Genesis1:1 Modimo o tlhodile legodimo le lefatshe mo tshimologong. 
Genesis1:2 Lefatshe la bo le tobekanye, le se na sepe, go le lefifi godimo ga bodiba; Mowa wa Modimo o kala mo godimo ga metsi." 
Genesis1:3 Modimo wa re: “A go nne lesedi!” Mme lesedi la nna teng. 
Genesis1:4 Modimo wa bona lesedi fa le le molemo. Ke fa Modimo o kgaoganya lesedi le lefifi," 
Genesis1:5 wa bitsa lesedi “Motshegare”, lefifi lone wa le bitsa “Bosigo”. Mme ga nna mantsiboa, ga ba ga nna moso, e le letsatsi la ntlha." 
Genesis1:6 Modimo wa ba wa re: “A go nne loapi fa gare ga metsi! A lo kgaoganye metsi.” Mme ga dirafala jalo. 
Genesis1:7 Modimo wa dira loapi go kgaoganya metsi a a kwa tlase ga loapi le metsi a a kwa godimo ga loapi. 
Genesis1:8 Modimo wa bitsa loapi “Legodimo”. Mme ga nna mantsiboa, ga ba ga nna moso, e le letsatsi la bobedi." 
Genesis1:9 Modimo wa ba wa re: “A metsi a a kwa tlase ga legodimo a phuthegele kwa felong go le gongwe gore go bonale mmu o o omileng.” Mme ga dirafala jalo. 
Genesis1:10 Modimo wa bitsa mmu o o omileng “Lefatshe”, phuthegelo ya metsi yona wa e bitsa “Lewatle”. Modimo wa bona, fa go le molemo." 
Genesis1:11 Modimo wa ba wa re: “A lefatshe le tlhoge botala jo bonana, e bong merogo e e nang le peo le ditlhare tse di ungwang maungo mo lefatsheng ka fa mefuteng ya tsona, a peo ya tsona e leng mo teng ga one.” Mme ga dirafala jalo." 
Genesis1:12 Ke fa lefatshe le tlhoga botala jo bonana, e bong merogo e e nang le peo ka fa mefuteng ya yona, le ditlhare tse di ungwang maungo ka fa mefuteng ya tsona a peo ya tsona e leng mo teng ga ona. Modimo wa bona, fa go le molemo." 
Genesis1:13 Mme ga nna mantsiboa, ga ba ga nna moso, e le letsatsi la boraro." 
Genesis1:14 Modimo wa ba wa re: “A go nne masedi mo loaping lwa legodimo a a kgaoganyang motshegare le bosigo, a a dirang ditshupo le dipaka tse di laotsweng le malatsi le dinyaga." 
Genesis1:15 A e nne masedi mo loaping lwa legodimo a a bonesang lefatshe.” Mme ga dirafala jalo. 
Genesis1:16 Modimo wa dira masedi a magolo a le mabedi; lesedi le legolo e le le le laolang motshegare; lesedi le lebotlana e le le le laolang bosigo; le dinaledi wa di dira. 
Genesis1:17 Modimo wa a baya mo loaping lwa legodimo gore a bonese lefatshe," 
Genesis1:18 a laole motshegare le bosigo, a kgaoganye lesedi le lefifi. Modimo wa bona, fa go le molemo." 
Genesis1:19 Mme ga nna mantsiboa, ga ba ga nna moso, e le letsatsi la bone." 
Genesis1:20 Modimo wa ba wa re: “A go nyeule bontsi jwa dilonyana tse di phelang mo metsing; le dinonyane di fofe kwa godimo ga lefatshe fa tlase ga loapi lwa legodimo!” 
Genesis1:21 Modimo wa tlhola maruarua le dilo tsotlhe tse di phelang tse di itshikinyang, tse di nyeulang mo metsing ka fa mefuteng ya tsona, le dinonyane tsotlhe tsa mafofa ka fa mefuteng ya tsona. Modimo wa bona, fa go le molemo." 
Genesis1:22 Le gona wa di tshegofatsa wa re: “Atang lo ntsifale lo tlale mo metsing a lewatle! Le dinonyane a di ate mo lefatsheng!” 
Genesis1:23 Mme ga nna mantsiboa ga ba ga nna moso, e le letsatsi la botlhano." 
Genesis1:24 Modimo wa ba wa re: “A lefatshe le ntshe diphedi ka fa mefuteng ya tsona, e leng diruiwa le digagabi le diphologolo tsa naga ka fa mefuteng ya tsona.” Mme ga dirafala jalo." 
Genesis1:25 Modimo wa dira diphologolo tsa naga ka fa mefuteng ya tsona le diruiwa ka fa mefuteng ya tsona le digagabi tsotlhe tsa naga ka fa mefuteng ya tsona. Modimo wa bona, fa go le molemo." 
Genesis1:26 Modimo wa fela o re: “A re direng batho ka fa setshwanong sa rona ba ba tshwanang le rona gore ba laole ditlhapi tsa lewatle le dinonyane tsa legodimo le diruiwa le lefatshe lotlhe le dilo tsotlhe tse di gagabang fa fatshe.” 
Genesis1:27 Jaanong Modimo wa tlhola batho ka fa setshwanong sa ona, wa ba tlhola ka fa setshwanong sa Modimo; wa ba tlhola e le monna le mosadi." 
Genesis1:28 Modimo wa ba tshegofatsa, Modimo wa ba raya wa re: “Atang lo ntsifale, lo tlale ka lefatshe, lo le laole, lo buse ditlhapi tsa lewatle le dinonyane tsa legodimo le diphedi tsotlhe tse di gagabang fa fatshe.”" 
Genesis1:29 Modimo wa ba wa re: “Bonang, ditlhogi tsotlhe tse di nang le peo tse di mo lefatsheng lotlhe le ditlhare tsotlhe tsa maungo a a nang le peo ke di lo naya gore e nne dijo tsa lona." 
Genesis1:30 Mme fa e le diphedi tsotlhe tsa lefatshe le dinonyane tsotlhe tsa legodimo le dilo tsotlhe tse di gagabang fa fatshe tse di nang le mowa wa bophelo tsona ke di naya ditlhogi tsotlhe tse ditala go nna dijo tsa tsona.” Mme ga nna jalo. 
Genesis1:31 Jaanong Modimo wa leba dilo tsotlhe tse o di dirileng, wa fitlhela di le molemo thata. Mme ga nna mantsiboa ga ba ga nna moso, e le letsatsi la borataro." 
Genesis2:1 Go ne ga wediwa legodimo le lefatshe jalo le masomo otlhe a a mo go tsona. 
Genesis2:2 Ka letsatsi la bosupa Modimo o ne wa wetsa tiro ya ona e o e dirileng; wa ikhutsa ka letsatsi la bosupa, o sena go fetsa tiro yotlhe ya ona e o e dirileng." 
Genesis2:3 Mme Modimo wa tshegofatsa letsatsi la bosupa, wa le itshepisa; ka gonne Modimo o ne wa ikhutsa ka lone o sena go fetsa tiro yotlhe ya ona e o e tlhodileng ka go e dira." 
Genesis2:4 Ditirafalo tsa legodimo le lefatshe, fa di tlholwa, ke tse: E rile ka motlha o Morena Modimo o dirileng lefatshe le legodimo ka ona" 
Genesis2:5 ga bo go ise go nne ditlhatshana dipe tsa naga mo lefatsheng, go ise go mele botala bope jwa naga; ka gonne Morena Modimo o ne o ise o nese pula mo lefatsheng; le gona go se na motho yo o ka lemang naga." 
Genesis2:6 Fela ga tla mouwane mo lefatsheng, wa kolobisa mmu otlhe wa naga." 
Genesis2:7 Ke fa Morena Modimo o bopa motho ka lerole la mmu, o budulela mowa wa bophelo mo dinkong tsa gagwe; motho a nna mophedi jalo." 
Genesis2:8 Jaanong Morena Modimo wa dira tshimo kwa Etene mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, wa baya motho teng yo o mmopileng." 
Genesis2:9 Morena Modimo wa tlhogisa ditlhare tsa mefutafuta teng, di medile mo lefatsheng, e le tse di eletsegang mo matlhong, tse di monate go jewa. Setlhare sa bophelo sa bo se le fa gare ga tshimo mmogo le setlhare sa kitso ya molemo le bosula." 
Genesis2:10 Noka ya bo e tswa mo Etene go nosa tshimo eo; fa e sena go tswa teng, ya kgaogana, ya nna dinoka di le nne." 
Genesis2:11 Leina la ya ntlha ke Phišone; ke yona e e potologang lefatshe lotlhe la Hawila kwa gouta e leng teng. 
Genesis2:12 Gouta ya lefatshe leo ga e a pekwa; teng go na le boroku jwa bedula le majwe a a tlhokegang a šohama. 
Genesis2:13 Leina la noka ya bobedi ke Kihone; ke yona e e potologang lefatshe lotlhe la Ethiopia. 
Genesis2:14 Leina la noka ya boraro ke Hitekele; ke yona e e elang mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Asiria. Noka ya bone ke Ferathe. 
Genesis2:15 Morena Modimo o ne wa tsaya motho, wa mmaya mo tshimong ya Etene gore a e leme, a e dise." 
Genesis2:16 Morena Modimo wa laela motho wa re: “O ka ja mo ditlhareng tsotlhe tsa tshimo ka kgololesego. 
Genesis2:17 Fela setlhare sa kitso ya molemo le bosula sona o se ka wa se ja! Gonne ka letsatsi le o se jang, o tlile go swa.”" 
Genesis2:18 Le gona Morena Modimo wa re: “Ga go molemo fa motho a nna a le nosi fela; ke tla mo direla mothusi yo o mo tshwanetseng.” 
Genesis2:19 Jaanong e rile Morena Modimo o sena go bopa diphedi tsotlhe tsa naga le dinonyane tsotlhe tsa legodimo, wa di isa kwa mothong go bona, ka fa a tla di bitsang ka teng gore mafoko otlhe a motho o tla bitsang diphedi ka ona, e nne maina a tsona." 
Genesis2:20 Diruiwa tsotlhe le dinonyane tsotlhe tsa legodimo le diphologolo tsotlhe tsa naga motho a di taya maina, mme motho a bo a se na mothusi yo o mo tshwanetseng." 
Genesis2:21 Ke fa Morena Modimo o thulametsa motho; ya re a sena go robala, wa ntsha longwe lwa dikgopo tsa gagwe, wa thiba ka nama, fa lo duleng teng." 
Genesis2:22 Mme logopo loo Morena Modimo o lo ntshitseng mo mothong wa bopa mosadi ka lone, wa mo isa kwa mothong." 
Genesis2:23 Ke fa motho a re: “Ahee! Kana yo ke lesapo la marapo a me le nama ya nama ya me; ene yo o tla bidiwa monnagadi, gonne o ntshitswe mo monneng.”" 
Genesis2:24 Ke ka moo monna a tla tlogelang rraagwe le mmaagwe, a ngaparela mosadi wa gagwe; mme ba tla nna nama e le nngwe fela." 
Genesis2:25 Motho le mosadi wa gagwe ba bo ba sa ikatega ka bobedi jwa bone, mme ba se na ditlhong." 
Genesis3:1 Noga e ne e feta diphologolo tsotlhe tsa naga ka boferefere tse Morena Modimo o di dirileng; ya botsa mosadi ya re: “A ruri Modimo o buile wa re: ‘Lo se ka lwa ja ditlhare dipe tsa tshimo’?” 
Genesis3:2 Ke fa mosadi a araba noga a re: “Go tilwe, re je maungo a ditlhare tsa tshimo." 
Genesis3:3 Fela Modimo o buile ka ga maungo a setlhare se se fa gare ga tshimo wa re: ‘Lo se ka lwa a ja le e seng go a ama, e se re gongwe lwa swa.’ ”" 
Genesis3:4 Mme noga ya raya mosadi ya re: “Nnyaya, ga lo kitla lo swa!" 
Genesis3:5 Kana Modimo o itse gore motlhang lo a jang, matlho a lona a tla buduloga, lo tshwana le Modimo, lo itse molemo le bosula.”" 
Genesis3:6 Ke fa mosadi a bona gore setlhare seo se molemo go ka jewa, le gona se kgatlha matlho; setlhare seo se eletsega ka ntlha ya go tlhalefisa motho. A ba a tsaya maungo a sona, a ja, a naya le monna wa gagwe yo o neng a na nae, mme le ene a ja." 
Genesis3:7 Ya baa gona matlho a bone a budulogang, ba lemoga gore ga ba a tswala; ba rokaganya matlhare a mofeie, ba itirela ditswalo." 
Genesis3:8 Jaanong ya re ba utlwa mokgwasa wa Morena Modimo o sepela mo tshimong go le phefo ya mantsiboa, motho le mosadi wa gagwe ba tshaba sefatlhego sa Morena Modimo, ba iphitlha mo teng ga ditlhare tsa tshimo." 
Genesis3:9 Ke fa Morena Modimo o bitsa motho, o mo raya o re: “O fa kae?”" 
Genesis3:10 Ene a re: “Ke utlwile mokgwasa wa gago mo tshimong, jaanong ka boifa, ka ke ne ke sa ikatega, ka ba ka iphitlha.”" 
Genesis3:11 Morena a fetola a re: “Ke mang yo o go boleletseng gore ga o a ikatega? A kampo o jele setlhare se ke go laetseng ka re: O se ka wa se ja?” 
Genesis3:12 Motho a re: “Mosadi yo ò mo nneileng gore a nne le nna ke ene yo o mphileng leungo la setlhare seo, ka ja.”" 
Genesis3:13 Morena Modimo wa botsa mosadi wa re: “Ke eng se o se dirileng?” Mosadi a re: “Noga e ntsieditse, mo ke bileng ka ja.”" 
Genesis3:14 Ke fa Morena Modimo o raya noga o re: “E re ka o dirile jalo o hutsitswe mo diruiweng tsotlhe le mo diphologolong tsotlhe tsa naga. O tla gwapa ka mpa, o ja lerole ka malatsi otlhe a bophelo jwa gago." 
Genesis3:15 Le gona ke tla baya letlhoo fa gare ga gago le mosadi le fa gare ga losika lwa gago le losika lwa gagwe; lone lo tla go tšhwetla tlhogo, mme wena o tla lo loma serethe.”" 
Genesis3:16 Morena a raya mosadi a re: “Ke tla go ntsifaletsa ditapisego thata, fa o ithwele; o tla belega bana ka botlhoko, o tla tlhologelelwa monna wa gago, mme ene o tla go laola.”" 
Genesis3:17 A raya Atame a re: “E re ka o utlwile lentswe la mosadi wa gago, wa ja setlhare se ke go laetseng ka re: ‘O se ka wa se ja!’ masimo a hutsitswe ka ntlha ya gago. O tla ja tsa ona ka matsapa ka malatsi otlhe a bophelo jwa gago." 
Genesis3:18 A tla go tlhogela mitlwa le ngwang; o tla ja merogo ya naga. 
Genesis3:19 O tla ja dijo ka mofufutso wa sefatlhego sa gago go fitlhelela o boela kwa mmung, gonne o ntshitswe mo go ona; o lerole, mme o tla boela leroleng.”" 
Genesis3:20 Motho a taya mosadi wa gagwe leina la Efa; gonne ke ene mma-baphedi botlhe. 
Genesis3:21 Morena Modimo wa direla motho le mosadi wa gagwe diaparo tsa matlalo, wa di ba apesa." 
Genesis3:22 Jaanong Morena Modimo wa re: “Bonang, motho o fetogile, o tshwana le rona ka go itse molemo le bosula. Jaanong a a se ka a ntsha letsogo, a fula le maungo a setlhare sa bophelo, a a ja, a tloga a phela ka bosakhutleng!”" 
Genesis3:23 Ke ka moo Morena Modimo o mo ntshitseng mo tshimong ya Etene gore a ye go lema mmu o a ntshitsweng mo go ona; 
Genesis3:24 wa leleka motho, wa baya boKerubime mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya tshimo ya Etene, ba nna le tšhaka ya molelo e e kgadikang go disa tsela e e yang kwa setlhareng sa bophelo." 
Genesis4:1 Atame o ne a itse Efa, mosadi wa gagwe; ke fa a nna moimana, a belega Kaine a re: “Ke bonye monna ka thuso ya Morena.”" 
Genesis4:2 A boela a belega Abele monnawe. Abele a nna modisa wa dinku, Kaine a nna molemi wa masimo." 
Genesis4:3 Ya re malatsi mangwe a sena go feta, Kaine a tlisa maungo a masimo, a direla Morena tshupelo." 
Genesis4:4 Abele le ene a tlisa tsa maitibolo a dinku tsa gagwe le mafura a tsona. Mme Morena a itumelela Abele le setlhabelo sa gagwe. 
Genesis4:5 Fela a se ka a itumelela Kaine le tshupelo ya gagwe. Ke fa Kaine a galefa thata, a gagabisa matlho." 
Genesis4:6 Mme Morena a botsa Kaine a re: “O galefetseng? O gagabisetsang matlho? 
Genesis4:7 A ga ke re, fa o dira sentle, o ka tsholetsa sefatlhego, mme fa o sa dire sentle, boleo bo lalela fa mojako, bo go tlhologeletswe, mme wena o bo laole.”" 
Genesis4:8 Mme Kaine a bua le Abele monnawe; ya re ba le kwa nageng, Kaine a tsogela Abele monnawe, a mmolaya." 
Genesis4:9 Ke fa Morena a botsa Kaine a re: “Abele monnao o kae?” Ene a re: “Ga ke itse. A ke modisa wa ga nnake?” 
Genesis4:10 Mme Morena a re: “O dirileng? Lentswe la madi a ga monnao le ntlhaeletsa, le tswa mo mmung." 
Genesis4:11 Jaanong o hutsitswe, o lelekilwe mo nageng e e atlhamolotseng legano go amogela madi a ga monnao a a tsholotsweng ke diatla tsa gago." 
Genesis4:12 Fa o lema masimo, ga a kitla a tlhola a go ntshetsa dijo ka fa nonofong ya ona; o tla nna mofaladi le motshabi mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis4:13 Ke fa Kaine a raya Morena a re: “Molato wa me o mogolo go feta o o ka itshwarelwang. 
Genesis4:14 Bona, kajeno o nteleka mo nageng e; ke tla iphitlha, ke tshaba sefatlhego sa gago; ke tla nna mofaladi le motshabi mo lefatsheng. Mongwe le mongwe yo o mponang o tla mpolaya.”" 
Genesis4:15 Mme Morena a mo raya a re: “Nnyaya, mongwe le mongwe yo o go bolayang, Kaine, o tla busolosiwa gasupa.” Morena a ba a baya lotshwao mo go Kaine gore a se ka a bolawa ke ope yo o mmonang." 
Genesis4:16 Ke fa Kaine a tloga fa pele ga sefatlhego sa Morena, a ya go nna kwa lefatsheng la Note mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Etene." 
Genesis4:17 Kaine o ne a itse mosadi wa gagwe a nna moimana, a belega Henoge; a ba a aga motse, a o taya leina la Henoge, a o teelela morwawe." 
Genesis4:18 Henoge a belegelwa Irate; Irate a tsala Mehuyaele; Mehuyaele a tsala Methusaele; Methusaele a tsala Lamege. 
Genesis4:19 Lamege a tsaya basadi ba le babedi; leina la mongwe e le Ata, leina la yo mongwe e le Sila." 
Genesis4:20 Ata a belega Jabale; ke ene rraabone ba ba neng ba nna mo ditenteng, e le barui ba dikgomo." 
Genesis4:21 Leina la ga monnawe ke Jubale; ke ene rraabone botlhe ba be neng ba letsa dirankure le ditlhaka. 
Genesis4:22 Sila le ene a belega, a tshola Thubale-Kaine; a nna mothudi wa dilo tsa mefutafuta tsa kgotlho le tsa tshipi. Kgaitsadia Thubale-Kaine e ne e le Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Lamege o ne a raya basadi ba gagwe a re: “Ata le Sila, utlwang lentswe la me; lona basadi ba ga Lamege, reetsang mafoko a me: Ruri, ke tla bolaya monna yo o ka nntshang ntho, le lekau le le ka nkhutlang." 
Genesis4:24 Gonne Kaine o tla busolosiwa gasupa, mme Lamege ene ga masome a a supang le bosupa.”" 
Genesis4:25 Atame a ba a itse mosadi wa gagwe gape; a belega morwa, a mo taya leina la Sethe. Gonne a re: “Modimo o mphile ngwana yo mongwe mo boemong jwa ga Abele yo Kaine o mmolaileng.”" 
Genesis4:26 Sethe le ene a belegelwa morwa, a mo taya leina la Enose. Metlheng eo ba simolola go bitsa leina la Morena." 
Genesis5:1 Tlhatlologano ya losika lwa ga Atame ke e: Ka letsatsi le Modimo o tlhodileng Atame ka lone, o ne wa mo dira ka fa setshwanong sa Modimo." 
Genesis5:2 O tlhodile monna le mosadi, wa ba tshegofatsa, wa ba bitsa “Batho” ka letsatsi le ba tlhodilweng ka lone." 
Genesis5:3 E rile Atame a le dinyaga di le 130, a tsala morwa yo o tshwanang nae ka fa setshwanong sa gagwe, a mo taya leina la Sethe." 
Genesis5:4 Malatsi a ga Atame, a sena go tsala Sethe, ke dinyaga di le 800, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis5:5 Malatsi otlhe a Atame o a phedileng ke dinyaga di le 930; ke fa a swa. 
Genesis5:6 Ya re Sethe a sena go phela dinyaga di le 105, a tsala Enose." 
Genesis5:7 Mme ya re Sethe a sena go tsala Enose, a phela dinyaga di le 807, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis5:8 Malatsi otlhe a ga Sethe ke dinyaga di le 912; ke fa a swa. 
Genesis5:9 Ya re Enose a sena go phela dinyaga di le 90, a tsala Kenane." 
Genesis5:10 Mme ya re Enose a sena go tsala Kenane, a phela dinyaga di le 815, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis5:11 Malatsi otlhe a ga Enose ke dinyaga di le 905; ke fa a swa. 
Genesis5:12 Ya re Kenane a sena go phela dinyaga di le 70, a tsala Mahalalele." 
Genesis5:13 Mme ya re Kenane a sena go tsala Mahalalele, a phela dinyaga di le 840, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis5:14 Malatsi otlhe a ga Kenane ke dinyaga di le 910; ke fa a swa. 
Genesis5:15 Ya re Mahalalele a sena go phela dinyaga di le 65, a tsala Jarete." 
Genesis5:16 Mme ya re Mahalalele a sena go tsala Jarete, a phela dinyaga di le 830, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis5:17 Malatsi otlhe a ga Mahalalele ke dinyaga di le 895; ke fa a swa. 
Genesis5:18 Ya re Jarete a sena go phela dinyaga di le 162, a tsala Henoge." 
Genesis5:19 Mme ya re Jarete a sena go tsala Henoge, a phela dinyaga di le 800, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis5:20 Malatsi otlhe a ga Jarete ke dinyaga di le 962; ke fa a swa. 
Genesis5:21 Ya re Henoge a sena go phela dinyaga di le 65 a tsala Methusala. 
Genesis5:22 Mme ya re Henoge a sena go tsala Methusala, a sepela le Modimo dinyaga di le 300, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis5:23 Malatsi otlhe a ga Henoge ke dinyaga di le 365. 
Genesis5:24 Henoge o ne a phela le Modimo; ke fa a sa tlhole a bonala, gonne Modimo o mo tsere." 
Genesis5:25 Ya re Methusala a sena go phela dinyaga di le 187, a tsala Lamege." 
Genesis5:26 Mme ya re Methusala a sena go tsala Lamege, a phela dinyaga di le 782, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis5:27 Malatsi otlhe a ga Methusala ke dinyaga di le 969; ke fa a swa. 
Genesis5:28 Ya re Lamege a sena go phela dinyaga di le 182 a tsala morwa," 
Genesis5:29 a mo taya leina la Noa a re: “Yo, o tla re gomotsa mo tirong ya rona le mo matsapeng a diatla tsa rona kwa masimong a Morena o a hutsitseng.”" 
Genesis5:30 Mme ya re Lamege a sena go tsala. Noa, a phela dinyaga di le 595, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis5:31 Malatsi otlhe a ga Lamege ke dinyaga di le 777; ke fa a swa. 
Genesis5:32 Ya re Noa a le dinyaga di le 500, a tsala Seme le Hame le Jafethe." 
Genesis6:1 E rile batho ba simolola go ata mo lefatsheng le go tsalelwa bomorwadi," 
Genesis6:2 bomorwa Modimo ba bona bomorwadia batho, fa ba le bantle, ba tsaya basadi mo go bona botlhe ba ba ba ratang." 
Genesis6:3 Ke fa Morena a re: “Mowa wa me ga o kitla o busa mo mothong ka bosakhutleng, gonne le ene ke nama. A malatsi a gagwe e nne dinyaga di le 120 fela.”" 
Genesis6:4 Mo malatsing ao ga bo go le mekaloba mo lefatsheng; le gona morago ga moo, fa bomorwa Modimo ba kopana le bomorwadia batho, ba ba tshodisa bana. Bona bao ke bagale ba bogologolo, ke banna bale ba ba tumileng." 
Genesis6:5 Jaanong ya re Morena a bona bosula jwa batho bo le bogolo le maano otlhe a dikakanyo tsa dipelo tsa bone a le bosula fela ka metlha yotlhe," 
Genesis6:6 ke fa Morena a ikwatlhaya, ka a dirile batho mo lefatsheng, a hutsafala mo pelong ya gagwe." 
Genesis6:7 Jaanong Morena a re: “Ke tla nyeletsa batho ba ke ba tlhodileng, ke ba tlosa mo lefatsheng; bone batho le diruiwa le digagabi le dinonyane tsa legodimo; gonne ke ikwatlhaya, ka ke ba dirile.”" 
Genesis6:8 Mme Noa ene a bona bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a Morena. 
Genesis6:9 Tsa bophelo jwa ga Noa ke tse: Noa e ne e le monna yo o siameng, a se na molato mo bathong ba metlha ya gagwe; Noa o ne a sepela le Modimo." 
Genesis6:10 A tsala bomorwa ba le bararo, e bong Seme le Hame le Jafethe." 
Genesis6:11 Lefatshe la bo le senyegile fa pele ga Modimo; lefatshe le tletse boithatelo jo bo setlhogo. 
Genesis6:12 Ke fa Modimo o leba lefatshe, o fitlhela le senyegile; gonne batho botlhe ba ne ba sentse setho sa bone mo lefatsheng." 
Genesis6:13 Mme Modimo wa raya Noa wa re: “Bofelo jwa batho botlhe bo tlile fa pele ga me. Gonne lefatshe le tletse tshiamololo e ba e dirang. Ka moo ke tla ba senya, ke ba tlosa mo lefatsheng." 
Genesis6:14 Itirele mokoro o mogolo ka dikgong tsa paina, o dire matlwana mo mokorong oo, o o thibe ka boka ka fa teng le ka fa ntle." 
Genesis6:15 O o dire jaana: Boleele jwa mokoro oo e nne mabogo a le 300; boatlhamo jwa ona e nne mabogo a le 50; bogodimo jwa ona e nne mabogo a le 30. 
Genesis6:16 O direle mokoro oo fenstere ya boleele jwa letsogo kwa godimo mo tikologong. “Setswalo sa mokoro oo o se tsenye mo lotlhakoreng lwa ona. O dire matlwana a a kwa tlase le a a fa gare le a a kwa godimo mo go ona. 
Genesis6:17 Gonne ke tla tlisa morwalela wa metsi mo lefatsheng, e le go senya nama yotlhe e mowa wa bophelo o leng mo go yona fa tlase ga letsatsi; tsotlhe tse di mo lefatsheng di tla swa." 
Genesis6:18 Mme wena ke tla dira kgolagano nao e e tlhomameng; o tla tsena mo mokorong oo, wena le bomorwao le mosadi wa gago le basadi ba bomorwao, ba na nao." 
Genesis6:19 Le gona o tsenye bobedi le bobedi jwa dilo tsotlhe tse di phelang tsa nama yotlhe tsa mofuta mongwe le mongwe mo mokorong oo, e le go di phedisa nao. A e nne e tonanyana le e namagadi." 
Genesis6:20 A di le pedi tsa mefuta yotlhe ya dinonyane le tsa mefuta yotlhe ya diruiwa le tsa mefuta yotlhe ya digagabi tse di mo lefatsheng di tsene le wena go bolokelwa bophelo. 
Genesis6:21 O be o itseele dijo tsa mefutafuta tse di jewang, o di phuthele kwa go wena gore e nne dijo tsa gago le tsa tsona.”" 
Genesis6:22 Noa a dira tsotlhe ka fa Modimo o mo laetseng ka teng. 
Genesis7:1 Jaanong Morena a raya Noa a re: “Tsena mo mokorong, wena le ba lapa la gago botlhe; gonne ke go bonye o le mosiami mo gare ga ba metlha eno." 
Genesis7:2 Tsaya tse ditonanyana tse supa le tse dinamagadi tse supa tsa mefuta yotlhe ya diphedi tse di itshekileng; gape o tseye e tonanyana le e namagadi ya mefuta yotlhe ya diphedi se di sa itshekang; 
Genesis7:3 le gona mo mefuteng yotlhe ya dinonyane tsa legodimo o tseye tse ditonanyana tse supa le tse dinamagadi tse supa, e le go boloka losika lwa tsona mo lefatsheng lotlhe." 
Genesis7:4 Gonne e tla re malatsi a supa a sena go feta, ke nese pula mo lefatsheng malatsi a le 40 le masigo a le 40; ke tla nyeletsa tsotlhe tse di phelang tse ke di dirileng, ke di tlosa mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis7:5 Noa a dira tsotlhe ka fa Morena a mo laetseng ka teng. 
Genesis7:6 Noa o ne a le dinyaga di le 600, fa metsi a morwalela a tla mo lefatsheng." 
Genesis7:7 Noa a tsena mo mokorong a na le bomorwawe le mosadi wa gagwe le betsi ba gagwe, metsi a morwalela a ise a tle." 
Genesis7:8 Diphedi tse di itshekileng le diphedi tse di sa itshekang le dinonyane le tsotlhe tse di gagabang fa fatshe 
Genesis7:9 tsa tla kwa go Noa ka bobedi le bobedi, tsa tsena mo mokorong, e tonanyana le e namagadi, jaaka Modimo o laetse Noa." 
Genesis7:10 Ya re malatsi a supa a sena go feta, metsi a morwalela a tla mo lefatsheng." 
Genesis7:11 Ka ngwaga wa 600 wa bophelo jwa ga Noa, ka kgwedi ya bobedi, ka letsatsi la some supa; ka lone letsatsi leo ga phunyega metswedi yotlhe ya madiba a magolo, ga bulega maroba a legodimo." 
Genesis7:12 Pula ya tshologela mo lefatsheng malatsi a le 40 le masigo a le 40. 
Genesis7:13 Ka lone letsatsi leo Noa a tsena mo mokorong le bomorwa Noa Seme le Hame le Jafethe le mosadi wa ga Noa le basadi ba le bararo, e bong betsi ba gagwe." 
Genesis7:14 E ne e le bone le mefuta yotlhe ya diphologolo le mefuta yotlhe ya diruiwa le mefuta yotlhe ya digagabi tse di gagabang fa fatshe le mefuta yotlhe ya dinonyane ka fa mebaleng ya mafofa a tsona. 
Genesis7:15 Tsa tsena kwa go Noa mo mokorong, e le bobedi le bobedi jwa nama yotlhe e mowa wa bophelo o leng mo go yona." 
Genesis7:16 Tse di tsenyeng e ne e le e tonanyana le e namagadi tsa nama yotlhe, jaaka Modimo o mo laetse. Ya re a sena go tsena natso, Morena a tswala." 
Genesis7:17 Ke fa morwalela o tla mo lefatsheng malatsi a le 40; metsi a nna a golela godimo, a tsholetsa mokoro, wa tlhatloga wa katoga lefatshe." 
Genesis7:18 Metsi a kokomoga, a nna magolo thata mo lefatsheng; mokoro ole wa kokobala mo godimo ga metsi." 
Genesis7:19 Metsi a kokomoga thata thata mo lefatsheng, mo a bileng a khurumetsa dithaba tsotlhe tse dikgolo tse di fa tlase ga legodimo lotlhe." 
Genesis7:20 Metsi a nna magolo, a khurumetsa dithaba, a di feta ka mabogo a le some tlhano." 
Genesis7:21 Ke fa go swa nama yotlhe e e itshikinyang mo lefatsheng, e bong dinonyane le diruiwa le diphologolo le tsotlhe tse di gagabang fa fatshe le batho botlhe." 
Genesis7:22 Tsotlhe tse di neng di na le mowa wa bophelo mo dinkong tsa tsona, tsotlhe tse di neng di le fa go omileng tsa swa." 
Genesis7:23 Modimo wa nyeletsa jalo diphedi tsotlhe tse di mo lefatsheng, e leng batho le diruiwa le digagabi le dinonyane tsa legodimo, tsa fedisiwa mo lefatsheng; ga bolokega Noa fela le tse di neng di na nae mo mokorong." 
Genesis7:24 Metsi a bo a le magolo mo lefatsheng malatsi a le 150. 
Genesis8:1 Jaanong Modimo wa gopola Noa le diphologolo tsotlhe le diruiwa tsotlhe tse di neng di na nae mo mokorong. Modimo wa fokisa phefo mo lefatsheng, mme metsi a ngotlega." 
Genesis8:2 Ga thibala metswedi ya madiba le maroba a legodimo; le pula e e tswang kwa legodimong ya kgaotsa. 
Genesis8:3 Metsi a nna a boa, a fokotsega mo lefatsheng; ya re malatsi a le 150 a sena go feta, metsi a nna a ngotlega." 
Genesis8:4 Ka kgwedi ya bosupa, ka letsatsi la some supa la kgwedi, mokoro wa nna mo thabeng ya Ararate." 
Genesis8:5 Metsi a nna a ngotlegela pele go ya kgweding ya some; ka la ntlha la kgwedi ya some ga bonala ditlhoa tsa dithaba. 
Genesis8:6 Ya re malatsi a le 40 a sena go feta gape, Noa a bula fenstere ya mokoro e a e dirileng," 
Genesis8:7 a ntsha legakabe; lone la tswa, la boaboa go ya metsi a ba a tšhe mo lefatsheng." 
Genesis8:8 A ba a ntsha leeba, la tloga mo go ene, e le gore a bone, fa metsi a ngotlegile mo lefatsheng." 
Genesis8:9 Ya re ka leeba le sa bone le fa e le bogato jwa lonao, la boela kwa go ene mo mokorong; gonne metsi a ne a sa ntse a le mo lefatsheng lotlhe. Ke fa a ntsha letsogo, a le tsaya, a le busetsa kwa go ene mo mokorong." 
Genesis8:10 Ya re a sena go leta malatsi a supa a mangwe, a ntsha leeba gape mo mokorong." 
Genesis8:11 Leeba leo la boela kwa go ene ka nako ya mantsiboa, la tla le tshotse letlhare le lešwa la setlhare sa olefa ka molomo. Ke fa Noa a lemoga gore metsi a ngotlegile mo lefatsheng." 
Genesis8:12 A leta malatsi a supa gape, a boela a ntsha leeba, mme lone la se ka la boela gape kwa go ene." 
Genesis8:13 Ka letsatsi la ntlha la kgwedi ya ntlha ya ngwaga wa 601 metsi a bo a tšhele mo lefatsheng. Ke fa Noa a tlosa thulelo ya mokoro a leba, a fitlhela lefatshe le omile." 
Genesis8:14 Ka letsatsi la 27 la kgwedi ya bobedi lefatshe la bo le omile. 
Genesis8:15 Ke fa Modimo o raya Noa o re: 
Genesis8:16 “Tswaa mo mokorong, wena le mosadi wa gago le bomorwao le betsi ba gago." 
Genesis8:17 Diphedi tsotlhe tse di nang nao tsa mefutafuta, e bong dinonyane le diruiwa le digagabi tsotlhe tse di gagabang fa fatshe, tswaa natso gore di itsamaele mo lefatsheng, di ate, di ntsifale mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis8:18 Ke fa Noa a tswa le bomorwawe le mosadi wa gagwe le betsi ba gagwe. 
Genesis8:19 Le diphologolo tsotlhe le diruiwa tsotlhe le dinonyane tsotlhe le digagabi tse di gagabang fa fatshe tsa tswa mo mokorong ka fa mefuteng ya tsona. 
Genesis8:20 Noa a ba a agela Morena aletare, a tsaya dingwe tsa diruiwa tsa mefutafuta tse di itshekileng le tsa dinonyane tsa mefutafuta tse di itshekileng, a dira ditlhabelo tsa phiso mo aletareng." 
Genesis8:21 Ke fa Morena a dupa monko o o monate, mme Morena a bua mo pelong ya gagwe a re: “Ga nkitla ke tlhola ke hutsa lefatshe gape ka ntlha ya motho; gonne dikakanyo tsa pelo ya motho di bosula go tswa bonyaneng jwa gagwe. Ga nkitla ke tlhola ke bolaya tsotlhe tse di phelang gape jaaka ke dirile." 
Genesis8:22 Ka metlha yotlhe ya lefatshe ga go kitla go khutla go jwala le go roba, le letsididi le mogote, le selemo le mariga, le motshegare le bosigo.”" 
Genesis9:1 Jaanong Modimo wa tshegofatsa Noa le bomorwawe, wa ba raya wa re: “Atang lo ntsifale lo tlale ka lefatshe!" 
Genesis9:2 A diphedi tsotlhe tsa lefatshe le dinonyane tsotlhe tsa legodimo di lo boife, di lo tshabe; di neetswe mo diatleng tsa lona mmogo le tsotlhe tse di gagabang fa fatshe le ditlhapi tsotlhe tsa lewatle." 
Genesis9:3 Tsotlhe tse di phelang e tla nna dijo tsa lona; ke di lo file tsotlhe fela jaaka ditlhogi tse ditala. 
Genesis9:4 Fela lo se ka lwa ja nama e e nang le bophelo jwa yona, e bong madi a yona." 
Genesis9:5 Mme madi a lona a e leng maphelo a lona ke tla a busolosetsa; ke tla a busolosetsa mo sebateng sengwe le sengwe le mo seatleng sa motho. Ke tla busolosetsa bophelo jwa motho mo seatleng sa motho-ka-ene. 
Genesis9:6 Yo o tshololang madi a motho, le ene madi a gagwe a tla tshololwa ke batho; gonne Modimo o dirile motho ka fa setshwanong sa ona." 
Genesis9:7 “Mme lona, atang lo ntsifale; farafarang mo lefatsheng, lo tlale mo go lone!”" 
Genesis9:8 Modimo wa raya Noa le bomorwawe wa re: 
Genesis9:9 “Bonang, ke tlhomamisa kgolagano ya me le lona le losika lwa lona morago ga lona;" 
Genesis9:10 ke e tlhomamisetsa le dilo tsotlhe tse di phelang tse di nang le lona; e bong dinonyane le diruiwa le diphologolo tsotlhe tsa lefatshe tse di nang le lona; le tsotlhe tse di duleng mo mokorong, e leng diphedi tsotlhe tsa lefatshe." 
Genesis9:11 Ke tlhomamisa kgolagano ya me le lona ka re: Ga go kitla go tlhola go nyelediwa nama epe ka metsi a morwalela; morwalela wa metsi ga o kitla o tlhola o nna teng gape go senya lefatshe.” 
Genesis9:12 Modimo wa ba wa re: “Sesupo sa kgolagano e e sa khutleng e ke e dirang fa gare ga me le lona le dilo tsotlhe tse di phelang tse di nang le lona ke se: 
Genesis9:13 Motshewabadimo wa me ke o beile mo marung gore e nne sesupo sa kgolagano fa gare ga me le lefatshe. 
Genesis9:14 Jaanong e tla ne e re fa ke kgobokanya maru kwa godimo ga lefatshe, motshewabadimo o bonale mo marung." 
Genesis9:15 Foo ke tla gopola kgolagano ya me e e leng teng fa gare ga me le lona le diphedi tsotlhe. Metsi ga a kitla a tlhola a nna morwalela o o senyang nama yotlhe. 
Genesis9:16 Jaanong e tla ne e re fa motshewabadimo o le mo marung, ke o lebe go ikgakolola kgolagano e e sa khutleng e e fa gare ga Modimo le mewa yotlhe e e phelang mo nameng yotlhe e e mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis9:17 Modimo wa raya Noa wa re: “Ke sona sesupo sa kgolagano e ke e tlhomamisitseng fa gare ga me le nama yotlhe e e mo lefatsheng.” 
Genesis9:18 Bomorwa Noa ba ba duleng mo mokorong ke Seme le Hame le Jafethe; mme Hame ke rraagwe Kanana. 
Genesis9:19 Ba bararo ba ke bona bomorwa Noa; batho botlhe ba ba mo lefatsheng ba tswa mo go bone. 
Genesis9:20 Jaanong Noa a simolola go nna molemi wa masimo; a dira tshimo ya moweine. 
Genesis9:21 Mme ya re a sena go nwa weine, a tlhapelwa, a robala mo tenteng ya gagwe a sa ikatega." 
Genesis9:22 Ke fa Hame rraagwe Kanana a bona bosaikatega jwa ga rraagwe, a ya a bolelela bomorwa-rraagwe ba babedi ka fa ntle." 
Genesis9:23 Mme Seme le Jafethe ba tsaya kobo, ba e baya mo magetleng a bone babedi, ba kata ka sa morago, ba bipa bosaikatega jwa ga rraabo, ba ntse ba fapositse difatlhego tsa bone gore ba se bone bosaikatega jwa ga rraabo." 
Genesis9:24 Mme ya re Noa a sena go tlhaphogelwa, a thanya, a utlwela se morwawe yo mmotlana a se mo diretseng," 
Genesis9:25 a bua a re: “A go hutsiwe Kanana; a a nne motlhanka wa batlhanka mo go bomorwa-rraagwe!” 
Genesis9:26 A ba a re: “A go bakwe Morena Modimo wa ga Seme, mme Kanana e nne motlhanka wa gagwe!" 
Genesis9:27 A Modimo o bulele Jafethe mafatshe, a a nne mo ditenteng tsa ga Seme, mme Kanana e nne motlhanka wa gagwe!”" 
Genesis9:28 Noa o phedile dinyaga di le 350 morago ga morwalela wa metsi. 
Genesis9:29 Malatsi otlhe a ga Noa ya nna dinyaga di le 950; ke fa a swa. 
Genesis10:1 Losika lwa bomorwa Noa Seme le Hame le Jafethe ke lo. Ba ne ba tsalelwa bomorwa morago ga morwalela wa metsi. 
Genesis10:2 Bomorwa Jafethe ke Gomere le Magogo le Matai le Jafane le Thubale le Mesege le Thirase. 
Genesis10:3 Bomorwa Gomere ke Asekenase le Rifathe le Thogarama. 
Genesis10:4 Bomorwa Jafane ke Elisa le Tharesise le Bakhithime le Badotane. 
Genesis10:5 Ditšhaba tse di anameng tsa dinaga tse di fa lewatleng di tswa mo go bao. Ke bone bomorwa Jafethe le mafatshe a bone le dipuo tsa bone le ditso tsa bone le ditšhaba tsa bone. 
Genesis10:6 Mme bomorwa Hame ke Khuše le Miseraime le Phute le Kanana. 
Genesis10:7 Bomorwa Khuše ke Seba le Hawila le Sabetha le Raema le Sabetheka; bomorwa Raema ke Šeba le Detane. 
Genesis10:8 Khuše a tsala Nimerote; ke ene mogale wa ntlha mo lefatsheng. 
Genesis10:9 E ne e le motsomi yo mogolo fa pele ga Morena; ke ka moo go a tleng go twe: “Mokete ke motsomi yo mogolo fa pele ga Morena jaaka Nimerote.” 
Genesis10:10 O simolotse go busa kwa Babele le Erege le Akate le Kalene mo nageng ya Sineare. 
Genesis10:11 A ba a tswa mo lefatsheng leo, a ya kwa Asiria, a aga Ninife le Rehobothe-Ire le Kalaga" 
Genesis10:12 le Resene, fa gare ga Ninife le Kalaga; ke ona motse o mogolo." 
Genesis10:13 Miseraime a tsala Baludi le Baanami le Balehabi le Banafethugi 
Genesis10:14 le Baphatharusi le Bakhaselugi le Bakhafethori ba Bafelesita ba duleng mo go bone. 
Genesis10:15 Kanana a tsala Sitone, morwawe wa ntlha, le Hethe" 
Genesis10:16 le Bajebusi le Baamori le Bagiregasi 
Genesis10:17 le Bahewi le Baareki le Basini 
Genesis10:18 le Baarwadi le Basemari le Bahamathe. Morago ga moo ditso tsa Bakanana tsa phatlalala. 
Genesis10:19 Naga ya Bakanana e ne e simologa kwa Sitone go ya go fitlha kwa Gerara le go ya kwa Gasa le go ya kwa Sotoma le Gomora le Atema le Seboime go fitlha kwa Leša. 
Genesis10:20 Ke bone bomorwa Hame ka fa ditsong tsa bone le dipuong tsa bone mo mafatsheng a bone le mo ditšhabeng tsa bone. 
Genesis10:21 Mme Seme, rraa-Bahebere botlhe, mogoloa Jafethe, le ene a tsalelwa bana." 
Genesis10:22 Bomorwa Seme ke Elame le Asure le Arephagasadi le Lute le Arame. 
Genesis10:23 Bomorwa Arame ke Use le Hule le Gethere le Maše. 
Genesis10:24 Mme Arephagasadi a tsala Sela; Sela a tsala Hebere. 
Genesis10:25 Hebere a tsalelwa bomorwa ba le babedi; leina la wa ntlha ke Phelege – gonne batho ba lefatshe ba ne ba kgaogana mo metlheng ya gagwe – leina la monnawe ke Jokotane. 
Genesis10:26 Jokotane a tsala Alemotate le Selefe le Hasaremawethe le Jera 
Genesis10:27 le Hatorame le Usale le Dikela 
Genesis10:28 le Obale le Abimaele le Šeba 
Genesis10:29 le Ofire le Hawila la Jobabe. Botlhe bao ke bomorwa Jokotane. 
Genesis10:29 le Ofire le Hawila la Jobabe. Botlhe bao ke bomorwa Jokotane. 
Genesis10:30 Ba ne ba agile go simolola kwa Meša go ya go fitlha kwa Sefare le kwa dithabeng tsa botlhabatsatsi. 
Genesis10:31 Ke bone bomorwa Seme ka fa ditsong tsa bone le ka fa dipuong tsa bone mo mafatsheng a bone ka fa ditšhabeng tsa bone. 
Genesis10:32 Ke tsona ditso tsa bomorwa Noa ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone mo ditšhabeng tsa bone. Ditšhaba tse di mo lefatsheng di dule mo go bone, tsa anama mo lefatsheng morago ga morwalela." 
Genesis11:1 Pele lefatshe lotlhe la bo le na le puo e le nngwe fela le mafoko a le mangwe fela. 
Genesis11:2 Mme ya re ba hudugela kwa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, ba fitlhela lebala mo lefatsheng la Sineare, ba aga teng." 
Genesis11:3 Ke fa ba raana ba re: “A re yeng re bope diekana, re di bese, di butswe!” Diekana tse e ne e le matlapa a bone, boka jwa mmu e le seretse sa bone sa go aga." 
Genesis11:4 Ba re: “Tlayang a re ikageleng motse le kago e e godimo e setlhoa sa yona se fitlhang kwa legodimong gore re itirele leina le le tumileng, e se re gongwe ra phatlalala mo lefatsheng lotlhe.”" 
Genesis11:5 Ke fa Morena a fologa gore a bone motse oo le kago e e godimo eo, tse batho ba di agang." 
Genesis11:6 Jaanong Morena a re: “Ruri, botlhe ke morafe o le mongwe fela wa puo e le nngwe fela. Selo se ke tshimologo ya tiro ya bone. Go tloga fa ga ba nke ba palelwa ke sepe se ba se akanyang." 
Genesis11:7 Tlayang a re fologeleng teng, re tlhakatlhakanye puo ya bone gore ba se ka ba utlwana ka puo.”" 
Genesis11:8 Morena a ba phatlalatsa fa ba ne ba le teng, a ba falaletsa kwa dinageng tsotlhe tsa lefatshe. Ba khutla jalo go aga motse oo." 
Genesis11:9 Ke ka moo o teilweng leina la Babele; gonne teng koo Morena o tlhakatlhakantse puo ya batho botlhe, Morena a ba falatsa le dinaga tsotlhe tsa lefatshe go tswa teng." 
Genesis11:10 Ba losika lwa ga Seme ke ba: Ya re Seme a le dinyaga di le 100, a tsala Arephagasadi, dinyaga di le pedi morago ga morwalela." 
Genesis11:11 Ya re Seme a sena go tsala Arephagasadi, a phela dinyaga di le 500, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis11:12 Arephagasadi o ne a phedile dinyaga di le 35 fa a tsala Sela. 
Genesis11:13 Mme ya re Arephagasadi a sena go tsala Sela, a phela dinyaga di le 403, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis11:14 Sela o ne a phedile dinyaga di le 30, fa a tsala Hebere." 
Genesis11:15 Mme ya re Sela a sena go tsala Hebere, a phela dinyaga di le 403, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis11:16 Hebere o ne a phedile dinyaga di le 34, fa a tsala Phelege." 
Genesis11:17 Mme ya re Hebere a sena go tsala Phelege, a phela dinyaga di le 430, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis11:18 Phelege o ne a phedile dinyaga di le 30 fa a tsala Rehu. 
Genesis11:19 Mme ya re Phelege a sena go tsala Rehu, a phela dinyaga di le 209, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis11:20 Rehu o ne a phedile dinyaga di le 32 fa a tsala Seruge. 
Genesis11:21 Mme ya re Rehu a sena go tsala Seruge, a phela dinyaga di le 207, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis11:22 Seruge o ne a phedile dinyaga di le 30 fa a tsala Nahore. 
Genesis11:23 Mme ya re Seruge a sena go tsala Nahore, a phela dinyaga di le 200, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis11:24 Nahore o ne a phedile dinyaga di le 29 fa a tsala Thara. 
Genesis11:25 Mme ya re Nahore a sena go tsala Thara, a phela dinyaga di le 119, a ntse a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi." 
Genesis11:26 Thara o ne a phedile dinyaga di le 70 fa a tsala Aborame le Nahore le Harane. 
Genesis11:27 Ba losika lwa ga Thara ke ba: Thara o ne a tsala Aborame le Nahore le Harane, Mme Harane a tsala Lote." 
Genesis11:28 Mme Harane a swa pele ga rraagwe mo lefatsheng le a tsaletsweng mo go lone, kwa motseng wa Ure wa Kalatea." 
Genesis11:29 Ke fa Aborame le Nahore ba tsaya basadi: Leina la mosadi wa ga Aborame ke Sarai; leina la mosadi wa ga Nahore ke Mileka, morwadia Harane, yo e leng rraagwe Mileka le Iseka." 
Genesis11:30 Sarai ene e ne e le moopa, a se na ngwana." 
Genesis11:31 Jaanong Thara a tsaya Aborame morwawe, le Lote morwa Harane, morwa morwawe, le Sarai ngwetsi wa gagwe, mosadi wa ga Aborame morwawe, a huduga nabo, a tloga kwa Ure wa Kalatea, a re o ya kwa lefatsheng la Kanana; mme ba fitlha fela kwa Harane, ba aga teng." 
Genesis11:32 Jaanong Thara a swela kwa Harane, a le dinyaga di le 205." 
Genesis12:1 Jaanong Morena a raya Aborame a re: “Tloga o tswe mo lefatsheng la ga eno, o tlogele ba ga eno le lelapa la ga rraago, o ye kwa lefatsheng le ke tla le go bontshang." 
Genesis12:2 Ke tla go dira setšhaba se segolo, ke go tshegofatsa, ke tumisa leina la gago gore o nne tshegofatso." 
Genesis12:3 “Ke tla tshegofatsa ba ba go tshegofatsang, ke hutsa ba ba go hutsang; ditshika tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tla tshegofadiwa ka wena.”" 
Genesis12:4 Ke fa Aborame a tloga jaaka Morena a mo laetse. Lote a ya nae. Ya re Aborame a huduga kwa Harane, a bo a le dinyaga di le 75." 
Genesis12:5 Aborame a tsaya Sarai, mosadi wa gagwe, le Lote, morwa monnawe, le dithuo tsa bone tse ba di bonyeng le makgoba a ba a rekileng kwa Harane. Ba huduga go ya kwa lefatsheng la Kanana, ba be ba fitlha kwa lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis12:6 Aborame a ralala lefatshe leo go fitlha kwa felong ga Šegeme le kwa setlhareng sa motherebinthe sa boitseanape. Mo metlheng eo ga bo go le Bakanana mo lefatsheng leo. 
Genesis12:7 Ke fa Morena a iponatsa mo go Aborame a re: “Lefatshe le ke tla le naya ba losika lwa gago.” Jaanong Aborame a agela Morena yo o iponaditseng mo go ene aletare gona. 
Genesis12:8 A ba a tloga teng, a ya kwa dithabeng tse di mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Bethele, a tlhoma tente ya gagwe teng, Bethele a le kwa bophirimatsatsi, mme Ai a le kwa botlhabatsatsi. Le gona moo a agela Morena aletare, a bitsa leina la Morena." 
Genesis12:9 Morago ga moo Aborame a fetela pele, a ntse a tsamaela kwa borwa." 
Genesis12:10 Go kile ga nna leuba mo lefatsheng leo, ke fa Aborame a ya kwa Egepeto go jaka gona; gonne leuba le ne le le legolo mo lefatsheng leo." 
Genesis12:11 Jaanong ya re a le gaufi le go tsena mo Egepeto, a raya Sarai, mosadi wa gagwe, a re: “Kana o mosadi yo montle." 
Genesis12:12 Jaanong e tla re Baegepeto ba go bona, ba re: ‘Ke ene mosadi wa gagwe,’ mme ba tla mpolaya, wena ba go lesa o phela." 
Genesis12:13 O tle o ba ree o re, o kgaitsadiake gore ke tle ke tsholege ka ntlha ya gago, ke phele ka lebaka la gago.”" 
Genesis12:14 Jaanong ya re Aborame a tsena kwa Egepeto, Baegepeto ba bona mosadi ba re, o montle thata." 
Genesis12:15 Le dikgosana tsa ga Farao tsa mmona, tsa mmoka fa pele ga Farao; ke fa mosadi yoo a isiwa kwa ntlong ya ga Farao." 
Genesis12:16 Ene a direla Aborame tse di molemo ka ntlha ya gagwe, a bona dinku le dikgomo le diesele le makgoba a banna le a basadi, le diesele tse dinamagadi le dikammele." 
Genesis12:17 Mme Morena a otla Farao le ba lapa la gagwe ka dikotlo tse dikgolo ka ntlha ya ga Sarai, mosadi wa ga Aborame." 
Genesis12:18 Ke fa Farao a bitsa Aborame a re: “Ke eng se o se ntiretseng? Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa o sa mpolelela gore ke mosadi wa gago? 
Genesis12:19 Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa o ne wa re: ‘Ke kgaitsadio’? Ka ba ka mo tsaya gore e nne mosadi wa me. Mme jaanong, bona, mosadi wa gago ke yo, mo tsee, o tsamae.”" 
Genesis12:20 Ke fa Farao a roma banna gore ba mo felegetse le mosadi wa gagwe le tsotlhe tse a nang natso. 
Genesis13:1 Aborame a tloga jalo kwa Egepeto, ene le mosadi wa gagwe le tsotlhe tse a nang natso, a boela kwa nageng ya borwa ya Kanana, Lote a ntse a na nae." 
Genesis13:2 Aborame a bo a humile thata, a na le diruiwa le selefera le gouta." 
Genesis13:3 A nna a tsamaya ka go tloga fa le go nna fale, go tswa kwa borwa go ya go fitlha kwa Bethele, kwa felong fa tente ya gagwe e neng e le teng mo tshimologong fa gare ga Bethele le Ai," 
Genesis13:4 kwa felong ga aletare e a neng a e dirile teng pele. Aborame a ba a bitsa leina la Morena teng. 
Genesis13:5 Mme Lote yo o neng a tsamaya le Aborame, le ene o ne a na le dinku le dikgomo le ditente." 
Genesis13:6 Jaanong lefatshe la bo le sa ba lekane go ka nna mmogo, gonne dithuo tsa bone di ne di le dikgolo; ka moo ba palelwa ke go nna mmogo." 
Genesis13:7 Ga ba ga tsoga kgang fa gare ga badisa ba diruiwa tsa ga Aborame le badisa ba diruiwa tsa ga Lote. Le gona Bakanana le Baferesi ba ne ba nna mo lefatsheng leo ka sebaka seo. 
Genesis13:8 Ke fa Aborame a raya Lote a re: “A go ko go se nne kgang fa gare ga me le wena, le fa gare ga badisa ba me le badisa ba gago, gonne re bana ba motho." 
Genesis13:9 Kana lefatshe lotlhe le fa pele ga gago! A ko o kgaogane le nna. Fa o ka ya ntlheng ya la molema, ke tla ya ntlheng ya le le jang; mme fa o ka ya ntlheng ya le le jang, ke tla ya ntlheng ya la molema.”" 
Genesis13:10 Ke fa Lote a tsholetsa matlho a bona lebala lotlhe la Joretane e le naga e e nang le metsi yotlhe, e tshwana le tshimo ya Morena le lefatshe la Egepeto go fitlha kwa Soare, Morena a ise a senye Sotoma le Gomora." 
Genesis13:11 Lote a itlhophela lebala lotlhe la Joretane; Lote a hudugela kwa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi; motho a kgaogana jalo le mogoloa-rraagwe. 
Genesis13:12 Aborame a sala mo lefatsheng la Kanana; Lote a ya go nna kwa metseng ya lebala la Joretane, a tsamaya a ntse a tlhomolola a tlhoma ditente tsa gagwe go ya go fitlha kwa Sotoma." 
Genesis13:13 Mme banna ba Sotoma ba bo ba le bosula, ba leofela Morena thata." 
Genesis13:14 Jaanong ya re Lote a sena go kgaogana nae, Morena a raya Aborame a re: “A ko o tsholetse matlho o ntse o eme foo, o lebe kwa bokone le kwa borwa le kwa botlhabatsatsi le kwa bophirimatsatsi." 
Genesis13:15 Gonne lefatshe lotlhe le o le bonang, ke tla le go naya le ba losika lwa gago ka bosakhutleng." 
Genesis13:16 Ke tla atisa losika lwa gago jaaka lerole la lefatshe; ke go re, fa motho a ka kgona go bala lerole la lefatshe, losika lwa gago le lone lo tla nna le go ka balwa." 
Genesis13:17 Nanoga o ralale lefatshe, o tsamae boleele jwa lone le bophara jwa lone, gonne ke tla le go naya.”" 
Genesis13:18 Ke fa Aborame a huduga ka ditente tsa gagwe, a ya a na fa ditlhareng tsa metherebinthe tsa ga Mamere tse di kwa Heberone, a agela Morena aletare gona." 
Genesis14:1 Mo metlheng ya ga Amorafele, kgosi ya Sineare, le Arioge, kgosi ya Elasare, le Ketorelaomere, kgosi ya Elame, le Thitale, kgosi ya ditšhaba," 
Genesis14:2 bone bao ba simolola ntwa le Bera, kgosi ya Sotoma, le Bireša kgosi ya Gomora, le Sinabe, kgosi ya Atema, le Semebere, kgosi ya Seboime, le kgosi ya Bela, ke Soare." 
Genesis14:3 Botlhe bao ba ne ba ikopantse, ba ya kwa lebaleng la Sidime; ke Lewatle la Letswai kajeno." 
Genesis14:4 Ba ne ba direla Ketorelaomere dinyaga di le 12, mme ba mo tlhanogela ka ngwaga wa some tharo." 
Genesis14:5 Jaanong ka ngwaga wa some nne ga tla Ketorelaomere le dikgosi tse di nang nae, ba fenya Barefaime kwa Ašetherothe-Karenaime le Basusi kwa Hame le Baemime mo lebaleng la Khiriathaime;" 
Genesis14:6 le Bahori mo dithabeng tsa bone tsa Seire go fitlha kwa Ele-Pharane yo o fa thoko ga sekaka. 
Genesis14:7 Ba boa ba fitlha kwa Ene-Mišephate, e bong Kateše, ba thopa naga yotlhe ya Baamaleke le Baamori ba ba neng ba agile kwa Hasesone-Thamare." 
Genesis14:8 Ke fa go bolola kgosi ya Sotoma le kgosi ya Gomora le kgosi ya Atema le kgosi ya Seboime le kgosi ya Bela, e bong Soare, tsa ipaakanyetsa ntwa mo lebaleng la Sidime" 
Genesis14:9 go lwa le Ketorelaomere, kgosi ya Elame, le Thitale, kgosi ya ditšhaba, le Amorafele, kgosi ya Sineare, le Arioge, kgosi ya Elasare: Dikgosi tse nne tsa lwa le dikgosi tse tlhano." 
Genesis14:10 Mme lebala la Sidime la bo le tletse didiba tsa boka jwa mmu. Jaanong ya re dikgosi tsa Sotoma le Gomora di tshaba, tsa wela ka moo. Mme ba ba falotseng ba tshabela kwa dithabeng." 
Genesis14:11 Bale ba thopa dithoto tsotlhe tsa Sotoma le Gomora le dijo tsotlhe tsa teng, ba tsamaya ka tsona." 
Genesis14:12 Ba thopa le Lote, morwa monnaa Aborame, le dithoto tsotlhe tsa gagwe, ba tsamaya ka tsona. Kana o ne a agile kwa Sotoma." 
Genesis14:13 Ga tla mofalodi, a itsise Aborame wa Mohebere yo o neng a agile kwa ditlhareng tsa metherebinthe tsa ga Mamere wa Moamori, morwa-rraagwe Ešekole le Anere; bao ba ne ba dirile kgolagano le Aborame." 
Genesis14:14 Ya re Aborame a utlwa, fa morwa monnawe a tshwerwe, a bolotsa batlhanka a gagwe ba ba itseng ntwa, ba ba tsaletsweng mo lapeng la gagwe, ba le 318, a latelela bale go fitlha kwa Dane." 
Genesis14:15 Mme a kgaoganya batlhanka ba gagwe, a ba dira ditlhopha, a tlhasela bale bosigo, a ba fenya, a ba latelela go fitlha kwa Hoba mo go leng ntlheng ya bokone ya Damaseko." 
Genesis14:16 A busa dithoto tsotlhe; a busa le Lote, morwa monnawe, le di-tsa-gagwe le basadi le batho." 
Genesis14:17 Jaanong ya re a boa, a sena go fenya Ketorelaomere le dikgosi tse di nang nae, kgosi ya Sotoma ya tswa, ya mo kgatlhantsha kwa mogorogorong wa Sawe o e leng mogorogoro wa kgosi." 
Genesis14:18 Melegi-Seteke, kgosi ya Saleme, a tlisa senkgwe le weine; ene e ne e le moperesiti wa Modimo o o godimodimo." 
Genesis14:19 A mo tshegofatsa a re: “A Aborame a tshegofadiwe ke Modimo o o godimodimo, Motlhodi wa legodimo le lefatshe!" 
Genesis14:20 A go bakwe Modimo o o godimodimo o o neetseng baba ba gago mo diatleng tsa gago!” Aborame a mo ntshetsa karolo ya lesome ya tsotlhe. 
Genesis14:21 Ke fa kgosi ya Sotoma e raya Aborame e re: “Mphe batho, o sale ka dithoto!”" 
Genesis14:22 Mme Aborame a raya kgosi ya Sotoma a re: “Ke tsholeletsa letsogo kwa Moreneng Modimo o o godimodimo, Motlhodi wa legodimo le lefatshe," 
Genesis14:23 ke ikana ke re: Ga nka ke ka tsaya tlhale le fa e le kgole ya setlhako le e seng sepe sa tsotlhe tse e leng tsa gago, e se re gongwe wa re, o humisitse Aborame." 
Genesis14:24 Ga ke batle sepe kwa ntle ga tse makau a di jeleng. Fela a banna ba ba ileng le nna, Anere le Ešekole le Mamere, bone ba amogele kabelo ya bone.”" 
Genesis15:1 Morago ga dilo tseo Lefoko la Morena la tla kwa go Aborame ka pono la re: “Aborame, se boife! Ke nna thebe ya gago; tuelo ya gago e kgolo thata.”" 
Genesis15:2 Mme Aborame a re: “Morena Modimo, o tla mpha eng, ka e le fa ke tla tsamaya, ke se na bana? Mme Eliesere yo wa kwa Damaseko o tla ja boswa jwa lapa la me.”" 
Genesis15:3 Aborame a ba a re: “Bona, nna ga o a mpha ngwana; mme motlhanka wa lapa la me o tla rua tsa me.”" 
Genesis15:4 Ke fa Lefoko la Morena le tla kwa go ene le re: “Nnyaya, yoo ga a nke a rua tsa gago, mme yo o tswang mo mmeleng wa gago, ke ene yo o tla jang boswa jwa gago.”" 
Genesis15:5 A ba a mo ntshetsa kwa ntle a mo raya a re: “A ko o lelale kwa legodimong, o bale dinaledi, fa o ka kgona go di bala!” A ba a mo raya a re: “Losika lwa gago lo tla nna kalo.”" 
Genesis15:6 Aborame a dumela Morena; mme tumelo eo ya kaiwa tshiamo ya gagwe. 
Genesis15:7 A ba a mo raya a re: “Ke nna Morena ke go ntshitseng kwa Ure wa Kalatea go tla go go naya lefatshe le, go le rua.”" 
Genesis15:8 Mme a re: “Morena Modimo, ke tla itse ka eng, fa ke tla le rua?”" 
Genesis15:9 A mo araba a re: “Ntlisetse kgomo ya dinyaga di le tharo le podi ya ngwaga tse tharo le phelehu ya ngwaga tse tharo le lephoi le leeba.” 
Genesis15:10 Aborame a mo tsisetsa tsotlhe tseo, a di fatola ka bogare; a baya mefama a e lebagantse. Fela dinonyane a se ka a di fatola." 
Genesis15:11 Jaanong dinonyane tse di jang nama tsa fologela mo ditotong tseo, mme Aborame a di koba." 
Genesis15:12 Jaanong ya re letsatsi le batla go phirima, Aborame a welwa ke boroko jo bogolo, mme letshogo le lefifi le legolo tsa mo tlela." 
Genesis15:13 Ke fa Morena a raya Aborame a re: “O tshwanetse go itse gore losika lwa gago e tla nna baeng mo lefatsheng le e seng la bone. Ba tla nna batlhanka teng, ba gatelelwa dinyaga di le 400." 
Genesis15:14 Mme le setšhaba seo se ba tla nnang batlhanka ba sona ke tla se otla; morago ga moo ba tla huduga ka dithoto tse dikgolo. 
Genesis15:15 Mme wena o tla ya kwa go borraago ka kagiso; o tla fitlhwa o tsofetse ka botlalo. 
Genesis15:16 Ba tla boela kwano e le ba losika lwa bone. Gonne kajeno molato wa Baamori ga o ise o tlale.” 
Genesis15:17 Jaanong ya re letsatsi le sena go phirima, go le lefifi thata, ga bonala sebeso se se kuang musi le kgabo ya molelo e raletse fa gare ga mehama ele." 
Genesis15:18 Ka letsatsi leo Morena a dira kgolagano le Aborame a re: “Lefatshe le ke tla le naya losika lwa gago go simolola kwa nokeng ya Egepeto go fitlha kwa nokeng e kgolo, nokeng ya Ferathe," 
Genesis15:19 e bong lefatshe la Bakeni le Bakenisi le Bakatemoni 
Genesis15:20 le Bahethe le Baferesi le Barefaime 
Genesis15:21 le Baamori le Bakanana le Bagiregasi le Bajebusi.” 
Genesis16:1 Sarai, mosadi wa ga Aborame, o ne a sa mmelegele bana; jaanong a na le lelata la Moegepeto, leina la lone e le Hagare." 
Genesis16:2 Sarai o ne a raya Aborame a re: “A ko o bone, Morena o ntimile bana. Bogolo a ko o kopane le letata la me; ka gongwe nka bona bana ka ene.” Aborame a utlwisisa lentswe la ga Sarai." 
Genesis16:3 Ke fa Sarai, mosadi wa ga Aborame, a tsaya Hagare wa Moegepeto lelata la gagwe, a mo neela Aborame, monna wa gagwe gore a nne mosadi wa gagwe. Ga dirafala jalo, fa Aborame a sena go nna dinyaga di le some mo lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis16:4 A kopana le Hagare, mme a ithwala. Ya re a ipona a ithwele, a nyatsa mohumagadi wa gagwe ka matlho." 
Genesis16:5 Ke fa Sarai a raya Aborame a re: “Tshiamololo e, e ntirafalela ka ntlha ya gago. Ke nna ka nosi ke go neetseng lelata la me mo mabogong a gago, mme ya re le bona le le moimana, ka nyatsega mo matlhong a lone. A Morena a atlhole fa gare ga me le wena!”" 
Genesis16:6 Mme Aborame a raya Sarai a re: “Bona, lelata la gago le mo thateng ya gago; le direle se se siameng mo matlhong a gago.” Jaanong ya re Sarai a re o a le kokobetsa, la tshaba, la mo tlogela." 
Genesis16:7 Ke fa moengele wa Morena a le fitlhela fa motsweding wa metsi mo sekakeng, kwa motsweding o o fa tseleng e e yang kwa Sure." 
Genesis16:8 A botsa a re: “Hagare, lelata la ga Sarai, o tswa kae? O ya kae?” Ene a re: “Ke tlogetse Sarai, mohumagadi wa me, ka tshaba.”" 
Genesis16:9 Moengele wa Morena a mo raya a re: “Boela kwa mohumagading wa gago, o ikokobetse fa tlase ga seatla sa gagwe.”" 
Genesis16:10 Moengele wa Morena a ba a mo raya a re: “Losika lwa gago ke tla lo atisa thata thata, mo lo tla bong lo pale go ka balwa ka ntlha ya bontsi.”" 
Genesis16:11 Le gona moengele wa Morena a mo raya a re: “Bona, o moimana, o tla belega ngwana wa mosimane, o mo tee leina la Isemaele; gonne Morena o utlwile pogisego ya gago." 
Genesis16:12 Ene e tla nna motho yo o tshwanang le esele ya naga. Seatla sa gagwe se tla lwa le botlhe. Diatla tsa botlhe di tla lwa nae. O tla nna mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya bomorwa-rraagwe botlhe.” 
Genesis16:13 Ke fa Hagare a bitsa leina la Morena yo o buileng nae a re: “Ò Modimo o o mponang.” Gonne a re: “A le gona ke mo setse morago ka matlho fano yo o mponang?” 
Genesis16:14 Ke ka moo sediba sele se bidiwang: “Sediba sa Mophedi-yo-o-mponang.” Kana se fa gare ga Kateše le Berete. 
Genesis16:15 Hagare a belegela Aborame ngwana wa mosimane; morwawe yo Hagare a mmelegeng Aborame a mo taya leina la Isemaele. 
Genesis16:16 Aborame o ne a le dinyaga di le 86, fa Hagare a mmelegela Isemaele." 
Genesis17:1 E rile Aborame a le dinyaga di le 99, Morena a iponatsa mo go ene, a mo raya a re: “Ke nna Modimo Rra-thata-yotlhe! Sepela fa pele ga me, foo o nne mosiami." 
Genesis17:2 Ke tla dira kgolagano ya me fa gare ga me le wena, ke go atisa thata thata.”" 
Genesis17:3 Ke fa Aborame a wela fa fatshe ka sefatlhego, mme Modimo wa bua nae wa re:" 
Genesis17:4 “Kgolagano ya me nao ka fa lotlhakoreng lwa me ke ya go re: Ò tla nna rra-bontsi jwa ditšhaba. 
Genesis17:5 Ka moo ga o nke o tlhola o bidiwa Aborame, mme leina la gago e tla nna Aborahame; gonne ke tla go dira rra-bontsi jwa ditšhaba." 
Genesis17:6 Ruri, ke tla go atisa gagolo thata, ke go dira ditšhaba; le dikgosi di tla tswa mo go wena." 
Genesis17:7 “Ke tla tlhomamisa kgolagano ya me fa gare ga me le wena le bana ba gago morago ga gago ba losika longwe le longwe gore e nne kgolagano e e sa khutleng ya go re: Ke tla nna Modimo wa gago le wa bana ba gago morago ga gago. 
Genesis17:8 Lefatshe le o leng moeng mo go lone, e leng lefatshe lotlhe la Kanana, ke tla le go naya le bana ba gago morago ga gago go nna boswa jo bo sa khutleng, mme ke tla nna Modimo wa bone.”" 
Genesis17:9 Jaanong Modimo wa raya Aborahame wa re: “Fela o tshegetse kgolagano ya me, wena le bana ba gago morago ga gago mo losikeng longwe le longwe lwa bone." 
Genesis17:10 Kgolagano ya me fa gare ga me le lona le bana ba gago morago ga gago e lo tshwanetseng go e tshegetsa ke e: A banna le basimane botlhe ba lona ba rupisiwe! 
Genesis17:11 Lo rupisiwe mo nameng ya letlalo la bonna jwa lona; seo e tla nna sesupo sa kgolagano gare ga me le lona. 
Genesis17:12 A go rupisiwe mosimanyana mongwe le mongwe wa lona a le malatsi a le 8 mo ditshikeng tsotlhe tsa lona le motlhanka yo o tsaletsweng mo ntlong le yo o rekilweng ka selefera le fa e le moeng wa kae le kae, yo e seng wa losika lwa lona." 
Genesis17:13 Batlhanka ba ba tsaletsweng mo ntlong ya gago le ba ba rekilweng ka selefera ya gago ba tshwanetse go rupisiwa. Kgolagano ya me e tla nna jalo mo nameng ya lona, e le kgolagano e e sa khutleng." 
Genesis17:14 Mme monna le mosimane yo o nang le letlalo la bonna yo o sa rupisiwang mo nameng ya letlalo la bonna jwa gagwe, motho yoo a a nyelediwe mo morafeng wa ga gabo; o sentse kgolagano ya me.”" 
Genesis17:15 Modimo wa ba wa raya Aborahame wa re: “Sarai, mosadi wa gago, o se ka wa tlhola o mmitsa Sarai, mme leina la gagwe a e nne Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Ke tla mo tshegofatsa, mme le ka ene ke tla go naya ngwana wa mosimane; ke tla mo tshegofatsa gore a nne mmaditšhaba; dikgosi tsa merafe di tla tswa mo go ene.”" 
Genesis17:17 Ke fa Aborahame a wela fa fatshe ka sefatlhego, a tshega, a ipotsa mo pelong a re: “A nka tsalelwa ngwana ke le dinyaga di le lekgolo? A Sara le ene o ka belega a setse a le dinyaga di le 90?”" 
Genesis17:18 Ke fa Aborahame a raya Modimo a re: “Ao! A go phele Isemaele fa pele ga gago!” 
Genesis17:19 Mme Modimo wa re: “Ruri, Sara mosadi wa gago o tla go belegela ngwana wa mosimane; o mo tee leina la Isaka. Ke tla tlhomamisa kgolagano ya me nae le losika lwa gagwe morago ga gagwe gore e nne kgolagano e e sa khutleng." 
Genesis17:20 Le ka ga Isemaele ke go utlwile, bona, ke tla mo tshegofatsa, ke mo atisa, ke mo ntsifatsa gagolo thata. O tla tsala dikgosi di le 12. Ke tla mo dira setšhaba se segolo." 
Genesis17:21 Mme kgolagano ya me ke tla e tlhomamisetsa Isaka yo Sara o tla mo go belegelang ngwaga o o tlang ka sona sebaka se.” 
Genesis17:22 Jaanong ya re Modimo o sena go bua nae wa tlhatloga, wa tlogela Aborahame." 
Genesis17:23 Ke fa Aborahame a tsaya Isemaele morwawe le batlhanka botlhe ba ba tsaletsweng mo ntlong ya gagwe le botlhe ba ba rekilweng ka selefera ya gagwe, e bong ba batonanyana botlhe ba batho ba lelapa la ga Aborahame, a rupisa nama ya letlalo la bonna jwa bone ka lone letsatsi leo, fela jaaka Modimo o mo laetse." 
Genesis17:24 Aborahame o ne a le dinyaga di le 99, fa a rupisiwa nama ya letlalo la bonna jwa gagwe." 
Genesis17:25 Isemaele morwawe o ne a le dinyaga di le 13, fa a rupisiwa nama ya letlalo la bonna jwa gagwe." 
Genesis17:26 Ka letsatsi lone leo go rupisitswe Aborahame le Isemaele morwawe. 
Genesis17:27 Le gona ga rupisiwa nae banna botlhe ba ntlo ya gagwe, e bong batlhanka ba ba tsaletsweng mo ntlong le ba ba rekilweng ka madi mo bathong ba sele." 
Genesis18:1 Morena a ba a iponatsa mo go ene kwa ditlhareng tsa metherebinthe tsa ga Mamere, a ntse fa mojakong wa tente go le motshegare ka selebalo." 
Genesis18:2 Ya re a tsholetsa matlho, a bona banna ba le bararo ba eme fa pele ga gagwe. Fa a ba bona, a tloga fa mojakong wa tente, a akofa go ba kgatlhantsha, a inamela fa fatshe" 
Genesis18:3 a re: “Morena, fa ke bonye bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a gago, a ko o se fete motlhanka wa gago." 
Genesis18:4 A go ko go tlisiwe metsinyana gore lo tlhape dinao, lo be lo ikhutse fa tlase ga setlhare." 
Genesis18:5 Ke tla lo tlisetsa thathana ya bogobe gore lo lapolose dipelo tsa lona. Morago ga moo lo ka feta. Gonne ke ka moo lo fapogetseng kwa motlhankeng wa lona.” Ba araba ba re: “Dira ka fa o buileng ka teng.” 
Genesis18:6 Ke fa Aborahame a itlhaganela, a ya mo tenteng kwa go Sara a re: “Akofa o tsee dielo di le tharo tsa bupe jo bosweu, o dube, o bese dinkgwe.”" 
Genesis18:7 Aborahame a ba a sianela kwa dikgomong, a tlhaola namane e e boruma e e siameng, a e neela motlhanka; mme ene a e tlhaba ka bonako." 
Genesis18:8 Jaanong a tsaya mašwi a madila le a lobese le namane e a e apeileng, a di baya fa pele ga bona, ene a ntse a eme fa go bone fa tlase ga setlhare fa ba ja." 
Genesis18:9 Ke fa ba mmotsa ba re: “Sara mosadi wa gago o kae?” A araba a re: “O ka mo tenteng.” 
Genesis18:10 Morena a ba a re: “Ke tla ba ke boela kwano go wena isago ka nako e, ke fitlhela Sara, mosadi wa gago, a na le ngwana wa mosimane.” Sara o ne a ntse a reeditse a le fa mojakong wa tente fa morago ga gagwe." 
Genesis18:11 Kana Aborahame le Sara ba ne ba tsofetse, ba godile thata; mokgwa wa sesadi o sa tlhole o dirafalela Sara." 
Genesis18:12 Ka moo Sara a tshegela mo pelong a re: “A nka utlwa monate wa lorato ke setse ke onetse, le morena wa me a tsofetse?”" 
Genesis18:13 Ke fa Morena a botsa Aborahame a re: “Sara o tshegang a re: ‘A ruri nka belega ke setse ke tsofetse?’ 
Genesis18:14 A go na le sengwe se se ka palelang Morena? Isago ka nako e e beilweng ke tla boela kwano go wena; foo Sara o tla bo a na le ngwana wa mosimane.” 
Genesis18:15 Ke fa Sara a latola a re: “Ga ke a tshega!” A re jalo gonne a boifa. Mme ene a re: “Nnyaya! O tshegile.” 
Genesis18:16 Banna bao ba nanoga, ba tloga teng. Ya re ba lebile Sotoma, Aborahame a ntse a na nabo, a ba felegetsa," 
Genesis18:17 Morena a akanya a re: “A nka lobela Aborahame se ke tla se dirang ne? 
Genesis18:18 Etswe Aborahame a tla nna setšhaba se segolo se se thata tota, le gona ditšhaba tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tla tshegofadiwa ka ene;" 
Genesis18:19 gonne ke mo tlhophile gore a laele bana ba gagwe le ba lapa la gagwe morago ga gagwe gore ba sepele mo tseleng ya Morena, ba dire ka tshiamo le ka tshwanelo gore Morena a tle a tlisetse Aborahame tse a di mo solofeditseng.”" 
Genesis18:20 Ke fa Morena a re: “Go na le selelo se segolo ka ga Sotoma le Gomora; ruri maleo a bone a magolo thata. 
Genesis18:21 Ke rata go fologa, ka bona gore a ba dirile gotlhe ka fa selelong se se tlileng kwa go nna ka ga bone gongwe nnyaya; ke rata go itse.”" 
Genesis18:22 Banna ba tloga foo, ba ya kwa Sotoma; Aborahame a sala a eme fa pele ga Morena." 
Genesis18:23 Aborahame a atamela, a botsa a re: “A o tla fedisa mosiami le moikepi?" 
Genesis18:24 Ka gongwe go ka nna le basiami ba le 50 mo motseng oo. A le bone o tla ba nyeletsa, o se ke o itshwarele felo foo ka ntlha ya basiami ba ba 50 ba ba mo go ona?" 
Genesis18:25 A go nne kgakala nao go dira jalo, go bolaya mosiami mmogo le moikepi gore mosiami a dirafalelwe ke tse di dirafalelang moikepi! Gona moo a go nne kgakala nao! A moatlhodi wa lefatshe lotlhe ga a nke a dira ka tshiamo?”" 
Genesis18:26 Morena a re: “Fa nka fitlhela basiami ba le 50 mo motseng wa Sotoma, ke tla itshwarela felo gotlhe ka ntlha ya bone.”" 
Genesis18:27 Aborahame a bua gape a re: “A ko o bone, ke nameditse pelo go bua le Morena, le fa ke le lerole le molora fela." 
Genesis18:28 Motlha ope mo basiaming ba le 50 go ka tlhaela ba le batlhano. Jaanong a o tla senya motse otlhe ka ntlha ya ba batlhano ba?” A araba a re: “Ga nka ke ka o senya fa ke fitlhela ba le 45 teng.” 
Genesis18:29 A tswelela pele gape go bua nae a re: “E ka re gongwe ga fitlhelwa ba le 40 gona.” Mme a re: “Ga nka ke ka dira jalo ka ntlha ya ba ba 40.” 
Genesis18:30 A ba a re: “Ka thapelo, a Morena a se ka a galefa fa ke bua gape: Ka gongwe go tla fitlhelwa ba le 30 gona.” Mme a re: “Ga nka ke ka dira jalo fa ke fitlhela ba ba 30 gona.”" 
Genesis18:31 A bua gape a re: “A ko o bone, ke nameditse pelo go bua le Morena. Motlhamongwe go tla fitlhelwa ba le 20 teng.” Mme a re: “Ga nka ke ka ba senya ka ntlha ya ba ba 20.”" 
Genesis18:32 A ba a re: “Ka thapelo, a Morena a se ka a galefa. Nte ke bue gangwe fela: Gongwe go tla fitlhelwa ba le some fela gona.” Mme a re: “Ga nkitla ke ba senya ka ntlha ya ba ba some.”" 
Genesis18:33 Jaanong a tsamaya Morena, a sena go bua le Aborahame. Aborahame ene a boela kwa gae." 
Genesis19:1 Baengele ba babedi ba ne ba fitlha kwa Sotoma mantsiboa, Lote a ntse fa kgorong ya Sotoma. Ya re Lote a ba bona, a nanoga, a ba kgatlhantsha, a ikobela fa fatshe ka sefatlhego," 
Genesis19:2 a re: “Barena ba me, a ko lo fapogele kwa lapeng la motlhanka wa lona, lo lale, lo tlhape dinao. Lo ka phakela, lwa wela tseleng ya lona.” Mme ba re: “Nnyaya! Re tla lala mo dipatlelong.”" 
Genesis19:3 Jaanong ya re a ba rapela thata, ba fapogela kwa go ene, ba tsena mo ntlong ya gagwe; a ba direla dijo, a besa dinkgwe tse di sa bedisiwang, mme ba ja." 
Genesis19:4 Ya re ba ise ba robale, banna ba motse wa Sotoma ba dikanyetsa ntlo, ba bašwa le ba bagolo, e le morafe otlhe, go sa tlhokafale ope," 
Genesis19:5 ba kua Lote, ba mmotsa ba re: “Banna bale ba kae ba ba tlileng kwa go wena bosigo? Ba ntshetse kwa go rona gore re ba senye.”" 
Genesis19:6 Lote a tswela kwa go bone fa mojako, a tswala setswalo fa morago ga gagwe," 
Genesis19:7 a re: “Ba ga etsho, ke a lo rapela, se direng bosula." 
Genesis19:8 A ko lo bone, ke na le bomorwadiake ba babedi, ba ba iseng ba itse monna. A nke ke ba ntshetse kwa go lona gore lo ba direle ka fa thatong ya lona. Fela banna bao se ba direng sepe. Gonne ke ka moo ba tlileng mo tshireletsong ya ntlo ya me.”" 
Genesis19:9 Mme ba re: “Thiboga foo!” Ba re: “O tlile fela o le moeng, mme jaanong o rata go re laola. Jaanong ge, re tla go direla bosula bogolo go bale.” Ba pitlaganya monna, e bong Lote thata, ba atamela go thuba setswalo." 
Genesis19:10 Ke fa banna bale ba ntsha mabogo, ba gogela Lote kwa go bone mo ntlong, ba tswala setswalo;" 
Genesis19:11 ba otla banna ba ba fa mojakong wa ntlo ka bofofu, ba bašwa le ba bagolo, mo ba itapiseditseng lefela go batla mojako." 
Genesis19:12 Ke fa banna bao ba botsa Lote ba re: “O na le bomang mono kwa ntle ga ba lapa? Tsaya bagwe le bomorwao le bomorwadio le botlhe ba e leng ba ga eno mo motseng, o ba ntshe mo felong fano!" 
Genesis19:13 Gonne re tla senya felo fano, ka selelo se le segolo ka ga ba mono fa pele ga Morena, mme Morena o re romile go tla go ba senya.”" 
Genesis19:14 Lote a tswa, a ya go bua le bagwe ba gagwe ba ba neng ba tla nyala bomorwadie, a re: “Nanogang lo tswe mo felong fa, gonne Morena o tla senya motse o!” Mme bagwe ba gagwe ba ne ba re, o bolela metlae fela." 
Genesis19:15 Ya re mahube a tlhatloga, baengele ba kurusa Lote ba re: “Nanoga o tshabe le mosadi wa gago le bomorwadio ba babedi ba ba nang nao, e se re gongwe wa nyelela ka boikepo jwa motse o!”" 
Genesis19:16 Mme ya re a diega, banna bao ba tshwara Lote le mosadi wa gagwe le bomorwadie ba babedi mabogong, ba ba ntsha, ba ba ntshetsa kwa ntle ga motse – gonne Morena o ne a rata go ba rekegela." 
Genesis19:17 Ya re ba sena go ba ntshetsa kwa ntle, mongwe a re: “Tshaba o boloke bophelo jwa gago! Se gadime, se emaeme gope mo lebaleng le! Tshabela kwa dithabeng gore o se nyelele!”" 
Genesis19:18 Mme Lote a ba araba a re: “Ka thapelo, Morena, a go se nne jalo!" 
Genesis19:19 A ko o bone, motlhanka wa gago o bonye bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a gago; o ntiretse ka boutlwelo-botlhoko jo bogolo, wa boloka bophelo jwa me; fela ke palelwa ke go tshabela kwa dithabeng; gongwe tatlhego e tla nkwela, ke swa." 
Genesis19:20 A ko o bone motse o, o gaufi go ka tshabela teng; ona o monnye, nte ke tshabele teng gore ke phele, ka e le o monnye.”" 
Genesis19:21 A mo araba a re: “Go siame, kopo e ya gago le yona ke e utlwile; ga nkitla ke senya motse o ò buileng ka ga ona." 
Genesis19:22 Itlhaganele o tshabele teng, gonne ga ke kgone go dira sepe o ise o fitlhe teng.” Ke ka moo ba biditseng motse oo Soare." 
Genesis19:23 Ya re Lote a tsena kwa Soare, letsatsi la bo le tlhaba mo lefatsheng." 
Genesis19:24 Ke fa Morena a nesetsa Sotoma le Gomora sebabole le molelo tse di tswang mo Moreneng kwa legodimong. 
Genesis19:25 A ribegetsa metse eo le naga yotlhe ya teng le baagi botlhe ba metse eo le tse di tlhogileng fa fatshe. 
Genesis19:26 Mosadi wa gagwe a gadima a le fa morago ga gagwe, jaanong a fetoga sesana sa letswai." 
Genesis19:27 Ya re ka moso Aborahame a phakela, a ya kwa felong fa a neng a eme teng fa pele ga Morena," 
Genesis19:28 a leba kwa Sotoma le Gomora le kwa lebaleng lotlhe la teng, a bona musi o tlhatloga mo lefatsheng jaaka musi wa leiso le legolo." 
Genesis19:29 E rile Modimo o senya metse ya lebala leo, Modimo wa gopola Aborahame, wa ntsha Lote mo thibegetsong, fa o ribegetsa metse e Lote a neng a agile mo go yona." 
Genesis19:30 Lote a huduga kwa Soare, a nna kwa thabeng, a na le bomorwadie ba babedi, gonne a boifa go aga kwa Soare; a nna mo logageng, ene le bomorwadie ba babedi." 
Genesis19:31 Jaanong yo mogolo a raya monnawe a re: “Rraarona o tsofetse. Ga go na monna mo lefatsheng yo o ka nnang le rona jaaka e le mokgwa wa lefatshe lotlhe. 
Genesis19:32 Tlaya, a re nose rraarona weine, re robale nae, re tsose losika ka rraarona.”" 
Genesis19:33 Ba dira jalo. Ba nosa rraabo weine bosigo joo; yo mogolo a tsena, a robala le rraagwe; mme ene a se ka a lemoga, fa a robala le fa a tsoga." 
Genesis19:34 Ya re kamoso yo mogolo a raya monnawe a re: “Bona, ke letse ke robetse le rre. A re mo nose weine gape bosigo gore le wena o tsene o robale nae, mme re tsose losika ka rraarona.”" 
Genesis19:35 Ba dira jalo. Ba nosa rraabo weine le bosigo joo; yo mmotlana a ya a robala nae; mme ene a se ka a lemoga, fa a robala le fa a tsoga." 
Genesis19:36 Bomorwadia Lote ba nna baimana jalo ka rraabo ka bobedi jwa bone. 
Genesis19:37 Yo mogolo a belega ngwana wa mosimane, a mmitsa Moabe; ke ene Rra-Bamoabe ba metlha eno." 
Genesis19:38 Yo mmotlana le ene a belega ngwana wa mosimane, a mo taya leina la Benami; ke ene Rra-Baamone ba metlha eno." 
Genesis20:1 Aborahame a huduga teng, a ya kwa lefatsheng la borwa, a nna fa gare ga Kateše le Sure, a ya go fudisa kwa Gerara." 
Genesis20:2 Aborahame o ne a bolela ka ga Sara, mosadi wa gagwe, a re: “Ke kgaitsadie.” Ke fa Abimelege, kgosi ya Gerara, a roma, a tsaya Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Mme Modimo wa tla kwa go Abimelege ka toro bosigo, wa mo raya wa re: “Bona, o tshwanetse go swa ka ntlha ya mosadi yo ò mo tsereng; gonne ke mosadi yo o nyetsweng ke monna.”" 
Genesis20:4 Mme Abimelege o ne a ise a mo atamele; ka moo a botsa a re: “Morena, a o tla bolaya le setšhaba se se siameng?" 
Genesis20:5 A ga ke re, Aborahame o ntheile a re: ‘Ke kgaitsadie.’ Le Sara a re: ‘Aborahame ke kgaitsadie.’ Ke dirile jalo ka pelo e e se nang molato le ka diatla tse di phepa.”" 
Genesis20:6 Modimo wa mo araba mo torong wa re: “Le nna ke itse, fa o dirile jalo ka bosenamolato jwa pelo ya gago. Nna ka nosi ke go thibetse gore o se ka wa nteofela; ke ka moo ke sa go leseletsang go mo ama." 
Genesis20:7 Jaanong busetsa monna mosadi wa gagwe, gonne ene ke moporofeti. O tla go rapelela gore o phele. Mme fa o sa mo rebole, itse gore o tla swa tota, wena le ba ga eno botlhe.”" 
Genesis20:8 Abimelege a phakela mo mosong, a bitsa batlhanka botlhe ba gagwe, a bolela tsotlhe tse mo ditsebeng tsa bone; ke fa banna bao ba boifa thata." 
Genesis20:9 Abimelege a ba a bitsa Aborahame, a mmotsa a re: “Kana o re diretseng? Ke go leofetse ka eng, fa o ntliseditse le bogosi jwa me boleo jo bogolo. O ntiretse tse di sa tshwanelang go dirwa.”" 
Genesis20:10 Abimelege a ba a botsa Aborahame a re: “O ne o ikaeletse eng, fa o dira jalo?”" 
Genesis20:11 Aborahame a araba a re: “Ke ne ke re: Ga go na poifo-Modimo mo felong fano; ba tla mpolaya ka ntlha ya mosadi wa me. 
Genesis20:12 Le gona ke kgaitsadiake tota, ke morwadia rre, fela e seng morwadia mme; a ba a nna mosadi wa me." 
Genesis20:13 Jaanong e rile Modimo o nkhudusa mo ntlong ya ga rre, o nkgarakgatsha, ka mo raya ka re: ‘Lorato lwa gago lo o tla ntirelang ka lone mo felong gongwe le gongwe kwa re tla fitlhang teng ke lo: O bolele ka ga me o re: O kgaitsadiake.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Ke fa Abimelege a tsaya dinku le dikgomo le batlhanka le malata, a di naya Aborahame; a ba a mmusetsa Sara, mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis20:15 Abimelege a ba a re: “Bona, lefatshe la me le go atlanegetse, aga fela fa o ratang teng.”" 
Genesis20:16 A ba a raya Sara a re: “Bona, ke neile kgaitsadio diselefera di le 1 000. Bona, tsona di go busetsa tlotlo ya gago fa pele ga botlhe ba ba nang nao; o siamisitswe jalo fa pele ga botlhe.”" 
Genesis20:17 Jaanong ya re Aborahame a rapela Modimo jalo, Modimo wa fodisa Abimelege le mosadi wa gagwe le malata a gagwe, mo ba bileng ba belega gape." 
Genesis20:18 Gonne Morena o ne a tswetse dipopelo tsa lelapa la ga Abimelege ka ntlha ya ga Sara, mosadi wa ga Aborahame." 
Genesis21:1 Morena o ne a tshegofatsa Sara jaaka a buile; Morena a direla Sara, ka fa a mo solofeditseng ka teng." 
Genesis21:2 Sara a nna moimana, a belegela Aborahame ngwana wa mosimane mo botsofeng jwa gagwe ka nako e Modimo o neng o e mmoleletse." 
Genesis21:3 Morwawe yo a mo tsaletsweng, yo Sara a mo mmelegetseng, Aborahame a mo taya leina la Isaka." 
Genesis21:4 Aborahame a ba a rupisa Isaka morwawe a le malatsi a a robedi, jaaka Modimo o mo laetse." 
Genesis21:5 Aborahame o ne a le dinyaga di le lekgolo, fa go tsalwa Isaka morwawe." 
Genesis21:6 Sara ene a re: “Modimo o ntiretse setshego; mongwe le mongwe yo o utlwang o tla ntshega.” 
Genesis21:7 A ba a re: “Ke mang yo o neng a ka raya Aborahame a re: ‘Sara o tla amusa bana’? Gonne ke mmelegetse morwa a ntse a tsofetse.” 
Genesis21:8 Ngwana ene a gola, a ba a kgwisiwa. Aborahame a dira moletlo o mogolo ka letsatsi le Isaka o kgwisitsweng ka lone." 
Genesis21:9 Jaanong ya re Sara a bona morwa Hagare wa Moegepeto yo a mmelegetseng Aborahame, a tshega," 
Genesis21:10 a raya Aborahame a re: “Leleka lelata le, le morwaa-lona! Gonne morwa lelata le ga a tshwanela go ja boswa le Isaka morwaake.”" 
Genesis21:11 Lefoko leo la kgopisa Aborahame ka ntlha ya ga morwawe Isemaele. 
Genesis21:12 Mme Modimo wa raya Aborahame wa re: “Se kgopisege ka ntlha ya mosimane le ka ntlha ya lelata la gago. Utlwa lentswe la ga Sara mo go tsotlhe tse o di buang nao; gonne losika lwa gago lo tla bidiwa ka Isaka. 
Genesis21:13 Fela le morwa lelata ke tla mo dira setšhaba se segolo, ka gonne ke ngwana wa gago.”" 
Genesis21:14 Ke fa Aborahame a phakela mo mosong, a tsaya senkgwe le lekuka la metsi, a di naya Hagare, a di baya mo legetleng la gagwe, le ngwana, a mo naya tsela. Hagare a tsamaya, a kgarakgatshega mo sekakeng sa Bereseba." 
Genesis21:15 Ya re metsi a sena go fela mo lekukeng a latlhela ngwana fa tlase ga sengwe sa ditlhatshana," 
Genesis21:16 a tloga, a nna fatshe a lebagana nae a le kgakalanyana, fa bora bo ka hulang go fitlha teng, gonne a re: “Ke palelwa ke go leba ngwana a swa.” A nna jalo a lebaganye nae. Ngwana a tlhatlosa lentswe, a lela." 
Genesis21:17 Modimo wa utlwa lentswe la mosimane. Moengele wa Modimo a bitsa Hagare a le kwa legodimong, a mo raya a re: “Molato ke eng, Hagare? Se boife, gonne Modimo o utlwile lentswe la mosimane fa a leng teng." 
Genesis21:18 Nanoga o tsee mosimane, o mo tshware ka letsogo, gonne ke tla mo dira setšhaba se segolo.”" 
Genesis21:19 Ke fa Modimo o mmudulola matlho, a bona sediba sa metsi, a ya a tlatsa metsi mo lekukeng, a nosa mosimane." 
Genesis21:20 Modimo wa nna le mosimane, a gola, a nna mo sekakeng, a tswa mohulabora." 
Genesis21:21 A nna mo sekakeng sa Pharane; mmaagwe a mmatlela mosadi kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto. 
Genesis21:22 Ka sebaka sona se Abimelege o ne a bua le Aborahame, a na le Phigolo, molaodi wa mephato ya gagwe, a re: “Modimo o na nao mo go tsotlhe tse o di dirang." 
Genesis21:23 Jaanong ge, inkanele fano ka Modimo, fa o se kitla o ntirela ka boikanyologo, le fa e le banake gongwe bana ba banake; mme lorato lo ke go diretseng ka lone, le nna o ntirele ka lone mmogo le lefatshe le o fudisang mo go lone.”" 
Genesis21:24 Aborahame a re: “Ke tla ikana jalo.” 
Genesis21:25 Fela Aborahame a kgalemela Abimelege ka ntlha ya sediba sa metsi se batlhanka ba ga Abimelege ba se mo amogileng ka thata. 
Genesis21:26 Abimelege a araba a re: “Ga ke itse gore ke mang yo o dirileng jalo; le gona ga o a ka wa mpegela; le gona ke simolola go utlwa kajeno.” 
Genesis21:27 Ke fa Aborahame a ntsha dinku le dikgomo, a di naya Abimelege; ba babedi bao ba dira kgolagano jalo." 
Genesis21:28 Mme Aborahame a beela dikwana tse supa tsa letsomane fa thoko. 
Genesis21:29 Ke fa Abimelege a botsa Aborahame a re: “Dikwana tse supa tseo tse o di tlhaotseng di le nosi ke tsa eng?” 
Genesis21:30 Aborahame a re: “Ke go re o amogele dikwana tse supa tseo mo seatleng sa me gore e nne sesupo sa me sa go re ke epile sediba seo.” 
Genesis21:31 Ke ka moo felo foo go biditsweng Bereseba; gonne ba ikanne teng ka bobedi jwa bone. 
Genesis21:32 Ba ne ba dira kgolagano jalo kwa Bereseba. Morago ga moo Abimelege a nanoga, a na le Phigolo, molaodi wa mephato ya gagwe, ba boela kwa lefatsheng la Bafelesita." 
Genesis21:33 Aborahame a tlhoma setlhare sa motamariseka kwa Bereseba; teng koo a bitsa leina la Morena Modimo o o sa khutleng. 
Genesis21:34 Aborahame a nna sebaka se seleele mo lefatsheng la Bafelesita e le moeng. 
Genesis22:1 E rile morago ga ditirafalo tse, Modimo wa leka Aborahame, wa mo raya wa re: “Aborahame!” A araba a re: “Ke fano.”" 
Genesis22:2 Ke fa o re: “A ko o tsee morwao yo o esi yo ò mo ratang, ene Isaka, o ye kwa nageng ya Moria, o mo dire setlhabelo sa phiso teng mo go nngwe ya dithaba e ke tla e go supetsang.”" 
Genesis22:3 Ke fa Aborahame a phakela ka moso, a belesa esele ya gagwe, a tsaya batlhanka ba le babedi ba gagwe, le Isaka morwawe, ba ya nae; a fatsa dikgong tsa setlhabelo sa phiso; a tloga a ya kwa felong fa Modimo o go mmoleletseng." 
Genesis22:4 Ka letsatsi la boraro Aborahame a tsholetsa matlho, a bona felo foo kgakala." 
Genesis22:5 Ke fa Aborahame a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Salang fa le esele, mme nna le mosimane re tla ya fale; e tla re re sena go obamela, re boele kwano go lona.”" 
Genesis22:6 Aborahame a tsaya dikgong tsa setlhabelo sa phiso, a di rwesa Isaka morwawe; a tsaya molelo le thipa ka seatla; bona babedi ba sepela mmogo jalo." 
Genesis22:7 Ke fa Isaka a raya Aborahame rraagwe a re: “Rra!” A araba a re: “Ke fano, morwaaka!” A ba a botsa a re: “Bona, molelo ke o, dikgong ke tse, mme kwana ya setlhabelo sa phiso e kae?”" 
Genesis22:8 Aborahame a araba a re: “Morwaaka, Modimo o tla ipatlela kwana ya setlhabelo sa phiso.” Bona babedi ba sepela mmogo jalo." 
Genesis22:9 Ya re ba sena go fitlha kwa felong fa Modimo o go mmoleletseng, Aborahame a aga aletare teng, a aletsa dikgong, a bofa Isaka morwawe, a mmaya mo aletareng mo godimo ga dikgong." 
Genesis22:10 Aborahame a ntsha letsogo, a tshwara thipa, a re o tlhaba morwawe." 
Genesis22:11 Ke fa moengele wa Morena a mmitsa a le kwa legodimong a re: “Aborahame! Aborahame!” A araba a re: “Ke fano!” 
Genesis22:12 A re: “O se ka wa baya letsogo mo mosimaneng, se mo dire sepe! Gonne jaanong ke a itse gore o boifa Modimo, ka o sa nkganela ka morwao yo o esi.”" 
Genesis22:13 Jaanong ya re Aborahame a tsholetsa matlho, a bona phelehu kwa morago ga gagwe, e tshwerwe dinaka mo sekhung. Aborahame a ya teng, a tsaya phelehu, a e dira setlhabelo sa phiso mo boemong jwa ga morwawe." 
Genesis22:14 Aborahame a taya felo foo leina a re: “Morena-o-bonye”; ke ka moo ba sa ntseng ba bua ba re: “Mo thabeng ya Morena-o-bonye.” 
Genesis22:15 Moengele wa Morena a bitsa Aborahame la bobedi a le kwa legodimong 
Genesis22:16 a re: “Morena a re: Ke ikanne ka nna ka re: E re ka o dirile jalo, o sa nkganela ka morwao yo o esi," 
Genesis22:17 ke tla go tshegofatsa thata, losika lwa gago ke tla lo ntsifatsa gagolo jaaka dinaledi tsa legodimo le jaaka motlhaba o o fa losing lwa lewatle. Losika lwa gago lo tla thopa metse ya baba ba lone." 
Genesis22:18 Ditšhaba tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tla tshegofadiwa ka losika lwa gago, ka ntlha ya gore o utlwile lentswe la me.”" 
Genesis22:19 Ya baa gona Aborahame a boelang kwa batlhankeng ba gagwe; ba tloga ba ya mmogo kwa Bereseba. Mme Aborahame a nna teng. 
Genesis22:20 Ya re morago ga dilo tseo, Aborahame a begelwa ga twe: “Bona, Mileka le ene o belegetse Nahore monnao bana." 
Genesis22:21 E bong Use, morwawe wa ntlha le Buse monnawe, le Kemuele, rraagwe Arame" 
Genesis22:22 le Kesete le Haso le Philetaše le Itelafe le Bethuele.” 
Genesis22:23 Mme Bethuele a tsala Rebeka. Mileka a belegela Nahore monnawe Aborahame ba ba robedi bao. 
Genesis22:24 Mogadingwana wa gagwe yo leina la gagwe e leng Reuma, le ene a belega Teba le Kahame le Thahaše le Maaga." 
Genesis23:1 Sara o phedile dinyaga di le 127," 
Genesis23:2 mme a swela kwa Khiriathe-Areba, ke go re kwa Heberone mo lefatsheng la Kanana. Ke fa Aborahame a tsena go hutsafalela Sara le go mo lelela." 
Genesis23:3 A ba a nanoga, a tlogela moswi wa gagwe, a bua le Bahethe a re:" 
Genesis23:4 “Ke moeng le mofaladi fela mo go lona. Mpheng felo ga phitlho mo go lona, e nne ga me gore ke tsee moswi wa me, ke ye go mo fitlha.”" 
Genesis23:5 Bahethe ba fetola Aborahame, ba mo raya ba re:"
