Genesis23:6 “Re utlwe, morena! O kgosana ya Modimo mo gare ga rona. Fitlha moswi wa gago mo lebitleng le le phalang mabitla a mangwe a rona. Ga go na ope mo go rona yo o tla go ganelang ka lebitla la gagwe, fa o rata go fitlha moswi wa gago.”" 
Genesis23:7 Ke fa Aborahame a nanoga, a ikoba fa pele ga beng ba naga eo, e bong Bahethe," 
Genesis23:8 a bua nabo a re: “Fa lo ntumelela go tlosa moswi wa me fa go nna, le go mo fitlha, nkutlweng, lo nthapelele Eferone, morwa Sohare" 
Genesis23:9 gore a mphe logaga lwa gagwe lwa Makapela lo lo kwa bofelong jwa naga ya gagwe, a lo nnee fa pele ga lona ka tlhwatlhwa e e tshwanetseng, e nne felo ga me ga phitlho.”" 
Genesis23:10 Mme Eferone o ne a ntse mo gare ga Bahethe. Ene Eferone wa Mohethe a fetola Aborahame mo ditsebeng tsa Bahethe botlhe ba ba tsenyeng mo lekgotleng la motse wa gagwe a re: 
Genesis23:11 “Nnyaya, morena, nkutlwe! Naga eo ke a e go naya, le logaga lo lo mo go yona ke a lo go naya; ke lo go naya fa pele ga banna ba morafe wa ga etsho. Fitlha moswi wa gago.”" 
Genesis23:12 Ke fa Aborahame a ikoba fa pele ga beng ba naga eo; 
Genesis23:13 a ba a raya Eferone mo ditsebeng tsa beng ba naga eo a re: “Ee, fa wena o rata ke e reka, ka thapelo nkutlwe, ke lefele naga eo ka selefera, e amogele mo go nna. Foo ke tla fitlha moswi wa me teng.”" 
Genesis23:14 Eferone a fetola Aborahame, a mo raya a re:" 
Genesis23:15 “Morena, nkutlwe, naga ya dišekele di le 400 tsa selefera ke eng fa gare ga me le wena? Fitlha moswi wa gago fela.”" 
Genesis23:16 Aborahame a utlwana le Eferone. Aborahame a lekanyetsa Eferone selefera e a e boletseng mo ditsebeng tsa Bahethe, e bong dišekele di le 400 tsa selefera, tse e neng e le madi a sebaka sele." 
Genesis23:17 Ga tlhomamisiwa jalo gore naga ya ga Eferone e e kwa Makapela e e lebaganyeng le Mamere, naga eo le logaga lo lo mo go yona le ditlhare tsotlhe tse di mo nageng eo, ka fa molelwane o supang ka teng," 
Genesis23:18 ke ya ga Aborahame; o e rekile mo matlhong a Bahethe botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo lekgotleng la ga gabo ka letsatsi leo. 
Genesis23:19 Morago ga moo Aborahame a fitlha Sara, mosadi wa gagwe, mo logageng lwa naga eo ya Makapela e e ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Mamere, yo e leng Heberone mo lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis23:20 Naga eo le logaga lo lo mo go yona ya tswa jalo mo go Bahethe ya nna felo ga mabitla oora Aborahame. 
Genesis24:1 Aborahame o ne a tsofetse a godile thata. Morena o ne a mo tshegofaditse mo dilong tsotlhe. 
Genesis24:2 Jaanong Aborahame a raya motlhanka yo mogolo wa lelapa la gagwe yo o neng a okametse dilo tsotlhe tsa gagwe, a re: “A ko o bee seatla sa gago fa tlase ga letheka la me" 
Genesis24:3 gore ke go ikanise ka Morena Modimo wa legodimo le lefatshe, fa o se nke o batlela morwaake mosadi mo go bomorwadia Bakanana ba ke agileng mo gare ga bone;" 
Genesis24:4 o ikane fa o tla ya kwa lefatsheng la ga etsho le kwa go ba ga etsho, go batlela morwaaka Isaka mosadi teng.”" 
Genesis24:5 Motlhanka a mo raya a re: “Ka gongwe mosadi o tla gana go ntshala morago go tla lefatsheng leno. A foo ke tla tshwanela go busetsa morwao kwa lefatsheng lele, kwa wena o tswang teng?”" 
Genesis24:6 Aborahame a mo araba a re: “Itise gore o se ka wa busetsa morwaake teng. 
Genesis24:7 Morena Modimo wa legodimo yo o nntshitseng mo lapeng la ga rre le mo lefatsheng la ba ga etsho, yo o buileng le nna, yo o inkanetseng a re: ‘Ba losika lwa gago ke tla ba naya lefatshe le,’ ene o tla roma moengele wa gagwe gore a go etelele pele gore o batlele morwaake mosadi teng." 
Genesis24:8 Mme e tla re fa mosadi a gana go tla le wena, o bo o bofologile maikanong a o a inkanetseng. Fela o se ka wa busetsa morwaake teng.”" 
Genesis24:9 Ke fa motlhanka a baya seatla sa gagwe fa tlase ga letheka la ga Aborahame, morena wa gagwe, a mo ikanela jalo ka fa mafokong ao." 
Genesis24:10 Motlhanka yoo a tsaya dikammele di le some mo dikammeleng tsa mongwagwe, a tloga a tshotse dithoto tsa mefutafuta tsa morena wa gagwe. A bolola a ya kwa nageng ya Mesopotamia kwa motseng wa ga Nahore." 
Genesis24:11 E rile a fitlha teng, a khubamisa dikammele ka fa ntle ga motse fa sedibeng sa metsi ka nako ya mantsiboa, fa basadi ba ya nokeng." 
Genesis24:12 A rapela a re: “Morena, Modimo wa ga Aborahame, morena wa me, a ko o dirafatse kajeno se ke se tletseng fa, o direle Aborahame, mong wa me, ka bopelotlhomogi." 
Genesis24:13 Bona, ke eme fano fa motsweding wa metsi, mme bomorwadia batho ba motse ba tla tla go ga metsi." 
Genesis24:14 Jaanong a mosetsana yo ke tla mo rayang ke re: ‘A ko o sikarolole nkgo ya gago gore ke nwe;’ mme a nkaraba a re: ‘Nwaa, le dikammele tsa gago ke tla di nosa,’ a e nne ene yo ò mo laoletseng Isaka motlhanka wa gago. Mme a ke itse ka moo, fa o diretse morena wa me ka bopelotlhomogi.”" 
Genesis24:15 Ya re a ise a fetse go bua jalo, ga tlhaga Rebeka, morwadia Bethuele, morwa Mileka, mosadi wa ga Nahore, monnawe Aborahame, a sikere nkgo mo legetleng." 
Genesis24:16 E ne e le mosetsana yo montle thata, e le lekgarebe le le iseng le angwe ke monna ope; a fologela motsweding, a tlatsa nkgo ya gagwe a ba a tlhatloga." 
Genesis24:17 Ke fa motlhanka a akofa, a mo kgatlhantsha a re: “A ko o nnose metsinyana ka nkgo ya gago!”" 
Genesis24:18 A araba a re: “Nwaa, mong wa me!” A akofa a sikarololela nkgo mo seatleng sa gagwe, a mo nosa." 
Genesis24:19 Ya re a sena go mo nosa, a re: “Le dikammele tsa gago ke tla di gelelela go fitlhelela di kgore.”" 
Genesis24:20 A ba a akofa a tshela metsi a gagwe mo segopong, a siana gape kwa sedibeng go ga, a gelelela dikammele tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
Genesis24:21 Monna yoo, o ne a mo etse tlhoko, a ntse a itidimaletse gore a tle a lemoge, fa Morena a tshegofaditse leeto la gagwe gongwe nnyaya." 
Genesis24:22 Jaanong ya re dikammele di sena go nwa, monna a ntsha lenyena la gouta le bokete jwa lone e leng bontlhanngwe jwa šekele, a ba a mo rwesa mefitshane e le mebedi mo mabogong e bokete jwa yona e leng dišekele di le some tsa gouta." 
Genesis24:23 A mmotsa a re: “O morwadia mang? A ko o mpolelele. A go na le manno mo lapeng la ga eno fa re ka lalang teng?” 
Genesis24:24 A mo araba a re: “Ke morwadia Bethuele yo e leng morwa Mileka le Nahore.” 
Genesis24:25 A ba a mo raya a re: “Re na le lotlhaka lwa mabele le dijo tse dintsi le marobalo.” 
Genesis24:26 Ke fa monna yoo a inama, a obamela Morena," 
Genesis24:27 a re: “A go bakwe Morena, Modimo wa ga Aborahame mongwake, yo o sa tlosang bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe le boammaaruri jwa gagwe mo go mongwake! O ntsamaisitse mo tseleng, a nkgogela lapeng la monnaa morena wa me.”" 
Genesis24:28 Ke fa mosetsana a siana, a begela lelapa la ga mmaagwe tse di ntseng jalo." 
Genesis24:29 Mme Rebeka a bo a na le kgaitsadie, leina la gagwe e le Labane. Labane a sianna kwa monneng yo o kwa motsweding." 
Genesis24:30 A dira jalo a sena go bona lenyena le mefitshane mo mabogong a ga kgaitsadie, a sena go utlwa mafoko a ga Rebeka a a reng: “Monna yole o ntheile jaana le jaana”, mme a ya kwa monneng yole, a fitlhela a eme fa dikammeleng fa motsweding." 
Genesis24:31 A mo raya a re: “Tsena, motshegofadiwa wa Morena! O emetseng kwa ntle? Ke baakantse ntlo le manno a dikammele.”" 
Genesis24:32 Monna yoo a tsena mo lapeng. Mme Labane a golola dikammele, a di alela motlhaka, a di fa dijo; mme monna yoo le banna ba ba nang nae a ba tlisetsa metsi gore ba tlhape dinao." 
Genesis24:33 Mme ya re a fiwa dijo, a re: “Ga nkitla ke ja ke ise ke bolele se ke se romilweng.” Labane a re: “Bolela!”" 
Genesis24:34 A re: “Ke motlhanka wa ga Aborahame. 
Genesis24:35 Morena o tshegofaditse mongwake gagolo, a nna mogolo; a mo naya dinku le dikgomo le selefera le gouta le batlhanka le malata le dikammele le diesele." 
Genesis24:36 Le gona Sara, mosadi wa ga mongwake, o mo tsholetse ngwana wa mosimane, a setse a tsofetse. Jaanong mongwake o abetse morwawe tsotlhe tse o nang natso." 
Genesis24:37 Jaanong mongwake o inkanisitse a re: ‘O se ka wa batlela morwaake mosadi mo go bomorwadia Bakanana ba ke agileng mo lefatsheng la bone," 
Genesis24:38 mme o ye kwa lapeng la ga rre le kwa losikeng lwa ga etsho, o batlele morwaake mosadi teng.’" 
Genesis24:39 Mme ka raya mongwake ka re: ‘Ka gongwe mosadi ga a ka ke a utlwana le nna.’ 
Genesis24:40 Ke fa a nthaya a re: ‘Morena yo ke sepetseng fa pele ga gagwe o tla roma moengele wa gagwe nao, a tlhogonolofatsa leeto la gago gore o batlele morwaake mosadi mo losikeng lwa ga etsho mo lapeng la ga rre." 
Genesis24:41 Fela o tla bo o bofologile maikanong a o a inkanetseng, fa e ka re o fitlha kwa losikeng lwa ga etsho, ba gana go go neela mosadi; foo o tla bo o bofologile maikanong a o a inkanetseng.’" 
Genesis24:42 “Jaanong ka fitlha kajeno fa motsweding, ka rapela ka re: ‘Morena, Modimo wa ga Aborahame mongwake, fa o rata tota go tlhogonolofatsa leeto la me le ke leng mo go lone." 
Genesis24:43 Bona, ke eme fa motsweding wa metsi! – A go nne jaana: Lekgarebe le le tlang go ga, le e tla reng ke le raya ke re: “A ko o nnose metsinyana ka nkgo ya gago;”" 
Genesis24:44 le ntheye le re: “Tsaya o nwe! Le dikammele tsa gago ke tla di nosa,” a e nne ene mosadi yo Morena a mo laoletseng morwa mongwake.’" 
Genesis24:45 Jaanong ya re ke ise ke fetse go bua jalo mo pelong, ka bona Rebeka a tla, a sikere nkgo ya gagwe mo legetleng, a fologela motsweding, a ga. Ka mo raya ka re: ‘A ko o nnose!’" 
Genesis24:46 A akofa, a sikarolola nkgo ya gagwe mo legetleng a re: ‘Tsaya o nwe! Le dikammele tsa gago ke tla di nosa.’ Ka nwa; a ba a nosa le dikammele." 
Genesis24:47 Ka mmotsa ka re: ‘O morwadia mang?’ A re: ‘Ke morwadia Bethuele, morwa Nahore le Mileka.’ Ke fa ke mo rwesa lenyena mo nkong ya gagwe le mefitshane mo mabogong a gagwe." 
Genesis24:48 Ka inama, ka obamela Morena, ka tumisa Morena, Modimo wa ga Aborahame mongwake, yo o ntsamaisitseng mo tseleng e e siameng gore ke batlele morwa mongwake morwadia morwa monnawe." 
Genesis24:49 “Jaanong fa lo rata go direla mongwake ka bopelotlhomogi le boammaaruri, mpoleleleng, le fa go se jalo, mpoleleleng gore ke tle ke bone kwa ke tla yang teng.”" 
Genesis24:50 Ke fa Labane le Bethuele ba araba ba re: “Selo se, se tswa mo Moreneng. Ga re ka ke ra gana le e seng go dumela." 
Genesis24:51 Bona, Rebeka ke yoo fa pele ga gago; mo tsee o tsamae gore a nne mosadi wa morwa mong-wa-go, jaaka Morena a buile.”" 
Genesis24:52 Ya re motlhanka wa ga Aborahame a utlwa mafoko ao, a itatlhela fa fatshe fa pele ga Morena." 
Genesis24:53 Motlhanka a ba a ntsha mekgabo ya selefera le ya gouta le diaparo, a di fa Rebeka; kgaitsadie le mmaagwe le bone a ba fa tsa tlhwatlhwa e kgolo." 
Genesis24:54 Ya baa gona ba jang, ene le banna ba ba nang nae, ba lala teng; ya re ba sena go tsoga ka moso, a re: “Mpheng tsela, ke boele kwa go mongwake!”" 
Genesis24:55 Mme kgaitsadie le mmaagwe ba re: “A mosetsana a name a sa na le rona malatsinyana le fa e ka nna a le some; e be gona a ka tsamayang.” 
Genesis24:56 Mme a ba raya a re: “Se ntieng! Kana Morena o tlhogonolofaditse leeto la me. Mpheng tsela gore ke boele kwa go mongwake.” 
Genesis24:57 Ba re: “A re bitseng mosetsana, re utlwe molomo wa gagwe.”" 
Genesis24:58 Ba bitsa Rebeka, ba mmotsa ba re: “A o tla tsamaya le monna yo?” A re: “Ee, ke tla tsamaya.”" 
Genesis24:59 Ke fa ba naya Rebeka kgaitsadia-bone tsela, a na le mmelegi wa gagwe, ba tsamaya le motlhanka wa ga Aborahame le banna ba gagwe." 
Genesis24:60 Ba tshegofatsa Rebeka, ba mo raya ba re: “Kgaitsadia-rona, o nne mmadiketekete! A bana ba gago ba thope kgoro ya ba ba ba tlhoileng!”" 
Genesis24:61 Rebeka a bolola le basetsana ba gagwe, ba palama dikammele, ba sala monna yole morago. Motlhanka a tsere Rebeka jalo, a tsamaya." 
Genesis24:62 Mme Isaka o ne a boa kwa nageng ya sediba sa “Mophedi-yo-o-mponang,” ka a ne a nna mo nageng ya borwa." 
Genesis24:63 Jaanong Isaka o ne a tswetse kwa nageng go akanya go le maitsiboa. Ya re a tlhatlosa matlho, a bona dikammele di tla." 
Genesis24:64 Le Rebeka a tlhatlosa matlho a bona Isaka. Ke fa a fologa mo kammeleng," 
Genesis24:65 a botsa motlhanka a re: “Ke mang monna yole yo o tsamayang mo nageng a tla go re kgatlhantsha?” Motlhanka a re: “Ke ene mongwake.” Ke fa a tsaya lesire, a itshira ka lone." 
Genesis24:66 Jaanong motlhanka a bolelela Isaka dilo tsotlhe tse o di dirileng. 
Genesis24:67 Isaka a isa Rebeka mo tenteng ya ga mmaagwe, e bong ya ga Sara, a mo tsaya, a nna mosadi wa gagwe, mme a mo rata. Isaka a gomotsega jalo morago ga loso lwa ga mmaagwe." 
Genesis25:1 Aborahame a tsaya mosadi gape; leina la gagwe e ne e le Ketura. 
Genesis25:2 Ene a mo tsalela Simerane le Jokosane le Metane le Midiane le Isepake le Sua. 
Genesis25:3 Jokosane a tsala Šeba le Detane; bomorwa Detane e ne e le Baašuri le Balethuši le Baleumi. 
Genesis25:4 Bomorwa Midiane e ne e le Efa le Efere le Henoge le Abita le Eletaha. Botlhe bao e ne e le bana ba ga Ketura. 
Genesis25:5 Mme Aborahame a abela Isaka tsotlhe tse e leng tsa gagwe. 
Genesis25:6 Fa e le bomorwa bagadingwana ba Aborahame o neng a na nabo, a ba abela dineo, a ba kgaoganya le Isaka morwawe, Aborahame a sa ntse a phela gore ba ye kwa botlhabatsatsi kwa lefatsheng le le ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Genesis25:7 Malatsi a dinyaga tsa bophelo jwa ga Aborahame tse o neng a phela ka tsona ke dinyaga di le 175. 
Genesis25:8 Aborahame a tlhokafala, a swa a tsofetse thata, e le monnamogolo, a jele lefatshe, a bilediwa kwa go borraagwe." 
Genesis25:9 Bomorwawe Isaka le Isemaele ba mo fitlha mo logageng lwa Makapela nageng ya ga Eferone, morwa Sohare wa Mohethe, e e lebaganyeng le Mamere." 
Genesis25:10 Ke naga ele e Aborahame o neng a e reka mo go Bahethe. Ke fa go fitlhilweng Aborahame le Sara, mosadi wa gagwe teng." 
Genesis25:11 Ya re Aborahame a sena go swa, Modimo wa tshegofatsa Isaka morwawe. Isaka a nna kwa sedibeng sa “Mophedi-yo-o-mponang.”" 
Genesis25:12 Losika lwa ga Isemaele, morwa Aborahame, yo Hagare wa Moegepeto, lelata la ga Sara, o mo tsetseng le Aborahame, ke lo:" 
Genesis25:13 Maina a bomorwa Isemaele, a ditshika tsa bone di bidiwang ka ona ke a: Morwa wa ntlha wa ga Isemaele e ne e le Nebayothe; a tlhomagannwa ke Ketare le Atebele le Mibesame" 
Genesis25:14 le Misima le Duma le Masa 
Genesis25:15 le Hatate le Thema le Jeture le Nafise le Kedima. 
Genesis25:16 Ke bone bomorwa Isemaele, ke ona maina a bone mo malapeng a bone le mo metsaneng ya bone ya ditente; ke dikgosana di le 12 tsa ditso tsa tsona." 
Genesis25:17 Dinyaga tsa bophelo jwa ga Isemaele ke di le 137. Ya baa gona a tlhokafalang, a swa, a bilediwa kwa go borraagwe." 
Genesis25:18 Baisemaele ba ne ba agile go simolola kwa Hawila go fitlha kwa Sure yo o mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Egepeto le go fitlha kwa Asiria. Ba nna mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya bomorwa-rraabo botlhe. 
Genesis25:19 Losika lwa ga Isaka, morwa Aborahame, ke lo: Aborahame o ne a tsala Isaka." 
Genesis25:20 Isaka o ne a le dinyaga di le 40, fa a tsaya Rebeka, morwadia Bethuele wa Mosiria wa kwa Phatane-Arame, kgaitsadia Labane wa Mosiria gore a nne mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis25:21 Isaka o ne a rapela Morena ka ntlha ya mosadi wa gagwe, gonne o ne a le moopa. Morena a mo utlwa; mme Rebeka, mosadi wa gagwe, a ithwala." 
Genesis25:22 Mme bana ba thulana mo teng ga gagwe. Ke fa a re: “Fa go ntse jalo ke phelelang?” Mme a ya go botsa Morena. 
Genesis25:23 Morena a mo araba a re: “Ditšhaba tse pedi di mo teng ga gago; merafe e mebedi e tla kgaogana, e tswa mo mpeng ya gago. Morafe mongwe o tla feta o mongwe ka thata. Yo mogolo o tla direla yo mmotlana.”" 
Genesis25:24 E rile malatsi a gagwe a go belega a sena go fitlha, ga bonala gore o tla tshola mafatlha." 
Genesis25:25 Wa ntlha a tla a le mohibidu, a tshwana gotlhe le kobo e e boboa; ke ka moo ba neng ba mmitsa Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Morago ga moo ga tla monnawe, seatla sa gagwe se tshwere serethe sa ga Esau; ene ba mo taya leina la Jakobe. E rile fa ba tsalwa, Isaka a bo a na le dinyaga di le 60." 
Genesis25:27 Jaanong e rile basimane ba gola, Esau a nna motsomi yo o senatla le monna wa kwa nageng, mme Jakobe e ne e le monna yo o masisi, a nna mo gae." 
Genesis25:28 Isaka o ne a rata Esau, ka a ne a natefelwa ke nama ya phologolo, mme Rebeka ene a rata Jakobe." 
Genesis25:29 Jakobe o kile a apaya dijo, mme Esau a tla a tswa kwa nageng a lapile thata." 
Genesis25:30 Ke fa Esau a raya Jakobe a re: “A ko o mphe, ke je bohibidu jo, gonne ke lapile thata.” Ke ka moo ba mo teileng leina la Etomo." 
Genesis25:31 Mme Jakobe a re: “Rekisa pele mo go nna botsalwapele jwa gago.” 
Genesis25:32 Esau a re: “Bona, ke gaufi le go swa; go tsalwa pele go tla nthusa eng?”" 
Genesis25:33 Jakobe a re: “Inkanele pele!” A mo ikanela, a rekisa botsalwapele jwa gagwe mo go Jakobe." 
Genesis25:34 Ke fa Jakobe a fa Esau senkgwe le dikgobe tse dikhibidu, a ja a nwa, a nanoga a tsamaya. Esau a nyatsa jalo botsalwapele jwa gagwe." 
Genesis26:1 Go kile ga tla leuba gape mo lefatsheng leo, jaaka le kile la nna teng mo malatsing a ga Aborahame. Mme Isaka a ya kwa go Abimelege, kgosi ya Bafelesita, kwa Gerara." 
Genesis26:2 Ke fa Morena a iponatsa mo go ene a re: “Se ye kwa Egepeto! Nna mo lefatsheng le ke tla le go bolelelang. 
Genesis26:3 Jaka mo lefatsheng le, ke tla nna nao, ke go tshegofatsa; gonne mafatshe aotlhe ao ke tla a naya wena le losika lwa gago. Ke tla dirafatsa maikano a ke a ikanetseng Aborahame rraago." 
Genesis26:4 Ke tla atisa bana ba gago, ba nna bantsi jaaka dinaledi tsa legodimo, ke naya losika lwa gago mafatshe aotlhe ao, mme ditšhaba tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tla tshegofadiwa ka losika lwa gago." 
Genesis26:5 Ka gonne Aborahame o utlwile lentswe la me, a tshegetsa dikaelo tsa me le ditaolo tsa me le melao ya me le dithuto tsa me.”" 
Genesis26:6 Ke fa Isaka a nna kwa Gerara. 
Genesis26:7 Jaanong ya re fa batho ba teng ba mmotsa ka ga mosadi wa gagwe, a ba raya a re: “Ke kgaitsadiake,” ka a ne a boifa go re: “Ke mosadi wa me.” A gopola gore banna ba mono ba ka mpolaya ka ntlha ya ga Rebeka; gonne o ne a le montle thata." 
Genesis26:8 E rile a sena go nna teng sebaka, Abimelege, kgosi ya Bafelesita, a okomela ka fenstere, a leba a bona Isaka a tshameka le Rebeka, mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis26:9 Ke fa Abimelege a bitsa Isaka a re: “Kana ke ene mosadi wa gago! O ne o buelang o re: ‘Ke ene kgaitsadio’?” Isaka a mo araba a re: “Ke buile jalo ke tshaba gore gongwe nka swa ka ntlha ya gagwe.” 
Genesis26:10 Mme Abimelege a re: “Ke eng se o se re diretseng? Kana go ka bo go diragetse gore mongwe wa batho ba me a itseele mosadi wa gago, mme o ka bo o re dirisitse molato.”" 
Genesis26:11 Ke fa Abimelege a laola morafe otlhe a re: “Yo o amang monna yo le fa e le mosadi wa gagwe ruri o tla bolawa.” 
Genesis26:12 Isaka o ne a lema mo lefatsheng leo. Mme ka ngwaga oo kgetse ya peo ya mmusetsa di le lekgolo, ka Morena a ne a mo tshegofaditse." 
Genesis26:13 Monna yoo a nna mogolo jalo, a nna a humela pele go fitlhelela a nna mogolo thata," 
Genesis26:14 a na le letsomane la dinku, a na le motlhape wa dikgomo le batlhanka ba bantsi, mo Bafelesita ba bileng ba mo fufegela." 
Genesis26:15 Bafelesita ba katela didiba tsotlhe tse batlhanka ba ga rraagwe ba neng ba di epile mo malatsing a ga rraagwe, e bong Aborahame, ba di katela ka mmu." 
Genesis26:16 Abimelege le ene a raya Isaka a re: “Tsamaya o re tlogele; gonne o tiile thata bogolo go rona.” 
Genesis26:17 Ke fa Isaka a huduga teng, a tlhoma ditente fa molapong wa Gerara, a nna teng." 
Genesis26:18 Isaka a katolola didiba tse ba neng ba di epile mo malatsing a ga rraagwe, e bong Aborahame, tse Bafelesita ba neng ba di katetse, fa Aborahame a sena go swa. A di bitsa ka maina a di a teilweng ke rraagwe." 
Genesis26:19 Le gona batlhanka ba ga Isaka ba epa mo mokgatsheng, ba phunya motswedi teng wa metsi a a elang." 
Genesis26:20 Mme badisa ba Gerara ba lwa le badisa ba ga Isaka ba re: “Ke metsi a rona.” Ke fa a o bitsa “Wa-kgang,” ka ba ne ba omana nae." 
Genesis26:21 Ba epa sediba se sengwe. Le sona ba se lwela. Ke fa a se bitsa “Sa-ntwa.” 
Genesis26:22 A huduga teng, a epa sediba se sengwe; sona ba se ka ba se lwela. Ke fa a se taya leina la “Naga-e-e-atlhameng” a re: “Ruri, jaanong Morena o re file naga e e atlhameng gore re ate mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis26:23 A ba a tloga teng, a ya kwa Bereseba." 
Genesis26:24 Morena a iponatsa mo go ene bosigo joo a re: “Ke nna Modimo wa ga Aborahame rraago. Se boife, gonne ke na nao! Ke tla go tshegofatsa, ke atisa losika lwa gago ka ntlha ya ga Aborahame motlhanka wa me.”" 
Genesis26:25 Ke fa a aga aletare teng, a rapela leina la Morena, a tlhoma tente ya gagwe teng. Batlhanka ba ga Isaka ba epa sediba gona." 
Genesis26:26 Jaanong letsatsi le lengwe Abimelege a ya kwa go ene a tswa kwa Gerara, a na le Ahusathe, tsala ya gagwe le Phigolo molaodi wa mephato ya gagwe." 
Genesis26:27 Isaka a ba botsa a re: “Lo tletseng kwa go nna? Kana lo ntlhoile, lwa nteleka mo go lona.”" 
Genesis26:28 Bone ba re: “Re bonye, fa Morena a na nao tota; ra re: A go ko go nne maikano fa gare ga rona, fa gare ga rona le wena, re dire kgolagano nao" 
Genesis26:29 gore o se ka wa re direla bosula, jaaka le rona re ise re ke re go ame; jaaka re go diretse tse di molemo fela, ra go tlogela, wa tsamaya ka kagiso. Kana wena o motshegofadiwa wa Morena.”" 
Genesis26:30 Ke fa a ba direla moletlo, ba a ja, ba a nwa." 
Genesis26:31 Ba phakela ka moso, ba ikanelana. Isaka a ba naya tsela, ba mo tlogela ka kagiso." 
Genesis26:32 Ka lone letsatsi leo ga tla batlhanka ba ga Isaka, ba mmolelela ka ga sediba se ba se epileng, ba mo raya ba re: “Re bonye metsi.”" 
Genesis26:33 A se bitsa “Seba”. Ke ka moo leina la motse e leng Bereseba go fitlhelela kajeno. 
Genesis26:34 E rile Esau a le dinyaga di le 40, a nyala Judithe, morwadia Beri wa Mohethe, le Basemathe, morwadia Elone wa Mohethe." 
Genesis26:35 Bone ba utlwisa Isaka le Rebeka botlhoko jo bo galakang. 
Genesis27:1 E rile Isaka a sena go tsofala le matlho a gagwe a sena go foufala, mo a sa tlholeng a bona, a bitsa Esau morwawe yo mogolo, a mo raya a re: “Morwaaka!” A mo araba a re: “Ke fano.”" 
Genesis27:2 A re: “Bona, ke tsofetse; ga ke itse letsatsi le ke tla swang ka lone." 
Genesis27:3 Jaanong a ko o tseye dilo tsa gago tse o tsomang ka tsona le mokotlopo wa gago le bora jwa gago, o ye kwa nageng, o ye go ntsomela phologolo;" 
Genesis27:4 o tle go ntirela dijo tse di monate tse ke di ratang, o di ntlisetse ke je gore ke tle ke go tshegofatse, ke ise ke swe.”" 
Genesis27:5 Ya re Isaka a bua jalo le Esau morwawe, Rebeka a bo a ntse a reeditse. Jaanong Esau a ya kwa nageng go tsoma phologolo le go e tlisa." 
Genesis27:6 Mme Rebeka a raya Jakobe morwawe a re: “Bona, ke utlwile rraago a bua le Esau mogoloo a re:" 
Genesis27:7 ‘Ntlisetse phologolo, o ntirele dijo tse di monate gore ke je, ke tle ke go tshegofatse fa pele ga Morena, ke ise ke swe.’" 
Genesis27:8 Mme jaanong, morwaaka, utlwa lentswe la me le se ke se go laelang." 
Genesis27:9 A ko o ye kwa letsomaneng, o ye go ntseela diphokwana tse dintle di le pedi tsa dipodi. Ke tla di apeela rraago gore e nne dijo tse di monate tse a di ratang;" 
Genesis27:10 o tla di isa kwa go rraago gore a je, a tle a go tshegofatse, a ise a swe.”" 
Genesis27:11 Jakobe a raya Rebeka mmaagwe a re: “Bona, nkgonne Esau ke monna yo o boboa, mme nna ke monna yo o borethe." 
Genesis27:12 E ka re gongwe rre a nkapaapa, ka nna motsietsi mo matlhong a gagwe, ka itlisetsa khutso, e seng tshegofatso.”" 
Genesis27:13 Ke fa mmaagwe a mo raya a re: “Khutso ya gago e tla wela mo go nna, morwaaka. Utlwa lentswe la me fela, o ye o di ntseele.”" 
Genesis27:14 A ya, a di tsaya, a di tlisetsa mmaagwe; mme mmaagwe a apaya dijo tse di monate ka fa rraagwe a di ratang ka teng." 
Genesis27:15 Rebeka a ba a tsaya diaparo tsa mokgabo tsa ga Esau morwawe yo mogolo, tse di neng di le mo ntlong, a di apesa Jakobe morwawe yo mmotlana." 
Genesis27:16 A ba a mo rwesa mabogo, a mo apesa ka matlalo a diphokwana go bipa borethe molaleng." 
Genesis27:17 Dijo tse di monate le senkgwe se a se besitseng a di neela Jakobe morwawe. 
Genesis27:18 Mme ene a tsena kwa go rraagwe a re: “Rra!” Isaka a re: “Ke fano; o mang, morwaaka?”" 
Genesis27:19 Jakobe a araba rraagwe a re: “Ke nna Esau ngwana wa ntlha wa gago. Ke dirile ka fa o ntaetseng ka teng. A ko o tsoge, o dule, o je phologolo ya me gore mowa wa gago o ntshegofatse.”" 
Genesis27:20 Mme Isaka a botsa morwawe a re: “O e bonye jang ka pele, morwaaka?” A araba a re: “Ke ka gonne Morena a ile a e mpontsha.”" 
Genesis27:21 Ke fa Isaka a raya Jakobe a re: “Atamela tlhe, ke go apaape morwaaka, ke lemoge fa o le morwaake Esau tota gongwe nnyaya.”" 
Genesis27:22 Jakobe a atamela Isaka rraagwe; jaanong a mo apaapa a re: “Lentswe ke la ga Jakobe, mme mabogo ke a ga Esau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Mme a se ka a mo lemoga, gonne mabogo a gagwe a ne a le boboa jaaka mabogo a ga Esau. Ke ka moo o neng a mo tshegofatsa." 
Genesis27:24 A mmotsa gape a re: “A wena o morwaake Esau ka nnete?” A araba a re: “Ke nna.” 
Genesis27:25 Ke fa a re: “Di ntlisetse, ke je nama ya phologolo ya ga morwaake gore mowa wa me o go tshegofatse.” A di isa fa go ene, mme a ja; a ba a mo isetsa weine, mme a nwa." 
Genesis27:26 Morago ga moo Isaka rraagwe a mo raya a re: “A ko o atamele, o nkatle, morwaaka.”" 
Genesis27:27 A atamela, a mo atla. Ya re a utlwa monko wa diaparo tsa gagwe, a mo tshegofatsa a re: “Bona, monko wa ga morwaake o tshwana le monko wa naga e Morena o e tshegofaditseng." 
Genesis27:28 A Modimo o go neye monyo wa legodimo le monono wa lefatshe le letlotlo la mabele le la matute a moweine. 
Genesis27:29 A merafe e go direle, a ditšhaba di go ikobele, o nne morena wa bomorwa-rraago. A bomorwa-mmaago ba go ikobele. Go hutsiwe ba ba go hutsang. Go tshegofadiwe ba ba go tshegofatsang.”" 
Genesis27:30 Jaanong ya re Isaka a sena go fetsa go tshegofatsa Jakobe e le gona fela Jakobe a kgaoganang le rraagwe, Esau mogolowe a goroga, a tswa go tsoma." 
Genesis27:31 A apaya dijo tse di monate le ene, a di isa kwa go rraagwe, a raya rraagwe a re: “A rre a tsoge, a je phologolo ya ga morwawe gore mowa wa gago o ntshegofatse.”" 
Genesis27:32 Mme Isaka rraagwe a mmotsa a re: “Wena o mang?” A araba a re: “Ke nna Esau morwao yo o tsetsweng pele.” 
Genesis27:33 Ke fa Isaka a tshoga ka letshogo le legolo thata a re: “Ke mang ne yo o tsomileng phologolo, a e ntlisetsa, ka ja mo go tsotlhe wena o ise o tle, ka ba ka mo tshegofatsa? Le gona o tla tshegofalela ruri.”" 
Genesis27:34 Ya re Esau a utlwa mafoko a ga rraagwe, a gala ka legalo le legolo le le galakang thata, a raya rraagwe a re: “Rra, le nna ntshegofatse!”" 
Genesis27:35 Mme ene a re: “Monnao o tlile ka boferefere, a utswa tshegofatso ya gago.”" 
Genesis27:36 Esau a re: “Ruri, o bidiwa Jakobe ka tshwanelo. Kana o ntsieditse gabedi: Bogolo jwa me o bo tsere; jaanong o tsere le tshegofatso ya me.” A ba a re: “A ga o a ntshadisetsa tshegofatso epe?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isaka a araba, a raya Esau a re: “Bona, ke mo dirile morena wa gago, ka dira bomorwa-rraagwe botlhe batlhanka ba gagwe, ka mmabalela ka mabele le matute a moweine! Kana wena ke tla go naya eng, morwaaka?”" 
Genesis27:38 Esau a botsa rraagwe a re: “Rra, a o ne o na le tshegofatso e le nngwe fela? Rra, le nna ntshegofatse!” Ke fa Esau a tsholetsa lentswe, a lela." 
Genesis27:39 Jaanong Isaka rraagwe a mo raya a re: “Bona, boago jwa gago bo tla nna kgakala le monono wa lefatshe le kgakala le monyo wa legodimo kwa godimo." 
Genesis27:40 O tla phela ka tšhaka ya gago, o direla monnao; mme e tla re o itwela thata, o role joko ya gagwe mo molaleng wa gago.”" 
Genesis27:41 Ke fa Esau a tlhoa Jakobe ka ntlha ya tshegofatso e rraagwe a mo tshegofaditseng ka yona. Esau a akanya mo pelong a re: “Malatsi a go lelela rre a gaufi; morago ke tla bolaya nnake Jakobe.” 
Genesis27:42 Ya re Rebeka a begelwa mafoko a ga Esau morwawe yo mogolo, a roma, a bitsa Jakobe morwawe yo mmotlana, a mo raya a re: “Bona, Esau o rata go ipusolosetsa mo go wena ka go go bolaya." 
Genesis27:43 Jaanong, morwaaka, utlwa lentswe la me, nanoga o tshabele kwa go Labane kgaitsadiake kwa Harane." 
Genesis27:44 O nne nae malatsi a se kae go fitlhelela bogale jwa ga mogoloo bo time," 
Genesis27:45 go tsamaya kgalefo ya ga mogoloo e go tlogele, a lebale tse o di mo diretseng. Foo ke tla roma, ke go tsaya teng. Kana nka tloga ka latlhegelwang ke bobedi jwa lona ka letsatsi le le lengwe fela?”" 
Genesis27:46 Rebeka a ya, a raya Isaka a re: “Ke sulafalelwa ke bophelo jwa me ka ntlha ya bomorwadia Bahethe. Fa Jakobe a ka tsaya mosadi mo go bomorwadia Bahethe ba lefatshe leno yo o tshwanang le ba, nka phelelang?”" 
Genesis28:1 Ke fa Isaka a bitsa Jakobe, a mo tshegofatsa, a mo laela, a mo raya a re: “O se ka wa tsaya mosadi mo go bomorwadia Kanana!" 
Genesis28:2 Mme nanoga o ye kwa Phatane-Arame kwa lapeng la ga Bethuele rra-mmaago, o tseye mosadi mo go bomorwadia Labane malomaago." 
Genesis28:3 A Modimo, Rra-thata-yotlhe, o go tshegofatse, o go atise, o go ntsifatse gore o nne masomo a merafe." 
Genesis28:4 A o go nee tshegofatso ya ga Aborahame, wena le losika lwa gago gore o rue lefatshe le o leng moeng mo go lone, le Modimo o le neileng Aborahame.”" 
Genesis28:5 Isaka a naya Jakobe tsela jalo, mme a ya kwa Phatane-Arame kwa go Labane, morwa Bethuele wa Mosiria, kgaitsadia Rebeka, mmaagwe Jakobe le Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Jaanong Esau a bona gore Isaka o tshegofaditse Jakobe, e bile a mo roma kwa Phatane-Arame go tsaya mosadi teng, a mo laela ka go mo tshegofatsa a re: “O se ka wa tsaya mosadi mo go bomorwadia Kanana;”" 
Genesis28:7 a bile a bona gore Jakobe a utlwa rraagwe le mmaagwe, a ya kwa Phatane-Arame." 
Genesis28:8 Ya re ka Esau a lemoga ka moo gore bomorwadia Kanana ga ba kgatlhe Isaka rraagwe," 
Genesis28:9 a ya kwa go Isemaele, a tsaya Mahalathe, morwadia Isemaele, morwa Aborahame, kgaitsadia Nebayothe, a nna mosadi wa gagwe; a oketsa basadi ba gagwe jalo." 
Genesis28:10 Jaanong Jakobe a tloga mo Bereseba, a ya kwa Harane;" 
Genesis28:11 a phirimelelwa felong gongwe, a lala teng, a tsaya lengwe la majwe a teng, a le sama, a robala mo felong foo." 
Genesis28:12 A lora, a bona sepalamo se tlhomilwe fa fatshe, se bofelelo jwa sona bo fitlhang kwa legodimong; a ba a bona baengele ba Modimo ba palama, e bile ba fologa ka sona." 
Genesis28:13 A bona Morena a eme mo godimo ga sona a re: “Ke nna Morena, Modimo wa ga Aborahame rraago le Isaka. Lefatshe le o robetseng mo go lone ke tla le naya wena le losika lwa gago." 
Genesis28:14 Losika lwa gago lo tla nna jaaka lerole la lefatshe; o tla anamela kwa bophirimatsatsi le kwa botlhabatsatsi le kwa bokone le kwa borwa. Ditshika tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tla tshegofadiwa ka wena le ka losika lwa gago. 
Genesis28:15 Bona, ke na nao, ke tla go boloka gongwe le gongwe kwa o yang teng; ke tla go busetsa gape mo nageng eno. Gonne ga nkitla ke go tlogela go fitlhelela ke dire tse ke di go solofeditseng.”" 
Genesis28:16 Jaanong ya re Jakobe a thanya mo borokong jwa gagwe a re: “Ruri, Morena o mo felong fano, mme nna ke ne ke sa itse.”" 
Genesis28:17 A boifa a re: “Felo fano go boitshega jang! Ga se naga fela, ke Ntlo ya Modimo; ke kgoro ya legodimo.”" 
Genesis28:18 Jakobe a phakela mo mosong, a tsaya lentswe le o neng a le samile, a le tlhoma go nna segopotso, a tshela lookwane godimo ga lone." 
Genesis28:19 A taya felo foo leina la “Bethele”, mme leina la kgale la motse wa teng e ne e le Luse." 
Genesis28:20 Le gona Jakobe a ipofa ka maikano a re: “Fa Modimo o ka nna le nna, wa mpoloka mo tseleng e ke tsamayang ka yona, wa mpha bogobe go ja le diaparo go apara;" 
Genesis28:21 ka ba ka boela kwa lapeng la ga rre ka kagiso, foo Morena o tla nna Modimo wa me." 
Genesis28:22 Foo lentswe le ke le tlhomileng go nna segopotso e tla nna Ntlo ya Modimo. Gape tsotlhe tse o tla di nnayang ke tla go ntshetsa kabelo ya lesome ya tsona.” 
Genesis29:1 Jakobe a wela tseleng, a ya kwa lefatsheng la ba botlhabatsatsi." 
Genesis29:2 Ya re a lebaleba, a bona sediba mo nageng le matsomane a le mararo a bothile fa go sona. Gonne ba ne ba nosa matsomane ka go gelela mo sedibeng seo. Sediba sa bo se khurumetswe ka letlapa le legolo." 
Genesis29:3 E ne e tle e re fa matsomane otlhe a sena go phuthegela teng, ba pitikolole letlapa, ba le tlose mo molomong wa sediba, ba nose matsomane; morago ba busetse letlapa gape mo mannong a lone mo molomong wa sediba." 
Genesis29:4 Jaanong Jakobe a ba botsa a re: “Ba ga etsho, lo tswa kae?” Ba re: “Re tswa kwa Harane.”" 
Genesis29:5 A ba a ba botsa a re: “A lo itse Labane, morwa Nahore?” Ba re: “Re a mo itse.”" 
Genesis29:6 A ba botsa gape a re: “A o phela sentle?” Ba re: “Ee, o phela sentle. Le gona, bona, Ragele morwadie ke yole, o tla le dinku!”" 
Genesis29:7 Ke fa a re: “E sa le motshegare o mogolo. Ga e ise e be nako ya go phutha diruiwa. Nosang dinku, lo be lo ye lo di fudise.”" 
Genesis29:8 Ba re: “Re a palelwa, ka go ise go phuthege matsomane otlhe; fa badisa ba le mmogo, ba kgona go pitikolola letlapa, ba le tlosa mo molomong wa sediba, ke gona re tla nosang dinku.”" 
Genesis29:9 Ya re a sa ntse a bua nabo, Ragele a tla ka dinku tse e leng tsa ga rraagwe, gonne a ne a di disa." 
Genesis29:10 Mme ya re Jakobe a bona Ragele, morwadia Labane malomaagwe le dinku tsa ga Labane malomaagwe, Jakobe a atamela, a pitikolola letlapa, a le tlosa mo molomong wa sediba, a nosa dinku tsa ga Labane, malomaagwe." 
Genesis29:11 Jakobe a ba a atla Ragele, a tsholetsa lentswe, a lela." 
Genesis29:12 Jakobe a ba a bolelela Ragele gore ke ene wa losika lwa ga rraagwe le gore ke ene morwa Rebeka. Ke fa Ragele a siana, a bolelela rraagwe." 
Genesis29:13 Jaanong ya re Labane a utlwela Jakobe setlogolo sa gagwe, a taboga, a mo kgatlhantsha, a mo tlamparela, a mo atla, a mo isa kwa lapeng la gagwe, mme ene a bolelela Labane tsotlhe tse di mo diragaletseng." 
Genesis29:14 Ke fa Labane a raya Jakobe a re: “Ruri, o lesapo la me le nama ya me.” Jaanong Jakobe a nna kgwedi e le nngwe nae." 
Genesis29:15 Ke fa Labane a raya Jakobe a re: “Fa o le wa ga etsho, a o ka ntirela fela? Mpolelele gore tuelo ya gago e ka nna eng?”" 
Genesis29:16 Jaanong Labane o ne a na le bomorwadie ba le babedi, leina la yo mogolo e le Lea, la yo mmotlana e le Ragele." 
Genesis29:17 Lea o ne a le matlho a a fokolang, mme Ragele a bopegile sentle, a le montle thata." 
Genesis29:18 Ya re ka Jakobe a rata Ragele, a araba a re: “Ke tla go direla dinyaga tse supa ka ntlha ya ga Ragele, morwadio yo mmotlana.”" 
Genesis29:19 Labane a re: “Go molemo, fa ke mo naya wena, e seng monna o sele. Nna le nna.”" 
Genesis29:20 Jakobe a mo direla jalo dinyaga tse supa ka ntlha ya ga Ragele. Tsa nna mo go ene jaaka e kete ke malatsinyana fela, ka gonne o ne a mo rata." 
Genesis29:21 Jaanong Jakobe a raya Labane a re: “Mphe mosadi wa me, gonne malatsi a me a go direla bogadi a fedile gore ke mo nyale.”" 
Genesis29:22 Ke fa Labane a laletsa batho botlhe ba felo foo, a dira moletlo." 
Genesis29:23 Mme ya re go le maitsiboa, a tsaya morwadie Lea, a mo isa kwa go ene, mme Jakobe a tsena mo go ene." 
Genesis29:24 Labane a ntsha Silepa, lelata la gagwe, a mo neela Lea morwadie go nna lelata la gagwe." 
Genesis29:25 Ya re mo mosong Jakobe a fitlhela e le Lea, a raya Labane a re: “Ke eng se o se ntiretseng? A ga ke a go direla ka ntlha ya ga Ragele? O ntsieleditseng?”" 
Genesis29:26 Labane a mo araba a re: “Ga se mokgwa wa rona go ka nyadisa yo mmotlana pele ga yo mogolo. 
Genesis29:27 Fetsa beke ya moletlo le yo, foo re tla go naya yole le ene ka ntlha ya tirelo e o tla e ntirelang dinyaga tse supa tse dingwe gape.”" 
Genesis29:28 Jakobe a dira jalo, a fetsa beke nae. Ke fa Labane a mo naya Ragele morwadie go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis29:29 Le gona Labane a ntsha Bileha, lelata la gagwe, a mo neela Ragele morwadie go nna lelata la gagwe." 
Genesis29:30 Jakobe a tsena le kwa go Ragele, mme a mo rata bogolo go Lea. A mo direla dinyaga tse dingwe tse supa gape." 
Genesis29:31 Ya re Morena a bona, fa Lea a nyadiwa, a mo naya bana, mme Ragele a nna moopa." 
Genesis29:32 Lea a nna moimana, a tshola ngwana wa mosimane, a mo taya leina la Rubene. Gonne a re: “Morena o bonye pogisego ya me. Jaanong monna wa me o tla nthata.”" 
Genesis29:33 A ithwala gape, a tshola ngwana wa mosimane a re: “Morena o utlwile, fa ke sa ratiwe; ke ka moo o mphileng le ene yo.” A mo taya leina la Simeone." 
Genesis29:34 A nna moimana gape, a tshola ngwana wa mosimane a re: “Jaanong monna wa me o tla nkgomarela, gonne ke mo tsaletse basimane ba le bararo.” Ka moo a mo taya leina la Lefi." 
Genesis29:35 A nna moimana gape, a tshola ngwana wa mosimane a re: “Kajeno ke tla baka Morena.” Ka moo a mmitsa Juta. Jaanong a ema go belega." 
Genesis30:1 E rile Ragele a bona, fa a sa tsholele Jakobe bana, Ragele a fufegela mogolowe, a raya Jakobe a re: “Mphe bana! Go seng jalo, ke tla swa.”" 
Genesis30:2 Mme Jakobe a tukela Ragele bogale a re: “A ke nna Modimo o o go timang bana!” 
Genesis30:3 Ragele a re: “Bileha, lelata la me, ke yo, tsena kwa go ene gore a ntsalele bana, le nna ke bone bana ka ene.”" 
Genesis30:4 A mo naya Bileha, lelata la gagwe, go nna mogadingwana, mme Jakobe a tsena kwa go ene." 
Genesis30:5 Bileha a nna moimana, a tsalela Jakobe mosimane." 
Genesis30:6 Ke fa Ragele a re: “Modimo o nkatlholetse, o bile o utlwile lentswe la me, wa mpha ngwana wa mosimane.” Ka moo a mo taya leina la Dane." 
Genesis30:7 Bileha, lelata la ga Ragele, a nna moimana gape, a tsalela Jakobe mosimane wa bobedi." 
Genesis30:8 Ke fa Ragele a re: “Dikampano tsa Modimo ke di kampanye le nkgonne, ka ba ka fenya.” Mme a mo taya leina la Nafetale." 
Genesis30:9 Jaanong ya re Lea a bona, fa a khutlile go belega, a tsaya Silepa, lelata la gagwe, a mo neela Jakobe go nna mogadingwana." 
Genesis30:10 Silepa, lelata la ga Lea, a tsalela Jakobe mosimane." 
Genesis30:11 Ke fa Lea a re: “A letlhogonolo!” A mo taya leina la Gate. 
Genesis30:12 Silepa, lelata la ga Lea, a ba a tsalela Jakobe mosimane wa bobedi." 
Genesis30:13 Ke fa Lea a re: “A lesego la me! Jaanong basadi ba tla mpoka ba re, ke sego.” A mo taya leina la Asere." 
Genesis30:14 Rubene o ne a kile a tsamaya mo malatsing a thobo ya mabele, a bona maungo a meratiso mo nageng, a a tlisetsa Lea mmaagwe. Mme Ragele a raya Lea a re: “A ko o mphe mangwe a maungo a meratiso a ga morwao.”" 
Genesis30:15 Lea a mo araba a re: “A ga o a itumela, ka o nkamogile monna wa me? A le gona o rata go nkamoga maungo a meratiso a ga morwaake?” Ragele a re: “A Jakobe a robale nao bosigo jono, fa o ka mpha maungo a meratiso a ga morwao.”" 
Genesis30:16 Jaanong ya re Jakobe a boa kwa masimong mantsiboa Lea a ya a mo kgatlhantsha, a mo raya a re: “O tshwanetse go tla kwa go nna, gonne ke go rekile ruri ka maungo a meratiso a ga morwaake.” Mme a robala nae bosigo joo." 
Genesis30:17 Modimo wa utlwa Lea, a nna moimana, a tsalela Jakobe mosimane wa botlhano." 
Genesis30:18 Ke fa Lea a re: “Modimo o mphile tuelo, ka gore ke neetse monna wa me lelata la me.” Mme a mo taya leina la Isašare." 
Genesis30:19 Lea a nna moimana gape, a tsalela Jakobe mosimane wa borataro." 
Genesis30:20 Ke fa Lea a re: “Modimo o mphile mpho e ntle. Jaanong monna wa me o tla nna le nna, gonne ke mo tsaletse basimane ba barataro.” Mme a mo taya leina la Sebulone." 
Genesis30:21 Morago ga moo a tshola ngwana wa mosetsana, a mo taya leina la Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Modimo wa gopola Ragele le ene, wa utlwa thapelo ya gagwe, wa mo naya ngwana." 
Genesis30:23 A nna moimana, a tshola ngwana wa mosimane a re: “Modimo o tlositse kgobo ya me.”" 
Genesis30:24 A mo taya leina la Josefa a re: “A Morena a mphe mosimane yo mongwe gape!” 
Genesis30:25 Jaanong ya re Ragele a sena go tshola Josefa, Jakobe a raya Labane a re: “Mphe tsela, ke boele kwa ga etsho le kwa lefatsheng la ga etsho!" 
Genesis30:26 Nthebolele basadi ba me le bana ba me ba ke go diretseng ka ntlha ya bone gore ke tsamae; gonne o itse tiro ya me ka wesi e ke e go diretseng.” 
Genesis30:27 Labane a mo raya a re: “A ko o ntebe ka bopelotlhomogi! Ke lemogile ka mabaka, fa Morena a ntshegofatsa ka ntlha ya gago.”" 
Genesis30:28 A ba a re: “Mpolelele tuelo ya gago; ke tla e go naya.” 
Genesis30:29 A mo fetola a re: “O itse ka wesi ka fa ke go diretseng ka teng le ka fa diruiwa tsa gago di atileng ka teng, ka tlamelo ya me." 
Genesis30:30 Gonne ke fitlhetse o na le di se kae fela, mme jaanong di atile thata. Morena o go tshegofaditse ka se ke se dirang. Mme jaanong motse wa me ke tla o direla leng?”" 
Genesis30:31 Labane a re: “Ke go neye eng?” Jakobe a re: “O se ka wa nnaya sepe. Fa o ka ntirela se ke se buang, ke tla fudisa letsomane la gago gape, ke le disa:" 
Genesis30:32 Ke tla ralala letsomane lotlhe la gago kajeno, ke tlhaola tsotlhe teng tse dikgwana le tse dikgwebana, e leng dikwana tsotlhe tsa dinku tse ditlhwana, le tse dikgwana le tse dikgwebana mo dipoding: Tsona tseo e tla nna tuelo ya me." 
Genesis30:33 Tshiamo ya me e tla supa ka ga me ka metlha e e tlang gore ke siame, fa o tla go tlhola tuelo ya me: Tsotlhe tse di seng dikgwana le tse di seng dikgwebana mo dipoding le tse di seng ditlhwana mo dinkung di tla bo di utswitswe ke nna.”" 
Genesis30:34 Labane a araba a re: “Go siame! A go nne ka fa o buileng ka teng.” 
Genesis30:35 Ka lone letsatsi leo Labane a tlhaola diphoko tse dikgwana le tse dikgwebana le dipodi tsotlhe tse dikgwana le tse dikgwebana, tsotlhe tse bosweu bo leng teng mo go tsona, le tse dintsho tsotlhe mo dinkung, a di neela mo tisong ya bomorwawe." 
Genesis30:36 A ba a di katologanya sebaka sa malatsi a mararo le Jakobe. Mme Jakobe a disa matsomane a ga Labane a a setseng. 
Genesis30:37 Jaanong Jakobe a tsaya dithupa tse dinana tsa popoleri le tsa moamantele le tsa palatane, a seta methaladi mo go tsona, e nne mesweu, a bipolola bosweu jo bo mo dithupeng." 
Genesis30:38 A tlhoma dithupa tse a di setileng mo meseleng le mo digopong tsa metsi, fa difutshane di nwang teng fa pele ga matlho a tsona. Jaanong ya re di tla go nwa, tsa gwelwa." 
Genesis30:39 Difutshane tsa gwelwa di ntse di lebaganye le dithupa tseo; tsa tsala jalo tse di nang le bongolwana le bogwana le bogwebana. 
Genesis30:40 Difutshane tseo Jakobe a di tlhaola. A ba a lebaganya difatlhego tsa tsona le tse di nang le bongolwana le tse dintsho tsotlhe mo matsomaneng a ga Labane. A feta a itlhaolela matsomane a gagwe, a sa a kopanye le matsomane a ga Labane." 
Genesis30:41 Jaanong ka nako le nako, fa difutshane tse di nonofileng di gwelwa, Jakobe a tlhome dithupa mo meseleng fa pele ga matlho a tsona gore di gwelwe fa dithupeng." 
Genesis30:42 Mme fa difutshane di le bokoa, a se ke a di tlhome. Ka mokgwa o tse di bokoa ya nna tsa ga Labane, mme tse di nonofileng ya nna tsa ga Jakobe." 
Genesis30:43 Jakobe a huma jalo thata thata, a na le matsomane a magolo le malata le batlhanka le dikammele le diesele." 
Genesis31:1 Ke fa a utlwa dipolelo tsa bomorwa Labane ba re: “Jakobe o tsere dilo tsotlhe tse e neng e le tsa ga rraetsho. Khumo yotlhe e o e phuthile e tswa mo go tsa ga rraetsho.” 
Genesis31:2 Le gona Jakobe a lemoga sefatlhego sa ga Labane gore ga se tlhole se mo leba sentle jaaka maabane le maloba. 
Genesis31:3 Jaanong Morena a raya Jakobe a re: “Boela kwa lefatsheng la borraago le kwa go ba ga eno; ke tla nna nao.” 
Genesis31:4 Ke fa Jakobe a roma motho go biletsa Ragele le Lea kwa nageng kwa letsomaneng la gagwe," 
Genesis31:5 a ba raya a re: “Ke lemoga ka sefatlhego sa ga rraeno, fa a sa tlhole a nteba jaaka maabane le maloba, mme Modimo wa ga rre o ntse o na le nna." 
Genesis31:6 Lo itse ka losi, fa ke diretse rraeno ka thata yotlhe ya me." 
Genesis31:7 Mme rraeno o ntsieditse, a fetola tuelo ya me gasome; mme Modimo ga o a ka wa mo leseletsa go ka ntshenyetsa." 
Genesis31:8 Ya re fa a re: ‘Tse dikgwebana e tla nna tuelo ya gago,’ letsomane lotlhe la tsala tse dikgwebana. Fa a re: ‘Tse dikgwana e tla nna tuelo ya gago,’ letsomane lotlhe la tsala tse dikgwana." 
Genesis31:9 Ke Modimo o o amogileng rraeno difutshane, wa di nnaya." 
Genesis31:10 “Ka sebaka sa go gwelwa ga difutshane, ka tlhatlosa matlho, ka bona mo torong, ka fitlhela diphelehu le diphoko tse di neng di gwela difutshane, e le tse di nang le bogwana le bongolwana le bogwebana." 
Genesis31:11 Mme moengele wa Modimo a nthaya mo torong a re: ‘Jakobe!’ Ka re: ‘Ke fano.’ 
Genesis31:12 A ba a re: ‘A ko o tlhatlose matlho, o bone diphelehu le diphoko tsotlhe tse di gwelang difutshane, ke tse di nang le bogwana le bongolwana le bogwebana. Gonne ke bonye dilo tsotlhe tse Labane o di go direlang." 
Genesis31:13 Ke nna Modimo wa Bethele kwa o tloditseng lentswe la segopotso teng, kwa o inkanetseng maikano teng. Jaanong, nanoga o tlogele lefatshe leno, o boele kwa lefatsheng la ga eno!’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Ragele le Lea ba mo araba ba re: “A re sa ntse re na le kabelo gongwe boswa mo lapeng la ga rraetsho? 
Genesis31:15 A ga ke re, re kaiwa baeng fela ke ene? Kana o re rekisitse. Le gona o ntse a ja magadi a rona." 
Genesis31:16 Tota khumo yotlhe e Modimo o e amogileng rraetsho ke ya rona le bana ba rona. Jaanong dira tsotlhe tse Modimo o di go laetseng.” 
Genesis31:17 Ke fa Jakobe a huduga. Bana ba gagwe le basadi ba gagwe a ba palamisa dikammele," 
Genesis31:18 a tsaya diruiwa tsotlhe tsa gagwe le dithoto tsotlhe tse a di itiretseng le metlhape yotlhe ya gagwe e a e bapetseng kwa Phatane-Arame, a boela kwa go Isaka, rraagwe, kwa lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis31:19 Labane o ne a sa ntse a ile go beola dinku tsa gagwe. Ke fa Ragele a utswa modimo wa seseto wa ga rraagwe. 
Genesis31:20 Mme Jakobe a tsietsa Labane wa Mosiria, a mo lobela, fa a rata go ngwega." 
Genesis31:21 A ngwega jalo ka tsotlhe tse o nang natso, a tloga, a tshela noka ya Ferathe, a tswelela pele go ya kwa dithabeng tsa Gileate." 
Genesis31:22 Mme e rile ka letsatsi la boraro Labane a bolelelwa gore Jakobe o ngwegile. 
Genesis31:23 Ke fa a tsaya bomorwa-rraagwe, a ya nabo, a mo latela a le bokgakala jwa malatsi a supa, a mo tshwara kwa dithabeng tsa Gileate." 
Genesis31:24 Mme Modimo wa tla kwa go Labane wa Mosiria ka toro bosigo, wa mo raya wa re: “O itise gore o se ka wa bua le Jakobe ka bosula, fa e se ka molemo.”" 
Genesis31:25 Labane a fitlha kwa go Jakobe. Jakobe o ne a tlhomile tente ya gagwe mo thabeng nngwe, Labane le ene a tlhoma ya gagwe mo thabeng e nngwe, e bong ya Gileate, a na le bomorwa-rraagwe." 
Genesis31:26 Mme Labane a raya Jakobe a re: “O dirileng fa o ntobetse, wa hudusa bomorwadiake jaaka batshwarwi ba ntwa?" 
Genesis31:27 Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa o ngwegile, wa ntsietsa, wa se ka wa nkitsise? Kana nka bo ke go felegeditse ka boitumelo, ka difela le ka meropa le diharepa!" 
Genesis31:28 Ga o a ka wa nteseletsa go ka atla bomorwaake le bomorwadiake! O dirile ka boeleele. 
Genesis31:29 Diatla tsa me di na le thata go ka lo direla bosula. Mme Modimo wa ga rraeno o letse o ntheile bosigo wa re: ‘Itise gore o se ka wa bua le Jakobe ka bosula, fa e se ka molemo.’" 
Genesis31:30 “Jaanong go siame, o hudugile, gonne o ne o tlhologeletswe lelapa la ga rraago thata. Mme ke ka ntlha ya eng fa o utswile modimo wa me?”" 
Genesis31:31 Jakobe a araba Labane a re: “Ke ne ka boifa gore o ka tla wa ntseela bomorwadio ka thata. 
Genesis31:32 Jaanong yo o tla fitlhelang modimo wa gago mo go ene, a a se ka a phela. Mphukutse fa pele ga bomorwa-rraetsho, o o batle.” Jakobe o ne a sa itse, fa Ragele a o utswile." 
Genesis31:33 Ke fa Labane a batla mo tenteng ya ga Jakobe le mo go ya ga Lea le mo go ya malata a mabedi, mme a se ka a o bona. A ba a tswa mo tenteng ya ga Lea, a tsena mo go ya ga Ragele." 
Genesis31:34 Mme Ragele o ne a tsere modimo oo, a o beile mo seipeeletsong sa kammele, a ntse mo go ona. Labane a fukutsa tente yotlhe, mme a se ka a o bona." 
Genesis31:35 Ke fa Ragele a raya rraagwe a re: “A matlho a morena wa me a se ka a tuka bogale, fa ke palelwa ke go nanoga fa pele ga gago. Gonne ke na le mokgwa wa basadi.” Labane a fukutsa, mme a se ka a bona modimo oo." 
Genesis31:36 Mme Jakobe a tuka bogale, a omanya Labane. Jakobe a simolola go bua, a botsa Labane a re: “Ke sentseng? Ke fositse ka eng, fa o tla, o ntshetse morago ka bogale jo bo tukang?" 
Genesis31:37 E re ka o fukuditse dithoto tsa me tsotlhe, a o ne wa bona sengwe sa dithoto tsa lapa la gago? Se bee fano fa pele ga ba ga rona gore ba atlhole fa gare ga me le wena." 
Genesis31:38 E setse e le dinyaga di le 20 ke ntse ke na nao. Dinku tsa gago le dipodi tsa gago ga di ise di ke di folotse. Diphelehu tsa letsomane la gago ga ke a di ja. 
Genesis31:39 Tse di gagotsweng ke dibata ga ke a ka ka di go tlisetsa; ke ne ke na le go di lefa, o di lopa mo diatleng tsa me, le fa di ne di utswilwe motshegare gongwe bosigo." 
Genesis31:40 Ke ne ke bolawa ke letsatsi motshegare le serame bosigo; ke tlhoka boroko. 
Genesis31:41 Ke ntse dinyaga di le 20 mo lapeng la gago, ka go direla dinyaga di le 14 ka ntlha ya bomorwadio le dinyaga di le thataro ka ntlha ya letsomane la gago, mme o fetotse tuelo ya me gasome." 
Genesis31:42 Fa Modimo wa ga rre, Modimo wa ga Aborahame, ona o Isaka a o boifang, o ka bo o se na le nna, ruri, wena o ka bo o ntsamaisitse ke iphotlhere fela. Fela Modimo o bonye pogisego ya me le matsapa a diatla tsa me; e bile o letse o di atlhotse.”" 
Genesis31:43 Labane a fetola Jakobe a re: “Basadi ba ke bomorwadiake le basimane ba ke bana ba me le letsomane le ke letsomane la me le tsotlhe tse o di bonang ke tsa me. Mme jaanong bomorwadiake gongwe bana ba bone ba ba ba tsetseng, nka ba tlhokofatsa jang kajeno?" 
Genesis31:44 A re dire kgolagano, nna le wena gore e nne sesupo gare ga me le wena.”" 
Genesis31:45 Ke fa Jakobe a tsaya lentswe, a le tlhoma go nna segopotso." 
Genesis31:46 Jaanong Jakobe a raya bomorwa-rraagwe a re: “Kgobokanyang majwe.” Ba tsaya majwe, ba dira sefikantswe. Ba feta ba jela mmogo mo godimo ga sona." 
Genesis31:47 Labane a se bitsa Jegare-Sahadutha. Jakobe ene a se bitsa Galete. 
Genesis31:48 Ke fa Labane a re: “Sefikantswe se ke sesupo gare ga me le wena kajeno.” Ke ka moo se biditsweng Galete," 
Genesis31:49 le Mitsepha, ka Labane a rile: “Morena a okomele fa gare ga me le wena, fa re sena go kgaogana." 
Genesis31:50 Fa o ka bogisa bomorwadiake, gongwe fa o tsaya basadi ba bangwe kwa ntle ga bomorwadiake – le fa go se na ope fa go rona, itse gore Modimo ke mosupi fa gare ga me le wena.”" 
Genesis31:51 Labane a raya Jakobe gape a re: “Bona, sefikantswe ke se le lentswe la segopotso ke le, ke di tlhomile fa gare ga me le wena." 
Genesis31:52 Sefikantswe se ke sesupo, lentswe la segopotso le ke sesupo sa gore, ke se ka ka feta sefikantswe se, ka tla kwa go wena; mme le wena o se ka wa feta sefikantswe se le lentswe la segopotso le, wa tla kwa go nna ka maikaelelo a a bosula." 
Genesis31:53 A Modimo wa ga Aborahame le Nahore, ona Modimo wa ga rraabo, o atlhole fa gare ga rona.” Ke fa Jakobe a ikana ka ona o o boifiwang ke Isaka rraagwe." 
Genesis31:54 Jakobe a ba a dira setlhabelo gona mo thabeng, a laletsa bomorwa-rraagwe, ba ja dijo mmogo, ba lala mo thabeng." 
Genesis31:55 Jaanong Labane a phakela mosong, a atla bomorwawe le bomorwadie, a ba tshegofatsa. Labane a ba a tloga, a boela kwa ga gabo." 
Genesis32:1 Le Jakobe a fetela pele mo tseleng ya gagwe, mme baengele ba Modimo ba kgatlhana nae." 
Genesis32:2 Ya re Jakobe a ba bona a re: “Ke bothibelelo jwa Modimo.” A taya felo foo leina la Mahanaime. 
Genesis32:3 Jaanong Jakobe a roma barongwi go mo etelela pele go ya kwa go Esau mogolowe, kwa lefatsheng la Seire nageng ya Etomo," 
Genesis32:4 a ba laela a re: “Lo fete lo ree Esau morena wa me, lo re: ‘Jakobe motlhanka wa gago o bua jaana a re: Ke ne ke ile go jaka kwa go Labane, ka diega teng go fitlha nakong eno," 
Genesis32:5 ka bapala dikgomo le diesele le letsomane le batlhanka le malata, mme ke romile go begela morena wa me le go bona bopelotlhomogi mo go ene.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Mme barongwi ba boela kwa go Jakobe ba re: “Re fitlhile kwa go Esau mogoloo; le gona o setse a le mo tseleng go go kgatlhantsha, o na le banna ba le 400.”" 
Genesis32:7 Ke fa Jakobe a boifa thata, a tlalelwa. A ba a kgaoganya batho ba ba nang nae le letsomane le motlhape le dikammele, ya nna mathibelelo a mabedi." 
Genesis32:8 Gonne a re: “Fa Esau a tla kwa bothibelelong bongwe, a bo fenya, bothibelelo jo bo setseng bo ka falola.”" 
Genesis32:9 Jaanong Jakobe a rapela a re: “Modimo wa borre, e bong Aborahame le Isaka, wena Morena yo o ntheileng wa re: ‘Boela kwa lefatsheng la ga eno le kwa go ba ga eno, ke tla go direla molemo!’" 
Genesis32:10 Ga ke a tshwanelwa ke mautlwelo-botlhoko otlhe le boikanyo jotlhe tse o di diretseng motlhanka wa gago. Gonne ke ne ka tshela Joretane yo ke tshotse thobane ya me fela, mme jaanong ke na le meraka e mebedi." 
Genesis32:11 A ko o nthuse, ke phologe mo seatleng sa ga nkgonne, e bong Esau, gonne ke a mmoifa; e se re gongwe a tla, a mpolaya le bana le bommaabo." 
Genesis32:12 Kana wena o rile: ‘Ruri, ke tla go direla tse di molemo, ke atisa losika lwa gago jaaka motlhaba wa lewatle o o sa balweng ka ntlha ya bontsi.’ ”" 
Genesis32:13 Jaanong a lala teng bosigo jole. Mo go tse a di ruileng a ntshetsa Esau mogolowe mpho," 
Genesis32:14 e bong dipodi di le 200 le diphoko di le 20 le dinku di le 200 le diphelehu di le 20 
Genesis32:15 le dikammele tse di amusang di le 30 mmogo le bana ba tsona le dikgomo tse dinamagadi di le 40 le dipoo di le some le diesele tse dinamagadi di le 20 le dieselana di le some. 
Genesis32:16 A di neela batlhanka ba gagwe, setlhopha sengwe le sengwe se le sosi. A laela batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Nketeleleng pele, mme lo ntshe dipaka fa gare ga ditlhopha.”" 
Genesis32:17 A laela wa ntlha a re: “E re fa Esau, nkgonne, a kgatlhana nao, a go botsa a re: ‘O oora mang? O ya kae? Tse o di thibang tse ke tsa oora mang?’" 
Genesis32:18 o re: ‘Ke tsa ga Jakobe, motlhanka wa gago; ke mpho e o e romelang Esau, morena wa me. Bona, le ene ka esi o e tla kwa morago ga rona.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Le wa bobedi a mo laela jalo le wa boraro le botlhe ba ba setseng ditlhopha tsa diruiwa morago, a re: “Buang jalo le Esau, fa lo mmona." 
Genesis32:20 Gape lo bo lo re: ‘Bona, le ene Jakobe, motlhanka wa gago, o re setse morago.’ ” Jakobe o ne a dira jalo, ka a re: “A ke time bogale jwa gagwe ka neo e ke e eteletsang pele. Morago ga moo ke tla mmona; ka gongwe o tla nkamogela sentle.”" 
Genesis32:21 Neo ya mo etelela pele, ene a lala bosigo joo mo bothibelelong." 
Genesis32:22 Mme a tsoga e sa le bosigo joo, a tsaya basadi ba gagwe ka bobedi le bagadingwana ba gagwe ka bobedi le bana ba gagwe ba le 11, a tshela Jaboke fa letsibogong." 
Genesis32:23 A ba tsaya a ba tshedisa noka, a ba a tshedisa tse a nang natso." 
Genesis32:24 Jakobe a sala a le esi. Ke fa monna mongwe a kampana nae ga tsamaya mahube a tswa. 
Genesis32:25 Mme monna yole, ka a bona, a sa mo fenye, a mo itaya mo nokeng ya gagwe, mme Jakobe a kumoga mmasutswane, fa a ntse a sokasokana nae." 
Genesis32:26 Mme monna yole a re: “Ntese ke tsamae, gonne mahube a dule.” Mme Jakobe a re: “Ga nka ke ka go lesa, o ise o ntshegofatse.”" 
Genesis32:27 Ke fa a mmotsa a re: “Leina la gago ke mang?” A re: “Ke Jakobe.” 
Genesis32:28 A fetola a re: “Ga o nke o tlhola o bidiwa Jakobe, jaanong o tla bidiwa Iseraele; gonne o kampanye le Modimo le batho, mme o fentse.”" 
Genesis32:29 Jakobe a botsa a re: “A ko o mpolelele leina la gago.” Yoo a re: “O boletsang leina la me?” A ba a mo tshegofatsa teng koo. 
Genesis32:30 Jakobe a taya felo foo leina a re: Pheniele. Gonne a re: “Ke bonye Modimo, re lebantse difatlhego, ke bile ka phologa.”" 
Genesis32:31 Ya re a sena go feta Pheniele, letsatsi la mo tlhabela, mme a bo a tlhotsa, ka a ne a bolawa ke noka." 
Genesis32:32 Ke ka moo Baiseraele ba sa jeng mosifa wa noka o o mo mmasutswaneng go fitlhelela kajeno, ka a ne a iteile Jakobe mo mmasutswaneng mo mosifeng wa teng." 
Genesis33:1 Jaanong ya re Jakobe a tlhatlosa matlho, a bona Esau a tla a na le banna ba le 400. Ke fa a kgaoganya bana ba gagwe, a ba neela Lea le Ragele le bagadingwana ba babedi." 
Genesis33:2 Bagadingwana le bana ba bone a ba eteletsa pele, ba latelwa ke Lea le bana ba gagwe, Ragele le Josefa ba le kwa morago." 
Genesis33:3 Ene ka esi a ba etelela pele, a inamela fa fatshe ga supa ga tsamaya a fitlha kwa go mogolowe." 
Genesis33:4 Mme Esau a siana go mo kgatlhantsha, a mo tlamparela, a wela mo thamong ya gagwe, a mo atla, mme ba lela." 
Genesis33:5 Esau a tlhatlosa matlho, a bona basadi le bana, a botsa a re: “Ke bomang ba o nang nabo?” A araba a re: “Ke bana ba Modimo o tshegofaditseng motlhanka wa gago ka bone.”" 
Genesis33:6 Ke fa bagadingwana ba atamela, bone le bana ba bone, ba inama." 
Genesis33:7 Le Lea a atamela le bana ba gagwe, ba inama. Morago ga moo ga atamela Josefa le Ragele, ba inama." 
Genesis33:8 Ke fa a botsa a re: “O romeletseng ditlhopha tsotlhe tsele tse ke kgatlhanyeng natso?” A araba a re: “Ke go re, ke bone bopelotlhomogi mo moreneng wa me.”" 
Genesis33:9 Mme Esau a re: “Ke na le tse dintsi, nnaka. A tse o nang natso e nne tsa gago.”" 
Genesis33:10 Jakobe a fetola a re: “Nnyaya, ka thapelo! Fa o ntebile ka bopelotlhomogi, amogela mpho e e tswang mo go nna. Gonne ke bonye sefatlhego sa gago jaaka e kete ke sa Modimo, wa nkamogela ka boitumelo." 
Genesis33:11 A ko o amogele mpho ya me e ke e go tletseng; gonne Modimo o di mphile ka bopelotlhomogi, ke bile ke sa na le tse dintsi.” A mo emelela jalo, ga tsamaya a di amogela." 
Genesis33:12 Jaanong Esau a re: “A re nanoge, re tsamae. Ke tla tsamaya le wena, ke go eteletse pele.”" 
Genesis33:13 Mme a mo raya a re: “Morena wa me o a itse gore, bana ba sa le bannye; le gona ke na le difutshane le dikgomo tse di amusang. Fa ba di tsamaisa thata letsatsi le le lengwe fela, di ka swa tsotlhe." 
Genesis33:14 A morena wa me a etelele motlhanka wa gagwe pele. Nna ke tla tla ke iketlile ka fa diruiwa di tsamayang ka teng tse ke di gatelelang, le ka fa bana ba nonofileng ka teng, go ya go fitlhela ke goroge kwa moreneng wa me kwa Seire.”" 
Genesis33:15 Esau a re: “Nte ke go tlogelele bangwe ba batho ba ke nang nabo!” Mme a fetola a re: “E tla bo e le ka ntlha ya eng? A ke bone bopelotlhomogi fela mo moreneng wa me.” 
Genesis33:16 Foo Esau a wela tsela ka letsatsi leo, a boela kwa Seire." 
Genesis33:17 Mme Jakobe a tloga, a ya kwa Sukothe, a ikagela ntlo teng, a agela diruiwa tsa gagwe maobo. Ke ka moo o teileng felo foo leina la Sukothe." 
Genesis33:18 Jakobe a ba a fitlha ka kagiso kwa motseng wa Šegeme o o mo lefatsheng la Kanana, fa a tswa go boa kwa Phatane-Arame, a thibelela mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya motse." 
Genesis33:19 Sebata seo sa naga se o neng a tlhomile tente ya gagwe mo go sona a se reka mo go bomorwa Hemore, rraagwe Šegeme, ka madi a le lekgolo." 
Genesis33:20 A aga aletare teng, a e bitsa “Modimo wa ga Iseraele ke ona Modimo.”" 
Genesis34:1 Dina, morwadia Lea yo a mo tsaletseng Jakobe, o kile a ile go bona makgarebe a lefatshe leo;" 
Genesis34:2 ke fa Šegeme, morwa Hemore wa Mohewi, kgosi ya lefatshe leo, a mmona, a mo tshwara, a robala nae, a mo senya." 
Genesis34:3 Mme a kgomarela Dina, morwadia Jakobe, ka pelo yotlhe, a rata mosetsana yoo, a bua tse di kgatlhang pelo ya mosetsana yoo." 
Genesis34:4 Šegeme a ba a bua le Hemore rraagwe a re: “Mpatlele mosetsana yoo gore a nne mosadi wa me.” 
Genesis34:5 Mme Jakobe a utlwa, fa Šegeme a sentse Dina, morwadie; jaanong e re ka bomorwawe ba le kwa dikgomong kwa nageng, Jakobe a didimala go fitlhelela ba be ba tla." 
Genesis34:6 Ke fa Hemore, rraagwe Šegeme, a ya kwa go Jakobe go bua nae." 
Genesis34:7 Jaanong e rile bomorwa Jakobe ba tswa kwa nageng, ba tsena mo gae, ba utlwa dilo tseo. Mme ba utlwa botlhoko, ba tuka bogale thata, gonne o ne a dirile boatla mo go Iseraele ka go robala le morwadia Jakobe, ba re: “Se se ntseng jalo ga se a tshwanela go dirwa.”" 
Genesis34:8 Jaanong Hemore a bua nabo a re: “Šegeme morwaake o kgomaretse morwadia-lona ka pelo yotlhe. A ko lo mo mo nee gore e nne mosadi wa gagwe. 
Genesis34:9 Nyalelalanang le rona; re neeleng bomorwadia-lona, lo itseeleng bomorwadia-rona," 
Genesis34:10 lo nne le rona. Lefatshe le tla bo le lo atlhametse. Agang, lo le ralale, lo nnele ruri mo go lone.”" 
Genesis34:11 Le Šegeme a bua le rraagwe Dina le bokgaitsadie a re: “A ke bone bopelotlhomogi mo go lona. Se lo se batlang ke tla se ntsha. 
Genesis34:12 Batlang bogadi le dineo mo go nna ka fa lo ratang ka teng, ke tla di ntsha. Fela mosetsana yoo lo mo nnee, a nne mosadi wa me.”" 
Genesis34:13 Bomorwa Jakobe ba fetola Šegeme le Hemore rraagwe – ba bua ka bolotsana, ka a sentse Dina kgaitsadia-bone –" 
Genesis34:14 ba ba raya ba re: “Ga re ka ke ra naya monna yo o sa rupang kgaitsadia-rona; go ka re tlhabisa ditlhong. 
Genesis34:15 Re ka dumelana le lona fela, fa lo ka dumela go rupa lotlhe jaaka rona." 
Genesis34:16 Foo re tla lo naya bomorwadia-rona, re tsaya bomorwadia-lona; re tla nna le lona, re le morafe o le mongwe fela." 
Genesis34:17 Mme fa lo sa utlwane le rona ka go rupa, re tla tsaya morwadia-rona, re huduga.”" 
Genesis34:18 Mafoko a bone a ne a kgatlha Hemore le Šegeme, morwa Hemore." 
Genesis34:19 Lekau leo la se ka la diega go dira jalo, ka gonne le ne le rata morwadia Jakobe; le gona le ne le tlotlega bogolo go botlhe ba lelapa la ga rraalo." 
Genesis34:20 Jaanong Hemore le Šegeme morwawe ba ya kwa kgotleng ya motse wa bone, ba bua le banna ba motse ba re:" 
Genesis34:21 “Batho bao ba agisanya le rona. A ba nne mo lefatsheng leno, ba le ralale. Kana lefatshe le ba atlhametse mo ntlheng tsotlhe. A re tseeng bomorwadia-bone go nna basadi ba rona; re ba neeleng bomorwadia-rona!" 
Genesis34:22 Mme banna bao ba ka dumela go nna le rona, re nna morafe o le mongwe fela fa banna botlhe ba rona ba ka rupa jaaka bone." 
Genesis34:23 A ga se gore matsomane a bone le dithoto tsa bone le diruiwa tsotlhe tsa bone e tla nna tsa rona? A re dumelaneng nabo gore ba nne le rona.” 
Genesis34:24 Ke fa botlhe ba lekgotla la motse ba dumalelana le Hemore le Šegeme morwawe; ga rupisiwa banna botlhe ba motse. 
Genesis34:25 Jaanong ya re ka letsatsi la boraro, ba sa ntse ba le mo botlhokong, bomorwa Jakobe ba le babedi, e bong Simeone le Lefi, bokgaitsadia Dina, ba tsaya ditšhaka tsa bone ka bobedi jwa bone, ba tsena mo motseng o o iketlileng, ba bolaya banna botlhe." 
Genesis34:26 Le Hemore le Šegeme morwawe ba ba bolaya ka bogale jwa tšhaka, ba ntsha Dina mo ntlong ya ga Šegeme, ba tloga." 
Genesis34:27 Bomorwa Jakobe ba bangwe ba tla kwa go ba ba bolailweng, ba thukhutha motse oo, ka gonne ba ne ba sentse kgaitsadia-bone." 
Genesis34:28 Ba gapa matsomane a bone le matlhape a bone le diesele tsa bone le tse di mo motseng le tse di kwa masimo," 
Genesis34:29 le dithoto tsotlhe tsa bone; ba isa bana botlhe ba bone le basadi ba bone mo botshwarong; ba thukhutha tsotlhe tse di mo matlong. 
Genesis34:30 Ke fa Jakobe a raya Simeone le Lefi a re: “Lo nkisitse mo tatlhegong, lwa nnkgisa mo baaging ba lefatshe leno mo go Bakanana le mo go Baferesi, etswe ke na le banna ba se kae fela. Fa ba ka kgobokana go ntlhasela, ba ka mpolaya, ka nyelediwa nna le ba lapa la me.”" 
Genesis34:31 Mme ba fetola ba re: “Ke eng, fa a ka dira ka kgaitsadia-rona jaaka seaka?”" 
Genesis35:1 Morago ga moo Modimo wa raya Jakobe wa re: “Nanoga o hudugele kwa Bethele, o nne teng, o dire aletare teng ya Modimo o o kileng wa iponatsa mo go wena, fa o tshaba Esau mogoloo.”" 
Genesis35:2 Ke fa Jakobe a raya ba lapa la gagwe le botlhe ba ba nang nae a re: “Tlosang medimo e sele e e mo go lona, lo tlhape, lo apare diaparo di sele." 
Genesis35:3 A re nanogeng, re hudugele kwa Bethele gore ke dire aletare teng ya Modimo o o nkutlwileng ka letsatsi la tlalelo ya me, wa ba wa nna le nna mo tseleng e ke tsamaileng ka yona.”" 
Genesis35:4 Ke fa ba neela Jakobe medimo e sele yotlhe e e mo diatleng tsa bone le manyena a a mo ditsebeng tsa bone. Jaanong Jakobe a di epela fa tlase ga mooka o o neng o le kwa Šegeme. 
Genesis35:5 Ba huduga jalo, mme therego e e tswang mo Modimong ya wela ba metse e e mo tikologong ya bone, mo ba palelwang ke go latelela bomorwa Jakobe." 
Genesis35:6 Jakobe a fitlha kwa Luse yo o mo lefatsheng la Kanana, e bong Bethele, ene le batho botlhe ba ba nang nae;" 
Genesis35:7 a aga aletare, a bitsa felo foo Modimo wa Bethele; gonne Modimo o ne wa mo itshenolela teng, fa a tshaba mogolowe." 
Genesis35:8 Foo ga swa Debora mmelegi wa ga Rebeka, a fitlhwa ka fa ntle ga Bethele ntlheng ya tlase, fa tlase ga mooka; wa ba wa bidiwa setlhare sa selelo." 
Genesis35:9 E rile Jakobe a tswa go boa kwa Phatane-Arame, Modimo wa iponatsa gape mo go ene, wa mo tshegofatsa." 
Genesis35:10 Modimo wa mo raya wa re: “Leina la gago ke Jakobe, mme ga o ne o tlhola o bidiwa Jakobe, mme leina la gago e tla nna Iseraele.” Wa mo taya leina la Iseraele jalo." 
Genesis35:11 Modimo wa ba wa mo raya wa re: “Ke nna Modimo Mothatayotlhe. “Ata o ntsifale! Go tla tswa setšhaba le bontsi jwa ditšhaba mo go wena. Le dikgosi di tla tswa mo go wena. 
Genesis35:12 Le lefatshe le ke le neileng Aborahame le Isaka ke tla le go naya. Lefatshe leo ke tla le naya losika lwa gago sehularong sa gago.” 
Genesis35:13 Ya baa gona Modimo o tlhatlogang wa mo tlogela felong fa o neng o bua nae teng. 
Genesis35:14 Ke fa Jakobe a tlhoma lentswe la segopotso mo felong fa o neng o bua nae teng, e le letlapa la segopotso; a tshela tshupelo ya noo mo go lone, a ba a tshela lookwane mo go lone." 
Genesis35:15 Felo fa Modimo o neng o bua nae teng Jakobe a go bitsa Bethele. 
Genesis35:16 Morago ga moo a huduga kwa Bethele, mme ya re ba sena go atamela Eferatha, Ragele a belega, a bona pelego e e bokete." 
Genesis35:17 Ya re a tlalelwa ke pelego ya gagwe, mmelegisi a mo raya a re: “Se boife, gonne o na le ngwana wa mosimane gape.”" 
Genesis35:18 Jaanong ya re mowa wa gagwe o tswa, ka a ne a swa, a mo taya leina la Benoni, mme rraagwe a mmitsa Benyamene." 
Genesis35:19 Ragele a swa jalo, a fitlhwa fa thoko ga tsela e e yang kwa Eferatha mo e leng Betleheme." 
Genesis35:20 Mme Jakobe a tlhoma lentswe la segopotso mo phupung ya gagwe. Ke lone lentswe la segopotso la phupu ya ga Ragele le le sa leng gona le kajeno. 
Genesis35:21 Iseraele a ba a hudugela pele, a tlhoma tente ya gagwe kwa pele ga Migetale-Etere." 
Genesis35:22 E rile Iseraele a ntse a agile mo lefatsheng leo, Rubene a ya a robala le Bileha mogadingwana wa ga rraagwe. Iseraele a utlwa jalo, a galefa. Bomorwa Jakobe ba bo ba le some le metso e mebedi." 
Genesis35:23 Bomorwa Lea e ne e le Rubene, morwa Jakobe wa ntlha, le Simeone le Lefi le Juta le Isašare le Sebulone." 
Genesis35:24 Bomorwa Ragele e ne e le Josefa le Benyamene. 
Genesis35:25 Bomorwa Bileha, lelata la ga Ragele, e ne e le Dane le Nafetale." 
Genesis35:26 Bomorwa Silepa, lelata la ga Lea, e ne e le Gate le Asere. Ke bone bomorwa Jakobe ba o ba tsetseng, a le kwa Phatane-Arame." 
Genesis35:27 Jakobe a ba a fitlha kwa go Isaka rraagwe kwa Mamere motseng wa ga Areba o e leng Heberone, kwa Aborahame le Isaka ba kileng ba falalela teng." 
Genesis35:28 Sebaka sa bophelo jwa ga Isaka ke dinyaga di le 180. 
Genesis35:29 Ya baa gona Isaka a tlhokafalang, a swa a bilediwa kwa go borraagwe, a tsofetse, a jele lefatshe; mme bomorwawe Esau le Jakobe ba mo fitlha." 
Genesis36:1 Losika lwa ga Esau, e bong Etomo ke lo:" 
Genesis36:2 Esau o ne a tsere basadi ba gagwe mo go bomorwadia Bakanana, e bong Ata, morwadia Elone wa Mohethe le Oholibama, morwadia Ana, yo e leng morwa Sibeone wa Mohewi" 
Genesis36:3 le Basemathe, morwadia Isemaele kgaitsadia Nebayothe." 
Genesis36:4 Ata a tsalela Esau Elifase, mme Basemathe a belega Rehuele." 
Genesis36:5 Oholibama a belega Jeuse le Jaelame le Kora. Bona bao ke bomorwa Esau ba o ba tsaletsweng a sa le mo lefatsheng la Kanana. 
Genesis36:6 Mme Esau a tsaya basadi ba gagwe le bomorwawe le bomorwadie le batho botlhe ba lelapa la gagwe le letsomane la gagwe le diruiwa tsotlhe tsa gagwe le dithoto tsotlhe tsa gagwe tse o di bapetseng mo lefatsheng la Kanana, a hudugela kwa lefatsheng le sele, a kgaogana le Jakobe monnawe." 
Genesis36:7 Gonne diruiwa tsa bone di ne di atile thata, mo ba neng ba palelwa ke go nna mmogo. Lefatshe la majako a bone le ne le sa ba lekane ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa diruiwa tsa bone." 
Genesis36:8 Ka moo Esau a ya go nna kwa dithabeng tsa Seire. Esau ke ene Etomo. 
Genesis36:9 Losika lwa ga Esau, rraabo Baetomo ba ba kwa dithabeng tsa Seire, ke lo:" 
Genesis36:10 Maina a bomorwa Esau ke a: Elifase, morwa Ata, mosadi wa ga Esau, le Rehuele, morwa Basemathe, mosadi wa ga Esau." 
Genesis36:11 Bomorwa Elifase e ne e le Themane le Omare le Sefo le Gaethame le Kenase. 
Genesis36:12 Thimena e ne e le mogadingwana wa ga Elifase, morwa Esau, ene a tsalela Elifase Amaleke. Ke bone bomorwa Ata, mosadi wa ga Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Bomorwa Rehuele e ne e le Nahathe le Sera le Sama le Misa. Bao e ne e le bomorwa Basemathe, mosadi wa ga Esau." 
Genesis36:14 Mosadi wa ga Esau, e bong Oholibama, morwadia Ana yo e leng morwa Sibeone, a tsalela Esau bomorwawe, e bong Jeuse le Jaelame le Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Dikgosana mo go bomorwa Esau ke tse: Tse e leng bomorwa Elifase, morwa Esau wa ntlha, ke kgosana Themane le kgosana Omare le kgosana Sefo le kgosana Kenase" 
Genesis36:16 le kgosana Kora le kgosana Gaethame le kgosana Amaleke. Ke tsona dikgosana tsa losika lwa ga Elifase mo lefatsheng la Etomo. Ke bone bomorwa Ata. 
Genesis36:17 Bomorwa Rehuele, morwa Esau ke ba, e bong kgosana Nahathe le kgosana Sera le kgosana Sama le kgosana Misa. Ke tsona dikgosana tsa losika lwa ga Rehuele mo lefatsheng la Etomo. Ke bone bomorwa Basemathe, mosadi wa ga Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Bomorwa Oholibama, mosadi wa ga Esau, ke ba, e bong kgosana Jeuse le kgosana Jaelame le kgosana Kora. Ke tsona dikgosana tsa ga Oholibama, morwadia Ana, mosadi wa ga Esau." 
Genesis36:19 Ke bone bomorwa Esau. Ke tsona dikgosana tsa bone. Ke ene Etomo. 
Genesis36:20 Bomorwa Seire wa Mohori ba ba neng ba agile mo lefatsheng leo pele ke ba, e bong Lotane le Sobale le Sibeone le Ana" 
Genesis36:21 le Disone le Esere le Disane. Ke tsona dikgosana tsa Bahori, ke bomorwa Seire mo lefatsheng la Etomo." 
Genesis36:22 Bomorwa Lotane e ne e le Hori le Hemame; kgaitsadia Lotane e le Thimena. 
Genesis36:23 Bomorwa Sobale ke Alwane le Manahathe le Ebale le Sefo le Oname. 
Genesis36:24 Bomorwa Sibeone ke Aya le Ana. Ke ene Ana yo o kileng a bona metswedi e e bolelo mo sekakeng, fa a disa diesele tsa ga Sibeone rraagwe." 
Genesis36:25 Morwa Ana ke Disone, morwadia Ana ke Oholibama." 
Genesis36:26 Bomorwa Disone ke Hemetane le Esebane le Itherane le Kerane. 
Genesis36:27 Bomorwa Esere ke Bilehane le Saawane le Akane. 
Genesis36:28 Bomorwa Disane ke Use le Arane. 
Genesis36:29 Dikgosana tsa Bahori ke kgosana Lotane le kgosana Sobale le kgosana Sibeone le kgosana Ana 
Genesis36:30 le kgosana Disone le kgosana Esere le kgosana Disane. Ke tsona dikgosana tsa Bahori ka fa ditsong tsa bone mo lefatsheng la Seire. 
Genesis36:31 Dikgosi tse di busitseng mo lefatsheng la Etomo pele go ise go buse kgosi mo Baiseraeleng ke tse: 
Genesis36:32 Bela, morwa Beore o ne a busa mo Etomo; leina la mošate wa gagwe e le Dinehaba." 
Genesis36:33 Ya re Bela a sena go swa, ga busa Jobabe, morwa Sera, wa kwa Bosera, mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:33 Ya re Bela a sena go swa, ga busa Jobabe, morwa Sera, wa kwa Bosera, mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:34 Ya re Jobabe a sena go swa, ga busa Husame wa kwa lefatsheng la Bathemane mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:34 Ya re Jobabe a sena go swa, ga busa Husame wa kwa lefatsheng la Bathemane mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:35 Ya re Husame a sena go swa, ga busa Hatate, morwa Betate, mo boemong jwa gagwe. Ke ene yo o fentseng Bamidiane mo nageng ya Moabe. Leina la mošate wa gagwe e ne e le Awithe." 
Genesis36:36 Ya re Hatate a sena go swa, ga busa Samela wa kwa Masereka mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:37 Ya re Samela a sena go swa, ga busa Saule wa kwa Rehobothe fa nokeng mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:38 Ya re Saule a sena go swa, ga busa Baale-Hanane, morwa Akebore mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Genesis36:39 Ya re Baale-Hanane, morwa Akebore a sena go swa, ga busa Hatare mo boemong jwa gagwe; leina la mošate wa gagwe e le Phahu, leina la mosadi wa gagwe e le Mehetabele, morwadia Materedi, morwadia Mesahabe." 
Genesis36:40 Maina a dikgosana tsa losika lwa ga Esau ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone le ka fa mafelong a bone le ka fa maineng a bone ke a: Kgosana Thimena le kgosana Alwa le kgosana Jethethe 
Genesis36:41 le kgosana Oholibama le kgosana Ela le kgosana Phinone 
Genesis36:42 le kgosana Kenase le kgosana Themane le kgosana Mibesare 
Genesis36:43 le kgosana Magadiele le kgosana Irame. Ke tsona dikgosana tsa Etomo ka fa mannong a tsona mo lefatsheng le di neng di le ruile. Ke ene Esau, rra Baetomo." 
Genesis37:1 Jakobe o ne a nna mo lefatsheng le rraagwe a neng a le moeng mo go lone, mo lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis37:2 Tse di diragaletseng Jakobe ke tse: E rile Josefa a le dinyaga di le 17, a disa letsomane le bomogolowe – ene a sa le mmotlana – a na le bomorwa Bileha le Silepa, basadi ba ga rraagwe. E ne e a tle e re fa a utlwa tse di bosula ka ga bone, Josefa a di sebele rraabo." 
Genesis37:3 Mme Iseraele a rata Josefa bogolo go bomorwawe botlhe, ka e le ngwana wa botsofe jwa gagwe; a mo direla seaparo se seleele se se nang le mabogo." 
Genesis37:4 Jaanong ya re bomogolowe ba bona, fa rraabo a mo rata bogolo go bone botlhe, ba mo tlhoa, ba se ka ke ba bua nae ka kagiso." 
Genesis37:5 Josefa o kile a lora toro, a e bolelela bomogolowe; ke fa ba mo tlhoa bogolo go pele." 
Genesis37:6 O ne a ba raya a re: “A ko lo utlwe ka ga toro e ke e lorileng. 
Genesis37:7 Ke lorile re bofa dingata kwa tshimong, ka bona ngata ya me e tsoga e ema, ka bona dingata tsa lona di dikanyetsa ngata ya me, di e ikobela.”" 
Genesis37:8 Ke fa bomogolowe ba mo raya ba re: “A o a re, o tla nna kgosi ya rona? A tota o rata go re busa?” Mme letlhoo la bone la oketsega ka ntlha ya ditoro tsa gagwe le mafoko a gagwe." 
Genesis37:9 A boela a lora toro gape, a e bolelela bomogolowe a re: “Ke lorile toro gape, ka bona letsatsi le ngwedi le dinaledi di le 11 di nkobamela.”" 
Genesis37:10 Ya re a bolelela rraagwe le bomogolowe jalo, rraagwe a mo kgalemela, a mo raya a re: “Toro e ke ya eng e o e lorileng? A o a re, nna le mmaago le bomogoloo re tle tota, re inamele fatshe fa pele ga gago?”" 
Genesis37:11 Bomogolowe ba mo fufegela, mme rraagwe a boloka dilo tseo mo pelong." 
Genesis37:12 E kile ya re bomogolowe ba ile go fudisa letsomane la ga rraabo kwa Šegeme," 
Genesis37:13 Iseraele a raya Josefa a re: “A ga ke re, bomogoloo ba fudisa kwa Šegeme? Tlaya, ke go rome kwa go bone.” A mo araba a re: “Ke fano.”" 
Genesis37:14 Jakobe a mo raya a re: “A ko o ye o bone gore bomogoloo ba phela jang, le diruiwa di phela jang; o tle o boe o mpolelele.” A mo roma jalo. Mme Josefa a tloga fa mokgatsheng wa Heberone, a ya a fitlha kwa Šegeme." 
Genesis37:15 Jaanong monna mongwe a mmona a ntse a kgarakgatshega mo nageng; monna yoo a mmotsa a re: “O batlang?” 
Genesis37:16 A araba a re: “Ke batla bonkgonne. A ko o mpolelele gore ba fudisa kae?” 
Genesis37:17 Monna yoo a re: “Ba tlogile fa. Ke ba utlwile ba re: ‘A re yeng kwa Dothane!’ ” Josefa a latela bomogolowe, a ba fitlhela kwa Dothane." 
Genesis37:18 Jaanong ya re ba mmona a sa le kgakala, a ise a ba atamele, ba mo logela maano a go mmolaya;" 
Genesis37:19 ba raana ba re: “Bonang, rra-ditoro ke yole, o e tla." 
Genesis37:20 Re tle re mmolaeng, re mo latlhele mo sedibeng sengwe. Re tla re, o jelwe ke sebata. Re tla bona gore ditoro tsa gagwe di tla dirafala jang!”" 
Genesis37:21 Ya re Rubene a utlwa jalo, a mo golola mo diatleng tsa bone a re: “A re se mmolaeng!”" 
Genesis37:22 Rubene a ba a ba raya a re: “Se tsholeleng madi! Mo latlheleng mo sedibeng se se mo sekakeng, mme lo se ka lwa mmolaya.” A re jalo gore a mo golole mo diatleng tsa bone, a mmusetse kwa go rraagwe." 
Genesis37:23 Jaanong ya re Josefa a sena go fitlha kwa go bomogolowe, ba mo apola seaparo, e bong sele se seleele se se nang le mabogo se a se apereng." 
Genesis37:24 Ba mo tsaya, ba mo latlhela mo sedibeng. Mme sediba seo sa bo se kgadile, go se na metsi mo go sona." 
Genesis37:25 Jaanong ba nna fa fatshe, ba ja. Ya re ba tlhatlosa matlho, ba bona go tla lesomo la Baisemaele, ba tswa kwa Gileate. Dikammele tsa bone tsa bo di rwele boroku le ditlhare le ditlolo tse di nkgang monate, ba di isa kwa Egepeto." 
Genesis37:26 Ke fa Juta a raya bomorwa-rraagwe a re: “Go tla re thusa eng, fa re bolaya monnaa-rona, re loba madi a gagwe?" 
Genesis37:27 A re mo rekiseng mo Baisemaeleng, mme a diatla tsa rona di se ka tsa mmolaya, gonne ke monnaa-rona le nama ya rona.” Bomorwa-rraagwe ba dumalelana nae." 
Genesis37:28 Jaanong ya re go feta barekisi ba Bamidiane, bomogoloa Josefa ba mo goga, ba mo ntsha mo sedibeng, ba rekisa Josefa mo go Baisemaele ka diselefera di le 20; mme bone ba ya le ene kwa Egepeto." 
Genesis37:29 Ya re Rubene a boela kwa sedibeng, a fitlhela Josefa a se yo mo go sona. Ke fa a ikgagola diaparo," 
Genesis37:30 a boela kwa go bomonnawe a re: “Mosimane ga a yo. Mme nna ke tla ya kae?” 
Genesis37:31 Mme ba tsaya seaparo sa ga Josefa, ba tlhaba phoko, ba ina seaparo mo mading," 
Genesis37:32 ba se romela kwa go rraabo, ba se fitlhisa mo go ene ba re: “Ke se re se thwetseng. A ko o se sekaseke, o bone gore a ke seaparo sa ga morwao gongwe nnyaya.”" 
Genesis37:33 Ya re a se bona, a re: “Ke seaparo sa ga morwaake. Sebata se mo jele! Ee, ruri Josefa o gagogantswe!”" 
Genesis37:34 Ke fa Jakobe a ikgagola diaparo, a apara lesela la bohutsana lethekeng, a hutsafalela morwawe malatsi a mantsi." 
Genesis37:35 Bomorwawe botlhe le bomorwadie botlhe ba nanoga, ba re ba mo gomotsa, mme a gana go gomotsega a re: “Nnyaya! Ke tla fologela kwa go morwaake kwa felong ga baswi ke ntse ke hutsafetse.” A mo lelela jalo." 
Genesis37:36 Jaanong Bamidiane ba rekisa Josefa kwa Egepeto mo go Photifare, modiredi wa ga Farao, tlhogo ya bafemedi ba kgosi." 
Genesis38:1 E rile ka sebaka seo Juta a huduga, a tlogela bomorwa-rraagwe, a nna fa monneng mongwe wa Adulame yo leina le gagwe e leng Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Juta a bona teng morwadia monna wa Mokanana yo leina la gagwe e leng Sua. A mo nyala, a nna nae." 
Genesis38:3 Ke fa a ithwala a belega ngwana wa mosimane, a mo taya leina la Ere." 
Genesis38:4 A ba a nna moimana gape, a belega mosimane, a mmitsa Onane." 
Genesis38:5 A boela a tshola ngwana wa mosimane gape, a mo taya leina la Sela, mme ya re a mmelega, Juta a bo a le kwa Kesibe." 
Genesis38:6 Juta a batlela Ere, morwawe wa ntlha, mosadi yo leina la gagwe e leng Thamare." 
Genesis38:7 Mme Ere, morwa Juta yo mogolo, o ne a le bosula mo matlhong a Morena. Ka moo Morena a mo tlogela, a swa." 
Genesis38:8 Ke fa Juta a raya Onane a re: “Tsena kwa mosading wa ga mogoloo, o mo nyale ka fa tshwanelong ya monnaa-motho, o tsalele mogoloo.”" 
Genesis38:9 Onane o ne a itse gore bana ga e ne e nna ba gagwe; ka moo e ne e a tle e re fa a kopana le mosadi wa ga mogolowe, a tshololele fa fatshe gore a se ka a tsalela mogolowe." 
Genesis38:10 Mme tse o neng a di dira tsa se ka tsa kgatlha Morena, le ene a mo tlogela, a swa." 
Genesis38:11 Ke fa Juta a raya Thamare, ngwetsi wa gagwe, a re: “Boela kwa ga eno, o nne motlholagadi go fitlhelela Sela morwaake a gole.” O ne a akanya gore e se re gongwe le ene a swa jaaka bomogolowe. Thamare a ya go nna kwa ga gabo." 
Genesis38:12 Jaanong ya re malatsi a mantsi a sena go feta, Juta a swelwa ke mosadi, e bong morwadia Sua. Ya re Juta a sena go fetsa boswagadi, a ya go tlhola babeodi ba dinku tsa gagwe kwa Thimena, ene le tsala ya gagwe Hira wa Adulame." 
Genesis38:13 Mme Thamare a bolelelwa ga twe: “Bona, ratswalaago o ya kwa Thimena go beola dinku tsa gagwe.”" 
Genesis38:14 Ke fa Thamare a apola diaparo tsa gagwe tsa botlholagadi, a ipipa ka lesire, a ikhurumetsa jalo, a ya a nna fa kgorong ya Enaime yo o fa tseleng e e yang kwa Thimena. A dira jalo, gonne a bona Sela a godile, mme Thamare a sa mo neelwe go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
Genesis38:15 Ya re Juta a mmona, a re ke seaka, ka a ne a ipipile sefatlhego." 
Genesis38:16 A fapogela kwa go ene fa tseleng a re: “A re ye, ke tle kwa go wena.” A re jalo a sa itse, fa e le ngwetsi wa gagwe. Mme ene a re: “O tla mpha eng, fa ke go dumelelela?”"
