Genesis38:17 Juta a re: “Ke tla go romela phokwana e e tswang letsomaneng.” Thamare a re: “Ee, fa o ka nneela peeletso go fitlhelela o e romela.”" 
Genesis38:18 Juta a re: “O batla peeletso ya eng, e nka e go neelang?” A re: “Ke batla palamonwana ya gago mmogo le mogala wa yona le thobane ya gago e e mo seatleng sa gago.” A di mo neela, a ba a kopana nae, mme Thamare a ithwala ka ene." 
Genesis38:19 Thamare a tsoga a tsamaya, a feta a apola lesire la gagwe, a apara diaparo tsa gagwe tsa botlholagadi." 
Genesis38:20 Juta a mo romela phokwana ka tsala ya gagwe ya kwa Adulame gore e amogele dipeeletso mo seatleng sa mosadi yole, mme ya se ka ya mo fitlhela." 
Genesis38:21 Ke fa e botsa batho ba motse oo ya re: “Seaka sele se kae se se neng se le mo Enaime fa tseleng?” Ba araba ba re: “Ga go na seaka mono.” 
Genesis38:22 Ya boela kwa go Juta ya re: “Ga ke a se bona; le gona batho ba felo foo ba re: Ga go na seaka teng.” 
Genesis38:23 Juta a re: “A a nne ka tsona, e se re gongwe ra sotlega. Kana ke mo rometse phokwana e, mme ga o a ka wa mo fitlhela.”" 
Genesis38:24 Jaanong ya re go sena go feta dikgwedi di ka ne di le tharo, Juta a bolelelwa ga twe: “Thamare, ngwetsi wa gago, o dirile boaka, e bile o moimana ka boaka.” Ke fa Juta a re: “Mo ntshetseng kwa ntle, a ye go fisiwa.”" 
Genesis38:25 Ya re a sena go ntshediwa kwa ntle, a roma kwa go ratswalaagwe a re: “Ke moimana ka monna wa dilo tse.” A ba a re: “A ko o sekaseke gore palamonwana e le mogala o le thobane e ke tsa ga mang?”" 
Genesis38:26 Ya re Juta a di bona, a re: “O siame bogolo go nna. Ke ka gore ga ke a mo neela Sela morwaake.” Mme a se ka a tlhola a kopana nae." 
Genesis38:27 Jaanong ya re ka sebaka sa go belega ga gagwe, ga lemogwa, fa a ithwele mafatlha." 
Genesis38:28 Ya re a belega, mongwe a ntsha letsogo, mme mmelegisi a le tshwara, a bofelela tlhale e khibidu mo letsogong la gagwe a re: “Ke ene yo o duleng pele.”" 
Genesis38:29 Mme ya re a sena go busa letsogo, ga tsalwa yo mongwe pele, ke fa mmelegisi a re: “O sutlhile jang, wa itirela phatlha?” Ka moo a mmitsa Pherese." 
Genesis38:30 Morago ga moo ga tswa monnawe yo o nang le tlhale e khibidu mo letsogong. Ene a bidiwa Sera. 
Genesis39:1 E rile Josefa a sena go isiwa kwa Egepeto, Photifare, modiredi wa ga Farao, tlhogo ya bafemedi ba kgosi, monna wa Moegepeto a mo reka mo Baisemaeleng ba ba mo isitseng teng." 
Genesis39:2 Mme Morena o ne a na le Josefa, a nna monna yo o tlhogonolo, a nna mo ntlong ya morena wa gagwe wa Moegepeto." 
Genesis39:3 Jaanong ya re morena wa gagwe a bona, fa Morena a na nae, le gona tsotlhe tse a di dirang Morena a di tsweletsa pele sentle," 
Genesis39:4 Josefa a bona bopelotlhomogi mo go mongwagwe, a mo direla; mme Photifare a mo dira mookamedi wa lelapa la gagwe, a neela tsotlhe tse a nang natso mo taolong ya gagwe." 
Genesis39:5 Go tloga sebakeng seo a mo dirileng mookamedi wa lelapa la gagwe le wa tsotlhe tse a nang natso ka sona, Morena a tshegofatsa lelapa la Moegepeto ka ntlha ya ga Josefa. Tshegofatso ya Morena e ne e le mo go tsotlhe tse a nang natso mo ntlong le kwa masimo." 
Genesis39:6 A tlogela tsotlhe tse a di tshotseng mo taolong ya ga Josefa, a sa tshwenyege ka sepe, fa a ntse a na nae, a lebile dijo tse a di jang fela. Josefa o ne a le montle ka seemo le ka sefatlhego." 
Genesis39:7 Jaanong ya re morago ga dilo tseo, mosadi wa morena wa gagwe a eletsa Josefa ka matlho, a mo raya a re: “Robala le nna!”" 
Genesis39:8 Mme a gana, a raya mosadi wa morena wa gagwe a re: “Bona, mongwake ga a tshwenyege ka sepe sa tse di mo ntlong, o ikantse nna; tsotlhe tse o nang natso o di neetse mo tisong ya me." 
Genesis39:9 Ga a ikae mogolo mo ntlong e bogolo go nna. Le gone ga a nkiletse sepe fa e se wena fela ka go re o mosadi wa gagwe. Kana nka dira jang bosula jo bogolo joo, ka leofela Modimo?”" 
Genesis39:10 Le fa a ntse a raela Josefa jalo ka malatsi otlhe, ene a gana go robala nae le go nna nae." 
Genesis39:11 Jaanong ya re letsatsi le lengwe a tsena mo ntlong go dira tiro ya gagwe, go se na ope wa batho ba lelapa leo mo ntlong," 
Genesis39:12 mosadi a mo tshwara ka seaparo sa gagwe a re: “Robala le nna!” Mme Josefa a tlogela seaparo mo seatleng sa gagwe, a tshabela kwa ntle." 
Genesis39:13 Mme ya re mosadi a bona, fa Josefa a tlogetse seaparo mo seatleng sa gagwe, a tshabetse kwa ntle," 
Genesis39:14 a tlhabela batho ba lapa la gagwe mokgosi, a ba raya a re: “Bonang, Photifare o re tliseditse monna wa Mohebere gore a re sotle. O tlile kwa go nna a re, o robala le nna. Mme ka goa ka lentswe le legolo." 
Genesis39:15 Mme ya re a utlwa ke tlhatlosa lentswe, ke goa, a tlogela seaparo sa gagwe fa go nna, a tshabela kwa ntle.”" 
Genesis39:16 Jaanong a baya seaparo sa gagwe fa thoko ga gagwe go fitlhelela mongwagwe a goroge," 
Genesis39:17 a mmolelela mafoko ona ao a re: “Motlhanka yo wa Mohebere yo o mo tlisitseng fa go rona, o tlile kwa go nna go ntshotla." 
Genesis39:18 Mme ya re ke tlhatlosa lentswe ke goa, a tlogela seaparo sa gagwe fa go nna, a tshabela kwa ntle.”" 
Genesis39:19 Jaanong ya re morena wa gagwe a utlwa mafoko a mosadi wa gagwe yo o neng a mo reile a re: “Motlhanka wa gago o ntiretse jaana le jaana,” a tuka bogale." 
Genesis39:20 Mme morena wa ga Josefa a mo tshwara, a mo tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo felong fa bagolegwi ba kgosi ba golegelwang teng. Josefa a nna gona mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Genesis39:21 Mme Morena o ne a na le Josefa, a mo direla ka bopelotlhomogi, a dira gore a kgatlhe mookamedi wa ntlo ya kgolegelo." 
Genesis39:22 Mme mookamedi wa ntlo ya kgolegelo a neela bagolegwi botlhe ba ba mo ntlong ya kgolegelo mo tisong ya ga Josefa. Tsotlhe tse di dirwang teng tsa dirwa ke ene. 
Genesis39:23 Mookamedi wa ntlo ya kgolegelo o ne a sa tlhole a tlhokomela sepe se se mo tisong ya ga Josefa, ka Morena a na nae. Tse a neng a di dira Morena a di tsweletsa pele sentle." 
Genesis40:1 Ya re morago ga dilo tseo mothokedi wa kgosi ya Egepeto le moapei ba leofela morena wa bone, kgosi ya Egepeto." 
Genesis40:2 Mme Farao a gakalela badiredi ba babedi bao ba gagwe, e bong mookamedi wa bathokedi le mookamedi wa baapei," 
Genesis40:3 a ba tsenya mo tisong kwa ntlong ya kgosana ya bafemedi ba kgosi, e bong mo ntlong ya kgolegelo mo felong fa Josefa a golegetsweng teng." 
Genesis40:4 Mme kgosana ya bafemedi ba kgosi ya ba neela Josefa gore a ba direle. Ba nna sebaka jalo ba disitswe. 
Genesis40:5 Jaanong bosigong jo bongwe mothokedi le moapei ba kgosi ya Egepeto, ba le mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, ba lora ditoro ka bobedi jwa bone, mongwe le mongwe a lora toro ya gagwe. Toro ya mongwe le mongwe e ne e na le thuto ya yona." 
Genesis40:6 Ya re Josefa a tla kwa go bone mo mosong, a ba leba, a bona ba sa itumele." 
Genesis40:7 Ke fa a botsa badiredi ba ga Farao ba ba nang nae mo tisong kwa ntlong ya morena wa gagwe a re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa lo tlhontse difatlhego kajeno?” 
Genesis40:8 Ba mo araba ba re: “Re lorile ditoro, mme ga go na ope fano yo o ka di re tlhalosetsang.” Josefa a ba raya a re: “Ditlhaloso a ga se tsa Modimo? Fela a lo ko lo di mpolelele.”" 
Genesis40:9 Ke fa mookamedi wa bathokedi a bolelela Josefa toro ya gagwe, a mo raya a re: “Mo torong ya me ke bonye setlhare sa moweine se le fa pele ga me;" 
Genesis40:10 setlhare seo sa moweine se na le dikala di le tharo. Ya re e le gona se tlhogang, sa tswa dithunya, le maungo a sona a butswa." 
Genesis40:11 Ka bo ke tshotse senwelo sa ga Farao ka seatla, ka tsaya maungo, ka a gamolela mo senwelong sa ga Farao, ka neela senwelo mo seatleng sa gagwe.”" 
Genesis40:12 Josefa a mo araba a re: “Tlhaloso ya yona ke e: Dikala di le tharo ke malatsi a le mararo. 
Genesis40:13 E tla re malatsi a le mararo a sena go feta, Farao a tsholetse tlhogo ya gago, a go busetse mo tirong ya gago, mme senwelo sa ga Farao o se mo neele mo seatleng sa gagwe jaaka gale, fa o ne o ntse o le mothokedi wa gagwe." 
Genesis40:14 Fela a ko o nkgopole, fa o phela monate, o ntirele ka lorato, o nkumake kwa go Farao, o nthuse gore ke tswe mo ntlong e." 
Genesis40:15 Gonne ke utswilwe tota kwa lefatsheng la Bahebere, mme le mono ga ke a senya sepe se ba ntsentseng mo kgolegong e ka ntlha ya sona.”" 
Genesis40:16 Jaanong ya re mookamedi wa baapei a bona, fa tlhaloso e le molemo, a raya Josefa a re: “Le nna mo torong ya me ke fitlhetse ke rwele diroto di le tharo tse di tletseng dinkgwe tse ditshweu mo tlhogong." 
Genesis40:17 Mo serotong se sa kwa godimo go le dijo tsa mefutafuta tsa ga Farao tse di apeilweng ke baapei. Mme dinonyane tsa di ja, tsa di ntsha mo serotong se ke se rweleng ka tlhogo.”" 
Genesis40:18 Josefa a mo raya a re: “Tlhaloso ya yona ke e: Diroto di le tharo ke malatsi a le mararo. 
Genesis40:19 E tla re malatsi a le mararo a sena go feta, Farao a tsholetse tlhogo ya gago, a e tlose mo go wena, a go pege mo koteng, mme dinonyane di tla ja nama ya gago, di e tlotlonya mo go wena.”" 
Genesis40:20 Jaanong ya re ka letsatsi la boraro e le letsatsi la botsalo jwa ga Farao, a direla batlhanka botlhe ba gagwe moletlo; ke fa a tsholetsa tlhogo ya mookamedi wa bathokedi le ya mookamedi wa baapei mo gare ga batlhanka ba gagwe." 
Genesis40:21 A busetsa mookamedi wa bathokedi mo tirong ya gagwe ya bothokedi, mme a neela Farao senwelo gape mo seatleng sa gagwe." 
Genesis40:22 Mme mookamedi wa baapei a mo pega mo koteng, jaaka Josefa a ne a ba tlhalosetsa." 
Genesis40:23 Mme mookamedi wa bathokedi a se ka a gopola Josefa, a mo lebala fela." 
Genesis41:1 E rile sebaka sa dinyaga di le pedi se sena go feta, Farao a lora, a eme fa nokeng ya Nile," 
Genesis41:2 a bona dikgomo tse supa tse di mebele mentle tse di nonneng di tlhatloga di tswa mo nokeng ya Nile, tsa ba tsa fula mo motlhakeng." 
Genesis41:3 Gape a bona dikgomo tse dingwe tse supa di tlhatloga di tswa mo nokeng ya Nile, di latela tsele, tsa mebele e e maswe, di bopame; tsa tla tsa ema fa thoko ga dikgomo tse di fa losing lwa Nile." 
Genesis41:4 Jaanong dikgomo tsa mebele e e maswe, tse di bopameng, tsa ja dikgomo tse supa tse dintle tse di akotseng. Ke fa Farao a thanya." 
Genesis41:5 A boela a thulamela gape, a lora la bobedi, a bona diako tse supa di tlhoga mo letlhakeng le le lengwe di tsentse di le dintle." 
Genesis41:6 A ba a bona diako tse supa di tlhoga morago ga tsele, e le tse ditshesane tse di fisitsweng ke phefo ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Genesis41:7 Mme diako tse ditshesane tseo tsa metsa diako tsele tse di tsentseng tse di tletseng. Ke fa Farao a thanya, a fitlhela e le toro." 
Genesis41:8 Ya re mo mosong mowa wa gagwe wa bo o huduegile, mme a roma go bitsa baitseanape botlhe ba Egepeto le batlhalefi botlhe ba teng, a ba bolelela toro ya gagwe, mme ga bo go se ope yo o ka e tlhalosetsang Farao." 
Genesis41:9 Ke fa mookamedi wa bathokedi a bua le Farao a re: “Ke gakologelwa maleo a me kajeno. 
Genesis41:10 Farao o ne a gakaletse batlhanka ba gagwe, a ntsenya mo tisong kwa ntlong ya kgosana ya bafemedi ba kgosi, nna le mookamedi wa baapei." 
Genesis41:11 Teng ra lora ditoro mo bosigong bo le bongwe, nna le ene; mongwe le mongwe a lora toro ya gagwe e e nang le thuto ya yona." 
Genesis41:12 Mme ga bo go le lekau la Mohebere fa go rona, e le motlhanka wa kgosana ya bafemedi ba kgosi. Ya re re sena go mmolelela, a re tlhalosetsa ditoro tsa rona, mongwe le mongwe toro ya gagwe." 
Genesis41:13 Mme go dirafetse jaaka a re tlhaloseditse: Nna Farao o mpuseditse mo tirong ya me, mme ene a mo pega.”" 
Genesis41:14 Ke fa Farao a roma go ya go bitsa Josefa. Ba akofa ba mo ntsha mo kgolegong. A beolwa, a apara diaparo di sele, a tla kwa go Farao." 
Genesis41:15 Mme Farao a raya Josefa a re: “Ke lorile toro, mme ga go na ope yo o ka e tlhalosang. Jaanong ke utlwile ka ga gago go twe, e a re fa o utlwa toro, o e tlhalose.”" 
Genesis41:16 Josefa a fetola Farao a re: “Nnyaya, ga se nna! Modimo o tla senolela Farao tse di molemo.”" 
Genesis41:17 Farao a bolelela Josefa a re: “Reetsa, mo torong ya me ke ne ke eme fa losing lwa noka ya Nile." 
Genesis41:18 Ka bona dikgomo tse supa di tlhatloga di tswa mo nokeng ya Nile, di nonne, tsa mebele e mentle; tsa ba tsa fula mo motlhakeng." 
Genesis41:19 Ka bona gape dikgomo tse supa tse dingwe di tlhatloga di latela tsele, di bopame, tsa mebele e e maswe thata, di otile. Ga ke ise nke ke bone sepe mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Egepeto se se tshwanang natso ka maswe." 
Genesis41:20 Mme dikgomo tse di bopameng tse di maswe tseo tsa ja dikgomo tse supa tsa pele tse di nonneng. 
Genesis41:21 Jaanong ya re di sena go tsena mo maleng a tsona, ga bo go sa bonale gore a di tsenye mo maleng a tsona, di ntse di le mekodue fela jaaka mo tshimologong. Ke fa ke thanya." 
Genesis41:22 Gape ka bona diako tse supa di tlhoga mo letlhakeng le le lengwe di tsentse di le dintle. 
Genesis41:23 Morago ga tsona ka bona go tlhoga diako tse supa tse e leng metlhose fela, tse di se nang sepe, tse di fisitsweng ke phefo ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Genesis41:24 Jaanong diako tse di se nang sepe tsa metsa diako tse supa tse dintle. Ka bolelela baitseanape jalo, mme ga bo go se ope yo o ka ntlhalosetsang toro eo.”" 
Genesis41:25 Ke fa Josefa a raya Farao a re: “Toro ya ga Farao ke e le nngwe fela. Modimo o itsisitse Farao tse o tla di dirang. 
Genesis41:26 Dikgomo tse supa tse dintle ke dinyaga tse supa le diako tse dintle tse supa ke dinyaga tse supa. Ke toro e le nngwe. 
Genesis41:27 Le dikgomo tse supa tse di bopameng tse di maswe tse di tlhatlogileng, tsa latela tsele, ke dinyaga tse supa. Le diako tse supa tse di se nang sepe tse di fisitsweng ke phefo ya botlhabatsatsi, e tla nna dinyaga tse supa tsa leuba." 
Genesis41:28 Ke sona se ke se boleletseng Farao ka re: ‘Modimo o bontshitse Farao se o tla se dirang.’ 
Genesis41:29 Itse gore go tla tla dinyaga tse supa tsa letlotlo le legolo mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Egepeto. 
Genesis41:30 Mme di tla latelwa ke dinyaga tse supa tsa leuba. Foo go tla lebalwa letlotlo lotlhe lele mo lefatsheng la Egepeto. Leuba le tla senya lefatshe. 
Genesis41:31 Letlotlo lele ga le nke le tlhola le gopolwa mo lefatsheng ka ntlha ya leuba le le tla le latelang; gonne le tla nna makete thata. 
Genesis41:32 Mme fa Farao a ne a boelela, a lora toro gabedi, ke go re: Selo se, se tlhomame; Modimo o tla akofa o se dirafatsa." 
Genesis41:33 “Jaanong a Farao a batle monna yo o nang le tlhaloganyo, yo o botlhale, a mo dire mookamedi wa lefatshe la Egepeto." 
Genesis41:34 A Farao a dire jaana: A a bee balebalebi, a ba laodise lefatshe gore ba ntshise batho ba lefatshe la Egepeto palo ya botlhano ya thobo mo dinyageng tse supa tsa letlotlo." 
Genesis41:35 A ba phuthe dijo tsotlhe tsa dinyaga tse di molemo tseo tse di tlang jaanong, ba kgobokanye mabele, a nne mo taolong ya ga Farao; ba boloke dijo mo metseng" 
Genesis41:36 gore dijo tseo di bolokelwe lefatshe, di tle di le thuse mo dinyageng tse supa tsa leuba tse di tla nnang teng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto gore lefatshe le se ka la nyelediwa ke tlala.”" 
Genesis41:37 Polelo e e ne ya kgatlha Farao le batlhanka botlhe ba gagwe. 
Genesis41:38 Mme Farao a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “A re ka bona yo mongwe yo o tshwanang le monna yo, yo Mowa wa Modimo o leng mo go ene?”" 
Genesis41:39 Mme Farao a raya Josefa a re: “E re ka Modimo o setse o go senoletse tsotlhe tseo ga re bone yo mongwe yo o nang le tlhaloganyo le botlhale jaaka wena. 
Genesis41:40 Wena o tla okamela lelapa la me; morafe otlhe wa me o tla laolwa ke molomo wa gago. Ke tla go feta fela ka sedulo sa bogosi.” 
Genesis41:41 Farao a raya Josefa gape a re: “Bona, ke go dirile mookamedi wa lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto.”" 
Genesis41:42 Ke fa Farao a rola palamonwana e e kanang ya gagwe mo monwaneng wa gagwe, a e rwesa Josefa mo monwaneng, a mo apesa diaparo tsa masela a mantlentle, a mo kgabisa ka mhiri wa gouta mo molaleng wa gagwe." 
Genesis41:43 A ba a mo palamisa koloi ya bobedi ya gagwe; ba tlhaba mokgosi fa pele ga gagwe ba re: “Khubamang!” A mo dira jalo mookamedi wa lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto. 
Genesis41:44 Farao a ba a raya Josefa a re: “Ke nna Farao. Mme ga go na ope yo o tla dirang ka letsogo gongwe go tsamaya ka lekoto mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Egepeto kwa ntle ga gago.” 
Genesis41:45 Farao a taya Josefa leina la Safenathe-Phanea, a mo neela Asenathe morwadia Photifera, moperesiti wa kwa One, go nna mosadi wa gagwe. Josefa a tloga, a photlaphotla lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto." 
Genesis41:46 E rile motlhang Josefa a emang fa pele ga Farao, kgosi ya Egepeto, a bo a le dinyaga di le 30. Jaanong Josefa a tloga mo go Farao, a photlaphotla lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto." 
Genesis41:47 Mme lefatshe la ungwa mabele a mantsi thata mo dinyageng tse supa tsa letlotlo. 
Genesis41:48 Josefa a kgobokanya dijo tsotlhe tse di kgethilweng tsa dinyaga tse supa tsa letlotlo mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, a bolokela dijo mo metseng. Dijo tsa masimo a motse mongwe le mongwe a di phuthela mo go ona." 
Genesis41:49 Josefa a kgobokanya mabele a mantsintsi jalo a a kana ka motlhaba wa lewatle, go fitlhelela a lape go a bala, gonne a ne a se na palo." 
Genesis41:50 Josefa a tsala bana ba basimane ba le babedi, dingwaga tsa tlala di ise di tle; a ba tsala le Asenathe, morwadia Photifera, moperesiti wa kwa One." 
Genesis41:51 Yo o tsetsweng pele Josefa a mmitsa Manase. Gonne a re: “Modimo o ntebaditse mathata otlhe a me le legae la ga etsho.” 
Genesis41:52 Wa bobedi a mo taya leina la Eferaime. Gonne a re: “Modimo o nkungwisitse mo lefatsheng la pogisego ya me.” 
Genesis41:53 Jaanong dinyaga tse supa tsa letlotlo la lefatshe la Egepeto tsa fela. 
Genesis41:54 Ga simologa dinyaga tse supa tsa leuba, tsa tla jaaka Josefa a buile. Ga nna tlala mo mafatsheng aotlhe, mme mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Egepeto dijo di ne di le teng." 
Genesis41:55 Jaanong e rile lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto le bolawa ke tlala, batho ba lelela dijo mo go Farao. Mme Farao a laela Baegepeto botlhe a re: “Yaang kwa go Josefa, lo dire se o tla se lo bolelelang.”" 
Genesis41:56 Mme leuba leo le ne le le mo lefatsheng lotlhe. Ke fa Josefa a bula difala tsotlhe tsa mabele, a a rekisa mo Baegepetong. Tlala ya nna kgolo mo lefatsheng la Egepeto." 
Genesis41:57 Ba mafatshe aotlhe ba ne ba tla kwa Egepeto go reka mabele mo go Josefa. Gonne tlala e ne e le kgolo mo mafatsheng otlhe. 
Genesis42:1 E rile Jakobe a utlwela gore mabele a teng kwa Egepeto, a raya bomorwawe a re: “Lo lebanelang?”" 
Genesis42:2 A ba a re: “Bonang, ke utlwetse mabele kwa Egepeto. Yaang lo ye go re rekela mabele teng gore re se ka ra swa ka tlala.”" 
Genesis42:3 Ke fa bomogoloa Josefa ba le some ba ya kwa Egepeto go reka mabele teng. 
Genesis42:4 Mme Benyamene, monnaa Josefa, Jakobe a se ka a mo roma le bomogolowe; gonne a tshaba gore e ka re gongwe kotsi ya mo wela mo tseleng." 
Genesis42:5 Bomorwa Iseraele ba fitlha jalo go reka mabele ba na le ba bangwe ba ba ileng teng; gonne go ne go le leuba mo lefatsheng la Kanana. 
Genesis42:6 Mme Josefa e ne e le molaodi mo lefatsheng, e le ene yo o rekisang mabele mo bathong botlhe ba lefatshe. Jaanong ya re bomogolowe ba fitlha, ba inamela fa fatshe fa pele ga gagwe." 
Genesis42:7 Mme ya re Josefa a bona bomogolowe, a ba itse, a ba itobela, a bua nabo ka bogale, a ba botsa a re: “Lo tswa kae?” Ba re: “Re tswa kwa lefatsheng la Kanana, re tsile go reka dijo.”" 
Genesis42:8 Josefa ene a itse bomogolowe, mme bone ba se ka ba mo itse." 
Genesis42:9 Ke fa Josefa a gakologelwa ditoro tse a kileng a di lora ka ga bone a ba raya a re: “Lo batlhodi, lo tlile go bona fa lefatshe le sa femelwang teng.”" 
Genesis42:10 Ba mo fetola ba re: “Nnyaya, morena! Batlhanka ba gago ba tlile go reka dijo." 
Genesis42:11 Rona rotlhe re bomorwa monna a le mongwe. Re batho ba nnete. Batlhanka ba gago ga se batlhodi.” 
Genesis42:12 Mme a ba fetola a re: “Nnyaya! Lo a aka, lo tlile go bona fa lefatshe le sa femelwang teng.”" 
Genesis42:13 Bone ba re: “Batlhanka ba gago ke ba le 12, re bomorwa motho, bomorwa motho a le mongwe wa kwa lefatsheng la Kanana. Yo mmotlana o setse le rraetsho, yo mongwe ga a tlhole a le teng.”" 
Genesis42:14 Josefa a ba raya a re: “Go ntse jaaka ke lo boleletse ka re: ‘Lo batlhodi!’ 
Genesis42:15 Se ke tla itseng nnete ya lona ka sona ke se: Ke ikana ka Farao! Ga lo ka ke lwa tloga mono, monnaa-lona a ise a tle kwano pele." 
Genesis42:16 Romang mongwe wa lona, a ye go tsaya monnaa-lona, mme lona lo sale lo golegilwe, ke tle ke bone gore a lo ne lo bua nnete. Mme fa go se jalo – ruri ka Farao – lo batlhodi!”" 
Genesis42:17 Ke fa a ba tsenya mmogo mo kgolegong malatsi a le mararo. 
Genesis42:18 Mme ka letsatsi la boraro Josefa a ba raya a re: “Dirang jaana, foo lo tla phela – gonne ke boifa Modimo." 
Genesis42:19 Fa lo le batho ba nnete, a mongwe wa lona a sale a golegilwe mo ntlong ya kgolegelo e lo leng mo go yona, mme lona lo tsamae lo isetse tlala ya malapa a lona mabele." 
Genesis42:20 Fela lo tlise monnaa-lona kwano go nna. Foo mafoko a lona a tla itshupa, fa e le a nnete gore lo se ka lwa swa.” Mme ba utlwisisa." 
Genesis42:21 Ke fa ba rerisanya ba re: “Re iteelwa molato o re leofetseng monnaa-rona ka ona. Gonne re ne ra bona tlalelo ya pelo ya gagwe, fa a re rapela, mme ra se ka ra mo utlwa. Ke ka moo re dirafaletsweng ke tlalelo e.”" 
Genesis42:22 Rubene a ba fetola a re: “A ga ke a ka ka lo bolelela ka re: ‘Se leofeleng ngwana,’ mme lwa gana go utlwa. Jaanong go batlwa madi a gagwe mo go rona.”" 
Genesis42:23 Mme ba bo ba sa itse, fa Josefa a ba utlwa; gonne o ne a bua nabo ka mofetolapuo." 
Genesis42:24 Ke fa Josefa a ba hularela a ba tlogela, a lela; a ba a boela kwa go bone, a bua nabo, a tshwara Simeone, a mo ntsha mo go bone, a mo golega fa pele ga bone." 
Genesis42:25 Jaanong Josefa a laela gore dikgetse tsa bone di tladiwe mabele, mme mongwe le mongwe a tsenyediwe madi a gagwe mo kgetseng ya gagwe, mme ba fiwe mfago. Ba direlwa jalo." 
Genesis42:26 Jaanong ba tsaya mabele a bone, ba a belesa mo dieseleng tsa bone, ba tsamaya." 
Genesis42:27 Mme ya re yo mongwe wa bone a bofolola kgetse ya gagwe go fa esele ya gagwe dijo ba le fa ba tla lalang teng, a fitlhela madi a gagwe a le mo molomong wa kgetse ya gagwe." 
Genesis42:28 A raya bomorwa-rraagwe a re: “Ba mpuseditse madi a me ke a, a mo kgetseng ya me.” Ke fa ba kgobega marapo, ba lebana, ba tshogile ba re: “Ke eng se Modimo o se re diretseng?”" 
Genesis42:29 Jaanong ya re ba sena go goroga kwa gae kwa Kanana, ba bolelela Jakobe rraabo tsotlhe tse di ba dirafaletseng ba re:" 
Genesis42:30 “Monna yo e leng molaodi wa lefatshe lele o buile ka bogale le rona, a re golega a re, gongwe re tsile go tlhola lefatshe lele." 
Genesis42:31 Ra mo raya ra re: ‘Re batho ba nnete. Ga re batlhodi. 
Genesis42:32 Re basimane ba le 12 fa lapeng, bana ba motho. Yo mongwe ga a tlhole a le teng. Yo mmotlana o setse le rraetsho kwa Kanana.’" 
Genesis42:33 Ke fa monna yo e leng molaodi wa lefatshe lele a re raya a re: ‘Tlogelang mongwe wa lona fa go nna, lo tsamae, lo isetse tlala ya malapa a lona mabele; ke gona ke tla dumelang gore lo batho ba nnete." 
Genesis42:34 Lo bo lo boe lo tlise monnaa-lona kwano go nna. Foo ke tla dumela, fa lo se batlhodi, lo le batho ba nnete; mme ke tla lo busetsa morwa-rraeno gore lo tsamae mo lefatsheng le ka kgololesego.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Jaanong ya re ba ntsha mabele mo dikgetseng, mongwe le mongwe a fitlhela sekgwama sa gagwe se na le madi a gagwe se le mo kgetseng. Ya re ba bona dikgwama tsa bone, ba boifa, bone le rraabo." 
Genesis42:36 Ke fa Jakobe rraabo a ba raya a re: “Lo nthukhutha bana. Josefa ga a tlhole a le teng. Simeone ga a tlhole a le teng. Jaanong lo rata go tsaya le Benyamene. Tsotlhe tseo di nkwela godimo.” 
Genesis42:37 Rubene a fetola rraagwe a re: “Mo nneele, ke tla boa nae; fa ke sa boe nae, o bolae bomorwaake ba babedi.”" 
Genesis42:38 Mme a fetola a re: “Ga ke dumele gore morwaake a tsamae le lona. Gonne mogolowe o sule, go setse ene fela. Fa a ka welwa ke kotsi mo tseleng, lo ka folosetsa moriri o mobududu wa me kwa felong ga baswi ka botlhoko.”" 
Genesis43:1 Mme tlala ya nna kgolo mo lefatsheng. 
Genesis43:2 Jaanong e rile ba sena go fetsa mabele a ba ne ba tswa go a reka kwa Egepeto, rraabo a ba raya a re: “Yaang gape, lo ye go re rekela dijonyana.”" 
Genesis43:3 Mme Juta a mo fetola a re: “Monna yole o ne a re tlhomamisetsa ruri a re: ‘Ga lo kitla lo bona sefatlhego sa me, fa monnaa-lona a sa tle le lona.’" 
Genesis43:4 Jaanong fa o ka roma monnaa-rona le rona, re tla ya, re go rekela dijo." 
Genesis43:5 Fa o sa mo rome, ga re ka ke ra ya. Gonne monna yole o re reile a re: ‘Ga lo kitla lo bona sefatlhego sa me, fa monnaa-lona a sa tle le lone.’ ”" 
Genesis43:6 Iseraele a re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa lo ntiretse bosula jalo, lwa bolelela monna yole, fa lo sa ntse lo na le monaa-lona.”" 
Genesis43:7 Ba araba ba re: “Monna yole o ne a botsolotsa thata ka ga rona le ba ga etsho a re: ‘A rraeno o sa ntse a phela? A lo na le monaa-lona?’ Jaanong ra mmolelela ka fa go ntseng ka teng. A re ne re ka itse tota, fa a tla re: ‘Tlisang monaa-lona’?”" 
Genesis43:8 Juta a raya Iseraele rraagwe a re: “Lesa lekau le ye le nna. Foo re tla tsamaya gore re phele, re se ka ra swa, rona le wena le bana ba rona." 
Genesis43:9 Ke tla rwala molato oo. O tla mmatla mo go nna. Fa nka boa ke se na nae, ke sa mmee fa pele ga gago, ke tla bo ke le molato mo go wena ka malatsi otlhe." 
Genesis43:10 Ruri fa re ka bo re sa diega, re ka bo re setse re tswa teng gabedi.”" 
Genesis43:11 Ke fa Iseraele rraabo a re: “Fa go ntse jalo he, dirang jaana: Tsayang maungo a a tlhophilweng a lefatshe le ka dikgetse tsa lona, lo ele monna yole dineo, e bong melemonyana le mafuranyana a dinotshe le boroku jo bo tlodiwang baswi le ditlolo tse di nkgang monate le dikgeru tsa mefuta." 
Genesis43:12 Tsamayang lo tshotse madi a le mabedi; le ona a a neng a busediwa mo dikgetseng tsa lona lo a busetse teng. Ka gongwe go dirafetse phoso. 
Genesis43:13 Tsamayang le monaa-lona, lo yeng gape kwa monneng yole." 
Genesis43:14 Mme a Modimo Mothatayotlhe o lo nee boutlwelo-botlhoko jwa monna yole gore a lo gololele morwa-rraeno yo mongwe, e bong Simeone, a boe le lona le Benyamene. Mme nna fa ke thukhuthilwe bana, ke thukhuthilwe.”" 
Genesis43:15 Jaanong ba tsaya dineo tseo, le gona ba tsaya madi a le mabedi le Benyamene; ba ya kwa Egepeto, ba feta ba ema fa pele ga Josefa." 
Genesis43:16 Ya re Josefa a bona Benyamene a na nabo, a laela mookamedi wa lelapa la gagwe a re: “Isa banna bale mo ntlong, o tlhabe o etleetse dijo, gonne ba tla ja le nna motshegare.”" 
Genesis43:17 Monna yoo a dira ka fa a laetsweng ka teng, a isa banna bao mo ntlong ya ga Josefa." 
Genesis43:18 Ya re ba isiwa mo ntlong ya ga Josefa, ba boifa ba re: “Re isiwa teng ka ntlha ya madi a maloba a a buseditsweng mo dikgetseng tsa rona gore ba re logele maano, ba re wele godimo, ba re thope le diesele tsa rona go nna batlhanka ba bone.”" 
Genesis43:19 Ka moo ba atamela mookamedi wa lelapa la ga Josefa, ba bua nae fa mojakong wa ntlo" 
Genesis43:20 ba re: “Morena! Re kile ra tla ga ntlha kwano go reka dijo. 
Genesis43:21 Jaanong e rile re fitlha felong fa go lalwang teng, re bofolela dikgetse tsa rona, ra fitlhela madi a mongwe le mongwe a le mo molomong wa kgetse ya gagwe, e le madi a rona, a na le bokete jwa ona. Jaanong re tsile gape, mme re tsile nao." 
Genesis43:22 Le gona re tlile le madi a mangwe gape go reka dijo. Ga re itse gore ke mang yo o neng a tsenya madi a rona mo dikgetseng tsa rona.” 
Genesis43:23 Mme ene a re: “Namatshegang, lo se boife! Modimo wa lona, e bong wa ga rraeno o lo file lehumo mo dikgetseng tsa lona. Madi a lona a ne a fitlha mo go nna.” Ke fa a ba ntshetsa Simeone." 
Genesis43:24 Jaanong monna yoo a ba isa mo ntlong ya ga Josefa. A ba gela metsi gore ba tlhape dinao. Le diesele tsa bone a di fa dijo. 
Genesis43:25 Bone ba baakanya dineo tsele, ba lebelela Josefa motshegare; gonne ba ne ba utlwile gore ba tla ja teng." 
Genesis43:26 Ya re Josefa a sena go tsena mo ntlong, ba isa dineo tse ba di tshotseng kwa go ene mo ntlong, ba inamela fa fatshe fa pele ga gagwe." 
Genesis43:27 Mme Josefa a ba botsa bophelo a re: “A rraeno yo o tsofetseng yo lo mo mpoleletseng o tsogile? A o sa ntse a phela?” 
Genesis43:28 Ba araba ba re: “Motlhanka wa gago, rraetsho o ntse a le teng, o sa ntse a phela.” Ba inama ba ikobela fa fatshe." 
Genesis43:29 Ke fa a tlhatlosa matlho a bona Benyamene monnawe, morwa mmaagwe, a botsa a re: “A ke ene monnaa-lona yo mmotlana yo lo mo mpoleletseng?” A ba a re: “A Modimo o nne bopelonomi le wena, morwaaka.”" 
Genesis43:30 Jaanong Josefa a akofa a tloga, gonne pelo ya gagwe e ne e huduegile ka ntlha ya ga monnawe, a batla fa a ka lelelang teng, a tsena mo ntlwaneng ya borobalo, a lelela teng." 
Genesis43:31 Ya re a sena go tlhapa sefatlhego, a tswa a itshwere a re: “Tsholang dijo!”" 
Genesis43:32 Ba mmeela tsa gagwe go sele le tsa bone go sele le tsa Baegepeto ba ba jang nae go sele. Gonne Baegepeto ba ne ba sa tshwanela go ja le Bahebere; gonne moo e ne e le maila mo go Baegepeto. 
Genesis43:33 Ba nnisiwa ba lebaganye nae ka go tlhomagana ga matsalo a bone, yo mogolo ka fa bogolong jwa gagwe le yo mmotlana ka fa bobotlaneng jwa gagwe. Banna bao ba lebana ba gakgametse." 
Genesis43:34 Jaanong a ba abela dikabelo tsa dijo tse di fa pele ga gagwe; kabelo ya ga Benyamene ya feta dikabelo tsa bone gatlhano. Mme ba ja, ba nwa, ba itumela nae." 
Genesis44:1 Jaanong Josefa a laela mookamedi wa lelapa la gagwe a re: “Tlatsa dikgetse tsa banna bao mabele ka fa ba ka kgonang go belesa ka teng, o tsenye madi a mongwe le mongwe mo molomong wa kgetse ya gagwe." 
Genesis44:2 Mme senwelo sa me sa selefera o se tsenye mo molomong wa kgetse ya yo mmotlana mmogo le madi a mabele a gagwe.” A dira ka fa Josefa a mo laetseng ka teng. 
Genesis44:3 E rile bosigo bo sena go sa, banna bao ba newa tsela, ba tsamaya ka diesele tsa bone." 
Genesis44:4 Ya re ba sena go tswa mo motseng, ba ise ba nne kgakala, Josefa a laela mookamedi wa lelapa la gagwe a re: “Tsamaya, o latelele banna bale, mme kwa o tla ba tshwarang teng, o ba ree o re: ‘Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa lo leboga molemo ka bosula? Lo utswa senwelo sa me sa selefera?" 
Genesis44:5 A ga se sona se morena wa me o nwang ka sona, e bile e le taola ya gagwe? Lo dirile bosula thata ka go dira jalo.’ ”" 
Genesis44:6 Ya re a sena go ba tshwara a bua mafoko ao nabo. 
Genesis44:7 Mme ba mo raya ba re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa morena wa rona a bua mafoko a a ntseng jalo? Go kgakala le batlhanka ba gago go ka dira jalo." 
Genesis44:8 Kana madi a re a fitlhetseng mo melomong ya dikgetse tsa rona re a buseditse kwa go wena, re tswa kwa lefatsheng la Kanana! Jaanong re ka utswa jang selefera gongwe gouta mo ntlong ya morena wa gago?" 
Genesis44:9 Yo se tla fitlhelwang mo go ene gare ga batlhanka ba gago, a a bolawe! Le rona re tla nna batlhanka ba morena wa rona.”" 
Genesis44:10 Ene a re: “Ee, go siame! A go dirwe jaaka lo buile, yo se tla fitlhelwang mo go ene o tla nna motlhanka wa me, mme lona lo tla bo lo se na molato.”" 
Genesis44:11 Ke fa ba itlhaganela, mongwe le mongwe a belegolola kgetse ya gagwe, a ba a e bofolola." 
Genesis44:12 Mookamedi a fukutsa, a simolola mo go yo mogolo, a khutla mo go yo mmotlana, mme senwelo seo sa fitlhelwa mo kgetseng ya ga Benyamene." 
Genesis44:13 Ke fa ba ikgagola diaparo, ba belesa diesele tsa bone botlhe, ba boela kwa motseng." 
Genesis44:14 Juta le bomorwa-rraagwe ba tsena mo ntlong ya ga Josefa – ene a sa ntse a le teng – ba wela fa fatshe fa pele ga gagwe. 
Genesis44:15 Josefa a ba botsa a re: “Ke tiro e e ntseng jang e lo e dirileng? A ga lo itse gore monna yo o tshwanang le nna o itse dilo ka boitseanape?” 
Genesis44:16 Juta a re: “Re ka raya morena wa rona ra reng? Re ka bolela eng? Re ka itshiamisa jang? Modimo o bonye molato wa batlhanka ba gago. Bona, re batlhanka ba morena wa rona, rona le ene yo senwelo se fitlhetsweng mo go ene.”" 
Genesis44:17 Mme a fetola a re: “A go nne kgakala le nna go dira jalo. Monna yo go fitlhetsweng senwelo mo go ene, ke ene yo o tla nnang motlhanka wa me. Mme lona boelang gae kwa go rraeno ka kagiso!”" 
Genesis44:18 Ke fa Juta a atamela kwa go ene a re: “Ka thapelo, morena wa me! A ko o letlelele motlhanka wa gago gore a bue lefoko mo ditsebeng tsa morena wa me. A bogale jwa gago bo se ka jwa tukela motlhanka wa gago! Kana o kana ka Farao." 
Genesis44:19 Morena wa me o kile a botsa batlhanka ba gagwe a re: ‘A lo na le rraeno le monnaa-lona?’ 
Genesis44:20 Ra araba morena wa rona ra re: ‘Re na le rraetsho yo o tsofetseng le morwawe yo mmotlana yo a mo tsaletsweng a setse a tsofetse. Mogolowe o sule, go setse ene a le esi wa ga mmaagwe, mme rraagwe o a mo rata.’" 
Genesis44:21 Ke fa o laela rona batlhanka ba gago o re: ‘Yaang go mo tlisa kwano go nna gore ke mmone ka matlho.’ 
Genesis44:22 Ra fetola morena wa rona ra re: ‘Mosimane yoo ga a ka ke a tlogela rraagwe. Fa a ka mo tlogela, rraagwe a ka swa.’" 
Genesis44:23 Ke fa o raya batlhanka ba gago o re: ‘Fa monnaa-lona a sa tle le lona, ga lo kitla lo bona sefatlhego sa me gape.’" 
Genesis44:24 “Ya re re sena go boela kwa go rraetsho, motlhanka wa gago, ra mmolelela mafoko a morena wa rona." 
Genesis44:25 Ya re morago ga malatsi rraetsho a re: ‘Tsamayang gape lo ye go re rekela dijonyana.’ 
Genesis44:26 Ra fetola ra re: ‘Ga re ka ke ra ya teng. Re ka ya fela, fa monnaa-rona a na le rona. Gonne ga re kitla re bona sefatlhego sa monna yole, fa monnaa-rona a se na le rona.’" 
Genesis44:27 Ke fa motlhanka wa gago, rraetsho, a re raya a re: ‘Lo a itse ka losi, fa mosadi wa me a ntsaletse basimane ba le babedi fela." 
Genesis44:28 Yo mongwe o sa le a tsamaya, ke bona gore o gagogantswe ke dibata. Ga ke ise ke be ke mmone go fitlhelela jaanong." 
Genesis44:29 Jaanong fa lo ka tsaya le ene yoo, lwa mo tlosa mo go nna, mme a welwa ke kotsi, lo tla folosetsa moriri o mobududu wa me kwa felong ga baswi ka botlhoko.’" 
Genesis44:30 “Jaanong fa nka fitlha kwa go rre motlhanka wa gago, mme mosimane yo a se na le rona, yo pelo ya ga rre e mo kgomaretseng;" 
Genesis44:31 fa a bona mosimane a se yo, o tla swa. Foo batlhanka ba gago ba tla folosetsa moriri o mobududu wa ga rraetsho, motlhanka wa gago, kwa felong ga baswi ka botlhoko." 
Genesis44:32 Gonne nna motlhanka wa gago ke neetswe mosimane yo ke rre ke sena go ipofa go nna moemedi wa gagwe ka re: ‘Fa ke sa boele nae kwa go wena, ke tla nna molato fa pele ga rre ka malatsi otlhe.’" 
Genesis44:33 A bogolo go sale motlhanka wa gago mo boemong jwa lekau, ke nne motlhanka wa morena wa me; mme a lekau le boele kwa gae le bomogoloa-lone." 
Genesis44:34 Gonne nka boela jang kwa go rre, ke se na le lekau? Nka palelwa ke go bona botlhoko jo bo tla welang mo go rre.”" 
Genesis45:1 Ke fa Josefa a palelwa ke go itshwara fa pele ga botlhe ba ba emeng fa go ene, mme a buela godimo a re: “A botlhe ba tswele kwa ntle!” Ga bo go se ope fa go Josefa, fa a ipolelela bomorwa-rraagwe." 
Genesis45:2 A lela, a tlhatlositse lentswe, Baegepeto ba mo utlwa, selelo sa gagwe sa utlwala le kwa lapeng la ga Farao." 
Genesis45:3 Josefa a raya bomorwa-rraagwe a re: “Ke nna Josefa! A rre o sa ntse a phela?” Mme bomorwa-rraagwe ba palelwa ke go mo araba, ka ba ne ba tshogile fa pele ga gagwe." 
Genesis45:4 Josefa a raya bomorwa-rraagwe a re: “A lo ko lo nkatamele.” Ba atamela. A ba a re: “Ke nna Josefa, morwa-rraeno yo lo ne lwa mo rekisa, a isiwa kwa Egepeto!" 
Genesis45:5 Mme jaanong lo se ka lwa hutsafala le e seng go inyatsa ka ntlha ya gore lo nthekisitse, ka tla kwano. Gonne Modimo o nthometse kwano gore ke lo etelele pele le go boloka maphelo a rona." 
Genesis45:6 E setse e le ngwaga wa bobedi go le tlala mo lefatsheng, mme go sa ntse go tla tla dinyaga di le tlhano tse go se neng go lengwa mo go tsona le e seng go roba." 
Genesis45:7 Modimo o nthometse kwano, ka lo etelela pele, e le go lo bolokela losika mo lefatsheng le go lo phedisa gore lo tle lo nne lesomo le legolo la baphologi." 
Genesis45:8 Ka moo ga se lona lo nthometseng kwano, ke Modimo. O ntirile mogakolodi wa ga Farao le morena wa lelapa lotlhe la gagwe le mmusi wa lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto." 
Genesis45:9 “Itlhaganeleng he lo ye kwa go rre, lo mo ree lo re: ‘Josefa morwao o bua jaana a re: Modimo o ntirile molaodi wa lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto. Tlaa kwano go nna, o se diege!" 
Genesis45:10 O tla aga mo nageng ya Gosene gore o nne gaufi le nna, wena le bana ba gago le bana ba bana ba gago le matsomane a gago le metlhape ya gago le tsotlhe tse o nang natso." 
Genesis45:11 Ke tla go babalela teng, gonne go sa ntse go tla tla dinyaga di le tlhano tsa leuba; e se re gongwe wa humanega, wena le ba lapa la gago le tsotlhe tse o nang natso.’" 
Genesis45:12 “Matlho a lona le matlho a ga nnake Benyamene a a bona, fa e le nna Josefa yo ke buang le lona." 
Genesis45:13 Bolelelang rre bogolo jotlhe jwa me mono Egepeto le tsotlhe tse lo di bonyeng, lo itlhaganele, lo tlise rre kwano.”" 
Genesis45:14 Ke fa a wela mo molaleng wa ga Benyamene monnawe, a lela; le Benyamene a lelela mo molaleng wa gagwe." 
Genesis45:15 A ba a atla bomorwa-rraagwe botlhe, a lelela mo go bone; morago ga moo bomorwa-rraagwe ba bua nae." 
Genesis45:16 Jaanong e rile tumo e, e utlwala mo lapeng la ga Farao go twe: Go tsile bomorwa-rraagwe Josefa, Farao a itumela le batlhanka ba gagwe." 
Genesis45:17 Farao a laela Josefa a re: “Raya bomorwa-rraago o re: Dirang jaana: Belesang diruiwa tsa lona, lo tloge lo ye kwa lefatsheng la Kanana." 
Genesis45:18 Lo tsee rraeno le ba malapa a lona, lo tle kwano go nna. Ke tla lo fa sefuti sa lefatshe la Egepeto gore lo je mafura a lone." 
Genesis45:19 Gape ke go neela thata ya go bua o re: Dirang jaana: Tsayang dikoloi mono Egepeto, lo ye go tsaya rraeno le basadi le bana ba lona, lo ba tsise kwano." 
Genesis45:20 Lo se ka lwa itshwenya go tla le dithoto tsa lona; gonne tse di molemo tsa lefatshe la Egepeto lo tla di abelwa.” 
Genesis45:21 Bomorwa Iseraele ba dira jalo. Josefa a ba naya dikoloi ka fa taelong ya ga Farao, a ba a ba fa mefago." 
Genesis45:22 Le gona a naya mongwe le mongwe wa bone seaparo sa mokgabo, mme Benyamene ene a mo naya diselefera di le 300 le diaparo di le tlhano tsa mokgabo." 
Genesis45:23 Mme rraagwe ene a mo romela diesele di le some, di belege tse di monate tsa Egepeto le diesele tse di namagadi di le some di belege mabele le dinkgwe le mefago ya ga rraagwe." 
Genesis45:24 A naya bomorwa-rraagwe tsela, ba tsamaya, mme a ba laela a re: “Lo se ka lwa omana mo tseleng.”" 
Genesis45:25 Ba tloga ba tswa kwa Egepeto, ba fitlha kwa lefatsheng la Kanana kwa go Jakobe rraabo" 
Genesis45:26 ba mmolelela ba re: “Josefa o sa ntse a phela, e bile ke ene mmusi wa lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto.” Mme a se ka a ba dumela, ka a ne a kgobegile marapo." 
Genesis45:27 Mme ya re ba mmolela mafoko aotlhe a Josefa o a buileng nabo, e bile a bona dikoloi tse Josefa a di rometseng go tla go mo tsaya, mowa wa gagwe wa rula." 
Genesis45:28 Mme Iseraele a re: “Go lekanye! Josefa morwaake o sa ntse a phela. Ke tla ya, ke be ke mmone, ke ise ke swe.”" 
Genesis46:1 Ke fa Iseraele a huduga, a tsaya tsotlhe tse e leng tsa gagwe. Ya re a sena go fitlha kwa Bereseba, a tlhabela Modimo wa ga Isaka rraagwe ditlhabelo." 
Genesis46:2 Mme Modimo wa bua le Iseraele ka pono ya bosigo wa re: “Jakobe, Jakobe!” A araba a re: “Ke fano!”" 
Genesis46:3 Modimo wa re: “Ke nna Modimo, e bong Modimo wa ga rraago. Se boife go hudugela kwa Egepeto; gonne ke tla go dira setšhaba se segolo teng." 
Genesis46:4 Nna ka nosi ke tla ya nao kwa Egepeto; le gona ke nna ke tla go ntshang teng gape. Mme Josefa o tla budulatsa matlho a gago.” 
Genesis46:5 Jakobe a tloga kwa Bereseba. Bomorwa Iseraele ba palamisa Jakobe rraabo le bana ba bone le basadi ba bone mo dikoloing tse Farao a di rometseng go mo hudusa ka tsona. 
Genesis46:6 Ba tsaya diruiwa tsa bone le dithoto tsa bone tse ba di bapetseng mo lefatsheng la Kanana, ba fitlha kwa Egepeto, Jakobe le losika lotlhe lwa gagwe nae," 
Genesis46:7 e bong bomorwawe le bomorwa bomorwawe le bomorwadie le bomorwadia bomorwawe; a ya le losika lotlhe lwa gagwe kwa Egepeto. 
Genesis46:8 Maina a bomorwa Iseraele ba ba ileng kwa Egepeto ke a, ke a ga Jakobe le bomorwawe: Motsalwapele wa ga Jakobe ke Rubene." 
Genesis46:9 Bomorwa Rubene ke Henoge le Phalo le Heserone le Karemi. 
Genesis46:10 Bomorwa Simeone ke Jemuele le Jamine le Ohate le Jagine le Sohare le Saule morwa mosadi wa Mokanana. 
Genesis46:11 Bomorwa Lefi ke Geresone le Kahathe le Merari. 
Genesis46:12 Bomorwa Juta ke Ere le Onane le Sela le Pherese le Sera. Mme Ere le Onane ba ne ba swela mo lefatsheng la Kanana. Bomorwa Pherese e ne e le Heserone le Hamule. 
Genesis46:13 Bomorwa Isašare ke Thola le Phuwa le Jobe le Simerone. 
Genesis46:13 Bomorwa Isašare ke Thola le Phuwa le Jobe le Simerone. 
Genesis46:14 Bomorwa Sebulone ke Serete le Elone le Jahalele. 
Genesis46:15 Ke bone bomorwa Lea ba o ba tsaletseng Jakobe kwa Phatane-Arame mmogo le Dina morwadie. Bomorwawe le bomorwadie botlhe e ne e le batho ba le 33. 
Genesis46:16 Bomorwa Gate ke Sifione le Haki le Suni le Esebone le Eri le Arodi le Aredi. 
Genesis46:17 Bomorwa Asere ke Imena le Iswa le Iswi le Beria le Sera kgaitsadia bone. Bomorwa Beria ke Hebere le Malekhiele. 
Genesis46:18 Ke bone bomorwa Silepa yo Labane a mo neetseng Lea morwadie, a tsalela Jakobe bana bao, mmogo e le batho ba le 16." 
Genesis46:19 Bomorwa Ragele mosadi wa ga Jakobe ke Josefa le Benyamene. 
Genesis46:20 Mme Josefa a tsala Manase le Eferaime mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, a ba tsala le Asenathe morwadia Photifera, moperesiti wa kwa One." 
Genesis46:21 Bomorwa Benyamene ke Bela le Begere le Asebele le Gera le Naamane le Egi le Roše le Muphime le Huphime le Arete. 
Genesis46:22 Ke bone bomorwa Ragele ba ba tsaletsweng Jakobe. Mmogo ke batho ba le 14. 
Genesis46:23 Morwa Dane ke Hušime fela. 
Genesis46:24 Bomorwa Nafetale ke Jahaseele le Guni le Jesere le Sileme. 
Genesis46:25 Ke bone bomorwa Bileha yo Labane a mo neetseng Ragele morwadie; a tsalela Jakobe bana bao, mmogo e le batho ba supa." 
Genesis46:26 Batho botlhe ba ba ileng le Jakobe kwa Egepeto ba e leng bana ba mmele wa gagwe, go sa balwe basadi ba bomorwa Jakobe, mmogo ke batho ba le 66." 
Genesis46:27 Bomorwa Josefa ba o ba tsetseng kwa Egepeto ba bedi fela. Ba lapa la ga Jakobe botlhe ba ba ileng kwa Egepeto ba ne ba le 70. 
Genesis46:28 Jakobe o ne a roma Juta gore a ye kwa pele kwa go Josefa gore ene Josefa a ba baakanyetse magorogelo kwa Gosene. Ba fitlha kwa nageng ya Gosene. 
Genesis46:29 Ke fa Josefa a baakanya koloi ya gagwe, a bolola go kgatlhantsha Iseraele rraagwe kwa Gosene. Ya re a mmona, a wela mo molaleng wa gagwe, a lelela sebaka mo molaleng wa gagwe." 
Genesis46:30 Mme Iseraele a raya Josefa a re: “Jaanong nka swa ka boitumelo, ka ke bonye sefatlhego sa gago o sa ntse o phela.”" 
Genesis46:31 Josefa a raya bomorwa-rraagwe le ba lapa la ga rraagwe a re: “Ke tla ya, ke begela Farao, ke mo raya ke re: ‘Bomorwa-rre le ba lapa la ga rre ba ba neng ba le kwa lefatsheng la Kanana, ba tlile kwano go nna." 
Genesis46:32 Banna bao ke badisa ba difutshane – gonne e ne e le beng ba diruiwa – ba tlile le matsomane a bone le metlhape le tsotlhe tse ba nang natso.’ 
Genesis46:33 Jaanong e tle e re fa Farao a lo bitsa, a lo botsa a re: ‘Tiro ya lona ke eng?’" 
Genesis46:34 lo arabe lo re: ‘Batlhanka ba gago, rona le borraetsho, re sa le re nna barui ba diruiwa go tswa bonyaneng jwa rona go fitlhelela kajeno!’ gore lo tle lo letlelelwe go aga mo nageng ya Gosene.” Gonne badisa botlhe ba matsomane ba nyatsegile mo go Baegepeto." 
Genesis47:1 Josefa a ya kwa go Farao, a mo itsise a re: “Rre le bomorwa-rre ba gorogile ba na le matsomane a bone le metlhape ya bone le tsotlhe tse e leng tsa bone, ba tswa kwa lefatsheng la Kanana, ba gorogetse mo nageng ya Gosene.”" 
Genesis47:2 O ne a tsere ba le batlhano mo go bomorwa-rraagwe, a ba isa fa pele ga Farao." 
Genesis47:3 Jaanong Farao a ba botsa a re: “Tiro ya lona ke eng?” Ba araba Farao ba re: “Rona batlhanka ba gago re badisa ba matsomane jaaka borraetsho.” 
Genesis47:4 Ba be ba raya Farao ba re: “Re tsile go jaka mo lefatsheng leno; gonne ga go na mafulo a matsomane a batlhanka ba gago, mme tlala e kgolo mo lefatsheng la Kanana. Jaanong ka thapelo, a batlhanka ba gago ba nne mo nageng ya Gosene.”" 
Genesis47:5 Ke fa Farao a raya Josefa a re: “Rraago le bomorwa-rraago ba tsile kwa go wena. 
Genesis47:6 Lefatshe la Egepeto le go atlanegetse. Rraago le bomorwa-rraago o ba bee mo nageng e e gaisang. A ba nne mo nageng ya Gosene. Mme fa go na le ba ba tlhaga mo go bone, o ba dire baokamedi ba badisa ba ga etsho.”" 
Genesis47:7 Jaanong Josefa a tsaya rraagwe, a ya go mo supa fa pele ga Farao. Ke fa Jakobe a tshegofatsa Farao." 
Genesis47:8 Farao a botsa Jakobe a re: “Malatsi a bophelo jwa gago a kae?” 
Genesis47:9 Jakobe a araba Farao a re: “Malatsi a leeto la bophelo jwa me ke dinyaga di le 130. Mme malatsi a bophelo jwa me a ne a le mannye fela, le gona a le botlhoko. Ga a lekane le malatsi a bophelo jwa borre a ba neng ba phela ka ona.”" 
Genesis47:10 Jakobe a sadisa Farao sentle ka tshegofatso, a ba a mo tlogela." 
Genesis47:11 Josefa a baya rraagwe le bomorwa-rraagwe mo lefatsheng la Egepeto mo nageng e e gaisang e e bidiwang Ramasese ka fa Farao a laetseng ka teng, a ba naya boswa jwa naga teng." 
Genesis47:12 Josefa a babalela rraagwe le bomorwa-rraagwe le malapa otlhe a bone ka dijo, mongwe le mongwe ka fa palong ya ba ba mo lapeng." 
Genesis47:13 Mme ga bo go se na dijo mo lefatsheng lotlhe, gonne tlala e ne e le kgolo thata, mo naga ya Egepeto le ya Kanana di bileng tsa felelwa ka ntlha ya yona tlala." 
Genesis47:14 Josefa a kgobokanya madi aotlhe a selefera a a leng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto le mo Kanana ka mabele a ba a rekang; a isa madi kwa ntlong ya ga Farao. 
Genesis47:15 Jaanong e rile madi a sena go fela mo lefatsheng la Egepeto le mo Kanana, Baegepeto botlhe ba tla kwa go Josefa ba re: “Re fe dijo! Kana re na le go swelang fa pele ga gago? Gonne madi a fedile.”" 
Genesis47:16 Josefa a re: “Rekang ka diruiwa tsa lona, fa go se na madi; ke tla lo naya mabele ka tsona.”" 
Genesis47:17 Ke fa ba ntsha diruiwa tsa bone, ba di neela Josefa. Mme Josefa a rekisa dijo mo go bona ka dipitse le diruiwa tsa matsomane le metlhape le diesele; a ba tlamela ka dijo, ba di reka ka diruiwa tsotlhe tsa bone, ka ona ngwaga oo." 
Genesis47:18 Ya re ngwaga oo o sena go feta, ba tla kwa go ene ka ngwaga o o latelang, ba mo raya ba re: “Ga re kitla re lobela morena wa rona go re, ka madi a fedile le diruiwa tsa diphedi e le tsa morena wa rona, ga goa sala sepe se re ka rekang dijo ka sona mo moreneng wa rona, fa e se mebele ya rona le masimo a rona." 
Genesis47:19 Kana re tla bo re swelang fa pele ga gago, rona le masimo a rona? Re reke le masimo a rona ka dijo gore re nne batlhanka ba ga Farao, rona le masimo a rona. Fela re fe peo gore re phele, mme re se ka ra swa, le masimo a se ka a fetoga naga.”" 
Genesis47:20 Josefa a rekela Farao naga yotlhe ya Egepeto, gonne Moegepeto mongwe le mongwe o ne a rekisa tshimo ya gagwe, ka tlala e ne e ba imela mo go botlhoko. Mme lefatshe ya nna la ga Farao." 
Genesis47:21 Fa e le batho a ba hudusetsa kwa metseng mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Egepeto. 
Genesis47:22 Fela masimo a baperesiti a se ka a a reka. Gonne baperesiti ba ne ba amogela tuelo e e tlhomameng mo go Farao, ba ja tuelo ya bone e e tlhomameng e Farao a e ba nayang. Ke ka moo ba se kang ba rekisa masimo a bone." 
Genesis47:23 Ke fa Josefa a raya morafe a re: “Bonang, ke lo reketse Farao kajeno le masimo a lona. Bonang, peo ya lona ke e! Jaanong yaang go jwala kwa masimo." 
Genesis47:24 Mme e re lo roba, lo neele Farao karolo ya botlhano. Dikarolo tse nne e tla nna tsa lona, e le peo ya masimo le dijo tsa malapa a lona.”" 
Genesis47:25 Ba araba ba re: “O re boloketse bophelo. Fa re ka bona bopelotlhomogi fela mo matlhong a morena wa rona, re tla nna batlhanka ba ga Farao.”" 
Genesis47:26 Go ntshetsa Farao karolo ya botlhano Josefa a go dira molao o o laolang masimo a Baegepeto go fitlha letsatsing leno. Ke masimo a baperesiti fela a e seng a ga Farao. 
Genesis47:27 Baiseraele ba nna mo lefatsheng la Egepeto mo nageng ya Gosene, ba e ja boswa, ba ata, ba ntsifala thata." 
Genesis47:28 Jakobe ene a phela dinyaga di le 17 mo lefatsheng la Egepeto. Malatsi a ga Jakobe a bophelo jwa gagwe ke dinyaga di le 147. 
Genesis47:29 Jaanong e rile malatsi a go swa ga Iseraele a atamela, a bitsa Josefa morwawe, a mo raya a re: “A e re fa ke bonye bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a gago, o bee seatla sa gago fa tlase ga letheka la me, o ntirele ka lorato le boammaaruri: Ke a go rapela, se mphitlhe mono Egepeto!" 
Genesis47:30 A e re fa ke sena go robala le borre, o ntlose mo Egepeto, o ye go mphitlha mo mabitleng a bone.” Josefa a araba a re: “Ke tla dira ka fa mafokong a gago.”" 
Genesis47:31 Rraagwe a re: “A ko o ikane!” A ikana, mme Iseraele a inama mo mosamong wa bolao." 
Genesis48:1 E rile morago ga dilo tseo Josefa a begelwa ga twe: “Rraago o a lwala.” A tsaya bomorwawe ba babedi, Manase le Eferaime a ya nabo kwa go Jakobe." 
Genesis48:2 Jaanong Jakobe a bolelelwa ga twe: “Josefa morwao o e tla.” Iseraele a itsetsepela a nna mo bolaong. 
Genesis48:3 Jakobe a raya Josefa a re: “Modimo Mothatayotlhe o kile wa iponatsa mo go nna kwa Luse mo lefatsheng la Kanana, wa ntshegofatsa," 
Genesis48:4 wa nthaya wa re: ‘Bona, ke tla go atisa, ke go ntsifatsa, ke go dira bontsi jwa merafe; ke tla naya ba losika lwa gago lefatshe le sehularong sa gago go nna boswa jo bo sa khutleng.’" 
Genesis48:5 “Jaanong he, bomorwao ba babedi ba o ba tsaletsweng mo lefatsheng la Egepeto ke ise ke tle kwano go wena mono Egepeto, ke ba me. Eferaime le Manase e tla nna ba me, fela jaaka Rubene le Simeone." 
Genesis48:6 Mme bana ba o ba tsetseng morago ga bone, e tla nna ba gago. Ba tla bidiwa ka maina a bomogoloa-bone mo bosweng jwa bone." 
Genesis48:7 Nna e rile ke boa kwa Phatane, Ragele mmaago a swa ke na nae mo tseleng mo lefatsheng la Kanana, go sa ntse go le sebakanyana sa go fitlha kwa Eferatha; ka mo fitlha gona fa tseleng e e yang kwa Eferatha mo e leng Betleheme.”" 
Genesis48:8 Jaanong ya re Iseraele a bona bomorwa Josefa, a botsa a re: “Ke bomang ba?”" 
Genesis48:9 Josefa a araba rraagwe a re: “Ke bomorwaake ba Modimo o ba mphileng mono.” Jakobe a re: “A ko o ba tlise kwano go nna gore ke ba tshegofatse.” 
Genesis48:10 Mme matlho a ga Iseraele a ne a fifetse ka tsofalo, a sa kgone go bona sentle. Jaanong ya re Josefa a sena go ba atametsa kwa go ene, a ba atla, a ba tlamparela." 
Genesis48:11 Iseraele a raya Josefa a re: “Ke ne ke setse ke tlhobogile go ka bona sefatlhego sa gago, mme jaana Modimo o bile o mpontshitse le bana ba gago.”" 
Genesis48:12 Ke fa Josefa a ba tlosa mo mangoleng a gagwe, a inamela fa fatshe ka sefatlhego fa pele ga gagwe." 
Genesis48:13 Josefa a ba a ba tsaya ka bobedi jwa bone, a tsaya Eferaime ka letsogo le le jang, a mo lebanya le la molema la ga Iseraele, a tsaya Manase ka la molema, a mo lebanya le le le jang la ga Iseraele. A ba atametsa jalo kwa go ene." 
Genesis48:14 Mme Iseraele a ntsha letsogo le le jang, a le baya mo tlhogong ya ga Eferaime, le fa e ne e le yo mmotlana; la molema a le baya mo tlhogong ya ga Manase, a fapaanya mabogo a gagwe jalo. Kana motsalwapele e ne e le Manase." 
Genesis48:15 A tshegofatsa Josefa a re: “Modimo o borre Aborahame le Isaka ba sepetseng fa pele ga ona; Modimo o e neng e le Modisa wa me mo bophelong jotlhe jwa me go fitlhelela letsatsing leno; 
Genesis48:16 moengele yo o nkgolotseng mo masuleng otlhe, a a tshegofatse basimane ba! A leina la me le maina a borre, e bong Aborahame le Isaka, a tume ka bone; a ba ate, ba nne bantsi thata mo lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis48:17 Ya re Josefa a bona rraagwe a beile letsogo le le jang mo tlhogong ya ga Eferaime, a se ka a itumela, a tshwara letsogo la ga rraagwe, a re o le tlosa mo tlhogong ya ga Eferaime go le baya mo tlhogong ya ga Manase." 
Genesis48:18 A raya rraagwe a re: “E seng jalo, rra. Gonne motsalwapele ke yo. Baya letsogo le le jang mo tlhogong ya gagwe.”" 
Genesis48:19 Mme rraagwe a gana a re: “Ke a itse, morwaaka, ke a itse! Le ene o tla nna morafe; le ene o tla nna mogolo. Mme monnawe o tla mo feta ka bogolo; bana ba gagwe e tla nna bontsi jwa ditšhaba.”" 
Genesis48:20 A ba tshegofatsa jalo ka letsatsi leo a re: “Baiseraele ba tla tshegofatsa ka lona ba re: ‘A Modimo o go dire jaaka Eferaime le Manase!’ ” A re jalo, a dira Eferaime mogolo mo go Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Iseraele a ba a raya Josefa a re: “Bona, ke a swa, mme Modimo o tla nna le lona, o lo busetsa kwa lefatsheng la borraeno." 
Genesis48:22 Nna ke go naya naga ya dithabana go feta bomorwa-rraago ka yona; ke e ke e gapileng mo go Baamori ka tšhaka ya me le bora.” 
Genesis49:1 Jaanong Jakobe a bitsa bomorwawe a re: “Phuthegang gore ke lo bolelele tse di tla lo dirafalelang mo metlheng e e tlang. 
Genesis49:2 Kgobokanang lo utlwe, lona bomorwa Jakobe! Reetsang Iseraele, rraeno!" 
Genesis49:3 Rubene, o morwaake yo mogolo, o thata ya me, o wa ntlha wa nonofo ya me. O gaisa ba bangwe ka bogolo; o phala ba bangwe ka bonatla." 
Genesis49:4 O huhula jaaka metsi. Ga o kitla o nna yo mogolo; ka gonne o kile wa palama mo bolaong jwa ga rraago, wa bo itshekolola. Wa palama mo marobalong a me." 
Genesis49:5 Simeone le Lefi ke bana ba motho. Dibolai tsa bone ke tse di setlhogo. 
Genesis49:6 A mowa wa me o se ka wa tsena mo lekgotleng la bone; a tlotlo ya me e se ka ya kopana le phuthego ya bone. Gonne ba bolaile banna ka bogale jwa bone; ba golafatsa dipoo ka bomo. 
Genesis49:7 A go hutsiwe bogale jwa bone, ka bo tuka thata, le kgalefo ya bone, ka e le setlhogo. Ke tla ba kgaoganya mo go Jakobe, ke ba phatlalatsa mo go Iseraele." 
Genesis49:8 Juta ke wena, bomorwa-rraago ba tla go boka. Seatla sa gago se tla nna mo thamong tsa baba ba gago. Bomorwa-rraago ba tla ikoba fa pele ga gago." 
Genesis49:9 Juta ke tawana; o tlhatlogile, morwaaka, o tswa thopong. A inama, a botha jaaka tau le jaaka tau e namagadi. Ke mang yo o ka mo tshosang?" 
Genesis49:10 Thobane ya bogosi ga e kitla e tloga mo go Juta le e seng lore lwa mmusi fa gare ga dinao tsa gagwe go fitlhelela go be go tle Silo. Ene merafe e tla mo utlwa. 
Genesis49:11 O bofelela eselana ya gagwe mo setlhareng sa moweine le ngwana wa esele e namagadi ya gagwe mo go sa moweine se se tlhaotsweng. Seaparo sa gagwe o se tlhatswa ka weine le kobo ya gagwe ka matute a maungo a moweine. 
Genesis49:12 Matlho a gagwe a leoto ka weine; o sweufetse meno ka mašwi. 
Genesis49:13 Sebulone o tla nna fa losing lwa lewatle, ene o fa magorogelong a mekoro. Letlhakore la gagwe le kopana le naga ya Sitone." 
Genesis49:14 Isašare ke esele ya marapo a a thata, o botha mo gare ga maraka." 
Genesis49:15 A fitlhela boikhutso bo le monate le lefatshe le le lentle; a oba legetla la gagwe go rwala, a nna motlhanka yo o kgethisiwang." 
Genesis49:16 Dane o tla emela tshiamo mo morafeng wa gagwe jaaka longwe lwa ditso tsa Iseraele. 
Genesis49:17 A Dane a nne noga mo tseleng le mokwepa mo tselaneng o o lomang pitse diretheng gore mopalami wa yona a wele kwa morago. 
Genesis49:18 Morena, ke lebeletse pholoso ya gago." 
Genesis49:19 Gate – setlhopha sa dinokwane se tla mo pitlaganya, mme ene o tla pitlaganya direthe tsa bone." 
Genesis49:20 Asere – dijo tsa gagwe di mafura; ene o tsisa menate ya dikgosi. 
Genesis49:21 Nafetale ke phala e namagadi e e gololegileng; o utlwatsa bontle jwa mafoko. 
Genesis49:22 Josefa ke setlhare se senana se se ungwang, ke setlhare se senana se se fa motsweding. Dikala tsa sona di golela godimo ga lorako." 
Genesis49:23 Ba ba hulang metswi ba ne ba mo tlhasela, ba mo hula, ba mo lwantsha." 
Genesis49:24 Mme bora jwa gagwe jwa nna bo tiile, mabogo le diatla tsa gagwe di le bobebe ka thuso ya Mothata wa ga Jakobe, e e tswang mo go yo e leng Modisa wa ga Iseraele le lefika la gagwe;" 
Genesis49:25 e e tswang mo Modimong wa ga rraago – a o go thuse! le mo go Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe – a a go tshegofatse ka ditshegofatso tsa legodimo kwa godimo, le ka ditshegofatso tsa bodiba jo bo leng kwa tlase le ka ditshegofatso tsa mabele le letsalo." 
Genesis49:26 Ditshegofatso tsa ga rraago di feta ditshegofatso tsa dithaba tse di sa khutleng le mokgabo wa dithabana tse di sa khutleng. A di tle mo tlhogong ya ga Josefa le mo phogong ya motlotlegi wa bomorwa-rraagwe. 
Genesis49:27 Benyamene ke phiri e e garolang. O ja thopo mo mosong, maitsiboa a abele se se thukhuthilweng.”" 
Genesis49:28 Botlhe bao ke bone ditso di le 12 tsa Iseraele, ke tsona tse rraabo o di ba boleletseng, fa a ba tshegofatsa mongwe le mongwe ka tshegofatso ya gagwe; a ba tshegofatsa jalo." 
Genesis49:29 A ba a ba laela, a ba raya a re: “E re ke sena go bilediwa kwa morafeng wa ga etsho, lo mphitlheng fa go borre mo logageng lo lo mo tshimong ya ga Eferone wa Mohethe" 
Genesis49:30 mo logageng lo lo mo tshimong ya Makapela e e mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Mamere mo lefatsheng la Kanana, e bong tshimo ele e Aborahame o neng a e reka mo go Eferone wa Mohethe go nna mabitla a losika lwa gagwe." 
Genesis49:31 jer 4 Gona foo ba fitlhile Aborahame le Sara mosadi wa gagwe; gona foo ba fitlhile Isaka le Rebeka mosadi wa gagwe; gona foo ke fitlhile Lea 
Genesis49:32 mo tshimong e e nang le logaga e e rekilweng mo go Bahethe.” 
Genesis49:33 Jaanong ya re Jakobe a sena go fetsa go laela bomorwawe, a busetsa maoto a gagwe mo bolaong, a swa, a bilediwa kwa bathong ba ga gabo." 
Genesis50:1 Ke fa Josefa a wela mo sefatlhegong sa ga rraagwe, a mo lelela, a mo atla." 
Genesis50:2 Josefa a ba a laola batlhanka ba gagwe ba e leng dingaka go omeletsa setoto sa ga rraagwe ka ditlhare. Dingaka tsa dira jalo," 
Genesis50:3 tsa fetsa morago ga malatsi a le 40; gonne go omeletsa setoto go tsaya malatsi a a kana. Baegepeto le bone ba mo lelela malatsi a le 70. 
Genesis50:4 Jaanong ya re malatsi a go mo lelela a sena go feta, Josefa a bua le ba lapa la ga Farao a re: “Fa ke bonye bopelotlhomogi mo go lona a nke lo bue mo ditsebeng tsa ga Farao lo re:" 
Genesis50:5 Rre o inkanisitse a re: ‘Bona, ke a swa, o mphitlhe gona kwa lefatsheng la Kanana mo lebitleng le ke le ikepetseng.’ Jaanong a nke ke ye, ke fitlhe rre. Ke tla be ke boa.”" 
Genesis50:6 Farao a re: “Yaa o fitlhe rraago ka fa a go ikanisitseng ka teng.” 
Genesis50:7 Josefa a ya jalo go fitlha rraagwe; batlhanka botlhe ba ga Farao ba ya nae le ba bagolo ba lapa la gagwe le ba bagolo botlhe ba lefatshe la Egepeto. 
Genesis50:8 Le botlhe ba lelapa la ga Josefa le bomorwa-rraagwe le ba lapa la ga rraagwe ba ya nae. Ba tlogela bana ba bannye ba bone le matsomane a bone le metlhape ya bone mo lefatsheng la Gosene. 
Genesis50:9 Gape ga ya nae dikoloi le bapalami ba dipitse; ya nna lesomo le legolo thata. 
Genesis50:10 Ya re ba sena go fitlha kwa seboaneng sa mitlwa se se kwa moseja ga Joretane, ba lelela moswi teng ka selelo se segolo, se se botlhoko thata. Josefa a direla rraagwe khutsafalelo ya malatsi a supa." 
Genesis50:11 Jaanong e rile Bakanana baagi ba lefatshe leo ba bona phitlho mo seboaneng sa mitlwa, ba re: “Selo se ke phitlho e e botlhoko ya Baegepeto.” Ke ka moo ba se teileng leina la Selelo-sa-Baegepeto se se leng kwa moseja ga Joretane." 
Genesis50:12 Mme bomorwawe ba mo direla ka fa a ba laetseng ka teng. 
Genesis50:13 Bomorwawe ba mo isa kwa lefatsheng la Kanana, ba mo fitlha mo logageng lwa tshimo ya Makapela, yona tshimo e Aborahame o neng a e rekile mo go Eferone wa Mohethe go nna mabitla a losika lwa gagwe ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Mamere." 
Genesis50:14 Ya re Josefa a sena go fitlha rraagwe, a boela kwa Egepeto, ene le bomorwa-rraagwe le botlhe ba ba ileng nae go fitlha rraagwe." 
Genesis50:15 Jaanong e rile bomorwa-rraagwe Josefa ba bona, fa rraabo a sule, ba re: “Fa Josefa a ka re tlhoa, a re busetsa tota tse di bosula tsotlhe tse re di mo diretseng, re tla reng?”" 
Genesis50:16 Ke ka moo ba rometseng lefoko kwa go Josefa le le reng: “Rraago o laetse a ise a swe a re: 
Genesis50:17 ‘Rayang Josefa jaana lo re: Ka thapelo a ko o itshwarele boleo jwa bomorwa-rraago le sebe sa bone; gonne ba go diretse bosula.’ Mme jaanong a ko o itshwarele boleo jwa batlhanka ba Modimo wa ga rraago!” Mme Josefa a lela, fa ba bua jalo nae." 
Genesis50:18 Le gona bomorwa-rraagwe ba ya ba wela fa fatshe fa pele ga gagwe ba re: “Bona, re fano, re batlhanka ba gago.”" 
Genesis50:19 Mme Josefa a ba fetola a re: “Se boifeng! A ke mo boemong jwa Modimo? 
Genesis50:20 Ke nnete, lona lo ne lo ikaeletse go ntirela bosula, mme Modimo o bo fetotse molemo gore o tle o dire jaaka go bonwa kajeno, o phedise batho ba bantsi." 
Genesis50:21 Jaanong ge, se boifeng! Ke tla lo babalela le bana ba lona.” A ba gomotsa jalo, a bua tse di itumedisang dipelo tsa bone." 
Genesis50:22 Josefa o ne a nna jalo kwa Egepeto, ene le ba lapa la ga rraagwe. Josefa a phela dinyaga di le lekgolo le lesome." 
Genesis50:23 Josefa a bona bana ba bana ba ga Eferaime. Le bana ba ga Magire, morwa Manase, ba tsalelwa Josefa." 
Genesis50:24 Josefa a laela bomorwa-rraagwe a re: “Ke a swa; mme Modimo o tla lo babalela, o lo ntsha mo lefatsheng le, o lo isa kwa lefatsheng le o le solofeditseng Aborahame le Isaka le Jakobe.”" 
Genesis50:25 Le gona Josefa a ikanisa bomorwa Iseraele a re: “E re Modimo o lo golola, lo ntshe marapo a me mono.”" 
Genesis50:26 Josefa a swa a le dinyaga di le 110. Ba mo omeletsa ka ditlhare, ba mo tsenya mo letloleng kwa Egepeto." 
Exodus1:1 Maina ke a, a bomorwa Iseraele ba ba neng ba ya kwa Egepeto mmogo le Jakobe le malapa a bone:" 
Exodus1:2 Rubene le Simeone le Lefi le Juta 
Exodus1:3 le Isašare le Sebulone le Benyamene 
Exodus1:4 le Dane le Nafetale le Gate le Asere. 
Exodus1:5 Mme botlhe ba e leng ba losika lwa ga Jakobe e ne e le batho ba le 70. Mme Josefa o ne a sa bolo go ya kwa Egepeto. 
Exodus1:6 Jaanong ya re Josefa a se na go swa le bomorwa-rraagwe botlhe le losika lwa ntlha," 
Exodus1:7 bana ba bone, e bong Baiseraele ba sala ba ata, ba ntsifala, ba nna bantsi, mo ba bileng ba tlala ka lefatshe." 
Exodus1:8 Mme ga busa kgosi e ntšhwa kwa Egepeto e e sa itseng sepe ka ga Josefa. 
Exodus1:9 Yona ya raya morafe wa yona ya re: “Bonang, morafe wa Baiseraele o mogolo, o tloga o nna thata bogolo go rona." 
Exodus1:10 Tlayang, re ba logeleng maano, e se re gongwe ba atela pele, mme ya re fa ntwa e ka tla, ba goga le baba ba rona, ba tlhabana le rona, ba tlogela lefatshe le.”" 
Exodus1:11 Ya baa gona ba ba beelang baokamedi ba ba ba pateletsang tirong, e le go ba bogisa ka ditiro tse di bokete tsa bone. Ba agela Farao metse ya difala tse di bolokang dijo, e bong Phitome le Ramasese." 
Exodus1:12 Mme le fa ba ba bogisa thata, bone ba ata thata, ba anama segolo, mo Baegepeto ba bileng ba boifa Baiseraele." 
Exodus1:13 Ke fa Baegepeto ba dira Baiseraele batlhanka ka thata; 
Exodus1:14 ba galakisa bophelo jwa bone ka tiro e e bokete letsopeng le diekaneng le ka tiro tsa mefutafuta kwa masimo; ditiro tsotlhe tsa bone ba di ba dirisa setlhogo. 
Exodus1:15 Gape kgosi ya Egepeto ya laela babelegisi ba basadi ba Bahebere, e bong Sifera le Phua," 
Exodus1:16 ya re: “Fa lo belegisa basadi ba Bahebere, lo lebalebe ngwana; fa e le mosimane, mmolaeng; fa e le mosetsana, a a phele!”" 
Exodus1:17 Mme babelegisi ba bo ba boifa Modimo, ba se ka ba dira ka fa kgosi ya Egepeto e ba laetseng ka teng, ba leseletsa basimane go phela." 
Exodus1:18 Ke fa kgosi ya Egepeto e bitsa babelegisi, e ba botsa e re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa lo dirile jalo, lwa phedisa basimane?”" 
Exodus1:19 Babelegisi ba fetola Farao ba re: “Kana basadi ba Bahebere ga ba tshwane le basadi ba Baegepeto, mme bone ba thata. E a tle e re mmelegisi a ise a fitlhe kwa go bone, ba bo ba setse ba belege.”" 
Exodus1:20 Babelegisi bao Modimo wa ba phedisa sentle, mme morafe wa Baiseraele wa ata, wa tia thata." 
Exodus1:21 Mme ya re ka babelegisi ba boifa Modimo, ona wa ba naya malapa a a tletseng bana." 
Exodus1:22 Ke fa Farao a laela morafe otlhe wa gagwe a re: “Basimane botlhe ba Bahebere ba ba tla tsalwang lo ba latlheleng mo nokeng ya Nile, mme basetsana botlhe lo ba lese ba phele!”" 
Exodus2:1 Monna mongwe wa lotso lwa ga Lefi a ya a tsaya mosadi mo go bomorwadia Lefi. 
Exodus2:2 Mosadi yoo a ithwala, a tshola ngwana wa mosimane. Ya re a bona a le montle, a mo fitlha dikgwedi di le tharo." 
Exodus2:3 Ya re a sa tlhole a kgona go mo fitlha, a mo tseela seroto sa lotlhaka, a se thiba ka boroku jwa mmu le boka, a baya ngwana mo go sona, a ba a se fitlha mo motlhakeng fa losing lwa noka ya Nile." 
Exodus2:4 Mme kgaitsadie a ema kgakalanyana gore a tle a bone, fa sengwe se mo dirafalela." 
Exodus2:5 Ke fa morwadia Farao a fologela kwa nokeng ya Nile go tlhapa, basetsana ba gagwe ba ntse ba tsamaya fa losing lwa noka ya Nile. Jaanong ya re a bona seroto seo mo motlhakeng, a roma lelata la gagwe, la ya la se tsaya." 
Exodus2:6 Ya re a se khurumolola, a bona ngwana, a fitlhela e le mosimanyana yo o lelang, a mo tlhomogela pelo a re: “Ke ngwana mongwe wa Bahebere.”" 
Exodus2:7 Ke fa kgaitsadie a botsa morwadia Farao a re: “A ke ye go go biletsa mosadi yo o amusang wa Bahebere gore a go amusetse ngwana yo?” 
Exodus2:8 Morwadia Farao a mo araba a re: “Ee, dira jalo!” Ke fa lekgarebe leo le ya, le bitsa mmaagwe ngwana." 
Exodus2:9 Mme morwadia Farao a mo laela a re: “Tsaya mosimanyana yo, o mo nkamusetse; ke tla go naya tuelo.” Mosadi a tsaya ngwana yo, a mo amusa." 
Exodus2:10 Ya re ngwana a sena go gola, a mo isa kwa go morwadia Farao, a nna morwawe, mme a mo taya leina la Moše a re: “Kana ke mo ntshitse mo metsing!”" 
Exodus2:11 Jaanong ya re Moše a sena go nna monna, a ya kwa go ba ga gabo, a bona ditiro tse di bokete tsa bone; a bona monna wa Moegepeto a itaya monna wa ga gabo wa Mohebere." 
Exodus2:12 A gadima kwa le kwa, mme ya re a bona go se na ope, a bolaya Moegepeto, a mo epela mo motlhabeng." 
Exodus2:13 A ba a ya gape ka letsatsi la bobedi, a bona banna ba le babedi ba Bahebere ba lwa, mme a botsa yo o rumotseng a re: “O iteelang wa ga eno?”" 
Exodus2:14 Mme ene a re: “Ke mang yo o go beileng molaodi le moatlhodi wa rona? A o rata go mpolaya jaaka o bolaile Moegepeto yole?” Ke fa Moše a tshoga a re: “Ka nnete, tiro eo e utlwetswe.”" 
Exodus2:15 Jaanong e rile Farao a utlwela tirafalo eo, a batla go bolaya Moše, mme Moše a tshaba, a ya a nna kwa lefatsheng la Midiane, a nna fa sedibeng sengwe." 
Exodus2:16 Mme moperesiti wa Midiane o ne a na le bomorwadie ba supa; bone ba tla, ba ga metsi, ba tlatsa digopo go nosa letsomane la ga rraabo." 
Exodus2:17 Ke fa badisa ba bangwe ba tla, ba ba leleka, mme Moše a nanoga, a ba thusa, a nosa letsomane la bone." 
Exodus2:18 E rile ba fitlha kwa go Rehuele rraabo, ene a re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa lo boile ka pele kajeno?”" 
Exodus2:19 Ba re: “Monna mongwe wa Moegepeto o re namotse badisa, a ba a re gelela metsi, a nosa letsomane lotlhe.”" 
Exodus2:20 Mme a raya bomorwadie a re: “Kana o kae? Monna yoo lo mo tlogeletseng? Yaang lo mmiletse dijo.” 
Exodus2:21 Moše a dumela go nna le monna yoo; ene a neela Moše Siphora morwadie go nna mosadi wa gagwe. 
Exodus2:22 Siphora a tshola ngwana wa mosimane, mme Moše a mo taya leina la Geresome; gonne a re: “Ke moeng mo lefatsheng le sele.”" 
Exodus2:23 Jaanong ya re sebaka se seleele se sena go feta, kgosi ya Egepeto ya swa, mme Baiseraele ba fegelwa ka ntlha ya botlhanka, ba lelela thuso; mme selelo sa bone sa tlhatlogela kwa Modimong se tswa mo botlhankeng jwa bone." 
Exodus2:24 Modimo wa utlwa diphegelo tsa bone, wa gopola kgolagano ya ona e o e dirileng le Aborahame le Isaka le Jakobe." 
Exodus2:25 Modimo wa bona Baiseraele, wa ba itshenolela." 
Exodus3:1 Moše o ne a ntse a disa letsomane la ga Jetoro mogwagwadiagwe, moperesiti wa Midiane. O kile a disa letsomane, a fetile sekaka, a fitlha kwa thabeng ya Modimo ya Horebe." 
Exodus3:2 Teng moengele wa Morena a iponatsa mo go ene a le mo kgabong ya molelo e e tswang mo setlhareng se se mitlwa. A leba, a fitlhela molelo o tuka mo setlhareng, mme se sa šwe." 
Exodus3:3 Ke fa Moše a re: “A nke ke atamele, ke bone kgakgamatso e kgolo e gore ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa setlhare seo se sa šwe.”" 
Exodus3:4 Mme ya re Morena a mmona a atamela go sekaseka, Modimo wa mmitsa o le mo setlhareng seo se se mitlwa wa re: “Moše! Moše!” Mme a re: “Ke fano.”" 
Exodus3:5 Wa re: “Se atamele kwano, rola ditlhako tsa gago; gonne felo fa o emeng teng foo ke felo fa go boitshepo.”" 
Exodus3:6 Wa ba wa re: “Ke nna Modimo wa ga rraago, Modimo wa ga Aborahame, Modimo wa ga Isaka, Modimo wa ga Jakobe.” Ke fa Moše a ipipa sefatlhego, ka a boifa go leba Modimo." 
Exodus3:7 Morena a re: “Ruri, ke bonye pogisego ya morafe wa me o o mo Egepeto, ke ba utlwile ba ledisiwa ke bagobagobetsi ba bone; tota ke itse botlhoko jwa bone." 
Exodus3:8 Mme ke fologile go ba golola mo diatleng tsa Baegepeto le go ba ntsha mo lefatsheng leo le go ba isa kwa lefatsheng le le molemo le le atlhameng kwa lefatsheng le le elang mašwi le dinotshe, kwa dinageng tsa Bakanana le Bahethe le Baamori le Baferesi le Bahewi le Bajebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Jaanong, bona, selelo sa Baiseraele se fitlhile mo go nna. Le gona ke bonye kgatelelo e Baegepeto ba ba gateletseng ka yona." 
Exodus3:10 Jaanong he, yaa teng, ke go rome kwa go Farao, o ntshe Baiseraele, morafe wa me, mo Egepeto.”" 
Exodus3:11 Moše a fetola Modimo a re: “Nna ke mang, yo nka yang kwa go Farao go ntsha Baiseraele mo Egepeto?”" 
Exodus3:12 Modimo wa re: “Kana ke tla nna nao. Mme sesupo sa gore ke go romile ke se: E tla re o sena go ntsha morafe oo mo Egepeto, lo direle Modimo mo thabeng e.”" 
Exodus3:13 Moše a botsa Modimo a re: “E re ke fitlha kwa Baiseraeleng, ke ba raya ke re: ‘Modimo wa borraeno o nthomile kwa go lona,’ mme ba mpotsa ba re: ‘Leina la ona ke mang?’ – foo ke ba ree ke reng?”" 
Exodus3:14 Modimo wa raya Moše wa re: “Ke nna yo ke leng ene!” Wa ba wa re: “Raya Baiseraele jaana o re: ‘Ene ke-nna o nthomile kwano go lona.’ ” 
Exodus3:15 Modimo wa bua gape le Moše wa re: “O ree Baiseraele jaana o re: ‘Morena Modimo wa borraeno, Modimo wa ga Aborahame le Isaka le Jakobe, ke ona o o nthomileng kwano go lona.’ Ke lone leina la me ka bosakhutleng, ke lone le ke bidiwang ka lone ke ditshika tsotlhe." 
Exodus3:16 Yaa he, o phuthe bagolo ba Baiseraele, o ba ree o re: ‘Morena Modimo wa borraeno o iponaditse mo go nna; Modimo wa ga Aborahame le Isaka le Jakobe wa re: Ruri, ke lo etse tlhoko le tse lo di diretsweng mo Egepeto," 
Exodus3:17 ka re, ke tla lo ntsha mo pogisegong ya Egepeto, ke lo isa kwa lefatsheng la Bakanana le Bahethe le Baamori le Baferesi le Bahewi le Bajebusi kwa lefatsheng le le elang mašwi le dinotshe.’" 
Exodus3:18 “Ba tla utlwa lentswe la gago; mme wena o ye kwa kgosing ya Egepeto, o na le bagolo ba Baiseraele, lo e ree lo re: ‘Morena Modimo wa Bahebere o kgatlhanye le rona. Jaanong ge, a ko o re letlelele go ya kwa sekakeng ka leeto la malatsi a le mararo, re ye go direla Morena Modimo wa rona ka ditlhabelo.’" 
Exodus3:19 Fela ke itse gore kgosi ya Egepeto ga e ka ke ya lo dumelela go tsamaya, fa e sa patelediwe ka thata." 
Exodus3:20 Mme ke tla otlolola letsogo, ke itaya Egepeto ka dikgakgamatso tsa me tsa mefutafuta tse ke tla di dirang teng. Morago ga moo kgosi e tla lo rebola." 
Exodus3:21 “Le gona ke tla naya morafe o go bona bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a Baegepeto: E tla re fa lo huduga, lo se ke lo huduge lo iphotlhere fela." 
Exodus3:22 Mme a mosadi mongwe le mongwe a kope dilo tsa selefera le tsa gouta le diaparo mo mosading wa Moegepeto yo o bapileng nae le mo go ene yo e leng moeng mo lapeng la Moiseraele; lo di apese bomorwa-lona le bomorwadia-lona, lo thukhuthe Baegepeto jalo.”" 
Exodus4:1 Moše a fetola a re: “Fa ba sa ntumele, ba sa utlwe lentswe la me, ba re: ‘Morena ga a ka a iponatsa mo go wena, ke tla dirang’?”" 
Exodus4:2 Morena a mo raya a re: “Ke eng se o se tshotseng ka letsogo?” A re: “Ke thobane.” 
Exodus4:3 Morena a re: “E latlhele fa fatshe!” A e latlhela fa fatshe, ya fetoga noga. Moše a ba a tshaba." 
Exodus4:4 Morena a raya Moše a re: “Ntsha letsogo o e tshware ka mogatla.” A ntsha letsogo, a e tshwara, mme ya boa ya nna thobane gape mo letsogong la gagwe." 
Exodus4:5 “O dire jalo gore ba tle ba dumele, fa Morena Modimo wa borraabo, Modimo wa ga Aborahame le Isaka le Jakobe, o iponaditse mo go wena.”" 
Exodus4:6 Morena a ba a mo raya a re: “A ko o tsenye seatla mo sehubeng sa gago.” A tsenya seatla mo sehubeng sa gagwe. Ya re a se ntsha, a fitlhela seatla sa gagwe se tletse lepero se le sesweu jaaka semathana." 
Exodus4:7 A laola a re: “Tsenya seatla gape mo kobong ya gago.” A se busetsa mo kobong ya gagwe. Ya re a se ntsha, a fitlhela se tshwana gape le nama ya gagwe." 
Exodus4:8 “Mme fa ba sa go dumele, ba sa utlwe thuto ya sesupo sa ntlha, ba tla dumela thuto ya sesupo sa bobedi." 
Exodus4:9 Mme fa ba sa dumele ditshupo tsoo pedi, ba sa utlwe lentswe la gago, o ge metsi mo nokeng ya Nile, o a tshololele fa go omileng. Foo metsi a o a gileng mo nokeng a tla fetoga madi teng foo.”" 
Exodus4:10 Mme Moše a raya Morena a re: “Ao! Morena, ga ke itse go bua sentle, fa e sa le ke tsalwa go fitlhelela kajeno, o ntse o bua le motlhanka wa gago. Gonne ke molomo o bonya, ke loleme lo bonya.”" 
Exodus4:11 Ke fa Morena a mmotsa a re: “Ke mang yo o fileng motho molomo, ke mang yo o dirang motho semumu gongwe sesusu gongwe mmoni gongwe sefofu? A ga se nna Morena?" 
Exodus4:12 Tsamaya he o ye, nna ke tla nna le molomo wa gago, ke go ruta tse o tla di buang.”" 
Exodus4:13 Mme Moše a re: “Ao! Morena, roma o sele yo o ka kgonang, e seng nna.”" 
Exodus4:14 Ke fa Morena a tukela Moše bogale a re: “A ga ke re, Arone mogoloo wa Molefi o teng? Ke itse gore ene o itse go bua sentle. E bile o e tla, o tsile go go kgatlhantsha, mme e tla re a go bona, a itumele ka pelo yotlhe." 
Exodus4:15 Bua nae, o tsenye mafoko mo molomong wa gagwe, mme ke tla nna le molomo wa gago le molomo wa gagwe, ke lo ruta tse lo tla di dirang." 
Exodus4:16 Ene o tla nna mmueledi wa gago mo bathong, ene e le molomo wa gago, mme wena o le modimo wa gagwe." 
Exodus4:17 Mme thobane eo e o tla dirang ditshupo ka yona, o e tshole ka letsogo.”" 
Exodus4:18 Moše a tsamaya, a boela kwa go Jetoro mogwagwadiagwe, a mo raya a re: “A ko o ntetlelele gore ke boele kwa go ba ga etsho ba ba nnang kwa Egepeto, ke ye go bona gore a ba sa ntse ba phela.” Jetoro a raya Moše a re: “Yaa ka kagiso!”" 
Exodus4:19 Morena a raya Moše a sa le kwa Midiane a re: “Boela kwa Egepeto, gonne banna botlhe ba ba neng ba rata go go bolaya ba sule.”" 
Exodus4:20 Ke fa Moše a tsaya mosadi wa gagwe le bomorwawe, a ba palamisa diesele, a boela kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto. Moše a bo a tshotse thobane ya Modimo ka letsogo." 
Exodus4:21 Morena a laela Moše jaana a re: “E re ka o le mo tseleng go boela kwa Egepeto, o tlhokomele gore o dire dikgakgamatso fa pele ga Farao tse ke di tsentseng mo diatleng tsa gago. Fela nna ke tla thatafatsa pelo ya gagwe, mo a se neng a leseletsa morafe go ka huduga." 
Exodus4:22 “O be o ree Farao o re: ‘Morena o bua jaana a re: Iseraele ke ene morwaake wa ntlha. 
Exodus4:23 Mme ke go laola ke re: Naya morwaake tsela gore a ye go ntirela, mme fa o ka gana go mo lesa a tsamae, ke tla bolaya morwao wa ntlha.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 Jaanong ya re Moše a le mo tseleng fa go lalwang teng, Morena a mo tlhasela, a re o a mmolaya." 
Exodus4:25 Ke fa Siphora a tsaya thipa ya letlapa, a rupisa morwawe, a se latlhela fa dinaong tsa ga Moše a re: “Kana o mogatsaake wa madi!”" 
Exodus4:26 Ya ba gona Morena a mo lesang. Foo mosadi a re: “Mogatsaake wa madi!” A raya thupiso. 
Exodus4:27 Mme Morena o ne a laetse Arone a re: “Yaa o kgatlhantshe Moše kwa sekakeng.” A ya a kgatlhana nae kwa thabeng ya Modimo, a mo atla." 
Exodus4:28 Ke fa Moše a begela Arone mafoko otlhe a Morena o mo romileng ka ona le ditshupo tsotlhe tse o di mo laoletseng. 
Exodus4:29 Moše le Arone ba ya ba phutha bagolo botlhe ba Baiseraele. 
Exodus4:30 Arone a bolela mafoko otlhe a Morena o neng a a buile le Moše, mme Moše a dira ditshupo tsele fa pele ga matlho a morafe." 
Exodus4:31 Morafe wa dumela. Ya re ba sena go utlwa gore Morena o etse Baiseraele tlhoko, o bonye pogisego ya bone, ba inama, ba obamela Modimo." 
Exodus5:1 Morago ga moo Moše le Arone ba ya kwa go Farao, ba mo raya ba re: “Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana a re: ‘Lesa morafe wa me o ye go ntirela moletlo mo sekakeng!’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Farao a fetola a re: “Morena ke mang yo ke tshwanetseng go mo utlwa, ka naya Baiseraele tsela? Ga ke itse Morena, le gona ga nka ke ka lesa Baiseraele go tsamaya.”" 
Exodus5:3 Bone ba re: “Modimo wa Bahebere o kgatlhanye le rona. Nte re ye kwa sekakeng ka leeto la malatsi a le mararo, re direle Morena, Modimo wa rona, ditlhabelo, e se re gongwe a re wela ka leroborobo gongwe ka tšhaka.”" 
Exodus5:4 Kgosi ya Egepeto ya ba raya ya re: “Lona, Moše le Arone, lo dielang batho mo ditirong tsa bone? Yaang kwa ditirong tsa lona.”" 
Exodus5:5 Farao a ba a re: “Bonang, ba setse ba atile thata mo lefatsheng la rona. Jaanong a lona lo rata go ba ikhutsisa mo ditirong tsa bone?”" 
Exodus5:6 Ka lone letsatsi leo Farao a laela bagobagobetsi ba ba mo morafeng le baokamedi ba ona a re: 
Exodus5:7 “Lo se ka lwa tlhola lo naya morafe lotlhaka lwa go bopa diekana jaaka pele. A ba ye ka bosi, ba ikgobokanyetse lotlhaka." 
Exodus5:8 Mme palo ya diekana e ba e dirileng pele lo e batle mo go bone, lo se ka lwa e fokotsa; gonne bone ke ditshwakga. Ke ka moo ba goang ba re: ‘Re lese re ye re direle Modimo wa rona ditlhabelo!’" 
Exodus5:9 A tiro e imele banna bao tota gore ba itapise ka yona, mme ba se ka ba tlhokomela mafoko a maaka.”" 
Exodus5:10 Ke fa bagobagobetsi ba morafe le baokamedi ba ona ba tswa ba raya morafe ba re: “Farao o bua jaana a re: ‘Ga nka ke ka lo naya lotlhaka. 
Exodus5:11 Yaang ka nosi lo ipatlele lotlhaka, kwa lo ka lo bonang teng, mme tiro ya lona ga e ne e fokodiwa ka gope.’ ”" 
Exodus5:12 Ke fa morafe o phatlalala le lefatshe lotlhe la Egepeto go kgobokanya dirite boemong jwa lotlhaka. 
Exodus5:13 Mme bagobagobetsi ba ba potlakisa ba re: “Fetsang ditiro tsa lona tsa letsatsi ka nako ya tsona jaaka pele, fa lo sa ntse lo fiwa lotlhaka.”" 
Exodus5:14 Baokamedi ba e leng Baiseraele ba ba neng ba beilwe ke bagobagobetsi ba ga Farao mo go bone ba itewa, ba bodiwa ga twe: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa maabane le kajeno lo sa fetsa palo ya diekana e lo e laetsweng jaaka gale?”" 
Exodus5:15 Ke fa baokamedi ba e leng Baiseraele ba ya kwa go Farao ba mo goela ba re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa o direla batlhanka ba gago jaana?" 
Exodus5:16 Batlhanka ba gago ga ba fiwe lotlhaka, mme ba ntse ba re raya ba re: ‘Bopang diekana!’ Bona, batlhanka ba gago ba a itewa, morafe wa gago o dirwa baleofi.”" 
Exodus5:17 Mme a fetola a re: “Ditshwakga ke lona, lo metlapa! Ke ka moo lo buang lo re: ‘Re lese re ye re direle Morena ditlhabelo!’" 
Exodus5:18 Tsamayang lo ye tirong! Ga lo kitla lo fiwa lotlhaka, mme lo bope palo ya diekana e e beilweng.”" 
Exodus5:19 Ke fa baokamedi ba e leng Baiseraele ba iphitlhela ba le mo bothateng ka lefoko le le reng: “Lo se ka lwa fokotsa palo ya diekana tsa lona e e beilweng ya letsatsi le letsatsi.” 
Exodus5:20 Ya re ba tswa kwa go Farao, ba kopana le Moše le Arone ba ba neng ba eme teng go ba kgatlhantsha." 
Exodus5:21 Ba ba raya ba re: “A Morena a lo bone, a lo atlhole; gonne lo re nkgisitse fa pele ga Farao le batlhanka ba gagwe, lwa ba lwa tsenya tšhaka mo diatleng tsa bone go re bolaya.”" 
Exodus5:22 Moše a boela kwa Moreneng a re: “Morena, ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa o direla morafe o bosula? A o nthometse gona?" 
Exodus5:23 Fa e sa le ke tsena kwa go Farao go bua ka leina la gago, a simolola go direla morafe o bosula. Le gona ga o ise o golole morafe wa gago gope.”" 
Exodus6:1 Mme Morena a raya Moše a re: “Jaanong o tla bona se ke tla se direlang Farao. Gonne o tla ba naya tsela, a pateleditswe ke letsogo le le thata. Ee, o tla ba leleka mo lefatsheng la gagwe, a pateleditswe ke letsogo le le thata.”" 
Exodus6:2 Modimo wa bua gape le Moše, wa mo raya wa re: “Ke nna Morena." 
Exodus6:3 Ke iponaditse mo go Aborahame le mo go Isaka le mo go Jakobe ke le Modimo Mothatayotlhe, mme ga ke a ka ka ikitsise mo go bone ka leina la me la Morena." 
Exodus6:4 Le gona ke dirile kgolagano ya me nabo, ka ba solofetsa go ba naya lefatshe la Kanana, lefatshe la boeng jwa bone, le ba neng ba le baeng mo go lone."
