Deuteronomy31:8 Morena ke ene yo o tla go etelelang pele, o tla nna nao. Ga a kitla a go hularela le e seng go go tlogela. O se ka wa boifa le e seng go tshoga.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Jaanong Moše a kwala molao o, a o neela baperesiti, boora Lefi ba e neng e le basikari ba Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena le bagolo botlhe ba Iseraele." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Moše a ba laela a re: “E ne e re go fela dinyaga di supa, ka nako ya ngwaga wa go phimola melato, ka Moletlo wa Metlaagana," 
Deuteronomy31:11 fa Baiseraele botlhe ba tla go bonala fa pele ga sefatlhego sa Morena, Modimo wa lona, mo felong fa o tla go tlhophang, go buisiwa molao o fa pele ga Baiseraele botlhe mo ditsebeng tsa bone." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Kgobokanyang morafe, e bong banna le basadi le bana le baeng ba lona ba ba mo metseng ya lona gore ba tle ba reetse le gore ba ithute go boifa Morena, Modimo wa lona, ba tlhokomele go dirisa mafoko otlhe a molao o." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Le bana ba bone ba ba sa o itseng a ba o reetse, ba ithute go boifa Morena, Modimo wa lona, ka malatsi otlhe a ba tla phelang ka ona mo lefatsheng le lo tla tshelang Joretane go ya kwa go lone go le rua.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Morena a ba a raya Moše a re: “Bona, malatsi a gago a go swa a atametse. Bitsa Jošua, lo eme mo Tenteng ya Boipontsho gore ke mo laele.” Moše le Jošua ba ya ba ema mo Tenteng ya Boipontsho." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Ke fa Morena a iponatsa kwa Tenteng ka pinagare ya leru, mme pinagare ya leru e ne e eme fa mojakong wa Tente." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Morena a raya Moše a re: “Bona, o tla robala le borraago, mme morafe o, o tla sala o dira boaka ka go latela medimo e sele ya lefatshe le o tla tsenang mo go lone; teng o tla ntlogela, o senya kgolagano ya me e ke e dirileng nabo." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Ka sebaka seo bogale jwa me bo tla o tukela, mme ke tla ba tlogela, ke ba subela sefatlhego sa me, mo ba tla jegang, ba dirafalelwa ke masula a mantsi le ditlalelo. Ka sebaka seo ba tla re: ‘A ga re a dirafalelwa ke masula ao, ka Modimo wa rona o se na le rona?’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Mme ke tla ba subela sefatlhego sa me gotlhe ka sebaka seo ka ntlha ya bosula jotlhe jo ba bo dirileng, ka ba ineetse medimo e sele." 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Jaanong he, ikwaleleng sefela se, lo se rute Baiseraele, lo se tsenye mo melomong ya bone gore sefela se e nne mosupi wa me ka ga Baiseraele." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Gonne ke tla ba gorosa kwa lefatsheng, le ke le ikanetseng borraabo le le elang mašwi le dinotshe; fela e tla re ba se na go ja le go kgora le go nona, ba ineele medimo e sele, ba e direle, ba nnyatse, ba senye kgolagano ya me." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Mme fa masula a mantsi le ditlalelo di ba dirafalela, sefela se se tla supa fa pele ga bone e le mosupi; gonne ga se kitla se lebalwa, se tloga mo melomong ya bana ba bone. Se tla supa gore ke ntse ke itse kakanyo ya bone e ba e akanyang kajeno, ke ise ke ba gorose kwa lefatsheng le ke le ikanetseng borraabo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Ke fa Moše a kwala sefela seo ka letsatsi leo, a se ruta Baiseraele." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Mme Morena a laela Jošua, morwa Nune, a re: “Nna pelokgale, o tie; gonne wena o tla gorosa Baiseraele kwa lefatsheng le ke le ba ikanetseng, mme nna ke tla nna nao.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 E rile Moše a se na go kwala mafoko a molao oo mo lokwalong le go a fetsa," 
Deuteronomy31:25 a laela Balefi, basikari ba Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena, a re:" 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Tsayang lokwalo lo lwa molao, lo lo bee fa thoko ga Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena, Modimo wa lona, gore lo nne teng e le mosupi ka ga lona." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Gonne nna ke itse borukhutlhi jwa lona le dithamo tsa lona tse di gagametseng. Bonang, fa lo ne lo rukhutlhegela Morena sebakeng seno, ke sa ntse ke phela le lona, morago ga loso lwa me gona go tla nna jang!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Jaanong he, phuthelang bagolo botlhe ba ditso tsa lona go nna le bakwaledi ba lona gore ke bue mafoko a mo ditsebeng tsa bone, ke ba biletse legodimo le lefatshe go nna basupi ka ga bone." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Gonne ke itse gore, morago ga loso lwa me lo tla senya bogolo, lo fapoga tsela e ke e lo laetseng. Ka moo lo tla wela mo tatlhegong ka malatsi a bofelo, ka lo tla dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena; mme lo tla mo gakatsa ka tiro ya diatla tsa lona.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Moše a ba a bolela mafoko a sefela se mo ditsebeng tsa phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele, a ba a a fetsa:" 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Heelang magodimo, tlhwayang ditsebe, ke bolele; heela lefatshe, reetsa dipolelo tsa molomo wa me!" 
Deuteronomy32:2 A thuto ya me e sarasare jaaka pula, a polelo ya me e rothe jaaka monyo; e etse marothodi a pula mo botalaneng le jaaka pula ya medupe mo morogong." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Gonne ke tla baka leina la Morena ke re: Neelang Modimo wa rona tlotlo. 
Deuteronomy32:4 “Ke ene Lefika; tiro ya gagwe e itekanetse; gonne ditsela tsotlhe tsa gagwe di siame. Ke Modimo o o ikanyegang o o se nang bokgopo; o siame, o tlhamaletse." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Ba o senyeditse. Ga se bana ba one, ba tshwana le tshubaba fela; ke losika lo lo sokameng lo lo kgopo gotlhe." 
Deuteronomy32:6 A lo leboga Morena jalo, lona morafe o o bosilo o o se nang tlhaloganyo? A ga se ene rraago yo o go bopileng? A ga se ene yo o go dirileng, a go baakanya?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 “Gopolang malatsi a bogologolo, tlhokomelang dinyaga tsa ditshika tsotlhe. Botsa rraago, o tla go itsise, le banna bagolo ba ga eno ba tla go bolelela." 
Deuteronomy32:8 E rile Mogodimodimo a abela ditšhaba boswa, ya re a kgaoganya bana ba batho, a sega melelwane ya merafe ka fa palong ya Baiseraele." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Gonne kabelo ya Morena ke morafe wa gagwe; Jakobe ke boswa jwa gagwe jo bo lekantsweng. 
Deuteronomy32:10 “A mmona mo lefatsheng la sekaka, fa go tobekanyeng mo selelong sa naga ya dibata. A mo agelela, a mmabalela, a mo sireletsa jaaka thaka ya leitlho la gagwe," 
Deuteronomy32:11 jaaka ntswi e tsosa bana ba sentlhaga sa yona, e kala godimo ga mamphorwana a yona, e tsharolola diphuka tsa yona, e a tshola, e a rwala mo diphukeng tsa yona." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Morena a mo tsamaisa a le esi, go se na modimo o sele nae." 
Deuteronomy32:13 “A mo palamisa mafelo a a godimo a lefatshe, a mo jesa maungo a naga, a mo nosa mafura a semana mo lefikeng le lookwane mo majweng a legakwa" 
Deuteronomy32:14 le madila a dikgomo le mašwi a difutshane mmogo le mafura a dikwana le diphelehu; a mo jesa dipoo tsa Basane le diphoko, mmogo le mabele a a nonofileng, wa nwa madi a maungo a moweine, weine e e lefulo." 
Deuteronomy32:15 “Ješurune a nona, a ja mokaragana – wa nona, wa tswa mmele, wa akola – a tlhokomologa Modimo o o mo dirileng, a nyatsa lefika la pholoso ya gagwe." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Ba tsosa lefufa la ona ka go direla medimo e sele, ba o gakatsa ka makgapha." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Ba tlhabela medemone e e seng Modimo le medimo e ba neng ba sa e itse e mešwa e e leng gona e tlang e borraabo ba neng ba sa e itse. 
Deuteronomy32:18 O tlhokomologile lefika le le go tsetseng, wa lebala Modimo o o go belegeng." 
Deuteronomy32:19 “Ya re Morena a bona jalo, a ba latlha, a gakaletse bomorwawe le bomorwadie." 
Deuteronomy32:20 A re: ‘Ke tla ba subela sefatlhego sa me, ke bone gore ba tla felela kae; gonne bone ke losika lo lo sokameng gotlhe, ke bana ba ba sa ikanyegeng." 
Deuteronomy32:21 E re ka ba tsositse lefufa la me ka tse e seng Modimo, ba nkgakatsa ka medimo ya bone ya boithamako, le nna ke tla tsosa lefufa la bone ka ba e seng morafe, ke tla ba gakatsa ka setšhaba se se bosilo." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Gonne molelo o simolotse go tuka ka bogale jwa me, wa tuka go ya kwa felong ga baswi kwa tlasetlase; wa ja lefatshe le tse le di tlhogisang, wa tshuba metheo ya dithaba." 
Deuteronomy32:23 “ ‘Ke tla ba kgobokanyetsa masula, ke tla feleletsa metsu ya me mo go bone." 
Deuteronomy32:24 E re ba feletswe ka tlala, ba jegile ka go tuka bolelo le ka malwetse a a galakang, ke ba romele meno a dibata mmogo le botlhole jwa dinoga tse di gagabang mo leroleng." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Ka kwa ntle tšhaka e tla ba amoga ba ga bone le therego ka mo matlwaneng, makau mmogo le makgarebe le masea le banna ba babududu." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Nka bo ke rile: Ke tla ba budula, ke khutlisa batho go ba gopola," 
Deuteronomy32:27 fa nka bo ke sa boifa go nkgakatsa ga mmaba, e se re gongwe bagateledi ba bone ba fosa ba re: Diatla tsa rona di ne di le thata; ga se Morena yo o dirileng tsotlhe tse.’" 
Deuteronomy32:28 “Gonne Baiseraele ke setšhaba se se latlhegetsweng ke dikgakololo; ga ba na tlhaloganyo. 
Deuteronomy32:29 Fa ba ka bo ba tlhalefile, ba ka bo ba tlhaloganya tseo, ba lemoga ka fa ba tla felang ka teng." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Mmaba a le mongwe o ka khutšhela jang ba le sekete? Ba le babedi ba ka leleka jang ba le 10 000? Kana ke go re, Lefika la bone le ba rekisitse, Morena o ba latlhile." 
Deuteronomy32:31 Gonne lefika la bone ga le tshwane le Lefika la rona; le baba ba rona ba bua jalo. 
Deuteronomy32:32 Gonne moweine wa bone ke wa Sotoma le wa masimo a moweine a Gomora; maungo a moweine a bone ke a a botlhole, ba na le masitlha a a galakang." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Weine ya bone ke botlhole jwa mokwepa le botlhole jo bo setlhogo jwa mabolobolo. 
Deuteronomy32:34 “Tseo a ga di a bolokwa fa go nna, tsa kanwa mo mahumong a me" 
Deuteronomy32:35 go ya letsatsing la pusoloso le tefetso, go ya sebakeng se dinao tsa bone di tla thekeselang ka sona? Gonne letsatsi la tatlhego ya bone le gaufi; tse di tla ba welang di a itlhaganela." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Gonne Morena o tla direla morafe wa gagwe tshiamo, a utlwela batlhanka ba gagwe botlhoko. Gonne o tla bona, fa thata e feleletse, fa go feleletse yo o bofegileng le yo o gololesegileng." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Morena o tla re: ‘Le kae lefika le ba neng ba tshabela kwa go lone, medimo ya bone e kae" 
Deuteronomy32:38 e e neng e ja mafura a ditlhabelo tsa bone, e nwa weine ya tshupelo ya noo ya bone. A e nanoge, e lo thuse gore e nne phemelo ya lona." 
Deuteronomy32:39 “ ‘Bonang jaanong gore ke nna tota Modimo ke le nosi, ga go na modimo ope fa e se nna. Ke nna ke bolayang, ke be ke phedise. Ke nna ke remagantseng, ke tla ba ke alafa. Ga go na ope yo o ka pholosang mo seatleng sa me." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Gonne ke tla tsholeletsa letsogo kwa legodimong ke re: Ka botshelo jwa me jo bo sa khutleng! 
Deuteronomy32:41 Fa ke looditse tšhaka ya me e e phatsimang, mme letsogo la me le dirafatsa katlholo, ke tla ipusolosetsa mo babeng ba me, ke betsa ba ba ntlhoileng." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Metsu ya me ke tla e tagisa madi, madi a ba ba bolailweng le a ba ba tshwerweng; tšhaka ya me e tla ja nama ya ditlhogo tsa balaodi ba mmaba.’" 
Deuteronomy32:43 “Lona ditšhaba, dudueletsang morafe wa gagwe; gonne o tla busolosa madi a batlhanka ba gagwe; o tla ipusolosetsa mo babeng ba gagwe, a direla lefatshe la gagwe le morafe wa gagwe thuanyo.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Moše a tla, a bolela mafoko otlhe a sefela se mo ditsebeng tsa morafe, ene le Hošea, morwa Nune." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Jaanong ya re Moše a sena go bolelela Baiseraele botlhe mafoko otlhe ao," 
Deuteronomy32:46 a ba raya a re: “Elang mafoko otlhe tlhoko a ke lo tlhagisang ka ona kajeno, a lo tshwanetseng go a laela bana ba lona gore ba tlhokomele go dirisa mafoko otlhe a molao o." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Gonne ga se lefoko le le lolea mo go lona, mme ke lone botshelo jwa lona. Mme ka lefoko le lo tla leelefatsa malatsi mo lefatsheng le lo tla tshelang Joretane go ya go tsena mo go lone go le rua.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Morena a ba a bua le Moše ka lone letsatsi leo a re: 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Tlhatlogela mo dithabeng tsa Abarime tseno, e bong mo thabeng ya Nebo e e mo lefatsheng la Moabe ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Jerigo, o bone lefatshe la Kanana le ke tla le nayang Baiseraele go nna boswa;" 
Deuteronomy32:50 o swele gona mo thabeng e o tlhatlogelang mo go yona, o gorosiwe kwa morafeng wa gago, jaaka Arone mogoloo a ne a swela kwa thabeng ya Hore, a ba a gorosiwa kwa morafeng wa gagwe;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 ka go re, lo ntiretse ka boikanyologo mo gare ga Baiseraele kwa Metsing a Komano kwa Kateše sekakeng sa Tsine, ka lo se ka lwa intshepisa mo Baiseraeleng." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Gonne o tla bona lefatshe le le fa pele ga gago, mme ga o kitla o tsena teng mo lefatsheng le ke tla le nayang Baiseraele.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Tshegofatso e Moše, monna wa Modimo o neng a tshegofatsa Baiseraele ka yona a ise a swe ke e:" 
Deuteronomy33:2 O buile a re: “Morena o ne a tswa kwa Sinai, a ba tlhabela a tswa kwa Seire, a phatsima a le kwa thabeng ya Pharane, a tswa kwa baitsheping ba le masome a dikete, a tsholetse Baiseraele molao o o molelo mo letsogong le le jang la gagwe." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Ruri, o rata merafe, baitshepi botlhe ba gagwe ba mo seatleng sa gagwe; ba ba atamelang dinao tsa gagwe ba amogela sengwe sa dithuto tsa gagwe." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Moše o re laetse molao, e le khumo ya phuthego ya Jakobe." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Morena o ne a nna kgosi mo Ješurune, jale fa ditlhogo tsa morafe di kgobokana, fa ditso tsa Iseraele di le mmogo." 
Deuteronomy33:6 A Rubene a tshele, a se swe; banna ba gagwe ba se nne bannye.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Ka ga Juta a re: “Morena, utlwa lentswe la ga Juta, o mo ise kwa morafeng wa gagwe o a neng a o lwela ka diatla tsa gagwe. O nne thuso ya gagwe mo babeng ba gagwe.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 A ba a bua ka ga Lefi a re: “ ‘Tshiamo’ ya gago le ‘Lesedi’ la gago, ke tsa monna yo o go ineetseng, yo ò mo lekileng kwa Masa, wa lwa nae fa Metsing a Meriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Ke yo o neng a bua ka ga rraagwe le mmaagwe a re: ‘Ga ke a ba bona,’ a sa re sepe ka bomorwa-rraagwe, a sa itse bana ba gagwe; gonne ba ne ba tlhokomela lefoko la gago, ba boloka kgolagano ya gago." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Ba tla ruta Jakobe ditshiamelo tsa gago le Iseraele molao wa gago. Ba tla baya maswalo fa nkong ya gago le setlhabelo se se tletseng mo aletareng ya gago. 
Deuteronomy33:11 Morena, tshegofatsa botswerere jwa gagwe, a tiro ya diatla tsa gagwe e go kgatlhe; o tšhwetlakanye matheka a ba ba mo tsogelang le a ba ba mo tlhoileng gore ba se tlhole ba tsoga.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 A ba a bua ka ga Benyamene a re: “Ke moratwa wa Morena, o tla aga fa go ene a iketlile. Modimo o mo sireletsa ka metlha yotlhe, ka o agile mo gare ga dithaba tsa gagwe.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 A ba a bua ka ga Josefa a re: “Lefatshe la gagwe le tshegofaditswe ke Morena ka dineo tse dintle tsa legodimo, ka monyo le ka metswedi e e anameng kwa tlase" 
Deuteronomy33:14 le ka dithobo tse dintle tsa letsatsi le ka maungo a mantle a dikgwedi 
Deuteronomy33:15 le ka tse di gaisang tsa dithaba tsa bogologolo le ka tse dintle tsa meboto ya kgale 
Deuteronomy33:16 le ka dineo tse dintle tsa lefatshe le ka tse di tletseng mo go lone le ka go ratwa ke yo o agileng mo setlhareng sa mitlwa: A di tle tsotlhe mo tlhogong ya ga Josefa le mo phogong ya kgosana ya bomorwa-rraagwe. 
Deuteronomy33:17 Poo ya gagwe ya leitibolo e na le borena, dinaka tsa gagwe ke dinaka tsa nare; o tla tlhaba merafe ka tsona, yotlhe mmogo go ya mafelelong a lefatshe. Ke ona masome a dikete a ga Eferaime, ke tsona dikete tsa ga Manase.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 A ba a bua ka ga Sebulone a re: “Wena Sebulone, itumelele go bolola ga gago ka dikepe, le wena Isašare, o itumelele ditente tsa gago." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Ba tla biletsa merafe kwa thabeng, ba dira ditlhabelo tse di siameng; gonne ba tla anya letlotlo la mawatle le mahumo a a fitlhegileng a mošawa.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 A ba a bua ka ga Gate a re: “A go tumisiwe Morena yo o katolosetsang Gate naga; o botha jaaka tau e namagadi; o tla garola letsogo le phogo. 
Deuteronomy33:21 A itlhaolela kabelo ya ntlha, gonne teng go ne go bolokilwe kabelo ya molaodi; a tla le ditlhogo tsa morafe, a dirafatsa tshiamo ya Morena le dikatlholo tsa gagwe le Baiseraele.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 A ba a bua ka ga Dane a re: “Dane ke ledumedi; o tla tlola, a tswa kwa Basane.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 A ba a bua ka ga Nafetale a re: “Nafetale o kgotshe letlhogonolo, o tletse tshegofatso ya Morena. O tla rua letsha la Genesareta le naga ya borwa ya teng.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 A ba a bua ka ga Asere a re: “Asere o tshegofaditswe go gaisa bana ba bangwe, a a ratwe ke bomorwa-rraagwe, a ine lonao lwa gagwe mo lookwaneng." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Mephakarego ya gago e nne ya tshipi le kgotlho. A thata ya gago e lekane le malatsi a gago.” 
Deuteronomy33:26 Ga go na ope yo o tshwanang le Modimo wa gago, Ješurune, o o palameng legodimo go go thusa le maru o le mogolo." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Modimo o o sa khutleng ke boago, bo fa tlase ga mabogo a a sa khutleng; o ne wa leleka mmaba fa pele ga gago wa re: “Mo nyeletse!”" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Iseraele o tla aga a le mo tshireletsong, motswedi wa ga Jakobe o tla nna o le osi mo lefatsheng la mabele le matute a moweine; le gona legodimo la gagwe le tla rotha monyo." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Iseraele, o wa letlhogonolo! Ke mang yo o tshwanang nao? O morafe o o pholosiwang ke Morena. Ke ene thebe e e go thusang le tšhaka e e go godisang. Baba ba gago ba tla go tlakisa, mme wena o tla gata dithota tsa bone." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Jaanong Moše a tloga kwa mabaleng a Moabe, a tlhatlogela mo thabeng ya Nebo setlhoeng sa Phiseka e e lebaganyeng le Jerigo. Mme Morena a mmontsha lefatshe lotlhe la Gileate go ya kwa go la Dane" 
Deuteronomy34:2 le la Nafetale lotlhe le lefatshe la Eferaime le Manase le lefatshe lotlhe la Juta go ya lewatleng la bophirimatsatsi 
Deuteronomy34:3 le naga ya borwa le molapo wa Joretane le lebala la Jerigo, motse wa mekolane, go ya kwa Soare." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Morena a ba a mo raya a re: “Ke lone lefatshe le ke le ikanetseng Aborahame le Isaka le Jakobe ka re: ‘Ke tla le naya losika lwa gago.’ Ke le go bontshitse gore o le bone ka matlho fela, mme ga o kitla o tshelela gona.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Mme Moše, motlhanka wa Morena, a swela teng kwa lefatsheng la Moabe ka fa lefokong la Morena." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Morena a mo fitlha mo mogorogorong kwa lefatsheng la Moabe fa go lebaganyeng le Bethe-Pheore, mme go se na ope yo o itseng phupu ya gagwe go fitlha letsatsing leno." 
Deuteronomy34:7 E rile Moše a swa, a bo a le dinyaga di le 120. Leitlho la gagwe le ne le sa koafala le thata ya gagwe e ne e sa ngotlege." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Baiseraele ba lelela Moše mo mabaleng a Moabe malatsi a le 30; ya ba gona malatsi a go lelela le go hutsafalela Moše a felang. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Mme Jošua, morwa Nune o ne a tletse mowa wa botlhale, gonne Moše o ne a mmeile diatla. Mme Baiseraele ba mo utlwa, ba dira jaaka Morena a laetse Moše." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Mme ga se ka ga tlhola go tsoga moporofeti gape mo Iseraeleng yo o tshwanang le Moše yo Morena o neng a kopana nae ba lebagantse difatlhego; 
Deuteronomy34:11 go se ope yo o tshwanang nae ntlheng ya ditshupo tsa mefutafuta le dikgakgamatso tse Morena o neng a mo roma gore a di dire kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto mo go Farao le mo batlhankeng botlhe ba gagwe le mo lefatsheng lotlhe la gagwe 
Deuteronomy34:12 le ntlheng ya maipontsho otlhe a letsogo le le tiileng le ditiro tse dikgolo tsotlhe tse di boifisang tse Moše o neng a di dira mo matlhong a Baiseraele botlhe. 
Joshua1:1 Morago ga loso lwa ga Moše, motlhanka wa Morena, Morena a raya Jošua morwa Nune, modiredi wa ga Moše, a re:" 
Joshua1:2 “Moše, motlhanka wa me o sule. Jaanong tloga o tshele noka e ya Joretane wena le morafe otlhe o, lo tsene mo lefatsheng le ke le nayang bone Baiseraele." 
Joshua1:3 Felo gongwe le gongwe kwa dipato tsa dinao tsa lona di tla gatang teng ke go lo neile jaaka ke boleletse Moše. 
Joshua1:4 Go tloga kwa sekakeng le kwa Lebanone go ya go fitlha kwa nokeng e kgolo, e bong ya Ferathe – lefatshe lotlhe la Bahethe – le go fitlha kwa lewatleng le legolo le le kwa bophirimatsatsi, e tla nna naga ya lona." 
Joshua1:5 Ga go na ope yo o tla kgonang go emelana nao ka malatsi otlhe a bophelo jwa gago. Ke tla nna nao jaaka ke ne ke na le Moše. Ga nkitla ke go nyemisa moko le e seng go go tlogela. 
Joshua1:6 Tia o nne pelokgale; gonne lefatshe le ke le ikanetseng borraabo go le ba naya, wena o tla le abela morafe o go nna boswa jwa ona." 
Joshua1:7 Fela o tie, o nne pelokgale thata go ela tlhoko gore o dire ka fa molaong otlhe o Moše, motlhanka wa me, a o go laetseng. Se o fapoge mo ntlheng ya le le jang le e seng mo go ya la molema gore tiro ya gago e tswelele pele sentle gongwe le gongwe kwa o tla yang teng." 
Joshua1:8 A lokwalo lo lwa molao lo se tloge mo molomong wa gago, o lo akanye bosigo le motshegare gore o ele tlhoko go dira tsotlhe ka fa di kwadilweng ka teng mo go lone; gonne foo o tla tlhogonolofala mo ditseleng tsa gago; foo o tla tswelela pele sentle." 
Joshua1:9 Kana ke go laetse ka re: Tia o nne pelokgale! Ka moo se rerege, o se kgobege marapo. Gonne Morena, Modimo wa gago, o na nao gongwe le gongwe kwa o tla yang teng.”" 
Joshua1:10 Jaanong Jošua a laola baokamedi ba morafe a re: 
Joshua1:11 “Ralalang bothibelelo, lo laele morafe lo re: ‘Ipaakanyetseng mefago, gonne lo tla tshela Joretane yo morago ga malatsi a le mararo gore lo tsene lo thope lefatshe le Morena, Modimo wa lona, o le lo nayang gore e nne la lona.’ ”" 
Joshua1:12 Gape Jošua a raya Barubene le Bagate le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase a re: 
Joshua1:13 “Gakologelwang lefoko le Moše, motlhanka wa Morena, o le lo laetseng a re: ‘Morena, Modimo wa lona, o lo ikhutsisitse, a lo naya lefatshe le.’" 
Joshua1:14 A go sale basadi ba lona le bana ba lona le diruiwa tsa lona mo lefatsheng le Moše o le lo neileng ka kwano ga Joretane, mme lona lotlhe ba lo leng bagale ba mephato, tshelang lo etelele ba ga lona pele lo tshotse marumo, lo ba thuse," 
Joshua1:15 go fitlhelela Morena a be a ikhutsise bomorwa-rraeno jaaka lona, mme le bone ba be ba thopile lefatshe le Morena, Modimo wa lona, o tla le ba nayang. Morago ga moo lo ka boela kwa lefatsheng le e leng la lona, lwa le rua, le Moše, motlhanka wa Morena, o le lo neileng ka kwano ga Joretane ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi.”" 
Joshua1:16 Ba araba Jošua ba re: “Re tla dira tsotlhe tse o di re laelang; re tla ya gongwe le gongwe kwa o re romang teng. 
Joshua1:17 Re tla go utlwa mo dilong tsotlhe fela jaaka re utlwile Moše. Fela a Morena, Modimo wa gago, a nne nao jaaka a ne a na le Moše." 
Joshua1:18 Mongwe le mongwe yo o ganetsang se o se bolelang, a sa utlwe mafoko a gago mo go tsotlhe tse o di re laelang, a a bolawe! Fela tia, o nne pelokgale.”" 
Joshua2:1 Jošua, morwa Nune, o na a romile banna ba le babedi ba batlhodi mo sephiring go tswa Sitime a re: “Yaang lo tlhole lefatshe le motse wa Jerigo.” Ba ya ba tsena mo ntlong ya mosadi wa seaka yo leina la gagwe e leng Rahabe, ba lala teng." 
Joshua2:2 Ke fa kgosi ya Jerigo e begelwa go twe: “Bona, banna ba letse ba tlile mono bosigo, ba tswa kwa Baiseraeleng go tlhola lefatshe le.”" 
Joshua2:3 Mme kgosi ya Jerigo ya romela kwa go Rahabe ya re: “Ntsha banna ba ba tlileng koo go wena ba ba tsenyeng mo ntlong ya gago; gonne ba tlile go tlhola lefatshe lotlhe le.” 
Joshua2:4 Mme mosadi o ne a tsere banna ba babedi bao, a ba fitlhile; a ba a re: “Ka nnete banna bao ba ne ba tla fano go nna, mme ke ne ke sa itse kwa ba tswang teng." 
Joshua2:5 Jaanong ya re kgoro e tswalwa ka letlatlana, banna bao ba tswela kwa ntle. Ga ke itse gore ba ile kae. Fela akofang lo ba latele! Lo tla ba tshwara.”" 
Joshua2:6 Mme ene o ne a ba tlhatloseditse kwa godimo ga ntlo, a ba fitlhile fa tlase ga ditlhaka tsa letseta tsa gagwe tse di tlhatlagantsweng mo godimo ga ntlo." 
Joshua2:7 Jaanong banna ba ba latela ka tsela e e yang kwa Joretane go fitlha kwa madibogong. Mme kgoro ya tswalwa balatedi ba bone ba sena go tswela kwa ntle. 
Joshua2:8 Mme ya re batlhodi ba ise ba robale, Rahabe a tlhatlogela kwa go bone mo godimo ga ntlo," 
Joshua2:9 a raya banna bao a re: “Ke a itse gore Morena o lo neile lefatshe le, le gore therego e re wetse ka lona le jaaka baagi botlhe ba lefatshe le ba nyemile moko, ba lo boifa." 
Joshua2:10 Gonne re utlwetse gore Morena o ne a kgadisa metsi a Lewatle la Motlhaka fa pele ga lona, jale fa lo tswa kwa Egepeto le se lo se diretseng dikgosi tse pedi tsa Baamori tse di neng di le kwa moseja ga Joretane, e bong Sihone le Oge, ba lo ba nyeleditseng ka taelo ya Modimo." 
Joshua2:11 Mme ya re re utlwa jalo, ra nyema moko, ga se ka ga tlhola go nna le bopelokgale mo go ope go ka lo lwantsha; gonne Morena, Modimo wa lona, ke Modimo kwa godimo mo legodimong le mono tlase mo lefatsheng." 
Joshua2:12 Jaanong e re ka ke lo diretse ka bopelotlhomogi, a lo ko lo inkanele gore le lona lo tla direla lelapa la ga rre ka bopelotlhomogi; le gona lo nneele sesupo se se ikanyegang" 
Joshua2:13 sa gore lo tla lesa rre le mme le bokgaitsadiake le bomorwadia-rre le ba ga gabo botlhe go phela, lo pholosa maphelo a rona mo losong.”" 
Joshua2:14 Banna bao ba mo raya ba re: “Rona re tla lo emela go ya losong, fa lo sa utlwatse tiro e ya rona. E be e re Morena a re naya lefatshe le, re go direle ka bopelotlhomogi le ka boikanyo.”" 
Joshua2:15 Ya baa gona a ba folosang ka thapo, ba tswa ka fenstere; gonne ntlo ya gagwe e ne e tshwaraganye le lobota lwa motse, a agile fa loboteng." 
Joshua2:16 A ba raya a re: “Yaang kwa dithabeng, e se re gongwe ba ba ileng go lo batla ba kgatlhana le lona, lo be lo iphitlhe teng malatsi a le mararo go tsamaya balatedi ba lona ba be ba boe. Morago ga moo lo ka wela mo tseleng ya lona.”" 
Joshua2:17 Mme banna bao ba mo raya ba re: “Re tla bo re bofologile maikanong a gago a o a re ikanisitseng, fa o sa dire jaana:" 
Joshua2:18 Bona, e re re tla mo lefatsheng le, o gokelele thapo e ya ditlhale tse dikhibidu mo fenstereng e o re folositseng ka yona, o phuthele rraago le mmaago le bokgaitsadio le botlhe ba lapa la ga rraago kwano go wena mo ntlong e." 
Joshua2:19 Jaanong mongwe le mongwe yo o tla tswelang kwa ntle, a tswa mo mojakong wa ntlo ya gago, fa a bolawa, e tla nna molato wa gagwe, rona re se na molato; fela mongwe le mongwe yo o tla bong a na nao mo ntlong e, fa a ka tshwarwa ka letsogo, a bolawa, e tla nna molato wa rona." 
Joshua2:20 Mme fa o ka utlwatsa tiro e ya rona, re tla bo re bofologile maikanong a gago a o a re ikanisitseng.”" 
Joshua2:21 Ke fa mosadi a re: “A go nne jalo ka fa lo buileng ka teng!” A ba a ba naya tsela, ba tsamaya. Jaanong a gokelela thapo e khibidu mo fenstereng." 
Joshua2:22 Mme bone ba ya ba fitlha kwa dithabeng, ba tlhola teng malatsi a le mararo go tsamaya balatedi ba be ba boa. Balatedi ba ne ba ba batlile mo tseleng yotlhe, mme ba se ka ba ba bona." 
Joshua2:23 Jaanong banna ba babedi bao ba boa, ba fologa mo dithabeng, ba tshela noka ba fitlha kwa go Jošua morwa Nune, ba mmolelela tsotlhe tse di ba dirafaletseng." 
Joshua2:24 Ba raya Jošua ba re: “Ruri, Morena o neetse lefatshe lotlhe mo diatleng tsa rona; le gona baagi botlhe ba lefatshe leo ba nyemile moko ba a re tshaba.”" 
Joshua3:1 Ya re ka moso Jošua a phakela, ene le Baiseraele botlhe, ba tloga kwa Sitime ba fitlha fa Joretane, ba lala gona ba ise ba tshele." 
Joshua3:2 Ya re malatsi a le mararo ale a se na go feta, balaodi ba ralala bothibelelo," 
Joshua3:3 ba laola morafe ba re: “E re lo bona Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena, Modimo wa lona, le sikerwe ke baperesiti ba Balefi, le lona lo bolole mafelong a lona, lo le sale morago." 
Joshua3:4 Fela a go nne sebaka fa gare ga lona le lone, e ka nna selekanyo sa mabogo a le kete tse pedi. Lo se ka lwa le atamela gore lo tle lo itse tsela e lo tla tsamayang ka yona; gonne ga lo ise lo ke lo sepele mo tseleng e ka gope.”" 
Joshua3:5 Mme Jošua a raya morafe a re: “Iitshepiseng, gonne kamoso Morena o tla dira dikgakgamatso mo gare ga lona.”" 
Joshua3:6 Jošua a ba a raya baperesiti a re: “Sikarang Letlole la Kgolagano, lo etelele morafe pele.” Ba le sikara, ba etelela morafe pele." 
Joshua3:7 Mme Morena a raya Jošua a re: “Ka letsatsi la kajeno ke tla simolola go go dira mogolo mo matlhong a Baiseraele botlhe, ba tle ba lemoge gore ke na nao jaaka ke ne ke na le Moše." 
Joshua3:8 Mme jaanong o laele baperesiti ba ba sikereng Letlole la Kgolagano o re: ‘E re fa lo tsena mo metsing fa thoko ga Joretane, lo eme mo go ona.’ ”" 
Joshua3:9 Ke fa Jošua a raya Baiseraele a re: “Atamelang kwano lo utlwe mafoko a Morena, Modimo wa lona.”" 
Joshua3:10 Jošua a ba a re: “Se lo tla lemogang ka sona gore Modimo o o phelang o mo gare ga lona le gore ruri o tla leleka Bakanana le Bahethe le Bahewi le Baferesi le Bagiregasi le Baamori le Bajebusi fa pele ga lona," 
Joshua3:11 ke se: Lo tla bona Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena wa lefatshe lotlhe le tshela, le lo etelela pele mo Joretane." 
Joshua3:12 Jaanong itlhaoleleng banna ba le some pedi mo ditsong tsa Iseraele, lotso longwe le longwe lo ntshe a le mongwe." 
Joshua3:13 Mme e tla re dipato tsa dinao tsa baperesiti ba ba sikereng Letlole la Morena, la Morena wa lefatshe lotlhe, di gata mo metsing a Joretane, metsi a Joretane a kgaolwe. Metsi a Joretane a a tswang kwa godimo a tla ema jaaka lobota lo le longwe.”" 
Joshua3:14 Jaanong morafe wa tloga mo ditenteng tsa ona go tshela Joretane, baperesiti ba ba sikereng Letlole la Kgolagano ba ntse ba eteletse morafe pele." 
Joshua3:15 Joretane o ne a tlaletse ruri go penologela mo dintshing ka malatsi aotlhe a thobo. Ya re baperesiti ba ba sikereng Letlole ba fitlha fa Joretane, mme dinao tsa bone di ikina mo metsing a a fa losing," 
Joshua3:16 metsi a a fologang kwa godimo a ema, a gogomoga, a nna mokoa o le mongwe kgakala thata kwa motseng wa Atame o o bapileng le wa Sarethane; mme metsi a a fologelang kwa Lewatleng la Sekaka kwa Lewatleng la Letswai a fela, a kgaogela ruri. Jaanong morafe wa tshela o lebaganye le Jerigo." 
Joshua3:17 Jaanong baperesiti ba ba sikereng Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena ba bo ba eme fa go omileng fa gare ga Joretane, Baiseraele botlhe ba ntse ba tshela fa go omileng, ga tsamaya setšhaba sotlhe sa fetsa go tshela Joretane." 
Joshua4:1 E rile setšhaba sotlhe se sena go tshela Joretane, Morena a raya Jošua a re:" 
Joshua4:2 “Itlhaoleleng banna ba le some pedi mo morafeng, lotso longwe le longwe lo ntshe a le mongwe." 
Joshua4:3 Lo ba laele lo re: ‘Ntshang mafika a le some pedi mo gare ga Joretane fa dinao tsa baperesiti di neng di eme teng di tsepame, lo tshele lo a tshotse, lo a bee kwa marobalong kwa lo tla lalang teng bosigo jono.’ ”" 
Joshua4:4 Jaanong Jošua a bitsa banna ba ba some pedi bao ba a neng a ba naya tiro ba tswa mo Baiseraeleng, lotso longwe le longwe lo ntshitse a le mongwe." 
Joshua4:5 Jošua a ba laela a re: “Tshelang lo etelele Letlole la Morena, Modimo wa lona, pele, lo tsene kwa gare ga Joretane, mme a mongwe le mongwe wa lona a tsee lefika, a le sikare legetleng ka fa palong ya ditso tsa Iseraele" 
Joshua4:6 gore selo se e nne sesupo mo go lona: E tle e re bana ba lona ba lo botsa mo metlheng e e tlang ba re: ‘Mafika ao a kaya eng mo go lona?’ 
Joshua4:7 foo lo ba ree lo re: ‘E rile Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena le tshela Joretane, metsi a Joretane a kgaoga fa pele ga lone, mme mafika ao ke segopotso sa teng mo Baiseraeleng ka bosakhutleng.’ ”" 
Joshua4:8 Baiseraele ba dira jalo jaaka Jošua a laotse, ba tsaya mafika a le some pedi, ba a ntsha mo gare ga Joretane jaaka Morena a laetse Jošua ka fa palong ya ditso tsa Baiseraele, ba tshela ba a tshotse, ba a isa kwa marobalong, ba a baya teng." 
Joshua4:9 Le gona Jošua a tlhoma mafika a le some pedi fa gare ga Joretane, fa dinao tsa baperesiti ba ba neng ba sikere Letlole la Kgolagano di neng di eme gona. A sa le teng le kajeno." 
Joshua4:10 Mme baperesiti ba ba neng ba sikere Letlole ba ne ba ntse ba eme fa gare ga Joretane ga tsamaya ga fediwa tsotlhe tse Morena o di laetseng Jošua go di bolelela morafe, e bong tsotlhe tse Moše o di laetseng Jošua. Morafe wa itlhaganela, wa tshela." 
Joshua4:11 Jaanong ya re morafe otlhe o sena go tshela, Letlole la Morena le lone la tshela le tshotswe ke baperesiti mo matlhong a morafe." 
Joshua4:12 Mme Barubene le Bagate le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase ba tshela, ba etelela Baiseraele pele ba tshotse marumo jaaka Moše a ba laetse." 
Joshua4:13 Ba fetela pele fa pele ga Morena go ya tlhabanong kwa nageng ya Jerigo, e ka nna banna ba mephato ba ba tshotseng marumo ba le 40 000." 
Joshua4:14 Ka letsatsi leo Morena a godisa Jošua mo matlhong a Baiseraele botlhe, mme ba mmoifa ka malatsi otlhe a bophelo jwa gagwe jaaka ba ne ba boifa Moše." 
Joshua4:15 Morena o ne a reile Jošua a re: 
Joshua4:16 “Laela baperesiti ba ba sikereng Letlole la Tshupo gore ba tlhatloge ba tswe mo Joretane.” 
Joshua4:17 Ke fa Jošua a laela baperesiti a re: “Tlhatlogang lo tswe mo Joretane!” 
Joshua4:18 Mme ya re baperesiti ba ba sikereng Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena ba tlhatloga ba tswa mo Joretane, mme dipato tsa dinao tsa baperesiti di sena go gata lefatshe le le omileng, metsi a Joretane a ba a boela mo felong ga ona, a ela jaaka pele, a penologela mo dintshing tsotlhe." 
Joshua4:19 Morafe o ne wa tlhatloga mo Joretane ka kgwedi ya ntlha e le some; jaanong ba thibelela kwa Gilegala fa molelwaneng wa botlhabatsatsi wa Jerigo. 
Joshua4:20 Mme mafika a a some pedi ale a ba a ntshitseng mo Joretane Jošua a a tlhoma kwa Gilegala. 
Joshua4:21 A raya Baiseraele a re: “E re fa bana ba lona ba botsa borraabo mo metlheng e e tlang ba re: ‘Mafika ao a kaya eng?’ 
Joshua4:22 foo lo itsise bana ba lona lo re: ‘Baiseraele ba ne ba tshela Joretane yo a omisitswe. 
Joshua4:23 Gonne Morena, Modimo wa lona, o ne a kgadisa metsi a Joretane fa pele ga lona ga tsamaya lwa tshela fela jaaka Morena, Modimo wa lona, a kile a direla Lewatle la Motlhaka le o neng a le kgadisa fa pele ga rona ga tsamaya ra tshela." 
Joshua4:24 E ne e le gore merafe yotlhe ya lefatshe e tle e lemoge letsogo la Morena, fa e le le le thata, mme e boife Morena, Modimo wa lona, ka malatsi otlhe.’ ”" 
Joshua5:1 E rile dikgosi tsotlhe tsa Baamori tse di neng di le ka kwano ga Joretane mo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi le dikgosi tsotlhe tsa Bakanana tse di neng di le fa lewatleng di utlwa ka fa Morena a kgadisitseng metsi a Joretane ka teng fa pele ga Baiseraele ga tsamaya ba tshela, tsa kgobega marapo, ga se ka ga tlhola go nna bopelokgale mo go tsona fa pele ga Baiseraele." 
Joshua5:2 Ka sebaka seo Morena a laela Jošua a re: “Itirele dithipa tsa matlapa, o rupise Baiseraele.”" 
Joshua5:3 Ke fa Jošua a itirela dithipa tsa matlapa, a rupisa Baiseraele kwa thabeng ya Aralothe." 
Joshua5:4 Jošua o ba rupisitse ka ntlha ya go re morafe otlhe o o neng o hudugile kwa Egepeto, e bong banna botlhe ba mephato ba ne ba swetse mo sekakeng ba le mo tseleng ya go huduga kwa Egepeto." 
Joshua5:5 Gonne batho botlhe ba ba hudugileng ba ne ba rupile; fela batho botlhe ba ba tsaletsweng mo tseleng go sena go duwa kwa Egepeto ba ne ba sa rupa. 
Joshua5:6 Gonne Baiseraele ba ne ba sepela dinyaga di le 40 mo sekakeng ga tsamaya setšhaba sotlhe sa banna ba batlhabani ba ba hudugileng kwa Egepeto sa nyelediwa, ka ba se ka ba utlwa lentswe la Morena. Ke bone ba Morena o neng a ba ikanela a re, ga a kitla a ba abela lefatshe le Morena o neng a le solofeditse borraabo ka maikano a re: “O tla le re naya, e bong lefatshe le le elang mašwi le dinotshe.”" 
Joshua5:7 Bomorwa-bone ba ba neng ba godile mo boemong jwa borraabo ke bone ba Jošua o neng a ba rupisa; gonne ba ne ba ise ba rupe, ka go ne go se na thupiso mo tseleng." 
Joshua5:8 Jaanong ya re setšhaba sotlhe se sena go rupisiwa, ba nna fela mo mannong a bone mo bothibelelong go fitlhelela ba fola." 
Joshua5:9 Ke fa Morena a raya Jošua a re: “Kajeno ke pitikile kgobo ya Baegepeto, ka e tlosa mo go lona.” Ke ka moo felo foo go bidiwang ka leina la Gilegala go fitlha letsatsing la kajeno." 
Joshua5:10 E rile Baiseraele ba ntse ba thibeletse kwa Gilegala mo nageng ya Jerigo, ba ja Moletlo wa Tlolaganyo ka letsatsi la 14 la kgwedi go le mantsiboa." 
Joshua5:11 Go tloga ka letsatsi le le latelang la Tlolaganyo ba ja tse di robilweng mo lefatsheng le, e bong dinkgwe tse di sa bedisiwang le dipabe tsa mabele, e le ka lone letsatsi leo." 
Joshua5:12 Ka letsatsi la ka moso Mmana wa khutla, ka jaanong Baiseraele ba ja tsa thobo ya lefatshe le. Go tsweng foo ga ba a ka ba tlhola ba nna le Mmana, mme ba ja tse di rojwang mo lefatsheng la Kanana ka ngwaga oo." 
Joshua5:13 E kile ya re Jošua a ntse a le gaufi le Jerigo, a tsholetsa matlho, a leba, a bona monna a eme fa pele ga gagwe, a tshotse tšhaka a e somotse. Jošua a ya kwa go ene, a mmotsa a re: “A o wa rona kampo a o wa baba ba rona?”" 
Joshua5:14 A araba a re: “Nnyaya! Ke nna molaodi wa mephato ya Morena. Ke gona ke tlang.” Ke fa Jošua a wela fa fatshe ka sefatlhego, a ikoba a mmotsa a re: “Morena wa me o laela motlhanka wa gagwe a reng?”" 
Joshua5:15 Molaodi wa mephato ya Morena a raya Jošua a re: “Rola ditlhako tsa gago mo dinaong tsa gago; gonne felo fa o emeng teng go boitshepo.” Jošua a dira jalo. 
Joshua6:1 Dikgoro tsa Jerigo di ne di tswetswe ka ntlha ya Baiseraele, go se na yo o tswang le e seng yo o tsenang." 
Joshua6:2 Mme Morena a raya Jošua a re: “Bona, ke neetse Jerigo mo diatleng tsa gago le kgosi ya gagwe le bagale ba mephato." 
Joshua6:3 Dikologang motse o, e bong banna botlhe ba batlhabani, lo o potologe gangwe ka letsatsi; lo dire jalo ka malatsi a marataro." 
Joshua6:4 Gape a baperesiti ba supa ba etele Letlole pele ba tshotse dinaka tse supa tsa diphelehu, mme ka letsatsi la bosupa lo dikologe motse o gasupa, mme baperesiti ba letse dinaka." 
Joshua6:5 Jaanong e re go lediwa lonaka lwa phelehu ka boleele, fa lo utlwa lonaka lo lela, a morafe otlhe o thele lešalaba, foo lobota lwa motse lo tla wela fa lo leng teng, mme banna ba lona ba tla o tlola, mongwe le mongwe fa go lebaganyeng nae.”" 
Joshua6:6 Ke fa Jošua, morwa Nune a bitsa baperesiti, a ba raya a re: “Sikarang Letlole la Kgolagano, mme a baperesiti ba supa ba tsee dinaka tse supa tsa diphelehu, ba etelele Letlole la Morena pele.”" 
Joshua6:7 A ba a raya morafe a re: “Nanogang lo dikologe motse o, mme ba ba tshotseng marumo a ba etelele Letlole la Morena pele.”" 
Joshua6:8 Ya re Jošua a sena go laela morafe jalo baperesiti ba supa ba ba tshotseng dinaka tse supa tsa diphelehu fa pele ga Morena, ba nanoga ba letsa dinaka; Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena la ba sala morago." 
Joshua6:9 Ba ba neng ba tshotse marumo ba etelela baperesiti ba ba letsang dinaka pele; ba bangwe ba latela Letlole go ntse go lediwa dinaka. 
Joshua6:10 Jošua a laela morafe a re: “Se openg mokgosi le e seng go utlwatsa mantswe a lona; a go se ka ga tswa lefoko mo melomong ya lona go ya letsatsing le ke tla lo rayang ka lone ke re: ‘Thelang lešalaba!’ Foo lo thele lešalaba.” 
Joshua6:11 Jošua a dikolosa Letlole la Morena jalo gangwe fela mo tikologong ya motse; morago ga moo ba boela kwa bothibelelong, ba lala teng." 
Joshua6:12 Jošua a ba a phakela mo mosong; baperesiti ba sikara Letlole la Morena; 
Joshua6:13 baperesiti ba supa ba ba tshotseng dinaka tse supa tsa diphelehu ba etelela Letlole la Morena pele ba ntse ba letsa dinaka; ba ba tshotseng marumo ba ba eteletse pele, ba bangwe ba sala Letlole la Morena morago go ntse go lediwa dinaka." 
Joshua6:14 Ba dikologa motse jalo ka letsatsi la bobedi gangwe fela, ba be ba boela kwa bothibelelong. Ba dira jalo ka malatsi a marataro." 
Joshua6:15 Mme ka letsatsi la bosupa ba phakela, fa mahube a tswa, ba dikologa motse ka mokgwa oo gasupa. Ke letsatsi leo fela le ba dikologileng motse gasupa ka lone." 
Joshua6:16 Mme ya re ba o dikologa lwa bosupa, baperesiti ba letsa dinaka; ke fa Jošua a raya morafe a re: “Thelang lešalaba! Gonne Morena o lo neetse motse o." 
Joshua6:17 Mme a motse o le tsotlhe tse di mo go ona di neelwe Morena ka go bolawa le go fisiwa; go phele Rahabe wa seaka fela, ene le botlhe ba ba nang nae mo ntlong; gonne ene o ne a fitlha barongwi ba re neng re ba romile." 
Joshua6:18 Fela lo itise mo go tse di neetsweng Morena jalo, e se ka ya re fa lo dirafatsa khutso, lwa tsaya dingwe tsa tse di hutsitsweng, lwa tloga lwa tsenya bothibelelo jwa Baiseraele mo khutsong, lwa bo isa mo tatlhegong." 
Joshua6:19 Mme selefera yotlhe le gouta le dilo tsa kgotlho le tsa tshipi ke tse di boitshepo tsa Morena; a di tsene mo lehumong la Morena.” 
Joshua6:20 Ke fa batho ba thela lešalaba, ba letsa dinaka; ya re batho ba utlwa lonaka lo lela, batho ba thela lešalaba le legolo; ke fa lobota lo wela fa lo leng teng, mme batho ba tlolela mo motseng mongwe le mongwe fa go lebaganyeng nae. Ba thopa motse jalo." 
Joshua6:21 Ba dirafatsa khutso ya Modimo mo go tsotlhe tse di neng di le mo motseng. Ba bolaya banna le basadi, ba bašwa le batsofe le dikgomo le difutshane le diesele ka bogale jwa tšhaka." 
Joshua6:22 Mme Jošua a raya banna ba babedi ba ba neng ba ile go tlhola lefatshe a re: “Tsenang mo ntlong ya mosadi yole wa seaka, lo ntshe teng mosadi yoo le botlhe ba e leng ba ga gabo jaaka lo mo ikanetse.”" 
Joshua6:23 Ke fa makau a e neng e le batlhodi a tsena, a ntsha Rahabe le rraagwe le mmaagwe le bokgaitsadie le ba ga gabo botlhe; a ba baya ka fa ntle ga bothibelelo jwa Baiseraele." 
Joshua6:24 Jaanong ba fisa motse ka molelo le tsotlhe tse di mo go ona; fela selefera le gouta le dilo tsa kgotlho le tsa tshipi ba di tsenya mo lehumong la Tempelana ya Morena. 
Joshua6:25 Mme Jošua a phedisa Rahabe wa seaka le ba lelapa la ga rraagwe le ba ga gabo botlhe; ba nna mo gare ga Baiseraele go fitlha letsatsing la kajeno, ka a ne a fitlha barongwi ba Jošua o neng a ba romile go tlhola Jerigo." 
Joshua6:26 Ka sebaka seo Jošua o ne a ikanisa Baiseraele a re: “A go hutsiwe monna fa pele ga Morena yo o ka tlogang, a aga motse o wa Jerigo gape; fa a o thaya, o tla swelwa ke morwawe yo mogolo; fa a tsenya dikgoro tsa ona, o tla swelwa ke morwawe yo mmotlana.”" 
Joshua6:27 Morena o ne a na le Jošua, mme a tuma mo lefatsheng lotlhe." 
Joshua7:1 Mme Baiseraele ba utswa tse di hutsitsweng: Agane morwa Karemi, morwa Sabedi, morwa Sera wa lotso lwa Juta, a tsaya dingwe tsa tse di hutsitsweng. Ke fa bogale jwa Morena bo tukela Baiseraele." 
Joshua7:2 E rile ba le kwa Jerigo, Jošua a roma banna kwa Ai. Ke motse o o bapileng le Bethawene o o mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Bethele, a ba laela a re: “Bololang lo tlhole lefatshe!” Banna bao ba bolola, ba ya go tlhola Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Ya re ba sena go boela kwa go Jošua ba mo raya ba re: “A go se ka ga bolola batho botlhe, a go bolole banna ba e ka nnang ba dikete di le pedi gongwe di le tharo; ba tla fenya Ai. Se lapise batho botlhe ka go ba isa teng gonne ba Ai ke setlhophanyana fela.”" 
Joshua7:4 Banna ba e ka nnang kete tse tharo ba bolola jalo, ba ya teng, mme ba feta ba tshaba banna ba Ai." 
Joshua7:5 Banna ba Ai ba bolaya banna ba e ka nnang ba le 36 ba bone, ba ba leleka ka kwa ntle ga kgoro go ya kwa meepong ya mafika, ba ba bolaya mo mokgokoloseng wa thaba. Ke fa batho ba nyema moko, dipelo tsa nna jaaka metsi." 
Joshua7:6 Mme Jošua a ikgagola diaparo, a wela fa fatshe ka sefatlhego fa pele ga Letlole la Morena go ya mantsiboeng, ene le bagolo ba Iseraele, ba itshela lerole mo ditlhogong." 
Joshua7:7 Jošua a rapela a re: “Ao, Morena Modimo! Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa o tshedisitse morafe o noka ya Joretane go re neela mo diatleng tsa Baamori gore ba re nyeletse? Ao, re ka bo re itumeletse go nna kwa moseja ga Joretane!" 
Joshua7:8 Ka thapelo, Morena, ke tla reng, ka Baiseraele ba tshabile baba ba bone?" 
Joshua7:9 Kana Bakanana le baagi botlhe ba lefatshe le ba tla utlwa; mme ba tla tla go re dikanyetsa, ba fedisa leina la rona mo lefatsheng. Foo o tla direla leina le legolo la gago eng?”" 
Joshua7:10 Mme Morena a raya Jošua a re: “Tsoga! O weletseng fa fatshe ka sefatlhego? 
Joshua7:11 Baiseraele ba leofile. Le gona ba tlodile kgolagano ya me e ke e ba laetseng ka go tsaya tse dingwe tse di hutsitsweng; ba utswile, ba bile ba di lobile, ba di fitlha mo dilong tsa bone." 
Joshua7:12 Baiseraele ba tla palelwa ke go ema fa pele ga baba ba bone. Ba tla tshaba baba ba bone, gonne ba hutsegile. Ga nkitla ke tlhola ke nna le lona, fa lo sa tlose tse di hutsitsweng mo go lona." 
Joshua7:13 Tsoga o itshepise morafe, o o ree o re: ‘Ipaakanyetseng kamoso lo nne boitshepo, gonne Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana a re: Go na le tse di hutsitsweng mo gare ga lona, Baiseraele; lo tla palelwa ke go ema fa pele ga baba ba lona go fitlhelela lo be lo tlose tse di hutsitsweng mo go lona." 
Joshua7:14 E re mo mosong lo atamele ka fa ditsong tsa lona, mme a lotso lo Morena o tla lo supang ka tengwa lo atamele ka fa ditshikeng, mme a losika lo Morena o tla lo supang lo atamele ka fa malapeng, mme a lelapa le Morena o tla le supang le atamele ka banna." 
Joshua7:15 Mme a ene yo o fitlhelwang a na le tse di hutsitsweng a fisiwe ka molelo, ene le tsotlhe tse o nang natso; gonne o tlodile kgolagano ya Morena, a dira boleo jo bogolo mo go Iseraele.’ ”" 
Joshua7:16 Jaanong Jošua a phakela mo mosong, a atametsa Baiseraele ka fa ditsong tsa bone; ga supiwa lotso lwa Juta." 
Joshua7:17 Ya re a atametsa ditshika tsa Juta, tengwa ya supa losika lwa ga Sera; ya re a atametsa losika lwa ga Sera ka tatelano ya banna, ga supiwa lelapa la ga Sabedi." 
Joshua7:18 Ya re a atametsa lelapa la gagwe ka tatelano ya banna, ga supiwa Agane morwa Karemi, morwa Sabedi, morwa Sera, wa lotso lwa Juta." 
Joshua7:19 Ke fa Jošua a raya Agane a re: “Morwaaka, a ko o nee Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, tlotlo, o mo nee pako; a ko o mpolelele se o se dirileng; o se ka wa se ntobela.”" 
Joshua7:20 Agane a araba Jošua a re: “Ka nnete, ke leofetse Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele; ke dirile jaana le jaana:" 
Joshua7:21 Mo thopong ka bona kobo e ntle e le nngwe ya kwa Sineare le dišekele di le 200 tsa selefera le lekwete la gouta; bokete jwa lone e le dišekele di le 50; ka di eletsa, ka di tsaya. Bona, di epetswe fa fatshe mo gare ga tente ya me. Selefera e ka fa tlase.”" 
Joshua7:22 Ke fa Jošua a roma barongwi, ba sianela kwa tenteng ya gagwe, ba fitlhela di epetswe mo tenteng ya gagwe, selefera e le ka fa tlase." 
Joshua7:23 Ba di tsaya, ba di ntsha mo tenteng, ba di isa kwa go Jošua le kwa Baiseraeleng botlhe, ba di baya fa pele ga Morena." 
Joshua7:24 Ke fa Jošua le Baiseraele botlhe ba ba nang nae ba tsaya Agane morwa Sera le selefera le kobo le lekwete la gouta le bomorwawe le bomorwadie le dikgomo tsa gagwe le diesele tsa gagwe le dinku tsa gagwe le tente ya gagwe le tsotlhe tse a nang natso, ba di isa nae kwa molapong wa Agore." 
Joshua7:25 Mme Jošua a re: “Ke go reng, fa o re isitse mo tatlhegong? Ka moo Morena o tla go isa mo tatlhegong kajeno.” Ke fa Baiseraele botlhe ba mo konopa ka majwe, ba ba fisa ka molelo, ba ba kgobotletsa ka majwe." 
Joshua7:26 Ba kgobokanya mokoa o mogolo wa majwe mo godimo ga gagwe o o sa ntseng o le teng kajeno. Ke fa Morena a rebega mo bogaleng jo bo tukang jwa gagwe. Ke ka moo leina la felo foo e leng Molapo wa Agore go fitlha letsatsing la kajeno. 
Joshua8:1 Morago ga moo Morena a raya Jošua a re: “Se boife o se tshoge! Tsaya banna botlhe ba batlhabani, ba ye nao; o tloge o ye kwa Ai. Bona, ke neetse kgosi ya Ai mo diatleng tsa gago le morafe wa yona le motse wa yona le naga ya yona." 
Joshua8:2 O direle Ai le kgosi ya teng jaaka o diretse Jerigo le kgosi ya teng. Fela thopo ya teng le diruiwa tsa teng lo ka di ithopela. Beela motse balaledi mo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi ya ona.” 
Joshua8:3 Jošua a bolola jalo le banna botlhe ba batlhabani go ya kwa Ai; Jošua a ba a tlhaola banna ba le 30 000 ba bagale ba mephato, a ba roma bosigo," 
Joshua8:4 a ba laela a re: “Bonang, lona lo lalele motse mo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi. Se katogeng motse thata, lo nne lo o iketleeleditse lotlhe." 
Joshua8:5 Mme nna le banna botlhe ba ba nang le nna re tla atamela motse. Jaanong e tla re ba bolola go re kgatlhantsha jaaka ga ntlha, re tshabe fa pele ga bone." 
Joshua8:6 Ba tla tswa ba re tebela go tsamaya re be re ba katoganye le motse. Gonne ba tla re, rona re a ba tshaba jaaka maloba. Mme e re re ba tshaba," 
Joshua8:7 lona lo tloge lo tswe mo talelong, lo be lo thope motse. Morena, Modimo wa lona, o tla o neela mo diatleng tsa lona." 
Joshua8:8 Mme e re lo sena go thopa motse, lo o tshube ka molelo. Dirang ka fa lefokong la Morena! Bonang, ke lo laotse jalo.”" 
Joshua8:9 Jošua a ba roma jalo, ba ya kwa talelong, ba nna fa gare ga Bethele le Ai mo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi ya Ai. Jošua a lala mo gare ga banna bosigo joo." 
Joshua8:10 Ya re mo mosong Jošua a phakela a bolotsa banna, a ba etelela pele go ya kwa Ai, ene le bagolo ba Iseraele." 
Joshua8:11 Ga ya banna botlhe ba batlhabani ba ba nang nae, ba atamela, ba fitlha ka fa ntle ga motse, ba thibelela mo ntlheng ya bokone ya Ai, go le molapo fela fa gare ga bone le Ai." 
Joshua8:12 Mme o ne a beile banna ba ba ka nnang 5 000 mo talelong fa gare ga Bethele le Ai mo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi ya motse. 
Joshua8:13 Jaanong ba rulaganya morafe, e bong bothibelelo jotlhe jo bo mo ntlheng ya bokone ya motse le balaledi ba ona mo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi ya motse. Jošua a ya kwa molapong bosigo joo." 
Joshua8:14 Ya re kgosi ya Ai e lemoga jalo, banna ba motse ba itlhaganela, ba phakela, ba bolola go kgatlhantsha Baiseraele go lwa nabo, e le yona le morafe otlhe wa yona gore ba thulane fa thoko ga lebala la Joretane. Mme ya bo e sa itse gore a go na le ba ba ba laletseng ka kwa morago ga motse." 
Joshua8:15 Mme Jošua le Baiseraele botlhe ba ipaya jaaka e kete ba fenngwa ke bone, ba tshabela kwa sekakeng." 
Joshua8:16 Ke fa banna botlhe ba ba mo motseng ba kuiwa gore ba ba latele; mme ya re ba ntse ba latela Jošua, ba katoga motse." 
Joshua8:17 Ga se ka ga sala monna ope mo Ai le Bethele yo o sa bololang go latela Baiseraele. Ba tlogela motse jalo o atlhame, ba latela Baiseraele." 
Joshua8:18 Ke fa Morena a raya Jošua a re: “Otlololela lerumo le o le tshotseng ka letsogo kwa Ai, gonne ke tla mo tsenya mo seatleng sa gago.” Ya re Jošua a otlololela lerumo le a le tshotseng kwa Ai," 
Joshua8:19 balaledi ba tloga mo felong ga bone ka pele, ba siana, fa a otlolola letsogo ba tsena mo motseng, ba o thopa, ba akofa ba o tshuba ka molelo." 
Joshua8:20 Ya re banna ba Ai ba gadima, ba fitlhela motse o thunya musi, o tlhatlogela kwa legodimong, mme ba se na kwa ba ka tshabelang teng; gonne banna ba ba neng ba tshabela kwa sekakeng ba retologile ba tlhabana le balatedi." 
Joshua8:21 Gonne e rile Jošua le Baiseraele botlhe ba bona balaledi ba thopile motse le musi wa motse o kua, ba menoga ba bolaya banna ba Ai." 
Joshua8:22 Le balaledi bale ba tswa mo motseng go ba kgatlhantsha, ba tsenya ba Ai fa gare. Baiseraele bangwe ba tswa kwa pele, ba bangwe ba tswa kwa morago, ba ba bolaya go tsamaya go sa sadisiwe mophologi ope le e seng mofalodi ope wa bone." 
Joshua8:23 Ba tshwara kgosi ya Ai e ntse e phela, ba e isa kwa go Jošua." 
Joshua8:24 Jaanong ya re Baiseraele ba sena go fetsa go bolaya baagi botlhe ba Ai mo nageng le mo sekakeng, kwa ba neng ba ba latetse teng, fa ba sena go bolawa botlhe ka bogale jwa tšhaka ga tsamaya ba felelela, Baiseraele botlhe ba boela kwa Ai, ba mmolaya ka bogale jwa tšhaka." 
Joshua8:25 Botlhe ba ba bolailweng ka letsatsi leo, banna le basadi mmogo e ne e le ba le 12 000, e le batho botlhe ba Ai." 
Joshua8:26 Mme Jošua a se ka a busa letsogo le a neng a le otlolotse le tshotse lerumo ga tsamaya a dirafatsa khutso ya Modimo mo baaging botlhe ba Ai. 
Joshua8:27 Fela diruiwa le thopo ya motse Baiseraele ba di ithopela ka fa lefokong la Morena le a le laetseng Jošua. 
Joshua8:28 Jaanong Jošua a fisa motse wa Ai, a o fetola thotana ya marope ya ka metlha; e sa le teng le kajeno." 
Joshua8:29 Kgosi ya Ai a e kaletsa mo setlhareng go ya nakong ya mantsiboa. Mme ya re letsatsi le phirima ba pagolola setoto sa yona mo setlhareng ka taelo ya ga Jošua, ba se latlhela kwa kgorong ya motse, ba kgobokanya mokoa o mogolo wa majwe mo godimo ga sona o o sa leng teng le kajeno." 
Joshua8:30 Ka sebaka sele Jošua a agela Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, aletare mo thabeng ya Ebale," 
Joshua8:31 jaaka Moše, motlhanka wa Morena a laetse Baiseraele, ka mo go kwadilweng ka teng mo lokwalong lwa molao lwa ga Moše, e bong aletare ya mafika a a sa betlwang, a a sa angwang ke tshipi. Jaanong ba direla Morena ditlhabelo tsa phiso mo go yona, ba tlhaba ditlhabelo tsa tebogo." 
Joshua8:32 Gona foo Jošua a kwala lokwalo lwa bobedi lwa molao wa ga Moše mo mafikeng fa pele ga Baiseraele o Moše o neng a o kwadile. 
Joshua8:33 Jaanong Baiseraele botlhe le bagolo ba bone le balaodi ba bone le baatlhodi ba bone ba bo ba eme mo ntlheng tse pedi tsa Letlole, ba lebaganye le baperesiti ba Balefi ba ba sikereng Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena, e le baeng le ba ba tsaletsweng mo gae; bontlhanngwe jwa bone ba eme fa thabeng ya Gerisime, bontlhanngwe jo bongwe jwa bone fa thabeng ya Ebale, jaaka Moše, motlhanka wa Morena, a laotse pele go tshegofatsa morafe wa Iseraele jalo." 
Joshua8:34 Morago ga moo a buisa mafoko aotlhe a molao a tshegofatso le a khutso, jaaka a kwadilwe otlhe mo lokwalong lwa molao." 
Joshua8:35 Ga bo go se na lefoko lepe la tsotlhe tse Moše o di laotseng le Jošua a se kang a le buisa fa pele ga phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele le basadi le bana le baeng ba ba sepetseng nabo. 
Joshua9:1 Dikgosi tsotlhe tse di neng di le mo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi ya Joretane mo dithabeng le mo nageng e e kwa tlase le ka fa losing lotlhe lwa lewatle le legolo go ya go fitlha kwa Lebanone, e bong tsa Bahethe le Baamori le Bakanana le Baferesi le Bahewi le Bajebusi di ne tsa utlwa dilo tseo." 
Joshua9:2 Jaanong tsa ikopanya mmogo jaaka monna a le mongwe go tlhabana le Jošua le Baiseraele. 
Joshua9:3 Mme e rile baagi ba Gibeone ba sena go utlwela tse Jošua a di diretseng Jerigo le Ai," 
Joshua9:4 le bone ba loga maano, ba itshwantshanya le baeti, ba tsaya dikgetse tse di onetseng, ba di belesa diesele tsa bone, le makuka a weine a a onetseng a a gagogileng a a dibatabata." 
Joshua9:5 Le gona ba rwala masutlha a ditlhako a mamilwe mo dinaong, ba apara diaparo tse di onetseng. Dijo tsotlhe tsa mfago wa bone di ne di omeletse, di fafarega." 
Joshua9:6 Ba tla kwa go Jošua kwa bothibelelong jwa kwa Gilegala, ba raya ene le banna ba Iseraele ba re: “Re tswa kwa lefatsheng le le kgakala. Jaanong a ko lo dire kgolagano le rona.”" 
Joshua9:7 Mme banna ba Iseraele ba raya Bahewi bao ba re: “Ka gongwe lo ntse lo agile mo gare ga rona. Re ka dira jang kgolagano le lona?” 
Joshua9:8 Jaanong ba raya Jošua ba re: “Rona re batlhanka ba gago.” Mme Jošua a ba botsa a re: “Lo bomang? Lo tswa kae?” 
Joshua9:9 Ba mo araba ba re: “Batlhanka ba gago ba tswa kwa lefatsheng le le kgakala thata ka ntlha ya leina la Morena, Modimo wa gago. Gonne re utlwile tumedi ya gagwe le tsotlhe tse o di dirileng kwa Egepeto" 
Joshua9:10 le tsotlhe tse o di diretseng dikgosi tse pedi tsa Baamori, tse di neng di le kwa moseja ga Joretane, e bong Sihone, kgosi ya Hešebone le Oge, kgosi ya Basane yo o neng a le kwa Ašetharothe." 
Joshua9:11 Ke fa bagolo ba rona le baagi botlhe ba lefatshe la rona ba re laela ba re: ‘Itseeleng mefago ya leeto, lo ye go ba kgatlhantsha, lo ba ree lo re: Rona re batlhanka ba lona. Jaanong he dirang kgolagano le rona.’" 
Joshua9:12 Dinkgwe tsa rona ke tse; ka letsatsi le re bolotseng ka lone go tla kwano go lona tsa bo di le bolelo, fa re di tsaya mo malapeng a rona go nna mefago ya rona. Mme jaanong bonang, di omeletse, e bile di a fafarega." 
Joshua9:13 Makuka a weine ke a; re a tladitse a sa le mašwa, mme bonang, a gagogile. Diaparo tsa rona le ditlhako tsa rona ke tse; di onetse ka leeto le leleele thata.”" 
Joshua9:14 Ke fa banna ba ngatha mefago ya bone, mme ba sa botse Morena." 
Joshua9:15 Mme Jošua a dira kagiso nabo, a dira kgolagano nabo ya gore o tla ba lesa go phela. Le gona dikgosana tsa phuthego tsa ba ikanela jalo." 
Joshua9:16 Mme ga feta malatsi a le mararo ba sena go dira kgolagano nabo, jaanong ba utlwa gore batho bale ba gaufi le rona, mme ba agile mo gare ga rona." 
Joshua9:17 Gonne e rile Baiseraele ba fetela pele, ba fitlha kwa metseng ya bone ka letsatsi la boraro; metse ya bone e le Gibeone le Kefira le Beerothe le Khiriathe-Jearime." 
Joshua9:18 Mme Baiseraele ba se ka ba ba bolaya, ka gonne dikgosana tsa phuthego di ne di ba ikanetse ka Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele; ke fa phuthego yotlhe e ngongoregela dikgosana." 
Joshua9:19 Mme dikgosana tsotlhe tsa raya phuthego yotlhe tsa re: “Re ba ikanetse ka Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele; ke ka moo re palelwang jaanong ke go ba ama." 
Joshua9:20 Se re ka se ba direlang ke se: Ba leseng go phela gore bogale bo se ka jwa re wela ka ntlha ya maikano a re a ba ikanetseng.” 
Joshua9:21 Gape dikgosana tsa ba raya tsa re: “A ba phele, a e nne bafatsi ba dikgong le bagi ba metsi ba phuthego yotlhe.” Mme ga nna jalo jaaka dikgosana di buile." 
Joshua9:22 Ke fa Jošua a ba bitsa, a bua nabo a re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa lo re tsieditse lwa re, lo kgakala thata le rona, etswe lo agile mo gare ga rona?" 
Joshua9:23 Mme jaanong lo hutsegile, mme ga lo kitla lo khutla ka gope go nna batlhanka le bafatsi ba dikgong le bagi ba metsi ba Tempelana wa Modimo wa me.”" 
Joshua9:24 Ba araba Jošua ba re: “Batlhanka ba gago ba begetswe e le nnete tse Morena, Modimo wa gago, o di laetseng Moše, motlhanka wa gagwe go lo naya lefatshe lotlhe le, le go nyeletsa baagi botlhe ba lefatshe le fa pele ga lona. Ka moo ra boifela maphelo a rona thata ka ntlha ya lona, mme ra dira jalo." 
Joshua9:25 Mme jaanong, bona, re mo diatleng tsa gago! Dira ka rona tse di siameng tse di tshwanetseng mo matlhong a gago!”" 
Joshua9:26 A ba direla jalo, a ba namolela mo diatleng tsa Baiseraele gore ba se ka ba ba bolaya." 
Joshua9:27 Ka letsatsi leo Jošua a ba dira bafatsi ba dikgong le bagi ba metsi ba phuthego le ba aletare ya Morena mo felong fa Morena o tla go tlhophang, go fitlhelela kajeno." 
Joshua10:1 Atoni-Seteke, kgosi ya Jerusalema a utlwa go twe, Jošua o thopile motse wa Ai, a dirafatsa khutso ya Modimo mo go ona; a direla Ai le kgosi ya teng jaaka a diretse Jerigo le kgosi ya gona, le gore baagi ba Gibeone ba dirile kagiso le Baiseraele, ba nna mo gare ga bone." 
Joshua10:2 Ke fa a boifa thata; gonne Gibeone e ne e le motse o mogolo jaaka mongwe wa metse ya dikgosi; gonne o ne o le mogolo bogolo go Ai, le banna botlhe ba ona e ne e le bagale." 
Joshua10:3 Ka moo Atoni-Seteke, kgosi ya Jerusalema, a roma kwa go Hohame, kgosi ya Heberone, le kwa go Phireame, kgosi ya Jaremuthe, le kwa go Jafia, kgosi ya Lagiše le kwa go Debire, kgosi ya Egelone, a re:" 
Joshua10:4 “Tlayang kwano go nna, lo nthuse gore re itee ba Gibeone, gonne ba dirile kagiso le Jošua le Baiseraele.”" 
Joshua10:5 Ke fa dikgosi tse tlhano tsa Baamori di kgobokana, di bolola, e le kgosi ya Jerusalema le kgosi ya Heberone le kgosi ya Jaremuthe le kgosi ya Lagiše le kgosi ya Egelone, tsone le mephato yotlhe ya tsone tsa dikanyetsa motse wa Gibeone ka ntwa, tsa tlhabana nao." 
Joshua10:6 Mme banna ba Gibeone ba roma kwa go Jošua kwa bothibelelong jwa Gilegala ba re: “O se ka wa repisa mabogo, wa a tlosa mo batlhankeng ba gago. Tlaya kwano go rona ka pele, o re pholose, o re thuse! Gonne dikgosi tsa Baamori tse di agileng mo dithabeng di kgobokanye go lwa le rona.”" 
Joshua10:7 Ke fa Jošua a bolola, a tswa kwa Gilegala, ene le banna botlhe ba batlhabani nae le bagale botlhe ba mephato." 
Joshua10:8 Le gona Morena a raya Jošua a re: “Se ba boife, gonne ke ba neetse mo diatleng tsa gago. Ga go na ope mo go bone yo o tla emang fa pele ga gago.”" 
Joshua10:9 Jošua a ba tlhasela ka tshoganyetso, ka a letse a tsamaya bosigo jotlhe go tswa kwa Gilegala." 
Joshua10:10 Mme Morena a ba raraanye fa pele ga Baiseraele, ba ba fenya ka phenyo e kgolo kwa Gibeone, ba ba tebela mo tseleng e e tlhatlogelang kwa Bethorone, ba ba bolaya go fitlha kwa Aseka le go fitlha kwa Maketa." 
Joshua10:11 Jaanong ya re ba tshaba Baiseraele, ba fologa kwa Bethorone go ya ba fitlha kwa Aseka, Morena a eta a ba konopa ka majwe a magolo a a tswang kwa legodimong, mme ba swa. Ba ba bolailweng ke majwe a sefako ba ne ba le bantsi go feta ba Baiseraele ba ba bolaileng ka tšhaka." 
Joshua10:12 Ke fa Jošua a bua le Morena, e le ka letsatsi le Morena a neetseng Baamori mo tatlhegong fa pele ga Baiseraele ka lone, a bolela mo matlhong a Baiseraele a re: “Wena letsatsi ema mo Gibeone, le wena ngwedi, mo mogorogorong wa Ayalone!”" 
Joshua10:13 Mme letsatsi la ema le ngwedi wa ema go fitlhelela setšhaba se ipusolosetsa mo babeng ba sona. Kana tseo di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa Mosiami! Letsatsi le ne la ema fa gare ga legodimo, e ka nna motlha o o tletseng, la se ka la akofa go phirima." 
Joshua10:14 Ga go ise go ke go nne motlha o o tshwanang le oo pele ga ona le e seng morago ga ona o Morena o utlwileng lentswe la monna ka ona; gonne Morena o ne a tlhabanela Baiseraele. 
Joshua10:15 Jaanong Jošua a boela kwa bothibelelong jwa Gilegala, a na le Baiseraele botlhe." 
Joshua10:16 Mme dikgosi tse tlhano tseo di ne di tshabile, tsa ya go iphitlha mo logageng kwa Maketa." 
Joshua10:17 Jaanong Jošua a begelwa ga twe: “Dikgosi tse tlhano di bonywe di iphitlhile mo logageng kwa Maketa.” 
Joshua10:18 Ke fa Jošua a re: “Pitikelang mafika a magolo mo molomong wa logaga, lo bee banna fa go lone gore ba di dise." 
Joshua10:19 Mme lona lo se ka lwa ema. Latelelang baba ba lona, lo bolae ba ba kwa morago mo go bone, lo se ka lwa ba lesa go boela mo metseng ya bone. Gonne Morena, Modimo wa lona, o ba neetse mo diatleng tsa lona.”" 
Joshua10:20 Jaanong e rile Jošua le Baiseraele ba sena go ba bolaya jalo ka polao e kgolo thata ga tsamaya ba fela – le masalela a bone a a falotseng a sena go tsena mo metseng e e femetsweng – 
Joshua10:21 morafe otlhe wa boela kwa bothibelelong kwa go Jošua kwa Maketa ka kagiso, mme go se na ope yo o ka nyefolang Baiseraele ka loleme." 
Joshua10:22 Ke fa Jošua a re: “Thibololang molomo wa logaga, lo ntshe dikgosi tse tlhano tsele mo logageng, lo di tlise kwano go nna.”" 
Joshua10:23 Ba dira jalo, ba ntsha dikgosi tse tlhano tsele mo logageng, ba di isa kwa go ene, e bong kgosi ya Jerusalema le ya Heberone le ya Jaremuthe le ya Lagiše le ya Egelone." 
Joshua10:24 Jaanong ya re ba sena go ntshetsa dikgosi tseo kwa go Jošua, Jošua a bitsa banna botlhe ba Iseraele, a raya balaodi ba batlhabani ba ba neng ba bolotse nae a re: “Atamelang, lo bee dinao mo dithamong tsa dikgosi tse.” Ba atamela, ba baya dinao mo dithamong tsa tsone." 
Joshua10:25 Jošua a ba a ba raya a re: “Se boifeng, se tshogeng! Tiang lo nne pelokgale! Gonne Morena o tla direla baba botlhe ba lona jalo, ba lo tla tlhabanang nabo.”" 
Joshua10:26 Morago ga moo Jošua a di rema, a di bolaya, a di pega mo ditlhareng tse tlhano; tsa tlhola di lepeletse mo ditlhareng go ya mantsiboeng." 
Joshua10:27 Mme ya re letsatsi le phirima, Jošua a laola gore ba di pagolole mo ditlhareng, ba di latlhele mo logageng lo di neng di iphitlhile mo go lone. Mme ba baya mafika a magolo mo molomong wa logaga. A sa le teng le ka letsatsi la kajeno." 
Joshua10:28 Le gona Jošua a thopa motse wa Maketa ka letsatsi leo, a o itaya ka bogale jwa tšhaka, a dirafatsa khutso ya Modimo mo kgosing ya ona le mo go ona le mo bathong botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo go ona, a sa sadise ope go ka falola. A dira kgosi ya Maketa se o kileng a se dira kgosi ya Jerigo." 
Joshua10:29 Jaanong Jošua a tloga kwa Maketa, a fetela kwa Lebena, a na le Baiseraele botlhe, a tlhasela motse wa Lebena." 
Joshua10:30 Le ona Morena a o neela mo diatleng tsa Baiseraele le kgosi ya ona; Jošua a o rema ka bogale jwa tšhaka le batho botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo go ona, a sa sadise ope mo go ona go ka falola, a dira kgosi ya ona se o kileng a se dira kgosi ya Jerigo." 
Joshua10:31 Jaanong Jošua a tloga kwa Lebena, a fetela kwa motseng wa Lagiše, a na le Baiseraele botlhe, ba o dikanyetsa ka ntwa, ba lwa nao." 
Joshua10:32 Lagiše le ona Morena a o neela mo diatleng tsa Baiseraele; ba o thopa ka letsatsi la bobedi, ba o itaya ka bogale jwa tšhaka le batho botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo go ona, fela jaaka ba dirile kwa Lebena." 
Joshua10:33 Ka sebaka seo ga bolola Horame, kgosi ya Gesere go thusa Lagiše, mme Jošua a mmolaya le morafe wa gagwe ga tsamaya a se ka a mo sadisetsa mofalodi ope." 
Joshua10:34 Jaanong Jošua a tloga kwa Lagiše, a fetela pele kwa motseng wa Egelone, a na le Baiseraele botlhe; ba o tsenya gare, ba o tlhasela," 
Joshua10:35 ba o thopa ka letsatsi leo, ba o rema ka bogale jwa tšhaka, ba dirafatsa khutso ya Modimo mo bathong botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo go ona ka letsatsi leo fela jaaka ba dirile kwa Lagiše." 
Joshua10:36 Jaanong Jošua a bolola gape, a tswa mo Egelone, a na le Baiseraele botlhe, a ya kwa motseng wa Heberone, mme ba o tlhasela," 
Joshua10:37 ba o thopa, ba o itaya ka bogale jwa tšhaka le kgosi ya ona le metse yotlhe ya ona le batho botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo go ona, a sa sadise ope yo o ka falolang fela jaaka a dirile kwa Egelone. A dirafatsa khutso ya Modimo mo go ona le mo bathong botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo go ona." 
Joshua10:38 Jaanong Jošua a boa, a na le Baiseraele botlhe, a ya kwa motseng wa Debire, a o tlhasela," 
Joshua10:39 a o thopa le kgosi ya ona le metse yotlhe ya ona; ba e itaya ka bogale jwa tšhaka, ba dirafatsa khutso ya Modimo mo bathong botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo go ona, a sa sadise ope yo o ka falolang, a dira ka Debire le kgosi ya ona jaaka a dirile kwa Heberone le jaaka a dirile ka Lebena le kgosi ya teng." 
Joshua10:40 Jošua a fenya jalo mo nageng yotlhe ya dithaba le ya borwa le e e kwa tlase le ya diphologo tsa dithaba, le dikgosi tsotlhe tsa teng a di fenya, a se ka a sadisa mofalodi ope; a dirafatsa khutso ya Modimo mo go tsotlhe tse di phelang jaaka Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, a laotse." 
Joshua10:41 Jošua a ba fenya go simolola kwa Kateše-Barenea go fitlha kwa Gasa le mo nageng yotlhe ya Gosene go ya kwa Gibeone. 
Joshua10:42 Dikgosi tsotlhe tseo le dinaga tsa tsona Jošua a di thopa ka nako e le nngwe fela; gonne Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o ne a tlhabanela Baiseraele." 
Joshua10:43 Morago ga foo Jošua a boela gape kwa bothibelelong jwa Gilegala, a na le Baiseraele botlhe." 
Joshua11:1 E rile Jabine, kgosi ya Hasore, a utlwela dilo tseo, a roma kwa go Jobabe, kgosi ya Matone, le kwa kgosing ya Simerone le kwa kgosing ya Agešafe," 
Joshua11:1 E rile Jabine, kgosi ya Hasore, a utlwela dilo tseo, a roma kwa go Jobabe, kgosi ya Matone, le kwa kgosing ya Simerone le kwa kgosing ya Agešafe," 
Joshua11:2 le kwa dikgosing tse di kwa bokone mo dithabeng le mo lebaleng la Joretane mo ntlheng ya borwa ya Khinerothe le mo nageng e e kwa tlase le mo dithoteng tsa Dore kwa bophirimatsatsi 
Joshua11:3 le kwa go Bakanana ba kwa botlhabatsatsi le ba kwa bophirimatsatsi le kwa go Baamori le Bahethe le Baferesi le Bajebusi ba ba mo dithabeng le kwa go Bahewi ba ba fa tlase ga thaba ya Heremone mo nageng ya Mitsepha. 
Joshua11:4 Ke bao ba neng ba bolola, ba na le mephato yotlhe ya bone, e le batho ba le bantsintsi ba ba kana ka motlhaba o o fa losing lwa lewatle ka bontsi, ba na le dipitse le dikoloi tsa ntwa di le dintsi thata." 
Joshua11:5 Dikgosi tsotlhe tseo tsa kgobokana, tsa tla, tsa thibelela mmogo fa metsing a Merome go tlhabana le Baiseraele." 
Joshua11:6 Mme Morena a raya Jošua a re: “Se ba boife, gonne kamoso mo nakong e ke tla ba neela botlhe losong ba bolailwe ke Baiseraele. Dipitse tsa bone o tla di kgaola mesifa; dikoloi tsa ntwa tsa bone o tla di fisa ka molelo.”" 
Joshua11:7 Jaanong Jošua a fitlha, a na le banna botlhe ba batlhabani, ba ba wela ka tshoganyetso fa metsing a Merome, ba ba tlhasela." 
Joshua11:8 Mme Morena a ba neela mo diatleng tsa Baiseraele, ba ba bolaya, ba ba tebela go ya kwa Sitone yo mogolo le go ya kwa metsweding ya metsi a a bolelo le go ya kwa lebaleng la Mitsepha kwa botlhabatsatsi; ba ba fenya gore go tlhokafale le yo o ka bong a falotse." 
Joshua11:9 Jošua a dira ka bone jaaka Morena a mo laetse: A kgaola mesifa ya dipitse tsa bone, a fisa dikoloi tsa ntwa tsa bone ka molelo." 
Joshua11:10 Jošua a ba a boa ka sebaka seo, a thopa Hasore, a bolaya kgosi ya teng ka tšhaka; gonne mo metlheng ya pele Hasore e ne e le tlhogo ya magosi aotlhe ao." 
Joshua11:11 Ba bolaya batho botlhe ba ba neng ba le gona ka bogale jwa tšhaka, ba dirafatsa khutso ya Modimo jalo, go sa sadisiwe sepe se se phelang, ba fisa Hasore ka molelo." 
Joshua11:12 Jošua a thopa metse yotlhe ya dikgosi tseo mmogo le dikgosi tsotlhe tsa yona, a di bolaya ka bogale jwa tšhaka, a dirafatsa khutso ya Modimo mo go tsona jaaka Moše, motlhanka wa Morena, a laetse." 
Joshua11:13 Fela metse yotlhe e e neng e agilwe mo dithabeng, Baiseraele ba se ka ba e fisa, fa e se motse wa Hasore o le osi fela, ona Jošua o o fisitse." 
Joshua11:14 Thopo yotlhe ya metse eo le diruiwa Baiseraele ba di ithopela; fela batho botlhe bone ba ba bolaya ka bogale jwa tšhaka ga tsamaya ba ba fedisa, ba sa sadise ope yo o phelang." 
Joshua11:15 Moše o ne a laetse Jošua jaaka Morena a ne a laotse Moše, motlhanka wa gagwe. Jošua a dira fela jalo, a se ka a tlogela sepe sa tsotlhe tse Morena o neng a di laotse Moše." 
Joshua11:16 Lefatshe lotlhe leo Jošua a le thopa jalo, e bong dithaba le naga yotlhe ya borwa le lefatshe lotlhe la Gosene le naga e e kwa tlase le lebala la Joretane le dithaba tsa Iseraele le naga ya teng e e kwa tlase fa lewatleng;" 
Joshua11:17 go tloga kwa dithabeng tse di bogonoko tse di tlhatlogelang kwa Seire go ya go fitlha kwa Baale-Gate mo mogorogorong wa Lebanone fa tlase ga thaba ya Heremone; a thopa le dikgosi tsotlhe tsa teng, a di rema, a di bolaya." 
Joshua11:18 Jošua o ne a tlhabana sebaka se seleele le dikgosi tsotlhe tseo. 
Joshua11:19 Ga go a ka ga nna motse ope o o neng wa dira kagiso le Baiseraele, fa e se Bahewi ba ba agileng kwa Gibeone, mme ba thopa lefatshe lotlhe ka tlhabano." 
Joshua11:20 Gonne e ne e le Morena yo o thatafatsang dipelo tsa bone, mo ba bololang go tlhabana le Baiseraele gore bone ba dirafatse khutso ya Modimo mo go bone, mme ba se ka ba bona bopelotlhomogi bope, mme ba ba fedise jaaka Morena a laotse Moše." 
Joshua11:21 Ka sebaka seo Jošua o bile a bolola a nyeletsa Baenake, a ba fedisa mo dithabeng le mo Heberone le mo Debire le mo Anabe le mo dithabeng tsotlhe tsa Juta le mo dithabeng tsotlhe tsa Iseraele. Jošua a dirafatsa khutso ya Modimo mo go bone le mo metseng ya bone." 
Joshua11:22 Ga se ka ga sadisiwa Baenake mo lefatsheng la Baiseraele; ba sadisiwa fela kwa Gasa le kwa Gathe le kwa Ašetote. 
Joshua11:23 Jošua a thopa lefatshe lotlhe jalo fela jaaka Morena a laotse Moše. Jošua a le abela Baiseraele go nna boswa ka fa dikarolong tsa bone, ke go re ka fa ditsong tsa bone. Jaanong lefatshe la ikhutsa le se na ntwa." 
Joshua12:1 Dikgosi tsa lefatshe tse Baiseraele ba di fentseng, ba thopa lefatshe la tsona kwa moseja ga Joretane ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go tloga fa nokeng ya Arenone go ya kwa thabeng ya Heremone le lebala lotlhe la Joretane le le ka kwa botlhabatsatsi, ke tse:" 
Joshua12:2 Ke Sihone, kgosi ya Baamori yo o neng a nna mo Hešebone; a busa go tloga kwa Aroere yo o fa losing lwa noka ya Arenone, le bontlhanngwe jwa molapo le bontlhanngwe jwa Gileate le go fitlha kwa nokeng ya Jaboke e e leng molelwane wa Baamone." 
Joshua12:3 A busa lebala la Joretane go ya kwa letsheng la Khinerothe kwa botlhabatsatsi le go ya kwa Lewatleng la Lebala la Joretane kwa Lewatleng la Letswai kwa botlhabatsatsi, fa go iwang kwa Bethe-Ješimothe le kwa borwa fa tlase ga mekgokolosa ya Phiseka." 
Joshua12:4 Ba thopa le naga ya ga Oge, kgosi ya Basane yo e neng e le wa masalela a Barefaime, yo o neng a nna mo Ašetharothe le mo Eterei." 
Joshua12:5 A busa kwa thabeng ya Heremone le kwa Salega le mo nageng yotlhe ya Basane go ya kwa molelwaneng wa Bakesure le wa Bamaagatha le bontlhanngwe jwa Gileate go ya molelwaneng wa ga Sihone, kgosi ya Hešebone." 
Joshua12:6 Ke bone ba Moše motlhanka wa Morena o neng a ba fenya le Baiseraele. Lefatshe leo la bone Moše, motlhanka wa Morena, o le abetse Barubene le Bagate le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase go nna boswa." 
Joshua12:7 Dikgosi tsa lefatshe tse Jošua o neng a di fenya a na le Baiseraele ka kwano ga Joretane ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi go tloga kwa Baale-Gate mo mogorogorong wa Lebanone go ya kwa dithabeng tse di bogonoko tse di tlhatlogelang kwa Seire, ke tse: (Jaanong Jošua a le abela ditso tsa Baiseraele go nna boswa; lotso longwe le longwe lwa newa kabelo ya lone:" 
Joshua12:8 Mo dithabeng le mo nageng e e kwa tlase fa lewatleng le mo lebaleng la Joretane le mo mekgokoloseng le mo sekakeng le mo nageng ya borwa, e bong mo dinageng tsa Bahethe le Baamori le Bakanana le Baferesi le Bahewi le Bajebusi.) Dikgosi tsa teng ke tse:" 
Joshua12:9 Ke kgosi ya Jerigo le kgosi ya Ai yo o neng a bapile le Bethele 
Joshua12:10 le kgosi ya Jerusalema le kgosi ya Heberone 
Joshua12:11 le kgosi ya Jaremuthe le kgosi ya Lagiše 
Joshua12:12 le kgosi ya Egelone le kgosi ya Gesere 
Joshua12:13 le kgosi ya Debire le kgosi ya Getere 
Joshua12:14 le kgosi ya Horema le kgosi ya Arate 
Joshua12:15 le kgosi ya Lebena le kgosi ya Adulame 
Joshua12:16 le kgosi ya Maketa le kgosi ya Bethele 
Joshua12:17 le kgosi ya Thaphua le kgosi ya Hefere 
Joshua12:18 le kgosi ya Afeke le kgosi ya Sarone 
Joshua12:19 le kgosi ya Matone le kgosi ya Hasore 
Joshua12:20 le kgosi ya Simerone-Merone le kgosi ya Agešafe 
Joshua12:21 le kgosi ya Thaenage le kgosi ya Megito 
Joshua12:22 le kgosi ya Keteše le kgosi ya Jokeneame kwa Karemele 
Joshua12:23 le kgosi ya Dore kwa dithoteng tsa Dore le kgosi ya ditšhaba tsa Gilegala 
Joshua12:24 le kgosi ya Thiresa. Dikgosi tsotlhe mmogo di ne di le 31. 
Joshua13:1 E rile Jošua a sena go tsofala, a le dinyaga-dintsi, Morena a mo raya a re: “Wena o tsofetse, o dinyaga-dintsi. Mme go sa ntse go setse lefatshe le legolo thata le le tshwanetseng go thopiwa." 
Joshua13:2 Lefatshe le le setseng ke le: Ke dinaga tsotlhe tsa Bafelesita le tsa Bakesure tsotlhe 
Joshua13:3 go tloga kwa nokeng ya Sigore e e fa thoko ga Egepeto go ya kwa nageng ya Ekerone kwa bokone e e balelwang Bakanana e bong naga ya dikgosi tse tlhano tsa Bafelesita ya Gasa le ya Ašetote le ya Ašekalone le ya Gathe le ya Ekerone, le dinaga tsa Baawi" 
Joshua13:4 kwa borwa. Go setse le lefatshe lotlhe la Bakanana le Meara yo e leng wa Basitone go ya kwa Afeke go ya kwa molelwaneng wa Baamori 
Joshua13:5 le lefatshe la Bagebale le Lebanone yotlhe mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi go tloga kwa Baale-Gate fa tlase ga thaba ya Heremone go ya go fitlha kwa Hamathe. 
Joshua13:6 Go setse le baagi botlhe ba dithaba go tloga kwa Lebanone go ya kwa metsweding ya metsi a a bolelo. Basitone botlhe ke tla ba leleka fa pele ga Baiseraele. Fela naga ya bone o e abele Baiseraele jaanong ka tengwa go nna boswa jaaka ke go laetse. 
Joshua13:7 Jaanong kgaoganya lefatshe le go nna boswa jwa ditso tse di le robongwe le jwa bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase.” 
Joshua13:8 Gonne bontlhanngwe jo bongwe jwa Manase bo amogetse boswa jwa bone mmogo le Barubene le Bagate, jo Moše o bo ba neileng kwa moseja ga Joretane go ya kwa botlhabatsatsi ka fa Moše motlhanka wa Morena a ba neileng ka teng:" 
Joshua13:9 Go tloga kwa Aroere yo o fa losing lwa noka ya Arenone le motse o o mo gare ga molapo le loboa lotlhe go tswa kwa Meteba go ya kwa Dibone 
Joshua13:10 le metse yotlhe ya ga Sihone kgosi ya Baamori yo o neng a busa mo Hešebone go ya molelwaneng wa Baamone 
Joshua13:11 le Gileate le naga ya Bakesure le ya Bamaagatha le thaba yotlhe ya Heremone le Basane yotlhe go ya kwa Salega 
Joshua13:12 e le puso yotlhe ya ga Oge mo Basane yo o neng a busa mo Ašetharothe le mo Eterei. Ene o ne a setse e le wa masalela a Barefaime, bone Moše o ba bolaile, a ba leleka." 
Joshua13:13 Fela Baiseraele ga ba a ka ba leleka Bakesure le Bamaagatha, mme Bakesure le Bamaagatha ba ntse ba agile mo gare ga Baiseraele go fitlha letsatsing leno." 
Joshua13:14 Ke lotso lwa ga Lefi lo le losi fela lo Moše a se kang a lo naya boswa. Ditlhabelo tsa Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, ke tsone boswa jwa lone jaaka a lo solofeditse." 
Joshua13:15 Moše a abela lotso lwa Barubene ka fa ditshikeng tsa lone. 
Joshua13:16 Se ba se abetsweng ke naga e e simologang kwa Aroere yo o fa losing lwa noka ya Arenone le kwa motseng o o mo gare ga molapo le leboa lotlhe go ya kwa Meteba 
Joshua13:17 le motse wa Hešebone le metse yotlhe ya ona e e mo leboeng: E bong Dibone le Bamothe-Baale le Bethe-Baale-Meone 
Joshua13:18 le Jahase le Ketemothe le Mefaathe 
Joshua13:19 le Khiriathaime le Sibema le Serethe-Šahare fa thabeng ya leboa 
Joshua13:20 le Bethe-Pheore le diphologelo tsa Phiseka le Bethe-Ješimothe 
Joshua13:21 le metse yotlhe ya leboa le puso yotlhe ya ga Sihone kgosi ya Baamori yo o neng a busa mo Hešebone, yo Moše o mo fentseng mmogo le dikgosana tsa Midiane, e bong Ewi le Rekeme le Sure le Hure le Reba, ba e neng e le dikgosana tsa ga Sihone tse di neng di agile mo lefatsheng le." 
Joshua13:22 Le Bileame wa moitseanape morwa Beore, Baiseraele ba mmolaile ka tšhaka mmogo le ba ba bolailweng bao." 
Joshua13:23 Molelwane wa Barubene e ne e le Joretane. Ke jona boswa jwa Barubene ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone; ke yona metse le metsana ya teng. 
Joshua13:24 Moše a abela lotso lwa Bagate ka fa ditshikeng tsa lone. 
Joshua13:25 Naga e ba e abetsweng ke Jasere le metse yotlhe ya Gileate le bontlhanngwe jwa lefatshe la Baamone go ya kwa Aroere yo o mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Raba 
Joshua13:26 le go tloga kwa Hešebone go ya kwa Ramathe-Mitsephe le kwa Betonime le go tloga kwa Mahanaime go ya kwa molelwaneng wa Letebire. 
Joshua13:27 Mo lebaleng la Joretane ba abelwa metse ya Bethe-Harame le Bethe-Nimera le Sukothe le Safone, mo e leng lesalela la puso ya ga Sihone kgosi ya Hešebone. Molelwane e ne e le Joretane go ya kwa bofelong jwa letsha la Khinerethe kwa moseja ga Joretane ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Joshua13:28 Ke jona boswa jwa Bagate ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone; ke yona metse le metsana ya teng. 
Joshua13:29 Moše a abela bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase; se bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase bo se abetsweng ka fa ditshikeng tsa bona ke se: 
Joshua13:30 Naga ya bone e ne e le Basane yotlhe go simolola kwa Mahanaime, e le puso yotlhe ya ga Oge kgosi ya Basane le metsana yotlhe ya ga Jaire e e mo Basane, metse e le 60;" 
Joshua13:31 le bontlhanngwe jwa Gileate le Ašetharothe le Eterei yona metse ya puso ya ga Oge mo Basane. Ke yona naga ya bomorwa Magire morwa Manase; ke ya bontlhanngwe jwa bomorwa Magire ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone. 
Joshua13:32 Ke tsona dinaga tse Moše o neng a di ba abela a le kwa mabaleng a Moabe kwa moseja ga Joretane, fa Jerigo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Joshua13:33 Mme ba lotso lwa ga Lefi Moše a se ka a ba naya boswa. Morena Modimo wa Iseraele ke ene boswa jwa bone jaaka a ba solofeditse. 
Joshua14:1 Dinaga ke tse, tse Baiseraele ba di amogetseng go nna boswa mo lefatsheng la Kanana tse ba di abetsweng ke moperesiti Eleasare le Jošua morwa Nune le ditlhogo tsa dikgotla tsa ditso tsa Baiseraele." 
Joshua14:2 Ba ba abela dinaga tsa bone ka tengwa jaaka Morena a ne a laotse ka Moše gore ba di nee ditso tse di le robongwe le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso. 
Joshua14:3 Gonne Moše o ne a neile ditso tse pedi le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso boswa kwa moseja ga Joretane, mme a se ka a naya Balefi boswa mo gare ga bone." 
Joshua14:4 Gonne Bajosefa e ne e le ditso tse pedi, Manase le Eferaime, mme ba se ka ba naya Balefi kabelo ya naga fa e se metse ya go nna mo go yona le mafulo a diruiwa tsa bone le ditsha tsa di-tsa-bone." 
Joshua14:5 Baiseraele ba kgaogana lefatshe jalo, ba dira jaaka Morena a laotse Moše." 
Joshua14:6 Bajuta ba kile ba atamela kwa go Jošua mo Gilegala, mme Kalebe morwa Jefune wa Mokenisi a mo raya a re: “O itse lefoko ka wesi le Morena o le buileng le Moše, monna wa Modimo, ka ntlha ya me le ka ntlha ya gago kwa Kateše-Barenea." 
Joshua14:7 E rile Moše motlhanka wa Morena a nthoma go tswa kwa Kateše-Barenea go ya go tlhola lefatshe le, ka bo ke le dinyaga di le 40; ya re ke boa, ka mmegela ka fa ke ikutlwang ka teng mo pelong." 
Joshua14:8 Mme bomorwa-rre ba ba neng ba ile le nna ba nyemisa morafe moko, mme nna ka latela Morena, Modimo wa me, ka botlalo." 
Joshua14:9 Ke fa Moše a ikana ka letsatsi leo a re: ‘Ruri, lefatshe le dinao tsa gago di gatileng mo go lone e tla nna la gago le la bana ba gago go nna boswa ka bosakhutleng; ka gonne o latetse Morena, Modimo wa me, ka botlalo.’" 
Joshua14:10 Mme jaanong bona, Morena o mphedisitse jaaka a ntsholofeditse, e setse e le dinyaga di le 45 go tloga foo, fa Morena a laola Moše lefoko leo, Baiseraele ba ntse ba sepela mo sekakeng. Bona, nna kajeno ke na le dinyaga di le 85."
