Joshua14:11 Ke sa ntse ke tiile kajeno jaaka ka letsatsi le Moše o ne a nthomile ka lone; thata ya me ya jaanong e sa ntse e tshwana le thata ya metlha ele go ka tlhabana le go bolola le go goroga. 
Joshua14:12 Jaanong he, a ko o mphe dithaba tse Morena o buileng ka ga tsona ka letsatsi lele; gonne o utlwile ka wesi ka letsatsi lele gore go na le Baenake le metse e megolo e e femetsweng; ka gongwe Morena o tla nna le nna gore ke ba leleke jaaka Morena a solofeditse.”" 
Joshua14:13 Ke fa Jošua a mo tshegofatsa, a naya Kalebe morwa Jefune Heberone go nna boswa." 
Joshua14:14 Ke ka moo Heberone e leng boswa jwa ga Kalebe morwa Jefune wa Mokenisi go fitlha letsatsing leno; ka gonne o ne a latetse Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, ka botlalo." 
Joshua14:15 Mme leina la Heberone e ne e le motse wa ga Areba pele ga foo; ene e ne e le motho yo mogolo mo go Baenake. Jaanong lefatshe la ikhutsa, le se na ntwa." 
Joshua15:1 Naga e ditshika tsa lotso lwa ga Juta di e abetsweng ka tengwa e ne e fitlha kwa molelwaneng wa Etomo le kwa sekakeng sa Tsine ntlheng ya borwa kwa mafelelong a teng. 
Joshua15:2 Molelwane wa bone ntlheng ya borwa o ne o tloga kwa bofelong jwa Lewatle la Letswai kwa sekhutlong se se ntlheng ya borwa 
Joshua15:3 o ya pele go fitlha ntlheng ya borwa ya Phata-ya-Diphepheng, o fetela kwa Tsine, o tlhatloga mo ntlheng ya borwa ya Kateše-Barenea, o fetela kwa Heserone, o tlhatlogela kwa Atare, o be o thelela teng, o ya kwa Kareka" 
Joshua15:4 o fetela kwa Asemone, o ya pele kwa nokaneng ya molelwane wa Egepeto o felela fa lewatleng. E tla nna ona molelwane wa lona kwa borwa." 
Joshua15:5 Molelwane wa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi e ne e le Lewatle la Letswai go fitlha fa Joretane o kopanang le lone teng. Molelwane wa lotlhakore lwa bokone o ne o tloga kwa makopanelong a lewatle leo le Joretane 
Joshua15:6 jaanong molelwane o ne o tlhatlogela kwa Bethogola, o fetela pele go ya ntlheng ya bokone ya Betharaba, o be o tlhatlogela kwa Lefikeng la Bohane morwa Rubene." 
Joshua15:7 Gape molelwane o ne o tlhatlogela kwa Debire o tswa Mogorogorong wa Agore, o be o thelela o ya kwa bokone kwa Gilegala yo o lebaganyeng le Phata ya Adumime e e mo ntlheng ya borwa ya nokana. Jaanong molelwane o ne o fetela kwa metsing a Motswedi wa Letsatsi, o be o felela fa motsweding wa Rogele." 
Joshua15:8 Jaanong molelwane o ne o tlhatlogela kwa mogorogorong wa morwa Hinome go ya mhapheng wa thaba ya Bajebusi ntlheng ya borwa – ke gona Jerusalema. Molelwane o tlhatlogela gape kwa setlhoeng sa thaba e e bapileng le mogorogoro wa ga Hinome mo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, e e bileng e le mo ntlheng ya bokone mo bofelong jwa mogorogoro wa Barefaime." 
Joshua15:9 Molelwane o ne o thelela mo setlhoeng sa thaba eo, o ya kwa motsweding wa metsi a Nefethoa; go tswa teng o ne o ya kwa dithabeng tsa metse ya ga Eferone. Jaanong o thelela, o ya kwa Baala, e bong Khiriathe-Jearime." 
Joshua15:10 Kwa Baala molelwane o ne o thelela o ya kwa bophirimatsatsi kwa thabeng ya Seire; o be o fetela kwa mhapheng wa thaba ya Jearime ntlheng ya bokone, e bong Kesalone; o be o fologela kwa Betšhemeše, o fetela kwa Thimena." 
Joshua15:11 Molelwane o ne o tswa teng o ya kwa bokone kwa mhapheng wa Ekerone; teng koo molelwane o thelela go ya kwa Sikerone, o fetela kwa thabeng ya Baala, o ya pele go fitlha kwa Jabenele, o felela fa lewatleng." 
Joshua15:12 Molelwane wa lotlhakore lwa bophirimatsatsi e ne e le lewatle le legolo, e bong losi lwa lone. Ke yona melelwane ya Bajuta mo tikologong ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua15:13 Mme Jošua a naya Kalebe morwa Jefune kabelo mo gare ga Bajuta ka fa Morena a mo laetseng ka teng, e bong motse wa ga Areba rraagwe Enake; ke ona motse wa Heberone." 
Joshua15:14 Kalebe a leleka bomorwa Enake ba bararo teng, e bong Sesai le Ahimane le Thalemai, bana ba ga Enake." 
Joshua15:15 Go tswa teng a tlhatloga go ya go lwa le baagi ba Debire; mme leina la Debire e ne e le Khiriatshefere pele ga foo. 
Joshua15:16 Ke fa Kalebe a re: “Yo o ka fenyang Khiriatshefere, a o thopa, ke tla mo neela morwadiake Agesa go nna mosadi wa gagwe.”" 
Joshua15:17 Ke fa Otheniele morwa Kenase, morwa-rraagwe Kalebe, a o thopa; mme Kalebe a mo neela morwadie Agesa go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
Joshua15:18 Jaanong ya re Agesa a tla kwa go ene, Otheniele a mo tlhotlheletsa gore a lope tshimo mo go rraagwe. Ke fa Agesa a fologa ka pele mo eseleng, mme Kalebe a mmotsa a re: “Go rileng?”" 
Joshua15:19 Agesa a re: “Mphe lesego la go ntsamaisa sentle. E re ka o mpeile kwa nageng e e sekaka ya borwa, ke kopa gore o mphe le metswedi ya metsi.” Ke fa Kalebe a mo naya metswedi e e kwa godimo le e e kwa tlase." 
Joshua15:20 Ke jona boswa jwa lotso lwa Bajuta ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone. 
Joshua15:21 Metse ya lotso lwa Bajuta kwa thoko ntlheng ya borwa go bapa le molelwane wa Etomo e ne e le Kapsheele le Etere le Jagure 
Joshua15:22 le Khina le Dimona le Atata 
Joshua15:23 le Keteše le Hasore le Ithenane 
Joshua15:24 le Sife le Teleme le Bealothe 
Joshua15:25 le Hasore-Hatatha le Keriothe-Heserone – ke gona Hasore – 
Joshua15:26 le Amame le Sema le Molata 
Joshua15:27 le Hasare-Gata le Hesemone le Bethe-Phelete 
Joshua15:28 le Hasare-Šuale le Bereseba le Bisiothia 
Joshua15:29 le Baala le Iyime le Eseme 
Joshua15:30 le Eletholate le Kesile le Horema 
Joshua15:31 le Sitlage le Matemana le Sanesana 
Joshua15:32 le Lebaothe le Silehime le Aine le Rimone. Metse yotlhe e ne e le 29 kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua15:33 Mo nageng e e kwa tlase go ne go le Ešethaole le Sorea le Ašena 
Joshua15:34 le Sanoa le Enganime le Thaphua le Ename 
Joshua15:35 le Jaremuthe le Adulame le Sogo le Aseka 
Joshua15:36 le Saaraime le Adithaime le Ketera le Geterothaime; e ne e le metse e le 14 kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua15:37 Le Senane le Hataša le Migetale-Gate 
Joshua15:38 le Dileane le Mitsepha le Jokethele 
Joshua15:39 le Lagiše le Bosekathe le Egelone 
Joshua15:40 le Kabone le Lagemase le Khitlhiše 
Joshua15:41 le Geterothe le Bethe-Dagone le Naama le Maketa. E ne e le metse e le 16 kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua15:42 Le Lebena le Ethere le Ašane 
Joshua15:43 le Ifetha le Ašena le Nesibe 
Joshua15:44 le Kehila le Agesibe le Mareša. E ne e le metse e le 9 kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua15:45 Le Ekerone le metse le metsana ya teng. 
Joshua15:46 Le go tloga kwa Ekerone go ya go fitlha kwa lewatleng, e bong metse yotlhe e e fa thoko ga Ašetote le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:47 Le Ašetote le metse le metsana ya teng le Gasa le metse le metsana ya teng, go ya kwa nokaneng ya molelwane wa Egepeto. Lewatle le legolo e ne e le molelwane." 
Joshua15:48 Mo dithabeng go ne go le Samire le Jathire le Sogo 
Joshua15:49 le Dana le Khiriathe-Sana, e bong Debire;" 
Joshua15:50 le Anabe le Ešethemo le Anime 
Joshua15:51 le Gosene le Holone le Gilo. E ne e le metse e le 11 kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua15:52 Le Arabe le Duma le Ešane 
Joshua15:53 le Janime le Bethe-Thaphua le Afeka 
Joshua15:54 le Humuta le Khiriathe-Areba, e bong Heberone le Siore. E ne e le metse e le 9 kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:55 Le Maone le Karemele le Sife le Jota 
Joshua15:56 le Iserele le Joketeame le Sanoa 
Joshua15:57 le Kaine le Gibea le Thimena. E ne e le metse e le some kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua15:58 Le Halehule le Betshure le Ketore 
Joshua15:59 le Maarathe le Bethanothe le Elethekone. E ne e le metse e merataro kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua15:60 Le Khiriathe-Baale, e bong Khiriathe-Jearime, le Raba. E ne e le metse e le mebedi kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:61 Mo sekakeng go ne go le Betharaba le Midine le Segaga 
Joshua15:62 le Nibešane le motse wa letswai le Engedi. E ne e le metse e merataro kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua15:63 Mme Bajuta ba ne ba palelwa ke go leleka Bajebusi ba ba agileng mo Jerusalema. Bajebusi ba nna jalo mo Jerusalema mmogo le Bajuta go fitlha letsatsing leno. 
Joshua16:1 Molelwane wa naga e Bajosefa ba e abetsweng ka tengwa o ne o simologa fa Joretane kwa Jerigo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya metsi a Jerigo, mme go tswa teng o ya kwa sekakeng, o be o tlhatlogela kwa dithabeng tsa Bethele." 
Joshua16:2 Jaanong go tswa kwa Bethele o ne o ya kwa Luse, o fetela pele kwa nageng ya Baaregi kwa Atarothe." 
Joshua16:3 O be o fologela kwa bophirimatsatsi kwa nageng ya Bajafelete go ya go fitlha kwa nageng ya Bethorone yo o kwa tlase le go ya kwa Gesere. O be o felela fa lewatleng. 
Joshua16:4 Ke fa bomorwa Josefa, e bong Manase le Eferaime, ba neng ba bona kabelo ya naga teng." 
Joshua16:5 Naga ya Baeferaime ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone e ne e ntse jaana: Molelwane wa kabelo ya bone o ne o ya kwa botlhabatsatsi kwa Aterothe-Atare go ya go fitlha kwa Bethorone yo o kwa godimo. 
Joshua16:6 Molelwane o be o fetela pele kwa lewatleng, o pota Migemethathe mo ntlheng ya borwa. Molelwane o be o thelela, o ya kwa botlhabatsatsi kwa Thaanatšhilo, o mo pota ka fa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, o ya kwa Janoa." 
Joshua16:7 Go tswa kwa Janoa o fologela kwa Atarothe le kwa Naara, o ama Jerigo, o felela fa Joretane." 
Joshua16:8 Go tswa kwa Thaphua molelwane o ne o ya kwa bophirimatsatsi kwa nokaneng ya Kana, o felela fa lewatleng. Ke yona kabelo ya lotso lwa Baeferaime ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone" 
Joshua16:9 mmogo le metse e e segetsweng Baeferaime mo gare ga naga ya Bamanase, metse yotlhe le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua16:10 Mme ba se ka ba leleka Bakanana ba ba agileng kwa Gesere. Bakanana ba nna jalo mo gare ga Baeferaime go fitlha letsatsing leno. Fela ba nna batlhanka, ba ba direla." 
Joshua17:1 Le lotso lwa ga Manase lwa abelwa naga ka tengwa, gonne ene e ne e le morwa wa ntlha wa ga Josefa. Magire morwa wa ntlha wa ga Manase, rraagwe Gileate, a abelwa Gileate le Basane, ka a le mogale mo ntweng." 
Joshua17:2 Le bomorwa Manase ba bangwe ba fiwa boswa ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, e bong bomorwa Abiesere le bomorwa Heleke le bomorwa Aseriele le bomorwa Šegeme le bomorwa Hefere le bomorwa Semita. Ke bone bomorwa Manase morwa Josefa ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua17:3 Mme Selofehate morwa Hefere, morwa Gileate morwa Magire morwa Manase o ne a se na bomorwa, fa e se bomorwadi fela. Maina a bomorwadie ke Magala le Noa le Hogola le Mileka le Thiresa." 
Joshua17:4 Jaanong bomorwadie ba kile ba tla fa pele ga Eleasare moperesiti le fa pele ga Jošua morwa Nune le fa pele ga dikgosana, ba re: “Morena o laetse Moše gore a re nee kabelo ya naga mo gare ga bomorwa-rraarona.” Ke fa Jošua a ba abela boswa mo gare ga bomorwa-rraabo mogolo ka fa taelong ya Morena." 
Joshua17:5 Dikarolo di le some tsa wela mo go Manase jalo kwa ntle ga lefatshe la Gileate le Basane le le kwa moseja ga Joretane. 
Joshua17:6 Ka gonne bomorwadia Manase ba ne ba amogela boswa mo gare ga bomorwawe. Mme lefatshe la Gileate ya nna la bomorwa Manase ba bangwe. 
Joshua17:7 Mme molelwane wa ga Manase o ne o tswa kwa Asere, o ya kwa Migemethathe yo o mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Šegeme; molelwane o be o ya kwa ntlheng ya le le jang kwa baaging ba Ene-Thaphua." 
Joshua17:8 Naga ya Thaphua e ne ya nna ya ga Manase, mme motse wa Thaphua o o fa molelwaneng wa ga Manase ya nna wa ga Eferaime." 
Joshua17:9 Jaanong molelwane o ne o fologela kwa nokaneng ya Kana ntlheng ya borwa ya nokana eo. Metse mengwe ya teng ya ga Eferaime e ne e le mo gare ga metse ya ga Manase. Molelwane wa ga Manase o be o le mo ntlheng ya bokone ya nokana eo, o felela fa lewatleng." 
Joshua17:10 Naga ya Eferaime e ne e le kwa borwa, ya Manase e le kwa bokone. Lewatle e ne e le molelwane wa bone. Ba amana le Asere kwa bokone le Isašare kwa botlhabatsatsi." 
Joshua17:11 Mo nageng ya ga Isašare le ya ga Asere Manase a abelwa motse wa Betšheane le metsana ya ona le Ibeleame le metsana ya ona le baagi ba Dore le metsana ya ona le baagi ba Entore le metsana ya ona le baagi ba Thaenage le metsana ya ona le baagi ba Megito le metsana ya ona, meboto e meraro e." 
Joshua17:12 Mme Bamanase ba palelwa ke go thopa metse eo; ke ka moo Bakanana ba kgonneng go nnela ruri mo nageng eo. 
Joshua17:13 Mme e rile Baiseraele ba sena go tia, ba dira Bakanana balala, fela ba se ka ba ba leleka." 
Joshua17:14 Jaanong Bajosefa ba bua le Jošua ba re: “Ke go reng, fa o re naya boswa jwa tengwa e le nngwe fela le kabelo e le nngwe fela, etswe rona re le morafe o mogolo, ka go re Morena o re tshegofaditse go fitlha jaanong?”" 
Joshua17:15 Jošua a ba raya a re: “Fa lo le morafe o mogolo, tlhatlogelang mo sekgweng, lo ithemele manno teng mo nageng ya Baferesi le ya Barefaime, ka lo re, dithaba tsa Eferaime di lo pitlagantse.”" 
Joshua17:16 Ke fa Bajosefa ba re: “Dithaba ga di re lekane, mme Bakanana botlhe ba ba agileng mo nageng ya leboa ba na le dikoloi tsa ntwa tsa tshipi, e bong ba ba mo Betšheane le mo metsaneng ya teng le ba ba mo leboeng la Iserele.”" 
Joshua17:17 Mme Jošua a raya Bajosefa, e bong Baeferaime le Bamanase, a re: “Lo morafe o mogolo, lo na le thata e kgolo; ga lo ne lo fiwa kabelo e le nngwe fela." 
Joshua17:18 Mme lo tla abelwa naga ya dithaba; fa go le sekgwa, lo ithemele manno gore e nne ya lona go ya mafelelong a yona. Gonne lo tshwanetse go leleka Bakanana, le fa ba na le dikoloi tsa ntwa tsa tshipi, ba le thata.”" 
Joshua18:1 E rile Baiseraele ba sena go thopa lefatshe, ba phuthegela botlhe kwa Silo, ba tlhoma Tempelana ya Boipontsho teng." 
Joshua18:2 Mme ga bo go setse ditso tse supa mo Baiseraeleng tse di iseng di amogele dikabelo tsa tsone. 
Joshua18:3 Ke fa Jošua a raya Baiseraele a re: “Lo diega sebaka se se kana kang go ya go tsaya lefatshe le Morena, Modimo wa borraeno, o le lo fileng?" 
Joshua18:4 Ntshang banna ba bararo mo lotsong longwe le longwe; ke tla ba roma gore ba nanoge ba ralale lefatshe, ba le kwale ka fa ba ka le abelwang ka teng, ba be ba boele kwano go nna." 
Joshua18:5 Lo fete lo le kgaoganye dikarolo tse supa. Juta o tla nna mo nageng ya gagwe kwa borwa le Bajosefa ba tla nna mo nageng ya bone kwa bokone. 
Joshua18:6 Mme lo kwale dikabelo tse supa tsa lefatshe, lo di tlise kwano go nna gore ke lo tlhamele tengwa fano fa pele ga Morena, Modimo wa rona." 
Joshua18:7 Gonne Balefi ga ba na kabelo ya naga mo go lona. Kana boswa jwa bone ke boperesiti jwa Morena. Gape Gate le Rubene le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase ba setse ba amogetse boswa jwa bone kwa botlhabatsatsi kwa moseja ga Joretane; ba bo filwe ke Moše, motlhanka wa Morena.”" 
Joshua18:8 Ke fa banna bao ba nanoga go tsamaya. Ya re ba bolola go kwala lefatshe, Jošua a ba laela a re: “Yaang lo ralale lefatshe, lo le kwale, lo be lo boele kwano go nna, ke tle ke lo tlhamele tengwa fa pele ga Morena mono Silo.”" 
Joshua18:9 Banna bao ba ya ba ralala lefatshe, ba le kwala ka fa metseng mo lokwalong, ba dira dikabelo tse supa ba be ba boela kwa go Jošua kwa bothibelelong jwa Silo." 
Joshua18:10 Ke fa Jošua a ba tlhamela tengwa mo Silo fa pele ga Morena; Jošua a abela Baiseraele lefatshe ka fa ba rulagantsweng ka teng. 
Joshua18:11 Ga tswa tengwa ya lotso lwa Babenyamene ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone: Naga e ba e amogetseng ka tengwa e ne e le fa gare ga Bajuta le Bajosefa. 
Joshua18:12 Molelwane wa bone mo ntlheng ya bokone o ne o tloga kwa Joretane; molelwane o be o tlhatlogela kwa mmotong ntlheng ya bokone ya Jerigo, o be o tlhatlogela mo dithabeng, o ya kwa bophirimatsatsi, o khutla mo sekakeng sa Bethawene." 
Joshua18:13 Go tswa teng molelwane o ne o fetela kwa Luse kwa ntlheng ya borwa ya mmoto wa Luse, e bong Bethele. Jaanong molelwane o fologela kwa Aterothe-Atare, o tlhatlogela kwa thabeng e e mo ntlheng ya borwa ya Bethorone yo o kwa tlase." 
Joshua18:14 Jaanong molelwane o ne o thelela, o fapogela kwa borwa mo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi go tswa kwa thabeng e e lebaganyeng le Bethorone ntlheng ya borwa, o ya o khutla kwa Khiriathe-Baale, e bong Khiriathe-Jearime motse wa Bajuta. Ke lone lotlhakore lwa bophirimatsatsi." 
Joshua18:15 Mo ntlheng ya borwa go tswa kwa bofelong jwa Khiriathe-Jearime molelwane o ne o tswa kwa bophirimatsatsi, o fetela kwa motsweding wa metsi a Nefethoa." 
Joshua18:16 Jaanong molelwane o ne o fologela kwa bofelong jwa thaba e e lebaganyeng le mogorogoro wa Morwa Hinome e e mo leboeng la Barefaime ntlheng ya bokone; o be o fologela kwa mogorogorong wa ga Hinome, o ya kwa mfapheng wa thaba ya Bajebusi mo ntlheng ya borwa, o be o fologela kwa motsweding wa Rogele." 
Joshua18:17 Jaanong o ne o thelela o ya kwa bokone, o fetela kwa Motsweding wa Letsatsi, o be o fetela kwa marakeng a dithako a a lebaganyeng le phata ya Adumime, o be o fologela kwa lefikeng la ga Bohane morwa Rubene." 
Joshua18:18 O be o fetele kwa bokone kwa dithabeng tse di lebaganyeng le lebala la Joretane o be o fologela kwa lebaleng leo. 
Joshua18:19 Jaanong molelwane o ne o fetela kwa ntlheng ya bokone ya Bethogola, molelwane o be o felela fa sekhutlong sa Lewatle la Letswai ntlheng ya bokone kwa bofelong jwa Joretane kwa borwa. Ke ona molelwane wa kwa borwa." 
Joshua18:20 Joretane ke molelwane wa teng mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi. Ke yona naga ya Babenyamene ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone le melelwane ya yona mo tikologong. 
Joshua18:21 Mme metse ya lotso lwa Babenyamene ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone e ne e le Jerigo le Bethogola le Emeke-Kesise 
Joshua18:22 le Betharaba le Semaraime le Bethele 
Joshua18:23 le Awime le Phara le Ofera 
Joshua18:24 le Kefare-Amoni le Ofeni le Geba. E ne e le metse e le 12 kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua18:25 Le Gibeone le Rama le Beerothe 
Joshua18:26 le Mitsepha le Kefira le Mosa 
Joshua18:27 le Rekeme le Irefele le Thareala 
Joshua18:28 le Sela le Elefe le Jebusi, e bong Jerusalema le Gibeathe le Khiriathe. E ne e le metse e le 14 kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. Ke yona kabelo ya Babenyamene ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua19:1 Ga ba ga tswa tengwa ya bobedi ya ga Simeone ya lotso lwa Basimeone ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, mme naga ya bone e ne e le mo gare ga naga ya Bajuta." 
Joshua19:2 Mo nageng ya bone ba abelwa Bereseba le fa e le Šeba le Molata 
Joshua19:3 le Hasare-Šuale le Bala le Eseme 
Joshua19:4 le Eletholate le Bethule le Horema 
Joshua19:5 le Sitlage le Bethe-Marekabothe le Hasare-Susa 
Joshua19:6 le Bethe-Lebaothe le Saruhene. E ne e le metse e le 13 kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua19:7 Le Aine le Rimone le Ethere le Ašane. E ne e le metse e mene kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua19:8 Le metsana yotlhe e e mo tikologong ya metse eo go ya go fitlha kwa Baalathe-Bere yo e leng Rama wa kwa borwa. Ke yona kabelo ya lotso lwa Basimeone, ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua19:9 Kabelo ya Basimeone e ne e le karolo ya kabelo ya Bajuta. Gonne Bajuta ba ne ba fetilwe ke naga e kgolo ya bone. Ka moo Basimeone ba amogela boswa mo gare ga naga ya bone. 
Joshua19:10 Tengwa ya boraro ya tswela Basebulone ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone. Molelwane wa naga ya bone o ne o fitlha kwa Sarite. 
Joshua19:11 Jaanong molelwane wa bone o ne o tlhatlogela kwa bophirimatsatsi kwa Marala, o fitlha kwa Dabešethe, o be o ya kwa nokeng e e mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya motse wa Jokeneame." 
Joshua19:12 Mme go tswa kwa Sarite go ya kwa botlhabatsatsi molelwane o boela kwa nageng ya Kiselothe-Thabore; o be o fetela pele kwa Daberathe le go tlhatlogela kwa Jafia. 
Joshua19:13 Go tswa teng o ne o fetela kwa botlhabatsatsi kwa Gathe-Hefere le kwa Ethe-Kasine, o ya kwa Rimone, o be o sokologela kwa motseng wa Hanea." 
Joshua19:14 Jaanong molelwane o o potologa mo ntlheng ya bokone, o ya kwa Hanathone, o be o felela mo mogorogorong wa Ifethagele." 
Joshua19:15 Metse ya teng e le Katathe le Nahalale le Simerone le Itala le Betleheme, e bong metse e le 12 kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:16 Ke yona kabelo ya Basebulone ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, metse eo le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:17 Tengwa ya bone ya tswela Isašare, e bong Baisašare ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone." 
Joshua19:18 Mo nageng ya bone go ne go le Iserele le Kesulothe le Suneme 
Joshua19:19 le Hafaraime le Sione le Anaharathe 
Joshua19:20 le Rabithe le Kišione le Ebese 
Joshua19:21 le Remethe le Enganime le Enata le Bethe-Phasese. 
Joshua19:22 Naga ya bone e ne e fitlha kwa Thabore le kwa Sahasima le kwa Betšhemeše. Naga ya bone e be e felela kwa Joretane. E ne e le metse e le 16 kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua19:23 Ke yona kabelo ya lotso lwa Baisašare ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, metse eo le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:24 Tengwa ya botlhano ya tswela lotso lwa Baasere ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone. 
Joshua19:25 Naga ya bone e ne e le Helekathe le Hali le Betene le Agešafe 
Joshua19:26 le Alamelege le Ameate le Mišeale; e ne e fitlha kwa dithabeng tsa Karemele fa lewatleng le kwa Sigore-Lebenathe. 
Joshua19:27 Jaanong molelwane o ne o boela kwa botlhabatsatsi kwa Bethe-Dagone, o ama Sebulone le mogorogoro wa Ifethagele kwa bokone, o be o ya kwa Bethemeke le kwa Nehiele, o fetela pele mo ntlheng ya bokone kwa Kabule" 
Joshua19:28 le Eberone le Rehobe le Hamone le Kana go ya go fitlha kwa Sitone yo mogolo. 
Joshua19:29 Jaanong molelwane o ne o sokologela kwa Rama le go fitlha kwa motseng o o femetsweng wa Tiro; molelwane o be o thelela o ya kwa Hosa, o be o felela fa lewatleng. Le Mahalebe le Agesibe" 
Joshua19:30 le Uma le Afeke le Rehobe. E ne e le metse e le 22 kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua19:31 Ke yona kabelo ya lotso lwa Baasere ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, metse eo le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:32 Tengwa ya borataro ya tswela Banafetale ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone. 
Joshua19:33 Molelwane wa bone o ne o tswa kwa Helefe le kwa setlhareng sa eike se se kwa Saananime, o ya kwa Atami-Nekebe le Jabenele go fitlha kwa Lakhume, o felela kwa Joretane." 
Joshua19:34 Gape molelwane o ne o boela kwa bophirimatsatsi kwa Asenothe-Thabore; go tswa teng o ne o fetela pele kwa Hukoka, o amana le Sebulone kwa borwa, o amana le Asere kwa bophirimatsatsi; gape le Joretane kwa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi." 
Joshua19:35 Metse ya teng e e femetsweng e ne e le Sidime le Sere le Hamathe le Rakathe le Khinerethe 
Joshua19:36 le Atama le Rama le Hasore 
Joshua19:37 le Keteše le Eterei le Ene-Hasore 
Joshua19:38 le Ireone le Migetalele le Horema le Bethanathe le Betšhemeše. E ne e le metse e le 19 kwa ntle ga metsana ya yona. 
Joshua19:39 Ke yona kabelo ya lotso lwa Banafetale ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, metse eo le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:40 Tengwa ya bosupa ya tswela Badane ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone. 
Joshua19:41 Kabelo ya naga ya bone e ne e na le metse ya Sorea le Ešethaole le Ire-Semese 
Joshua19:42 le Saalabine le Ayalone le Ithela 
Joshua19:43 le Elone le Thimenatha le Ekerone 
Joshua19:44 le Eletheke le Gibethone le Baalathe 
Joshua19:45 le Jehute le Bene-Berake le Gathe-Rimone 
Joshua19:46 le Majarekone le Rakone le naga e e lebaganyeng le Jafo. 
Joshua19:47 Mme naga ya Badane ya ba latlhegela. Ka moo Badane ba bolola, ba tlhasela motse wa Leseme, ba o thopa, ba o bolaya ka bogale jwa tšhaka, ba o rua, ba nna mo go ona. Mme Leseme ba o bitsa Dane ka leina la ga rraabo Dane." 
Joshua19:48 Ke yona kabelo ya lotso lwa Badane ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone, metse eo le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:49 Jaanong e rile ba sena go fetsa go aroganya lefatshe ka fa dikabelong tsa lone, Baiseraele ba naya Jošua morwa Nune kabelo mo gare ga bone." 
Joshua19:50 Ka fa taelong ya Morena ba mo naya motse o a o kopileng wa Thimenatshera mo dithabeng tsa Eferaime. Jaanong a agelela motse oo, a nna mo go ona." 
Joshua19:51 Ke tsona dikabelo tse ba di abetsweng ke Eleasare moperesiti le Jošua morwa Nune le ditlhogo tsa ditshika tsa ditso tsa Baiseraele ka tengwa mo Silo fa pele ga Morena fa mojakong wa Tempelana ya Boipontsho. Ba fetsa jalo go abelana lefatshe. 
Joshua20:1 Jaanong Morena a bua le Jošua a re: 
Joshua20:2 “Bolelela Baiseraele o re: ‘Supang metse ya botshabelo mo go lona e ke buileng le lona ka ga yona ka Moše 
Joshua20:3 gore yo o bolaileng motho ka go fosa, e se ka bomo, a tle a tshabele teng; metse eo e tla nna botshabelo jwa lona go tshaba mmusolosi wa madi." 
Joshua20:4 Jaanong yo o tshabelang kwa go mongwe wa metse eo a a eme fa mojakong wa kgoro ya motse, a bolele kgang ya gagwe mo ditsebeng tsa bagolo ba motse oo, mme a ba mo tsholele kwa go bone mo motseng, ba mo nee manno gore a nne nabo." 
Joshua20:5 Mme e re fa mmusolosi wa madi a mo latelela, a ba se ka ba neela mmolai mo diatleng tsa gagwe; gonne o bolaile mongwe ka ene ka go sa itse, o ne a sa mo tlhoa." 
Joshua20:6 Jaanong a a nne mo motseng oo go ya a be a eme fa pele ga phuthego go sekisiwa; go ya moperesiti yo mogolo yo o tla bong a le teng ka sebaka seo a be a swe. Ke gona mmolai a ka boelang kwa gae, a tsene mo motseng wa ga gabo le mo lapeng labo, mo motseng o o tshabileng mo go ona.’ ”" 
Joshua20:7 Ke fa ba tlhaola motse wa Keteše kwa Galelea mo dithabeng tsa Nafetale le Šegeme mo dithabeng tsa Eferaime le Khiriathe-Areba o e leng Heberone mo dithabeng tsa Juta. 
Joshua20:8 Mme kwa moseja ga Joretane go lebagana le Jerigo kwa botlhabatsatsi ba supa Besere mo nageng mo lebaleng la lotso lwa Rubene le Ramothe kwa Gileate mo nageng ya lotso lwa Gate le Golane kwa Basane mo nageng ya lotso lwa Manase. 
Joshua20:9 Ke yona metse e e beetsweng Baiseraele botlhe le baeng ba ba nnang mo gare ga bone gore mongwe le mongwe yo o bolaileng motho a sa ikaelela a tshabele teng, mme a se ka a swa ka seatla sa mmusolosi wa madi, a ise a eme fa pele ga phuthego." 
Joshua21:1 Jaanong ditlhogo tsa ditshika tsa Balefi tsa atamela kwa go Eleasare moperesiti le kwa go Jošua morwa Nune le kwa ditlhogong tsa ditshika tsa ditso tsa Iseraele 
Joshua21:2 tsa bua nabo mo Silo mo lefatsheng la Kanana tsa re: “Morena o laetse ka Moše gore re fiwe metse go nna mo go yona le mafulo a yona a diruiwa tsa rona.” 
Joshua21:3 Ke fa Baiseraele ba naya Balefi metse eo le mafulo a yona mo nageng ya bone ka fa taelong ya Morena. 
Joshua21:4 Jaanong tengwa ya tswela ditshika tsa ga Kahathe, mme bomorwa Arone moperesiti ba e leng Balefi ba abelwa metse e le 13 ka tengwa mo lotsong lwa ga Juta le lwa ga Simeone le lwa ga Benyamene." 
Joshua21:5 Mme ba bangwe ba losika lwa ga Kahathe ba abelwa metse e le some ka tengwa ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone mo lotsong lwa ga Eferaime le lwa ga Dane le lwa bontlhanngwe jwa ga Manase. 
Joshua21:6 Ba losika lwa ga Geresone ba abelwa metse e le 13 ka tengwa ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone mo lotsong lwa ga Isašare le lwa ga Asere le lwa ga Nafetale le lwa bontlhanngwe jwa ga Manase kwa Basane. 
Joshua21:7 Ba losika lwa ga Merari ba abelwa metse e le 12 ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone mo lotsong lwa ga Rubene le lwa ga Gate le lwa ga Sebulone. 
Joshua21:8 Baiseraele ba naya Balefi metse eo le mafulo a yona ka go tlhama tengwa jaaka Morena a laetse ka Moše. 
Joshua21:9 Mo lotsong lwa Bajuta le lwa Basimeone ba ne ba ntsha metse e e tla bolelwang ka maina. 
Joshua21:10 Yona ya nna ya bomorwa Arone ba e leng ba ditshika tsa ga Kahathe mongwe wa bomorwa Lefi; gonne tengwa ya ntlha e ne e le ya bone. 
Joshua21:11 Bone ba abelwa motse wa ga Areba, rraagwe Enake, o e leng Heberone mo dithabeng tsa Juta le mafulo a ona mo tikologong ya ona." 
Joshua21:12 Mme masimo a motse oo le metsana ya ona ba ne ba di neile Kalebe morwa Jefune go nna boswa jwa gagwe. 
Joshua21:13 Bomorwa moperesiti Arone ba newa motse wa botshabelo jwa babolai wa Heberone le mafulo a ona le wa Lebena le mafulo a ona 
Joshua21:14 le wa Jathire le mafulo a ona le wa Ešethemoa le mafulo a ona 
Joshua21:15 le wa Holone le mafulo a ona le wa Debire le mafulo a ona 
Joshua21:16 le wa Aine le mafulo a ona le wa Jota le mafulo a ona le wa Betšhemeše le mafulo a ona. Ke metse e e robongwe ya ditso tse pedi tseo. 
Joshua21:17 Mo lotsong lwa Benyamene ba newa motse wa Gibeone le mafulo a ona le wa Geba le mafulo a ona 
Joshua21:18 le wa Anathothe le mafulo a ona le wa Alemone le mafulo a ona. Ke metse e mene. 
Joshua21:19 Metse yotlhe ya bomorwa Arone baperesiti ke metse e le 13 le mafulo a yona. 
Joshua21:20 Ba bangwe ba losika lwa ga Kahathe, e bong Balefi ba ditshika tsa bomorwa Kahathe ba abelwa metse ya bone ka tengwa mo lotsong lwa Eferaime" 
Joshua21:21 Ba newa motse wa botshabelo jwa babolai wa Šegeme le mafulo a ona mo dithabeng tsa Eferaime le wa Gesere le mafulo a ona 
Joshua21:22 le wa Kibesaime le mafulo a ona le wa Bethorone le mafulo a ona. Ke metse e mene. 
Joshua21:23 Mo lotsong lwa Dane ba newa wa Eletheke le mafulo a ona le wa Gibethone le mafulo a ona 
Joshua21:24 le wa Ayalone le mafulo a ona le wa Gathe-Rimone le mafulo a ona. Ke metse e mene. 
Joshua21:25 Mo bontlhanngweng jwa lotso lwa Manase ba newa wa Thaenage le mafulo a ona le wa Ibeleame le mafulo a ona. 
Joshua21:26 Metse yotlhe ya ditshika tsa Bakahathe ba bangwe ke e some le mafulo a yona. 
Joshua21:27 Bageresone ba e leng ba ditshika tsa Balefi mo bontlhanngweng jwa lotso lwa Manase ba fiwa motse wa botshabelo jwa babolai wa Golane kwa Basane le mafulo a ona le wa Beešethera le mafulo a ona. Ke metse e mebedi. 
Joshua21:28 Mo lotsong lwa Isašare ba fiwa wa Kišione le mafulo a ona le wa Daberathe le mafulo a ona 
Joshua21:29 le wa Jaremuthe le mafulo a ona le wa Enganime le mafulo a ona. Ke metse e mene. 
Joshua21:30 Mo lotsong lwa Asere ba fiwa wa Mišeale le mafulo a ona le wa Abetone le mafulo a ona 
Joshua21:31 le wa Helekathe le mafulo a ona le wa Rehobe le mafulo a ona. Ke metse e mene. 
Joshua21:32 Mo lotsong lwa Nafetale ba fiwa motse wa botshabelo jwa babolai wa Keteše mo Galelea le mafulo a ona le wa Hamothe-Dore le mafulo a ona le wa Karethane le mafulo a ona. Ke metse e meraro. 
Joshua21:33 Metse yotlhe ya Bageresone ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone ke metse e le 13 le mafulo a yona. 
Joshua21:34 Mme Balefi ba bangwe gape ba ditshika tsa Bamerari mo lotsong lwa Sebulone ba fiwa wa Jokeneame le mafulo a ona le wa Karetha le mafulo a ona 
Joshua21:35 le wa Dimena le mafulo a ona le wa Nahalale le mafulo a ona. Ke metse e mene. 
Joshua21:36 Kwa moseja ga Joretane go lebagana le Jerigo mo lotsong lwa Rubene ba fiwa motse wa botshabelo jwa babolai wa Besere le mafulo a ona le wa Jahase le mafulo a ona 
Joshua21:37 le wa Ketemothe le mafulo a ona le wa Mefaathe le mafulo a ona. Ke metse e mene. 
Joshua21:38 Mo lotsong lwa Gate ba fiwa motse wa botshabelo jwa babolai wa Ramothe kwa Gileate le mafulo a ona le wa Mahanaime le mafulo a ona 
Joshua21:39 le wa Hešebone le mafulo a ona le wa Jasere le mafulo a ona. Ke metse e mene mmogo. 
Joshua21:40 Metse yotlhe ya Bamerari ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone ba e leng ba ditshika tsa Balefi ba bangwe ke metse e e 12 e ba e bonyeng ka tengwa. 
Joshua21:41 Metse yotlhe ya Balefi mo dinageng tsa Baiseraele e ne e le metse e le 48 le mafulo a yona. 
Joshua21:42 Motse mongwe le mongwe wa metse eo wa bo o na le mafulo a ona mo tikologong ya ona. Go ne go ntse jalo mo metseng eo yotlhe. 
Joshua21:43 Morena o ne a naya Baiseraele lefatshe lotlhe jalo le a neng a le ikanetse borraabo go le ba naya. Ba le rua, ba nna mo go lone." 
Joshua21:44 Morena a ba naya boikhutso mo ntlheng tsotlhe fela jaaka a ikanetse borraabo, go se na ope mo babeng botlhe ba bone yo o ka emelanang nabo. Morena a neela baba botlhe ba bone mo diatleng tsa bone." 
Joshua21:45 Ga go a ka ga tlhaela sepe sa tse di molemo tse Morena o neng a di solofeditse Baiseraele. Tsa dirafala tsotlhe. 
Joshua22:1 Ya ba gona Jošua a bitsang Barubene le Bagate le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase 
Joshua22:2 a ba raya a re: “Lo tshegeditse tsotlhe tse Moše, motlhanka wa Morena, o di lo laetseng, lwa utlwa lentswe la me mo go tsotlhe tse ke di lo laetseng." 
Joshua22:3 Ga lo a ka lwa tlogela ba ga lona mo malatsing a mantsi go fitlha letsatsing la kajeno; lo dirile ka tshwanelo ka fa taolong ya Morena, Modimo wa lona." 
Joshua22:4 Mme jaanong Morena, Modimo wa lona, o ikhutsisitse ba ga lona jaaka a ne a ba solofeditse. Ka moo he sokologang lo boele kwa malapeng a lona kwa lefatsheng la boswa jwa lona jo Moše, motlhanka wa Morena, o bo lo neileng kwa moseja ga Joretane." 
Joshua22:5 Fela lo ele tlhoko thata go dira ka fa taolong le ka fa molaong tse Moše, motlhanka wa Morena, a di o laetseng, gore lo rate Morena, Modimo wa lona, lo sepele mo ditseleng tsotlhe tsa gagwe, lo tshegetse ditaolo tsa gagwe, lo mo ineele, lo mo direle ka bojotlhe jwa dipelo tsa lona le jwa mewa ya lona.”" 
Joshua22:6 Jošua a ba tshegofatsa jalo, a ba naya tsela, mme ba boela kwa malapeng a bone." 
Joshua22:7 Moše o ne a neile ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase boswa kwa Basane; mme Jošua ene a naya ba bontlhanngwe jo bongwe jwa lone boswa mmogo le ba ga bone ka kwano ga Joretane mo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi. Le gona ya re Jošua a ba naya tsela gore ba boele kwa malapeng a bone, a ba tshegofatsa," 
Joshua22:8 a ba raya a re: “Boelang kwa malapeng a lona ka dikhumo tse dikgolo le ka diruiwa tse dintsi thata le ka selefera le ka gouta le ka kgotlho le ka tshipi le ka diaparo tse dintsi gagolo, lo kgaogane tse lo di thopileng mo babeng ba lona le ba ga lona.”" 
Joshua22:9 Ke fa Barubene le Bagate le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase ba tlogela Baiseraele kwa Silo yo o mo lefatsheng la Kanana, ba boela kwa lefatsheng la Gileate kwa lefatsheng la boswa jwa bone le ba agileng mo go lone ka fa taelong ya Morena ka Moše." 
Joshua22:10 Jaanong ya re ba fitlha kwa marakeng a dithako fa Joretane a a mo lefatsheng la Kanana, Barubene le Bagate le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase ba aga aletare teng fa thoko ga Joretane, ya nna aletare e kgolo e e bonalang kwa kgakala." 
Joshua22:11 Mme Baiseraele ba utlwa go twe: “Bonang, Barubene le Bagate le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase ba agile aletare mo lefatsheng la Kanana kwa marakeng a dithako fa Joretane ka kwano mo ntlheng ya Baiseraele.”" 
Joshua22:12 Ya re Baiseraele ba utlwa jalo, phuthego yotlhe ya bone ya phuthegela kwa Silo gore ba ba bololele ka mephato." 
Joshua22:13 Mme Baiseraele ba roma moperesiti Phinehase morwa Eleasare kwa go Barubene le Bagate le bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase kwa lefatsheng la Gileate. 
Joshua22:14 A ya a na le dikgosana di le some, lotso longwe le longwe lwa Baiseraele lo ntshitse kgosana e le nngwe ya malapa a lone. Nngwe le nngwe ya tsona e ne e le tlhogo ya dikgoro tsa bone mo ditsong tsa Iseraele." 
Joshua22:15 Jaanong ya re ba fitlha kwa go Barubene le Bagate le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase kwa lefatsheng la Gileate, ba bua nabo ba re:" 
Joshua22:16 “Phuthego yotlhe ya Morena e buile jaana ya re: ‘Boikanyologo jo ke jo bo ntseng jang jo lo tlhanogetseng Modimo wa Iseraele ka jona mo lo bileng lwa ikepa mo Moreneng kajeno ka go ikagela aletare le ka go tsogela Morena kajeno? 
Joshua22:17 A molato wa Pheore ga o ise o re lekane, o re iseng re o tlhape go fitlha letsatsing la kajeno, le fa petso e wetse phuthego ya Morena?" 
Joshua22:18 Mme a lona lo rata go ikepa mo Moreneng kajeno? Ruri, fa lo tsogela Morena kajeno, kamoso o tla tukela phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele bogale!" 
Joshua22:19 Fa lo bona gore lefatshe la boswa jwa lona le itshekologile, tshelelang kwano lefatsheng le e leng la Morena le Tempelana ya Morena e leng mo go lone, lo age mo gare ga rona, mme lo se ka lwa tsogela Morena, le e seng go tsogela rona ka go ikagela aletare kwa ntle ga aletare ya Morena, Modimo wa rona." 
Joshua22:20 A ga ke re, e rile Agane morwa Sera a dirile ka boikanyologo ka go utswa tse di hutseditsweng go fisiwa, bogale jwa Morena jwa wela phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele? Le gona ga a ka a swa a le esi ka ntlha ya molato wa gagwe.’ ”" 
Joshua22:21 Ke fa Barubene le Bagate le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa Manase ba fetola ba raya ditlhogo tsa ditso tsa Iseraele ba re: 
Joshua22:22 “Modimo o o thata, Morena Modimo o o thata, Morena ene o a itse; Baiseraele le bone ba tla itse: Fa re dirile jalo ka go tsogela Morena le ka go mo tlogela, foo a a se ka a re thusa ka letsatsi le!" 
Joshua22:23 Fa re ikagetse aletare go ikepa mo Moreneng fa e le go baya ditlhabelo tsa phiso le ditshupelo tsa dijo mo go yona fa e le go baya ditlhabelo tsa tebogo mo go yona foo a Morena ka esi a re beletse molato oo! 
Joshua22:24 Nnyaya! Re dirile jalo ka go boifa selo se le sengwe fela ra re: Ka metlha e e tlang bana ba lona ba ka botsa bana ba rona ba re: ‘Lo kopanelang le Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele?" 
Joshua22:25 Kana Morena o beile molelwane wa Joretane fa gare ga rona le lona Barubene le lona Bagate! Lona ga lo na kabelo mo Moreneng!’ Mme bana ba lona ba ka timetsa bana ba rona jalo gore ba se ka ba tlhola ba boifa Morena. 
Joshua22:26 Ke ka moo re rileng: ‘A re ke re itireleng sesupo ka go aga aletare. Ga se ya ditlhabelo tse di fisiwang ga se ya ditlhabelo tsa tebogo! 
Joshua22:27 Ke bosupi fa gare ga rona le lona le fa gare ga ditshika tsa rona sehularong sa rona jwa go re, re tla tlhoafalela tirelo ya Morena fa pele ga gagwe ka ditlhabelo tsa phiso tsa rona le ka ditlhabelo tsa boitumelo tsa rona le ka ditlhabelo tsa tebogo tsa rona le bosupi jwa go re, bana ba lona ba se ka ba raya bana ba rona ka metlha e e tlang ba re: Ga lo ba Morena!’" 
Joshua22:28 Rona ra re: E tle e re ka metlha e e tlang, fa ba ka bua jalo le rona gongwe le bana ba rona, re tle re re: ‘Lebang moago wa aletare ya Morena e borraetsho ba e dirileng: Ga se ya ditlhabelo tsa phiso ga se ya ditlhabelo tsa tebogo ke bosupi fela fa gare ga rona le lona.’" 
Joshua22:29 A go nne kgakala le rona go ka tsogela Morena le go ka ikepa mo Moreneng kajeno ka go aga aletare ya ditlhabelo tsa phiso le ya ditshupelo tsa dijo le ya ditlhabelo tsa tebogo kwa ntle ga aletare ya Morena, Modimo wa rona, e e fa pele ga Tempelana ya ona.”" 
Joshua22:30 Ya re Phinehase moperesiti le bagolo ba phuthego, e bong ditlhogo tsa ditso tsa Iseraele tse di nang nae ba utlwa mafoko a a builweng ke Barubene le Bagate le Bamanase, a ba kgatlha." 
Joshua22:31 Mme moperesiti Phinehase morwa Eleasare a raya Barubene le Bagate le Bamanase a re: “Kajeno re a lemoga gore Morena o na le rona. Gonne tse lo di dirileng e ne e se tsa go tlogela Morena ka boikanyologo. Jaanong lo pholositse Baiseraele mo diatleng tsa Morena.” 
Joshua22:32 Ke fa moperesiti Phinehase morwa Eleasare le dikgosana ba tlogela Barubene le Bagate ba boa kwa lefatsheng la Gileate, ba boela kwa lefatsheng la Kanana kwa Baiseraeleng, ba ba begela mafoko ao." 
Joshua22:33 A kgatlha Baiseraele, mme Baiseraele ba leboga Modimo; ba se ka ba tlhola ba re, ba ba bololela ka mephato go senya lefatshe le Barubene le Bagate ba agileng mo go lone." 
Joshua22:34 Mme Barubene le Bagate ba bitsa aletare e “Sesupo”. Gonne ba re: “Ke bosupi fa gare ga rona jwa go re: Morena ke ene Modimo.” 
Joshua23:1 E rile malatsi a mantsi a sena go feta, mme Morena a sena go agisa Baiseraele fa pele ga baba botlhe ba bone mo tikologong, Jošua ya bo e le monna mogolo, a tsofetse thata." 
Joshua23:2 Ke fa Jošua a bitsa Baiseraele botlhe le bagolo ba bone le ditlhogo tsa bone le baatlhodi ba bone le bakwaledi ba bone, a ba raya a re: “Ke monna mogolo, ke setse ke tsofetse." 
Joshua23:3 Lona ka losi lo bonye tsotlhe tse Morena, Modimo wa lona, o di diretseng ditšhaba tsotlhe tseo fa pele ga lona; gonne Morena, Modimo wa lona, o ne wa lo tlhabanela ka osi." 
Joshua23:4 Bonang, ditšhaba tse di setseng tse ke di lo abetse ka tengwa, lotso longwe le longwe lwa abelwa boswa jwa lone mmogo le ditšhaba tsotlhe tse ke di nyeleditseng go simolola kwa Joretane go ya go fitlha kwa lewatleng le legolo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi." 
Joshua23:5 Mme Morena, Modimo wa lona, ka osi o tla ba tshabisa fa pele ga lona, o ba leleka gore ba falale fa pele ga lona; lo tla rua lefatshe la bone jaaka Morena, Modimo wa lona, o lo solofeditse." 
Joshua23:6 Fela tiang thata go tshegetsa tsotlhe le go dira tsotlhe tse di kwadilweng mo lokwalong lwa molao wa ga Moše; se fapogeng mo go ona e seng ka go ya le letsogo le le jang le e seng ka go ya le la molema 
Joshua23:7 gore lo se ka lwa tlhakatlhakana le ditšhaba tseo tse di setseng mo go lona le e seng go umaka maina a medimo ya bone le e seng go ikana ka yona le e seng go e direla, le e seng go e obamela." 
Joshua23:8 Mme lo ineele Morena, Modimo wa lona, jaaka lo dirile go fitlha mo letsatsing la kajeno." 
Joshua23:9 Ka moo Morena o lelekile ditšhaba tse dikgolo tse di thata fa pele ga lona go se na ope yo o kgonneng go emelana le lona go fitlha letsatsing la kajeno. 
Joshua23:10 Monna a le mongwe wa lona o ne a khutšhela ba le sekete; gonne Morena, Modimo wa lona, o ne o lo tlhabanela ka osi jaaka o lo solofeditse." 
Joshua23:11 Itlhokomeleng thata ka ntlha ya maphelo a lona gore lo rate Morena, Modimo wa lona." 
Joshua23:12 Gonne fa lo ka boa ka morago, lwa kopana le masalela a ditšhaba tse, tse di setseng mo go lona, lwa nyalana nabo, lwa tlhakatlhakana nabo," 
Joshua23:13 foo itsetseng ruri gore Morena, Modimo wa lona, ga a kitla a tlhola a leleka ditšhaba tse fa pele ga lona, mme di tla lo fetogela serai le thaelo le thupa e e itayang ditlhakore tsa lona le mitlwa mo matlhong a lona go ya go fitlhelela lo latlhega, lo ntshiwa mo lefatsheng le le molemo le, le Morena, Modimo wa lona, o le lo neileng." 
Joshua23:14 “Bonang, nna kajeno ke wela mo tseleng ya batho botlhe, mme lo tshwanetse go lemoga ka pelo yotlhe le ka mowa otlhe, fa go sa tlhaela sepe sa dilo tsotlhe tse di molemo, tse Morena, Modimo wa lona, o di lo solofeditseng. Di lo dirafaletse tsotlhe. Ga go a tlhokafala sepe sa tsona." 
Joshua23:15 Dilo tsotlhe tse di molemo tse Morena, Modimo wa lona, o neng o di lo solofeditse di lo dirafaletse! Mme Morena o tla lo dirafaletsa dilo tsotlhe tse di bosula fela jalo go ya go fitlhelela a be a lo nyeletse, a lo tlose mo nageng e e molemo e, e Morena, Modimo wa lona, o e lo neileng" 
Joshua23:16 fa lo ka senya kgolagano ya Morena, Modimo wa lona, e o e lo laetseng lwa ya lwa direla medimo e sele lwa e obamela; foo bogale jwa Morena bo tla lo tukela, mme lo tla latlhega ka pele, lo tlosiwa mo lefatsheng le le molemo le o le lo neileng.”" 
Joshua24:1 Jošua a ba a phuthela ditso tsotlhe tsa Iseraele kwa Šegeme, a bitsa bagolo ba Baiseraele le ditlhogo tsa bone le baatlhodi ba bone le bakwaledi ba bone. Ba tla ba eme fa pele ga Modimo." 
Joshua24:2 Ke fa Jošua a raya morafe otlhe a re: “Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana a re: ‘Bogologolo borraeno ba ne ba agile kwa moseja ga noka ya Ferathe, e bong Thara rraagwe Aborahame le rraagwe Nahore, ba direla medimo e sele." 
Joshua24:3 Mme ke tsere rraeno Aborahame kwa moseja ga noka ya Ferathe, ka mo tsamaisa mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Kanana, ka atisa losika lwa gagwe, ka mo naya Isaka." 
Joshua24:4 Mme Isaka ka mo naya Jakobe le Esau. Ka naya Esau dithaba tsa Seire gore e nne tsa gagwe. Mme Jakobe le bana ba gagwe ba ya kwa Egepeto. 
Joshua24:5 Ka roma Moše le Arone, ka betsa Baegepeto jaaka ke dirile mo go bone. Morago ga moo ka lo ntsha teng." 
Joshua24:6 Ka ntsha borraeno kwa Egepeto, lwa fitlha fa lewatleng, mme Baegepeto ba latelela borraeno ka dikoloi tsa ntwa le ka bapalami kwa Lewatleng la Motlhaka." 
Joshua24:7 Ke fa ba lelela Moreneng, mme a baya lefifi fa gare ga lona le Baegepeto, a ba nwetsa mo lewatleng, la ba bipa. Matlho a lona a bonye tse ke di diretseng Baegepeto. Jaanong lwa nna mo sekakeng malatsi a mantsi." 
Joshua24:8 “ ‘Morago ga moo ka lo isa kwa lefatsheng la Baamori ba ba neng ba agile kwa moseja ga Joretane; ba tlhabana le lona, mme ka ba neela mo diatleng tsa lona, lwa thopa lefatshe la bone, ka ba nyeletsa fa pele ga lona." 
Joshua24:9 Ga tsoga Balake morwa Siphore, kgosi ya Moabe, a lwa le Iseraele; a roma a bitsa Bileame morwa Beore gore a lo hutse." 
Joshua24:10 Mme ka gana go utlwa Bileame, mo a bileng a lo tshegofatsa; ka lo pholosa jalo mo diatleng tsa gagwe." 
Joshua24:11 Mme ya re lo tshela Joretane, lo fitlha kwa Jerigo, beng ba Jerigo ba tlhabana le lona, bone Baamori le Baferesi le Bakanana le Bahethe le Bagiregasi le Bahewi le Bajebusi, mme ka ba neela mo diatleng tsa lona." 
Joshua24:12 Ka roma mefu, ya lo etelela pele, ya ba leleka gore ba lo tshabe jaaka dikgosi tse pedi tsa Baamori, e se ka ditšhaka tsa lona le e seng ka mara a lona." 
Joshua24:13 Ka lo naya lefatshe le lo sa itapisang ka lone le metse e lo sa e agang; lo nna mo go yona. Lo ja masimo a moweine le ditlhare tsa olefa tse lo sa di jwalang.’ 
Joshua24:14 “Jaanong he, boifang Morena, lo mo direle ka nnete le ka boikanyego! Tlosang medimo e borraeno ba neng ba e direla kwa moseja ga noka ya Ferathe le kwa Egepeto, lo direle Morena." 
Joshua24:15 Mme fa e le bosula mo matlhong a lona go direla Morena, itlhopheleng kajeno yo lo ratang go mo direla, a medimo e borraeno ba neng ba e direla ba le kwa moseja ga noka ya Ferathe kampo medimo ya Baamori ba lo agileng mo lefatsheng la bone, mme nna le ba lapa la me re tla direla Morena.”" 
Joshua24:16 Ke fa morafe o araba o re: “A go nne kgakala le rona go ka tlogela Morena le go ka direla medimo e sele. 
Joshua24:17 Gonne Morena ke Modimo wa rona; ke ona o o re ntshitseng le borraetsho kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto kwa ntlong ya botlhanka; ke ona o o dirileng ditshupo tse dikgolo tsele mo matlhong a rona; ke ona o o re bolokileng mo tseleng yotlhe e re e tsamaileng le mo merafeng yotlhe e re neng re e raletse. 
Joshua24:18 Ke ene Morena yo o lelekileng merafe yotlhe eo le Baamori, baagi ba lefatshe le fa pele ga rona. Le rona re rata go direla Morena; gonne ke ene Modimo wa rona.”" 
Joshua24:19 Mme Jošua a raya morafe a re: “Ga lo ne lo kgona go direla Morena; gonne ene ke Modimo o o boitshepo, ke Modimo o o lefufa; ga o kitla o lo itshwarela ditlolo tsa lona le maleo a lona." 
Joshua24:20 Gonne fa lo ka tlogela Morena, lwa direla medimo e sele, o tla lo fetogela, a lo direla tse di botlhoko, a lo nyeletsa a sena go lo direla tse di molemo.”" 
Joshua24:21 Mme morafe wa raya Jošua wa re: “Nnyaya, re tla direla Morena.”" 
Joshua24:22 Ke fa Jošua a raya morafe a re: “Lona lo itshupela ka losi, fa lo itlhophetse Morena go mo direla.” Ba re: “Ee, re a itshupela.”" 
Joshua24:23 “Ka moo he tlosang medimo e sele e e mo go lona, mme a dipelo tsa lona di sekamele ka fa Moreneng, Modimo wa Iseraele!”" 
Joshua24:24 Ke fa morafe o raya Jošua o re: “Re tla direla Morena, Modimo wa rona, re utlwa lentswe la ona.”" 
Joshua24:25 Jošua a tlhomamisetsa morafe kgolagano ya Modimo jalo ka letsatsi leo, a o beela molao le ngwao kwa Šegeme." 
Joshua24:26 Jošua a ba a kwala mafoko ao mo lokwalong lwa molao wa Modimo, a ba a tsaya letlapa le legolo, a le tlhoma teng fa tlase ga setlhare sa eike, se se fa Tempelaneng ya Morena." 
Joshua24:27 Mme Jošua a raya morafe otlhe a re: “Bonang, letlapa le e tla nna mosupi ka ga rona; gonne le utlwile mafoko otlhe a Morena a o a buileng le rona; le gona e tla nna mosupi ka ga lona, e se re gongwe lwa itatola Modimo wa lona.”" 
Joshua24:28 Ke fa Jošua a naya morafe tsela, mongwe le mongwe a boela kwa legaeng la gagwe." 
Joshua24:29 Mme morago ga dilo tseo Jošua morwa Nune motlhanka wa Morena a swa a le dinyaga di le 110. 
Joshua24:30 Ba mo fitlha mo nageng ya gagwe kwa Thimenatshera e e kwa dithabeng tsa Eferaime ntlheng ya bokone ya thaba ya Gaaše. 
Joshua24:31 Baiseraele ba ne ba direla Morena ka malatsi otlhe a ga Jošua le ka malatsi otlhe a bagolo ba ba neng ba phela sebaka se seleele sehularong sa ga Jošua, e le ba ba itseng ditiro tsotlhe tsa Morena tse o di diretseng Baiseraele." 
Joshua24:32 Le marapo a ga Josefa a Baiseraele ba duleng nao kwa Egepeto ba a fitlha mo Šegeme mo karolong ya tshimo e Jakobe o neng a e rekile mo go bomorwa Hemore rraagwe Šegeme ka dipapetlana tsa madi di le kgolo, a ba a e naya Josefa go nna boswa." 
Joshua24:33 Le Eleasare morwa Arone, e rile a swa, ba mo fitlha mo motseng wa Gibea wa ga Phinehase morwawe, o a o filweng kwa dithabeng tsa ga Eferaime." 
Judges1:1 E rile morago ga loso lwa ga Jošua Baiseraele ba botsa Morena ba re: “Ke mang mo go rona yo o tshwanetseng go bololela Bakanana pele go tlhabana nabo?” 
Judges1:2 Morena a re: “A go bolole Juta! Bonang, ke neetse lefatshe mo diatleng tsa gagwe.”" 
Judges1:3 Ke fa Juta a raya mogolowe Simeone a re: “Bololela le nna kwa nageng ya me, re ye go tlhabana le Bakanana! Le nna ke tla ya nao kwa nageng ya gago.” Mme Simeone a ya nae." 
Judges1:4 Ya re Bajuta ba bolola Morena a neela Bakanana le Baferesi mo diatleng tsa bone; ba bolaya banna ba le 10 000 ba bone kwa Beseke. 
Judges1:5 Ba fitlhela kgosi Atoni-Beseke a le mo Beseke, ba tlhabana nae, ba fenya Bakanana bao le Baferesi bao." 
Judges1:6 Fela Atoni-Beseke a tshaba, mme ba mo latelela, ba mo tshwara, ba mo kgaola menwana ya kgonotšwe ya diatla le ya dinao." 
Judges1:7 Ke fa Atoni-Beseke a re: “Dikgosi tse di 70 tse di kgaotsweng menwana ya kgonotšwe ya diatla le ya dinao di ne di sela matlhotlhora fa tlase ga lobati lwa bojelo lwa me. Jaanong Modimo o mpusoloseditse ka tse ke di dirileng.” Ba mo isa kwa Jerusalema, a swela gona." 
Judges1:8 Jaanong Bajuta ba tlhasela Jerusalema, ba mo thopa, ba bolaya baagi ba teng ka bogale jwa tšhaka, ba fisa motse ka molelo." 
Judges1:9 Morago ga moo Bajuta ba ya go tlhabana le Bakanana ba ba neng ba agile kwa dithabeng le kwa borwa le mo nageng e e kwa tlase. 
Judges1:10 Bajuta ba be ba bololela Bakanana ba ba neng ba agile kwa Heberone – leina la Heberone pele e ne e le Khiriathe-Areba – ba fenya Sesai le Ahimane le Thalemai. 
Judges1:11 Go tswa teng ba bololela baagi ba Debire, mme leina la Debire pele e ne e le Khiriatshefere." 
Judges1:12 Ke fa Kalebe a re: “Yo o ka fenyang Khiriatshefere, a mo thopa, ke tla mo neela morwadiake Agesa go nna mosadi wa gagwe.”" 
Judges1:13 Ke fa Otheniele morwa Kenase, monnaa Kalebe, a mo thopa. Jaanong a mo neela morwadie Agesa go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
Judges1:14 Jaanong ya re Agesa a tla kwa go ene, Otheniele a mo tlhotlheletsa gore a lope tshimo mo go rraagwe. Ke fa Agesa a fologa ka pele mo eseleng, mme Kalebe a mmotsa a re: “Go rileng?”" 
Judges1:15 Agesa a mo raya a re: “Mphe lesego la go ntsamaisa sentle; e re ka o mpeile kwa nageng e e sekaka ya borwa, ke kopa gore o mphe le metswedi ya metsi.” Ke fa Kalebe a mo naya metswedi e e kwa godimo le e e kwa tlase." 
Judges1:16 Mme bomorwa Hobabe wa Mokeni kgaitsadia mosadi wa ga Moše ba ne ba bolotse kwa Motseng wa Mekolane mmogo le Bajuta, ba ya kwa sekakeng sa Juta se se mo ntlheng ya borwa ya motse wa Arate. Ba ya ba nna mmogo le morafe." 
Judges1:17 Mme Juta a ya a na le Simeone morwa-rraagwe, ba fenya Bakanana ba ba neng ba agile kwa Sefathe; motse o ba o senya ka khutso ya Modimo, ba o taya leina la Horema." 
Judges1:18 Mme Bajuta ba palelwa ke go thopa Gasa le naga ya teng le Ašekalone le naga ya teng le Ekerone le naga ya teng. 
Judges1:19 Mme Morena a bo a na le Bajuta, mo ba bileng ba thopa dithaba; gonne ba ne ba sa kgone go leleka baagi ba naga e e kwa tlase, ka bone ba na le dikoloi tsa ntwa tsa tshipi." 
Judges1:20 Kalebe a abelwa Heberone jaaka Moše a laetse, mme a leleka bomorwa ba bararo ba ga Enake teng." 
Judges1:21 Babenyamene ba se ka ba leleka Bajebusi ba ba neng ba agile kwa Jerusalema. Bajebusi ba nna jalo mmogo le Babenyamene mo Jerusalema go fitlha letsatsing la kajeno. 
Judges1:22 Bajosefa le bone ba ne ba bololela Bethele, mme Morena a bo a na nabo." 
Judges1:23 Jaanong e rile Bajosefa ba ntse ba tlhola Bethele – gale leina la motse oo e ne e le Luse – 
Judges1:24 batlhodi ba bona monna a tswa mo motseng, ba mo raya ba re: “A ko o re bontshe fa go tsenwang teng mo motseng. Foo re tla go direla ka bopelotlhomogi.”" 
Judges1:25 A ba bontsha fa go tsenwang teng mo motseng, mme ba itaya motse ka bogale jwa tšhaka, mme monna yole le ba losika lwa gagwe botlhe ba ba naya tsela." 
Judges1:26 Monna yole a ya kwa lefatsheng la Bahethe, a aga motse, a o bitsa Luse. E sa ntse e le leina la ona le gompieno." 
Judges1:27 Mme Bamanase ba se ka ba leleka baagi ba Betšheane le ba metsana ya teng le ba Thaenage le ba metsana ya teng le ba Dore le ba metsana ya teng le ba Ibeleame le ba metsana ya teng le ba Megito le ba metsana ya teng. Bakanana ba kgona jalo go nna mo lefatsheng le. 
Judges1:28 Mme e rile Baiseraele ba sena go tia, ba dira masalela a Bakanana balala, mme go leleka ba se ka ba ba leleka." 
Judges1:29 Baeferaime le bone ba se ka ba leleka Bakanana ba ba neng ba agile kwa Gesere. Bakanana ba nna mo gare ga bone kwa Gesere. 
Judges1:30 Le Basebulone ba se ka ba leleka baagi ba Kiterone le baagi ba Nahalole, mme Bakanana ba nna mo gare ga bone, ya nna balala." 
Judges1:31 Le Baasere ba se ka ba leleka baagi ba Ako le baagi ba Sitone le ba Ahelabe le ba Agesibe le ba Heleba le ba Afike le ba Rehobe," 
Judges1:32 mme Baasere ba nna mo gare ga Bakanana ba ba neng ba agile mo lefatsheng pele ka ba se ka ba ba leleka. 
Judges1:33 Le Banafetale ba se ka ba leleka baagi ba Betšhemeše le baagi ba Bethanathe; ba nna jalo mo gare ga Bakanana baagi ba lefatshe. Mme baagi ba Betšhemeše le ba Bethanathe ba nna balala ba bone. 
Judges1:34 Mme Baamori ba ne ba patikelela Badane kwa dithabeng, gonne ba ne ba sa ba dumelele go fologela kwa lebaleng." 
Judges1:35 Baamori ba kgona jalo go nna kwa Hare-Herese le kwa Ayalone le kwa Saalebime. Mme diatla tsa Bajosefa tsa ba imela, ba nna balala ba bone." 
Judges1:36 Kana molelwane wa Baamori o ne o tswa kwa Phateng-ya-Diphepheng le kwa Sela, o be o tlhatlogela pele." 
Judges2:1 Moengele wa Morena o ne a bolola kwa Gilegala, a tla kwa Bogime a re: “Ke lo ntshitse kwa Egepeto, ka lo fitlhisa mo lefatsheng le ke neng ke ikanetse borraeno ka lone ka re: ‘Ga nkitla ke senya kgolagano ya me le lona ka bosakhutleng.’" 
Judges2:2 Ka re: ‘Lona lo se ka lwa dira kgolagano le baagi ba lefatshe le, mme lo dige dialetare tsa bone,’ mme lwa se ka lwa utlwa lentswe la me. Ke eng se lo se dirileng?" 
Judges2:3 Ke ka moo le nna ke reng: Ga nkitla ke ba leleka fa pele ga lona gore ba lo bogise, mme medimo ya bone e nne thaelo mo go lona.”" 
Judges2:4 E rile moengele wa Morena a sena go bolelela Baiseraele botlhe mafoko ao batho ba tlhatlosa mantswe, ba lela;" 
Judges2:5 ba taya felo foo leina la Bogime, ba direla Morena ditlhabelo teng." 
Judges2:6 E rile Jošua a sena go naya morafe tsela, mongwe le mongwe a boela kwa nageng ya boswa jwa gagwe go rua lefatshe." 
Judges2:7 Morafe wa direla Morena ka malatsi otlhe a ga Jošua le ka malatsi otlhe a bagolo ba ba neng ba phela sebaka se seleele sehularong sa ga Jošua ba ba bonyeng ditiro tse dikgolo tsotlhe tsa Morena tse o di diretseng Baiseraele. 
Judges2:8 Jaanong e rile Jošua morwa Nune motlhanka wa Morena a sena go swa, a le dinyaga di le 110," 
Judges2:9 ba mo fitlha mo nageng ya boswa jwa gagwe kwa Thimenatherese kwa dithabeng tsa ga Eferaime mo ntlheng ya bokone ya thaba ya Gaaše. 
Judges2:10 Ya re botlhe ba metlha ele ba sena go gorosiwa kwa go borraabo, ga tsoga ba bašwa sehularong sa bone ba ba sa itseng Morena le e seng ditiro tse o di diretseng Baiseraele." 
Judges2:11 Ke fa Baiseraele ba dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena, ba direla boBaale," 
Judges2:12 ba tlogela Morena, Modimo wa borraabo, yo o ba ntshitseng kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto, ba latela medimo e sele, e bong medimo ya merafe e e mo tikologong ya bone, ba e obamela, ba gakatsa Morena ka go dira jalo." 
Judges2:13 Mme e ne ya re fa ba tlogela Morena, ba direla Baale le boAšethorethe," 
Judges2:14 Morena a tukele Baiseraele bogale, a ba neele mo diatleng tsa bathukhuthi, ba ba thukhuthe dilo, a ba rekise mo diatleng tsa baba ba bone tikologong, mo ba neng ba sa tlhole ba kgona go emelana le baba ba bone." 
Judges2:15 Gongwe le gongwe kwa ba neng ba tswela teng seatla sa Morena se ne se lwa nabo go ba direla tse di botlhoko, jaaka Morena a ne a boletse le jaaka Morena a ne a ba ikanetse. Mme e ne ya re fa ba le mo tlalelong e kgolo." 
Judges2:16 Morena a ba tsosetse baatlhodi, ba ba golole mo diatleng tsa bathukhuthi ba bone." 
Judges2:17 Fela le baatlhodi ba bone Baiseraele ba se ka ba ba utlwa; gonne ba ne ba dira boaka ka go latela medimo e sele, ba e obamela. Ba fapoga ka pele mo tseleng e borraabo ba neng ba sepetse mo go yona ka go utlwa ditaolo tsa Morena. Bone ba se ka ba dira jalo." 
Judges2:18 Mme e ne ya re fa Morena a ba tsosetsa baatlhodi, Morena a nne le baatlhodi, a ba golole mo diatleng tsa baba ba bone ka malatsi aotlhe a moatlhodi. Ka gonne Morena o ne a ba tlhomogela pelo, fa ba ledisiwa ke ba ba ba pitlaganyang, ba ba gatelela." 
Judges2:19 Fela e ne ya re fa moatlhodi a swa, ba boele kwa morago, ba senye bogolo go borraabo ka go latela medimo e sele, ba e direle, ba e obamele. Ba se ke ba tlogele sepe sa ditiro tsa bone le sa tsamao ya bone ya botlhogoethata." 
Judges2:20 Ka moo Morena a tukela Baiseraele bogale a re: “E re ka setšhaba se, se tlodile kgolagano ya me e ke e laetseng borraabo, sa se ka sa utlwa lentswe la me," 
Judges2:21 le nna ga nkitla ke tlhola ke leleka ope fa pele ga bone wa ditšhaba tse Jošua o neng a di tlogela, jale fa a swa" 
Judges2:22 gore ke tle ke leke Baiseraele ka tsona, ke bone gore a ba tla tlhokomela ditsela tsa Morena go sepela mo go tsona jaaka borraabo ba di tlhokometse gongwe nnyaya.”" 
Judges2:23 Morena a sadisa ditšhaba tseo jalo, a se ka a di leleka ka pele le e seng go di neela mo diatleng tsa ga Jošua." 
Judges3:1 Mme ditšhaba tse Morena o neng a di sadisa gore ka tsona a leke Baiseraele botlhe ba ba neng ba sa itse dintwa tsotlhe tsa Kanana, ke tse:" 
Judges3:2 (E ne e le ka ntlha ya tlhalefo ya ditshika tsa Baiseraele fela go ba ruta tlhabano; bone fela ba ba neng ba sa e itse pele ga foo.) 
Judges3:3 Ke dikgosi tse tlhano tsa Bafelesita le Bakanana le Basitone le Bahewi botlhe ba ba neng ba agile kwa dithabeng tsa Lebanone go tswa thabeng ya Baale-Heremone go ya go fitlha kwa Hamathe. 
Judges3:4 Tsone tsa sala, e le go leka Baiseraele ka tsone, go tle go bonwe gore a ba tla utlwa ditaolo tsa Morena tse o di laetseng borraabo ka Moše." 
Judges3:5 Jaanong e rile Baiseraele ba ntse ba agile mo gare ga Bakanana le Bahethe le Baamori le Baferesi le Bahewi le Bajebusi," 
Judges3:6 ba tsaya bomorwadia merafe eo go nna basadi ba bone; gape ba neela bomorwa merafe eo bomorwadia-bone, ba be ba direla medimo ya yona." 
Judges3:7 Jaanong Baiseraele ba nna ba dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena, ba lebala Morena, Modimo wa bone, ba direla boBaale le boAšera." 
Judges3:8 Ke fa bogale jwa Morena bo tukela Baiseraele, mme a ba rekisa mo diatleng tsa ga Khušane-Rišathaime, kgosi ya Mesopotamia. Jaanong Baiseraele ba direla Khušane-Rišathaime dinyaga di le robedi." 
Judges3:9 Mme ya re Baiseraele ba lelela Moreneng, a ba tsosetsa mogolodi yo o neng a ba golola, e bong Otheniele, morwa Kenase, monnaa Kalebe." 
Judges3:10 Mowa wa Morena wa tsena mo go ene, a siamisa Baiseraele, a bolola go ya mo ntweng, mme Morena a neela Khušane-Rišathaime kgosi ya Mesopotamia mo diatleng tsa gagwe; letsogo la gagwe la fenya Khušane-Rišathaime." 
Judges3:11 Mme lefatshe la nna mo kagisong dinyaga di le 40. Ke fa Otheniele morwa Kenase a swa. 
Judges3:12 Fela Baiseraele ba boela gape go dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena. Ke fa Morena a tiisa Egelone kgosi ya Moabe gore a ba bogise; ka gonne ba ne ba dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena. 
Judges3:13 A ba a iphuthela Baamone le Baamaleke, a ya go itaya Baiseraele, a thopa Motse wa Mekolane." 
Judges3:14 Jaanong Baiseraele ba direla Egelone kgosi ya Moabe dinyaga di le 18. 
Judges3:15 Mme ya re Baiseraele ba lelela Moreneng a ba tsosetsa gape mopholosi, e bong Ehute, morwa Gera wa Mobenyamene, monna yo o molema. Baiseraele ba ne ba romela lekgetho kwa go Egelone kgosi ya Moabe ka ene." 
Judges3:16 Jaanong Ehute a itirela tšhaka e e magale-mabedi ya boleele jwa letsogo, a e tlama ka fa teng ga diaparo tsa gagwe fa seropeng sa le le jang;" 
Judges3:17 a ba a isa lekgetho kwa go Egelone kgosi ya Moabe. Mme Egelone e ne e le monna yo o nonneng thata. 
Judges3:18 Jaanong ya re a sena go gorosa lekgetho, a felegetsa batho ba ba neng ba rwele lekgetho." 
Judges3:19 Morago a boa kwa ditshwantshong tsa medimo tse di mo Gilegala, a boela kwa kgosing, a feta a re: “Ke go tletse lefoko la sephiri, wena kgosi.” Ke fa e re: “Didimalang!” Mme botlhe ba ba neng ba eme fa go yona ba tswela kwa ntle." 
Judges3:20 Ya re Ehute a tsena kwa go yona, yona ya bo e dutse mo ntlwaneng e e kwa godimo e e tsiditsanyana e e leng ya yona e le yosi. Ehute a re: “Ke go tletse taelo ya Modimo.” Ke fa e nanoga mo sedulong sa yona sa bogosi." 
Judges3:21 Mme Ehute a tsenya letsogo la molema la gagwe, a somola tšhaka fa seropeng sa le le jang, a e tlhaba mo mpeng ya yona." 
Judges3:22 Ya tsena le mhinyana, wa latela bogale. Mme mafura a bipa bogale, ka a se ka a somola tšhaka mo mpeng ya yona, ya phunyeletsa ka kwa morago." 
Judges3:23 Jaanong Ehute a tswela kwa mathuding, a tswala setswalo sa ntlwana e e kwa godimo fa morago ga gagwe, a se lotlela." 
Judges3:24 Ya re a sena go tswela kwa ntle, batlhanka ba yona ba tla, ba bona setswalo sa ntlwana e e kwa godimo se lotletswe ba re: “Kooteng e ithomile fela mo ntlwaneng e e tsiditsanyana.”" 
Judges3:25 Ba e emela sebaka go fitlhelela ba fela pelo, mme ya se ka ya bula setswalo sa ntlwana e e kwa godimo. Jaanong ba tsaya selotlele, ba bula, ba fitlhela morena wa bone a wetse fa fatshe a sule." 
Judges3:26 Mme Ehute o ne a falola, ba sa ntse ba diegile jalo, a feta fa ditshwantshong tsa medimo, a tshabela kwa Seira." 
Judges3:27 Ya re a sena go fitlha, a letsa lonaka mo dithabeng tsa Eferaime. Ke fa Baiseraele ba fologa nae mo dithabeng, ene a ba eteletse pele." 
Judges3:28 Mme a ba raya a re: “Ntshaleng morago, gonne Morena o neetse Bamoabe, baba ba lona, mo diatleng tsa lona.” Ba fologa, ba mo sala morago, ba tseela Bamoabe matsibogo a Joretane, ba sa dumelele ope go tshela." 
Judges3:29 Ka nako eo ba bolaya Bamoabe ba e ka nnang ba le 10 000; botlhe e le batlhabani ba ba tiileng, ga se ka ga falola ope." 
Judges3:30 Bamoabe ba ne ba kokobediwa jalo ka letsatsi leo fa tlase ga dinao tsa Baiseraele, mme lefatshe la nna mo kagisong dinyaga di le 80." 
Judges3:31 Morago ga gagwe ga bo go le Samegare morwa Anathe yo o neng a bolaya banna ba le 600 ba Bafelesita ka lešwane la dipholo. Le ene a golola Baiseraele jalo. 
Judges4:1 Mme e rile Ehute a sena go swa, Baiseraele ba boela gape go dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena." 
Judges4:2 Ke fa Morena a ba rekisa mo diatleng tsa ga Jabine kgosi ya Bakanana, yo mošate wa gagwe e neng e le Hasore. Molaodi wa mephato ya gagwe e ne e le Sisera yo o neng a agile kwa Harošethe wa baheitane." 
Judges4:3 Mme Baiseraele ba lelela Moreneng; gonne Jabine o ne a na le dikoloi tsa ntwa tsa tshipi di le 900, a gatelela Baiseraele ka thata dinyaga di le 20." 
Judges4:4 Jaanong ka sebaka seo Debora moporofeti wa sesadi, mogatsa Laphitothe, a atlhola Baiseraele." 
Judges4:5 O ne a nna fa tlase ga Mokolane wa ga Debora fa gare ga Rama le Bethele mo dithabeng tsa Eferaime, mme Baiseraele ba ntse ba ya kwa go ene, ba batla go sekwa." 
Judges4:6 Jaanong ene a roma, a bitsa Barake morwa Abinoame kwa Keteše nageng ya ga Nafetale, a mo raya a re: “Ruri, Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o go laetse a re: ‘Tloga o ye kwa thabeng ya Thabore, o tsee banna ba le 10 000 ba Banafetale le ba Basebulone ba ye nao." 
Judges4:7 Ke tla gogela Sisera molaodi wa mephato ya ga Jabine kwa go wena kwa nokaneng ya Kisone mmogo le dikoloi tsa ntwa tsa gagwe le bontsi jwa gagwe, ke mo neela mo diatleng tsa gago.’ ”" 
Judges4:8 Barake a mo araba a re: “Fa o ya le nna, ke tla ya; mme fa o sa ye le nna ga ke ye.”" 
Judges4:9 Debora a mo raya a re: “Go siame, ke tla ya nao. Fela foo tlotlo ga e nna ya gago mo tseleng e o e tsamayang; gonne Morena o tla rekisa Sisera mo diatleng tsa mosadi.” Mme Debora a nanoga, a ya le Barake kwa Keteše." 
Judges4:10 Mme Barake a kua Basebulone le Banafetale go tla kwa Keteše, a ba a bolola a na le banna ba le 10 000; le Debora a bolola nae." 
Judges4:11 Jaanong Hebere wa Mokeni o ne a kgaoganye le Bakeni ba e leng bomorwa Hobabe, kgaitsadia mosadi wa ga Moše, a nna a tlhoma tente ya gagwe go ya go fitlha kwa setlhareng sa eike mo Saananime gaufi le Keteše." 
Judges4:12 Ke fa Sisera a begelwa go twe: “Barake morwa Abinoame o tlhatlogetse mo thabeng ya Thabore.” 
Judges4:13 Jaanong Sisera a kua dikoloi tsotlhe tsa ntwa tsa gagwe, e le dikoloi tsa tshipi di le 900 le banna botlhe ba batlhabani ba na nae, a ba bolotsa mo Harošethe wa baheitane, a ba isa kwa nokaneng ya Kisone." 
Judges4:14 Ke fa Debora a raya Barake a re: “Nanoga, gonne ke lone letsatsi le Morena o neetseng Sisera mo diatleng tsa gago ka lone. Ruri, Morena o bolotse, o go etelela pele!” Barake a fologa mo thabeng ya Thabore a na le banna ba le 10 000." 
Judges4:15 Mme Morena a raraanya Sisera le dikoloi tsotlhe tsa ntwa le mephato yotlhe ka bogale jwa tšhaka fa pele ga Barake. Ke fa Sisera a fologa mo koloing, a tshaba ka dinao." 
Judges4:16 Mme Barake a tebela dikoloi tsa ntwa le mephato yotlhe go ya kwa Harošethe wa baheitane; mephato yotlhe ya ga Sisera ya wa ka bogale jwa tšhaka, ga se ka ga sala ope." 
Judges4:17 Sisera ene a tshaba ka dinao, a fitlha kwa tenteng ya ga Jaele mosadi wa ga Hebere wa Mokeni. Gonne go ne go le kagiso fa gare ga Jabine kgosi ya Hasore le ba lapa la ga Hebere wa Mokeni." 
Judges4:18 Jaele a tswela kwa ntle, a kgatlhantsha Sisera, a mo raya a re: “Fapogela kwano, morena wa me, fapogela go nna, o se boife!” A fapogela kwa go ene mo tenteng, mme Jaele a mo khurumetsa ka kobo." 
Judges4:19 Sisera a mo raya a re: “A ko o nnose metsinyana, gonne ke nyorilwe.” Jaele a thibolola lekuka la mašwi, a mo nosa, a ba a mo khurumetsa gape." 
Judges4:20 Sisera a mo raya a re: “Ema fa mojakong wa tente, mme e re fa monna a ka tla, a go botsa a re: ‘A go monna ka moo?’ o fetole o re: ‘Ga a yo.’ ”" 
Judges4:21 Mme Jaele mosadi wa ga Hebere a tsaya lomapo lwa tente, a tshwara noto ka seatla, a tsena kwa go ene sephiring, a mo kokotela lomapo mo letlhwaneng, lwa ba lwa phololela, lwa tsena fa fatshe, ene a ntse a thulametse, a feletswe ke thata, mme a swa." 
Judges4:22 Ya baa gona go fitlhang Barake, a lateletse Sisera, mme Jaele a tswela kwa ntle, a mo kgatlhantsha, a mo raya a re: “Tlaya, ke tla go bontsha monna yo ò mmatlang.” A tsena kwa go ene, a fitlhela Sisera a namaletse fa fatshe a sule; lomapo lo le mo letlhwaneng la gagwe." 
Judges4:23 Modimo o ne wa kokobetsa Jabine kgosi ya Bakanana jalo fa pele ga Baiseraele ka letsatsi leo. 
Judges4:24 Mme mabogo a Baiseraele a nna a tswelela pele go imela Jabine kgosi ya Bakanana ga tsamaya ba nyeletsa Jabine kgosi ya Bakanana. 
Judges5:1 Ka letsatsi leo Debora le Barake morwa Abinoame ba boka ba re: 
Judges5:2 “E re ka bagogi ba ne ba etelela Baiseraele pele, le morafe o utlwa ka bopelotshweu, bokang Morena!" 
Judges5:3 Utlwang lona dikgosi! Sekegang ditsebe lona dikgosana! Nna ke tla opelela Morena, ke leletsa Morena Modimo wa Iseraele." 
Judges5:4 Morena, e rile fa o tswa kwa Seire, ya re o gata o tlhaga nageng ya Etomo lefatshe la roroma, magodimo a rotha, maru a rotha metsi." 
Judges5:5 Dithaba tsa reketla fa pele ga Morena, thaba eo ya Sinai fa pele ga Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele." 
Judges5:6 Mo malatsing a ga Samegare morwa Anathe, mo malatsing a ga Jaele ditsela di ne di le senya; baeti ba tsamaya mo ditselaneng tse di kwa thoko tse di metsopodia." 
Judges5:7 Go ne go tlhokafala babusi mo Iseraeleng, ba tlhokafala ga tsamaya ka tsoga, nna Debora, ka tsoga ke le Mma-Iseraele." 
Judges5:8 E rile ba ineela medimo e mešwa, ga nna tlhabano mo dikgorong; thebe le lerumo tsa bo di sa bonale mo diketeng tse di 40 tsa Iseraele." 
Judges5:9 Pelo ya me e goga le balaodi ba Iseraele ba ba ineetseng ka bopelotshweu mo gare ga morafe. Bakang Morena! 
Judges5:10 Ba lo palameng diesele tse ditshwaana, ba lo dutseng mo diphateng tse di logilweng, ba lo sepelang mo tseleng: Akanyang!" 
Judges5:11 Ka ntlha ya mantswe a ba ba binang mo gare ga digopo, ba boka teng ditiro tse di siameng tsa Morena, ditiro tsa pholoso tsa puso ya gagwe mo Iseraeleng. Ke fa morafe wa Morena o fologela kwa dikgorong." 
Judges5:12 Tsoga! Tsoga, Debora! Tsoga, tsoga, o tlhabe sefela! Nanoga, Barake, o ise batshwarwi ba gago mo botshwarong, wena morwa Abinoame." 
Judges5:13 Ke fa masalela a batlotlegi ba morafe a fologa; Morena a fologa go nthusa a le mo gare ga bagale. 
Judges5:14 Ba tswa kwa Eferaime ba ba agileng mo nageng ya Amaleke; Babenyamene ba go latela mo gare ga batlhabani ba gago; balaodi ba fologa kwa Magire; ba ba bololang ba latetse thobane ya molaodi wa batlhabani, ba tswa kwa Sebulone." 
Judges5:15 Balaodi ba Isašare ba tla le Debora; Barake a tla jaaka Isašare. Ba romelwa mogorogorong, ba mo setse morago. Kwa dinageng tsa ga Rubene ga bo go le maikgogomoso a magolo a dipelo fela." 
Judges5:16 Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa o ne o itulela kwa merakeng go utlwelela melodi kwa matsomaneng? Kwa dinageng tsa ga Rubene ga bo go le dikakanyo tse dikgolo tsa dipelo fela." 
Judges5:17 Gileate o ne a itulela kwa moseja ga Joretane. Ke eng fa Dane a le mo mekorong? Asere a itunna fa losing lwa lewatle, a nna kwa matsibogong a lone." 
Judges5:18 Basebulone ke batho ba ba neelang maphelo a bone mo losong; le Banafetale ba ntse jalo mo dithoteng tsa naga. 
Judges5:19 Ga tla dikgosi, tsa tlhabana; foo ga tlhabana dikgosi tsa Kanana kwa Thaenage fa metsing a Megito – di sa bone thopo ya selefera." 
Judges5:20 Dinaledi tsa tlhabana di tswa kwa legodimong; tsa tlhabana le Sisera di tswa mo ditseleng tsa tsona. 
Judges5:21 Nokana ya Kisone ya ba tsaya. Ke nokana ya ditlhabano, nokana ya Kisone! Jaa moepelane, mowa wa me!" 
Judges5:22 Foo ditlhako tsa dipitse tsa tiba ka go patakanya, go patakanya ga dipitse tse di lebelo tsa gagwe." 
Judges5:23 Hutsang motse wa Merose, go bua Moengele wa Morena; hutsang lo hutse baagi ba ona, ka ba se ka ba tla go thusa Morena, go thusa Morena mo gare ga bagale." 
Judges5:24 A go tshegofadiwe Jaele bogolo go basadi botlhe, ene mosadi wa ga Hebere wa Mokeni! A a tshegofadiwe mo lapeng bogolo go basadi botlhe!" 
Judges5:25 Sisera a kopa metsi; Jaele a mo naya mašwi, a tlisa madila ka mogopo wa batlotlegi." 
Judges5:26 A isa letsogo kwa lomapong, le le jang kwa notong ya badiri; a rutha Sisera, a pšhwetlakanya tlhogo ya gagwe, a e silakanya; a mo phololetsa letlhwana." 
Judges5:27 A idibala, a wela fa fatshe, a namalala fa gare ga dinao tsa gagwe; a idibala, a wela fa fatshe fa gare ga dinao tsa gagwe. Fa a neng a idibala teng, a namalala a bolailwe." 
Judges5:28 Mmaagwe Sisera a okomela ka fenstere, a kua fa phatlheng ya phefo a re: ‘Ke eng fa koloi ya gagwe e diega go tla? Ke eng fa medumo ya dipitse tsa gagwe e sa akofe?’" 
Judges5:29 Ba ba botlhale ba bahumagadi ba gagwe ba mo fetola; le ene ka esi a fetola mafoko a gagwe a re: 
Judges5:30 ‘Kooteng ba bonye thopo, ba e abelana gore monna mongwe le mongwe a bone mosetsana, gongwe basetsana ba le babedi; thopo ya diaparo tse di marabata tsa ga Sisera; thopo ya diaparo tse di marabata, lesela le le marabata, masela a a marabata a le mabedi ke thopo ya molala wa me.’" 
Judges5:31 A baba botlhe ba gago, Morena, ba latlhege jalo! Mme ba ba go ratang ba tshwana le letsatsi, fa le tlhaba ka kgalalelo ya lone.” Jaanong lefatshe la nna mo kagisong dinyaga di le 40." 
Judges6:1 Mme Baiseraele ba fela ba dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena. Ke fa Morena a ba neela mo diatleng tsa Bamidiane dinyaga tse supa. 
Judges6:2 Jaanong e rile mabogo a Bamidiane a gatelela Baiseraele, Baiseraele ba ipaakanyetsa manno mo dikgophung tse di mo dithabeng le mo dikgageng le dikago tsa phemelo mo dithabeng ka ntlha ya go tshaba Bamidiane." 
Judges6:3 E ne ya re fa Baiseraele ba sena go jwala, go tlhage Bamidiane le Baamaleke le ba kwa botlhabatsatsi, ba ba tlhasele," 
Judges6:4 ba ba dikanyetse ka ntwa, ba senye kotulo ya lefatshe go ya go fitlha kwa Gasa; ba se ke ba tlogelele Baiseraele dijo dipe, le e seng nku kampo kgomo gongwe esele." 
Judges6:5 Gonne ba ne ba tle ba tlhage ka diruiwa tsa bone le ka ditente tsa bone, ba tle jaaka segopa sa tsie, mo ba sa ka keng ba balwa le fa e le dikammele tsa bone; ba tle mo lefatsheng go le senya." 
Judges6:6 Baiseraele ba ne ba koafadiwa thata ke Bamidiane, mme Baiseraele ba lelela Moreneng." 
Judges6:7 Mme ya re Baiseraele ba lelela Moreneng ka ntlha ya Bamidiane," 
Judges6:8 Morena a roma monna wa moporofeti kwa Baiseraeleng; ene a ba raya a re: “Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana a re: ‘Ke lo ntshitse kwa Egepeto, ka lo ntsha mo ntlong ya botlhanka," 
Judges6:9 ka lo namolela mo diatleng tsa Baegepeto le mo diatleng tsa bagateledi botlhe ba lona, ka ba leleka fa pele ga lona, ka lo naya lefatshe la bone." 
Judges6:10 Ka lo raya ka re, ke nna Morena, Modimo wa lona. Se boifeng medimo ya Baamori ba lo agileng mo lefatsheng la bone. Mme lwa se ka lwa utlwa lentswe la me.’ ”" 
Judges6:11 Moengele wa Morena a tla letsatsi le lengwe, a feta a nna fa tlase ga mooka wa kwa Ofera o e leng wa ga Joase wa Moabiesere, Giteone morwawe a ntse a photha mabele a korong mo segatelong gore a a subele Bamidiane." 
Judges6:12 Jaanong moengele wa Morena a iponatsa mo go ene, a mo raya a re: “Morena o na nao, wena mogale yo mogolo.”" 
Judges6:13 Mme Giteone a mo raya a re: “Ao! Morena wa me, fa Morena a na le rona, ke ka ntlha ya eng fa dilo tsotlhe tse, di re dirafaletse? Dikgakgamatso tsotlhe di kae tse borraetsho ba di re boleletseng ba re: ‘Kana Morena o re ntshitse kwa Egepeto?’ Mme jaanong Morena o re latlhile, o re neetse mo diatleng tsa Bamidiane.”" 
Judges6:14 Mme Morena a retologela kwa go ene a re: “Yaa ka thata e ya gago, o pholose Baiseraele mo diatleng tsa Bamidiane! Kana o rongwa ke nna.”" 
Judges6:15 Ke fa Giteone a mmotsa a re: “Ao! Morena wa me, ke tla pholosa Baiseraele ka eng? Kana losika lwa me ke lo lobotlana mo go Bamanase; le gona ke yo mmotlana mo baneng ba ga rre.”" 
Judges6:16 Mme Morena a mo raya a re: “Ruri ke tla nna nao, mme o tla fenya Bamidiane jaaka e kete ke monna a le mongwe fela.”" 
Judges6:17 Giteone a mo fetola a re: “Ka thapelo, fa ke bonye bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a gago, ntirele sesupo sa gore ke wena o buang le nna!" 
Judges6:18 A ko o se ka wa tloga fa, ke be ke boe, ke go tsisetse tshupelo, ke e bee fa pele ga gago.” Morena a re: “Ke tla nna fa go fitlhelela o boa.”" 
Judges6:19 Ke fa Giteone a tloga a ya kwa gae, a feta a baakanya potsane e tonanyana le dinkgwe tse di sa bedisiwang tsa bupe jwa seelo sa efa; a tsenya dinama mo serotong, a tshela moro mo pitseng, a di isa kwa go ene fa tlase ga mooka, a di baya fa go ene." 
Judges6:20 Mme Moengele wa Modimo a mo raya a re: “Tsaya nama le dinkgwe, o di bee mo lefikeng lele, o tshele moro mo go tsona.” A dira jalo." 
Judges6:21 Jaanong Moengele wa Morena a tsaya thobane e a e tshotseng, a kgotla dinama le dinkgwe ka ntlha ya yona. Molelo wa bo o tswa mo lefikeng, o ja dinama le dinkgwe, mme Moengele wa Morena a nyelela mo matlhong a gagwe." 
Judges6:22 Ya re Giteone a lemoga gore e ne e le Moengele wa Morena, a re: “Joo nna wee, Morena Modimo! Ke bonye Moengele wa Morena, re lebanye ka difatlhego.”" 
Judges6:23 Mme Morena a mo raya a re: “A kagiso e nne nao! Se boife! Ga o kitla o swa.” 
Judges6:24 Ke fa Giteone a agela Morena aletare gona, a e bitsa “Morena-wa-kagiso.” E sa le teng kwa Ofera wa Baabiesere go fitlhelela letsatsing la kajeno." 
Judges6:25 Mme ya re bosigo joo Morena a mo raya a re: “Tsaya poo ya dikgomo tse e leng tsa ga rraago, e bong poo ya bobedi ya dinyaga tse supa, o dige aletare ya ga Baale e e leng ya ga rraago, o reme Ašera e e fa thoko ga yona." 
Judges6:26 Gape o agele Morena, Modimo wa gago, aletare mo setlhoeng se se ageletsweng sa thaba e ka go tlhatlaganya matlapa, o tsee poo ya bobedi ele, o dire setlhabelo sa phiso ka dikgong tsa ga Ašera yo ò tla mo fatsang.”" 
Judges6:27 Ke fa Giteone a tsaya banna ba some ba batlhanka ba gagwe, a dira jaaka Morena a mo laetse. Mme ya re ka a boifa ba kgotla ya ga rraagwe le banna ba motse, a se ka a dira motshegare, mme a dira bosigo." 
Judges6:28 Mme ya re banna ba motse ba tsoga mo mosong, ba fitlhela aletare ya ga Baale e digilwe le kota ya ga Ašera e e fa thoko ga yona e remilwe le poo ele ya bobedi e dirilwe setlhabelo sa phiso mo aletareng e e agilweng." 
Judges6:29 Ba botsanya ba re: “Ke mang yo o dirileng jalo?” Ya re ba sena go tlhotlhomisa le go botsolotsa ba utlwa go twe: “Giteone, morwa Joase, o dirile jalo.”" 
Judges6:30 Ke fa banna ba motse ba raya Joase ba re: “Ntsha morwao, re mmolae! Gonne o digile aletare ya ga Baale, o bile remile kota ya ga Ašera e e neng e le fa thoko ga yona.”" 
Judges6:31 Mme Joase a raya botlhe ba ba emeng fa go ene a re: “A lo rata go lwela Baale kampo go mo thusa? Yo o mo lwelang a a bolawe! e sa le mo mosong o. Fa ene Baale e le modimo, a a itwele, ka aletare ya gagwe e digilwe.”" 
Judges6:32 Ke ka moo Giteone o biditsweng Jerubaale ka letsatsi leo. Jerubaale ke go re: “A Baale a lwe nae!” Ka gonne o ne a digile aletare ya gagwe. 
Judges6:33 Jaanong Bamidiane botlhe le Baamaleke le ba kwa botlhabatsatsi ba phuthega mmogo, ba tshela noka, ba thibelela mo lebaleng la Iserele." 
Judges6:34 Mme Mowa wa Morena wa tlala mo go Giteone, a letsa lonaka, a kua Baabiesere gore ba mo sale morago." 
Judges6:35 A ba a roma barongwi kwa go Bamanase botlhe, a ba kua le bone gore ba mo sale morago; gape a roma barongwi kwa go Baasere le Basebulone le Banafetale, mme ba bolola go mo kgatlhantsha." 
Judges6:36 Jaanong Giteone a raya Modimo a re: “Fa o rata go pholosa Baiseraele ka nna jaaka o buile – a ko o mphe sesupo! 
Judges6:37 Bona, ke tla baya letlalo mo seboaneng, mme fa monyo o ka wela mo letlalong le le losi fela, lefatshe lotlhe go se fa o oleng teng, foo ke tla itse gore o tla golola Baiseraele ka nna jaaka o buile.”" 
Judges6:38 Ga dirafala jalo. Ya re a tsoga ka moso, a gamola monyo mo letlalong, ya nna metsi a a tlalang ka mogopo." 
Judges6:39 Mme Giteone a raya Modimo a re: “A bogale jwa gago bo se ka jwa ntukela, fa ke sa ntse ke bua gangwe fela. A ko o nte ke leke gape gangwe fela ka letlalo le. Jaanong a go ko go nne komelelo mo letlalong le le losi fela, mme monyo o nne mo lefatsheng lotlhe.”" 
Judges6:40 Modimo wa dira jalo bosigo joo. Letlalo la lala le omile le le losi fela, mme lefatshe lotlhe le wetswe ke monyo." 
Judges7:1 Jaanong Jerubaale, e bong Giteone, a phakela le batho botlhe ba ba nang nae, ba thibelela fa motsweding wa Harote, mme bothibelelo jwa Bamidiane bo ne bo le mo ntlheng ya bokone ya gagwe mo lebaleng go tloga fa thoteng ya More." 
Judges7:2 Mme Morena a raya Giteone a re: “Batho ba ba nang nao ba bantsi. Ke palelwa ke go neela Bamidiane mo diatleng tsa bone, e se re gongwe Baiseraele ba inkgantshetsa ba re: ‘Go ikgolotse rona ka rosi.’" 
Judges7:3 Mme jaanong tlhaba mokgosi mo ditsebeng tsa batho o re: ‘Yo o tshogileng le yo o boifang a a boe, a tshabe mo dithabeng tsa Gileate.’ ” Ga boa batho ba le 22 000, ga sala ba le 10 000." 
Judges7:4 Mme Morena a raya Giteone a re: “Batho ba sa le bantsi. Ba folosetse kwa metsing, ke tle ke ba go fokoletse teng: Yo ke tla go laelang ka ga gagwe ke re: ‘A a ye nao,’ a ene a ye nao; mme mongwe le mongwe yo ke go laelang ka ga gagwe ke re: ‘A a se ye nao,’ a ene a se ka a ya nao.”" 
Judges7:5 A folosetsa batho kwa metsing, mme Morena a raya Giteone a re: “Mongwe le mongwe yo o kapetsang metsi ka seatla le molomo jaaka ntšwa, mmee go sele; gape mongwe le mongwe yo o khubamang ka mangole go nwa a tomame o mmee go sele.”" 
Judges7:6 Palo ya ba ba neng ba a kapetsa, ba a isa ka diatla kwa melomong, e ne e le banna ba le 300; batho botlhe ba bangwe ba ne ba khubame ka mangole go nwa metsi ba tomame." 
Judges7:7 Ke fa Morena a raya Giteone a re: “Ke tla lo golola ka banna ba le 300 ba, ba ba noleng ka go kapetsa, ke neela Bamidiane mo diatleng tsa gago. Mme a batho botlhe ba bangwe ba boele kwa magaeng a bone.”" 
Judges7:8 Jaanong ba itseela mefago ya batho le dinaka tsa bone. Mme Giteone a busetsa banna botlhe ba Iseraele kwa magaeng a bone, a sala fela a na le banna ba le 300 bale. Mephato ya Bamidiane e ne e le kwa tlase ga gagwe mo lebaleng." 
Judges7:9 Ya re bosigo Morena a mo raya a re: “Tsoga o fologele kwa mephatong eo, gonne ke e neetse mo diatleng tsa gago." 
Judges7:10 Mme fa o boifa go fologa, fologa le Phura motlhanka wa gago pele, o ye kwa mephatong eo,"
