Judges7:11 o utlwelele se ba se buang teng. Morago ga moo o tla bo o tiile moko go ka fologela teng le go tlhasela mephato eo.” A fologa a na le Phura motlhanka wa gagwe, a fitlha kwa batlhabaning ba ba tlhometseng fa bokhutlong jwa bothibelelo." 
Judges7:12 Mme Bamidiane le Baamaleke le botlhe ba kwa botlhabatsatsi ba bo ba robetse mo lebaleng jaaka segopa sa tsie; dikammele tsa bone e le tse di se nang palo, di le kana ka motlhaba o o fa losing lwa lewatle." 
Judges7:13 Jaanong ya re Giteone a goroga, a fitlhela mongwe a bolelela yo mongwe toro a re: “Utlwa toro e ke e lorileng, ke bonye senkgwe se se besitsweng sa garase se kgokologela mo bothibelelong jwa Bamidiane, se fitlha kwa tenteng, se e itaya, ya wa, sa e pitikolola, ya kanama.”" 
Judges7:14 Mme mongwe-ka-ene a araba a re: “Selo se ga se sepe fa e se tšhaka ya ga Giteone morwa Joase, monna wa Moiseraele. Modimo o neetse Bamidiane le mephato yotlhe mo diatleng tsa gagwe.”" 
Judges7:15 Ya re Giteone a utlwa polelo e ya toro le phuthololo ya yona, a obamela Morena, a boela kwa bothibelelong jwa Baiseraele a re: “Tsogang, gonne Morena o neetse mephato ya Bamidiane mo diatleng tsa lona.”" 
Judges7:16 Mme a kgaoganya banna ba le 300, a ba dira ditlhopha tse tharo, a tsenya dinaka mo diatleng tsa botlhe le dinkgwana tse di lolea le dirumola mo teng ga dinkgwana;" 
Judges7:17 a ba raya a re: “Ntebeng lo dire fela jaaka nna; mme e re ke fitlha fa bothibelelong, lo dire gape jaaka ke dira." 
Judges7:18 E re fa ke letsa lonaka nna le botlhe ba ke nang nabo, le lona lo letse dinaka mo ntlheng tsotlhe tsa bothibelelo, lo thele lešalaba lo re: ‘Ntwa ya Morena le ya ga Giteone!’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Giteone le banna ba ba lekgolo ba ba nang nae ba fitlha fa bothibelelong, e le gona go bewang balebeledi ba gare ga bosigo. Ke fa a letsa lonaka, a thuba nkgwana e a e tshotseng ka seatla." 
Judges7:20 Jaanong ba ditlhopha tse tharo ba letsa dinaka, ba thuba dinkgwana, ba tshwara dirumola ka diatla tsa molema le dinaka ka diatla tse di jang, ba di letsa, ba kua ba re: “Tšhaka ya Morena le ya ga Giteone!”" 
Judges7:21 Ba ne ba ntse ba eme mongwe le mongwe fa a emeng teng mo tikologong ya bothibelelo, mme mephato yotlhe ya sia, ya goa ya tshaba." 
Judges7:22 Ya re ba ntse ba letsa dinaka tse di 300, Morena a bolaanya Bamidiane ka ditšhaka tsa bone mo bothibelelong jotlhe, mme ba bangwe ba tshabela kwa Betšhita ntlheng ya Sereta go ya go fitlha kwa losing lwa Abele-Megola gaufi le Tabathe." 
Judges7:23 Jaanong banna ba Iseraele, e bong Banafetale le Baasere le Bamanase botlhe ba kuiwa go latelela Bamidiane." 
Judges7:24 Gape Giteone a roma barongwi kwa dithabeng tsotlhe tsa ga Eferaime a re: “Fologang lo kgatlhantshe Bamidiane, lo ba thibelelele metsi go fitlha kwa Bethe-Bara le Joretane!” Ke fa go kuiwa banna botlhe ba Eferaime, ba ba thibelelela metsi go fitlha kwa Bethe-Bara le Joretane." 
Judges7:25 Le gona ba tshwara dikgosi tse pedi tsa Bamidiane, e bong Orebe le Seebe; ba bolaela Orebe kwa Lefikeng la ga Legakabe le Seebe kwa Segatelong sa ga Phiri, ba feta ba latelela Bamidiane. Mme ba isa ditlhogo tsa boOrebe le Seebe kwa go Giteone kwa moseja ga Joretane." 
Judges8:1 Ke fa banna ba Baeferaime ba mo sekisa ba re: “O ne o direlang jalo, fa o sa re bitse maloba fa o ya go tlhabana le Bamidiane?” Ba mo omanya thata jalo." 
Judges8:2 Mme ene a ba fetola a re: “Ke dirile tiro efe e e kana ka ya lona? A ga ke re, maronopo a Baeferaime a gaisa phulo ya moweine ya Baabiesere?" 
Judges8:3 Kana dikgosi tsa Bamidiane, Orebe le Seebe, Modimo o di neetse mo diatleng tsa lona. Nna ke kgonne go dira tiro efe e e tshwanang le ya lona?” Ya re a bua mafoko ao, ba rebega logala, ba se ka ba tlhola ba mo omanya." 
Judges8:4 Jaanong Giteone a fitlha kwa nokeng ya Joretane, a e tshela, ene le banna ba ba 300 ba ba nang nae, ba lapile ka go latelela baba" 
Judges8:5 mme a kopa banna ba Sukothe a re: “A lo ke lo fe banna ba ba ntshetseng morago dinkgwe, gonne ba lapile. Kana ke latelela Seba le Salemuna, dikgosi tsa Midiane.”" 
Judges8:6 Ke fa bagolo ba Sukothe ba botsa ba re: “A mabole a ga Seba le Salemuna o setse o a bofile, fa o re, re fe mephato ya gago dijo?”" 
Judges8:7 Giteone a re: “Go siame. E tla re Morena a neela Seba le Salemuna mo diatleng tsa me, ke phothe mebele ya lona ka mitlwa ya sekaka le ka dikala tsa mengana.”" 
Judges8:8 A tloga teng a fetela kwa Phenuele, le bone a ba kopa. Mme banna ba Phenuele ba mo araba jaaka banna ba Sukothe." 
Judges8:9 Mme a raya banna ba Phenuele le bone a re: “E tla re ke boa ka kagiso, ke fete ke dige kago e ya phemelo.”" 
Judges8:10 Seba le Salemuna ba ne ba le kwa Karekore, ba na le mephato ya bone, e ka nna banna ba le 15 000; bone e le botlhe ba ba setseng ba mephato yotlhe ya ba kwa botlhabatsatsi. Gonne ba ba bolailweng e ne e le banna ba le 120 000 ba ba neng ba tshwere tšhaka." 
Judges8:11 Jaanong Giteone a bolola ka tsela ya baagi ba ditente, a potile metse ya Noba le Jogebeha mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi, a fenya mephato eo, e sa ntse e itebetse." 
Judges8:12 Seba le Salemuna ba tshaba, mme a ba latelela, a tshwara dikgosi tse pedi tsa Bamidiane, e bong Seba le Salemuna, a tshosa mephato yotlhe, a e phatlalatsa." 
Judges8:13 Jaanong e rile Giteone morwa Joase a boa mo tlhabanong ka phata ya motse wa Herese," 
Judges8:14 a tshwara lekau la kwa Sukothe, a le botsolotsa; la mo kwalela maina a dikgosana tsa Sukothe le a bagolo ba teng, e le banna ba le 77." 
Judges8:15 Ya re a fitlha kwa banneng ba Sukothe a re: “Bonang, Seba le Salemuna ke ba, ba lo nkgobileng ka ga bone lwa re: ‘A mabole a ga Seba le Salemuna o setse o a bofile fa o re, re fe banna ba gago ba ba lapileng dijo!’ ”" 
Judges8:16 Ke fa a tsaya bagolo ba motse le mitlwa ya sekaka le dikala tsa mengana, a swabaila banna ba Sukothe ka tsona." 
Judges8:17 Le gona a diga kago ya phemelo ya Phenuele, a bolaya banna ba motse oo." 
Judges8:18 Jaanong a botsa Seba le Salemuna a re: “Banna ba lo ba bolaetseng kwa thabeng ya Thabore ba ne ba ntse jang?” Ba re: “Ba ne ba tshwana nao; mongwe le mongwe a lebega jaaka ngwana wa kgosi.” 
Judges8:19 Giteone a re: “E ne e le bonkgonne ba ga mme. Ka bophelo jwa Morena, fa lo ka bo lo ba lesitse go phela, nka bo ke sa lo bolae.”" 
Judges8:20 A ba a raya Jethere morwawe yo mogolo a re: “Nanoga o ba bolae!” Mme lekau la se ka la somola tšhaka ya lone, gonne le boifa ka le sa le lešwa." 
Judges8:21 Mme Seba le Salemuna ba re: “Nanoga ka wesi o re wele; gonne thata ya monna e lekana le sebopego sa gagwe.” Ke fa Giteone a nanoga, a bolaya Seba le Salemuna, a tsaya dingwedinyana tse di mo melaleng ya dikammele tsa bone." 
Judges8:22 Jaanong banna ba Iseraele ba raya Giteone ba re: “Re buse, wena le morwao le morwa morwao; gonne o re golotse mo diatleng tsa Bamidiane.”" 
Judges8:23 Mme Giteone a ba raya a re: “Ga nkitla ke lo busa, le morwaake ga a kitla a lo busa. Lo tla busiwa ke Morena.”" 
Judges8:24 Giteone a boela a ba raya a re: “Ke rata go kopa sengwe mo go lona: A mongwe le mongwe a mphe lenyena le a le thopileng.” A bua jalo ka gonne Bamidiane ba ne ba na le manyena a gouta, ka e le Baisemaele." 
Judges8:25 Ba araba ba re: “Re tla a go naya ka boitumelo.” Ba ala kobo, mme mongwe le mongwe a latlhela lenyena le a le thopileng mo go yona." 
Judges8:26 Bokete jwa manyena a gouta a o neng a a kopile e ne e le dišekele tsa gouta di le 1 700, go sa balwe jwa dingwedinyana le jwa mekgabo ya ditsebe le jwa diaparo tse dikhibidu tsa bofifadu tse di neng di aperwe ke dikgosi tsa Bamidiane; go bile go sa balwe le jwa dibaga tse di neng di le mo melaleng ya dikammele." 
Judges8:27 Jaanong Giteone a dira khiba ya boperesiti ka tsona, a e lepeletsa mo Ofera motseng wa ga gabo, mme Baiseraele botlhe ba dira boaka teng ka go e obamela jaaka modimo wa seseto; ya nna serai jalo mo go Giteone le mo go ba lapa la gagwe." 
Judges8:28 Bamidiane ba ne ba kokobediwa jalo fa pele ga Baiseraele, ba se ka ba tlhola ba tsosa ditlhogo tsa bone. Lefatshe la nna mo kagisong dinyaga di le 40 ka malatsi a bophelo jwa ga Giteone." 
Judges8:29 Morago ga ntwa Jerubaale, e bong Giteone morwa Joase a ya a nna mo ntlong ya gagwe." 
Judges8:30 Giteone o ne a na le bomorwa ba le 70 ba ba tsetsweng ke ene, ka a ne a na le basadi ba bantsi." 
Judges8:31 Nyatsi ya gagwe e e neng e le mo Šegeme le yona ya mo tsholela ngwana wa mosimane, a tewa leina la Abimelege." 
Judges8:32 Giteone morwa Joase o ne a swa, a tsofetse; a fitlhwa mo lebitleng la ga Joase rraagwe kwa Ofera wa Baabiesere." 
Judges8:33 Mme ya re fela Giteone a sena go swa, Baiseraele ba boela kwa morago, ba dira boaka ka go latela boBaale, ba ipeela Baale-wa-kgolagano go nna modimo wa bone." 
Judges8:34 Baiseraele ba tlhokomologa Morena, Modimo wa bone, yo o neng a ba pholositse mo diatleng tsa baba botlhe ba bone mo tikologong." 
Judges8:35 Le gona ba se ka ba direla ba lapa la ga Jerubaale yo e leng Giteone ditiro tsa tebogo ka ntlha ya tse di molemo tsotlhe tse o di diretseng Baiseraele. 
Judges9:1 Abimelege morwa Jerubaale letsatsi lengwe a ya kwa Šegeme kwa go bomalomaagwe, a ya go bua nabo le losika lotlhe lwa ga gabo mogolo a re:" 
Judges9:2 “A lo ke lo botse mo ditsebeng tsa batho ba Šegeme botlhe lo re: ‘Se se molemo mo go lona ke eng? A ke go busiwa ke banna ba le 70 bomorwa Jerubaale botlhe, kampo go busiwa ke monna a le mongwe? Le gona lo gakologelwe fa ke le lesapo la lona le nama ya lona.’ ”" 
Judges9:3 Ke fa bomalomaagwe ba ya go bua mafoko aotlhe ao ka ga gagwe mo ditsebeng tsa batho ba Šegeme botlhe. Mme dipelo tsa bone tsa ineela Abimelege, ka e le ngwana wa kgaitsadia-bona." 
Judges9:4 Ba mo naya diselefera di le 70 di tswa mo ntlong ya ga Baale-wa-kgolagano. Mme Abimelege a rapa banna ba e seng ba sepe ka tsona ba ba ikgantshang; ba mo sala morago. 
Judges9:5 A ba a ya kwa kgotleng ya ga rraagwe kwa Ofera, a bolaya bomorwa-rraagwe, bana ba ga Jerubaale, banna ba le 70 mo lefikeng le le lengwe, mme ga falola Jothame morwa Jerubaale yo mmotlana, ka a ne a iphitlhile." 
Judges9:6 Jaanong ga phuthega batho ba Šegeme botlhe le ba kago ya phemelo botlhe, ba tla ba dira Abimelege kgosi fa setlhareng sa mooka se se kwa Šegeme, fa go leng lefika la bosupi." 
Judges9:7 E rile Jothame a sena go sebelwa jalo, a ya a ema mo setlhoeng sa thaba ya Gerisime, a tlhatlosa lentswe, a tlhaeletsa, a ba raya a re: “Ntheetseng lona beng ba Šegeme gore Modimo le ona o lo utlwe." 
Judges9:8 Ditlhare di kile tsa bolola go itloletsa kgosi, tsa raya setlhare sa olefa tsa re: ‘Nna kgosi ya rona.’" 
Judges9:9 Mme setlhare sa olefa sa di fetola sa re: ‘A lo a re, ke tlogele monono wa me o Modimo le batho ba o tlotlang mo go nna, ke ye go okama ditlhare?’" 
Judges9:10 Ke fa ditlhare di raya setlhare sa feie di re: ‘Tlaya wena, o nne kgosi ya rona!’" 
Judges9:11 Mme sa feie sa di fetola sa re: ‘A lo a re ke tlogele botshe jwa me le maungo a a monate a me, ke ye go okama ditlhare?’" 
Judges9:12 Ke fa ditlhare di raya moweine di re: ‘Tlaya wena, o nne kgosi ya rona.’" 
Judges9:13 Mme moweine wa di fetola wa re: ‘A lo a re, ke tlogele matute a me a a itumedisang Modimo le batho, ke ye go okama ditlhare?’" 
Judges9:14 Ke fa ditlhare tsotlhe di raya mosu di re: ‘Tlaya wena, o nne kgosi ya rona.’" 
Judges9:15 Mme mosu wa araba ditlhare wa re: ‘Fa lo ntlotsa ka nnete go nna kgosi ya lona, tlayang he lo tshabele mo moriting wa me. Mme fa go sa nne jalo molelo o tla tswa mo mosung, o ja mesetere ya Lebanone.’" 
Judges9:16 “Jaanong he, fa lo dirile ka boikanyo le ka nnete ka go dira Abimelege kgosi, fa lo diretse Jerubaale le ba lapa la gagwe sentle, fa lo mo diretse tse di tshwanetseng tiro ya diatla tsa gagwe." 
Judges9:17 Kana rre o ne a lo tlhabanela, a tsenya bophelo jwa gagwe mo kotsing gore lona lo pholosiwe mo diatleng tsa Bamidiane." 
Judges9:18 Mme lona lo tsogetse lelapa la ga rre kajeno, lwa bolaya bomorwawe, banna ba le 70, mo lefikeng le le lengwe, lwa dira Abimelege morwa lelata la gagwe kgosi ya beng ba Šegeme, ka e le wa ga lona." 
Judges9:19 Kana ka re: Fa lo diretse Jerubaale le ba lapa la gagwe ka boikanyo le ka nnete ka letsatsi la kajeno, foo itumeleleng Abimelege, mme a le ene a lo itumelele!" 
Judges9:20 Mme fa go sa nna jalo, a molelo o tswe mo go Abimelege, o je beng ba Šegeme le ba kago ya phemelo; o be o tswe mo go beng ba Šegeme le mo go ba kago ya phemelo, o je Abimelege.”" 
Judges9:21 Morago ga moo Jothame a thoba a tshabela kwa Beere, a nna teng ka ntlha ya go boifa Abimelege morwa-rraagwe." 
Judges9:22 Jaanong e rile Abimelege a sena go busa Baiseraele dinyaga di le tharo," 
Judges9:23 Modimo wa romela mowa o o bosula o o lwantshanyang Abimelege le beng ba Šegeme, mo ba bileng ba direla Abimelege ka boikanyologo;" 
Judges9:24 e le go re tshiamololo e e diretsweng bomorwa Jerubaale ba le 70 le polao ya bone e tle e wele mo go Abimelege morwa-rraabo yo o ba bolaileng; e be e wele mo go beng ba Šegeme ba ba mo thusitseng go bolaya bomorwa-rraagwe. 
Judges9:25 Ka moo beng ba Šegeme ba mmeela balaledi mo ditlhoeng tsa dithaba gore ba thukhuthe mongwe le mongwe yo o fetang fa go bone mo tseleng, mme Abimelege a sebelwa tseo." 
Judges9:26 Le gona ga tlhaga Gaale morwa Ebete, a na le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba hudugela kwa Šegeme, mme beng ba Šegeme ba mo ikanya." 
Judges9:27 Mme ba tswela kwa masimo, ba fula mo masimong a meweine a bone, ba gata maungo a meweine, ba dira moletlo, ba tsena mo ntlong ya modimo wa bone, ba ja, ba nwa, ba hutsa Abimelege." 
Judges9:28 Gaale morwa Ebete a ba tlhotlheletsa a re: “Abimelege ke mang, mme rona ba Šegeme re bomang, mo re tshwanetseng go mo direla? A ga se ene morwa Jerubaale, mme Sebule ke kgosana ya gagwe? Direlang banna ba ga Hemore rraagwe Šegeme. Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa rona re tshwanetse go direla ene?" 
Judges9:29 Ao! Fa nka bo ke busa morafe o, nka bo ke tlosa Abimelege, ke raya Abimelege ke re: ‘Ntsifatsa mephato ya gago, o bolole!’ ”" 
Judges9:30 Mme ya re Sebule, kgosana ya motse, a utlwa mafoko a ga Gaale morwa Ebete, a tuka bogale," 
Judges9:31 a roma barongwi kwa go Abimelege ka sephiri a re: “Bona, Gaale morwa Ebete le bomorwa-rraagwe ba tlile mono Šegeme. Ba bile ba go tsosetsa moferefere." 
Judges9:32 Jaanong o tsoge bosigo, wena le batho ba ba nang nao, o ba lalele mo nageng." 
Judges9:33 Mme e re mo mosong fa letsatsi le tswa, o phakele, o tlhasele motse. Jaanong fa ene le batho ba ba nang nae ba tswela kwa go wena, o mo direle ka fa mabogo a gago a kgonang ka teng.”" 
Judges9:34 Abimelege a tsoga bosigo le batho botlhe ba ba nang nae, ba lalela Šegeme ka ditlhopha tse nne." 
Judges9:35 Mme ya re Gaale morwa Ebete a tswa a ema fa kgorong ya motse, Abimelege a ragoga le batho ba ba nang nae, ba tswa mo talelong." 
Judges9:36 Ya re Gaale a bona batho bao, a raya Sebule a re: “Bona batho ba fologa mo ditlhoeng tsa dithaba.” Mme Sebule a mo raya a re: “O bona meriti ya dithaba wa re ke batho.”" 
Judges9:37 Gaale a ba a bua gape a re: “Bona, batho ba fologa mo mohubung wa lefatshe, mme setlhopha se sengwe se tswa ntlheng ya mooka wa baroka.”" 
Judges9:38 Ke fa Sebule a mo raya a re: “Jaanong molomo wa boikgantsho jwa gago o kae o ò buileng ka ona wa re: ‘Abimelege ke mang, mo re tshwanetseng go mo direla?’ A ga se bona batho ba, ba o ba nyaditseng? Jaanong bolola he, o tlhabane nabo!”" 
Judges9:39 Gaale a bolola, e etelela batho ba Šegeme pele, a tlhabana le Abimelege." 
Judges9:40 Fela Abimelege a mo leleka, mme a tshaba fa pele ga gagwe; ga nna ga wa ba bantsi ba ba bolawang go ya go fitlha kwa kgorong." 
Judges9:41 Jaanong Abimelege a nna kwa motseng wa Aruma, mme Sebule a leleka Gaale le bomorwa-rraagwe gore ba se ka ba aga mo Šegeme." 
Judges9:42 Mme ya re kamoso batho ba tswa ba ya masimo, Abimelege a begelwa jalo." 
Judges9:43 Ke fa a tsaya batho, a ba aroganya, a ba dira ditlhopha tse tharo, a lalela kwa nageng. Jaanong fa a bona batho ba tswa mo motseng, a ba wela, a ba bolaya." 
Judges9:44 Abimelege a bolola le setlhopha se se nang nae, ba ema fa kgorong ya motse, mme ditlhopha tse pedi tsa bolola, tsa wela botlhe ba ba kwa masimo, tsa ba bolaya." 
Judges9:45 Abimelege a tlhabana le motse ka letsatsi lotlhe leo, a thopa motse, a bolaya batho ba ba neng ba le mo go ona, a senya motse, a gasa letswai mo go ona." 
Judges9:46 Ya re batho ba ba mo kagong ya phemelo ya Šegeme ba utlwa jalo, ba tsena mo maiphitlhelong a a ka fa tlase ga ntlo ya modimo-wa-kgolagano." 
Judges9:47 Ya re Abimelege a sena go begelwa gore batho botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo kagong ya phemelo ya Šegeme ba phuthegetse teng," 
Judges9:48 a tlhatlogela mo thabeng ya Salemone, ene le batho botlhe ba ba nang nae; Abimelege a tsaya selepe sa gagwe, a rema letlharapa la setlhare, a le tsholetsa, a le sikara, a raya batho ba ba nang nae a re: “Se lo bonang ke se dira, akofang lo se dire jaaka nna!”" 
Judges9:49 Ke fa batho botlhe ba rema matlharapa, ba sala Abimelege morago, ba feta ba a baya mo godimo ga maiphitlhelo ale, ba a tshuba godimo ga bale. Ka mokgwa oo batho botlhe ba kago ya phemelo ya Šegeme le bone ba a swa, e ka nna banna ba le sekete ba tlhakanye le basadi." 
Judges9:50 Jaanong Abimelege a ya kwa motseng wa Thebese, a o dikanyetsa ka ntwa, a o thopa." 
Judges9:51 Mme ga bo go le kago e e godimo ya phemelo mo gare ga motse; banna botlhe ba motse le basadi le beng ba motse botlhe ba tshabela teng, ba tswala fa morago ga bone, ba tlhatlogela kwa godimo ga kago ya phemelo." 
Judges9:52 Ke fa Abimelege a tla kwa kagong eo ya phemelo, a e tlhasela, a atamela mojako wa yona gore a e fise ka molelo." 
Judges9:53 Mme mosadi mongwe a mo konopa ka tshilwana, ya itaya tlhogo ya ga Abimelege, ya mo thuba logata." 
Judges9:54 Ke fa a bitsa mokaba-dibolai wa gagwe ka potlako, a mo raya a re: “Somola tšhaka ya gago, o mpheletse, e se re gongwe ba bua ka ga me ba re: ‘O bolailwe ke mosadi.’ ” A dira jalo, a mo phololetsa, mme a a swa." 
Judges9:55 Ya re banna ba Iseraele ba bona Abimelege a sule mongwe le mongwe a ya kwa legaeng la gagwe. 
Judges9:56 Modimo wa lefetsa Abimelege bosula jalo jo o bo diretseng rraagwe ka go bolaya bomorwa-rraagwe ba le 70. 
Judges9:57 Le gona Modimo wa busetsa bosula jotlhe jwa banna ba Šegeme mo ditlhogong tsa bone. Khutso ya ga Jothame morwa Jerubaale ya ba wela jalo. 
Judges10:1 Sehularong sa ga Abimelege ga tsoga Thola morwa Phua morwa Doto, monna wa lotso lwa ga Isašare, go thusa Iseraele. O ne a agile mo motseng wa Samire kwa dithabeng tsa Eferaime." 
Judges10:2 A siamisa Baiseraele dinyaga di le 23; a ba a swa, a fitlhwa mo Samire." 
Judges10:3 Sehularong sa gagwe ga tsoga Jaire wa kwa Gileate, a siamisa Baiseraele dinyaga di le 22." 
Judges10:4 O ne a na le bomorwa ba le 30 ba ba neng ba palama diesele di le 30, ba na le metse e le 30 e e bidiwang metse ya ditente ya ga Jaire go fitlhelela letsatsing la kajeno, e e kwa nageng ya Gileate." 
Judges10:5 Jaire a ba a swa, a fitlhwa kwa Kamone." 
Judges10:6 Mme Baiseraele ba fela ba dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena, ba direla boBaale le boAšethorethe le medimo ya Siria le ya Sitone le ya Moabe le ya Baamone le ya Bafelesita; ba tlogela Morena, ba se ka ba mo direla." 
Judges10:7 Ke fa bogale jwa Morena bo tukela Baiseraele, mme a ba rekisa mo diatleng tsa Bafelesita le tsa Baamone." 
Judges10:8 Ba bogisa Baiseraele, ba ba gatelela setlhogo dinyaga di le 18 ka sebaka seo, e bong Baiseraele botlhe ba ba kwa moseja ga Joretane mo nageng ya Baamori e e kwa Gileate." 
Judges10:9 Le gona Baamone ba tshela Joretane go tlhabana le Bajuta le Babenyamene le Baeferaime, mo Baiseraele ba bileng ba pitlaganngwa thata." 
Judges10:10 Ke fa Baiseraele ba lelela Moreneng ba re: “Re go leofetse; gonne re go tlogetse, Modimo wa rona, ra direla boBaale.”" 
Judges10:11 Mme Morena a raya Baiseraele a re: “A ga ke re, ke lo golotse mo go Baegepeto le mo go Baamori le mo go Baamone le mo go Bafelesita?" 
Judges10:12 Mme ya re Basitone le Baamaleke le Bamaone ba lo pitlaganya, lwa lelela go nna, mme ka lo pholosa mo diatleng tsa bone." 
Judges10:13 Mme lona lo ntlogetse, lwa direla medimo e sele; ke ka moo ke sa ka keng ka tlhola ke lo thusa." 
Judges10:14 Yaang lo lele medimong e lo e itlhophetseng! A yona e lo thuse ka sebaka sa tlalelo ya lona!” 
Judges10:15 Mme Baiseraele ba raya Morena ba re: “Re leofile. Wena o re direle tsotlhe tse di siameng mo matlhong a gago, fela a ko o re thuse kajeno.”" 
Judges10:16 Le gona ba tlosa medimo e sele mo gare ga bona, ba direla Morena. Ke fa a tlhomoga pelo ka ntlha ya pogisego ya Baiseraele." 
Judges10:17 Jaanong Baamone ba kuiwa, ba thibelela kwa Gileate. Le Baiseraele ba phuthega, ba thibelela kwa Mitsepha." 
Judges10:18 Ke fa batho, e bong dikgosana tsa Gileate, ba raana ba re: “Ke monna ofe yo o tla simololang go tlhabana le Baamone? Ene o tla nna tlhogo ya baagi botlhe ba Gileate.”" 
Judges11:1 Mme Ifetha wa kwa Gileate e ne e le mogale, fela e ne e le morwa mosadi wa seaka, a tsetswe ke Gileate." 
Judges11:2 Jaanong ya re mosadi wa ga Gileate a sena go mo tsholela bomorwa, mme bomorwa mosadi yoo ba sena go gola, ba leleka Ifetha, ba mo raya ba re: “Ga o a tshwanela go rua boswa mo kgotleng ya ga rraetsho, gonne o morwa mosadi o sele.”" 
Judges11:3 Ke fa Ifetha a tshaba, a tlogela bomorwa-rraagwe, a nna mo lefatsheng la Tobe. Mme banna ba ba motlhofo ba mo kgobokanela, ba bolola nae." 
Judges11:4 Ga tla malatsi a ntwa ya Baamone le Baiseraele. 
Judges11:5 Mme ya re Baamone ba tlhabana le Baiseraele, bagolo ba Gileate ba ya go tsaya Ifetha kwa lefatsheng la Tobe," 
Judges11:6 ba raya Ifetha ba re: “Tlaya o nne moeteledipele wa rona gore re ye go tlhabana le Baamone.” 
Judges11:7 Mme Ifetha a fetola bagolo ba Gileate a re: “A ga se lona ba lo ntlhoileng, lwa nteleka mo kgotleng ya ga rre? A jaanong lo tla kwano go nna, fa lo le mo tlalelong?”" 
Judges11:8 Bagolo ba Gileate ba raya Ifetha ba re: “Ke ka moo re boetseng kwa go wena jaanong. Mme fa o ya le rona, o tlhabana le Baamone, o tla nna tlhogo ya rona ya baagi botlhe ba Gileate.”" 
Judges11:9 Mme Ifetha a fetola bagolo ba Gileate a re: “Fa lo mpusetsa kwa gae go ya go tlhabana le Baamone, Morena a ba a nnaya go ba fenya, gona ke tla nna tlhogo ya lona.”" 
Judges11:10 Ke fa bagolo ba Gileate ba araba Ifetha ba re: “Morena ke moutlwi fa gare ga rona. Ruri, re tla dira ka fa lefokong la gago.”" 
Judges11:11 Jaanong Ifetha a ya le bagolo ba Gileate, mme morafe wa mo dira tlhogo le molaodi wa ona. Ifetha a ba a bolela mafoko aotlhe a gagwe fa pele ga Morena kwa Mitsepha." 
Judges11:12 Jaanong Ifetha a roma barongwi kwa kgosing ya Baamone a re: “O batlang mo go nna fa o tlile go ntlhabantshetsa lefatshe la me?” 
Judges11:13 Kgosi ya Baamone ya fetola barongwi ba ga Ifetha ya re: “Kana e rile Baiseraele ba tlhaga kwa Egepeto, ba tsaya naga ya me go tloga nokeng ya Arenone go ya go fitlha kwa go ya Jaboke le ya Joretane. Jaanong e nthebolele, foo ke tla tsamaya ka kagiso.”" 
Judges11:14 Ifetha a boa a roma barongwi gape kwa kgosing ya Baamone 
Judges11:15 gore ba ye go e raya ba re: “Ifetha o bua jaana a re: Ga go a nna jalo, Baiseraele ga ba a tsaya lefatshe la Moabe le e seng la Baamone." 
Judges11:16 Gonne e rile Baiseraele ba bolola kwa Egepeto, ba sepela mo sekakeng go fitlha kwa Lewatleng la Motlhaka, ba be ba fitlha kwa Kateše." 
Judges11:17 Ke fa Baiseraele ba roma barongwi kwa kgosing ya Etomo ba re: ‘Re letlelele go ralala lefatshe la gago.’ Mme kgosi ya Etomo ya se ka ya dumela. Le gona ba roma kwa kgosing ya Moabe, le yona ya gana. Ke ka moo Baiseraele ba diegileng kwa Kateše." 
Judges11:18 Gape ba sepela mo sekakeng, ba potologa lefatshe la Etomo le lefatshe la Moabe, ba tla kwa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya lefatshe la Moabe, ba thibelela ka kwano ga Arenone, ba se ka ba tsena mo nageng ya Moabe, ka noka ya Arenone e le molelwane wa Moabe." 
Judges11:19 Jaanong Baiseraele ba roma barongwi kwa go Sihone kgosi ya Baamori, kgosi ya Hešebone; Baiseraele ba mo raya ba re: ‘A ko o re letlelele go ralala lefatshe la gago go fitlha kwa re yang teng.’" 
Judges11:20 Sihone a se ka a dumelela Baiseraele go ralala naga ya gagwe, mme Sihone a phutha morafe otlhe wa gagwe, a thibelela kwa Jahase, a tlhabana le Baiseraele." 
Judges11:21 Ke fa Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, a neela Sihone le morafe otlhe wa gagwe mo diatleng tsa Baiseraele, mme ba ba fenya; Baiseraele ba thopa jalo lefatshe lotlhe la Baamori, ba ba neng ba agile mo lefatsheng leo." 
Judges11:22 Ba thopa naga yotlhe ya Baamori go tloga kwa nokeng ya Arenone go fitlha kwa go ya Jaboke le go tloga kwa sekakeng go fitlha kwa Joretane. 
Judges11:23 Jaanong he! Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o lelekile Baamori fa pele ga Iseraele morafe wa gagwe, mme a wena o a re o ka tsaya naga e?" 
Judges11:24 A ga ke re, wena o tshwanetse go tsaya naga e o e filweng ke Kamose, modimo wa gago? Le rona re tsaya naga jalo ya mongwe le mongwe yo o lelekilweng ke Morena, Modimo wa rona." 
Judges11:25 Mme jaanong a wena o siame go gaisa Balake morwa Siphore, kgosi ya Moabe? A ene o kile a sekisanya le Baiseraele gongwe a tlhabana nabo," 
Judges11:26 jale fa Baiseraele ba ntse ba agile mo Hešebone le mo metsaneng ya teng le mo Aroere le mo metsaneng ya teng le mo metseng yotlhe e e mo ntlheng tse pedi tsa Arenone dinyaga di le 300. Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa lo se ka lwa e re amoga ka sebaka seo? 
Judges11:27 Nna ga ke a go leofela, mme wena o ntirela bosula ka go tlhabana le nna. A Morena yo e leng moatlhodi a atlhole kajeno fa gare ga Baiseraele le Baamone.”" 
Judges11:28 Mme kgosi ya Baamone ya se ka ya dumelana le mafoko a ga Ifetha a o neng a a romela kwa go yona. 
Judges11:29 Ke fa Mowa wa Morena o tsena mo go Ifetha, mme a ralala naga ya Gileate le ya Manase, a fetela kwa Mitsepha yo o mo Gileate. Go tswa teng a fetela kwa go Baamone." 
Judges11:30 Mme Ifetha a ikanela Morena maikano a re: “Fa o ka neela Baamone tota mo diatleng tsa me," 
Judges11:31 foo ene yo o tla tswang ka mojako wa ntlo ya me go nkgatlhantsha mogang ke boang kwa go Baamone ka kagiso, e tla nna wa Morena; ke tla mo dira setlhabelo sa phiso.”" 
Judges11:32 Ifetha a fetela jalo kwa go Baamone go tlhabana nabo, mme Morena a ba neela mo diatleng tsa gagwe." 
Judges11:33 A ba fenya go tloga kwa Aroere go ya go fitlha kwa Minithe, a thopa metse e le 20, le go fitlha kwa Abele-Keramime, ya nna phenyo e kgolo thata. Baamone ba kokobediwa jalo fa pele ga Baiseraele." 
Judges11:34 Mme ya re Ifetha a goroga kwa Mitsepha mo lapeng la gagwe, a rakana le morwadie a tswa mo ntlong go mo kgatlhantsha ka meropana le dipina; mme e ne e le ngwana o esi, go se na ope yo o tsetsweng nae, mosimane kampo mosetsana." 
Judges11:35 Ya re a mmona, a ikgagola diaparo a re: “Ijoo, morwadiaka! O nkokobetsa jang! O ntigela mo tatlhegong. Kana ke butse molomo, ka ikanela Morena, mme ga ke kgone go dirolola.”" 
Judges11:36 Mme morwadie a mo raya a re: “Rra, fa o butse molomo, wa ikanela Morena, dira ka nna ka fa go duleng mo molomong wa gago ka teng, ka Morena a setse a go diretse pusoloso e e tletseng mo babeng ba gago, e bong Baamone.”" 
Judges11:37 Gape a raya rraagwe a re: “A ke direlwe selo se: Mphe sebaka sa dikgwedi di le pedi, ke ye kwa dithabeng, ke lelele bokgarebe jwa me, nna le balekane ba me.”" 
Judges11:38 Rraagwe a re: “Yaa,” mme a mo naya tsela kgwedi tse pedi. Morwadie a tsamaya, ene le balekane ba gagwe ba basetsana, a lelela bokgarebe jwa gagwe kwa dithabeng." 
Judges11:39 Mme ya re dikgwedi tse pedi di sena go feta, a boela kwa go rraagwe, mme ene a mo direla ka fa maikanong a gagwe a o neng a a ikanne. Mme morwadie a se ka a itse monna. Jaanong ga nna tlwaelo mo Iseraeleng ya gore:" 
Judges11:40 Ka ngwaga le ngwaga bomorwadia Iseraele ba ya go opelela morwadia Ifetha wa kwa Gileate malatsi a le mane. 
Judges12:1 Jaanong banna ba Eferaime ba kuiwa, ba ya kwa bokone, ba feta ba raya Ifetha ba re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa e rile o bolola go tlhabana le Baamone, wa se ka wa re bitsa go ya nao? Re tla go tshubela mo ntlong ya gago ka molelo.”" 
Judges12:2 Mme Ifetha a ba fetola a re: “Nna le morafe wa me re ne re le mo ntweng e kgolo thata le Baamone, ka lo kua, mme lwa gana go tla go mpholosa mo diatleng tsa bone." 
Judges12:3 Jaanong ya re ke bona lo sa nthuse, ka tsenya bophelo jwa me mo kotsing, ka bololela Baamone, mme Morena a ba neela mo diatleng tsa me. Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa lo mpololetse kajeno go tlhabana le nna?”" 
Judges12:4 Ke fa Ifetha a kgobokanya banna botlhe ba Gileate, a tlhabana le Baeferaime, mme ba bolaya Baeferaime; ka gonne Baeferaime ba ne ba buile ba re: “Lo bafalodi ba Eferaime fela;” Gileate o fa gare ga Eferaime le Manase." 
Judges12:5 Mme ba Gileate ba tseela Baeferaime matsibogo a Joretane. Jaanong e ne ya re fa motshabi wa Baeferaime a re: “Nteng ke tshele!” banna ba Gileate ba mmotse ba re: “A o Moeferaime?” Fa a re: “Nnyaya!” 
Judges12:6 ba mmuise ba re: “E re Šibolethe!” Mme fa a re Sibolethe, a sa ele tlhoko go bua ka tshwanelo, ba mo tshware ba mmolae fa matsibogong a Joretane. Ka sebaka seo ga bolawa Baeferaime ba le 42 000." 
Judges12:7 Ifetha e ne e le tlhogo ya Baiseraele dinyaga tse thataro. Ifetha wa kwa Gileate a ba a swa, a fitlhwa mo motseng wa gagwe kwa Gileate." 
Judges12:8 Sehularong sa gagwe Baiseraele ba okamelwa ke Ibesane wa kwa Betleheme. 
Judges12:9 Ene o ne a na le bomorwa ba le 30, a nyadisa bomorwadie ba ba 30 ba tswa lapeng la gagwe, a ba a nyadisa bomorwawe basadi ba le 30 ba tswa kwa gongwe. A atlhola Iseraele dinyaga di supa." 
Judges12:10 Ibesane a ba a swa, a fitlhwa mo Betleheme." 
Judges12:11 Sehularong sa gagwe Baiseraele ba busiwa ke Elone wa Mosebulone; a etelela Iseraele pele dinyaga di le some. 
Judges12:12 Elone wa Mosebulone a ba a swa, a fitlhwa kwa Ayalone, mo nageng ya Sebulone." 
Judges12:13 Sehularong sa gagwe Baiseraele ba siamisediwa ke Abetone morwa Hilele wa kwa Phirathone. 
Judges12:14 A na le bomorwa ba le 40 le bana ba bana ba le 30 ba ba palameng diesele di le 70. A siamisetsa Baiseraele dinyaga di le 8. 
Judges12:15 Abetone morwa Hilele wa kwa Phirathone a ba a swa, a fitlhwa kwa Phirathone mo nageng ya Eferaime mo thabeng ya Amaleke." 
Judges13:1 Mme Baiseraele ba fela ba dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena. Ke fa Morena a ba neela mo diatleng tsa Bafelesita dinyaga di le 40. 
Judges13:2 Jaanong ga bo go le monna mongwe wa losika lwa ga Dane kwa Sorea, yo leina la gagwe e leng Manoa. Mosadi wa gagwe o ne a le moopa, a sa tshole bana." 
Judges13:3 Mme moengele wa Morena a iponatsa mo mosading yoo, a mo raya a re: “Bona, o moopa, ga o belege bana. Mme o tla ithwala, o belega ngwana wa mosimane." 
Judges13:4 Mme jaanong a ko o itise; se nwe weine le fa e le bojalwa le e seng go ja sepe se se sa itshekang. 
Judges13:5 Gonne bona, o tla ithwala, o belega ngwana wa mosimane. A go se tle logare mo tlhogong ya gagwe, gonne mosimane yoo o tla nna moikiledi wa Modimo go tswa botsalong jwa gagwe; o tla simolola go golola Baiseraele mo diatleng tsa Bafelesita.”" 
Judges13:6 Mosadi a ya, a bolelela monna wa gagwe a re: “Monna wa Modimo o tlile kwa go nna; o ne a lebega jaaka Moengele wa Modimo, a boitshega thata, mme ga ke a mmotsa kwa a tswang teng; le ene ga a a mpolelela leina la gagwe." 
Judges13:7 O ntheile a re: ‘Bona, o tla ithwala, o belega ngwana wa mosimane. Mme jaanong, se nwe weine le fa e le bojalwa, o se je sepe se se sa itshekang; gonne mosimane yoo, e tla nna moikiledi wa Modimo go tswa botsalong go ya letsatsing la loso lwa gagwe.’ ”" 
Judges13:8 Ke fa Manoa a rapela Morena a re: “Ao! Morena, a monna wa Modimo yo ò mo romileng, a ke a tle gape kwa go rona, a re rute tse re tshwanetseng go di direla mosimane yo o tla tsalwang.”" 
Judges13:9 Modimo wa utlwa lentswe la ga Manoa. Moengele wa Modimo a tla gape kwa mosading a ntse fa fatshe kwa tshimong, mme Manoa, monna wa gagwe, a se na nae." 
Judges13:10 Ke fa mosadi a akofa, a taboga, a itsise monna wa gagwe, a mo raya a re: “Bona, monna yo o neng a tlile kwa go nna maloba o iponaditse gape mo go nna.”" 
Judges13:11 Manoa a nanoga, a sala mosadi wa gagwe morago, a fitlha kwa monneng yole, a mmotsa a re: “A ke wena monna yo o buileng le mosadi?” A re: “Ke nna.”" 
Judges13:12 Manoa a re: “Jaanong fa lefoko la gago le dirafala, mosimane o tshwanetse go phela jang le go dira eng?”" 
Judges13:13 Moengele wa Morena a araba Manoa a re: “A mosadi a itise mo go tsotlhe tse ke di mmoleletseng. 
Judges13:14 A a se je sepe se se tswang mo setlhareng sa moweine; a se ka a nwa weine le fa e le bojalwa; a se ka a ja sepe se se sa itshekang. Tsotlhe tse ke di mo laetseng a a di tshegetse.” 
Judges13:15 Ke fa Manoa a raya Moengele wa Morena a re: “Nte re go die, re go baakanyetse potsane.”" 
Judges13:16 Mme Moengele wa Morena a fetola Manoa a re: “Le fa o ka ntia, ga ke ne ke ja dijo tsa gago. Mme fa o rata go direla Morena setlhabelo sa phiso, se baakanye.” Kana Manoa o ne a sa itse fa e le Moengele wa Morena." 
Judges13:17 Ke fa Manoa a botsa Moengele wa Morena a re: “Leina la gago ke mang gore re tle re go tlotle motlhang lefoko la gago le dirafalang?” 
Judges13:18 Mme Moengele wa Morena a mo fetola a re: “O boletsang leina la me? Kana ke le le gakgamatsang!” 
Judges13:19 Ke fa Manoa a tsaya potsane le tshupelo ya teng ya dijo, a direla Morena setlhabelo sa phiso mo godimo ga lefika, mme Morena a dira ka mokgwa o o gakgamatsang: Manoa le mosadi wa gagwe ba bona" 
Judges13:20 kgabo ya molelo e tlhatlogela kwa legodimong e tswa mo aletareng le Moengele wa Morena a tlhatloga a le mo kgabong ya aletare. Ya re Manoa le mosadi wa gagwe ba bona jalo, ba wela fa fatshe ka difatlhego." 
Judges13:21 Mme Moengele wa Morena a se ka a tlhola a iponatsa gape mo go Manoa le e seng mo mosading wa gagwe. Ke fa Manoa a lemoga gore e ne e le Moengele wa Morena. 
Judges13:22 Jaanong Manoa a raya mosadi wa gagwe a re: “Ruri, re tla swa, gonne re bonye Modimo.”" 
Judges13:23 Mme mosadi wa gagwe a mo fetola a re: “Fa Morena a ka bo a ratile go re bolaya, o ka bo a se ka a amogela setlhabelo sa phiso le tshupelo ya dijo mo diatleng tsa rona; le gona o ka bo a se ka a re bontsha dilo tsotlhe tse le e seng go re utlwisa tse re sa tswang go di utlwa jaanong.”" 
Judges13:24 Mosadi a ba a belega ngwana wa mosimane, a mo taya leina la Simesone. Mosimane a gola, mme Morena a mo tshegofatsa." 
Judges13:25 Mowa wa Morena wa simolola go mo tlhotlheletsa a le mo bothibelelong jwa ga Dane fa gare ga Sorea le Ešethaole. 
Judges14:1 Simesone o kile a ya kwa Thimena, a bona mosadi wa bomorwadia Bafelesita kwa Thimena." 
Judges14:2 A boa a bolelela rraagwe le mmaagwe a re: “Ke bonye mosadi wa bomorwadia Bafelesita kwa Thimena. Mme jaanong ka re: Mo mpatleleng, e nne mosadi wa me.”" 
Judges14:3 Mme rraagwe le mmaagwe ba mmotsa ba re: “A ga go na mosadi ope mo go bomorwadia ba ga eno le mo morafeng otlhe wa ga rona, fa o ya go tsaya mosadi mo go Bafelesita ba ba sa rupang?” Mme Simesone a raya rraagwe a re: “Mo mpatlele, gonne ene o kgatlha matlho wa me.”" 
Judges14:4 Mme rraagwe le mmaagwe ba bo ba sa itse, fa seo se tswa mo Moreneng; ka gonne o ne a batla sesana-nkgope mo Bafelesiteng. Kana ka sebaka seo Bafelesita ba ne ba busa Baiseraele." 
Judges14:5 Jaanong Simesone a ya kwa Thimena, a na le rraagwe le mmaagwe. Mme ya re ba fitlha kwa masimong a moweine a Thimena, tawana ya mo kgatlhantsha e duma." 
Judges14:6 Ke fa Mowa wa Morena o tsena mo go ene ka thata, mme a e gagoganya jaaka go gagolwa potsane, a sa tshola sepe ka diatla. Mme a se ka a bolelela rraagwe le mmaagwe se a se dirileng." 
Judges14:7 Jaanong a ya, a bua le mosadi yoo; a ne a kgatlha matlho a ga Simesone." 
Judges14:8 Ya re morago ga malatsi a se kae a boela teng go mo nyala, a fapoga go ya go bona setoto sa tau ele, a fitlhela go le motshitshi wa dinotshe mo sekgoropeng sa tau le mafura a tsona." 
Judges14:9 A a rafela mo diatleng, a tsamaya a ntse a a ja; a ya kwa go rraagwe le mmaagwe, a ba naya, ba a ja, mme a se ka a ba bolelela, fa a rafile mafura a dinotshe mo sekgoropeng sa tau." 
Judges14:10 Ya re rraagwe a fitlha kwa mosading yoo, Simesone a baakanya moletlo teng, ka makau a ne a dira jalo." 
Judges14:11 Ya re Bafelesita ba mmona, ba tlisa balekane ba le 30 gore ba nne nae." 
Judges14:12 Bao Simesone a ba raya a re: “A nke ke lo tlhabele nyepo. Fa lo ka e mphuthololela mo malatsing a supa a moletlo, lwa e lemoga, foo ke tla lo naya dihempe di le 30 le diaparo tsa mokgabo di le 30." 
Judges14:13 Mme fa lo palelwa ke go e ntepololela, lona lo tshwanetse go mpha dihempe di le 30 le diaparo tsa mokgabo di le 30.” Ba mo araba ba re: “E tlhabe, re e utlwe.”" 
Judges14:14 A e ba bolela a re: “Dijo tsa tswa mo mojing, botshe jwa tswa mo go mong wa thata.” Ga feta malatsi a le mararo ba ntse ba palelwa ke go e lepolola." 
Judges14:15 Ya re ka letsatsi la bone ba raya mosadi wa ga Simesone ba re: “Kgona monna wa gago gore a re lepololele nyepo eo, e se re gongwe ra go fisa le ntlo ya ga rraago. A lo re laleditse go tla go re humanegisa gongwe nnyaya?”" 
Judges14:16 Ke fa mosadi wa ga Simesone a lela fa go ene a re: “O ntlhoile, ga o nthate. O tlhabetse ba ga etsho nyepo, mme ga o a e ntshebela.” A mo araba a re: “Bona, ga ke a e bolelela rre le mme. A o a re nka e go bolelela?”" 
Judges14:17 Mme mosadi a lela fa go ene malatsi a supa a ba neng ba tshwere moletlo ka ona. Ya re ka letsatsi la bosupa, a e mo sebela, gonne o ne a mo emeletse thata. Mosadi a e sebela ba ga gabo." 
Judges14:18 Ka letsatsi la bosupa le ise le phirime banna ba motse ba mo raya ba re: “Se se gaisang mafura a dinotshe ka botshe ke eng? Se se phalang tau ka thata ke eng?” Mme a ba fetola a re: “Fa lo ka bo lo se ka lwa lema ka moroba wa me, lo ka bo lo se ka lwa lemoga nyepo ya me.”" 
Judges14:19 Ke fa Mowa wa Morena o tsena mo go ene, a ya kwa Ašekalone, a bolaya banna ba le 30 ba teng, a tsaya diaparo tsa mokgabo tsa bone, a di naya ba ba lepolotseng nyepo ya gagwe. Mme a tuka bogale, a boela kwa ga gabo." 
Judges14:20 Mme mosadi wa ga Simesone a neelwa molekane wa gagwe, yo e neng e le motshwari mo nyalong ya gagwe." 
Judges15:1 Ya re morago ga malatsi a se kae ka sebaka sa kotulo ya mabele a korong, Simesone a etela mosadi wa gagwe ka potsane a re: “Nte ke tsene kwa mosading wa me mo ntlwaneng;” mme rraagwe a se ka a mo dumelela go tsena." 
Judges15:2 Rraagwe a re: “Ke itheile ka re: Ga o tlhole o mo rata; ka mo neela molekane wa gago. A ga ke re: Monnawe o mo gaisa ka bontle. A ene e nne wa gago mo boemong jwa yole.” 
Judges15:3 Mme Simesone a ba raya a re: “Gona fa nka se nne molato fa pele ga Bafelesita, fa ke ba direla bosula.”" 
Judges15:4 Ke fa Simesone a ya a tshwara diphokojwe di le 300, a tsaya metswaiso, a bofaganya megatla ya tse pedi le tse pedi, a bofelela motswaiso o le mongwe fa gare ga megatla e mebedi mo go tse tsotlhe." 
Judges15:5 Mme ya re a sena go tshuba metswaiso a di lesa, tsa tshabela kwa masimong a Bafelesita, tsa tshuba mabele a a sa leng letlhakeng le a a mo seboaneng le masimo a moweine le a ditlhare tsa olefa." 
Judges15:6 Ke fa Bafelesita ba botsa ba re: “Ke mang yo o dirileng jalo?” Ba re: “Ke Simesone mogwe wa monna wa kwa Thimena, ka gonne o mo amogile mosadi, a mo neela mongwe-ka-ene.” Ka moo Bafelesita ba bolola, ba fisa mosadi le rraagwe ka molelo." 
Judges15:7 Mme Simesone a ba raya a re: “Fa lo dira tse di ntseng jalo, ruri, ga nkitla ke ikhutsa ke ise ke ipusolosetse mo go lona.”" 
Judges15:8 Ke fa a ba remaganya dirope le matheka, ya nna polao e kgolo; morago a tsamaya a ya go nna mo logageng lwa Etame." 
Judges15:9 Mme Bafelesita ba bolola, ba thibelela mo nageng ya Juta; ba anama kwa Legi." 
Judges15:10 Banna ba Juta ba botsa ba re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa lo re bololetse?” Ba re: “Re bolotse go golega Simesone gore re mo direle jaaka a re diretse.”" 
Judges15:11 Ke fa banna ba le 3 000 ba Juta ba fologela kwa logageng lwa Etame, ba raya Simesone ba re: “A ga o itse gore Bafelesita ba a re busa? Jaanong ke eng se o se re diretseng?” A ba araba a re: “Ke ba diretse fela jaaka ba ntiretse.”" 
Judges15:12 Ba mo raya ba re: “Re tsile go go golega le go go neela mo diatleng tsa Bafelesita.” Simesone a ba raya a re: “Inkaneleng pele gore ga lo kitla lo mpolaya ka losi.” 
Judges15:13 Ba mo araba ba re: “Nnyaya, re tla go golega fela, re go neela mo diatleng tsa bone, mme ruri ga re kitla re go bolaya.” Jaanong ba mo golega ka dithapo tse pedi tse dintšhwa, ba mo ntsha mo logageng." 
Judges15:14 Ya re a fitlha kwa Legi, Bafelesita ba mo kgatlhantsha, ba ntse ba thela lešalaba. Mme Mowa wa Morena wa tsena mo go ene; dithapo tse di neng di le mo mabogong a gagwe tsa nna jaaka ditlhale tse di fisitsweng ke molelo; dikgole tse a golegilweng ka tsona tsa kumagana, a bofologa mabogo." 
Judges15:15 A bona lotlhaa lo lošwa lwa esele, a ntsha letsogo, a lo tsaya, a bolaya banna ba le sekete ka lone." 
Judges15:16 Ke fa Simesone a boka a re: “Ka lotlhaa lwa esele ke ba dirile mekoa ya ditoto; ka lotlhaa lwa esele ke bolaile banna ba le sekete.” 
Judges15:17 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a latlha lotlhaa lo a neng a lo tshwere, a bitsa felo foo Mmoto-wa-lotlhaa." 
Judges15:18 Mme ya re a nyorilwe thata a lelela Moreneng a re: “Ke wena o dirileng pholoso e kgolo e ka letsogo la motlhanka wa gago. A jaanong ke tla swa ka lenyora, ke wela mo diatleng tsa ba ba sa rupang?”" 
Judges15:19 Ke fa Modimo o phantsha khuti e e kwa Legi go tswa metsi mo go yona. Ya re a nwa, a boelwa ke nonofo, a phela. Ke ka moo e bidiwang Motswedi wa moledi; o sa le teng kwa Legi le kajeno." 
Judges15:20 A siamisetsa Iseraele mo metlheng ya Bafelesita dinyaga di le 20. 
Judges16:1 Simesone o kile a ya kwa Gasa, a bona mosadi wa seaka teng, a tsena kwa go ene." 
Judges16:2 Ya re ba Gasa ba begelwa go twe: “Simesone o tsile mono,” ba mo dikanyetsa, ba mo lalela bosigo jotlhe kwa kgorong ya motse; ba lala ba didimetse fela ba re: “E tla re mo mosong boo sa, re mmolae.”" 
Judges16:3 Mme Simesone a robala fela go fitlha bosigogare; bosigogare a tsoga, a tshwara ditswalo tsa kgoro ya motse le disana tsoo pedi tsa tsona, a di somola mmogo le mephakarego, a di sikara magetleng, a di isa kwa setlhoeng sa thaba e e lebaganyeng le Heberone." 
Judges16:4 Morago ga moo a rata mosadi mo molapong wa Soreke; leina la gagwe e ne e le Delila. 
Judges16:5 Dikgosana tsa Bafelesita tsa tla kwa go ene, tsa mo raya tsa re: “Mo tlakise gore o lemoge kwa thata e kgolo ya gagwe e tswang teng le ka fa re ka mo kgonang ka teng gore re tle re mo golege, re mo fenye. Foo mongwe le mongwe wa rona o tla go naya diselefera di le 1 100.”" 
Judges16:6 Ke fa Delila a mo raya a re: “A ko o mpolele gore thata ya gago e kgolo ka eng? O ka golegwa ka eng go go fenya?” 
Judges16:7 Simesone a mo raya a re: “Fa ba ka mpofa ka mesifa e supa e mešwa e e iseng e omelele, ke tla nna bokoa, ke tshwana le batho botlhe.”" 
Judges16:8 Dikgosana tsa Bafelesita tsa mo tlisetsa mesifa e supa e mešwa e e iseng e omelele; a mo golega ka yona. 
Judges16:9 Jaanong ya re ba ntse ba mo laletse mo ntlwaneng, a mo raya a re: “Simesone, Bafelesita ba a go wela!” Ke fa a kgaola mesifa jaaka go kgaolwa megala ya lelodi, fa e utlwa molelo. Mme sephiri sa thata ya gagwe sa se ka sa itsiwe." 
Judges16:10 Ke fa Delila a raya Simesone a re: “Bona, o ntsieditse, o mpoleletse maaka! Jaanong a ko o ntshebele gore o ka golegwa ka eng?”" 
Judges16:11 A mo araba a re: “Fa ba ka mpofa ka megala e mešwa e go iseng go dirwe tiro epe ka yona, ke tla nna bokoa, ke tshwana le batho botlhe.”" 
Judges16:12 Delila a tsaya megala a mešwa, a mo golega ka yona. A ba a mo raya a re: “Simesone, Bafelesita ba a go wela!” Ba ntse ba mo laletse mo ntlwaneng. Mme a di kgaola jaaka ditlhale, a bofologa mabogo." 
Judges16:13 Ke fa Delila a raya Simesone a re: “Go fitlha jaanong o ntsieditse, o mpoleletse maaka. Mpolelele tlhe gore o ka golegwa ka eng?” A mo araba a re: “Fa o ka loga makaodi a supa a tlhogo ya me mmogo le ditlhale tse di logwang, wa a kokotela ka lomapo mo loboteng, foo ke tla nna bokoa, ke tshwana le batho botlhe.”" 
Judges16:14 Jaanong a mo robatsa, a loga makaodi a supa a tlhogo ya gagwe mmogo le ditlhale tse di logwang, a a kokotela ka lomapo; a ba a mo raya a re: “Simesone, Bafelesita ba a go wela!” Mme a tsoga borokong jwa gagwe, a somola lomapo mmogo le lesela le le logilweng." 
Judges16:15 Ke fa Delila a mo raya a re: “O ka bua jang o a re, o a nthata, etswe pelo ya gago e sa re sepe ka nna. E setse e le gararo o ntse o ntsietsa, o sa mpolele gore thata ya gago e kgolo ka eng.”" 
Judges16:16 Mme ya re ka a mo tshwenya ka mafoko a gagwe ka malatsi aotlhe, a mo emeletse, a fela pelo, mo e keteng a ka swa," 
Judges16:17 a mmolelela tsotlhe tse di mo pelong ya gagwe, a mo raya a re: “Logare ga lo ise lo tle mo tlhogong ya me, gonne ke moikiledi wa Modimo go tswa botsalong jwa me. Fa nka beolwa, thata ya me e ka ntlogela; ke ka nna bokoa, ke tshwana le batho botlhe.”" 
Judges16:18 Ya re Delila a bona, fa a mmoleletse sephiri sa pelo ya gagwe sotlhe, a roma a bitsa dikgosana tsa Bafelesita a re: “Tlayang jaanong, gonne o mpoleletse sephiri sa pelo ya gagwe sotlhe.” Dikgosana tsa Bafelesita tsa tla kwa go ene, di tshotse diselefera." 
Judges16:19 Delila a mo robatsa a mo farile, a ba a bitsa monna yo mongwe, mme a beola makaodi a supa a tlhogo ya gagwe. Ke fa a simolola go koafala, mme thata ya gagwe ya mo tlogela." 
Judges16:20 Ke fa Delila a re: “Simesone, Bafelesita ba a go wela!” Mme ya re a thanya borokong jwa gagwe, a ithaya a re: “Ke tla tswa jaaka gangwe le gape, ke ikgolola,” mme a sa itse, fa Morena a mo tlogetse." 
Judges16:21 Mme Bafelesita ba mo tshwara, ba mo gonya matlho, ba mo isa kwa Gasa, ba mo golega ka dikeetane tse pedi tsa kgotlho, mme tiro ya gagwe ya nna go sila mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Judges16:22 Mme ya re a sena go beolwa, moriri wa tlhogo ya gagwe wa tlhoga gape." 
Judges16:23 Jaanong tsatsi le lengwe dikgosana tsa Bafelesita tsa kgobokana go tlhabela Dagone, modimo wa bone, ditlhabelo tse dikgolo le go itumela. Ke fa ba opela ba re: “Modimo wa rona o neetse Simesone, mmaba wa rona, mo diatleng tsa rona!”" 
Judges16:24 Ya re batho ba mmona, ba boka modimo wa bone ba re: “Modimo wa rona o neetse Simesone, mmaba wa rona, mo diatleng tsa rona; ke ene yo o sentseng lefatshe la rona, a bolaya ba bantsi ba rona!”" 
Judges16:25 Mme ya re dipelo tsa bone di itumela, ba re: “Bitsang Simesone, a tle go re tshamekela.” Ba bitsa Simesone, a tswa mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, a tshameka fa pele ga bone, ba mmeile fa gare ga dipinagare tsa ntlo." 
Judges16:26 Mme Simesone a raya mosimane yo o neng a mo tshwere letsogo a re: “Nte ke apaape dipinagare tse di rweleng ntlo gore ke ikaege ka tsona.” 
Judges16:27 Kana ntlo e ne e tletse banna le basadi le dikgosana tsotlhe tsa Bafelesita di le teng; le mo godimo ga ntlo go le banna le basadi, e ka nna ba le kete tse tharo, ba ntse ba lebile metshameko ya ga Simesone." 
Judges16:28 Mme Simesone a rapela Morena a re: “Morena Modimo, a ko o nkgopole, o ntiise ka nako eno fela, Modimo, gore ke ipusolosetse mo Bafelesiteng ka pusoloso e le nngwe ka ntlha ya matlho a mabedi a me.”" 
Judges16:29 Ke fa Simesone a tshwara dipinagare tse di rweleng ntlo, a di kgarametsa, nngwe ka le le jang le e nngwe ka la molema." 
Judges16:30 Mme Simesone a re: “A ke swe le Bafelesita!” A ba a inama a ntse a kgarametsa ka thata. Ke fa ntlo e wela dikgosana le batho botlhe ba ba mo go yona. Batho ba o ba bolaileng jalo mo losong lwa gagwe ba ne ba feta ba o ba bolaileng mo bophelong jwa gagwe. 
Judges16:31 Jaanong ga tla bomorwa-rraagwe le ba kgotla ya ga rraagwe botlhe, ba mo tsaya, ba mo tlosa, ba ya go mo fitlha fa gare ga Sorea le Ešethaole mo mabitleng a ga Manoa rraagwe. O ne a siamiseditse Iseraele dinyaga di le 20." 
Judges17:1 Go ne go le monna kwa dithabeng tsa Eferaime yo leina la gagwe e leng Miga. 
Judges17:2 Ene a raya mmaagwe a re: “Mma, diselefera di le 1 100 tse di utswilweng mo go wena, bona, diselefera tseo di mo go nna. Ke nna ke di tsereng. Kana o hutsitse khutso ka ntlha ya tsona; le gona o e buile mo ditsebeng tsa me.” Ke fa mmaagwe a re: “A morwaake a tshegofadiwe ke Morena!”" 
Judges17:3 A busetsa mmaagwe diselefera di le 1 100 jalo, mme mmaagwe a re: “Diselefera tseo ke di tlhaoletse Morena, ke di ntsha ka ntlha ya ga morwaake go dira modimo wa seseto le o o bopilweng. Mme jaanong ke rata go di go busetsa.”" 
Judges17:4 Mme a busetsa mmaagwe diselefera tseo; mmaagwe a tsaya diselefera di le 200, a di neela mothudi; ene a dira modimo wa seseto le o o bopilweng ka tsona; wa ba wa nna mo ntlong ya ga Miga." 
Judges17:5 Miga, monna yoo o ne a na le tempelana ya medimo, a dira khiba ya boperesiti le medimo ya lelapa, a dira mongwe wa bomorwawe moperesiti, a nna moperesiti wa gagwe." 
Judges17:6 Ka sebaka seo go ne go se na kgosi mo Iseraeleng; mongwe le mongwe a dira tse di kgatlhang matlho a gagwe. 
Judges17:7 Jaanong go ne ga tla lekau le tswa kwa Betleheme wa Juta kwa losikeng lwa Juta. E ne le Molefi, a tlile teng go jaka." 
Judges17:8 Monna yoo o ne a tlogile kwa Betleheme motseng wa Juta, a ile go jaka fa a ka bonang tiro teng. Jaanong a fitlha kwa dithabeng tsa Eferaime kwa ntlong ya ga Miga a le mo tseleng." 
Judges17:9 Miga a mmotsa a re: “O tswa kae?” A mo araba a re: “Ke Molefi wa Betleheme wa Juta. Ke mo tseleng go jaka fa nka bonang tiro teng.” 
Judges17:10 Miga a mo raya a re: “Nna le nna, o nne rre le moperesiti wa me; ke tla go naya diselefera di le some ka ngwaga le diaparo le dijo.” Mme ya re a emelela Molefi," 
Judges17:11 a dumela go nna le monna yoo; lekau leo la nna mo go ene jaaka mongwe wa bomorwawe. 
Judges17:12 Mme Miga a tsenya Molefi mo tirong; lekau leo la nna moperesiti wa gagwe, la nna mo ntlong ya ga Miga." 
Judges17:13 Ke fa Miga a re: “Jaanong ke a itse gore Morena o tla ntirela molemo; gonne ke na le moperesiti wa Molefi.” 
Judges18:1 Mo metlheng eo go ne go se na kgosi mo Iseraeleng. Ya re ka sebaka seo ba lotso lwa Dane ba ipatlela kabelo ya naga, fa ba ka nnang teng; gonne kabelo e ne e ise e wele mo diatleng tsa bone mo gare ga ditso tsa Iseraele go fitlha letsatsing leo." 
Judges18:2 Jaanong Badane ba roma banna ba batlhano ba losika lwa bone, ba romilwe ke lotso lotlhe, e le banna ba ba pelokgale; ba tloga kwa Sorea le kwa Ešethaole go tlhola lefatshe le go le sekaseka. Ba ba laela ba re: “Yaang lo sekaseke lefatshe.” Bone bao ba fitlha kwa dithabeng tsa Eferaime kwa ntlong ya ga Miga, ba lala teng." 
Judges18:3 Ya re ba le mo lapeng la ga Miga, ba lemoga lentswe la lekau la Molefi, ba ya teng, ba mmotsa ba re: “Ke mang yo o go tlisitseng, kwano? O dira eng mono? O batlang mono?”" 
Judges18:4 A ba araba a re: “Miga o ntiretse jaana le jaana, a nthapa gore ke nne moperesiti wa gagwe.”" 
Judges18:5 Ba mo kopa ba re: “A ko o botse Modimo, re tle re itse gore a leeto la rona le re le tsamayang le tla nna le letlhogonolo?”" 
Judges18:6 Moperesiti a ba araba a re: “Tsamayang ka kagiso! Leeto la lona le lo le tshwereng, le fa pele ga Morena.”" 
Judges18:7 Ke fa banna ba batlhano ba ya ba fitlha kwa motseng wa Laiše, ba bona batho ba ba mo go ona ba agile mo thagamong ka fa melaong ya Basitone, ba iketlile, ba sa boife sepe, go se na ope yo o utlwisang botlhoko mo lefatsheng leo ka go thukhutha khumo; le gona ba le kgakala le Basitone, ba sa kgathalale batho ba bangwe." 
Judges18:8 Ya re ba fitlha gape kwa go ba ga bone kwa Sorea le Ešethaole, ba ga bone ba ba botsa ba re: “Go ntse jang?”" 
Judges18:9 Ba araba ba re: “Nanogang a re yeng re ba tlhasele! Gonne re bonye lefatshe lele, ra fitlhela le le molemo thata. Jaanong a lo a re lo a itulela? Lo se ka lwa nna ditshwakga go ya le go fitlha le go thopa lefatshe leo!" 
Judges18:10 E tla re lo fitlha, lo gorogele fa bathong ba ba iketlileng le mo lefatsheng le le atlhameng mo ntlheng tsotlhe. Kana Modimo o le neetse mo diatleng tsa lona; ke felo fa go sa tlhokafaleng sepe teng sa dilo tse di mo lefatsheng.”" 
Judges18:11 Ke fa go huduga banna ba le 600 ba losika lwa Badane, ba tloga kwa Sorea le kwa Ešethaole, ba tlhometse dibolai tsa ntwa." 
Judges18:12 Ba bolola, ba thibelela kwa Khiriathe-Jearime wa Juta. Ke ka moo felo foo go bidiwang Bothibelelo jwa Badane go fitlha letsatsing leno. Go mo ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi ya Khiriathe-Jearime." 
Judges18:13 Go tswa teng ba fetela kwa dithabeng tsa Eferaime, ba gorogela fa ntlong ya ga Miga." 
Judges18:14 Jaanong banna ba batlhano ba ba kileng ba ya go tlhola lefatshe la Laiše ba simolola go bua, ba raya ba ga bone ba re: “A lo a itse gore mo matlong a go na le khiba ya boperesiti le medimo ya lelapa le modimo wa seseto le o o bopilweng. Lo itse jaanong se lo tshwanetseng lwa se dira.”" 
Judges18:15 Ba ya teng, ba fitlha kwa ntlong ya lekau la Molefi e e leng ntlo ya ga Miga, ba le botsa matsogo." 
Judges18:16 Jaanong ya re banna ba Badane ba ba 600 ba ba tlhometseng dibolai tsa ntwa ba ntse ba eme fa kgorong," 
Judges18:17 banna ba batlhano ba ba kileng ba ya go tlhola lefatshe ba ya kwa tempelaneng, ba tsena teng, ba tsaya modimo wa seseto le khiba ya boperesiti le medimo ya lelapa le modimo o o bopilweng, moperesiti ene a ntse a eme le banna ba ba 600 ba ba tlhometseng dibolai tsa ntwa kwa mojakong wa kgoro." 
Judges18:18 Mme bale ba ba tsenyeng mo ntlong ya ga Miga, ya re ba ntse ba tsaya modimo wa seseto le khiba ya boperesiti le medimo ya lelapa le modimo o o bopilweng, moperesiti a ba botsa a re: “Lo dira eng?”" 
Judges18:19 Ba mo fetola ba re: “Didimala, se tlhole o bua! Yaa le rona, o nne rraarona le moperesiti wa rona. Se se botoka mo go wena ke eng? A ke go nna moperesiti wa lelapa la monna a le mongwe gongwe go nna moperesiti wa lotso, wa losika mo go Iseraele?”" 
Judges18:20 Ke fa pelo ya moperesiti e ja monate, mme a tsaya khiba ya boperesiti le medimo ya lelapa le modimo wa seseto le modimo o o bopilweng, a ema mo gare ga batho bao." 
Judges18:21 Jaanong ba retologa, ba tsamaya, ba eteletsa bana le diruiwa le dikhumo pele." 
Judges18:22 Ya re ba setse ba le kgakala le ntlo ya ga Miga, ga kuiwa banna ba ba mo malapeng a a mo tikologong ya ntlo ya ga Miga, ba latela Badane." 
Judges18:23 Ya re ba tlhaeletsa Badane, bone ba retolola difatlhego, ba botsa Miga ba re: “O batla eng, fa o re latetse ka batho ba gago?”" 
Judges18:24 A fetola a re: “Lo tsere medimo ya me e ke e dirileng le moperesiti, lwa tloga. Jaanong ke saletswe ke eng? Lo ka botsa jang lo re: ‘O batla eng?’ ”" 
Judges18:25 Mme Badane ba mo raya ba re: “Se utlwatse lentswe la gago mo go rona, e se re gongwe banna ba mowa o o galakang ba lo wela, mme wa nyelelelwa ke bophelo jwa gago le maphelo a ba lapa la gago!”" 
Judges18:26 Jaanong Badane ba ikela kwa pele. Mme ya re ka Miga a bona gore ba thata bogolo go ene, a retologa, a boela kwa gae." 
Judges18:27 Ya re ba sena go tsaya medimo e Miga a e dirileng le moperesiti yo o neng a na nae ba fitlha ba wela Laiše, ba tlhasela batho ba ba mo thagamong ba ba iketlileng, ba ba bolaya ka bogale jwa tšhaka, ba fisa motse oo ka molelo." 
Judges18:28 Go ne go se na mopholosi; gonne ona o ne o le kgakala le Sitone; le gona ba sa kgathalele batho ba bangwe. Motse oo o ne o le mo lebaleng la Bethe-Rehobe. Badane ba tsosa motse oo, ba nna mo go ona." 
Judges18:29 Ba taya motse leina la Dane ka leina la ga Dane rraabo yo o belegetsweng Iseraele. Mme pele ga foo leina la motse oo e ne e le Laiše. 
Judges18:30 Mme Badane ba ikemisetsa modimo ole wa seseto. Jonathane morwa Geresome, morwa Moše, ene le ba lotso lwa gagwe e ne e le baperesiti ba lotso lwa ga Dane go fitlha letsatsing le ba ntshitsweng mo lefatsheng ka lone." 
Judges18:31 Ba ikemisetsa modimo wa seseto wa ga Miga jalo o ene a o dirileng; wa nna teng ka malatsi otlhe a Tempelana ya Modimo e neng e le kwa Silo ka ona. 
Judges19:1 E rile ka malatsi ale, fa go ise go nne kgosi mo Iseraeleng, monna wa Molefi a bo a jaka kwa mafelelong a dithaba tsa Eferaime, mme a tsere mosadi wa nyatsi wa kwa Betleheme wa Juta." 
Judges19:2 Mme nyatsi ya gagwe ya mo ngalela, ya mo tlogela, ya ya kwa ga yona kwa Betleheme wa Juta, ya nna teng malatsi a dikgwedi tse nne." 
Judges19:3 Ke fa ene monna yoo wa gagwe a tloga, a mo latela gore a ye go bua nae tsa lorato, a mmuse; a ya, a na le motlhanka wa gagwe le diesele di le pedi. Mosadi yoo a mo isa mo ntlong ya ga rraagwe; ya re rraagwe mosetsana a mmona, a itumela, a mo kgatlhantsha." 
Judges19:4 Mme mogwagwadiagwe, rraagwe mosetsana a mo thibela go tsamaya, mo a bileng a nna nae malatsi a le mararo, ba a ja, ba a nwa, ba lala teng." 
Judges19:5 Ka letsatsi la bone ba phakela mo mosong, mme a tsoga a re o a tsamaya, mme rraagwe mosetsana a raya mogwe wa gagwe a re: “Itiise ka thathana ya bogobe! Morago ga moo lo ka tsamaya.”" 
Judges19:6 Ba nna, ba a ja ba nwa mmogo ka bobedi jwa bone, mme rraagwe mosetsana a raya monna yoo a re: “A ko o dumelele go lala gape gore pelo ya gago e itumele.”" 
Judges19:7 Mme ya re monna a nanoga a re o a tsamaya, mogwagwadiagwe a mo rapela thata. Ke fa a boa, a lala gape." 
Judges19:8 Ka letsatsi la botlhano a phakela mo mosong a re o a tsamaya, mme rraagwe mosetsana a mo raya a re: “A ko o tiise pelo ya gago, lo iketle go ya tshokologong ya letsatsi.” Mme ba ja ka bobedi jwa bone." 
Judges19:9 Jaanong monna yoo a nanoga a re o a tsamaya a na le nyatsi ya gagwe le motlhanka wa gagwe, mme mogwagwadiagwe rraagwe mosetsana, a mo raya a re: “A ko o bone, letsatsi le ngotlegile, le ya phirimong. A ko o lale, bona, letsatsi le ya go wela. Lala mono gore pelo ya gago e itumele. Lo tla tsoga lo phakela, lo wela tseleng ya lona lo ya kwa gae.”" 
Judges19:10 Mme monna a gana go lala gape; a nanoga a tsamaya a fitlha go lebagana le Jebusi, e bong Jerusalema, a na le diesele tse pedi tse di belesitsweng le nyatsi ya gagwe le motlhanka wa gagwe." 
Judges19:11 Ya re ba le kwa Jebusi, letsatsi la bo le le gaufi le go phirima, ke fa motlhanka a raya morena wa gagwe a re: “A ga re ka ke ra fapogela kwa motseng o wa Bajebusi, ra lala mo go ona?”" 
Judges19:12 Mme morena wa gagwe a mo raya a re: “Ga re kitla re fapogela kwa motseng wa ba sele ba e seng Baiseraele. Re tla fetela kwa Gibea.” 
Judges19:13 A ba a raya motlhanka wa gagwe a re: “A re fetele kwa motseng o mongwe, re lale kwa Gibea gongwe kwa Rama.”" 
Judges19:14 Ba feta ba ya pele, ba phirimelelwa ba le gaufi le Gibea wa Benyamene." 
Judges19:15 Ba fapogela teng gore ba tsene, ba lale mo Gibea; ya re ba sena go tsena, ba nna fa fatshe mo patlelong ya motse, mme go se na ope yo o ba tsholelang mo ntlong gore ba robale." 
Judges19:16 Mme ya re go le mantsiboana, ga tla monna mogolo, a tswa tirong ya gagwe kwa masimong. Monna yoo e ne e le wa kwa dithabeng tsa Eferaime, a phela mo Gibea e le moeng. Banna ba felo foo e ne e le Babenyamene." 
Judges19:17 Ya re monna mogolo a tsholetsa matlho, a bona monna wa moeti mo patlelong ya motse, a botsa a re: “O tswa kae? O ya kae?”" 
Judges19:18 A mo araba a re: “Re mo tseleng, re tswa kwa Betleheme wa Juta, re boela kwa ga rona kwa mafelelong a dithaba tsa Eferaime. Ke ne ke ile kwa Betleheme wa Juta; jaanong ke ya kwa Tempelaneng ya Morena, mme ga go na ope yo o ntsholelang mo ntlong." 
Judges19:19 Re tshotse dikokole le dijo tsa diesele tsa rona; le gona re tshotse mefago ya senkgwe le weine ya me le ya lelata la gago le ya motlhanka yo o nang le motlhanka wa gago. Ga go na sepe se se tlhokafalang.” 
Judges19:20 Ke fa monna mogolo a re: “Baya pelo, se tshwenyege! Fela tse o di tlhokang ke tla go babalela ka tsona. O se ka wa lala mo patlelong.”" 
Judges19:21 Jaanong a mo isa mo ntlong ya gagwe, a naya diesele dijo; ba tlhapa dinao, ba a ja, ba a nwa." 
Judges19:22 Ya re ba ntse ba itumedisa dipelo tsa bone, ga tla banna ba motse, banna ba dikebeke, ba dikanyetsa ntlo, ba itaya setswalo, ba raya monna mogolo mong wa ntlo, ba re: “Ntsha monna yo o tlileng mo ntlong ya gago gore re tle re mo senye.”" 
Judges19:23 Mme monna yoo, mong wa ntlo a tswela kwa go bone, a ba raya a re: “Nnyaya, ba ga etsho! A lo ke lo se ka lwa dira bosula jo bo kalo! Jaanong ka monna yoo a setse a gorogetse mo ntlong ya me, se direng tiro e e tlhabisang ditlhong e!" 
Judges19:24 Bonang, morwadiake wa lekgarebe le nyatsi ya gagwe ke ba, nteng ke ba ntshe. Ba senyeng, lo dire ka bone ka fa lo ratang ka teng, mme monna yoo lo se ka lwa mo direla selo se, se se tlhabisang ditlhong.”" 
Judges19:25 Mme banna bao ba gana go mo utlwa. Ke fa monna yole a tshwara nyatsi ya gagwe, a e ntshetsa kwa ntle kwa go bone; mme ba e senya, ba dira ka yona ka fa ba ratang ka teng bosigo jotlhe go ya mosong. E rile mahube a tlhatloga, ba e tlogela." 
Judges19:26 Ya re boo sa, ga tla mosadi yoo, a wela fa fatshe fa mojakong wa ntlo ya monna e morena wa gagwe a neng a le mo go yona, a namalala teng go ya mosong." 
Judges19:27 Jaanong ya re morena wa gagwe a tsoga mo mosong, a bula setswalo sa ntlo, a tswa a re o tsamaela pele, a fitlhela mosadi, e bong nyatsi ya gagwe, a namaletse fa mojakong wa ntlo, diatla tsa gagwe di le fa serepoding." 
Judges19:28 A mo raya a re: “Tsoga, re tsamae!” Mme a se ka a araba, ka a sule. Jaanong a mo tsaya, a mmelesa mo eseleng. Monna yoo a tloga jalo, a ya kwa ga gabo." 
Judges19:29 Ya re a sena go fitlha kwa gae, a tsaya thipa, a tshwara setoto sa nyatsi ya gagwe, a se kgaoganya ka fa ditokololong tsa sona, a dira dikarolo di le 12, a di romela kwa dinageng tsotlhe tsa Iseraele." 
Judges19:30 Mme botlhe ba ba neng ba di bona ba re: “Tse di ntseng jalo ga di ise di ke di dirafale le e seng go bonwa ka gope go tloga letsatsing le Baiseraele ba duleng kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto ka lone go tla go fitlha letsatsing leno. Di eleng tlhoko ka pelo, gakololang lo bue!”" 
Judges20:1 Ke fa Baiseraele botlhe ba bolola; phuthego ya phuthegela kwa Mitsepha fa pele ga Morena ka seopo se le sengwe go tswa kwa Dane go ya kwa Bereseba le ba lefatshe la Gileate. 
Judges20:2 Ga ikemisa ditlhogo tsotlhe tsa morafe le ditso tsotlhe tsa Iseraele mo pitsong ya morafe wa Modimo e le banna ba le 400 000 ba dinao ba ba somolang tšhaka. 
Judges20:3 Babenyamene ba ne ba utlwa gore Baiseraele ba tlhatlogetse kwa Mitsepha. Jaanong Baiseraele ba re: “Bolelang gore bosula joo bo dirafetse jang?” 
Judges20:4 Ga araba monna yole wa Molefi, monna wa mosadi yo o bolailweng, a bolela a re: “Ke ne ka fitlha fa Gibea maloba yo o mo nageng ya Benyamene, nna le nyatsi ya me, ra lala teng." 
Judges20:5 Ke fa beng ba Gibea ba ntsogela, ba dikanyetsa ntlo bosigo ka ntlha ya me, ba ikaeletse go mpolaya, mme ba senya nyatsi ya me, mo a bileng a swa." 
Judges20:6 Ka ba ka tsaya nyatsi ya me, ka mo kgaoganya dikarolo, ka di romela kwa dinageng tsotlhe tsa lefatshe la Baiseraele; gonne ba dirile tiro e e tlhabisang ditlhong ya boikepo mo Iseraeleng." 
Judges20:7 Jaanong lo teng fano, lona Baiseraele botlhe. Sekang kgang e, lo ntshe kgakololo fano.”" 
Judges20:8 Ke fa morafe otlhe o ema ka bongwefela o re: “A go se nne ope wa rona yo o boelang kwa tenteng ya gagwe le e seng ope wa rona yo o fapogelang kwa ntlong ya gagwe. 
Judges20:9 Mme jaanong se re tla se direlang Gibea ke se: A re mmololeng ka fa tengweng! 
Judges20:10 A e re mo lotsong longwe le longwe lwa Iseraele banna ba ba 100 ba ntshe lesome, ba ba 1 000 ba ntshe 100, ba kete tse some ba ntshe 1 000, ba ye go tseela morafe mefago. Mme e re ba sena go boa, re direle Gibea wa Benyamene tse di tshwanetseng tiro yotlhe e e tlhabisang ditlhong e ba e dirileng mo Iseraeleng.”" 
Judges20:11 Jaanong banna botlhe ba Iseraele ba phuthegela motse oo wa Gibea, ba golagantswe ka maikutlo a le mangwe." 
Judges20:12 Mme ditso tsa Iseraele tsa roma banna kwa lotsong lotlhe lwa ga Benyamene, tsa re: “Ke bosula jo bo ntseng jang jo bo dirafetseng mo go lona?" 
Judges20:13 Jaanong he, ntshang banna bao ba dikebeke ba ba mo Gibea gore re ba bolae, re tlose bosula mo Iseraeleng.” Mme Babenyamene ba gana go utlwa se se bolelwang ke Baiseraele bomorwa-rraabo." 
Judges20:14 Mme Babenyamene ba phuthegela kwa Gibea, ba tswa mo metseng ya bone gore ba bolole go tlhabana le Baiseraele." 
Judges20:15 Ya re ka letsatsi leo go balwa Babenyamene ba ba tswang kwa metseng, ya bo e le banna ba le 26 000 ba ba somolang tšhaka; baagi ba Gibea ba balwa ba le bosi, ya nna banna ba le 700 ba ba tlhaotsweng." 
Judges20:16 Mo bathong botlhe bao go ne go tlhaotswe banna ba le 700 ba ba melema; botlhe bao e le ba ba maroka, ba itse go konopa ka seragamajwe, ba se ke ba fosa." 
Judges20:17 Le banna ba Iseraele ba balwa kwa ntle ga Babenyamene, e le banna ba le 400 000 ba ba somolang tšhaka, botlhe bao e le batlhabani." 
Judges20:18 Jaanong Baiseraele ba tloga ba tlhatlogela kwa Bethele, ba botsa Modimo ba re: “Ke bomang mo go rona ba ba tshwanetseng go etelela pele le go simolola ntwa le Babenyamene?” Morena a re: “A go simolole Bajuta.”" 
Judges20:19 Jaanong Baiseraele ba tsoga mo mosong, ba dikanyetsa Gibea ka ntwa." 
Judges20:20 Banna ba Iseraele ba bolola go tlhabana le Babenyamene; banna ba Iseraele ba ikemisa ka thulaganyo ya ntwa ba lebile Gibea. 
Judges20:21 Mme Babenyamene ba bolola ba tswa mo Gibea, ba bolaya banna ba Iseraele ba le 22 000 ka letsatsi leo, ba ba digela fa fatshe." 
Judges20:22 Mme banna ba morafe wa Iseraele ba itiisa, ba ikemisa gape ka thulaganyo ya ntwa mo felong fa ba neng ba dirile jalo ka letsatsi la ntlha." 
Judges20:23 Mme pele ga foo Baiseraele ba ne ba tlhatlogetse kwa Bethele, ba lela fa pele ga Morena go ya mantsiboeng. Ba botsa Morena ba re: “A re tshwanetse go atamela gape go tlhabana le Babenyamene, bomorwa-rraarona?” Morena a re: “Ba bololeng!”" 
Judges20:24 Mme ya re Baiseraele ba atamela Babenyamene ka letsatsi la bobedi," 
Judges20:25 Babenyamene ba bolola, ba ba kgatlhantsha, ba tswa mo Gibea ka letsatsi la bobedi, ba bolaya banna ba le 18 000 ba Baiseraele gape, ba ba digela fa fatshe. Botlhe bao e le ba ba neng ba tshotse ditšhaka." 
Judges20:26 Ke fa batlhabani botlhe ba Iseraele ba tlhatlogela kwa Bethele, ba nnela go lela teng fa pele ga Morena, ba itima dijo ka letsatsi leo go ya mantsiboeng, ba direla Morena ditlhabelo tsa phiso le tsa tebogo." 
Judges20:27 Baiseraele ba botsa Morena. (Kana Letlole la Kgolagano ya Modimo le ne le le teng ka malatsi ao. 
Judges20:28 Phinehase morwa Eleasare morwa Arone o ne a tshwere tirelo fa go lone ka sebaka seo.) Ba re: “A re tshwanetse go bolola gape go tlhabana le Babenyamene bomorwa-rraarona kampo re lese?” Morena a re: “Bololang, gonne kamoso ke tla ba neela mo diatleng tsa lona.”" 
Judges20:29 Jaanong Baiseraele ba beela Gibea balaledi mo tikologong. 
Judges20:30 Baiseraele ba bololela Babenyamene ka letsatsi la boraro, ba ikemisa ka thulaganyo ba lebile Gibea jaaka gangwe le gape." 
Judges20:31 Ke fa Babenyamene ba tswa ba kgatlhantsha morafe, ba katosiwa motse, ba gogelwa kwa nageng le kwa ditseleng tse dikgolo tse nngwe ya tsona e yang kwa Bethele, e nngwe kwa Gibea, ba simolola go bolaya bangwe ba morafe jaaka gangwe le gape, e ka nna banna ba le 30 ba Iseraele." 
Judges20:32 Babenyamene ba ithaya ba re: “Re ba fentse jaaka pele.” Mme Baiseraele ba ne ba rile: “A re tshabeng, re ba gogele kwa ditseleng tse dikgolo, re ba tlogedise motse.”" 
Judges20:33 Jaanong banna botlhe ba Iseraele ba tloga fa ba neng ba le teng, ba ya ba ikemisa kwa Baale-Thamare; le balaledi ba Iseraele ba tswa mo felong ga bone, ba tlhagelela mo lebaleng la sekgwa sa Geba;" 
Judges20:34 ba fitlha ka fa ntle ga Gibea, e le banna ba le 10 000 ba ba tlhaotsweng mo Baiseraeleng botlhe, mme tlhabano ya nna bokete. Fela Babenyamene ba ne ba sa lemoge, fa tatlhego e ba wela." 
Judges20:35 Morena o ne a itaya Babenyamene jalo ka Baiseraele. Baiseraele ba bolaya banna ba Benyamene ba le 25 100 ka letsatsi leo, botlhe bao e le ba ba somolang tšhaka." 
Judges20:36 Ke fa Babenyamene ba lemoga gore ba fentswe. Kana Baiseraele ba ne ba sutetse Babenyamene, ka ba ne ba ikanya balaledi ba ba ba beetseng Gibea." 
Judges20:37 Mme balaledi ba ne ba tlhasetse motse ka tshoganyetso; ba bolaya motse otlhe ka bogale jwa tšhaka. 
Judges20:38 Gape banna ba Iseraele ba ne ba utlwanye le balaledi gore ba kuise musi mogolo mo motseng. 
Judges20:39 Jaanong ya re banna ba Iseraele ba retologa mo tlhabanong le Babenyamene ba simolola go bolaya banna bangwe ba Iseraele, e ka nna ba le 30, ka ba ithaya ba re: “Ruri, re ba fentse gape jaaka mo tlhabanong ya ntlha.”" 
Judges20:40 Ya baa gona musi o simololang go tlhatloga mo motseng, e le musi o ntse lonaka. Jaanong ya re Babenyamene ba retologela kwa morago, ba bona musi wa motse otlhe o tlhatlogela kwa legodimong." 
Judges20:41 Ke fa banna ba Iseraele ba boa, mme banna ba Benyamene ba tseana; gonne ba ne ba lemoga gore tatlhego e a ba wela." 
Judges20:42 Ba hularela banna ba Iseraele, ba tshabela kwa sekakeng, mme tlhabano ya ba latela. Metse e ba fetang ka yona, ba bolawa ke beng ba yona." 
Judges20:43 Ba dikanyetsa Babenyamene, ba ba khutšhela, ba ba tshwarela fa ba reng ba ikhutsa teng, ba eta ba ba gataka go ya go fitlha kwa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Gibea." 
Judges20:44 Ga wa banna ba le 18 000 ba Benyamene, botlhe bao e le batlhabani." 
Judges20:45 Jaanong ba retologa, ba tshabela kwa sekakeng kwa lefikeng la Rimone, mme Baiseraele ba bolaya banna ba le 5 000 mo ditseleng tse dikgolo e le maronopo; ba ba latelela go ya kwa Giteome, ba bolaya banna ba le 2 000 ba bone gape." 
Judges20:46 Banna botlhe ba Benyamene ba ba bolailweng ka letsatsi leo ba ne ba le 25 000 ba ba somolang tšhaka, botlhe bao e le bagale." 
Judges20:47 Mme banna ba le 600 ba hulara ba tshabela kwa sekakeng kwa lefikeng la Rimone, ba nna kwa lefikeng la Rimone dikgwedi tse nne." 
Judges20:48 Jaanong banna ba Iseraele ba boela kwa go Babenyamene, ba ba bolaya ka bogale jwa tšhaka, e bong batho ba metse le diruiwa le sengwe le sengwe se ba se fitlhelang. Le gona ba fisa metse yotlhe ka molelo." 
Judges21:1 Banna ba Iseraele ba ne ba ikanne kwa Mitsepha ba re: “Go se ka ga nna ope mo go rona yo o nayang Mobenyamene morwadie go nna mosadi.” 
Judges21:2 Jaanong ya re batho ba sena go fitlha kwa Bethele, ba nna teng go fitlha mantsiboa fa pele ga Modimo, ba tsholetsa mantswe, ba lela selelo se segolo," 
Judges21:3 ba re: “Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa selo se, se dirafetse mo Iseraeleng; fa kajeno go tlhokafala lotso longwe lwa Iseraele?”" 
Judges21:4 Mme ya re kamoso batho ba phakela, ba aga aletare teng, ba dira ditlhabelo tsa phiso le tsa tebogo." 
Judges21:5 Jaanong Baiseraele ba botsa ba re: “Ke mang mo ditsong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele yo o se kang a tla mo pitsong kwa Moreneng?” Gonne go ne go dirilwe maikano a magolo a gore, yo o sa tleng kwa Moreneng kwa Mitsepha, ruri o tla bolawa." 
Judges21:6 Kana Baiseraele ba ne ba tlhomogela Babenyamene bomorwa-rraabo pelo ba re: “Kajeno go kgaotswe lotso longwe mo Iseraeleng. 
Judges21:7 Jaanong ba ba setseng re ka ba direla jang gore ba bone basadi? Gonne rona re ikanne ka Morena ra re: ‘Ga re kitla re ba naya bomorwadia-rona go nna basadi.’ ” 
Judges21:8 Ba botsa ba re: “Ke mang mo ditsong tsa Iseraele yo o se kang a tla kwa Moreneng kwa Mitsepha?” Ba fitlhela gore ba kwa Jabese kwa Gileate ba ne ba sa tla pitsong mo bothibelelong. 
Judges21:9 Ke fa ba bala morafe ka maina, ba fitlhela go se na ope wa baagi ba Jabese kwa Gileate." 
Judges21:10 Jaanong phuthego ya roma banna ba le 12 000 ba batlhabani teng, ya ba laela ya re: “Yaang lo bolae baagi ba Jabese kwa Gileate ka bogale jwa tšhaka le basadi le bana." 
Judges21:11 Se lo tshwanetseng go se dira ke se: Banna botlhe le basadi botlhe ba ba kileng ba kopana le monna lo ba bolae. Mme makgarebe a a phepa lo a lese go phela.” Ba dira jalo. 
Judges21:12 Mo baaging ba Jabese kwa Gileate ba fitlhela basetsana ba makgarebe ba le 400 ba ba iseng ba itse monna; ba ba isa kwa bothibelelong kwa Silo yo o mo lefatsheng la Kanana. 
Judges21:13 Jaanong phuthego yotlhe ya roma, ya bua le Babenyamene ba ba neng ba le kwa lefikeng la Rimone, ya ba bolelela gore go kagiso." 
Judges21:14 Babenyamene ba ne ba boa jalo ka sebaka seo, ba newa basadi ba ba lesitsweng go phela mo basading ba Jabese kwa Gileate, mme ba se ka ba ba lekana." 
Judges21:15 Mme morafe wa tlhomogela Babenyamene pelo, ka Morena a ne a ntshitse ntho mo ditsong tsa Iseraele." 
Judges21:16 Bagolo ba phuthego ba botsa gape ba re: “Ba ba setseng re ka ba direla jang gore ba bone basadi? Gonne basadi ba Babenyamene ba fedisitswe.” 
Judges21:17 Gape ba re: “Babenyamene ba ba falotseng ba ka thusega jang gore lotso loo lo se ka lwa nyelediwa mo go Iseraele? 
Judges21:18 Rona re palelwa ke go ba naya basadi ba e leng bomorwadia-rona; gonne re le Baiseraele re ikanne ra re: ‘Go hutsitswe yo o nayang Mobenyamene morwadie go nna mosadi.’ ” 
Judges21:19 Jaanong ba re: “Bonang, ka ngwaga le ngwaga go na le moletlo wa Morena kwa Silo yo o mo ntlheng ya bokone ya Bethele, mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya tsela e kgolo e e tswang kwa Bethele e ya kwa Šegeme mo ntlheng ya borwa ya Lebona.”" 
Judges21:20 Mme ba laela Babenyamene ba re: “Yaang lo lalele mo masimong a meweine. 
Judges21:21 Mme e re fa lo bona bomorwadia Silo ba tswela kwa ntle go bina dipina, lo tswe mo masimong a meweine, mme mongwe le mongwe wa lona a ikgapele mosadi mo go bomorwadia Silo, lo ye ka bone kwa nageng ya Benyamene." 
Judges21:22 Mme e re fa borraabo gongwe bokgaitsadia-bone ba tla go lwa le lona, lo ba fetole lo re: ‘Re itshwareleng! Gonne ga re a bona basadi rotlhe ka ntwa. Kana ga se lona lo ba re neetseng. Gonne foo lo ka bo lo le molato.’ ”" 
Judges21:23 Babenyamene ba dira jalo; ba tsaya ka fa palong ya bone, ba ba thopa mo go ba ba neng ba bina; ba tloga ba boela kwa nageng ya bone, ba aga metse, ba nna mo go yona." 
Judges21:24 Le Baiseraele ba itsamaela ka sebaka seo; mongwe le mongwe a ya kwa ga gabo kwa kabelong ya gagwe. 
Judges21:25 Ka sebaka seo go ne go se na kgosi mo Iseraeleng; mongwe le mongwe a dira tse di kgatlhang matlho a gagwe. 
Ruth1:1 E rile ka malatsi a puso ya baatlhodi ga nna tlala mo lefatsheng. Ke fa monna mongwe wa kwa Betleheme wa Juta a ya go jaka kwa nageng ya Moabe, ene le mosadi wa gagwe le bomorwawe ka bobedi." 
Ruth1:2 Leina la monna yoo e ne e le Elimelege, leina la mosadi wa gagwe e le Naomi, maina a bomorwawe ba babedi e le Magelone le Kileone. E ne e le Baeferathi ba Betleheme wa Juta. Jaanong ba fitlha kwa nageng ya Moabe, ba nna teng." 
Ruth1:3 Mme Elimelege monna wa ga Naomi a swa, ga sala Naomi le bomorwawe ba babedi." 
Ruth1:4 Bone ba nyala basadi ba Bamoabe; leina la mongwe e le Orepha, leina la yo mongwe e le Ruthe. Ya re ba sena go nna teng dinyaga tse e ka nnang di le some," 
Ruth1:5 ga ba ga swa Magelone le Kileone ka bobedi jwa bone; mosadi a sala a tlogetswe ke bana ba babedi ba gagwe le monna wa gagwe. 
Ruth1:6 Jaanong a nanoga a na le betsi ba gagwe, a boa kwa nageng ya Moabe; gonne o ne a utlwetse mo nageng ya Moabe ga twe, Morena o babaletse batho ba gagwe, a ba naya dijo." 
Ruth1:7 A tloga kwa felong fa a neng a le teng, betsi ba babedi ba gagwe ba na nae. Ya re ba le mo tseleng go boela kwa lefatsheng la Juta," 
Ruth1:8 Naomi a raya betsi ba babedi ba gagwe a re: “Yaang lo boele kwa gae, mongwe le mongwe kwa lapeng la ga mmaagwe. A Morena a lo direle ka lorato jaaka lo diretse baswi le nna." 
Ruth1:9 A Morena a lo thuse go bona boikhutso, mongwe le mongwe mo lapeng la monna wa gagwe.” A ba a ba atla. Ke fa ba tsholetsa mantswe ba lela," 
Ruth1:10 ba mo raya ba re: “Nnyaya, re tla boela nao kwa morafeng wa ga eno.”" 
Ruth1:11 Mme Naomi a re: “Boang, bomorwadiaka! Lo ka elang le nna? A lo a re, ke sa ntse ke ka belega bomorwa go nna banna ba lona?" 
Ruth1:12 Boang, bomorwadiaka, lo ye kwa gae. Gonne ke tsofetse, mo ke sa ka keng ka tlhola ke nyalwa ke monna. Le fa nka re, ke na le tsholofelo, ka tsewa ke monna bosigo jo, ka belega bomorwa:" 
Ruth1:13 A lo ka ba leta go tsamaya ba gola? A lo ka ithibelela nyalo ka ntlha ya bone? Nnyaya, bomorwadiaka! Kana ke lo tlhomogela pelo thata, ka e le fa letsogo la Morena le nkotlile.”" 
Ruth1:14 Ke fa ba tsholetsa mantswe, ba lela gape; mme Orepha a atla matsalaagwe, a boela kwa morafeng wa ga gabo. Ruthe ene a mo ngaparela." 
Ruth1:15 Ke fa Naomi a re: “Bona, monnao o boetse kwa morafeng wa ga gabo le kwa modimong wa ga gabo. Le wena, boa o latele monnao.”" 
Ruth1:16 Mme Ruthe a re: “Se nkemelele gore ke go tlogele, ke boe ke se ye nao. Gonne kwa o yang teng, ke tla ya teng; kwa o nnang teng, ke tla nna teng. Morafe wa ga eno ke morafe wa ga etsho. Modimo wa gago ke Modimo wa me." 
Ruth1:17 Kwa o swelang teng, ke tla swela teng, ke be ke fitlhwa gona. Le fa Morena a ka ntirela jang le jang – ke loso fela lo lo ka nkgaoganyang nao.”" 
Ruth1:18 Ya re Naomi a lemoga gore Ruthe o ikaeletse ka tlhomamo go ya nae, a khutla go bua nae." 
Ruth1:19 Bone babedi ba fetela pele go ya ba tsena mo Betleheme; mme ya re ba fitlha mo Betleheme, motse otlhe wa huduega ka ntlha ya bone. Basadi ba re: “A ke ene Naomi?”" 
Ruth1:20 Mme a ba raya a re: “Se mpitseng Naomi. Mpitseng Mara. Gonne Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe o ntiretse tse di galakang thata. 
Ruth1:21 Ke hudugile ke humile; Morena a mpusetsa kwano gae ke iphotlhere. Lo mpiletsang Naomi, ka e le fa Morena a supile molato mo go nna; Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe a nkutlwisa botlhoko.”" 
Ruth1:22 Naomi o ne a boela jalo kwa gae, a na le ngwetsi wa gagwe, Ruthe wa Moabe yo o neng a boile nae kwa nageng ya Moabe. Ba fitlha mo Betleheme ka tshimologo ya thobo ya garase." 
Ruth2:1 Naomi o ne a na le tsala ya monna wa gagwe, e le monna wa senatla yo o humileng wa losika lwa ga Elimelege; leina la gagwe e ne e le Boase." 
Ruth2:2 Tsatsi le lengwe Ruthe wa Moabe a kopa Naomi a re: “Nte ke ye go ronopa diako kwa masimo, ke latele yo ke bonang bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a gagwe.” A mo araba a re: “Yaa, morwadiaka!”" 
Ruth2:3 A ya a fitlha a sela mo tshimong, a setse basegi morago; mme a dirafalelwa ke letlhogonolo ka go tsena mo tshimong ya ga Boase yo e leng losika le Elimelege." 
Ruth2:4 E rile go ise go ye kgakala, Boase a ba a goroga, a tswa kwa Betleheme, a dumedisa basegi a re: “A Morena a nne le lona!” Ba mo araba ba re: “A Morena a go tshegofatse!”" 
Ruth2:5 Mme Boase a botsa motlhanka wa gagwe, e bong mookamedi wa basegi, a re: “Mosetsana yole ke wa ga mang?”" 
Ruth2:6 Mookamedi wa basegi a mo araba a re: “Ke ene mosetsana wa Moabe yo o tsileng le Naomi kwa nageng ya Moabe. 
Ruth2:7 O kopile a re: ‘Ka thapelo, nte ke ronope, ke sele diako mo gare ga dingata, ke sale basegi morago.’ Fa e sa le a tla, o ntse a tshwere go tloga mo mosong go fitlha jaanong. Ga a nne fa fatshe mo tshimong.”" 
Ruth2:8 Ke fa Boase a raya Ruthe a re: “Reetsa fa, morwadiaka! O se ka wa ya go sela kwa tshimong e sele; le gona o se ka wa tloga fa, mme o nne le basetsana ba me fano." 
Ruth2:9 Lebisa matlho a gago mo tshimong e ba e robang, o ba sale morago. Ke laetse batlhanka gore ba se ka ba go tshwenya. Fa o nyorilwe ya kwa dinkgong, o nwe metsi a a gilweng ke batlhanka.”" 
Ruth2:10 Ke fa Ruthe a wela fa fatshe ka sefatlhego, a ikoba, a mo raya a re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa ke bonye bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a gago, wa ntlhokomela ka tsalano ke le moeng?”" 
Ruth2:11 Boase a araba, a mo raya a re: “Kana ke boleletswe tsotlhe sentle tse o di diretseng matsalaago, monna wa gago a sena go swa, wa tlogela rraago le mmaago le lefatshe la ga eno, wa tla kwa morafeng o ò neng o sa o itse pele." 
Ruth2:12 A Morena, a go duelele tiro ya gago; tuelo e e tletseng o e fiwe ke Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, yo ò tlileng go batla botshabelo fa tlase ga diphuka tsa gagwe.”" 
Ruth2:13 Ruthe a re: “A ke nne ke bone bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a gago, morena wa me! Gonne o nkgomoditse, wa bua le lelata la gago ka bopelontle, le fa ke sa tshwane le ope wa malata a gago.”" 
Ruth2:14 Ka nako ya go ja Boase a mo raya a re: “Atamela kwano o itseele dijo o je, o ine thathana ya gago mo motatsweng.” A tla a nna fa thoko ga basegi mme Boase a mo abela dipabe. A ja, a kgora, a ba a sadisa." 
Ruth2:15 Ya re a nanoga go sela, Boase a laela batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “A a sele le mo gare ga dingata! Se mo tlhabiseng ditlhong!" 
Ruth2:16 Le gona lo nne lo mo somolele diako mo dingateng, lo di tlogele gore a di sele, mme lo se ka lwa mo omanya.”" 
Ruth2:17 A sela jalo mo tshimong go ya mantsiboeng, a photha tse a di sedileng. Ya nna makapa a le mabedi a garase."
