Ruth2:18 A e rwala, a ya kwa motseng, a bontsha matsalaagwe tse a di sedileng. A ba a ntsha dijo tse a di sadisitseng a sena go ja, a di mo naya." 
Ruth2:19 Ke fa matsalaagwe a mmotsa a re: “O tlhotse o sedile kae kajeno, o tswa go dira kwa kae? A go tshegofadiwe yo o go tlhokometseng ka tsalano!” Mme a bolelela matsalaagwe gore o ne a tlhotse a dira le mang a re: “Leina la monna yo ke tlhotseng ke dira fa go ene kajeno ke Boase.”" 
Ruth2:20 Mme Naomi a raya ngwetsi wa gagwe a re: “A a tshegofadiwe ke Morena yo o se kang a tlhokisa baphedi le baswi lorato lwa gagwe!” Naomi a ba a mo raya a re: “Monna yoo ke wa ga etsho; ke mongwe wa bagolodi ba rona.” 
Ruth2:21 Ruthe wa Moabe a re: “O bile a nthaya a re: ‘O nne le malata a me go fitlhelela ba fetse thobo yotlhe ya me.’ ” 
Ruth2:22 Ke fa Naomi a araba Ruthe ngwetsi wa gagwe a re: “Go molemo, morwadiaka, fa o ya le basetsana ba gagwe; foo ga o ne o tshwenyega mo masimong a sele.”" 
Ruth2:23 A nna jalo le basetsana ba ga Boase, a ntse a sela go ya bokhutlong jwa thobo ya garase le jwa thobo ya mabele a korong. O ne a ntse a nna le matsalaagwe." 
Ruth3:1 Mme Naomi a raya ngwetsi wa gagwe a re: “Morwadiaka, kana ke tshwanetse go go batlela legae la boikhutso gore o phele sentle." 
Ruth3:2 Jaanong Boase yo ò neng o na le basetsana ba gagwe, kana ene ke wa ga etsho. Bona, o tla lala a olosa garase mo seboaneng bosigong jono." 
Ruth3:3 Tlhapa o iphotle o apare diaparo tsa gago tsa mokgabo, o fologele kwa seboaneng; o se ka wa nta monna yoo a go lemoga a ise a fetse go ja le go nwa." 
Ruth3:4 Mme e re a ya go robala, o lebelele fa a robalang teng, o ye o bipolele fa dinaong tsa gagwe, o robale; foo ene o tla go bolelela se o tshwanetseng go se dira.”" 
Ruth3:5 Ruthe a mo araba a re: “Ke tla dira tsotlhe tse o di ntaetseng.” 
Ruth3:6 A fologela kwa seboaneng, a dira tsotlhe fela jaaka matsalaagwe a mo laetse." 
Ruth3:7 E rile Boase a sena go ja le go nwa, mme pelo ya gagwe e itumetse, a ya a robala fa thoko ga mokoa wa garase; ke fa Ruthe a tla a ngwangwaela, a bipolela fa dinaong tsa gagwe, a robala." 
Ruth3:8 Ya re gare ga bosigo monna yoo a tshoga, a kanamologa, a fitlhela mosadi a robetse fa dinaong tsa gagwe." 
Ruth3:9 A botsa a re: “O mang?” A araba a re: “Ke nna Ruthe, lelata la gago; phuthololela lelata la gago diphuka tsa gago; gonne ke wena mogolodi.”" 
Ruth3:10 Boase a re: “O tshegofadiwe ke Morena, morwadiaka. Lorato lo lwa gago lo gaisa lwa pele, ka o se ka wa latela makau, le fa e le a a humanegileng gongwe a a humileng." 
Ruth3:11 Mme jaanong, morwadiaka, se boife. Tsotlhe tse o di buileng ke tla di go direla. Kana go itse mongwe le mongwe mo lekgotleng la morafe wa ga etsho, fa o le mosadi yo o maatlametlo." 
Ruth3:12 Jaanong he, ke nnete, ke nna mogolodi; mme le gona go na le mogolodi yo o tshwanetseng bogolo go nna." 
Ruth3:13 Lala fano bosigong jono. E re mo mosong, fa a ka go golola, go siame, a a go golole! Mme fa a sa kgatlhwe ke go go golola, foo nna – ka bophelo jwa Morena – ke tla go golola! Robala fano go ya mosong.”" 
Ruth3:14 Ruthe a robala fa dinaong tsa gagwe go ya mosong, mme a tsoga phakela go ise go bonale. Gonne Boase o ne a re: “A go se ka ga itsiwe gore mosadi yoo o letse kwa seboaneng.”" 
Ruth3:15 Boase a mo raya a re: “Tlisa kobo e o e apereng, o e ntshwarelele.” A e mo tshwarelela, mme Boase a mo tshelela dielo di le thataro tsa garase, a e mo rwesa. Jaanong Ruthe a ya kwa motseng." 
Ruth3:16 Ya re a fitlha, matsalaagwe a mmotsa a re: “Go ntse jang, morwadiaka?” Ruthe a mmolelela tsotlhe tse monna yoo o di mo diretseng," 
Ruth3:17 a re: “O mphile dielo di le thataro tseo tsa garase a re: ‘Ga o a tshwanela go fitlha kwa go matsalaago o iphotlhere fela.’ ” 
Ruth3:18 Mme Naomi a re: “Iketle, morwadiaka, go fitlhelela o be o itse gore kgang e, e felela kae; gonne monna yoo ga a kitla a ikhutsa a ise a fetse kgang e kajeno.”" 
Ruth4:1 Boase a ya kwa kgotleng, a feta a nna fatshe. Ke fa mogolodi yole a feta, yo Boase a buileng ka ga gagwe. Boase a mmitsa a re: “Tlaa jaana, o nne fatshe, wena mangmang.” A fapogela teng, a nna fatshe." 
Ruth4:2 Jaanong Boase a bitsa banna ba bagolo ba motse ba le some a re: “Nnang fa!” Mme ba nna fatshe. 
Ruth4:3 Ke fa a raya mogolodi yole a re: “Naomi yo o boileng kwa nageng ya Moabe o rata go rekisa kabelo ya tshimo e e neng e le ya monna wa ga etsho, e bong Elimelege." 
Ruth4:4 Ke ne ka re, ke tla go begela jalo ke re: E reke fa pele ga ba ba dutseng fa le fa pele ga bagolo ba morafe wa ga rona. Fa o rata go e rekolola, e rekolole; fa o sa rate go e rekolola, o bolele gore ke itse. Gonne ga go na ope yo o ka e rekololang fa e se wena le nna yo ke fa morago ga gago.” A araba a re: “Ke tla e rekolola.”" 
Ruth4:5 Mme Boase a re: “Ka letsatsi le o rekang tshimo eo mo diatleng tsa ga Naomi ka lone, o bile o amogela le Ruthe wa Moabe, mosadi wa moswi gore o tsose leina la moswi mo bosweng jwa gagwe.”" 
Ruth4:6 Ke fa mogolodi yoo a re: “Ke palelwa ke go e ithekololela, e se re gongwe ka senya boswa jwa me. E ithekololele e ke neng ke tshwanetse go e rekolola; gonne ke a palelwa.”" 
Ruth4:7 Jaanong mo metlheng ya pele go ne go le mokgwa mo Iseraeleng wa go re: Fa go rekololwa gongwe go ananngwa, motho a role setlhako sa gagwe, a se neele mongwe-ka-ene, e le go tlhomamisa mafoko aotlhe. Go re jalo e ne e le tshupo ya teng mo Iseraeleng." 
Ruth4:8 Mme mogolodi yoo a raya Boase a re: “E ithekele!” A ba a rola setlhako sa gagwe, a se mo neela." 
Ruth4:9 Ke fa Boase a raya bagolo le batho botlhe a re: “Lona lo basupi kajeno ba go re, ke rekile tsotlhe tse e neng e le tsa ga Elimelege le tsa ga Kileone le Magelone mo diatleng tsa ga Naomi." 
Ruth4:10 Le gona ke tsaya Ruthe wa Moabe, mosadi wa ga Magelone gore a nne mosadi wa me, mme ke tsose leina la moswi mo bosweng jwa gagwe, mme leina la moswi le se ka la nyelediwa mo gare ga bomorwa-rraagwe le mo lekgotleng la motse wa ga gabo. Lona lo basupi kajeno.”" 
Ruth4:11 Batho botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo lekgotleng le bagolo ba araba ba re: “Re basupi! Mosadi yo o tla tsenang mo lapeng la gago a Morena a mo dire jaaka Ragele le Lea ba ba agileng lelapa la ga Iseraele ka bobedi jwa bone. Dira tse dikgolo mo Eferatha gore o nne le leina mo Betleheme. 
Ruth4:12 A lelapa la gago le tshwane le la ga Pherese yo Thamare a neng a mo tsholela Juta, a le nne jalo ka bana ba Morena o tla ba go nayang ka mosadi yoo, ka a sa le mošwa.”" 
Ruth4:13 Jaanong Boase a tsaya Ruthe, a nna mosadi wa gagwe; ya re a sena go tsena kwa go ene, Morena a mo naya boimana, mme a belega ngwana wa mosimane." 
Ruth4:14 Ke fa basadi ba raya Naomi ba re: “A go bakwe Morena yo o se kang a go tlhokisa mogolodi kajeno. A leina la gagwe le tumisiwe mo Iseraeleng! 
Ruth4:15 E tla nna ene yo o go lapolosang pelo, yo o go tlamelang mo botsofeng jwa gago; gonne ngwetsi wa gago yo o go ratang o mmelege, ene o molemo mo go wena go feta bomorwa ba supa.”" 
Ruth4:16 Mme Naomi a tsaya ngwana, a mo fara, a nna mmelegi wa gagwe." 
Ruth4:17 Basadi ba ba neng ba agile go bapa nae ba re: “Naomi o belegetswe ngwana.” Ba mo taya leina la Obete. Ke ene rraagwe Isai yo e leng rraagwe Dafita. 
Ruth4:18 Losika lwa ga Pherese ke lo: Pherese o ne a tsala Heserone; 
Ruth4:19 Heserone a tsala Rame; Rame a tsala Aminatabe; 
Ruth4:20 Aminatabe a tsala Nasone; Nasone a tsala Salema; 
Ruth4:21 Salema a tsala Boase; Boase a tsala Obete; 
Ruth4:22 Obete a tsala Isai; Isai a tsala Dafita. 
1Samuel1:1 Go no go le monna mongwe wa kwa Rama wa losika lwa ga Sufe lwa kwa dithabeng tsa Eferaime. Leina la gagwe e ne e le Elekana morwa Jerohame morwa Elihu morwa Thohu morwa Sufe wa Moeferaime. 
1Samuel1:2 O ne a na le basadi ba le babedi, leina la mongwe e le Hana, leina la yo mongwe e le Phenina. Phenina o ne a na le bana, mme Hana a se na bana." 
1Samuel1:3 Monna yoo o ne a tloga ka ngwaga le ngwaga mo motseng wa ga gabo go ya go obamela Morena wa masomosomo le go mo tlhabela ditlhabelo kwa Silo. Teng go ne go le bomorwa Eli ba babedi, Hofeni le Phinehase, e le baperesiti ba Morena." 
1Samuel1:4 Jaanong e ne ya re ka letsatsi le Elekana a dirang setlhabelo ka lone, a nee Phenina mosadi wa gagwe le bana botlhe ba gagwe ba basimane le ba basetsana dikabelo," 
1Samuel1:5 mme a nee Hana kabelo e le nngwe e e kana ka tse pedi; gonne o ne a rata Hana bogolo, le fa Morena a mo timile bana." 
1Samuel1:6 Mme mogadikae a bo a mo tlhoafaditse ka dikgobo gore a mo utlwise botlhoko, ka Morena a mo timile bana." 
1Samuel1:7 Go ne go dirafala jalo ka ngwaga le ngwaga, fa go iwa kwa Ntlong ya Morena, Phenina a mo rumole, Hana a lele, a se ke a je." 
1Samuel1:8 Mme Elekana monna wa gagwe a mo ree a re: “Hana, o lelelang? Ke eng fa o sa je? O utlwisitswe ke eng botlhoko? A ga ke molemo mo go wena go feta basimane ba le some?”" 
1Samuel1:9 E kile ya re ba sena go ja le go nwa kwa Silo, Hana a nanoga. Moperesiti Eli a ntse a dutse fa mojakong wa Tempelana ya Morena." 
1Samuel1:10 Hana a lela thata, a rapela Morena ka pelo e e galakang," 
1Samuel1:11 a ikana maikano a re: “Morena wa masomosomo, fa o ka leba pogisego ya lelata la gago, wa nkgopola, wa se ka wa lebala lelata la gago, wa naya lelata la gago ngwana wa mosimane, foo ke tla mo neela Morena ka malatsi otlhe a bophelo jwa gagwe, mme ga a kitla a angwa ke logare mo tlhogong.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Jaanong ya re a ntse a rapela ka boleele fa pele ga Morena, Eli a ela molomo wa gagwe tlhoko." 
1Samuel1:13 Gonne Hana o ne a bua ka pelo, go tshikinyega molomo fela, lentswe la gagwe le sa utlwale. Eli a gopola gore mosadi yo, o tagilwe." 
1Samuel1:14 Jaanong Eli a mo raya a re: “O tla itshola jaaka letagwa go fitlha leng? Tlogela botagwa.” 
1Samuel1:15 Mme Hana a fetola a re: “Nnyaya, morena wa me, ke mosadi yo o pelo e botlhoko. Weine le bojalwa ga ke a di nwa, mme ke tsholotse tsa pelo ya me fa pele ga Morena." 
1Samuel1:16 O se ka wa kaya lelata la gago mosadi yo e seng wa sepe; gonne ke ntse ke buisiwa ke botlhoko jwa me le masetlapelo a magolo a me go fitlha jaanong.” 
1Samuel1:17 Eli a mo fetola a re: “Tsamaya ka kagiso! Modimo wa Iseraele o tla go naya se o se kopileng mo go ona.” 
1Samuel1:18 Hana a re: “A lelata la gago le bone bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a gago.” Jaanong mosadi yoo a tsamaya, a feta a ja; sefatlhego sa gagwe sa bo se sa tlhole se tlhontse." 
1Samuel1:19 Ka moso ba phakela, ba obamela fa pele ga Morena; jaanong ba tsamaya ba boela kwa ga bone kwa Rama. Elekana a itse Hana mosadi wa gagwe, mme Morena a mo gopola." 
1Samuel1:20 Hana a ithwala, a belega ngwana wa mosimane ka bofelo jwa ngwaga, a mo taya leina la Samuele; gonne a re: “Ke mo kopile Moreneng.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Jaanong ya re isago Elekana, monna yoo, a tlhatloga le botlhe ba lelapa la gagwe go tlhabela Morena ditlhabelo tsa ngwaga le tsa maikano a gagwe," 
1Samuel1:22 Hana a se ka a tlhatloga, a raya monna wa gagwe a re: “Ke tla ya teng mosimane a sena go kgwa gore ke tle ke mo supe fa pele ga Morena, a nne teng ka bosakhutleng.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Elekana, monna wa gagwe, a mo raya a re: “Dira ka fa o bonang go siame ka teng. Sala mo gae go tsamaya o be o mo kgwise. Fela a Morena a dirafatse lefoko la gago.” Mosadi a sala mo gae, a amusa morwawe ga tsamaya a mo kgwisa." 
1Samuel1:24 Mme e rile a sena go mo kgwisa, a tlhatloga ka ene, a na le poo ya dinyaga tse tharo le efa ya bupe e le nngwe le lekuka la weine; a mo isa jalo kwa Ntlong ya Morena kwa Silo, mme ngwana a bo a sa le monnye." 
1Samuel1:25 Jaanong ba tlhaba poo, ba isa mosimane kwa go Eli." 
1Samuel1:26 Hana a re: “Ka thapelo, morena wa me! Ka bophelo jwa gago, morena wa me! Ke nna mosadi yole yo o kileng a ema fano go wena go rapela Morena." 
1Samuel1:27 Ke kopile mosimane yo, mme Morena o nneile se ke se kopileng mo go ene." 
1Samuel1:28 Ka moo le nna ke mo neela Morena ka malatsi aotlhe a bophelo jwa gagwe. Kana o kopilwe mo Moreneng.” Mme Hana a mo tlogela teng fa pele ga Morena. 
1Samuel2:1 Ke fa Hana a rapela a re: “Pelo ya me e dudueletsa Morena. Lonaka lwa me lo thatafaditswe ke Morena. Molomo wa me o bulegetse baba ba me. Gonne ke itumelela pholoso ya gago. 
1Samuel2:2 Ga go na ope yo o boitshepo jaaka Morena; gonne ga go na ope kwa ntle ga gago; ga go na lefika le le tshwanang le Modimo wa rona. 
1Samuel2:3 Se bueng tsa maikgantsho a magolo ka gale; a tsa matepe di se ka tsa tswa mo melomong ya lona. Gonne Morena ke Modimo o o itseng tsotlhe; ditiro di tlhatlhojwa ke ene. 
1Samuel2:4 Mara a dinatla a robegile; mme ba ba theekelang ba itlamile ka thata. 
1Samuel2:5 Ba ba neng ba kgora ba ile go jaka dijo; ba ba neng ba bolawa ke tlala ba a kgora. Moopa le ene o belege ba supa; mmabontsi o swabile. 
1Samuel2:6 Morena o a bolaya, e bile o a phedisa; o folosetsa kwa felong ga baswi, e bile o tlhatlosa teng." 
1Samuel2:7 Morena o a humanegisa, e bile o a humisa; o a kokobetsa, le gona o a godisa." 
1Samuel2:8 O tsosa ba ba fokolang mo leroleng, o tsholetsa bahumanegi mo thotobolong go ba nnisa le batlotlegi; o ba ruisa sedulo sa bogosi sa kgalalelo. Gonne maotwana a lefatshe ke a Morena, o beile lefatshe mo go ona." 
1Samuel2:9 O tla sireletsa dinao tsa baitshepi ba gagwe, mme baikepi ba tla swela mo lefifing; gonne motho ga a kgone sepe ka thata ya gagwe." 
1Samuel2:10 Ba ba lwang le Morena ba tla phatlakanngwa; o tla ba dumisetsa maru kwa legodimong. Morena o tla atlhola dikhutlo tsa lefatshe, a naya kgosi ya gagwe thata, a natlafatsa lonaka lwa motlodiwa wa gagwe.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Jaanong Elekana a boela kwa lapeng la gagwe kwa Rama. Ngwana ene a sala, a direla Morena fa pele ga moperesiti Eli." 
1Samuel2:12 Mme bomorwa Eli ba ne ba le bosula, ba sa re sepe ka Morena." 
1Samuel2:13 Ba tlhokomologa tse di laoletsweng baperesiti mo morafeng. E ne ya re fa motho a tlhaba setlhabelo, go tle motlhanka wa moperesiti, nama e ntse e apewa, a tshotse seroophata;" 
1Samuel2:14 a tlhabe mo pitseng gongwe mo pitsaneng gongwe mo paneng gongwe mo sejaneng. Sengwe le sengwe se seroophata se se ntshang moperesiti a se itseele. Ba ne ba direla Baiseraele botlhe jalo ba ba tlang gona kwa Silo. 
1Samuel2:15 Le gona e ne ya re ba ise ba tshube mafura, go tle motlhanka wa moperesiti, a ree monna yo o tlhabang setlhabelo a re: “Ntsha nama e e besediwang moperesiti. Gonne ga a ka ke a amogela nama e e apeilweng mo go wena fa e se e tala fela.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Mme e ne ya re fa motho a mo raya a re: “Mafura a tshwanetse go tshubiwa pele, morago ga moo o itseele ka fa o ratang ka teng!” ene a fetole a re: “Nnyaya! E mphe jaanong. Go seng jalo, ke tla e tsaya ka thata.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Boleo jwa makau ao bo ne bo le bogolo thata fa pele ga Morena, ka a ne a nyatsa tshupelo ya Morena." 
1Samuel2:18 Mme Samuele o ne a ntse a direla fa pele ga Morena, e le mosimane yo o apereng khiba ya letseta." 
1Samuel2:19 Le gona mmaagwe o ne a tle a mo direle kojwana, a mo tlele nayo ka ngwaga le ngwaga, fa a tlhatlogela teng le monna wa gagwe go tlhaba setlhabelo sa ngwaga." 
1Samuel2:20 Foo Eli a tshegofatse Elekana le mosadi wa gagwe a re: “A Morena a go nee bana ka mosadi yo boemong jwa ngwana yo a mo kopileng, a mo tsalela Morena.” Jaanong ba ye kwa gae." 
1Samuel2:21 Mme Morena a direla Hana molemo; a ithwala, a tshola gape bana ba basimane ba le bararo le ba basetsana ba le babedi. Mosimane Samuele ene a golela kwa Moreneng." 
1Samuel2:22 Eli o ne a tsofetse thata. Fela e ne e tle e re fa a utlwa tsotlhe tse bomorwawe ba neng ba di direla Baiseraele botlhe le ka fa ba lalang ka teng le basadi ba ba direlang fa mojakong wa Tempelana ya Boipontsho," 
1Samuel2:23 a ba ree a re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa lo dira dilo tse di bosula jalo, tse ke di utlwang mo morafeng otlhe o?" 
1Samuel2:24 Nnyaya, bomorwaaka! Tumedi e ke e utlwang ga e molemo. Lo leofisa morafe wa Morena." 
1Samuel2:25 Fa motho a leofela motho, moatlhodi o ka mo atlholela. Mme fa motho a leofela Morena, ke mang yo o ka mo emelang?” Mme ba se ka ba utlwa lentswe la ga rraabo; gonne Morena o ne a ikaeletse go ba bolaya." 
1Samuel2:26 Mme mosimane Samuele a nna a gola, a ratwa ke Morena le batho." 
1Samuel2:27 Letsatsi le lengwe monna wa Modimo a tla kwa go Eli, a mo raya a re: “Morena o bua jaana a re: ‘A ga ke re, ke iponaditse sentle mo go ba ga eno, fa ba sa le kwa Egepeto mo taolong ya ga Farao?" 
1Samuel2:28 Ka ba itlhophela mo ditsong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele go nna baperesiti gore ba palame mo aletareng ya me go fisa maswalo le go apara khiba ya boperesiti fa pele ga me; ka naya ba ga eno ditlhabelo tsotlhe tse di dirwang ka molelo tsa Baiseraele. 
1Samuel2:29 Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa lo nyatsa setlhabelo sa me le tshupelo ya me tse ke di laotseng go nna tsa moago wa me; ke eng fa o tlotla bomorwao bogolo go nna, lo inontsha ka tse di tlhaotsweng mo ditshupelong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele morafe wa me?’" 
1Samuel2:30 Ke ka moo Morena Modimo wa Iseraele o buang a re: ‘Ka nnete ke ne ke rile: Ba lapa la gago le ba lapa la ga rraago ba tla sepela fa pele ga me ka bosakhutleng. Mme jaanong go kgakala le nna! Ke tla tlotla ba ba ntlotlang; mme ba ba nnyatsang ba tla nyatsega.’ Morena a re jalo. 
1Samuel2:31 ‘Bona, malatsi a e tla a ke tla kgaolang letsogo la gago le letsogo la lelapa la ga rraago ka ona gore go se ka ga nna monna wa motsofe mo lapeng la gago." 
1Samuel2:32 Mme tsotlhe tse di molemo tse Morena o di direlang Baiseraele o tla di leba ka khutsafalo. Ga o kitla o nna le motsofe mo lapeng la gago ka metlha yotlhe. 
1Samuel2:33 Ke a le mongwe fela wa ga eno yo ke se neng ke mo nyeletsa, ke mo tlosa mo aletareng ya me, e se re gongwe ka ledisa matlho a gago le go tlhokofatsa pelo ya gago, mme botlhe ba ba tla tsalwang mo lapeng la gago ba tla swa ba ise ba tsofale." 
1Samuel2:34 Sesupo mo go wena se se tla dirafalelang bomorwao ba babedi Hofeni le Phinehase ke sa go re: Ba tla swa ka letsatsi le le lengwe ka bobedi jwa bone. 
1Samuel2:35 Mme ke tla itlhomela moperesiti yo o ikanyegang; o tla dira tse di mo pelong ya me le mo moweng wa me. Ke tla mo naya losika lo lo tlhomameng; o tla sepela fa pele ga motlodiwa wa me ka metlha yotlhe. 
1Samuel2:36 Mongwe le mongwe wa masalela a lelapa la gago o tla tla, a mo ikôbêla go kopa ledi la selefera le kgolokwe ya senkgwe a re: A ko o ntsenye mo tirong ya boperesiti, ke tle ke je thathana ya senkgwe.’ ”" 
1Samuel3:1 Samuele wa lekau o ne a ntse a direla Morena fa pele ga Eli, mme lefoko la Morena le ne le tlhokafala thata ka sebaka seo, go se na dipono tse dintsi." 
1Samuel3:2 Jaanong ga dirafala ka sebaka seo Eli a bo a robetse mo felong ga gagwe, mme matlho a gagwe a ne a simolotse go koafala, a sa kgone go bona sentle;" 
1Samuel3:3 lobone lwa Modimo lo ise lo time, Samuele ene a robetse mo Tempeleng ya Morena kwa Letlole la Modimo le leng teng." 
1Samuel3:4 Ke fa Morena a bitsa Samuele. A araba a re: “Ke fano.” 
1Samuel3:5 A ba a tabogela kwa go Eli a re: “Ke fano, ka o no o mpitsa.” Mme a fetola a re: “Ga ke a go bitsa. Boa o ye go robala.” A ya go robala." 
1Samuel3:6 Jaanong Morena a bitsa Samuele gape. Samuele a tsoga, a ya kwa go Eli a re: “Ke fano, ka o ne o mpitsa.” A fetola a re: “Ga ke a go bitsa, morwaaka. Boa o ye go robala.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Kana Samuele o ne a ise a itse Morena; a ise a senolelwe lefoko la Morena. 
1Samuel3:8 Morena a boela a bitsa Samuele la boraro. A tsoga, a ya kwa go Eli a re: “Ke fano, ka o ne o mpitsa.” Ke fa Eli a lemoga gore lekau le bidiwa ke Morena." 
1Samuel3:9 Ka moo Eli a raya Samuele a re: “Yaa o robale. Mme e re fa o bidiwa gape, o arabe o re: ‘Bua, Morena, gonne motlhanka wa gago o reeditse.’ ” Samuele a ya, a robala gape mo felong ga gagwe." 
1Samuel3:10 Ke fa Morena a tla, a ema, a bitsa jaaka kgantele a re: “Samuele, Samuele!” Samuele a araba a re: “Bua, gonne motlhanka wa gago o reeditse.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Morena a raya Samuele a re: “Bona, ke tla dira tiro mo Iseraeleng e ditsebe tse pedi tsa mongwe le mongwe yo o e utlwang di tla kuruetsang ka yona." 
1Samuel3:12 Ka letsatsi leo ke tla dirafaletsa Eli tsotlhe tse ke di buileng ka ga lelapa la gagwe go tswa tshimologong go ya bokhutlong. 
1Samuel3:13 Kana ke mo itsisitse ka re, ke tla atlhola lelapa la gagwe go ya bosakhutleng ka ntlha ya molato, ka a ne a itse gore bomorwawe ba dira se se ba ronang, mme a se ka a ba omanya." 
1Samuel3:14 Ke ka moo ke ikanetseng lelapa la ga Eli ka re, molato wa lelapa la ga Eli ga o kitla o itshwarelwa ka setlhabelo le e seng ka tshupelo go ya bosakhutleng.”" 
1Samuel3:15 Samuele a lala fa fatshe go ya mosong. A tsoga phakela, a bula Ntlo ya Morena. Fela Samuele a boifa go begela Eli pono eo." 
1Samuel3:16 Ke fa Eli a bitsa Samuele a re: “Samuele, morwaaka!” A araba a re: “Ke fano.”" 
1Samuel3:17 A mmotsa a re: “Ke eng se o se boleletsweng? A ko o se ntobele sepe. A Modimo o go betse jaana, o go okeletse jaana, fa o ka ntobela sengwe sa tsotlhe tse o di boleletsweng.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Ke fa Samuele a mmolelela mafoko aotlhe, a se ka a mo lobela sepe. Mme Eli a re: “Ke Morena. A a dire tse di siameng mo matlhong a gagwe.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Samuele a gola, mme Morena a na nae, a se ka a leseletsa lefoko lepe la mafoko a gagwe go wela fa fatshe." 
1Samuel3:20 Baiseraele botlhe go tswa kwa Dane go fitlha kwa Bereseba ba lemoga gore Samuele ke moporofeti yo o ikanyegang wa Morena. 
1Samuel3:21 Morena a tswelela pele go iponatsa kwa Silo. Gonne Morena o ne a itshenolela Samuele kwa Silo ka lefoko la Morena. 
1Samuel4:1 Mme lefoko la ga Samuele la tla kwa Baiseraeleng botlhe. Jaanong ka sebaka seo Bafelesita ba kgobokana go tlhabana le Baiseraele. Ke fa Baiseraele ba bolola go ba kgatlhantsha go tlhabana nabo, ba thibelela kwa Ebenesere, mme Bafelesita ba thibelela kwa Afeke." 
1Samuel4:2 Jaanong ya re Bafelesita ba ema ka thulaganyo go kgatlhantsha Baiseraele, mme tlhabano e tlhaselana, Baiseraele ba fenngwa ke Bafelesita. Bao ba bolaya ba e ka nnang ba le 4 000 mo nageng ya tlhabano." 
1Samuel4:3 Mme ya re banna ba fitlha kwa bothibelelong, bagolo ba Iseraele ba re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa Morena a re bolaisitse Bafelesita kajeno? A re yeng go itseela Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena kwa Silo gore le tle mo gare ga rona, le tle le re golole mo diatleng tsa baba ba rona.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Ke fa morafe o roma kwa Silo, ba tsaya teng Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena wa masomosomo yo o dutseng godimo ga boKerubime. Teng koo ga bo go le bomorwa Eli ba babedi, Hofeni le Phinehase, ba le fa Letloleng la Kgolagano ya Modimo, ba tla nalo." 
1Samuel4:5 Ya re Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena le tsena mo bothibelelong, Baiseraele botlhe ba duduetsa ka tuduetso e kgolo, mo lefatshe le bileng la duma." 
1Samuel4:6 Ya re Bafelesita ba utlwa modumo wa tuduetso, ba re: “Tuduetso e kgolo e ke modumo wa eng mo bothibelelong jwa Bahebere?” Ya re ba lemoga gore Letlole la Morena le tsenye mo bothibelelong," 
1Samuel4:7 ba boifa, gonne ba ne ba re: “Modimo wa bone o tlile kwa go bone kwa bothibelelong,” e bile ba re: “A tatlhego ya rona wee! Gonne ga go ise go ke go dirafale tse di ntseng jalo ka motlha ope." 
1Samuel4:8 A tatlhego ya rona wee! Ke mang yo o tla re pholosang mo diatleng tsa medimo e e thata eo? Ke yona medimo e e bolaileng Baegepeto ka dipetso tsa mefutafuta mo sekakeng. 
1Samuel4:9 Lona Bafelesita, itshupeng lo le bagale, lo eme senna, e se re gongwe lwa direla Bahebere jaaka bone ba lo diretse. Emang senna, lo tlhabaneng!”" 
1Samuel4:10 Bafelesita ba tlhabana, Baiseraele ba fenngwa, ba tshabela botlhe kwa ditenteng tsa bone. Ya nna polao e kgolo thata. Mo Baiseraeleng ga wa ba le 30 000 ba dinao." 
1Samuel4:11 Le Letlole la Modimo la tsewa; le bomorwa Eli ba babedi, Hofeni le Phinehase ba swa." 
1Samuel4:12 Mme monna wa Mobenyamene a tshaba mo tlhabanong, a siana, a fitlha kwa Silo ka letsatsi leo, a ikgagotse diaparo, a itshetse mmu mo tlhogong." 
1Samuel4:13 A goroga, a fitlhela Eli a dutse mo sedulong fa thoko ga tsela a lebeletse, ka pelo ya gagwe e ne e boifela Letlole la Modimo. Monna yoo a tsena, a begela motse tse o di bonyeng. Ke fa motse otlhe o lela." 
1Samuel4:14 Ya re Eli a utlwa modumo wa selelo a botsa batho a re: “Modumo wa tlhodio e ke wa eng?” Monna yole a akofa, a fitlha, a begela Eli." 
1Samuel4:15 Eli o ne a le dinyaga di le 98; matlho a gagwe a ne a eme, a sa tlhole a bona." 
1Samuel4:16 Monna yole a raya Eli a re: “Ke gorogile ke tswa kwa tlhabanong. Ke tshabile kwa tlhabanong kajeno.” Mme Eli a botsa a re: “Go ntse jang, morwaaka?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Mmegi a araba a re: “Baiseraele ba tshabile fa pele ga Bafelesita. Le gona morafe o bolailwe segolo, e bile bomorwao ba babedi, Hofeni le Phinehase, ba sule. Le Letlole la Modimo le tserwe.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Mme ya re a umaka Letlole la Modimo, Eli a wa mo sedulong, a wa ka sa morago fa thoko ga kgoro, a robega molala, a swa. Gonne o ne a tsofetse, e le monna yo o bokete. O ne a siamisitse Baiseraele dinyaga di le 40." 
1Samuel4:19 Mme ngwetsi wa gagwe, mosadi wa ga Phinehase, o ne a ithwele, a le gaufi le go belega. Ya re ene a utlwa mafoko a a reng, Letlole la Modimo le tserwe le a a reng, go sule rratswalaagwe le monna wa gagwe, a kudupana, a belega, gonne leralalo la gagwe la mo tshwara." 
1Samuel4:20 Jaanong ya re a swa, basadi ba ba emeng fa go ene ba re: “Se boife, gonne o belege ngwana wa mosimane.” Mme a se ka a araba le e seng go ela tlhoko." 
1Samuel4:21 Mme a bitsa mosimanyana Ikabote, a re: “Kgalalelo e ile ya tlogela Iseraele;” a re jalo ka ntlha ya Letlole la Modimo le le thopilweng le ka ntlha ya ga rratswalaagwe le monna wa gagwe." 
1Samuel4:22 A ba a re: “Kgalalelo e ile ya tlogela Iseraele; gonne Letlole la Modimo le tserwe.” 
1Samuel5:1 Bafelesita ba ne ba tsaya Letlole la Modimo kwa Ebenesere, ba le isa kwa Ašetote." 
1Samuel5:2 Jaanong Bafelesita ba tsaya Letlole la Modimo, ba le isa kwa ntlong ya Dagone, ba le baya fa thoko ga Dagone." 
1Samuel5:3 Mme ya re ba Ašetote ba phakela kamoso, ba fitlhela Dagone a ole, a patlame fa pele ga Letlole la Morena. Ke fa ba tsaya Dagone, ba mmaya gape mo felong ga gagwe." 
1Samuel5:4 Jaanong ya re ba phakela ka moso o mongwe, ba fitlhela Dagone gape a ole, a patlame fa pele ga Letlole la Morena, a kgaotswe tlhogo le diatla di le fa serepoding; go setse mmele wa gagwe fela." 
1Samuel5:5 Ke ka moo baperesiti ba Dagone le botlhe ba ba tsenang mo ntlong ya Dagone ba sa gateng mo serepoding sa Dagone kwa Ašetote go fitlha letsatsing la kajeno. 
1Samuel5:6 Seatla sa Morena sa nna sa imela ba Ašetote jalo, a ba senya, a ba otla ka ditlhagala, ba Ašetote le ba dinaga tsa teng." 
1Samuel5:7 Ya re banna ba Ašetote ba bona go le jalo, ba re: “A Letlole la Modimo wa Iseraele le se ka la nna mo go rona; gonne seatla sa ona se re imela le Dagone modimo wa rona.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Jaanong ba roma, ba phuthela dikgosana tsotlhe tsa Bafelesita kwa go bone ba re: “Re ka dira eng ka Letlole la Modimo wa Iseraele?” Tsa re: “A Letlole la Modimo wa Iseraele le isiwe kwa Gathe.” Ke fa ba le isa teng." 
1Samuel5:9 Mme ya re ba sena go le isa teng, seatla sa Morena sa lwa le motse oo ka tlhakatlhakanyo e kgolo thata, a otla banna ba motse oo ba bagolo le ba bannye, ba duwa ke ditlhagala." 
1Samuel5:10 Ke fa ba romela Letlole la Modimo kwa Ekerone. Mme ya re Letlole la Modimo le fitlha kwa Ekerone, ba Ekerone ba goa ba re: “Ba tlisitse Letlole la Modimo wa Iseraele kwa go rona go re bolaya le morafe wa rona.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Ke fa ba roma ba phutha dikgosana tsotlhe tsa Bafelesita ba re: “Romelang Letlole la Modimo wa Iseraele kwa gongwe, a le boele kwa felong ga lone gore le se ka la re bolaya le morafe wa rona.” Motse otlhe o ne o tshogile lwa go swa. Seatla sa Modimo sa ba imela thata gona." 
1Samuel5:12 Batho ba ba se kang ba swa ba bediwa ka ditlhagala; go lela ga motse ga tlhatlogela kwa legodimong. 
1Samuel6:1 Letlole la Morena le ne le le mo nageng ya Bafelesita dikgwedi di supa. 
1Samuel6:2 Jaanong Bafelesita ba bitsa baperesiti le baitseanape ba re: “Re ka dirang ka Letlole la Morena? Re akanyetseng gore re ka le romela jang kwa felong ga lone?” 
1Samuel6:3 Ba re: “Fa lo rata go romela Letlole la Modimo wa Iseraele, lo se ka lwa le romela le se na sepe. Gonne lo tshwanetse go o ntshetsa setlhabelo sa molato. Foo lo tla fodisiwa, mme lo tla itse gore ke ka ntlha ya eng fa seatla sa ona se ne se sa lo tlogele.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Ba botsa ba re: “Setlhabelo sa molato re ka o ntshetsa se se ntseng jang?” Ba re: “A e nne ditlhagala di le tlhano tsa gouta le dipeba di le tlhano tsa gouta ka fa palong ya dikgosana tsa Bafelesita, gonne petso e lo wetse le dikgosana tsa lona ka go tshwana." 
1Samuel6:5 Dirang ditshwantsho he tsa ditlhagala tsa lona le ditshwantsho tsa dipeba tsa lona tse di senyang lefatshe le, lo neele Modimo wa Iseraele tlotlo. Ka gongwe o tla tlhofofatsa letsogo la ona, le sa tlhole le lo imela le modimo wa lona le lefatshe la lona." 
1Samuel6:6 Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa lo thatafatsa dipelo tsa lona jaaka Baegepeto le Farao ba ne ba thatafaditse dipelo tsa bone? A ga ke re, e rile Modimo o sena go ba bontsha thata ya ona, ba naya Baiseraele tsela, ba tsamaya!" 
1Samuel6:7 Mme jaanong tsayang tse di batlegang, lo dire koloi e ntšhwa, lo tsee dikgomo tse pedi tse di amusang, tse di iseng di ke di rwesiwe joko; lo golege dikgomo mo koloing, lo busetse dinamane tsa tsona kwa sakeng, di di hularele." 
1Samuel6:8 Lo be lo tsee Letlole la Morena, lo le bee mo koloing le dilo tsa gouta tse lo di mo ntsheditseng go nna tshupelo ya molato, lo di tsenye mo letlojaneng fa thoko ga lone. Lo le bolotse jalo, le tsamae!" 
1Samuel6:9 Mme elang tlhoko: Fa le ya kwa nageng ya lone, le tlhatlogela kwa Betšhemeše, foo e tla bo e le ona Modimo o o re diretseng petso e kgolo e; mme fa go sa nna jalo, foo re tla itse gore ga se letsogo la ona le le re iteileng. Ke kotsi fela e e re wetseng e sa romelwa ke ope.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Batho ba dira jalo, ba tsaya dikgomo tse pedi tse di amusang, ba di golega mo koloing, ba tlhatlhela dinamane tsa tsona mo lesakaneng." 
1Samuel6:11 Ba pega Letlole la Morena mo koloing le letlojana le le nang le dipeba tsa gouta le ditshwantsho tsa ditlhagala tsa bone. 
1Samuel6:12 Mme dikgomo tsa tlhamalala fela le tsela e e yang kwa Betšhemeše; tsa tsamaya mo tseleng e kgolo e le nngwe di ntse di lela, mme di sa fapogele mo ntlheng ya le le jang le e seng mo go ya la molema. Dikgosana tsa Bafelesita tsa di sala morago go ya go fitlha nageng ya Betšhemeše." 
1Samuel6:13 Ba Betšhemeše ba ne ba roba mabele mo lebaleng. Ya re ba tsholetsa matlho, ba bona Letlole, ba itumela go le bona." 
1Samuel6:14 Koloi ya gorogela fa tshimong ya ga Jošua wa kwa Betšhemeše, ya ema teng. Ga bo go le lefika le legolo teng. Jaanong ba fatsa dikgong tsa koloi, dikgomo ba di tlhabela Morena, ba dira setlhabelo sa phiso." 
1Samuel6:15 Balefi ba ne ba folositse Letlole la Morena le letlojana le le nang nalo le dilo tsa gouta di neng di le mo go lone, ba di beile mo lefikeng le legolo leo. Ka letsatsi leo banna ba Betšhemeše ba direla Morena ditlhabelo tsa phiso, ba mo tlhabela ditlhabelo." 
1Samuel6:16 Ya re dikgosana tse tlhano tsa Bafelesita di sena go bona jalo, tsa boela kwa Ekerone ka letsatsi leo." 
1Samuel6:17 Ditlhagala tsa gouta tse Bafelesita ba neng ba di direla Morena go nna tshupelo ya molato ke tse: Nngwe e ne e le ya Ašetote, e nngwe e le ya Gasa, e nngwe e le ya Ašekalone, e nngwe e le ya Gathe, e nngwe e le ya Ekerone." 
1Samuel6:18 Ba di okeletsa dipeba tsa gouta ka fa palong ya metse yotlhe ya Bafelesita e e leng ya dikgosana tse tlhano, ya metse e e femetsweng le ya metsana e e sa agelelwang ya naga fela. Mme lefika le legolo le ba beileng Letlole la Morena mo go lone e ntse e le sesupo kwa tshimong ya ga Jošua wa kwa Betšhemeše go fitlha letsatsing la kajeno." 
1Samuel6:19 Mme bomorwa Jegonya ba se ka ba itumela le batho ba Betšhemeše ba ba neng ba lebile Letlole la Morena ka boitumelo. Ke fa Morena a bolaya banna ba le 70 mo go bone. Mme morafe wa hutsafala, ka Morena a bolaile ba ba kalo ba bone." 
1Samuel6:20 Jaanong banna ba Betšhemeše ba re: “Ke mang yo o ka kgonang go ema fa pele ga Morena, Modimo o o boitshepo o? Mme o tla ya kwa ga mang, fa o tloga mo go rona?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Ka moo ba roma barongwi kwa baaging ba Khiriathe-Jearime ba re: “Bafelesita ba busitse Letlole la Morena. Fologang, lo le tsee, lo le ise kwa ga lona.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Banna ba Khiriathe-Jearime ba tla, ba tsaya Letlole la Morena, ba le isa kwa ntlong ya ga Abinatabe e e kwa thoteng; ba itshepisa Eleasare morwawe gore a dise Letlole la Morena." 
1Samuel7:2 Go tloga letsatsing leo Letlole le ileng go nna kwa Khiriathe-Jearime ka lone ga feta sebaka se seleele sa dinyaga di le 20, mme Baiseraele botlhe ba lela, ba lela Moreneng." 
1Samuel7:3 Mme Samuele a raya Baiseraele botlhe a re: “Fa lo rata go boela kwa Moreneng ka pelo yotlhe, tlosang medimo e sele e e mo gare ga lona le boAšethorethe, lo ineele Morena ka dipelo tsa lona, lo mo direle a le esi; foo o tla lo pholosa mo diatleng tsa Bafelesita.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Ke fa Baiseraele ba tlosa boBaale le boAšethorethe, ba direla Morena a le esi." 
1Samuel7:5 Samuele a ba a re: “Phuthelang Baiseraele botlhe kwa Mitsepha gore ke lo rapelele Morena.” 
1Samuel7:6 Ke fa ba phuthegela kwa Mitsepha, ba ga metsi, ba a tshololela fa pele ga Morena, ba itima dijo ka letsatsi leo, ba ipobola teng ba re: “Re leofetse Morena.” Mme Samuele a siamisa Baiseraele kwa Mitsepha." 
1Samuel7:7 Jaanong e rile Bafelesita ba utlwa gore Baiseraele ba phuthegetse kwa Mitsepha, dikgosana tsa Bafelesita tsa bololela Baiseraele; ya re Baiseraele ba utlwa jalo, ba boifa Bafelesita." 
1Samuel7:8 Mme Baiseraele ba raya Samuele ba re: “Se khutle go re rapelela Morena, Modimo wa rona, gore a re pholose mo diatleng tsa Bafelesita.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Ke fa Samuele a tsaya kwanyana e e anyang e le nngwe, a e tlhabela Morena go nna setlhabelo se se fisiwang gotlhe; le gona Samuele a rapela Morena, a rapelela Baiseraele, mme Morena a mo utlwa." 
1Samuel7:10 Jaanong ya re Samuele a sa ntse a fisa setlhabelo, Bafelesita ba atamela go tlhabana le Baiseraele. Mme Morena a dumisa maru ka tumo e kgolo godimo ga Bafelesita ka letsatsi leo, a ba raraanya, mme ba fenngwa ke Baiseraele." 
1Samuel7:11 Mme banna ba Iseraele ba bolola kwa Mitsepha, ba khutšhela Bafelesita, ba ba bolaya go ya go fitlha kwa tlase ga Bethe-Kara." 
1Samuel7:12 Ke fa Samuele a tsaya lefika, a le tlhoma fa gare ga Mitsepha le Šene, a le taya leina la Ebenesere, a re: “Morena o re thusitse go fitlha kajeno.”" 
1Samuel7:13 Bafelesita ba ne ba kokobediwa jalo, ba se ka ba tlhola ba tla gape mo nageng ya Iseraele. Mme seatla sa Morena sa nna sa imela Bafelesita ka malatsi aotlhe a ga Samuele." 
1Samuel7:14 Le metse e Bafelesita ba neng ba e amogile Baiseraele ya boela kwa Baiseraeleng go tloga kwa Ekerone go fitlha kwa Gathe. Le naga ya yona Baiseraele ba e gapa mo diatleng tsa Bafelesita. Le gona ga nna kagiso fa gare ga Baiseraele le Baamori. 
1Samuel7:15 Samuele a siamisa Baiseraele ka malatsi aotlhe a botshelo jwa gagwe. 
1Samuel7:16 O ne a tle a tsamaya ka ngwaga le ngwaga, a etele Bethele le Gilegala le Mitsepha, a atlhole Baiseraele mo mafelong aotlhe ao." 
1Samuel7:17 A be a boele kwa Rama; gonne ntlo ya gagwe e ne e le gona; a atlhole Baiseraele gona. Le gona a agela Morena aletare teng. 
1Samuel8:1 E rile Samuele a sena go tsofala, a dira bomorwawe basiamisi ba Iseraele." 
1Samuel8:2 Leina la morwawe yo mogolo e ne e le Joele; leina la wa bobedi wa gagwe e le Abia. Ba ne ba atlhola kwa Bereseba. 
1Samuel8:2 Leina la morwawe yo mogolo e ne e le Joele; leina la wa bobedi wa gagwe e le Abia. Ba ne ba atlhola kwa Bereseba. 
1Samuel8:3 Fela bomorwawe ga ba a ka ba sepela mo ditseleng tsa gagwe. Ba bapala ka bopelotshetlha, ba amogela dithelesetso, ba sokamisa tshiamo." 
1Samuel8:4 Ke fa bagolo botlhe ba Iseraele ba kgobokana ba tla kwa go Samuele kwa Rama," 
1Samuel8:5 ba mo raya ba re: “Bona, wena o tsofetse, mme bomorwao ga ba sepele mo ditseleng tsa gago. Jaanong he, re beele kgosi gore e re buse, re tshwane le ditšhaba tsotlhe.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Mme lefoko leo le ne le le bosula mo matlhong a ga Samuele, fa ba re: “Re neele kgosi gore e re buse.” Ka moo Samuele a rapela Morena." 
1Samuel8:7 Mme Morena a raya Samuele a re: “Utlwa lentswe la morafe mo go tsotlhe tse ba di buileng nao; gonne ga ba latlhe wena, mme ba latlha nna gore ke se ka ka nna kgosi ya bone." 
1Samuel8:8 Le wena ba go direla jaaka ba dirile ka gale go tloga letsatsing le ke ba ntshitseng kwa Egepeto ka lone go fitlha letsatsing la kajeno, ba ntlogela, ba direla medimo e sele." 
1Samuel8:9 Mme jaanong utlwa mantswe a bone. Fela tse ba tshwanetseng go di direla kgosi e e tla ba busang o di ba tlhalosetse, o di ba itsise.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Mafoko otlhe a Morena Samuele a a bolelela morafe o o lopileng kgosi mo go ene," 
1Samuel8:11 a re: “Tse di siametseng kgosi e e tla lo busang ke tse: E tla tsaya bomorwaa-lona, e ba dira batlhanka ba dikoloi tsa yona le ba dipitse tsa yona le go taboga fa pele ga koloi ya yona." 
1Samuel8:12 Le gona e tla ba tsaya go ba ipeela balaodi ba sekete le balaodi ba lekgolo le balaodi ba 50; le gore ba leme masimo a yona, ba robe thobo ya yona, ba dire dibolai tsa yona tsa ntwa le dilo tsa dikoloi tsa ntwa tsa yona." 
1Samuel8:13 E tla tsaya bomorwadia-lona gore e nne batlhakanyi ba ditswaiso le baapei le babesi. 
1Samuel8:14 Fa e le masimo a lona le masimo a meweine a lona le ditlhare tsa olefa tsa lona e tla tsaya tse di molemo tsa teng, e di naya batlhanka ba yona." 
1Samuel8:15 E tla tsaya palo ya bosome ya mabele a lona le ya masimo a meweine a lona, e e naya badiredi ba yona ba lelapa le batlhanka ba yona." 
1Samuel8:16 E tla tsaya batlhanka ba lona le malata a lona le dikgomo tse dintle tsa lona le diesele tsa lona, e dira tiro ya yona ka tsotlhe tseo." 
1Samuel8:17 E tla tsaya palo ya bosome ya matsomane a lona; le lona lo tla nna batlhanka ba yona. 
1Samuel8:18 Ka sebaka seo lo tla lela ka ntlha ya kgosi e lo e itlhophetseng, mme foo Morena ga a kitla a lo utlwa.”" 
1Samuel8:19 Fela morafe wa gana go utlwa lentswe la ga Samuele wa re: “Nnyaya! A kgosi e re buse 
1Samuel8:20 gore le rona re tshwane le ditšhaba tsotlhe, mme kgosi ya rona e re atlhole, e re etelele pele le mo dintweng.”" 
1Samuel8:21 Ya re Samuele a sena go utlwa mafoko otlhe a morafe, a a bolela mo ditsebeng tsa Morena." 
1Samuel8:22 Mme Morena a raya Samuele a re: “Utlwa mantswe a bone, o ba beele kgosi.” Ke fa Samuele a raya banna ba Iseraele a re: “Tsamayang, a mongwe le mongwe a ye gae.”" 
1Samuel9:1 Go ne go le monna wa Benyamene, leina la gagwe e le Khiše morwa Abiele morwa Serore morwa Begorathe morwa Afia wa Mobenyamene; e le senatla se se maatlametlo." 
1Samuel9:2 Ene o ne a na le ngwana wa mosimane yo leina la gagwe e leng Saule. Saule o ne a le montle thata, go se na monna ope mo Baiseraeleng yo o tshwanang nae ka bontle; a feta batho botlhe ka boleele, ba mo khutlela fa magetleng." 
1Samuel9:3 Jaanong Khiše rraagwe Saule a timelelwa ke diesele tse dinamagadi, mme Khiše a raya Saule morwawe a re: “A ko o tsee mongwe wa batlhanka nao, o nanoge, o ye go batla diesele tse dinamagadi.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Ba ya ba ralala dithaba tsa Eferaime le naga ya Salisa, mme ba di tlhoka; ba ralala naga ya Saalime, mme di se yo; ba ralala naga ya Benyamene, ba se ka ba di bona." 
1Samuel9:5 Ya re ba sena go fitlha kwa nageng ya Sufe, Saule a raya motlhanka wa gagwe a re: “Tlaya a re boele kwa gae, e se re gongwe rre a tlhokomologa diesele, a tlhofaelela rona.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Mme ene a mo fetola a re: “A ko o iketle! Go na le monna wa Modimo mo motseng o. Ke monna yo o tlotlegang. Tsotlhe tse o di buang di a tle di dirafale tota. A re ye teng. Go gongwe o ka re itsise tsa leeto la rona le re leng mo go lone.” 
1Samuel9:7 Saule a fetola motlhanka wa gagwe a re: “Bona, fa re ya kwa monneng yoo, re ka eta re mo tsholetseng? Mefago e fedile mo dikgwatlheng tsa rona. Ga go na neo e re ka etang re e tsholetse monna wa Modimo. Re tshotseng?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Motlhanka a ba a fetola Saule gape a re: “Bona, ke na le karolo ya bone ya šekele ya selefera. Ke tla e naya monna wa Modimo gore a re itsise tsa leeto la rona.”" 
1Samuel9:9 E ne ya re bogologolo mo Iseraeleng fa motho a ya go botsa Modimo a bue jaana a re: “Tlaya a re ye kwa go Mmoni.” Gonne yo e leng Moporofeti kajeno, kgale o ne a bidiwa Mmoni." 
1Samuel9:10 Ke fa Saule a raya motlhanka wa gagwe a re: “Lefoko la gago le siame. Tlaya a re ye.” Ba ya kwa motseng kwa monna wa Modimo a leng teng. 
1Samuel9:11 Ya re ba tlhatlogela kwa motseng ka tsela e e mokong, ba kgatlhana le basetsana ba ba yang go ga metsi, ba ba botsa ba re: “A Mmoni o teng mono?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Ba ba araba ba re: “O teng. Bonang, o fa pele ga lona. Akofang jaanong, gonne ke gona a gorogang mo motseng kajeno. Gonne go na le moletlo wa batho wa ditlhabelo kajeno kwa thoteng." 
1Samuel9:13 E tla re lo tsena mo motseng, lo fitlhele a ise a tlhatlogele kwa thoteng go ya go ja. Gonne morafe ga o ka ke wa ja a ise a tle. Kana ke ene yo o tshegofatsang setlhabelo; morago ga moo balalediwi ba je. Jaanong he, tlhatlogang. Gonne lo tla mo fitlhela ka yona nako e.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Ba tlhatlogela kwa motseng. Ya re ba tsena mo motseng, ba rakana le Samuele a tswa a tlhatlogela kwa thoteng ya tlhabelo." 
1Samuel9:15 Mme Morena o ne a itsisitse Samuele maabane, Saule a ise a tle, a re:" 
1Samuel9:16 “Kamoso ka nako e ke tla tsisa monna kwa go wena, a tswa kwa nageng ya Benyamene, o mo tlotse go nna moeteledipele wa Baiseraele, morafe wa me, gore a o pholose mo diatleng tsa Bafelesita; gonne ke bonye pogisego ya morafe wa me le selelo sa ona se fitlhile kwano go nna.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Jaanong ya re Samuele a bona Saule, Morena a mo raya a re: “Ke ene monna yo ke buileng nao ka ga gagwe ka re: O tla busa morafe wa me.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Mme Saule a atamela Samuele fa gare ga kgoro a re: “A ko o mpolelele gore ntlo ya Mmoni e kae?” 
1Samuel9:19 Samuele a araba Saule a re: “Ke nna Mmoni. Nketelele pele o tlhatlogele kwa thabaneng ya tlhabelo. Lo tla ja le nna kajeno. E tla re mo mosong ke go nee tsela, ke go bolelele tsotlhe tse di mo pelong ya gago." 
1Samuel9:20 Se tshwenyegele diesele tse dinamagadi tse kajeno e leng letsatsi la boraro di ntse di go timeletse, gonne di bonywe. Mme tsotlhe tse di eletsegang tsa Iseraele e tla nna tsa ga mang? A e tla bo e se tsa gago le tsa lelapa lotlhe la ga rraago?”" 
1Samuel9:21 Saule a fetola a re: “A ga ke Mobenyamene wa longwe lwa ditso tse dipotlana tsa Iseraele? E bile losika lwa ga etsho ke lo lobotlana mo ditshikeng tsotlhe tsa lotso lwa ga Benyamene. Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa o bua tse di ntseng jalo le nna?” 
1Samuel9:22 Mme Samuele a tsaya Saule le motlhanka wa gagwe, a ba isa kwa ntlong e e jelang, a ba nnisa mo mannong a a kwa pele ga ba ba laleditsweng ba ba neng ba ka nna 30." 
1Samuel9:23 Samuele a ba a raya moapei a re: “Tlisa nama e ke e go neetseng ka re, o e boloke.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Moapei a ntsha letsogo le na le dikgopo, a di baya fa pele ga Saule. Ke fa Samuele a re: “E e setseng ke e. Itsholele o je. Gonne e sadiseditswe wena moletlong ono maloba fa ke laletsa batho.” Saule a ja jalo le Samuele ka letsatsi leo." 
1Samuel9:25 Ya re ba sena go fologa kwa thabaneng ya tlhabelo le go fitlha mo motseng, ba alela Saule dikobo mo godimo ga ntlo." 
1Samuel9:26 A lala teng. Jaanong ya re mahube a tswa, Samuele a bitsa Saule a lebile kwa godimo ga ntlo a re: “Tsoga gore ke go nee tsela.” Saule a tsoga, ba tswela kwa ntle ka bobedi jwa bone, ene le Samuele." 
1Samuel9:27 Ya re ba sena go fologa le go fitlha fa motse o khutlang teng, Samuele a raya Saule a re: “Raya motlhanka, a tsamaele kwa pele.” A tsamaya. “Mme wena o eme jaanong gore ke go utlwise Lefoko la Modimo.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Ke fa Samuele a tsaya kurwana ya lookwane, a lo tshela mo tlhogong ya gagwe, a mo atla a re: “Morena o go tloditse gore o nne moeteledipele wa boswa jwa gagwe. Mme sesupo sa teng ke se:" 
1Samuel10:2 Fa o tloga mo go nna kajeno, o tla fitlhela banna ba le babedi fa phupung ya ga Ragele mo nageng ya Benyamene kwa Selesa, ba tla go raya ba re: ‘Diesele tse dinamagadi tse o ileng go di batla, ba di bonye. E bile rraago o setse a tlhokomologile kgang ya diesele, mme o tshwenyegela lona a re: Ke tla dirang gore ke bone morwaake?’" 
1Samuel10:3 E tla re o sena go tloga teng le go etela pele le go fitlha kwa setlhareng sa eike sa Thabore, banna ba le bararo ba go fitlhele teng ba ba tlhatlogelang kwa Modimong kwa Bethele; mongwe a rwele dipotsane di le tharo, yo mongwe a rwele dinkgwe di le tharo, wa boraro a rwele lekuka la weine." 
1Samuel10:4 Ba tla go botsa matsogo, ba go naya dinkgwe di le pedi; o di amogele mo diatleng tsa bone." 
1Samuel10:5 Morago ga moo o tla fitlha kwa thabaneng ya Modimo kwa balebeledi ba puso ya Bafelesita ba leng teng. Mme e tla re o fitlha teng mo motseng, o kgatlhane le setlhopha sa baporofeti, ba fologa mo thabaneng ya tlhabelo, ba eteletswe pele ke baletsi ba harepa le moropana le lotlhaka le lengope, ba ntse ba bua ka mokgwa wa baporofeti." 
1Samuel10:6 Foo mowa wa Morena o tla go tsena, mme o tla itshola jaaka moporofeti nabo, o fetoga monna o sele." 
1Samuel10:7 Mme e re ditshupo tseo di sena go go dirafalela, o dire se se gaufi le seatla sa gago; gonne Modimo o na nao." 
1Samuel10:8 Jaanong nketelele pele, o fologele kwa Gilegala. Le nna ke tla fologa, ke go latela ke tla go fisa ditlhabelo tsa phiso le go tlhaba ditlhabelo tsa tebogo. O ntete malatsi a supa go fitlhelela ke be ke fitlhe kwa go wena, ke go itsise se o tla se dirang.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Ya re a hulara go tlogela Samuele, Modimo wa mo fetola pelo, ya nna e sele. Le gona ga dirafala ditshupo tsotlhe tseo ka letsatsi leo." 
1Samuel10:10 E rile ba fitlha teng kwa thabaneng ya Modimo, setlhopha sa baporofeti sa mo kgatlhantsha, mme Mowa wa Modimo wa tsena mo go ene, mme a itshola jaaka moporofeti mo gare ga bone." 
1Samuel10:11 Botlhe ba ba neng ba ntse ba mo itse, ya re ba mmona a duduetsa le baporofeti, ba botsana ba re: “Ke eng se se dirafaletseng morwa Khiše? A Saule le ene ke moporofeti?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Ga fetola monna wa teng a re: “Kana rraabo ke mang?” Ke ka moo go simologileng seane se se reng: “A Saule le ene ke moporofeti?” 
1Samuel10:13 Ya re a sena go fetsa go duduetsa, a fitlha kwa Gibea." 
1Samuel10:14 Ke fa rrangwanaagwe Saule a mmotsa le motlhanka wa gagwe a re: “Lo ne lo ile kae?” A araba a re: “Re ne re ile go batla diesele tse dinamagadi; ya re re di tlhoka, ra ya kwa go Samuele.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Mme rrangwanaagwe Saule a re: “A ko o mpolelele tse Samuele o di buileng le lona.” 
1Samuel10:16 Saule a araba rrangwanaagwe a re: “O re itsisitse a re: ‘Diesele tse dinamagadi di bonywe.’ ” Mme a se ka a mmolelela tsa bogosi tse Samuele o di buileng. 
1Samuel10:17 Jaanong Samuele a biletsa morafe kwa Moreneng kwa Mitsepha," 
1Samuel10:18 a raya Baiseraele a re: “Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana a re: ‘Ke nna ke ntshitseng Baiseraele kwa Egepeto, ka lo golola mo diatleng tsa Baegepeto le mo diatleng tsa magosi aotlhe a a neng a lo pitlaganya.’" 
1Samuel10:19 Mme lona lo latlhile Modimo wa lona kajeno o o lo thusitseng mo ditlalelong tsotlhe tsa lona le mo dipitlaganyong tsa lona, lwa o raya lwa re: ‘Re tlhomele kgosi!’ Jaanong he, emang fa pele ga Morena ka fa ditsong tsa lona le ka fa diketeng tsa lona!”" 
1Samuel10:20 Ya re Samuele a atametsa ditso tsotlhe tsa Iseraele, ga tshwarwa lotso lwa Benyamene." 
1Samuel10:21 Ya re a atametsa lotso lwa Benyamene ka fa ditshikeng tsa lone, ga tshwarwa losika lwa ga Materi; ya re a atametsa losika lwa ga Materi, ga tshwarwa Saule morwa Khiše, mme ya re ba mmatla, a bo a se yo." 
1Samuel10:22 Ke fa ba botsa Morena gape ba re: “A monna yoo o setse a tlile kwano?” Morena a re: “O teng, o iphitlhile kwa dithotong tsa leeto.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Ba taboga, ba mo tsaya teng. Ya re a ema mo gare ga morafe, a bo a le moleele, a feta batho botlhe, ba mo khutlela fa legetleng." 
1Samuel10:24 Ke fa Samuele a raya morafe otlhe a re: “A lo a mmona yo Morena o mo tlhophileng? Gonne ga go na ope yo o tshwanang nae mo morafeng otlhe.” Ke fa morafe otlhe o tlhaba mokgosi o re: “A kgosi e phele!” 
1Samuel10:25 Samuele a ba a bolelela morafe tse ba tshwanetseng go di direla kgosi, a di kwala mo lokwalong, a lo boloka fa pele ga Morena. Jaanong Samuele a naya morafe otlhe tsela, mongwe le mongwe a boela kwa lapeng la gagwe." 
1Samuel10:26 Saule le ene a ya kwa lapeng la gagwe kwa Gibea, mme baetleetsi ba mephato ba ya nae, ba Modimo o neng o ba ratisitse jalo." 
1Samuel10:27 Mme banna ba e seng ba sepe ba ne ba re: “Yoo, o tla re thusa eng?” Ba mo nyatsa jalo, ba se ka ba mo tlisetsa mpho, mme a ba tlhokomologa." 
1Samuel11:1 Morago ga moo ga bolola Nahase wa Moamone, a dikanyetsa motse wa Jabese kwa Gileate ka ntwa; ke fa banna botlhe ba Jabese ba raya Nahase ba re: “Dira kgolagano le rona, mme re tla go direla.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Mme Nahase wa Moamone a ba fetola a re: “Kgolagano e nke e dirang le lona ke ya go re: Lona lotlhe ke lo gonye matlho a le le jang, ke direle Baiseraele botlhe tshotlego jalo.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Bagolo ba Jabese ba mo araba ba re: “Re fe sebaka sa malatsi a supa gore re rome barongwi kwa nageng yotlhe ya Iseraele. Jaanong e tla re fa go se na ope yo o re thusang, re go ineele.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Barongwi bao ba fitlha kwa Gibea wa ga Saule, ba bolela mafoko ao mo ditsebeng tsa batho. Ke fa batho botlhe ba tlhatlosa mantswe ba lela." 
1Samuel11:5 E ne e le gona Saule a gorogang, a tswa kwa tshimong a setse dikgomo morago. Saule a botsa a re: “Batho ba lelelang?” Ba mmolelela mafoko a banna ba Jabese." 
1Samuel11:6 Ya re Saule a utlwa mafoko ao, Mowa wa Modimo wa mo tsena, mme a tuka bogale." 
1Samuel11:7 A tsaya dikgomo di le pedi, a di tlhaba, a di kgabetlela, a romela dinama kwa nageng yotlhe ya Iseraele ka barongwi a re: “Yo o sa bololeng a sala Saule le Samuele morago, dikgomo tsa gagwe di tla dirwa jalo.” Ke fa poifo ya Morena e wela batho, mme ba bolola jaaka monna a le mongwe." 
1Samuel11:8 Jaanong a ba bala kwa Beseke: Baiseraele ba le 300 000, banna ba Juta ba le 30 000." 
1Samuel11:9 A laela barongwi bale ba ba tlileng a re: “Bolelelang banna ba Jabese kwa Gileate jaana lo re: ‘E tla re kamoso fa letsatsi le le bolelo, lo bone thuso.’ ” Ya re barongwi ba fitlha, ba bolelela banna ba Jabese jalo, mme ba itumela." 
1Samuel11:10 Jaanong banna ba Jabese ba raya Baamone ba re: “Kamoso re tla ineela mo go lona gore lo re direle tsotlhe ka fa lo bonang ka teng.” 
1Samuel11:11 Ya re kamoso mo mosong Saule a kgaoganya banna ditlhopha di le tharo; ba tsena mo bothibelelong jwa Baamone ka tiso ya masa, ba bolaya Baamone go ya bolelong jwa motshegare. Masalela a bone a phatlalala, go se ba le babedi ba ba setseng mmogo." 
1Samuel11:12 Ke fa banna ba raya Samuele ba re: “Ke bomang ba ba boditseng ba re: ‘A Saule o tla re busa?’ Ntshang banna bao gore re ba bolae!” 
1Samuel11:13 Mme Saule a re: “A go se ka ga bolawa ope ka letsatsi le, gonne Morena o dirafaditse pholoso mo Iseraeleng kajeno.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Samuele ene a raya banna a re: “Tlaang a re yeng kwa Gilegala, re tlhomamise bogosi teng sešwa.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Ke fa banna botlhe ba ya kwa Gilegala, ba dira Saule kgosi sešwa fa pele ga Morena teng kwa Gilegala; ba tlhaba ditlhabelo tsa tebogo teng fa pele ga Morena. Saule le banna botlhe ba Iseraele ba itumela thata gona." 
1Samuel12:1 Mme Samuele a raya Baiseraele botlhe a re: “Kana ke utlwile mantswe a lona mo go tsotlhe tse lo di buileng le nna, ke lo neile kgosi." 
1Samuel12:2 Jaanong he, kgosi e e tla lo etelelang pele ke e. Nna ke tsofetse, ke thuntse, bomorwaake ke bao, lo a ba bona; ke sa le ke sepela fa pele ga lona go tloga bonyaneng jwa me go fitlha letsatsing leno." 
1Samuel12:3 Ke fano. Supang ka ga me fa pele ga Morena le fa pele ga motlodiwa wa gagwe. Ke amogile mang pholo? Ke pitlagantse mang? Ke amogetse thelesetso mo seatleng sa ga mang, ka iphatlha ka yona? Kana nka lo busetsa.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Ba araba ba re: “Nnyaya! Ga o a ka wa re gatelela le e seng go re pitlaganya; ga o a ka wa amogela sepe mo seatleng sa ope.” 
1Samuel12:5 A ba raya a re: “Morena ke mosupi ka ga lona le motlodiwa wa gagwe ke mosupi ka letsatsi le fa lo sa fitlhela sepe mo seatleng sa me.” Ba re: “Ke ene mosupi.” 
1Samuel12:6 Samuele a ba a raya morafe a re: “Mosupi ke Morena yo o dirileng Moše le Arone, yo o ntshitseng borraeno kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto." 
1Samuel12:7 Jaanong he, emang gore ke sekisanye le lona fa pele ga Morena ka ga ditiro tsotlhe tse di siameng tsa Morena, tse o di lo diretseng le borraeno." 
1Samuel12:8 E rile Jakobe a sena go fitlha kwa Egepeto, mme borraeno ba rapela Morena, Morena a roma Moše le Arone, mme ba ntsha borraeno kwa Egepeto, ba ba baya mo lefatsheng leno." 
1Samuel12:9 Mme ya re ba lebala Morena, Modimo wa bone, a ba neela mo diatleng tsa ga Sisera molaodi wa mephato ya kwa Hasore, le mo diatleng tsa Bafelesita le mo diatleng tsa kgosi ya Moabe, mme ba tlhabana nabo." 
1Samuel12:10 Ke fa ba goela Moreneng ba re: ‘Re leofile, gonne re go tlogetse, Morena, ra direla boBaale le boAšethorethe. Mme jaanong re golole mo diatleng tsa baba ba rona, foo re tla go direla.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Mme Morena a roma Jerubaale le Barake le Ifetha le Samuele, a lo golola mo diatleng tsa baba ba lona tikologong, lwa ba lwa aga lo iketlile." 
1Samuel12:12 Fela e rile lo bona Nahase kgosi ya Baamone a tla a lo tlhasela, lwa nthaya lwa re: ‘Nnyaya! A re busiwe ke kgosi!’ Etswe Morena Modimo wa lona e ntse e le kgosi ya lona." 
1Samuel12:13 “Jaanong he, kgosi e lo e tlhophileng lwa e kopa, ke e; ke yona kgosi e Morena o e lo neetseng." 
1Samuel12:14 E tla re fa lo boifa Morena, lo mo direla lo utlwa lentswe la gagwe, lo sa ganetsa molomo wa Morena; fa lona le kgosi e e lo busang lo sala Morena, Modimo wa lona, morago – foo o tla nna le lona." 
1Samuel12:15 Mme fa lo ka gana go utlwa lentswe la Morena, lwa ganetsa molomo wa Morena, foo seatla sa Morena se tla lo betsa jaaka se beditse borraeno." 
1Samuel12:16 Mme jaanong emang lo bone selo se segolo se Morena o tla se dirang mo matlhong a lona. 
1Samuel12:17 A ga ke re, go thobo ya mabele kajeno? Ke tla rapela Morena gore a dumise maru, a nese pula gore lo itse, lo be lo bone bosula jwa lona fa e le jo bogolo jo lo bo dirileng mo matlhong a Morena ka go ikopela kgosi.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Ya re Samuele a rapela Morena, Morena a dumisa maru, a nesa pula ka letsatsi leo, mme morafe otlhe wa boifa Morena le Samuele thata." 
1Samuel12:19 Morafe otlhe wa raya Samuele wa re: “Rapelela batlhanka ba gago mo Moreneng, Modimo wa gago, gore re se ka ra swa. Gonne re okeditse maleo otlhe a rona ka bosula jwa go ikopela kgosi.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Ke fa Samuele a raya morafe a re: “Se boifeng. Maleo otlhe ao lo a dirile. Fela lo se ka lwa fapoga, lwa tlogela Morena, mme lo direle Morena ka pelo yotlhe." 
1Samuel12:21 Lo se ka lwa fapoga, lwa latela medimo ya boithamako e e sa thuseng sepe, e e sa pholoseng ope, ka e le ya boithamako." 
1Samuel12:22 Gonne Morena ga a kitla a latlha morafe wa gagwe ka ntlha ya leina le legolo la gagwe, ka Morena a ratile go lo dira morafe wa gagwe." 
1Samuel12:23 Le gona a go nne kgakala le nna go ka leofela Morena ka go khutla go lo rapelela, mme ke tla lo ruta tsela e e siameng e e tlhamaletseng." 
1Samuel12:24 Fela boifang Morena, lo mo direle ka boikanyo le ka pelo yotlhe; gonne lo bonye tse dikgolo tse o di lo diretseng." 
1Samuel12:25 Mme fa lo dira tse di bosula, lo tla latlhega, lona le kgosi ya lona.”" 
1Samuel13:1 E rile Saule a simolola go busa a bo a le dinyaga di le; ya re a sena go busa Iseraele dinyaga di le pedi," 
1Samuel13:2 Saule a itlhophela banna ba le 3 000 mo Baiseraeleng; ba le 2 000 ba nna le Saule kwa Migemase le mo thabeng ya Bethele; ba le 1 000 ba nna le Jonathane kwa Gibea wa Benyamene. Banna ba bangwe a ba naya tsela gore mongwe le mongwe a boele kwa lapeng la gagwe. 
1Samuel13:3 Jaanong Jonathane a bolaya balebeledi ba puso ya Bafelesita ba ba neng ba le kwa Geba. Bafelesita ba utlwa jalo. Mme Saule a letsa lonaka mo lefatsheng lotlhe a re: “A Bahebere ba utlwe!” 
1Samuel13:4 Baiseraele botlhe ba utlwa go twe: “Saule o bolaile balebeledi ba puso ya Bafelesita; le gona Baiseraele ba itlhoisitse Bafelesita.” Mme banna ba kuiwa gore ba latele Saule go ya kwa Gilegala. 
1Samuel13:5 Le Bafelesita ba phuthega go tlhabana le Baiseraele ba na le dikoloi tsa ntwa di le 3 000 le bapalami ba dipitse ba le 6 000, le banna ba ba kana ka motlhaba o o fa losing lwa lewatle. Ba bolola, ba thibelela kwa Migemase mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Bethawene." 
1Samuel13:6 Ya re banna ba Iseraele ba ipona fa ba le mo tlalelong, mme morafe o pitlagantswe, ba iphitlha mo dikgageng le mo sekhung le mo dipharong le mo mesimeng le mo dikgatamping." 
1Samuel13:7 Bahebere bangwe ba tshela Joretane, ba ya kwa nageng ya Gate le ya Gileate, mme Saule a sa ntse a le kwa Gilegala, batho botlhe ba mo setse morago ba tshogile." 
1Samuel13:8 Saule a letela nako e e beilweng ke Samuele malatsi a supa, mme Samuele a se ka a tla kwa Gilegala. Jaanong ya re morafe o phatlalala, o mo tlogela," 
1Samuel13:9 Saule a re: “Ntlisetseng setlhabelo sa phiso le ditlhabelo tsa tebogo.” A ba a dira setlhabelo sa phiso. 
1Samuel13:10 Ya re e le gona a fetsang go dira setlhabelo sa phiso a bona Samuele a tla. Saule a ya go mo kgatlhantsha le go mo dumedisa. 
1Samuel13:11 Mme Samuele a botsa a re: “O dirileng?” Saule a re: “E rile ke bona morafe o phatlalala o ntlogela, mme wena o sa tle ka nako e e beilweng. Bafelesita ba ntse ba phuthegile kwa Migemase," 
1Samuel13:12 ka re jaanong Bafelesita ba tla nkwela mono Gilegala ke ise ke kope bopelotlhomogi mo Moreneng; ka nametsa pelo, ka dira setlhabelo sa phiso.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Mme Samuele a raya Saule a re: “O dirile ka bosilo; ga o a tshegetsa taolo ya Morena, Modimo wa gago, e o e go laetseng; gonne foo Morena o ka bo a tlhomamisitse bogosi jwa gago mo Iseraeleng ka bosakhutleng." 
1Samuel13:14 Mme jaanong bogosi jwa gago ga bo kitla bo tlhomama. Morena o setse a ipatletse monna yo o utlwanang le pelo ya gagwe. E bile Morena o mo laetse go nna moeteledipele wa morafe wa gagwe; gonne wena ga o a ka wa tshegetsa tse Morena o di go laetseng.” 
1Samuel13:15 Ke fa Samuele a nanoga, a tloga kwa Gilegala, a ya kwa Gibea wa Benyamene, mme Saule a bala banna ba ba nang nae, e ka nna banna ba le 600." 
1Samuel13:16 Jaanong Saule le Jonathane morwawe le batho ba ba nang nabo ba sala kwa Geba wa Benyamene, Bafelesita bone ba thibeletse kwa Migemase." 
1Samuel13:17 Mme lekoko la bathukhuthi la bolola kwa bothibelelong jwa Bafelesita e le masomo a mararo. Lesomo lengwe la fapogela kwa ntlheng ya Ofera kwa lefatsheng la Suale; 
1Samuel13:18 lesomo le lengwe la fapogela kwa ntlheng ya Bethorone; lesomo la boraro la fapogela kwa ntlheng ya Geba yo o okameng Mokgatsha wa Diphiri a lebile kwa sekakeng. 
1Samuel13:19 Mme mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Iseraele go ne go sa dumelelwe mothudi; gonne Bafelesita ba re: “E se re gongwe Bahebere ba dira tšhaka le lerumo.” 
1Samuel13:20 Mongwe le mongwe wa Baiseraele botlhe o ne a tshwanetse go fologela kwa Bafelesiteng go thulelwa ege le petlwana le selepe le sekara sa mogoma 
1Samuel13:21 fa di titinegile, e bong dikara tsa megoma le dipetlwana le diforoko tse di maphatamararo le dilepe; le go tlhamalatsa lešwane." 
1Samuel13:22 Jaanong ya re ka letsatsi la tlhabano kwa Migemase ga bo go sa bonwe tšhaka le lerumo mo banneng botlhe ba ba nang le Saule le Jonathane; di tshotswe ke Saule le Jonathane morwawe fela. 
1Samuel13:23 Balebeledi ba puso ya Bafelesita ba ne ba bololela kwa phateng ya Migemase. 
1Samuel14:1 Ka letsatsi le lengwe Jonathane morwa Saule a raya motlhanka yo o rweleng dibolai tsa gagwe a re: “Tlaya, re kgabaganyetse kwa balebeleding ba Bafelesita ba ba kwa ntlheng ele!” Mme a se ka a bolelela rraagwe." 
1Samuel14:2 Saule o ne a le kwa molelwaneng wa Gibea, a dutse fa tlase ga setlhare sa garanata se se kwa Migerone. Batlhabani ba ba neng ba na nae e ne e ka nna ba le 600." 
1Samuel14:3 Ahia morwa Ahitube morwa-rraagwe Ikabote morwa Phinehase morwa Eli moperesiti wa Morena kwa Silo a bo a apere khiba ya boperesiti. Banna ba ne ba sa itse gore Jonathane o tsamaile. 
1Samuel14:4 Mo gare ga phata fa Jonathane a neng a batla go kgabaganya teng go tlhasela batlhodi ba Bafelesita ga bo go le lefika le le ntlha mo ntlheng eno le lefika le le ntlha mo ntlheng ele; leina la lengwe e le Bosese, leina la le lengwe e le Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Lefika le le ntlha le le kwa bokone le ne le lebaganye le Migemase; le lengwe le le kwa borwa le ne le lebaganye le Geba. 
1Samuel14:6 Jaanong Jonathane a raya motlhanka yo o rweleng dibolai tsa gagwe a re: “Tlaya, re kgabaganyetse kwa batlhoding ba ba sa rupang bale. Ka gongwe Morena o tla re thusa; gonne ga go na se se ka thibelang Morena go pholosa ka bontsi gongwe ka bobotlana.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Motshola-dibolai wa gagwe a mo araba a re: “Dira tsotlhe tse pelo ya gago e di ikaeletseng. Ke na nao. Se o se ratang le nna ke a se rata.” 
1Samuel14:8 Jonathane a ba a re: “Bona, re tla kgabaganyetsa kwa banneng bale, re ba ipontsha." 
1Samuel14:9 Jaanong fa ba ka re raya jaana ba re: ‘Emang, re be re fitlhe koo go lona!’ gona re tla ema fa re leng teng, re sa tlhatlogele kwa go bone." 
1Samuel14:10 Mme fa ba ka re: ‘Tlhatlogelang kwano go rona!’ foo re tla tlhatloga; gonne Morena o tla bo a ba neetse mo diatleng tsa rona. Selo seo e tla nna sesupo mo go rona.” 
1Samuel14:11 Ya re ba ipontsha batlhodi ba Bafelesita ka bobedi jwa bone Bafelesita ba re: “Bahebere ke bale, ba tswa mo mesimeng, mo ba neng ba iphitlhile teng.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Mme banna ba batlhodi ba bitsa Jonathane le motshola-dibolai wa gagwe ba re: “Tlhatlogelang kwano, re tle go lo tlhalefisa!” Ke fa Jonathane a raya motshola-dibolai wa gagwe a re: “Tlhatloga o ntshale morago, gonne Morena o ba neetse mo diatleng tsa Baiseraele.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Jonathane a tlhatloga ka go abula, motshola-dibolai wa gagwe a mo setse morago. Ke fa ba wa fa pele ga Jonathane, mme motshola-dibolai wa gagwe a mo sala morago, a ba fofotsa." 
1Samuel14:14 Polao ya ntlha eo e Jonathane le motshola-dibolai wa gagwe ba bolaileng banna ba e ka nnang ba le 20 mo go yona ya dirafala mo felwaneng ga bontlhanngwe jwa tema ya letsatsi. 
1Samuel14:15 Jaanong ga nna letshogo mo bothibelelong le mo nageng le mo banneng botlhe ba Bafelesita; le gona ga rerega batlhodi le lekoko la bathukhuthi; le lefatshe la roroma, ya nna theregiso ya Modimo." 
1Samuel14:16 Jaanong rile batlhodi ba ga Saule kwa Gibea wa Benyamene ba leba, ba bona bontsi bo tetesela, bo tabogela kwa le kwa." 
1Samuel14:17 Ke fa Saule a raya banna ba ba nang nae a re: “A ko lo bale, lo bone yo o se yong mo go rona.” Ya re ba bala ba fitlhela Jonathane le motshola-dibolai wa gagwe ba se yo." 
1Samuel14:18 Saule a ba a raya Ahia a re: “Tlisa Letlole la Modimo.” Letlole la Modimo le ne le le mo Baiseraeleng ka sebaka seo. 
1Samuel14:19 Ya re Saule a sa ntse a bua le moperesiti tlhodio e e mo bothibelelong jwa Bafelesita ya nna ya golela pele. Ke fa Saule a raya moperesiti a re: “Tlogela!” 
1Samuel14:20 Ga kuiwa Saule le banna botlhe ba ba nang nae; ya re ba fitlha kwa tlhabanong ba fitlhela go bolayana bone ka ditšhaka, go le tlhakatlhakanyo e kgolo thata." 
1Samuel14:21 Mme Bahebere ba ba neng ba ntse ba thusa Bafelesita ba ba neng ba bolotse nabo mo mephatong ba tlhanoga le bone, ba thusa Baiseraele ba ba nang le Saule le Jonathane." 
1Samuel14:22 Jaanong ya re banna botlhe ba Iseraele ba ba neng ba iphitlhile kwa dithabeng tsa Eferaime ba utlwa go twe, Bafelesita ba a tshaba, le bone ba ba khutšhela mo tlhabanong." 
1Samuel14:23 Morena o ne a naya Iseraele phenyo jalo ka letsatsi leo. Jaanong tlhabano e feta Bethawene. 
1Samuel14:24 Mme banna ba Iseraele ba lapile ka letsatsi leo, Saule a ikanisa banna a re: “Go hutsitswe monna yo o ka jang dijo pele ga mantsiboa, ke ise ke ipusolosetse mo babeng ba me.” Ka moo banna botlhe ba se ka ba ja dijo." 
1Samuel14:25 Batho botlhe ba tsena mo sekgweng, mme ga bo go tletse dinotshe mo nageng eo." 
1Samuel14:26 Ya re banna ba phunya dinotshe, ba fitlhela di tsentse, e bile mamepe a tshologa, mme go se na ope yo o isang seatla sa gagwe kwa molomong ka banna ba boifa khutso ele." 
1Samuel14:27 Mme Jonathane o ne a sa utlwa fa rraagwe a ikanisa banna; a ntsha ntlha ya molamu o a o tshotseng, a kgotla mo lemepeng, a isa kwa molomong, a mona; ke fa matlho a gagwe a apoga." 
1Samuel14:28 Mme mongwe wa banna a mo raya a re: “Rraago o ikanisitse banna maikano a a reng: ‘Go hutsitswe monna yo o jang dijo kajeno.’ Ke ka mo banna ba feletsweng ke thata.” 
1Samuel14:29 Jonathane a re: “Rre o isitse lefatshe le mo tatlhegong. A ko lo bone jaaka matlho a me a apogile fa ke sena go ja bobotlana jwa mafura a dinotshe a. 
1Samuel14:30 Kana fa banna ba ka bo ba dumeletswe go ja tsa thopo ya baba ba bone kajeno e ba e bonyeng, foo polao mo Bafelesiteng e ka bo e le kgolo thata.”" 
1Samuel14:31 Ka letsatsi leo ba ne ba bolaya Bafelesita go tswa kwa Migemase go ya kwa Ayalone; fela banna ba ne ba lapile thata. 
1Samuel14:32 Jaanong banna ba tla ba wela thopo, ba tsaya dinku le dikgomo le dipoana, ba di tlhabela fa fatshe; ba be ba di ja di ntse di rotha madi." 
1Samuel14:33 Ke fa Saule a begelwa go twe: “Bona, banna ba leofela Morena ka go ja nama e e rothang madi.” Mme a re: “Lo dira molato! Pitikelang lentswe le legolo kwano go nna.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Saule a ba a re: “Phatlalalelang mo banneng, lo ba ree lo re: ‘A mongwe le mongwe a tlise kgomo ya gagwe gongwe nku ya gagwe kwano go nna, lo di tlhabe fano, lo be lo je, mme lo se ka lwa leofela Morena ka go ja nama e e rothang madi.’ ” Ke fa mongwe le mongwe a tlisa se a nang naso bosigo joo, ba di tlhabela teng." 
1Samuel14:35 Mme Saule a agela Morena aletare, e le aletare ya ntlha e o e agetseng Morena." 
1Samuel14:36 Jaanong Saule a re: “A re fologeng, re latelele Bafelesita bosigo jo, re ba thukhuthe dilo go ya phepafalong ya moso, mme re se ka ra sadisa ope wa bone.” Ba re: “Dira tsotlhe tse di siameng mo matlhong a gago.” Mme moperesiti a re: “A re atameleng Modimong fano.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Ke fa Saule a botsa Modimo a re: “A ke fologe, ke latelele Bafelesita? A o tla ba neela mo diatleng tsa Baiseraele?” Mme wa se ka wa mo araba ka letsatsi leo." 
1Samuel14:38 Saule a ba a re: “Atamelang kwano lona bagolo lotlhe ba morafe, lo lemoge, lo bone gore boleo joo bo dirafetse ka eng kajeno?" 
1Samuel14:39 Gonne ka bophelo jwa Morena yo o fileng Iseraele phenyo le fa bo le mo go Jonathane morwaake, o tshwanetse go swa!” Mme ga se ka ga nna ope mo banneng botlhe yo o mo arabang." 
1Samuel14:40 Jaanong a raya Baiseraele botlhe a re: “Lona lo nnele ntlha ele, mme nna le Jonathane morwaake re tla nna ka kwano.” Banna ba araba Saule ba re: “Dira ka fa o bonang ka teng.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Ke fa Saule a raya Morena a re: “Modimo wa Iseraele, re supetse boammaaruri.” Ga tshwarwa Jonathane le Saule, mme banna ba falola fela." 
1Samuel14:42 Saule a re: “Ntlhameleng tengwa le Jonathane morwaake.” Ga tshwarwa Jonathane. 
1Samuel14:43 Ke fa Saule a raya Jonathane a re: “A ko o mpolelele se o se dirileng.” Jonathane a mmolelela a re: “Ke jele bobotlana jwa mafura a dinotshe fela ka ntlha ya molamu o ke neng ke o tshotse. Ke fano. Nka swa.” 
1Samuel14:44 Saule a re: “A Modimo o ntirele jaana, o nkokeletse jaana, fa ke sa go bolae, Jonathane.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Mme banna ba raya Saule ba re: “A Jonathane o tla swa yo o dirileng phenyo e kgolo e mo Iseraeleng? A go nne kgakala! Ka bophelo jwa Morena! Ruri, ga go kitla go wela thiri epe ya gagwe fa fatshe. Gonne o e dirile ka thuso ya Modimo ka letsatsi la kajeno.” Banna ba golola Jonathane jalo mme a se ka a swa." 
1Samuel14:46 Jaanong Saule a tlogela Bafelesita a ya gae. Bafelesita bone ba ya kwa ga bone. 
1Samuel14:47 E rile Saule a se na go tsaya bogosi jwa Iseraele, a tlhabana le baba botlhe ba gagwe mo tikologong, e bong Bamoabe le Baamone le Baetomo le dikgosi tsa Soba le Bafelesita, mme gongwe le gongwe kwa a yang teng a fenya." 
1Samuel14:48 A itshupa a le pelokgale, a fenya Baamaleke, a namolela Baiseraele mo diatleng tsa yo o ba thukhuthang." 
1Samuel14:49 Bomorwa Saule e ne e le Jonathane le Iswi le Malekhišua. Maina a bomorwadie ba babedi e ne e le a: Leina la yo mogolo e le Merabe leina la yo mmotlana e le Migale. 
1Samuel14:50 Leina la mosadi wa ga Saule e ne e le Ahinoame morwadia Ahimaase; leina la molaodi wa mephato ya gagwe e le Abenere morwa Nere rrangwanaagwe Saule. 
1Samuel14:51 Kana Khiše rraagwe Saule le Nere rraagwe Abenere e ne e le bomorwa Abiele. 
1Samuel14:52 Go ne go le dintwa tse di makete le Bafelesita ka malatsi otlhe a ga Saule. Ka moo e ne ya re fa Saule a bona monna wa mogale gongwe wa senatla a mo itseele. 
1Samuel15:1 Tsatsi le lengwe Samuele a raya Saule a re: “Morena o kile a nthoma go go tlotsa gore o nne kgosi ya morafe wa gagwe wa Iseraele. Ka moo he utlwa mafoko a Morena. 
1Samuel15:2 Morena wa masomosomo o bua jaana a re: ‘Ke tla beletsa Baamaleke se ba kileng ba se direla Baiseraele fa ba ba thibela tsela, jale fa ba tswa kwa Egepeto." 
1Samuel15:3 Yaa jaanong o bolae Baamaleke, o ba nyeletse le tsotlhe tse ba nang natso, ka ba hutsitswe ke Modimo. O se ka wa ba rekegela, mme o bolae banna le basadi le bana le masea le dikgomo le dinku le dikammele le diesele.’ ”" 
1Samuel15:4 Ke fa Saule a kua banna, a ba bala kwa Telaime, e le ba dinao ba le 200 000 le banna ba Juta ba le 10 000." 
1Samuel15:5 Ya re Saule a fitlha kwa mošate wa Baamaleke a baya balaledi mo molapong. 
1Samuel15:6 Le gona Saule a raya Bakeni a re: “Nanogang, lo tloge, lo tswe mo gare ga Baamaleke e se re gongwe ka lo nyeletsa nabo; ka gonne lona lo diretse Baiseraele botlhe ka bopelotlhomogi jale fa ba tswa kwa Egepeto.” Ke fa Bakeni ba tloga, ba tswa mo gare ga Baamaleke." 
1Samuel15:7 Ya baa gona Saule a bolayang Baamaleke go tloga kwa Hawila go ya go fitlha kwa Sure yo o mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Egepeto. 
1Samuel15:8 A tshwara Agage kgosi ya Baamaleke a sa ntse a phela; mme a nyeletsa morafe otlhe ka bogale jwa tšhaka jaaka khutso ya Modimo. 
1Samuel15:9 Mme Saule le batho ba rekegela Agage le dinku le dikgomo tse dintle le tse di latelang tseo ka bontle le dikwana le tsotlhe tse di kgatlhisang, ba se ka ba rata go di bolaya jaaka Modimo o laetse, mme ba bolaya fela diruiwa tsotlhe tse di nyatsegang tse di bopamang." 
1Samuel15:10 Ke fa lefoko la Morena le tla kwa go Samuele le re: 
1Samuel15:11 “Ke utlwa botlhoko, fa ke dirile Saule kgosi, gonne o ikepile mo go nna, a se ka a dirafatsa mafoko a me.” Ke fa Samuele a tuka bogale, a goela Moreneng bosigo jotlhe." 
1Samuel15:12 Ya re mo mosong Samuele a phakela go kgatlhantsha Saule; mme ga begelwa Samuele ga twe: “Saule o tsenye kwa motseng wa Karemele, a itlhomela segopotso sa phenyo teng, a ba a thelela, a fetela pele, a fologela kwa Gilegala.”" 
1Samuel15:13 Jaanong ya re Samuele a fitlha kwa go Saule, Saule a mo raya a re: “A Morena a go tshegofatse! Ke dirafaditse lefoko la Morena.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Mme Samuele a botsa a re: “Dinku tse ke di utlwang di lela le dikgomo tse ke di utlwang di bokolela ke tsa eng?” 
1Samuel15:15 Saule a araba a re: “Ba di tsere kwa go Baamaleke, gonne banna ba rekegetse dinku le dikgomo tse dintle gore ba tle ba di tlhabela Morena, Modimo wa gago. Mme tse dingwe re di nyeleditse jaaka Modimo o laetse.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Ke fa Samuele a raya Saule a re: “Iketle, ke go bolele se Morena o letseng a se bua le nna bosigong jono.” A mo araba a re: “Bua.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Samuele a re: “A ga ke re, o tlhogo ya ditso tsa Iseraele le fa o ikaya yo mmotlana. Kana Morena o go tloditse gore o nne kgosi ya Iseraele." 
1Samuel15:18 Le gona Morena o go romile a re: ‘Ya o dirafatse khutso ya Modimo mo baleofing bale mo go Baamaleke, o tlhabana nabo go tsamaya o ba fedise.’" 
1Samuel15:19 Jaanong ke ka ntlha ya eng fa o sa utlwa lentswe la Morena, mme wa phomegela mo thopong, wa dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena?”" 
1Samuel15:20 Ke fa Saule a fetola Samuele a re: “Kana ke utlwile lentswe la Morena, ka tsena tseleng e Morena o nthomileng mo go yona, ka tlisa Agage kgosi ya Baamaleke, mme Baamaleke bone ka ba bolaela ruri ka khutso ya Modimo." 
1Samuel15:21 Fela banna ba tsere dinku le dikgomo tsa thopo, e bong tse dintle tsa tse di hutsitsweng ke Modimo go di tlhabela Morena Modimo wa gago mono Gilegala.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Mme Samuele a re: “A ditlhabelo tsa phiso le tse di jewang di kgatlha Morena jaaka go utlwa lentswe la Morena? Nnyaya go utlwa go gaisa setlhabelo; go reetsa go phala mafura a diphelehu! 
1Samuel15:23 Gonne go sa utlweng ke boleo jwa boloi; go ganetsa ke go ikepela medimong e sele. E re ka o latlhile Lefoko la Morena le ene o go latlhile gore o se tlhole o nna kgosi.” 
1Samuel15:24 Ke fa Saule a raya Samuele a re: “Ke leofile, gonne ke tlodile taolo ya Morena le mafoko a gago; ka gonne ke boifile batho, ka utlwa mantswe a bone." 
1Samuel15:25 Mme jaanong a ko o itshwarele boleo jwa me, o boe le nna gore ke obamele Morena.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Mme Samuele a fetola Saule a re: “Ga nkitla ke boa nao. E re ka o nyaditse Lefoko la Morena le Morena o go latlhile gore o se tlhole o nna kgosi ya Iseraele.” 
1Samuel15:27 Ya re Samuele a retologa a re o a tsamaya Saule a tshwara moja wa kobo ya gagwe, mme ya gagoga." 
1Samuel15:28 Ke fa Samuele a mo raya a re: “Morena o gagotse bogosi jwa Iseraele mo go wena kajeno, a bo neela yo mongwe yo o siameng bogolo go wena." 
1Samuel15:29 Le gona ene yo e leng tumiso ya Iseraele ga a ake, le e seng go ikwatlhaya; gonne ene ga se motho mo a ka ikwatlhayang.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Jaanong Saule a re: “Ke leofile, mme a ko o ntlotle jaanong fa pele ga bagolo ba morafe wa me le fa pele ga Baiseraele, o boe le nna gore ke obamele Morena, Modimo wa gago.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Ke fa Samuele a boa a sala Saule morago, mme Saule a obamela Morena." 
1Samuel15:32 Ya baa gona Samuele a reng: “Tlisang Agage kgosi ya Baamaleke kwano go nna.” Agage a ya kwa go ene a thabile. Agage a re: “Ruri, bogalaka jwa loso bo tlogile.”" 
1Samuel15:33 Mme Samuele a re: “Mmaago o tla amogwa ngwana mo basading jaaka tšhaka ya gago e amogile basadi bana.” Jaanong Samuele a remaganya Agage fa pele ga Morena kwa Gilegala. 
1Samuel15:34 Jaanong Samuele a ya kwa Rama; Saule ene a tlhatlogela kwa lapeng la gagwe, kwa Gibea-wa-ga-Saule." 
1Samuel15:35 Samuele a se ka a tlhola a bona Saule go ya letsatsing la loso lwa gagwe ka Samuele a hutsafalela Saule. Morena a utlwa botlhoko fa a dirile Saule kgosi ya Iseraele. 
1Samuel16:1 Morago ga moo Morena a raya Samuele a re: “O tla hutsafalela Saule go fitlha leng? Kana ke mo latlhile gore a se ka a tlhola a nna kgosi ya Iseraele. Tlatsa lonaka lwa gago lookwane, o tsamae; ke go roma kwa go Isai wa Betleheme; gonne ke iponetse kgosi mo go bomorwawe.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Samuele a botsa a re: “Nka ya jang? Fa Saule a ka utlwela, o tla mpolaya.” Morena a re: “Gapa kgomo ya moroba, o ye nayo teng, o fete o re: ‘Ke tlile go tlhabela Morena setlhabelo.’" 
1Samuel16:3 O be o laletse Isai tlhabelong. Ke tla go itsise se o tshwanetseng go se dira gore o ntloletse yo ke tla mo go kaelang.” 
1Samuel16:4 Samuele a dira se Morena a se buileng, mme ya re a goroga kwa Betleheme bagolo ba motse ba mo kgatlhantsha ba tshogile ba re: “A o tla ka kagiso?”" 
1Samuel16:5 A re: “Ka kagiso! Ke tlile go tlhabela Morena setlhabelo. Iitshepiseng, lo tle le nna moletlong wa tlhabelo.” Jaanong a itshepisa Isai le bomorwawe, a ba laleletsa moletlo wa tlhabelo." 
1Samuel16:6 Ya re ba tsena a bona Eliabe, a ithaya a re: “Ahee, ke ene motlodiwi wa Morena!”" 
1Samuel16:7 Mme Morena a raya Samuele a re: “Se lebe ponalo ya gagwe le seemo se seleele sa gagwe, gonne ke mo ganne; kana Modimo ga o lebe jaaka motho a leba. Gonne motho o bona fela tse di lebaganyeng le matlho, mme Morena o bona pelo.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Ke fa Isai a bitsa Abinatabe a mo fetisa fa pele ga Samuele, mme Samuele a re: “Le ene yo ga se yo Morena o mo tlhophileng.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Jaanong Isai a fetisa Sama, mme Samuele a re: “Le ene yo ga e ise e nne wa Morena.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Ya ba gona Isai a fetisang bomorwawe ba ba supa fa pele ga Samuele, mme Samuele a raya Isai a re: “Ga go ope mo go bone ba yo Morena o mo tlhophileng.”" 
1Samuel16:11 Mme Samuele a botsa Isai a re: “A basimane ba ke bone botlhe?” A araba a re: “Go setse yo mmotlana; o disa dinku.” Samuele a raya Isai a re: “E re a ye go bidiwa; gonne ga re ka ke ra nnela go ja a ise a tle.” 
1Samuel16:12 A roma motho, mme a mo tlisa. O ne a le mohibidu, a na le matlho a mantle, a le sebopego se sentle. Ke fa Morena a re: “Nanoga o mo tlotse, gonne ke ene yoo.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Samuele a tsaya lonaka lwa lookwane, a mo tlotsa mo gare ga bomogolowe. Mowa wa Morena wa tsena mo go Dafita go tloga ka letsatsi leo go ya pele. Jaanong Samuele a nanoga, a boela kwa Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 Mme Saule o ne a tlogetswe ke Mowa wa Morena, a ntse a tshwenngwa ke mowa o o bosula o o romilweng ke Morena." 
1Samuel16:15 Jaanong batlhanka ba ga Saule ba mo raya ba re: “A ko o bone, mowa o o bosula wa Modimo o go tshwenya." 
1Samuel16:16 A morena wa rona a bue lefoko fela, mme batlhanka ba gago ba ba go direlang, ba tla batla monna yo o itseng go letsa harepa gore e re fa mowa o o bosula wa Modimo o go tsena, a e letse ka seatla, mme ò nne botoka.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Ke fa Saule a laela batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “A lo ko lo mpatlele monna yo o itseng go letsa sentle, lo mo tlise go nna.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Ga araba mongwe wa makau a re: “Ke itse mongwe, ke morwa Isai wa kwa Betleheme. O itse go letsa; le gona ke senatla se se tiileng le mogale tlhabanong, e bile o itse go bua; ke monna yo montle, mme Morena o na nae.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Ke fa Saule a roma barongwi kwa go Isai a re: “Nthomele morwao Dafita yo o disang dinku.” 
1Samuel16:20 Jaanong Isai a tsaya esele, a e belesa dinkgwe le lekuka la weine, le potsane, a di romela Saule ka Dafita morwawe." 
1Samuel16:21 Dafita a ya kwa go Saule, a mo direla, mme Saule a mo rata thata, mme a nna morwadi wa dibolai tsa gagwe." 
1Samuel16:22 Ka moo Saule a roma kwa go Isai a re: “Ka thapelo, a Dafita a nne a ntirele; gonne ke a mo rata.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Mme e ne ya re fa mowa o o bosula wa Modimo o tsena mo go Saule Dafita a tsee harepa, a e letse ka seatla, mme Saule a lapologe, a nne kaone, mme mowa o o bosula o mo tlogele." 
1Samuel17:1 Mme Bafelesita ba phutha mephato ya bone go ya kwa ntweng, ya phuthegela kwa Sogo yo e leng wa Juta, ya thibelela kwa Efese-Damime fa gare ga Sogole le Aseka." 
1Samuel17:2 Saule le banna ba Iseraele le bone ba phuthega, ba thibelela mo molapong wa ditlhare tsa metherebinthe, ba ipaakanyetsa go tlhabana le Bafelesita." 
1Samuel17:3 Bafelesita ba bo ba eme mo thabeng ntlheng ele, Baiseraele ba eme mo thabeng ntlheng eno, go le leboa fa gare ga bone." 
1Samuel17:4 Jaanong ga tswa monna wa motlhabani mo mephatong ya Bafelesita, leina la gagwe e le Goliathe wa kwa Gathe; boleele jwa gagwe e le jwa mabogo a le marataro le bophara jwa seatla." 
1Samuel17:5 O ne a rwele kuane ya kgotlho mo tlhogong, a apere sefemelo sa tshipi se e keteng letlalo la kgaga; bokete jwa sona e ne e le dišekele di le 5 000 tsa kgotlho." 
1Samuel17:6 A na le dikamase tsa kgotlho mo maotong le lerumonyana la kgotlho fa gare ga magetla. 
1Samuel17:7 Lore lwa lerumo la gagwe lo ne lo le kana ka tlhomeso. Bogale jwa lerumo la gagwe e ne e le dišekele di le 600 tsa tshipi. Motshola-thebe a mo etelela pele. 
1Samuel17:8 Monna yoo a ema a kua a lebile mephato ya Iseraele, a e raya a re: “Lo bololetseng go ipaakanyetsa tlhabano? A ga ke Mofelesita, mme lona lo le batlhanka ba ga Saule fela? Itlhopheleng monna, a a fologele kwano go nna!" 
1Samuel17:9 Fa a ka kgona go tlhabana le nna le go mphenya re tla nna batlhanka ba lona; mme fa nka mo kgona ka mo fenya, lo tla nna batlhanka ba rona, lo re direla.”" 
1Samuel17:10 Mofelesita yoo a ba a re: “Ke kgobile mephato ya Iseraele kajeno ka re: ‘Mpheng monna gore re tlhabane mmogo!’ ” 
1Samuel17:11 Ya re Saule le Baiseraele botlhe ba utlwa mafoko ao a Mofelesita yoo, ba tshoga, ba boifa thata." 
1Samuel17:12 Jaanong Dafita e ne e le morwa monna yole wa Eferatha wa kwa Betleheme wa Juta yo leina la gagwe e leng Isai yo o neng a na le bomorwa ba robedi. Monna yoo o ne a setse a tsofetse mo malatsing a ga Saule, e le monna mogolo."
