1Samuel17:13 Mme bomorwa Isai ba bagolo ba bararo ba ne ba latetse Saule, ba ile kwa ntweng. Maina a bomorwawe ba bararo ba ba ileng kwa ntweng e ne e le Eliabe yo mogolo, a tlhomagannwa ke Abinatabe, wa boraro e le Sama." 
1Samuel17:14 Mme Dafita ene e ne e le gofejane. Jaanong ya re ba bagolo ba bararo ba sena go latela Saule. 
1Samuel17:15 Dafita a nna a tlogela Saule gangwe le gape, a ya go disa dinku tsa ga rraagwe kwa Betleheme." 
1Samuel17:16 Mme Mofelesita yole a atamela mo mosong le mantsiboa, a ikemisa jalo malatsi a le 40." 
1Samuel17:17 Jaanong Isai o kile a raya Dafita morwawe a re: “A ko o isetse bomogoloo kgetsanyana ya dipabe tse le dinkgwe di le some tse, o akofe o di ise kwa go bomogoloo kwa bothibelelong." 
1Samuel17:18 Dikase di le some tse tsa mašwi o di isetse molaodi wa ba le sekete, o be o botse bomogoloo bophelo, o ntlele neo ya karabo ya bone.”" 
1Samuel17:19 Kana Saule le bone le banna botlhe ba Iseraele ba bo ba le kwa lebaleng la ditlhare tsa metherebinthe, ba ile go tlhabana le Bafelesita." 
1Samuel17:20 Jaanong Dafita a phakela mo mosong, a tlogela dinku le modisa, a rwala mefago ele, a tsamaya jaaka Isai a mo laetse. Ya re a fitlha kwa magololong a dikoloi, mephato e e tswelang kwa felong ga tlhabano ya tlhabela tlhabano mokgosi." 
1Samuel17:21 Baiseraele le Bafelesita ba ne ba ipaakantse mephato e lebaganye. 
1Samuel17:22 Ke fa Dafita a rola morwalo, a o tlogela le molebeledi wa dithoto a sianela kwa mephatong, a fitlha a dumedisa bomogolowe." 
1Samuel17:23 Ya re a ntse a bua nabo ga tlhaga monna yole wa motlhabani yo leina la gagwe e leng Goliathe Mofelesita wa kwa Gathe a tswa mo mephatong ya Bafelesita, a bua mafoko ale gape, Dafita a a utlwa." 
1Samuel17:24 Mme banna botlhe ba Iseraele, e ne ya re fa ba bona monna yoo ba mo tshabe ba boife thata." 
1Samuel17:25 Mme monna mongwe wa Iseraele a re: “A lo bonye monna yo o tsileng yoo? Kana o tsile go kgoba Baiseraele. Mme jaanong monna yo o ka mo fenyang kgosi e tla mo humisa ka khumo e kgolo, e mo neela morwadia-yona, e kgaola ba lapa la ga rraagwe mo lekgethong la Baiseraele.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Dafita a botsa banna ba ba emeng fa go ene a re: “Monna yo o tla fenyang Mofelesita yole, a tlosa ditlhong mo Iseraeleng, o tla direlwang? Kana Mofelesita yo o sa rupang yoo ke mang mo a ka kgobang mephato ya Modimo o o phelang?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Mme batho ba mmolelela mafoko ale ba re: “Monna yo o mo fenyang o tla direlwa jaana le jaana.” 
1Samuel17:28 Ya re Eliabe mogolowe yo mogolo a mo utlwa a bua le banna a tukela Dafita bogale a re: “O tletseng kwano? Dinkunyana tsele o di tlogetse le mang kwa nageng? Ke itse boikgantsho jwa gago le bosula jwa pelo ya gago. Gonne o tlile fela gore o tle o bone tlhabano.” 
1Samuel17:29 Mme Dafita a re: “Ke sentseng jaanong? Kana ke botsa fela.” 
1Samuel17:30 Jaanong a mo hularela, a leba yo mongwe, a mmotsa potso ele gape. Banna ba mmusetsa karabo e e tshwanang le karabo ya ntlha." 
1Samuel17:31 Ya re mafoko a a builweng ke Dafita a utlwala ba a begela Saule, mme a mmitsa." 
1Samuel17:32 Dafita a tla, a raya Saule a re: “A go se nne motho ope yo o nyemang moko ka ntlha ya Mofelesita yoo. Motlhanka wa gago o tla ya a tlhabana nae.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Fela Saule a fetola Dafita a re: “Ga o a nonofa go ka tlhabana le Mofelesita yoo; gonne o lekau, mme ene ke motlhabani go tswa bokaung jwa gagwe.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Mme Dafita a raya Saule a re: “Motlhanka wa gago e ne e le modisa wa dinku tsa ga rraagwe. Jaanong e ne ya re fa go tla tau gongwe bere e gapa kwana ya letsomane," 
1Samuel17:35 ke bolole, ke e latele, ke e fenye, ke golole kwana mo leganong la yona. Mme fa e re e lwa le nna ke e tshware ka ditedu, ke e fenye, ke e bolae." 
1Samuel17:36 Le fa e le tau gongwe bere motlhanka wa gago o di fentse ka bobedi jwa tsona. Mme Mofelesita yo o sa rupang yoo o tla direlwa fela jaaka nngwe ya tsona; gonne o kgobile mephato ya Modimo o o phelang.” 
1Samuel17:37 Dafita a ba a re: “Morena yo o mpholositseng mo leroong la tau le la bere o tla mpholosa le mo seatleng sa Mofelesita yoo.” Ke fa Saule a raya Dafita a re: “Yaa he, a Morena a nne nao!”" 
1Samuel17:38 Jaanong Saule a apesa Dafita diaparo tsa gagwe, a mo rwesa kuane ya kgotlho mo tlhogong, a mo apesa sefemelo sa tshipi." 
1Samuel17:39 Dafita a ba a tlama tšhaka ya gagwe ka fa ntle ga diaparo, a re o simolola go tsamaya jalo; gonne o ne a ise a leke. Mme Dafita a raya Saule a re: “Ke palelwa ke go tsamaya ka dilo tse, gonne ga ke a di tlwaela.” Dafita a ba a di apola," 
1Samuel17:40 a tsaya thobane ya gagwe ka seatla, a itlhophela matlapana a le matlhano a a borethe mo molapong, a a tsenya mo kgwatlheng ya badisa ya gagwe, e bong mo kgetsaneng ya seragamajwe; a ba a atamela Mofelesita, a tshwere seragamajwe sa gagwe ka seatla." 
1Samuel17:41 Mofelesita le ene a nna a tla, a atamela Dafita; motshola-thebe a mo etelela pele." 
1Samuel17:42 Ya re Mofelesita a leba a bona Dafita, a mo nyatsa; gonne e ne e le lekau fela, a le mohibidu, wa sefatlhego se sentle." 
1Samuel17:43 Mofelesita a botsa Dafita a re: “A ke ntšwa fa o tla kwa go nna ka dithobane?” A ba a hutsa Dafita ka medimo ya gagwe. 
1Samuel17:44 Mofelesita a ba a raya Dafita a re: “Tlaa kwano go nna. Nama ya gago ke tla e neela dinonyane tsa loapi le dibata tsa naga.” 
1Samuel17:45 Mme Dafita a raya Mofelesita a re: “Wena o tla kwa go nna ka tšhaka le ka lerumo le ka lerumonyana. Mme nna ke tla kwa go wena ka leina la Morena wa masomosomo, Modimo wa mephato ya Iseraele, e o e kgobileng." 
1Samuel17:46 Kajeno Morena o tla go neela mo seatleng sa me gore ke go fenye, ke go kgaole tlhogo. Setoto sa gago le ditoto tsa mephato ya Bafelesita ke tla di neela dinonyane tsa loapi le dibata tsa lefatshe kajeno gore lefatshe lotlhe le tle le itse gore Baiseraele ba na le Modimo;" 
1Samuel17:47 le gore phuthego yotlhe e ya batlhabani e lemoge gore Morena ga a pholose ka tšhaka le ka lerumo, gonne tlhabano e ke ya Morena. O tla lo neela mo diatleng tsa rona.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Jaanong ya re Mofelesita a kgweloga go kgatlhantsha Dafita, Dafita a itlhaganela, a tabogela kwa felong ga tlhabano go kgatlhantsha Mofelesita." 
1Samuel17:49 Dafita a ba a tsenya seatla mo kgwatlheng, a ntsha letlapana mo go yona, a konopa ka seragamajwe, a itaya Mofelesita mo phatleng, letlapana la tsenelela kwa teng ga phatla ya gagwe, mme a wela fa fatshe, a patlama." 
1Samuel17:50 Dafita a fenya Mofelesita jalo ka seragamajwe le ka letlapana; a itaya Mofelesita, a mmolaya le fa go ne go se na tšhaka mo seatleng sa gagwe." 
1Samuel17:51 Dafita a ba a siana, a ema fa go Mofelesita, a tsaya tšhaka ya gagwe, a e somola mo kgwatlheng ya yona, a mo fofotsa, a mo kgaola tlhogo ka yona. Ya re Bafelesita ba bona seganka sa bone se sule, ba tshaba." 
1Samuel17:52 Ke fa banna ba Iseraele le ba Juta ba nanoga, ba tlhaba mokgosi, ba eta ba bolaya Bafelesita go ya go fitlha kwa Gathe le kwa dikgorong tsa Ekerone. Bafelesita ba ba bolailweng ba namalala mo tseleng go tswa kwa Saaraime go fitlha kwa Gathe le kwa Ekerone." 
1Samuel17:53 Ya re Baiseraele ba sena go lelekela Bafelesita kgakala ba boa, ba thukhutha bothibelelo jwa bone." 
1Samuel17:54 Mme Dafita a tsaya tlhogo ya Mofelesita, a e isa kwa Jerusalema; dibolai tsa gagwe a di baya mo tenteng ya gagwe." 
1Samuel17:55 E rile Saule a bona Dafita a bolola go kgatlhantsha Mofelesita, a botsa Abenere, molaodi wa mephato, a re: “Lekau leo ke morwa mang, Abenere?” Abenere a re: “Ka bophelo jwa gago, kgosi, ga ke itse.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Kgosi ya re: “Botsolotsa gore lekau leo ke morwa mang?” 
1Samuel17:57 Jaanong ya re Dafita a boa a sena go fenya Mofelesita Abenere a mo tsaya, a mo isa fa pele ga Saule, a ntse a tshotse tlhogo ya Mofelesita." 
1Samuel17:58 Ke fa Saule a mmotsa a re: “Wena lekau, o morwa mang?” Dafita a re: “Ke morwa Isai motlhanka wa gago wa kwa Betleheme.”" 
1Samuel18:1 E rile Dafita a sena go bua le Saule Jonathane a tsalana le Dafita, a mo rata fela jaaka a ithata." 
1Samuel18:2 Mme Saule a mo tsaya ka letsatsi leo, a se ka a mo lesa go boela kwa lapeng la ga rraagwe." 
1Samuel18:3 Jonathane a dira kgolagano le Dafita, ka gonne o ne a mo rata jaaka a ithata." 
1Samuel18:4 Jonathane a apola kobo e o neng a e apere, a e naya Dafita; a ba a mo naya diaparo tsa gagwe le tšhaka ya gagwe le bora jwa gagwe le moitlamo wa gagwe." 
1Samuel18:5 E ne ya re fa Dafita a bolola, a nne letlhogonolo gongwe le gongwe kwa Saule a mo romang teng mo Saule a bileng a mo laodisa batlhabani, mme ga itumedisa morafe otlhe le batlhanka ba ga Saule." 
1Samuel18:6 Mme e rile ba boa le Dafita a sena go bolaya Mofelesita, basadi ba tswa mo metseng yotlhe ya Iseraele, ba baka, ba bina, ba kgatlhantsha kgosi Saule ka meropana le ka boitumelo le ka diletso tsa ditshipi tse tharo." 
1Samuel18:7 Jaanong basadi ba ba duduetsang, ba baka ba re: “Saule o bolaile dikete, mme Dafita ene o bolaile dikete tse some.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Ke fa Saule a tuka bogale thata. Lefoko leo la mo sudisa pelo, mme a re: “Ba neile Dafita dikete tse some, mme nna ba mpha dikete fela. O sa ntse a tlhaela bogosi fela.”" 
1Samuel18:9 Mme Saule a nna a fufegela Dafita go tloga ka letsatsi leo go ya pele. 
1Samuel18:10 Ya re kamoso Saule a tsenwa ke mowa o o bosula wa Modimo, mme a galefa jaaka e kete o a tsenwa a le mo ntlong, Dafita a letsa harepa ka seatla jaaka ka metlha; Saule ene a bo a tshotse lerumo ka seatla." 
1Samuel18:11 Jaanong Saule a konopa ka lerumo, a re o tla tlhabakelela Dafita fa loboteng. Mme Dafita a le tila, a mo tshaba gabedi." 
1Samuel18:12 Ka moo Saule a boifa Dafita, ka Morena a na nae, mme a tlogetse Saule." 
1Samuel18:13 Bakeng leo Saule a mo tlosa fa go ene, a mo dira molaodi wa ba le sekete. Jaanong a bolole, a ba a boe a ntse a eteletse banna pele." 
1Samuel18:14 Dafita a nna a tlhogonolofala mo ditseleng tsotlhe tsa gagwe ka Morena a na nae. 
1Samuel18:15 Ya re Saule a mmona a tshegofala thata a rerega ka ntlha ya gagwe. 
1Samuel18:16 Mme Baiseraele le Bajuta botlhe ba bo ba rata Dafita; gonne a ntse a tswa, a ba a tsena, a ba eteletse pele." 
1Samuel18:17 Jaanong Saule a raya Dafita a re: “Bona, morwadiake yo mogolo Merabe, ene ke tla mo go neela go nna mosadi wa gago. Fela o nne mogale wa me, o lwe dintwa tsa Morena.” Kana Saule a akanya jaana a re: “A a se ka a bolawa ke nna, a a bolawe ke Bafelesita.”" 
1Samuel18:18 Mme Dafita a fetola Saule a re: “Nna ke mang? Lotso lwa me le losika lwa ga rre ke eng mo Iseraeleng mo nka nnang mogwe wa kgosi?” 
1Samuel18:19 Mme ya re ka sebaka sa go neela Dafita Merabe morwadia Saule a neelwa Ateriele wa kwa Mehola go nna mosadi wa gagwe. 
1Samuel18:20 Mme Migale morwadia Saule yo mmotlana o ne a rata Dafita. Ya re ba itsise Saule jalo a dumalelana le seo. 
1Samuel18:21 Saule a re: “Ke tla mo mo neela gore e nne ene serai mo go ene, mme a bolawe ke diatla tsa Bafelesita.” Mme Saule a raya Dafita a re: “O tla nna mogwe wa me kajeno ka go nyala morwadiake wa bobedi.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Saule a laela batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Buang le Dafita mo sephiring lo re: ‘Itse gore kgosi e kgatlhwa ke wena, batlhanka botlhe ba yona ba go rata. O tshwanetse gore o nne mogwe wa kgosi!’ ”" 
1Samuel18:23 Batlhanka ba ga Saule ba bua mafoko ao mo ditsebeng tsa ga Dafita, mme Dafita a botsa a re: “A ke selo se se botlhofo mo matlhong a lona go nna mogwe wa kgosi? Kana ke monna fela yo o humanegileng, yo o se nang tlotlo.”" 
1Samuel18:24 Batlhanka ba ga Saule ba mo itsise ba re: “Dafita o buile mafoko jaana le jaana.” 
1Samuel18:25 Saule a re: “Rayang Dafita jaana lo re: ‘Kgosi ga e kgatlhwe ke bogadi jo bongwe fa e se matlalo a a sa rupisiwang a le lekgolo a Bafelesita, e le go ipusolosetsa mo babeng ba kgosi.’ ” Saule a loga maano jalo go diga Dafita ka diatla tsa Bafelesita." 
1Samuel18:26 Ya re batlhanka ba gagwe ba bolelela Dafita mafoko ao, a a itumelela gore a nne mogwe wa kgosi. Mme ya re malatsi a a beilweng a ise a fete" 
1Samuel18:27 Dafita a nanoga, a ya le banna ba gagwe, a bolaya banna ba le 200 ba Bafelesita. Dafita a ba a tlisa matlalo a a sa rupisiwang a bone, a neelwa kgosi e le palo e e tletseng gore Dafita a tle a nne mogwe wa kgosi. Ke fa Saule a mo neela Migale morwadie go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
1Samuel18:28 Jaanong ya re Saule a bona le go lemoga fa Morena a na le Dafita, e bile Migale morwadie a mo rata," 
1Samuel18:29 Saule a oketsegelwa ke poifo ya go boifa Dafita, mme a nna mmaba wa ga Dafita ka metlha yotlhe." 
1Samuel18:30 Dikgosana tsa Bafelesita di ne di bolola, mme ka nako le nako fa di bolola Dafita a nne tlhogonolo go gaisa batlhanka botlhe ba ga Saule. Leina la gagwe la ba la tlotlega mo go fetisang." 
1Samuel19:1 Jaanong Saule a bua le Jonathane morwawe le batlhanka botlhe ba gagwe, a rata go bolaya Dafita. Mme Jonathane morwa Saule o ne a kgatlhwa thata ke Dafita." 
1Samuel19:2 Jonathane a sebela Dafita a re: “Rre Saule o batla go go bolaya. Jaanong a ko itise mo mosong, o nne fa o fitlhegileng teng, o iphitlhe." 
1Samuel19:3 Ke tla tswa ka nosi, ke ema le rre kwa nageng fa o leng teng, ke bua nae ka ga gago. Se ke tla se lemogang ke tla se go sebela.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Mme Jonathane a bua tse di molemo ka ga Dafita le Saule rraagwe, a mo raya a re: “A kgosi e se ka ya leofela Dafita motlhanka wa yona, gonne ga a ise a ke a go leofele. E bile ditiro tsa gagwe di go thusa thata." 
1Samuel19:5 Kana o ne a sa rekegele bophelo jwa gagwe ka go bolaya Mofelesita yole, mme Morena a direla Baiseraele botlhe pholoso e kgolo ka ene. Seo o se bonye, wa ba wa itumela. Jaanong ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa o rata go leofela motho yo o se nang molato ka go bolaya Dafita kwa ntle ga lebaka.”" 
1Samuel19:6 Saule a kgonwa ke lentswe la ga Jonathane, a ba a ikana a re: “Ka bophelo jwa Morena Dafita ga a kitla a bolawa.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Ke fa Jonathane a bitsa Dafita, a mo itsise mafoko otlhe ao, a mo isa kwa go Saule. Mme Dafita a mo direla gape jaaka gale." 
1Samuel19:8 Jaanong ya re go tsoga ntwa gape, Dafita a bolola go tlhabana le Bafelesita, a ba bolaya ka polao e kgolo, mme ba tshaba ba hulere." 
1Samuel19:9 Mme Saule a tsenwa ke mowa o o bosula wa Morena gape a ntse a dutse mo ntlong ya gagwe, a tshwere lerumo la gagwe mme Dafita a letsa harepa ka seatla." 
1Samuel19:10 Ke fa Saule a re o tlhabakelela Dafita fa loboteng ka lerumo, mme ene a le tila, a thiboga fa pele ga Saule, mme a tlhaba lobota ka lerumo mme Dafita a tshaba, a falola. Bosigong joo" 
1Samuel19:11 Saule a roma barongwi kwa lapeng la ga Dafita gore ba mo lalele, ba mmolae mo mosong. Mme Migale mosadi wa gagwe a itsise Dafita a re: “Fa o sa pholose bophelo jwa gago bosigo jono o tla tsoga o bolawa kamoso.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Jaanong Migale a folosa Dafita ka fenstere; a tloga, a tshaba, a falola." 
1Samuel19:13 Migale a ba a tsaya setshwantsho sa modimo wa ntlo, a se robatsa mo bolaong, a baya lesire la boboa jwa dipodi mo tlhogong ya sona, a se khurumetsa ka kobo." 
1Samuel19:14 Mme ya re Saule a roma barongwi go tshwara Dafita, Migale a re: “O a lwala.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Saule a roma barongwi bao gape ba ye go bona Dafita, a re: “Mo tliseng kwano go nna ka bolao gore ke mmolae.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Ya re barongwi bao ba tsena ba fitlhela setshwantsho sa modimo wa ntlo se le mo bolaong le lesire la boboa jwa dipodi le le mo tlhogong ya sona. 
1Samuel19:17 Ke fa Saule a raya Migale a re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa o ntsieditse jalo, wa lesa mmaba wa me a falola?” Mme Migale a raya Saule a re: “Ene o ntheile a re: ‘Nte ke tsamae! Go seng jalo ke tla go bolaya.’ ”" 
1Samuel19:18 Mme Dafita a tshaba, a falola, a fitlha kwa go Samuele kwa Rama, a mo itsise tsotlhe tse Saule o di mo diretseng. Mme ene le Samuele ba ya ba nna mo matlong a baporofeti." 
1Samuel19:19 Mme Saule a sebelwa ga twe: “Itse gore Dafita o mo matlong a baporofeti kwa Rama.” 
1Samuel19:20 Ke fa Saule a roma barongwi go tshwara Dafita. Ya re ba bona lesomo la baporofeti le duduetsa le Samuele a eme e le tlhogo ya bone, barongwi ba ga Saule ba tsenwa ke Mowa wa Modimo le bone ba duduetsa." 
1Samuel19:21 Ya re Saule a sena go begelwa jalo, a roma barongwi ba bangwe, le bone ba duduetsa. Gape Saule a roma barongwi lwa boraro, le bone ba duduetsa." 
1Samuel19:22 Jaanong Saule a ya kwa Rama ka esi, a fitlha kwa sedibeng se segolo se se kwa Segu, a botsa a re: “Samuele le Dafita ba kae?” Ba re: “Ba mo matlong a baporofeti kwa Rama.”" 
1Samuel19:23 A ya teng kwa matlong a baporofeti kwa Rama, mme le ene a tsenwa ke Mowa wa Modimo, a tsamaya a ntse a duduetsa go ya go fitlha teng." 
1Samuel19:24 Ke fa le ene a apola diaparo tsa gagwe a duduetsa fa pele ga Samuele, a namalala fa fatshe, a sa ikatega motshegare otlhe oo le bosigo jotlhe joo. Ke ka moo go tweng: “A Saule le ene ke moporofeti?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Mme Dafita a tshaba, a tswa mo matlong a baporofeti kwa Rama, a fitlha fa go Jonathane, a mmotsa a re: “Ke dirileng? Molato wa me ke eng? Ke leofileng fa pele ga rraago mo a batlang go mpolaya?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Mme Jonathane a mo raya a re: “A go nne kgakala. Ga o kitla o swa. Bona, rre ga a dire sepe se segolo gongwe se sebotlana a ise a se ntshenolele. E ka nna ka ntlha ya eng fa rre a ntobela selo se? Ga go na se se ntseng jalo.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Mme Dafita a bile a ikana a re: “Rraago o itse sentle fa ke bonye bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a gago. O akantse go re: ‘A Jonathane a se ka a itse e se re gongwe a hutsafala.’ Fela ruri ka bophelo jwa Morena le ka bophelo jwa gago go na le kgato e le nngwe fela fa gare ga me le loso.” 
1Samuel20:4 Ke fa Jonathane a raya Dafita a re: “Se o se eletsang ke tla se go direla.” 
1Samuel20:5 Dafita a raya Jonathane a re: “Kamoso ngwedi o tsoga o rogwa. Tota ke ne ke tshwanetse go nna le kgosi fa dijong. Mme nte ke iphitlhe mo nageng go fitlha mantsiboeng a letsatsi la boraro. 
1Samuel20:6 Fa rraago a ka ntlhoka, o bolele o re: ‘Dafita o ikopile mo go nna gore a tabogele kwa Betleheme motseng wa ga gabo. Gonne go na le tlhabelo ya ngwaga gona ya losika lwetsho.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Fa a ka bua jaana a re: ‘Go siame!’ foo motlhanka wa gago o na le kagiso. Mme fa a galefa thata, o itse gore o setse a ikaeletse tatlhego ya me." 
1Samuel20:8 Jaanong direla motlhanka wa gago ka bopelotlhomogi, gonne o tsentse motlhanka wa gago mo kgolaganong ya Morena nao. Mme fa molato o le teng mo go nna, a ke bolawe ke wena. O tla bo o nkisetsang kwa go rraago?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Mme Jonathane a re: “O se ka wa re jalo! Kana fa ke lemoga tota gore rre o ikaeletse go go isa mo tatlhegong, ga nka ke ka tlhoka go go itsise.”" 
1Samuel20:10 Mme Dafita a botsa Jonathane a re: “Ke mang yo o tla mpegelang, fa rraago a go fetola ka tse di thata?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Ke fa Jonathane a raya Dafita a re: “Tlaya, re tswele kwa nageng!” Ba tswela kwa nageng ka bobedi jwa bone." 
1Samuel20:12 Jonathane a ba a raya Dafita a re: “A Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, e nne mosupi; ke tla botsolotsa rre kamoso mo nakong e le ka moso o mongwe; fa ke fitlhela go siametse Dafita foo ke tla roma kwa go wena, ke go senolela jalo." 
1Samuel20:13 A Morena a direle Jonathane jaana a mo okeletse jaana: Fa go siametse rre go digela bosula mo go wena ruri ke tla go senolela jalo, ke go naya tsela gore o tsamae ka kagiso. Mme a Morena a nne nao jaaka a ne a na le rre." 
1Samuel20:14 Ka thapelo, fa ke sa ntse ke phela ke kopa gore o ntirele ka bopelotlhomogi jwa Morena. Mme fa nka swa" 
1Samuel20:15 o se ka wa tlosa bopelotlhomogi jwa gago mo lapeng la me ka bosakhutleng le e seng fa Morena a nyeletsa baba ba ga Dafita ka go latelana ga bone, a ba tlosa mo lefatsheng.”" 
1Samuel20:16 Jonathane a dira kgolagano jalo le lelapa la ga Dafita, a re: “Morena o tla busolosa baba ba ga Dafita.”" 
1Samuel20:17 Jaanong Jonathane a ikanisa Dafita gape ka lorato lo a mo ratang ka lone; gonne o ne a mo rata ka pelo yotlhe. 
1Samuel20:18 Jonathane a ba a mo raya a re: “Kamoso ngwedi o tsoga o rogwa. O tla tlhokwa fa o batlwa mo mannong a gago. 
1Samuel20:19 Mme ka letsatsi la boraro o fologe ka pele, o tle kwa felong fa o neng o iphitlhile teng maloba, o nne fa fatshe fa thoko ga lefika la Asele." 
1Samuel20:20 Jaanong ke tla hulela metsu e le meraro ka fa lotlhakoreng lwa lone jaaka e kete ke hula sengwe. 
1Samuel20:21 Bona, ke tla roma mosimane ke re: ‘Yaa o batle metsu.’ Jaanong fa ke raya mosimane ke re: ‘Bona, metsu e ka kwano ga gago, e tsee!’ gona o ka tla, gonne ka bophelo jwa Morena o mo kagisong; ga go na kotsi epe." 
1Samuel20:22 Mme fa ke raya lekau jaana ke re: ‘Bona, metsu e kwa pele ga gago!’ gona o tsamae, gonne Morena o tla bo a go neile tsela." 
1Samuel20:23 Mme fa e le lefoko le re buileng mmogo, Morena o fa gare ga rona bosakhutheng.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Ke fa Dafita a iphitlha kwa nageng. Ya re ka la ngwedi o o rogilweng, kgosi ya nna fa bojelong go ja." 
1Samuel20:25 Kgosi ya nna mo mannong a yona jaaka ka gale mo mannong a a fa loboteng, Jonathane a lebaganye nae. Abenere a nna fa thoko ga Saule. Manno a ga Dafita a tlhoka mong wa ona." 
1Samuel20:26 Ka letsatsi leo Saule a se ka a bua sepe; gonne o ne a gopola gore gongwe o dirafaletswe ke maila mangwe; go gongwe ga a itsheka, mme a ise a itshekisiwe." 
1Samuel20:27 Mme ya re kamoso ka letsatsi la bobedi la ngwedi o o rogilweng manno a ga Dafita a tlhoka mong wa ona gape, Saule a botsa Jonathane morwawe a re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa morwa Isai a se ka a tla dijong maabane le kajeno?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Jonathane a araba Saule a re: “Dafita o ikopile thata mo go nna go ka ya kwa Betleheme," 
1Samuel20:29 a re: ‘A ko o nte ke tsamae, gonne re na le tlhabelo ya losika kwa motseng wa ga etsho. E bile nkgonne o mpiditse ka esi. Jaanong he, fa ke bonye bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a gago, nte ke itlhaganele ke ye go bona bomogolole.’ Ke ka moo a se kang a tla bojelong jwa kgosi.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Ke fa Saule a tukela Jonathane bogale a mo raya a re: “Wena morwa borukhutlhi jo bo maswe! A o ithaya o re, ga ke itse fa o itlhaoletse morwa Isai? Mme e tla nna ditlhong tsa gago le ditlhong tsa mmele wa ga mmaago." 
1Samuel20:31 Gonne ka malatsi otlhe a morwa Isai o phelang ka ona mo lefatsheng ga o kitla o tlhomamisiwa le e seng go dirwa kgosi. Jaanong ka re, roma o mo tlise kwano go nna, gonne o tshwanetse go bolawa.”" 
1Samuel20:32 Jonathane a araba Saule rraagwe a re: “O tla bo a bolaelwang? O dirile eng?” 
1Samuel20:33 Ke fa Saule a mo konopa ka lerumo, a re o a mo tlhaba. Jonathane a lemoga jalo fa rragwe a feditse pelo go bolaya Dafita." 
1Samuel20:34 Jaanong Jonathane a nanoga, a tlogela bojelo ka bogale jo bo tukang; a se ka a ja dijo ka letsatsi leo la bobedi la ngwedi o o rogilweng; gonne o ne a tshwenyegela Dafita, ka rraagwe a mo rogakile." 
1Samuel20:35 Ya re mo mosong Jonathane a tswela kwa nageng jaaka a dumalanye le Dafita, a na le mosimanyana." 
1Samuel20:36 A raya mosimane wa gagwe a re: “Siana o batle metsu e ke tla e fulang.” Ya re mosimane a taboga, a fula motsu, a o fetisa ka ene." 
1Samuel20:37 Ya re mosimane a fitlha fa motsu o wetseng teng o Jonathane a o hudileng, Jonathane a tlhaeletsa mosimane a re: “Kana motsu o kwa pele ga gago!”" 
1Samuel20:38 Jonathane a ba a tlhaeletsa mosimane a re: “Dira ka pele, o itlhaganele, o se ka wa ema.” Ke fa mosimane wa ga Jonathane a nopa metsu, a ba a boela kwa go mongwagwe." 
1Samuel20:39 Mosimane a bo a sa itse sepe, tumelano ya bo e le sephiri sa ga Jonathane le Dafita fela." 
1Samuel20:40 Jaanong Jonathane a neela mosimane yo o neng a na nae dibolai tsa gagwe, a mo laela a re: “Tsamaya o di ise kwa motseng.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Ya re mosimane a ntse a tsamaya go ya kwa gae, Dafita a nanoga, a tswa ka fa ntlheng ya borwa, a wela fa fatshe ka sefatlhego, a inama gararo; ba atlana, ba lela mmogo; la bofelo Dafita a lela mo go fetisang." 
1Samuel20:42 Jaanong Jonathane a raya Dafita a re: “Tsamaya ka kagiso! Kana re ikanne ka bobedi jwa rona ka leina la Morena ra re: ‘Morena o tla nna fa gare ga rona le fa gare ga losika lwa me le lwa gago ka bosakhutleng.’ ” 
1Samuel20:43 Ke fa Dafita a nanoga a tsamaya, Jonathane ene a boela kwa motseng." 
1Samuel21:1 Dafita a fitlha kwa Nobe kwa go moperesiti Ahimelege. Ahimelege a kgatlhantsha Dafita a tshogile a mmotsa a re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa o tla o le wesi fela o se na le ope?” 
1Samuel21:2 Dafita a araba moperesiti Ahimelege a re: “Kgosi e ntaetse tiro nngwe, ya nthaya ya re: ‘A go se nne ope yo o itseng sepe sa tiro e ke e go romileng le e seng se ke se go laetseng.’ Kana le batlhanka ke ba romile kwa felong ga bolebelebe." 
1Samuel21:3 Jaanong he, go na le eng fa lapeng? Mphe dinkgwe di le tlhano gongwe se se leng teng.”" 
1Samuel21:4 Moperesiti a araba Dafita a re: “Ga ke na senkgwe sa metlha yotlhe, mme senkgwe se se leng teng ke se se boitshepo fela; lo ka se fiwa fela fa batlhanka ba ikileditse basadi.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Dafita a araba moperesiti a mo raya a re: “Ruri, e setse e le sebaka re ntse re ileditswe basadi. E rile ke bolola mebele ya batlhanka ya bo e le boitshepo le fa e le leeto fela le le sa itshepisiwang. Bogolo jang ba tla bo ba itshekile kajeno mo mebeleng.”" 
1Samuel21:6 Ke fa moperesiti a mo naya dinkgwe tse di boitshepo; gonne go ne go se na dinkgwe tse dingwe fa e se dinkgwe tsa tshupo tse di neng di tle di tlosiwe fa pele ga Morena gore go bewe tse dintšhwa teng ka letsatsi le go tlosiwang tse kgologolo ka lone. 
1Samuel21:7 Mme ka letsatsi leo go ne go le mongwe wa batlhanka ba ga Saule, a golegilwe fa pele ga Morena; leina la gagwe e ne e le Doege wa Moetomo, mookamedi wa badisa ba ga Saule." 
1Samuel21:8 Jaanong Dafita a botsa Ahimelege a re: “A ga go na lerumo gongwe tšhaka fano? Gonne ga ke a tshola tšhaka ya me le fa e le dibolai; kana tiro ya kgosi e re tlositse ka potlako.” 
1Samuel21:9 Moperesiti a re: “Tšhaka ya ga Goliathe wa Mofelesita yo ò mmolaetseng kwa molapong wa ditlhare tsa metherebinthe e teng, e phuthilwe ka lesela ka fa morago ga khiba ya moperesiti; fa o rata go e tsaya e tsee; gonne ga go na e nngwe kwa ntle ga yona.” Dafita a re: “Ga go na epe e e tshwanang nayo, e nnee!”" 
1Samuel21:10 Jaanong Dafita a nanoga a tshaba ka letsatsi leo ka ntlha ya ga Saule, a ya kwa go Agiše kgosi ya Gathe." 
1Samuel21:11 Mme batlhanka ba ga Agiše ba mo raya ba re: “Yoo a ga se Dafita motlhanka wa kgosi ya lefatshe lele? A ga se ene yo ba neng ba mo opela dipina ba re: ‘Saule o bolaile dikete, mme Dafita ene o bolaile kete tse some’?”" 
1Samuel21:12 Mme mafoko ao a ne a tshosa Dafita, a boifa thata, a tshaba Agiše, kgosi ya Gathe." 
1Samuel21:13 Ka moo a iphetola tlhaloganyo mo matlhong a bone, a itira setsenwa a le mo diatleng tsa bone, a ngapa mo ditswalong tsa kgoro, a lesa mathe a gagwe a elela mo ditedung." 
1Samuel21:14 Ke fa Agiše a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Kana lo bona monna yo gore o tsenwa! Ke kantlha ya eng, fa lo mo tlisa kwano?" 
1Samuel21:15 A ke tlhoka ditsenwa fa lo mo tlisa gore a tle go ntshwenya ka botsenwa jwa gagwe? A yoo o ka tsena mo ntlong ya me?” 
1Samuel22:1 Ke fa Dafita a tloga teng a falolela kwa logageng lwa Adulame. Ya re bomogolowe le ba lapa la ga rraagwe botlhe ba utlwa jalo ba ya kwa go ene. 
1Samuel22:2 A ba a kgobokanelwa ke banna botlhe ba ba mo pitlaganyong le banna botlhe ba ba tsereng melato le banna botlhe ba ba pelo-di-botlhoko, a nna molaodi wa bone; ba nna nae e ka nna banna ba le 400." 
1Samuel22:3 Dafita a ba a tloga teng a ya kwa Mitsephe wa Moabe, a raya kgosi ya Moabe a re: “A rre le mme ba tshabele kwano go lona go tsamaya ke be ke itse se Modimo o tla se ntirelang.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Jaanong a ba tlisa fa pele ga kgosi ya Moabe, ba nna nayo ka malatsi otlhe a Dafita a ntseng a le kwa botshabelong jo bo femetsweng ka ona." 
1Samuel22:5 Mme moporofeti Gate a raya Dafita a re: “O se ka wa nna mo botshabelong joo. Tloga o ye kwa nageng ya Juta.” Dafita a ya a fitlha kwa sekgweng sa Herethe. 
1Samuel22:6 E rile Saule a sena go utlwela Dafita le banna ba ba nang nae, a nna fa tlase ga setlhare sa motamariseka kwa Gibea mo thoteng a tshotse lerumo la gagwe ka seatla, mme batlhanka botlhe ba gagwe ba eme fa go ene." 
1Samuel22:7 Ke fa Saule a raya batlhanka ba gagwe ba ba emeng fa go ene a re: “Utlwang tlhe, lona Babenyamene! A le morwa Isai o tla lo naya lotlhe masimo le masimo a meweine? A o tla lo dira lotlhe balaodi ba dikete le balaodi ba makgolo," 
1Samuel22:8 fa lo ikgolagantse lotlhe go lwa le nna, go se na ope yo o ntshebelang fa morwaake a dira kgolagano le morwa Isai; go se na ope mo go lona yo o nkutlwelang botlhoko, a nkitsise, fa morwaake a tlhotlheletsa motlhanka wa me gore a ntsogele, a ntalele jaaka go ntse kajeno?”" 
1Samuel22:9 Ga fetola Doege wa Moetomo a ntse a eme le batlhanka ba ga Saule a re: “Ke bonye morwa Isai a tla kwa Nobe kwa go Ahimelege morwa Ahitube. 
1Samuel22:10 Ahimelege a mmoletsa Morena, a mo naya mfago, a ba a mo naya tšhaka ya ga Goliathe wa Mofelesita.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Ke fa kgosi e roma go bitsa moperesiti Ahimelege morwa Ahitube le botlhe ba lapa la ga rraagwe, e bong baperesiti ba ba neng ba le kwa Nobe. Ba tla botlhe kwa kgosing." 
1Samuel22:12 Jaanong Saule a re: “A ko o utlwe wena morwa Ahitube.” A araba a re: “Ke fano, morena wa me.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Saule a mmotsa a re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa lo ikgolagantse go lwa le nna, wena le morwa Isai? Ka gonne o mo neile dijo le tšhaka, wa mmoletsa Modimo gore a ntsogele, a ntalele jaaka go ntse kajeno.”" 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimelege a fetola kgosi a re: “Ke mang mo batlhankeng botlhe ba gago yo o ikanyegang jaaka Dafita? E bile ke mogwe wa kgosi le molaodi wa ba ba go femelang, a tlotlega mo lapeng la gago." 
1Samuel22:15 A ke sa ntlha ke mmoletsa Modimo? Ga go a nna jalo. A kgosi e se ka ya baya motlhanka wa yona le botlhe ba lelapa la ga rraagwe molato; gonne motlhanka wa gago ga a ka a itse sepe sa dilo tsotlhe tseo, le fa e le se sebotlana gongwe se segolo.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Mme kgosi ya re: “Ahimelege, ruri o tsile go swa, wena le botlhe ba lelapa la ga rraago.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Ke fa kgosi e raya batlhanka ba ba emeng fa go yona e re: “Atamelang lo bolae baperesiti ba Morena, gonne le bone ba goga le Dafita. Le fa ba ne ba itse gore ene o a tshaba, ga ba a ka ba nkitsise.” Mme batlhanka ba kgosi ba gana go ntsha mabogo go wela baperesiti ba Morena." 
1Samuel22:18 Ke fa kgosi e raya Doege e re: “Atamela wena, o wele baperesiti.” Doege wa Moetomo a atamela, a wela baperesiti, a bolaya banna ba le 85 ba ba apereng lesela la khiba ya boperesiti ka letsatsi leo." 
1Samuel22:19 A ba a bolaya Nobe, ona motse wa baperesiti ka bogale jwa tšhaka, banna le basadi le bana le masea le dikgomo le diesele le dinku ka bogale jwa tšhaka." 
1Samuel22:20 Mme ga falola morwa a le mongwe wa ga Ahimelege morwa Ahitube; leina la gagwe e ne e le Abjathare; a tshaba, a latela Dafita." 
1Samuel22:21 Abjathare a feta a itsise Dafita a re: “Saule o bolaile baperesiti ba Morena.” 
1Samuel22:22 Dafita a raya Abjathare a re: “Ke sa le ke itse ka letsatsi lele jale fa Doege wa Moetomo a ne a le teng gore ke ene yo o tla bolelelang Saule. Ke ka ntlha ya me fa go bolailwe botlhe ba lapa la ga rraago. 
1Samuel22:23 Nna le nna, o se ka wa boifa; gonne yo o ratang go go bolaya o rata go bolaya nna. O mo tshireletsong, fa o na le nna.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Dafita o ne a begelwa ga twe: “Bona, Bafelesita ba tlhabana le Kehila, e bile ba ba thukhutha mabele mo diboaneng.”" 
1Samuel23:2 Ke fa Dafita a botsa Morena a re: “A ke ye ke bolae Bafelesita bao?” Morena a araba Dafita a re: “Yaa o bolae Bafelesita bao, o thuse Kehila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Mme banna ba ga Dafita ba mo raya ba re: “Kana re setse re boifa mono mo Juta, jaanong fa re le kwa Kehila kwa mephatong ya Bafelesita, gona go tla nna jang?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Dafita a ba a botsa Morena gape. Morena a mo araba a re: “Nanoga o fologele kwa Kehila; gonne ke tla neela Bafelesita mo diatleng tsa gago.” 
1Samuel23:5 Ke fa Dafita a ya kwa Kehila a na le banna ba gagwe, a tlhabana le Bafelesita, a gapa diruiwa tsa bone, a ba bolaya ka polao e kgolo. Dafita a pholosa baagi ba Kehila jalo." 
1Samuel23:6 Kana e rile Abjathare morwa Ahimelege a tshabela kwa go Dafita kwa Kehila, a eta a tshotse khiba ya boperesiti." 
1Samuel23:7 Jaanong ya re Saule a itsisiwe gore Dafita o tsenye kwa Kehila, Saule a re: “Modimo o mo neetse mo diatleng tsa me; gonne o itswaletse ka go tsena mo motseng o o nang le ditswalo le mephakarego.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Ka mo Saule a kua banna botlhe go ya kwa ntweng kwa Kehila go dikanyetsa Dafita le banna ba gagwe ka ntwa. 
1Samuel23:9 Mme ya re Dafita a lemoga, fa Saule a mo logela maano a a bosula, a raya Abjathare moperesiti a re: “Tlisa khiba ya boperesiti kwano.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Jaanong Dafita a botsa a re: “Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, motlhanka wa gago o utlwile gore Saule o rata go tla kwano Kehila le go senya motse o ka ntlha ya me." 
1Samuel23:11 A beng ba Kehila ba tla nneela mo diatleng tsa gagwe? A Saule o tla fologela kwano jaaka motlhanka wa gago a utlwile? Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, a ko o itsise motlhanka wa gago jalo.” Morena a re: “O tla fologa.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Dafita a boela a botsa a re: “A beng ba Kehila ba tla nneela mo diatleng tsa ga Saule, nna le banna ba me?” Morena a re: “Ba tla lo neela.”" 
1Samuel23:13 Ke fa Dafita a nanoga a na le banna ba gagwe – e ka nna banna ba le 600 – ba tloga kwa Kehila, ba itsamaela mo ba itsamaelang teng. Ya re Saule a begelwa gore Dafita o falotse kwa Kehila, a thinya." 
1Samuel23:14 Morago ga moo Dafita a nna kwa sekakeng mo dikgageng, a nna mo dithabeng kwa sekakeng sa Sife. Saule a nna a mmatla ka malatsi otlhe, mme Modimo wa se ka wa mo neela mo diatleng tsa gagwe." 
1Samuel23:15 Mme Dafita a lemoga fa Saule a bolotse go tsoma botshelo jwa gagwe. E rile Dafita a le mo sekgweng kwa sekakeng sa Sife," 
1Samuel23:16 Jonathane morwa Saule a nanoga, a ya kwa go Dafita kwa sekgweng, a mo nametsa pelo ka Modimo." 
1Samuel23:17 A mo raya a re: “Se boife! gonne seatla sa ga rre Saule ga se kitla se go tshwara, mme wena o tla nna kgosi ya Iseraele, nna ke go loma serota. Le rre Saule o itse jalo.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Jaanong bone babedi ba dira kgolagano fa pele ga Morena. Dafita a sala kwa sekgweng sele, Jonathane ene a boela kwa gae." 
1Samuel23:19 Mme Basife ba tlhatlogela kwa go Saule kwa Gibea ba re: “Kana Dafita o iphitlhile kwa go rona mo dikgageng mo sekgweng kwa thabaneng ya Hagila mo ntlheng ya borwa ya naga e e senya. 
1Samuel23:20 Jaanong he, kgosi, fologela teng fela ka fa pelo ya gago e eletsang ka teng go fologela gona. E tla nna tiro ya rona go mo neela mo diatleng tsa kgosi.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Ke fa Saule a re: “A Morena a lo tshegofatse, gonne lo ntlhomogetse pelo." 
1Samuel23:22 Yaang he, lo tlhotlhomise gape, lo lemoge felo ga gagwe, lo bone fa motlhala wa gagwe o leng teng le yo o mmonyeng teng. Gonne ke boleletswe gore ke rramaano-a-mantsi." 
1Samuel23:23 Okomelang lo lotolotse maiphitlho otlhe kwa a iphitlhang teng, lo be lo boele kwa go nna, fa lo itse sentle. Foo ke tla ya le lona. Fa a le teng mo lefatsheng le, ke tla mmatla mo dinageng tsotlhe tsa Juta.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Jaanong ba nanoga, ba boela kwa Sife, ba etelela Saule pele. Dafita le banna ba gagwe ba bo ba le mo sekakeng sa Maone mo lebaleng ntlheng ya borwa ya naga e e senya." 
1Samuel23:25 Mme ya re Saule a ya a na le banna ba gagwe go mmatla, Dafita a sebelwa jalo, a fologela kwa lefikeng le le mo sekakeng sa Maone. Ya re Saule a utlwa jalo, a letelela Dafita kwa sekakeng sa Maone." 
1Samuel23:26 Saule le banna ba gagwe ba tsamaya go pota thaba ka kwano, mme Dafita le banna ba gagwe ba tsamaya go pota thaba ka kwa. Mme ya re Dafita a itlhaganela go tshaba, ka a boifa Saule, Saule le banna ba gagwe ba dikanyetsa Dafita le banna ba gagwe gore ba ba tshware." 
1Samuel23:27 Ke fa go tla morongwi kwa go Saule a re: “Itlhaganele o tle, gonne Bafelesita ba tlhasetse lefatshe.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Jaanong Saule a boa a khutlela Dafita, a ya go kgatlhantsha Bafelesita. Ke ka moo felo foo go teilweng leina go twe: Lentswe la go falola." 
1Samuel24:1 Dafita a tloga teng, a tlhatloga a nna kwa dikgageng tsa Engedi." 
1Samuel24:2 Jaanong ya re Saule a boa a tswa go leleka Bafelesita, a bolelelwa ga twe: “Bona, Dafita o kwa sekakeng sa Engedi.”" 
1Samuel24:3 Ke fa Saule a tsaya banna ba le 3 000 ba ba tlhaotsweng mo Baiseraeleng botlhe, a ya go batla Dafita le banna ba gagwe kwa ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Mafika a Diphudufudu." 
1Samuel24:4 Ya re a fitlha kwa marakeng a dinku a a fa thoko ga tsela fa go leng logaga, Saule a tsena teng go ithoma, Dafita le banna ba gagwe ba ntse ba le kwa tengteng ga logaga." 
1Samuel24:5 Ke fa banna ba ga Dafita ba mo raya ba re: “Bona, ke lone letsatsi le Morena o le go boleletseng a re: ‘Itse gore ke tla neela mmaba wa gago mo diatleng tsa gago gore o mo direle ka fa o ratang ka teng.’ ” Dafita a nanoga, a kgaola moja wa kobo ya ga Saule, a sa mmone." 
1Samuel24:6 Mme morago ga moo Dafita a itewa ke letswalo, ka a kgaotse moja wa kobo ya ga Saule." 
1Samuel24:7 A ba a raya banna ba gagwe a re: “A Morena a nthibele gore ke se ka ka direla morena wa me, motlodiwa wa Morena, selo se, ka mo ntshetsa letsogo; gonne ke ene motlodiwa wa Morena.”" 
1Samuel24:8 Dafita a kgalemela banna ba gagwe ka mafoko a a bogale, a se ka a ba dumelela go tsogela Saule. Saule a ba a nanoga, a tswa mo logageng a wela tseleng." 
1Samuel24:9 Morago ga moo Dafita le ene a nanoga, a tswa mo logageng, a tlhaeletsa Saule a re: “Morena wa me, kgosi!” Ya re Saule a gadima, Dafita a inamela fa fatshe ka sefatlhego, a ikoba." 
1Samuel24:10 Dafita a ba a raya Saule a re: “O dumelelelang mafoko a batho, fa ba re: ‘Bona, Dafita o rata go go direla bosula’?" 
1Samuel24:11 Kana matlho a gago a bona jaanong ka fa Morena a go neetseng ka teng mo diatleng tsa me kajeno mo logageng, mme go tilwe, ke go bolae, mme ka go rekegela ka re: ‘Ga nkitla ke ntshetsa morena wa me letsogo, gonne ke ene motlodiwa wa Morena.’" 
1Samuel24:12 Rra, leba, o be o bone moja wa kobo ya gago o o mo seatleng sa me, jaaka ke o kgaotse, mme ka se ka ka go bolaya; o ka lemoga, wa bona fa go se na bosula gongwe bolotsana mo pelong ya me. Ga ke a go leofela, mme wena o ntsoma go nkamoga bophelo." 
1Samuel24:13 Morena o tla atlhola fa gare ga me le wena; Morena o tla mpusolosetsa mo go wena. Mme seatla sa me ga se kitla se lwa nao. 
1Samuel24:14 Jaaka seane sa bogologolo se re: ‘Boikepo bo tswa mo baikeping!’ Mme seatla sa me ga se kitla se go ama. 
1Samuel24:15 Kgosi ya Iseraele e bolotse go latelela mang? Wena o tsoma mang? O latelela ntšwa e e suleng, o tsoma letsetse le le lengwe fela." 
1Samuel24:16 Morena o tla nna moatlhodi, a atlhola fa gare ga rona, a a ele tlhoko, a lwele kgang ya me, a nkatlholele, a nkgolole mo seatleng sa gago!”" 
1Samuel24:17 Ya re Dafita a sena go bua mafoko ao le Saule, Saule a re: “A ke lone lentswe la gago, morwaaka Dafita?” A ba a tlhatlosa lentswe, a lela," 
1Samuel24:18 a raya Dafita a re: “Wena o siame bogolo go nna; gonne o ntiretse tse di molemo, mme nna ke go diretse tse di bosula." 
1Samuel24:19 Kajeno o mpontshitse tse di molemo tse o di ntiretseng, etswe Morena a nneetse mo diatleng tsa gago, mme wa se ka wa mpolaya." 
1Samuel24:20 A fa motho a tshwara mmaba wa gagwe, o ka mo naya tsela ka kagiso? A Morena a go duele ka tse di molemo ka ntlha ya tse o di ntiretseng." 
1Samuel24:21 Mme jaanong, ke a itse gore o tla nna kgosi tota; e bile bogosi jwa lseraele bo tla tlhomama mo seatleng sa gago." 
1Samuel24:22 Jaanong he, inkanele ka Morena gore ga o kitla o nyeletsa losika lwa me sehularong sa me le e seng go phimola leina la me mo lapeng la ga rre.”" 
1Samuel24:23 Dafita a ikanela Saule jalo. Saule a ba a boela kwa lapeng la gagwe. Dafita le banna ba gagwe ba tlhatlogela kwa logageng lwa thaba. 
1Samuel25:1 Jaanong Samuele a swa, mme Baiseraele botlhe ba kgobokana ba mo lelela, ba mo fitlha mo ntlong ya gagwe kwa Rama. Dafita ene a nanoga a fologela kwa sekakeng sa Pharane." 
1Samuel25:2 Jaanong go ne go le monna kwa Maone, mme diruiwa tsa gagwe di le kwa motseng wa Karemele. Monna yoo o ne a humile thata, a na le dinku di le 3 000 le dipodi di le 1 000. A bo a beola dinku tsa gagwe kwa Karemele." 
1Samuel25:3 Leina la monna yoo e ne e le Nabale, leina la mosadi wa gagwe e le Abikaile. Mosadi yoo o ne a na le tlhaloganyo e e siameng, a bopegile sentle, monna ene a le peloethata, a le bosula mo ditirong, e le wa losika lwa ga Kalebe." 
1Samuel25:4 Jaanong ya re Dafita a utlwa a le kwa sekakeng gore Nabale o beola dinku tsa gagwe," 
1Samuel25:5 Dafita a roma makau a le some, a a laela a re: “Tlhatlogelang kwa Karemele, lo ye kwa go Nabale, lo mo mpoletse bophelo," 
1Samuel25:6 lo ree yo o phelang monate jaana lo re: ‘A kagiso e nne nao, a kagiso e nne mo lapeng la gago, a kagiso e nne le tsotlhe tse o nang natso!" 
1Samuel25:7 Ke gona ke utlwang gore o na le babeodi ba dinku. Kana badisa ba gago ba ne ba ntse ba na le rona, re sa ba tshwenye, ba sa timelelwe ke sepe ka malatsi otlhe, fa ba ntse ba le kwa Karemele." 
1Samuel25:8 Botsa makau a gago, a tla go bolelela jalo. Jaanong a makau a me a bone bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a gago. Gonne re tsile ka letsatsi la letsema. A ko o nee batlhanka ba gago le morwao Dafita tse di leng mo seatleng sa gago.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:9 Makau a ga Dafita a fitlha, a bua le Nabale mafoko otlhe ao jaaka a laetswe ke Dafita, a ba a letela." 
1Samuel25:10 Mme Nabale a fetola batlhanka ba ga Dafita a re: “Dafita ke mang? Morwa Isai ke mang? Kajeno go na le batlhanka ba bantsi ba ba thobang mo go beng ba bone. 
1Samuel25:11 A nka tsaya bogobe jwa me le dino tsa me le dinama tsa me tse ke di apeetseng babeodi ba dinku tsa me, ka di naya banna ba ke sa itseng kwa ba tswang gona?”" 
1Samuel25:12 Ke fa makau a ga Dafita a retologa, a wela tseleng ya one, a boa a fitlha, a mmolelela mafoko otlhe ao." 
1Samuel25:13 Ke fa Dafita a raya banna ba gagwe a re: “A mongwe le mongwe a itlamelele tšhaka!” Mongwe le mongwe a itlamelela tšhaka; le Dafita a itlamelela tšhaka ya gagwe. Ba bolola ba sala Dafita morago, e ka nna banna ba le 400, ba le 200 ba sala le dithoto." 
1Samuel25:14 Mme lekau lengwe la makau la itsise Abikaile mosadi wa ga Nabale la re: “Itse gore Dafita o ne a romile barongwi ba tswa kwa sekakeng go dumedisa mong wa rona, mme o ba bifetse." 
1Samuel25:15 Kana banna bao ba ne ba re thusa thata; ga re ise re ke re direlwe bosula, le e seng go latlhegelwa ke sepe ka malatsi otlhe a re neng re ntse re na nabo kwa nageng ka ona." 
1Samuel25:16 Ba ne ba le lorako mo tikologong ya rona bosigo le motshegare ka malatsi otlhe, fa re ntse re na nabo, re disa dinku." 
1Samuel25:17 Jaanong he, akanya o bone se o ka se dirang. Gonne tatlhego e okame mong wa rona le lelapa lotlhe la gagwe. Mme ene o pelompe; motho ga a ka ke a bua nae.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Ke fa Abikaile a itlhaganela a tsaya dinkgwe di le 200 le makuka a le mabedi a weine le dinku di le tlhano tse di buduleng le ditlatla di le tlhano tsa dipabe le dinkgwe di le 100 tsa maswabi a moweine le dinkgwe di le 200 tsa feie, a di belesa mo dieseleng." 
1Samuel25:19 A laela makau a gagwe a re: “Nketeleleng pele, nna ke tla akofa ke lo latela!” Mme a se ka a bolelela Nabale monna wa gagwe sepe." 
1Samuel25:20 Jaanong ya re a kgokologa a palame esele, a sirilwe ke thaba, a bona Dafita le banna ba gagwe ba fologa mo thabeng ba tla kwa go ene, a rakana nabo kwa tlase." 
1Samuel25:21 Mme Dafita o ne a bonye gore “Ke diretse lefela, fa ke disitse tsotlhe tse e leng tsa yole kwa sekakeng mo go se kang ga tlhokafala sepe sa tsotlhe tsa gagwe. Jaanong o ntebogetse molemo ka bosula." 
1Samuel25:22 A Modimo o direle Dafita jaana o mo okeletse jaana, fa nka sadisa a le mongwe fela yo motonanyana wa botlhe ba e leng ba gagwe go ya mo mosong.”" 
1Samuel25:23 Ya re Abikaile a bona Dafita, a akofa a fologa mo eseleng, a wa fa pele ga Dafita ka sefatlhego, a ikobela fa fatshe;" 
1Samuel25:24 a wela fa dinaong tsa gagwe a re: “Morena wa me, molato oo ke wa me. A lelata la gago le ke le bue mo ditsebeng tsa gago, a ko o utlwe mafoko a lelata la gago!" 
1Samuel25:25 A morena wa me a ke a se ka a ela Nabale tlhoko, monna yoo wa bopelompe. Gonne ene o ntse jaaka leina la gagwe: Leina la gagwe ke Lesilo, mme bosilo bo mo go ene. Mme nna lelata la gago ga ke a ka ka bona makau a o neng o a romile, wena morena wa me." 
1Samuel25:26 Jaanong he, morena wa me, ka bophelo jwa Morena le ka bophelo jwa gago, wena yo Morena o go thibetseng go tla go tsholola madi le go itseela ka wesi. Mme jaanong a baba ba gago le ba ba batlelang morena wa me bosula ba nne jaaka Nabale." 
1Samuel25:27 Mme jaanong mpho e, e lelata la gago le e tliseditseng morena wa me, a e newe makau a a setseng morena wa me morago." 
1Samuel25:28 A ko o itshwarele molato wa lelata la gago. Gonne ka nnete, Morena o tla direla morena wa me ntlo e e tlhomameng, ka morena wa me a lwa dintwa tsa Morena, mme go se kitla go bonwa bosula mo go wena bophelong jotlhe jwa gago." 
1Samuel25:29 Mme fa motho a ka tsoga go go latelela le go tsoma bophelo jwa gago, mowa wa morena wa me o tla bo o bofeletswe mo ngateng ya baphedi fa Moreneng, Modimo wa gago; mme o tla latlha mewa ya baba ba gago jaaka e kete e tswa mo letlalong la seragamajwe." 
1Samuel25:30 Jaanong fa Morena a direla morena wa me tse di molemo tsotlhe tse o di mo solofeditseng, a go dira moeteledipele wa Iseraele," 
1Samuel25:31 gona o tla tlhoka sekgopi le e seng go tshwenngwa ke segakolodi sa molato wa go tsholola madi ka bomo le go itseela ka wesi, morena wa me. Mme e re Morena a sena go go direla sentle, o gakologelwe lelata la gago.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Ke fa Dafita a raya Abikaile a re: “A go bakwe Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, yo o go romileng kajeno go nkgatlhantsha." 
1Samuel25:33 A go bakwe temogo ya gago, a go bakwe wena ka wesi yo o nthibetseng kajeno gore ke se wele mo molatong wa go tsholola madi le e seng go itseela ka nosi." 
1Samuel25:34 Mme ruri, ka bophelo jwa Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, yo o nthibetseng go go direla bosula: Fa o ka bo o sa itlhaganela, wa tla go nkgatlhantsha, go ne go se kitla go salela Nabale ope yo motonanyana go ya leseding la moso.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Jaanong Dafita a amogela tse o di mo tliseditseng, a mo raya a re: “Boela kwa ntlong ya gago ka kagiso. Bona, ke utlwile lentswe la gago, ka go tshola sentle.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Ya re Abikaile a fitlha kwa go Nabale a fitlhela a na le moletlo mo ntlong ya gagwe o e keteng ke moletlo wa kgosi. Nabale o ne a itumetse a tagilwe gagolo thata. Mme Abikaile a se ka a mmolelela sepe, le fa e le se sebotlana gongwe se segolo go ya bo be bo se." 
1Samuel25:37 Ya re mo mosong weine e sena go tlhaphoga mo go Nabale, mosadi wa gagwe a mmolelela tse di dirafetseng. Ke fa pelo ya gagwe e swa mo teng ga gagwe, a fetoga lefika." 
1Samuel25:38 Ya re malatsi a a ka nnang some a sena go feta, Morena a betsa Nabale, a ba a swa." 
1Samuel25:39 Ya re Dafita a utlwa gore Nabale o sule, a re: “A go bakwe Morena yo o sekileng kgang ya kgobo e Nabale a e nkgobileng, a thibela motlhanka wa gagwe gore a se dire bosula, mme Morena a busetsa bosula jwa ga Nabale mo tlhogong ya gagwe.” Dafita a ba a roma, a bua le Abikaile gore a mo tsee go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
1Samuel25:40 Ya re batlhanka ba ga Dafita ba fitlha kwa go Abikaile kwa Karemele, ba bua nae ba re: “Dafita o re romile kwa go wena, gore a go tsee go nna mosadi wa gagwe.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Abikaile a nanoga, a ba a inamela fa fatshe ka sefatlhego a re: “Ke nna lelata la gago go nna modiredi wa go tlhapisa dinao tsa batlhanka ba morena wa me.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Jaanong Abikaile a akofa a nanoga, a palama esele a na le basetsana ba gagwe ba le batlhano ba ba tsamayang nae, a latela barongwi ba ga Dafita, a ya go nna mosadi wa gagwe." 
1Samuel25:43 Dafita o ne a ntse a nyetse Ahinoame kwa Iserele (mo Juta), ba nna basadi ba gagwe ka bobedi jwa bone." 
1Samuel25:44 Fa e le Migale morwadia Saule, mosadi wa ga Dafita, Saule o ne a mo neetse Phaleti morwa Laiše yo e leng wa kwa Galeme." 
1Samuel26:1 Basife ba tla kwa go Saule kwa Gibea ba re: “Kana Dafita o ntse a iphitlha mo thabaneng ya Hagila ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya naga e e senya.” 
1Samuel26:2 Ke fa Saule a nanoga a fologela kwa sekakeng sa Sife, a na le banna ba le 300 ba ba tlhophilweng ba lseraele go batla Dafita kwa sekakeng sa Sife." 
1Samuel26:3 Saule a thibelela mo thabaneng ya Hagila e e fa tseleng mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya naga e e senya, mme Dafita a ntse a le mo sekakeng. Ya re Dafita a utlwa go twe Saule o tlile go mo tsoma kwa sekakeng," 
1Samuel26:4 a roma batlhodi, mme a utlwa ka bone, fa Saule a tlile ka nnete." 
1Samuel26:5 Ke fa Dafita a nanoga, a fitlha kwa felong fa Saule a thibeletseng teng. Saule a bo a robetse fa gare ga magololo a dikoloi, banna ba mo dikanyeditse. Mme Dafita a bona felo fa Saule a robetseng teng le Abenere morwa Nere, molaodi wa mephato ya gagwe." 
1Samuel26:6 Jaanong Dafita a botsa Ahimelege wa Mohethe le Abisai morwa Seruya morwa-rraagwe Joabe a re: “Ke mang yo o tla fologelang le nna kwa go Saule kwa bothibelelong?” Abisai a re: “Ke tla fologa nao.” 
1Samuel26:7 Jaanong ya re Dafita le Abisai ba fitlha kwa banneng bothibelelong bosigo, ba fitlhela Saule a robetse a thulametse fa gare ga dikoloi; lerumo la gagwe le tsepame fa fatshe fa tlhogong ya gagwe; Abenere le banna ba robetse ba mo dikanyeditse." 
1Samuel26:8 Ke fa Abisai a raya Dafita a re: “Modimo o neetse mmaba wa gago mo diatleng tsa gago kajeno. Nte ke mo tlhabakelele fa fatshe ka lerumo la gagwe gangwe fela; ga go kitla go batlega la bobedi.” 
1Samuel26:9 Dafita a raya Abisai a re: “O se ka wa mmolaya! Gonne ga go ope yo o ka ntshetsang motlodiwa wa Morena letsogo, mme a se ka a bona petso.”" 
1Samuel26:10 Dafita a ba a re: “Ka bophelo jwa Morena! Ruri, Morena O tla mo itaya gongwe go tla tla letsatsi la gagwe la go swa gongwe o tla bolawa mo ntweng." 
1Samuel26:11 A Morena a nthibele go ka ntshetsa motlodiwa wa Morena letsogo. Jaanong he, tsaya lerumo le le fa tlhogong ya gagwe le modutwana wa metsi, re tsamae.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Jaanong Dafita a tsaya lerumo le modutwana wa metsi fa tlhogong ya ga Saule, ba tsamaya go se na ope yo o ba bonang gongwe yo o lemogang sepe gongwe yo o thanyang; gonne ba ne ba robetse botlhe, ba thulameditswe ke Morena." 
1Samuel26:13 Dafita a ba a tshelela kwa moseja ga molapo, a ema mo setlhoeng sa thaba kwa kgakala go le sebaka se segolo fa gare ga bone." 
1Samuel26:14 Jaanong Dafita a tlhaeletsa banna le Abenere morwa Nere a re: “A ga o arabe, Abenere?” Abenere a araba a re: “O mang wena yo o tlhaeletsang kgosi?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Mme Dafita a fetola Abenere a re: “A ga o monna? Ke mang yo o tshwanang nao mo Iseraeleng? Jaanong ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa o sa disa morena wa gago, kgosi? Gonne mongwe wa banna o fitlhile koo, a re o bolaya kgosi morena wa gago." 
1Samuel26:16 Se o se dirileng ga se a siama. Ka bophelo jwa Morena! Lo tshwanetswe ke loso, gonne ga lo a disa morena wa lona, motlodiwa wa Morena. Jaanong he, tlhola gore lerumo la kgosi le kae? Modutwana wa metsi o o neng o le fa tlhogong ya yona o kae?”" 
1Samuel26:17 Ke fa Saule a lemoga lentswe la ga Dafita a re: “A ke lone lentswe la gago, morwaaka Dafita?” Dafita a araba a re: “Ke lone, kgosi, morena wa me.”" 
1Samuel26:18 A ba a re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa morena wa me a latelela motlhanka wa gagwe? Naare ke dirile eng? Go na le bosula bofe mo seatleng sa me? 
1Samuel26:19 Jaanong he, a kgosi morena wa me e ke e reetse mafoko a motlhanka wa yona: Fa Morena a go tlhotlheletsa gore o lwe le nna, a a utlwisiwe monko wa tshupelo! Mme fa e le batho, a ba hutsege fa pele ga Morena! Gonne ba nteleka kajeno, ba ntlhokisa legae mo nageng ya Morena ba re: ‘Yaa o direle medimo e sele.’" 
1Samuel26:20 Mme jaanong, a madi a me a se ka a tshologela fa fatshe ke le kgakala le sefatlhego sa Morena! Gonne kgosi ya Iseraele e bolotse go batla letsetse le le lengwe fela, jaaka go tsongwa lesogo kwa majweng.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Saule a re: “Ke leofile. Boa, morwaaka Dafita! Gonne ga nkitla ke tlhola ke go direla bosula, ka gonne bophelo jwa me bo ne bo tlotlega thata kajeno mo matlhong a gago. Ka nnete, ke dirile bosilo, ka fosa gagolo thata”" 
1Samuel26:22 Mme Dafita a fetola a re: “Bona, lerumo la kgosi ke le. A mongwe wa makau a tshelele kwano, a tle go le tsaya." 
1Samuel26:23 Mme Morena o tla duela mongwe le mongwe ka fa tshiamong ya gagwe le boikanyegong jwa gagwe; gonne Morena o ne a go neetse mo diatleng tsa me kajeno, mme ka bo ke sa rate go ntshetsa motlodiwa wa Morena letsogo." 
1Samuel26:24 Bona, bophelo jwa gago bo ne bo kaiwa segolo kajeno mo matlhong a me, a bophelo jwa me bo kaiwe segolo jalo mo matlhong a Morena, a mpholose mo tlalelong yotlhe.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Jaanong Saule a raya Dafita a re: “O tshegofaditswe, morwaaka Dafita. Ruri, o tla dirafatsa, o tswelela pele.” Jaanong Dafita a wela tseleng ya gagwe, Saule le ene a boela kwa felong ga gagwe." 
1Samuel27:1 Dafita o ne a akanya gore: “E tla re ka letsatsi le lengwe ke bolawe ke letsogo la ga Saule. Ga go ka tsela e nngwe fa e se go falolela kwa lefatsheng la Bafelesita gore Saule a ntlhoboge, a se tlhole a mpatla mo nageng yotlhe ya lseraele. Ke tla tšhomoga jalo mo diatleng tsa gagwe.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Ke fa Dafita, ene le banna ba le 600 ba ba nang nae, a ya kwa go Agiše, morwa Maoge, kgosi ya kwa Gathe." 
1Samuel27:3 Dafita a nna jalo le Agiše kwa Gathe, ene le banna ba gagwe; mongwe le mongwe a na le ba lapa la gagwe. Dafita a na le basadi ba babedi ba gagwe, Ahinoame wa kwa Iserele le Abikaile mosadi wa ga Nabale wa kwa Karemele." 
1Samuel27:4 Ya re Saule a sena go bolelelwa gore Dafita o tshabetse kwa Gathe, a se ka a tlhola a mmatla." 
1Samuel27:5 Letsatsi le lengwe Dafita a raya Agiše a re: “Fa ke bonye bopelotlhomogi mo matlhong a gago, a nke ke newe manno mo motseng mongwe wa metse e e kwa nageng gore ke nne teng. E ka nna ka ntlha ya eng, fa motlhanka wa gago a nna nao mo motseng wa kgosing?”" 
1Samuel27:6 Ke fa Agiše a mo naya motse wa Sitlage ka letsatsi leo. Ke ka moo Sitlage e leng wa dikgosi tsa Juta go fitlha letsatsing leno. 
1Samuel27:7 Palo ya malatsi a Dafita o neng a nna mo nageng ya Bafelesita ka ona e ne e le ngwaga le dikgwedi di le nne. 
1Samuel27:8 Dafita le banna ba gagwe ba nna ba bolola ba tlhasela Bakesure le Bakiresi le Baamaleke. Gonne ke bone baagi ba lefatshe leo le le simologang kwa Telame le ya go fitlha kwa Sure le kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto. 
1Samuel27:9 Mme e ne ya re fa Dafita a itaya lefatshe leo, a se ke a rekegele monna ope gongwe mosadi, a ba amoge dinku le dikgomo le diesele le dikammele le diaparo, a be a boe a fitlhe kwa go Agiše." 
1Samuel27:10 Jaanong fa Agiše a botsa a re: “Lo tswa go tlhasela kae gompieno?” Dafita a arabe a re: “Kwa nageng ya borwa ya Juta le kwa nageng ya borwa ya Bajeramele le kwa nageng ya borwa ya Bakeni.” 
1Samuel27:11 Dafita o ne a sa lese monna gongwe mosadi go phela le e seng go isiwa kwa Gathe, gonne a re: “Ba ka tla ba supa ka ga rona ba re: ‘Dafita o dirile jaana le jaana.’ ” E ne e le ona mokgwa wa gagwe ka malatsi otlhe a o neng a nna mo nageng ya Bafelesita ka ona." 
1Samuel27:12 Agiše a ikanya Dafita a re: “Ruri, o nkgela morafe wa ga gabo, e bong Baiseraele. O tla nna motlhanka wa me ka metlha.”" 
1Samuel28:1 E rile ka malatsi ao Bafelesita ba phutha mephato ya bone go ya ntweng go tlhabana le Baiseraele, Agiše a raya Dafita a re: “Itse sentle gore o tshwanetse go bolola le nna mo mophatong, wena le banna ba gago.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Dafita a fetola Agiše a re: “Go siame! Jaanong o tla bona se motlhanka wa gago a kgonang go se dira.” Agiše a raya Dafita a re: “Ka moo ke go dira mofemedi wa tlhogo ya me ka metlha yotlhe.” 
1Samuel28:3 Kana Samuele o ne a sule, Baiseraele botlhe ba ne ba mo leletse, ba mo fitlhile kwa Rama mo motseng wa ga gabo. E bile Saule o ne a tlositse ba ba buisang badimo le baitseanape mo lefatsheng." 
1Samuel28:4 Jaanong ya re Bafelesita ba phuthega, ba fitlha, ba thibelela kwa Suneme, le Saule a phutha Baiseraele botlhe, ba thibelela kwa Gileboa." 
1Samuel28:5 Ya re Saule a bona mephato ya Bafelesita, a boifa; pelo ya gagwe ya roroma thata." 
1Samuel28:6 Saule a botsa Morena, mme Morena a se ka a mo araba, e seng ka ditoro le e seng ka Lesedi le e seng ka baporofeti." 
1Samuel28:7 Ke fa Saule a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Mpatleleng mosadi yo o itseng go buisa baswi gore ke ye kwa go ene, ke mmotse.” Batlhanka ba gagwe ba mo araba ba re: “Mosadi yo o buisang baswi o teng kwa Entore.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Jaanong Saule a iphetola ka go apara diaparo di sele, a ya a na le banna ba le babedi, ba fitlha kwa mosading yole bosigo, mme Saule a re: “A ko o mpolelele tsa boitseanape ka thuso ya mowa wa moswi, o ntlisetse yo ke tla mo go bolelelang.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Mme mosadi yoo a mo fetola a re: “Kana o itse se Saule o se dirileng, fa a fedisa ba ba buisang badimo le baitseanape mo lefatsheng. Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa o tsile go ntalela gore ke tle ke bolawe.”" 
1Samuel28:10 Ke fa Saule a mo ikanela ka Morena a re: “Ka bophelo jwa Morena! Ga o kitla o welwa ke molato ope ka tiro e.” 
1Samuel28:11 Jaanong mosadi a botsa a re: “Ke go tlisetse mang?” A re: “Ntlisetse Samuele.” 
1Samuel28:12 Ya re mosadi a bona Samuele, a goa ka lentswe le legolo, a ba a raya Saule a re: “O ntsieleditseng? Kana o Saule.”" 
1Samuel28:13 Kgosi ya mo raya ya re: “Se boife! Mme o bona eng?” Mosadi a araba Saule a re: “Ke bona mowa wa moswi o tswa mo lefatsheng.” 
1Samuel28:14 Saule a mmotsa a re: “Sebopego sa ona ke se se ntseng jang?” Mosadi a re: “Monna mogolo o tlhatloga, a apere kobo.” Ke fa Saule a lemoga gore ke Samuele; a ba a inamela fa fatshe ka sefatlhego a ikoba." 
1Samuel28:15 Mme Samuele a raya Saule a re: “O ntshwenyetsang ka go mpitsa?” Saule a re: “Ke tlaletswe thata. Bafelesita ba tlhabana le nna, mme Modimo o ntlogetse; ga o tlhole o nkaraba le e seng ka baporofeti le e seng ka ditoro. Ke ka moo ke go biditseng gore o nkitsise se ke tshwanetseng go se dira.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Samuele a ba a re: “O mpoletsang, etswe Morena o go tlogetse, a tswa mmaba wa gago?" 
1Samuel28:17 Morena O dirile jaaka a buile ka nna. O phamotse bogosi mo diatleng tsa gago, a bo neela yo mongwe, e bong Dafita." 
1Samuel28:18 Ka gore ga o a ka wa utlwa lentswe la Morena, ga o a ka wa dirafatsa bogale jo bo tukang jwa gagwe mo go Baamaleke; ke ka moo Morena O GO diretseng tsona tse gompieno." 
1Samuel28:19 Le gona Morena o tla go neela le Baiseraele mo diatleng tsa Bafelesita. Gape wena le bomorwao lo tla bo lo na le nna kamoso. Le mephato ya Baiseraele Morena o tla e neela mo diatleng tsa Bafelesita.” 
1Samuel28:20 Ya ba gona Saule a welang fa fatshe ka letshogo, a namalala ka boleele jotlhe jwa gagwe, a boifa thata ka ntlha ya mafoko a ga Samuele. Le gona o ne a setse a feletswe ke thata, gonne o ne a ise a je sepe motshegare otlhe le bosigo jotlhe." 
1Samuel28:21 Jaanong mosadi yole a tla kwa go Saule, mme ya re a mmona a tshogile thata, a mo raya a re: “Kana lelata la gago le dirile se o se le boleletseng, ka se ka ka rekegela botshelo jwa me, ka utlwa mafoko a gago a o a buileng le nna." 
1Samuel28:22 Jaanong he, le wena a ko o utlwe lentswe la lelata la gago. Ke tla baya thathana ya bogobe fa pele ga gago, e je gore o nne le thata, fa o tsamaya mo tseleng.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Mme a gana a re: “Ga ke rate go ja.” Fela ya re batlhanka ba gagwe le ene mosadi ba mo emelela, a ba utlwa, a namologa fa fatshe, a nna mo bolaong." 
1Samuel28:24 Jaanong mosadi a bo a na le namane e e nonneng mo lapeng; a akofa a e tlhaba, a ba a tsaya bupe a bo duba, a besa dinkgwe tse di sa bedisiwang." 
1Samuel28:25 A ba a di tlisa, a di baya fa pele ga Saule le fa pele ga batlhanka ba gagwe. Ya re ba sena go ja ba nanoga, ba tsamaya bosigo joo." 
1Samuel29:1 Bafelesita ba ne ba phuthela mephato yotlhe ya bone kwa Afeke; Baiseraele bone ba bo ba thibeletse fa motsweding o o kwa Iserele. 
1Samuel29:2 Jaanong ya re balaodi ba mephato ya Bafelesita ba feta ka makgolo le dikete, Dafita le banna ba gagwe le bone ba feta kwa morago, ba na le Agiše," 
1Samuel29:3 dikgosana tsa Bafelesita tsa re: “Bahebere ba, ba batlang fa?” Agiše a araba dikgosana tsa Bafelesita a re: “A ga se ene Dafita, motlhanka wa ga Saule, kgosi ya Iseraele, yo o sa bolong go nna le nna, e setse e le malatsi a mantsi gongwe dinyaga, mme ke ise ke bone molato mo go ene go tloga letsatsing le o ineetseng mo go nna ka lone go fitlha letsatsing leno.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Mme dikgosana tsa Bafelesita tsa mo gakalela, tsa mo raya tsa re: “Busa monna yo! A a boele kwa felong ga gagwe fa o mmeileng teng, mme a se ka a fologela le rona kwa tlhabanong, e se re gongwe a re fetogela mmaba mo tlhabanong. Kana monna yo, o ka kgatlha morena wa gagwe ka eng? A ga se ka ditlhogo tsa banna ba?" 
1Samuel29:5 A ga se ene Dafita yo ba mo opetseng dipina ba re: ‘Saule o bolaile dikete, mme Dafita o bolaile kete tse some.’ ”" 
1Samuel29:6 Ke fa Agiše a bitsa Dafita, a mo raya a re: “Ka bophelo jwa Morena! Ruri, o tlhamaletse, le go bolola ga gago le go tsena ga gago le nna mo mophatong go siame mo matlhong a me. Gonne ga ka bona bosula bope mo go wena go tloga letsatsing le o tlileng go nna ka lone go fitlha letsatsing leno, mme ga o a siama mo matlhong a dikgosana." 
1Samuel29:7 Jaanong he, boa o tsamae ka kagiso gore o se ka wa kgopisa dikgosana tsa Bafelesita.”" 
1Samuel29:8 Dafita a fetola Agiše a re: “Kana ke dirileng? O bonye eng mo motlhankeng wa gago go tloga letsatsing le ke simolotseng go go direla ka lone go fitlha letsatsing leno, mo ke sa tshwanelang go ya le go tlhabana le baba ba kgosi, morena wa me?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Agiše a araba a raya Dafita a re: “Ke a itse, gonne o siame mo matlhong a me jaaka moengele wa Modimo. Fela dikgosana tsa Bafelesita tsa re: ‘A a se ka a bolola le rona mo tlhabanong!’" 
1Samuel29:10 Jaanong phakela ka moso, wena le batlhanka ba morena wa gago ba ba tlileng nao, lo phakeleng ka moso, lo tsamae fa boo sa.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Dafita a phakela jalo, ene le banna ba gagwe gore a tsamae mo mosong, a boele kwa lefatsheng la Bafelesita. Bafelesita bone ba bolola go ya kwa Iserele." 
1Samuel30:1 E rile Dafita le banna ba gagwe ba fitlha kwa Sitlage ka letsatsi la boraro, Baamaleke ba bo ba thukhuthile naga ya borwa le Sitlage, ba sentse motse wa Sitlage, ba o fisitse ka molelo." 
1Samuel30:2 Ba bo ba gapile basadi le botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo go ona, ba bannye le ba bagolo; ba ne ba sa bolaya ope, mme ba ne ba ba thopile, ba ile ka bone." 
1Samuel30:3 Jaanong ya re Dafita le banna ba gagwe ba goroga kwa motseng, ba fitlhela o fisitswe ka molelo, le basadi ba bone le bomorwaa-bone le bomorwadia-bone ba isitswe mo botshwarong." 
1Samuel30:4 Ke fa Dafita le banna ba ba nang nae ba tlhatlosa mantswe ba lela go fitlhelela ba felelwa ke thata ya go ka lela. 
1Samuel30:5 Le basadi ba babedi ba ga Dafita, Ahinoame wa kwa Iserele le Abikaile, mosadi wa ga Nabale wa kwa Karemele ba bo ba thopilwe." 
1Samuel30:6 Dafita ene o ne a tlaletswe thata, gonne banna ba ne ba re ba mo kgobotletsa ka majwe; gonne banna botlhe ba ne ba sudile dipelo, mongwe le mongwe ka ntlha ya bomorwawe le ka ntlha ya bomorwadie, mme Dafita a itiisa ka Morena, Modimo wa gagwe." 
1Samuel30:7 Dafita a raya moperesiti Abjathare morwa Ahimelege a re: “A ko o ntlisetse khiba ya boperesiti.” Abjathare a isa khiba ya boperesiti kwa go ene. 
1Samuel30:8 Ke fa Dafita a botsa Morena a re: “A ke ke latelele lekoko leo la dinokwane, a ke tla le tshwara?” A mo araba a re: “Le latelele, gonne ruri o tla le tshwara; ruri o tla pholosa ba ga eno.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Jaanong Dafita a bolola, ene le banna ba le 600 ba ba nang nae; ya re ba fitlha kwa nokaneng ya Besore, bangwe ba sala teng." 
1Samuel30:10 Dafita a le latelela, ene le banna ba le 400. Banna ba ba 200 ba ba neng ba feletswe ke thata, mo ba palelwang ke go tshela nokana ya Besore, ba tlogelwa foo." 
1Samuel30:11 Kwa nageng ba fitlhela monna wa Moegepeto, ba mo isa kwa go Dafita, ba mo naya bogobe a ja; ba be ba mo siela metsi." 
1Samuel30:12 E bile ba mo naya senkgwe sa difeie le dinkgwe di le pedi tsa maswabi a moweine. Ya re a sena go ja a itharabologelwa. Gonne o ne a sa ja dijo, a sa nwa metsi malatsi a le mararo le masigo a one." 
1Samuel30:13 Jaanong Dafita a mmotsa a re: “O mokae? O tswa kae?” A re: “Ke lekau la Moegepeto, ke motlhanka wa monna wa Moamaleke, mme morena wa me o ntlogetse ka ke lwala, kajeno e setse e le letsatsi la boraro." 
1Samuel30:14 Re tswa go thukhutha naga ya borwa ya Bakerethi le ya Juta le naga ya borwa ya ga Kalebe, ra fisa Sitlage ka molelo.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Dafita a ba a mmotsa a re: “A o tla nkisa kwa lesomong leo la dinokwane?” A re: “Inkanele ka Modimo gore ga o kitla o mpolaya le gore ga o kitla o nneela mo diatleng tsa morena wa me! Gona ke tla go isa kwa lesomong leo.” 
1Samuel30:16 Jaanong a mo isa teng, ba fitlhela ba aname mo lefatsheng lotlhe, ba ja, ba nwa, ba dirile moletlo ka ntlha ya thopo e kgolo yotlhe e ba e thopileng kwa lefatsheng la Bafelesita le kwa lefatsheng la Juta." 
1Samuel30:17 Jaanong Dafita a ba bolaya go simolola ka lotlatlana go ya mantsiboeng a kamoso, ga se ka ga falola ope wa bone, fa e se makau a le 400 a a neng a palama dikammele a tshaba." 
1Samuel30:18 Dafita a busa gape tsotlhe tse Baamaleke ba neng ba di thopile; le basadi ba babedi ba gagwe a ba golola. 
1Samuel30:19 Ga se ka ga tlhokafala sepe, le fa e le tse dipotlana gongwe tse dikgolo le fa e le bomorwaa-bone gongwe bomorwadia-bone le fa e le tsa thopo gongwe sengwe sa dilo tsotlhe tse Baamaleke ba neng ba di ba amogile; Dafita a busa tsotlhe gape." 
1Samuel30:20 Jaanong Dafita a tsaya dinku tsotlhe le dikgomo tsa Baamaleke; ba di kgweeletsa kwa pele ga diruiwa tsa bone ba re: “Ke yona thopo ya ga Dafita.” 
1Samuel30:21 Ya re Dafita a fitlha kwa banneng ba ba 200 ba ba neng ba feletswe ke thata mo ba paletsweng ke go mo sala morago, ba a ba tlogetseng kwa nokaneng ya Besore, bone ba bolola go kgatlhantsha Dafita le banna ba ba nang nae. Dafita a atamela banna bao, a ba botsa matsogo." 
1Samuel30:22 Ke fa banna botlhe ba ba bosula ba ba pelompe mo banneng, ba ba neng ba ile le Dafita, ba bua ba re: “E re ka ba se ka ba ya le rona, ga re kitla re ba naya sepe sa thopo e re e busitseng, fa e se mongwe le mongwe mosadi wa gagwe le bana ba gagwe. A ba ba tsee, ba tsamae!”" 
1Samuel30:23 Mme Dafita a fetola a re: “Lo se ka lwa dira jalo, ba ga etsho, ka dilo tse Morena o di re neileng! Kana o re bolokile, a neela lekoko la dinokwane le le neng le re thukhuthile mo diatleng tsa rona." 
1Samuel30:24 Ke mang yo o ka lo utlwang mo go se? Nnyaya, kabelo ya yo o tswang kwa ntweng e tla lekana fela le kabelo ya yo o setseng le dithoto. Ba tla kgaogana thopo ka go tshwana.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Ga nna jalo go tloga ka letsatsi leo le kwa pele. Dafita a go beela Baiseraele molao le mokgwa go fitlha letsatsing leno. 
1Samuel30:26 Ya re Dafita a sena go fitlha kwa Sitlage, a romela bagolo ba Juta le ditsala tsa gagwe dikabelo tsa thopo a re: “Bonang, mpho ya lona ke eo e e tswang mo thopong ya baba ba Morena.”" 
1Samuel30:27 A di romela ba Bethele le ba Ramothe wa kwa borwa le ba Jathire 
1Samuel30:28 le ba Aroere le ba Sifemothe le ba Ešethemoa 
1Samuel30:29 le ba Ragale le ba metse ya Bajeramele le ba metse ya Bakeni 
1Samuel30:30 le ba Horema le ba Borašane le ba Athage 
1Samuel30:31 le ba Heberone le ba mafelo otlhe kwa Dafita o neng a ntse a tsamaya teng le banna ba gagwe. 
1Samuel31:1 Jaanong e rile Bafelesita ba tlhabana le Baiseraele, banna ba Iseraele ba lelekwa ke Bafelesita, mme ba wa ba bolailwe kwa dithabeng tsa Gileboa." 
1Samuel31:2 Jaanong Bafelesita ba khutšhela Saule le bomorwawe, ba bolaya Jonathane le Abinatabe le Malekhišua bomorwa Saule." 
1Samuel31:3 Ya re tlhabano e le bogale mo tikologong ya ga Saule, mme banna ba ba hulang ka mara ba mo lemoga, a tlhabakwa thata ke bahudi." 
1Samuel31:4 Ke fa Saule a raya motshola-dibolai wa gagwe a re: “Somola tšhaka ya gago, o mphololetse ka yona, e se re gongwe ga tla ba ba sa rupang bale ba mphololetsa, ba ntshotla.” Mme motshola-dibolai wa gagwe a gana, ka a boifa thata. Foo Saule a tsaya tšhaka, a itigela mo go yona." 
1Samuel31:5 Ya re motshola-dibolai wa gagwe a bona Saule a sule, le ene a itigela mo tšhakeng ya gagwe, a swa nae." 
1Samuel31:6 Saule le bomorwawe ba bararo le motshola-dibolai wa gagwe le banna botlhe ba gagwe ba ne ba swa jalo mmogo ka letsatsi leo. 
1Samuel31:7 Jaanong ya re banna ba Iseraele ba ba neng ba le kwa ntlheng ele ya leboa le ka kwano ga Joretane ba bona banna ba Iseraele ba tshabile, le Saule a sule le bomorwawe, ba tlogela metse ya bone, ba tshaba; ga tla Bafelesita ba nna mo go yona." 
1Samuel31:8 Ya re kamoso Bafelesita ba tla go thukhutha ba ba bolailweng dilo, ba fitlhela Saule le bomorwawe ba bararo ba namaletse mo dithabeng tsa Gileboa," 
1Samuel31:9 ba mo kgaola tlhogo, ba mo apola dibolai, ba di romela kwa lefatsheng la Bafelesita ntlheng tsotlhe e le go utlwatsa phenyo mo tempeleng ya medimo ya bone le mo morafeng." 
1Samuel31:10 Dibolai tsa gagwe ba di baya mo tempeleng ya boAšethorethe; setoto sa gagwe ba se kokotela mo loboteng lwa Betšheane. 
1Samuel31:11 Ya re baagi ba Jabese kwa Gileate ba utlwela tse Bafelesita ba di diretseng Saule," 
1Samuel31:12 banna botlhe ba ba pelokgale ba nanoga, ba lala ba tsamaya bosigo jotlhe, ba tsaya setoto sa ga Saule le ditoto tsa bomorwawe kwa loboteng lwa Betšheane, ba di isa kwa Jabese, ba feta ba di fisa teng;" 
1Samuel31:13 marapo one ba a fitlha fa tlase ga setlhare sa motamariseka kwa Jabese, ba itima dijo malatsi a supa." 
2Samuel1:1 E rile morago ga loso lwa ga Saule, Dafita a sena go fenya Baamaleke le go boa, a tlhola malatsi a le mabedi kwa Sitlage," 
2Samuel1:2 ga tla monna ka letsatsi la boraro, a tswa kwa go Saule kwa bothibelelong, a ikgagotse diaparo, a itshetse mmu mo tlhogong. Ya re a fitlha kwa go Dafita, a wela fa fatshe, a ikoba." 
2Samuel1:3 Mme Dafita a mmotsa a re: “O tswa kae?” A mo araba a re: “Ke falotse kwa bothibelelong jwa ga Saule.” 
2Samuel1:4 Dafita a ba a mmotsa a re: “Go rileng? A ko o mpolelele.” A bolela a re: “Banna ba tshabile mo ntweng; le gona go ole ba bantsi ba morafe, ba swa; go bile go sule Saule le Jonathane morwawe.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Ke fa Dafita a botsa lekau le le mmoleletseng jalo a re: “O itse jang fa Saule le Jonathane morwawe ba sule?” 
2Samuel1:6 Lekau le le mmegetseng mafoko la araba la re: “E rile ke feta kwa thabeng ya Gileboa, ka wela Saule a ikaegile ka lerumo la gagwe, ka bona ba dikoloi le bapalami ba dipitse ba mo leleka." 
2Samuel1:7 A gadima, a mpona a mpitsa; ka re: ‘Ke fano.’" 
2Samuel1:8 A mpotsa a re: ‘O mang?’ Ka mo araba ka re: ‘Ke Moamaleke.’ 
2Samuel1:9 A nthaya a re: ‘A ko o eme fa go nna, o mpolae; gonne ke tshwerwe ke sedidi, mme bophelo bo sa le mo go nna jotlhe.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Ka ema fa go ene, ka mmolaya; gonne ke ne ke itse gore, ga a kitla a phela a sena go wa. Ka tsaya serwalo sa bogosi se se neng se le mo tlhogong ya gagwe le mohitshane mo letsogong la gagwe, ka di tlisa kwano go morena wa me.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Ke fa Dafita a itshwara diaparo, a di gagola; le banna botlhe ba ba nang nae ba dira jalo." 
2Samuel1:12 Ba hutsafala ba lela, ba itima dijo go ya mantsiboeng ka ntlha ya ga Saule le ka ntlha ya ga Jonathane morwawe le ka ntlha ya morafe wa Morena, e bong Baiseraele, ka ba ole ka tšhaka." 
2Samuel1:13 Jaanong Dafita a botsa lekau le le mo itsisitseng jalo a re: “O mokae?” La araba la re: “Ke morwa monna yo o falaletseng kwa Boamaleke.” 
2Samuel1:14 Dafita a ba a le botsa a re: “Ke go reng, fa o se ka wa boifa go ntsha letsogo go bolaya motlodiwa wa Morena?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Dafita a ba a bitsa lengwe la makau a re: “Atamela o mo wele.” La mo itaya, a ba a swa." 
2Samuel1:16 Ya re a ise a swe Dafita a mo raya a re: “O swela molato wa gago. Gonne o ipoletse wa re ke wena o bolaileng motlodiwa wa Morena.” 
2Samuel1:17 Ke fa Dafita a tlhaba sefela sa selelo ka ga Saule le Jonathane morwawe; 
2Samuel1:18 – a Bajuta ba se rutwe! Kana se kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa motlhamaladi! – a re: 
2Samuel1:19 “Iseraele, mokgabo wa gago o bolaetswe kwa dithoteng tsa gago. Kana bagale ba ole jang!" 
2Samuel1:20 Lo se ka lwa itsise kwa Gathe le e seng go bolela mo mebileng ya Ašekalone, e se re gongwe bomorwadia Bafelesita ba itumela, bomorwadia ba ba sa rupang ba duduetsa." 
2Samuel1:21 Lona dithaba tsa Gileboa, a go se we monyo le e seng go na pula mo go lona; a go se nne masimo a a ntshang makgetho. Gonne teng koo go sotlegile dithebe tsa bagale le thebe ya ga Saule, e kete ga se ya yo o tloditsweng ka lookwane." 
2Samuel1:22 Bora jwa ga Jonathane bo ne bo se ke bo sutela kwa morago le tšhaka ya ga Saule e ne e se ke e boa, di sa tlala madi a ba ba bolailweng le mafura a bagale." 
2Samuel1:23 Saule le Jonathane, baratwi le bakgatlhi! Mo bophelong jwa bone le mo losong lwa bone ga ba a ka ba kgaogana. Ba ne ba le lobelo bogolo go bontswi, ba le thata bogolo go ditau." 
2Samuel1:24 Lona bomorwadia Iseraele, lelelang Saule yo o neng a lo apesa ka masela a mahibidu le mekgabo e mentle; a kgabisa diaparo tsa lona ka mokgabo wa gouta." 
2Samuel1:25 Kana bagale ba ole jang mo tlhabanong! Jonathane o namaletse mo dithoteng tsa gago a bolailwe. 
2Samuel1:26 Jonathane, morwa-rra, ke mo khutsafalong ka ntlha ya gago. Ke ne ke go rata thata, lorato lwa gago lo nkgakgamatsa go gaisa lorato lwa basadi." 
2Samuel1:27 Kana bagale ba ole jang! Dibolai tsa ntwa tsa latlhega.” 
2Samuel2:1 Morago ga moo Dafita a botsa Morena a re: “A ke ke ye kwa go mongwe wa metse ya Juta?” Morena a mo araba a re: “Yaa!” Dafita a botsa gape a re: “Ke ye kwa kae?” A araba a re: “Kwa Heberone.” 
2Samuel2:2 Dafita a ya teng mmogo le basadi ba babedi ba gagwe Ahinoame wa kwa Iserele le Abikaile, mosadi wa ga Nabale wa kwa Karemele." 
2Samuel2:3 Le banna ba gagwe ba ba nang nae Dafita a ba isa teng, mongwe le mongwe le ba lapa la gagwe, ba aga mo metseng ya Heberone." 
2Samuel2:4 Ke fa banna ba Juta ba tla ba tlotsa Dafita teng go nna kgosi ya lotso lwa Juta. Jaanong ya re Dafita a begelwa go twe, banna ba Jabese kwa Gileate ba fitlhile Saule," 
2Samuel2:5 Dafita a roma barongwi kwa banneng ba Jabese kwa Gileate, a ba raya a re: “A Morena a lo tshegofatse, ka lo diretse Saule morena wa lona ka lorato loo, lwa mo fitlha." 
2Samuel2:6 Jaanong he, a Morena a lo direle ka lorato le boikanyo, mme le nna ke tla lo direla tse di molemo tseo, ka lo dirile tiro eo." 
2Samuel2:7 Mme jaanong tsenyang marapo dinameng, lo nne banna ba ba pelokgale; gonne Saule morena wa lona o sule. Le gona Bajuta ba ntloditse go nna kgosi ya bone.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Mme Abenere morwa Nere, molaodi wa mephato ya ga Saule, a tsaya Isebosethe morwa Saule, a mo isa kwa moseja ga Joretane kwa Mahanaime," 
2Samuel2:9 a mo dira kgosi ya Gileate le ya Baašure le ya Iserele le ya Eferaime le ya Benyamene le ya Iseraele yotlhe. 
2Samuel2:10 E rile Isebosethe morwa Saule a simolola go busa Iseraele, a bo a le dinyaga di le 40, a busa dinyaga di le pedi. E ne e le ba lotso lwa Juta fela ba ba gogang le Dafita." 
2Samuel2:11 Mme palo ya malatsi a Dafita e neng e le kgosi ya lotso lwa Juta kwa Heberone ka ona ke dinyaga di supa le dikgwedi tse thataro. 
2Samuel2:12 Abenere morwa Nere o kile a bolola kwa Mahanaime, a na le batlhanka ba ga Isebosethe morwa Saule, a tla kwa Gibeone." 
2Samuel2:13 Le Joabe morwa Seruya le batlhanka ba ga Dafita ba bolola, ba kgatlhana le bale fa letsheng la Gibeone; bangwe ba thibelela ka kwano ga letsha, ba bangwe kwa moseja ga letsha." 
2Samuel2:14 Ke fa Abenere a raya Joabe a re: “A makau a ke a nanoge, a tshameke fa pele ga rona!” Joabe a re: “A a nanoge.”" 
2Samuel2:15 A nanoga a feta a badilwe, a a 12 e le a Benyamene a ga Isebosethe, morwa Saule, a a 12 e le a batlhanka ba ga Dafita." 
2Samuel2:16 Ke fa ba tshwarana ka ditlhogo, mongwe le mongwe a tlhaba mongwe-ka-ene ka tšhaka mo lotlhakoreng, mme ba wa mmogo. Felo foo ga bidiwa tshimo ya magale a ditšhaka e e kwa Gibeone." 
2Samuel2:17 Tlhabano ya nna e e thatathata ka letsatsi leo, mme Abenere le banna ba Iseraele ba fenngwa ke batlhanka ba ga Dafita." 
2Samuel2:18 Teng koo go ne go le bomorwa Seruya ba bararo: Joabe le Abisai le Asahele. Mme Asahele o ne a le lobelo jaaka tshephe mo nageng. 
2Samuel2:19 Ene Asahele a tlhomere Abenere, a se ka a fapogela ntlheng ya le le jang le e seng mo go ya la molema, a ntse a setse Abenere morago." 
2Samuel2:20 Ke fa Abenere a retologa a re: “A ke wena Asahele?” A re: “Ke nna.” 
2Samuel2:21 Abenere a mo raya a re: “Fapogela mo ntlheng ya le le jang gongwe mo ntlheng ya la molema, o tshware mongwe wa makau, o itseele dibolai tsa gagwe.” Mme Asahele a gana go fapoga le go mo tlogela." 
2Samuel2:22 Abenere a ba a bua gape le Asahele a re: “Fapoga tlhe o ntlogele! O batlelang gore ke go remele fa fatshe? Ke ne ke tla leba jang Joabe morwa-rraago?” 
2Samuel2:23 Mme ya re a gana go fapoga, Abenere a mo tlhaba ka mhinyana wa lerumo mo mpeng, lerumo la ba la tswa ka kwa motlhaneng. Asahele a wa foo, a swela felong foo. Mme botlhe ba ba neng ba feta teng, fa Asahele a oleng a swela gona, ba ema." 
2Samuel2:24 Mme Joabe le Abisai ba latelela Abenere. Ya re letsatsi le sena go phirima, ba fitlha kwa thabaneng ya Ama e e lebaganyeng le Gia fa tseleng e e yang kwa sekakeng sa Gibeone." 
2Samuel2:25 Ke fa Babenyamene ba phuthegela kwa go Abenere, ya nna setlhopha se le sengwe, ba ema mo setlhoeng sa thabana nngwe." 
2Samuel2:26 Jaanong Abenere a tlhaeletsa Joabe a re: “A tšhaka e tla ja ka bosakhutleng? A ga o itse gore tse di galakang di tla nna teng morago? E tla nna goleele go le kae o sa re, banna ba boe, ba tlogele bomorwa-rraabo?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Joabe a araba a re: “Ka bophelo jwa Modimo! Fa o ka bo o se ka wa bua jalo, banna ba ka bo ba se ka ba khutla go khutšhela bomorwa-rraabo bo ise bo se.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Ke fa Joabe a letsa lonaka; banna botlhe ba ema, ba se ka ba tlhola ba latelela Baiseraele; le gona ba se ka ba tlhola ba tlhabana." 
2Samuel2:29 Mme Abenere le banna ba gagwe ba tsamaya bosigo jotlhe joo, ba ralala Lebala la Joretane, ba tshela Joretane, ba ralala naga yotlhe ya Bitherone, ba fitlha kwa Mahanaime." 
2Samuel2:30 Ya re Joabe a sena go khutla go latelela Abenere, a phutha banna botlhe; ga tlhokafala banna ba le 19 le Asahele mo batlhankeng ba ga Dafita." 
2Samuel2:31 Mme batlhanka ba ga Dafita ba ne ba bolaile banna ba le 360 ba Babenyamene ba banna ba ga Abenere, e le bone ba ba suleng." 
2Samuel2:32 Jaanong ba tsaya setoto sa ga Asahele, ba mo fitlha mo lebitleng la ga rraagwe le le neng le le kwa Betleheme. Joabe le banna ba gagwe ba lala ba tsamaya bosigo jotlhe, ba fitlha kwa Heberone ka masa." 
2Samuel3:1 Ntwa ya ba losika lwa ga Saule le ba losika lwa ga Dafita ya tsaya sebaka se seleele, mme Dafita a nna a tiela pele, ba losika lwa ga Saule ba nna ba ngotlega." 
2Samuel3:2 Bomorwa Dafita ba ba tsaletsweng kwa Heberone ke ba: Yo mogolo ke Amenone wa ga Ahinoame wa kwa Iserele; 
2Samuel3:3 wa bobedi ke Kileabe wa ga Abikaile mosadi wa ga Nabale wa kwa Karemele; wa boraro ke Abesalomo morwa Maaga, morwadia Thalemai kgosi ya Kesure;" 
2Samuel3:4 wa bone ke Atonia morwa Hagithe; wa botlhano ke Sefatya morwa Abitale; 
2Samuel3:5 wa borataro ke Ithereame wa ga Egela mosadi wa ga Dafita. Ke bone bana ba ga Dafita ba ba tsaletsweng kwa Heberone. 
2Samuel3:6 E rile go ntse go le ntwa fa gare ga losika lwa ga Saule le losika lwa ga Dafita, Abenere a emela losika lwa ga Saule ka tlhomamo." 
2Samuel3:7 Saule o ne a na le mogadingwana yo leina la gagwe e neng e le Ritsepha morwadia Aya. Jaanong Abenere a mo tsaya, mme Isebosethe a raya Abenere a re: “Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa o tsenye kwa go mogadingwana wa ga rre?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Ke fa Abenere a tuka bogale thata ka ntlha ya mafoko a ga Isebosethe a re: “A ke tlhogo ya ntšwa e e leng ya Bajuta? Ke ntse ke direla ba losika lwa ga Saule rraago le bomorwa rraagwe le balekane ba gagwe ka bopelotlhomogi; e bile ga ke a ka ka go neela mo seatleng sa ga Dafita, mme kajeno o mpaya molato ka ntlha ya mosadi!" 
2Samuel3:9 A Modimo o direle Abenere jaana, o mo okeletse jaana, fa ke sa direle Dafita jaaka Morena a mo ikanetse," 
2Samuel3:10 ka go tlosa bogosi mo losikeng lwa ga Saule le ka go tlhomamisetsa Iseraele le Juta sedulo sa bogosi sa ga Dafita go tswa kwa Dane go ya go fitlha kwa Bereseba.” 
2Samuel3:11 Ke fa a sa tlhole a nonofa go araba Abenere ka lefoko lepe, ka a mmoifa."
