2Kings15:1 Asaria morwa Amasia kgosi ya Juta o ne a simolola go busa ka ngwaga wa 27 wa puso ya ga Jerobeame kgosi ya Iseraele. 
2Kings15:2 E rile a nna kgosi, a bo a le dinyaga di le 16, a busa dinyaga di le 52 kwa Jerusalema. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Jegolea wa Jerusalema." 
2Kings15:3 A dira tse di siameng mo matlhong a Morena fela jaaka go dirile Amasia rraagwe. 
2Kings15:4 Fela dithota tsa tlhabelo tsa se ka tsa tlosiwa; batho ba nna ba dira ditlhabelo le go tshuba maswalo mo dithoteng tsa tlhabelo. 
2Kings15:5 Mme Morena a betsa kgosi, mme ya bolawa ke lepero go fitlha letsatsing la loso lwa yona, ya nna mo ntlong e e kwa thoko. Mme Jothame morwa kgosi o ne a e tshwarelela, a okamela ntlo ya bogosi a busa batho ba lefatshe." 
2Kings15:6 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Asaria le tsotlhe tse o neng a di dira kana di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa sebaka sa dikgosi tsa Juta. 
2Kings15:7 Mme Asaria a robala le borraagwe, mme ba mo fitlha fa go borraagwe mo motseng wa ga Dafita, mme Jothame morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Kings15:8 Sagaria morwa Jerobeame o ne a simolola go busa Iseraele ka ngwaga wa 38 wa puso ya ga Asaria kgosi ya Juta; a busa dikgwedi di le thataro kwa Samaria. 
2Kings15:9 A dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena jaaka go dirile borraagwe; a se ka a tlogela maleo a ga Jerobeame morwa Nebate yo o neng a leofisa Baiseraele. 
2Kings15:10 Mme Sadume morwa Jabese a mo tsosetsa moferefere, a mo itaya fa pele ga morafe, a mmolaya, a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Kings15:11 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Sagaria, kana di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa sebaka sa dikgosi tsa Iseraele." 
2Kings15:12 Ke lone lefoko la Morena le o kileng a le bua le Jehu a re: “Bomorwao ba tla nna mo sedulong sa bogosi sa Iseraele go ya losikeng lwa bone.” Ga nna jalo. 
2Kings15:13 Sadume morwa Jabese o ne a simolola go busa ka ngwaga wa 39 wa puso ya ga Usia kgosi ya Juta, a busa sebakanyana sa kgwedi fela kwa Samaria." 
2Kings15:14 Ke fa Menaheme morwa Gadi a bolola kwa Thiresa, a fitlha kwa Samaria, a fenya Sadume morwa Jabese kwa Samaria, a mmolaya, a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Kings15:15 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Sadume le moferefere o a neng a o tsosa kana di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa sebaka sa dikgosi tsa Iseraele. 
2Kings15:16 Ka metlha eo Menaheme a bolaya motse wa Thifesa le botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo go ona le dinaga tsa ona go tloga kwa Thiresa, ka ba se ka ba mmulela. A o bolaya, a ba a gagola ba baimana botlhe ba ona dimpa." 
2Kings15:17 Menaheme morwa Gadi o ne a simolola go busa Iseraele ka ngwaga wa 39 wa puso ya ga Asaria kgosi ya Juta; a busa dinyaga di le some kwa Samaria. 
2Kings15:18 A dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena ka malatsi otlhe a gagwe, a se ka a tlogela maleo a ga Jerobeame morwa Nebate yo o neng a leofisa Baiseraele." 
2Kings15:19 Ka malatsi a gagwe ga tlhaga Phule kgosi ya Asiria, a tlhasela lefatshe. Ke fa Menaheme a naya Phule ditalente di le sekete tsa selefera gore mabogo a gagwe a nne nae go tlhomamisa bogosi mo seatleng sa gagwe." 
2Kings15:20 Mme Menaheme a kgethisa Baiseraele madi ao, e bong bahumi botlhe gore monna a le mongwe a nee kgosi ya Asiria dišekele di le 50 tsa selefera. Ke fa kgosi ya Asiria e boa, ya se ka ya nna mo lefatsheng la Baiseraele." 
2Kings15:21 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Menaheme le tsotlhe tse o neng a di dira kana di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa sebaka sa dikgosi tsa Iseraele. 
2Kings15:22 Mme Menaheme a robala le borraagwe, mme Phekaya morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Kings15:23 Phekaya morwa Menaheme o ne a simolola go busa Iseraele ka ngwaga wa 50 wa puso ya ga Asaria kgosi ya Juta; a busa dinyaga di le pedi kwa Samaria. 
2Kings15:24 A dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena; a se ka a tlogela maleo a ga Jerobeame morwa Nebate yo o neng a leofisa Baiseraele. 
2Kings15:25 Mme Pheka morwa Remalea mothusi wa gagwe wa motlhabani a mo tsosetsa moferefere, a mo fenya kwa Samaria mo kagong ya phemelo ya ntlo ya kgosi mmogo le Arekobe le Arie – Pheka ene a na le banna ba le 50 ba Gileate – a mmolaya, a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Kings15:26 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Phekaya le tsotlhe tse o neng a di dira kana di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa sebaka sa dikgosi tsa Iseraele. 
2Kings15:27 Pheka morwa Remalea o ne a simolola go busa Iseraele ka ngwaga wa 52 wa puso ya ga Asaria kgosi ya Juta; a busa dinyaga di le 20 kwa Samaria. 
2Kings15:28 A dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena; a se ka a tlogela maleo a ga Jerobeame morwa Nebate yo o neng a leofisa Baiseraele. 
2Kings15:29 Ka sebaka sa ga Pheka kgosi ya Iseraele ga tla Thigelathe-Philesere kgosi ya Asiria, a thopa Iyone le Abele-Bethe-Maaga le Janoa le Keteše le Hasore le Gileate le Galelea, e bong naga yotlhe ya Nafetale, a isa batho ba teng mo botshwarong kwa Asiria." 
2Kings15:30 Mme Hosea morwa Ela a tsosetsa Pheka morwa Remalea moferefere, a mo fenya a mmolaya, a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe ka ngwaga wa 20 wa puso ya ga Jothame morwa Usia." 
2Kings15:30 Mme Hosea morwa Ela a tsosetsa Pheka morwa Remalea moferefere, a mo fenya a mmolaya, a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe ka ngwaga wa 20 wa puso ya ga Jothame morwa Usia." 
2Kings15:31 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Pheka le tsotlhe tse o neng a di dira kana di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa sebaka sa dikgosi tsa Iseraele. 
2Kings15:32 Jothame morwa Usia kgosi ya Juta o ne a simolola go busa ka ngwaga wa bobedi wa puso ya ga Pheka morwa Remalea kgosi ya Iseraele. 
2Kings15:33 Ya re a simolola go busa, a bo a le dinyaga di le 25; a busa dinyaga di le 16 kwa Jerusalema. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Jeruša morwadia Satoke." 
2Kings15:34 A dira tse di siameng mo matlhong a Morena, a dira fela jaaka go dirile Usia rraagwe." 
2Kings15:35 Fela dithota tsa tlhabelo tsa se ka tsa tlosiwa; batho ba nna ba dira ditlhabelo le go tshuba maswalo mo dithoteng tsa tlhabelo. Ke ene yo o neng a aga kgoro ya Ntlo ya Morena e e bidiwang: E e kwa godimo. 
2Kings15:36 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Jothame le tsotlhe tse o neng a di dira kana di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa sebaka sa dikgosi tsa Juta. 
2Kings15:37 Ka metlha eo Morena a simolola go laela Resine kgosi ya Siria le Pheka morwa Remalea kgosi ya Iseraele gore ba tlhasele Juta. 
2Kings15:38 Mme Jothame a robala le borraagwe, a ba a fitlhwa fa go borraagwe mo motseng wa ga Dafita rraagwe, mme Ahase morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Kings16:1 Ahase morwa Jothame kgosi ya Juta o ne a simolola go busa ka ngwaga wa 17 wa puso ya ga Pheka morwa Remalea. 
2Kings16:2 Ya re a simolola go busa, a bo a le dinyaga di le 20, a busa dinyaga di le 16 kwa Jerusalema. A se ka a dira tse di siameng mo matlhong a Morena, Modimo wa gagwe, jaaka Dafita rraagwe mogolwagolwane." 
2Kings16:3 Mme a sepela mo tseleng ya dikgosi tsa Iseraele; le gona a ralatsa morwawe molelo ka fa makgapheng a baheitane, ba Morena o kileng a ba leleka fa pele ga Baiseraele." 
2Kings16:4 A dira ditlhabelo le go tshuba maswalo mo dithoteng tsa tlhabelo le mo dithabaneng le fa tlase ga setlhare sengwe le sengwe se setala. 
2Kings16:5 Ka metlha eo ga bolola Resine kgosi ya Siria le Pheka morwa Remalea kgosi ya Iseraele, ba ya kwa Jerusalema go tlhabana; ba dikanyetsa Ahase ka ntwa, mme ba palelwa ke go fenya." 
2Kings16:6 Ka sebaka seo Resine kgosi ya Siria a busetsa motse wa Elathe kwa Siria, a leleka Bajuta mo Elathe; ga tla Basiria kwa Elathe, ba nna teng go fitlha letsatsing la kajeno." 
2Kings16:7 Mme Ahase a roma barongwi kwa go Thigelathe-Philesere kgosi ya Asiria a re: “Ke motlhanka wa gago le morwao. Bolola, o nkgolole mo diatleng tsa kgosi ya Siria le mo diatleng tsa kgosi ya Iseraele tse di ntlhasetseng.”" 
2Kings16:8 Ahase o bile a tsere selefera le gouta tse di neng di fitlhelwa mo Ntlong ya Morena le mo mahumong a ntlo ya kgosi a di romela kgosi ya Asiria e le mpho. 
2Kings16:9 Kgosi ya Asiria ya utlwana nae, ya bolola, ya ya kwa Damaseko, ya mo thopa, ya isa batho ba teng mo botshwarong kwa Kire, ya bolaya Resine." 
2Kings16:10 Jaanong kgosi Ahase a ya go kgatlhantsha Thigelathe-Philesere kgosi ya Asiria kwa Damaseko. Ya re a sena go bona aletare e e neng e le kwa Damaseko, kgosi Ahase a romela setshwantsho sa aletare le sekao sa yona fela jaaka e ne e dirilwe kwa go moperesiti Uria." 
2Kings16:11 Ke fa moperesiti Uria a aga aletare eo fela jaaka a laetswe ke kgosi Ahase go tswa kwa Damaseko. Moperesiti a e dira jalo, kgosi Ahase a ise a boe kwa Damaseko." 
2Kings16:12 Ya re kgosi e goroga, e tswa kwa Damaseko, ya bona aletare, ya atamela kwa go yona, ya palamela mo mapalamong a yona," 
2Kings16:13 ya tshuba setlhabelo sa phiso sa yona le tshupelo ya dijo ya yona, ya tshela tshupelo ya noo ya yona, ya kgatsha madi a ditlhabelo tsa tebogo tsa yona mo aletareng." 
2Kings16:14 Mme aletare ya kgotlho e e neng e le fa pele ga Morena yona a e tlosa fa pele ga Ntlo ya Morena gore e se ka ya nna fa gare ga aletare ya gagwe le Ntlo ya Morena, a e baya ntlheng ya bokone ya aletare ya gagwe." 
2Kings16:15 Mme kgosi Ahase a mo laela, ene moperesiti Uria, a re: “Mo aletareng e kgolo e o tshube setlhabelo sa phiso sa mo mosong le tshupelo ya dijo ya maitsiboa le setlhabelo sa phiso sa kgosi le tshupelo ya dijo ya yona le setlhabelo sa phiso sa morafe otlhe wa lefatshe le tshupelo ya dijo le ya noo ya ona. Madi otlhe a setlhabelo sa phiso le madi otlhe a setlhabelo se sengwe o a kgatshe mo go yona. Ke tla bona se nka se dirang ka aletare ya kgotlho.”" 
2Kings16:16 Moperesiti Uria a dira fela jaaka kgosi Ahase e mo laetse. 
2Kings16:17 Le gona kgosi Ahase a kgaola dipati tsa ditlhakore tsa dikolotsana tsa tlhatswetso, a tlosa megopo mo go tsona; a ba a folosa lewatle mo dikgomong tsa kgotlho tse di neng di le rwele, a le baya mo mannong a a agilweng ka mafika." 
2Kings16:18 A ba a sutisa tsela ya Sabata e e ruletsweng ka leobo le ba neng ba le agile fa Ntlong ya Morena le botseno jwa kgosi jwa ka kwa ntle jwa go ya kwa Ntlong ya Morena ka ntlha ya kgosi ya Asiria. 
2Kings16:19 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Ahase le tse o neng a di dira kana di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa sebaka sa dikgosi tsa Juta. 
2Kings16:20 Mme Ahase a robala le borraagwe a ba a fitlhwa fa go borraagwe mo motseng wa ga Dafita, mme Hesekia morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Kings17:1 Hosea morwa Ela o na a simolola go busa Iseraele kwa Samaria ka ngwaga wa 12 wa puso ya ga Ahase kgosi ya Juta; a busa dinyaga di le robongwe. 
2Kings17:1 Hosea morwa Ela o na a simolola go busa Iseraele kwa Samaria ka ngwaga wa 12 wa puso ya ga Ahase kgosi ya Juta; a busa dinyaga di le robongwe. 
2Kings17:2 O ne a dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena, fela e seng jaaka dikgosi tsa Iseraele tse di neng di le teng pele ga gagwe." 
2Kings17:3 Mme Salemanesere kgosi ya Asiria ya mmololela, mme Hosea a nna motlhanka wa yona, a e ntshetsa lekgetho." 
2Kings17:3 Mme Salemanesere kgosi ya Asiria ya mmololela, mme Hosea a nna motlhanka wa yona, a e ntshetsa lekgetho." 
2Kings17:4 Mme e rile kgosi ya Asiria e bona moferefere mo go Hosea, ka a ne a romile barongwi kwa go So, kgosi ya Egepeto, mme a sa tlhole a ntshetsa kgosi ya Asiria lekgetho jaaka a ne a dira ka ngwaga le ngwaga, kgosi ya Asiria ya mo tshwara ya mo tlhatlhela mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, ya mmofelela teng." 
2Kings17:4 Mme e rile kgosi ya Asiria e bona moferefere mo go Hosea, ka a ne a romile barongwi kwa go So, kgosi ya Egepeto, mme a sa tlhole a ntshetsa kgosi ya Asiria lekgetho jaaka a ne a dira ka ngwaga le ngwaga, kgosi ya Asiria ya mo tshwara ya mo tlhatlhela mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, ya mmofelela teng." 
2Kings17:5 Kgosi ya Asiria ya ba ya bolola ya ralala lefatshe lotlhe, ya bololela motse wa Samaria, ya o dikanyetsa ka ntwa dinyaga di le tharo." 
2Kings17:6 Ka ngwaga wa robongwe wa puso ya ga Hosea kgosi ya Asiria ya thopa Samaria, ya isa Baiseraele mo botshwarong kwa Asiria, ya ba baya kwa Hala le fa Habore noka ya Gosane le mo metseng ya Media." 
2Kings17:6 Ka ngwaga wa robongwe wa puso ya ga Hosea kgosi ya Asiria ya thopa Samaria, ya isa Baiseraele mo botshwarong kwa Asiria, ya ba baya kwa Hala le fa Habore noka ya Gosane le mo metseng ya Media." 
2Kings17:7 Ga dirafala jalo, gonne Baiseraele ba ne ba leofetse Morena, Modimo wa bone, o o neng o ba ntshitse kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto mo taolong ya ga Farao kgosi ya Egepeto, mme ba boifa medimo e sele." 
2Kings17:8 Baiseraele ba sepela ka fa mekgweng ya ditšhaba tse Morena o neng a di lelekile fa pele ga bone le ka fa mekgweng ya dikgosi tsa Iseraele e di neng di na nayo. 
2Kings17:9 Baiseraele ba dira dilo sephiring tse di ronang Morena, Modimo wa bone; ba ikagela dithota tsa tlhabelo mo metseng yotlhe ya bone, le fa e le motsana wa lonaka lwa balebedi fela gongwe e le motse o o femetsweng." 
2Kings17:10 Ba itlhomela majwe a a motloutlo le medimako ya Ašera mo thabaneng nngwe le nngwe e e godimo le fa tlase ga setlhare sengwe le sengwe se setala. 
2Kings17:11 Ba tshuba maswalo teng mo dithoteng tsotlhe tsa tlhabelo jaaka baheitane, ba Morena o neng a ba lelekile fa pele ga bone; ba dira dilo tse di bosula, e le go gakatsa Morena." 
2Kings17:12 Ba direla medimo e e maila e Morena o neng a ba laetse ka ga yona a re: “Lo se ka lwa dira selo se!” 
2Kings17:13 Mme Morena o ne a tlhagisa Baiseraele le Bajuta ka baporofeti botlhe le ka baboni botlhe a re: “Boang lo tlogele ditsela tsa lona tse di bosula, lo tshegetse ditaolo tsa me le melao ya me ka fa molaong otlhe o ke o laetseng borraeno o ke o rometseng kwa go lona ka baporofeti, batlhanka ba me.”" 
2Kings17:14 Fela ba se ka ba utlwa, mme ba gagamatsa dithamo tsa bone jaaka dithamo tsa borraabo ba ba neng ba sa dumele mo Moreneng, Modimo wa bone." 
2Kings17:15 Ba nyatsa melao ya gagwe le kgolagano ya gagwe e o neng a e dirile le borraabo le ditshupo tsa gagwe tse o ba tlhagisitseng ka tsona; ba latela medimo e e seng ya sepe, ba be ba fetoga ba e seng ba sepe; ba latela baheitane ba ba mo tikologong ya bone ba Morena o neng a ba laetse ka ga bone gore ba se ka ba ba etsa." 
2Kings17:16 Mme ba tlogela ditaolo tsotlhe tsa Morena, Modimo wa bone, ba itirela dinamane tse pedi tse di bopilweng, ba dira setshwantsho sa Ašera, ba obamela lesomo lotlhe la legodimo, ba direla Baale." 
2Kings17:17 Bomorwaa-bone le bomorwadia-bone ba ba ralatsa molelo, ba dira tsa boitseanape le tsa botlhodi, ba ineela go dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena go mo gakatsa." 
2Kings17:18 Ka moo Morena a tukela Baiseraele bogale thata, a ba tlosa fa pele ga sefatlhego sa gagwe; ga se ka ga sala ope fa e se lotso lwa Juta lo le losi fela." 
2Kings17:19 Le Bajuta ba se ka ba tshegetsa ditaolo tsa Morena, Modimo wa bone, mme ba sepela ka fa mekgweng e Baiseraele ba e dirileng." 
2Kings17:20 Ka moo Morena a latlha losika lotlhe lwa Baiseraele, a ba kokobetsa, a ba neela mo diatleng tsa bathukhuthi ga tsamaya a ba leleka fa pele ga gagwe." 
2Kings17:21 Gonne Morena o ne a gagotse Baiseraele mo ntlong ya ga Dafita, mme ba dira Jerobeame morwa Nebate kgosi, mme a faposa Baiseraele mo Moreneng, a ba leofisa boleo jo bogolo." 
2Kings17:22 Baiseraele ba ne ba sepela mo maleong otlhe a ga Jerobeame a o neng a a dira, ba se ka ba a tlogela," 
2Kings17:23 ga tsamaya Morena a tlosa Baiseraele fa pele ga sefatlhego sa gagwe jaaka a ne a bôpa ka batlhanka botlhe ba gagwe e bong baporofeti. Baiseraele ba ne ba ntshiwa jalo mo nageng ya bone, ba isiwa botshwarong kwa Asiria, ba nna teng go fitlha letsatsing leno." 
2Kings17:24 Kgosi ya Asiria ya tlisa batho ba Babele le ba Khutha le ba Awa le ba Hamathe le ba Sefarwaime, ya ba baya mo metseng ya Samaria boemong jwa Baiseraele, mme ba rua Samaria, ba nna mo metseng ya teng." 
2Kings17:25 Mme e rile ba simolola go nna teng, ba bo ba sa itse Morena; ke fa Morena a romela ditau kwa go bone, tsa nna tsa bolaya bangwe ba bone." 
2Kings17:26 Kgosi ya Asiria ya bolelelwa ga twe: “Ba ditšhaba ba o ba hudusitseng, wa ba baya mo metseng ya Samaria, ga ba itse tse di tshwanetseng Modimo wa lefatshe lele; ka moo o rometse ditau kwa go bone. Bona, di a ba bolaya, ka ba sa itse tse di tshwanetseng Modimo wa lefatshe lele.”" 
2Kings17:27 Ke fa kgosi ya Asiria e laela e re: “Isang mongwe wa baperesiti teng, ba lo ba tlositseng gona gore a ye a nne teng, a ba rute tse di tshwanetseng Modimo wa lefatshe lele.”" 
2Kings17:28 Mongwe wa baperesiti ba ba neng ba tlositswe mo Samaria a tla jalo, a nna kwa Bethele, a nna a ba ruta ka fa ba tshwanetseng go boifa Morena ka teng." 
2Kings17:29 Mme setšhaba sengwe le sengwe sa itirela modimo wa sona, sa o baya mo ditempeleng tsa dithota tsa tlhabelo tse Basamaria ba neng ba di dirile, setšhaba sengwe le sengwe mo metseng ya sona e se neng se agile mo go yona:" 
2Kings17:30 Banna ba Babele ba dira setshwantsho sa Sukothe-Benothe, banna ba Khutha ba dira sa Neregale, banna ba Hamathe ba dira sa Ašima," 
2Kings17:31 ba Awa ba dira sa Nibehase le sa Tharethake, ba Sefarwaime ba fisetsa Ateramelege le Anamelege medimo ya Sefarwaime bana ba bone ka molelo." 
2Kings17:32 Ba bile ba boifa Morena, ba ipeela baperesiti ba dithota tsa tlhabelo ba ba tswang mo go bone botlhe; bao ba ba direla mo ditempeleng tsa dithota tsa tlhabelo." 
2Kings17:33 Ba ne ba boifa Morena, ba bile ba direla medimo ya ga bone ka fa mokgweng wa ditšhaba tse ba neng ba hudusitswe mo go tsona." 
2Kings17:34 Go fitlha letsatsing leno ba dira ka fa mekgweng ya pele. Ga ba boife Morena ka botlalo; le gona ga ba dire ka fa melaong ya bone le ka fa mokgweng wa bone ka botlalo; le e seng ka fa molaong le ka fa ditaolong tse Morena o neng a di laela bomorwa Jakobe yo a neng a mo taya leina la Iseraele. 
2Kings17:35 Kana Morena o kile a dira kgolagano nabo, a ba laela a re: “Se boifeng medimo e sele le e seng go e obamela le e seng go e direla le e seng go e tlhabela." 
2Kings17:36 Mme lo boife Morena yo o lo ntshitseng kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto ka thata e kgolo le ka letsogo le le otlologileng, lo mo obamele lo mo tlhabele." 
2Kings17:37 Lo tshegetse melaetsa le ditshwanelo le molao le taolo tse o di lo kwaletseng go dira ka tsona ka metlha yotlhe, mme se boifeng medimo e sele." 
2Kings17:38 Le gona lo se ka lwa lebala kgolagano e ke e dirileng le lona, mme lo se boife medimo e sele." 
2Kings17:39 Mme lo boife Morena, Modimo wa lona; ene o tla lo golola mo diatleng tsa baba botlhe ba lona.”" 
2Kings17:40 Fela ba se ka ba utlwa, mme ba nna ba dira ka fa mokgweng wa bone wa pele." 
2Kings17:41 Ditšhaba tseo tsa nna tsa boifa Morena, tsa ba tsa nna tsa direla medimo ya diseto ya ga bone. Le bana ba bone le bana ba bana ba bone ba dira le kajeno jaaka go dirile borraabo." 
2Kings18:1 Hesekia morwa Ahase kgosi ya Juta o ne a simolola go busa ka ngwaga wa boraro wa puso ya ga Hosea morwa Ela, kgosi ya Iseraele." 
2Kings18:1 Hesekia morwa Ahase kgosi ya Juta o ne a simolola go busa ka ngwaga wa boraro wa puso ya ga Hosea morwa Ela, kgosi ya Iseraele." 
2Kings18:2 Ya re a simolola go busa, a bo a le dinyaga di le 25; a busa dinyaga di le 29 kwa Jerusalema. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Abi morwadia Sagaria." 
2Kings18:3 A dira tse di siameng mo matlhong a Morena fela jaaka go dirile Dafita rraagwe mogolwagolwane. 
2Kings18:4 Ke ene yo o neng a tlosa dithota tsa tlhabelo, a thubaganya majwe a a motloutlo, a rema medimako ya Ašera, a pšhwetlakanya noga ya kgotlho e Moše o kileng a e dira; gonne go fitlha metlheng ele Baiseraele ba nna ba e tshubela maswalo, mme e ne e bidiwa Nehušethane." 
2Kings18:5 O ne a ikanya Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, mme go se na ope mo dikgosing tsotlhe tsa Juta yo o tshwanang nae, le fa e le tse di mo latetseng gongwe tse di neng di le teng pele ga gagwe." 
2Kings18:6 O ne a ineela Moreneng, a sa fapoge mo go ene, a tshegetsa ditaolo tsa gagwe tse Morena o di laetseng Moše." 
2Kings18:7 Mme Morena o ne a na nae; mo go tsotlhe tse o neng a ya go di dira a nna tlhogonolo; a tswa mo kgosing ya Asiria, a se ka a e direla." 
2Kings18:8 A fenya Bafelesita go fitlha kwa Gasa le dinageng tsa teng; a simolola ka dinaka tsa balebedi, a khutla ka motse o o femetsweng." 
2Kings18:9 Ka ngwaga wa bone wa puso ya kgosi Hesekia o e leng ngwaga wa bosupa wa puso ya ga Hosea morwa Ela kgosi ya Iseraele Salemanesere kgosi ya Asiria ya bololela Samaria, ya mo dikanyetsa ka ntwa," 
2Kings18:9 Ka ngwaga wa bone wa puso ya kgosi Hesekia o e leng ngwaga wa bosupa wa puso ya ga Hosea morwa Ela kgosi ya Iseraele Salemanesere kgosi ya Asiria ya bololela Samaria, ya mo dikanyetsa ka ntwa," 
2Kings18:10 ya mo thopa morago ga dinyaga di le tharo. E ne e le ka ngwaga wa borataro wa puso ya ga Hesekia o e leng ngwaga wa robongwe wa puso ya ga Hosea kgosi ya Iseraele fa Samaria a thopiwa. 
2Kings18:10 ya mo thopa morago ga dinyaga di le tharo. E ne e le ka ngwaga wa borataro wa puso ya ga Hesekia o e leng ngwaga wa robongwe wa puso ya ga Hosea kgosi ya Iseraele fa Samaria a thopiwa. 
2Kings18:11 Jaanong kgosi ya Asiria ya isa Baiseraele botshwarong kwa Asiria, ya ba baya kwa Hala le fa Habore, noka ya Gosane, le kwa metseng ya Media." 
2Kings18:12 E ne e le ka gore ga ba a ka ba utlwa lentswe la Morena, Modimo wa bone, mme ba tlola kgolagano ya gagwe, e bong tsotlhe tse Moše motlhanka wa Morena o neng a di ba laetse. Ba se ka ba di utlwa le e seng go di dirisa." 
2Kings18:13 Ka ngwaga wa 14 wa puso ya kgosi Hesekia Saneheribe kgosi ya Asiria a bololela metse yotlhe e e femetsweng ya Juta, a ba a e thopa." 
2Kings18:14 Ke fa Hesekia kgosi ya Juta a romela lefoko kwa kgosing ya Asiria kwa Lagiše a re: “Ke leofile. Boa o ntlogele. Se o se nthwesang ke tla se rwala.” Mme kgosi ya Asiria ya lefisa Hesekia kgosi ya Juta ditalente di le 300 tsa selefera le ditalente di le 30 tsa gouta. 
2Kings18:15 Jaanong Hesekia a ntsha selefera yotlhe e e mo Ntlong ya Morena le mo mahumong a ntlo ya bogosi. 
2Kings18:16 Ka sebaka seo Hesekia a kgakgamolola gouta mo ditswalong tsa Tempele ya Morena le mo maotwaneng a tsona a Hesekia kgosi ya Juta o neng a a manegile, a e neela kgosi ya Asiria." 
2Kings18:17 Kgosi ya Asiria e kile ya roma molaodi yo mogolo wa mephato le mookamedi wa badiredi ba lapa la kgosi le mothoki yo mogolo kwa go kgosi Hesekia kwa Jerusalema, ba na le mephato e megolo ya batlhabani ba tswa kwa Lagiše; ba tlhaga ba fitlha kwa Jerusalema; ya re ba tlhaga ba fitlha, ba ema fa moseleng wa letsha le le kwa godimo fa tseleng ya tshimo ya motlhatswi wa masela," 
2Kings18:18 ba bitsa kgosi. Ke fa Eliakime morwa Hilekia yo e leng mookamedi wa lelapa la kgosi le Sebena mokwaledi le Joa morwa Asafe letsogo la kgosi ba tswela kwa go bone. 
2Kings18:19 Mme mothoki yo mogolo a ba raya a re: “A ko lo botse Hesekia lo re: ‘Kgosi e kgolo kgosi ya Asiria e bua jaana e a re: Ke eng se o se ikanyang se se ikanyegang? 
2Kings18:20 A wena o a re: Go bua mafoko fela ke one maano le thata ya ntwa? Jaanong he, o ikanya mang, fa o ntsogetse?" 
2Kings18:21 Bona he, o ikanya seikokotlelo seo sa lotlhaka lo lo pšhwetlegileng sa Egepeto, lo e ka reng fa motho a ikaega ka lone, lwa mo tsena mo seatleng lwa se phunya: Farao, kgosi ya Egepeto e direla botlhe jalo ba ba e ikanyang." 
2Kings18:22 “ ‘Mme fa lo ka nthaya lo a re: “Re ikanya Morena, Modimo wa rona” – a ga se ona o Hesekia o tlositseng dithota tsa tlhabelo tsa ona le dialetare tsa ona, a raya Juta le Jerusalema a re: “Obamelang fela fa pele ga aletare e mono Jerusalema”?" 
2Kings18:23 Mme jaanong a ko o dire peelano le morena wa me kgosi ya Asiria: Ke tla go naya dipitse di le dikete tse pedi fa o ka kgona go ntsha bapalami ba tsona. 
2Kings18:24 Mme o ka leleka jang batlhasedi ba molaodi a le mongwe fela wa batlhanka ba babotlana ba morena wa me? Kampo a o ikanya Egepeto ka ntlha ya dikoloi tsa ntwa le ka ntlha ya bapalami ba dipitse? 
2Kings18:25 Jaanong a o a re, ke bololetse go senya golo mono ke sa laelwa ke Morena? Nnyaya! Morena o ntheile a re: Bololela lefatshe leo, o le senye!’ ”" 
2Kings18:26 Ke fa Eliakime morwa Hilekia le Sebena le Joa ba raya mothoki yo mogolo ba re: “A ko o bue le batlhanka ba gago ka Sesiria, gonne re a se utlwa. Se bue le rona ka Sejuta mo ditsebeng tsa batho ba ba mo loboteng.”" 
2Kings18:27 Mme mothoki yo mogolo a ba fetola a re: “A morena wa me o nthomile kwa moreneng wa gago le kwano go wena go bua mafoko a? A ga a nthoma kwa banneng ba ba ntseng mo loboteng gore ba je mantle a bone, ba nwe moroto wa bone mmogo le lona?”" 
2Kings18:28 Mothoki yo mogolo a ba a ema fa gaufi, a kua ka kodu e e kwa godimo ka Sejuta, a bua a re: “Utlwang lefoko la kgosi e kgolo la kgosi ya Asiria!" 
2Kings18:29 Kgosi e buile jaana ya re: ‘A Hesekia a se ka a lo tsietsa! Gonne ga a kgone go lo pholosa mo seatleng sa yona. 
2Kings18:30 Le gona a Hesekia a se ka a lo ikanyisa Morena ka go re: Ruri, Morena o tla re pholosa. Motse o ga o nke o neelwa mo seatleng sa kgosi ya Asiria.’" 
2Kings18:31 Lo se ka lwa utlwa Hesekia! Gonne kgosi ya Asiria e bua jaana e a re: ‘Agisanyang le nna, lo tswele kwano go nna. Foo mongwe le mongwe wa lona o tla ja moweine wa gagwe le mofeie wa gagwe le go nwa metsi a sediba sa gagwe" 
2Kings18:32 go fitlhelela ke tle ke lo tseele kwa lefatsheng le le tshwanang le lefatshe la lona; kwa lefatsheng la mabele le matute a moweine, kwa lefatsheng la bogobe le masimo a moweine, kwa lefatsheng la lookwane lwa ditlhare tsa olefa le mafura a dinotshe. Foo lo tla phela, mme lo sa swe. Lo se ka lwa utlwa Hesekia; gonne o lo aketsa ka go re: Morena o tla re pholosa." 
2Kings18:33 A tota mongwe wa medimo ya ditšhaba o kile wa pholosa lefatshe la ona mo seatleng sa kgosi ya Asiria? 
2Kings18:34 E kae medimo ya Hamathe le ya Arephate? E kae medimo ya Sefarwaime le ya Hena le ya Iwa? A e ne ya pholosa Samaria mo seatleng sa me? 
2Kings18:35 Ke efe medimo mo medimong yotlhe ya mafatshe e e kileng ya pholosa mafatshe a yona mo seatleng sa me, fa lo re: Morena o tla pholosa Jerusalema mo seatleng sa me’?”" 
2Kings18:36 Mme banna ba didimala fela, ba se ka ba mo fetola ka lefoko lepe. Gonne taelo ya kgosi e ne e re: “Lo se ka lwa mo araba!”" 
2Kings18:37 Ke fa Eliakime morwa Hilekia yo e leng mookamedi wa lelapa la kgosi le Sebena mokwaledi le Joa morwa Asafe letsogo la kgosi ba tla kwa go Hesekia ba ikgagotse diaparo, ba mo itsise mafoko a mothoki yo mogolo." 
2Kings19:1 E rile kgosi Hesekia a utlwa, a ikgagola diaparo, a apara diaparo tsa khutsafalo, a ya kwa Ntlong ya Morena." 
2Kings19:2 A ba a roma Eliakime yo e leng mookamedi wa lelapa la kgosi le Sebena mokwaledi le bagolo ba baperesiti ba apere diaparo tsa khutsafalo kwa go moporofeti Jesaya morwa Amotse. 
2Kings19:3 Mme ba mo raya ba re: “Hesekia o bua jaana a re: ‘Letsatsi le ke letsatsi la tlalelo le kotlo le kgalo; gonne bana ba gaufi le go tsalwa, mme ga go na thata ya go ka belega." 
2Kings19:4 Go gongwe Morena, Modimo wa gago, o tla utlwa mafoko otlhe a mothoki yo mogolo yo o romilweng ke morena wa gagwe, kgosi ya Asiria, gore a tle go kgala Modimo o o phelang; a mmeletsa mafoko a Morena, Modimo wa gago, o a utlwileng. Jaanong a ko o rapelele masalela a a sa ntseng a le teng.’ ”" 
2Kings19:5 Jaanong ya re batlhanka ba kgosi Hesekia ba fitlha kwa go Jesaya. 
2Kings19:6 Jesaya a ba raya a re: “Rayang morena wa lona lo re: ‘Morena o bua jaana a re: Se boife mafoko a o a utlwileng a basimane ba kgosi ya Asiria ba ntlhapaditseng ka ona. 
2Kings19:7 Bone, ke tla tsenya mowa mo go yona gore e utlwe modumo, e boele kwa lefatsheng la yona. Ke tla ba ke e diga ka tšhaka mo lefatsheng la yona.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Ya re mothoki yo mogolo a boa, a fitlhela kgosi ya Asiria e tlhasela Lebena; gonne o ne a utlwile gore e tlogile kwa Lagiše." 
2Kings19:9 Ya re Saneheribe a utlwa go twe: “Bona, Thirehaka kgosi ya Ethiopia e bolotse go tlhabana nao!” a boa a roma barongwi gape kwa go Hesekia a re:" 
2Kings19:10 “Rayang Hesekia kgosi ya Juta lo re: ‘A Modimo wa gago o se ka wa go tsietsa o ò o ikanyang o re: Jerusalema ga a nke a neelwa mo seatleng sa kgosi ya Asiria. 
2Kings19:11 Bona, o utlwile ka wesi se dikgosi tsa Asiria di se diretseng mafatshe aotlhe, tsa a senya gotlhe. A o a re, wena o ka phologa?" 
2Kings19:12 A medimo ya ditšhaba tse borre ba di nyeleditseng e ne ya di pholosa, e bong Gosane le Harane le Resefe le batho ba Etene ba ba neng ba le kwa Thelasare?" 
2Kings19:13 E kae kgosi ya Hamathe le kgosi ya Arephate le kgosi ya motse wa Sefarwaime le ya Hena le ya Iwa?’ ” 
2Kings19:14 Ya re Hesekia a sena go amogela lokwalo mo diatleng tsa barongwi le go lo buisa, a ya kwa Ntlong ya Morena, a lo phutholola fa pele ga Morena." 
2Kings19:15 Hesekia a ba a rapela fa pele ga Morena a re: “Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, yo o ntseng godimo ga boKerubime. Ke wena Modimo o le wesi fela wa magosi aotlhe a lefatshe. Wena o dirile legodimo le lefatshe." 
2Kings19:16 Morena, sekega tsebe, o utlwe! Morena, budulola matlho, o bone! Utlwa mafoko a ga Saneheribe a o a rometseng go kgala Modimo o o phelang." 
2Kings19:17 Ke nnete, Morena, dikgosi tsa Asiria di sentse ditšhaba le mafatshe a tsona," 
2Kings19:18 tsa latlhela medimo ya tsona mo molelong, tsa e nyeletsa; gonne e ne e se medimo, e ne e le tiro ya diatla tsa batho, e le dikgong le majwe fela." 
2Kings19:19 Jaanong, Morena, Modimo wa rona, a ko o re golole mo seatleng sa gagwe gore magosi otlhe a lefatshe a tle a itse, fa wena Morena o le Modimo o le wesi.”" 
2Kings19:20 Ke fa Jesaya morwa Amotse a romela lefoko kwa go Hesekia a re: “Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana o a re: ‘Se o se nthapetseng ka ntlha ya ga Saneheribe kgosi ya Asiria ke se utlwile." 
2Kings19:21 Lefoko le Morena o le buang ka ga gagwe ke le le reng: Lekgarebe, morwadia Sione o a go nyatsa, o a go sotla; morwadia Jerusalema o thukhutha tlhogo fa morago ga gago." 
2Kings19:22 O kgadile mang? O kgobile mang? O tlhatloseditse mang lentswe? O tsholeleditse mang matlho kwa godimo? Ke Moitshepi wa Iseraele! 
2Kings19:23 O kgadile Morena ka batlhanka ba gago wa re: Ke palame ditlhoa tsa dithaba ka bontsi jwa dikoloi tsa me tsa ntwa le mafelelelo a Lebanone; ka rema mesetere e megolo le mesiperese e mentle ya teng, ka fitlha kwa borobalelong jwa bofelo jwa teng kwa sekgweng sa tshimo ya ditlhare sa teng." 
2Kings19:24 Ke epile, ka nwa metsi a mafatshe a sele; ka kgadisa dinoka tsotlhe tsa Egepeto ka kgato ya dinao tsa me." 
2Kings19:25 “ ‘A ga o a ka wa utlwa? Tse ke di dirafaditseng jaanong ga ke bolo go di akanya le go di ikaelela bogologolo, gore wena o senye metse e e femetsweng e fetoge mekoa ya marope." 
2Kings19:26 Mme baagi ba yona ba ne ba repa mabogo, ba tshoga, ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong, ba nna jaaka morogo wa naga le jaaka botalana jo bošwa le jaaka bojang jo bo mo dithulelong le jaaka mabele a a swang ka mongadule a ise a ntshe ditlhaka." 
2Kings19:27 “ ‘Ke itse go nna ga gago le go tswa ga gago le go tsena ga gago le ka fa o ntsogelang ka loratla ka teng. 
2Kings19:28 Jaanong e re ka o ntsogela ka loratla, e re ka boikgantsho jwa gago bo utlwetse mo ditsebeng tsa me, ke tla tsenya mogolasetso wa me mo dinkong tsa gago le mogala wa me mo molomong wa gago, ke go busetsa kwa morago ka tsela e o tsileng ka yona.’" 
2Kings19:29 “Mme se e tla nnang sesupo mo go wena, Hesekia, ke se: Monongwaga go tla jewa se se ijwetseng; isago matshwabudu, mme ka ngwaga wa boraro lo jwale, lo robe, lo leme masimo a moweine, lo je maungo a ona." 
2Kings19:30 Mme masalela a Bajuta a a falotseng a tla namela medi kwa tlase, a ungwa maungo kwa godimo." 
2Kings19:31 Gonne masalela a tla tswa mo Jerusalema le ba ba falotseng mo thabeng ya Sione. Tlhoafalo ya Morena wa masomosomo e tla dira jalo. 
2Kings19:32 “Ke ka moo Morena a buang jaana ka ga kgosi ya Asiria a re: ‘Ga e ka ke ya tsena mo motseng o le e seng go hulela motsu mo teng; ga e ka ke ya o atamela ka thebe le e seng go dira mapalamo ka mmu fa go ona. 
2Kings19:33 E tla boa ka tsela e e tsileng ka yona. Ga e kitla e tsena mo motseng o, go bua Morena." 
2Kings19:34 Gonne ke tla sireletsa motse o, ke o pholosa ka ntlha ya me le ka ntlha ya ga Dafita motlhanka wa me.’ ”" 
2Kings19:35 Ya re bosigo joo moengele wa Morena a bolola, a itaya banna ba le dikete di le 185 mo bothibelelong jwa Baasiria. Ya re ba phakela ka moso, ba fitlhela botlhe bao e le ditoto fela." 
2Kings19:36 Foo Saneheribe kgosi ya Asiria ya bothologa, ya tsamaya, ya boela kwa gae, ya nna mo Ninife." 
2Kings19:37 Jaanong ya re a obamela mo tempeleng ya ga Niseroge modimo wa gagwe, a bolawa ke Ateramelege le Saresere bomorwawe ka tšhaka. Ba tloga ba tshabela kwa lefatsheng la Ararate, mme Esarehatone morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Kings20:1 Mo metlheng eo Hesekia o ne a lwala lwa go swa. Ke fa moporofeti Jesaya morwa Amotse a tla kwa go ene, a mo raya a re: “Morena o bua jaana a re: ‘Laela ba lapa la gago! Gonne o tla swa, ga o kitla o phela.’ ”" 
2Kings20:2 Ke fa Hesekia a gadimela kwa loboteng, a rapela Morena a re:" 
2Kings20:3 “Ao, Morena, a ko o gakologelwa ka fa ke sepetseng ka teng fa pele ga gago ka boammaaruri le ka pelo yotlhe, ka dira tse di molemo mo matlhong a gago.” Hesekia a ba a lela thata." 
2Kings20:4 Mme ya re Jesaya a ise a tswe lapeng le le fa gare, lefoko la Morena la fitlha kwa go ene la re:" 
2Kings20:5 “Boa o ree Hesekia, moeteledipele wa morafe wa me, o re: ‘Morena, Modimo wa ga Dafita rraago, o bua jaana o a re: Ke utlwile thapelo ya gago, ka bona dikeledi tsa gago. Bona, ke tla go fodisa. O tla tlhatlogela kwa Ntlong ya Morena ka letsatsi la boraro." 
2Kings20:6 Ke tla okeletsa malatsi a gago dinyaga di le 15. Le gona ke tla go pholosa mmogo le motse o mo seatleng sa kgosi ya Asiria, ke femela motse o ka ntlha ya me le ka ntlha ya ga Dafita motlhanka wa me.’ ”" 
2Kings20:7 Jesaya a ba a re: “Tlisang molemo o o tutetsang wa difeie.” Ya re ba o tlisa le go o baya mo tlhagaleng, a fola." 
2Kings20:8 Mme Hesekia a botsa Jesaya a re: “Sesupo sa gore Morena o tla mphodisa le sa gore ke tla tlhatlogela kwa Ntlong ya Morena ka letsatsi la boraro, ke eng?”" 
2Kings20:9 Jesaya a re: “Sesupo sa gago se se tswang mo Moreneng sa gore Morena o tla dirafatsa se a se buileng, ke se: Itlhophele: A moriti o fetele pele dikgato di le some gongwe o boele kwa morago dikgato di le some?”" 
2Kings20:10 Hesekia a re: “Go botlhofo mo moriting go fetela pele dikgato di le some; nnyaya, a moriti o boele kwa morago dikgato di le some.”" 
2Kings20:11 Ke fa moporofeti Jesaya a rapela Morena, mme Morena a busetsa moriti kwa morago dikgato di le some tse o setseng o di fetile mo go sesupa-nako sa ga Ahase." 
2Kings20:12 Ya re ka sebaka seo Berotage-Balatane morwa Balatane kgosi ya Babele a romela dikwalo le dineo kwa go Hesekia; gonne o ne a utlwile fa Hesekia a ne a lwala. 
2Kings20:13 Hesekia a itumelela barongwi, a ba bontsha ntlo yotlhe ya mahumo, e bong selefera le gouta le makga le lookwane lo lo molemo le ntlo ya marumo a gagwe le dilo tsotlhe tse di leng teng mo mahumong a gagwe; go se na sepe se Hesekia a se kang a se ba bontsha mo ntlong ya gagwe le mo pusong yotlhe ya gagwe." 
2Kings20:14 Ke fa moporofeti Jesaya a tla kwa go kgosi Hesekia a mmotsa a re: “Ba tlile kwa go nna ba tswa kwa lefatsheng le le kgakala la Babele.” 
2Kings20:15 A ba a botsa a re: “Ba bonyeng mo ntlong ya gago?” Hesekia a araba a re: “Ba bonye tsotlhe tse di mo ntlong ya me. Ga go na sepe mo mahumong a me se ke sa se ba bontshang.” 
2Kings20:16 Ke fa Jesaya a raya Hesekia a re: “Utlwa lefoko la Morena! 
2Kings20:17 Bona, malatsi a tla tla mogang tsotlhe tse di mo ntlong ya gago le tse borraago ba di phuthileng go fitlha kajeno di isiwang kwa Babele go sa tlogelwe sepe, go bua Morena." 
2Kings20:18 Mme ba tla tsaya bangwe ba bana ba gago, ba ba tla tswang mo go wena, ba o tla ba tsalang, mme e tla nna batlhanka mo ntlong ya borena ya kgosi ya Babele.”" 
2Kings20:19 Ke fa Hesekia a raya Jesaya a re: “Lefoko la Morena le o le buileng le molemo.” A ba a re: “Kana ga se sepe, fa go le kagiso le boikanyego mo malatsing a me.”" 
2Kings20:20 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Hesekia le ditiro tsotlhe tsa gagwe tsa bopelokgale le jaaka a ne a dira letamo le mosele, a tlisa metsi mo motseng, kana di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa sebaka sa dikgosi tsa Juta." 
2Kings20:21 Mme Hesekia a robala le borraagwe, mme Manase morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Kings21:1 E rile Manase a simolola go busa, a bo a le dinyaga di le 15; a busa dinyaga di le 55 kwa Jerusalema. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Hefesiba." 
2Kings21:2 A dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena tse di tshwanang le makgapha a baheitane ba Morena o neng a ba lelekile fa pele ga Baiseraele. 
2Kings21:3 A tsosa dithota tsa tlhabelo tse Hesekia rraagwe o neng a di sentse; a agela Baale dialetare, a dira Ašera jaaka go dirile Ahabe kgosi ya Iseraele; a ba a obamela lesomo lotlhe la legodimo a le direla." 
2Kings21:4 Le gona a aga dialetare tse di ntseng jalo mo Ntlong ya Morena e Morena o neng a buile ka ga yona a re: “Ke tla baya leina la me mo Jerusalema.” 
2Kings21:5 O bile a agela lesomo lotlhe la legodimo dialetare mo malapeng a mabedi a Ntlo ya Morena. 
2Kings21:6 A ralatsa morwawe molelo, a dira tsa mereo ya boloi le tsa botlhodi, a tlhoma ba ba buang le baswi le baitseanape a dira tse dintsi tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena, a mo gakatsa." 
2Kings21:7 Le gona a baya setshwantsho sa ga Ašera se o neng a se dirile mo Ntlong e Morena o neng a buile ka ga yona le Dafita le Salomo morwawe a re: “Mo Ntlong e le mo Jerusalema yo ke mo tlhophileng mo ditsong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele ke fa ke tla bayang leina la me teng ka bosakhutleng. 
2Kings21:8 Le gona ga nkitla ke tlhola ke kgarakgatsha dinao tsa Baiseraele gore ba tswe mo lefatsheng le ke le neileng borraabo. Ke raya fela fa ba tlhokomela go dira tsotlhe tse ke di ba laetseng, e bong ka fa molaong otlhe o Moše motlhanka wa me o neng a o ba laela.”" 
2Kings21:9 Mme ba se ka ba utlwa, mme Manase a ba timetsa gore ba dire bosula bogolo go baheitane, ba Morena o neng a ba nyeleditse fa pele ga Baiseraele." 
2Kings21:10 Ke fa Morena a bua ka baporofeti batlhanka ba gagwe a re: 
2Kings21:11 “E re ka Manase kgosi ya Juta e dirile makgapha ao, ya dira bosula jo bo fetang tsotlhe tse di kileng tsa dirwa ke Baamori ba ba neng ba le teng pele ga yona ya leofisa le Bajuta ka medimo e e maila ya yona:" 
2Kings21:12 Ke ka moo Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o buang jaana o a re: ‘Bonang, ke tla tlisetsa Jerusalema le Juta tatlhego e mongwe le mongwe yo o e utlwelang, ditsebe tse pedi tsa gagwe di tla sumang ka yona." 
2Kings21:13 Ke tla gagamatsa mogala o o lekanyang wa Samaria mo godimo ga Jerusalema le serophiso sa lelapa la ga Ahabe, ke phimola Jerusalema jaaka go phimolwa mogopo, ke mo phimola le go mo ribegetsa." 
2Kings21:14 Ke tla latlha masalela a boswa jwa me, ke a neela mo diatleng tsa baba ba ona gore e nne thopo le thukhutho tsa baba botlhe ba ona," 
2Kings21:15 ka ba dirile tse di bosula mo matlhong a me, ba nna ba nkgalefisa go tloga ka letsatsi le borraabo ba neng ba huduga kwa Egepeto ka lone go fitlha letsatsing leno.’ ”" 
2Kings21:16 Le gona Manase o ne a tsholola madi a mantsintsi a a se nang molato, a ba a a tlatsa Jerusalema mo ntlheng tsotlhe kwa ntle ga boleo jwa gagwe jo o neng a leofisa Bajuta ka jona gore ba dire tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena." 
2Kings21:17 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Manase le tsotlhe tse o neng a di dira le boleo jwa gagwe jo o neng a bo dira kana di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa sebaka sa dikgosi tsa Juta. 
2Kings21:18 Mme Manase a robala le borraagwe, a fitlhwa mo segotlong sa gagwe, mo segotlong sa ga Usa, mme Amone morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Kings21:19 Amone o ne a le dinyaga di le 22 fa a nna kgosi; a busa dinyaga di le pedi kwa Jerusalema. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Mesulemethe morwadia Haruse wa Joteba. 
2Kings21:20 A dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena jaaka go dirile Manase rraagwe. 
2Kings21:21 A sepela gotlhe mo tseleng e rraagwe o neng a sepela mo go yona; a direla medimo e e maila e rraagwe o neng a e direla, a e obamela." 
2Kings21:22 A tlogela Morena, Modimo wa borraagwe; a se ka a sepela mo tseleng ya Morena." 
2Kings21:23 Mme batlhanka ba ga Amone ba mo tsosetsa leferetlho, ba mmolaela mo ntlong ya gagwe." 
2Kings21:24 Mme batho ba kwa nageng ba bolaya botlhe ba ba neng ba tsoseditse kgosi Amone leferetlho; ba dira Josia morwawe kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe. 
2Kings21:25 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Amone le tse o neng a di dira kana di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa sebaka sa dikgosi tsa Juta. 
2Kings21:26 O ne a fitlhwa mo lebitleng la gagwe mo segotlong sa ga Usa, mme Josia morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Kings22:1 Josia o ne a le dinyaga di le robedi, fa a nna kgosi; a busa dinyaga di le 31 kwa Jerusalema. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Jedita morwadia Ataya wa Bosekathe." 
2Kings22:2 A dira tse di siameng mo matlhong a Morena, a sepela gotlhe mo tseleng ya ga Dafita rraagwe mogolwagolwane; a se ka a fapogela ntlheng ya le le jang le e seng ya la molema." 
2Kings22:3 E rile ka ngwaga wa 18 wa puso ya kgosi Josia, kgosi ya roma mokwaledi Safane morwa Asalea morwa Mesulame kwa Ntlong ya Morena ya re:" 
2Kings22:4 “Tlhatlogela kwa go Hilekia moperesiti yo mogolo gore a bale madi a a tlisitsweng kwa Ntlong ya Morena, a badisa ba mojako ba a phuthileng mo bathong" 
2Kings22:5 gore ba a neele mo diatleng tsa baokamedi ba tiro kwa Ntlong ya Morena, mme bao ba duele badiri ba tiro ba ba kwa Ntlong ya Morena go e baakanya fa e senyegileng teng;" 
2Kings22:6 e bong babopedi le babetli le baruledi; le gona e le go reka dikgong le mafika a a betlilweng tsa go baakanya Ntlo ya Morena.” 
2Kings22:7 Fela madi a ba a neetsweng diatleng a se ka a balwa nabo; gonne ba dira ka go ba ikanya. 
2Kings22:8 Ke fa Hilekia moperesiti yo mogolo a raya mokwaledi Safane a re: “Ke bonye lokwalo lwa molao mo Ntlong ya Morena.” Hilekia a ba a neela Safane lokwalo loo, mme ene a lo buisa." 
2Kings22:9 Ya re mokwaledi Safane a sena go boela kwa kgosing, a e busetsa lefoko a re: “Batlhanka ba gago ba tsholotse madi a a kwa Ntlong ya Morena, ba a neela diatleng tsa baokamedi ba tiro kwa Ntlong ya Morena.”" 
2Kings22:10 Safane mokwaledi a ba a bolelela kgosi a re: “Moperesiti Hilekia o nneetse lokwalo.” Safane a ba a lo buisa fa pele ga kgosi. 
2Kings22:11 Mme ya re kgosi e utlwa mafoko a lokwalo lwa molao ya ikgagola diaparo. 
2Kings22:12 Kgosi ya ba ya laela moperesiti Hilekia le Ahikame morwa Safane le Agebore morwa Migaya le Safane mokwaledi le Asaya motlhanka wa kgosi ya re: 
2Kings22:13 “Yaang lo mpoletse Morena le morafe le Bajuta botlhe ka ntlha ya mafoko a lokwalo lo lo bonyweng loo; gonne bogale jwa Morena bo bogolo jo bo re tuketseng, ka borraetsho ba se ka ba utlwa mafoko a lokwalo loo le e seng go dira tsotlhe tse re di kwaletsweng.”" 
2Kings22:14 Moperesiti Hilekia le Ahikame le Agebore le Safane le Asaya ba ya kwa go Huleta moporofeti wa sesadi, mosadi wa ga Sadume morwa Thikwa morwa Harehase mmoloki wa diaparo: – Huleta o ne a agile kwa Motseng-o-mošwa mo Jerusalema – ba bua nae." 
2Kings22:15 Huleta a ba raya a re: “Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana o a re: ‘Rayang monna yole yo o lo romileng kwano go nna lo re:" 
2Kings22:16 Morena o bua jaana a re: Bona, ke tla tlisa tatlhego mo felong fano le mo baaging ba teng ka fa mafokong otlhe a lokwalo lo kgosi ya Juta e lo buisitseng." 
2Kings22:17 Ke ka gonne ba ntlogetse ba fisetsa medimo e sele maswalo, e le gore ba nkgalefise ka tiro yotlhe ya diatla tsa bone; ka moo bogale jwa me bo tla tukela felo fano, mme bo sa time." 
2Kings22:18 Mme kgosi ya Juta e e lo romileng go botsa Morena lo e ree jaana lo re: Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua jaana o a re: Fa e le mafoko a o a utlwileng:" 
2Kings22:19 E re ka pelo ya gago e le boleta, mme o ikokobeditse fa pele ga Morena, jale fa o utlwa tse ke di omanetseng ka ga felo fano le baagi ba gona ka re: Ba tla fetoga theregiso le khutso; ka o ikgagotse diaparo, o ledile fa pele ga me, le nna ke go utlwile! Morena a re jalo." 
2Kings22:20 Ka moo, bona, ke tla go phuthela kwa go borraago, o bolokwa mo lebitleng la gago ka kagiso gore matlho a gago a se ka a bona tatlhego yotlhe e ke tla e tlisetsang felo fano.’ ” Ba busetsa kgosi karabo." 
2Kings23:1 Jaanong kgosi ya roma gore ba phuthele bagolo botlhe ba Juta le Jerusalema kwa go yona. 
2Kings23:2 Kgosi ya ba ya tlhatlogela kwa Ntlong ya Morena e na le banna botlhe ba Juta le baagi botlhe ba Jerusalema le baperesiti le baporofeti le morafe otlhe, ba babotlana le ba bagolo; mme mafoko otlhe a lokwalo lwa kgolagano lo lo bonyweng mo Ntlong ya Morena ya a buisa mo ditsebeng tsa bone." 
2Kings23:3 Jaanong kgosi ya ema mo sefateng, ya ipofa ka kgolagano fa pele ga Morena go mo ineela le go tshegetsa melao ya gagwe le ditshupo tsa gagwe le ditaolo tsa gagwe ka pelo yotlhe le ka mowa otlhe, e le go dirafatsa mafoko a kgolagano eo a a kwadilweng mo lokwalong loo. Le morafe otlhe wa ipofa jalo ka kgolagano." 
2Kings23:4 Kgosi ya ba laela Hilekia moperesiti yo mogolo le baperesiti ba ba tlhomaganang nae le badisa ba mojako gore ba ntshe dilo tsotlhe mo Tempeleng ya Morena tse di neng di diretswe Baale le Ašera le lesomo lotlhe la legodimo; tsa ba tsa fisediwa ka kwa ntle ga Jerusalema mo masimong a Kiterone; molora wa tsona wa isiwa kwa Bethele. 
2Kings23:5 Ya ba ya tlosa baperesiti ba medimo ba ba neng ba tlhomilwe ke dikgosi tsa Juta gore ba fise maswalo mo dithoteng tsa tlhabelo mo metseng ya Juta le mo tikologong ya Jerusalema; ya tlosa le ba ba neng ba fisetsa Baale maswalo le letsatsi le ngwedi le dinaledi tse go itsiweng dipaka tsa ngwaga ka tsona le lesomo lotlhe la legodimo. 
2Kings23:6 Mme setshwantsho sa Ašera se se mo Ntlong ya Morena ya se ntshetsa kwa ntle ga Jerusalema kwa molapong wa Kiterone, ya se fisetsa teng, ya se sila, ya se notetsa, ya latlhela lerole la sona mo diphupung tsa morafe." 
2Kings23:7 E bile ya diga matlo a banna ba ba direlang medimo ka boaka a a neng a le fa Ntlong ya Morena kwa basadi ba neng ba logela Ašera ditente teng. 
2Kings23:8 Ya ntsha baperesiti botlhe mo metseng ya Juta, ya ba tlisa mo Jerusalema, ya itshekolola dithota tsa tlhabelo kwa baperesiti ba neng ba fisa maswalo teng go simolola kwa Geba go ya go fitlha kwa Bereseba; ya diga dithota tsa tlhabelo tsa dikgoro tse di neng di le fa kgorong ya ga Jošua, molaodi wa motse, le tse di neng di le mo ntlheng ya la molema la motho, fa a tsena ka kgoro ya motse." 
2Kings23:9 Fela baperesiti ba dithota tsa tlhabelo ba ne ba sa tshwanela go palamela mo aletareng ya Morena mo Jerusalema, mme ba ja dinkgwe tse di sa bedisiwang le bomorwaa-rraabo." 
2Kings23:10 Ya ba ya itshekolola Thofethe fa go neng go le mo mogorogorong wa Morwa-Hinome gore go se nne ope yo o direlang Mologe ka go ralatsa morwawe gongwe morwadie molelo. 
2Kings23:11 Ya ba ya tlosa dipitse tse di neng di beetswe kobamelo ya letsatsi ke dikgosi tsa Juta fa gare ga mojako wa Ntlo ya Morena le ntlwana ya ga Nathane-Melege modiredi wa lapa la kgosi e e neng e le kwa mathuding; ya fisa dikoloi tsa letsatsi ka molelo. 
2Kings23:12 Kgosi ya ba ya diga dialetare tse di neng di le mo godimo ga ntlwana e e kwa godimo ya ga Ahase tse di dirilweng ke dikgosi tsa Juta le tse di dirilweng ke Manase mo malapeng a mabedi a Ntlo ya Morena, ya di thubaganya teng, ya latlhela lerole la tsona mo molapong wa Kiterone." 
2Kings23:13 Le gona kgosi ya itshekolola dithota tsa tlhabelo tse di neng di le ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Jerusalema, di le mo ntlheng ya borwa ya Thaba ya Tshenyego tse Salomo kgosi ya Iseraele o neng a di agetse Ašethorethe, modimo o o ilegang wa Basitone le Kamose o o ilegang wa Bamoabe le Milekome o o makgapha wa Baamone." 
2Kings23:14 Ya ba ya thubaganya majwe a a motloutlo, ya rema medimako ya Ašera, ya tlatsa felo ga tsona marapo a batho." 
2Kings23:15 Aletare e e neng e le kwa Bethele ya thota ya tlhabelo e e dirilweng ke Jerobeame morwa Nebate yo o neng a leofisa Baiseraele le aletare eo le thota eo Josia a di diga, a thubaganya majwe a tsona, a a sila ya nna lerole, a ba a fisa modimako wa Ašera." 
2Kings23:16 Jaanong ya re Josia a gadima, a bona diphupu tse di mo thabeng, a roma go ntsha marapo mo go tsona, a a fisa mo aletareng, a e itshekolola jalo ka fa lefokong la Morena le monna wa Modimo yole o kileng a le kua, a bolela dilo tseo." 
2Kings23:17 Ke fa a botsa a re: “Letlapa la phupu le ke le bonang le ke la eng?” Banna ba motse ba mo araba ba re: “Ke yona phupu ya monna wa Modimo yo o neng a tla a tswa kwa Juta a kua mafoko ao a wena o a dirafaditseng jaanong mo aletareng ya Bethele.” 
2Kings23:18 Jaanong a re: “Mo leseng! A marapo a gagwe a se ka a tshwenngwa ke ope.” Mme ba ikhutsisa marapo a gagwe jalo mmogo le marapo a moporofeti yo o neng a tswa kwa Samaria. 
2Kings23:19 Le gona Josia a tlosa ditempele tsotlhe tsa dithota tsa tlhabelo tse di neng di le mo metseng ya Samaria, di dirilwe ke dikgosi tsa Iseraele go galefisa Morena, a di senya fela jaaka a dirile kwa Bethele." 
2Kings23:20 Mme baperesiti botlhe ba dithota tsa tlhabelo ba ba neng ba le teng, a ba dira ditlhabelo mo dialetareng, a fisa marapo a batho bao mo go tsona. Jaanong a boela kwa Jerusalema." 
2Kings23:21 Kgosi ya ba ya laela morafe otlhe ya re: “Direlang Morena, Modimo wa lona, moletlo wa Tlolaganyo jaaka go kwadilwe mo lokwalong lo lwa kgolagano.”" 
2Kings23:22 Gonne ga bo go ise go dirwe Tlolaganyo e e ntseng jalo go tloga malatsing a baatlhodi ba ba neng ba busa Baiseraele le e seng ka malatsi otlhe a dikgosi tsa Iseraele le tsa Juta. 
2Kings23:23 Mme Tlolaganyo eo ya direlwa Morena kwa Jerusalema ka ngwaga wa 18 wa puso ya kgosi Josia. 
2Kings23:24 Le gona Josia a fedisa ba ba buang le baswi le baitseanape le ditshwantsho tsa medimo ya matlo le medimo e e maila le makgapha otlhe a a neng a bonwa mo lefatsheng la Juta le mo Jerusalema, e le go dirafatsa mafoko a molao a a kwadilweng mo lokwalong lo moperesiti Hilekia a neng a lo bona mo Ntlong ya Morena." 
2Kings23:25 Go ne go ise go ke go nne kgosi epe pele ga gagwe e e tshwanang nae, e e neng ya sokologela Moreneng ka pelo ya yona yotlhe le ka mowa wa yona otlhe le ka thata ya yona yotlhe ka fa molaong otlhe wa ga Moše; le sehularong sa gagwe ga se ka ga tsoga epe e e tshwanang nae." 
2Kings23:26 Fela Morena a se ka a boa bogaleng jo bogolo jwa gagwe jo bo tukang, ka bogale jwa gagwe bo ne bo tukela Bajuta ka ntlha ya dithumolo tsotlhe tse Manase o neng a mo rumotse ka tsona." 
2Kings23:27 Mme Morena a re: “Le Juta ke tla mo tlosa fa pele ga sefatlhego sa me jaaka ke tlositse Iseraele; le gona ke tla latlha motse o wa Jerusalema o ke o tlhophileng le Ntlo e ke buileng ka ga yona ka re: ‘Leina la me le tla nna gona.’ ” 
2Kings23:28 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Josia le tsotlhe tse o neng a di dira kana di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa sebaka sa dikgosi tsa Juta. 
2Kings23:29 Mo metlheng ya gagwe Farao Nego kgosi ya Egepeto ya bololela kgosi ya Asiria, ya ya kwa nokeng ya Ferathe, mme kgosi Josia a ya a mo kgatlhantsha, mme ya re Farao Nego a mmona, a mmolaela kwa Megito." 
2Kings23:30 Mme batlhanka ba gagwe ba mo tsaya kwa Megito ka koloi a sule, ba mo isa kwa Jerusalema, ba mo fitlha mo lebitleng la gagwe; mme batho ba lefatshe ba tsaya Joahase morwa Josia, ba mo tlotsa, ba mo dira kgosi mo boemong jwa ga rraagwe." 
2Kings23:31 Joahase o ne a le dinyaga di le 23, fa a nna kgosi, a busa dikgwedi di le tharo kwa Jerusalema. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Hamutale morwadia Jeremia wa Lebena." 
2Kings23:32 O ne a dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena fela jaaka go dirile borraagwe. 
2Kings23:33 Mme Farao Nego a mo tshwara kwa Ribela mo lefatsheng la Hamathe gore a se ka a busa kwa Jerusalema; a ba a beela lefatshe petso ya go lefa ditalente di le 100 tsa selefera le talente ya gouta. 
2Kings23:34 Farao Nego a ba a dira Eliakime morwa Josia kgosi mo boemong jwa ga Josia rraagwe, a fetola leina la gagwe a mmitsa Joyakime; a ba a tsaya Joahase, a mo isa kwa Egepeto, mme a swela teng." 
2Kings23:35 Joyakime o ne a naya Farao Nego selefera ele le gouta ele; fela o ne a na le go kgethisa batho ba lefatshe go ka ntsha selefera ka fa taelong ya ga Farao; a laola batho ba lefatshe gore mongwe le mongwe a ntshe selefera le gouta ka fa nonofo ya gagwe e bonyweng ka teng gore di neelwe Farao Nego. 
2Kings23:36 Joyakime o ne a le dinyaga di le 25, fa a nna kgosi; a busa dinyaga di le some le motso kwa Jerusalema. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Sebuta morwadia Phetaya wa kwa Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 A dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena fela jaaka go dirile borraagwe. 
2Kings24:1 Mo metlheng ya gagwe ga tlhaga Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babele, mme Joyakime a nna motlhanka wa gagwe dinyaga di le tharo; ya baa gona a mo tlhanogelang gape." 
2Kings24:2 Ke fa Morena a mo romela dinokwane tsa Bakalatea le tsa Basiria le tsa Bamoabe le tsa Baamone; a di romela kwa Juta go mo nyeletsa ka fa lefokong la Morena le o le buileng ka baporofeti, batlhanka ba gagwe." 
2Kings24:3 Ga dirafalela Bajuta jalo ka ntlha ya taelo ya Morena fela e le go ba tlosa fa pele ga sefatlhego sa gagwe ka ntlha ya maleo a ga Manase a tsotlhe tse o neng a di dira 
2Kings24:4 le ka ntlha ya madi a a se nang molato a Manase o neng a a tsholola, a tlatsa Jerusalema madi a a se nang molato, Morena a se ka a rata go ba itshwarela." 
2Kings24:5 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Joyakime le tsotlhe tse o neng a di dira kana di kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa sebaka sa dikgosi tsa Juta. 
2Kings24:6 Mme Joyakime a robala le borraagwe, mme Joyagine morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Kings24:7 Kgosi ya Egepeto ya se ka ya tlhola e bolola mo lefatsheng la yona; gonne kgosi ya Babele e ne e thopile tsotlhe tse e neng e le tsa kgosi ya Egepeto go tloga kwa nokaneng ya Egepeto go ya go fitlha kwa nokeng ya Ferathe. 
2Kings24:8 Joyagine o ne a le dinyaga di le 18, fa a nna kgosi, a busa dikgwedi di le tharo kwa Jerusalema. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Nehusetha morwadia Elenathane wa mo Jerusalema." 
2Kings24:9 A dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena fela jaaka go dirile rraagwe. 
2Kings24:10 Ka sebaka seo batlhanka ba ga Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babele ba bololela Jerusalema, mme motse wa dikanyediwa ke ntwa." 
2Kings24:11 Mme ya re Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babele e tla ka yosi go tlhasela motse, batlhanka ba yona ba ntse ba o dikanyeditse," 
2Kings24:12 Joyagine, kgosi ya Juta, a tswela kwa kgosing ya Babele go ineela, ene le mmaagwe le batlhanka ba gagwe le dikgosana tsa gagwe le badiredi ba lapa la gagwe, mme kgosi ya Babele ya mo golega ka ngwaga wa robedi wa puso ya yona." 
2Kings24:13 Kgosi ya Babele ya ba ya tsena mo motseng, ya ntsha teng mahumo otlhe a Ntlo ya Morena le mahumo a ntlo ya kgosi, ya thubaganya dilo tsotlhe tsa gouta tse di neng di dirilwe ke Salomo, kgosi ya Iseraele, mo Tempeleng ya Morena, jaaka go ne ga bua Morena." 
2Kings24:14 Ya isa batho botlhe ba Jerusalema le dikgosana tsotlhe le bagale botlhe mo botshwarong, e bong ba le 10 000 mmogo le ditswerere tsotlhe le bathudi; ga se ka ga sadisiwa ope fa e se batho ba ba humanegileng ba lefatshe fela." 
2Kings24:15 Ya isa Joyagine botshwarong kwa Babele le mma-kgosi le basadi ba kgosi le badiredi ba yona le baeteledipele ba lefatshe, ya ba ntsha mo Jerusalema, ya ba isa botshwarong kwa Babele" 
2Kings24:16 le banna botlhe ba ba maatlametlo ba le 7 000 le ditswerere le bathudi ba le 1 000, botlhe e le bagale ba ba itseng ntwa, kgosi ya Babele ya ba isa botshwarong kwa Babele." 
2Kings24:17 Mme kgosi ya Babele ya dira Mathanya rrangwanaagwe Joyagine kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe, ya fetola leina la gagwe, ya mmitsa Setekia." 
2Kings24:18 Setekia o ne a le dinyaga di le 21, fa a nna kgosi; a busa dinyaga di le 11 kwa Jerusalema; leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Hamutale, morwadia Jeremia wa kwa Lebena." 
2Kings24:19 A dira tse di bosula mo matlhong a Morena fela jaaka go dirile Joyakime. 
2Kings24:20 Gonne go ne ga dirafalela Jerusalema le Juta jalo ka ntlha ya bogale jwa Morena ga tsamaya a ba latlha, a ba tlosa fa pele ga sefatlhego sa gagwe. Mme Setekia a tlhanogela kgosi ya Babele." 
2Kings25:1 E rile ka ngwaga wa robongwe wa puso ya ga Setekia ka letsatsi la some la kgwedi ya some ga tla Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babele kwa motseng wa Jerusalema, a na le mephato yotlhe ya gagwe, a o dikanyetsa ka ntwa, mme ba aga dikago tsa go o tlhasela mo tikologong." 
2Kings25:2 Motse wa nna wa dikanyediwa jalo ke ntwa go ya ngwageng wa some le motso o le mongwe wa puso ya kgosi Setekia. 
2Kings25:3 Mme ka la robongwe la kgwedi ya bone tlala ya nna e kgolo mo motseng; batho ba ba tswang kwa nageng ba tlhoka dijo. 
2Kings25:4 Ya baa gona ba sutlhelelang mo motseng. Ya re Setekia le banna botlhe ba batlhabani ba bona jalo, ba tshaba ba tswa mo motseng bosigo ka tsela ya kgoro e e fa gare ga dipota tse pedi e e fa tshimong ya kgosi – Bakalatea ba ntse ba dikanyeditse motse – Setekia a tshaba ka tsela e e yang kwa Lebaleng la Joretane." 
2Kings25:5 Mme batlhabani ba Bakalatea ba latelela kgosi, ba e tshwarela mo nageng ya Jerigo. Ke fa batlhabani botlhe ba gagwe ba phatlalala ba mo tshabela." 
2Kings25:6 Bakalatea ba tshwara kgosi, ba e isa kwa kgosing ya Babele kwa Ribela, ba e atlholela petso teng." 
2Kings25:7 Ba bolaya bomorwa Setekia fa pele ga matlho a gagwe, mme Nebukatenesare a foufatsa matlho a ga Setekia, a mmofa ka dikeetane, a mo isa kwa Babele." 
2Kings25:8 Ka ngwaga wa 19 wa puso ya ga Nebukatenesare kgosi ya Babele ka kgwedi ya botlhano e supa ga tla Nebusaratane, tlhogo ya bafemedi ba kgosi, motlhanka wa kgosi ya Babele kwa Jerusalema." 
2Kings25:9 A fisa Ntlo ya Morena le ntlo ya kgosi le matlo otlhe a Jerusalema; a fisa matlo a magolo otlhe ka molelo. 
2Kings25:10 Batlhabani botlhe ba Bakalatea ba ba neng ba na le tlhogo ya bafemedi ba kgosi ba diga dipota tsa Jerusalema tikologong. 
2Kings25:11 Mme masalela a batho ba ba setseng mo motseng le bathobi ba ba ineetseng kgosi ya Babele le masalela a bontsi Nebusaratane, tlhogo ya bafemedi ba kgosi, ya ba isa mo botshwarong." 
2Kings25:12 Fela bangwe ba bahumanegi ba kwa nageng tlhogo ya bafemedi ba kgosi ya ba sadisa go nna balemi ba masimo a moweine le ba masimo a mangwe. 
2Kings25:13 Mme maotwana a kgotlho a a neng a le fa Ntlong ya Morena le dikolotsana tsa tlhatswetso le lewatle la kgotlho tse di neng di le fa Ntlong ya Morena Bakalatea ba di thubaganya, ba isa kgotlho ya tsona kwa Babele." 
2Kings25:14 Le gona ba tsaya dipitsa le diolola-melora le dithipa le megopo le dilo tsotlhe tsa kgotlho tse go neng go dirwa ka tsona mo tirelong-Modimo. 
2Kings25:15 Molaodi wa bafemedi ba kgosi a tsaya ditshola-molelo le megopo e e kgatshetsang; e bong tsotlhe tse e leng gouta fela le tsotlhe tse e leng selefera fela. 
2Kings25:16 Maotwana a mabedi le lewatle le dikolotsana tsa tlhatswetso tse Salomo o neng a di diretse Ntlo ya Morena, bokete jwa kgotlho ya dilo tsotlhe tseo ba palelwa ke go bo lekanya." 
2Kings25:17 Bogodimo jwa lekotwana e ne e le mabogo a le 18, mme go le tlhogo ya kgotlho mo godimo ga lone; bogodimo jwa tlhogo e le mabogo a le mararo. Tharaanyo ya digaranata e ne e kgabisa tlhogo mo tikologong e le ya kgotlho yotlhe. Le lekotwana la bobedi le ne le kgabisitswe jalo ka digaranata tse di mo tharaanyong." 
2Kings25:18 Le gona molaodi wa bafemedi ba kgosi a tsaya Seraya moperesiti yo mogolo le Sefanya moperesiti wa bobedi le badisa ba bararo ba mojako; 
2Kings25:19 mo motseng a tsaya modiredi wa lapa la kgosi a le mongwe yo e neng e le mookamedi wa batlhabani le banna ba batlhano ba kgosing ba ba fitlhetsweng mo motseng le mokwaledi wa molaodi wa batlhabani yo o neng a kua mephato ya batlhabani mo bathong ba lefatshe le banna ba le 60 ba batho ba kwa nageng ba ba fitlhetsweng mo motseng. 
2Kings25:20 Bone bao Nebusaratane, molaodi wa bafemedi ba kgosi, a ba tsaya, a ba isa kwa kgosing ya Babele kwa Ribela." 
2Kings25:21 Mme kgosi ya Babele ya ba itaya, ya ba bolaela kwa Ribela mo nageng ya Hamathe. Ka mokgwa oo Bajuta ba ne ba ntshiwa mo lefatsheng la bone." 
2Kings25:22 Fa e le batho ba Nebukatenesare, kgosi ya Babele, o neng a ba sadisitse mo lefatsheng la Juta a dira Ketalea morwa Ahikame morwa Safane mookamedi wa bone." 
2Kings25:23 Jaanong e rile balaodi botlhe ba mephato, bone le mephato ya bone, ba utlwa gore kgosi ya Babele e laodisitse Ketalea lefatshe, ba tla kwa go Ketalea kwa Mitsepha, e bong Isemaele morwa Nethanya le Johanane morwa Karea le Seraya morwa Thanumethe wa kwa Netofa le Jaasanya morwa monna wa kwa Maaga, bone le mephato ya bone." 
2Kings25:24 Mme Ketalea a ba ikanela le banna ba bone a ba raya a re: “Se boifeng batlhanka ba Bakalatea. Nnang mo lefatsheng lo direle kgosi ya Babele. Foo lo tla phela sentle.” 
2Kings25:25 Mme e rile ka kgwedi ya bosupa ga tla ene Isemaele, morwa Nethanya morwa Elisama wa losika lwa kgosi, a na le banna ba le some, ba bolaya Ketalea le Bajuta le Bakalatea ba ba neng ba na nae kwa Mitsepha, ba a swa." 
2Kings25:26 Ke fa morafe otlhe, ba bannye le ba bagolo ba na le balaodi ba mephato ba falalela kwa Egepeto; gonne ba ne ba boifa Bakalatea." 
2Kings25:27 Jaanong e rile Joyagine kgosi ya Juta e sena go fetsa dinyaga di le 37 e ntse e le mo kgolegong ka kgwedi ya 12 e le 27, Ewile-Merotage kgosi ya Babele ya tlhomogela Joyagine kgosi ya Juta pelo, ya mo ntsha mo ntlong ya kgolegelo. E ne e le ka ngwaga wa ntlha wa puso ya gagwe." 
2Kings25:28 Ya bua nae ka bopelonomi, sedulo sa gagwe sa bogosi ya se okamisa ditulo tsa dikgosi tse di neng di na nae kwa Babele." 
2Kings25:29 Ya ba ya mo apola diaparo tsa kgolego, ya mo apesa tsa tlotlo, mme a nna a jela fa pele ga yona ka malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa gagwe." 
2Kings25:30 Tse a phelang ka tsona o ne a di fiwa ke kgosi ya Babele ka botlalo ka fa go batlegang ka teng letsatsi lengwe le lengwe ka malatsi otlhe a botshelo jwa gagwe. 
1Chronicles1:1 Atame, Sethe, Enose," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenane, Mahalalele, Jarete," 
1Chronicles1:3 Henoge, Methusala, Lamege," 
1Chronicles1:4 Noa. Bomorwa Noa ke Seme le Hame le Jafethe. 
1Chronicles1:5 Bomorwa Jafethe ke Gomere le Magogo le Matai le Jafane le Thubale le Mesege le Thirase. 
1Chronicles1:6 Bomorwa Gomere ke Asekenase le Rifathe le Thogarama. 
1Chronicles1:7 Bomorwa Jafane ke Elisa le Tharesise le Bakhithime le Barotanime. 
1Chronicles1:8 Bomorwa Hame ke Khuše le Miseraime le Phute le Kanana. 
1Chronicles1:9 Bomorwa Khuše ke Seba le Hawila le Sabetha le Raema le Sabetheka; bomorwa Raema ke Šeba le Detane. 
1Chronicles1:10 Mme Khuše a tsala Nimerote; ke ene mogale wa ntlha mo lefatsheng. 
1Chronicles1:11 Miseraime a tsala Baludi le Baanami le Balehabi le Banafethugi 
1Chronicles1:12 le Baphatharusi le Bakhaselugi le Bakhafethori, ba Bafelesita ba duleng mo go bone." 
1Chronicles1:13 Mme Kanana a tsala Sitone morwawe wa ntlha le Hethe; 
1Chronicles1:14 le Bajebusi le Baamori le Bagiregasi 
1Chronicles1:15 le Bahewi le Baareki le Basini 
1Chronicles1:16 le Baarwadi le Basemari le Bahamathe. 
1Chronicles1:17 Bomorwa Seme ke Elame le Asure le Arephagasadi le Lute le Arame; bomorwa Arame ke Use le Hule le Gethere le Mesege. 
1Chronicles1:18 Mme Arephagasadi a tsala Kenane; Kenane a tsala Sela; Sela a tsala Hebere. 
1Chronicles1:19 Mme Hebere a tsalelwa bomorwa ba le babedi; leina la yo mongwe e le Phelege, gonne mo metlheng ya gagwe batho ba lefatshe ba ne ba kgaoganngwa; leina la ga monnawe e le Jokotane." 
1Chronicles1:20 Jokotane a tsala Alemotate le Selefe le Hasaremawethe le Jera 
1Chronicles1:21 le Hatorame le Usale le Dikela 
1Chronicles1:22 le Ebale le Abimaele le Šeba 
1Chronicles1:23 le Ofire le Hawila le Jobabe; botlhe bao ke bomorwa Jokotane. 
1Chronicles1:23 le Ofire le Hawila le Jobabe; botlhe bao ke bomorwa Jokotane. 
1Chronicles1:24 Seme, Arephagasadi, Sela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Hebere, Phelege, Rehu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Seruge, Nahore, Thara," 
1Chronicles1:27 Aborame, ke ene Aborahame." 
1Chronicles1:28 Bomorwa Aborahame ke Isaka le Isemaele. 
1Chronicles1:29 Tlhomagano ya ditshika tsa bone ke e: Morwa Isemaele wa ntlha ke Nebayothe le Ketare le Atebele le Mibesame 
1Chronicles1:30 le Misima le Duma le Masa le Hatate le Thema 
1Chronicles1:31 le Jeture le Nafise le Kedima. Ke bone bomorwa Isemaele. 
1Chronicles1:32 Bomorwa Ketura, mogadingwana wa ga Aborahame: A tshola Simerane le Jokosane le Metane le Midiane le Isepake le Sua. Mme bomorwa Jokosane ke Šeba le Detane." 
1Chronicles1:33 Bomorwa Midiane ke Efa le Efere le Henoge le Abita le Eletaha; botlhe bao ke bomorwa Ketura. 
1Chronicles1:34 Aborahame a tsala Isaka; bomorwa Isaka ke Esau le Iseraele. 
1Chronicles1:35 Bomorwa Esau ke Elifase le Rehuele le Jeuse le Jaelame le Kora. 
1Chronicles1:36 Bomorwa Elifase ke Themane le Omare le Sefi le Gaethame le Kenase le Thimena le Amaleke. 
1Chronicles1:37 Bomorwa Rehuele ke Nahathe le Sera le Sama le Misa. 
1Chronicles1:38 Bomorwa Seire ke Lotane le Sobale le Sibeone le Ana le Disone le Esere le Disane. 
1Chronicles1:39 Bomorwa Lotane ke Hori le Homame; kgaitsadia Lotane ke Thimena. 
1Chronicles1:40 Bomorwa Sobale ke Aliane le Manahathe le Ebale le Sefi le Oname. Bomorwa Sibeone ke Aya le Ana. 
1Chronicles1:41 Morwa Ana ke Disone. Bomorwa Disone ke Hamerane le Esebane le Itherane le Kerane. 
1Chronicles1:42 Bomorwa Esere ke Bilehane le Saawane le Jaakane; bomorwa Disane ke Use le Arane. 
1Chronicles1:43 Dikgosi tse di neng tsa busa kwa lefatsheng la Etomo go ise go buse kgosi ya Baiseraele ke tse: Ke Bela morwa Beore; leina la motse wa gagwe e le Dinehaba. 
1Chronicles1:44 Ya re Bela a sena go swa, ga busa Jobabe morwa Sera wa kwa Bosera mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:44 Ya re Bela a sena go swa, ga busa Jobabe morwa Sera wa kwa Bosera mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Ya re Jobabe a sena go swa, ga busa Husame wa kwa lefatsheng la Bathemane mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Ya re Jobabe a sena go swa, ga busa Husame wa kwa lefatsheng la Bathemane mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:46 Ya re Husame a sena go swa, ga busa Hatate morwa Betate mo boemong jwa gagwe; ke ene yo o neng a fenya Bamidiane mo nageng ya Moabe. Leina la motse wa gagwe e ne e le Awithe." 
1Chronicles1:47 Ya re Hatate a sena go swa, ga busa Samela wa kwa Masereka mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:48 Ya re Samela a sena go swa, ga busa Saule wa kwa Rehobothe yo o fa nokeng mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:49 Ya re Saule a sena go swa, ga busa Baale-Hanane morwa Akebore mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:50 Ya re Baale-Hanane a sena go swa, ga busa Hatate mo boemong jwa gagwe; leina la motse wa gagwe e le Phahi; leina la mosadi wa gagwe e le Mehetabele morwadia Materedi morwadia Mesahabe bommaagwe-mogolo." 
1Chronicles1:51 Ya re Hatate a sena go swa, ga nna dikgosana kwa Etomo mo boemong jwa dikgosi, e bong Thimena le Alia le Jethethe" 
1Chronicles1:52 le Oholibama le Ela le Phinone 
1Chronicles1:53 le Kenase le Themane le Mibesare 
1Chronicles1:54 le Magadiele le Irame. Ke tsona dikgosana tsa Etomo. 
1Chronicles2:1 Bomorwa Iseraele ke ba: Rubene le Simeone le Lefi le Juta le Isašare le Sebulone 
1Chronicles2:2 le Dane le Josefa le Benyamene le Nafetale le Gate le Asere. 
1Chronicles2:3 Bomorwa Juta ke Ere le Onane le Sela. O belegetswe ba bararo ba ke morwadia Sua, mosadi wa Mokanana. Mme Ere morwa Juta wa ntlha o ne a le bosula mo matlhong a Morena, ka moo a mmolaya." 
1Chronicles2:4 Thamare ngwetsi wa gagwe a tshola nae Pherese le Sera. Bomorwa Juta botlhe ba ne ba le batlhano. 
1Chronicles2:5 Bomorwa Pherese ke Heserone le Hamule. 
1Chronicles2:6 Bomorwa Sera ke Simeri le Ethane le Hemane le Kalakolo le Dara. Mmogo ke ba batlhano. 
1Chronicles2:7 Morwa Simeri ke Karemi; morwa Karemi ke Agane yo o kileng a tsenya Baiseraele mo kotsing ka go utswa tse di rogilweng ke Modimo. 
1Chronicles2:8 Morwa Ethane ke Asaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Heserone a belegelwa bomorwawe, e bong Jeramele le Rame le Kalebe." 
1Chronicles2:10 Rame a tsala Aminatabe; Aminatabe a tsala Nasone moeteledipele wa Bajuta. 
1Chronicles2:11 Nasone a tsala Salema; Salema a tsala Boase; 
1Chronicles2:12 Boase a tsala Obete; Obete a tsala Isai. 
1Chronicles2:13 Isai a tsala Eliabe, morwawe wa ntlha le Abinatabe, e le wa bobedi, le Šimea, e le wa boraro," 
1Chronicles2:14 le Nethanele, e le wa bone, le Ratai, e le wa botlhano," 
1Chronicles2:15 le Oseme, e le wa borataro, le Dafita, e le wa bosupa." 
1Chronicles2:16 Bokgaitsadia-bone ke Seruya le Abikaile. Bomorwa Seruya ke Abisai le Joabe le Asahele, ba bararo." 
1Chronicles2:17 Mme Abikaile a belega Amasa; rraagwe Amasa e le Jethere wa Moisemaele. 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebe morwa Heserone a tsala Jeriothe ngwana wa mosetsana le Asuba mosadi wa gagwe; bomorwawe ke Ješere le Sobabe le Aretone. 
1Chronicles2:19 Ya re Asuba a sena go swa, Kalebe a nyala Eferathe; ene a mmelegela Hure." 
1Chronicles2:20 Hure a tsala Uri; Uri a tsala Besalele. 
1Chronicles2:21 Morago ga moo Heserone a tsena kwa go morwadia Magire rraagwe Gileate, a mo tsaya a le dinyaga di le 60; ene a tshola Sekube nae." 
1Chronicles2:22 Sekube a tsala Jaire yo o neng a na le metse e le 23 kwa lefatsheng la Gileate. 
1Chronicles2:23 Mme Bakesure le Basiria ba ba amoga metsana ya ga Jaire, e bong Kenathe le metsana ya teng, e le metse e le 60. Yotlhe eo e ne e le ya bomorwa Magire rraagwe Gileate." 
1Chronicles2:24 E rile Heserone a sena go swela kwa Kalebe-Eferatha, Abia mosadi wa gagwe a mmelegela Asehure rraagwe Thekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Bomorwa Jeramele morwa Heserone wa ntlha e ne le Rame morwawe wa ntlha le Buna le Orene le Oseme le Ahia. 
1Chronicles2:26 Jeramele o ne a na le mosadi yo mongwe, leina la gagwe e le Atara; ke ene mmagwe Oname." 
1Chronicles2:27 Bomorwa Rame morwa Jeramele wa ntlha e ne e le Maase le Jamine le Ekere. 
1Chronicles2:28 Bomorwa Oname e ne e le Samai le Jata; bomorwa Samai e le Natabe le Abisure. 
1Chronicles2:29 Leina la mosadi wa ga Abisure e ne e le Abigaile; ene a tshola Agebane le Molite nae. 
1Chronicles2:30 Bomorwa Natabe ke Selete le Aphaime, mme Selete a swa a se na bana." 
1Chronicles2:31 Morwa Aphaime ke Isei; morwa Isei ke Sesane; morwa Sesane ke Ahelai. 
1Chronicles2:32 Bomorwa Jata morwa-rraagwe Samai ke Jethere le Jonathane. Mme Jethere a swa a se na bana. 
1Chronicles2:33 Bomorwa Jonathane ke Phelethe le Sasa. Bao e ne e le bomorwa Jeramele. 
1Chronicles2:34 Mme Sesane o ne a se na bomorwa fa e se bomorwadi fela. Jaanong Sesane a na le motlhanka wa Moegepeto, leina la gagwe e le Jareha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Mme Sesane a neela Jareha motlhanka wa gagwe morwadi go nna mosadi wa gagwe; ene a tshola Athai nae. 
1Chronicles2:36 Athai a tsala Nathane; Nathane a tsala Sabate; 
1Chronicles2:37 Sabate a tsala Efelale; Efelale a tsala Obete; 
1Chronicles2:38 Obete a tsala Jehu; Jehu a tsala Asaria; 
1Chronicles2:39 Asaria a tsala Halese; Halese a tsala Eleasa; 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa a tsala Sisemai; Sisemai a tsala Sadume; 
1Chronicles2:41 Sadume a tsala Jekamia; Jekamia a tsala Elisama. 
1Chronicles2:42 Morwa Kalebe morwa-rraagwe Jeramele ke Mareša, morwawe wa ntlha; ke ene rragwe Sife. Morwa Mareša ke Heberone." 
1Chronicles2:43 Bomorwa Heberone ke Kora le Thaphua le Rekeme le Sema. 
1Chronicles2:44 Mme Sema a tsala Rahame rraagwe Jorekeame; Rekeme a tsala Samai. 
1Chronicles2:45 Morwa Samai ke Maone; Maone ke rraagwe Betshure. 
1Chronicles2:46 Efa mogadingwana wa ga Kalebe a belega Harane le Mosa le Kasese; Harane a tsala Kasese. 
1Chronicles2:47 Bomorwa Jatai ke Regeme le Jothame le Kesane le Phelete le Efa le Saafe. 
1Chronicles2:48 Mme Maaga mogadingwana wa ga Kalebe a belega Sebere le Thiregana; 
1Chronicles2:49 a ba a belega Saafe rraagwe Matemana le Sewa rraagwe Magebena le Gibea. Mme morwadia Kalebe e ne e le Agesa. 
1Chronicles2:50 Bao e ne e le bomorwa Kalebe. Bomorwa Hure morwa Eferatha wa ntlha ke Sobale Rra-Khiriathe-Jearime 
1Chronicles2:51 le Salema Rra-Betleheme le Harefe Rra-Bethe-Katere. 
1Chronicles2:52 Bomorwa Sobale Rra-Khiriathe-Jearime e ne e le Haroe le batho ba bontlhanngwe jwa Bamanahathe 
1Chronicles2:53 le ditshika tsa Khiriathe-Jearime, e bong Baithere le Baphuthe le Basumathi le Bamiserai; mo go bao go dule ba Sorea le Baešethaole." 
1Chronicles2:54 Bomorwa Salema ke ba Betleheme le ba Netofa le ba Aterothe-Bethe-Joabe le batho ba bontlhanngwe jwa Bamanahathe, e bong ba kwa Sorea." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ditshika tsa bakwadi ba ba neng ba agile kwa Jabese ke Bathira le Basimea le Basuga; bone ke Bakeni ba ba duleng mo go Hamathe rra-lelapa la ga Regabe. 
1Chronicles3:1 Bomorwa Dafita ba o neng a ba belegelwa kwa Heberone e ne e le ba: Wa ntlha e le Amenone wa ga Ahinoame mosadi wa kwa Iserele; wa bobedi e le Daniele wa ga Abikaile mosadi wa kwa Karemele; 
1Chronicles3:1 Bomorwa Dafita ba o neng a ba belegelwa kwa Heberone e ne e le ba: Wa ntlha e le Amenone wa ga Ahinoame mosadi wa kwa Iserele; wa bobedi e le Daniele wa ga Abikaile mosadi wa kwa Karemele; 
1Chronicles3:2 wa boraro e le Abesalomo morwa Maaga morwadia Thalemai kgosi ya Kesure; wa bone e le Atonia morwa Hagithe; 
1Chronicles3:3 wa botlhano e le Sefatya wa ga Abitale; wa borataro e le Ithereame wa ga Egela mosadi wa gagwe. 
1Chronicles3:4 A belegelwa ba barataro kwa Heberone. Kana o ne a busa teng dinyaga di supa le dikgwedi di le thataro; mme kwa Jerusalema a busa dinyaga di le 33. 
1Chronicles3:5 Ba o neng a ba belegelwa kwa Jerusalema ke Šimea le Sobabe le Nathane le Salomo – ke ba bane ba ga Batsheba morwadia Amiele – 
1Chronicles3:6 le Ibegare le Elisama le Elifelete 
1Chronicles3:7 le Noga le Nefege le Jafia 
1Chronicles3:8 le Elisama le Eliata le Elifelete, ke ba robongwe." 
1Chronicles3:9 Ke bone bomorwa Dafita botlhe, go sa balwe bomorwa bagadingwana, mme Thamare e le kgaitsadia-bone." 
1Chronicles3:10 Morwa Salomo e ne e le Rehabeame, morwawe e le Abia, morwawe e le Asa, morwawe e le Josafate," 
1Chronicles3:11 morwawe e le Jorame, morwawe e le Ahasia, morwawe e le Joase," 
1Chronicles3:12 morwawe e le Amasia, morwawe e le Asaria, morwawe e le Jothame," 
1Chronicles3:13 morwawe e le Ahase, morwawe e le Hesekia, morwawe e le Manase," 
1Chronicles3:14 morwawe e le Amone, morwawe e le Josia." 
1Chronicles3:15 Fa e le bomorwa Josia, wa ntlha e ne e le Johanane, wa bobedi e le Joyakime, wa boraro e le Setekia, wa bone e le Sadume." 
1Chronicles3:16 Bomorwa Joyakime: Morwawe e ne e le Jegonya, morwawe e le Setekia." 
1Chronicles3:17 Bomorwa Jegonya yo o neng a le mo botshwarong e ne e le Salathiele 
1Chronicles3:18 le Malekirame le Phetaya le Senasare le Jekamia le Hosama le Netabja. 
1Chronicles3:19 Bomorwa Phetaya e ne e le Serubabele le Simei; bomorwa Serubabele e le Mesulame le Hananya; – Kgaitsadia-bone e le Selomithe – 
1Chronicles3:20 gape Hasuba le Ohele le Beregia le Hasatya le Jusabe-Hesete, ba batlhano." 
1Chronicles3:21 Morwa Hananya e ne e le Phelatya, morwawe e le Jesaya, morwawe e le Refaya, morwawe e le Arenane, morwawe e le Obatya, morwawe e le Seganya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Bomorwa Seganya e ne e le Semaya le Hatuse le Igale le Baria le Nearia le Safate, ba barataro." 
1Chronicles3:23 Bomorwa Nearia e ne e le Eleyoenai le Hesekia le Aserikame, ba bararo." 
1Chronicles3:24 Mme bomorwa Eleyoenai e ne e le Hotafia le Eliasibe le Phelaya le Akhube le Johanane le Delaya le Anani, ba supa." 
1Chronicles4:1 Bomorwa Juta ke Pherese le Heserone le Karemi le Hure le Sobale. 
1Chronicles4:2 Mme Reaya morwa Sobale a tsala Jahathe, Jahathe a tsala Ahumai le Lahate; ke tsona ditshika tsa ba Sorea." 
1Chronicles4:3 Etame le Iserele le Isema le Itebase – leina la kgaitsadia-bone e le Haseleleponi – 
1Chronicles4:4 le Phenuele rraagwe Ketore le Esere rraagwe Huša e ne e le bomorwa Hure morwa Eferatha wa ntlha Rra-Betleheme. 
1Chronicles4:5 Mme Asehure Rra-Thekoa o ne a na le basadi ba le babedi Helea le Naara. 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara a tshola nae Ahusame le Hefere le Themeni le Baahasethari. Ke bone bomorwa Naara. 
1Chronicles4:7 Mme bomorwa Helea e ne e le Serethe le Isehare le Ethenane le Kose. 
1Chronicles4:8 Kose a tsala Anube le Hasobeba le Jabese le ditshika tsa ga Aharehele morwa Harume. 
1Chronicles4:9 Mme Jabese o ne a tlotlega bogolo go bomorwa-rraagwe. Mmaagwe o ne a mo teile leina la Jabese a re: “Kana ke mmelege ka botlhoko.” 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabese o ne a rapela Modimo wa Iseraele a re: “E kete o ka bo o ntshegofatsa thata wa atlhamolosa naga ya me, mme seatla sa gago sa nna le nna, wa thibela bosula gore bo se ka jwa ntlhokofatsa!” Mme Modimo wa mo direla jaaka a kopile." 
1Chronicles4:11 Mme Kelobe morwa-rraagwe Suha a tsala Mehire; ke ene rraagwe Esethone. 
1Chronicles4:12 Esethone a tsala Betherafa le Phasea le Thehina Rra-motse wa Nahase. Ke bone banna ba Rega. 
1Chronicles4:13 Bomorwa Kenase ke Otheniele le Seraya. Bomorwa Otheniele ke Hathathe le Meonothai. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonothai a tsala Ofera; Seraya a tsala Joabe Rra-molapo wa ditswerere; gonne e ne e le ditswerere. 
1Chronicles4:15 Bomorwa Kalebe morwa Jefune ke Iru le Ela le Naame; morwa Ela ke Kenase. 
1Chronicles4:16 Bomorwa Jehalelele ke Sife le Sifa le Thireya le Asarele. 
1Chronicles4:17 Bomorwa Esera ke Jethere le Merete le Efere le Jalone. Bomorwa Bithia morwadia Farao yo Merete o neng a mo nyetse, ba ene o ba belegeng ke Miriame le Samai le Iseba rraagwe Ešethemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Mme mosadi wa gagwe wa Mojuta a belega Jerete rraagwe Ketore le Hebere rraagwe Sogo le Jehuthiele rraagwe Sanoa. 
1Chronicles4:19 Bomorwa mosadi wa ga Hodiya kgaitsadia Nahame ke rraagwe Kehila wa kwa Karemi le Ešethemoa wa kwa Maaga. 
1Chronicles4:20 Bomorwa Simone ke Amenone le Rina le Benehanane le Thilone; bomorwa Isei ke Sohethe le Benesohethe. 
1Chronicles4:21 Bomorwa Sela morwa Juta ke Ere rraagwe Lega le Laeta rraagwe Mareša le ditshika tsa balogi ba letseta ba kwa Asebea; 
1Chronicles4:22 le Jokime le banna ba Koseba le Joase le Sarafe ba ba neng ba busa Moabe, le Jasubileheme. Kana ke dikgang tsa bogologolo." 
1Chronicles4:23 Bone e ne e le babopi ba dinkgwana, ba agile kwa Netaime le kwa Ketera; ba agile fa kgosing ba le mo tirong ya yona." 
1Chronicles4:24 Bomorwa Simeone ke Nemuele le Jamine le Jaribe le Sera le Saule; 
1Chronicles4:25 morwawe e le Sadume, morwawe e le Mibesame, morwawe e le Mišema." 
1Chronicles4:26 Morwa Mišema e ne e le Hamuele, morwawe e le Sakhure, morwawe e le Simei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Simei o ne a na le bomorwa ba le 16 le bomorwadi ba le barataro, mme bomorwa-rraagwe ba se na bomorwa ba bantsi. Mme losika lotlhe lwa bone lwa se ka lwa ata jaaka bomorwa Juta." 
1Chronicles4:28 Ba ne ba agile kwa Bereseba le Molata le Hasare-Šuale 
1Chronicles4:29 le kwa Bileha le Eseme le Tholate 
1Chronicles4:30 le kwa Bethuele le Horema le Sitlage 
1Chronicles4:31 le kwa Bethe-Marekabothe le kwa Hasare-Susime le kwa Bethe-Biri le kwa Saaraime. Eo e ne e le metse ya bone go fitlha pusong ya ga Dafita. 
1Chronicles4:32 Metsana ya bone e ne e le Etame le Aine le Rimone le Thogene le Ašane, metse e metlhano," 
1Chronicles4:33 le metsana yotlhe e e neng e le mo tikologong ya metse eo go fitlha kwa Baale. Ke one mafelo a bone. Ba bile ba ikwalela tlhomagano ya ditshika tsa bone. 
1Chronicles4:34 Basimeone ba bangwe ke Mesobabe le Jamelege le Josa morwa Amasia 
1Chronicles4:35 le Joele le Jehu morwa Josibja morwa Seraya morwa Asiele 
1Chronicles4:35 le Joele le Jehu morwa Josibja morwa Seraya morwa Asiele 
1Chronicles4:36 le Eleyoenai le Jaakoba le Jesohaya le Asaya le Adiele le Jesimiele le Benaya 
1Chronicles4:37 le Sisa morwa Sifei morwa Alone morwa Jetaya morwa Simeri morwa Semaya: 
1Chronicles4:38 Bao ba ba umakilweng ka maina e ne e le ditlhogo mo ditshikeng tsa bone, mme malapa a bone a ata, ba nna bantsi." 
1Chronicles4:39 Mme ba ya kwa botsenong jwa Ketore go fitlha ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya molapo, go batlela matsomane a bone mafulo." 
1Chronicles4:40 Ba fitlhela mafulo a sefuti a a siameng, mme lefatshe la teng le ne le atlhame mo ntlheng tsotlhe, le iketlile le sa tshwenye ka sepe. Kana baagi ba teng ba pele e ne e le Bahame."
