1Chronicles4:41 Mme bao ba ba kwadilweng fa ka maina ba ya teng mo malatsing a ga Hesekia kgosi ya Juta, ba senya ditente tsa bale mmogo le tsa Bameuni ba ba neng ba fitlhelwa teng, ba dirafatsa khutso ya Modimo mo go bone, ga se ka ga sadisiwa ope go fitlha letsatsing leno, mme ba aga teng mo boemong jwa bale; gonne go ne go na le mafulo a difutshane tsa bone teng." 
1Chronicles4:42 Banna ba le 500 ba Basimeone ba kile ba ya kwa thabeng ya Seire, bagogi ba bone e le Phelatya le Nearia le Refaya le Usiele bomorwa Isei." 
1Chronicles4:43 Ba bolaya masalela a Baamaleke a a neng a falotse, ba nna teng go fitlha letsatsing leno." 
1Chronicles5:1 Bomorwa Rubene morwa Iseraele wa ntlha – gonne ke ene wa ntlha, mme e re ka a ne a itshekolola bolao jwa ga rraagwe, tshiamelo ya bogolo jwa gagwe ya neelwa bomorwa Josefa morwa Iseraele, mme e se go mo kwalela bogolo mo lokwalong lwa tlhomagano ya ditshika." 
1Chronicles5:2 Gonne Juta o ne a le thata mo go bomorwa-rraagwe, mme moeteledipele e ne e le wa ga gabo Juta, fela tshiamelo ya bogolo e le ya ga Josefa –" 
1Chronicles5:3 bomorwa Rubene morwa Iseraele wa ntlha ke Henoge le Phalo le Heserone le Karemi. 
1Chronicles5:4 Morwawe Karemi e ne e le Joele, morwawe e le Semaya, morwawe e le Gogo, morwawe e le Simei," 
1Chronicles5:4 Morwawe Karemi e ne e le Joele, morwawe e le Semaya, morwawe e le Gogo, morwawe e le Simei," 
1Chronicles5:5 morwawe e le Miga, morwawe e le Reaya, morwawe e le Baale," 
1Chronicles5:6 morwawe e le Bera; ke ene yo o neng a isiwa mo botshwarong ke Thigelathe-Philesere kgosi ya Asiria, e le kgosana ya Barubene." 
1Chronicles5:7 Bomorwa-rraagwe ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone jaaka di ne tsa kwalwa mo lokwalong lwa tlhomagano ya tsona: Tlhogo ke Jehiele, a tlhomaganngwa ke Sagaria" 
1Chronicles5:8 le Bela morwa Asase morwa Sema morwa Joele; ene o ne a agile kwa Aroere le go fitlha kwa Nebo le kwa Baale-Meone. 
1Chronicles5:8 le Bela morwa Asase morwa Sema morwa Joele; ene o ne a agile kwa Aroere le go fitlha kwa Nebo le kwa Baale-Meone. 
1Chronicles5:9 Kwa botlhabatsatsi o ne a agile go ya go fitlha kwa sekakeng se se ka kwano ga noka ya Ferathe; gonne diruiwa tsa bone di ne di le dintsi mo lefatsheng la Gileate. 
1Chronicles5:10 Mo metlheng ya ga Saule Barubene ba ne ba lwa le Bahagare, ba ba bolaya ba nna mo ditenteng tsa bone ntlheng tsotlhe tsa botlhabatsatsi jwa Gileate." 
1Chronicles5:11 Bomorwa Gate ba ne ba agile go bapa nabo kwa lefatsheng la Basane go fitlha kwa Salega. 
1Chronicles5:12 Tlhogo ya bone e ne e le Joele, wa bobedi e le Safame le Jaenai le Safate kwa Basane." 
1Chronicles5:12 Tlhogo ya bone e ne e le Joele, wa bobedi e le Safame le Jaenai le Safate kwa Basane." 
1Chronicles5:13 Bomorwa-rraabo ka fa malapeng a bone ke Migaele le Mesulame le Seba le Jorai le Jakane le Sia le Ebere, ba ba supa." 
1Chronicles5:14 Ke bone bomorwa Abigaile morwa Huri morwa Jaroa morwa Gileate morwa Migaele morwa Jesisai morwa Jato morwa Buse. 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi, morwa Abadiele morwa Guni, e ne e le tlhogo ya dikgotla tsa bone." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ba ne ba agile kwa Gileate mo Basane le mo metsaneng ya teng le mo mafulong aotlhe a Sarone go ya go fitlha kwa a felelelang teng. 
1Chronicles5:17 Botlhe ba, ba ne ba kwalwa mo lokwalong lwa tlhomagano ya ditshika mo metlheng ya ga Jothame, kgosi ya Juta, le mo metlheng ya ga Jerobeame, kgosi ya Iseraele." 
1Chronicles5:18 Barubene le Bagate le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase, fa go balwa bagale, banna ba ba tshotseng dithebe le ditšhaka ba ba gagamatsang mara, ba ba rutilweng tlhabano ba ne ba le 44 760 ba ba bololang mephatong." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ba dira ntwa le Bahagare le Jeture le Nafise le Notabe," 
1Chronicles5:20 mme ba thusega ba ba fenya. Bahagare le botlhe ba ba neng ba na nabo ba neelwa mo diatleng tsa bone; gonne ba ne ba tlhaeleditse Modimo ba le mo tlhabanong, mme wa ba utlwa, ka ba o ikanya." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ba thopa diruiwa tsa bone, e bong dikammele di le 50 000 le difutshane di le 250 000 le diesele di le 2 000 le batho ba le 100 000." 
1Chronicles5:22 E bile ba bantsi ba ne ba ole ba bolailwe; gonne tlhabano e ne e tswa Modimong, mme ba nna mo mafelong a bone go ya go fitlha botshwarong." 
1Chronicles5:23 Le bomorwa bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase ba ne ba agile mo lefatsheng leo go tloga kwa Basane go fitlha kwa Baale-Heremone le kwa Senire le kwa thabeng ya Heremone. Bone ba ne ba le bantsi. 
1Chronicles5:24 Ditlhogo tsa dikgoro tsa bone e ne e le Efere le Isei le Eliele le Aseriele le Jeremia le Hotafia le Jadiele; e le banna ba bagale, banna ba ba tumileng, e le ditlhogo tsa ditshika tsa bone." 
1Chronicles5:25 Mme e rile ka ba direla Modimo wa borraabo ka boikanyologo, ba dira boaka ka go latela medimo ya merafe ya lefatshe leo, e Modimo o neng o e nyeleditse fa pele ga bone;" 
1Chronicles5:26 ka moo Modimo wa Iseraele wa tlhotlheletsa mowa wa ga Phule, e bong wa ga Thigelathe-Philesere kgosi ya Asiria, mme ya isa Barubene le Bagate le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase mo botshwarong, ya ba isa kwa Hala le Habore le kwa dithabeng tsa Media le kwa nokeng ya Gosane. Ba sa ntse ba nna teng go fitlha letsatsing leno." 
1Chronicles6:1 Bomorwa Lefi ke Geresone le Kahathe le Merari. 
1Chronicles6:2 Bomorwa Kahathe ke Amerame le Isehare le Heberone le Usiele. 
1Chronicles6:3 Bana ba ga Amerame ke Arone le Moše le Miriame. Bomorwa Arone ke Natabe le Abihu le Eleasare le Ithamare.

1Chronicles6:46 morwa Amesi morwa Bani morwa Semere

1Chronicles6:49 Fela Arone le bomorwawe ba ne ba na le go tshuba ditlhabelo mo aletareng ya ditlhabelo tsa phiso le maswalo mo aletareng ya musi le go dira tiro yotlhe ya Felo-ga-Boitshepo-jwa-Maitshepo le go batlela Baiseraele boitshwarelo fela jaaka go ne go laetse Moše motlhanka wa Modimo.

1Chronicles6:55 ba ne ba fiwa Heberone mo lefatsheng la Juta le mafulo a teng mo tikologong. 
1Chronicles6:56 Mme Kalebe morwa Jefune a abelwa masimo a motse oo le metsana ya ona.

1Chronicles6:59 le Ašane le mafulo a teng le Betšhemeše le mafulo a teng. 
1Chronicles6:60 Mo nageng ya lotso lwa ga Benyamene ba abelwa Geba le mafulo a teng le Alemethe le mafulo a teng le Anathothe le mafulo a teng. Metse yotlhe ya bone e ne e le metse e le 13 le mafulo a yona. 
1Chronicles6:61 Bomorwa Kahathe ba bangwe ba abelwa ka tengwa metse e le some ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone mo nageng ya lotso lwa ga Eferaime le ya lotso lwa ga Dane le ya bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase. 
1Chronicles6:62 Bomorwa Geresone ba abelwa metse e le 13 ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone mo nageng ya lotso lwa ga Isašare le ya lotso lwa ga Asere le ya lotso lwa ga Nafetale le ya lotso lwa ga Manase yo o kwa Basane. 
1Chronicles6:63 Bomorwa Merari ba abelwa ka tengwa metse e le 12 ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone mo nageng ya lotso lwa ga Rubene le ya lotso lwa ga Gate le ya lotso lwa ga Sebulone. 
1Chronicles6:64 Baiseraele ba naya Balefi metse eo le mafulo a yona. 
1Chronicles6:65 Ba naya baperesiti ka tengwa metse ele e e boletsweng ka maina mo lotsong lwa ga Juta le mo lotsong lwa ga Simeone le mo lotsong lwa ga Benyamene.

1Chronicles6:69 le Ayalone le mafulo a teng le Gathe-Rimone le mafulo a teng. 
1Chronicles6:70 Mo go bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase tsa newa Anere le mafulo a teng le Bileame le mafulo a teng. Ke yona e e neng e le ya losika lwa bomorwa Kahathe ba bangwe. 
1Chronicles6:71 Bomorwa Geresone ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone ba abelwa metse mo botlhanngweng jwa lotso lwa ga Manase, e bong Golane kwa Basane le mafulo a teng le Ašetharothe le mafulo a teng."

1Chronicles6:73 le Jaremuthe le mafulo a teng le Aneme le mafulo a teng.

1Chronicles6:75 le Hukoke le mafulo a teng le Rehobe le mafulo a teng. 
1Chronicles6:76 Mo lotsong lwa ga Nafetale ba abelwa Keteše kwa Galelea le mafulo a teng le Hamone le mafulo a teng le Khiriathaime le mafulo a teng.

1Chronicles7:1 Bomorwa Isašare ke Thola le Phua le Jašube le Simerone, ba bane." 
1Chronicles7:2 Bomorwa Thola ke Usi le Refaya le Jeriele le Jamai le Ibesame le Samuele; ke tsona ditlhogo tsa dikgoro tsa ga gabo Thola e le bagale. Ba kwadilwe lokwalong ka fa tlhomaganong ya bone. Palo ya bone mo metlheng ya ga Dafita e ne e le 22 600. 
1Chronicles7:3 Morwa Usi e ne e le Iseraya; bomorwa Iseraya e le Migaele le Obatya le Joele le Isia, ba batlhano, e le ditlhogo botlhe." 
1Chronicles7:3 Morwa Usi e ne e le Iseraya; bomorwa Iseraya e le Migaele le Obatya le Joele le Isia, ba batlhano, e le ditlhogo botlhe." 
1Chronicles7:4 Mme mephato ya batlhabani ba le 36 000 e ne e na nabo ka fa tlhomaganong ya malapa a bone; gonne ba ne ba na le basadi ba bantsi le bana ba bantsi. 
1Chronicles7:5 Ba ga gabo Isašare ba ditshika tsotlhe tsa gagwe e ne e le batlhabani ba ba pelokgale; botlhe mmogo ba ne ba le 87 000 ka fa ba kwadilweng ka teng mo lokwalong lwa ditshika. 
1Chronicles7:6 Bomorwa Benyamene e ne e le Bela le Begere le Jediaele, ba bararo." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bomorwa Bela e ne e le Esebone le Usi le Usiele le Jerimothe le Iri, tlhogo tse tlhano tsa dikgoro, batlhabani ba ba pelokgale. Lokwalo lwa ditshika tsa bone lwa bala ba le 22 034." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bomorwa Begere e ne e le Semira le Joase le Eliesere le Eleyoenai le Omeri le Jeremothe le Abia le Anathothe le Alemethe; botlhe bao e le bomorwa Begere. 
1Chronicles7:9 Ba ne ba kwalwa lokwalong ka fa tlhomaganong ya bone e le ditlhogo tsa dikgoro le batlhabani ba ba pelokgale ba le 20 200. 
1Chronicles7:10 Morwa Jediaele e ne e le Bilehane; bomorwa Bilehane e le Jeuse le Benyamene le Ehute le Kenaana le Sethane le Tharesise le Ahisahare. 
1Chronicles7:11 Botlhe bao e ne e le bomorwa Jediaele e le ditlhogo tsa dikgoro le batlhabani ba ba pelokgale ba le 17 200 ba ba bololang mephatong go tlhabana. 
1Chronicles7:12 Suphime le Huphime e ne e le bomorwa Ire; Hušime e le morwa Ahere. 
1Chronicles7:13 Bomorwa Nafetale morwa Bileha e ne e le Jahaseele le Kuni le Jesere le Sadume. 
1Chronicles7:14 Bomorwa Manase ke Aseriele le Magire, rraagwe Gileate, ba a ba tshotseng le mogadingwana wa gagwe wa Mosiria." 
1Chronicles7:15 Gileate a tsaya mosadi yo leina la gagwe e leng Maaga, leina la kgaitsadie e le Hamolegethe, la morwa-rraagwe e le Selofehate. Mme Selofehate o ne a na le bomorwadi fela." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaga mosadi wa ga Gileate a belega morwa, a mo taya leina la Pherese, leina la monnawe e le Serese; bomorwawe e le Ulame le Rekeme." 
1Chronicles7:17 Morwa Ulame e ne e le Betane. Ke bone bomorwa Gileate morwa Magire morwa Manase. 
1Chronicles7:18 Kgaitsadie Hamolegethe a belega Išote le Abiesere le Magala. 
1Chronicles7:19 Bomorwa Semita morwa Gileate e ne e le Ayane le Šegeme le Lekhi le Aniame. 
1Chronicles7:20 Morwa Eferaime e ne e le Suthela, morwawe e le Berete, morwawe e le Thahathe, morwawe e le Eleata, morwawe e le Thahathe," 
1Chronicles7:21 morwawe e le Sabate, bomorwawe e le Suthela le Esere le Eleate. Bao ba ne ba bolawa ke banna ba Gathe, ba e neng e le beng ba lefatshe, ka ba ne ba bolotse go ba amoga diruiwa." 
1Chronicles7:22 Mme rraabo Eferaime a ba hutsafalela malatsi a mantsi, mme bomorwa-rraagwe ba tla go mo gomotsa." 
1Chronicles7:23 A ba a tsena mo mosading wa gagwe, mme a nna moimana a belega morwa, mme monna a mmitsa Beria; gonne go ne go dirafaletse lelapa la gagwe jalo sebakeng sa tatlhego." 
1Chronicles7:24 Morwadie e ne e le Seera; ene a aga Bethorone wa kwa tlase le wa kwa godimo le Usene-Seera. 
1Chronicles7:25 Morwawe e ne e le Refa, morwawe e le Resefe, morwawe e le Thela, morwawe e le Thahane," 
1Chronicles7:26 morwawe e le Laetane, morwawe e le Amihute, morwawe e le Elisama," 
1Chronicles7:27 morwawe e le Nune, morwawe e le Jošua." 
1Chronicles7:28 Boswa jwa bone le magae a bone e ne e le Bethele le metsana ya teng le Naarane kwa botlhabatsatsi le Gesere le metsana ya teng kwa bophirimatsatsi le Šegeme le metsana ya teng go ya go fitlha kwa Aya le metsana ya teng. 
1Chronicles7:29 Magae a boora Manase e ne e le Betšheane le metsana ya teng le Thaenage le metsana ya teng le Megito le metsana ya teng le Dore le metsana ya teng. Ke gona fa go neng go agile bomorwa Josefa morwa Iseraele. 
1Chronicles7:30 Bomorwa Asere e ne e le Imena le Iswa le Iswi le Beria le Sera, kgaitsadia-bone." 
1Chronicles7:31 Bomorwa Beria e ne e le Hebere le Malekhiele; ke ene rraagwe Biresaithe. 
1Chronicles7:32 Mme Hebere a tsala Jafelete le Somere le Hothame le Sua, kgaitsadia-bone." 
1Chronicles7:33 Bomorwa Jafelete e ne e le Phasage le Bimehale le Ašefathe; ke bone bomorwa Jafelete. 
1Chronicles7:34 Bomorwa Semere, morwa-rraagwe, e ne e le Rohaga le Huba le Arame." 
1Chronicles7:35 Bomorwa Hothame, morwa-rraagwe, e ne e le Sofa le Imena le Selese le Amale." 
1Chronicles7:36 Bomorwa Sofa e ne e le Sua le Harenefere le Suale le Beri le Imera 
1Chronicles7:37 le Besere le Hote le Sama le Silesa le Itherane le Beera. 
1Chronicles7:38 Bomorwa Jethere e ne e le Jefune le Fisepha le Ara. 
1Chronicles7:39 Bomorwa Ula e ne e le Ara le Haniele le Risia. 
1Chronicles7:40 Botlhe bao e ne e le boora Asere, e le ditlhogo tsa dikgoro, e le batlhabani ba ba pelokgale ba ba tlhaotsweng, e le ditlhogo tsa baeteledipele. Palo ya bone ba ba kwadilweng mo lokwalong lwa mephato mo ntweng e ne e le banna ba le 26 000." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamene o ne a tsala Bela morwawe wa ntlha, wa bobedi e le Asebele, wa boraro e le Ahara;" 
1Chronicles8:2 wa bone e le Noga, wa botlhano e le Rafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela o ne a na le bomorwa, e bong Atare le Gera rraagwe Ehute" 
1Chronicles8:4 le Abisua le Naamane le Ahoa 
1Chronicles8:5 le Gera le Sefufane le Hurame. 
1Chronicles8:6 Bomorwa Ehute ke ba: (bone e ne e le ditlhogo tsa dikgoro mo baaging ba Geba; ba ba hudusa ba ba isa kwa Manahathe)," 
1Chronicles8:7 mme e ne e le Naamane le Ahiya le Gera yo o neng a ba hudusa – ene a tsala Usa le Ahihute. 
1Chronicles8:8 E rile Saharaime a sena go tlhala Hušime le Baara, basadi ba gagwe, a tsala bana kwa nageng ya Moabe" 
1Chronicles8:9 le Hotese mosadi wa gagwe; a tsala Jobabe le Sibja le Meša le Malekame 
1Chronicles8:9 le Hotese mosadi wa gagwe; a tsala Jobabe le Sibja le Meša le Malekame 
1Chronicles8:10 le Jeuse le Sageya le Mirema. Bao e ne e le bomorwawe, e le ditlhogo tsa dikgoro." 
1Chronicles8:11 O ne a tsetse Abitube le Elephaale le Hušime, mosadi wa pele." 
1Chronicles8:12 Bomorwa Elephaale e ne e le Ebere le Miseame le Semete. Ke ene yo o neng a aga Ono le Lote le metsana ya teng. 
1Chronicles8:13 Beria le Sema bone e ne e le ditlhogo tsa dikgoro tsa baagi ba Ayalone; bone ba leleka baagi ba Gathe. 
1Chronicles8:14 Mme Ayo le Sasake le Jeremothe 
1Chronicles8:15 le Sebatya le Arate le Etere 
1Chronicles8:16 le Migaele le Isepha le Joha e ne e le bomorwa Beria. 
1Chronicles8:17 Mme Sebatya le Mesulame le Hisekhi le Hebere 
1Chronicles8:18 le Isemarai le Isedia le Jobabe e ne e le bomorwa Elephaale. 
1Chronicles8:18 le Isemarai le Isedia le Jobabe e ne e le bomorwa Elephaale. 
1Chronicles8:19 Mme Jakime le Sigeri le Sabedi 
1Chronicles8:20 le Elienai le Silethai le Eliele 
1Chronicles8:21 le Ataya le Beraya le Simerathe e ne e le bomorwa Simei. 
1Chronicles8:22 Mme Išephane le Ebere le Eliele 
1Chronicles8:23 le Abetone le Sigeri le Hanane 
1Chronicles8:24 le Hananya le Elame le Anathothia 
1Chronicles8:25 le Efedia le Phenuele e ne e le bomorwa Sasake. 
1Chronicles8:26 Mme Sameserai le Seharia le Athalea 
1Chronicles8:27 le Jaaresia le Elia le Sigeri e ne e le bomorwa Jerohame. 
1Chronicles8:28 Bao e ne e le ditlhogo tsa dikgoro, e le ditlhogo tsa ditshika tsa bone; bao ba ne ba agile kwa Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles8:29 Mme kwa Gibeone go ne go agile Jehuele, rraagwe Gibeone; leina la mosadi wa gagwe e le Maaga." 
1Chronicles8:30 Morwawe wa ntlha e ne e le Abetone, bomonnawe e le Sure le Khiše le Baale le Nere le Natabe" 
1Chronicles8:31 le Ketore le Ayo le Segere le Mikelothe. 
1Chronicles8:32 Mme Mikelothe a tsala Šimea. Bao le bone ba ne ba agile le ba ga bone kwa Jerusalema, ba lebaganye le ba ga bone ba ba kwa Gibeone." 
1Chronicles8:33 Mme Nere a tsala Abenere, Khiše a tsala Saule, Saule a tsala Jonathane le Malekhišua le Abinatabe le Esebaale." 
1Chronicles8:34 Mme morwa Jonathane e ne e le Meribaale; Meribaale a tsala Miga. 
1Chronicles8:35 Bomorwa Miga e ne e le Phithone le Melege le Tharea le Ahase. 
1Chronicles8:36 Mme Ahase a tsala Joata; Joata a tsala Alemethe le Asemawethe le Simeri. Mme Simeri a tsala Mosa. 
1Chronicles8:37 Mme Mosa a tsala Binea; morwawe e le Rafa, morwawe e le Eleasa, morwawe e le Asele." 
1Chronicles8:38 Asele o ne a na le bomorwa ba le barataro, maina a bone e le Aserikame le Bogeru le Isemaele le Searia le Obatya le Hanane; botlhe bao e le bomorwa Asele." 
1Chronicles8:39 Bomorwa Eseke, morwa-rraagwe, e ne e le Ulame morwawe wa ntlha, wa bobedi e le Jeuse, wa boraro e le Elifelete." 
1Chronicles8:40 Bomorwa Ulame e ne e le banna ba bagale, bahudi ba mara; ba na le bana le bana ba bana ba bantsi, e bong ba le 150. Botlhe bao e ne e le Babenyamene." 
1Chronicles9:1 Baiseraele botlhe ba ne ba kwalwa mo lokwalong lwa ditshika tsa bone. Kana ba kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa dikgosi tsa Iseraele. Mme Bajuta ba tloga ba isiwa botshwarong kwa Babele ka ntlha ya boikanyologo jwa bone. 
1Chronicles9:2 Baagi ba pele ba ba neng ba le mo kabelong ya bone mo metseng ya bone e ne e le Baiseraele le baperesiti le Balefi le badiredi ba Tempele. 
1Chronicles9:3 Mme mo Jerusalema go ne go agile bangwe ba Bajuta le ba Babenyamene le ba Baeferaime le ba Bamanase. 
1Chronicles9:4 Ba Bajuta e ne e le Uthai morwa Amihute morwa Omeri morwa Imeri morwa Bani wa boora Pherese morwa Juta. 
1Chronicles9:5 Boora Sela morwa Juta e ne e le Asaya motsalwapele le bomorwawe. 
1Chronicles9:6 Ba ga gabo Sera morwa Juta e ne e le boJehuele le bomorwa-rraabo. Mmogo ba le 690. 
1Chronicles9:7 Ba Babenyamene e ne e le Salo morwa Mesulame morwa Hotafia morwa Hasenua," 
1Chronicles9:8 le Ibenia morwa Jerohame le Ela morwa Usi morwa Migeri le Mesulame morwa Sefatya morwa Rehuele morwa Ibenia 
1Chronicles9:9 le ba ga bone ka fa tlhomaganong ya bone, mmogo ba le 956. Banna botlhe bao e ne e le ditlhogo tsa dikgoro mo ditshikeng tsa bone." 
1Chronicles9:10 Ba baperesiti e ne e le Jetaya le Joyaribe la Jagine 
1Chronicles9:11 le Asaria morwa Hilekia morwa Mesulame morwa Satoke morwa Merayothe morwa Ahitube moperesiti yo mogolo wa Ntlo ya Modimo; 
1Chronicles9:12 le Ataya morwa Jerohame morwa Phašure morwa Malekhia le Maesai morwa Adiele morwa Jasera morwa Mesulame morwa Mesilemithe morwa Imere 
1Chronicles9:13 le ba ga bone, ditlhogo tsa dikgoro tsa bone, mmogo ba le 1 760 banna ba ba tlhalefetseng tirelo mo Ntlong ya Modimo." 
1Chronicles9:14 Ba Balefi e ne e le Semaya morwa Hašube morwa Aserikame morwa Hasabja wa boora Merari 
1Chronicles9:15 le Bakabakare le Herese le Galale le Mathanya morwa Miga morwa Sigeri morwa Asafe 
1Chronicles9:16 le Obatya morwa Semaya morwa Galale morwa Jeduthune morwa Beregia morwa Asa morwa Elekana yo o neng a agile mo metsaneng ya Banetofa. 
1Chronicles9:17 Badisa ba dikgoro e ne e le Sadume le Akhube le Talemone le Ahimane le ba ga bone. Sadume ke tlhogo ya bone," 
1Chronicles9:18 mme o disa kwa kgorong ya botlhabatsatsi ya kgosi go fitlha kajeno. Ke bone badisa ba dikgoro tsa mathibelelo a Balefi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Mme Sadume morwa Kore morwa Ebjasafe morwa Kora le ba ga gabo ba lelapa la ga rraagwe ba ga gabo Kora ba ne ba dirilwe baokamedi ba tirelo eo, e le badisa ba mejako ya tente, ka borraabo ba ne ba okametse bothibelelo jwa Morena, e le badisa ba kgoro." 
1Chronicles9:20 Mo metlheng ya pele Phinehase morwa Eleasare e ne e le moeteledipele yo o ba okametseng. – A Morena a nne nae! 
1Chronicles9:21 Sagaria morwa Meselemia e ne e le modisa wa mojako wa Tente ya Boipontsho. 
1Chronicles9:22 Bone botlhe ba ba neng ba tlhaotswe go nna badisa ba mejako ba ne ba le 212; ba kwalwa mo lokwalong lwa ditshika tsa bone mo metsaneng ya ga bone. Dafita le Samuele wa Mmoni ba ne ba ba tlhomamisa mo tshwanelong ya tiso ya bone. 
1Chronicles9:23 Bone le bomorwaa-bone ba ne ba okametse dikgoro tsa ntlo ya Morena, e bong tsa ntlo ya tente go di disa." 
1Chronicles9:24 Badisa ba dikgoro ba ne ba tshwanetse go nna mo ntlheng tse nne kwa botlhabatsatsi le kwa bophirimatsatsi le kwa bokone le kwa borwa. 
1Chronicles9:25 Ba ga bone ba ba neng ba nna mo metsaneng ya bone ba ne ba tshwanetse go tla go disa nabo malatsi a supa ka dipaka tsa teng. 
1Chronicles9:26 Mme badisa ba bane ba bagolo ba dikgoro bone ba ne ba tshwanetse go disa ka metlha. Balefi ba bangwe ba ne ba okametse matlwana a Ntlo ya Modimo le mahumo a yona. 
1Chronicles9:27 Ba ne ba lala mo tikologong ya Ntlo ya Modimo, ka ba ne ba na le go disa; le gona ba tshotse selotlele go e bula mo mosong mongwe le mongwe." 
1Chronicles9:28 Bangwe ba bone e ne e le batlhokomedi ba didiri tsa tirelo. Kana ba ne ba tshwanetse go di boloka di badilwe le go di ntsha gape di badilwe. 
1Chronicles9:29 Ba bangwe ba bone ba ne ba dirilwe baokamedi ba dijana, ba dijana tsa mefutafuta tse di boitshepo le ba bupe jo bo boleta le weine le lookwane le musi wa maswalo le makga." 
1Chronicles9:30 Bangwe ba bomorwa baperesiti ba ne ba tlhakanya setlolo ka makga a mefutafuta. 
1Chronicles9:31 Mme Mathitya mongwe wa Balefi morwa wa ntlha wa ga Sadume wa ga gabo Kora e ne e le mookamedi wa baapei. 
1Chronicles9:32 Bangwe ba ga gabo Kahathe ba ne ba okametse dinkgwe tsa tshupo; ba na le go di baakanya ka Sabata mongwe le mongwe. 
1Chronicles9:33 Go ne go le baopedi ditlhogo tsa dikgoro tsa Balefi, ba nna mo matlwaneng a Tempele, ba golotswe mo tirong tse dingwe, ka ba tshwaregile ka tiro ya bone bosigo le motshegare." 
1Chronicles9:34 Ke bone ditlhogo tsa dikgoro tsa Balefi ka fa tlhomaganong ya bone; ba ne ba agile kwa Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles9:35 Mme kwa Gibeone go ne go agile Jehuele rraagwe Gibeone – leina la mosadi wa gagwe e le Maaga – 
1Chronicles9:36 le morwawe wa ntlha Abetone le bomonnawe Sure le Khiše le Baale le Nere le Natabe 
1Chronicles9:37 le Ketore le Ayo le Sagaria le Mikelothe. 
1Chronicles9:38 Mme Mikelothe a tsala Simeame; bao le bone ba ne ba agile le ba ga bone kwa Jerusalema, ba lebaganye le ba ga bone ba ba kwa Gibeone." 
1Chronicles9:39 Mme Nere a tsala Abenere, Khiše a tsala Saule, Saule a tsala Jonathane le Malekhišua le Abinatabe le Esebaale." 
1Chronicles9:40 Morwa Jonathane e ne e le Meribaale, mme Meribaale a tsala Miga." 
1Chronicles9:41 Bomorwa Miga e ne e le Phithone le Melege le Tharea le Ahase. 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahase a tsala Jaera. Jaera a tsala Alemethe le Asemawethe le Simeri; Simeri a tsala Mosa. 
1Chronicles9:43 Mosa a tsala Binea; morwawe e le Refaya, morwawe e le Eleasa, morwawe e le Asele." 
1Chronicles9:44 Asele o ne a na le bomorwa ba le barataro. Maina a bone ke a: Aserikame le Bogeru le Isemaele le Searia le Obatya le Hanane. Ke bone bomorwa Asele. 
1Chronicles10:1 Bafelesita ba kile ba tlhabana le Baiseraele, mme banna ba Iseraele ba tshaba ba lelekwa ke Bafelesita, ba bolawa ba wela mo dithabeng tsa Gileboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Mme Bafelesita ba khutšhela Saule le bomorwawe, ba bolaya Jonathane le Abinatabe le Malekhišua bomorwa Saule." 
1Chronicles10:3 Jaanong ya re tlhabano e ketefalela Saule, mme ba ba hulang ka mara ba mmona, a tlalelwa thata ka ntlha ya bahudi." 
1Chronicles10:4 Ke fa Saule a raya morwala-dibolai wa gagwe a re: “Somola tšhaka ya gago, o mphololetse ka yona, e se re gongwe ga tla ba ba sa rupang bale ba ntirela ka tshotlo.” Mme morwala-dibolai wa gagwe a gana, ka a boifa thata. Ke fa Saule a tsaya tšhaka a itigela mo go yona." 
1Chronicles10:5 Ya re morwala-dibolai wa gagwe a bona Saule a sule le ene a itigela mo tšhakeng ya gagwe, a swa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Saule a swa jalo le bomorwawe ba bararo le botlhe ba lapa la gagwe, ba swa mmogo." 
1Chronicles10:7 Ya re banna botlhe ba Iseraele ba kwa lebaleng ba bona Baiseraele ba tshabile le Saule le bomorwawe ba sule, ba tlogela metse ya bone, ba tshaba; ga tla Bafelesita ba nna mo go yona." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ya re kamoso Bafelesita ba tla go thukhutha ba ba bolailweng dilo, ba fitlhela Saule le bomorwawe ba namaletse mo dithabeng tsa Gileboa;" 
1Chronicles10:9 ba mo thukhutha, ba tsaya tlhogo ya gagwe le dibolai tsa gagwe, ba di romela kwa lefatsheng la Bafelesita ntlheng tsotlhe, e le go bolelela medimo ya bone le morafe mafoko a phenyo." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ba baya dibolai tsa gagwe mo ntlong ya ga Dagone modimo wa bone, logata lwa gagwe le lone ba lo kokotela mo go yona." 
1Chronicles10:11 E rile baagi botlhe ba Jabese kwa Gileate ba utlwela tsotlhe tse Bafelesita ba di diretseng Saule," 
1Chronicles10:12 ga nanoga banna botlhe ba ba pelokgale, ba tsaya serepa sa ga Saule le tsa bomorwawe, ba di isa kwa Jabese, ba fitlha marapo a bone fa tlase ga mooka kwa Jabese, ba itima dijo malatsi a supa." 
1Chronicles10:13 Saule a swela jalo mo boikanyologong jwa gagwe jo o neng a leofetse Morena ka jona ka ntlha ya lefoko la Morena le a se kang a le tshegetsa; le gona ka ntlha ya go botsa mowa wa moswi go batla kgakololo. 
1Chronicles10:14 Mme a se ka a batla kgakololo mo Moreneng. Ka moo Morena a mo gogela losong, mme a sokololela bogosi kwa go Dafita morwa Isai." 
1Chronicles11:1 Morago ga moo Baiseraele botlhe ba phuthegela kwa go Dafita kwa Heberone ba re: “Kana re lesapo la gago le nama ya gago! 
1Chronicles11:2 O sa le o bolotsa Baiseraele le go ba gorosa, Saule a sa le kgosi. E bile Morena, Modimo wa gago, o go laetse wa re: ‘Wena o tla fudisa morafe wa me wa Iseraele, o nna moetapele wa ona, o o busa.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Ga ba ga tla bagolo botlhe ba Iseraele kwa kgosing kwa Heberone, mme Dafita a dira kgolagano nabo kwa Heberone fa pele ga Morena. Ba be ba tlotsa Dafita go nna kgosi ya Iseraele ka fa lefokong la Morena le o le buileng ka Samuele." 
1Chronicles11:4 Morago ga moo Dafita a ya kwa Jerusalema yo e neng e le Jebusi, a na le Baiseraele botlhe. Teng go ne go agile Bajebusi mo lefatsheng leo." 
1Chronicles11:5 Mme baagi ba Jebusi ba raya Dafita ba re: “Ga o kitla o tsena ka mo!” Mme Dafita a thopa thaba e e femetsweng ya Sione. Ke yona tshimologo ya motse wa ga Dafita. 
1Chronicles11:6 Dafita o ne a buile a re: “Mangmang yo o ka fenyang Bajebusi e le wa ntlha o tla nna tlhogo le kgosana.” Mme Joabe morwa Seruya a palama pele, a nna tlhogo ya mephato." 
1Chronicles11:7 Jaanong Dafita a nna mo thabeng e e femetsweng; ke ka moo e bidiwang motse wa ga Dafita. 
1Chronicles11:8 Dafita a ba a agelela motse mo tikologong go tloga kagong ya phemelo ya Milo go ya go o dikologa otlhe. Joabe ene a tsosa dikarolo tse di senyegileng tsa motse. 
1Chronicles11:9 Mme Dafita a nna a tia, ka Morena wa masomosomo a na nae." 
1Chronicles11:10 Ba ke ditlhogo tsa bagale ba ga Dafita ba ba neng ba mo emela thata gore a bone bogosi, ba na le Baiseraele botlhe gore ba mo dire kgosi ka fa lefokong la Morena ka ga Iseraele." 
1Chronicles11:11 Palo ya bagale ba ga Dafita ke e: Jasobeame morwa Hagemoni, tlhogo ya ba bararo. Ene o kile a kgadikanya lerumo la gagwe godimo ga ba le 300 ba ba bolailweng ka nako e le nngwe." 
1Chronicles11:12 A tlhomagannwa ke Eleasare morwa Doto wa kwa Ahohi; yoo e ne e le mongwe wa bagale ba bararo. 
1Chronicles11:13 O ne a na le Dafita kwa Phase-Damime kwa Bafelesita ba phuthegetseng teng go tlhabana. Mme go ne go le tshimo e e lemilweng e e tletseng garase. Jaanong ya re batho ba tshaba Bafelesita," 
1Chronicles11:14 ene a ikemisa mo gare ga tshimo eo a e amoga baba, a bolaya Bafelesita, mme Morena a ba naya phenyo e kgolo ka ene." 
1Chronicles11:15 Ba le bararo ba ditlhogo di le 30 tsa bagale ba kile ba fologa, ba fitlha kwa go Dafita a le kwa lefikeng mo logageng lwa Adulame, mme bothibelelo jwa Bafelesita bo le kwa lebaleng la Refaime." 
1Chronicles11:16 Ka sebaka seo Dafita o ne a le kwa thabeng e e femetsweng, mme balebedi ba puso ya Bafelesita ba le kwa Betleheme." 
1Chronicles11:17 Foo Dafita a utlwa lenyora, mme a re: “Ke mang yo o ka nnosang metsi a a tswang go gelelwa kwa mokweleng o o fa kgorong ya Betleheme?”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Ke fa ba bararo ba, ba sutlhelela bothibelelo jwa Bafelesita, ba gelela metsi mo mokweleng o o fa kgorong ya Betleheme, ba a tsaya ba a isa kwa go Dafita, mme Dafita a gana go a nwa, mme a a tshololela Morena" 
1Chronicles11:19 a re: “A Modimo wa me o nthibele go ka dira jalo! A nka nwa madi a banna bao ba ba tsentseng maphelo a bone mo kotsing?” Mme a gana go a nwa. Bagale ba bararo ba dirile jalo. 
1Chronicles11:20 Abisai monnaa Joabe e ne e le tlhogo ya ba bararo; o kile a kgadikanya lerumo la gagwe godimo ga ba le 300 ba o neng a ba bolaya, mme o ne a tumile mo go ba bararo." 
1Chronicles11:21 Mo go ba bararo o ne a tlotlega bogolo go ba babedi, a nna molaodi wa bone, mme a se ka a lekana le ba bararo ba pele." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya morwa Joyata morwa monna wa senatla wa ditiro tse dikgolo wa kwa Kapsheele ene a bolaya bagale ba babedi ba Moabe; a ba a fologa a bolaela tau mo mokweleng ka letsatsi la semathana. 
1Chronicles11:23 E bile ke ene yo o kileng a bolaya Moegepeto, monna wa boleele jwa mabogo a le matlhano; Moegepeto a tshotse lerumo le lore lwa lone lo leng kana ka mosipuri wa balogi, mme Benaya a ya kwa go ene ka thobane fela, a phamola lerumo mo seatleng sa Moegepeto, a mmolaya ka lone lerumo leo la gagwe." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ke tsona tse di dirilweng ke Benaya morwa Joyata; o ne a tumile mo bagaleng ba bararo. 
1Chronicles11:25 Kana o ne a tlotlega bogolo go ba ba 30, mme a se ka a lekana le ba bararo bale. Mme Dafita a mo dira molaodi wa bafemedi ba gagwe." 
1Chronicles11:26 Bagale ba bangwe ba pelokgale e ne e le Asahele monnaa Joabe le Elehanane morwa Doto wa kwa Betleheme; 
1Chronicles11:27 le Samothe wa kwa Harote le Helese wa kwa Phelone 
1Chronicles11:28 le Ira morwa Ikese wa kwa Thekoa le Abiesere wa kwa Anathothe 
1Chronicles11:29 le Sibegai wa kwa Huša le Ilai wa kwa Ahohi 
1Chronicles11:30 le Maharai wa kwa Netofa le Helete morwa Baana wa kwa Netofa 
1Chronicles11:31 le Ithai morwa Ribai wa kwa Gibea wa Babenyamene le Benaya wa kwa Phirathone 
1Chronicles11:32 le Hurai wa kwa Nagale-Gaaše le Abiele wa kwa Areba 
1Chronicles11:33 le Asemawethe wa kwa Baharume le Eliaba wa kwa Saalebone 
1Chronicles11:34 le bomorwa Haseme wa kwa Gisone le Jonathane morwa Sage wa kwa Harari 
1Chronicles11:35 le Ahiame morwa Sagare wa kwa Harari le Elifale morwa Ure 
1Chronicles11:36 le Hefere wa kwa Megera le Ahia wa kwa Phelone 
1Chronicles11:37 le Hesero wa kwa Karemele le Naarai morwa Esebai 
1Chronicles11:38 le Joele morwa rraagwe Nathane le Mibegare morwa Hageri 
1Chronicles11:38 le Joele morwa rraagwe Nathane le Mibegare morwa Hageri 
1Chronicles11:39 le Seleke wa Moamone le Naharai wa kwa Beerothe, morwala-dibolai wa ga Joabe morwa Seruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 le Ira wa Moithere le Garebe wa Moithere 
1Chronicles11:41 le Uria wa Mohethe le Sabate morwa Ahelai 
1Chronicles11:42 le Adina morwa Sisa wa Morubene, tlhogo ya Barubene, a na le ba le 30;" 
1Chronicles11:43 le Hanane morwa Maaga le Josafate wa kwa Methene 
1Chronicles11:44 le Usia wa kwa Asethera le Sama le Jehiele, bomorwa Hothame wa kwa Aroere;" 
1Chronicles11:45 le Jediaele morwa Simeri le Joha morwa-rraagwe, ba kwa Thisa;" 
1Chronicles11:46 le Eliele wa kwa Mahawime le Jeribai le Josabja bomorwa Elenaame le Ithema wa kwa Moabe 
1Chronicles11:47 le Eliele le Obete le Jaasiele wa kwa Mesobaya. 
1Chronicles12:1 Ba ke ba ba neng ba tla kwa go Dafita kwa Sitlage fa a sa ntse a lelekwa ke Saule morwa Khiše. Le bone e ne e le bagale ba ba thusitseng mo ntweng. 
1Chronicles12:2 Ba ne ba tshotse mara, ba itse go konopa ka seragamajwe le go hula metsu ka bora ka letsogo le le jang le ka la molema. Ba ga gabo Saule ba Babenyamene e ne e le ba:" 
1Chronicles12:3 Ahiesere yo e leng tlhogo le Joase morwa Semaa wa kwa Gibea; le Jesiele le Phelete bomorwa Asemawethe le Beraga le Jehu wa kwa Anathothe; 
1Chronicles12:4 le Isemaya wa kwa Gibeone mogale mo go ba ba 30 le molaodi wa ba ba 30; le Jeremia le Jahasiele le Johanane le Josabate wa kwa Ketera 
1Chronicles12:5 le Elusai le Jerimothe le Bealea le Semaria le Sefatya wa kwa Harufe 
1Chronicles12:6 le Elekana le Isia le Asarele le Joesere le Jasobeame ba ga gabo Kora; 
1Chronicles12:7 le Joela le Sebatya bomorwa Jerohame wa kwa Ketore. 
1Chronicles12:7 le Joela le Sebatya bomorwa Jerohame wa kwa Ketore. 
1Chronicles12:8 Le bangwe ba Bagate ba itomololela kwa go Dafita kwa thabeng e e femetsweng sekakeng, e le bagale ba ba pelokgale, banna ba mephato ba ba itseng go tlhabana ba ba tshwereng thebe le lerumo, ba le difatlhego tsa tau, ba le lebelo jaaka mefele kwa dithabeng." 
1Chronicles12:9 Esere e ne e le tlhogo, wa bobedi e le Obatya, wa boraro e le Eliabe," 
1Chronicles12:10 wa bone e le Misemana, wa botlhano e le Jeremia," 
1Chronicles12:11 wa borataro e le Athai, wa bosupa e le Eliele," 
1Chronicles12:12 wa robedi e le Johanane, wa robongwe e le Elesabate," 
1Chronicles12:13 wa some e le Jeremia, wa some nngwe e le Magebanai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Bao e ne e le Bagate, e le ditlhogo tsa mephato; yo mmotlana wa bona a kgona ba le lekgolo, yo mogolo a kgona ba le sekete." 
1Chronicles12:15 Ke bone ba ba neng ba tshela noka ya Joretane e tletse dintshing tsotlhe, e bile e tlhatsa ka kgwedi ya ntlha, ba leleka baagi botlhe ba megorogoro ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi le ntlheng ya bophirima." 
1Chronicles12:16 Le gona ga tla bangwe ba Babenyamene le ba Bajuta kwa thabeng e e femetsweng kwa go Dafita. 
1Chronicles12:17 Ke fa Dafita a ba kgatlhantsha, a simolola go bua a ba raya a re: “Fa lo tsile kwano go nna ka kagiso go nthusa, foo ke tla ikopanya le lona ka pelo, mme fa e le go nkoka le go nneela mo diatleng tsa baba ba me, le fa go se na tshiamololo mo diatleng tsa me, gona a Modimo wa borraarona o go bone o lo betse.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Ke fa Amasai tlhogo ya ba ba 30 a tsenwa ke Mowa a re: “Re ba gago, Dafita, re na nao, morwa Isai. Kagiso, kagiso a e nne nao; a kagiso e nne le ba ba go thusang; gonne Modimo wa gago o go thusitse.” Jaanong Dafita a ba amogela a ba dira ditlhogo tsa masomo a batlhabani." 
1Chronicles12:19 Le bangwe ba Bamanase ba tla ba ineela mo go Dafita, jale fa a tla le Bafelesita, ba tla go tlhabana le Saule, mme a se ka a ba thusa. Ka gonne dikgosana tsa Bafelesita di ne tsa mo naya tsela ka go belaela gore, e ka nna go kgaolwa ditlhogo, fa a ka ineela Saule morena wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles12:20 Ba Bamanase ba ba neng ba mo ineela, fa a boela kwa Sitlage, e ne e le Atena le Josabate le Jediaele le Migaele le Josabate le Elihu le Silethai, ditlhogo tsa ditshika tsa Bamanase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Bone ba thusa Dafita go tlhabana le lesomo la baba, e bong Baamaleke; gonne e ne e le bagale ba ba pelokgale botlhe, mme ba nna balaodi ba mephato." 
1Chronicles12:22 Gonne ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe go ne go ntse go tla bangwe go mo thusa, ga tsamaya ga nna mephato e e masomosomo jaaka masomosomo a Modimo." 
1Chronicles12:23 Dipalo tsa mephato ya ba ba tlhomeletseng ntwa ba ba neng ba tla kwa go Dafita kwa Heberone go sokololela bogosi jwa ga Saule mo go ene ka fa lefokong la Morena ke tse: 
1Chronicles12:24 Bajuta ba ba tshotseng thebe le lerumo ba ne ba le 6 800 ba tlhomeletse ntwa. 
1Chronicles12:25 Bagale ba ba pelokgale ntweng ba Basimeone ba ne ba le 7 100. 
1Chronicles12:26 Ba Balefi ba ne ba le 4 600; 
1Chronicles12:27 ba tla ba na le Joyata moeteledipele wa ba ga Arone a na le 3 700," 
1Chronicles12:28 le Satoke, lekau, mogale yo o pelokgale le ba kgotla ya ga rraagwe, e le balaodi ba le 22." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ba ga gabo Saule ba Babenyamene ba ne ba le 3 000; kana go fitlha foo bontsi jwa bone bo ntse bo goga le ba kgotla ya ga Saule. 
1Chronicles12:30 Batlhabani ba ba pelokgale, banna ba ba tumileng mo dikgorong tsa bone ba Baeferaime, ba ne ba le 20 800." 
1Chronicles12:31 Ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase ba ne ba le 18 000, ba tlhaotswe ka maina gore ba ye go dira Dafita kgosi." 
1Chronicles12:32 Ba Baisašare ba ba neng ba tlhaloganya dipaka go ka itse se Baiseraele ba tshwanetseng go se dira ka nako le nako ditlhogo tsa bone di ne di le 200, mme ba ga tsona botlhe ba le mo taolong ya tsona." 
1Chronicles12:33 Ba ba nonofetseng ntwa ba Basebulone ba ba rulaganyeditsweng tlhabano ba ba tlhomeletseng tlhabano ka dibolai tsa mefutafuta ba ne ba le 50 000, ba tla go thusa ba se pelo-pedi." 
1Chronicles12:34 Balaodi ba Banafetale ba ne ba le 1 000, ba na le banna ba le 37 000 ba ba tshotseng thebe le lerumo." 
1Chronicles12:35 Ba ba rulaganyeditsweng tlhabano ba Badane ba ne ba le 28 600. 
1Chronicles12:36 Ba ba nonofetseng ntwa go ka ikemisetsa tlhabano ba Baasere ba ne ba le 40 000. 
1Chronicles12:37 Ba kwa moseja ga Joretane ba Barubene le Bagate le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase ba ne ba le 120 000, ba tlhomeletse tlhabano ka dibolai tsa mefutafuta." 
1Chronicles12:38 Batlhabani botlhe bao ba ba ikemisitseng ka thulaganyo ba tla kwa Heberone ka pelo yotlhe go dira Dafita kgosi ya Baiseraele botlhe; le Baiseraele botlhe ba bangwe ba ne ba ikaeletse go dira Dafita kgosi ka bongwefela jwa pelo. 
1Chronicles12:39 Ba ne ba na le Dafita gona malatsi a le mararo, ba a ja, ba a nwa; gonne ba ga bone ba ne ba ba etleeleditse dijo." 
1Chronicles12:40 Le gona ba ba gaufi nabo go fitlha kwa go Baisašare le Basebulone le Banafetale ba ne ba tlisa dijo ka diesele le dikammele le meboulwe le dipholo, e le dijo tsa bupe le dinkgwe tsa difeie le tsa maswabi a moweine le weine le lookwane le bontsi jwa dikgomo le difutshane; gonne go ne go le boitumelo mo Baiseraeleng." 
1Chronicles13:1 Jaanong Dafita a gakololana le balaodi ba dikete le ba makgolo le baetapele botlhe. 
1Chronicles13:2 Dafita a ba a raya phuthego yotlhe ya Baiseraele a re: “Fa go lo siametse le Morena, Modimo wa rona, o rata jalo, a re romeng go bitsa ba ga rona ba ba setseng mo dinageng tsotlhe tsa Iseraele le baperesiti le Balefi nabo kwa metseng ya mafulo a bone gore ba phuthegele go rona" 
1Chronicles13:3 re be re ye go tsaya Letlole la Modimo wa rona, le tle kwano go rona; gonne ga re a ka ra le ela tlhoko ka malatsi a ga Saule.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Phuthego yotlhe ya re: “A go dirwe jalo!” Gonne tiro eo e ne e siame mo matlhong a morafe otlhe. 
1Chronicles13:5 Ke fa Dafita a kgobokanya Baiseraele botlhe go tloga nokeng ya Sigore ya Egepeto go ya go fitlha kwa Hamathe gore ba tsee Letlole la Modimo kwa Khiriathe-Jearime. 
1Chronicles13:6 Dafita a ba a bolola a na le Baiseraele botlhe, ba ya kwa Baala, ke kwa Khiriathe-Jearime yo e leng wa Juta, go tsaya teng Letlole la Modimo le le biditsweng ka leina la Morena yo o ntseng kwa godimo ga boKerubime." 
1Chronicles13:7 Mme ba pega Letlole la Modimo mo koloing e ntšhwa, ba e tlosa kwa ntlong ya ga Abinatabe, mme Usa le Ayo ba kgweetsa koloi." 
1Chronicles13:8 Mme Dafita le Baiseraele botlhe ba bina fa pele ga Modimo ka thata yotlhe, e le ka difela le ka dikwadi le ka diharepa le ka meropana le ka matlhao-a-mabogo le ka diphala." 
1Chronicles13:9 Jaanong ya re ba fitlha kwa seboaneng sa ga Khitone, Usa a ntsha letsogo, a tshwara Letlole, a bona dipholo di batla go le diga." 
1Chronicles13:10 Ke fa bogale jwa Morena bo tukela Usa, mme a mo itaya, ka a beile letsogo mo Letloleng, mo a bileng a swela teng fa pele ga Modimo." 
1Chronicles13:11 Mme Dafita a tlalelwa, ka Morena a gagotse Usa; felo foo ga bidiwa Pherese-Usa go fitlha letsatsing leno." 
1Chronicles13:12 Dafita a ba a boifa Modimo ka letsatsi leo a re: “Nka tlisa jang Letlole la Modimo kwa go nna?” 
1Chronicles13:13 Ke ka moo Dafita a se kang a isa Letlole kwa ga gagwe kwa motseng wa ga Dafita, mme a le faposetsa kwa ntlong ya ga Obete-Etomo wa kwa Gathe-Rimone." 
1Chronicles13:14 Mme Letlole la Modimo la nna dikgwedi tse tharo mo lapeng la ga Obete-Etomo mo ntlong ya gagwe. Mme Morena a tshegofatsa lelapa la ga Obete-Etomo le tsotlhe tse o neng a na natso. 
1Chronicles14:1 Jaanong Hirame kgosi ya Tiro a roma barongwi kwa go Dafita, a ba a romela le dikgong tsa mesetere le babopedi ba dipota le babetli ba dikgong gore ba mo agele ntlo." 
1Chronicles14:2 Dafita o na a lemoga jalo, fa Morena a mo tlhomamisitse go nna kgosi ya Iseraele, a bile a tlotlomatsa bogosi jwa gagwe ka ntlha ya morafe wa gagwe wa Iseraele." 
1Chronicles14:3 Dafita a tswelela go tsaya basadi ba bangwe gape a le mo Jerusalema; a ba a tsala bomorwa le bomorwadi gape. 
1Chronicles14:4 Maina a bona ba o ba belegetsweng kwa Jerusalema ke a: Samua le Sobabe le Nathane le Salomo 
1Chronicles14:5 le Ibegare le Elisua le Elephelete 
1Chronicles14:6 le Noga le Nefege le Jafia 
1Chronicles14:7 le Elisama le Beleyata le Elifelete. 
1Chronicles14:8 E rile Bafelesita ba utlwa go twe, Dafita o tloditswe go nna kgosi ya Baiseraele botlhe, ba bolola botlhe go mmatla; ya re a utlwa jalo, a bolola go ba kgatlhantsha." 
1Chronicles14:9 Bafelesita ba tla ba anama mo lebaleng la Refaime. 
1Chronicles14:10 Ke fa Dafita a botsa Modimo a re: “A ke bololele Bafelesita? A o tla ba neela mo diatleng tsa me?” Morena a mo raya a re: “Bolola, ke tla ba neela mo diatleng tsa gago.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Jaanong ya re Bafelesita ba bolola kwa Baale-Pherasime, Dafita a ba fenya teng; a ba a re: “Modimo o gogotse baba ba me ka letsogo la me jaaka go gogola metsi.” Ke ka moo felo foo go teilweng leina la Baale-Pherasime." 
1Chronicles14:12 Ba tlogela medimo ya bone teng, mme Dafita a laela gore e fisiwe ka molelo." 
1Chronicles14:13 Mme Bafelesita ba boelela ba anama mo lebaleng. 
1Chronicles14:14 Ya re Dafita a botsa Modimo gape, wa mo raya wa re: “O se ka wa bolola go ba latelela; ba pote ka fa, o ba tlhasele ntlheng ya ditlhatshana tsa boroku." 
1Chronicles14:15 Mme e re ò utlwa mosumo wa dikgato mo godimo ga ditlhatshana tsa boroku foo o bolole go ya go tlhabana; gonne Modimo o tla bo o bolotse o go eteletse pele go fenya mephato ya Bafelesita.” 
1Chronicles14:16 Dafita a dira ka fa Modimo o mo laetseng ka teng. Ba fenya mephato ya Bafelesita go tloga kwa Gibeone go fitlha kwa Gesere. 
1Chronicles14:17 Tumo ya ga Dafita ya utlwala kwa mafatsheng otlhe. Morena a dira gore ditšhaba tsotlhe di mmoife. 
1Chronicles15:1 Dafita a ba a ikagela matlo mo motseng wa gagwe, a ba a baakanyetsa Letlole la Modimo felo, a le tlhomela tente." 
1Chronicles15:2 Ka nako eo Dafita a laela a re: “Letlole la Modimo le se ka la sikarwa ke ope fa e se Balefi fela; gonne ke bone ba Morena o ba tlhaotseng go sikara Letlole la Morena le go mo direla ka metlha yotlhe.” 
1Chronicles15:3 Jaanong Dafita a phuthela Baiseraele botlhe kwa Jerusalema gore Letlole la Morena le isiwe kwa felong ga lone mo a go le baakanyeditseng. 
1Chronicles15:4 Dafita a ba a kgobokanya ba ga gabo Arone le Balefi: 
1Chronicles15:5 Ba ga gabo Kahathe e ne e le Uriele yo mogolo le ba ga gabo ba le 120. 
1Chronicles15:6 Ba ga gabo Merari e ne e le Asaya yo mogolo le ba ga gabo ba le 220. 
1Chronicles15:7 Ba ga gabo Geresone e ne e le Joele yo mogolo le ba ga gabo ba le 130. 
1Chronicles15:7 Ba ga gabo Geresone e ne e le Joele yo mogolo le ba ga gabo ba le 130. 
1Chronicles15:8 Ba ga gabo Elisafane e ne e le Semaya yo mogolo le ba ga gabo ba le 200. 
1Chronicles15:9 Ba ga gabo Heberone e ne e le Eliele yo mogolo le ba ga gabo ba le 80. 
1Chronicles15:10 Ba ga gabo Usiele e ne e le Aminatabe yo mogolo le ba ga gabo ba le 112. 
1Chronicles15:11 Dafita a ba a bitsa baperesiti Satoke le Abjathare le Balefi Uriele le Asaya le Joele le Semaya le Eliele le Aminatabe," 
1Chronicles15:11 Dafita a ba a bitsa baperesiti Satoke le Abjathare le Balefi Uriele le Asaya le Joele le Semaya le Eliele le Aminatabe," 
1Chronicles15:12 a ba raya a re: “Lona lo ditlhogo tsa dikgoro tsa Balefi. Itireng boitshepo, lona le ba ga lona gore lo ise Letlole la Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, kwa felong fa ke go le baakanyeditseng." 
1Chronicles15:13 E re ka ga ntlha lo ne lo se yo go ka le sikara, ke ka moo Morena, Modimo wa rona, o ne wa dira kgagolo mo go rona, gonne re ne re sa mmatla ka tshwanelo.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Mme baperesiti le Balefi ba iitshepisa gore ba ye go tsaya Letlole la Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele." 
1Chronicles15:15 Balefi ba feta ba sikara Letlole la Modimo ka disikari mo magetleng a bone, lone ba sa le ame jaaka go ne go laetse Moše ka fa lefokong la Morena." 
1Chronicles15:16 Dafita a ba a laela ba bagolo ba Balefi gore ba emise ba ga bone ba e leng baopedi ba tshotse diletso, e bong diharepa le dikwadi le matlhao-a-mabogo gore ba utlwatse ditumo tsa boitumelo ka go tlhatlosa mantswe." 
1Chronicles15:17 Mme Balefi ba emisa Hemane morwa Joele le Asafe morwa Beregia wa ba ga gabo le Ethane morwa Khusaya wa ba ga gabo Merari, ba e leng ba ga bone." 
1Chronicles15:17 Mme Balefi ba emisa Hemane morwa Joele le Asafe morwa Beregia wa ba ga gabo le Ethane morwa Khusaya wa ba ga gabo Merari, ba e leng ba ga bone." 
1Chronicles15:18 Ba ga bone ba thulaganyo ya bobedi ba nna nabo, e bong Sagaria le Jaasiele le Semiramothe le Jehiele le Uni le Eliabe le Benaya le Maaseya le Mathitya le Elifele le Mikeneya, le Obete-Etomo le Jegiele badisa ba kgoro." 
1Chronicles15:19 Baopedi Hemane le Asafe le Ethane ba ne ba tshotse matlhao a kgotlho a mabogo, ba a letsa." 
1Chronicles15:20 Mme Sagaria le Asiele le Semiramothe le Jehiele le Uni le Eliabe le Maaseya le Benaya ba ne ba tshotse diharepa go opedisa lentswe la ntlha. 
1Chronicles15:21 Mme Mathitya le Elifele le Mikeneya le Obete-Etomo le Jegiele le Asasia ba tshotse dikgwadi go opedisa moporo. 
1Chronicles15:22 Mme Kenanya, yo mogolo wa Balefi, o ne a okametse kopelo, a ruta go opela sentle, ka a ne a le setswerere." 
1Chronicles15:23 Mme Beregia le Elekana e ne e le badisa ba mojako fa Letloleng. 
1Chronicles15:24 Mme baperesiti Sebanya le Josafate le Nethanele le Amasai le Sagaria le Benaya le Eliesere ba letsa diphala fa pele ga Letlole la Modimo. Le Obete-Etomo le Jehia e ne e le badisa ba mojako fa Letloleng. 
1Chronicles15:25 Jaanong Dafita le bagolo ba Iseraele le balaodi ba dikete ba ya go tsaya Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena kwa ntlong ya ga Obete-Etomo ka boitumelo. 
1Chronicles15:26 Mme e re ka Modimo o ne o thusa Balefi ba ba neng ba sikere Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena, ga dirwa ditlhabelo tsa dipoo di supa le diphelehu di supa." 
1Chronicles15:27 Dafita o ne a apere kobo e e boleta ya letseta, le Balefi botlhe ba apere jalo ba ba neng ba sikere Letlole le baopedi le Kenanya mookamedi wa kopelo ya baopedi. Dafita a bile a apere khiba ya boperesiti ya lesela le lesweu." 
1Chronicles15:28 Baiseraele botlhe ba ne ba etleetsa Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena ka tuduetso le tumo ya dinaka le ka diphala le ka matlhao-a-mabogo, ba ntse ba utlwatsa ditumo tsa diharepa le dikwadi." 
1Chronicles15:29 E rile Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena le fitlha kwa motseng wa ga Dafita, Migale morwadia Saule a okomela ka fenstere, a bona kgosi Dafita a tlola a bina, mme a mo nyatsa mo pelong ya gagwe." 
1Chronicles16:1 Ya re ba sena go fitlhisa Letlole la Modimo, ba le baya mo teng ga tente e Dafita o neng a e le tlhometse, ba feta ba tlisa ditlhabelo tsa phiso le tsa tebogo fa pele ga Modimo." 
1Chronicles16:2 Ya re Dafita a sena go dira ditlhabelo tsa phiso le tsa tebogo, a tshegofatsa morafe ka leina la Morena." 
1Chronicles16:3 A ba a abela mongwe le mongwe wa Baiseraele, banna le basadi, senkgwe se le sengwe le nama le senkgwana sa maswabi a moweine." 
1Chronicles16:4 Mme bangwe ba Balefi a ba dira badiredi fa pele ga Letlole la Morena gore ba tumise Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, ba o leboge ba o bake:" 
1Chronicles16:5 E bong Asafe yo e leng tlhogo le Sagaria yo o tlhomaganang nae le Jehuele le Semiramothe le Jehiele le Mathitya le Eliabe le Benaya le Obete-Etomo le Jegiele ba tshotse diletso tsa diharepa le dikwadi, mme Asafe a letsa matlhao-a-mabogo." 
1Chronicles16:6 Mme baperesiti Benaya le Jahasiele ba nna ba letsa diphala ka metlha fa pele ga Letlole la Kgolagano ya Modimo. 
1Chronicles16:7 E ne e le ga ntlha ka letsatsi leo, fa Dafita a opedisa Asafe le ba ga gabo “Lebogang Morena.”" 
1Chronicles16:8 Lebogang Morena, bitsang leina la gagwe, utlwatsang ditiro tsa gagwe mo merafeng." 
1Chronicles16:9 Mo opeleleng, mo leletseng, akanyang dikgakgamatso tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
1Chronicles16:10 Ikgantsheng ka leina le le boitshepo la gagwe; a go itumele dipelo tsa ba ba batlang Morena. 
1Chronicles16:11 Elang Morena tlhoko le thata ya gagwe, lo nne lo batle sefatlhego sa gagwe ka gale." 
1Chronicles16:12 Gopolang dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe tse o di dirileng ditshupo tsa metlholo tsa gagwe le dikatlholo tsa molomo wa gagwe," 
1Chronicles16:13 lona bana ba ga Iseraele motlhanka wa gagwe, lona bomorwa Jakobe, baitlhophelwi ba gagwe." 
1Chronicles16:14 Morena ke ene Modimo wa rona; dikatlholo tsa gagwe di mo lefatsheng lotlhe. 
1Chronicles16:15 Gopolang kgolagano ya gagwe ka bosakhutleng le lefoko le o le laetseng ditshika di le sekete; 
1Chronicles16:16 kgolagano e o e dirileng le Aborahame le ikano e o e ikanetseng Isaka. 
1Chronicles16:17 A e beela Jakobe molao le Iseraele kgolagano e e sa khutleng," 
1Chronicles16:18 fa a re: “Ke tla go naya lefatshe la Kanana go nna kabelo ya boswa jwa lona;” 
1Chronicles16:19 jale fa ba sa le bannye mo palong, ba se kae, ba jaka mo go lone." 
1Chronicles16:20 Ba itsamaela, ba tswa setšhabeng ba ya setšhabeng, ba tlogela bogosi bongwe ba ya kwa morafeng o mongwe." 
1Chronicles16:21 A se ka a letlelela ope go ba gatelela, a betsa dikgosi ka ntlha ya bone a re:" 
1Chronicles16:22 “Lo se ka lwa ama batlodiwa ba me le e seng go direla baporofeti ba me bosula.” 
1Chronicles16:23 Opelelang Morena, lona ba lefatshe lotlhe; utlwatsang boitumelo jwa pholoso ya gagwe ka letsatsi le letsatsi." 
1Chronicles16:24 Bolelang kgalalelo ya gagwe mo ditšhabeng le dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe mo merafeng yotlhe. 
1Chronicles16:25 Gonne Morena o mogolo, o tshwanetse go bakwa segolo; o bile o a boitshega bogolo go medimo yotlhe." 
1Chronicles16:26 Gonne medimo yotlhe ya merafe ke ditshwantsho fela, mme Morena o dirile legodimo." 
1Chronicles16:27 Borena le kgalalelo di fa pele ga sefatlhego sa gagwe; nonofo le boitumelo di mo felong ga gagwe. 
1Chronicles16:28 Lona ditshika tsa merafe, neelang Morena, lo neele Morena tlotlo le thata." 
1Chronicles16:29 Neelang Morena tlotlo ya leina la gagwe; tlisang tshupelo, lo tle fa pele ga sefatlhego sa gagwe; obamelang Morena lo kgabile ka boitshepo." 
1Chronicles16:30 Tlakaselang fa pele ga gagwe, lona ba lefatshe lotlhe; kana lefatshe le tlhomame, ga le reketle." 
1Chronicles16:31 A magodimo a itumele, a lefatshe le ipele! A go buiwe mo ditšhabeng go twe: “Kgosi ke Morena!”" 
1Chronicles16:32 A lewatle le sume le tse di tletseng mo go lone! A naga e duduetse le tsotlhe tse di mo go yona! 
1Chronicles16:33 Foo ditlhare tsa sekgwa di tla ipela fa pele ga Morena; gonne o e tla go atlhola lefatshe. 
1Chronicles16:34 Lebogang Morena, gonne o molemo; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng." 
1Chronicles16:35 E reng: “Re pholose, Modimo wa pholoso ya rona; re phuthe, re golole mo ditšhabeng gore re leboge leina le le boitshepo la gago, re ipelafatse ka go baka wena.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 A go tumisiwe Morena Modimo wa Iseraele go tswa bosenang-tshimologo go ya bosakhutleng! Ke fa batho botlhe ba re: “Amen! Baka Morena!” 
1Chronicles16:37 Mme Dafita a tlogela Asafe le ba ga gabo gona fa pele ga Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena gore ba nne ba direle fa pele ga Letlole ka gale ka fa go batlegang ka teng ka letsatsi le letsatsi. 
1Chronicles16:38 Mme Obete-Etomo morwa Jeduthune le Hosa le ba ga bone, banna ba le 68, a ba dira badisa ba mojako." 
1Chronicles16:39 A ba a tlogela Satoke moperesiti le ba ga gabo ba e leng baperesiti fa pele ga Tente ya Boipontsho ya Morena kwa thoteng ya tlhabelo e e neng e le kwa Gibeone 
1Chronicles16:40 gore ba nne ba direle Morena ditlhabelo tsa phiso mo aletareng ya tsona ka gale mo mosong le mantsiboa le go dira tsotlhe tse di kwadilweng mo molaong wa Morena o a o laetseng Baiseraele. 
1Chronicles16:41 Ba bo ba na le Hemane le Jeduthune le ba bangwe ba ba tlhaotsweng ba ba boletsweng ka maina gore ba leboge Morena ka bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe e le jo bo sa khutleng. 
1Chronicles16:42 Mme Hemane le Jeduthune ba ne ba na le diphala le matlhao-a-mabogo le diletso tsa difela tsa Modimo, e le tsa ba ba di letsang. Mme bomorwa Jeduthune bone ba disa kgoro." 
1Chronicles16:43 Jaanong batho botlhe ba ya kwa gae, mongwe le mongwe kwa lapeng la gagwe; le Dafita a boa go dumedisa ba lapa la gagwe." 
1Chronicles17:1 E rile Dafita a ntse a nna mo ntlong ya gagwe, a raya moporofeti Nathane a re: “Bona, nna ke nna mo ntlong ya mesetere, mme Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena lone le fa tlase ga masela a tente.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Nathane a araba Dafita a re: “Dira tsotlhe tse di mo pelong ya gago; gonne Modimo o na nao.” 
1Chronicles17:3 Mme ya re bosigo joo ga tla lefoko la Modimo kwa go Nathane la re: 
1Chronicles17:4 “Yaa o ree Dafita motlhanka wa me o re Morena o bua jaana o re: ‘Ga se wena o tla nkagelang ntlo ya go nna mo go yona. 
1Chronicles17:5 Kana go tloga letsatsing le ke ntshitseng Baiseraele kwa Egepeto ka lone go fitlha letsatsing leno ga ke ise nke ke nne mo ntlong, ka nna ka sepela ka tente ya Taberenakele." 
1Chronicles17:6 Gongwe le gongwe kwa ke ntseng ke sepetse teng le Baiseraele botlhe, a nkile ka bua lefoko fela le mongwe wa basiamisi ba Iseraele yo ke neng ke mo laetse go fudisa morafe wa me ka re: Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa lo sa nkagela ntlo ya mesetere?’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Jaanong he, raya Dafita motlhanka wa me jaana o re: ‘Morena wa masomosomo o bua jaana a re: Ke nna ke go tsereng kwa morakeng o setse dinku morago gore o nne moeteledipele wa morafe wa me wa Iseraele." 
1Chronicles17:8 Ka nna nao gongwe le gongwe kwa o ne wa ya teng, ka nyeletsa baba botlhe ba gago fa pele ga gago. Le gona ke tla go direla leina le le tshwanang le leina la ba bagolo ba ba mo lefatsheng." 
1Chronicles17:9 Ke tla beela morafe wa me wa Iseraele manno, ke o tlhoma gore o nne mo felong ga ona, mme o se ka wa tlhola o rerega gore ba ba setlhogo ba se tlhole ba o bogisa jaaka pele" 
1Chronicles17:10 go tloga malatsing a ke beileng basiamisi ka ona ba ba neng ba busa morafe wa me wa Iseraele; mme ke tla kokobetsa baba botlhe ba gago, ke be ke go itsise go re: Morena o tla go agela ntlo." 
1Chronicles17:11 E tla re fa malatsi a gago a sena go tlala fa o ya go robala le borraago, ke tsose wa losika lwa gago sehularong sa gago yo o tla nnang wa bomorwao, ke tlhomamisa bogosi jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ene o tla nkagela ntlo, mme ke tla tlhomamisa sedulo sa gagwe sa bogosi ka bosakhutleng." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ke tla nna rraagwe, ene a nne morwaake; mme ga nkitla ke tlosa bopelotlhomogi jwa me mo go ene jaaka ke bo tlositse mo go yo o neng a le pele ga gago." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ke tla mmaya mo ntlong ya me le mo bogosing jwa me ka bosakhutleng; sedulo sa bogosi sa gagwe se tla tlhomama ka bosakhutleng.’ ” 
1Chronicles17:15 Nathane a bolelela Dafita mafoko otlhe ao le pono yotlhe eo fela jaaka a laetswe. 
1Chronicles17:16 Ke fa kgosi Dafita a tsena, a nna fa pele ga Morena a re: “Nna ke mang, Morena, Modimo? Le lotso lwa me ke eng, mo o bileng o mphitlhisitse fano?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Mme tseo ke tse dinnye mo matlhong a gago, Modimo; o bile o solofeditse ba lapa la motlhanka wa gago tse di kwa kgakala, mme o mpona ke le mothalo wa losika lo lo bopeletseng lwa bana ba bana, Morena, Modimo." 
1Chronicles17:18 Mme Dafita o sa ntse a ka go raya a reng? Kana o itse motlhanka wa gago. 
1Chronicles17:19 Morena, ke ka ntlha ya motlhanka wa gago le ka fa pelong ya gago fa o dirile selo se segolo seo sotlhe sa go itsise tiro tse dikgolo tsotlhe." 
1Chronicles17:20 Morena, ga go na ope yo o tshwanang nao; le gona ga go modimo ope kwa ntle ga gago gongwe le gongwe mo re go utlwetseng ka ditsebe." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ke setšhaba sefe mo lefatsheng se se tshwanang le morafe wa gago o le osi wa Iseraele o Modimo o ileng wa o ithekololela gore e nne morafe wa ona gore o itirele leina ka ditiro tse dikgolo le tse di boitshegang, ka go leleka ditšhaba fa pele ga morafe wa gago o ò o rekolotseng kwa Egepeto?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Mme morafe wa gago wa Iseraele ò o dirile morafe wa gago ka bosakhutleng; wena Morena o dule Modimo wa bone. 
1Chronicles17:23 “Mme jaanong Morena, a lefoko le o le buileng ka ga motlhanka wa gago le ka ga lelapa la gagwe le tlhomame ka bosakhutleng, mme o dire jaaka o buile." 
1Chronicles17:24 Foo leina la gago le tla ikanyega, le nna legolo ka bosakhutleng mo go tla bong go twe: ‘Morena wa masomosomo, Modimo wa Iseraele, ke ona Modimo wa Iseraele;’ foo lelapa la ga Dafita motlhanka wa gago le tla bo le tlhomame fa pele ga gago." 
1Chronicles17:25 Gonne wena Modimo wa me o senoletse motlhanka wa gago gore o tla mo agela ntlo; ke ka moo motlhanka wa gago o nameditsweng pelo go rapela fa pele ga gago. 
1Chronicles17:26 Mme jaanong Morena, ke wena Modimo, o buile tse di molemo tseo ka ga motlhanka wa gago." 
1Chronicles17:27 Jaanong he, go kgatlhile wena go tshegofatsa lelapa la motlhanka wa gago gore le nne fa pele ga gago ka bosakhutleng; gonne se wena Morena o se tshegofaditseng se tla bo se tshegofaditswe ka bosakhutleng.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Morago ga moo Dafita a fenya Bafelesita, a ba dira batlhanka, a ba a ba amoga mošate wa Gathe le metsana ya ona." 
1Chronicles18:2 A fenya le Bamoabe, le bone ba nna batlhanka ba gagwe ba mo ntshetsa lekgetho." 
1Chronicles18:3 Dafita a ba a fenya Hatatesere kgosi ya Soba ntlheng ya Hamathe, jale fa a ya go tlhomamisa puso ya gagwe kwa nokeng ya Ferathe." 
1Chronicles18:4 Dafita a mo amoga dikoloi tsa ntwa di le 1 000 le bapalami ba le 7 000 le banna ba le 20 000 ba dinao. Dafita a ba a golafatsa dipitse tsa dikoloi tsotlhe ka go di kgaola mesifa ya maoto, a sadisa dipitse di le 100 fela tsa tsona." 
1Chronicles18:5 Mme ya re Basiria ba Damaseko ba tla go thusa Hatatesere kgosi ya Soba, Dafita a bolaya banna ba le 22 000 ba Basiria." 
1Chronicles18:6 Dafita a ba a baya balebedi ba puso mo Siria wa Damaseko; Basiria ba nna balala ba ga Dafita ba ba mo ntshetsang lekgetho. Morena a naya Dafita phenyo gongwe le gongwe kwa a yang teng. 
1Chronicles18:7 Le gona Dafita a tsaya dithebe tsa gouta tse di neng di tshotswe ke batlhanka ba ga Hatatesere, a di isa kwa Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles18:8 Dafita a ba a thopa kgotlho e ntsintsi kwa metseng ya ga Hatatesere kwa Tibegathe le kwa Khune. Salomo a dira lewatle la kgotlho le maotwana le didiri tsa kgotlho ka yona. 
1Chronicles18:9 E rile Thou kgosi ya Hamathe a utlwa gore Dafita o fentse mephato yotlhe ya ga Hatatesere kgosi ya Soba," 
1Chronicles18:10 a roma Hatorame morwawe kwa go kgosi Dafita go mmotsa bophelo le go mo eleletsa letlhogonolo, ka a tlhabanye le Hatatesere, a mo fenya – gonne Hatatesere o ne a ntse a tlhabana le Thou – a ba a romela Dafita dilo tsa mefutafuta tsa gouta le tsa selefera le tsa kgotlho." 
1Chronicles18:11 Le tseo kgosi Dafita a di itshepisetsa Morena mmogo le selefera le gouta tse o di tsereng mo ditšhabeng tsotlhe, kwa go Baetomo le Bamoabe le Baamone le Bafelesita le Baamaleke." 
1Chronicles18:12 Mme Abisai morwa Seruya a bolaya Baetomo ba le 18 000 mo lebaleng la letswai. 
1Chronicles18:13 Mme Dafita a baya balebedi ba puso ya gagwe kwa Etomo. Baetomo botlhe ba nna mo pusong ya gagwe. Morena a mo naya phenyo gongwe le gongwe kwa a bololelang teng. 
1Chronicles18:14 Dafita o ne a busa Iseraele yotlhe, a ntse a direla morafe otlhe wa gagwe ka molao le tshiamo." 
1Chronicles18:15 Joabe morwa Seruya e ne e le molaodi wa mephato; Josafate morwa Ahilote e le seatla sa kgosi. 
1Chronicles18:16 Satoke morwa Ahitube le Ahimelege morwa Abjathare e ne e le baperesiti, Sausa e le mokwaledi." 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaya morwa Joyata e ne e le molaodi wa Bakerethi le Baphelethe, bafemedi ba kgosi; bomorwa Dafita ba pele ba thusa kgosi." 
1Chronicles19:1 Morago ga moo Nahase a swa, kgosi ya Baamone, mme Hanune morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles19:2 Ke fa Dafita a re: “Ke tla direla Hanune morwa Nahase ka bopelotlhomogi; gonne rraagwe o ne a ntirela ka bopelotlhomogi.” Ka moo Dafita a roma barongwi go mo tshedisa ka ntlha ya ga rraagwe. Mme ya re batlhanka ba ga Dafita ba fitlha kwa lefatsheng la Baamone kwa go Hanune go mo tshedisa," 
1Chronicles19:3 dikgosana tsa Baamone tsa raya Hanune tsa re: “A o a re Dafita o tlotla rraago ka a romile bagomotsi kwano go wena? A ga se go re, batlhanka ba gagwe ba tlile kwano go wena go sekaseka lefatshe le go le senya le go le tlhola?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Ke fa Hanune a tshwara batlhanka ba ga Dafita, a ba beola bontlhanngwe jwa ditedu, a kgaola bontlhanngwe jwa diaparo tsa bone ka bogare fa lethekeng, a ba a ba naya tsela." 
1Chronicles19:5 Ba tsamaya. Ya re Dafita a begelwa ka ga banna bao a roma go ba kgatlhantsha; gonne banna bao ba ne ba tlhabisitswe ditlhong thata. Kgosi ya re: “Nnang kwa Jerigo go ya ditedu tsa lona di be di gole; morago ga moo lo boe.” 
1Chronicles19:6 E rile Baamone ba bona gore ba itlhoisitse Dafita, Hanune le Baamone ba romela ditalente di le 1 000 tsa selefera kwa go Basiria ba Mesopotamia le go Basiria ba Maaga le kwa Soba go ithapela dikoloi tsa ntwa le bapalami." 
1Chronicles19:7 Ba ithapela dikoloi tsa ntwa di le 32 000 le kgosi ya Maaga le batlhabani ba yona; ba tla ba thibelela ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Meteba; le Baamone ba phuthega, ba tswa mo metseng ya bone, ba tla go tlhabana." 
1Chronicles19:8 Ya re Dafita a utlwa jalo, a roma Joabe le mephato yotlhe ya bagale." 
1Chronicles19:9 Jaanong Baamone ba bolola, ba ikemisa ka thulaganyo ya tlhabano ka fa ntle ga kgoro ya motse mme dikgosi tsele tse di tsileng di ne di le go sele kwa nageng." 
1Chronicles19:10 Jaanong ya re Joabe a lemoga gore ntwa e mo potile ka kwa pele le kwa morago, a tlhopha banna mo mephatong yotlhe ya Iseraele, a ba rulaganya go kgatlhantsha Basiria." 
1Chronicles19:11 Mme banna ba ba setseng a ba neela mo taolong ya ga Abisai monnawe gore ba ikemise go kgatlhantsha Baamone. 
1Chronicles19:12 A laela a re: “Fa Basiria ba mphekeetsa, o tle o nthuse; mme fa Baamone ba go fekeetsa, ke tla tla go go thusa." 
1Chronicles19:13 Nna pelokgale, a re itshupe re le bagale ka ntlha ya morafe wa rona le ka ntlha ya metse ya Modimo wa rona! A Morena a dire tse di siameng mo matlhong a gagwe.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Jaanong ya re Joabe le banna ba ba nang nae ba atamela Basiria go tlhabana nabo, ba tshaba fa pele ga gagwe." 
1Chronicles19:15 Mme ya re Baamone ba bona Basiria ba tshaba, le bone ba tshaba fa pele ga Abisai monnawe, ba tsena mo motseng. Ke fa Joabe a boela kwa Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles19:16 Ya re Basiria ba bona, fa ba fentswe ke Baiseraele, ba roma barongwi, ba bolotsa Basiria ba ba kwa moseja ga noka ya Ferathe, mme Sofage molaodi wa mephato ya ga Hatatesere a ba etelela pele." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ya re Dafita a bolelelwa jalo, a phutha Baiseraele botlhe, a tshela Joretane a fitlha fa go bone, a feta a ema teng; ya re Dafita a se na go emisa batlhabani ka thulaganyo go ya go kgatlhantsha Basiria, ba tlhabana nae." 
1Chronicles19:18 Mme Basiria ba tshaba fa pele ga Baiseraele, mme Dafita a bolaya banna ba dikoloi di le 7 000 tsa Basiria le banna ba le 40 000 ba dinao; a bolaya le Sofage molaodi wa mephato." 
1Chronicles19:19 Jaanong ya re batlhanka ba ga Hatatesere ba bona, fa ba fentswe ke Baiseraele ba dira kagiso le Dafita, ba mo direla. Mme Basiria ba se ka ba tlhola ba rata go thusa Baamone." 
1Chronicles20:1 E rile ngwaga o se na go feta ka nako e dikgosi di a tleng di bolole ka yona, Joabe a bolotsa mephato, a senya lefatshe la Baamone a fitlha a dikanyetsa mošate wa Raba ka ntwa, Dafita ene a setse kwa Jerusalema, mme Joabe a thopa Raba a o diga." 
1Chronicles20:2 Mme Dafita a tsaya serwalo sa Milekome, a se tlosa mo tlhogong ya ona, a fitlhela bokete jwa sona e le talente ya gouta, se bile se na le taemane e e tlhokegang; yona ya rwesiwa Dafita tlhogong; a ba a ntsha thopo e kgolo thata mo motseng oo." 
1Chronicles20:3 Mme batho ba ba neng ba le mo go ona a ba dirisa ka šage le ka dikepu tsa tshipi le ka dilepe. Dafita a direla metse yotlhe ya Baamone jalo. Jaanong Dafita le batlhabani botlhe ba boela kwa Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles20:4 Morago ga moo ga tsoga ntwa kwa Gesere le Bafelesita. Foo Sibegai wa Mohuša a bolaya Siphai yo e neng e le mokaloba. Bafelesita ba kokobediwa jalo. 
1Chronicles20:5 Ga ba ga tlhabanwa gape le Bafelesita. Ke fa Elehanane morwa Jaire a bolaya Lagemi morwa-rraagwe Goliathe wa kwa Gathe yo lore lwa lerumo la gagwe lo neng lo le kana ka tlhomeso. 
1Chronicles20:6 Ga ba ga lowa ntwa gape kwa Gathe. Teng go ne go le monna yo moleele thata yo o menwana e merataro, e le 24 mmogo diatleng le dinaong. Le ene e ne e le mokaloba." 
1Chronicles20:7 Mme ya re a kgoba Baiseraele, a bolawa ke Jonathane morwa Šimea mogoloa Dafita." 
1Chronicles20:8 Bao e ne e le ba losika lwa mekaloba kwa Gathe, mme ba bolawa ke Dafita le ke batlhanka ba gagwe." 
1Chronicles21:1 Satane o kile a tsogela Baiseraele, a tlhotlheletsa Dafita go bala Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles21:2 Ke fa Dafita a raya Joabe le dikgosana tsa morafe a re: “Yaang lo bale Baiseraele go tloga kwa Bereseba go fitlha kwa Dane, lo bo lo tle go mpegela gore ke itse palo ya bone.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Mme Joabe a fetola a re: “A Morena a okeletse morafe wa gagwe ba ba kana ka ona ga lekgolo. Kgosi mong wa me, bone botlhe a ga se batlhanka ba morena wa me? Mong wa me o batlelang selo se se ntseng jalo? O tla bo o leofisetsang Baiseraele?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Fela lefoko la kgosi la pateletsa Joabe, mme Joabe a bolola a ralala Iseraele yotlhe, a ba a boela kwa Jerusalema," 
1Chronicles21:5 a feta a neela Dafita palo ya batho: Banna ba ba somolang tšhaka ba Baiseraele botlhe ba ne ba le 1 100 000; banna ba ba somolang tšhaka ba Juta ba le 470 000. 
1Chronicles21:6 Mme o ne a sa bala Balefi le Babenyamene nabo; gonne lefoko la kgosi le ne le tena Joabe. 
1Chronicles21:7 Fela selo seo se ne se le bosula mo matlhong a Modimo, mme wa betsa Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles21:8 Ke fa Dafita a raya Modimo a re: “Ke leofile thata ka go dira jalo. Mme jaanong a ko o itshwarele molato wa motlhanka wa gago; gonne ke dirile bosilo jo bogolo.” 
1Chronicles21:9 Mme Morena a bua le Gate mosedisetsi wa ga Dafita a re: 
1Chronicles21:10 “Yaa o bue le Dafita o re: ‘Morena o buile jaana a re: Ke tsharolotse dilo di le tharo tse di ka go welang. Itlhaolele sengwe sa tsona gore ke se go direle.’ ” 
1Chronicles21:11 Gate a ya kwa go Dafita, a mo raya a re: “Morena o buile jaana a re: ‘Itlhaolele!" 
1Chronicles21:12 A go tle tlala ya dinyaga di le tharo; gongwe go bolawa ke baganetsi ba gago dikgwedi di le tharo le go fitlhelwa ke tšhaka tsa baba ba gago; gongwe tšhaka ya Morena malatsi a le mararo, e bong leroborobo mo lefatsheng, fa moengele wa Morena a senya mo nageng yotlhe ya Iseraele?’ Jaanong he, bona sentle o bolele se ke tla se arabang yo o nthomileng.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Dafita a fetola Gate a re: “Ke tlaletswe thata. Nte ke wele mo diatleng tsa Morena; gonne boutlwelo-botlhoko jwa gagwe bo bogolo thata. A ke se ka ka wela mo diatleng tsa batho.” 
1Chronicles21:14 Ke fa Morena a romela leroborobo mo go Iseraele; ga swa banna ba le 70 000 ba Iseraele. 
1Chronicles21:15 Mme Modimo wa roma moengele kwa Jerusalema go mo senya; ya re a ntse a senya, Morena a ela tlhoko, a rebega bogale, a raya moengele yo o senyang a re: “Go lekanye jaanong! Gonyetsa letsogo.” E ne e le fa moengele wa Morena a eme fa seboaneng sa ga Orenane wa Mojebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Jaanong ya re Dafita a tsholetsa matlho, a bona moengele wa Morena a eme fa gare ga lefatshe le legodimo, a tshotse tšhaka ya gagwe e e somotsweng ka letsogo le le otlololetsweng Jerusalema, Dafita le bagolo ba ba apereng masela a boikwatlhao ba wela fa fatshe ka difatlhego." 
1Chronicles21:17 Mme Dafita a raya Modimo a re: “A ga se nna ke laetseng go bala morafe? Ke nna ke leofileng ka senya thata; mme dinku tse, di dirileng? Morena, Modimo wa me, ka thapelo a letsogo la gago le otle nna le ba lapa la ga rre, mme e seng morafe wa gago.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Ke fa moengele wa Morena a laela Gate gore a ree Dafita, a tlhatloge go agela Morena aletare mo seboaneng sa ga Orenane wa Mojebusi." 
1Chronicles21:19 Dafita a tlhatloga ka fa lefokong la ga Gate le o le buileng ka taelo ya Morena. 
1Chronicles21:20 Ya re Orenane a retologa, a bona moengele, mme bomorwawe ba bane ba ba nang nae ba iphitlha. Orenane a bo a photha mabele." 
1Chronicles21:21 Mme ya re Dafita a tla kwa go Orenane, Orenane a tlhatlosa matlho, a bona Dafita. Ke fa a tswa mo seboaneng, a ikobela fa fatshe fa pele ga Dafita." 
1Chronicles21:22 Dafita a raya Orenane a re: “Nneela felo ga seboana gore ke agele Morena aletare gona, ò go nneele ka tlhwatlhwa e e tletseng gore petso e tlosiwe mo morafeng.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Mme Orenane a fetola Dafita a re: “Se tsee fela. A kgosi mong wa me a dire tse di siameng mo matlhong a gagwe. Bona, ke ntsha dikgomo go nna tsa setlhabelo le meotlwana go nna dikgong le mabele go nna tshupelo. Ke di ntsha tsotlhe.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Fela kgosi Dafita a raya Orenane a re: “Nnyaya, ke rata go di reka ka tlhwatlhwa e e tletseng. Gonne ga nka ke ka tseela Morena tse e leng tsa gago, ka dira setlhabelo fela, ke sa senyegelwe.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Mme Dafita a ntshetsa felo foo madi a dišekele tsa gouta di le 600, a di neela Orenane." 
1Chronicles21:26 Jaanong Dafita a agela Morena aletare gona, a baakanya ditlhabelo tsa phiso le tsa tebogo, mme ya re a tlhaeleletsa Moreneng, ene a mo araba ka molelo o o tswang kwa legodimong, wa wela mo aletareng ya tlhabelo ya phiso, wa ja setlhabelo." 
1Chronicles21:27 Ke fa Morena a laela moengele gore a somele tšhaka ya gagwe mo kgatleng ya yona. 
1Chronicles21:28 Go tloga sebakeng seo, fa Dafita a bona gore Morena o mo arabile kwa seboaneng sa ga Orenane wa Mojebusi, a nna a dira ditlhabelo teng." 
1Chronicles21:29 Kana Taberenakele e e neng e dirilwe ke Moše kwa sekakeng le aletare ya ditlhabelo tsa phiso tsone ka sebaka seo di ne di le kwa thoteng ya tlhabelo kwa Gibeone. 
1Chronicles21:30 Mme Dafita a palelwa ke go ya fa pele ga yona aletare eo go batla Modimo; gonne o ne a tshositswe ke tšhaka ya moengele wa Morena. 
1Chronicles22:1 Mme Dafita a re: “Felo fa e tla nna ga Ntlo ya Morena Modimo le aletare ya ditlhabelo tsa phiso tsa Baiseraele e tla nna fa.” 
1Chronicles22:2 Dafita a ba a laela gore go phuthwe baeng ba ba mo lefatsheng la Iseraele. A ba a tlhoma babetli go betla majwe a go aga Ntlo ya Modimo. 
1Chronicles22:3 Le gona Dafita a thula tshipi e ntsi, a dira dimapo tsa ditswalo tsa dikgoro le dipataganyo le kgotlho e ntsi e e sa itsiweng bokete;" 
1Chronicles22:4 a kgobokanya dikota tsa mesetere tse di se nang palo; gonne ba Sitone le ba Tiro ba ne ba tlisetsa Dafita bontsi jwa dikgong tsa mesetere. 
1Chronicles22:5 Kana Dafita o ne a re: “Salomo morwaake o sa le mošwa o tlhoka temogo, mme Ntlo e e tshwanetseng go agelwa Morena e tshwanetse ya nna e kgolo mo go feteletseng e e tumileng e e kgabetseng mafatshe otlhe. Nte ke mo etleeletse.” Mme Dafita o ne a etleetsa ka tse dintsi a ise a swe." 
1Chronicles22:6 A ba a bitsa Salomo morwawe, a mo laela gore a tle a agele Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, Ntlo." 
1Chronicles22:7 Dafita a raya Salomo a re: “Morwaaka, ke ne ke ikaeletse ka nosi go agela leina la Morena, Modimo wa me, Ntlo." 
1Chronicles22:8 Mme lefoko la Morena la tla kwa go nna la re: ‘O tsholotse madi a mantsi, o lole dintwa tse dikgolo. Ga o a tshwanela go agela leina la me Ntlo; ka gonne o tshololetse madi a mantsi fa fatshe fa pele ga me." 
1Chronicles22:9 Bona, morwa yo ò tla mmelegelwang o tla nna monna wa boikhutso, mme ke tla mo ikhutsisa go se na mmaba ope tikologong; gonne leina la gagwe e tla nna Salomo, mme ke tla naya Baiseraele kagiso le boikhutso malatsing a gagwe." 
1Chronicles22:10 Ene o tla agela leina la me Ntlo; o tla nna morwaake, nna ke nne rraagwe, mme ke tla tlhomamisa sedulo sa bogosi jwa gagwe mo go Iseraele ka bosakhutleng.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 “Jaanong he, morwaaka, a Morena a nne nao, o nne maatlametlo go ka aga Ntlo ya Morena, Modimo wa gago, jaaka a buile ka ga gago." 
1Chronicles22:12 Fela a Morena a go nee kutlwisiso le tlhaloganyo, a go laodise Baiseraele, a go thuse go tshegetsa molao wa Morena, Modimo wa gago." 
1Chronicles22:13 Foo o tla tshegofala fa o ela tlhoko go dira ka melao le ka ditshwanelo tse Morena o di laetseng Baiseraele ka Moše. Tia o tlhomame! Se boife le e seng go tshoga! 
1Chronicles22:14 Bona, le fa ke ne ke le pogisegong, ke etleeleditse Ntlo ya Morena ditalente di le 100 000 tsa gouta le ditalente di le 1 000 000 tsa selefera le kgotlho le tshipi tse di sa kakeng tsa lekanngwa bokete. Ke bile ke etleeditse ka dikgong le majwe, mme tsona o ka di oketsa ka tse dingwe." 
1Chronicles22:15 Le gona o na le badiri ba bantsi, e bong babetli ba mafika le baagi le babetli ba dikgong le batlhalefi ba mefutafuta mo ditirong tse dintsi" 
1Chronicles22:16 tsa gouta le selefera le kgotlho le tshipi tse di se nang palo. Nanoga he, o simolole tiro, mme a Morena a nne nao!”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Dafita a ba a laela dikgosana tsotlhe tsa Iseraele gore di thuse Salomo morwawe a re: 
1Chronicles22:18 “A ga ke re, Morena, Modimo wa lona, o na le lona, o bile o lo neile boikhutso ntlheng tsotlhe. Gonne o ne wa neela baagi ba pele ba lefatshe le mo diatleng tsa me, mme lefatshe le la tsenngwa mo taolong ya Morena le ya morafe wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles22:19 Jaanong ineeleng ka dipelo le mewa go batla Morena, Modimo wa lona, lo nanoge lo age Ntlo e e Boitshepo ya Morena Modimo gore lo itse go tsenya Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena le didiri tse di boitshepo tsa Modimo mo Ntlong e e tla agelwang leina la Morena.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 E rile Dafita a se na go tsofala le go ja lefatshe a dira Salomo morwawe kgosi ya Iseraele. 
1Chronicles23:2 A ba a phutha dikgosana tsotlhe tsa Iseraele le baperesiti le Balefi. 
1Chronicles23:3 Mme Balefi ba balwa go simolola ka ba ba dinyaga di le 30 le bomogoloa-bone, mme palo ya bone ka fa ditlhogong tsa bone e le banna ba le 38 000." 
1Chronicles23:4 Dafita a laela a re: “Ba le 24 000 ba bone ba na le go okamela tiro ya Ntlo ya Morena; ba le 6 000 e nne bakwaledi le baatlhodi; 
1Chronicles23:5 ba le 4 000 e nne badisa ba dikgoro; ba le 4 000 ba bangwe e nne ba ba bakang Morena ka diletso tse ke di diretseng go baka ka tsona.” 
1Chronicles23:6 Dafita a ba a ba kgaoganya ditlhopha ka fa ditshikeng tsa bomorwa Lefi Geresone le Kahathe le Merari. 
1Chronicles23:7 Boora Geresone e ne e le Laetane le Simei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Bomorwa Laetane e ne e le Jehiele, wa ntlha, le Sethame le Joele, ba bararo." 
1Chronicles23:8 Bomorwa Laetane e ne e le Jehiele, wa ntlha, le Sethame le Joele, ba bararo." 
1Chronicles23:9 Bomorwa Simei e ne e le Selomothe le Hasiele le Harane, ba bararo; bao e le ditlhogo tsa dikgoro tsa losika lwa ga Laetane." 
1Chronicles23:10 Bomorwa Simei e ne e le Jahathe le Sisa le Jeuse le Beria. Ke bone bomorwa Simei ba bane. 
1Chronicles23:11 Jahathe e ne e le wa ntlha, Sisa e le wa bobedi; mme Jeuse le Beria ba ne ba se na bana ba bantsi; ka moo ba nna kgoro e le nngwe le setlhopha se le sengwe." 
1Chronicles23:12 Bomorwa Kahathe e ne e le Amerame le Isehare le Heberone le Usiele, ba bane." 
1Chronicles23:13 Bomorwa Amerame e ne e le Arone le Moše. Mme Arone a ntshiwa go tsenngwa tirelong ya Felo-ga-Boitshepo-jwa-Maitshepo, ene le bomorwawe ka bosakhutleng gore a fise maswalo fa pele ga Morena, a mo direle, a tshegofatse ka leina la gagwe ka bosakhutleng." 
1Chronicles23:14 Fa e le Moše monna wa Modimo, bomorwawe ba ne ba balelwa mo lotsong lwa ga Lefi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Bomorwa Moše e ne e le Geresome le Eliesere. 
1Chronicles23:16 Morwa Geresome e ne e le Sebuele tlhogo ya losika. 
1Chronicles23:17 Morwa Eliesere e ne e le Rehabja tlhogo ya losika, mme Eliesere a se na bomorwa ba bangwe, mme bomorwa Rehabja ba ne ba le bantsi thata." 
1Chronicles23:18 Morwa Isehare e ne e le Selomithe tlhogo ya losika. 
1Chronicles23:19 Bomorwa Heberone e ne e le Jeria, wa ntlha, le Amaria, wa bobedi, le Jahasiele, wa boraro, le Jekameame, wa bone." 
1Chronicles23:20 Bomorwa Usiele e ne e le Miga, wa ntlha, le Isia, wa bobedi." 
1Chronicles23:21 Bomorwa Merari e ne e le Magedi le Muši; bomorwa Magedi e le Eleasare le Khiše. 
1Chronicles23:22 Mme Eleasare a swa a se na bomorwa fa e se bomorwadi fela, mme ba nyalwa ke bomorwa Khiše, rrangwanaabo." 
1Chronicles23:23 Bomorwa Muši e ne e le Magedi le Etere le Jeremothe, ba bararo." 
1Chronicles23:24 Ke bone bomorwa Lefi ka fa dikgorong tsa bone, e bong ditlhogo tsa dikgoro ka fa ba rulagantsweng ka teng ka fa ditlhogong tsa bone ba ba neng ba dira ditiro tsa tirelo kwa Ntlong ya Morena, go simolola ka ba ba dinyaga di le 20 le bomogoloa-bone." 
1Chronicles23:25 Gonne Dafita o ne a re: “Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o file morafe wa gagwe boikhutso, o bile o agile mo Jerusalema ka bosakhutleng." 
1Chronicles23:26 Le gona Balefi ga ba tlhole ba na le go sikara Taberenakele le dilwana tsotlhe tsa tirelo ya yona.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Gonne ka fa mafokong a bofelo a ga Dafita bomorwa Lefi ba ne ba balwa go simolola ka ba ba dinyaga di le 20 le bomogoloa-bone. 
1Chronicles23:28 Mme tiro ya bone ke go thusa bomorwa Arone tirelong ya Ntlo ya Morena, go okamela malapa le matlwana le go phepafatsa dilo tsotlhe tse di boitshepo le ditiro tse dingwe mo Ntlong ya Modimo" 
1Chronicles23:29 le go tlhokomela dinkgwe tsa tshupo le bupe jo bo setou jwa tshupelo ya dijo le dinkgwenyana tse dipapetla tse di sa bedisiwang le moritshana le tse di fagwang le dielo tsotlhe le ditekanyo tsotlhe 
1Chronicles23:30 le go ema ka moso mongwe le mongwe go leboga le go baka Morena le maitsiboa fela jalo; 
1Chronicles23:31 le go direla Morena ditlhabelo tsotlhe tsa phiso ka boSabata le ka malatsi a ngwedi o o rogilweng le ka meletlo ka fa palong ya tsona ka fa di tshwanetseng ka teng ka gale fa pele ga Morena. 
1Chronicles23:32 Ba tshwanetse go tlhokomela ditiro mo Tenteng ya Boipontsho le ditiro mo Felong-ga-Boitshepo le ditiro tsa go thusa bomorwa Arone, ba ga bone ba le tirelong ya Ntlo ya Morena." 
1Chronicles24:1 Le boora Arone ba ne ba na le ditlhopha tsa bone. Bomorwa Arone e ne e le Natabe le Abihu le Eleasare le Ithamare. 
1Chronicles24:2 Mme Natabe le Abihu ba swa pele ga rraabo ba se na bana; baperesiti ya nna Eleasare le Ithamare fela. 
1Chronicles24:3 Dafita a ba dira ditlhopha, a na le Satoke wa losika lwa ga Eleasare le Ahimelege wa losika lwa ga Ithamare, a ba tsenya mo ditirong tsa bone ka fa ditlhopheng tsa bone." 
1Chronicles24:4 Mme ga fitlhelwa ba losika lwa ga Eleasare ba le bantsi go feta ba losika lwa ga Ithamare, fa go balwa ditlhogo tsa banna. Ka moo ba ba kgaoganya jaana: Ditlhogo tsa dikgoro tsa losika lwa ga Eleasare ya nna di le 16, mme tsa dikgoro tsa losika lwa ga Ithamare ya nna di le robedi." 
1Chronicles24:5 Ba kgaoganya bao le bao ka ditengwa; gonne go ne go le bagolo ba ba boitshepo, e bong bagolo ba Modimo mo losikeng lwa ga Eleasare le mo losikeng lwa ga Ithamare." 
1Chronicles24:6 Mme mokwaledi Semaya morwa Nethanele mongwe wa Balefi a ba kwala fa pele ga kgosi le dikgosana le Satoke moperesiti le Ahimelege morwa Abjathare le ditlhogo tsa dikgoro tsa baperesiti le Balefi; ga ntshiwa dikgoro tse pedi ka tengwa tsa losika lwa ga Eleasare, ga ba ga ntshiwa e le nngwe ya losika lwa ga Ithamare." 
1Chronicles24:7 Tengwa ya ntlha ya wela Joyaribe, ya bobedi ya wela Jetaya;" 
1Chronicles24:8 ya boraro ya wela Harime, ya bone ya wela Seorime;" 
1Chronicles24:9 ya botlhano ya wela Malekhia, ya borataro ya wela Miyamine;" 
1Chronicles24:10 ya bosupa ya wela Hakose, ya robedi ya wela Abia;" 
1Chronicles24:11 ya robongwe ya wela Jesua, ya some ya wela Seganya;" 
1Chronicles24:12 ya 11 ya wela Eliasibe, ya 12 ya wela Jakime;" 
1Chronicles24:13 ya 13 ya wela Hupha, ya 14 ya wela Jesebeabe;" 
1Chronicles24:14 ya 15 ya wela Bileka, ya 16 ya wela Imere;" 
1Chronicles24:15 ya 17 ya wela Hesire, ya 18 ya wela Haphisese;" 
1Chronicles24:16 ya 19 ya wela Phethaya, ya 20 ya wela Hesekiele;" 
1Chronicles24:17 ya 21 ya wela Jagine, ya 22 ya wela Gamule;" 
1Chronicles24:18 ya 23 ya wela Delaya, ya 24 ya wela Maasia."
