1Chronicles24:19 Ke yona thulaganyo ya bone tirelong ya bone ya go tsena Ntlong ya Morena ka fa tshwanelong e ba e beetsweng ke Arone rraabo jaaka ene a laetswe ke Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele." 
1Chronicles24:20 Fa e le boora Lefi ba bangwe go ne go le teng Subaele, oora Amerame le Jedia mongwe wa bomorwa Subaele;" 
1Chronicles24:21 le Isia yo mogolo oora Rehabja; 
1Chronicles24:22 le Selomothe oora Isehare le Jahathe mongwe wa bomorwa Selomothe. 
1Chronicles24:23 Bomorwa Heberone e ne e le Jeria wa ntlha, le Amaria wa bobedi, le Jahasiele wa boraro, le Jekameame wa bone." 
1Chronicles24:24 Morwa Usiele e ne e le Miga, mongwe wa bomorwa Miga e le Samire." 
1Chronicles24:25 Morwa-rraagwe Miga e ne e le Isia; mongwe wa bomorwa Isia e le Sagaria. 
1Chronicles24:26 Bomorwa Merari e ne e le Magedi le Muši; ngwana wa ngwana wa gagwe e le Jaasia. 
1Chronicles24:27 Boora Merari bomorwa Jaasia e ne e le Sohame le Sakhure le Iberi. 
1Chronicles24:28 Magedi o ne a na le Eleasare yo o neng a se na bana le Khiše. 
1Chronicles24:29 Fa e le Khiše morwawe e ne e le Jeramele. 
1Chronicles24:30 Bomorwa Muši e ne e le Magedi le Etere le Jerimothe. Ke bone bomorwa Balefi ka fa dikgorong tsa bone. 
1Chronicles24:31 Le bone ba tlhamelwa ditengwa fela jaaka ba ga bone boora Arone fa pele ga kgosi Dafita le Satoke le Ahimelege le ditlhogo tsa dikgoro tsa baperesiti le Balefi; tlhogo ya kgoro ya direlwa fela jaaka monnawe yo mmotlana. 
1Chronicles25:1 Dafita le balaodi ba mephato ba ne ba tlhaolela bomorwa Asafe le ba ga Hemane le ba ga Jeduthune tirelo-Modimo, e le ba ba rutang tsa Modimo ka go letsa dikwadi le diharepa le matlhao-a-mabogo; palo ya bone ya banna ba tirelo ya bone e leng tiro eo e ne e le e:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Baopedi ba bomorwa Asafe e ne e le Sakhure le Josefa le Nethanya le Ašarela, ba okametswe ke Asafe yo o neng a ruta tsa Modimo ka difela ka taelo ya kgosi." 
1Chronicles25:3 Ba bomorwa Jeduthune e ne e le Ketalea le Seri le Jesaya le Simei le Hasabja le Mathitya, ba barataro; ba okametswe ke Jeduthune rraabo yo o neng a letsa kwadi a na le Mowa wa Modimo, fa go lebogwa le go bakwa Morena." 
1Chronicles25:4 Ba bomorwa Hemane e ne e le Bukhia le Mathanya le Usiele le Sebuele le Jerimothe le Hananya le Hanani le Eliatha le Gitalethi le Romamethi-Esere le Josebekasa le Malothi le Hothire le Mahasiothe. 
1Chronicles25:5 Botlhe bao e ne e le bomorwa Hemane mosedisetsi wa kgosi. Modimo o ne o neile Hemane bomorwa ba le 14 le bomorwadi ba le bararo gore ba tle ba godise thata ya yona ka fa ditsholofetsong tsa Modimo. 
1Chronicles25:6 Botlhe bao ba ne ba okametswe ke rraabo, e bong Hemane mo dikopelong tsa Ntlo ya Morena, ba letsa matlhao-a-mabogo le diharepa le dikwadi mo tirelong-Modimo mo Ntlong ya Modimo jaaka kgosi e laetse Asafe le Jeduthune le Hemane." 
1Chronicles25:7 Palo ya bone mmogo le ba ga bone ba ba rutilweng kopelo tsa Morena sentle, ba e leng ditswerere botlhe e ne e le 288." 
1Chronicles25:8 Mme ba tlhama ditengwa go rulaganya tirelo, yo mmotlana fela jaaka yo mogolo, motlhaloganyi fela jaaka moithuti." 
1Chronicles25:9 Tengwa ya ntlha ya wela Asafe, e bong morwawe Josefa; ya bobedi ya wela Ketalea ene le bomorwa-rraagwe le bomorwawe, ba le 12 mmogo." 
1Chronicles25:10 Ya boraro ya wela Sakhure le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:11 Ya bone ya wela Iseri le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:12 Ya botlhano ya wela Nethanya le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:13 Ya borataro ya wela Bukhia le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:14 Ya bosupa ya wela Jesarela le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:15 Ya robedi ya wela Jesaya le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:16 Ya robongwe ya wela Mathanya le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:17 Ya some ya wela Simei le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:18 Ya 11 ya wela Asarele le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:19 Ya 12 ya wela Hasabja le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:20 Ya 13 ya wela Subaele le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:21 Ya 14 ya wela Mathitya le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:22 Ya 15 ya wela Jeremothe le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:23 Ya 16 ya wela Hananya le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:24 Ya 17 ya wela Josebekasa le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:25 Ya 18 ya wela Hanani le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:26 Ya 19 ya wela Malothi le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:27 Ya 20 ya wela Eliatha le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:28 Ya 21 ya wela Hothire le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:29 Ya 22 ya wela Gitalethi le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:30 ya ya wela Mahasiothe le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles25:31 Ya 24 ya wela Romamethi-Esere le bomorwawe le bomorwa-rraagwe, ba le 12." 
1Chronicles26:1 Fa e le badisa ba dikgoro ba e leng boora Kora e ne e le Meselemia morwa Kore, mongwe wa bomorwa Asafe." 
1Chronicles26:2 Mme Meselemia o ne a na le bomorwa, e bong Sagaria, yo mogolo, le Jediaele, wa bobedi, le Sebatya, wa boraro, le Jatheniele, wa bone," 
1Chronicles26:3 le Elame, wa botlhano, le Johanane wa borataro, le Eleyoenai, wa bosupa." 
1Chronicles26:4 Le Obete-Etomo o ne a na le bomorwa, e bong Semaya, yo mogolo, le Josabate, wa bobedi, le Joa, wa boraro, le Sagare, wa bone, le Nethanele, wa botlhano," 
1Chronicles26:5 le Amiele, wa borataro, le Isašare, wa bosupa, le Pheulethai, wa robedi; gonne Modimo o ne o mo tshegofaditse." 
1Chronicles26:6 Le Semaya morwawe a belegelwa bomorwa ba ba neng ba busa mo kgotleng ya ga rraabo, gonne e ne e le banna ba ba maatlametlo." 
1Chronicles26:7 Bomorwa Semaya e ne e le Otheni le Refaele le Obete le Elesabate le bomorwa-rraagwe ba e leng banna ba ditswerere, Elihu le Semagia." 
1Chronicles26:8 Botlhe bao e ne e le ba ga gabo Obete-Etomo; bone le bomorwaa-bone le bomorwa-rraabo, banna ba ba maatlametlo ba nonofetse tirelo. Ba ne ba le 62." 
1Chronicles26:9 Le Meselemia o ne a na le bomorwa le bomorwa-rraagwe e le banna ba ditswerere ba le 18. 
1Chronicles26:10 Le Hosa oora Merari o ne a na le bomorwa, e bong Simeri, yo mogolo, yo rraagwe o neng a mo dira mogolo, le fa e se motsalwapele;" 
1Chronicles26:11 le Hilekia, wa bobedi, le Tebalea, wa boraro, le Sagaria, wa bone; bomorwa Hosa le bomorwa-rraagwe ba ne ba le 13 mmogo." 
1Chronicles26:12 Le ditlhopha tseo tsa badisa ba dikgoro, e bong ditlhogo tsa banna di ne di abetswe ditshwanelo tsa go direla fa Ntlong ya Morena fela jaaka ba ga bone." 
1Chronicles26:13 Mme ba tlhama tengwa, yo mmotlana fela jaaka yo mogolo wa dikgotla tsa bone; ba e tlhamela kgoro nngwe le nngwe." 
1Chronicles26:14 Tengwa ya kgoro ya botlhabatsatsi ya wela Selemia. Le Sagaria morwawe, mogakolodi yo o botlhale, a tlhamelwa tengwa; tengwa ya gagwe ya wela kgoro ya bokone." 
1Chronicles26:15 Ya ga Obete-Etomo ya wela kgoro ya borwa; ya bomorwawe ya wela ntlo ya polokelo. 
1Chronicles26:16 Ya ga Suphime le ya ga Hosa tsa wela kgoro ya bophirimatsatsi fa kgorong ya Salegethe fa tseleng e e tlhatlogang, badisa ba lebaganye le badisa." 
1Chronicles26:17 Ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi Balefi ba ne ba le barataro, ntlheng ya bokone ba le bane ka letsatsi le letsatsi, ntlheng ya borwa ba le bane ka letsatsi le letsatsi; fa ntlong ya polokelo go le babedi le babedi." 
1Chronicles26:18 Kwa mathuding ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi go ne go le ba le bane ba ba disang tsela e kgolo le ba le babedi ba mathudi. 
1Chronicles26:19 Ke tsona ditlhopha tsa badisa ba dikgoro, e le tsa losika lwa ga Kora le lwa ga Merari." 
1Chronicles26:20 Mme ba ga bone Balefi ba ba neng ba okametse mahumo a Ntlo ya Modimo le mahumo a a neetsweng Tempele ke ba: 
1Chronicles26:21 Ba ga gabo Laetane, oora Geresone, ditlhogo tsa dikgoro tsa ga Laetane, wa losika lwa ga Geresone e ne e le boora Jehiele." 
1Chronicles26:22 Bomorwa Jehiele e ne e le Sethame le Joele morwa-rraagwe, bone ba okametse mahumo a Ntlo ya Morena." 
1Chronicles26:22 Bomorwa Jehiele e ne e le Sethame le Joele morwa-rraagwe, bone ba okametse mahumo a Ntlo ya Morena." 
1Chronicles26:23 Fa e le boora Amerame le boora Isehare le boora Heberone le boora Usiele," 
1Chronicles26:24 Sebuele, oora Geresome, morwa Moše e ne e le mookamedi yo mogolo wa mahumo." 
1Chronicles26:25 Fa e le boora Eliesere, morwawe e ne e le Rehabja, morwawe e le Jesaya, morwawe e le Jorame, morwawe e le Sigeri, morwawe e le Selomothe." 
1Chronicles26:26 Selomothe yoo le bomorwa-rraagwe ba ne ba okametse mahumo otlhe a a neng a neetswe Tempele, a itshepisitswe jalo ke kgosi Dafita le ditlhogo tsa dikgoro le balaodi ba dikete le ba makgolo le balaodi ba mephato." 
1Chronicles26:27 Ba ne ba a itshepisitse, a tswa mo dintweng le mo thopong go thusa kagong ya Ntlo ya Morena." 
1Chronicles26:28 Le tsotlhe tse di neng di itshepisitswe ke Samuele mmoni le Saule morwa Khiše le Abenere morwa Nere le Joabe morwa Seruya le tsotlhe tse di neng di itshepisitswe, di ne di okametswe ke Selomothe le bomorwa-rraagwe." 
1Chronicles26:29 Kenanya le bomorwawe, boora Isehare, ba ne ba neetswe tiro ya ka kwa ntle mo go Iseraele, e le bakwaledi le baatlhodi." 
1Chronicles26:30 Hasabja le bomorwa-rraagwe, boora Heberone, banna ba dinatla ba le 1 700 e ne e le baokamedi ba makgotla a mmuso a Iseraele ka kwano ga Joretane ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi ba tiro yotlhe ya Morena le ba tirelo ya kgosi." 
1Chronicles26:31 Tlhogo ya boora Heberone e ne e le Jeria. – Go ne go batlwa boora Heberone ka fa ditshikeng tsa bone le malapeng a bone ka ngwaga wa 40 wa puso ya ga Dafita, ga fitlhelwa banna ba dinatla mo go bone kwa Jasere wa Gileate." 
1Chronicles26:32 Mme ba losika lwa gagwe e ne e le banna ba dinatla ba le 2 700, e le ditlhogo tsa dikgotla. Mme Dafita a ba dira baokamedi ba Barubene le Bagate le ba bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase, ba tiro nngwe le nngwe ya Modimo le ba tiro ya kgosi." 
1Chronicles27:1 Go fa go bolelwa Baiseraele ka fa palong ya bone, e bong ditlhogo tsa dikgoro le balaodi ba dikete le ba makgolo le baduedi ba bone ba ba direlang kgosi mo dilong tsotlhe tsa mephato e e refosanyang mo tirong ka kgwedi le kgwedi ngwaga otlhe. Mophato o le mongwe e ne e le batlhabani ba le 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:2 Mookamedi wa mophato wa ntlha wa kgwedi ya ntlha e ne e le Jasobeame morwa Sabediele; ba mophato wa gagwe ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:3 Ene e ne e le oora Pherese, e le tlhogo ya balaodi botlhe ba mephato kgweding ya ntlha." 
1Chronicles27:4 Mookamedi wa mophato wa kgwedi ya bobedi e ne e le Dotai wa kwa Ahohi, mme Mikelothe e le moeteledipele wa mophato wa gagwe; ba mophato wa gagwe ba le 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:5 Molaodi wa mophato wa boraro wa kgwedi ya boraro e ne e le Benaya morwa Joyata moperesiti yo mogolo; ba mophato wa gagwe ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:6 Benaya yoo e ne e le mogale wa ba ba 30 le mookamedi wa bone; mookamedi wa mophato wa gagwe e ne e le Amisabate morwawe. 
1Chronicles27:7 Molaodi wa bone wa kgwedi ya bone e ne e le Asahele monnaa Joabe le Sebatya morwawe sehularong sa gagwe; ba mophato wa gagwe ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:8 Molaodi wa botlhano wa kgwedi ya botlhano e ne e le Samehuthe wa kwa Isera; ba mophato wa gagwe ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:9 Molaodi wa borataro wa kgwedi ya borataro e ne e le Ira morwa Ikese wa kwa Thekoa; ba mophato wa gagwe ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:10 Molaodi wa bosupa wa kgwedi ya bosupa e ne e le Helese wa kwa Phelone wa Baeferaime; ba mophato wa gagwe ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:11 Molaodi wa robedi wa kgwedi ya robedi e ne e le Sibegai wa kwa Huša wa losika lwa ga Sera; ba mophato wa gagwe ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:12 Molaodi wa robongwe wa kgwedi ya robongwe e ne e le Abiesere wa kwa Anathothe wa Babenyamene; ba mophato wa gagwe ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:13 Molaodi wa some wa kgwedi ya some e ne e le Maharai wa kwa Netofa wa losika lwa ga Sera; ba mophato wa gagwe ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:14 Molaodi wa 11 wa kgwedi ya 11 e ne e le Benaya wa kwa Phirathone wa Baeferaime; ba mophato wa gagwe ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:15 Molaodi wa 12 wa kgwedi ya 12 e ne e le Heletai wa kwa Netofa wa losika lwa ga Otheniele; ba mophato wa gagwe ba le 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:16 Baokamedi ba ditso tsa Iseraele e ne e le ba: Moeteledipele wa Barubene e le Eliesere morwa Sigeri; wa Basimeone e le Sefatya morwa Maaga; 
1Chronicles27:17 wa Balefi e le Hasabja morwa Kemuele; wa boora Arone e le Satoke; 
1Chronicles27:18 wa Bajuta e le Elihu wa bomorwa-rraagwe Dafita; wa Baisašare e le Omeri morwa Migaele; 
1Chronicles27:19 wa Basebulone e le Isemaya morwa Obatya; wa Banafetale e le Jeremothe morwa Aseriele; 
1Chronicles27:20 wa Baeferaime e le Hosea morwa Asasia; wa bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase e le Joele morwa Phetaya; 
1Chronicles27:20 wa Baeferaime e le Hosea morwa Asasia; wa bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase e le Joele morwa Phetaya; 
1Chronicles27:20 wa Baeferaime e le Hosea morwa Asasia; wa bontlhanngwe jwa lotso lwa ga Manase e le Joele morwa Phetaya; 
1Chronicles27:21 wa bontlhanngwe jwa Bamanase ba kwa Gileate e le Ito morwa Sagaria; wa Babenyamene e le Jaasiele morwa Abenere; 
1Chronicles27:22 wa Badane e le Asarele morwa Jerohame. Ke bone balaodi ba ditso tsa Baiseraele. 
1Chronicles27:23 Mme Dafita a se ka a tshola palo ya bone ba ba dinyaga di 20 le e seng ya bomonnaa-bone; gonne Morena o ne a solofeditse go ntsifatsa Baiseraele jaaka dinaledi tsa legodimo. 
1Chronicles27:24 Joabe morwa Seruya o ne a simolotse go bala morafe, mme a se ka a fetsa, ka petso ya bogale e ne e wetse Baiseraele ka ntlha ya gona; le gona palo ya teng ya se ka ya tsholwa mo lokwalong lwa ditirafalo tsa malatsi a kgosi Dafita." 
1Chronicles27:25 Mookamedi wa matlotlo a kgosi e ne e le Asemawethe morwa Adiele. Mme mookamedi wa matlotlo a a kwa nageng le mo metseng le mo metsaneng le mo dinakeng tsa phemelo e ne e le Jonathane morwa Usia. 
1Chronicles27:26 Mookamedi wa balemi ba masimo e ne e le Eseri morwa Kelobe. 
1Chronicles27:27 Mookamedi wa masimo a moweine e ne e le Simei wa kwa Rama; mookamedi wa ditsaga tsa weine tse di neng di le kwa masimo e ne e le Sabedi wa kwa Sifeme. 
1Chronicles27:28 Mookamedi wa ditlhare tsa olefa le tsa mefaa tse di neng di le mo nageng e e kwa tlase e ne e le Baale-Hanane wa kwa Getere; mookamedi wa lookwane lo lo bolokilweng e ne e le Joase. 
1Chronicles27:29 Mookamedi wa dikgomo tse di neng di fula kwa lebaleng la Sarone e ne e le Siterai wa kwa Sarone; mme mookamedi wa dikgomo tse di mo melapong e ne e le Safate morwa Atelai. 
1Chronicles27:30 Mookamedi wa dikammele e ne e le Obile wa Moisemaele; mme mookamedi wa diesele tse dinamagadi e ne e le Jedia wa kwa Meronothe. 
1Chronicles27:31 Mookamedi wa difutshane e ne e le Jasise wa kwa Hagare. Botlhe bao e ne e le baokamedi ba bagolo ba maruo a kgosi Dafita. 
1Chronicles27:32 Mme Jonathane rrangwanaagwe Dafita e ne e le mogakolodi, e le monna wa tlhaloganyo yo o rutegileng; mme Jehiele morwa Hagemoni o ne a na le bomorwa kgosi." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahithofele e ne e le mogakolodi wa kgosi; mme Husai wa Moaregi e ne e le tsala e e ikanyegang ya kgosi. 
1Chronicles27:34 Ahithofele o ne a tlhomagannwa ke Joyata morwa Benaya, le Abjathare; mme molaodi wa mephato ya kgosi e ne e le Joabe." 
1Chronicles28:1 Jaanong Dafita a kgobokanya dikgosana tsotlhe tsa Iseraele, e bong dikgosana tsa ditso le balaodi ba ditlhopha tsa ba ba direlang kgosi le balaodi ba dikete le balaodi ba makgolo le baokamedi ba dithoto tsotlhe le dithuo tsotlhe tsa kgosi le tsa bomorwaa-yona, ba na le badiredi ba lapa la kgosi le bagale le batlhabani botlhe ba ba pelokgale, a ba phuthela kwa Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles28:2 Kgosi Dafita e ema ka dinao a bua a re: “Ntheetseng, bomorwa-rra le morafe wa me! Nna ke ne ke ikaeletse go agela Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena le sebeo sa dinao tsa Modimo wa rona Ntlo ya boikhutso, ke bile ke kgobokantse tsa go e aga." 
1Chronicles28:3 Mme Modimo wa nthaya wa re: ‘Se agele leina la me Ntlo; gonne o monna wa dintwa, o tsholotse madi.’" 
1Chronicles28:4 Mme Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o ntlhophile mo go botlhe ba lelapa la ga rre go nna kgosi ya Iseraele ka metlha le metlha; gonne o ne o tlhophile Juta go nna moeteledipele, le lelapa la ga rre mo lotsong lwa ga Juta; wa ba wa kgatlhwa ke nna mo go bomorwa-rre go ntira kgosi ya Baiseraele botlhe." 
1Chronicles28:5 Mme mo go bomorwaake botlhe – gonne Morena o mphile bomorwa ba bantsi – o tlhophile Salomo morwaake gore a nne mo sedulong sa bogosi jwa Morena, a buse Iseraele." 
1Chronicles28:6 “A nthaya a re: ‘Salomo morwao ke ene yo o tla agang Ntlo ya me le malapa a me; gonne ke mo itlhophetse go nna morwaake, nna ke nne rraagwe." 
1Chronicles28:7 Mme ke tla tlhomamisa bogosi jwa gagwe ka go sa feleng, fa a dirisa ditaelo tsa me le ditshiamo tsa me ka tlhomamo jaaka wena kajeno.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 “Jaanong he, ke a lo rapela mo matlhong a Baiseraele botlhe a phuthego ya Morena le mo ditsebeng tsa Modimo wa rona ka re: Tshegetsang lo tlhokomele melao yotlhe ya Morena, Modimo wa lona, gore lo nne lo rue lefatshe le lentle le, lo be lo le tlogelele bana ba lona boswa sehularong sa lona go ya go ileng." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Wena morwaaka Salomo, itse Modimo wa ga rraago, ò o direle ka pelo yotlhe le ka mowa o o etleetsegileng; gonne Morena o ntse a tlhotlhomisa dipelo tsotlhe, a tlhaloganya maano otlhe a dikakanyo. Fa o o batla, o tla o bona, mme fa o o tlogela, foo o tla go latlha ka bosakhutleng." 
1Chronicles28:10 Lemoga he fa Morena a go tlhaotse gore o age Ntlo ya Tempele e e Boitshepo. Tia o dire jalo.” 
1Chronicles28:11 Dafita a ba a neela Salomo morwawe setshwantsho sa Tempele le sa dikago tsa yona le sa matlwana a dikhumo a yona le sa matlwana a a kwa godimo a yona le sa matlwana a yona a a ka fa teng le sa Ntlo ya sekhurumelo sa thuanyo 
1Chronicles28:12 le setshwantsho sa tsotlhe tse o neng a di akantse, sa malapa a Ntlo ya Morena le sa matlwana otlhe tikologong le sa matlwana a dikhumo tsa Ntlo ya Modimo le sa matlwana a dikhumo tsa dineo tse di boitshepo" 
1Chronicles28:13 le thulaganyo ya ditlhopha tsa baperesiti le tsa Balefi le ya tiro yotlhe ya tirelo ya Ntlo ya Morena le ditshwantsho tsa didiri tsotlhe tsa tirelo Ntlong ya Morena. 
1Chronicles28:14 A ba a mo neela gouta e e lekanyeng go ka dira dilo tsotlhe tsa gouta tsa tirelo nngwe le nngwe le selefera e e lekanyeng go ka dira dilo tsotlhe tsa selefera tsa tirelo nngwe le nngwe 
1Chronicles28:15 le gouta e e lekanyeng ditlhomo tsa gouta le dipone tsa tsona tsa gouta ka fa e lekanyeng setlhomo sengwe le sengwe le dipone tsa sona ka teng, le selefera ya ditlhomo tsa selefera e e lekanyeng setlhomo le dipone tsa sona ka fa tirelong ya setlhomo sengwe le sengwe;" 
1Chronicles28:16 le gouta e e lekanyeng ditafole tsa dinkgwe tsa tshupo ya ditafole tsotlhe le selefera ya ditafole tsa selefera 
1Chronicles28:17 le gouta e e sa pekwang ya diroophata le ya megopo e e kgatshang le ya dikgamelo le ya dinwelo tsa gouta ka fa e lekanyeng dinwelo tsotlhe ka teng le selefera ya dinwelo tsa selefera ka fa e lekanyeng dinwelo tsotlhe ka teng 
1Chronicles28:18 le gouta e e itshekisitsweng ya aletare ya maswalo ka fa e batlegang ka teng le setshwantsho sa koloi, e bong sa boKerubime ba gouta ba ba tla tsharololang diphuka tsa bone, ba khurumetsa Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena." 
1Chronicles28:19 Mme Dafita a re: “Tsotlhe tse, e bong ditiro tsotlhe tsa setshwantsho, Morena o di nthutile ka lokwalo lo lo tswang mo seatleng sa Morena se le mo go nna.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Dafita a ba a raya Salomo a re: “Tia o nametsege o fetse tiro; se boife, se tshoge; gonne Morena, Modimo, Modimo wa me, o na nao; ga o ne o go hularela le e seng go go tlogela go ya go fitlhelela o fetsa tiro yotlhe ya kago le ya dilo tsa tirelo ya Ntlo ya Morena." 
1Chronicles28:21 Bona, ditlhopha tsa baperesiti le tsa Balefi ke tse, go ka tshwara tirelo nngwe le nngwe ya Ntlo ya Modimo; gape o na le ba ba etleetsegileng ditirong tsa mefutafuta go ka dira tiro nngwe le nngwe ka botswerere. E bile dikgosana mmogo le morafe otlhe di tla emela ditiro tsotlhe tsa gago.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Kgosi Dafita a ba a raya phuthego yotlhe a re: “Salomo, morwaake yo Modimo o mo tlhaotseng a le esi, o sa le mošwa, o bile o monana, mme tiro e kgolo; gonne ntlo ya borena e ga se ya motho, ke ya Morena Modimo." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ka fa ke neng ke nonofile ka teng ka kgobokanyetsa Ntlo ya Modimo wa me gouta ya tse e tla nnang tsa gouta le selefera ya tsa selefera le kgotlho ya tsa kgotlho le tshipi ya tsa tshipi le dikgong tsa dilo tsa dikgong le majwana a a tlhokegang a šohama le a a tla tlhongwang le majwana a a tlhokegang a mantsho le a a mebalabala le majwana a a tlhokegang a mefutafuta le magakwa a magolo ka bontsi. 
1Chronicles29:3 Mme e re ka ke itumelela Ntlo ya Modimo wa me, ke bile ke ntshetsa Ntlo ya Modimo wa me gouta le selefera tse dingwe tse e leng tsa me kwa ntle ga tsotlhe tse ke setseng ke di kgobokanyeditse Ntlo e e Boitshepo:" 
1Chronicles29:4 E bong ditalente di le 3 000 tsa gouta, e le gouta ya kwa Ofire, le ditalente di le 7 000 tsa selefera e e itshekisitsweng go di manega mo dipoteng tsa Tempele." 
1Chronicles29:5 Gouta e, e nne ya dilo tsa gouta, mme selefera e, e nne ya tsa selefera le ya tiro ya mefutafuta e e dirwang ka diatla ke ditswerere. Jaanong ke mang yo o tla ntshetsang Morena neo kajeno ka boitumelo?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Ga itshupa ditlhogo tsa dikgoro le dikgosana tsa ditso tsa Iseraele le balaodi ba dikete le ba makgolo le baokamedi ba tiro ya kgosi gore ba rata go ntsha dineo. 
1Chronicles29:7 Ba ntshetsa kago ya Ntlo ya Modimo ditalente di le 5 000 tsa gouta le madi a gouta a diranta di le 20 000 le ditalente di le 10 000 tsa selefera le ditalente di le 18 000 tsa kgotlho le ditalente di le 100 000 tsa tshipi. 
1Chronicles29:8 Mme yo o neng a tshotse majwana a a tlhokegang a a tsenya mo khumong ya Ntlo ya Morena e e neng e okametswe ke Jehiele wa losika lwa ga Geresone. 
1Chronicles29:9 Mme batho ba itumelela bopelotshweu jwa bao, ka ba ne ba ntshetsa Morena ka pelo yotlhe e e thabileng; kgosi Dafita le ene a itumela ka boitumelo jo bogolo." 
1Chronicles29:10 Dafita a ba a boka Morena mo matlhong a phuthego yotlhe a re: “A go bokwe wena Morena, Modimo wa ga Iseraele rraetsho, go tswa bosenang-tshimologo go ya bosakhutleng." 
1Chronicles29:11 Morena, bogolo ke jwa gago le thata le kgalalelo le tumiso le borena; kana tsotlhe tse di kwa legodimong le mo lefatsheng ke tsa gago; bogosi ke jwa gago, Morena; ke wena o itsholeditseng godimo ga tsotlhe, o le tlhogo." 
1Chronicles29:12 Khumo le tlotlo di tswa mo go wena; wena o mmusi wa tsotlhe; thata le nonofo di mo seatleng sa gago; go godisa le go tiisa mongwe le mongwe go mo seatleng sa gago. 
1Chronicles29:13 Ka moo he, Modimo wa rona, re a go leboga, re boka leina le le galalelang la gago." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Kana nna ke mang, morafe wa me ke bomang mo re ka bong re nonofa go ntsha dineo tse di kana ka boitumelo? Kana tsotlhe di tswa mo go wena, mme re go neetse fela tse di tswang mo seatleng sa gago." 
1Chronicles29:15 Kana re baeng le bajaki fa pele ga gago jaaka borraetsho botlhe. Malatsi a rona mo lefatsheng a tshwana le moriti go se na tsholofelo. 
1Chronicles29:16 Morena, Modimo wa rona, khumo yotlhe e, e re e kgobokantseng go go agela Ntlo ya leina le le boitshepo la gago e tswa mo seatleng sa gago; ke ya gago yotlhe." 
1Chronicles29:17 Modimo wa me, ke a itse gore o tlhatlhoba pelo, o natefelwa ke mannete; ka bonnete jwa pelo ya me ke ntshitse tsotlhe tse ka pelotshweu; ke bile ke bonye batho ba gago jaanong ka boitumelo ba ba leng fano ba go ntshetsa dineo ka bopelotshweu." 
1Chronicles29:18 Morena, Modimo wa ga Aborahame le Isaka le Iseraele borraetsho, boloka bopelotshweu jo bo ntseng jalo ka bosakhutleng, bo nne mo maikutlong le mo maikaelelong a dipelo tsa batho ba gago; o gogele dipelo tsa bone kwa go wena." 
1Chronicles29:19 O be o nee Salomo morwaake pelo ya nnete gore a tshegetse ditaelo tsa gago le ditshupo tsa gago le melao ya gago, a dirafatse tsotlhe, a age ntlo ya borena ya gago e ke e etleeleditseng.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Morago ga moo Dafita a raya phuthego yotlhe a re: “A ko lo bake Morena, Modimo wa lona!” Phuthego yotlhe ya baka Morena, Modimo wa borraabo; ba be ba inama, ba ikobela fatshe fa pele ga Morena le kgosi." 
1Chronicles29:21 Kamoso ba direla Morena ditlhabelo, ba fisetsa Morena ditlhabelo tsa phiso tsa dipoo di le sekete le diphelehu di le sekete le dikwana di le sekete mmogo le ditshupelo tsa noo tsa teng le ditlhabelo tse dintsi tse di jewang tsa Baiseraele botlhe." 
1Chronicles29:22 Ba a ja, ba nwa fa pele ga Morena ka letsatsi leo ka boitumelo jo bogolo; ba be ba dira Salomo morwa Dafita kgosi gape, ba mo tloletsa Morena go nna moeteledipele le Satoke go nna moperesiti." 
1Chronicles29:23 Salomo a nna jalo mo sedulong sa bogosi sa Morena, a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa ga Dafita rraagwe, a tlhogonolofala, mme Baiseraele botlhe ba mo utlwa." 
1Chronicles29:24 Dikgosana tsotlhe le bagale le bone bomorwa kgosi Dafita botlhe ba ikokobeletsa kgosi Salomo. 
1Chronicles29:25 Morena a nna a godisa Salomo mo matlhong a Baiseraele botlhe, a mo naya bogosi jo bo galalelang jo bo iseng bo ke bo nne mo kgosing epe ya Iseraele pele ga gagwe." 
1Chronicles29:26 Jalo he, Dafita morwa Isai e ne e le kgosi ya Baiseraele botlhe." 
1Chronicles29:27 Sebaka se o neng a busa Iseraele ka sona e ne e le dinyaga di le 40; a busa dinyaga di supa kwa Heberone; a ba a busa dinyaga di le 33 mo Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles29:28 A ba a swa a tsofetse sentle, a kgotshe malatsi le khumo le tlotlo, mme Salomo morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
1Chronicles29:29 Mme ditirafalo tsa kgosi Dafita tsa pele le tsa morago kana di kwadilwe mo ditirafalong tsa ga Samuele mmoni le mo ditirafalong tsa moporofeti Nathane le mo ditirafalong tsa ga Gate mmoni 
1Chronicles29:30 mmogo le dilo tsotlhe tsa bogosi jwa gagwe le tsa bogale jwa gagwe le tsa dipaka tse di dirafaletseng ene le Baiseraele le dipuso tsotlhe tsa mafatshe. 
2Chronicles1:1 Salomo morwa Dafita a itiisa bogosing jwa gagwe, mme Morena, Modimo wa gagwe, a nna nae, a mo dira yo mogolo mo go feteletseng." 
2Chronicles1:2 Letsatsi le lengwe Salomo a bua le Baiseraele botlhe le balaodi ba dikete le ba makgolo le baatlhodi le baetapele botlhe ba Iseraele, e bong ditlhogo tsa dikgoro," 
2Chronicles1:3 a ba a ya kwa thoteng ya tlhabelo ya Gibeone, a na le phuthego yotlhe; gonne teng go ne go le Tempelana ya Boipontsho ya Modimo, e Moše motlhanka wa Morena o neng a e dirile kwa sekakeng." 
2Chronicles1:4 Le gale Letlole la Modimo lone Dafita o ne a le tsere kwa Khiriathe-Jearime, a le isa felong fa a go le baakanyeditseng kwa Jerusalema; ka gonne o ne a le tlhometse tente teng." 
2Chronicles1:5 Mme aletare ya kgotlho e e neng e dirilwe ke Besalele morwa Uri morwa Hure yona e ne e le teng fa pele ga Tempelana ya Morena, mme Salomo le phuthego ba mo obamela teng." 
2Chronicles1:6 Salomo a dira ditlhabelo teng mo aletareng ya kgotlho fa pele ga Morena e e leng ya Tempelana ya Boipontsho, a dira ditlhabelo tsa phiso di le 1 000 mo go yona." 
2Chronicles1:7 Bosigo joo Modimo wa ipontsha mo go Salomo, wa mo raya wa re: “Kopa se o ratang ke se go naya.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Salomo a raya Modimo a re: “O diretse Dafita rre ka bopelotlhomogi jo bogolo; o bile o ntirile kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe. 
2Chronicles1:9 Jaanong Morena Modimo, dirafatsa se o se solofeditseng Dafita rre; gonne o ntirile kgosi ya morafe o mogolo o o kana ka lerole la lefatshe." 
2Chronicles1:10 Ka moo he, mphe botlhale le tlhaloganyo gore ke itse go dira ka tshwanelo fa pele ga morafe o; go seng jalo go ka kgona mang go busa morafe o mogolo o wa gago?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Mme Modimo wa raya Salomo wa re: “E re ka selo se, se le mo pelong ya gago, mme o sa kope khumo le matlotlo le tlotlo le e seng loso lwa ba ba go tlhoileng, le gona o sa kope botshelo jo boleele, mme o ikopela botlhale le tlhaloganyo gore o tle o itse go busa morafe wa me o ke go dirileng kgosi ya ona," 
2Chronicles1:12 ka moo o newa botlhale le tlhaloganyo. Le gona ke tla go naya khumo le matlotlo le tlotlo tse di neng di sa tsholwa ke dikgosi tse di neng di le pele ga gago; le gona ga di kitla di bonwa ke ope sehularong sa gago.” 
2Chronicles1:13 Mme Salomo a tloga kwa thoteng ya tlhabelo e e kwa Gibeone, kwa Tempelaneng ya Boitshepo, a boela kwa Jerusalema, a busa Iseraele teng." 
2Chronicles1:14 Salomo a ikgobokanyetsa dikoloi tsa ntwa le bapalami ba dipitse; o ne a na le dikoloi tsa ntwa di le 1 400 le bapalami ba dipitse ba le 12 000; a ba baya kwa metseng ya dikoloi le mo Jerusalema fa kgosing. 
2Chronicles1:15 Kgosi ya dira gore go nne selefera le gouta mo Jerusalema tse di kana ka mafika; ya ntsifatsa mesetere gore e lekane ka bontsi le megokare e e kwa nageng e e kwa tlase. 
2Chronicles1:16 Dipitse tsa ga Salomo di ne di tswa kwa Egepeto le kwa Kgoa; barekedi ba kgosi ba di reka kwa Kgoa ka madi. 
2Chronicles1:17 Ba reka koloi kwa Egepeto ka diselefera di le 600, le pitse ka di le 150; ba di mo rekela jalo go ya go di rekisa le mo dikgosing tsotlhe tsa Bahethe le mo dikgosing tsa Siria." 
2Chronicles2:1 Jaanong Salomo a ikaelela go agela leina la Morena Ntlo le go ikagela ntlo ya bogosi. 
2Chronicles2:2 Salomo a ntsha banna ba le 70 000 ba ba tla rwalang merwalo le banna ba le 80 000 ba ba tla betlang mafika kwa dithabeng le baokamedi ba bone ba le 3 600. 
2Chronicles2:3 Salomo a ba a roma kwa go Hurame, kgosi ya Tiro a re: “A ko o ntirele jaaka o kile wa direla Dafita rre, wa mo romela mesetere go ka ikagela ntlo e a nnang mo go yona." 
2Chronicles2:4 Itse gore ke batla go agela leina la Morena, Modimo wa me, Ntlo le go e mo itshepisetsa go tshuba maswalo fa pele ga gagwe, e bong maswalo a makga a a monate le go baya teng dinkgwe tsa tshupo ka gale le go dira ditlhabelo tsa phiso mo mosong le maitsiboa ka boSabata le ka ngwedi o o rogilweng le ka meletlo ya Morena, Modimo wa rona. Go dira jalo ke tshwanelo e e se neng e khutla ya Baiseraele." 
2Chronicles2:5 Mme Ntlo e ke ratang go e aga e tshwanetse go nna e kgolo; gonne Modimo wa rona o mogolo go feta medimo yotlhe. 
2Chronicles2:6 Kana ke mang yo o ka nonofang go o agela Ntlo, etswe loapi le magodimo otlhe di sa o lekane? Nna ke mang mo nka o agelang Ntlo? Kana ke felo ga go tshuba maswalo fela fa pele ga ona." 
2Chronicles2:7 Jaanong he, nthomele monna wa setswerere yo o ka dirang dilo tsa gouta le tsa selefera le tsa kgotlho le tsa tshipi le tsa masela a mahibidu a bofifadu le a mahibidu a madi le a mabududu; yo o itseng go seta ditshwantsho mmogo le ditswerere tse ke nang natso mo Juta le Jerusalema tse di beilweng ke Dafita rre." 
2Chronicles2:8 O bo o nthomele dikgong tsa mesetere le tsa mesiperese le tsa merukuru tsa kwa Lebanone; gonne ke a itse gore batlhanka ba gago ba itse go rema ditlhare tsa Lebanone. Mme batlhanka ba me ba tla thusanya le ba gago 
2Chronicles2:9 gore ke etleelediwe dikgong tse dintsi; gonne Ntlo e ke batlang go e aga e tla nna e kgolo e e gakgamatsang. 
2Chronicles2:10 Bona, batlhanka ba gago, e bong baremi ba ba remang ditlhare, ke tla ba naya dijo tsa dikgetse di le 20 000 tsa korong le dikgetse di le 20 000 tsa garase le dielo di le 20 000 tsa weine le dielo di le 20 000 tsa lookwane.”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Hurame kgosi ya Tiro a araba ka lokwalo, a lo romela Salomo a re: “E re ka Morena a rata morafe wa gagwe, o go dirile kgosi ya one.”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Hurame a ba a re: “A go bakwe Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, yo o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe, yo o neileng kgosi Dafita morwa yo o botlhale yo o nang le tlhaloganyo le temogo, yo o batlang go agela Morena Ntlo le go ikagela ntlo ya bogosi." 
2Chronicles2:13 Jaanong he, ke go romela monna wa maatlametlo yo o nang le temogo, e bong Hurame-Abi." 
2Chronicles2:14 Ke morwa mosadi wa bomorwadia Dane, mme rraagwe ke monna wa mono Tiro; o itse go dira dilo tsa gouta le tsa selefera le tsa kgotlho le tsa tshipi le tsa mafika le tsa dikgong le tsa masela a mahibidu a bofifadu le a mabududu le a masweu le a mahibidu a madi le go seta meseto ya mefutafuta le go akanya tiro nngwe le nngwe ka botswerere e a e neelwang mmogo le ditswerere tsa gago le tsa ga Dafita rraago, mong wa me." 
2Chronicles2:15 Mme jaanong fa e le korong le garase le lookwane le weine tse mong wa me a di umakileng, a a di romele batlhanka ba gagwe." 
2Chronicles2:16 Rona re tla rema ditlhare kwa Lebanone fela jaaka o di batla, re di go isetsa kwa Jafo mo lewatleng di patagantswe; wena o di tsee teng, o di ise kwa Jerusalema.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Salomo a ba a bala banna botlhe ba baeng ba ba neng ba le mo lefatsheng la Iseraele morago ga go bala mo Dafita rraagwe o neng a go badile; ga fitlhelwa ba le 153 600. 
2Chronicles2:18 Ba le 70 000 ba bone a ba dira barwadi ba merwalo, ba le 80 000 a ba dira babetli ba mafika kwa dithabeng, ba le 3 600 a ba dira baokamedi ba ba dirisang batho." 
2Chronicles3:1 Salomo a simolola go aga Ntlo ya Morena mo Jerusalema thabeng ya Moriya, kwa Morena o neng a iponaditse teng mo go Dafita rraagwe, mo felong fa Dafita o neng a go etleeditse mo seboaneng sa ga Orenane wa Mojebusi." 
2Chronicles3:2 O ne a simolola go aga ka letsatsi la bobedi la kgwedi ya bobedi ya ngwaga wa bone wa puso ya gagwe. 
2Chronicles3:3 E rile Salomo a simolola go aga Ntlo ya Modimo, a e thaya jaana: Boleele jwa nna mabogo a le 60 ka fa selekanyong sa pele, bophara jwa nna mabogo a le 20." 
2Chronicles3:4 Matseno a a neng a le fa mojako boleele jwa ona jo bo tsamayang le bophara jwa Ntlo e le mabogo a le 20; bogodimo jwa ona e le mabogo a le 20; a a manega gouta e e sa pekwang ka mo teng. 
2Chronicles3:5 Ntlo e kgolo a e manega dipati tsa mesiperese, a ba a e manega gouta e e sa pekwang; a dira ditshwantsho tsa mekolane le tsa dikeetane tsa dithunya mo go yona." 
2Chronicles3:6 A ba a manega Ntlo ya Modimo majwana a a tlhokegang go e kgabisa. Gouta e ne e tswa kwa Pharwaime. 
2Chronicles3:7 Le gona a manega Ntlo ya Modimo gouta, e bong ditlhomeso le direpodi le dipota tsa yona le ditswalo tsa yona; a seta boKerubime mo dipoteng." 
2Chronicles3:8 A ba a dira Ntlo e e Boitshepo-jwa-Maitshepo; boleele jwa yona jo bo tsamayang le bophara jwa Tempele jwa nna mabogo a le 20, le bophara jwa yona jwa nna mabogo a le 20; a e manega gouta e e sa pekwang ya ditalente di le 600." 
2Chronicles3:9 Bokete jwa dimapo e ne e le dišekele di le 50 tsa gouta. Le matlwana a a kwa godimo a a manega gouta. 
2Chronicles3:10 A ba a dira boKerubime ba le babedi mo Ntlong e e Boitshepo-jwa-Maitshepo, e le tiro ya botswerere, a ba manega gouta." 
2Chronicles3:11 Boleele jwa diphuka tsa boKerubime e ne e le mabogo a soma mabedi mmogo; lofuka lwa mongwe lwa mabogo a le matlhano lo ama lobota lwa Ntlo ka fa, lofuka lo longwe lwa mabogo a matlhano lo amana le lofuka lwa Kerubime yo mongwe fa gare." 
2Chronicles3:12 Lofuka lwa Kerubime yo mongwe lwa mabogo a matlhano le lone lo ama lobota lwa Ntlo ka fale; lofuka lo longwe lwa mabogo a matlhano lo kopana le lofuka lwa Kerubime yo mongwe fa gare. 
2Chronicles3:13 Diphuka tseo tsa boKerubime tsa bo di tsharologile mabogo a le 20; ba bo ba eme ka dinao, ba lebisitse difatlhego kwa Ntlong." 
2Chronicles3:14 A ba a dira lesire le masela a mabududu le a mahibidu a bofifadu le a mahibidu a madi le a masweu, a dira ditshwantsho tsa boKerubime mo go lone." 
2Chronicles3:15 A ba a dira maotwana a mabedi a boleele jwa mabogo a le 35 ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Ntlo ya Modimo; ditlhogo mo godimo ga ona, bogodimo jwa tsona e ne e le mabogo a le matlhano." 
2Chronicles3:16 A ba a dira dikeetane jaaka sebaga, a di gokelela mo ditlhogong tsa maotwana; a ba a dira digaranata di le 100, a di gokelela mo dikeetaneng." 
2Chronicles3:17 A ba a tlhoma maotwana fa mojakong wa Tempele, le lengwe ntlheng ya le le jang, le lengwe ntlheng ya la molema. Le le mo ntlheng ya le le jang a le bitsa Jagine, le le mo ntlheng ya la molema a le taya leina la Boase." 
2Chronicles4:1 Le gona a dira aletare ya kgotlho, boleele jwa yona e le mabogo a le 20 le bophara jwa yona e le mabogo a le 20, bogodimo jwa yona e le mabogo a le some." 
2Chronicles4:2 A ba a dira lewatle le le bopilweng la kgotlho; go le kgabaganya go tswa losing go ya losing e ne e le mabogo a le some; le le tshekeletsa; boteng jwa lone e le mabogo a le matlhano, mme mogala wa mabogo a le 30 o le kopanya tikologong." 
2Chronicles4:3 Ditshwantsho tsa diphare di ne di le dikologa ka fa tlase ga losi tikologong yotlhe; di ne di le some mo letsogong le le lengwe, di dikologa lewatle tikologong, e le methalo e mebedi ya diphare, di bopilwe mmogo le lewatle, fa le bopiwa." 
2Chronicles4:4 Le ne le pegilwe mo dikgomong di le 12, di le tharo di lebile kwa bokone, tse tharo kwa bophirimatsatsi, tse tharo kwa borwa, tse tharo kwa botlhabatsatsi, mme lewatle le le mo godimo ga tsona, marago otlhe a le ka fa tlase ga lone." 
2Chronicles4:5 Bokima jwa lobota lwa lone e ne e le bophara jwa seatla; losi lwa lone lo ne lo bopegile jaaka losi lwa nkgo jaaka sethunya se se thuntseng. Le ne le tladiwa ke dinkgo di le 3 000. 
2Chronicles4:6 A ba a dira megopo ya tlhatswetso e le some, a baya e metlhano ntlheng ya le le jang, e metlhano ntlheng ya la molema gore go tlhatswiwe mo go yona. Ba tsokotsa dilo tsa ditlhabelo tsa phiso mo go yona. Mme lewatle e ne e le la baperesiti go tlhapa mo go lone." 
2Chronicles4:7 A ba a dira ditlhomo tsa dipone tsa gouta di le some ka fa molaong wa tsona, a di baya mo Felong-ga-Boitshepo, tse tlhano mo ntlheng ya le le jang, tse tlhano mo ntlheng ya la molema." 
2Chronicles4:8 A ba a dira ditafole di le some, a di baya mo Felong-ga-Boitshepo, tse tlhano mo ntlheng ya le le jang, tse tlhano mo ntlheng ya la molema; a ba a dira dijana tsa go kgatsha di le lekgolo tsa gouta." 
2Chronicles4:9 A ba a dira lelapa la baperesiti le lelapa le legolo le ditswalo tsa lelapa; dipati tsa tsona a di manega kgotlho. 
2Chronicles4:10 Lewatle lone a le baya kwa sekhutlong sa Tempele mo botshekeng jwa borwa le botlhabatsatsi. 
2Chronicles4:11 Hurame a ba a dira dipitsa le diolola-molora le dijana tsa go kgatsha. Hurame a ba a fetsa go dira tiro e a e direlang kgosi Salomo kwa Ntlong ya Modimo: 
2Chronicles4:12 E bong maotwana a mabedi le dikgolokwe tsa ditlhogo tse di mo godimo ga maotwana a mabedi le ditharaanyo tse pedi tsa go kgabisa dikgolokwe tse pedi tsa ditlhogo tse di mo godimo ga maotwana 
2Chronicles4:13 le digaranata di le 400 tsa ditharaanyo tse pedi, e le dikeetane tse pedi tsa digaranata tsa tharaanyo nngwe le nngwe go kgabisa dikgolokwe tse pedi tsa ditlhogo tse di mo godimo ga maotwana" 
2Chronicles4:14 le dikolotsana tsa tlhatswetso di le some le megopo e le some mo go tsona 
2Chronicles4:15 le lewatle le le lengwe le dikgomo di le 12 ka fa tlase ga lone 
2Chronicles4:16 le dipitsa le diolola-molora le diroophata le didiri tsotlhe tsa teng. Tsotlhe tseo Hurame-Abi a di direla kgosi Salomo go nna tsa Ntlo ya Morena, e le tsa kgotlho e e gotlhilweng." 
2Chronicles4:17 Kgosi ya laela Hurame go di bopa kwa lebaleng la Joretane ka dibopelo tsa mmu wa letsopa fa gare ga Sukothe le Sereta. 
2Chronicles4:18 Salomo a dira didiri tsotlhe tseo, e le tse dintsintsi; gonne bokete jwa kgotlho ya tsona bo ne bo se na selekanyo." 
2Chronicles4:19 Salomo a dira didiri tsotlhe tsa Ntlo ya Modimo, e bong aletare ya gouta le ditafole tsa dinkgwe tsa tshupo;" 
2Chronicles4:20 le ditlhomo tsa dipone le dipone tsa tsona tsa gouta e e sa pekwang go di tshuba ka fa molaong ka fa ntle ga Felo fa go kwa Tengteng; 
2Chronicles4:21 le dithunya le dipone le dipoma tsa tsona tsa gouta; tsotlhe e le tsa gouta e e sa pekwang; 
2Chronicles4:22 le dithipa le dijana tsa go kgatsha le megopo le diolola-molora tsa gouta e e sa pekwang. Fa e le mojako wa Tempele, ditswalo tsa ona tsa ka fa teng tsa Felo-ga-Boitshepo-jwa-Maitshepo le ditswalo tsa Felo-ga-Boitshepo e ne e le tsa gouta." 
2Chronicles5:1 E rile tiro yotlhe e Salomo o neng a e direla Ntlo ya Morena e se na go wediwa, Salomo a tsenya dineo tse di boitshepo tsa ga Dafita rraagwe; a ba a tsenya selefera le gouta le dilo tsa mefutafuta mo dipolokelong tsa Ntlo ya Modimo." 
2Chronicles5:2 Sebakeng seo Salomo a phutha bagolo ba Iseraele le dikgosana tsotlhe tsa ditso le ditlhogo tsa dikgoro tsa Baiseraele, ba tla kwa Jerusalema go ya go tsaya Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena kwa motseng wa ga Dafita o e leng Sione." 
2Chronicles5:3 Banna botlhe ba Iseraele ba phuthegela kwa kgosing moletlong ka kgwedi ya bosupa. 
2Chronicles5:4 Jaanong e rile bagolo botlhe ba Iseraele ba sena go goroga, Balefi ba tsaya Letlole," 
2Chronicles5:5 ba tlisa Letlole le Tente ya Boipontsho le didiri tsotlhe tse di boitshepo tse di neng di le mo tenteng eo; baperesiti le Balefi ba di tlisa. 
2Chronicles5:6 Mme ya re kgosi Salomo le phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele e e neng e phuthegetse kwa go ene, ba ntse ba le fa pele ga Letlole, ba tlisa ditlhabelo tsa difutshane le dikgomo tse di sa ka keng tsa balwa, le fa e le go akanngwa ka ntlha ya bontsi." 
2Chronicles5:7 Baperesiti ba isa Letlole la Kgolagano ya Morena kwa felong ga lone, kwa Felong fa go kwa Tengteng ga Tempele, kwa Felong-ga-Boitshepo-jwa-Maitshepo fa tlase ga diphuka tsa boKerubime." 
2Chronicles5:8 Mme boKerubime ba bo ba tsharolotse diphuka godimo ga Letlole, ba sireleditse Letlole le disikari tsa lone, ba le okame." 
2Chronicles5:9 Mme disikari e ne e le tse ditelele mo dintlha tsa tsona tse di tswang Letloleng di neng di bonala ka fa ntle ga Felo fa go kwa Tengteng, mme di sa bonale ka kwa ntle; le ntse le le teng go fitlha letsatsing la kajeno." 
2Chronicles5:10 Go ne go se sepe mo Letloleng fa e se matlapa a mabedi a Moše o neng a a tsenya mo teng kwa Horebe, jale fa Morena a dira kgolagano le Baiseraele, fa ba tswa kwa Egepeto." 
2Chronicles5:11 Jaanong baperesiti ba tswa mo Felong-ga-Boitshepo. Kana baperesiti botlhe ba ba neng ba le teng ba ne ba iitshepisitse go sa tlhokomelwe kamogano ya ditlhopha mo tirong. 
2Chronicles5:12 Gape baopedi ba Balefi botlhe Asafe le Hemane le Jeduthune le bomorwaa-bone le ba ga bone ba ne ba eme ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya aletare, ba apere masela a masweu, ba na le matlhao-a-mabogo le diharepa le dikwadi, mme baperesiti ba le 120 ba na nabo ba letsa diphala." 
2Chronicles5:13 Baletsi ba diphala le baopedi ba utlwala jaaka e kete ke lentswe la a le mongwe fela go baka le go leboga Morena; ya re ba tlhatlosa mantswe ka diphala le ka matlhao-a-mabogo le ka diletso tse dingwe le ka pako e e reng: Bakang Morena, gonne o molemo, mme bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng! Ntlo ya tlala leru la kgalalelo ya Morena." 
2Chronicles5:14 Mme baperesiti ba palelwa ke go ema le go dira tsa tirelo-Modimo ka ntlha ya leru; gonne kgalalelo ya Morena e ne e tletse mo Ntlong ya Modimo. 
2Chronicles6:1 Ka nako ele Salomo a bua a re: “Morena a re, o rata go nna mo bontshong jwa maru." 
2Chronicles6:2 Mme nna ke go agetse Ntlo, ke bonno jo bo tlhomameng gore o nne teng ka bosakhutleng.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Jaanong kgosi ya retologa, ya tshegofatsa phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele, phuthego e ntse e eme." 
2Chronicles6:4 Ya ba ya re: “A go tumisiwe Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o o dirafaditseng ka diatla tsa ona se o se solofeditseng Dafita rre ka molomo wa ona wa re:" 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘E sa le ka letsatsi le ke ntshitseng morafe wa me kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto ka lone, ga ke ise nke ke tlhophe motse ope mo ditsong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele go aga Ntlo teng gore leina la me le nne teng; le gona ke ne ke ise ke tlhaole monna go nna kgosi ya morafe wa me wa Iseraele." 
2Chronicles6:6 Mme ke tlhophile Jerusalema gore leina la me le nne teng; ka ba ka tlhaola Dafita go nna mookamedi wa morafe wa me wa Iseraele.’ 
2Chronicles6:7 “Dafita rre o ne a ikaeletse go agela leina la Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, Ntlo," 
2Chronicles6:8 mme Morena a raya Dafita rre a re: ‘Maikaelelo a pelo ya gago a go agela leina la me Ntlo a siame. 
2Chronicles6:9 Fela wena ga o ne o aga Ntlo ya me, mme morwao yo o tla mo tsalang ke ene yo o tla agelang leina la me Ntlo.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 “Jaanong Morena o dirafaditse lefoko la gagwe le o le buileng: Kana ke tsogile mo boemong jwa ga Dafita rre, ka nna mo sedulong sa bogosi sa Iseraele jaaka Morena a buile, ka agela leina la Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, Ntlo." 
2Chronicles6:11 Ka ba ka baya Letlole teng, le tshupo ya kgolagano ya Morena e leng mo go lone e o e dirileng le Baiseraele.”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Salomo a ba a ema fa pele ga aletare ya Morena a lebaganye le phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele, a tsholetsa mabogo." 
2Chronicles6:13 Kana Salomo o ne a dirile sefata sa kgotlho, a se baya fa gare ga lelapa, boleele jwa sona e le mabogo a le matlhano le bophara jwa sona e le mabogo a le matlhano, bogodimo jwa sona e le mabogo a le mararo. Jaanong a ema mo go sona, a khubama ka mangole fa pele ga phuthego yotlhe ya Iseraele, a tsholeletsa mabogo kwa legodimong" 
2Chronicles6:14 a re: “Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, kwa legodimong le mono lefatsheng ga go na modimo ope o o tshwanang nao. Wena o bolokela batlhanka ba gago kgolagano le bopelotlhomogi, fa ba sepela fa pele ga gago ka pelo yotlhe." 
2Chronicles6:15 Wena o diretse motlhanka wa gago Dafita rre tse o di mo solofeditseng. Ruri, o ne o di buile ka molomo wa gago, mme o bile o di dirafaditse ka seatla sa gago jaaka go ntse kajeno." 
2Chronicles6:16 Jaanong he, Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o dirafaletse motlhanka wa gago Dafita rre le tse o di mo solofeditseng wa re: ‘Ga o kitla o tlhoka monna fa pele ga me yo o dutseng mo sedulong sa bogosi sa Iseraele; go ka nna jalo fela fa bana ba gago ba disa tsela ya bone ka go sepela ka fa molaong wa me jaaka wena.’" 
2Chronicles6:17 Jaanong he, Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, a lefoko la gago le o le solofeditseng motlhanka wa gago Dafita le tlhomame." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Mme a ruri Modimo o ka nna le batho mo lefatsheng? Kana loapi le magodimo otlhe ga di go lekane. Jaanong Ntlo e ke e agileng yona e tlhaela bogolo jang! 
2Chronicles6:19 Morena, Modimo wa me, ngoka thapelo ya motlhanka wa gago le mokokotlelo wa gagwe gore o utlwe go goelela le go rapela mo motlhanka wa gago a go rapelang fa pele ga gago" 
2Chronicles6:20 le gore matlho a gago e nne a a budulogetseng Ntlo e bosigo le motshegare, e bong felo fa o buileng ka ga gona wa re, o tla baya leina la gago teng; gape le gore o utlwe thapelo e motlhanka wa gago o tla e rapelang a lebile felo fano." 
2Chronicles6:21 A ko o utlwe mokokotlelo wa motlhanka wa gago le wa morafe wa gago wa Iseraele o ba tla o rapelang ba lebile felo fa; o o utlwe o le kwa felong fa o nnang teng kwa legodimong; mme o re o o utlwa, o ba itshwarele." 
2Chronicles6:22 “E re fa motho a leofetse mongwe-ka-ene, mme ba mo ikanisa gore a ikhutse, mme a tla a bua khutso fa pele ga aletare ya gago fa Ntlong e," 
2Chronicles6:23 foo o utlwe o le kwa legodimong, o itshupe ka tiro, o direle batlhanka ba gago tshiamo ka go betsa moikepi, ka go digela ditiro tsa gagwe mo tlhogong ya gagwe le ka go atlholela mosiami o re, ga a na molato, ka go mo naya ka fa tshiamong ya gagwe." 
2Chronicles6:24 “E re fa morafe wa gago wa Iseraele o fenngwa ke mmaba, ka ba tla bo ba go leofetse, mme ba sokologela kwa go wena, ba ipolela leina la gago, ba rapela ba go kokotlela mo Ntlong e," 
2Chronicles6:25 foo o utlwe o le kwa legodimong o itshwarele boleo jwa morafe wa gago wa Iseraele, o ba busetse kwa nageng e o e ba fileng le borraabo." 
2Chronicles6:26 “E re fa legodimo le tswetswe, go se na pula, ka ba tla bo ba go leofetse, mme ba rapela ba lebile felo fa, ba ipolela leina la gago, ba boa ba tlogela boleo jwa bone, ka o tla bo o ba kokobetsa," 
2Chronicles6:27 foo o utlwe o le kwa legodimong, o itshwarele boleo jwa motlhanka wa gago le jwa morafe wa gago wa Baiseraele – kana o ba ruta tsela e e siameng e ba tshwanetseng go sepela mo go yona – o nesetse lefatshe la gago pula le o le neileng morafe wa gago go nna boswa." 
2Chronicles6:28 “E re fa go le tlala mo lefatsheng, fa go le leroborobo, fa go le phori gongwe mongadule gongwe boijane gongwe tsie, fa mmaba wa morafe a o dikanyetsa ka ntwa mo lefatsheng kwa go nngwe ya dikgoro tsa ona, le fa go le pogo efe gongwe bolwetse bofe," 
2Chronicles6:29 foo o utlwe thapelo nngwe le nngwe. O utlwe selelo sengwe le sengwe, le fa e le sa motho ofe, le fa e le sa morafe otlhe wa gago wa Iseraele, ka ba tla bo ba lemoga mongwe le mongwe petso ya gagwe le botlhoko jwa gagwe, ba tsholeletsa mabogo kwa Ntlong e." 
2Chronicles6:30 Foo o utlwe o le kwa legodimong kwa bonnong jwa gago, o ba itshwarele, o nee mongwe le mongwe ka fa ditsamaong tsotlhe tsa gagwe. Kana o itse pelo ya gagwe; gonne ke wena o le wesi fela o itseng dipelo tsa bana ba batho" 
2Chronicles6:31 gore ba go boife, ba sepele mo ditseleng tsa gago ka malatsi otlhe a ba phelang ka ona mo lefatsheng le o le neileng borraetsho." 
2Chronicles6:32 “Le ene moditšhaba yo e seng wa morafe wa gago wa Iseraele, fa a tswa kwa lefatsheng le le kgakala ka ntlha ya leina le legolo la gago le seatla sa gago se se thata le letsogo la gago le le otlologileng; fa a tla a rapela a lebile Ntlo e," 
2Chronicles6:33 foo o utlwe o le kwa legodimong kwa bonnong jwa gago, o dire fela jaaka moditšhaba a goela kwa go wena gore merafe yotlhe ya lefatshe e itse leina la gago, e go boife jaaka morafe wa gago wa Iseraele; e be e lemoge gore Ntlo e, e ke e agileng, ke e agetse leina la gago." 
2Chronicles6:34 “E re fa morafe wa gago o bolola go ya go tlhabana le baba ba ona ka taelo ya gago, mme ba go rapela ba lebile kwa motseng o, o ò o tlhophileng le kwa Ntlong e ke e agetseng leina la gago," 
2Chronicles6:35 foo o utlwe thapelo ya bone le selelo sa bone o le kwa legodimong, o ba direle tshiamo." 
2Chronicles6:36 “E re fa ba go leofela – kana ga go na motho ope yo o sa leofeng! – mme o ba galefela, o ba neela mo diatleng tsa mmaba, mme bathopi ba bone ba ba isa mo botshwarong kwa lefatsheng le le kgakala gongwe le le gaufi" 
2Chronicles6:37 jaanong fa ba itshôla kwa lefatsheng le ba isitsweng teng mo botshwarong, ba sokologa, ba lelela kwa go wena ba le kwa lefatsheng la botshwaro jwa bone, ba re: ‘Re leofile, ra senya, ra ikepa!’" 
2Chronicles6:38 Fa ba boela jalo kwa go wena ka pelo yotlhe le ka mowa otlhe ba le kwa lefatsheng la botshwaro jwa bone kwa ba isitsweng teng mo botshwarong, mme ba rapela ba lebile kwa lefatsheng la bone le o le neileng borraabo le kwa motseng o ò o tlhophileng le kwa Ntlong e ke e agetseng leina la gago," 
2Chronicles6:39 foo o utlwe thapelo ya bone le dilelo tsa bone o le kwa legodimong kwa bonnong jwa gago, o ba direle tshiamo, o itshwarele morafe wa gago o o go leofetseng." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Jaanong he, Modimo wa me, ka thapelo, a matlho a gago a buduloge, a ditsebe tsa gago di sekegelwe thapelo ya felo fa." 
2Chronicles6:41 Nanoga jaanong, Morena Modimo, o tle felong ga boikhutso jwa gago, wena le Letlole la thata ya gago. A baperesiti ba gago, Morena Modimo, ba apare pholoso; a ba o ba tlhomogetseng pelo ba itumedisiwe ka tse di molemo!" 
2Chronicles6:42 Morena Modimo, se gane go utlwa motlodiwa wa gago; gakologelwa mapelotlhomogi a o a solofeditseng Dafita motlhanka wa gago.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 E rile Salomo a sena go rapela, molelo wa fologa kwa legodimong, wa ja ditlhabelo tsa phiso le ditlhabelo tse di jewang, mme kgalalelo ya Morena ya tlala ka Ntlo ya Modimo" 
2Chronicles7:2 mo baperesiti ba bileng ba palelwa ke go tsena mo Ntlong ya Morena, ka kgalalelo ya Morena e ne e tletse mo Ntlong ya Morena." 
2Chronicles7:3 Ya re Baiseraele botlhe ba bona molelo o fologa le kgalalelo ya Morena e okame Ntlo ya Modimo, ba khubama, ba inamela fa fatshe ka difatlhego mo bodilong jwa matlapa, ba obamela, ba leboga Morena, ka a le molemo le bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe e le jo bo sa khutleng." 
2Chronicles7:4 Mme kgosi le morafe otlhe ba direla Morena ditlhabelo. 
2Chronicles7:5 Kgosi Salomo a tlhaba ditlhabelo tsa dikgomo di le 22 000 le tsa difutshane di le 120 000; kgosi le morafe otlhe ba kgakola Ntlo ya Modimo jalo. 
2Chronicles7:6 Baperesiti ba bo ba eme mo mannong a bone, Balefi bone ba tshotse diletso tsa Morena tse di neng di dirilwe ke kgosi Dafita go leboga Morena, ka bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe e le jo bo sa khutleng; e le sefela sa tebogo sa ga Dafita se lediwa ke bone. Mme baperesiti ba letsa diphala ba lebaganye nabo, Baiseraele botlhe ba ntse ba eme ka dinao." 
2Chronicles7:7 Mme Salomo a itshepisa bogare jwa lelapa le le mo ntlheng ya botlhabatsatsi ya Ntlo ya Morena; gonne teng a tlisa ditlhabelo tsa phiso le mafura a ditlhabelo tsa tebogo, ka aletare ya kgotlho e Salomo o e dirileng e ne e sa lekane ditlhabelo tsa phiso le ditshupelo tsa bupe le mafura." 
2Chronicles7:8 Le gona ka sebaka seo Salomo a dira Moletlo malatsi a supa a na le Baiseraele botlhe, e le phuthego e kgolo thata e e tswang nageng yotlhe go tloga kwa Hamathe go ya go fitlha kwa molatswaneng wa Egepeto." 
2Chronicles7:9 A ba a dira kgobokano ya moletlo ka letsatsi la robedi; gonne ba ne ba dirile kgakolo ya aletare malatsi a supa le Moletlo malatsi a supa. 
2Chronicles7:10 Mme ka letsatsi la 23 la kgwedi ya bosupa a naya batho tsela, ba boela kwa magaeng ba itumetse, ba natefetswe ke tse di molemo tse Morena a di diretseng Dafita le Salomo le morafe wa gagwe wa Iseraele." 
2Chronicles7:11 Jaanong e rile Salomo a sena go fetsa Ntlo ya Morena le ntlo ya kgosi le go wetsa tsotlhe ka maatlametlo tse a neng a rata go di dira mo Ntlong ya Morena le mo ntlong ya gagwe," 
2Chronicles7:12 Morena a iponatsa gape mo go Salomo bosigo a mo raya a re: “Ke utlwile thapelo ya gago, ke bile ke itlhaoletse felo fa go nna Ntlo ya tlhabelo." 
2Chronicles7:13 Fa ke tswala legodimo, mme go se na pula, gongwe fa ke laela tsie go ja lefatshe, gongwe fa ke romela leroborobo mo morafeng wa me," 
2Chronicles7:14 mme morafe wa me o o bidiwang ka fa leineng la me o ikokobetsa, ba rapela, ba batla sefatlhego sa me, ba boa mo ditseleng tsa bone tse di bosula, foo ke tla utlwa ke le kwa legodimong, ke itshwarela boleo jwa bone, ke alafa lefatshe la bone." 
2Chronicles7:15 Jaanong matlho a me a tla bo a budulogile le ditsebe tsa me di sekegetswe thapelo ya felo fa. 
2Chronicles7:16 Mme go tloga jaanong ke tlhophile Ntlo e, ka ba ka e itshepisa gore leina le me le nne teng ka bosakhutleng. Mme matlho a me le pelo ya me di tla nna teng ka malatsi otlhe." 
2Chronicles7:17 Mme wena, fa o ka sepela fa pele ga me jaaka Dafita rraago a sepetse, wa dira fela jaaka ke go laetse, wa tshegetsa melao ya me le ditshiamelo tsa me," 
2Chronicles7:18 gona ke tla tlhomamisa sedulo sa bogosi jwa gago jaaka ke solofeditse Dafita rraago ka re: ‘Ga o kitla o tlhoka monna yo o busang Baiseraele.’ 
2Chronicles7:19 Mme fa lo ka ikepa, lwa tlogela melao ya me le ditaolo tsa me tse ke di lo neileng, lwa ya lwa direla medimo e sele, lwa e obamela," 
2Chronicles7:20 foo ke tla lo kumola, ke lo tlosa mo lefatsheng la me le ke le lo neileng. Mme Ntlo e, e ke e itshepiseditseng leina la me, ke tla e latlha, ke e tlosa fa pele ga me, ke e dira seane le tshotlego mo merafeng yotlhe." 
2Chronicles7:21 “Mme Ntlo e, e e neng e tlotlometse mo go fetisang, mongwe le mongwe yo o fetang fa go yona o tla rerega, a botsa a re: ‘Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa Morena a diretse lefatshe le, le Ntlo e ka mokgwa oo?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Go tla arabiwa go twe: ‘E re ka ba tlogetse Morena, Modimo wa borraabo, o o ba ntshitseng kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto, ba ineela mo medimong e sele, ba e obamela, ba e direla, ke ka moo o ba dirafaleditseng tatlhego yotlhe e.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 E rile dinyaga di le 20 di sena go feta, tse Salomo o neng a aga Ntlo ya Morena le ntlo ya gagwe ka tsona" 
2Chronicles8:2 Salomo a agelela metse e a e filweng ke Hurame, a ba a baya Baiseraele mo go yona." 
2Chronicles8:3 Salomo a ba a ya kwa Hamathe-Soba, a mo fenya," 
2Chronicles8:4 a agelela Thatemore kwa sekakeng le metse yotlhe ya difala e o neng a e aga kwa nageng ya Hamathe. 
2Chronicles8:5 A ba a agelela Bethorone-godimo le Bethorone-tlase, ya nna metse e e femetsweng ka dipota le ditswalo le mephakarego" 
2Chronicles8:6 le Baalathe le metse yotlhe ya difala e Salomo o neng a na nayo le metse yotlhe ya dikoloi tsa ntwa le metse ya bapalami; a dira le tsotlhe tse di neng di mo kgatlha tse a ratang go di aga mo Jerusalema le kwa Lebanone le mo lefatsheng lotlhe la puso ya gagwe. 
2Chronicles8:7 Masalela otlhe a Bahethe le Baamori le Baferesi le Bahewi le Bajebusi, ba e seng ba Baiseraele" 
2Chronicles8:8 bana ba bone ba ba setseng mo lefatsheng sehularong sa bone ba Baiseraele ba se kang ba ba nyeletsa, bone Salomo a ba dirisa tiro ya mokuio, ga nna jalo go fitlhelela letsatsing leno." 
2Chronicles8:9 Mme Salomo a se ka a dira makgoba ape mo Baiseraeleng a go dira tiro ya gagwe; gonne bone e ne e le batlhabani le balaodi ba bagale le balaodi ba dikoloi tsa gagwe le ba bapalami ba gagwe. 
2Chronicles8:10 Baokamedi ba bagolo ba kgosi Salomo ba ne ba le 250; bao ba ne ba okametse batho. 
2Chronicles8:11 Salomo a ba a ntsha morwadia Farao mo motseng wa ga Dafita, a mo isa kwa ntlong e o e mo agetseng; gonne o ne a re: “A go se nne mosadi ope wa me mo ntlong ya ga Dafita kgosi ya Iseraele; gonne mafelo ao a boitshepo, ka Letlole la Morena le tsenye mo go ona.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Metlheng eo Salomo a direla Morena ditlhabelo tsa phiso mo aletareng ya Morena e o e agileng fa pele ga matseno a Tempele; 
2Chronicles8:13 go ne go dirwa ditlhabelo tsa letsatsi lengwe le lengwe ka fa taelong ya ga Moše ka boSabata le ka dingwedi tse di rogilweng le ka malatsi a meletlo, gararo ka ngwaga, ka Moletlo wa Dinkgwe tse di sa bedisiwang le ka Moletlo wa Dibeke le ka Moletlo wa Metlaagana." 
2Chronicles8:14 Le gona a tsenya ditlhopha tsa baperesiti mo tirelong ya bone ka fa taelong ya ga Dafita rraagwe le Balefi mo ditirong tsa bone tsa go baka Modimo le go thusa baperesiti gore go dirwe ka fa go batlegang letsatsi lengwe le lengwe ka teng; a ba a baya badisa ba dikgoro kwa kgorong nngwe le nngwe ka fa ditlhopheng tsa bone; gonne taelo ya ga Dafita monna wa Modimo e ne e re jalo. 
2Chronicles8:15 Mme ba se ka ba fapoga ka gope mo taelong ya kgosi ka ga baperesiti le Balefi le ka ga badisa ba matlwana a dikhumo. 
2Chronicles8:16 Tiro yotlhe ya ga Salomo ya wediwa go tloga letsatsing le Ntlo ya Morena e theilweng ka lone go fitlhelela e be e fediwe. Ntlo ya Morena ya agega jalo ka botlalo. 
2Chronicles8:17 Metlheng eo Salomo a ya kwa Esione-Gebere le kwa Elothe fa losing lwa lewatle kwa lefatsheng la Baetomo. 
2Chronicles8:18 Mme Hurame a mo romela dikepe ka batlhanka ba gagwe le batlhanka ba bangwe ba ba itseng lewatle. Bao ba ya kwa Ofire, ba na le batlhanka ba ga Salomo, ba tsaya teng ditalente di le 450 tsa gouta, ba di tlisetsa kgosi Salomo." 
2Chronicles9:1 E rile kgosigadi ya Šeba e utlwela tumedi ya ga Salomo, ya tla kwa Jerusalema go leka Salomo ka dipotso tse di thata, e na le lekoko le legolo thata le dikammele tse di belesitseng makga le gouta e ntsi le majwana a a tlhokegang; ya tla kwa go Salomo, ya mmotsa tsotlhe tse di neng di le mo pelong ya yona." 
2Chronicles9:2 Salomo a e ranolela dipotso tsotlhe tsa yona, go se na sepe se se mo fitlhegetseng se a paletsweng ke go se e tlhalosetsa." 
2Chronicles9:3 Mme ya re kgosigadi ya Šeba e bona botlhale jwa ga Salomo le ntlo e a e agileng 
2Chronicles9:4 le dijo tsa tafole ya gagwe le manno a batlhanka ba gagwe le tirelo ya badiredi ba gagwe le diaparo tsa bone le bathokedi ba gagwe le diaparo tsa bone le setlhabelo sa phiso sa gagwe se o neng a se dira kwa Ntlong ya Morena ya felelwa ke kakanyo," 
2Chronicles9:5 ya raya kgosi ya re: “Polelo e ke e utlwileng kwa lefatsheng la me ka ga gago le ka ga botlhale jwa gago e ne e le nnete. 
2Chronicles9:6 Mme ke ne ke sa dumele mafoko a bone ga tsamaya ka tla ka bona ka matlho, ka fitlhela tse ke di boleletsweng di fetwa ke bontlhanngwe jwa botlhale jo bogolo jwa gago. O gaisa tumedi e ke e utlwileng." 
2Chronicles9:7 Go tlhogonolo batho ba gago, go sego batlhanka ba gago ba, ba ba ntseng ba go direla ka gale, ba utlwa botlhale jwa gago." 
2Chronicles9:8 A Morena Modimo wa gago o tumisiwe o o kgatlhilweng ke wena, wa go baya mo sedulong sa bogosi sa ona, mme wa nna kgosi ya Morena, Modimo wa gago. E re ka Modimo wa gago o rata Baiseraele go ba tlhomamisa ka bosakhutleng, ke ka moo o go dirileng kgosi ya bone go dira ka tshiamo le tshwanelo.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Jaanong ya naya kgosi ditalente di le 120 tsa gouta le makga a mantsintsi le majwana a a tlhokegang. Makga a a kana ka ona a kgosigadi ya Šeba e a neileng kgosi Salomo a ne a ise a ke a nne teng. 
2Chronicles9:10 Le gona batlhanka ba ga Hurame le batlhanka ba ga Salomo ba ba neng ba tlisa gouta ya kwa Ofire ba tlisa dikgong tsa merukuru le majwana a a tlhokegang. 
2Chronicles9:11 Kgosi ya direla Ntlo ya Morena le ntlo ya kgosi mapalamo le dikwadi le diharepa tsa baopedi ka dikgong tse tsa merukuru; tse di tshwanang le tseo di ne di ise di ke di bonwe mo lefatsheng la Juta pele ga foo. 
2Chronicles9:12 Kgosi Salomo a naya kgosigadi ya Šeba tsotlhe tse e neng e di eletsa e di kopa, tsa gaisa tse e di tliseditseng kgosi thata. Jaanong ya hulara, ya boela kwa lefatsheng la yona e na le batlhanka ba yona." 
2Chronicles9:13 Bokete jwa gouta e e neng e tsisediwa Salomo ka ngwaga o le mongwe e ne e le ditalente di le 666 tsa gouta," 
2Chronicles9:14 go sa balwe tse di tswang go gweba le tse barekisi ba di tlisang; le dikgosi tsotlhe tsa Arabia le balaodi ba lefatshe ba nna ba tlisetsa Salomo gouta le selefera. 
2Chronicles9:15 Kgosi Salomo a dira dithebe di le 200 tsa gouta e e papetlilweng; thebe e le nngwe ya dirwa ka dišekele di le 600 tsa gouta e e papetlilweng; 
2Chronicles9:16 le dithejana di le 300 tsa gouta e e papetlilweng; thejana e le nngwe ya dirwa ka dišekele di le 300; kgosi ya di baya kwa Ntlong-ya-Sekgwa-sa-Lebanone. 
2Chronicles9:17 Le gona kgosi ya dira sedulo se segolo sa bogosi ka dinaka tsa tlou, ya se manega gouta e e sa pekwang." 
2Chronicles9:18 Sedulo seo sa bogosi se ne se na le mapalamo a le marataro le sebeo sa dinao sa gouta se se tshwaraganyeng le sedulo sa bogosi; manno a sona a ne a na le maikhutso a mabogo; ditau tse pedi tsa bo di eme fa thoko ga maikhutso ao. 
2Chronicles9:19 Ditau di le 12 tsa bo di eme teng mo mapalamong a marataro mo ditlhakoreng tsoo pedi. Ga go na bogosi bope jo bo kileng jwa direlwa tse di ntseng jalo. 
2Chronicles9:20 Dinwelo tsotlhe tsa kgosi Salomo e ne e le tsa gouta; dijana tsotlhe tsa Ntlo-ya-Sekgwa-sa-Lebanone e le tsa gouta e e sa pekwang; selefera e ne e sa kaiwe sepe mo malatsing a ga Salomo. 
2Chronicles9:21 Gonne kgosi e ne e na le dikepe tse di yang kwa Tharesise, di tsamaisiwa ke batlhanka ba ga Hurame. Dikepe tseo tsa Tharesise di ne di goroga mo gae gangwe mo ngwageng tse tharo, di tla di tshotse gouta le selefera le dinaka tsa tlou le dikgabo le diphikoko." 
2Chronicles9:22 Kgosi Salomo o ne a nna mogolo jalo, a feta dikgosi tsa lefatshe ka khumo le botlhale." 
2Chronicles9:23 Dikgosi tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di ne di eletsa go bona Salomo gore di reetse botlhale jwa gagwe jo Modimo o neng o bo mo file mo pelong. 
2Chronicles9:24 Mongwe le mongwe wa tsona o ne a tla ka neo ya gagwe, e ka nna dilo tsa selefera gongwe tsa gouta gongwe dikobo gongwe dibolai gongwe makga gongwe dipitse gongwe meboulwe; go le jalo ka ngwaga le ngwaga." 
2Chronicles9:25 Salomo o ne a na le dipitse di le 4 000 le dikoloi le bapalami ba le 12 000. A di baya mo metseng ya dikoloi le mo Jerusalema fa kgosing. 
2Chronicles9:26 A busa dikgosi tsotlhe go tloga kwa nokeng ya Ferathe go ya kwa lefatsheng la Bafelesita le go fitlha molelwaneng wa Egepeto. 
2Chronicles9:27 Kgosi ya dira gore go nne selefera mo Jerusalema e e kana ka majwe ka bontsi; ya ntsifatsa mesetere gore e lekane le megokare ya naga e e kwa tlase ka bontsi. 
2Chronicles9:28 Ba ne ba reka dipitse kwa Egepeto le kwa mafatsheng otlhe, ba di isetsa Salomo." 
2Chronicles9:29 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Salomo tsa pele le tsa morago kana di kwadilwe mo ditirafalong tsa moporofeti Nathane le mo mafokong a boporofeti a ga Ahia wa kwa Silo le mo diponeng tsa ga Ito yo o neng a bolelela pele ka ga Jerobeame morwa Nebate. 
2Chronicles9:30 Salomo o ne a busa Baiseraele botlhe mo Jerusalema dinyaga di le 40. 
2Chronicles9:31 Salomo a robala le borraagwe, mme ba mo fitlha mo motseng wa ga Dafita rraagwe, mme Rehabeame morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehabeame a ya kwa Šegeme, gonne Baiseraele botlhe ba ne ba ile kwa Šegeme go mo tlhoma mo bogosing." 
2Chronicles10:2 E rile Jerobeame morwa Nebate a utlwa jalo a le kwa Egepeto kwa a neng a tshabetse teng, fa a tshaba kgosi Salomo, a boa kwa Egepeto." 
2Chronicles10:3 Mme Baiseraele ba roma go ya go mmitsa. Jerobeame a tla jalo a na le Baiseraele botlhe, mme ba bua le Rehabeame ba re:" 
2Chronicles10:4 “Rraago o no a imafatsa joko ya rona. Jaanong he, wena o re imolole mo tirong e e thata ya ga rraago le mo jokong e e makete ya gagwe e a e re rwesitseng, foo re tla go direla.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Mme ene a ba raya a re: “Tsamayang mme lo boele go nna morago ga malatsi a le mararo.” Batho ba tsamaya. 
2Chronicles10:6 Ke fa kgosi Rehabeame a gakololana le banna bagolo ba ba neng ba direla Salomo rraagwe a sa ntse a phela a re: “Nkgakololang ka fa nka arabang morafe o ka teng.” 
2Chronicles10:7 Ba mo raya ba re: “Fa o ka dumalelana le batho ba, wa ba kgatlha, wa bua mafoko a bopelonomi nabo, ba tla nna batlhanka ba gago ka malatsi otlhe.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Mme a tlhokomologa kgakololo ya banna bagolo e ba e mo neileng, a ya go gakololana le ba bašwa ba ba godileng nae, ba ba mo direlang." 
2Chronicles10:9 A botsa a re: “Lona lo gakolola jang, ka fa re ka arabang batho ka teng ba ba ntheileng ba re: ‘Tlhofofatsa joko e rraago o e re rwesitseng’?”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Ba bašwa bao ba ba godileng nae ba mo araba ba re: “O ree morafe o o buileng nao wa re: ‘Rraago o ne a imafatsa joko ya rona, mme wena o e re tlhofofaletse!’ – o ba arabe jaana o re: ‘Monwana o monnye wa me o feta letheka la ga rre ka bokima." 
2Chronicles10:11 Jaanong he, rre o ne a lo rwesa joko e e makete, mme nna ke tla oketsa joko ya lona bokete; rre o ne a lo otla ka dime, mme nna ke tla lo betsa ka diphepheng.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Ka letsatsi la boraro ga tla Jerobeame le morafe otlhe kwa go Rehabeame jaaka kgosi e laetse ya re: “Boelang kwano go nna ka letsatsi la boraro.” 
2Chronicles10:13 Ke fa kgosi e ba naya karabo e e thata. Kgosi Rehabeame a tlogela kgakololo ya banna bagolo 
2Chronicles10:14 a bua nabo ka fa kgakololong ya ba bašwa a re: “Rre o imafaditse joko ya lona, mme nna ke tla e oketsa bokete. Rre o ne a lo betsa ka dime, mme nna ke tla lo betsa ka diphepheng.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Kgosi ya se ka ya utlwana le morafe. Mme e ne e le se se tswang kwa Modimong gore Morena a dirafatse lefoko la gagwe le o le buileng le Jerobeame morwa Nebate ka Ahia wa kwa Silo. 
2Chronicles10:16 Ya re Baiseraele botlhe ba bona kgosi e sa utlwane nabo, batho ba fetola kgosi ba re: “Ga re na kabelo mo go Dafita. Le gona ga re na boswa mo go morwa Isai. A mongwe le mongwe a boela kwa ditenteng tsa gagwe, Iseraele! Sala jalo le lelapa la gago Dafita.” Jaanong Baiseraele botlhe ba phatlalala, ba ya kwa ditenteng tsa bone." 
2Chronicles10:17 Mme Baiseraele ba ba neng ba agile mo metseng ya Juta bone ba busiwa ke Rehabeame. 
2Chronicles10:18 Mme ya re kgosi Rehabeame a romile Hatorame yo o neng a okametse badiri ba mekuio, Baiseraele ba mo kgobotletsa ka majwe, a ba a swa. Ke fa kgosi Rehabeame a itlhaganela, a palama koloi, a tshabela kwa Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles10:19 Baiseraele ba ne ba ikepa jalo mo ntlong ya ga Dafita go fitlha letsatsing la kajeno. 
2Chronicles11:1 E rile Rehabeame a fitlha kwa Jerusalema a feta a kgobokanya lotso lwa Juta le lwa Benyamene, e le banna ba ba tlhaotsweng ba batlhabani ba le 180 000, go ya go tlhabana le Baiseraele go busetsa bogosi go ene." 
2Chronicles11:2 Mme lefoko la Morena la tla kwa go Semaya, monna wa Modimo, la re:" 
2Chronicles11:3 “Raya Rehabeame morwa Salomo kgosi ya Juta le Baiseraele botlhe kwa Juta le Benyamene o re: 
2Chronicles11:4 ‘Morena o bua jaana a re: Lo se ka lwa bolola go ya go tlhabana le ba ga lona. A mongwe le mongwe a boele kwa lapeng la gagwe. Gonne selo se, se dirilwe ke nna.’ ” Ba utlwa mafoko a Morena, ba boa, ba se ka ba bololela Jerobeame." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehabeame a nna mo Jerusalema, a agelela metse go nna e e femetsweng mo Juta." 
2Chronicles11:6 A agelela Betleheme le Etame le Thekoa 
2Chronicles11:7 le Betshure le Sogo le Adulame 
2Chronicles11:8 le Gathe le Mareša le Sife 
2Chronicles11:9 le Atoraime le Lagiše le Aseka 
2Chronicles11:10 le Sorea le Ayalone le Heberone. Ke yona metse e e ne ya femelwa mo Juta le Benyamene. 
2Chronicles11:11 A ba a tiisa metse e e femetsweng eo, a baya balaodi mo go yona le ditlamelo tsa dijo le lookwane le weine" 
2Chronicles11:12 le dithebe le marumo mo motseng mongwe le mongwe, a e thatafatsa gagolo thata. Bajuta le Babenyamene e ne e le ba gagwe." 
2Chronicles11:13 Le baperesiti le Balefi ba ba neng ba le mo gare ga Baiseraele botlhe ba ineela mo go ene, ba huduga mo dinageng tsotlhe tsa bone." 
2Chronicles11:14 Gonne Balefi ba ne ba tlogela mafulo a bone le di-tsa-bone, ba ya kwa Juta le Jerusalema. Gonne Jerobeame le bomorwawe ba ne ba ba amogile boperesiti jwa Morena." 
2Chronicles11:15 Mme o ne a itlhometse baperesiti ba dithota tsa tlhabelo le ba didimo tsa sekaka le ba dinamane tse o di dirileng. 
2Chronicles11:16 Balefi ba latelwa ke ba ba ineetseng ka dipelo go batla Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, ba tswa mo ditsong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele, ba ya kwa Jerusalema go direla Morena, Modimo wa borraabo, ditlhabelo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Ba tiisa bogosi jwa Juta, ba nonotsha Rehabeame morwa Salomo dinyaga di le tharo; gonne ba ne ba sepela mo tseleng ya ga Dafita le Salomo dinyaga di le tharo fela." 
2Chronicles11:18 Mme Rehabeame a tsaya Mahalathe go nna mosadi wa gagwe. Bagolo ba mosadi e ne e le Jerimothe morwa Dafita le Abihaile morwadia Eliabe morwa Isai. 
2Chronicles11:19 Ene a tshola nae bana ba basimane, e bong Jeuse le Semaria le Sahame." 
2Chronicles11:20 Morago ga Mahalathe a nyala Maaga morwadia Abesalomo; a tshola nae Abia le Athai le Sisa le Selomithe. 
2Chronicles11:21 Mme Rehabeame a rata Maaga morwadia Abesalomo bogolo go basadi le bagadingwana botlhe ba gagwe; gonne o ne a tsere basadi ba le 18 le bagadingwana ba le 60: a tsala bomorwa ba le 28 le bomorwadi ba le 60. 
2Chronicles11:22 Rehabeame a ba a tlhoma Abia morwa Maaga go nna tlhogo le moetapele wa bomorwa-rraagwe. Gonne o ne a ikaeletse go mo dira kgosi. 
2Chronicles11:23 Mme a dira ka botlhale, a kgaoganya bomorwawe botlhe, a ba baya kwa dinageng tsotlhe tsa Juta le Benyamene le kwa metseng yotlhe e e femetsweng, bangwe kwa, ba bangwe kwa gongwe, a ba naya bontsi jwa dijo, a ba batlela basadi ba bantsi." 
2Chronicles12:1 E rile Rehabeame a se na go tlhomamisa bogosi le go nna thata a tlogela molao wa Morena le Baiseraele botlhe nae. 
2Chronicles12:2 Mme ya re ka ngwaga wa botlhano wa puso ya gagwe Sisake kgosi ya Egepeto a bololela Jerusalema, ka ba ne ba diretse Morena ka boikanyologo." 
2Chronicles12:3 A tla a na le dikoloi tsa ntwa di le 1 200 le bapalami ba dipitse ba le 60 000; mme batlhabani ba ba duleng nae kwa Egepeto ba ne ba se na palo, e le ba Balebia le Basugi le Baethiopia." 
2Chronicles12:4 A thopa metse e e femetsweng ya Juta, a ba a tla kwa Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles12:5 Ke fa moporofeti Semaya a tla kwa go Rehabeame le kwa dikgosaneng tsa Juta tse di neng di phuthegetse kwa Jerusalema di tshabile Sisake, a ba raya a re: “Morena o bua jaana a re: ‘Lona lo ntlogetse. Ke ka moo le nna ke lo tlogetseng lo le mo diatleng tsa ga Sisake.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Foo dikgosana tsa Iseraele tsa ikokobetsa mmogo le kgosi tsa re: “Morena o mo nneteng.” 
2Chronicles12:7 E rile Morena a ba bona ba ikokobeditse, lefoko la Morena la tla kwa go Semaya la re: “E re ka ba ikokobeditse, ga ke ne ke ba senya, mme ke tla ba naya bobotlana jwa pholoso gore bogale jwa me bo se tshologele Jerusalema ka Sisake." 
2Chronicles12:8 Fela ba tla nna batlhanka ba gagwe gore ba lemoge pharologanyo ya go ntirela le go direla dikgosi tsa mafatshe.” 
2Chronicles12:9 Sisake kgosi ya Egepeto a bololela Jerusalema jalo, a amoga dikhumo tsa Ntlo ya Morena le dikhumo tsa ntlo ya kgosi, a tsaya dilo tsotlhe, a ba a tsaya le dithebe tsa gouta tse Salomo o di dirileng." 
2Chronicles12:10 Mo boemong jwa dithebe tseo kgosi Rehabeame a dira tsa kgotlho, a di neela mo diatleng tsa balaodi ba batabogi ba ba disang mojako wa ntlo ya kgosi gore ba di tlhokomele." 
2Chronicles12:11 Mme e ne ya re fa kgosi e tsena mo Ntlong ya Morena, batabogi ba tle, ba di tsholetse; morago ba di busetse ntlwaneng ya batabogi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Ya re ka Rehabeame a ikokobetsa, bogale jwa Morena jwa boa mo go ene, jwa se ka jwa mo nyeletsa gotlhe. Le gona dilo tse di siameng di ne di sa ntse di le teng mo Juta." 
2Chronicles12:13 Kgosi Rehabeame a itiisa jalo gape mo Jerusalema, a tswelela pele go busa. Rehabeame o ne a le dinyaga di le 41, fa a simolola go busa, a busa dinyaga di le 17 mo Jerusalema, ona motse o Morena o o tlhophileng mo ditsong tsotlhe tsa Iseraele go baya leina la gagwe teng. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Naama wa Moamone." 
2Chronicles12:14 A dira tse di bosula, ka a se ka a ineela ka pelo ya gagwe go batla Morena." 
2Chronicles12:15 Mme ditirafalo tsa ga Rehabeame tsa pele le tsa morago kana di kwadilwe mo ditirafalong tsa moporofeti Semaya le tsa ga Ito mmoni ka fa lokwalong lwa ditshika. Mme go ne go ntse go le dintwa fa gare ga Rehabeame le Jerobeame ka metlha yotlhe. 
2Chronicles12:16 Mme Rehabeame a robala le borraagwe, a fitlhwa mo motseng wa ga Dafita, mme Abia morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
2Chronicles13:1 Abia o ne a simolola go busa Juta ka ngwaga wa 18 wa puso ya ga Jerobeame. 
2Chronicles13:2 A busa dinyaga di le tharo mo Jerusalema. Leina la ga mmaagwe e ne e le Migaya morwadia Uriele wa kwa Gibea. Mme go ne go le ntwa fa gare ga Abia le Jerobeame. 
2Chronicles13:3 Abia a simolola ntwa ka mephato ya batlhabani ba ba pelokgale ya banna ba ba tlhaotsweng ba le 400 000, mme Jerobeame a ipaakanyetsa go tlhabana nae ka banna ba ba tlhaotsweng ba bagale ba ba tiileng ba le 800 000." 
2Chronicles13:4 Mme Abia a ya a ema kwa godimo ga thaba ya Semaraime e e kwa dithabeng tsa Eferaime, a kua a re: “Wena Jerobeame le lona Baiseraele lotlhe, ntheetsang!" 
2Chronicles13:5 A tota ga lo itse gore Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, o neetse Dafita bogosi jwa Iseraele ka bosakhutleng, e bong ene le bomorwawe, e le kgolagano ya letswai?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Mme Jerobeame morwa Nebate, motlhanka wa ga Salomo morwa Dafita, a nanoga, a tsogela morena wa gagwe." 
2Chronicles13:7 Mme banna ba ba botlhofo ba disenyi ba phuthegela kwa go ene, ba ikgantsha, ba kgona Rehabeame morwa Salomo. Kana Rehabeame o ne a le mošwa, a le pelo e boi, a tlhoka thata fa pele ga bone." 
2Chronicles13:8 Jaanong lona lo ithaya lo re, lo ka emelana le bogosi jwa Morena jo bo mo diatleng tsa bomorwa Dafita, ka lo le bontsi jo bogolo, lo na le dinamane tsa gouta tse Jerobeame o di dirileng go nna medimo ya lona." 
2Chronicles13:9 Kana lo lelekile baperesiti ba Morena, bomorwa Arone le Balefi, lwa itlhomela baperesiti jaaka merafe ya mafatshe a baheitane. Mongwe le mongwe yo o tlang ka poana le diphelehu di supa go tsenngwa mo tirong ya boperesiti ene a nne moperesiti wa dilo tse e seng medimo." 
2Chronicles13:10 “Mme rona – Modimo wa rona ke Morena – ga re a ka ra mo tlogela, mme bomorwa Arone ba direla Morena e le baperesiti le Balefi ba mo tirong ya bone." 
2Chronicles13:11 Ba tshubela Morena ditlhabelo tsa phiso ka gale mo mosong le maitsiboa le maswalo a a nkgang monate, ba bee dinkgwe tsa tshupo mo tafoleng e e phepa, ba tshube setlhomo, e bong dipone tsa sona ka gale maitsiboa. Gonne rona re tshegetsa thulaganyo ya tirelo ya Morena, Modimo wa rona, mme lona lo mo tlogetse." 
2Chronicles13:12 Bonang, Modimo o na le rona e le moeteledipele, le baperesiti ba na le dinaka tsa mokgosi wa ntwa tsa go lo tsosetsa tlhabano. Lona Baiseraele, se tlhabaneng le Morena, Modimo wa borraeno. Gonne ga lo ka ke lwa kgona sepe.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Mme Jerobeame a potolosa balaledi gore ba ba pote ka kwa morago. Ba bo ba lebaganye le Bajuta jalo, mme balaledi ba le kwa morago ga bona." 
2Chronicles13:14 Jaanong ya re Bajuta ba gadima, ba fitlhela tlhabano e ba lebile kwa pele le kwa morago. Ke fa ba goela Moreneng, mme baperesiti ba letsa dinaka," 
2Chronicles13:15 mme banna ba Juta ba thela lošalaba. Mme ya re banna ba Juta ba thela lošaba, Modimo wa itaya Jerobeame le Baiseraele botlhe fa pele ga Abia le Bajuta." 
2Chronicles13:16 Baiseraele ba tshaba Bajuta; Modimo wa ba neela mo diatleng tsa bone," 
2Chronicles13:17 mme Abia le batlhabani ba gagwe ba ba bolaya ka polao e kgolo, ga bolawa Baiseraele ba le 500 000, e le banna ba ba tlhaotsweng." 
2Chronicles13:18 Baiseraele ba ne ba kokobediwa jalo ka sebaka seo, mme Bajuta ba tia, ka ba ne ba ikaegile ka Morena, Modimo wa borraabo." 
2Chronicles13:19 Mme Abia a khutšhela Jerobeame, a mo amoga metse, e bong Bethele le metsana ya teng le Jesana le metsana ya teng le Eferone le metsana ya teng." 
2Chronicles13:20 Jerobeame a se ka a tlhola a na le thata malatsing a ga Abia, mme Morena a mo itaya a ba a swa." 
2Chronicles13:21 Abia ene a itshupa a le thata, a nyala basadi ba le 14, a tsala bomorwa ba le 22 le bomorwadi ba le 16." 
2Chronicles13:22 Ditirafalo tse dingwe tsa ga Abia le mesepele ya gagwe le mafoko a gagwe di kwadilwe mo tlhalosong ya ga Ito moporofeti. 
2Chronicles14:1 Mme Abia a robala le borraagwe a fitlhwa mo motseng wa ga Dafita, mme Asa morwawe a nna kgosi mo boemong jwa gagwe. Mo metlheng ya gagwe lefatshe la nna mo kagisong dinyaga di le some." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa a dira tse di molemo tse di siameng mo matlhong a Morena Modimo wa gagwe. 
2Chronicles14:3 A tlosa dialetare tsa medimo e sele le dithota tsa tlhabelo, a thubaganya majwe a a motloutlo, a rema medimako ya Ašera," 
2Chronicles14:4 a laela Bajuta gore ba batle Morena, Modimo wa borraabo, ba dire ka fa molaong le taolong tsa ona." 
2Chronicles14:5 A ba a tlosa dithota tsa tlhabelo le majwe a a motloutlo a letsatsi mo metseng yotlhe ya Juta, mme bogosi jwa nna mo kagisong ka puso ya gagwe." 
2Chronicles14:6 A ba a aga metse e e femetsweng mo Juta; gonne lefatshe le ne le iketlile, go se na ope yo o lwang nae ka dinyaga tseo, ka Morena a mo file boikhutso." 
2Chronicles14:7 Ke ka moo a reileng Bajuta a re: “A re ageng metse eo, re e agelele ka lobota le dinaka tsa phemelo le dikgoro le mephakarego, re sa ntse re le barena ba lefatshe. E re ka re tlhokometse Morena, Modimo wa rona, le ona o re tlhokometse, wa re naya boikhutso tikologong, wa re tsweletsa pele.”" 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa o ne a na le mephato ya batlhabani ba Juta ba ba tshotseng dithebe le marumo ba le 300 000, le ba Benyamene ba ba tshotseng dithebe ba itse go hula ka mara, ba le 280 000; botlhe bao e ne e le batlhabani ba ba pelokgale." 
2Chronicles14:9 Ba kile ba bololelwa ke Sera wa Moethiopia, a tla a na le batlhabani ba le sedikadike le dikoloi tsa ntwa di le 300, a fitlha kwa Mareša." 
2Chronicles14:10 Ke fa Asa a bolola go mo kgatlhantsha, mme ba ikemisa ka thulaganyo ya tlhabano kwa mogorogorong wa Sefatha ntlheng ya Mareša." 
2Chronicles14:11 Mme Asa a rapela Morena Modimo wa gagwe a re: “Morena, ga go na ope kwa ntle ga gago yo o ka thusang, fa go tlhabana yo o thata le yo o bokoa. Re thuse, Morena Modimo wa rona, gonne re ikaega ka wena, mme re tsile go tlhabana le bontsi jo ka leina la gago. Morena, o Modimo wa rona. A motho a se ka a kgona sepe fa pele ga gago!”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Mme Morena a itaya Baethiopia, ba fenngwa ke Asa le Bajuta, ba be ba tshaba."
