Job1:16 Ya re ene a sa ntse a bua, ga ba ga tla yo mongwe a re: “Molelo wa Modimo o wele kwa legodimong, wa fisa dinku le batlhanka, wa di nyeletsa. Ke nna ke le nosi fela ke falotseng gore ke go itsise jalo.”" 
Job1:17 Ya re ene a sa ntse a bua, ga ba ga tla yo mongwe a re: “Bakalatea ba tlile e le ditlhopha di le tharo tsa batlhabani, ba tlhasela dikammele, ba di thopa, ba bolaya batlhanka ka bogale jwa tšhaka. Ke nna ke le nosi fela ke falotseng gore ke go itsise jalo.”" 
Job1:18 Ya re ene a sa ntse a bua, ga ba ga tla yo mongwe gape a re: “Bomorwao le bomorwadio ba ne ba a ja, ba nwa weine mo ntlong ya mogoloa-bone," 
Job1:19 ke fa go tla ledimo le legolo le tswa kwa sekakeng, le itaya dikhutlo tse nne tsa ntlo; ya wela bana bao, ba be ba a swa. Ke nna ke le nosi fela ke falotseng gore ke go itsise jalo.”" 
Job1:20 Ya ba gona Jobe a nanogang, a ikgagola diaparo, a ipeola tlhogo, a ba a wela fa fatshe, a rapela a khubame" 
Job1:21 a re: “Ke dule mo mmeleng wa ga mme ke sa ikatega; ke tla be ke boela teng ke sa ikatega. Morena o ne a nneile, Morena o bile o tsere. A leina la Morena le bakwe!”" 
Job1:22 Mo go tsotlhe tseo Jobe a se ka a leofela Modimo le e seng go dira sepe se se bosula. 
Job2:1 Jaanong ya re letsatsi le lengwe bomorwa Modimo ba tla gape, ba ema fa pele ga Morena, Satane le ene a tla gape a le mo gare ga bone, a ema fa pele ga Morena." 
Job2:2 Morena a botsa Satane a re: “O tswa kae?” Satane a araba Morena a re: “Ke tswa go kgarakgatshega mo lefatsheng, ka itsamaela mo go lone.”" 
Job2:3 Morena a ba a botsa Satane gape a re: “Jobe, motlhanka wa me a o mo etse tlhoko? Gonne ga go na monna ope yo o tshwanang nae mo lefatsheng. O siame, ga a na molato, o boifa Modimo, o tshaba bosula. Mme o sa ntse a tshegeditse tshiamo ya gagwe, mme wena o ntlhotlheleditse gore ke mo senyetse a se na molato.”" 
Job2:4 Mme Satane a fetola Morena a re: “Letlalo le a tle le ntshediwe letlalo. Tsotlhe tse motho o di tshotseng o ka di ntsha gore a boloke bophelo jwa gagwe. 
Job2:5 Fela a ko o otlolole letsogo, o ame marapo a gagwe le nama ya gagwe. Foo ruri o tla go itatola a lebaganye nao.”" 
Job2:6 Ke fa Morena a raya Satane a re: “Bona, o mo thateng ya gago. Fela o rekegele bophelo jwa gagwe.”" 
Job2:7 Ya baa gona Satane a tlogang gape fa pele ga Morena, a betsa Jobe ka diso tse di bosula go simolola patong ya lonao go fitlha phogong ya gagwe." 
Job2:8 Jobe a itseela lobeana, a ingwaya ka lone a ntse a dutse mo moloreng." 
Job2:9 Ke fa mosadi wa gagwe a mo raya a re: “A o sa ntse o tshegeditse tshiamo ya gago? Itatole Modimo o swe!” 
Job2:10 Mme a mo raya a re: “Le wena o bua jaaka mongwe wa basadi ba e leng dieleele. A re ka amogela tse di molemo mo Moreneng, mme tse di botlhoko tsona re a di gana?” Mo go tsotlhe tseo Jobe a se ka a leofa ka molomo wa gagwe." 
Job2:11 E rile ditsala tse tharo tsa ga Jobe di utlwela tse di botlhoko tsotlhe tseo tse di mo wetseng, tsa tla, mongwe le mongwe a tswa kwa ga gabo, e bong Elifase wa Themane le Biletate wa Sua le Sofare wa Naama. Bao ba utlwana go ya mmogo kwa go ene le go mo lelela le go mo gomotsa." 
Job2:12 Jaanong ya re ba tsholetsa matlho ba sa le kgakala, ba bo ba sa mo itse; ke fa ba tlhatlosa mantswe, ba lela, ba ikgagola diaparo ka boraro jwa bone, ba gasetsa lorole kwa godimo ga ditlhogo tsa bone;" 
Job2:13 ba tla, ba nna nae fa fatshe masigo a supa le malatsi a supa, go se na ope wa bone yo o buang lefoko nae, ka gonne ba bona botlhoko jwa gagwe e le jo bogolo thata." 
Job3:1 Morago ga moo Jobe a tswa molomo, a rogaka letsatsi la botsalo jwa gagwe." 
Job3:2 Jobe a simolola go bua a re: 
Job3:3 “A letsatsi le nyelele le ke tsetsweng ka lone le bosigo jo go tilweng go ithwelwe ngwana wa mosimane! 
Job3:4 A letsatsi leo le nne lefifi! Modimo o o kwa godimo a o se le tlhokomele! A le se ka la phatsimelwa ke lesedi! 
Job3:5 A lefifi le moriti-wa-loso di le gape! A maru a mantsho a nne godimo ga lone! A phifalo ya motshegare e le tshose! 
Job3:6 Bosigo joo a lefifi le bo tlose! A bo se tlhomagane le malatsi mo ngwageng! A bo se ka jwa tsena mo malatsing a kgwedi! 
Job3:7 Ee, bosigo joo a e nne jwa boopa! A go se nne tuduetso mo go jona!" 
Job3:8 Ba ba rogakang letsatsi, a ba bo rogake, bone ba ba itseng go tlhotlheletsa kgwanyape!" 
Job3:9 A go fifale dinaledi tsa lotlatlana lwa jona! A bo letele lesedi, mme le se nne teng! A bo se ka jwa itumelela dintshi tsa mahube!" 
Job3:10 Ka gonne ga bo a ka jwa ntswalela kgoro ya sebopelo sa ga mme; ga bo a ka jwa subela matlho a me tapisego. 
Job3:11 Ke ne ke sa sweleng mo botsalong? Ke ne ke sa tlhokafaleleng, fa ke sena go tsalwa?" 
Job3:12 Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa ba mphara mangoleng, fa ba nkisa mabeleng, ba re ke anye?" 
Job3:13 Gonne foo nka bo ke rapama jaanong, ke iketlile; foo nka bo ke robala, ke na le boikhutso." 
Job3:14 Foo nka bo ke na le dikgosi tsa lefatshe le banna ba lekgotla, ba ba tsositseng marope." 
Job3:15 Gongwe nka bo ke na le dikgosana tse di neng di tshotse gouta, tse di neng di tladitse matlo a tsona selefera." 
Job3:16 Gongwe nka bo ke se gona jaaka phetela e e fitlhilweng le jaaka bana ba ba sa boneng lesedi. 
Job3:17 Gona kwa baikepi ba khutla go tsosa modumo, teng kwa go ikhutsa ba ba feletsweng ke thata." 
Job3:18 Bagolegwi ba ikhutsa mmogo gona; lentswe la mogateledi ga ba le utlwe. 
Job3:19 Ba bannye le ba bagolo ba gona, ba a tshwana; motlhanka o gololesegile mo moreneng wa gagwe." 
Job3:20 Ke eng fa Modimo o naya mmogisegi lesedi, fa o naya ba ba nyemileng moko bophelo?" 
Job3:21 Ke ba ba letang loso, mme ga ba lo bone; ba lo epa bogolo go dikhumo." 
Job3:22 Ke ba ba ka bong ba itumela, ba duduetsa, ba thaba, fa ba ka bona lebitla." 
Job3:23 Ke eng fa Modimo o naya monna bophelo, yo tsela ya gagwe e fitlhegileng, yo Modimo o mo thibeletseng phalolo mo ntlheng tsotlhe?" 
Job3:24 Gonne ke tlelwa ke diphegelo boemong jwa dijo tsa me; go goa ga me go tswa jaaka metsi a elela. 
Job3:25 Fa ke boifa selo se a ntlela; se ke se tshogileng se a nkwela. 
Job3:26 Ga ke na kagiso, ga ke na boiketlo, ga ke na boikhutso; go tla matshwenyego fela.”" 
Job4:1 Ke fa Elifase wa Themane a fetola a re: 
Job4:2 “A fa motho a leka go bua le wena, o tla kgopisega? Fela ke mang yo o ka kgonang go ithiba go bua?" 
Job4:3 Kana ke wena o rutileng ba bantsi, wa tiisa diatla tse di repileng." 
Job4:4 Yo o kgopiwang, mafoko a gago a mo tsositse, wa nonotsha mangole a a kgwetlhang." 
Job4:5 Mme fa jaanong di wela wena, o nyema moko; fa di ama wena, o a tshoga." 
Job4:6 Poifo-Modimo ya gago a ga o e ikanye? Tsamao ya gago e e siameng a ga o e solofele? 
Job4:7 A ko o akanye: Ke mang yo o latlhegileng a se na molato? Ke bafe basiami ba ba nyeleditsweng? 
Job4:8 Ka fa ke bonyeng ka teng: Ba ba lemang boikepo le ba ba jwalang tatlhego ba roba tsona tseo. 
Job4:9 Ba latlhega ka pudulo ya Modimo; ba felelela ka phefo ya bogale jwa ona. 
Job4:10 Go duma ga tau le go rora ga tawana go a khutla; meno a ditawana a robegile. 
Job4:11 Tau e kgolo e a swa, fa e se na thopo; bana ba tau e namagadi ba a phatlalala." 
Job4:12 Lefoko le ntletse sephiring; tsebe ya me ya utlwa go sebasebelwa ga lone. 
Job4:13 E rile ke akanya dipono tsa bosigo, fa batho ba tshwerwe ke boroko jo bogolo," 
Job4:14 therego ya nkwela le go tetesela, ya roromisa marapo a me otlhe." 
Job4:15 Ke fa mowa o feta fa pele ga me, mmele wa me wa tlhonya." 
Job4:16 Wa ba wa ema, ke sa lemoge ponalo ya ona, mme e le sebopego sa mongwe yo o fa pele ga me; ka utlwa go sebaseba ga lentswe le le reng:" 
Job4:17 ‘A motho o siame fa pele ga Modimo? Gongwe a monna o itshekile fa pele ga Mmopi wa gagwe? 
Job4:18 Bonang, ga o ikanye batlhanka ba ona; baengele ba ona o ba tshwaya phoso." 
Job4:19 Bogolo jang bone ba ba agileng mo matlong a letsopa, ba tlholego ya bone e leng mo loroleng, ba ba pšhwetlwang jaaka motoutwana?" 
Job4:20 Le tlhaba ba le gona, le phirima ba remagantswe; ba latlhega ka bosakhutleng, ba sa tlhokomelwe ke ope." 
Job4:21 A ga ke re, fa dimapo tsa tente ya bone di somolwa, ba a swa, ba se na botlhale?’" 
Job5:1 “Goelela he! Re bone fa go na le yo o tla go arabang? O ka retologela kwa go ofe wa Baitshepi? 
Job5:2 Kana lesilo le bolawa ke go ngala; seeleele se swa ka lefufa la sona. 
Job5:3 Ke bonye lesilo le nama medi, ka tlhoboga lelapa la lone ka tshoganyetso." 
Job5:4 Bana ba lone ba se na lesego, ba gatelelwa mo lekgotleng ba se na mothusi." 
Job5:5 Tse ba di kotutseng di jewa ke yo o tlala, ee, di ntshiwa mo gare ga dikgora. Tatlhego e metsa khumo ya bone." 
Job5:6 Gonne tatlhego ga e tswe leroleng, pogisego ga e tlhoge fa fatshe." 
Job5:7 Nnyaa, ke motho yo o itsalelang pogisego jaaka ditlhase di fofela kwa godimo di tswa mo molelong." 
Job5:8 Mme nna nka bo ke batla thuso mo Modimong; nka bo ke begela Modimo kgang ya me; 
Job5:9 ona Modiri wa tse dikgolo tse di se nang tlhotlhomiso; wa tse di gakgamatsang tse di se nang palo: 
Job5:10 O o nesang pula mo fatsheng, o nosa dinaga ka metsi" 
Job5:11 gore o godise ba babotlana thata, mme ba ba hutsafalang, ba bone pholoso e kgolo;" 
Job5:12 o o senyang maano a balotsana, gore diatla tsa bone di se ka tsa kgona sepe;" 
Job5:13 o o tshwarang batlhalefi ba ba boferefere gore maikaelelo a ba kgopo a senngwe ke bobebe jwa bone 
Job5:14 gore ba kgatlhane le lefifi bo ntse bo sele, ba apaape motshegare jaaka bosigo." 
Job5:15 Mme o pholosa mohumanegi mo tšhakeng e e tswang mo melomong ya bone le mo diatleng tsa yo o thata; 
Job5:16 ka moo yo mmotlana o ka bona tsholofelo, mme bokgopo bo tla ithiba molomo." 
Job5:17 Itse he: Go sego motho yo Modimo o mo kgalemelang! Ka moo se nyatse kotlo ya Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe! 
Job5:18 Gonne o a tle o tlhokofatse, mme o be o fape; o a tle o ntshe dintho, mme diatla tsa ona di be di fodise." 
Job5:19 O tla go pholosa mo ditlalelong tse thataro, ee, mo go tse supa ga go na botlhoko bope jo bo ka go amang:" 
Job5:20 O tla go golola mo losong o le mo tlaleng le mo thateng ya tšhaka o le mo ntweng. 
Job5:21 Fa diteme di tlhaba, o tla bo o sireleditswe; ga o na go boifa fa tshenyo ya ntwa e tla." 
Job5:22 O tla tshega kgatelelo le ditlala, o sa ka ke wa boifa dibata tsa lefatshe." 
Job5:23 Gonne o na le kgolagano le matlapa a masimo; le dibata tsa dinaga di tla agisanya nao. 
Job5:24 O tla fitlhela lapa la gago le le kagisong; fa o tlhola naga ya gago ga o nke o tlhoka sepe. 
Job5:25 O tla bona bana ba gago ba ntsifala le ditlogolwana tsa gago di ata jaaka ditlhogi tsa naga. 
Job5:26 O tla tsena mo lebitleng o na le botsofe jo bo tletseng jaaka fa mabele a robiwa a budule. 
Job5:27 Bona, ke tse re di lemogileng. Di ntse jalo. Mme wena, o di utlwe, o di ele tlhoko!”" 
Job6:1 Jobe ene a fetola a re: 
Job6:2 “Ao! Botlhoko jwa me bo ka bo bo elwa sentle. Ba ka bo ba baya tatlhego ya me yotlhe mo selekanyetsong. 
Job6:3 Kana foo e ka bo e le makete bogolo go motlhaba wa lewatle; ke ka moo ke gakiwang ke puo. 
Job6:4 Gonne metsu ya Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe e tsepame mo go nna, e botlhole jwa yona bo nowang ke mowa wa me. Ditheregiso tsa Modimo di a ntlhasela." 
Job6:5 A esele ya naga e ka lela e ntse e na le mafulo? Gongwe a kgomo e ka lela e ntse e jesiwa? 
Job6:6 A go jewa dijo tse di sa baloleng tse di sa lokwang? Gongwe a bosweu jwa lee bo na le monate? 
Job6:7 Tse mowa wa me o ganang go di ama di tshwana le dijo tse di ntenang. 
Job6:8 Ntlha nka bo ke tlelwa ke tse ke di batlang; Modimo wa nnaya tse ke di lelelang! 
Job6:9 Ao! Modimo e kete o ka bo o kgatlhwa ke go mpšhwetla. A o otlolole letsogo, o nkgaole!" 
Job6:10 Foo nka bo ke sa ntse ke na le kgomotso; nka bo ke ipela ke le botlhokong jo bo se nang thekegelo. Gonne ga ke a itatola mafoko a Moitshepi. 
Job6:11 Ke eng se se ka nthatafatsang gore ke itshoke? Ke kae kwa nka isiwang teng gore ke se fele pelo? 
Job6:12 A thata ya me ke thata ya lefika? A mmele wa me ke wa tshipi? 
Job6:13 Nnyaya! Ga ke na go thusiwa ka sepe! Pholoso e lelekilwe mo go nna. 
Job6:14 Moitlhobogi o tshwanetswe ke lorato lwa mongwe-ka-ene, le fa a latlha go boifa Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe." 
Job6:15 Bomorwa-rre ba ntshwabisitse jaaka noka le jaaka meedi ya dinoka e e fetang ka pele," 
Job6:16 e e leng e mentsho ka dikgapetla, e semathana se iphitlhang mo go yona." 
Job6:17 E a re e fisiwa ke letsatsi, e nyelele; e re go le bolelo, e kgale mafelong a yona." 
Job6:18 Masomo a baeti a fapoga mo tseleng ya ona, a ya sekakeng, a latlhega." 
Job6:19 Masomo a baeti ba Thema a tlhola metsi; makoko a baeti ba Šeba a ikanya metsi. 
Job6:20 Mme tsholofelo ya bone e tlhabisiwa ditlhong; ba fitlha teng ba a swaba. 
Job6:21 Jaanong lo ntshwabisitse fela jalo; lo bona therego, mme lo a boifa." 
Job6:22 A nkile ka re: Mpheng, lo ntefele ka di-tsa-lona," 
Job6:23 lo mpholose mo diatleng tsa mmaba, lo nthekolole mo diatleng tsa barena ba ba peloethata?" 
Job6:24 Nthuteng, ke tla didimala; lo ntemose fa ke fositseng teng!" 
Job6:25 Mafoko a nnete a na le thata ruri, mme go kgalema ga lona go kgona eng?" 
Job6:26 A lo rata go kgalemela mafoko fela, mme lo tseisa mafoko a mosolofologi phefo?" 
Job6:27 Ee, lesiela le lone lo ka le tlhamela tengwa, lwa bapatsa tsala ya lona." 
Job6:28 Mme jaanong, a lo ko lo ntebe! Ruri, ga nkitla ke lo aketsa re lebaganye!" 
Job6:29 Boang tlhe, a go se dirwe ka tshiamololo! Boang, go fa ke sa ntse ke le mo nneteng." 
Job6:30 A go na le tshiamololo mo lolemeng lwa me? Gongwe a magalapa a me ga a lemoge tse di isang mo tatlhegong? 
Job7:1 “Bophelo jwa motho fatsheng a ga se go tlhabana? Malatsi a gagwe a ga a tshwane le a motlhanka yo o sebeletsang tuelo ya letsatsi? 
Job7:2 Molala o lelela moriti; yo o sebeletsang tuelo o emela tuelo ya gagwe: 
Job7:3 Ke ruile jalo dikgwedi tse di swabisang, ka abelwa masigo a a lapisang." 
Job7:4 E re fa ke ya go robala, ke re: ‘Ke tla tsoga leng?’ Mme bosigo e nne jo boleele; ke lapisiwe ke go tlhobaela go ya bo be bo se." 
Job7:5 Mmele wa me o apere dibokwana le logogo lwa lorole; letlalo la me le thibala, le be le phanyega gape." 
Job7:6 Malatsi a me a potlaka bogolo go morutse wa mologi; a feta fela, ke sa bone se ke se solofetseng." 
Job7:7 Gopola, fa bophelo jwa me e le phefo fela; fa matlho a me a se kitla a bona tlhogonolo gape." 
Job7:8 Matlho a yo o mponang ga a nke a nteba; matlho a gago a tla mpatla, mme ke tla bo ke se yo." 
Job7:9 Leru le a tle le nyelele, le tsamae: Yo o fologetseng kwa felong ga baswi le ene o ntse jalo; ga a nke a tlhatloga gape." 
Job7:10 Ga a tlhole a boela mo lapeng la gagwe; felo ga gagwe ga go tlhole go mo itse. 
Job7:11 Le fa go ntse jalo ga nkitla ke ithiba molomo; fa mowa wa me o le tlalelong, ke tla bua; fa ke le botlhokong jo bo galakang ke tla lela." 
Job7:12 A ke lewatle gongwe leruarua la lewatle, fa o mpeela balebeledi ba ba ntisang?" 
Job7:13 Fa ke re: ‘Bolao jwa me bo tla nkgomotsa, marobalo a me a tla nthusa go itshoka tlalelong ya me,’" 
Job7:14 foo o ntshose ka ditoro o ntheregise ka dipono," 
Job7:15 mo ke bileng ka rata go betwa le go swa bogolo go pogisego ya me. 
Job7:16 Ke nyatsa bophelo jwa me! A nke ke se phele jalo ka bosakhutleng! Ntese! Kana malatsi a me ke phefo fela. 
Job7:17 Motho ke eng, fa o mo kaya yo mogolo, fa pelo ya gago e mo ela tlhoko?" 
Job7:18 Fa o mo tlhola mo mosong mongwe le mongwe, fa o mo leka ka nako le nako?" 
Job7:19 Ke sebaka se se kana kang o sa mphapose matlho, o sa mphe boikhutso go ka metsa mathe?" 
Job7:20 Fa ke leofile, wena modisa wa batho, ke go senyeditseng? Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa o mpeile gore o ntlhasele, fa ke le morwalo o o ikimelang?" 
Job7:21 Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa o sa itshwarele boleo jwa me, fa o sa phimole molato wa me? Gonne jaanong ke tla robala loroleng; o tla mpatla, mme ke tla bo ke se teng.”" 
Job8:1 Ga fetola Biletate wa Sua a re: 
Job8:2 “O tla khutla leng go bua tse di ntseng jalo, mafoko a molomo wa gago e ntse e le phefo e kgolo fela?" 
Job8:3 A Modimo o ka kgopamisa katlholo? Gongwe a Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe o ka sokamisa tshiamo? 
Job8:4 Fa bana ba gago ba ne ba mo leofetse, a ba neela mo petsong ya boleo jwa bone." 
Job8:5 Mme fa wena o batla Modimo, o kopa bopelotlhomogi mo go Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe" 
Job8:6 fa o se na molato, o le yo o siameng: Ee, foo o tla go ngoka gape, a go busetsa tlhogonolo ya lapa la gago." 
Job8:7 Foo tlhogonolo ya ntlha ya gago e tla bonala, e ne e le nnyane, mme tlhogonolo ya morago e tla nna e kgolo thata." 
Job8:8 Ee, a ko o botse batho ba kgale, o ele tlhoko se borraabo ba se tlhotlhomisitseng!" 
Job8:9 Gonne rona re ba maabane, ga re itse sepe; malatsi a rona fatsheng ke moriti fela." 
Job8:10 A ga ke re, bone ba tla go ruta, ba go bolelela, ba go ntshetsa mafoko ka fa kitsong ya dipelo tsa bone?" 
Job8:11 Ba re: A lotlhaka lo ka gola fa go se nang bokgola? A motlhatlha o ka gola, o se na metsi?" 
Job8:12 Fa e le gona lo tlhogang, lo ise lo butswe go ka segwa, lo tla swaba pele ga bojang jotlhe." 
Job8:13 Ke yona tsela ya botlhe ba ba lebalang Modimo, mme tsholofelo ya moikepi e a nyelela." 
Job8:14 O ikgantsha ka tse di nyelelang; tse a di ikanyang ke bobi jwa segokgo fela. 
Job8:15 O ikaega ka ntlo ya gagwe, mme ga e nke e ema; o itshwarelela mo go yona, mme ga se e e tlhomameng." 
Job8:16 O gola sentle a tletse matute, le fa go le letsatsi; matlhogela a gagwe a farafara tshimo ya gagwe." 
Job8:17 Medi ya gagwe e raraana mo mokoeng wa matlapa; e itshwarelela mo gare ga mafika. 
Job8:18 Mme fa a kumolwa mo felong ga gagwe, gona go tla mo latola go re: ‘Ga ke ise nke ke go bone.’" 
Job8:19 Bona, ke jona boitumelo jwa bophelo jwa gagwe, mme yo mongwe o tla tlhoga loroleng." 
Job8:20 Bona, Jobe! Modimo ga o latlhe yo o o boifang, mme ga o eme basenyi nokeng." 
Job8:21 Molomo wa gago o tla o tlatsa setshego gape le legano la gago tuduetso. 
Job8:22 Ba ba go tlhoileng ba tla apara tsa ditlhong; lelapa la baikepi ga le nke le tlhola le nna teng.” 
Job9:1 Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job9:2 “Ke nnete. Ke a itse gore go ntse jalo. Motho o ka nna jang mosiami fa pele ga Modimo? 
Job9:3 Fa a rata go ganetsanya naô, a ka palelwa le ke go o araba potso e le nngwe fela mo go di le sekete." 
Job9:4 Modimo o pelo-e-botlhale, o thata nonofong. Ke mang yo o kileng a o ganetsa, a se ka a bona petso?" 
Job9:5 Dithaba o a di sutisa, go sa lemogiwe; o di ribegetsa ka bogale jwa ona." 
Job9:6 Lefatshe o a le roromisa, le tswe mo felong ga lone; maotwana a lone a be a reketle." 
Job9:7 Letsatsi o a le laela, mme le se ke le tlhabe; dinaledi o a di bipa, di se ke di bonale." 
Job9:8 Legodimo o le tsharolola o le osi, o gate mo godimo ga dintelo tsa lewatle." 
Job9:9 O dirile dinaledi tsa ‘Bere e kgolo’ le tsa ‘Dikolobe’ le tsa ‘Selemela’ le tsa ‘Sefapaano’ kwa ntlheng ya borwa. 
Job9:10 O dira tse dikgolo tse di se nang botlhotlhomiso le dikgakgamatso tse di se nang palo. 
Job9:11 Bonang! O a mpheta, ke sa o bone; o a tlhaga, ke sa o lemoge." 
Job9:12 Bonang, fa o amoga, o ka thibelwa ke mang? Ke mang yo o ka o botsang a re: ‘O dira eng?’" 
Job9:13 Modimo ga o buse bogale jwa ona; bathusi ba kgogela tlholegong ba ne ba o ikokobeletsa. 
Job9:14 Jaanong nna ke mang yo nka o fetolang? Nka tlhopha jang mafoko a a o tshwanetseng? 
Job9:15 Le fa nka bo ke le yo o siameng, ga ke na go o araba. Ke na le go kopa bopelotlhomogi mo go Moatlhodi wa me." 
Job9:16 Fa ke o bitsa, o sa nkarabe, ga ke dumele gore o tla reetsa lentswe la me." 
Job9:17 Kana o ka mpšhwetla ka ledimo, wa ntsifatsa dintho tsa me ka bomo." 
Job9:18 Ga o ke o mpha nako ya go ka busa mowa, mme o nkgorisa matlhoko a a galakang." 
Job9:19 Fa go lebilwe thata ya yo o tiileng, ona o na nayo. Fa go lebilwe tshiamo, ke mang yo o ka biletsang ona tshekong?" 
Job9:20 Le fa nka bo ke le yo o siameng, molomo wa me o ka bo o nkatlhola ke le moikepi; le fa ke se na molato, ona o ka mpona molato." 
Job9:21 Ga ke na molato! Mme ga ke tlhole ke ikitse. Bophelo jwa me ke a bo nyatsa. 
Job9:22 Go tshwana fela! Ke ka moo ke reng: Ona o fedisa mosiami jaaka moikepi. 
Job9:23 Fa kotlo ya Modimo e bolaya ka tshoganyetso, o tshege tsholofologo ya ba ba se nang molato." 
Job9:24 Lefatshe o le neetse mo diatleng tsa moikepi; o bipa difatlhego tsa baatlhodi ba lone. Fa e se ona, go dira mang?" 
Job9:25 Malatsi a me a fetile ka lobelo lwa go sia motabogi; a tshabile a ise a bone tse di molemo. 
Job9:26 A ile ka bobebe jwa mekoro ya lotlhaka jaaka fa lenong le fologela kwa dijong. 
Job9:27 Fa nka re: ‘A nke ke lebale selelo sa me, ke fetoge sefatlhego se se tlhontseng, e nne se se thabileng;’" 
Job9:28 ke gona ke tshogang matlhoko a me otlhe. Ke a itse gore ga o nke o nkaya yo o se nang molato. 
Job9:29 Ke tshwanetse ka bo ke le molato. Ke itapisa felafela ka lebaka la eng? 
Job9:30 Le fa ke le yo o tlhapang ka semathana; le fa ke tlhapa diatla ka molora: 
Job9:31 Wena o tla ntatlhela seretseng gore ke tene diaparo tsa me. 
Job9:32 Gonne ona ga se motho ka nna yo nka mo fetolang, yo nka yang nae kwa tshekong." 
Job9:33 Ga go motsereganyi fa gare ga rona yo o ka bayang seatla sa gagwe mo go ona le mo go nna. 
Job9:34 A o tlose thupa ya ona mo go nna! Theregiso ya ona a e se ka ya ntshosa! 
Job9:35 Foo nka bo ke bua, ke sa o boife; kana maikutlo a me a tletse poifo." 
Job10:1 “Bophelo jwa me bo a ntena. Ke tla ntsha selelo sa me. Ke tla bua ke le botlhokong jo bo galakang," 
Job10:2 ke raya Modimo ke re: Se nkatlhole wa re, ke moikepi; nkitsise se se go losang le nna." 
Job10:3 A go molemo mo go wena, fa o dira tsa kgatelelo, fa o latlha yo diatla tsa gago di mo dirileng, fa o kgatlhwa ke maano a baikepi?" 
Job10:4 A matlho a gago ke a nama? Gongwe a o bona jaaka motho a bona? 
Job10:5 A malatsi a gago a tshwana le malatsi a motho? Gongwe a dinyaga tsa gago di tshwana le malatsi a monna? 
Job10:6 Ke go reng, fa o batla molato mo go nna, fa o latelela sebe sa me?" 
Job10:7 Etswe o ntse o itse, fa ke se na molato, e bile go se na ope yo o ka pholosang mo diatleng tsa gago." 
Job10:8 Diatla tsa gago di mpopile, di ntirile ka botswerere gotlhe! A o batla go nnyeletsa?" 
Job10:9 A ko o gopole gore o mpopile jaaka letsopa! Jaanong a o mpusetsa loroleng? 
Job10:10 A ga o a ntshela jaaka mašwi, wa nthemisa jaaka madila a a loileng?" 
Job10:11 Wa nkapesa letlalo le nama, wa ntshwaraganya ka marapo le mesifa." 
Job10:12 O mphile bophelo, wa nthata, wa mpolokela mowa ka go mpabalela." 
Job10:13 Mme tse o neng o di fitlhile mo pelong ya gago – jaanong ke itse boikaelelo jwa gago – ke tse: 
Job10:14 Fa nka leofa, o tla nkela tlhoko; ga o kitla o nkgolola molatong." 
Job10:15 Fa nka ikepa, a tatlhego ya me wee! Le fa ke le yo o siameng, ga ke na go tsholetsa tlhogo ka ntlha ya go kgora tsa ditlhong le go bona pogisego ya me." 
Job10:16 Fa tlhogo e ka bo e itsosa, o ka bo o ntsoma jaaka tau, o ntse o ntemosa thata ya gago e e gakgamatsang." 
Job10:17 O ka bo o ntebaganya le basupi ba bašwa, o godisa go nkgalefela ga gago, o ntse o ntlhasela ka mephato e mešwa." 
Job10:18 O nntsheditseng mo mmeleng wa ga mme? E kete nka bo ke sule ke ise ke bonwe ke leitlho la motho. 
Job10:19 Foo nka bo ke tshwana le yo o iseng a nne teng; nka bo ke isitswe kwa lebitleng fela ka nako e ke duleng mo popelong ka yona. 
Job10:20 Malatsi a me a ga a mannye? A Modimo o khutle, a o ntese, ke tle ke phuthologe go le gonnye!" 
Job10:21 Ke ise ke ye kwa fatsheng la lefifi la moriti wa loso, kwa ke sa tlholeng ke ka boa teng" 
Job10:22 kwa lefatsheng le lentsho la lefifi la moriti wa loso le le se nang thulaganyo; kwa bosigogare bo bidiwang lesedi.” 
Job11:1 Ga fetola Sofare wa Naama a re: 
Job11:2 “A bontsi jwa mafoko bo na le go tlhoka karabo? Gongwe a mmalabadi o mo nneteng? 
Job11:3 A maithamako a gago a ka didimatsa banna? A o ka sotla go se yo o go tlhabisang ditlhong? 
Job11:4 Kana o rile: ‘Thuto ya me ke e e phepa. Ke itshekile mo matlhong a gago!’ 
Job11:5 E kete Modimo o ka bo o bua, wa bo o bula molomo, o go bolelela;" 
Job11:6 o ka bo o go itsise diphiri tsa botlhale, fa bo gaisa kitso gabedi. Foo o ka bo o itse gore Modimo o itebatsa molato mongwe wa gago." 
Job11:7 A o ka itse tse Modimo o di itseng? A o ka bona kitso e e tletseng ya Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe? 
Job11:8 E kwa godimo mo legodimong, ò ka kgona eng? E kwa tlase mo felong ga baswi, wena o itseng?" 
Job11:9 Seelo sa yona se seleele bogolo go lefatshe, se atlhame bogolo go lewatle." 
Job11:10 Fa ona o tlhaga o go tshwara, o go biletsa kwa tshekong, yo o ka o thibelang ke mang?" 
Job11:11 Gonne balotsana ona o a ba itse; bokgopo o a bo bona, le fa e kete ga o bo tlhokomele." 
Job11:12 A le seeleele se ka tlhalefa? A eselana ya nageng e ka fetoga motho? 
Job11:13 Fa wena o baakanya pelo ya gago, fa o o tsholeletsa diatla," 
Job11:14 fa diatla tsa gago di na le bokgopo, bo tlose! A tshiamololo e se nne mo lapeng la ga eno!" 
Job11:15 Ee, foo sefatlhego sa gago o tla se tsholetsa o se na molato; o tla bo o tlhomame o sa boife sepe." 
Job11:16 Ee, foo o tla lebala tapisego; fa o e gopola e tla tshwana le metsi a a fetileng." 
Job11:17 O tla selwa ke bophelo go phala lesedi la motshegare. Fa go fifala, go tla tshwana fela le fa bo sa." 
Job11:18 O tla gomotsega, gonne o na le tse o di solofelang; le fa o ka gadima, gongwe wa okomela, o tla robala o le mo tshireletsong." 
Job11:19 O tla lala go se yo o go tshosang. Ba bantsi ba tla eletsa go go kgatlha. 
Job11:20 Mme matlho a baikepi a tla swaba. Botshabelo bo ba senyegetse. Se se ba saletseng ke go ntsha mowa wa bofelo.” 
Job12:1 Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job12:2 “Ee ruri, batho ke lona; botlhale bo tla swa le lona." 
Job12:3 Le nna ke na le tlhaloganyo jaaka lona; ga lo mphale. Ke mang yo o sa itseng tse di ntseng jalo? 
Job12:4 Ke fetogile yo o sotlwang ke mongwe-ka-ene, ke le yo o rapetseng Modimo, wa ba wa nkutlwa; go sotlega mosiami yo o se nang molato." 
Job12:5 Yo o phelang monate a re: Nyatso e tshwanela ba ba mo tatlhegong; ba dinao tse di relelang a ba kgopisiwe! 
Job12:6 Kagiso e mo malapeng a ba ba gatelelang. Ba ba gakatsang Modimo ba thagame ba re: Modimo re a o laola. 
Job12:7 Mme a ko o botse diphologolo gore di go rute, le dinonyane tsa loapi gore di go itsise." 
Job12:8 Gongwe bua le lefatshe gore le go rute, a ditlhapi tsa lewatle di go bolelele!" 
Job12:9 Ke mang yo o sa lemogeng ka tsotlhe tse, fa seatla sa Morena se di dirile?" 
Job12:10 Kana bophelo jwa tse di phelang tsotlhe le mewa ya mebele ya batho botlhe di mo seatleng sa gagwe. 
Job12:11 A ga se tshwanelo ya tsebe go tlhatlhoba mafoko jaaka magalapa a utlwa dijo? 
Job12:12 Ga twe: Botlhale bo mo go ba ba tlhogo-di-pududu. Bontsi jwa malatsi bo tlisa tlhaloganyo. 
Job12:13 Nnyaya! Botlhale le bonatla di mo go ona; ke ona o o nang le maano le temogo. 
Job12:14 Ruri, ona o a rutla, mme ga go yo o ka tsosang; o tswalela motho, go se yo o ka mmulelang." 
Job12:15 Bonang, fa o thibela pula, metsi a a tšha; mme fa o ka e nesa, a gogola naga." 
Job12:16 O na le thata le temogo. Motimedi ke wa ona fela jaaka motimetsi. 
Job12:17 Banna ba lekgotla o ba isa botshwarong ka dinao di sa rwala; o silofatsa baatlhodi. 
Job12:18 O bofolola dikgole tse dikgosi di bofang ka tsona; o di golega matheka ka kgole. 
Job12:19 Baperesiti o ba isa botshwarong ka dinao di sa rwala; o diga ditshika tsa kgale. 
Job12:20 Ba ba ikanyegang o ba tima puo; o amoga banna bagolo temogo. 
Job12:21 O goromeletsa nyatsego mo batlotleging; o repisa meitlamo ya ba ba thata. 
Job12:22 Madiba a lefifi o a a senola; lefifi le lentsho o le ntshetsa leseding. 
Job12:23 O godisa ditšhaba, le gona o a di nyeletsa; o anamisa ditšhaba, o bo o di tlose." 
Job12:24 O amoga ditlhogo tsa batho ba lefatshe tlhaloganyo; o ba kgarakgatsha sekakeng mo go se nang tsela. 
Job12:25 Ba apaapa mo fifing fa go seng lesedi; o ba theekedisa jaaka matagwa. 
Job13:1 “Ruri, tsotlhe tseo matlho a me a di bonye, ditsebe tsa me tsa di utlwa, tsa di tlhaloganya." 
Job13:2 Le nna ke di itse jaaka lona, mme ga lo mphale." 
Job13:3 Mme nna ke rata go bua le Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe; ke eletsa go sekisanya le Modimo. 
Job13:4 Lona lo babipi ba maaka, lotlhe lo dingaka tse e seng tsona." 
Job13:5 Ao! Fa lo ka bo lo didimala, lo ka bo lo kaiwa batlhalefi." 
Job13:6 Utlwang tlhe boikarabelo jwa me, lo tlhokomele go itwela ga molomo wa me." 
Job13:7 A lo a re, lo direla Modimo ka go bua tse di sokameng? A lo o emela ka go bua tsa tsietso?" 
Job13:8 Gongwe a lo goga le ona? Kampo a lo a re, lo lwela Modimo?" 
Job13:9 A lo tla tswa sentle, fa o lo sekisa? A lo a re, lo ka o tsietsa jaaka go tsiediwa motho?" 
Job13:10 Nnyaya! O tla lo otla ruri, fa lo gobelelela mongwe mo sephiring." 
Job13:11 Bogolo jwa ona a ga bo kitla bo lo wela? Poitshego ya ona a ga e kitla e lo tshosa? 
Job13:12 Tse lo di nkgakololang ke diane tsa molora; mabaka a lona ke mabaka a letsopa fela. 
Job13:13 Didimalang, lo nte ke bue, le fa ke dirafalelwa ke eng!" 
Job13:14 Ke leka go ipoloka ka go itsenya mo kotsing. 
Job13:15 Bonang, o ka mpolaya, ga ke na tsholofelo; fela ditsela tsa me ke tla di ikarabela fa pele ga ona." 
Job13:16 Le gona moo e tla nna pholoso ya me; gonne molotsana ga a tle fa pele ga ona. 
Job13:17 Utlwang mafoko a me sentle, a tlhaloso ya me e lo tsene ditsebeng!" 
Job13:18 Bonang tlhe, ke rulagantse mafoko a tsheko; ke a itse, fa ke tla tswa ke se na molato." 
Job13:19 Ke mang yo o ka mponang molato? Gonne fa a ka nna teng, ke tla didimala, ke swa." 
Job13:20 Fela dilo di le pedi se di ntirele; foo ga nkitla ke iphitlha fa pele ga gago: 
Job13:21 Ka re: A seatla sa gago se se ka sa nkimela! A theregiso ya gago e se ka ya ntshosa! 
Job13:22 Ke gona o ka ntshekisang, ke tla araba; gongwe ke tla bua, mme o mphetole!" 
Job13:23 Ke na le ditshiamololo le dibe di le kae? Nkitsise tlolo ya me le boleo jwa me! 
Job13:24 O fitlhelang sefatlhego sa gago? O nkaya mmaba wa gago ka lebaka la eng? 
Job13:25 A o a re, o tshosa letlhare le le fokwang ke phefo? A o latelela dirite tse di omeletseng?" 
Job13:26 Mo o mpolaisang tse di galakang, o nthwesa dibe tsa bokau jwa me;" 
Job13:27 mo dinao tsa me o di bofelelang mo koteng, o tlhola tsela tsotlhe tsa me; mo o nthalelang mothalo mo tikologong ya pato tsa dinao tsa me" 
Job13:28 ke le yo o nyelelang jaaka tse di bodileng le jaaka seaparo se se jewang ke motoutwana. 
Job14:1 “Motho, ngwana wa mosadi, ke wa malatsi a se kae o kgora matshwenyego." 
Job14:2 O tlhoga jaaka sethunya, a ba a swaba; o tshaba jaaka moriti, ga a na tlhomamo." 
Job14:3 Mme le fa e le yo o ntseng jalo o mmudulogetse matlho; o nkisa tshekong fa pele ga gago. 
Job14:4 Ao! Go ka bo go tswa yo o phepa mo go ba ba sa itshekang! Mme ga a yo, le e seng a le mongwe." 
Job14:5 E re ka malatsi a gagwe a beilwe, ka o badile dikgwedi tsa gagwe, ka o dirile melelwane e a sa ka keng a e tlola," 
Job14:6 faposa matlho mo go ene gore a ikhutse go fitlhelela a thabele letsatsi la gagwe jaaka yo o direlang tuelo ya letsatsi. 
Job14:7 Gonne setlhare se na le tsholofelo; le fa se ka rengwa, se tla tlhoga gape; matlhogela a sona ga a tlhokafale." 
Job14:8 Le fa modi wa sona o onala mo lefatsheng, le fa kutu ya sona e swela mo leroleng," 
Job14:9 fa se utlwa monko wa metsi se tla tlhoga gape, se ntsha dikala jaaka se se tlhomilweng." 
Job14:10 Mme fa monna a swa, o feleletse; fa motho a tlhokafetse, o ka tlhola a nna kae?" 
Job14:11 Metsi a fela mo letsheng; noka e a tšha e kgale: 
Job14:12 Motho o robala jalo, a se ke a tlhole a tsoga; ga ba thanye, ga ba tsosiwe mo borokong jwa bone go fitlhelela legodimo le khutle go nna teng." 
Job14:13 Ao! Ga o mpolokeleng mo felong ga baswi wa mphitlha teng go fitlhelela bogale jwa gago bo time; e kete o ka mpeela sebaka se o tla nkgopolang ka sona. 
Job14:14 Fa monna yo o swang a ne a ka phela gape, foo nka bo ke itshoka ka malatsi otlhe a kampano ya me go tsamaya kgololo ya me e be e tle!" 
Job14:15 O ne o tla mpitsa, mme ke go arabe; o ka bo o tlhologelelwa sebopiwa sa seatla sa gago." 
Job14:16 Foo o ne o tla bala dikgato tsa me, mme o se ke o tlhokomele sebe sa me." 
Job14:17 Boleo jwa me bo ka bo bo tswaletswe kgetsaneng; molato wa me o ka bo o o bipile. 
Job14:18 Mme thaba le yona, fa e wa, e a phatlakanngwa; le lentswe le ka suta mo felong ga lone." 
Job14:19 Metsi a gotlha mafika, merwalela ya ona a gogola mmu wa lefatshe: Le tsholofelo ya motho o a e nyeletsa jalo." 
Job14:20 O mo gatelela ka bosakhutleng, mme o a nyelela; o fetola sefatlhego sa gagwe, o mo naya tsela." 
Job14:21 Fa bana ba gagwe ba tlotlega, ene ga a itse; fa e le ba ba nyatsegang, ga a ba tlhokomele." 
Job14:22 Mmele wa gagwe o utlwa botlhoko fela, fa o sa ntse o phela; mowa wa gagwe o hutsafala fela o sa ntse o le mo nameng.”" 
Job15:1 Ke fa Elifase wa Themane a fetola a re: 
Job15:2 “A motlhalefi o ka araba ka kitso e e leng phefo fela, a tlatsa mpa ya gagwe phefo ya botlhabatsatsi," 
Job15:3 e le go ikarabela ka mafoko a a se nang mosola le ka dipuo tse di sa thuseng sepe? 
Job15:4 Ee, wena o senya poifo-Modimo, o ngotla tshisimogo fa pele ga Modimo." 
Job15:5 Gonne molomo wa gago o buisiwa ke molato wa gago; o itlhophela puo ya maferefere. 
Job15:6 Ga se nna ke go sekisang, o sekisiwa ke molomo wa gago; mafoko a gago a supa ka ga gago." 
Job15:7 A ke wena motho wa ntlha yo o tsetsweng? A o tlholegile pele ga dithabana? 
Job15:8 A o ne o reeditse mo lekgotleng la Modimo? A o iphamoletse botlhale? 
Job15:9 O itse eng se rona re sa se itseng? A o lemogile sengwe se rona re iseng re se lemoge? 
Job15:10 Ba ba tlhogo-di-pududu le batsofe le rona re na nabo; ke ba malatsi a mantsi bogolo go rraago. 
Job15:11 Dikgomotso tsa Modimo a o a di galala, e bong lefoko le le builweng le wena ka bonolo?" 
Job15:12 O betelwang ke pelo? Ke eng, fa o gwetola matlho?" 
Job15:13 Kana o losa mowa wa gago le Modimo, fa o ntsha mafoko a a ntseng jalo mo molomong wa gago!" 
Job15:14 Motho ke eng? A e ka nna yo o itshekileng? A ngwana wa mosadi e ka nna yo o siameng? 
Job15:15 Bonang, baitshepi ba ona ga o ba ikanye; le legodimo ga le a itsheka mo matlhong a ona," 
Job15:16 bogolo jang motho yo o maila yo o senyegileng, yo o nwang bokgopo jaaka metsi!" 
Job15:17 Ke tla go ruta, ntheetse; ke tla bolela tse ke di bonyeng," 
Job15:18 tse batlhalefi ba di bolelang, tse borraabo ba sa di ba lobelang." 
Job15:19 Ke ba ba neng ba neilwe lefatshe ba le nosi, moeng a sa ba ralale:" 
Job15:20 Ba re: Moikepi o mo poifong ka malatsi otlhe fela, jaaka morena yo o pelompe ka dinyaga tsotlhe tse o di beetsweng." 
Job15:21 Medumo ya matshogo e duma mo tsebeng tsa gagwe; e a re a le kagisong, a welwe ke mogateledi." 
Job15:22 Ga a solofele go ka boa mo lefifing; o atlholetswe go bolawa ka tšhaka. 
Job15:23 O kgarakgatshega go batla dijo. Di kwa kae? O a itse, fa letsatsi la tatlhego le etleeditswe le le gaufi nae." 
Job15:24 Tlalelo le pitlaganyo di mo tshosa di mo wela jaaka go tshosa kgosi e e bolotseng go tlhasela. 
Job15:25 Ke ka gonne o otlololetse Modimo letsogo go lwa nao, a ikgantshetsa Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe." 
Job15:26 A o tlhasela ka thamo e e gagametseng le ka bontsi jwa dithebe tsa gagwe. 
Job15:27 Gonne o sirilwe matlho ke go nona, a akola mafura diropeng," 
Job15:28 a nna mo metseng e e sentsweng le mo matlong, a ba a ileditsweng a a atlholetsweng go nna matlotla." 
Job15:29 Ga a kitla a huma; tse o nang natso ga se tse di tlhomameng; di tshwana le diako tse di sa obegeleng fa fatshe. 
Job15:30 Ga a kitla a falola mo fifing; bolelo bo tla swabisa matlhogela a gagwe; o tla nyelela ka pudulo ya molomo wa ona. 
Job15:31 A a se ka a ikanya boithamako, o a itsietsa; gonne tuelo ya gagwe e tla nna boithamako." 
Job15:32 Go tla dirafala jalo letsatsi la gagwe le ise le tle; kala ya mokolane wa gagwe ga e tlhoge. 
Job15:33 O tla diga maungo a a iseng a butswe jaaka moweine; a tlhotlhora dithunya tsa gagwe jaaka setlhare sa olefa. 
Job15:34 Gonne lekoko la balotsana ke la baopa; molelo o tla fisa malapa a ba ba amogelang neo e e faposang tshiamo. 
Job15:35 Ba ithwala tapisego, ba tsala tatlhego; teng ya bone e etleetsa tsietso.”" 
Job16:1 Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job16:2 “Mafoko a mofuta oo ke a utlwile gantsi; lo bagomotsi ba lo tenang motho, lona lotlhe." 
Job16:3 Mafoko a e leng diphefo fela a a feleletse? Gongwe o tlhotlhelediwa ke eng, fa ò fetola?" 
Job16:4 Le nna nka bo ke itse go bua jaaka lona, fa lona lo ka bo lo le mo boemong jwa me; ke ne ke tla lo rulaganyetsa mafoko sentle le go lo thukhuthela tlhogo." 
Job16:5 Nka bo ke lo nonotsha ka molomo wa me; kutlwelo-botlhoko ya mafoko a me e ka bo e kokobetsa tlalelo ya lona. 
Job16:6 Le fa nka bua, botlhoko jwa me ga bo kokobele; fa ke didimala, ke tlogelwa ke eng?" 
Job16:7 Ruri, jaanong ona o ntapisitse. Wena Modimo, o ntshenyetsa ba ga etsho botlhe," 
Job16:8 o a ntshwara; botlhoko jwa me ke mosupi; bo ntsogetse, jwa mpaya molato bo lebaganye le nna." 
Job16:9 Bogale jwa ona bo nkgagotse le go ntwantsha; ona wa nkhuranyetsa meno; montsogedi a nkgwetolela matlho. 
Job16:10 Ba nkatlhamolosetsa melomo, ba ntitaya marameng ka kgobo, ba nkgobokanela go lwa le nna." 
Job16:11 Modimo o nneetse ba ba sokameng, wa ntatlhela diatleng tsa baikepi." 
Job16:12 Ke ne ke le boiketlong, mme wa nthobaganya; wa ntshwara mo thamong, wa mpšhwetlakanya; wa ntira sekonopiwa sa ona." 
Job16:13 Metsu ya ona e mpharafere mo ntlheng tsotlhe; o mphatlola pelo o sa rekegele; santlhokwe wa me o o tshololela fa fatshe. 
Job16:14 O phunyaphunya mmele wa me jaaka fa go phunngwa lobota; o ntlhasela jaaka seganka. 
Job16:15 Lesela la bohutsana ke le rokeletse mo letlalong la me; lonaka lwa me ka lo latlhela loroleng. 
Job16:16 Matlho a me a hubitse ka go lela; lefifi le lentsho le mo dintshing tsa matlho a me; 
Job16:17 e tswe go se na bokgopo mo diatleng tsa me le thapelo ya me e le phepa. 
Job16:18 Wena lefatshe, se khurumetse madi a me! A go goa ga me go se bone boikhutso!" 
Job16:19 Le jaanong, bonang, mosupi wa me o kwa legodimong; ee, moemedi wa me o kwa godimodimo!" 
Job16:20 Ditsala tsa me di a ntshotla, mme matlho a me a rothela dikeledi Modimong" 
Job16:21 gore o fedise kgang ya monna le Modimo le ya morwa motho le tsala ya gagwe. 
Job16:22 Gonne go setse dinyaga di se kae, mme ke tla wela mo tseleng, ke sa boe." 
Job17:1 “Mowa wa me o a fela, malatsi a me a a tima; ke lebitla fela le le ntshaletseng." 
Job17:2 Ruri, ditshotlo ke kabelo ya me; matlho a me a lala a ledisiwa ke dikomano tsa bone." 
Job17:3 A ko o mpeele, o nkemele mo go wena! Yo mongwe kana ga a teng yo o ka nkemelang!" 
Job17:4 O subetse pelo tsa bone tlhaloganyo; ka moo ga o kitla o ba naya phenyo. 
Job17:5 Yo o batlang kabelo ka go eka ba ga gabo, bana ba gagwe ba tla rotola matlho." 
Job17:6 Nna o ntirile seane sa batho; ke fetogile yo o kgwelwang mathe mo sefatlhegong. 
Job17:7 Matlho a me a fifetse ka botlhoko; ditokololo tsa me tsotlhe di tshwana le moriti fela. 
Job17:8 Ka ntlha ya tseo go rerega ba e leng ba nnete; ba ba se nang molato ba tsogela baikepi. 
Job17:9 Mme mosiami o tla sala mo tseleng ya gagwe; yo o diatla di phepa o tla nna a tiela pele. 
Job17:10 Mme lona lotlhe, a ko lo tle gape; fela ga nka ke ka bona yo o botlhale mo go lona." 
Job17:11 Malatsi a me a fetile. Maano a me a senyegile a pelo ya me e a tlhoafaletseng. 
Job17:12 Bosigo ba bo dira motshegare ba re: ‘Lesedi le gaufi, le fa go ntse go le lefifi fela.’" 
Job17:13 Ke letile felo ga baswi ka re, ke ntlo ya me; bolao jwa me ke bo ala mo lefifing." 
Job17:14 Ke raya phupu ke re: ‘O rre’; le diboko, ke re: ‘Lo mme’ le ‘kgaitsadiake.’" 
Job17:15 Tse ke di lebeletseng di kae? Tse ke di solofelang di bonwa ke mang? 
Job17:16 Di fologela dikgorong tsa felo ga baswi, fa go robetswe mmogo leroleng.”" 
Job18:1 Ga fetola Biletate wa Sua a re: 
Job18:2 “O tla fetsa leng go buabua? Ikakanye pele, nte go bue rona!" 
Job18:3 Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa re kaiwa jaaka kgomo fela, fa re le dieleele mo matlhong a lona?" 
Job18:4 Fa o ikgarolaka mo bogaleng jwa gago: A lefatshe le tla tlogelwa ka lebaka la gago? A lefika le ka suta mo mannong a lone? 
Job18:5 Nnyaya! Lesedi la moikepi le tla tima; kgabo ya molelo wa gagwe ga e bonese. 
Job18:6 Lesedi la lelapa la gagwe le a fifala; lobone lwa gagwe lo tima godimo ga gagwe. 
Job18:7 Dikgato tsa go gwanta ga gagwe di tla koafala, mme maano a gagwe a tla mo diga." 
Job18:8 Gonne o isiwa letloeng ke maoto a gagwe; o itsamaela mo godimo ga digopo. 
Job18:9 Mutlwane o mo tshwara seretheng; seru se a mmofa. 
Job18:10 Segole o se thaetswe ka mo mmung; le gona o thaiwa mo tseleng. 
Job18:11 Ditherego di mo tshosa mo ntlheng tsotlhe; di mo tebela di ntse di mo setse morago. 
Job18:12 Tatlhego e mo meletsa mathe; kotsi e baakantswe go mo diga. 
Job18:13 Motsalwapele wa loso o tla ja dibatanyana tsa letlalo la gagwe; o tla ja ditokololo tsa gagwe. 
Job18:14 O tla kumolwa mo lapeng la gagwe le a neng a le ikanya; o tla isiwa kwa kgosing ya ditherego. 
Job18:15 Dilo tse e seng tsa gagwe di tla nna mo lapeng la gagwe; go tla gasiwa sebabole mo nageng ya gagwe. 
Job18:16 Go tla omelela medi ya gagwe ka kwa tlase; dikala tsa gagwe di tla swaba kwa godimo. 
Job18:17 Ga a tlhole a gopolwa mo fatsheng; ga a na leina le le umakwang mo mebileng. 
Job18:18 Ba mo ntsha mo leseding, ba mo kobela kwa lefifing; ba mo leleka mo lefatsheng." 
Job18:19 Ga a na ngwana, le fa e le setlogolo mo morafeng wa ga gabo; ga a na lesalela fa a neng a phela teng." 
Job18:20 Ka ntlha ya letsatsi la tatlhego ya gagwe go tla rerega ba bophirimatsatsi, le ba botlhabatsatsi ba tshwarwa ke letshogo." 
Job18:21 Ee, ke tsona tseo fela tse di dirafalelang malapa a basenyi; ke tsa ga gabo yo o sa itseng Modimo.”" 
Job19:1 Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job19:2 “Lo tla ntlhokofatsa pelo le go nthubaganya ka dipuo sebaka se se kana kang? 
Job19:3 Lo nkgobile e setse e le la bosome, lwa ntirela ka setlhogo lo sa tlhajwe ke ditlhong." 
Job19:4 Le fa ka gongwe ke fositse tota, gona phoso ya me e tla sala le nna." 
Job19:5 Fa lo rata tota go ikgodisa le go nnyatsa le go supa molato wa nyatsego ya me," 
Job19:6 foo itseng gore ke siamololelwa ke Modimo, mme o ntharile ka letloa la ona." 
Job19:7 Bonang, ke goa ke re: ‘Ke a gatelelwa!’ Mme ga ke utlwiwe; ke lelela thuso, mme tshiamo ga e teng." 
Job19:8 Morena o thibile tsela ya me, mme ke palelwa ke go feta; le ditselana tsa me o adile lefifi mo go tsona." 
Job19:9 O nkapotse tlotlo ya me; serwalo sa me sa bogosi o se nkamogile. 
Job19:10 O nthutlile gotlhegotlhe, ke a tloga; o kumotse tsholofelo ya me jaaka setlhare." 
Job19:11 Bogale jwa gagwe o bo ntukisetsa, o nkaya mmaba wa gagwe." 
Job19:12 Mephato ya gagwe ya tla mmogo, e ikatela tsela ya go nkwela, e ntikanyetsa ka go thibelela." 
Job19:13 O nkatogantse thata le bana ba ga rre; ba ke ne ke tlwaelanye nabo, ba ipaya ba ba sa nkitseng." 
Job19:14 Ba losika lwa ga etsho ba a ntshaba; ba ba neng ba nkitse ba ntebetse. 
Job19:15 Ba lelapa la me le malata a me ba ntebile jaaka moeng; ke o sele mo matlhong a bone. 
Job19:16 Motlhanka wa me, fa ke mmitsa, ga a arabe; ke na le go mo kokotlela ka molomo wa me." 
Job19:17 Mowa wa me o nkgela mosadi wa me; bomorwa-rre ba re, ke a nkga." 
Job19:18 Le basimanyana ba a nnyatsa; fa ke re ke a nanoga, ba a ntshotla." 
Job19:19 Ke maila mo go botlhe ba ke neng ke ba ikanya; bao ke ba ratileng ba mphetogetse baba. 
Job19:20 Marapo a me a ngaparetse letlalo la me; ke phologile fela ka mahinini a meno a me. 
Job19:21 Ntlhomogeleng pelo! Ntlhomogeleng pelo! Lona ditsala tsa me; gonne seatla sa Modimo se nkotlile. 
Job19:22 Ke go reng, fa lo ntlhorisa jaaka Modimo, lo sa kgore tshenyego ya nama ya me?" 
Job19:23 Ao! A go kwalwe tseo tse ke di buileng! A di kwalwe lokwalong! 
Job19:24 A di gwaiwe mo lefikeng ka sethadi sa tshipi le ka llota gore di nnele ruri. 
Job19:25 Mme nna ke a itse gore Mogolodi wa me o a phela; ke ene yo o nnelang ruri, o tla ema mo godimo ga lorole." 
Job19:26 Mme ke tla bona Modimo, ke se na letlalo le le sentsweng ke dilo tseo, ke se na nama ya me." 
Job19:27 Ona ke tla o bona e le mothusi wa me, matlho a me a tla o bona, e seng o sele; ke seo pelo ya me e se tlhologeletsweng mo go nna." 
Job19:28 Fa lo re, re tla mo latelela thata, re bona molato wa dipogo mo go ene," 
Job19:29 gona lo boife tšhaka ka losi; gonne letlhoo ke mongwe wa melato e e atlholelwang tšhaka gore lo tle lo itse, fa moatlhodi a le teng.”" 
Job20:1 Ga fetola Sofare wa Naama a re: 
Job20:2 “Ke ka moo ke arabisiwang ke dikakanyo tsa me; ka lebaka leo maikutlo a me a a mpotlakisa. 
Job20:3 Ke utlwile kgalemelo e e nkgopisang; ke na le temogo mo moweng wa me e e nkarabisang. 
Job20:4 A ga ke re, o itse tsa bogologolo, tsa go tloga kgale, fa go tlholwa batho mo fatsheng?" 
Job20:5 Tse di reng: Moduduetso wa baikepi o mokhutshwanyane fela; boitumelo jwa ba ba pelompe ke jwa sebakanyana fela. 
Job20:6 Le fa boikgantsho jwa moikepi bo ka tlhatlogela kwa legodimong, le fa tlhogo ya gagwe e ka ama maru," 
Job20:7 o tla nyelelela ruri jaaka mantle a gagwe; ba ba kileng ba mmona ba tla re: ‘O fa kae?’ 
Job20:8 O tla timela jaaka toro a sa tlhole a ka bonwa; o tla kobiwa jaaka pono ya bosigo. 
Job20:9 Leitlho le le kileng la mmona ga le tlhole le mmona; le felo ga gagwe ga go tlhole go mmona. 
Job20:10 Bana ba gagwe ba tshwanetse go thabisa ba ba humanegileng; diatla tsa bone di na le go busa tse o di thukhuthileng. 
Job20:11 Le fa marapo a gagwe a tletse thata ya bokau jwa gagwe, e tla lala nae loroleng." 
Job20:12 Le fa bosula bo mo natefetse leganong, a bo fitlha ka fa tlase ga loleme lwa gagwe;" 
Job20:13 le fa a bo boloka, a sa rate go bo lesa a bo tshotse mo magalapeng a gagwe." 
Job20:14 Dijo tsa gagwe di tla fetoga di le mo maleng a gagwe; e nna botlhole jwa mabolobolo ka mo teng ga gagwe. 
Job20:15 Dikhumo tseo o di meditseng o tla di tlhatsa gape; Modimo o tla di gelola mo mpeng ya gagwe. 
Job20:16 Botlhole jwa mabolobolo o a bo anya; loleme lwa noga lo a mmolaya. 
Job20:17 Ga a nke a thaba ka go bona dinokana le dinoka tsa mafura a dinotshe le tsa mašwi a a themileng. 
Job20:18 Tse o di itiretseng o a di ntsha gape, a ise a di metse; tse o di anantseng ga di na go mo itumedisa." 
Job20:19 Gonne o ne a gatelela ba ba humanegileng, a ba latlha fela; a gapa ntlo, mme ga a kitla a e ntšhwafatsa." 
Job20:20 E re ka a ne a sa khutle go eletsa mo teng ga gagwe, ga a kitla a phologa ka dilo tse a di ratang." 
Job20:21 E rile a thopa, a bo a sa sadise sepe; ke ka moo a sa boneng lesego le le tlhomameng." 
Job20:22 Le fa a na le letlotlo le le tletseng, o tla pitlaganngwa; mabogo otlhe a babogisegi a tla mo wela." 
Job20:23 Morena o tla mo romela bogale jo bo tukang jwa gagwe, a bo mo nesetsa go nna dijo tsa gagwe le go tlatsa mpa ya gagwe." 
Job20:24 Fa a tshaba dibolai tsa tshipi, o tla phololediwa ka bora jwa kgotlho." 
Job20:25 Fa a re ke a itlhomola, motsu o tswa mo motlhaneng wa gagwe le tshipi e e phatsimang mo santlhokweng wa gagwe. O ya kwa losong, a wetswe ke matshogo." 
Job20:26 Lefifi tota le baakanyeditswe mahumo a gagwe; molelo o o sa godiweng ke motho o tla mo nyeletsa, o feleletsa masalela a a mo lapeng la gagwe." 
Job20:27 Legodimo le tla senola molato wa gagwe le lefatshe le mo tsogela. 
Job20:28 Mahumo a a mo ntlong ya gagwe a tla thopiwa; a gogolwa ka letsatsi la bogale jwa ona. 
Job20:29 Ke yona kabelo ya motho wa moikepi e e tswang mo Modimong; ke jona boswa jo o bo neetsweng ke Modimo.” 
Job21:1 Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job21:2 “Utlwang lo reetse se ke se bolelang! A go re jalo e nne dikgomotso tsa lona! 
Job21:3 Ntumeleleng, le nna ke bue. Fa ke sena go bua, o ka sotla." 
Job21:4 A nna ke lebisa selelo sa me mo bathong? Gongwe ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa ke sa tshwanela go fela pelo?" 
Job21:5 Ntebeng lo rerege! Bayang diatla melomong. 
Job21:6 Fa ke gopola tseo, ke a tshoga; mmele wa me o a sisimoga." 
Job21:7 Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa baikepi ba ka phela, ba be ba tsofala le go tia nonofong?" 
Job21:8 Ba bona bana ba bone, ba tiile ba na nabo mmogo le bana ba bana." 
Job21:9 Matlo a bone a mo kagisong, ga go na se se ba tshosang; thupa ya Modimo ga e ba otle." 
Job21:10 Poo ya gagwe e a gwela, ga e fose; kgomo ya gagwe e a tsala, ga e folotse." 
Job21:11 Ba ntshetsa basimane ba bone kwa ntle jaaka dinku; bana ba bone ba a tlolaka. 
Job21:12 Ba opelela moropana le mangope; ba itumelela go lela ga ditlhaka. 
Job21:13 Ba phela monate ka malatsi aotlhe; ba fologela mo felong ga baswi ba le kagisong. 
Job21:14 Mme kana ba reile Modimo ba re: ‘Tloga mo go rona! Ga re kgatlhwe ke go itse ditsela tsa gago.’ 
Job21:15 Ba re: ‘Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe ke eng, fa go twe, re mo direle? Go ka re thusa eng, fa re mo rapela?’" 
Job21:16 Bonang, tlhogonolo ya bone a ga e mo diatleng tsa bone? Kakanyo ya baikepi e kgakala le ona Modimo." 
Job21:17 A ga ke re, lobone lwa baikepi ga lo atise go tima le tatlhego ga e ba wele gantsi? Ga ke re, Modimo ga o tsotelele go ba abela dikotlo ka bogale jwa ona?" 
Job21:18 Ke ga kae ba tleng ba tshwane le dirite mo phefong, ba be ba tshwane le moko o o tsewang ke ledimo?" 
Job21:19 Lona lo a re: ‘Modimo o bolokela bana ba moikepi tatlhego ya gagwe!’ Nnyaya! A o otle ene ka fa go mo lebanyeng gore a utlwe botlhoko! 
Job21:20 A moikepi a bone tatlhego ya gagwe ka matlho! A a nwe bogale jwa Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe! 
Job21:21 Gonne ke eng sa lapa la gagwe se se ka mo tshwenyang, fa a sena go swa, fa palo ya dikgwedi tsa gagwe e sena go fela?" 
Job21:22 A motho o ka ruta Modimo kitso, ona o o sekisang ba ba kwa godimo?" 
Job21:23 Mongwe o swa a ntse a le tlhogonolo tota, a na le kagiso fa gotlhe a sa tshwenyegele sepe." 
Job21:24 Dikgamelo tsa gagwe di tletse lebese; marapo a gagwe a tiile moko. 
Job21:25 Mme yo mongwe a swe a le pelo-e-botlhoko, a ise a je tsa letlhogonolo." 
Job21:26 Ba robale mmogo leroleng, mme diboko di ba khurumetse." 
Job21:27 Bonang, ke itse dikakanyo tsa lona le maano a lo a ntogelang, a lo nteofelang ka ona." 
Job21:28 Fa lo re: ‘Lelapa la morena yo o ikgantshang le kae? Ntlo e kae e baikepi ba neng ba nna mo go yona?’ 
Job21:29 A ga lo a botsa bafeti ba tsela? Kana dikao tsa bone ga lo di ganetse! 
Job21:30 Ba re: ‘Yo o bosula o rekegelwa ka letsatsi la tatlhego; o phologa ka letsatsi la bogale.’ 
Job21:31 Ke mang yo o kgalemelang tsamao ya gagwe a lebaganye nae? Ke mang yo o mo otlhaelang tse a di dirileng? 
Job21:32 Le gona o isiwa mabitleng, mme phupu ya gagwe ba a e disa." 
Job21:33 Makwete a lebitla a monate mo go ene; batho botlhe ba mo sala morago, le ba ba mo eteletseng pele ga ba na palo." 
Job21:34 Jaanong lo ka nkgomotsa jang ka dilo tsa lefela? Mo dikarabong tsa lona go setse bolotsana fela.” 
Job22:1 Ga fetola Elifase wa Themane a re: 
Job22:2 “A monna o ka thusa Modimo? Nnyaya, letlhale sa lone ke go itirela fela." 
Job22:3 A o a re o kgatlha Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe, fa o le yo o siameng? A o a re o a mo thusa, fa o siamisa tsamao ya gago?" 
Job22:4 A o a re ke ka ntlha ya poifo-Modimo ya gago, fa a go otla, a go sekisa?" 
Job22:5 A ga ke re, bosula jwa gago ke jwa mefutafuta? Le gona melato ya gago ga e na fa e felelang teng!" 
Job22:6 O tsere dipeeletso mo go morwa-rraago, a se na molato; wa apola diaparo tsa ba ba tlhokang." 
Job22:7 Yo o nyorilweng ga o a mo nosa metsi; yo o tshwerweng ke tlala o mo timile dijo. 
Job22:8 O a re: Naga ke ya monna yo o bogale! Motlotlegi o nna mo go yona! 
Job22:9 Batlholagadi o ba buseditse kwa morago ba iphotlhere fela; wa pšhwetla masiela mabogo. 
Job22:10 Ke ka moo o dikanyeditsweng ke diru le therego e go tshosa ka tshoganyetso. 
Job22:11 A kampo ga o bone lefifi le morwalela wa metsi a a go khurumetsang? 
Job22:12 Modimo a ga o kwa godimo? Bona dinaledi tse di kwa godimodimo, di kwa godimo jang!" 
Job22:13 Mme wena o a re: ‘Modimo o itse eng? A o ka atlhola o le kwa morago ga bontsho jwa maru?’ 
Job22:14 O a re: ‘Maru a o thibile matlho, ga o bone! O itsamaela mo tikologong ya legodimo!’" 
Job22:15 A o rata go tsaya tsela ya bogologolo e baikepi ba tsamaileng ka yona 
Job22:16 ba ba neng ba tlosiwa pele ga sebaka, ba tsewa ke morwalela wa metsi?" 
Job22:17 Ke ba ba reileng Modimo ba re: ‘Tloga mo go rona!’ Gape ba re: ‘Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe o ka re direlang?’ 
Job22:18 Mme e ne e le ene yo o tladitseng matlo a bone tse di molemo! – Kakanyo ya baikepi e kgakala le nna! – 
Job22:19 Basiami ba a bona, ba a itumela; ba ba se nang molato ba a ba sotla ba re:" 
Job22:20 ‘Ruri, ba ba neng ba re tlhoile ba nyeleditswe; le tse ba di tlogetseng di fisitswe ka molelo.’" 
Job22:21 A ko o ithuse ka go tsalana nao, o nne kagisong; tlhogonolo e tla go tlela ka go dira jalo." 
Job22:22 A ko o amogele thuto e e tswang mo molomong wa ona; o bee mafoko a ona mo pelong ya gago! 
Job22:23 Fa o boela kwa go Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe, fa o ikokobetsa o tlosa tshiamololo mo lapeng la gago;" 
Job22:24 fa o latlhela gouta ya gago leroleng le gouta ya Ofire kwa mafikeng a melapo 
Job22:25 foo Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe o tla nna gouta ya gago le selefera e e phatsimang mo go wena; 
Job22:26 ee, foo o tla itumelela Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe, o tsholeletsa Modimo sefatlhego." 
Job22:27 O tla rapela Modimo, o tla go utlwa; o tla dirafatsa maikano a gago." 
Job22:28 Fa o ikaelela sengwe, o tla se kgona; lesedi le tla phatsimela ditsela tsa gago." 
Job22:29 Fa di ya kwa tlase, o tla re: ‘A ke tlhatloge!’ Modimo o tla thusa yo o ikokobetsang." 
Job22:30 Ee, le yo o molato, o tla mo pholosa; a pholosiwa ka bophepa jwa diatla tsa gago.”" 
Job23:1 Ke fa Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job23:2 “Le kajeno selelo sa me se a lo ganetsa; seatla sa ona se a nkimela, ke be ke fegelwe." 
Job23:3 Ao! Nka bo ke itse kwa nka o fitlhelang teng, gore ke eme fa pele ga sedulo sa ona!" 
Job23:4 Nka bo ke phutholola mafoko a a siameng fa pele ga ona; ke tlatsa molomo wa me maitlhatso. 
Job23:5 Ke ne ke tla itse mafoko a o mphetolang ka ona le go tlhaloganya tse o di buang le nna. 
Job23:6 A o ka bo o seka le nna ka thata e kgolo? Nnyaya! O ka bo o utlwana le nna. 
Job23:7 Gona monna wa nnete o ka bo a seka nao, mme ke ne ke tla gololwa mo go Moatlhodi wa me ka bosakhutleng." 
Job23:8 Bonang, fa ke ya kwa botlhabatsatsi, ga a teng; le kwa bophirimatsatsi ga ke mmone." 
Job23:9 Fa a le mo tirong kwa bokone, ga ke mo fitlhele; fa a fapogela kwa borwa, ga ke mo lemoge." 
Job23:10 Gonne Modimo o itse tsamao ya me; fa o ka nteka, ke tla tswa jaaka gouta." 
Job23:11 Lonao lwa me lo ntse lo gatile mo motlhaleng wa ona; ke ntse ke tshwere tsela ya ona, ke sa e fapoge." 
Job23:12 Ga ke a tlogela taolo ya molomo wa ona; mafoko a molomo wa ona ke a bolokile bogolo go maikaelelo a me. 
Job23:13 Mme ona ga o fetoge; ke mang yo o ka o thibelang? Se pelo ya ona e se ratang o a se dira! 
Job23:14 Gonne o tla dirafatsa se o se mpeetseng. Dilo tse di ntseng jalo di dintsi mo go ona. 
Job23:15 Ke ka moo ke tshogileng fa pele ga ona; fa ke di akanya, ke a o boifa." 
Job23:16 Modimo o nkoafaditse pelo; Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe o ntshositse. 
Job23:17 Gonne ga se lefifi le le mpolayang, le fa bontsho bo mpipile sefatlhego." 
Job24:1 “Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe a itse dipaka tsa go otla, mme ba ba mo itseng ba sa bone malatsi a gagwe a tshekiso?" 
Job24:2 Ba ba bosula ba sutisa melelwane, ba utswa letsomane ba a le fudisa." 
Job24:3 Esele ya masiela ba a e gapa, kgomo ya motlholagadi ba e tsaya go nna peeletso." 
Job24:4 Ba leleka bahumanegi mo tseleng; ba ba tshwereng bothata mo lefatsheng ba phela ka go iphitlha. 
Job24:5 Ke bao, ba tswela kwa tirong ya bone jaaka diesele tsa nageng, ba ya go sela tse di jewang mo nageng, ba batlela bana dijo." 
Job24:6 Ba kotula mabele a gagwe mo tshimong; ba ronopa tshimo ya moweine ya moikepi. 
Job24:7 Ba lala ba sa ikatega ba se na diaparo; le gona ga ba na kobo, le fa go le maruru." 
Job24:8 Ba koloba ka dipula tsa dithaba, mme ka ba se na botshabelo, ba ipatika fa thoko ga mafika." 
Job24:9 Ba kgomodisa lesiela letsele la mmaalo; ba tsaya lesea la mmogisegi go nna peeletso. 
Job24:10 Babogisegi bao ba tsamaya ba sa ikatega ba se na diaparo; ba na le go rwala dingata ba ntse ba tshwerwe ke tlala. 
Job24:11 Ba tlhotlha lookwane mo gare ga dithako tsa bone ba ba bosula bao; ba gata segatelo sa weine ba ntse ba nyorilwe. 
Job24:12 Go fegelwa ga ba ba swang go utlwala mo motseng; ba ba phololeditsweng ba goela thuso! Mme Modimo ga o tlhokomele tshiamololo. 
Job24:13 Bone ba ba bosula bao ba tshaba lesedi; ga ba itse ditsela tsa lone; ga ba phele mo ditselaneng tsa lone. 
Job24:14 Mmolai o tsoga pele ga masa, o bolaya mmogisegi le mohumanegi, mme o tshwana le legodu bosigo." 
Job24:15 Leitlho la mosenya-nyalo le letela lotlatlana, a re: ‘Ga go na leitlho le le tla mponang;’ a ipipe sefatlhego ka lesela." 
Job24:16 Legodu le thuba matlo mo fifing le tsene; motshegare ba a itswalela. Lesedi ga ba le tlhaloganye. 
Job24:17 Gonne botlhe bao lefifi le lentsho ba le kaya moso; gonne ba tlwaetse dipoitshego tsa lefifi le le kwenneng. 
Job24:18 A moikepi a fele ka pele jaaka selo fa se tsewa ke metsi! A tshimo ya gagwe e rogakwe mo lefatsheng! A a se ka a tlhola a ya kwa masimong a moweine! 
Job24:19 A komelelo le bolelo di tlose metsi a semathana! A felo ga baswi go metse ba ba leofileng. 
Job24:20 A mmaagwe moikepi a mo lebale! A a natefele diboko! A a se ka a tlhola a gopolwa ke ope! A tshiamololo e robiwe jaaka logong! 
Job24:21 Ke raya yo o neng a direla mosadi wa moopa bosula, a sa direle motlholagadi molemo." 
Job24:22 Mme Modimo o naya beng ba thata bophelo jo boleele ka thata ya ona; le yo o neng a tlhobogile bophelo jwa gagwe o tsoga gape. 
Job24:23 Modimo o mo neela thagamo, a ba a ikaege ka yona; mme matlho a ona a tlhokomela ditsela tsa beng ba thata." 
Job24:24 Ba gola ba tumile, ba tlhokafala ka sebakanyana; ba namalala, ba swa jaaka botlhe, jaaka diako di kgaolwa." 
Job24:25 A ga go a nna jalo? Ke mang yo o ka reng, ke buile maaka? Ke mang yo o ka nyatsang mafoko a me a re, ga se a sepe?”" 
Job25:1 Ga fetola Biletate wa Sua a re: 
Job25:2 “Puso le theregiso ke tsa ona o o dirang kagiso mo mafelong a a kwa godimodimo a ona. 
Job25:3 A masomo a ona a ka balwa? Ke mang yo lesedi la ona le sa mo tlhabeleng? 
Job25:4 Motho o ka nna jang mosiami fa pele ga Modimo? Yo o tsetsweng ke mosadi o ka nna phepa jang? 
Job25:5 Bonang, le fa e le ngwedi ga o phatsime le dinaledi ga di a itsheka mo matlhong a ona!" 
Job25:6 Jaanong fa e le motho yo e leng seboko fela le morwa motho yo e leng sebokwana fela – ene o tlhaela jang mo tshiamong?” 
Job26:1 Ke fa Jobe a fetola a re: 
Job26:2 “Yo o tlhokang thata, o mo thusitse jang ne! Letsogo le le sa tiang, o le namoletse pila jang!" 
Job26:3 Yo o se nang botlhale, ruri o mo gakolotse! Kana o ntshitse tse di tlhalefisang di le dintsi!" 
Job26:4 Mafoko a gago o a boleletse mang? Ke mowa wa ga mang o ò neng ò bua ka ona? 
Job26:5 Baswi ba roroma kwa tlase ga metsi le tse di agileng mo go ona. 
Job26:6 Felo ga baswi ga go a bipega fa pele ga ona; molete wa tatlhego ga o na sekhurumelo. 
Job26:7 Ona o tsharolola bokone godimo ga lolea; o lepeletsa lefatshe mo go se nang sepe. 
Job26:8 O phuthela metsi mo marung a ona, mme ga go leru lepe le le phanngwang ke metsi." 
Job26:9 Ponalo ya sedulo sa ona sa bogosi o a e sira, o ala leru la ona mo go yona." 
Job26:10 O rala molelwane mo godimo ga metsi go fitlha kwa mafelelong a lesedi fa le amanang le lefifi teng. 
Job26:11 Maotwana a legodimo a a reketla, a ba rerege ka kgalemelo ya ona." 
Job26:12 O hudua lewatle ka thata ya ona; o remaganya kgogela ka tlhaloganyo ya ona. 
Job26:13 Go sedifetse kwa legodimong ka phefo ya ona; seatla sa ona se phololetsa noga e e lobelo. 
Job26:14 Bonang, tseo ke makhutlo a ditsela tsa ona fela. Tse re di utlwang ka ga ona ke tsa go sebasebelwa fela, mme modumo wa thata ya ona ke mang yo o ka o tlhaloganyang?”" 
Job27:1 Jobe a tswelela pele, a ntsha diane tsa gagwe a re:" 
Job27:2 “Ka bophelo jwa Modimo o o nkamogileng tshwanelo ya me! Le ka Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe yo o njesitseng tse di galakang! 
Job27:3 Ruri, fa bophelo jwa me bo sa ntse bo itekanetse mo go nna, fa mowa wa Modimo o le mo dinkong tsa me" 
Job27:4 molomo wa me ga o kitla o bua tsa tshiamololo; loleme lwa me ga lo kitla lo bolela tsa tsietso. 
Job27:5 A go nne kgakala le nna go ka dumela gore lona lo mo nneteng; ke tla swa ke ise ke ipone molato. 
Job27:6 Ke itshwarelela mo tshiamong ya me, ga nkitla ke e lesa; pelo ya me ga e nkgalemele ka letsatsi lepe la me." 
Job27:7 Mmaba wa me o tshwanetse go nna jaaka moikepi; yo o ntsogelang o tshwanetse go nna jaaka mosiamolodi. 
Job27:8 Gonne moikepi o solofela eng, fa Modimo o kgaola le go tlosa mowa wa gagwe?" 
Job27:9 A Modimo o tla utlwa go goa ga gagwe, fa tlalelo e mo wela?" 
Job27:10 A ene o ka itumelela Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe? A o ka tlhaeletsa Modimo ka metlha yotlhe? 
Job27:11 Ke tla lo ruta ka ga letsogo la Modimo; tse di mo go Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe ga nkitla ke di loba. 
Job27:12 Bonang, lona lotlhe lo di bonye ka nosi. Jaanong ke eng fa lo bua dipuo tsa boithamako fela?" 
Job27:13 Kabelo ya motho wa moikepi mo Modimong ke e; boswa jwa morena yo o pelompe jo o tla bo amogelang mo go Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe ke bo: 
Job27:14 Fa bana ba gagwe ba ata, ba atela tšhaka fela bana ba bana ba gagwe ga ba kitla ba kgora bogobe." 
Job27:15 Masalela a gagwe a tla fitlhwa ke leroborobo; batlholagadi ba motse wa gagwe ga ba kitla ba a lelela. 
Job27:16 Le fa a kgobokanya selefera jaaka lerole, a itshegela diaparo tse dintsi jaaka motlhaba," 
Job27:17 o tla di itshegela, mme di tla aparwa ke mosiami; yo o se nang molato o tla abelwa selefera." 
Job27:18 O agile ntlo ya gagwe jaaka segokgo le jaaka mokgoro o o dirwang ke modisa. 
Job27:19 O ya go robala a humile, mme a se ke a boelele gape: E re a budulola matlho, a fitlhele a se na sepe." 
Job27:20 Ditherego di mo wela jaaka morwalela; ledimo le mo tsaya bosigo. 
Job27:21 Phefo ya botlhabatsatsi e mo kuke, a tloge; e mo gogole mo felong ga gagwe." 
Job27:22 Modimo o mo konopa o sa rekegele; o ntse a tshaba seatla sa ona. 
Job27:23 Batho ba tla mo opela diatla; ba mo leletsa molodi, fa a tswa mo felong ga gagwe." 
Job28:1 “Kana go na le felo kwa selefera e bonwang teng; gouta e na le felo fa e tlhatswiwang gona. 
Job28:2 Tshipi e ntshiwa mo mmung; kgotlho e gakolosiwa e tswa mo mafikeng. 
Job28:3 Batho ba fedisa lefifi, mo ntlheng tsotlhe ba fukutsa mafika a a mo bontshong le mo lefifing le legolo." 
Job28:4 Ba epa moepo, ba tloga mo go ba ba agileng mo lefatsheng; ba lebalwa ba le kgakala le kwa dinao di gatang teng, ba lepeletse ba le kgakala le batho, ba akgaakgegela kwa le kwa." 
Job28:5 Lefatshe le dijo di tswang mo go lone ka kwa tlase ga lone go epololwa ka molelo. 
Job28:6 Matlapa a lone ke lone legae la safire; le dithole tsa gouta di teng gona moo. 
Job28:7 Lenong ga le itse tselana ya teng; leitlho la segodi ga le a e bona. 
Job28:8 Dibata tse di kokorogang ga di ise di e gate; le tau ga e ise e tsamae mo go yona. 
Job28:9 Mme motho o isa seatla kwa mafikeng a legakwa; a epolola dithaba ka kwa meding. 
Job28:10 O phunya ditsela mo teng ga mafika; leitlho la gagwe le bona tse di tlhwatlhwa e kgolo tsa mefutafuta. 
Job28:11 O thiba dikelelo tsa metsi kwa tlase gore di se ka tsa rotha; tse di fitlhegileng o di ntshetsa kwa leseding. 
Job28:12 Mme botlhale jona bo bonwa kae? Felo ga tlhaloganyo ke kwa kae? 
Job28:13 Motho ga a itse tlhwatlhwa ya jona; ga bo bonwe mo lefatsheng la ba ba phelang. 
Job28:14 Bodiba bo a re: ‘Ga bo yo mo go nna!’ Lewatle le a re: ‘Ga ke na najo!’ 
Job28:15 Ga bo rekwe ka gouta e e itshekileng; ga bo lekanyediwe selefera go nna tlhwatlhwa ya jona. 
Job28:16 Gouta ya Ofire le yona ga e bo lekane, le fa e le šohama e e tlhwatlhwa e kgolo gongwe safire." 
Job28:17 Gouta le galase ga di tshwane najo; ga bo ananngwe ka dijana tsa gouta. 
Job28:18 Dikorala le legakwa ga di umakiwe; go nna botlhale go gaisa ditalama. 
Job28:19 Le topase ya Ethiopia ga e tshwane najo; gouta e ntlentle ga e bo lekane. 
Job28:20 Jaanong ge, bo tswa kae botlhale? Tlhaloganyo e agile kae?" 
Job28:21 Bo fitlhegetse matlho a tsotlhe tse di phelang; le dinonyane tsa loapi bo di subegetse. 
Job28:22 Felo ga tatlhego le loso tsa re: ‘Re utlwile magatwe a jona fela ka ditsebe tsa rona.’ 
Job28:23 Tsela e e yang kwa go jona Modimo o e lemogile; ona o itse felo ga jona. 
Job28:24 Gonne o bona go fitlha kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe; o leba tsotlhe tse di fa tlase ga legodimo. 
Job28:25 E rile o direla phefo thata, o lekanya metsi ka seelo;" 
Job28:26 ya re o baya molao wa pula, o direla logadima tsela:" 
Job28:27 wa bo bona, wa bo rulaganya, wa bo emisa, wa bo tlhotlhomisa." 
Job28:28 Mme wa raya motho wa re: ‘Bona, go boifa Morena ke botlhale le go tlogela bosula ke tlhaloganyo.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Jobe a tswelela pele, a ntsha diane tsa gagwe a re:" 
Job29:2 “Ao! E kete nka bo ke ntse jaaka mo kgweding tsa pele! Jaaka ka malatsi ale fa Modimo o ne o ntse o ntisitse! 
Job29:3 Fa lobone lwa ona lo okame tlhogo ya me; ka ralala lefifi ke le mo leseding la ona. 
Job29:4 Nka bo ke ntse jaaka ke ne ke le mo malatsing a nonofo ya me; fa tsalano ya Modimo e okame lapa la me 
Job29:5 fa Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe a sa ntse a na le nna fa bana ba me ba ne ba ntikanyeditse 
Job29:6 fa dinao tsa me ke di tshasa ka lobebe, fa lekgwarana le ntswelela dinokana tsa lookwane." 
Job29:7 E ne ya re fa ke tswela kwa kgorong ya motse, ke baakanya senno sa me mo dipatlelong," 
Job29:8 basimane ba iphitlhe, fa ba mpona; banna ba bagolo ba nanoge ba eme ka dinao," 
Job29:9 dikgosana di khutle go bua, di itshware melomo;" 
Job29:10 mantswe a ba ba tlotlegang a didimale, diteme tsa bone di kgomarele magalapa." 
Job29:11 Ya re fa tsebe e nkutlwa, e ntshegofatse; e re fa leitlho le mpona, le supe ka ga me," 
Job29:12 fa ke ne ke pholosa mmogisegi yo o goelang dithuso le lesiela le yo o se nang mothusi. 
Job29:13 Ka bona tshegofatso ka yo o latlhegileng ka thabisa pelo ya motlholagadi. 
Job29:14 Ka apara tshiamo; tiro tse di siameng tsa me tsa nkapesa jaaka kobo le serwalo. 
Job29:15 Ke ne ke le matlho a sefofu le maoto a segole. 
Job29:16 Ke ne ke le rra-bahumanegi; ka lotolotsa kgang ya tsheko ya yo ke sa mo itseng. 
Job29:17 Mosiamolodi ka mo roba metlhagare; ka phamola thopo mo menong a gagwe. 
Job29:18 Ka re: ‘Ke tla swa le sentlhaga sa me, ke ntsifatsa malatsi jaaka motlhaba.’" 
Job29:19 Ka re: ‘Modi wa me o nametse kwa metsing; go lala monyo mo dikaleng tsa me.’ 
Job29:20 Ka re: ‘Tlotlo ya me e ntse e le e ntšhwa mo go nna; bora jwa me bo ntšhwafala mo seatleng sa me.’ 
Job29:21 Ba ne ba tle ba ntheetse ba ntebelele; kgakololo ba e utlwe ka go didimala. 
Job29:22 Ya re fa ke sena go bua, ba se ke ba bue; mafoko a me a ne a rothegela mo go bone." 
Job29:23 Ba ne ba tle ba ntebelele jaaka go lebelelwa pula; ba bule melomo jaaka e kete ba kgalegetse tlhakola-modula. 
Job29:24 Ke ne ke tle ke tshege nabo ka tsalano, fa ba solofologile; ba ne ba sa itse go fifatsa lesedi la sefatlhego sa me." 
Job29:25 Ka itumela go ya kwa go bone, ka nna nabo ke le tlhogo, ka dula jaaka kgosi mo gare ga batlhabani, ke le yo o gomotsang ba ba pelo-di-botlhoko." 
Job30:1 “Mme kajeno ke tshegwa ke ba e leng ba bašwa mo go nna; bao borraabo ke neng ke nyatsa go ba kopanya le dintšwa tsa letsomane la me. 
Job30:2 Le gona thata ya diatla tsa bone e ne e ka nthusa eng, ka ba ne ba senyegetswe ke thata ya bonna jwa bona?" 
Job30:3 Ba fedisitswe ka go tlhoka le ka tlala; maabane ba ne ba phura mo nageng e e omeletseng ya sekaka. 
Job30:4 Ba tle ba kgetle morogo o o letswai mo ditlhatshaneng; modi wa motlopi ke dijo tsa bone. 
Job30:5 Ba lelekwe mo gare ga batho, ba tlhabelwe mokgosi jaaka legodu." 
Job30:6 Ba na le go nna mo megorogorong e e boitshegang le mo meoleng ya lefatshe le mo dikgageng. 
Job30:7 Ba kue ba le mo gare ga ditlhatshana, ba kgobokane fa tlase ga bogopa." 
Job30:8 Ke losika lwa masilo a a nyatsegang a a kobilweng mo lefatsheng ka seme. 
Job30:9 Mme kajeno ke sotlwa ke bone bao, ba opela ka nna, ba buabua ka nna." 
Job30:10 Ba katogana le nna, ke maila mo go bone; ga ba tshabe go nkgwela mathe mo sefatlhegong." 
Job30:11 Gonne Modimo o repisitse mosifa wa me wa nkokobetsa; ka moo ba itshola bobe fa pele ga me. 
Job30:12 Banyatsegi ba ntsogela mo ntlheng ya le le jang, ba nkgopisa maoto, ba kata ditsela tsa bone tsa go tla kwa go nna le go ntshenya." 
Job30:13 Ba sentse tsela ya me, ba thusa go ntiga. Ga ba thibelwe ke ope." 
Job30:14 Ba tsena jaaka baba ka phatlha e e atlhameng ya lorako, ba bidikamela pele mo gare ga marope." 
Job30:15 Ditherego di nkwetse, di lelekile tlotlo ya me jaaka phefo; letlhogonolo la me le nyeletse jaaka leru." 
Job30:16 Jaanong ke nnetse go lela; malatsi a pogisego a ntshwere. 
Job30:17 Ke fetlhwa marapo otlhe bosigo; matlhoko a a jang mo go nna ga a didimale. 
Job30:18 Seaparo sa me se fetogile ka thata e kgolo ya matlhoko; se a mpeta jaaka thamo ya hempe ya me. 
Job30:19 Modimo o ntatlhetse mo seretseng; ke tshwana le lerole le molora. 
Job30:20 Ke goela thuso kwa go wena, mme ga o nkutlwe; ke eme fa pele ga gago, mme ga o nkele tlhoko." 
Job30:21 O mphetogetse yo o setlhogo, o lwa le nna ka thata ya diatla tsa gago." 
Job30:22 O ntsholeletsa mo phefong, o e mpalamisa, o ntheekedisa mo modumong wa yona." 
Job30:23 Ee, ke a itse gore o nkisa losong kwa ntlong ele kwa go tla kgobokanang botlhe ba ba phelang." 
Job30:24 Fela fa ntlo e wela motho, a ga a kitla a ntsha letsogo? Gongwe fa a latlhega, a ga a kitla a goela thuso?" 
Job30:25 Kampo a ga ke a lelela yo o bonyeng malatsi a a makete? A ga ke a utlwela bahumanegi botlhoko? 
Job30:26 Gonne ke ne ke solofetse tse di molemo, ga tla tse di bosula; ke ne ke lebeletse lesedi, ga tla lefifi." 
Job30:27 Ka mo teng ga me go a bela, ga go khutle; malatsi a tlalelo a tlile mo go nna." 
Job30:28 Ke sepela ke hutsafetse, ke se na lesedi; ke nanoga mo phuthegong ke goela thuso." 
Job30:29 Ke fetogile morwa-rraatso-diphokojwe le selekane sa bontšhwe. 
Job30:30 Letlalo la me le tloga mo go nna le ntshofetse; marapo a me a fisiwa ke mogote. 
Job30:31 Sefela sa me se fetogile khutsafalo; melodi ya lotlhaka lwa me e fetogile selelo sa ba ba lelang. 
Job31:1 “Matlho a me ke ne ke utlwanye nao gore a se ka a leba lekgarebe. 
Job31:2 Fa nka bo ke dirile jalo, kabelo ya Modimo e e tswang kwa godimo e ka bo e le efe? Boswa jwa Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe jo bo tswang legodimong e ka nna bofe?" 
Job31:3 A ga se tatlhego ya mosiamolodi le go tlhoka tlhogonolo ga baleofi? 
Job31:4 A ga se ene yo o bonang ditsela tsa me, yo o balang dikgato tsa me tsotlhe?" 
Job31:5 Fa ke dirile ka bolotsana, fa dinao tsa me di akofetse go tsietsa" 
Job31:6 foo a Modimo o ntekanye mo selekanyetsong se se siameng gore o itse bosenamolato jwa me! 
Job31:7 Fa dikgato tsa me di fapogile mo tseleng, fa pelo ya me e setse keletso ya matlho a me morago, fa sebala se kgomaretse diatla tsa me," 
Job31:8 foo a ke jwale, mme go je yo mongwe; tse di ntlhogelang mo tshimong a di kumowe!" 
Job31:9 Fa pelo ya me e raelesegile ka mosadi, fa ke laletse mojako wa mongwe-ka-nna," 
Job31:10 foo a mosadi wa me a silele monna yo mongwe! A ba bangwe ba nne nae! 
Job31:11 Gonne go dira jalo ke tshenyo e e nyatsegang; ke molato o o tshwanetseng petso ya baatlhodi. 
Job31:12 Ee, ke molelo o o nyeletsang go fitlha kwa felong ga tatlhego o o fisang mahumo a me otlhe." 
Job31:13 Fa ke nyaditse tshiamelo ya motlhanka wa me le ya lelata la me mogang ba sekang le nna," 
Job31:14 foo ke tla dira eng, fa Modimo o ka tsoga? Nka fetola ka reng, fa o nkotla?" 
Job31:15 A ga ke re, yo o ntirileng mo popelong, le ene o mo dirile? A ga se Modimo o le mongwe fela o o re bopileng ka bobedi jwa rona?" 
Job31:16 Fa ke ganne ka se se kopiwang ke ba babotlana, fa ke swabisitse matlho a motlholagadi," 
Job31:17 gongwe fa ke jele thathana ya me ke le nosi, mme ke se ka ka nathela lesiela –" 
Job31:18 kana go tloga bonyaneng jwa me le goletse mo go nna ke le rraalo; go tloga botsalong ke ne ke le mogogi wa motlholagadi! 
Job31:19 Fa ke bonye motho a latlhega ka go tlhoka diaparo le mohumanegi yo o se nang kobo; 
Job31:20 fa dirope tsa gagwe di sa nteboga, fa a sa ikomosa ka boboa jwa dinku tsa me" 
Job31:21 fa ke tsholeleditse lesiela letsogo go le otla, ka ke bona ba ba nkemelang kwa lekgotleng;" 
Job31:22 foo a legetla la me le kgaoge mo thamong! A letsogo la me le robege le tlosiwe mo mmeleng! 
Job31:23 Gonne go boifa Modimo go ne go nthibela; ke ne ke sa kgone go dira jalo ka ntlha ya bogolo jwa ona. 
Job31:24 Fa ke ikantse gouta, fa ke reile gouta e e itshekileng ka re: ‘Ke wena ke ikaegang ka wena;’" 
Job31:25 fa ke itumeletse khumo ya me e kgolo le papalo e kgolo ya seatla sa me," 
Job31:26 fa ke bonye lesedi la letsatsi le phatsima gongwe ngwedi o o tsamayang o le montle 
Job31:27 fa pelo ya me e itsieditse mo sephiring, fa molomo wa me o atlile seatla sa me e le go di tlotla jaaka medimo:" 
Job31:28 le go dira jalo ke molato o o atlholelwang petso gonne nka bo ke itatotse Modimo o o kwa legodimong. 
Job31:29 Fa ke itumeletse tatlhego ya yo o ntlhoileng fa ke ne ke duduetsa, fa bosula bo mo wela –" 
Job31:30 mme ga ke a leofisa magalapa a me; ga ke a mo kopela loso ka go mo hutsa! 
Job31:31 Ruri, ba lapa la me ba buile ba re: ‘Ke ofe yo o se kang a kgora nama tsa gagwe?’" 
Job31:32 Moeng ga a ise a ke a lale kwa ntle; ka bulela moeti ditswalo tsa me. 
Job31:33 Fa ke lobile dibe tsa me jaaka batho, fa ke fitlhile molato wa me mo teng ga me," 
Job31:34 ka ke ne ke boifa bontsi jo bogolo, ka nyatso ya ditshika tsa ga etsho e ntshosa, fa ke ne ke didimala, ke sa tswele kwa ntle ga ntlo – foo a Modimo o nkotle!" 
Job31:35 Ao! Nka bo ke na le yo o nkutlwang! Go ikwala ga me ke moo. A Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe a nkarabe! Nka bo ke tshotse lokwalo lo moganetsi wa me o lo kwadileng! 
Job31:36 Ruri, ke ne ke tla lo sikara ka legetla la me, ke lo ithathelela mo tlhogong jaaka serwalo." 
Job31:37 Nka bo ke mo ikarabela dikgato tsa me, ke mo atamela jaaka kgosana." 
Job31:38 Fa tshimo ya me e goa ka ga me, fa mesele ya yona e lela mmogo;" 
Job31:39 fa ke jele dijo tsa yona ke sa e reka, fa ke bolaile beng ba yona," 
Job31:40 foo a go tlhoge mitlwa boemong jwa mabele le mefero boemong jwa mmopo!” Mafoko a ga Jobe a felela fa. 
Job32:1 Jaanong banna ba bararo bao ba khutla go fetola Jobe; gonne o ne a ikaya yo o siameng. 
Job32:2 Ke fa go galefa Elihu morwa Baragele wa kwa Busi wa losika lwa ga Rame; a tukela Jobe bogale ka a itshiamisa fa pele ga Modimo. 
Job32:3 Le gona a galefela ditsala tse tharo tsa gagwe, ka gonne ba palelwa ke go fetola Jobe, mme ba mmona molato fela." 
Job32:4 Ene Elihu o ne a iketlile bone ba ntse ba bua le Jobe; gonne ba ne ba le bagolo mo go ene, ba mo feta ka dinyaga." 
Job32:5 Jaanong e rile Elihu a bona, fa go se na karabo mo melomong ya banna ba bararo bao, a tuka bogale." 
Job32:6 Elihu morwa Baragele wa kwa Busi a fetola a re: “Nna ke sa le mošwa, lona lo ba bagolo lo mpheta ka dinyaga; ka moo ke ne ke itshwere, ka boifa go lo bolelela tse ke di itseng." 
Job32:7 Ka re: ‘A go bolele banna bagolo ba ba nang le malatsi! A ba bontsi jwa dinyaga ba itsise botlhale!’ 
Job32:8 Fela ke mowa o o mo bathong, ke Mowa wa Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe o o ba tlhalefisang." 
Job32:9 Ba bagolo ga se bone ba ba botlhale; ba ba tsofetseng ga ba tlhaloganye tse di siameng. 
Job32:10 Ke ka moo ke reng: Ntheetseng! Le nna ke bolele se ke se itseng. 
Job32:11 Bonang, ke emetse mafoko a lona, ka utlwelela dipuo tse di botlhale tsa lona, go fitlhelela lo bone mafoko a a siameng;" 
Job32:12 ka nna ka lo ela tlhoko, ka fitlhela go se na yo o fenyang Jobe; go se na ope mo go lona yo o fetolang mafoko a gagwe." 
Job32:13 Lo se ka lwa re: ‘Re fitlhetse botlhale mo go ene! Modimo o tla mo kgona, e seng motho.’" 
Job32:14 Ga a ka a bolela mafoko go lwa le nna; le gona ga nka ke ka mo fetola jaaka go buile lona. 
Job32:15 Ba nyemile moko; ga ba tlhole ba araba. Ba feletswe ke mafoko. 
Job32:16 A nka leta, fa ba sa bue ba eme fela, ba sa tlhole ba araba?" 
Job32:17 Nnyaya! Le nna ke tla araba tse ke di abetsweng; le nna ke tla bolela tse ke di itseng. 
Job32:18 Gonne ke tletse mafoko; mowa o o mo teng ga me o a ntlhotlheletsa. 
Job32:19 Bonang, mafatlha a me a tshwana le weine e e belang e e sa thibololwang; a phanyega jaaka makuka a mašwa." 
Job32:20 Ke na le go bua, gore ke hupologe mowa. Ke na le go bula molomo le go araba." 
Job32:21 Ga nka ke ka goga le ope le e seng go kgatlha motho ka loleme. 
Job32:22 Gonne ga ke itse go kgatlha motho ka loleme; Modiri wa me o ne a ka ntlosa ka bonako. 
Job33:1 “Mme wena Jobe, a ko o utlwe dipuo tsa me; mafoko a me otlhe o a sekegele tsebe!" 
Job33:2 A ko o bone, ke butse molomo; go bua loleme lwa me mo magalapeng." 
Job33:3 Mafoko a me ke a boammaaruri jwa pelo; molomo wa me o tla bua kitso e e phepa. 
Job33:4 Mowa wa Modimo o ntirile; Mowa wa Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe o a mphedisa. 
Job33:5 Fa o ka kgona, o mphetole; ipaakanye o eme fa pele ga me!" 
Job33:6 Bona, ke tshwana le wena fa pele ga Modimo: Le nna ke ngathilwe mo letsopeng." 
Job33:7 Bona, a go mpoifa go se ka ga go tshabisa; ga nkitla ke go imela ka kgatelelo ya me." 
Job33:8 Fela o buile mo ditsebeng tsa me, ka utlwa lentswe le le buang mafoko le re:" 
Job33:9 ‘Ke itshekile, ga ke na boleo; ke nna yo o phepa, ga ke na molato." 
Job33:10 Bonang, Modimo o bonye mabaka a go lwa le nna; o nkaya mmaba wa ona." 
Job33:11 Dinao tsa me o di bofeletse mo dikoteng; o tlhokometse ditsela tsa me tsotlhe.’ 
Job33:12 Bona, ke a go fetola: Gona fao ga o mo nneteng, gonne Modimo o mogolo bogolo go motho." 
Job33:13 Ke ka ntlha ya eng fa ò o lwantsha ò re: ‘Ga o arabe lefoko lepe la me.’ 
Job33:14 Gonne Modimo o bua gangwe le gape, mme motho ga a ele tlhoko:" 
Job33:15 O bua ka toro, ka pono bosigo, fa batho ba le borokong, fa ba robetse mo malaong." 
Job33:16 Foo o thibolola batho ditsebe, o ba tlhagisa ka go ba tshosa," 
Job33:17 gore o tlogedise motho ditiro tse di bosula, o latlhise monna boikgodiso;" 
Job33:18 gore o boloke mowa wa gagwe, a se ka a ya lebitleng, le bophelo jwa gagwe gore bo se ka jwa nyelela ka lerumo." 
Job33:19 Le gona o a tle a otlwe ka botlhoko mo bolaong jwa gagwe le ka ntwa e e sa feleng mo marapong a gagwe. 
Job33:20 Bophelo jwa gagwe bo mo tentshe bogobe; mowa wa gagwe o tenwe ke dijo tse di monate. 
Job33:21 Nama ya gagwe e ote e sa tlhole e bonwa; go bonale marapo a gagwe a a neng a bipegile. 
Job33:22 Mowa wa gagwe o atamele lebitla, bophelo jwa gagwe bo atamele ba ba tlisang loso." 
Job33:23 Jaanong fa go na le moengele fa go ene, motsereganyi a le mongwe wa ba le sekete, gore a itsise motho tshwanelo ya gagwe," 
Job33:24 foo o tla mo tlhomogela pelo a re: ‘Mo golole a se ka a tsena mo lebitleng! Ke bonye serekololo sa bophelo jwa gagwe.’ 
Job33:25 Foo nama ya gagwe e tla ntšhwafala, e tlala thata e ntšhwa; o tla boela malatsing a bošwa jwa gagwe." 
Job33:26 Fa a rapela Modimo, ona o tla mo itumelela, o mo lebisa sefatlhego sa ona ka tuduetso, o busetsa motho tshiamo ya gagwe." 
Job33:27 Ene o tla opelela batho a re: ‘Ke ne ke leofile, ka sokamisa tse di siameng, mme Modimo ga o a nkotla ka fa go ntebanyeng." 
Job33:28 O nthekolotse gore ke se ka ka tsena mo lebitleng; bophelo jwa me bo ka itumelela lesedi.’ 
Job33:29 Bonang, Modimo o direla motho tsotlhe tseo gabedi le gararo," 
Job33:30 e le go mo thibela go ya lebitleng gore a sedimosediwe ka lesedi la bophelo. 
Job33:31 Ela tlhoko, Jobe, o nkutlwelele! Didimala, ke tla bua!" 
Job33:32 Fa o na le mafoko, mphetole! Bua, gonne nka itumela, fa o le mo nneteng." 
Job33:33 Fa o se na phetolo, ntheetse! Didimala, mme ke tla go ruta botlhale.”" 
Job34:1 Elihu a simolola gape go bua a re: 
Job34:2 “Utlwang mafoko a me, lona batlhalefi! Ntshekegeleng ditsebe ba lo nang le kitso!" 
Job34:3 Gonne tsebe e tlhatlhoba mafoko jaaka magalapa a utlwa dijo. 
Job34:4 A re itlhopheleng tse di siameng, re gakololane tse di molemo." 
Job34:5 Gonne Jobe a re: ‘Ke siame, mme Modimo o nkamogile tse di ntshwanetseng." 
Job34:6 Le fa ke siame, ke tshwanetse go nna moaki. Ntho ya me ya motsu ke e e sa foleng, le fa ke se na molato.’" 
Job34:7 Monna yo o tshwanang le Jobe o kae yo o nwang dikgalo jaaka metsi," 
Job34:8 yo o tsalanang le badiradibe, a goga le banna ba boikepo?" 
Job34:9 Gonne o rile: ‘Ga go thuse motho sepe, fa a rata Modimo.’" 
Job34:10 Ka moo, ntheetseng, lona banna ba botlhale! Modimo o kgakala le bokgopo; Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe o kgakala le tshiamololo." 
Job34:11 Nnyaya, o tla duela motho ka fa tirong ya gagwe; o tla dirafaletsa mongwe le mongwe tse di lebanyeng tsamao ya gagwe."
