Job34:12 Nnyaya, ruri, Modimo ga o dire tshiamololo. Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe ga a sokamise tshiamo." 
Job34:13 Ke mang yo o mo neetseng go laola lefatshe; le tikologo yotlhe ya lone, ke mang yo o e theileng?" 
Job34:14 Fa Modimo o ka itlhokomela fela, fa o ka busetsa Mowa wa ona le pudulo ya ona kwa go ona," 
Job34:15 foo nama yotlhe e tla swa ka nako e le nngwe fela; motho o tla boela leroleng. 
Job34:16 Fa o na le tlhaloganyo, nkutlwelele, o sekegele lentswe la mafoko a me tsebe." 
Job34:17 Kana yo o tlhoileng tshiamo o ka busa jang? Gongwe yo o tshiamo le thata, a wena o ka mmona molato?" 
Job34:18 Ene yo o ka rayang kgosi a re: ‘Ga o wa sepe,’ le dikgosana a re: ‘Lo baikepi!’" 
Job34:19 Ene yo o sa gobeleleleng batlotlegi, yo o sa tlhokomeleng mohumi bogolo go yo e leng motho fela; gonne bone botlhe ke tiro ya diatla tsa gagwe." 
Job34:20 Ba swa ka tshoganyetso gare ga bosigo; morafe o rerege o nyelele; yo o thata a tlosiwe e se ka seatla. 
Job34:21 Gonne matlho a ona a lebile ditsela tsa motho; o bona dikgato tsotlhe tsa gagwe. 
Job34:22 Ga go na lefifi le e seng bontsho jo bo kwenneng kwa badiradibe ba ka iphitlhang teng. 
Job34:23 Gonne Modimo ga o tlhole o sekaseka molato wa motho, fa a ya kwa go ona mo tshekong." 
Job34:24 O pšhwetlakanya ba ba thata kwa ntle ga tsheko; o emisa ba bangwe mo boemong jwa bone. 
Job34:25 Ke ka moo ke reng: O itse ditiro tsa bone; o ba ribegetsa bosigo, mme ba silakanngwe." 
Job34:26 Ka e le baikepi o ba otla mo felong fa go bonang botlhe. 
Job34:27 Ke ka gonne ba ikepile mo go ona; mme ba se ka ba tlhokomela ditsela dipe tsa ona; 
Job34:28 e le go fitlhisa selelo sa yo mmotlana kwa go ona gore ona o utlwe go goa ga ba ba bogisegang. 
Job34:29 Jaanong fa ona o ikhutsisa batho, ke mang yo o ka o bonang molato? Fa o fitlha sefatlhego, ke mang yo o ka o bonang? Gonne o okametse setšhaba le batho botlhe" 
Job34:30 gore go se ka ga busa motho yo o pelompe yo o isang morafe mo tatlhegong. 
Job34:31 Jaanong fa motho a ka raya Modimo a re: ‘Ke ikgodisitse, ga nkitla ke senya gape;" 
Job34:32 ke bona jalo, nthute; fa ke dirile ka tshiamololo ke tla baka.’" 
Job34:33 A ò a re, ona o busolose ka fa go ratang wena? Kana o nyaditse ditsela tsa ona. Ke wena o tshwanetseng go bolela tse di phalang tsa ona, e seng nna. Bolela tse o di itseng!" 
Job34:34 Banna ba ba nang le tlhaloganyo le batlhalefi ba ba ntheetsang ba tla nthaya ba re: 
Job34:35 ‘Jobe o buile a se na kitso; mafoko a gagwe ga a na botlhale.’ 
Job34:36 Ao! A Jobe a nne a lekwe go ya go ile ka a fetola jaaka batho ba ba bosula. 
Job34:37 Gonne o oketsa boleo jwa gagwe ka boikepo, o sotla mo gare ga rona; o ntsifatsa mafoko a gagwe a a ganetsang Modimo.”" 
Job35:1 Elihu a simolola gape go bua a re: 
Job35:2 “A ò se kaya se se siameng, a ò a re ke tshiamo ya gago fa pele ga Modimo" 
Job35:3 fa ò re: ‘Go nthusa eng, go ntirela eng, fa ke sa leofe?’" 
Job35:4 Nna ke tla go fetola ka mafoko le ditsala tsa gago nao. 
Job35:5 Lelala kwa legodimong o bone; leba maru a a kwa godimo ga gago! 
Job35:6 Fa ò leofa, ona ò ka o senyetsa eng? Fa maleo a gago a le mantsi, ona ò ka o direla bosula bofe?" 
Job35:7 Fa ò siame, ò o naya eng? Gongwe Modimo o tla amogela eng mo seatleng sa gago?" 
Job35:8 Boikepo jwa gago bo senyetsa motho ka wena; tshiamo ya gago e thusa mongwe-ka-wena. 
Job35:9 Batho ba lela ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa dikgatelelo; ba goela thuso ka ntlha ya mabogo a ba ba thata. 
Job35:10 Mme ga ba botse go re: ‘Modimo, Mmopi wa rona o kae o o nayang batho difela tsa tebogo bosigo," 
Job35:11 o o re rutang bogolo go diphologolo tsa lefatshe, o o re tlhalefisang bogolo go dinonyane tsa loapi?’" 
Job35:12 Se bao, ba goela thuso, mme ga o ba utlwe ka ntlha ya boikgantsho jwa bone ba ba bosula." 
Job35:13 Ruri, Modimo ga o utlwe dilelo tsa boithamako; Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe ga a di ele tlhoko." 
Job35:14 Bogolo jang, fa ò re: ‘Ga ò o bone! Kgang e fa pele ga ona, o lete.’" 
Job35:15 Mme jaanong e re ka bogale jwa ona bo sa otle, ka o sa tlhokomele thata tse di boatla," 
Job35:16 Jobe o tumolola molomo go bua tsa boithamako; o bua tse dintsi a se na kitso.” 
Job36:1 Elihu a tswelela pele a re: 
Job36:2 “Iketle go le gonnye, ke tla go ruta; gonne mafoko a sa ntse a le teng a go emela Modimo." 
Job36:3 Kitso ya me ke rata go e tsaya kwa kgakala le go supa gore Mmopi wa me ke yo o mo nneteng. 
Job36:4 Gonne ruri, mafoko a me ga se a maaka; monna wa kitso e e tletseng o bua nao." 
Job36:5 Bona, Modimo o mogolo, mme ga o tlhokomologe sepe; ke ona senatla ka thata le ka tlhaloganyo." 
Job36:6 Ga o boloke maphelo a baikepi, mme o siamisetsa ba ba bogisegang." 
Job36:7 Ga o fapose matlho a ona mo basiaming, mme o ba nnisa le dikgosi mo ditulong tsa tsona ka metlha; ba godisiwa jalo." 
Job36:8 Mme fa ba bofilwe ka dikeetane, fa ba tshwerwe ka dikgole tsa matlhoko," 
Job36:9 foo o ba supetsa ditiro tsa bone le maleo a bone, fa ba ne ba ikgodisa," 
Job36:10 foo o bulela kgalemelo ditsebe tsa bone, o ba laola gore ba boe mo boikepong." 
Job36:11 Jaanong fa ba o utlwa le go o ineela, ba tla tlhola malatsi a bone ba le tlhogonolo; ba dika dinyaga tsa bone di le monate." 
Job36:12 Mme fa ba sa utlwe, ba tla nyelela ka lerumo ba tla swa ba se na kitso." 
Job36:13 Ba ba pelo-di-bolotsana ba ngala fela; ga ba goele thuso, fa Modimo o ba golegile." 
Job36:14 Mewa ya bone e tshwanetse go swa ba sa le bašwa; maphelo a bone a na le go fela jaaka a banna ba medimo ya boaka. 
Job36:15 Mme o tla pholosa mmogisegi ka tlalelo ya gagwe; o mo thibolola ditsebe ka pitlaganyo. 
Job36:16 Le wena o go bitsa gore o tswe mo leganong la tlalelo; o go biletsa felong fa go atlhameng, fa go se nang pitlaganyo, le mo monateng wa dijo tse di mafura tsa lojelo lwa gago." 
Job36:17 Mme katlholo e e welang moikepi e go wetse ka botlalo; tshekiso le katlholo di go tshwere. 
Job36:18 A bogale bo se ka jwa go raela go ka kgala Modimo! A bogolo jwa serekololo bo se ka jwa go timetsa! 
Job36:19 A Modimo o ka ruta motho go goela thuso kwa ntle ga tlalelo le kwa ntle ga tsotlhe tse di rapedisang motho thata? 
Job36:20 Se tlhologelelwe bosigo jwa tshekiso, jo bo tlosang merafe mo mannong a yona!" 
Job36:21 Itise, o se fapogele boikepong; gonne o bo rata bogolo go boitshoko." 
Job36:22 Bona, Modimo o itshupa o le mogolo ka thata ya ona. Ke mang yo e leng moruti jaaka ona?" 
Job36:23 Ke mang yo o ka o laelang tsela ya ona; ke mang yo o ka o rayang a re: ‘O dirile tshiamololo’? 
Job36:24 Se lebale go godisa tiro ya ona e batho ba e tumisitseng ka difela. 
Job36:25 Batho botlhe ba e bona ba itumetse; motho o e leba a le kgakala. 
Job36:26 Bona, Modimo o mogolo, mme ga re o itse; palo ya dinyaga tsa ona ga e tlhotlhomisiwe." 
Job36:27 Gonne o atametsa marothodi a metsi, o a rothisa e le pula e e tswang mo mouwaneng wa ona." 
Job36:28 Maru a a e rothisa, a e nesetsa batho ba bantsi." 
Job36:29 Jaanong e ka nna mang yo o ka tlhaloganyang go thiba ga maru le tumo ya boago jwa ona? 
Job36:30 Bonang, o phutholola lesedi la ona mo tikologong ya ona, o khurumetsa mateng a lewatle." 
Job36:31 Ee, o atlhola merafe ka dilo tseo, e bile o e naya letlotlo la dijo ka tsona." 
Job36:32 Ditladi o di tshwere ka diatla, o di romela go lwa le motlhasedi." 
Job36:33 Tumo ya ona e a o bega; ee, le letsomane le supa ka ga yo o tlang." 
Job37:1 “Ee, pelo ya me e tshosiwa ke tseo, e tsiboga mo felong ga yona." 
Job37:2 Utlwang lo reetse loratla lwa lentswe la ona le tumo e e tswang mo molomong wa ona. 
Job37:3 O e utlwatsa fa tlase ga legodimo lotlhe, o bonatsa logadima lwa ona kwa mafelelong a lefatshe." 
Job37:4 Lo latelwa ke go duma ga maru; o dume ka kodu ya borena jwa ona; mme ga o thibele dikgadima, fa kodu ya ona e utlwala." 
Job37:5 Modimo o duma ka kodu ya ona mo go gakgamatsang; o dira tse dikgolo tse re sa di tlhaloganyeng; 
Job37:6 gonne o raya semathana o re: ‘Wela fa fatshe!’ Le pula ya leebana le ya medupe le dipula tsa thata ya ona o di raya o re jalo. 
Job37:7 O hunyetsa diatla tsa batho botlhe mariga gore batho botlhe ba lemoge ditiro tsa ona. 
Job37:8 Foo diphologolo di tsene mo maiphitlhong a tsona, di nne mo marobalelong a tsona." 
Job37:9 Ledimo le tle le tswa mo ntlong ya lone; diphefo tse di phatlalatsang maru di tlise serame. 
Job37:10 Pudulo e e maruru ya Modimo e bope dikgapetla; metsi a a atlhameng a thatafale ka serame. 
Job37:11 O imetsa maru ka metsi, o bo o a phatlalatse, a ntshe dikgadima tsa ona." 
Job37:12 A tsamaisiwa kwa le kwa ka fa taolong ya ona gore a dire ditiro tsotlhe tse o di a laetseng mo tikologong ya lefatshe. 
Job37:13 Fa o a tlisetsa lefatshe la ona, e ka nna kotlo gongwe tshegofatso." 
Job37:14 Wena Jobe, sekegela tseo tsebe; iketle, o tlo o tlhaloganye dikgakgamatso tsa Modimo." 
Job37:15 A o itse ka fa Modimo o di laolang ka teng, fa o gadimisa tladi ya maru a ona?" 
Job37:16 A o tlhaloganya se se tsholeditseng maru le dikgakgamatso tsa yo o kitso e e tletseng? 
Job37:17 Wena yo diaparo tsa gago di nnang bolelo, fa go foka phefo e e bolelo ya borwa mo lefatsheng:" 
Job37:18 A wena o ka tsharolola loapi nao lo lo tiileng jaaka seiponi sa tshipi? 
Job37:19 Re itsise se re ka se buang nao; ga re ka ke ra rulaganya puo epe ka ntlha ya lefifi. 
Job37:20 A ona o ka tewa ga twe: ‘Didimala, ke bue’? Gongwe a motho o kile a re: ‘Ke rata go nyelediwa’?" 
Job37:21 Le gona jalo go a pala go ka leba lesedi la letsatsi, fa le phatsima kwa legodimong, fa phefo e sena go feta le go le anosa." 
Job37:22 Gouta e e phatsimang e tswa kwa bokone, mme kgalalelo e e boitshegang Modimo o mo go yona." 
Job37:23 Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe ga re mmone; o mogolo ka thata, o humile tshiamo; ga a ka ke a sokamisa tshiamo." 
Job37:24 Ka moo batho ba tshwanetse go mmoifa. Ga a re sepe ka botlhe ba ba ikayang matlhale.” 
Job38:1 Ke fa Morena a fetola Jobe a le mo ledimong a re: 
Job38:2 “Ke mang yo o fifatsang maikaelelo a me ka dipolelo tse di se nang kitso? 
Job38:3 A ko o itlame letheka jaaka monna! Ke tla go botsa, o nthute!" 
Job38:4 E rile ke thaya lefatshe, wa bo o le kae? Bolela, fa o na le kitso!" 
Job38:5 Ke mang yo o beileng ditekanyo tsa lone? – Kana o a itse! – Gongwe ke mang yo o neng a gagamatsa mogala o o le anyang mo go lone? 
Job38:6 Metheo ya lone e tsentswe mo go eng? Ke mang yo o beileng lentswe la sekhutlo la lone 
Job38:7 mogang dinaledi tsa masa di duduetsang mmogo, fa baengele botlhe ba tlhaba mokgosi wa boitumelo?" 
Job38:8 Ke mang yo o tswaletseng lewatle ka ditswalo, fa le phašametsega le tswa mo felong ga lone," 
Job38:9 fa ke dira maru diaparo tsa lone le lefifi le lentsho lesela la lone? 
Job38:10 Motlhang ke le beelang molelwane wa lone, fa ke le direla losi le ditswalo," 
Job38:11 ka re: ‘O ka tla go fitlha fano, mme e seng go feta; boikgogomoso jwa dintelo tsa gago bo na le go kokobela fa!’" 
Job38:12 A o setse o kile wa laola moso ka lengwe la malatsi a gago? A o kile wa itsise mahube felo ga ona 
Job38:13 gore a tshware dikhutlo tsa lefatshe, mme baikepi ba tlhotlhorwe mo go lone?" 
Job38:14 Gore le fetoge jaaka mmopa fa tlase ga sekano, mme dilo tsotlhe di bonale sentle, di senoge jaaka seaparo?" 
Job38:15 Gore baikepi ba timiwe lesedi la bone, mme letswele le le tsholetsegileng le robiwe?" 
Job38:16 A o kile wa ya kwa metsweding ya lewatle, wa itsamaela kwa tlasetlase ga madiba a lone?" 
Job38:17 A o kile wa bulelwa dikgoro tsa loso? A o kile wa bona dikgoro tsa lefifi le le kwenneng? 
Job38:18 A o lemogile bophara jwa lefatshe? Bolela, fa o itse tsotlhe tseo!" 
Job38:19 Tsela e kae e e yang kwa lesedi le nnang teng? Le felo ga lefifi go kwa kae? 
Job38:20 Mo o ka di isang kwa teng ga melelwane ya tsona, mo o itseng ditsela tse di yang kwa matlong a tsona." 
Job38:21 Legale o a itse! Kana o tsetswe ka metlha ele; palo ya malatsi a gago e kgolo! 
Job38:22 A o kile wa fitlha kwa polokelong ya semathana? A o kile wa bona polokelo ya sefako 
Job38:23 tse di boloketseng sebaka sa tlalelo le letsatsi la ntwa le la tlhabano? 
Job38:24 Tsela e kae e e yang kwa lesedi le abelwang teng, kwa phefo ya botlhabatsatsi e tsogang teng go ralala lefatshe?" 
Job38:25 Ke mang yo o epileng melapo ya dipula tse dikgolo, a dira tsela ya logadima lwa maru," 
Job38:26 e le go nesa pula mo lefatsheng le le se nang motho, le mo sekakeng kwa go sa nneng batho teng;" 
Job38:27 e le go nosetsa naga e e omileng le e e senya, e le go tlhogisa bojang jo bošwa mo nageng?" 
Job38:28 A pula e na le rraayo? Gongwe marothodi a monyo a tsalwa ke mang? 
Job38:29 Dikgapetla mmaa-tsona ke mang, le kgogotshwane ya legodimo ke mang yo o e belegeng," 
Job38:30 fa metsi a thatafala, a nna jaaka matlapa, fa sefatlhego sa bodiba se nyele dikgapetla?" 
Job38:31 A wena o ka bofaganya Selemela, gongwe a o ka bofolola dithapo tsa Dikolobe?" 
Job38:32 A o ka bolotsa dinaledi ka go latelana ga tsona mo ngwageng? A o ka tsamaisa dinaledi tsa Bere e kgolo le tsa Bere e nnyane? 
Job38:33 A o itse melao ya legodimo? A o le laodisa mo lefatsheng? 
Job38:34 A o ka tsholeletsa lentswe kwa marung gore morwalela wa metsi o go khurumetse? 
Job38:35 A o ka roma dikgadima gore di bolole di go ree di re: ‘Re fano’? 
Job38:36 Ke mang yo o beileng botlhale mo marung? Ke mang yo o neileng dilo tsa loapi tlhaloganyo? 
Job38:37 Ke mang yo o balang maru ka botlhale? Ke mang yo o tshololang makuka a legodimo," 
Job38:38 fa lerole le fetoga seretse, fa makote a ngaparelana?" 
Job38:39 A o tsomela tau e namagadi phologolo gongwe a o kgorisa ditawana," 
Job38:40 fa di ratela marobalo, fa di di lalela mo sekhung?" 
Job38:41 Ke mang yo o baakanyetsang legakabe dijo, fa mamphorwana a lone a lelela Modimong, fa a kgarakgatshega ka go tlhoka dijo?" 
Job39:1 “A o itse sebaka se mefele ya mafika e tsalang ka sona? A o disa ditholo, fa di segwa ke maralalo?" 
Job39:2 A o bala dikgwedi fa di ntse di dusa? A o itse sebaka se di tsalang ka sona? 
Job39:3 Di kudupane di tsale bana ba tsone, di fetse go segwa ke maralalo." 
Job39:4 Bana ba tsone ba tie ba golele mo nageng; ba di tlogele, mme ba se ke ba boele kwa go tsone." 
Job39:5 Yo o rebotseng esele ya nageng ke mang, ke mang yo o bofolotseng dikgole tsa pitse ya nageng" 
Job39:6 e ke dirileng sekaka ntlo ya yona ka dira naga ya dikgalaopa bonno jwa yona? 
Job39:7 E tshega modumo wa motse; ga e utlwe dikgalemelo tsa mokgweetsi. 
Job39:8 E batla mafulo a yona kwa dithabeng, e latelela tsotlhe tse ditala." 
Job39:9 A nare e ka rata go go direla? Gongwe a e ka lala fa segopong sa gago? 
Job39:10 A o ka golega nare ka kgole ya yona gore e leme? Gongwe a e tla ega mekgatsha e go setse morago? 
Job39:11 A o ka e ikanya, ka thata ya yona e le e kgolo? Gongwe a o ka e tlogelela tiro ya gago?" 
Job39:12 A o ikaega ka yona gore e tla busa kotulo ya gago, e e phuthela mo seboaneng sa gago?" 
Job39:13 Diphuka tsa ntšhwe yo monamagadi di a phuphutha. A diphuka le mafofa tsa gagwe di supa lorato? 
Job39:14 Kana o tlogela mae a gagwe fa fatshe, mme a a thuthuse mo leroleng." 
Job39:15 A lebale gore a ka gatakwa ke ditlhako gongwe a ka pšhwetlwa ke diphologolo tsa naga. 
Job39:16 A direle bana ba gagwe ka bopeloethata jaaka e kete ga se ba gagwe. Le fa tiro ya gagwe e le ya lefela, ene ga a kgathale." 
Job39:17 Gonne Modimo o mo timile botlhale; ga o a ka wa mo abela tlhaloganyo. 
Job39:18 Mme e a re a phuphutha ka diphuka, a siane, a tshege pitse le mopalami wa yona." 
Job39:19 A o naya pitse thata? A o apesa thamo ya yona ka moetse? 
Job39:20 A o e matlisa jaaka tsie? Pudulo ya yona e e mabela e a boitshega. 
Job39:21 E tiba ka ditlhako mo molapong e thabile; e bolole ka thata go kgatlhantsha marumo. 
Job39:22 E tshega poifo, mme ga e tshoge; ga e boe go tshaba ditšhaka." 
Job39:23 Mo go yona go tlharakana mokotlopo; go phatsima tšhaka le lerumo. 
Job39:24 E ja naga ka loratla le lebelo; ga e eme, fa lonaka lo lela." 
Job39:25 Ka nako le nako, fa go lela lonaka a re: ‘Ahee!’ Mme e dupelele tlhabano le dikgalemo tsa balaodi le mekgosi ya ntwa, e ntse e le kgakala." 
Job39:26 A segodi se fofa ka tlhaloganyo ya gago, se tsharololela diphuka tsa sona kwa borwa?" 
Job39:27 Kampo a lenong le fofa kwa godimo ka taolo ya gago, le dire sentlhaga sa lone kwa godimo?" 
Job39:28 Le se agile mo mafikeng; le nna mo menong a dithaba le mo ditlhoeng tsa tsona. 
Job39:29 Go tswa teng le tlhola dijo; matlho a lone a bonela kgakala. 
Job39:30 Mamphorwana a lone le ona a nwa madi; mme fa go leng ditoto teng le lone le gona.” 
Job40:1 Morena a araba Jobe a re: 
Job40:2 “A mongongoregi o rata go lwa le Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe? Yo o sekang le Modimo a a fetole!” 
Job40:3 Ke fa Jobe a araba Morena a re: 
Job40:4 “Bona, ga ke lekane. Nka go araba ka reng? Ke itshwara molomo." 
Job40:5 Ke buile gangwe, ga nkitla ke boelela; ee, gabedi, mme ga nkitla ke araba gape.”" 
Job40:6 Morena a ba a fetola Jobe, a le mo ledimong, a re:" 
Job40:7 “A ko o itlame letheka jaaka monna! Ke tla go botsa, o nthute!" 
Job40:8 A tota o a re o roba tshiamo ya me? A o a re o mpona molato gore o nne yo o siameng? 
Job40:9 A o na le letsogo le le kana ka la Modimo? A o ka dumisa maru ka lentswe jaaka ona? 
Job40:10 A ko o ikgabise ka borena le bogolo; o ikapese ka phatsimo le kgalalelo! 
Job40:11 Gorometsa dikgakalo tsa bogale jwa gago, o bone mongwe le mongwe yo o ikgodisang, o mo kokobetse." 
Job40:12 Leba botlhe ba ba ikgodisang o ba inamise; o gatake baikepi fa ba leng teng! 
Job40:13 Botlhe o ba fitlhe mo leroleng; difatlhego tsa bone o di ise kwa di sa tlholeng di ka bonwa. 
Job40:14 Foo le nna ke tla go boka ke re: ‘Letsogo le le jang la gago le go thusitse.’ 
Job40:15 A ko o bone kubu e ke e dirileng jaaka le wena ke go dirile! E fula bojang jaaka kgomo. 
Job40:16 A ko o bone, thata ya yona e mo lethekeng; nonofo ya yona e mo mesifeng ya mpa." 
Job40:17 E tlhamalatsa mogatla wa yona jaaka kota ya mosetere; mesifa ya dirope tsa yona e raraanye. 
Job40:18 Marapo a yona a tshwana le kgotlho e e logapa; dikgopo tsa yona di ntse jaaka tshipi. 
Job40:19 Yona ke moetapele wa ditsela tsa Modimo; yo o e dirileng o e file tšhaka ya yona. 
Job40:20 Ee, dithaba di e ntshetsa dijo; diphologolo tsotlhe tsa naga di tshameka teng." 
Job40:21 E a tle e bothe fa tlase ga ditlhare le mo maiphitlhong a motlhaka le loraga. 
Job40:22 Ditlhare di e okame ka meriti, megokare ya noka e e dikanyetse." 
Job40:23 Bona, le fa noka e ka tlala, ga e tshabe; e ntse e iketlile, le fa noka e e kana ka Joretane e ka tshologela mo leganong la yona." 
Job40:24 Ke mang yo o ka e tshwarang e ntse e mo lebile, a e phunye nko ka lomapo?" 
Job41:1 “A o ka goga kwena ka kobe le go gatelela loleme lwa yona ka lodi? 
Job41:2 A o ka tsenya mogala wa motlhatlha mo nkong ya yona? A o ka e phunya lesama ka kobe? 
Job41:3 A e ka go kokotlela thata? Gongwe e bua nao ka boleta? 
Job41:4 A e ka dira kgolagano nao gore o e tshole, e nne motlhanka wa gago ka metlha yotlhe?" 
Job41:5 A o ka tshameka nayo jaaka e kete ke nonyane? A o ka e golegela basetsana ba gago? 
Job41:6 A batshwari ba ditlhapi ba ka e bapatsa ba e kgaoganyetsa barekisi? 
Job41:7 A o ka tsepamisa marumo mo letlalong la yona gongwe dikobe tsa ditlhapi mo tlhogong ya yona? 
Job41:8 Baya seatla sa gago mo go yona! O gopole tlhabano! Ga o kitla o dira gape. 
Job41:9 Bona, tsholofelo ya go e tshwara e a aketsa; motho o tla wa fela, fa a e bona." 
Job41:10 Ga go na ope yo o pelokgale go ka e rumola! Jaanong yo o ka emelanang le nna ke mang? 
Job41:11 Ke mang yo o kileng a nnaya sengwe, yo ke ka mmusetsang? Kana tse di fa tlase ga legodimo lotlhe ke tsa me." 
Job41:12 Ga nkitla ke didimala ka ga ditokololo tsa yona; ke raya dithata tsa kwena le bontle jwa popego ya yona. 
Job41:13 Ke mang yo o ka e apolang letlalo? Ke mang yo o ka tsenang mo gare ga metlhagare e mebedi ya yona e ntse e utlwa? 
Job41:14 Ke mang yo o ka bulang kgoro ya legano la yona? Meno a yona a boitshega ka ntlha tsotlhe. 
Job41:15 Mokokotlo wa yona ke methalo ya dithebe tsa makape; a tshwaragantswe ka sekano se se tiileng. 
Job41:16 Lengwe le pataganye le le lengwe; ga go tsene phefo mo gare ga ona. 
Job41:17 Makape a ngaparelanye a lomaganye; ga a ka ke a patologana. 
Job41:18 Go ethimola ga yona go phatsimisa lesedi; dintshi tsa matlho a yona di tshwana le mahube. 
Job41:19 Mo leganong la yona go tswa dirumola; go tswa ditlhase tsa molelo. 
Job41:20 Dinko tsa yona di kua musi jaaka pitsa e e bedisiwang ka molelo wa metlhatlha. 
Job41:21 Pudulo ya yona e tukisa magala. Kgabo ya molelo e tswa mo leganong la yona. 
Job41:22 Thata e mo thamong ya yona; poitshego e e etelela pele. 
Job41:23 Matlhakore a mmele wa yona a ngaparelanye a tiile mo go yona; ga a tshikinyege. 
Job41:24 Pelo ya yona e thata jaaka lefika; e tiile jaaka lelwala. 
Job41:25 Fa e tsoga, go boifa dinatla, di tlhakane tlhogo ka go rerega." 
Job41:26 Le fa motho a e rema ka tšhaka, tšhaka ga e kgone sepe, le fa e le lerumo gongwe motsu gongwe selepe." 
Job41:27 Kwena e kaya tshipi bojang fela; kgotlho e e kaya dikgong tse di bodileng. 
Job41:28 Motsu ga o ka ke wa e tshabisa; mafika a seragamajwe ke dirite mo go yona. 
Job41:29 Molamu e o kaya dirite fela; e tshega mosumo wa lerumo. 
Job41:30 Ka fa tlase e na le matlape a a bogale; e tlogela metlhala mo lorageng jaaka selei se se phothang. 
Job41:31 E bedisa bodiba jaaka pitsa; e hudua letsha jaaka go huduiwa pitsana ya ditlhare. 
Job41:32 E phatsimisa metsi fa morago ga yona; motlhala wa yona o tshwana le moriri o mmududu. 
Job41:33 Mo lefatsheng ga go na selekane sa yona; e bopetswe go se boife. 
Job41:34 E lebile tsotlhe tse dikgolo e sa boife, ka yona e le kgosi ya dibata tsotlhe tse di mabela.”" 
Job42:1 Ke fa Jobe a fetola Morena a re: 
Job42:2 “Ke a itse gore o kgona tsotlhe; ga o palelwe ke sepe se o se ikaeletseng. 
Job42:3 O rile ke mang yo o fifatsang maikaelelo a me, yo o se nang kitso? Ke ka moo ke buileng ke se na tlhaloganyo; ka bua metlholo e e mpalelang, e ke sa e itseng." 
Job42:4 Wa re: ‘A ko o utlwe gore go bue nna!’ Ke tla go botsa, wena o nthute!" 
Job42:5 Ke ne ke go utlwetse fela ka ditsebe, mme jaanong matlho a me a go bonye." 
Job42:6 Ka moo ke a inyatsa, ke a ikwatlhaya ke le leroleng le moloreng.”" 
Job42:7 E rile Morena a sena go bua mafoko ao le Jobe, Morena a raya Elifase wa Themane a re: “Wena le ditsala tse pedi tsa gago, bogale jwa me bo lo tuketse; gonne ga lo a ka lwa bua ka ga me ka tshwanelo jaaka Jobe, motlhanka wa me." 
Job42:8 Mme jaanong itseeleng dipoana tse di supang le diphelefu tse di supang, lo ye kwa go Jobe motlhanka wa me, lo itirele setlhabelo se se fisiwang, mme a Jobe motlhanka wa me a lo rapelele; gonne ke ene fela yo ke tla mo lebang gore ke se ka ka lo direla tse di tshwanetseng bosilo jwa lona; gonne ga lo a ka lwa bua tse di siameng ka ga me jaaka Jobe motlhanka wa me.”" 
Job42:9 Ke fa Elifase wa Themane le Biletate wa Sua le Sofare wa Naama ba dira ka fa Morena a ba laetseng ka teng. Mme Morena a leba Jobe ka boitshwarelo. 
Job42:10 Morena a ba a fetola tatlhego ya ga Jobe, fa a rapelela ditsala tsa gagwe, mme tsotlhe tse Jobe a neng a na natso pele Morena a di mmusetsa gabedi." 
Job42:11 Ke fa bomorwa-rraagwe botlhe le bokgaitsadie botlhe le botlhe ba a neng a itsanye nabo pele ba tla kwa go ene, ba ja dijo nae mo ntlong ya gagwe, ba lela nae, ba mo gomotsa ka ntlha ya tatlhego yotlhe e Morena a e mo tliseditseng; le gona mongwe le mongwe a mo naya ledi le le lengwe le palamonwana e le nngwe." 
Job42:12 Mme Morena a tshegofatsa Jobe go tloga jaanong bogolo go metlha ya pele: A rua difutshane di le 14 000 le dikammele di le 6 000 le dipholo tse di gogang di le 2 000 le diesele tse dinamagadi di le sekete. 
Job42:13 A fiwa bana ba basimane ba ba supang le basetsana ba le bararo. 
Job42:14 Morwadie wa ntlha a mmitsa Jemima, wa bobedi a mmitsa Ketsia, wa boraro a mmitsa Kerene-Hapuge." 
Job42:15 Mme go ne go se na basadi mo lefatsheng lotlhe ba ba tshwanang le bomarwadia Jobe ka bontle; le gona rraabo a ba naya boswa mo gare ga bokgaitsadia-bone. 
Job42:16 Morago ga moo Jobe a phela dinyaga di le 140, a bona bana ba gagwe le bana ba bana ba gagwe go fitlha losikeng lwa bone." 
Job42:17 Jobe a swa a tsofetse, a kgotshe bophelo." 
Psalms1:1 Go sego monna yo o sa tsamaeng ka fa kgakololong ya baikepi, le e seng go gata mo tseleng ya baleofi, le e seng go nna mo mannong a basotli," 
Psalms1:2 mme a itumelela molao wa Morena, a akanya molao wa gagwe bosigo le motshegare." 
Psalms1:3 O tshwana le setlhare se se tlhomilweng fa dinokaneng tsa metsi, se se ungwang leungo la sona mo motlheng wa sona, se matlhare a sona a sa swabeng, mme tsotlhe tse o di dirang o di swetsa ka lesego." 
Psalms1:4 Baikepi ga ba a nna jalo; nnyaya, ba tshwana le moko o phefo e o gogolang." 
Psalms1:5 Ka ntlha ya moo baikepi ga ba nke ba atlholelwa mo katlholong, le e seng baleofi mo phuthegong ya basiami." 
Psalms1:6 Gonne Morena o itse tsela ya basiami, mme tsela ya baikepi e isa tshenyegong." 
Psalms2:1 Kana merafe e huduelang, ditšhaba di akanyetsang dilo tsa boithamako?" 
Psalms2:2 Dikgosi tsa lefatshe di a ikemisa le babusi ba nnela go logisanya maano a go lwa le Morena le Motlodiwa wa gagwe ba re: 
Psalms2:3 “A re kgaoleng dikgole tsa bone, megala ya bone re e tlose mo go rona, re e latlhe!”" 
Psalms2:4 Ene yo o agileng mo legodimong o a tshega, Morena o a ba sotla." 
Psalms2:5 Foo o tla bua nabo ka bogale jwa gagwe, o tla ba tshosa ka kgakalo ya gagwe:" 
Psalms2:6 “Mme nna, kana ke tlhomile kgosi ya me mo Sione, mo thabeng ya me e e boitshepo!”" 
Psalms2:7 Ke rata go bolela ka ga maikaelelo a Morena. O ntheile a re: “O morwaake, ke go tsetse kajeno." 
Psalms2:8 Lopa mo go nna, mme ke tla go naya merafe go nna boswa jwa gago, le dikhutlo tsa lefatshe go nna leruo la gago." 
Psalms2:9 O tla ba robaganya ka thobane ya tshipi; o tla ba thubaganya jaaka sejana sa letsopa.” 
Psalms2:10 Ka moo he, tlhalefang, lona dikgosi; tlhagisiwang, lona baatlhodi ba lefatshe." 
Psalms2:11 Direlang Morena ka poifo, lo duduetse ka thoromo." 
Psalms2:12 Atlang Morwa gore a se ka a gakala, mme lwa latlhega mo tseleng. Gonne bogale jwa gagwe bo ka akofa jwa tuka. Go sego bona botlhe ba ba mo ikanyang." 
Psalms3:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita ya sebaka sa fa a tshaba Abesalomo morwawe. 
Psalms3:2 Morena, kana baganetsi ba me ba atile jang! Ba bantsi ba ba ntsogelang," 
Psalms3:3 ba bantsi ba ba buang ka ga me ba re: “Ga a na thuso epe mo Modimong.” Sela. 
Psalms3:4 Mme wena, Morena, o thebe e e ntshireletsang, o tlotlo ya me le motsholetsi wa tlhogo ya me." 
Psalms3:5 Ke tlhaeleleditse thata go Morena, mme a nkutlwa, a le mo thabeng ya gagwe e e boitshepo. Sela." 
Psalms3:6 Ke ne ka rapama, ka robala; ka ba ka thanya; gonne Morena o a nkokotletsa." 
Psalms3:7 Ga nkitla ke boifa dikete tse di masome tsa batho ba ba ntsogetseng ba ntikanyeditse. 
Psalms3:8 Tloga o eme, Morena; mpholose, Modimo wa me! Gonne o iteile baba ba me botlhe mo lotlhaeng, o robile meno a baikepi." 
Psalms3:9 Pholoso e mo Moreneng; tshegofatso ya gago e okame morafe wa gago. Sela. 
Psalms4:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi; e opedisiwe ka kwadi ya dithapo. 
Psalms4:2 Fa ke bitsa o nkutlwe, Modimo wa tshiamo ya me! Mo pitlaganong ya me o nkatlhamoloseditse bonno; ntlhomogele pelo, o utlwe thapelo ya me!" 
Psalms4:3 Lona banna, tlotlo ya me e tla nna tshotlo goleele go le kae? Lo tla rata boithamako le go batla maaka goleele go le kae? Sela." 
Psalms4:4 Itseng gore Morena o itlhaoletse yo o mo kgatlhang. Morena o a utlwa fa ke tlhaeleletsa go ena. 
Psalms4:5 Galefang, mme lo se leofe; buang ka dipelo tsa lona mo malaong a lona, mme lo didimale. Sela." 
Psalms4:6 Tlhabang ditlhabelo tsa nnete, lo ikanye Morena." 
Psalms4:7 Ba bantsi ba re: “Ke mang yo o re bontshang se se molemo? Morena, re sedifaletse ka lesedi la sefatlhego sa gago.”" 
Psalms4:8 Pelo ya me o e tladitse boitumelo jo bo fetang jwa bona, jwa letlotlo la mabele le la bojalwa." 
Psalms4:9 Ke tla ya go lala ka kagiso, ke thulamela; gonne ke wena Morena o le wesi yo o mphedisang mo kagisong." 
Psalms5:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi; e opedisiwe ka ditlhaka. 
Psalms5:2 Morena, sekegela mafoko a me tsebe, o ele phegelo ya me tlhoko;" 
Psalms5:3 reetsa lentswe la me le le goelang thuso, Kgosi ya me le Modimo wa me, gonne ke rapela wena." 
Psalms5:4 Morena, o tla utlwa lentswe la me mo mosong; ke tla go baakanyetsa tshupelo ya thapelo mo mosong, ke lebelela." 
Psalms5:5 Gonne ga o Modimo o o natefelwang ke boikepo, mme yo o bosula ga a kitla a nna nao." 
Psalms5:6 Baikgantshi ga ba kitla ba ema fa pele ga matlho a gago; o tlhoile botlhe ba ba dirang tshiamololo. 
Psalms5:7 O tla nyeletsa ba ba buang maaka; monna wa polao le wa tsietso o tena Morena. 
Psalms5:8 Mme nna nka tsena mo Ntlong ya gago ka ntlha ya bogolo jwa bopelotlhomogi jwa gago, ka obamela mo Tempeleng e e Boitshepo ya gago ke go boifa." 
Psalms5:9 Morena, ntsamaise mo tshiamong ya gago ka ntlha ya baba ba me; tlhamalatsa tsela ya gago fa pele ga me." 
Psalms5:10 Gonne ga go na sepe se se ikanyegang mo melomong ya bona; mateng a bona ke tshenyego; memetso ya bona ke mabitla a a atlhameng; ba rethefatsa diteme tsa bona. 
Psalms5:11 Ba bee molato, Modimo; a ba we ka ntlha ya maano a bona; ba leleke ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa ditlolo tsa bona; gonne ba a go rukhutlhegela." 
Psalms5:12 Mme botlhe ba ba go ikanyang a ba itumele, a ba duduetse ka gale, mme o ba femele. Le bona ba ba ratang leina la gago a ba ipele mo go wena." 
Psalms5:13 Gonne o tshegofatsa mosiami, Morena, o mo dikanyetsa ka bopelonomi jaaka ka thebe." 
Psalms6:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi; e opedisiwe ka kwadi ya dithapo, e na le kodu ya moporo." 
Psalms6:2 Morena, se mpetse ka bogale jwa gago, se nkwatlhae o gaketse." 
Psalms6:3 Morena, intshwarele: gonne ke swabile. Morena, mphodise; gonne ke remegile marapo," 
Psalms6:4 mowa wa me le ona o reregile thata; mme wena, Morena, o tla nna goleele go le kae?" 
Psalms6:5 Boa Morena, o pholose botshelo jwa me, o nthuse ka ntlha ya bopelotlhomogi jwa gago." 
Psalms6:6 Gonne mo losong ga o gopolwe; ke mang yo o tla go lebogang kwa felong ga baswi? 
Psalms6:7 Ke lapile ka go fegelwa ga me, ke edisa bolao jwa me bosigo bongwe le bongwe, ke kolobisa phate ya me ka dikeledi tsa me." 
Psalms6:8 Leitlho la me le fifaditswe ke bohutsana, le onetse ka ntlha ya baganetsi botlhe ba me." 
Psalms6:9 Ntlogeleng lona lotlhe badiratshiamololo; gonne Morena o utlwile lentswe la selelo sa me. 
Psalms6:10 Morena o utlwile mekokotlelo ya me, Morena o amogela thapelo ya me." 
Psalms6:11 Baba ba me botlhe ba tla tlhajwa ke ditlhong, ba tshoga thata; ba tla boela kwa morago, ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong ka tshoganyetso." 
Psalms7:1 Sefela sa ga Dafita se o se opeletseng Morena ka ntlha ya mafoko a ga Khuše wa Mobenyamene. 
Psalms7:2 Morena, Modimo wa me, ke tshabela kwa go wena; nkgolola mo bapatiking botlhe ba me, o mpholose," 
Psalms7:3 e se re gongwe ba nkgagola jaaka tau, ba mphamola go se ope yo o gololang." 
Psalms7:4 Morena, Modimo wa me, fa ke dirile jalo, fa go na le tshiamololo mo diatleng tsa me," 
Psalms7:5 fa ene yo o nang a na le kagiso le nna ke mo diretse bosula; fa ke senyeditse ene yo o neng a le moganetsi wa me ka bomo; 
Psalms7:6 fa go ntse jalo, a mmaba a nteleke, a ntshware, a gatakele bophelo jwa me mo mmung, tlotlo ya me a e latse mo leroleng. Sela." 
Psalms7:7 Morena, tloga o eme mo bogaleng jwa gago, bololela baganetsi ba me ba ba nkgakaletseng, o tsoge ka ntlha ya me, wena yo o laotseng katlholo." 
Psalms7:8 A phuthego ya merafe e go dikanyeletse, o boele kwa godimo, o ba okame." 
Psalms7:9 Morena, o atlhola merafe. Morena, ntshiamisetse ka fa tshiamong ya me le ka fa ke se nang molato ka teng." 
Psalms7:10 Dira gore boikepo jwa baikepi bo khutle! Tlhomamisa mosiami, wena yo o lekang dipelo le diphilo, wena Modimo o o siameng." 
Psalms7:11 Thebe ya me e mo Modimong o o thusang ba ba dipelo di boammaaruri. 
Psalms7:12 Modimo ke moatlhodi yo o siameng, e bile ke Modimo o o galefang ka letsatsi le letsatsi." 
Psalms7:13 Fa motho a sa sokologe, o lootsa tšhaka ya ona, o gagamatsa bora jwa ona, o supa ka jona;" 
Psalms7:14 o mmaakanyeditse dibolai tsa loso, o dira metsu ya ona go nna e e tukang." 
Psalms7:15 Bonang, motho yoo o nna moimana ka boikepo, o ithwele tshiamololo, o tsala maaka." 
Psalms7:16 O epile lemena, a le gaba; mme o wetse mo gopong e o e dirileng." 
Psalms7:17 Tshenyo ya gagwe e boela tlhogong ya gagwe, le go thubaka ga gagwe go wela mo phogong ya gagwe." 
Psalms7:18 Ke tla baka Morena ka ntlha ya tshiamo ya gagwe, ke opelela leina la Morena Mogodimodimo." 
Psalms8:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi ka fa moopelong wa ba ba gatang segatelo. 
Psalms8:2 Morena, Mmusi wa rona, leina la gago le galalela jang mo lefatsheng lotlhe, wena yo borena jwa gago bo opelelwang kwa legodimong!" 
Psalms8:3 O itiretse tumiso e kgolo, e tswa mo melomong ya bana le ya masea, ka ntlha ya baganetsi ba gago, gore o didimatse baba le baipusolosetsi." 
Psalms8:4 Fa ke lebile magodimo a gago, tiro ya menwana ya gago le ngwedi le dinaledi tse o di tlhomileng –" 
Psalms8:5 kana motho ke eng, fa o mo gopotse, ngwana wa motho ke eng, fa o mmabalela?" 
Psalms8:6 O mo tlhaedisitse baengele go le gonnye fela, wa mo rwesa kgalalelo le bontle." 
Psalms8:7 O mo dirile molaodi wa ditiro tsa diatla tsa gago; o beile dilo tsotlhe fa tlase ga dinao tsa gagwe," 
Psalms8:8 tsotlhe, dinku le dikgomo, le tsona diphologolo tsa naga," 
Psalms8:9 dinonyane tsa loapi le ditlhapi tsa lewatle, le fa e le eng se se ralalang lewatle ka ditsela tsa lone." 
Psalms8:10 Morena, Mmusi wa rona, kana leina la gago le galalela jang mo lefatsheng lotlhe!" 
Psalms9:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi ka fa moopelong wa “Swela morwa”. 
Psalms9:2 Ke tla go leboga, Morena, ka pelo yotlhe, ke tla bolela dikgakgamatso tsotlhe tsa gago." 
Psalms9:3 Ke tla itumela, ke ipela mo go wena; ke tla opelela leina la gago, wena Mogodimodimo." 
Psalms9:4 Ka gonne baba ba me ba katile ka morago, ba kgotšwa, ba nyelela fa pele ga gago." 
Psalms9:5 Gonne o emetse tshiamo ya me le tsheko ya me, wa ipaya mo sedulong sa bogosi, o le moatlhodi yo o siameng." 
Psalms9:6 O kgalemetse Baditšhaba, wa nyeletsa baikepi, maina a bona wa a phimolela ruri." 
Psalms9:7 Baba ba sule, ke marope fela ka bosakhutleng, le metse o e thubile, go gopolwa ga yona go ile." 
Psalms9:8 Mme Morena ene o nnela ruri, sedulo sa gagwe o se baakanyeditse go atlhola." 
Psalms9:9 O atlhola lefatshe ka tshiamo, o siamisetsa merafe ka boammaaruri." 
Psalms9:10 Ka moo Morena ke botshabelo jo bo thata jwa bapatikwa, ke botshabelo jo bo thata mo metlheng ya pitlagano." 
Psalms9:11 Ba ba itseng leina la gago ba a go ikanya; ka gonne wena Morena ga o ke o tlogela ba ba go batlang. 
Psalms9:12 Opelelang Morena yo o agileng mo Sione; bolelang ditiro tsa gagwe mo merafeng. 
Psalms9:13 Gonne ena yo o busolosang madi o ba gopotse, ga a lebale selelo sa batlalelwi." 
Psalms9:14 Morena, intshwarele, ela se ke se bogang mo go bona ba ba ntlhoileng tlhoko, wena yo o ntsholetsang mo dikgorong tsa loso," 
Psalms9:15 gore ke tle ke bolele dipôkô tsotlhe tsa gago, ke dudueletse pholoso ya gago mo dikgorong tsa morwadia Sione." 
Psalms9:16 Baditšhaba ba wetse mo lemeneng le ba le epileng, dinao tsa bona di tshwerwe ke letloa le ba le thaileng mo sephiring." 
Psalms9:17 Morena o ikitsisitse, o dirile katlholo, moikepi o raraanye ka tiro ya diatla tsa gagwe. Go a lediwa. Sela." 
Psalms9:18 Baikepi ba tla boela kwa felong ga baswi, le baheitane botlhe ba ba lebetseng Modimo." 
Psalms9:19 Gonne bahumanegi ga ba nke ba lebalelwa ruri, le tsholofelo ya babogisegi ga e kitla e tlhokafalela ruri." 
Psalms9:20 Tloga o eme, Morena! A motho a se ka a thatafala, a baheitane ba atlholwe fa pele ga gago." 
Psalms9:21 Morena, ba tlatse poifo, a baheitane ba itemoge, fa e le batho fela. Sela." 
Psalms10:1 Morena, o emetseng kgakala, o iphitlhetseng mo metlheng ya pitlagano?" 
Psalms10:2 Motlalelwi o pitlagantswe ka ntlha ya boikgantsho jwa baikepi. A ba tshwarwe ke maano a ba a logileng a boferefere. 
Psalms10:3 Gonne moikepi o ikgantsha ka keletso ya gagwe; mmapadi wa tsietso o tshegofatsa ke go re o kgala Morena. 
Psalms10:4 Moikepi, mo boikgodisong jwa gagwe ga a batle Modimo; o ithaya a re: “Ga go na Modimo.” Ke yona megopolo yotlhe ya gagwe." 
Psalms10:5 Ditsela tsa gagwe di na le botswelelopele ka gale, dikatlholo tsa gago di kwa godimodimo, kgakala le ena; baganetsi botlhe ba gagwe o a ba budula." 
Psalms10:6 Mo pelong ya gagwe o ithaya a re: “Ga ke na go tshikinyega, ke mongwe yo ke se kitlang ke wela mo tlalelong go ya bokhutlong.”" 
Psalms10:7 Molomo wa gagwe o tletse khutso le tsietso le patiko; fa tlase ga loleme lwa gagwe go na le letshwenyo le tshenyo. 
Psalms10:8 O bataletse mo talelong ya metse; yo o se nang molato o mmolaela mo sephiring; matlho a gagwe a tlhomilwe mo go yo o tlhokang letlhogonolo. 
Psalms10:9 O lalela mo sephiring jaaka tau mo sekhung sa yona, o laletse mmogisegi gore a mo tshware; o tshwara motlalelwi ka go mo goga ka letloa la gagwe." 
Psalms10:10 O a boba, a batalale, mme ba ba tlhokang letlhogonolo ba wele mo maroong a gagwe." 
Psalms10:11 O ithaya mo pelong a re: “Modimo o lebetse, o ipipile sefatlhego, ga o kitla o go bona ka gope.”" 
Psalms10:12 Morena, nanoga, Modimo, tsholetsa letsogo, se lebale batlalelwi!" 
Psalms10:13 Kana moikepi o kgalelang Modimo, a ithaya mo pelong a re: “Ga o ne o busolosa”?" 
Psalms10:14 Wena o bonye; gonne o lebile tapisego le tshwenyego gore di beiwe mo seatleng sa gago. Yo o itlhokang o di neetse wena, o mothusi wa dikhutsana." 
Psalms10:15 Robaganya letsogo la moikepi; yo o bosula o busolose boikepo jwa gagwe, gore o se ka wa tlhola o bo bona." 
Psalms10:16 Morena ke Kgosi ka gale le ka bosakhutleng, baheitane ba nyeletse mo lefatsheng la gagwe." 
Psalms10:17 Morena, o utlwile keletso ya baikokobetsi, o tiisa dipelo tsa bone, o tlhwaya tsebe go utlwa," 
Psalms10:18 go tla o siamisetsa khutsana le mopatikwi, gore motho wa lefatshe a se ka a tlhola a ba tlhorisa." 
Psalms11:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. Ke itiketsa ka Morena; lo ka nthaya jang lo a re: “Tshabela kwa thabeng jaaka nonyane? 
Psalms11:2 Gonne bona, baikepi ba gagamatsa bora, ba beile metsu ya bone mo thapong ya jona, gore e re ba le mo fifing, ba tle ba hule ba ba dipelo di boammaaruri." 
Psalms11:3 Fa metheo e thujwa, mosiami a ka dirang?”" 
Psalms11:4 Morena o mo Tempeleng ya gagwe e e Boitshepo, Morena, yo sedulo sa gagwe sa bogosi se leng mo legodimong. Matlho a gagwe a bona lefatshe, dintshi tsa matlho a gagwe di keleka bana ba batho." 
Psalms11:5 Morena o sekaseka mosiami le moikepi; mowa wa gagwe o tlhoile yo o ratang kgatelelo. 
Psalms11:6 O tla nesetsa baikepi magala; molelo le sebabole le ledimo le le bolelo ke tsona senwelo sa bona se ba se abetsweng. 
Psalms11:7 Gonne Morena o siame, o rata ditiro tse di siameng. Ba nnete ba tla bona sefatlhego sa gagwe." 
Psalms12:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi, e na le kodu ya moporo." 
Psalms12:2 Morena, thusa; gonne ga go tlhole go na le yo o boifang Modimo, mme ba ba ikanyegang ba fedile mo baneng ba batho." 
Psalms12:3 Ba bua maaka mongwe le yo mongwe, ba bua ka melomo e e borethe le bopelopedi." 
Psalms12:4 A Morena a nyeletse melomo yotlhe e e borethe, le loleme lo lo buang dilo tsa boikgodiso;" 
Psalms12:5 bona ba ba reng: “Re thata ka diteme tsa rona, re na le melomo ya rona; mmusi yo o re laolang ke mang?”" 
Psalms12:6 Mme Morena a re: “Jaanong ke tla tsogela pogiso ya batlalelwi le phegelo ya batlhoki, ke thusa ene yo o lelelang thuso.”" 
Psalms12:7 Mafoko a Morena ke mafoko a a phepa, ke selefera e e itshekisitsweng mo leubelong e e tshologelang fa fatshe, e itshekisitswe gasupa." 
Psalms12:8 Wena Morena, o re boloke, o re sireletse mo losikeng loo ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms12:9 Fa tshenyego e godile mo baneng ba batho, baikepi ba ikgantsha mo ntlheng tsotlhe." 
Psalms13:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms13:2 Morena, go tla nna goleele go le kae? A o tla ntebalela ruri? O tla mphitlhela sefatlhego sa gago sebaka se se kana kang?" 
Psalms13:3 Ke tla akanya goleele go le kae mo moweng wa me, ke tlhola ke tletse bohutsana mo pelong? Mmaba wa me o tla inkgodisetsa sebaka se se kana kang?" 
Psalms13:4 A o ko o bone, o nkutlwe, Morena, Modimo wa me! Sedifatsa matlho a me gore ke se robale thobalo ya loso," 
Psalms13:5 le gore mmaba wa me a se re: “Ke mo fentse,” mme baganetsi ba me ba se ipele, fa ke theekela." 
Psalms13:6 Mme nna, ke ikanya boitshwarelo jwa gago; pelo ya me e tla ipelela thuso ya gago. Ke tla opelela Morena pako, ka a ntiretse molemo." 
Psalms14:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. Lesilo le bua mo pelong ya lone le re: “Modimo ga o yo.” Ba a senya, ba dira tsa maila; ga go ope yo o dirang molemo." 
Psalms14:2 Morena o lebile bana ba batho a le mo legodimong, go bona, fa go le mongwe yo o botlhale, yo o batlang Modimo." 
Psalms14:3 Ba fapogile botlhe, ba senyega mmogo. Ga go ope yo o dirang molemo, le e seng a le mongwe fela." 
Psalms14:4 A botlhe ba ba dirang tshiamololo ga ba na kitso, bona ba ba metsang batho ba me jaaka ba ja senkgwe? Morena ga ba mmitse." 
Psalms14:5 Foo ba tla tshoga mo go boitshegang; gonne Modimo o mo losikeng lo lo siameng. 
Psalms14:6 Maano a ba a logelang mmogisegi a tla ba tlhabisa ditlhong, gonne Morena ke botshabelo jwa gagwe." 
Psalms14:7 E kete pholoso ya Iseraele e ka bo e tla e e tswang mo Sione! E ne e tla re Morena a fetola tatlhego ya morafe wa gagwe, Jakobe a duduetse, Iseraele a itumele." 
Psalms15:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Morena, ke mang yo o ka tsenang mo Tenteng ya gago? Ke mang yo o ka nnang mo thabeng ya gago e e boitshepo?" 
Psalms15:2 Ke ene fela yo o sepelang a se na molato, a dira ka tshiamo, a bua boammaaruri ka pelo;" 
Psalms15:3 yo o sa senyeng motho leina ka loleme, a sa direle mongwe-ka-ene bosula, a sa kgobe wa ga gabo;" 
Psalms15:4 yo molatlhegi a nyatsegang mo matlhong a gagwe, mme a tlotla ba ba boifang Morena; yo e a reng a ikanetse sengwe, a se ke a fetoge, le fa a ka senyegelwa;" 
Psalms15:5 yo o sa adimeng madi ka go a tsadisa, a sa rekwe go patika yo o se nang molato. Yo o dirang jalo, ga a kitla a tshikinyega ka gope." 
Psalms16:1 Loboko lwa ga Dafita. Modimo, mpoloke, gonne ke ikanya wena!" 
Psalms16:2 Ke reile Morena ka re: “Ke wena Morena wa me, ga ke na molemo ope kwa ntle ga gago.”" 
Psalms16:3 Fa e le baitshepi ba ba mo lefatsheng, bona batlotlegi ke ba ba nkgatlhang." 
Psalms16:4 Dipogo tsa bona ba ba ipatlelang medimo e sele di tla ntsifala. Ga nkitla ke e isetsa ditshupelo tsa madi, le e seng go bua maina a yona ka molomo wa me." 
Psalms16:5 Morena ke kabelo ya boswa jwa me, le ya senwelo sa me; o tshegeditse kabelo ya me." 
Psalms16:6 Melelwane e ntiteetse ka fa mafelong a a monate. Ee, ke na le boswa jo bontle." 
Psalms16:7 Ke tla baka Morena yo o nkgakolotseng. Ee, le mo bosigong diphilo tsa me di a nkaela." 
Psalms16:8 Ke ntse ke emisitse Morena fa pele ga matlho a me; ga nkitla ke tshikinyega, ka a nkeme ka fa letsogong le le jang." 
Psalms16:9 Ka moo pelo ya me e a itumela, le mowa wa me o a ipela; mmele wa me le ona o tla ikhutsa o iketlile." 
Psalms16:10 Gonne ga o kitla o tlogela mowa wa me go tsena mo bobipong, le e seng go leseletsa moitshepi wa gago go bona go bola." 
Psalms16:11 O tla nkitsise tsela ya bophelo; go kgora boitumelo, go fa pele ga sefatlhego sa gago, le go ja monate fa letsogong le le jang la gago ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms17:1 Thapelo ya ga Dafita. Morena, utlwa go rapelela tse di siameng, o tlhokomele go kua ga me; reetsa thapelo ya me e e seng ya molomo wa tsietso." 
Psalms17:2 A tse di ntshiametseng di tswe mo go wena; a matlho a gago a lebe ka tshiamo. 
Psalms17:3 O leka pelo ya me, o nkeleka mo bosigong, o a ntlhotlhomisa, mme ga o fitlhele tse di tlhabisang ditlhong mo go nna; le molomo wa me ga o senye." 
Psalms17:4 Fa e le ditiro tsa batho, ke ila ditsela tsa mogateledi ka fa lefokong la molomo wa gago." 
Psalms17:5 Dikgato tsa me di paleletse mo metlhaleng ya gago; dinao tsa me ga di a ka tsa theekela. 
Psalms17:6 Ke goela kwa go wena, Modimo; gonne o a nkutlwa; ntshekegele tsebe o reetse polelo ya me." 
Psalms17:7 Supa maitshwarelo a gago ka mokgwa o o gakgamatsang, wena yo o gololang ba ba ikanyang letsogo le le jang la gago mo baganetsing ba bona." 
Psalms17:8 Mpoloke jaaka thaka ya leitlho, o mphemele mo moriting wa diphuka tsa gago," 
Psalms17:9 o mphemele mo baikeping ba ba nkgatelelang le mo babeng ba me ba ba ntikanyetsang go mpolaya. 
Psalms17:10 Ba thatafaditse dipelo tsa bona; ba bua ka melomo ya bona ka boikgantsho. 
Psalms17:11 Ba re dikanyeditse re ntse re tsamaya; ba re tlhomile matlho go re digela fa fatshe. 
Psalms17:12 Ba tshwana le tau e e gakaletseng go gagola, le tawana e e laletseng fa e bobileng teng." 
Psalms17:13 Nanoga, Morena, o ba kgatlhantshe, o ba digele fa fatshe. Mpholose mo moikeping ka tšhaka ya gago," 
Psalms17:14 le mo banneng ka letsogo la gago, Morena, le mo banneng ba lefatshe, ba kabelo ya bona e leng mo bophelong jono, ba o tlatsang dimpa tsa bona lehumo la gago; bana ba bona ba a kgora, letlotlo la bona ba le tlogelela masea a bona." 
Psalms17:15 Mme nna ke tla leba sefatlhego sa gago ke le mo tshiamong, ke tla kgora setshwano sa gago mogang ke thanyang." 
Psalms18:1 Ya moopedisi. Pesalome ya ga Dafita, motlhanka wa Morena, yo o neng a tlhabela Morena sefela se, ka sebaka se Morena o neng a mo golola ka sona mo diatleng tsa baba botlhe ba gagwe le mo seatleng sa ga Saule." 
Psalms18:2 Mme a re: “Ke go rata ka pelo yotlhe, Morena, thata ya me." 
Psalms18:3 Morena ke lefika la me le phemelo ya me ya kwa thabeng le mogolodi wa me; ke Modimo wa me le lefika la phemelo la me, le ke tshabelang kwa go lone, le thebe ya me le lonaka lwa me lwa pholoso le kago ya phemelo ya me." 
Psalms18:4 E a re fa ke bitsa Morena yo o bakwang, ke gololwe mo babeng ba me." 
Psalms18:5 Makhubu a loso a ne a ntikanyeditse, dinoka tsa tatlhego di ne di mpoifisa." 
Psalms18:6 Dikgole tsa felo ga baswi di ne di ntsentse gare le dithapo tsa loso tsa nkwela. 
Psalms18:7 E rile ke pitlagantswe, ka lelela Moreneng, ka kuela Modimong wa me; wa utlwa lentswe la me o le mo Tempeleng ya ona, selelo sa me sa tla fa pele ga ona, sa tsena mo ditsebeng tsa ona." 
Psalms18:8 Foo lefatshe la reketla, la roroma, metheo ya dithaba ya roroma, ya tshikinyega, ka o ne o galefile." 
Psalms18:9 Ga kua musi, o tswa mo nkong ya ona, molelo wa tswa mo molomong wa ona o senya, magala a tswa mo go ona a tuka." 
Psalms18:10 Wa sekamisa legodimo, wa fologa; lefifi la nna fa tlase ga dinao tsa ona." 
Psalms18:11 O ne o palame Kerubime o fofa; o kala o le mo diphukeng tsa phefo. 
Psalms18:12 Wa dira lefifi sesiro sa ona, le lefifi la metsi le maru a a maima wa di dira motlaagana o o itikanyeditseng ka ona." 
Psalms18:13 Mo kgalalelong e e fa pele ga ona ga tswa maru a ona le sefako le magala a molelo. 
Psalms18:14 Morena a dumisa maru kwa legodimong; Mogodimodimo a utlwatsa lentswe la gagwe, ga nna sefako le magala a molelo;" 
Psalms18:15 a hula metsu ya gagwe, a phatlalatsa baba; a rathisa tladi, a ba tshosa." 
Psalms18:16 Mateng a lewatle a bonala, metheo ya lefatshe ya senoga ka ntlha ya kgalemo ya gago, Morena, ka ntlha ya go suma ga mowa wa nko ya gago." 
Psalms18:17 O ne a ntsha letsogo a le kwa godimo, a ntshwara, a nkinola mo metsing a magolo." 
Psalms18:18 A nkgolola mo babeng ba me ba ba thata le mo go ba ba ntlhoileng; gonne ba ne ba mpheta ka thata. 
Psalms18:19 Ba nkwetse mo letsatsing la tlalelo ya me, mme Morena a nna seitsetsepelo sa me." 
Psalms18:20 A nkgogela kwa ntle mo mafelong a a atlhameng, a nkgolola, ka gonne ke a mo kgatlha." 
Psalms18:21 Morena o ne a ntuela ka fa tshiamong ya me, a mpusetsa ka fa boitshekong jwa diatla tsa me." 
Psalms18:22 Gonne ke tshwere ditsela tsa Morena, mme ga ke a ka ka ikepa mo Modimong wa me." 
Psalms18:23 Gonne tsotlhe tse di siameng fa pele ga ona, ke ntse ke di tlhokomela, mme ga ke a ka ka tlosa melao ya ona fa go nna." 
Psalms18:24 Ke ne ke siame fa pele ga ona, ka itisa gore ke se nne molato." 
Psalms18:25 Ka moo Morena a ntuela ka fa tshiamong ya me le ka fa boitshekong jwa diatla tsa me, jo bo fa pele ga matlho a gagwe." 
Psalms18:26 O itshupa o le bopelotlhomogi mo go yo o tlhomogang pelo; o itshupa o le tlhamalalo mo monneng yo o tlhamaletseng. 
Psalms18:27 O itshupa o le phepa mo go yo o phepa, mme mo molotsaneng o itshupa o le kgopo." 
Psalms18:28 Gonne batho ba ba bogisiwang o ba direla kgololo; mme matlho a a mabela o a a kokobetsa. 
Psalms18:29 Ee, o tukisa lobone lwa me; Morena, Modimo wa me o sedifatsa lefifi la me." 
Psalms18:30 Gonne ke tlhasela lesomo la baba ka wena; ke tlola lobota ka Modimo wa me. 
Psalms18:31 Tsela ya Modimo oo e itekanetse; lefoko la Morena le itshekile. Ke ene thebe ya botlhe ba ba mo ikanyang. 
Psalms18:32 Gonne ke mang yo e leng Modimo fa e se Morena? Gape ke mang yo e leng lefika fa e se Modimo wa rona? 
Psalms18:33 Ke ona Modimo o o ntlamang ka thata, o o dirang tsela ya me botlalo." 
Psalms18:34 O dira dinao tsa me jaaka tsa tshephe, o nkemisa mo mafelong a me a a godimo." 
Psalms18:35 O ruta diatla tsa me go tlhabana, gore mabogo a me a ba a obe bora jwa kgotlho." 
Psalms18:36 O nneile thebe ya pholoso ya gago; letsogo le le jang la gago le ntshegeditse; go ikinamisa ga gago go ntira mogolo. 
Psalms18:37 O atlhamolositse kgato ya me fa tlase ga me, malengana a me ga a a ka a temeka." 
Psalms18:38 Ke lelekile baba ba me, ka ba tshwara, mme ga ke a ka ka boa ke ise ke ba nyeletse." 
Psalms18:39 Ke ba thubakile, ba be ba retelelwa ke go tsoga; ba wetse fa tlase ga dinao tsa me." 
Psalms18:40 O ntlamile ka thata go tlhabana; o dira gore bona ba ba ntsogetseng ba ikobe fa tlase ga me. 
Psalms18:41 Le gona o tshabisitse baba ba me gore ba nkhularele; ba ba ntlhoileng ka ba nyeletsa. 
Psalms18:42 Ba goela thuso, mme go se na mothusi ope; ba tlhaeleletsa kwa Moreneng, mme a se ka a ba araba." 
Psalms18:43 Ke ne ka ba thuga jaaka lerole fa pele ga phefo, ka ba gelolela kwa ntle jaaka seretse sa mmila." 
Psalms18:44 O nkgolotse mo dikganetsanyong tsa batho; o ntirile tlhogo ya merafe. Ke diretswe ke setšhaba se ke neng ke sa se itse. 
Psalms18:45 E rile fela fa ba nkutlwela, ba tla go inkobela; bomorwa ditšhaba ba inneela ka go mpoifa." 
Psalms18:46 Bomorwa baeng ba a koafala; ba a tla, ba roroma, ba tswa mo maiphitlhong a bona." 
Psalms18:47 Morena o a phela. A go bakwe ene lefika la me. A go godisiwe Modimo wa pholoso ya me; 
Psalms18:48 ona Modimo o o mpusolosetsang o tsenya batho mo taolong ya me; 
Psalms18:49 o nkgolola mo babeng ba me ba ba bogale. Wena o nkgodisetsa ba ba ntsogelang, o nkgolola mo monneng yo o setlhogo." 
Psalms18:50 Ke ka ntlha ya moo, Morena, ke ratang go go leboga mo merafeng le go opelela leina la gago pako." 
Psalms18:51 Wena yo o nayang kgosi e o e beileng kgololo e kgolo, boitshwarelo o bo supetsa motlodiwa wa gago, e bong Dafita le losika lwa gagwe go ya bosakhutleng.”" 
Psalms19:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms19:2 Magodimo a bolela kgalalelo ya Modimo, phuthologo e rera tiro tsa ona." 
Psalms19:3 Letsatsi le bilolela letsatsi le lengwe polelo, le bosigo bo utlwaletsa bosigo jo bongwe kitso." 
Psalms19:4 Ga go na polelo le e seng mafoko; modumo wa tsona ga o utlwale. 
Psalms19:5 Modumo wa ona magodimo o tswetse mo lefatsheng lotlhe, le mafoko a ona a fitlha kwa mafelelong a lefatshe; Modimo o beetse letsatsi tente kwa go ona magodimo." 
Psalms19:6 Le tshwana le monyadi yo o tswang mo ntlwaneng ya borobalo ya gagwe, le itumelela go taboga tseleng ya lone jaaka mogale." 
Psalms19:7 Le tswa kwa bokhutlong jwa magodimo, le dikologa go ya bokhutlong jo bongwe jwa ona, mme ga go sepe se se fitlhetsweng mogote wa lone." 
Psalms19:8 Molao wa Morena o botlalo, o lapolosa mowa; tshupo ya Morena e a ikanyega, e tlhalefisa yo o sa tlhalefang." 
Psalms19:9 Ditao tsa Morena di siame, di itumedisa pelo; taolo ya Morena e phepa, e bonesa matlho." 
Psalms19:10 Go boifa Morena go itshekile, go bile go nnela ruri; tse Morena a di siamisitseng ke tsa nnete, di bile di siame tsotlhe." 
Psalms19:11 Di eletsega bogolo go gouta le bontsi jwa gouta e ntlentle; di botshe bogolo go dinotshe, e bong mafura a tsona." 
Psalms19:12 Le motlhanka wa gago o sedimosediwa ka tsona; go di tlhokomela go na le mosola o mogolo. 
Psalms19:13 Ke mang yo o ka itemogang diphoso tsotlhe? Intshwarele tse di fitlhegileng. 
Psalms19:14 Le gona thibela motlhanka wa gago mo maleong a boikgantsho, a a se ntaole. Foo ke tla nna mosiami, ke se na molato wa boleo jo bogolo." 
Psalms19:15 A mafoko a molomo wa me le kakanyo ya pelo ya me di go kgatlhe, Morena, lefika la me le mogolodi wa me." 
Psalms20:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms20:2 A Morena a go utlwe ka letsatsi la tlalelo; a leina la Modimo wa ga Jakobe le go femele. 
Psalms20:3 A a go romele thuso e e tswang mo Felong-ga-Boitshepo, a go kokotletse a le mo Sione." 
Psalms20:4 A a gopole ditshupelo tsotlhe tsa gago tsa dijo; a be a itumelele setlhabelo sa gago sa phiso. Sela. 
Psalms20:5 A a go neye se pelo ya gago e se eletsang, a dirafatse maikaelelo otlhe a gago." 
Psalms20:6 Re tla dudueletsa phenyo ya gago, re tlhoma difoka ka leina la Modimo wa rona. A Morena a dirafatse dikopo tsotlhe tsa gago." 
Psalms20:7 Jaanong ke itse gore Morena o thusa motlodiwa wa gagwe, a mo utlwa a le kwa legodimong le le boitshepo la gagwe ka thata e e pholosang ya letsogo le le jang la gagwe." 
Psalms20:8 Bangwe ba boka dikoloi tsa tlhabano, ba bangwe ba boka dipitse; mme rona re baka leina la Morena, Modimo wa rona." 
Psalms20:9 Bao, ba obegile ba wa; mme rona re tsogile re eme ka tlhomamo." 
Psalms20:10 Morena, thusa kgosi, o re utlwe mogang re go bitsang." 
Psalms21:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms21:2 Morena, kgosi e itumelela thata ya gago, e dudueletsa thuso ya gago bogolo jang ne!" 
Psalms21:3 O e neile se pelo ya yona e se eletsang; ga o a ka wa gana kopo ya molomo wa yona. Sela. 
Psalms21:4 Gonne o ne wa e kgatlhantsha ka ditshegofatso tsa molemo, wa e rwesa tlhogo ka serwalo sa gouta e ntlentle." 
Psalms21:5 E kopile bophelo mo go wena, o bo e neile, botshelo jo boleele ka gale le ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms21:6 Tlotlo ya yona e kgolo ka thuso ya gago; o beile tlotlo le borena mo go yona. 
Psalms21:7 Gonne o e beile go nna lesego le legolo thata ka bosakhutleng, wa e itumedisa ka boitumelo fa pele ga gago." 
Psalms21:8 Gonne kgosi e ikanya Morena; mme ka bopelotlhomogi jwa Mogodimodimo ga e kitla e theekela. 
Psalms21:9 Letsogo la gago le tla fitlha kwa babeng botlhe ba gago; letsogo le le jang le tla tshwara ba ba go tlhoileng. 
Psalms21:10 O tla ba direla jaaka pesetso ya molelo, mogang o ipontshang. Morena o tla ba metsa mo bogaleng jwa gagwe, molelo o tla ba nyeletsa." 
Psalms21:11 Leungo la bona o tla le nyeletsa, o le tlosa mo lefatsheng, le losika lwa bona mo baneng ba batho." 
Psalms21:12 Ba ne ba go gopoletse bosula, ba go logetse maano, mme ba sa nonofa go a dirafatsa." 
Psalms21:13 O tla ba hularisa ka go lebisa dithapo tsa bora jwa gago kwa difatlhegong tsa bona. 
Psalms21:14 Morena, nanoga o bonale ka thata ya gago; mme re tla opelela bonatla jwa gago, re bo baka." 
Psalms22:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi ka moopelo wa: “Tshephe ya mahube.” 
Psalms22:2 Modimo wa me, Modimo wa me, o ntlogeletseng, wa nna kgakala le thuso ya me, kgakala le mafoko a selelo se segolo sa me?" 
Psalms22:3 Modimo wa me, ke bitsa motshegare, mme ga o nkarabe; le mo bosigong ke a lela, mme ga ke gomotsege." 
Psalms22:4 Etswe o le Moitshepi, wena yo o agileng mo dipakong tsa Iseraele." 
Psalms22:5 Borraetsho ba ne ba go ikanya, ba ne ba ikanya, mme o ba golole." 
Psalms22:6 Ba ne ba goela kwa go wena, mme ba pholosiwa; ba ne ba go ikanya, mme ba se ka ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong." 
Psalms22:7 Mme nna ke seboko fela, ga ke motho; ke lesotlwa la batho le monyatsegi wa morafe." 
Psalms22:8 Botlhe ba ba mponang ba sotla ka nna, ba petla melomo, ba thukhutha ditlhogo ba re:" 
Psalms22:9 “O pitiketse matshwenyego kwa Moreneng! A ene a mo golole, a mo pholose, fa a kgatlhwa ke ene.”" 
Psalms22:10 Ee, ke wena yo o nntshitseng mo mmeleng wa ga mme; wa ntapolosa mo mabeleng a ga mme." 
Psalms22:11 Ke sa le ke latlhelwa mo go wena, fa ke tsalwa; o Modimo wa me go tswa botsalong jwa me." 
Psalms22:12 Se nne kgakala le nna, gonne pitlagano e gaufi, mme ga go na mothusi." 
Psalms22:13 Dipoo tse dintsi di ntikanyeditse; dipoo tse di thata tsa Basane di ntikile. 
Psalms22:14 Di nkatlhamiseditse magano a tsona, jaaka tau e e gagolang, e e dumang." 
Psalms22:15 Ke tsholotswe jaaka metsi, marapo otlhe a me a lokologile; pelo ya me e fetogile ya nna jaaka mmotu, e gakologile mo teng ga me." 
Psalms22:16 Thata ya me e omeletse jaaka lengetana, loleme lwa me lo kgomaretse magalapa a me; mme o ntatsa mo loroleng lwa loso." 
Psalms22:17 Gonne dintšwa di ntikanyeditse, lesomo la basenyi le ntsentse gare; ba phuntse diatla tsa me le dinao tsa me." 
Psalms22:18 Nka bala marapo otlhe a me, mme bone ba a mpona, ba ntebile ba kgatlhega." 
Psalms22:19 Ba kgaogana diaparo tsa me, mme kojwana ya me ba e tlhamela tengwa." 
Psalms22:20 Mme wena, Morena, se nne kgakala le nna, wena thata ya me, itlhaganelele go nthusa." 
Psalms22:21 Pholosa botshelo jwa me mo tšhakeng, botshelo jo bo nosi jwa me mo thateng ya ntšwa." 
Psalms22:22 Nkgolole mo leganong la tau, o nkarabe (ka go mpholosa) mo dinakeng tsa dinare." 
Psalms22:23 Ke rata go bolelela ba ga etsho leina la gago, ke go tumisa mo phuthegong:" 
Psalms22:24 “Lona ba lo boifang Morena, mo galaletseng; lona boora Jakobe lotlhe, mo tlotleng; lona boora Iseraele lotlhe, mmoifeng!" 
Psalms22:25 Gonne ga a ka a nyatsa tlalelo ya motlalelwi, le e seng go tenwa ke yona, le e seng go mo fitlhela sefatlhego, mme e rile a goela thuso kwa go ene, a mo ngoka.”" 
Psalms22:26 Pako ya me mo phuthegong e kgolo e tswa mo go wena. Maikano a me ke tla a dirafatsa fa pele ga bone ba ba mmoifang. 
Psalms22:27 Ba ba pelonolo ba tla ja, ba kgora; ba ba batlang Morena ba tla mo galaletsa. A dipelo tsa lona di lapologe ka bosakhutleng!" 
Psalms22:28 Dikhutlo tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tla gakologelwa, di boela kwa Moreneng, mme ditshika tsotlhe tsa merafe di tla obamela fa pele ga gago." 
Psalms22:29 Gonne bogosi ke jwa Morena, o busa merafe." 
Psalms22:30 Botlhe ba ba robetseng mo diphupung ba tla obamela ene fela; botlhe ba ba fologetseng kwa leroleng ba tla khubama fa pele ga gagwe, mme ke ene yo mowa wa me o mo phelelang." 
Psalms22:31 Losika lo lo tlang lo tla mo direla; losika lo lo kwa pele lo tla bolelelwa ka ga Morena. 
Psalms22:32 Ba tla tla ba itsise morafe o o tla tsalwang tshiamo ya gagwe gore Morena o dirile jalo. 
Psalms23:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Morena ke modisa wa me, ga nkitla ke tlhoka sepe." 
Psalms23:2 O mpothisa mo mafulong a matalana, o nkgogela kwa metsing a tapoloso." 
Psalms23:3 O lapolosa mowa wa me; o ntsamaisa mo ditseleng tsa tshiamo ka ntlha ya leina la gagwe. 
Psalms23:4 Le fa ke tsamaya mo mogorogorong wa moriti wa loso, ga nkitla ke boifa bosula bope; gonne o na le nna. Tsamma ya gago le seikokotlelo sa gago di a nkgomotsa." 
Psalms23:5 O baakanya bojelo fa pele ga me go lebagana le baba ba me; o ntlotsa tlhogo ka lookwane; senwelo sa me se tletse, se a penologa." 
Psalms23:6 Ruri molemo le boitshwarelo di tla ntshala morago ka malatsi otlhe a bophelo jwa me; ke tla nna mo Ntlong ya Morena go ya bosakhutleng. 
Psalms24:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Lefatshe ke la Morena le tsotlhe tse di mo go lone; lefatshe le ba ba agileng mo go lone. 
Psalms24:2 Gonne o le theile mo mawatleng, a le tlhomamisa mo dinokeng." 
Psalms24:3 Ke mang yo o tla tlhatlogelang mo thabeng ya Morena? Ke mang yo o tla emang mo felong ga gagwe ga boitshepo? 
Psalms24:4 Ke ena yo o diatla di phepa, yo o pelo e itshekileng; yo o sa lebiseng mowa wa gagwe kwa boithamakong, a sa ikanele maaka." 
Psalms24:5 Ena yoo o tla amogela tshegofatso mo Moreneng le tshiamo mo Modimong wa pholoso ya gagwe. 
Psalms24:6 Ke lone losika lwa ba ba o tlhokomelang, ba ba batlang sefatlhego sa gago, Modimo wa ga Jakobe. Sela." 
Psalms24:7 Lona dikgoro, tsholetsang ditlhogo; lona mejako ya bogologolo tala, itsholetseng gore Kgosi ya kgalalelo e tsene." 
Psalms24:8 Mme Kgosi ya kgalalelo ke mang? Ke Morena yo o thata, yo o bonatla, Morena, senatla mo tlhabanong." 
Psalms24:9 Lona dikgoro, tsholetsang ditlhogo, ee, itsholetseng, lona mejako ya bosakhutleng, gore Kgosi ya kgalalelo e tsene." 
Psalms24:10 Mme Kgosi eo ya kgalalelo ke mang? Ke Morena wa masomosomo – Ke ena Kgosi ya kgalalelo. Sela. 
Psalms25:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Ke tsholeletsa mowa wa me kwa go wena, Morena." 
Psalms25:2 Modimo wa me, ke a go ikanya. A ke se tlhajwe ke ditlhong, a baba ba me ba se ntudueletse." 
Psalms25:3 Ee, mo go botlhe ba ba go lebeletseng ga go ope yo o tla tlhajwang ke ditlhong. Ba ba tla tlhajwang ke ditlhong ke ba ba ikepang kwa ntle ga lebaka." 
Psalms25:4 Morena, nkitsise ditsela tsa gago, o nthute ditselana tsa gago." 
Psalms25:5 Ntsamaise mo boammaaruring jwa gago, o nthute; gonne ke wena Modimo wa pholoso ya me; ke lebeletse wena ka gale." 
Psalms25:6 Morena, gopola mautlwelo-botlhoko a gago le maitshwarelo a gago, gonne a ntse a le teng ka bosenatshimologo." 
Psalms25:7 O se ka wa gopola maleo a bokau jwa me le ditlolo tsa me. Nkgopole ka fa boitshwarelong jwa gago ka ntlha ya molemo wa gago, Morena." 
Psalms25:8 Morena o molemo, ke wa nnete. Ke gona ka moo a rutang baleofi tsela." 
Psalms25:9 Ba ba pelonolo o ba tsamaisa ka tshiamo; ba ba pelonolo o ba ruta tsela ya gagwe. 
Psalms25:10 Ditselana tsotlhe tsa Morena ke tsa bopelotlhomogi le boammaaruri mo go bona ba ba bolokang kgolagano ya gagwe le ditshupo tsa gagwe. 
Psalms25:11 Morena, intshwarele molato wa me ka ntlha ya leina la gago, gonne o mogolo." 
Psalms25:12 Motho yo o boifang Morena ke mang? O tla mo ruta ka ga tsela e o tshwanetseng go e itlhaolela. 
Psalms25:13 Ene ka esi o tla aga a le tlhogonolo; losika lwa gagwe lo tla rua lefatshe. 
Psalms25:14 Morena o kopana le ba ba mmoifang, o ba itsise kgolagano ya gagwe." 
Psalms25:15 Matlho a me a lebile Morena ka gale; gonne o tla ntsha dinao tsa me mo letloeng. 
Psalms25:16 Retologela kwa go nna, o intshwarele; gonne ke nosi, mme ke tlaletswe." 
Psalms25:17 Ditlalelo tsa pelo ya me di oketsegile thata. Nnamolela mo dipatikegong tsa me. 
Psalms25:18 Leba tlalelo ya me le thekisego ya me, mme maleo a me o a intshwarele otlhe." 
Psalms25:19 Leba baba ba me, gonne ba bantsi; ba ntlhoile ka letlhoo le le bolayang." 
Psalms25:20 Boloka mowa wa me, o nkgolole. A ke se tlhajwe ke ditlhong, gonne ke a go ikanya." 
Psalms25:21 A bosenamolato le nnete di mpoloke; gonne ke go lebeletse. 
Psalms25:22 Modimo, golola Iseraele mo ditlalelong tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
Psalms26:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Ntshiamisetsa, Morena, gonne ke ntse ke tsamaya ke se na molato, ke ikantse Morena ke sa tshikinyege." 
Psalms26:2 Ntlhotlhomise, Morena, o nkeleke; tlhatlhoba diphilo tsa me le pelo ya me." 
Psalms26:3 Gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gago bo fa pele ga matlho a me, mme ke tsamaya mo boaammaaruring jwa gago." 
Psalms26:4 Ga ke nne le batho ba maaka, ga ke phele le maferefere." 
Psalms26:5 Ke ila phuthego ya basulafatsi, mme ga ke nne le baikepi." 
Psalms26:6 Ke tlhapa diatla mo bosenangmolato, mme ke tla potologa aletare ya gago, Morena," 
Psalms26:7 gore ke utlwatse lentswe la pako le go bolela dikgakgamatso tsotlhe tsa gago. 
Psalms26:8 Morena, ke rata boago jwa Ntlo ya gago, e bong felo fa kgalalelo ya gago e agileng teng." 
Psalms26:9 Se gogoreletse mowa wa me le baleofi, le e seng bophelo jwa me le batshololamadi;" 
Psalms26:10 ba go leng ditshenyo mo diatleng tsa bona, ba mabogo a a jang a bona a tletseng theko ya phaposo." 
Psalms26:11 Mme nna ke tsamaya ke se na molato. Nkgolola, Morena, o be o intshwarele." 
Psalms26:12 Lonao lwa me lo eme mo patlelong, ke tla tumisa Morena mo diphuthegong." 
Psalms27:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Morena ke lesedi la me le pholoso ya me; ke tla boifa mang? Morena ke botshabelo jwa bophelo jwa me; ke tla tshoga mang? 
Psalms27:2 E a re fa basenyi ba ntsogela go tla go ja nama ya me, e bong baganetsi ba me le baba ba me, ba kgopiwe ka nosi, ba we." 
Psalms27:3 Le fa ntwa e ka ntikanyetsa, pelo ya me ga e kitla e boifa; le fa tlhabano e ka ntlhasela, le foo ke tletse boikanyo." 
Psalms27:4 Selo se le sengwe se ke se kopileng mo go Morena, se ke se eletsang ke go re, ke nne mo Ntlong ya Morena ka metlha yotlhe ya bophelo jwa me, go leba bontle jwa Morena le go akanya mo Tempeleng ya gagwe." 
Psalms27:5 Gonne o mpoloka mo boagong jwa gagwe mo letsatsing la tlalelo; o mphitlha mo botikelong jwa Tente ya gagwe, o ntsholeletsa mo lefikeng." 
Psalms27:6 Mme jaanong tlhogo ya me e tla bo e tsholetsegile godimo ga baba ba me ba ba mo tikologong ya me, mme ke rata go tlhaba ditlhabelo tsa meduduetso mo Tenteng ya gagwe. Ke rata go opela, go opelela Morena dipako." 
Psalms27:7 Utlwa, Morena, ke kua ka lentswe le legolo; nkutlwele botlhoko, o nkarabe." 
Psalms27:8 Pelo ya me e bolela lefoko la gago le le reng: “Batlang sefatlhego sa me.” Ka moo ke batla sefatlhego sa gago, Morena." 
Psalms27:9 Se mphitlhele sefatlhego sa gago, se kobe motlhanka wa gago ka bogale; wena yo o neng o le thuso ya me, se ntatlhe, o se ntlogele, Modimo o o mpholosang." 
Psalms27:10 Rre le mme ba ntlogetse, mme Morena o a nkamogela." 
Psalms27:11 Morena, nthute tsela ya gago, o ntsamaise mo tselaneng e e papannweng ka ntlha ya baba ba me." 
Psalms27:12 O se ka wa ntsenya mo thateng ya baganetsi ba me; gonne ke tsogetswe ke basupi ba maaka, le mongwe yo o sumelang go senya." 
Psalms27:13 Fa nka bo ke sa dumela gore ke tla bona molemo wa Morena mo lefatsheng la baphedi, nka bo ke latlhegile." 
Psalms27:14 Lebelela Morena o namatshege; a pelo ya gago e tie, mme o solofele Morena." 
Psalms28:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Ke tlhaeleletsa kwa go wena, Morena; se ntidimalele, lefika la me, e se re gongwe fa o ntidimalela, ka nna jaaka bona ba ba fologelang kwa felong ga baswi." 
Psalms28:2 Utlwa lentswe la mekokotlelo ya me, fa ke goela thuso kwa go wena, fa ke tsholeletsa mabogo kwa tengteng ga Felo-fa-go-Boitshepo ga gago." 
Psalms28:3 Se nkgogoreletse le badiradibe le basiamolodi ba ba buang kagiso le bangwe-ka-bona, etswe bosula bo le mo dipelong tsa bona." 
Psalms28:4 Ba nee ka fa ditirong tsa bona le ka fa bosuleng jwa ditiro tsa bona; ba nee ka fa ditirong tsa diatla tsa bona, ba busetse se ba se dirileng." 
Psalms28:5 E re ka ba sa tlhokomele ditiro tsa Morena le e seng tiro ya diatla tsa gagwe, o tla ba rutla, mme ga a kitla a ba aga gape." 
Psalms28:6 A Morena a a bakwe; gonne o utlwile lentswe la mekokotlelo ya me. 
Psalms28:7 Morena ke thata ya me le thebe ya me; pelo ya me e ne e mo ikanya, mme ka thusega; ka moo pelo ya me e a duduetsa, mme ke mo leboga ka sefela sa me." 
Psalms28:8 Morena ke thata ya morafe wa gagwe le botshabelo jo bo pholosang jwa motlodiwa wa gagwe. 
Psalms28:9 Thusa batho ba gago, o tshegofatse boswa jwa gago, o ba fudise, o bo o ba belege go ya bosakhutleng." 
Psalms29:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Nayang Morena, lona bomorwa Modimo, nayang Morena tlotlo le thata." 
Psalms29:2 Nayang Morena tlotlo e e tshwanetseng leina la gagwe; obamelang Morena lo kgabile ka tse di boitshepo. 
Psalms29:3 Lentswe la Morena le mo godimo ga metsi; Modimo wa kgalalelo o dumisa maru. Morena o okame metsi a magolo. 
Psalms29:4 Lentswe la Morena le thata, lentswe la Morena le a galalela." 
Psalms29:5 Lentswe la Morena le robaganya ditlhare tsa mesetere. Ee, Morena o robaganya mesetere ya Lebanone." 
Psalms29:6 O karagantsha Lebanone jaaka namane le Sirione jaaka poana ya nare. 
Psalms29:7 Lentswe la Morena le a ratha, le ntshe kgabo ya molelo." 
Psalms29:8 Lentswe la Morena le roromisa sekaka; Morena o roromisa sekaka sa Kateše. 
Psalms29:9 Lentswe la Morena le tsadisa ditshephe, le fotlhe dikgwa, mme mo Tempeleng ya gagwe dilo tsotlhe di bua di re: “Kgalalelo!”" 
Psalms29:10 Morena o kile a okama Morwalela wa metsi, Morena o bile o ntse a dutse jalo e le kgosi ya bosakhutleng." 
Psalms29:11 Morena o tla naya batho ba gagwe thata, Morena o tla tshegofatsa batho ba gagwe ka kagiso." 
Psalms30:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Sefela sa kgakolo ya Tempele. 
Psalms30:2 Ke tla go godisa, Morena; gonne o ntshwatotse, mme ga o a ka wa leseletsa baba ba me go itumela ka ga me." 
Psalms30:3 Morena, Modimo wa me, ke goetse thuso kwa go wena, mme o mphodisitse." 
Psalms30:4 Morena, o tlhatlositse mowa wa me mo felong ga baswi, o mphedisitse ke le mo go bona ba ba fologelang mo moleteng." 
Psalms30:5 Opelelang Morena, lona baratwi ba gagwe, lo bake segopotso sa boitshepo jwa gagwe." 
Psalms30:6 Gonne bogale jwa gagwe ke jwa sebakanyana, mme bopelontle jwa gagwe ke jwa bophelo jotlhe. Maitsiboa go lale go le selelo, mme mo mosong go tsoge go le boitumelo." 
Psalms30:7 Mo boiketlong jwa me ke itheile ka re: “Ga nkitla ke tshikinyega ka bosenabokhutlo.” 
Psalms30:8 Morena, e rile o intumelela, wa nkemisa mo thabeng ya me e e thata; mme ya re o fitlha sefatlhego sa gago, ka tshoga." 
Psalms30:9 Ka goela kwa go wena, Morena, ka kopa Morena ka mekokotlelo ka re:" 
Psalms30:10 “Go tla go thusa eng, fa madi a me a tshololwa, ke fologela mo lebitleng? A lerole le ka go baka, a le ka bolela boammaaruri jwa gago?" 
Psalms30:11 Utlwa, Morena, o ntlhomogele pelo; Morena, o nne mothusi wa me.”" 
Psalms30:12 Selelo sa me o se mphetoletse pina, o nkapotse lesela la khutsafalo, wa ntlama ka boitumelo" 
Psalms30:13 gore kgalalelo ya me e go opelele pako, mme e se didimale. Morena, Modimo wa me, ke tla go leboga ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms31:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms31:2 Ke ikanya wena, Morena; a ke se ka ka tlhajwa ke ditlhong ka bosakhutleng; nkgolola ka tshiamo ya gago." 
Psalms31:3 Ntshekegele tsebe, o nkgolole ka bonako; o nne lefika la me la botshabelo le ntlo ya phemelo kwa thabeng ya go nthusa." 
Psalms31:4 Gonne ke wena lefika la me le botshabelo jwa me; ka moo o nkgoge, o ntsamaise ka ntlha ya leina la gago." 
Psalms31:5 O tla ntshwatola mo letloeng le ba nthaisitseng ka lone mo sephiring; gonne ke wena botshabelo jwa me. 
Psalms31:6 Ke neela mowa wa me mo seatleng sa gago, ke wena yo o nkgolotseng, Morena, Modimo o o ikanyegang." 
Psalms31:7 O ila ba ba direlang medimo ya boithamako, mme nna ke ikanya Morena." 
Psalms31:8 Ke tla duduetsa, ke itumela ka ntlha ya bopelontle jwa gago, ka o bonye pogisego ya me, wa ba wa tlhokomela mowa wa me mo ditlalelong." 
Psalms31:9 Mme ga o a ka wa ntsenya mo seatleng sa mmaba; dinao tsa me o di tlhomile mo patlelong e e atlhameng. 
Psalms31:10 Nkutlwele botlhoko, Morena, gonne ke pitlagantswe; leitlho la me le mowa wa me le mmele wa me di tlhontse ka bohutsana." 
Psalms31:11 Gonne bophelo jwa me bo fedisiwa ke tshwenyego, le dinyaga tsa me ke phegelo; thata ya me e reketla ka ntlha ya tshiamololo ya me, marapo a me a a kgobega." 
Psalms31:12 Ke nyatsegile mo baganetsing ba me botlhe, bogolo mo go ba ke bapileng nabo, ka nna yo o tshosang mo go ba ke itsanyeng nabo. Ba ba mponang kwa mmileng ba a ntshaba." 
Psalms31:13 Ke lebetswe mo pelong jaaka moswi; ke ntse jaaka nkgwana e e thubegileng. 
Psalms31:14 Gonne ke utlwa kgalo ya batho ba le bantsi. Poitshego e ntlheng tsotlhe, ka ba gakololana ka ga me; ba ikaeletse go mpolaya." 
Psalms31:15 Mme nna ke ikantse wena, Morena, ka re: “O Modimo wa me.”" 
Psalms31:16 Sebaka sa me se mo seatleng sa gago. Nkgolole mo diatleng tsa baba ba me le mo go ba ba ntelekileng. 
Psalms31:17 Phatsimisetsa motlhanka wa gago sefatlhego sa gago, o nthuse ka boutlwelo-botlhoko jwa gago." 
Psalms31:18 Morena, se ntese ka tlhajwa ke ditlhong, gonne ke goela kwa go wena. A baikepi ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, a ba tlhoke puo kwa felong ga baswi." 
Psalms31:19 A melomo ya maaka e didimadiwe, e e buang ka makgakga ka ga mosiami ka boikgantsho le lenyatso." 
Psalms31:20 Kana molemo wa gago o mogolo jang, o ò o boloketseng ba ba go boifang, wa o direla bona ba ba go ikanyang fa pele ga bana ba batho." 
Psalms31:21 O ba fitlha mo botikelong jwa sefatlhego sa gago ka ntlha ya dikhuduo tsa batho; o ba fitlha mo motlaaganeng gore ba se ka ba angwa ke dikgantsho tsa diteme. 
Psalms31:22 A Morena a bakwe, ka a ntiretse boutlwelo-botlhoko jwa gagwe ka mokgwa o o gakgamatsang mo motseng o o thata." 
Psalms31:23 Le gale nna, e rile ke tshoga, ka re: “Ke kgaotswe, ke tlositswe fa pele ga matlho a gago.” Mme ruri, ya re ke goela thuso kwa go wena, wa utlwa selelo sa mekokotlelo ya me." 
Psalms31:24 Ratang Morena, lona lotlhe baratiwa ba gagwe. Morena o boloka ba ba ikanyegang; mme o duela ka botlalo ene yo o dirang ka boikgantsho." 
Psalms31:25 Nametsegang, mme a dipelo tsa lona di natlafale, lona lotlhe ba lo lebelelang Morena." 
Psalms32:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Sefela sa thuto. Go sego ena yo o itshwaretsweng ditlolo, yo boleo jwa gagwe bo bipilweng." 
Psalms32:2 Go sego motho yo Morena o sa mmaleleng tshiamololo, yo tsietso e se yong mo moweng wa gagwe." 
Psalms32:3 E rile ke didimala, marapo a me a remega ka go duma ga me ka letsatsi lotlhe." 
Psalms32:4 Gonne letsogo la gago le ne le le bokete mo go nna bosigo le motshegare; bokgola jwa me jwa fetoga komelelo ya selemo. Sela. 
Psalms32:5 Ke ne ka go ipobolela boleo jwa me, mme ka se ka ka fitlha tshiamololo ya me. Ke rile: “Ke tla ipobolela Morena ditlolo tsa me,” mme wa tlosa molato wa boleo jwa me. Sela" 
Psalms32:6 Ka ntlha ya moo modumedi mongwe le mongwe o tla go rapela mo motlheng o ò ka bonwang ka ona; ruri, le fa merwalela e tla gwasa, ga e kitla e fitlha fa go ena." 
Psalms32:7 Ke wena phemelo ya me; o nkefosa mo pitlaganong; o ntikanyetsa ka difela tsa kgololego. Sela. 
Psalms32:8 Ke tla go itsise, ke go ruta tsela e o tshwanetseng go e tsamaya; ke tla go gakolola ke tsepile matlho a me mo go wena." 
Psalms32:9 Se tshwaneng le pitse gongwe moulwe tse di se nang tlhaloganyo, tse mekgabo ya tsona e leng tshipi le marapo go di thapisa, ka di gana go go atamela." 
Psalms32:10 Moikepi o na le mahutsana a mantsi; mme yo o ikanyang Morena, boutlwelo-botlhoko bo tla mo dikanyetsa." 
Psalms32:11 Itumeleng mo Moreneng, lo bo lo ipele, lona basiami; duduetsang, lona lotlhe ba lo dipelo di tlhamaletseng." 
Psalms33:1 Lona basiami, dudueletsang Morena, sefela sa pako se tshwanetse batlhamaladi." 
Psalms33:2 Bakang Morena ka kitara, lo mo opelele ka harepa e e dithapo di le some." 
Psalms33:3 Mo opeleleng sefela se sešwa, letsang sentle ka tumo e kgolo;" 
Psalms33:4 gonne lefoko la Morena ke nnete, le go dira gotlhe ga gagwe go a ikanyega." 
Psalms33:5 O rata tshiamo le molao; lefatshe lotlhe le tletse bopelotlhomogi jwa Morena. 
Psalms33:6 Magodimo a dirilwe ka lefoko la Morena, le lesomo lotlhe la ona ka mowa wa molomo wa gagwe." 
Psalms33:7 O kgobokanya metsi a lewatle e kete mo lekukeng, o tsenya merwalela mo difaleng." 
Psalms33:8 A lefatshe lotlhe le boife Morena, a botlhe ba ba agileng mo lefatsheng ba rorome fa pele ga gagwe." 
Psalms33:9 Gonne o buile, mme ga direga; a laola, ga ba ga nna teng." 
Psalms33:10 Morena o nyeleditse kgakololo ya ditšhaba, a senya maano a merafe." 
Psalms33:11 Kgakololo ya Morena e tlhomame ka bosakhutleng, le maano a pelo ya gagwe go ya tshikatshikeng." 
Psalms33:12 Go sego morafe o Morena e leng Modimo wa ona, batho ba a ba itlhaoletseng go nna boswa jwa gagwe." 
Psalms33:13 Morena o leba a le mo legodimong, o bona bana ba batho botlhe;" 
Psalms33:14 a le mo felong ga boago jwa gagwe, o lebile botlhe ba ba agileng mo lefatsheng;" 
Psalms33:15 ena yo o bopileng dipelo tsa bona botlhe, yo o tlhokometseng ditiro tsotlhe tsa bona." 
Psalms33:16 Kgosi ga e fenye ka mophato o mogolo; mogale ga a pholosiwe ka thata e kgolo. 
Psalms33:17 Pitse ga e ikanyege go ka isa phenyong; ga e ka ke ya pholosa ope ka thata e kgolo ya yona. 
Psalms33:18 Bonang, leitlho la Morena le lebile bona ba ba mmoifang, bona ba ba lebeletseng bopelontle jwa gagwe," 
Psalms33:19 gore a pholose maphelo a bone mo losong, le go ba phedisa, fa ba le mo tlaleng." 
Psalms33:20 Mewa ya rona e lebeletse Morena; ke ena thuso ya rona le thebe ya rona. 
Psalms33:21 Gonne dipelo tsa rona di itumela mo go ena, ka re ikanya leina le le boitshepo la gagwe." 
Psalms33:22 Morena, a bopelontle jwa gago bo nne mo go rona, fela ka fa re go lebeletseng ka teng." 
Psalms34:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita, e a e kwadileng jale, fa a itira setsenwa fa pele ga Abimelege, yo o neng a mo leleka, mme a tsamaya." 
Psalms34:2 Ke rata go baka Morena ka metlha yotlhe, tumiso ya gagwe e tla nna mo molomong wa me ka gale." 
Psalms34:3 Mowa wa me o tla ipelafatsa ka Morena. Baitshoki ba tla utlwa, ba itumela." 
Psalms34:4 Godisang Morena le nna, a re tlotlomatseng leina la gagwe mmogo." 
Psalms34:5 Ke ne ka batla Morena, mme a nkaraba, a ba a nkgolola mo dipoifong tsotlhe tsa me." 
Psalms34:6 Ba ba lebileng ena ba galalela difatlhego, mme difatlhego tsa bona ga di kitla di sosobana." 
Psalms34:7 Motho yo wa batho o biditse, mme Morena a utlwa, a mo thusa mo ditlalelong tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
Psalms34:8 Moengele wa Morena o thibelela tikologong ya bona ba ba mmoifang, a ba golola." 
Psalms34:9 Lekang lo bone, fa Morena a le molemo; go sego monna yo o itiketsang ka ene." 
Psalms34:10 Boifang Morena, lona baitshepi ba gagwe; gonne ba ba mmoifang ga ba nke ba tlhoka sepe." 
Psalms34:11 Ditawana di a tlhoka, di bolawa ke tlala; mme ba ba batlang Morena bona ga ba kitla ba tlhoka molemo ope." 
Psalms34:12 Bana ke lona, tlayang lo ntheetse! Ke rata go lo ruta go boifa Morena." 
Psalms34:13 Motho ke ofe yo o eletsang bophelo, a rata bontsi jwa malatsi gore a tle a bone molemo?" 
Psalms34:14 Thibela loleme lwa gago mo bosuleng, le molomo wa gago gore o se ka wa bua tsietso." 
Psalms34:15 Thibogela bosula, o dire molemo; batla kagiso, o bo o e latelele." 
Psalms34:16 Matlho a Morena a lebile ba ba mmoifang; ditsebe tsa gagwe di sekegetswe go lelela thuso ga bona. 
Psalms34:17 Sefatlhego sa Morena se kgatlhanong le ba ba dirang bosula gore a fedise go gopolwa ga bona mo lefatsheng. 
Psalms34:18 Basiami ba biditse, mme Morena a utlwa, a ba golola mo ditlalelong tsotlhe tsa bona." 
Psalms34:19 Morena o gaufi le ba ba pelo di thubegileng, o pholosa ba ba mewa e kgobegileng." 
Psalms34:20 Dipogo tsa mosiami di dintsi, mme Morena o di mo namolela tsotlhe." 
Psalms34:21 O boloka marapo otlhe a gagwe, ga go lepe la ona le le robiwang." 
Psalms34:22 Bosula bo bolaya moikepi; ba ba tlhoileng mosiami ba tla bonwa molato. 
Psalms34:23 Morena o golola mewa ya batlhanka ba gagwe; botlhe ba ba mo ikanyang ga ba kitla ba bonwa molato. 
Psalms35:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Morena, ganetsa ba ba nkganetsang; tlhabana le ba ba tlhabanang le nna." 
Psalms35:2 Tsaya thejana le thebe, mme o nanogele thusong ya me." 
Psalms35:3 Somola lerumo o thibelele babogisi ba me tsela; raya mowa wa me o re: “Ke nna pholoso ya gago.” 
Psalms35:4 Ba ba batlang go mpolaya, a ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, ba nyatsege; ba ba logang maano go ntirela kotsi, a ba busediwe kwa morago, ba sosobane." 
Psalms35:5 A ba nne jaaka moko mo phefong, a moengele wa Morena a tle a ba kgophole." 
Psalms35:6 A tsela ya bona e nne lefifi le boreledi, fa moengele wa Morena a ba leleka." 
Psalms35:7 Gonne ba nkaletse letloa la bona ka bomo mo sephiring, ba nkepela lemena kwa ntle ga molato." 
Psalms35:8 A tshenyego e mo wele a sa itse; a letloa le a le adileng sephiring le tshware ene; a a wele mo gopong ka esi. 
Psalms35:9 Foo mowa wa me o tla ipela mo Moreneng, o itumelela thuso ya gagwe." 
Psalms35:10 Marapo a me otlhe a tla re: “Morena, ke mang yo o tshwanang nao, yo o gololang motlhomolapelo mo go yo o mo fetang ka thata, le motho wa batho le mohumanegi mo go yo o mo thukhuthang?”" 
Psalms35:11 Go tsoga basupi ba pateletso, ba mpotsa se ke sa se itseng." 
Psalms35:12 Ba ntuela molemo ka bosula; ke nosi fela. 
Psalms35:13 Mme nna, e rile ba lwala, ka apara kgetse, ka bogisa mowa wa me ka go itima dijo; mme thapelo ya me e boetse sehubeng sa me."
