Psalms35:14 Ke boaboetse jaaka e kete ke tsala ya me, e kete ke ngwana wa ga rre; ke tsamaile ke tlhoname ka bohutsana jaaka motho yo o lelelang mmaagwe." 
Psalms35:15 Mme koô ya me ba a e itumelela, ba a phuthega; basotli le ba ke sa ba itseng ba a nkgobokanela, ba a kgoba, ga ba didimale." 
Psalms35:16 Le ba e seng ba sepe ba a sotlasotla, ba ntšhenela meno." 
Psalms35:17 Morena, o tla leba fela sebaka se se kana kang? Falodisa mowa wa me mo ditshenyong tsa bona, o o osi wa me mo ditawaneng." 
Psalms35:18 Ke tla go leboga mo phuthegong e kgolo, ke go baka mo bathong ba bantsi." 
Psalms35:19 Ba e leng baba ba me, ba se na lebaka, a ba se intumelele; a ba ba ntlhoileng ka bomo fela ba se getle ka leitlho." 
Psalms35:20 Gonne ga ba bue kagiso, ba akanya mafoko a tsietso ka ga badidimadi mo lefatsheng." 
Psalms35:21 Ba nkatlhamiseditse melomo ba re: “Ahee, ahee, matlho a rona a bonye!”" 
Psalms35:22 Wena Morena o bonye; o se ka wa didimala; Morena, o se ka wa nna kgakala le nna." 
Psalms35:23 Thanya o nanogele go nkatlholela mo tshekong ya me, Modimo wa me le Morena wa me." 
Psalms35:24 Nkatlhola ka fa tshiamong ya gago, Morena, Modimo wa me, gore ba se itumele ka nna," 
Psalms35:25 ba se bue mo dipelong tsa bona ba re: “Ahee, re rata jalo!” ba se re: “Re mo meditse.”" 
Psalms35:26 A ba ba itumelelang tlalelo ya me ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, ba sosobane mmogo. A ba ba inkgodisetsang ba apesiwe nyatsego le ditlhong." 
Psalms35:27 A ba ba natefelwang ke tshiamo ya me ba ipele, ba itumele, ba bue ka gale ba re: “Morena o mogolo yo o kgatlhwang ke kagiso ya motlhanka wa gagwe.”" 
Psalms35:28 Mme loleme lwa me lo tla bolela tshiamo ya gago le pako ya gago letsatsi lotlhe. 
Psalms36:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita, motlhanka wa Morena, e e kwaletsweng moopedisi." 
Psalms36:2 Mosenyi a re: “Maikaelelo a ka ke go senya.” Go tshoga Modimo ga a go itse. 
Psalms36:3 Gonne o ikgatlha ka esi, a ithaya a re, molato wa gagwe ga o kitla o bonwa le e seng go tlhoiwa." 
Psalms36:4 Mafoko a molomo a gagwe ke boikepo le tsietso; o gana go dira tsa botlhale le tse di molemo. 
Psalms36:5 O akanya boikepo mo bolaong jwa gagwe; o ikemisa mo tseleng e e seng molemo; bosula ga a bo tlhoe. 
Psalms36:6 Morena, bopelontle jwa gago bo fitlha kwa magodimong; boikanyego jwa gago bo fitlha kwa marung." 
Psalms36:7 Tshiamo ya gago e ntse jaaka dithaba tsa Modimo; dikatlholo tsa gago ke boteng jo bogolo jwa metsi. Morena, o thusa batho le diphedi." 
Psalms36:8 Kana bopelontle jwa gago, Modimo, bo molemolemo jang ne! Bana ba batho ba tshabele mo moriting wa diphuka tsa gago." 
Psalms36:9 Ba ja monate wa monono wa Ntlo ya gago; o ba nosa mo nokeng ya dinatefo tsa gago. 
Psalms36:10 Gonne motswedi wa bophelo o fa go wena; re bona lesedi ka lesedi la gago. 
Psalms36:11 Tsweletsa bopelontle jwa gago mo go bona ba ba go itseng, le tshiamo ya gago mo go bona ba ba dipelo di tlhamaletseng." 
Psalms36:12 A lonao lwa boikgantsho lo se nkgate, a diatla tsa baikepi di se nteleke." 
Psalms36:13 Foo badiradibe ba tla bo ba ole, ba digilwe, mme ba tla palelwa ke go tsoga." 
Psalms37:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. O se ka wa tlhodiega ka ga badirabosula; o se ka wa fufegele ba ba dirang tse di sa siamang. 
Psalms37:2 Gonne ba omelela ka bonako jaaka bojang; ba swaba jaaka matlhogela a matalana. 
Psalms37:3 Ikanye Morena, o dire se se molemo; aga mo lefatsheng, o ikanyege;" 
Psalms37:4 o natefelwe ke Morena, mme o tla go naya dikeletso tsa pelo ya gago." 
Psalms37:5 Laolela Morena tsela ya gago, o mo ikanye, ena o tla dirafatsa;" 
Psalms37:6 o tla phatsimisa tshiamo ya gago jaaka lesedi, le tshiamelo ya gago jaaka motshegare." 
Psalms37:7 Didimalela Morena, o mo lebelele. O se ka wa ngongoregela yo o sego mo tseleng ya gagwe, le monna yo o dirafatsang maano a boferefere." 
Psalms37:8 Lesa bogale, o tlogele kgakalo; o se ka wa tuka bogale; bo isa bosuleng." 
Psalms37:9 Gonne badirabosula ba tla nyelediwa; mme ba ba lebeletseng Morena bona ba tla rua lefatshe. 
Psalms37:10 Go sa le sebakanyana fela moikepi o tla ba a se yo; fa o tlhokomela felo ga gagwe, ga o kitla o mo fitlhela." 
Psalms37:11 Mme ba ba pelonomi bona ba tla rua lefatshe, ba natefelwa ke letlotlo la kagiso." 
Psalms37:12 Moikepi o logela mosiami maano, a mo šenele meno." 
Psalms37:13 Morena o a mo tshega, ka a bona gore letsatsi la gagwe le a atamela." 
Psalms37:14 Baikepi ba somotse lerumo, ba oba bora jwa bona go diga motlalelwi le mohumanegi, le go bolaya ba motsamao o o lolameng." 
Psalms37:15 Marumo a bona a tla tlhaba dipelo tsa bona ka bosi, le mara a bona a tla rojwa." 
Psalms37:16 Bobotlana jwa mosiami bo gaisa letlotlo la baikepi ba bantsi. 
Psalms37:17 Gonne mabogo a baikepi a tla rojwa; mme yo o tshegetsang basiami ke Morena. 
Psalms37:18 Morena o itse malatsi a ba ba tlhamaletseng; boswa jwa bona bo tla nna ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms37:19 Ga ba nke ba tlhajwa ke ditlhong mo motlheng o o bosula; mo malatsing a tlala ba tla kgora. 
Psalms37:20 Mme baikepi ba tla latlhega; baba ba Morena ba ba ntseng jaaka bontle jwa bofulo ba nyeletse, ba fedile jaaka musi." 
Psalms37:21 Moikepi o a adima, mme a se ke a buse; mme mosiami ena o pelonomi, o a fa." 
Psalms37:22 Gonne ba ba tshegofadiwang ke ena ba tla rua lefatshe; mme ba ba hutsiwang ke ena bona ba tla nyelediwa. 
Psalms37:23 Morena o tlhomamisa dikgato tsa monna, fa a kgatlhwa ke tsela ya gagwe." 
Psalms37:24 Le fa a ka wa, ga a wele ruri; gonne Morena o tshwere seatla sa gagwe." 
Psalms37:25 Ke ne ke le lekau, mme jaanong ke tsofetse. Mme ga ke ise nke ke bone mosiami a tlogetswe, le fa e le bana ba gagwe ba kopa dijo." 
Psalms37:26 O tlhola a atswa, a adima ka metlha yotlhe, mme losika lwa gagwe lo tshegofale." 
Psalms37:27 Thibogela bosula, o dire molemo, mme o tla aga ka bosakhutleng;" 
Psalms37:28 gonne Morena o rata tshiamo; ga a tlogele baitshepi ba gagwe, mme ba bolokwa ka bosakhutleng. Losika lwa badirabosula lo a nyelediwa." 
Psalms37:29 Basiami ba tla rua lefatshe, ba agela ruri mo go lone." 
Psalms37:30 Molomo wa mosiami o bolela tsa botlhale; loleme lwa gagwe lo bua se se siameng. 
Psalms37:31 Molao wa Modimo wa gagwe o mo pelong ya gagwe; dikgato tsa gagwe ga di theekele. 
Psalms37:32 Moikepi o laletse mosiami, o batla go mmolaya." 
Psalms37:33 Mme Morena ga a mo leseletse go wela mo seatleng sa gagwe, le e seng go mmona molato, fa a sekisiwa ke moikepi." 
Psalms37:34 Lebelela Morena, o tshware tsela ya gagwe, mme o tla go godisa gore o rue lefatshe. O tla bona ka kgatlhego, fa baikepi ba nyelediwa." 
Psalms37:35 Ke bonye moikepi wa mogateledi; a nama jaaka setlhare se setala sa naga. 
Psalms37:36 E rile ke feta gape, a bo a se yo; ya re ke mmatla, a se ka a bonala." 
Psalms37:37 Ela modumedi tlhoko, o lebe mosiami; gonne motho wa kagiso o na le botswelelopele." 
Psalms37:38 Mme batlodi bona ba tla senngwa mmogo; botswelelopele jwa baikepi bo tla nyelediwa. 
Psalms37:39 Thuso ya basiami e tswa go Morena; ke ena botshabelo jwa bona mo motlheng wa tlalelo. 
Psalms37:40 Morena o a thusa, a ba namolele; o ba namolela mo baikeping, a ba pholose, ka ba mo ikanya." 
Psalms38:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita ya kgopotso mo tshupelong ya tebogo. 
Psalms38:2 Morena, se nkgalemele ka bogale jwa gago, se nkwatlhae mo kgakalong ya gago." 
Psalms38:3 Gonne metsu ya gago e ntsepame, seatla sa gago se nkgateletse." 
Psalms38:4 Ga go na boitekanelo bope mo nameng ya me ka ntlha ya kgakalo ya gago, le e seng pholo epe mo marapong a me ka ntlha ya boleo jwa me." 
Psalms38:5 Gonne ditshiamololo tsa me di khurumeditse tlhogo ya me; di nkimela jaaka morwalo o o bokete. 
Psalms38:6 Dintho tsa ka di a nkga, di tswa boladu ka ntlha ya bosilo jwa me." 
Psalms38:7 Ke koname, ke hutaganye gotlhe; ke tlhola ke tsamaya ke hutsafetse." 
Psalms38:8 Gonne letheka la me le tletse ditlhabi; ga go na boitekanelo bope mo nameng ya me. 
Psalms38:9 Ke koafetse, ke tapetegile gotlhe, ke dumisiwa ke phegelo ya pelo ya me." 
Psalms38:10 Morena, tlhologelelo yotlhe ya ka e go senogetse; phegelo ya ka ga e a go fitlhegela." 
Psalms38:11 Pelo ya me e a kubakuba, thata ya me e ntlogetse, lesedi la matlho a me le lone ga ke na nalo." 
Psalms38:12 Ba ba nthatang le ditsala tsa me ba emetse petso ya me fa thoko, le losika lwa me lo emetse kwa kgakala." 
Psalms38:13 Mme ba ba tsomang bophelo jwa me ba nthaisitse; ba ba batlang go ntsenya mo tlalelong ba rera tatlhego ya ka, ba ntse ba akanya tsietso letsatsi lotlhe." 
Psalms38:14 Mme nna ke ntse jaaka sesusu, ga ke utlwe; ke ntse jaaka semumu se se sa tsweng molomo." 
Psalms38:15 Ee, ke tshwana le monna yo o sa utlweng, yo go se nang kganetso mo molomong wa gagwe." 
Psalms38:16 Gonne ke lebeletse wena, Morena o tla araba, Morena, Modimo wa me." 
Psalms38:17 Kana ke rile: “A ba ba inkgodisetsang ba se itumele ka nna, fa lonao lwa ka lo theekela.”" 
Psalms38:18 Gonne ke gaufi le go wa; botlhoko jwa ka bo ntse bo mpolaya ka gale. 
Psalms38:19 Ee, ke ipobola molato wa ka, ke itshôla ka ntlha ya boleo jwa ka." 
Psalms38:20 Mme baba ba me ba tlhaga, e bile ba thata, le ba ba ntlhoileng fela ba ntsifetse." 
Psalms38:21 Le ba ba ntuelang molemo ka bosula ba emelanye le nna, ka ke latelela se se molemo." 
Psalms38:22 O se ka wa ntlogela, Morena; o se ka wa nna kgakala le nna, Modimo wa me." 
Psalms38:23 A o ko o itlhaganele go nthusa, Morena, Mopholosi wa ka." 
Psalms39:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng Jeduthune, moopedisi." 
Psalms39:2 Ke rile: “Ke tla tlhokomela ditsela tsa me gore ke se leofe ka loleme lwa me; ke tla bofa molomo wa me ka mogala, ka moikepi a sa ntse a le fa pele ga me.”" 
Psalms39:3 Ke ne ke le semumu ka tidimalo; ke ne ke didimala, ke se na molomo, mme botlhoko jwa me jwa butsologa." 
Psalms39:4 Pelo ya me e ne e gotela mo teng ga me, molelo o tuka ka go akanya ga me, ke bua ka loleme lwa me ka re:" 
Psalms39:5 “Morena, nkitsise bokhutlo jwa me, le selekanyo sa malatsi a me gore ke sefe, ke tle ke lemoge ka fa ke felang ka teng.”" 
Psalms39:6 Bona, o lekantse malatsi a me ka dikatlhamo tsa seatla; sebaka sa bophelo jwa me ga se sa sepe fa pele ga gago. Ee, motho mongwe le mongwe yo o leng teng ke wa lefelafela la mmatota. Sela." 
Psalms39:7 Ruri, motho o tsamaya jaaka moriti, ruri ba itlhobaeletsa boithamako; o kgobela mahumo, mme ga a itse gore a tla jewa ke mang." 
Psalms39:8 Mme jaanong, Morena, ke lebeletse eng? Tsholofelo ya me e mo go wena." 
Psalms39:9 Nkgolole mo ditlolong tsa me tsotlhe, o se ka wa ntira kgobo ya masilo." 
Psalms39:10 Ke didimetse, ga ke tswe molomo; gonne go dirile wena." 
Psalms39:11 Tlosa petso ya gago mo go nna; ke nyelediwa ke titeo ya seatla sa gago. 
Psalms39:12 Fa o watlhaya motho ka dipetso ka ntlha ya tshiamololo, o nyeletse bontle jwa gagwe jaaka motoutwana; ee, motho mongwe le mongwe ke pudulo fela. Sela." 
Psalms39:13 Morena, utlwa thapelo ya me, o reetse go tlhaeletsa ga me; se didimalele dikeledi tsa me; gonne ke moeng fa go wena, ke mojaki jaaka borre botlhe." 
Psalms39:14 Thibosa matlho a gago mo go nna gore ke itumele, ke ise ke tswe mono, ka nna yo o sa tlholeng a le teng." 
Psalms40:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms40:2 Ke lebeletse Morena ka tlhologelelo; mme a itshekamisetsa go nna, a nkutlwa ke goela thuso." 
Psalms40:3 A ntshwatola mo moleteng wa tshenyego, mo maragarageng a seretse, a tlhoma dinao tsa me mo lefikeng, a tlhomamisa dikgato tsa me." 
Psalms40:4 O ntsentse sefela se sešwa mo molomong, sefela sa go baka Modimo wa rona. Bantsi ba a bona, ba a boifa, ba ikanya Morena." 
Psalms40:5 Go sego monna yo o ikanyang Morena, a sa fapogele kwa baikgantshing le kwa baikeping ba maaka." 
Psalms40:6 O re diretse dilo di le dintsi, Morena, Modimo wa me, dikgakgamatso tsa gago le megopolo ya gago; ga go yo o ka tshwantshiwang le wena. Fa nka rata go di itsise le go di bolela, go ka feta mo nka balang." 
Psalms40:7 Ga o kgatlhwe ke setlhabelo le tshupelo. O nthibolotse ditsebe. Ga o batle setlhabelo sa phiso, le fa e le sa boleo." 
Psalms40:8 Foo ke ne ka re: “Bona, ke e tla, go kwadilwe ka ga me mo lokwalong." 
Psalms40:9 Ke kgatlhwa ke go dira tse di go natefelang, Modimo wa me; molao wa gago o mo teng ga me.”" 
Psalms40:10 Ke boletse pholoso ya gago ka boitumelo mo phuthegong e kgolo. Bona, ga nka ke ka itshwara molomo, go itse wena, Morena." 
Psalms40:11 Ga ke fitlhe tshiamo ya gago mo teng ga pelo ya me. Ke bolela boikanyego jwa gago le pholoso ya gago. Phuthego e kgolo ga ke e lobele bopelotlhomogi jwa gago le boammaaruri jwa gago. 
Psalms40:12 Wena Morena, ga o kitla o ntlhokisa kutlwelo-botlhoko ya gago. Bopelotlhomogi jwa gago le boammaaruri jwa gago di tla mpoloka ka gale." 
Psalms40:13 Gonne masula a a se nang palo a ntsentse gare; melato ya me e ntshwere, ke tshaba go e leba; e feta dithiri tsa tlhogo ya me, pelo ya me e ntlogetse." 
Psalms40:14 Morena, a o ko o kgatlhwe ke go nkgolola; Morena, a o ko o itlhaganele go nthusa." 
Psalms40:15 Botlhe ba ba batlang bophelo jwa me go bo senya a ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, ba sosobane mmogo. Ba ba itumelelang tlalelo ya me a ba kate ka morago, ba tlhajwe ke kgala." 
Psalms40:16 Ba ba nthayang ba re: “Ahee, ahee!” a ba rerege ka ntlha ya ditlhong tsa bona." 
Psalms40:17 Botlhe ba ba go batlang a ba go itumelele, ba ipele; ba ba ratang pholoso ya gago a ba bue ka gale ba re: “Morena o mogolo.”" 
Psalms40:18 Le fa nna ke le mmogisegi le mohumanegi, Morena o tla ntlamela. Ke wena thuso ya me le mogolodi wa me. Modimo wa me, se diege." 
Psalms41:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms41:2 Go sego motho yo o babalelang yo o kwa tlase; Morena o tla mo thusa ka letsatsi la tlalelo. 
Psalms41:3 Morena o tla mmoloka, a mo phedisa; o tla kaiwa yo o sego mo lefatsheng; a ko o se mo neele mo keletsong ya baba ba gagwe." 
Psalms41:4 Morena o tla mo oka mo diphateng tsa bolwetse; o fetola bolwetse jotlhe jwa gagwe mo bolaong. 
Psalms41:5 Ke rile: “Morena, nkutlwele botlhoko; fodisa mowa wa me; gonne ke go leofetse.”" 
Psalms41:6 Baba ba me ba bua bosula ka ga me ba re: “O tla swa leng, leina la gagwe la nyelela?”" 
Psalms41:7 Mme e a re fa mongwe a tsile go ntekola, a bue maaka; pelo ya gagwe e ikgobokanyetse dilo tse di bosula; e re a tswela kwa ntle, a di bolele." 
Psalms41:8 Botlhe ba ba ntlhoileng ba sebelana ka ga me, ba nkeleletsa bosula ba re:" 
Psalms41:9 “O tshetswe bolwetse jo bo setlhogo; mme jaanong yo o namaletseng jalo ga a nke a tlhola a tsoga.” 
Psalms41:10 Tota le monna yo ke tsalanyeng nae, yo ke mo ikantseng, yo o jang dijo tsa me, o ntsholeleditse serethe." 
Psalms41:11 Mme wena, Morena, a o ko o nkutlwele botlhoko, o ntsose gore tseo ke tle ke di ba busetse." 
Psalms41:12 Se ke itseng ka sona gore ke a go kgatlha ke fa mmaba wa me a sa ntudueletse. 
Psalms41:13 Mme nna o ntshegeditse, ka ke se na molato, o nkemisa fa pele ga sefatlhego sa gago ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms41:14 A Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, a bakwe go tswa bosasimologeng go ya bosakhutleng. Amen, ee, a go nne jalo!" 
Psalms42:1 Sefela sa thuto sa boora Kora se se kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms42:2 Mowa wa me o lelela go wena Modimo, jaaka tholo e lelela metsi a melatswana." 
Psalms42:3 Mowa wa me o nyorelwa Modimo, Modimo o o tshelang. Ke tla fitlha leng teng gore ke bonale fa pele ga sefatlhego sa Modimo?" 
Psalms42:4 Dikeledi tsa me ke dijo tsa me bosigo le motshegare, ka ba tlhola ba nthaya ba re: “Modimo wa gago o kae?”" 
Psalms42:5 Dilo tse ke tla nna ke di gopola, ke tsholola mowa wa me mo teng ga me, jaaka ke ne ke tle ke ye le bontsi jwa batho, ke ba gogela kwa Ntlong ya Modimo, ka lentswe la tuduetso le la tebogo – lesomo le le itumelelang moletlo." 
Psalms42:6 O obegetseng, wena mowa wa me, o huduegelang mo teng ga me? Solofela mo Modimong; gonne ke tla ba ke o lebogela thuso ya sefatlhego sa ona." 
Psalms42:7 Modimo wa me, mowa wa me o obegile mo teng ga me, ke gona ka moo ke go gopolang, ke le mo lefatsheng la Joretane le mo dithabeng tsa Heremone le Misare." 
Psalms42:8 Morwalela o tlhaeleletsa morwaleleng ka kgwaso ya maphothophotho a gago; makhubu otlhe a gago le maphothophotho a nkhurumeditse. 
Psalms42:9 Mme Morena o nthomela boutlwelo-botlhoko jwa gagwe motshegare, ke na le sefela sa gagwe bosigo, e bong thapelo go Modimo wa bophelo jwa me." 
Psalms42:10 Ke rata go botsa Modimo, lefika la me, ke re: “O ntebaletseng? Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa ke tsamaya ke hutsafetse ka go bogisiwa ke mmaba?”" 
Psalms42:11 Tshotlo ya baganetsi ba me e ntlhaba jaaka lerumo mo marapong, fa ba tlhola ba nthaya ba re: “Modimo wa gago o kae?”" 
Psalms42:12 O obegetseng, wena mowa wa me, o huduegelang mo teng ga me? Solofela mo Modimong; gonne ke tla ba ke o leboga, ka e le ona thuso ya sefatlhego sa me le Modimo wa me." 
Psalms43:1 Nkatlhole, Modimo, o nkemele mo tshekong ya me le batho ba ba se nang lorato, o nkgolole mo bathong ba tsietso le ba tshiamololo." 
Psalms43:2 Gonne ke wena Modimo wa botshabelo jwa me. Mme o ntatlhetseng? Ke ka ntlhaang, fa ke tsamaya ke hutsafetse ka go bogisiwa ke mmaba?" 
Psalms43:3 Romela lesedi la gago le boammaaruri jwa gago; a di nkgoge, di nkise kwa thabeng ya gago e e boitshepo le kwa maagong a gago" 
Psalms43:4 gore ke fitlhe kwa aletareng ya Modimo, kwa Modimong wa boitumelo jwa me jo bo ntuduedisang, le go go baka ka harepa, Modimo, Modimo wa me." 
Psalms43:5 O obegetseng, mowa wa me, o huduegelang mo teng ga me? Solofela mo Modimong; gonne ke tla ba ke o leboga ka e le ona thuso ya sefatlhego sa me le Modimo wa me." 
Psalms44:1 Sefela sa thuto sa boora Kora se se kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms44:2 Modimo, re utlwile ka ditsebe, borraetsho ba re boleletse ba re, o dirile tiro mo metlheng ya bona, malatsing a bogologolo." 
Psalms44:3 O lelekile merafe ka letsogo la gago, mme bona wa ba tlhoma; o sentse ditšhaba, mme bona wa ba anamisa." 
Psalms44:4 Gonne ba ruile lefatshe, e seng ka marumo a bona, e bile ga se mabogo a bona a a ba neileng phenyo; mme ke seatla sa gago se se jang le letsogo la gago le lesedi la sefatlhego sa gago; gonne o ne o natefelwa ke bona." 
Psalms44:5 Modimo, ke wena kgosi ya me; laolela Jakobe diphenyo." 
Psalms44:6 Re tla diga baganetsi ba rona ka wena; ba ba re tsogelang re tla ba gataka ka leina la gago. 
Psalms44:7 Gonne ga ke ikanye bora jwa me, le tšhaka ya me ga e nke e mpha phenyo." 
Psalms44:8 Mme ke wena o re namolang baba, o tlhabisa ba ba re tlhoileng ditlhong." 
Psalms44:9 Re tla ipelafatsa ka gale ka Modimo; re baka leina la gago ka bosenabokhutlo. Sela. 
Psalms44:10 Le fa go ntse jalo o re latlhile, wa re tlhabisa ditlhong, mme ga o a bolola le mephato ya rona." 
Psalms44:11 O re katisa ka morago fa pele ga mmaba, mme ba ba re tlhoileng ba thopa di-tsa-rona." 
Psalms44:12 O re abetse go tlhajwa jaaka dinku; o re faladitse mo merafeng. 
Psalms44:13 O rekisitse batho ba gago ka tlhwatlhwa e e seng ya sepe; wa se ka wa bapala sepe ka tlhwatlhwa ya bona. 
Psalms44:14 O re dira nyatsego mo go ba re bapileng nabo, le tshotlo le setshego mo go ba ba tikologong ya rona." 
Psalms44:15 O re dira seane mo ditšhabeng, re ba ba thukhuthelwang ditlhogo ke merafe." 
Psalms44:16 Tshotlego ya me e eme fa pele ga me ka gale; ditlhong tsa sefatlhego sa me di nkhurumeditse 
Psalms44:17 ka ntlha ya go utlwa mosotli le mokgadi, le ka ntlha ya go bona mmaba le moipusolosetsi." 
Psalms44:18 Tsotlhe tseo di re wetse, etswe re sa go lebala le e seng go ikanyologa kgolagano ya gago." 
Psalms44:19 Dipelo tsa rona ga di a ka tsa kata ka morago, le dinao tsa rona ga di a ka tsa fapoga tsela ya gago." 
Psalms44:20 Le fa go ntse jalo o re papetletse mo mafelong a diphokojwe, wa re khurumetsa ka moriti wa loso." 
Psalms44:21 Fa re ka bo re lebetse leina la Modimo wa rona, gongwe ra otlololela modimo wa seeng mabogo," 
Psalms44:22 a Modimo o ka bo o sa go tlhotlhomisa, ka e le ona o o itseng se se fitlhegileng mo pelong?" 
Psalms44:23 Mme re tlhola re bolawa ka ntlha ya gago, re kaiwa jaaka dinku tsa tlhabo." 
Psalms44:24 Thanya, Morena! O robaletseng? Tloga o eme, o se ka wa re latlhela ruri." 
Psalms44:25 O fitlhelang sefatlhego sa gago, o lebalelang pogisego ya rona le patikego ya rona?" 
Psalms44:26 Gonne mewa ya rona e obegetse mo loroleng, mebele ya rona e kgomaretse mmu." 
Psalms44:27 Nanoga o re thuse, o be o re golole ka ntlha ya bopelotlhomogi jwa gago." 
Psalms45:1 Pesalome ya boora Kora ya thuto e e kwaletsweng moopedisi e e opelwang ka moopelo wa: “Madutla”. Sefela sa lorato. 
Psalms45:2 Pelo ya me e fofoma ka polelo e e monate. Ke tlhabela kgosi loboko lwa me; loleme lwa me ke sekwadi sa mokwadi yo o bobebe. 
Psalms45:3 O montle thata go gaisa bana ba motho; natefo e tshetswe mo melomong ya gago; ke gona ka moo Modimo o go tshegofaditseng ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms45:4 Itlame letheka ka tšhaka ya gago, wena mogale; e bong ya borena jwa gago le kgalalelo ya gago." 
Psalms45:5 Kgalalelong ya gago o tlhogole, o bolole go lwela boammaaruri le boikokobetso le tshiamo; mme a letsogo le le jang la gago le go rute ditiro tse di boitshegang." 
Psalms45:6 Metsu ya gago e looditswe, e tlhaba dipelo tsa baba ba kgosi. Merafe e wela fa tlase ga gago." 
Psalms45:7 Sedulo sa bogosi sa gago, Modimo, ke sa ka gale le sa bosakhutleng. Thobane ya bogosi jwa gago ke thobane ya tshiamo." 
Psalms45:8 O rata tshiamo, mme tshiamololo o e tlhoile; ke gona ka moo, Modimo, Modimo wa gago o go tloditseng lookwane lwa boitumelo go gaisa balekane ba gago." 
Psalms45:9 Diaparo tsotlhe tsa gago di nkga mera le mokgwapha le mookana fela, dipina tsa dikwadi tsa dithapo di go itumedisa, di utlwala mo matlong a borena a dinaka tsa tlou." 
Psalms45:10 Bomorwadia dikgosi ba kgabile mekgabo e mentlentle ya gago; mohumagadi o eme fa letsogong le le jang la gago, a kgabile ka gouta ya Ofire." 
Psalms45:11 Reetsa, morwadiaka, o bone, o sekege tsebe: Lebala morafe wa ga eno le lelapa la ga rraago." 
Psalms45:12 Mme fa kgosi e eletsa bontle jwa gago, ka e le mong-wa-go, o mo ikobele." 
Psalms45:13 Mme bomorwadia Tiro ba tla batla go go kgatlha ka dineo, bona ba ba humileng bogolo mo bathong." 
Psalms45:14 Morwadia kgosi yo o mo teng o tletse kgalalelo fela; diaparo tsa gagwe di logilwe ka ditlhale tsa gouta. 
Psalms45:15 O isiwa kwa kgosing a apere diaparo tsa melogo e e mebalabala; makgarebe, baetleetsi ba gagwe, a isiwa kwa go wena." 
Psalms45:16 A isiwa ka boitumelo le meduduetso, a tsena mo ntlong ya kgosi." 
Psalms45:17 Mo boemong jwa borraago go tla ema bomorwao. O tla ba tlhoma go nna dikgosana mo lefatsheng lotlhe. 
Psalms45:18 Ke tla itsise leina la gago mo ditshikatshikeng tsotlhe; ka moo merafe e tla go galaletsa ka gale le ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms46:1 Sefela sa boora Kora se se kwaletsweng moopedisi, se opelwa ka lentswe la motenyane." 
Psalms46:2 Modimo ke botshabelo jwa rona le thata ya rona; o itshupile gantsi e le thuso mo ditlalelong. 
Psalms46:3 Ke gona ka moo re sa boifeng, le fa lefatshe le ka roroma, le fa dithaba di ka kgokgoetsegela mo botennye jwa lewatle;" 
Psalms46:4 le fa metsi a lone a ka gwasa, a phoka lefulo, le fa dithaba di ka roroma ka go gogomoga ga lone. Sela." 
Psalms46:5 Dikelelo tsa noka di itumedisa motse wa Modimo, e bong Felo-ga-Boitshepo a maago a Mogodimodimo." 
Psalms46:6 Modimo o mo teng ga ona, ga o kitla o tshikinyega; Modimo o a o thusa, fa bosigo bo sa." 
Psalms46:7 Merafe e ne e tsosa moferefere, magosi a reketla; wa dumisa maru a ona, mme lefatshe la roroma." 
Psalms46:8 Morena wa masomosomo o na le rona, Modimo wa ga Jakobe ke botshabelo jwa rona. Sela." 
Psalms46:9 Tlayang lo lebe ditiro tsa Morena yo o dirang setlhogo mo lefatsheng; 
Psalms46:10 yo o khutlisang dintwa go ya kwa bokhutlong jwa lefatshe; yo o robang bora, a robaganye lerumo, a fise dikoloi tsa ntwa ka molelo!" 
Psalms46:11 “Khutlang lo itse, fa ke le Modimo; ke mogolo mo merafeng, ke mogolo mo lefatsheng.”" 
Psalms46:12 Morena wa masomosomo o na le rona, Modimo wa ga Jakobe ke botshabelo jwa rona. Sela." 
Psalms47:1 Pesalome ya boora Kora e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms47:2 Lona merafe yotlhe, opang diatla, dudueletsang Modimo ka kopelo ya maipelo!" 
Psalms47:3 Gonne Morena Mogodimodimo o a boitshega; ke kgosi e kgolo mo lefatsheng lotlhe. 
Psalms47:4 O digela merafe fa tlase ga rona le ditšhaba fa tlase ga dinao tsa rona. 
Psalms47:5 O re tlhophela boswa jwa rona, boipelafalelo jwa ga Jakobe yo a mo ratileng. Sela." 
Psalms47:6 Modimo o tlhatloga ka tuduetso, Morena o tlhatloga ka tumo ya phala." 
Psalms47:7 Opelelang Modimo pako, o opeleleng; opelelang kgosi ya rona pako, opelang!" 
Psalms47:8 Gonne Modimo ke kgosi ya lefatshe lotlhe; opelang sefela se se utlwalang. 
Psalms47:9 Modimo o busa merafe; Modimo o ntse mo sedulong sa bogosi sa ona se se boitshepo. 
Psalms47:10 Batlotlegi ba merafe ba phuthegile, e bong batho ba Modimo wa ga Aborahame; gonne dithebe tsa lefatshe ke tsa Modimo, o mogolo bogolo." 
Psalms48:1 Pesalome e e leng sefela sa boora Kora. 
Psalms48:2 Morena o mogolo, mme o na le go tlotlwa thata mo motseng wa Modimo wa rona, mo thabeng ya ona e e boitshepo." 
Psalms48:3 E ntle, thaba ya Sione, ka go gola ga yone; e itumelelwa ke lefatshe lotlhe. Ntlheng ya bokone go motse wa kgosi e kgolo." 
Psalms48:4 Modimo o ikitsisitse mo matlong a ona a borena, fa e le ona tshireletso." 
Psalms48:5 Gonne, bona, dikgosi di ne tsa phuthega, tsa bolola mmogo." 
Psalms48:6 E rile di tlhoma di bona, tsa tlhoka puo, tsa tshoga, tsa tshaba ka poifo." 
Psalms48:7 Thoromo e ne ya di tshwara teng, le botlhoko jwa di tshwara jaaka leralalo la mmelegi." 
Psalms48:8 O thuba dikepe tsa Tharesise ka phefo ya botlhabatsatsi. 
Psalms48:9 Re bonye mo motseng wa Morena wa masomosomo, mo motseng wa Modimo wa rona jaaka re utlwile: Modimo o tla o tlhomamisa go ya bosakhutleng. Sela." 
Psalms48:10 Modimo, re gopola bopelotlhomogi jwa gago mo Tempeleng ya gago." 
Psalms48:11 Modimo, tumiso ya gago e fitlha kwa mafelelong a lefatshe fela jaaka leina la gago; seatla se se jang sa gago se tletse tshiamo." 
Psalms48:12 A thaba ya Sione e itumele, a bomorwadia Juta ba duduetse ka ntlha ya dikatlholo tsa gago." 
Psalms48:13 Dikologang motse wa Sione, lo o potologeng, balang diturio tsa ona." 
Psalms48:14 Elang dipota tsa phemelo tsa ona tlhoko, ralalang matlo a borena a ona gore lo tle lo bolelele losika lo lo tlang lo re:" 
Psalms48:15 Modimo o ke Modimo wa rona ka gale le ka bosakhutleng; o tla re goga go ya losong. 
Psalms49:1 Pesalome ya boora Kora e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms49:2 Utlwang dilo tse, lona merafe yotlhe; reetsang lona lotlhe, ba lo agileng mo lefatsheng," 
Psalms49:3 ba babotlana le ba bagolo, bahumi le bahumanegi mmogo;" 
Psalms49:4 molomo wa me o tla bua botlhale, mme se pelo ya me e se akanyang ke tlhaloganyo." 
Psalms49:5 Ke tla sekegela seane tsebe; thabalakane ya ka ke tla e ranola ka harepa. 
Psalms49:6 Kana ke tla boifelang mo malatsing a tlalelo, fa boikepo jwa basenyetsi ba me bo ntikanyeditse," 
Psalms49:7 jwa bona ba ba ikantseng letlotlo la bona, ba belafalela khumo e kgolo ya bona?" 
Psalms49:8 Ga go na ope yo o ka rekololang morwa-rraagwe, le fa e le go ntshetsa Modimo tefo e e mo gololang –" 
Psalms49:9 gonne thekololo ya botshelo jwa gagwe e kgolo thata, mme o tla tlhobogela ruri go e ntsha –" 
Psalms49:10 gore a phelele ruri ka bosakhutleng, a se bone tshenyego." 
Psalms49:11 Gonne go bonwa gore batlhalefi ba a swa; masilo le ba ba se nang tlhaloganyo ba nyelela mmogo, mme khumo ya bona ba e tlogelela ba sele." 
Psalms49:12 Diphupu tsa bona ke tsone matlo a bona ka gale, ke maago a bona go ya tshikatshikeng, le fa ba ne ba taya mafatshe maina a bona." 
Psalms49:13 Kana motho ga a nnele ruri mo bontlengtleng; o tshwana le diphologolo tse di nyelelang. 
Psalms49:14 Ke yona tsela ya ba ba iikanyang le ya balatedi ba bona ba ba kgatlhwang ke mafoko a bona. Sela. 
Psalms49:15 Ba fologela kwa felong ga baswi jaaka dinku tlhabong, loso ke modisa wa bona; ba tlhamalalela kwa lebitleng, popego ya bona e tla nyelela mo mosong, felo ga baswi e tla nna boago jwa bona." 
Psalms49:16 Mme nna, Modimo o tla golola mowa wa me mo thateng ya felo ga baswi, gonne o tla ntshola. Sela." 
Psalms49:17 O se ka wa boifa, fa motho a huma, fa kgalalelo ya ntlo ya gagwe e totafala." 
Psalms49:18 Gonne e tla re fa a swa, a se ke a ye le sepe sa tseo tsotlhe; kgalalelo ya gagwe ga e nke e mo sala morago." 
Psalms49:19 Le fa a ipoka mo bophelong jwa gagwe a re o tlhogonolo – kana batho ba a go boka, fa o iphelela monate –" 
Psalms49:20 o tla ya kwa losikeng lwa borraagwe ba ba se kitlang ba bona lesedi ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms49:21 Motho yo o phelang mo bontlengtleng, mme a se na tlhaloganyo, o tshwana le diphologolo tse di nyelelang." 
Psalms50:1 Pesalome ya ga Asafe. Modimo Morena yo o thata o a bua, o bitsa lefatshe go tswa kwa botlhabatsatsi go ya kwa bophirimatsatsi." 
Psalms50:2 Modimo o tswa ka phatsimo kwa Sione yo o tletseng bontle. 
Psalms50:3 Modimo wa rona o e tla, mme ga o ka ke wa didimala; molelo o o nyeletsang o fa pele ga ona, mo tikologong ya ona go suma phefo e kgolo." 
Psalms50:4 O tlhaeleletsa kwa legodimong kwa godimo le kwa lefatsheng go sekisa morafe wa ona wa re: 
Psalms50:5 “Mphuthelang baratwa ba me ba ba dirileng kgolagano le nna ka setlhabelo.” 
Psalms50:6 Magodimo a bolela tshiamo ya ona; gonne Modimo ke ona o o atlholang. Sela. 
Psalms50:7 “Reetsang, batho ba me, ke rata go bua, Iseraele; ke tle ke supe ke go tiisetse gore ke nna Modimo, Modimo wa gago." 
Psalms50:8 Ga ke go kgalemele ka ntlha ya ditlhabelo tsa gago; kana ditlhabelo tsa phiso tsa gago di ntse di le fa pele ga me ka gale. 
Psalms50:9 Ga go batlege gore ke tsee poo mo sakeng la gago, le e seng diphoko kwa morakeng wa gago." 
Psalms50:10 Gonne diphologolo tsotlhe tsa sekgwa ke tsa me, le ditshedi kwa dithabeng ka dikete." 
Psalms50:11 Ke itse dinonyane tsotlhe tsa loapi le tse di phelang mo nageng: Ke tsa me. 
Psalms50:12 Fa nka tshwarwa ke tlala, ga nka ke ka go kopa; gonne lefatshe lotlhe ke la me le tse di tletseng mo go lone." 
Psalms50:13 A ke ja nama ya dipoo, a ke nwa madi a diphoko?" 
Psalms50:14 Ntshetsa Modimo setlhabelo sa tebogo ya pelo, o dirafatse maikano a o a ikanetseng Mogodimodimo." 
Psalms50:15 O mpitse ka letsatsi la tlalelo; ke tla go namolela, mme o tla nkgalaletsa.”" 
Psalms50:16 Mme moikepi ena, Modimo o mo raya o re: “O balelang melao ya me le go bua kgolagano ya me ka molomo wa gago," 
Psalms50:17 etswe o tlhoile kwatlhao, mme mafoko a me o a latlhela kwa morago ga gago?" 
Psalms50:18 Fa o bona legodu, o kgatlhwe ke go nna nalo, mme o tlhakanela boleo le baakafadi." 
Psalms50:19 Molomo wa gago ò o letlelela go bua bosula, loleme lwa gago lo loga maano a tsietso." 
Psalms50:20 O nnetse go seba morwa-rraago; o pateletsa ngwana wa ga mmaago. 
Psalms50:21 Dilo tse o di dirile, mme ka didimala. Wa ithaya wa re, ke tshwana fela le wena; ke tla go supetsa, ke di baya fa pele ga matlho a gago." 
Psalms50:22 Tlhokomelang tlhe dilo tseo, lona ba lo lebalang Modimo, gore ke se ka ka gagoganya, mme ga tlhokwa yo o pholosang." 
Psalms50:23 Yo o ntshang setlhabelo sa tebogo ya pelo o a ntlotla; yo o tlhokomelang tsela ke tla mo naya gore a bone pholoso ya Modimo.” 
Psalms51:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi," 
Psalms51:2 jale fa moporofeti Nathane a tla kwa go ene, Dafita a sena go tsena kwa go Batsheba." 
Psalms51:3 Modimo, intshwarele ka fa bopelotlhomoging jwa gago, o phimole ditlolo tsa me ka fa boutlwelong-botlhoko jo bogolo jwa gago." 
Psalms51:4 Ntlhapise sentle, o tlose tshiamololo ya me, o intshekise boleo." 
Psalms51:5 Gonne ditlolo tsa me ke a di itse, boleo jwa me bo fa pele ga me ka gale." 
Psalms51:6 Ke wena o le nosi fela yo ke go leofetseng, ka dira se mo matlhong a gago se leng bosula, gore e re fa o bua, o fitlhelwe o siame, mme o le phepa, fa o atlhola." 
Psalms51:7 Bona, ke tsaletswe mo tshiamololong, mme mmê o nkamogetse mo boleong." 
Psalms51:8 Bona, o natefelwa ke boammaaruri jwa pelo, o nkitsise botlhale mo go sa itsiweng." 
Psalms51:9 Ntlose boleo ka mosiama gore ke itsheke; ntlhapise gore ke nne mosweu go gaisa semathana. 
Psalms51:10 Nkutlwise boitumelo le thabo; a marapo a o a robileng a duduetse. 
Psalms51:11 Fitlhela maleo a me sefatlhego sa gago; o phimole ditshiamololo tsa me tsotlhe. 
Psalms51:12 Modimo, mpopele pelo e e itshekileng, o ntšhwafatse mowa o o tlhomameng mo teng ga me." 
Psalms51:13 O se ka wa ntatlha fa pele ga sefatlhego sa gago; se tlose Mowa o o Boitshepo wa gago mo go nna. 
Psalms51:14 Mpusetse boitumelo jwa pholoso ya gago, o ntshegetse ka mowa o o phuthologileng." 
Psalms51:15 Batlodi ke tla ba ruta ditsela tsa gago gore baleofi ba sokologele kwa go wena. 
Psalms51:16 Modimo, nkgolola mo molatong wa go tsholola madi, Modimo wa pholoso ya me, mme loleme lwa me lo tla dudueletsa tshiamo ya gago." 
Psalms51:17 Morena, bula molomo wa me gore o bolele tumiso ya gago." 
Psalms51:18 Gonne ga o natefelwe ke setlhabelo – nka bo ke se ntsha – ga o kgatlhwe ke setlhabelo sa phiso. 
Psalms51:19 Ditlhabelo tsa Modimo ke mowa o o kgobegileng. Wena Modimo, ga o kitla o nyatsa pelo e e kgobegileng, e e phatlogileng." 
Psalms51:20 Direla Sione molemo ka fa natefelong ya gago; aga dipota tsa Jerusalema. 
Psalms51:21 Foo o tla natefelwa ke ditlhabelo tsa tshiamo, e leng tsa phiso le tse di fisiwang gotlhe. Foo ba tla tlhabela dipoo mo aletareng ya gago." 
Psalms52:1 Sefela sa thuto sa ga Dafita se se kwaletsweng moopedisi," 
Psalms52:2 jale fa Doege wa Moetomo a tla go Saule, a mmolelela a re: “Dafita o tsenye mo ntlong ya ga Ahimelege.”" 
Psalms52:3 O ipokelang ka bosula, seganka ke wena? Bopelotlhomogi jwa Modimo bo nnetse ruri." 
Psalms52:4 Motsietsi ke wena, loleme lwa gago lo loga maano a tshenyo, jaaka logare lo lo looditsweng." 
Psalms52:5 O rata bosula bogolo go molemo; o rata maaka bogolo go boammaaruri. Sela. 
Psalms52:6 O kgatlhwa fela ke mafoko a a senyang, loleme lwa tsietso ke wena." 
Psalms52:7 Ka moo, Modimo o tla go digela ruri, o go tshwara, o go swatola mo tenteng ya gago; o tla go kumola ka medi mo lefatsheng la baphedi. Sela." 
Psalms52:8 Basiami ba tla bona, ba boifa; mme ba tla mo tshega ba re:" 
Psalms52:9 “Bonang, monna su, yo o sa dirang Modimo botshabelo jwa gagwe, mme o ikantse bogolo jwa khumo ya gagwe, a ithatafatsa ka bopelotshetlha jwa gagwe.”" 
Psalms52:10 Mme nna ke tshwana le motlhware o motalatala mo Ntlong ya Modimo. Ke ikantse bopelotlhomogi jwa Modimo ka gale le ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms52:11 Ke tla go baka ka gale, ka o dirile jalo; ke tla lebelela leina la gago; gonne le molemo fa pele ga barategi ba gago." 
Psalms53:1 Sefela sa thuto sa ga Dafita se se kwaletsweng moopedisi, se opelwa ka moopelo wa: “Bolwetse”." 
Psalms53:2 Lesilo le bua mo pelong ya lone le re: “Modimo ga o yo!” Ba a senya, ba dira tsa bokgopo jo bo maila; ga go ope yo o dirang molemo." 
Psalms53:3 Modimo o lebile bana ba batho o le mo legodimong gore o bone fa go le mongwe yo o batlang Modimo. 
Psalms53:4 Ba fapogile botlhe, ba senyega mmogo; ga go ope yo o dirang molemo, le e seng a le mongwe fela." 
Psalms53:5 A ba ba dirang tshiamololo ga ba na kitso, bona ba ba metsang batho ba me jaaka ba ja senkgwe? Modimo ga ba o bitse." 
Psalms53:6 Foo ba tla tshoga mo go boitshegang; gonne Modimo o phatlaladitse marapo a yo o go dikanyeditseng ka ntwa. O ba tlhabisitse ditlhong; gonne Modimo o ba latlhile. 
Psalms53:7 E kete pholoso ya Iseraele e ka bo e tla e e tswang mo Sione! E ne e tla re Modimo a fetola tatlhego ya morafe wa gagwe, Jakobe a duduetse, Iseraele a itumele." 
Psalms54:1 Sefela sa thuto sa ga Dafita se se kwaletsweng moopedisi, se opedisiwe ka kwadi ya dithapo," 
Psalms54:2 motlheng ole fa batho ba Sife ba tsile go Saule, ba mo raya ba re: “A Dafita ga a iphitlha fa go rona?”" 
Psalms54:3 Modimo, nthuse ka leina la gago; o ntshiamisetse ka thata ya gago." 
Psalms54:4 Modimo, utlwa thapelo ya me, o reetse mafoko a molomo wa me." 
Psalms54:5 Gonne ba ba matepe ba ntsogetse, diganka di batla botshelo jwa me; ga ba gopole Modimo. Sela." 
Psalms54:6 Bonang, Modimo ke mothusi wa me; Morena ke ene yo o tshegetsang bophelo jwa ka." 
Psalms54:7 O tla busetsa baba ba ka bosula. Ba nyeletse ka fa boammaaruring jwa gago. 
Psalms54:8 Ke tla go direla setlhabelo ka pelotshweu; ke tla leboga leina la gago, Morena, gonne le molemo;" 
Psalms54:9 gonne le nnamoletse mo tlalelong yotlhe, mme leitlho la me le lebile baba ba me ka boitumelo." 
Psalms55:1 Sefela sa thuto sa ga Dafita se se kwaletsweng moopedisi, se opedisiwe ka kwadi ya dithapo." 
Psalms55:2 Modimo, reetsa thapelo ya me, mme o se ka wa iphitlhela mekokotlelo ya me." 
Psalms55:3 Ntlhokomele o nkarabe. Ke kgarakgatshega ka tshwenyego ya me, ke ntse ke duma" 
Psalms55:4 ka ntlha ya tlhodio ya mmaba, ka ntlha ya kgatelelo ya moikepi; gonne ba ntigela mo tatlhegong, ba lwa le nna ba gaketse." 
Psalms55:5 Pelo ya me e hutagana mo teng ga me, dipoitshego tsa loso di nkwetse." 
Psalms55:6 Poifo le thoromo di a ntshwara, letshogo le nkhurumeditse." 
Psalms55:7 Mme ke ne ka re: “E kete nka bo ke na le diphuka jaaka lephoi, ke ne ke tla fofa, ke ya go nna go sele." 
Psalms55:8 Bonang, ke ne ke tla tshabela kwa kgakala, ke nna teng kwa sekakeng. Sela." 
Psalms55:9 Ke ne ke tla akofa ke batla botshabelo; ke tshaba phefo ya matsubutsubu, ke tshaba ledimo.”" 
Psalms55:10 Morena, raraanya dipuo tsa bona, o di tlhakatlhakanye; gonne ke bona tshiamololo le kganetsanyo mo motseng." 
Psalms55:11 Bosigo le motshegare ba o potologa ba le mo dipoteng tsa ona, mme mo teng ga ona go tletse boikepo le tapisego." 
Psalms55:12 Tshiamololo e mo go ona; mme patiko le tsietso ga di tloge mo patlelong ya ona. 
Psalms55:13 Kana ga se mmaba yo o ntshotlang, – nka bo ke itshoka – ga se yo o ntlhoileng, yo o inkgodisetsang, nka bo ke mo iphitlhela." 
Psalms55:14 Mme ke wena, motho-ka-nna, tsala ya ka le moikanngwi wa ka," 
Psalms55:15 ba re neng re utlwana sentle, re ya kwa Ntlong ya Modimo le masomosomo a batho." 
Psalms55:16 A ba welwe ke loso; a ba fologele kwa felong ga baswi ba ntse ba tshela; gonne bosula bo mo maagong a bona, mo teng ga bona." 
Psalms55:17 Mme nna ke bitsa Modimo, mme Morena o tla nthusa." 
Psalms55:18 Ke tla lela, ke fegelwa maitsiboa le mo mosong le motshegare, mme o tla utlwa lentswe la me." 
Psalms55:19 O golola mowa wa me ka kagiso mo tlhabanong e e ntlhasetseng; gonne ba ntikile ka bontsi. 
Psalms55:20 Modimo o o sa leng o nna bogologolo mo sedulong sa bogosi o tla utlwa, o ba kokobetsa, ka go se na tlhabologo mo go bona, ba sa boife Modimo. Sela." 
Psalms55:21 Mme o ntsheditse ba neng ba agisantse nae diatla, a senya kgolagano ya gagwe." 
Psalms55:22 Mafoko a molomo wa gagwe a borethe jaaka sereledi, pelo ya gagwe ke ntwa; dipolelo tsa gagwe di boleta go gaisa lookwane; etswe e le ditšhaka tse di somotsweng." 
Psalms55:23 Latlhela tshwenyego ya gago mo Moreneng, mme o tla go tlamela; ga a kitla a leseletsa mosiami ka gope go theekela." 
Psalms55:24 Mme Modimo, wena o tla ba digela mo bodibeng jwa tshenyego. Banna ba polao le tsietso ga ba ne ba fitlha fa gare ga dinyaga tsa bona. Mme nna ke ikanya wena." 
Psalms56:1 Loboko lwa ga Dafita lo lo kwaletsweng moopedisi, lo lo opelwang ka moopelo wa: “Leeba la maoka a a kgakala”, lo kwadilwe jale fa Bafelesita ba ne ba mo tshwere kwa Gathe." 
Psalms56:2 Modimo, intshwarele; gonne motho o mpeteletse; motlhabani o tlhola a mpitlagantse." 
Psalms56:3 Ba ba ntaletseng ba tlhola ba batla go mmetsa; gonne ba bantsi ba ba lwang le nna ka boikgodiso. 
Psalms56:4 Motlhang ke boifang, ke tla ikanya wena." 
Psalms56:5 Ka thuso ya Modimo ke tla baka lefoko la ona. Ke ikanya Modimo ke sa boife; kana batho ba ka ntirang? 
Psalms56:6 Ba tlhola ba sokamisa mafoko a me; megopolo yotlhe ya bona e lebile go ntirela bosula. 
Psalms56:7 Ba ikgobokanya, ba a lalela, ba etse direthe tsa me tlhoko, fela jaaka ba ba laletseng botshelo jwa me." 
Psalms56:8 A ba ka falola e le baikepi? Modimo, diga merafe ka bogale." 
Psalms56:9 Dikgarakgatshego tsa me o di badile, le dikeledi tsa me o di tsentse mo modutwaneng wa gago; kana di mo lokwalong lwa gago." 
Psalms56:10 Foo baba ba me ba tla boela kwa morago, motlhang ke tla bitsang. Se ke se itseng ke go re, Modimo o mo ntlheng ya me." 
Psalms56:11 Ke rata go boka lefoko la Modimo; ke rata go tumisa lefoko la Morena. 
Psalms56:12 Ke ikanya Modimo ke sa boife. Kana motho a ka ntirang? 
Psalms56:13 Modimo, ke go ikanetse maikano; ke tla a go dirafaletsa ka ditlhabelo tsa tebogo." 
Psalms56:14 Gonne o golotse bophelo jwa me mo losong le dinao tsa me mo go kgotšweng gore ke tsamae fa pele ga Modimo mo leseding la bophelo. 
Psalms57:1 Loboko lwa ga Dafita lo lo kwaletsweng moopedisi lo lo opelwang ka moopelo wa: “O se ka wa senya”, jale fa a tshaba Saule, a tshabela kwa logageng." 
Psalms57:2 Nkutlwele botlhoko, Modimo, o nkutlwele botlhoko; gonne mowa wa me o batlile botshabelo mo go wena; ke tla batla botshabelo mo moriting wa diphuka tsa gago, go ya madimabe a be a fete." 
Psalms57:3 Ke bitsa Modimo, Mogodimodimo, Modimo o o nkhutlisetsang dilo tsotlhe." 
Psalms57:4 O tla roma o le kwa legodimong, o mpholosa, fa yo o mpeteletseng a ntshotla. Sela. Modimo o tla roma bopelotlhomogi jwa ona le boammaaruri jwa ona." 
Psalms57:5 Ke na le go lala mo gare ga ditau, e bong batho ba ba tukang bogale, ba meno a bona e leng marumo le metsu, ba diteme tsa bona e leng ditšhaka tse di bogale." 
Psalms57:6 Modimo, itsholeletse godimo ga magodimo; a kgalalelo ya gago e okame lefatshe lotlhe." 
Psalms57:7 Ba thaisitse dikgato tsa me ka letloa, ba obile mowa wa me; ba epile lemena fa pele ga me, ba wetse mo go lone. Sela." 
Psalms57:8 Pelo ya me e gomotsegile, Modimo, pelo ya me e gomotsegile. Ke tla opela, ke letsa." 
Psalms57:9 Thanya, tlotlo ya me! Tsogang, harepa le kitara! Ke rata go tsosa mahube a moso." 
Psalms57:10 Ke tla go baka mo merafeng, Morena, ke go opelela mo ditšhabeng." 
Psalms57:11 Gonne bopelontle jwa gago bo bogolo, bo fitlha kwa magodimong, le boammaaruri jwa gago bo fitlha kwa marung." 
Psalms57:12 Modimo, itsholeletse godimo ga magodimo, a kgalalelo ya gago e okame lefatshe lotlhe." 
Psalms58:1 Loboko lwa ga Dafita lo lo kwaletsweng moopedisi, lo lo opelwang ka moopelo wa: “O se ka wa senya”." 
Psalms58:2 Lona beng ba thata, a ka nnete lo bua tsa tshiamo? A lo sekisa bana ba batho ka tlhamalalo?" 
Psalms58:3 Nnyaya, lo akantse tshiamololo mo dipelong; lo lekanyetsa batho bokgopo jwa diatla tsa lona mo lefatsheng." 
Psalms58:4 Baikepi ba sa le ba tenega go tswa botsalong; ba ba buang maaka ba ntse ba timetse go tswa botsalong. 
Psalms58:5 Ba na le botlhole jo bo tshwanang le botlhole jwa noga; ba tshwana le lebolobolo le le bosusu, le le thibetseng ditsebe," 
Psalms58:6 le le sa reetseng mantswe a baloi, le fa e le lentswe la moupi yo o rutilweng tsa go upa." 
Psalms58:7 Modimo, roba meno a bona mo melomong ya bona; Morena, kgola meno a ditawana." 
Psalms58:8 A ba nyelele jaaka metsi a a elang, a ya; fa a hula metsu ya gagwe, a e nne jaaka e e titinegileng." 
Psalms58:9 A ba tshwane le kgopa e e gakologang e ntse e gagaba; ba tshwane le sefolotsana se se se kang sa bona letsatsi. 
Psalms58:10 E tla re dipitsa tsa lona di ise di utlwe molelo wa setlhare sa mitlwa, ledimo le se gogole, se sa le setala gongwe se setse se tuka." 
Psalms58:11 Mosiami o tla itumela, fa a bona pusoloso; o tla tlhapa dinao mo mading a baikepi." 
Psalms58:12 Ke gona batho ba tla reng: “Ruri, mosiami o bona tuelo; ruri, Modimo o teng o o atlholang batho mo lefatsheng.”" 
Psalms59:1 Loboko lwa ga Dafita lo lo kwaletsweng moopedisi, lo lo opelwang ka moopelo wa: “O se ka wa senya”, lo kwadilwe jale fa Saule a roma go lalela fa ntlong go bolaya Dafita." 
Psalms59:2 Modimo wa me, nnamolele mo babeng ba me, o ntshireletse mo go ba ba ntsogelang." 
Psalms59:3 Nnamolele mo go ba ba dirang bosula, o nthuse mo banneng ba ba tshololang madi." 
Psalms59:4 Gonne bona, ba laletse botshelo jwa me, diganka di a ntlhasela, ke se kgopo, ke sa leofa, Morena." 
Psalms59:5 Ba a taboga, ba a ipaakanya, ke se na molato ope. Tsoga go nkgatlhantsha, o bone." 
Psalms59:6 Ee, Morena, Modimo wa masomosomo, wena Modimo wa Iseraele, thanya o betse baheitane botlhe, mme o se ka wa itshwarela ope wa baikepi ba boikanyologo. Sela." 
Psalms59:7 Ba nne ba boe maitsiboa, ba lele jaaka dintšwa, ba dikologe mo motseng." 
Psalms59:8 Bona, ba nyefola ka melomo; ditšhaka di mo melomong ya bona; gonne ba re: “Ke mang yo o utlwang?”" 
Psalms59:9 Mme wena, Morena, o a ba tshega, o sotla baheitane botlhe." 
Psalms59:10 Wena thata ya ka, ke tla go ela tlhoko; gonne wena Modimo o phemelo ya ka." 
Psalms59:11 Modimo wa me o tla nkgatlhantsha ka bopelotlhomogi jwa ona; Modimo o tla ntebisa baba ba me ka boitumelo. 
Psalms59:12 O se ka wa ba bolaela ruri, gore batho ba me ba tle ba se ka ba lebala. Ba kgarakgatshe ka thata ya gago, o ba dige, wena Morena, thebe ya rona." 
Psalms59:13 Boleo jwa bona ke lefoko la melomo ya bona. A ba tshwarwe mo boikgantshong jwa bona, le ka ntlha ya dithogakano le dikako tse ba di buang." 
Psalms59:14 Ba nyeletse ka kgakalo, ba nyeletse gore ba se ka ba tlhola ba le yo, mme ba lemoge gore Modimo o busa mo go Jakobe go ya kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe. Sela." 
Psalms59:15 Ba nne ba boe maitsiboa, ba lele jaaka dintšwa, ba dikologe mo motseng." 
Psalms59:16 Ba kgarakgatshegela dijo; fa ba sa kgore, ba a ngongorega." 
Psalms59:17 Mme nna ke tla opela ka ga thata ya gago, ke tla dudueletsa bopelotlhomogi jwa gago mo mosong mongwe le mongwe; gonne o ne o le phemelo ya me le botshabelo jwa me ka letsatsi la tlalelo." 
Psalms59:18 Wena thata ya me, ke tla go opelela; gonne wena Modimo o phemelo ya me, Modimo o o bopelotlhomogi wa me." 
Psalms60:1 Loboko lwa ga Dafita lwa go ruta lo lo kwaletsweng moopedisi, lo lo opelwang ka moopelo wa: “Ledutla la tshupo”." 
Psalms60:2 Lo kwadilwe jale fa a tlhabana le Basiria ba Mesopotamia le Basiria ba Soba, fa Joabe a boa, a fenya Baetomo ba le 12 000 mo mokgatsheng wa letswai." 
Psalms60:3 Modimo, o re latlhile, o re faladitse; o ne o gaketse, re agise gape." 
Psalms60:4 O roromisitse lefatshe, wa le fatoganya. Fodisa thubego ya lone, gonne le a theekela." 
Psalms60:5 O bontshitse batho ba gago dilo tse di thata, wa re nosa weine e e theekedisang." 
Psalms60:6 Ba ba go boifang o ba neile sefoka gore ba falole mo boreng. Sela. 
Psalms60:7 Thusa ka letsogo le le jang la gago, o re utlwe, gore baratiwa ba gago ba gololege." 
Psalms60:8 Modimo o buile mo Felong-ga-Boitshepo ga ona wa re: “Ke tla ipela, ke tla kgaoganya Šegeme, ke lekanya mokgatsha wa Sukothe." 
Psalms60:9 Gileate ke wa me le Manase ke wa me; Eferaime ke phemelo ya tlhogo ya me, Juta ke thobane ya me ya bogosi." 
Psalms60:10 Moabe ke mogopo wa me wa go tlhapela. Setlhako sa me ke se latlhela mo go Etomo; ntudueletsa, wena Felesita.”" 
Psalms60:11 Ke mang yo o tla nkisang kwa motseng o o thata? Ke mang yo o tla nkgogelang kwa Etomo? 
Psalms60:12 A ga se wena, Modimo, o o re latlhileng? Ee, Modimo, ga o bolole le mephato ya rona." 
Psalms60:13 Re direle thuso ya go phologa mo mmabeng; gonne thuso ya batho ga se ya sepe. 
Psalms60:14 Ka Modimo re tla dira ditiro tsa bonatla, mme ona o tla gataka baba ba rona." 
Psalms61:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi, e e opedisiwang ka kwadi ya dithapo." 
Psalms61:2 Modimo, utlwa mekokotlelo ya me, o ele thapelo ya me tlhoko." 
Psalms61:3 E a re fa pelo ya me e feletswe, ke goele kwa go wena ke le kwa bokhutlong jwa lefatshe; nkgogele kwa godimo ga lefika le legolo la pholoso, nna ke a palelwa." 
Psalms61:4 Gonne o diregile botshabelo jwa me, le turio e e thata ya phemelo kgatlhanong le mmaba." 
Psalms61:5 Ke rata go nna ka gale mo tenteng ya gago le go tshabela mo phemelong ya diphuka tsa gago. Sela. 
Psalms61:6 Gonne wena, Modimo, o utlwile maikano a me; ba ba boifang leina la gago o ba neile boswa." 
Psalms61:7 A ko o oketse malatsi a kgosi ka malatsi; a dinyaga tsa yona di nne go ya tshikatshikeng. 
Psalms61:8 A e nne mo sedulong sa bogosi fa pele ga Modimo ka bosakhutleng. Dira gore bopelotlhomogi le boammaaruri di e sireletse. 
Psalms61:9 Foo ke tla opelela leina la gago ka go sa feleng, ke dirafatsa maikano a me ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe." 
Psalms62:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi, e e opelwang ka moopelo wa ga Jeduthune." 
Psalms62:2 Mowa wa me o didimaletse Modimo fela; thuso ya me e tswa mo go ona. 
Psalms62:3 Ke ona fela lefika la me le thuso ya me le kago ya me ya phemelo; ga nkitla ke tshikinyega thata. 
Psalms62:4 Lo tla kgwelogela motho goleele go le kae, lo rata go mmolaya lotlhe, etswe a tshwana le lobota lo lo sekameng le lorako lo lo batlileng go wa?" 
Psalms62:5 Ba akantse fela go mo diga mo bogolong jwa gagwe; ba natefelwa ke maaka; ka molomo ba a tshegofatsa, mme mo teng ga bona gona ba hutsa. Sela." 
Psalms62:6 Didimalela Modimo fela, mowa wa me; gonne se ke se lebeletseng se tswa mo go ona." 
Psalms62:7 Kana ke ona lefika la me le thuso ya me; ke kago ya me ya phemelo, ga nkitla ke tshikinyega." 
Psalms62:8 Pholoso ya me e mo Modimong le tlotlo ya me; lefika le le thata la me le mo Modimong, le botshabelo jwa me." 
Psalms62:9 Ikanyeng ona ka gale, lona batho! Tshololang dipelo tsa lona fa pele ga ona! Modimo ke botshabelo jwa rona. Sela." 
Psalms62:10 Ruri, ba babotlana ke ba lefelafela, ba bagolo ke baaki; mo selekanyong ba a tsholetsega, botlhe mmogo ba botlhofo bogolo go pudulo e le nngwe fela ya mowa." 
Psalms62:11 Lo se ka lwa ikanya patiko; lo se ka lwa solofelela lefela mo thopong. Fa khumo e ata, lo se ka lwa e kgomarela ka dipelo." 
Psalms62:12 Modimo o buile gangwe, nna ke utlwile gabedi gore thata ke ya Modimo." 
Psalms62:13 Le bopelotlhomogi ke jwa gago, Morena; gonne o duela mongwe le mongwe ka fa tirong ya gagwe." 
Psalms63:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita, a le mo sekakeng sa Juta." 
Psalms63:2 Modimo, o Modimo wa me, ke batla wena; mowa wa me o go nyoretswe, nama ya me e go tlhologeletswe mo lefatsheng la komelelo, le le nyorilweng, le le se nang metsi." 
Psalms63:3 Ke ne ke go lebile kwa Felong-ga-Boitshepo ka maikutlo a a ntseng jalo, go bona thata ya gago le kgalalelo ya gago." 
Psalms63:4 Gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gago bo molemo go gaisa bophelo. Molomo wa me o tla go baka. 
Psalms63:5 Ke tla go tumisa jalo mo botshelong jotlhe jwa me, ke tsholetsa mabogo mo leineng la gago." 
Psalms63:6 Mowa wa me o tla kgora jaaka ka moko le mafura; molomo wa me o tla baka ka go duduetsa," 
Psalms63:7 fa ke go gopola mo bolaong jwa me; ke akanya ka ga gago ka dinako tsa tebelelo ya bosigo. 
Psalms63:8 Gonne o ne o le thuso ya me; ke tla duduetsa mo moriting wa diphuka tsa gago. 
Psalms63:9 Mowa wa me o go setse morago, o go kgomaretse; letsogo le le jang la gago le ntshegeditse." 
Psalms63:10 Mme bona ba ba ratang go nkisa tshenyegong ke bona ba ba tla fitlhang mo mafelong a a kwa tlase ga lefatshe. 
Psalms63:11 Ba tla neelwa mo thateng ya tšhaka; ba tla nna seabe sa diphokojwe. 
Psalms63:12 Mme kgosi e tla itumela mo Modimong. Mongwe le mongwe yo o ikanang ka ona o tla belafala; gonne melomo ya ba ba buang maaka e tla thijwa. 
Psalms64:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms64:2 Modimo, utlwa lentswe la me, fa ke lela; boloka bophelo jwa me, fa ke tshosiwa ke mmaba." 
Psalms64:3 Mphitlhe ke fitlhegele maikaelelo a basulatsi le pheretlhego ya badiratshiamololo; 
Psalms64:4 ba ba looditseng diteme tsa bona jaaka ditšhaka ba supile ka metsu ya bona, e bong mafoko a a galakang," 
Psalms64:5 go hula mosiami ba mo laletse, ba mo hula ka tshoganyetso, ba sa boife." 
Psalms64:6 Ba ikaeletse go dirafatsa maano a a bosula, ba bolela go thaisa ka mitlwane e e subilweng ba re: “Go tla bona mang?”" 
Psalms64:7 Ba akanya boikepo ba re: “Re sweditse, re logile maano a mantle.” Mogopolo wa motho o botengteng, le pelo ke lengôpe." 
Psalms64:8 Mme Modimo o tla ba hula ka motsu; dipetso tsa bona di tla tla ka tshoganyetso. 
Psalms64:9 Ba tla digwa ke diteme tsa bona; botlhe ba ba ba lebileng ba thukhutha ditlhogo. 
Psalms64:10 Mme batho botlhe ba tla boifa, ba bolela tiro ya Modimo, ba tlhokomela se o se dirang." 
Psalms64:11 Mosiami o tla itumela mo Moreneng, a batla botshabelo fa go ena; mme botlhe ba ba dipelo di tlhamaletseng ba tla itumisa ka Morena." 
Psalms65:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Sefela se se kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms65:2 Modimo, o tshwanetswe ke sefela sa pako mo Sione, maikano o tla a direlwa." 
Psalms65:3 Wena yo o utlwang thapelo, batho botlhe ba tla tla go wena." 
Psalms65:4 Dilo tse di molato di mpaletse. Ditlolo tsa rona wena o tla di ruanya. 
Psalms65:5 Go sego ena yo ò mo itlhaolelang, ò mo ikatametsa, gore a age mo malapeng a gago. Re tla kgora molemo wa Ntlo ya gago, le boitshepo jwa Tempele ya gago." 
Psalms65:6 O re araba ka tshiamo ka dilo tse di boitshegang, wena Modimo wa pholoso ya rona o o ikanngwang ke dikhutlo tsotlhe tsa lefatshe le dintshi tse di kgakala." 
Psalms65:7 O thatafatsa dithaba ka thata ya gago, o itlamile ka nonofo." 
Psalms65:8 O didimatsa kgwaso ya mawatle, kgwaso ya makhubu a ona, le khuduo ya merafe," 
Psalms65:9 gore ba ba agileng kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe ba boife ditshupo tsa gago; mafatshe a botlhabatsatsi le bophirimatsatsi o a tlatsa tuduetso. 
Psalms65:10 O lekotse lefatshe, wa le fa letlotlo, o le humisa thata; noka ya Modimo e tletse metsi. O ba baakanyetsa mabele; gonne o e baakanya jalo." 
Psalms65:11 O nosa ditemo tsa lone, o thuba makwete a lone, o le kolobisa ka medupe, o tshegofatsa go tlhoga ga dijwalo tsa lone." 
Psalms65:12 O rwesa ngwaga ka molemo wa gago, ditselana tsa gago di rotha monono." 
Psalms65:13 Mafulo a naga a a tshutshuma; dithota di itlamile ka tuduetso. 
Psalms65:14 Mafulo a apesitswe ka matsomane; mekgatsha e khurumeditswe ka mabele; di duduetsa tsotlhe, di a opela." 
Psalms66:1 Sefela sa pako se se kwaletsweng moopedisi. Dudueletsang Modimo, lona ba lefatshe lotlhe." 
Psalms66:2 Opelelang kgalalelo ya leina la ona; galaletsang pako ya ona. 
Psalms66:3 Rayang Modimo lo re: “Ditiro tsa gago di tlotlometse jang ne! Baba ba gago ba tla go tlakisa ka ntlha ya bogolo jwa thata ya gago. 
Psalms66:4 A ba lefatshe lotlhe ba go obamele, ba go opelele, ba opelele leina la gago pako.” Sela." 
Psalms66:5 Tlayang, lo lebe ditiro tsa Modimo; o boitshega ka ditiro mo baneng ba batho." 
Psalms66:6 O fetotse lewatle komelelo; ba kgabagantse noka ka dinao; foo ra o itumelela. 
Psalms66:7 O busa ka gale ka thata ya ona; matlho a ona a lebile merafe; baganetsi ga ba na go o tsogela. Sela. 
Psalms66:8 Galaletsang Modimo wa rona, lona merafe! Lo utlwatse lentswe le le o bakang;" 
Psalms66:9 o o nayang mewa ya rona bophelo, o sa leseletse dinao tsa rona go theekela;" 
Psalms66:10 gonne wena, Modimo, o re lekile, wa re itshekisa, jaaka go itshekisiwa selefera." 
Psalms66:11 O re tsentse mo letloeng, wa baya morwalo o o imelang mo dinokeng tsa rona." 
Psalms66:12 Wa lesa bapalami ba re gata ditlhogo; ra tsena mo molelong le mo metsing; mme o re ntsheditse kwa go leng letlotlo. 
Psalms66:13 Ke tla tsena mo Ntlong ya gago ka ditlhabelo tsa phiso; ke tla go dirafaletsa maikano a me 
Psalms66:14 a loleme lwa me lo a boletseng, a molomo wa me o a buileng, ke le mo tlalelong." 
Psalms66:15 Ke tla go tsisetsa ditlhabelo tsa phiso tsa dinku tse di nonneng, di na le musi wa ditlhabelo tsa diphelehu; ke tla go direla ka dikgomo le diphoko. Sela." 
Psalms66:16 Tlayang, lo reetse, lona lotlhe ba lo boifang Modimo; ke tla bolela se o se diretseng mowa wa me." 
Psalms66:17 Ke goetse kwa go ona ka molomo; pako e mo lolemeng lwa me. 
Psalms66:18 Fa nka bo ke akantse boikepo ka pelo ya me, Morena a ka bo a sa utlwa." 
Psalms66:19 Mme ruri, Modimo o nkutlwile, wa tlhokomela lentswe la thapelo ya me." 
Psalms66:20 A go bakwe Modimo o o se kang wa latlha thapelo ya me, le e seng go ntima bopelotlhomogi jwa ona." 
Psalms67:1 Pesalome. Sefela se se kwaletsweng moopedisi, se opedisiwa ka kwadi ya dithapo." 
Psalms67:2 A Modimo o nne boitshwarelo le rona, o re tshegofatse; a o re phatsimisetse sefatlhego sa ona, Sela," 
Psalms67:3 gore tsela ya gago e lemogiwe mo lefatsheng, le pholoso ya gago mo ditšhabeng tsotlhe." 
Psalms67:4 Merafe e tla go baka, Modimo, ditšhaba tsotlhe di tla go baka." 
Psalms67:5 Merafe e tla itumela, e ipela, ka gonne o atlhola ditšhaba ka tshiamo, ò goga merafe mo lefatsheng. Sela." 
Psalms67:6 Merafe e tla go leboga, Modimo, ditšhaba tsotlhe di tla go leboga." 
Psalms67:7 Lefatshe le ntshitse thobo ya lone. Modimo, e bong Modimo wa rona, o tla re tshegofatsa." 
Psalms67:8 Modimo o tla re tshegofatsa, mme dikhutlo tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tla o boifa." 
Psalms68:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Sefela se se kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms68:2 Fa Modimo o nanoga, baba ba ona ba phatlalala; ba ba o tlhoileng ba tshaba fa pele ga ona." 
Psalms68:3 O ba nyeletsa jaaka musi o nyelela; baikepi ba latlhega fa pele ga Modimo jaaka mmotu o gakologa mo molelong. 
Psalms68:4 Mme basiami ba itumele, ba duduetse fa pele ga Modimo, ba itumele ka boipelo." 
Psalms68:5 Opelelang Modimo, opelelang leina la ona pako! Ona o o ralalang dipoa tsa bogareganaga, o baakanyetseng tsela! Itumeleng mo Moreneng, lo duduetse fa pele ga gagwe." 
Psalms68:6 Modimo ke rra-dikhutsana, le moatlholedi wa batlholagadi mo boagong jo bo boitshepo jwa ona." 
Psalms68:7 Modimo o direla bannanosi legae; o golola bagolegwi, o ba gogele lesegong; mme baganetsi bona ba agile mo lefatsheng la komelelo." 
Psalms68:8 Modimo, e rile o bolola fa pele ga batho ba gago, ya re o tsamaya mo sekakeng, Sela," 
Psalms68:9 lefatshe la roroma, magodimo le ona a rotha fa pele ga sefatlhego sa Modimo; Sinai a reketla fa pele ga sefatlhego sa Modimo, Modimo wa Baiseraele." 
Psalms68:10 Modimo, o nesitse pula ya medupe, wa lapolosa naga ya boswa jwa gago e e swabileng." 
Psalms68:11 Lesomo la gago le ne la aga mo go yona; o ne wa e baakanyetsa babogisegi ka molemo wa gago, Modimo." 
Psalms68:12 Morena o utlwatsa lefoko; basadi ba ba tlhabang mokgosi wa phenyo ke lesomo le legolo. 
Psalms68:13 Dikgosi tsa masomosomo di a tshaba, di a tshaba; mme mosadi yo o setseng mo gae o aba thopo." 
Psalms68:14 Fa lo robala kwa merakeng, ga lo bone thopo e e phatsimang jaaka diphuka tsa lephoi tse di manegilweng selefera le diphofa tsa lone tse di manegilweng gouta e tshetlha." 
Psalms68:15 E rile Mong-wa-thata-yotlhe a falatsa dikgosi teng, semathana sa na mo dithabeng tsa Salemone." 
Psalms68:16 Thaba ya Basane ke thaba ya Modimo; thaba ya Basane ke thaba e e ditlhoa. 
Psalms68:17 Lona dithaba tse di ditlhoa, lo lebetseng ka lefufa kwa thabeng e Modimo o e itlhaoletseng go nna boago jwa ona? Ee, Morena o tla aga teng ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms68:18 Dikoloi tsa Modimo di dikete tse di masome, ke dikete tse di dikete; Morena yo o neng a na nabo kwa Sinai kajeno o mo Felong-ga-Boitshepo." 
Psalms68:19 O tlhatlogetse kwa godimo, wa thopa batshwarwi, wa amogela dineo mo bathong – ee, le mo baganetsing – go nna kgosi o le Morena, Modimo." 
Psalms68:20 A go bakwe Morena yo o re belegang ka letsatsi le letsatsi. Modimo ke pholoso ya rona. Sela. 
Psalms68:21 Modimo ke Modimo wa dithuso mo go rona; Modimo Morena o itse go re falodisa mo losong. 
Psalms68:22 Ruri, Modimo o tla tšhwetlaka ditlhogo tsa baba ba ona, e bong logata lo lo moriti lwa yo o ntseng a iphelela mo molatong wa gagwe." 
Psalms68:23 Morena o rile: “Ke tla ba busa kwa Basane, ke tla ba busa mo bodibeng jwa lewatle," 
Psalms68:24 gore o phatšhe ka lonao mo mading; diteme tsa dintšwa tsa gago di nne le seabe sa tsona mo babeng.” 
Psalms68:25 Ba bona tsamao ya masomo a gago, Modimo, tsamao ya masomo a Modimo wa me, a kgosi ya me, a tsena mo Felong-ga-Boitshepo." 
Psalms68:26 Baopedi ba etelela pele, ba latelwa ke baletsi ba dikwadi tsa dithapo, ba tsentswe gare ke makgarebe a a letsang meropa." 
Psalms68:27 “Bakang Modimo, Morena, mo diphuthegong, lona ba motswedi wa Iseraele!”" 
Psalms68:28 Go teng Benyamene yo mmotlana yo o ba busang, dikgosana tsa Juta ka lesomo, dikgosana tsa Sebulone, dikgosana tsa Nafetale." 
Psalms68:29 Modimo, laela thata ya gago, o itshupe o le thata, wena Modimo o o re diretseng," 
Psalms68:30 o le kwa Tempeleng ya gago o okametse Jerusalema. Dikgosi di tla go tlisetsa dineo. 
Psalms68:31 Kgalemela sephedi sa motlhaka – motlhape wa dipoo mmogo le merafe ya se-ka-morôle – ba ba ineelang ka dikgolokwe tsa selefera. Falatsa merafe e e natefelwang ke ntwa. 
Psalms68:32 Dikgosana di tla tswa kwa Egepeto; lefatshe la Khuše le tla akofa le ntshetsa Modimo mabogo a lone. 
Psalms68:33 Lona magosi a lefatshe, opelelang Modimo; opelelang Morena pako; Sela," 
Psalms68:34 ona o o ralalang magodimo a a godimodimo a bogologolo tala; utlwang, o utlwatsa lentswe la ona, lentswe le legolo." 
Psalms68:35 Neelang Modimo thata, borena jwa ona bo okame Iseraele le thata ya ona e mo marung." 
Psalms68:36 Modimo o boitshega go tswa mafelong a ona a a boitshepo. Modimo wa Iseraele ke ona o o nayang morafe thata le nonofo. A Modimo o bakwe. 
Psalms69:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi, e e opelwang ka moopelo wa: “Madutla”." 
Psalms69:2 Modimo, nthuse! Gonne metsi a gaufi le go mpeta." 
Psalms69:3 Ke rorometse mo lerageng le le botengteng, kwa go se nang boemo teng; ke wetse mo madibeng a metsi, morwalela o nkhurumeditse." 
Psalms69:4 Ke lapisitswe ke go lela ga me, ke sule lentswe; matlho a me a a fela ke ntse ke lebeletse Modimo wa me." 
Psalms69:5 Ba ba ntlhoileng, go se na molato, ba bantsi go feta dithiri tsa tlhogo ya me. Ba ba ratang go ntshenya, ba e leng baba ba me kwa ntle ga lebaka ba thata, ba re, ke tshwanetse go busa se ke sa se gapang." 
Psalms69:6 Modimo, wena o itse bosilo jwa me, le melato ya me ga o a e subelwa." 
Psalms69:7 A bona ba ba go lebeletseng ba se tlhajwe ke ditlhong ka nna, Morena, Modimo wa masomosomo. A bona ba ba go batlang ba se swabe ka nna, Modimo wa Iseraele." 
Psalms69:8 Gonne ke ka ntlha ya gago ke rweleng nyatsego, ditlhong di bipile sefatlhego sa me." 
Psalms69:9 Bomorwa-rre ke ba fetogetse moeng, ke yo o sa itsiweng mo baneng ba ga mme." 
Psalms69:10 Gonne go tlhoafalela Ntlo ya gago go njele, le dikgobo tsa bona ba ba go kgobang di nkwetse." 
Psalms69:11 Ke ne ka ikutlwisa botlhoko ka go itima dijo, mme ga mphetogela ditlhong." 
Psalms69:12 Ka ikapesa kgetse ya bohutsana, mme ka tswa seane sa tshotlo mo go bona." 
Psalms69:13 Ba ba ntseng mo kgotleng ba bua ka ga me, le ba ba nwang bojalwa ba nkopela difela." 
Psalms69:14 Mme nna, thapelo ya me ke e lebisitse wena, Morena, ka nako e e go kgatlhang. Modimo, nkutlwe ka fa bogolong jwa bopelotlhomogi jwa gago le ka ntlha ya pholoso ya gago e e ikanyegang." 
Psalms69:15 Ntshwatole mo lerageng gore ke se ka ka rôrômelela ruri; a ke gololwe mo go ba ba ntlhoileng le mo madibeng a metsi. 
Psalms69:16 A morwalela o se nkhurumetse, le bodiba a bo se nkometse; a lemena le se itswale molomo godimo ga me." 
Psalms69:17 Nkutlwe, Morena, gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gago bo molemo; retologela go nna ka fa bogolong jwa boutlwelo-botlhoko jwa gago." 
Psalms69:18 Mme o se ka wa fitlhela motlhanka wa gago sefatlhego sa gago, gonne ke mo pitlaganong. Akofa o nkutlwe." 
Psalms69:19 Atamela mowa wa me, o o golole; nkgolole ka ntlha ya baba ba me." 
Psalms69:20 Wena o itse nyatsego ya me le ditlhong tsa me le go kgojwa ga me; baganetsi ba me o ba itse botlhe. 
Psalms69:21 Nyatsego e mphatlotse pelo, ka felelwa ke thata; ke tlhologeletswe boutlwelo-botlhoko, mme ga bo yo, le bagomotsi, mme ga ke ba bone." 
Psalms69:22 Ba nneile santlhokwe go nna sejo sa me, mme e rile ke nyorilwe, ba nnosa motatsa." 
Psalms69:23 A bojelo jwa bona bo nne segole fa pele ga bona, le mutlwane mo go ba ba sa kgathaleng sepe." 
Psalms69:24 A matlho a bona a fifale gore ba se ka ba bona, o theeketse dinôka tsa bona ka gale." 
Psalms69:25 Goromeletsa kgakalo ya gago mo go bona, a molelo wa bogale jwa gago o ba tshware." 
Psalms69:26 A boago jwa bona bo nne letlotla; a go se age ope mo ditenteng tsa bona. 
Psalms69:27 Gonne ba bogisa ena yo wena o mo iteileng; ba godisa botlhoko jwa yo ò mo khutlileng. 
Psalms69:28 Oketsa molato wa bona ka molato; a ba se bone tshiamiso ya gago. 
Psalms69:29 A ba phimolwe mo bukeng ya bophelo; a ba se kwalwe le basiami. 
Psalms69:30 Mme nna ke bogisegile, ke tletse botlhoko. A pholoso ya gago, Modimo, e nkgodise." 
Psalms69:31 Ke tla tumisa leina la Modimo ka sefela, ke le godisa ka pina e e lebogang." 
Psalms69:32 Moo go tla kgatlha Morena bogolo go kgomo, e bong poo e e nang le dinaka le ditlhako tse di maphata." 
Psalms69:33 Ba ba pelonolo ba a go bona, ba itumele. Lona ba lo batlang Modimo, a dipelo tsa lona di phele." 
Psalms69:34 Gonne Morena o utlwa bahumanegi; ga a nyatse batshwarwi ba gagwe. 
Psalms69:35 A legodimo le lefatshe di mo tumise, le mawatle le tsotlhe tse di nyeulang mo go ona." 
Psalms69:36 Gonne Modimo o tla pholosa Sione, o aga metse ya Juta; ba tla aga teng, ba e rua." 
Psalms69:37 Boora batlhanka ba ona ba tla rua boswa teng; ba ba ratang leina la ona ba tla aga gona. 
Psalms70:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita ya kgopotso mo tshupelong ya tebogo e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms70:2 Modimo, akofa o nkgolole; Morena, itlhaganele o nthuse." 
Psalms70:3 A ba ba batlang go mpolaya ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, ba sosobane; a ba ba kgatlhwang ke tlalelo ya me ba kate ka morago, ba tlhajwe ke kgala." 
Psalms70:4 A ba ba reng: “Ahee, ahee!” ba boele kwa morago ka ntlha ya ditlhong tsa bona." 
Psalms70:5 A botlhe ba ba go batlang ba go itumelele, ba ipele; a ba ba ratang pholoso ya gago ba nne ba bue ba re: “Modimo o mogolo.”" 
Psalms70:6 Mme nna ke motlalelwi, ke mohumanegi; Modimo, a o ko o tle go nna ka bonako. Ke wena thuso ya me le mopholosi wa me; Morena, o se diege." 
Psalms71:1 Ke tshabela kwa go wena, Morena; a ke se tlhajwe ke ditlhong ka gope." 
Psalms71:2 Mpholosa ka tshiamo ya gago, o nkgolole; ntshekegela tsebe o nthuse." 
Psalms71:3 O nne logaga lwa me lwa phemelo lo nka tsenang mo go lone ka gale, wena yo o laetseng go nthusa; gonne ke wena lefika la me le phemelo ya me ya kwa thabeng." 
Psalms71:4 Modimo wa me, nkgolole mo letsogong la moikepi, mo letsweleng la mosiamolodi le la yo o setlhogo." 
Psalms71:5 Gonne ke wena yo ke go solofetseng, Morena Modimo, ke go ikantse go tswa bokaung jwa me." 
Psalms71:6 Ke itshegeditse ka wena go tswa botsalong, ke wena mogolodi wa me go tswa tlholegong ya me; sefela sa ka se tla baka wena ka gale." 
Psalms71:7 Nna ke kgakgamatso mo bathong ba bantsi; mme wena o botshabelo jo bo thata jwa me. 
Psalms71:8 Molomo wa me o tletse pako ya gago le kgalaletso ya gago ka gale. 
Psalms71:9 Se ntatlhe mo motlheng wa botsofe; se ntlogele mogang thata ya me e felang. 
Psalms71:10 Gonne baba ba me ba bua ka ga me, le ba ba laletseng bophelo jwa me ba a gakololana. Ba re:" 
Psalms71:11 “Modimo o mo tlogetse; mo lelekeng, lo mo tshware; gonne ga a na monamoledi.”" 
Psalms71:12 Modimo, o se nne kgakala le nna; Modimo wa me, akofa o nthuse." 
Psalms71:13 A ba ba tlhabanang le mowa wa me ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, ba fele; a ba ba batlang tlalelo ya me ba bipiwe ke nyatsego le tshotlego." 
Psalms71:14 Mme nna ke tla nna ke lebelela, ke godisa tumo yotlhe ya gago." 
Psalms71:15 Molomo wa me o tla bolela tsa tshiamo ya gago le tsa pholoso ya gago ka metlha yotlhe; gonne ga ke itse palo ya tsona. 
Psalms71:16 Ke tla tla ka ditiro tse di thata tsa Morena Modimo, ke tla tumisa tshiamo ya gago o le wesi fela." 
Psalms71:17 Modimo, o nthutile go tswa bokaung jwa me; ke ntse ke bolela dikgakgamatso tsa gago go fitlhelela kajeno." 
Psalms71:18 Le gona, Modimo, o se ka wa ntlogela go ya botsofeng, fa ke thuntse tlhogo, go ya ke be ke bolelele losika lo lo tlang tsa letsogo la gago le botlhe ba ba tlang tsa thata ya gago." 
Psalms71:19 Le gona tshiamo ya gago, Modimo, e fitlha kwa godimodimo; Modimo, wena yo o dirileng dilo tse dikgolo, ke mang yo o tshwanang nao?" 
Psalms71:20 Wena yo o dirileng gore ke bone dipitlagano tse dintsi le ditlalelo, o tla boa o mphedisa, o ntlhatlosa gape mo madibeng a lefatshe." 
Psalms71:21 O tla godisa bogolo jwa me, o boa o nkgomotsa." 
Psalms71:22 Jaanong le nna ke tla go lebogela boammaaruri jwa gago ka seletso sa harepa, Modimo wa me, ke go opelela ka katara, wena Moitshepi wa Iseraele." 
Psalms71:23 Molomo wa me o tla duduetsa, fa ke go opelela pako, le mowa wa me o ò o golotseng." 
Psalms71:24 Loleme lwa me le lone lo tla nna lo bua ka ga tshiamo ya gago ka metlha; gonne ba ba neng ba mpatlela tatlhego ba tlhabilwe ke ditlhong ba nyatsega. 
Psalms72:1 Pesalome ya ga Salomo. Modimo, naya kgosi melao ya gago; morwa kgosi o mo nee tshiamo ya gago" 
Psalms72:2 gore a atlhole batho ba gago ka tshiamo, le batlalelwi ba gago ka molao." 
Psalms72:3 A dithaba di ungwele batho kagiso, le dithabana di ba ungwele tshiamo." 
Psalms72:4 O tla siamisetsa batlalelwi ba morafe, a pholosa bana ba bahumanegi, a tšhwetlakanya mogateledi." 
Psalms72:5 O tla phela sebaka se se kana ka letsatsi le tlhabile le ngwedi o ise o phirime go ya tshikatshikeng. 
Psalms72:6 O tla fologa jaka pula mo pilong, jaaka medupe e e nosang lefatshe." 
Psalms72:7 Mo malatsing a gagwe tshiamo e tla tlhoga, kagiso e kgolo e tla nna teng go fitlhelela ngwedi o sa tlhole o le yo." 
Psalms72:8 O tla busa go tswa lewatleng go ya go le lengwe, le go tswa Nokeng go ya mafelelong a lefatshe." 
Psalms72:9 Ba ba agileng mo dikakeng ba tla khubama fa pele ga gagwe, baba ba gagwe ba tla latswa lerole." 
Psalms72:10 Dikgosi tsa Tharesise le tsa ditlhakenyana di tla tsisa dimpho; dikgosi tsa Šeba le Seba di tla ntsha lekgetho. 
Psalms72:11 Dikgosi tsotlhe di tla mo ikobela, ditšhaba tsotlhe di tla mo direla." 
Psalms72:12 Gonne o tla golola mohumanegi yo o goelang thuso le mmogisegi le yo o se nang mothusi. 
Psalms72:13 O tla utlwela yo mmotlana le motlhoki botlhoko, a pholosa mewa ya bahumanegi." 
Psalms72:14 O tla golola maphelo a bona mo patikegong le mo kgatelelong; madi a bona e tla nna a botlhokwa mo matlhong a gagwe. 
Psalms72:15 A kgosi e phele, mme ba e nee tsa gouta ya Šeba, ba e rapelele ka gale, ba e tshegofatse ka metlha." 
Psalms72:16 A go nne letlotlo la mabele mo lefatsheng, a go sume kwa ditlhoeng tsa dithaba; a leungo la lone le tshwane le Lebanone; a batho ba motse ba rune jaaka morogo wa lefatshe." 
Psalms72:17 A leina la yona le nnele ruri. A leina la yona le tlhoge letsatsi le ntse le le teng; a ditšhaba tsotlhe di tshegofadiwe ka yona, a di e boke di re: Kgosi e tlhogonolo." 
Psalms72:18 A go bokwe Morena, Modimo, Modimo wa Iseraele, o e leng ona fela o o dirang dikgakgamatso." 
Psalms72:19 Mme a leina la ona le le galalelang le bakwe ka bosakhutleng; a lefatshe lotlhe le tlale kgalalelo ya ona, Amen, ee, a go nne jalo!" 
Psalms72:20 Fano go fela dithapelo tsa ga Dafita, morwa Isai." 
Psalms73:1 Pesalome ya ga Asafe. Ruri, Modimo o molemo mo go Iseraele, mo go bona ba ba dipelo di phepa." 
Psalms73:2 Mme nna, dinao tsa me di batlile go kgotšwa, dikgato tsa me di batlile go relela." 
Psalms73:3 Ke ne ke fufegela baikgantshi ka go bona letlhogonolo la baikepi. 
Psalms73:4 Gonne ga ba na matlhoko; mebele ya bona e itekanetse, e nonne." 
Psalms73:5 Ga ba mo tapisegong ya batho ba bangwe; ga ba tshwenyege jaaka batho ba bangwe. 
Psalms73:6 Ke gona ka moo mokgabo wa molala wa bona e leng boikgodiso; bosetlhogo ba bo apere jaaka kobo. 
Psalms73:7 Matlho a bona a rotogile ka monono; maano a dipelo tsa bona a a tswelela. 
Psalms73:8 Ba a sotla, ba bua patiko ka boikepo; ba bua ka boikgodiso." 
Psalms73:9 Ba bua tse di kgatlhanong le tsa legodimo; diteme tsa bona di itaola mo lefatsheng. 
Psalms73:10 Ke ka moo batho ba sokologelang kwa go bona, ba gope metsi a thuto ya bona ka botlalo." 
Psalms73:11 Ba re: “Modimo o ka itse jang, a ruri go na le kitso mo Mogodimodimong?”" 
Psalms73:12 Bonang, baikepi ba ntse jalo; ee, ba godisa khumo ya bona ba ntse ba iketlile." 
Psalms73:13 Ruri, ke lefelafela fa ke ntse ke phepafatsa pelo ya me, ke tlhapa diatla ka bosenamolato." 
Psalms73:14 Gonne ke tlhola ke tshwenngwa ka metlha, ke watlhaiwa moso mongwe le mongwe." 
Psalms73:15 Fa nka bo ke rile, ke tla bolela jaaka bona, nka bo ke diretse losika lwa bana ba gago ka boikanyologo." 
Psalms73:16 Foo ke ne ka akanya gore ke tlhaloganye selo se, ke fitlhela e le matsapa fela," 
Psalms73:17 ga tsamaya ka tsenelela ditsamaisong tse di boitshepo tsa Modimo, ka lemoga bokhutlo jwa bona." 
Psalms73:18 Ruri, o ba baya mo mareleding; o ba leseletsa go wela mo tshenyegong." 
Psalms73:19 Kana ba fetoga theregiso ka tshoganyetso; ba fele, ba nyelele ka poitshego!" 
Psalms73:20 Wena Morena, o nyatsa setshwano sa bona, fa o tsoga, jaaka toro e nyatsega, fa motho a sena go thanya." 
Psalms73:21 E rile pelo ya me e ntse e galakegile mme ke tlhabegile mo diphilong," 
Psalms73:22 ka bo ke le lesilo, ke sa itse sepe, ke le jaaka phologolo fela fa pele ga gago." 
Psalms73:23 Mme nna ke ntse ke na nao; o ntshwere letsogo le le jang. 
Psalms73:24 O tla nkgoga ka kgakololo ya gago, mme morago ga moo o tla nkamogela kwa kgalalelong." 
Psalms73:25 Ke na le mang kwa legodimong, fa e se wena? Fa ke na nao, ga ke kgatlhwe ke sepe mo lefatsheng." 
Psalms73:26 Le fa nama ya me le pelo ya me di ka nyelela, Modimo ke lefika la pelo ya me, le kabelo ya me ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms73:27 Gonne bona, ba ba ikgaoganyang le wena ba tla latlhega; o nyeletsa botlhe ba ba akafalang ka go ikepa mo go wena." 
Psalms73:28 Mme fa e le nna, ke itumela go nna gaufi le Modimo. Wena Morena Modimo o botshabelo jwa me. Ke tla bolela ditiro tsotlhe tsa gago." 
Psalms74:1 Sefela sa thuto sa ga Asafe. Ke ka ntlha yang, Modimo, fa o re latlhetse ruri, mme bogale jwa gago bo tukela dinku tsa mafulo a gago?" 
Psalms74:2 Gopola phuthego ya gago e o sa leng o e ithekela bogologolo e o e ithekololetseng gore e nne setšhaba sa boswa jwa gago, e bong thaba ya Sione e o kileng wa aga mo go yona." 
Psalms74:3 Tsholeletsa dinao maropeng a a nnetseng ruri. Mmaba o sentse tsotlhe mo Felong-ga-Boitshepo. 
Psalms74:4 Baganetsi ba gago ba ne ba bôpa mo mafelong a phuthego ya gago; ba emisitse difoka tsa bona go nna ditshupo. 
Psalms74:5 Go tshwana le batho, fa ba eketse sekgwa sa ditlhare dilepe." 
Psalms74:6 Mme jaanong ba kgekgethile meseto yotlhe ka dilepe le ka dinoto. 
Psalms74:7 Ba tshubile Felo-ga-Boitshepo ga gago, ba itshepolotse boago jwa leina la gago ka go bo digela fa fatshe." 
Psalms74:8 Ba rile mo pelong tsa bona: “A re ba remaganyeng botlhe!” Ba fisitse matlo otlhe a Modimo mo lefatsheng. 
Psalms74:9 Ga re bone ditshupo tsa rona; ga go tlhole go le moporofeti ope. Ga go ope mo go rona yo o itseng gore go tla tswelela go ya leng. 
Psalms74:10 Ao, Modimo, kana moganetsi o tla kgala goleele go le kae? A mmaba o tla nna a kgoba leina la gago ka bosakhutleng?" 
Psalms74:11 Ke ka ntlha yang, fa o gonyetsa letsogo, e bong letsogo le le jang? Le ntshe mo sehubeng sa gago, o nyeletse!" 
Psalms74:12 Kana Modimo e ntse e le kgosi ya me go tswa bogologolong, ona o o dirang ditiro tsa pholoso mo lefatsheng." 
Psalms74:13 Wena o dirile ka thata ya gago gore lewatle le kgaphasele, wa tšhwetla ditlhogo tsa dikgogela mo metsing." 
Psalms74:14 Wena o tšwetlakantse ditlhogo tsa kgwanyape, wa e neela bontsi jwa diphedi tsa sekaka gore di e je." 
Psalms74:15 Wena o phuntse metswedi le melatswana, wa kgadisa dinoka tse dikgolo tse di ntseng di sa kgale." 
Psalms74:16 Motshegare ke wa gago, bosigo le jona ke jwa gago; o beile lesedi le letsatsi." 
Psalms74:17 Wena o segile melelwane yotlhe ya lefatshe; selemo le mariga di dirilwe ke wena. 
Psalms74:18 Gopola tse: Mmaba o go kgadile, Morena; batho ba masilo ba kgobile leina la gago." 
Psalms74:19 O se ka wa naya sebata mowa wa lephoi la gago; o se ka wa lebalela ruri maphelo a batlalelwi ba gago. 
Psalms74:20 Leba kgolagano; gonne matikelo a lefatshe a tletse mafelo a tshenyo e e setlhogo. 
Psalms74:21 A mopatikwa a se boe a tlhabilwe ke ditlhong; a babogisegi le bahumanegi ba boke leina la gago. 
Psalms74:22 Nanoga, Modimo, o lwele tshiamo ya gago. Gopola kgobo e o tlholang o e direlwa ke motho wa lesilo." 
Psalms74:23 O se ka wa lebala tlhodio ya baganetsi ba gago le dipopo tsa ba ba go tsogetseng, tse di ntseng di tlhatloga." 
Psalms75:1 Pesalome ya ga Asafe e e kwaletsweng moopedisi; sefela se se opelwang ka moopelo wa: “O se ka wa senya”. 
Psalms75:2 Re a go leboga, Modimo, re a leboga. Re bitsa leina la gago, re bolela dikgakgamatso tsa gago." 
Psalms75:3 “Fa nako ya me e tsile, ke atlhola ka tshiamo." 
Psalms75:4 Le fa lefatshe le ka tshikinyega le botlhe ba ba agileng mo go lone, nna ke tlhomamisitse maotwana a lone. Sela." 
Psalms75:5 Ke reile masilo ka re: ‘Se nneng bosilo,’ le baikepi ka re: ‘Se tsholetseng lonaka." 
Psalms75:6 Se tsholeletseng lonaka lwa lona kwa godimo; se bueng tsa matepe, lo gagamaditse melala.’ ”" 
Psalms75:7 Gonne katlholo ga e tswe kwa botlhabatsatsi le e seng kwa bophirimatsatsi le e seng kwa sekakeng sa dithaba," 
Psalms75:8 mme moatlhodi ke Modimo, o kokobetsa yo, o godisa yole." 
Psalms75:9 Gonne mo seatleng sa Morena go senwelo sa weine e e fufulang, e tletse ditswaiso, mme o nosa ka sona; ee, baikepi botlhe ba lefatshe ba tla gôpa magorugoru a sona, ba a nwa." 
Psalms75:10 Mme nna ke tla bolela ka bosakhutleng, ke opelela Modimo wa ga Jakobe o o rileng:" 
Psalms75:11 “Ke tla kgaola dinaka tsotlhe tsa baikepi; dinaka tsa basiami tsona di tla tsholediwa.” 
Psalms76:1 Pesalome ya ga Asafe e e kwaletsweng moopedisi; sefela se se opedisiwang ka kwadi ya dithapo. 
Psalms76:2 Modimo o itsiwe mo Juta; leina la ona le legolo mo Iseraele. 
Psalms76:3 Ee, motlaagana wa ona o mo Saleme, le boago jwa ona mo Sione." 
Psalms76:4 O robakile metsu-seka-ditladi ya bora teng, le thebe le tšhaka le tsa ntwa. Sela." 
Psalms76:5 O a phatsima, o a galalela, o tswa kwa dithabeng tsa thopo." 
Psalms76:6 Dinatla tse di pelokgale di thopetswe, di gateletswe ke boroko, bagale botlhe ba repile diatla." 
Psalms76:7 Modimo wa ga Jakobe, koloi ya ntwa le pitse di tserwe ke madiopo ka kgalemelo ya gago." 
Psalms76:8 Wena o yo o boitshegang; ke mang yo o ka emang fa pele ga gago, fa bogale jwa gago bo tuka?" 
Psalms76:9 O ne wa utlwatsa katlholo go tswa kwa legodimong; lefatshe la tshoga, la didimala," 
Psalms76:10 fa Modimo o ema go atlhola gore o thuse botlhe ba ba pelonolo ba lefatshe. Sela. 
Psalms76:11 Gonne bogale jwa motho bo a go tlotla, o itlama ka bogale jo bo setseng." 
Psalms76:12 Ikaneleng Morena, Modimo wa lona, lo o lefele maikano. A botlhe ba ba o dikanyeditseng ba tsisetse ona o o tshabegang dineo," 
Psalms76:13 o o kokobetsang boikgantsho jwa dikgosana, o o tshabegang mo dikgosing tsa lefatshe." 
Psalms77:1 Pesalome ya ga Asafe e e kwaletsweng moopedisi, e e opelwang ka moopelo wa ga Jeduthune." 
Psalms77:2 Lentswe la me le lebile Modimo, ke a kua; lentswe la me le lebile Modimo gore o ntshekegele tsebe." 
Psalms77:3 Ke batla Morena ka letsatsi la tlalelo ya me; letsogo la me le otlologile mo bosigong, le sa lape; mowa wa me o gana go gomotsega." 
Psalms77:4 Fa ke gopola Modimo, ke fegelwe; fa ke akanya, mowa wa me o nne mo maibing. Sela." 
Psalms77:5 O tshwere dintshi tsa matlho a me, ke a tlhobaela, e bile ke palelwa ke go bua." 
Psalms77:6 Ke akanya malatsi a sebaka sa pele le dinyaga tsa bogologolo tala. 
Psalms77:7 Ke gopola go letsa kwadi ga me mo bosigong; ke akanya mo pelong ya me, mowa wa me o tlhotlhomisa o re:" 
Psalms77:8 “A Morena o tla latlhela ruri, a ga a nke a tlhola a kgatlhwa ke rona?" 
Psalms77:9 A bopelontle jwa gagwe bo feletse ruri? A tsholofetso e e neng e raya ditshika tsotlhe e khutlile? 
Psalms77:10 A Modimo o lebetse go itshwarela, a kampo o tswaletse boutlwelo-botlhoko jwa ona ka bogale?” Sela." 
Psalms77:11 Foo ka re: “Ke bolwetse jwa me, fa ke ne ke re: Letsogo le le jang la Mogodimodimo le fetogile.”" 
Psalms77:12 Ke tla gopola ditiro tsa Morena; ee, ke tla gopola dikgakgamatso tsa gago tsa bogologolo;" 
Psalms77:13 ke tla akanya tiro yotlhe ya gago; ke elelelwa tse o di dirileng. 
Psalms77:14 Tsela ya gago, Modimo, e mo boitshepong; ke modimo ofe o o kana ka wena, Modimo wa rona?" 
Psalms77:15 Ke wena, Modimo, o o dirang dikgakgamatso, o itsisitse thata ya gago mo merafeng." 
Psalms77:16 O golotse batho ba gago ka letsogo le le thata, boora Jakobe le Josefa. Sela."
