Psalms77:17 Metsi a go bonye, Modimo, metsi a go bonye, a roroma; ee, merwalela ya tetesela." 
Psalms77:18 Maru a tsholotse metsi, maru a duma; metswi ya gago le yona ya thuntshiwa." 
Psalms77:19 Tumo ya gago ya maru e utlwetse jaaka koloi e kgothosela; dikgadima tsa bonesa lefatshe; lefatshe la roroma, la kutuma." 
Psalms77:20 Tsela ya gago e ne e le mo lewatleng, le ditselana tsa gago mo metsing a magolo; mme metlhala ya gago e ne e sa bonale." 
Psalms77:21 O ne o goga batho ba gago jaaka letsomane ka Moše le Arone. 
Psalms78:1 Sefela sa thuto sa ga Asafe. Lona batho ba me, reetsang thuto ya me, sekegelang mafoko a molomo wa me ditsebe." 
Psalms78:2 Ke tla tswa molomo, ke bolela seane, ke ntsha dinyepo tsa bogologolo." 
Psalms78:3 Tse re di utlwetseng, ra di itse, tse borraetsho ba di re boleletseng," 
Psalms78:4 ga re ka ke ra di lobela bana ba bona; re tla bolelela losika lo lo tlang ditiro tsa pako tsa Morena, le thata ya gagwe, le dikgakgamatso tse a di dirileng." 
Psalms78:5 Gonne o tlhomile tshupo mo go Jakobe, a baya molao mo go Iseraele o a o laetseng borraetsho gore ba o itsise bana ba bona," 
Psalms78:6 gore losika lo lo tlang lo o itse, e bong bana ba ba tla tsalwang, gore ba tle ba o bolelele bana ba bona," 
Psalms78:7 le gore ba ikanye Modimo, mme ba se lebale ditiro tsa Modimo, mme ba tshegetse ditaolo tsa ona" 
Psalms78:8 gore ba se nne jaaka borraabo ba e neng e le losika lo lo tlhogo-e-thata lwa borukhutlhi, losika lo lo tlhokang pelo ya tlhomamo le mowa o o lebileng Modimo ka boikanyo." 
Psalms78:9 Baeferaime ba ba neng ba ipaakantse go hula ka bora, ba menoga, ba tshaba ka letsatsi la tlhabano." 
Psalms78:10 Ga ba a ka ba tlhokomela kgolagano ya Modimo, ba bile ba ganne go tsamaya ka fa molaong wa ona;" 
Psalms78:11 ba lebala ditiro tsa ona le dikgakgamatso tse o di ba bontshitseng. 
Psalms78:12 O dirile dikgakgamatso fa pele ga borraabo kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto, mo nageng ya Soane." 
Psalms78:13 O kgaogantse lewatle, wa ba tshedisa; wa emisa metsi jaaka lobota." 
Psalms78:14 Motshegare o ne wa ba goga ka leru, mme bosigo jotlhe ka lesedi la molelo." 
Psalms78:15 O phatlotse mafika mo sekakeng, wa ba nosa ka botlalo jaaka ka merwalela." 
Psalms78:16 O ne wa ntsha dinokana mo lefikeng, wa eledisa metsi jaaka dinoka." 
Psalms78:17 Mme ba fela ba tswelela pele go o leofela, ba rukhutlhegela Mogodimodimo kwa nageng e e omileng." 
Psalms78:18 Ba leka Modimo mo dipelong tsa bona ka go lopa dijo ka fa kgatlhegong ya bona. 
Psalms78:19 Ba bua kgatlhanong le Modimo ba re: “A Modimo o ka baakanya bojelo mo sekakeng? 
Psalms78:20 Ee, o iteile lefika, metsi a ba a ela, dinokana tsa phothosela. Mme a senkgwe le sona o ka se ntsha, gongwe wa naya batho ba ona nama?”" 
Psalms78:21 Ke gona e rileng Morena a utlwa, a tuka bogale; molelo wa tukela Jakobe, ee, bogale jwa tsogela Iseraele," 
Psalms78:22 ka ba se ka ba dumela Modimo, le e seng go ikanya thuso ya ona." 
Psalms78:23 Jaanong wa laela maru kwa godimo, wa bula mejako ya legodimo." 
Psalms78:24 Wa ba nesetsa Mmana go o ja, wa ba naya mabele a legodimo." 
Psalms78:25 Ba ja sejo sa baengele, wa ba romela mfago, ba kgora." 
Psalms78:26 O ne wa fokisa phefo ya botlhabatsatsi kwa legodimong, wa phunya phefo ya borwa ka thata ya ona." 
Psalms78:27 Wa ba nesetsa nama jaaka lerole le dinonyane tse di diphuka jaaka motlhaba wa lewatle. 
Psalms78:28 Wa di digela mo bothibelelong jwa bona tikologong ya maago a bona. 
Psalms78:29 Foo ba ja, ba kgora thata; wa ba tsisetsa tse ba neng ba di eleditse." 
Psalms78:30 E rile ba ise ba bakele keletso ya bona, nama e sa ntse e le mo maganong a bona," 
Psalms78:31 bogale jwa Modimo jwa ba tsogela, mme wa bolaya ba ba nonneng mo go bona, wa namalatsa makau a Iseraele." 
Psalms78:32 Mme ba tlhokomologa tsotlhe tseo, ba fela ba leofela pele, ba se ka ba dumela dikgakgamatso tsa ona." 
Psalms78:33 Ka moo wa fedisa malatsi a bona mo bosengsepe, le dinyaga tsa bona mo theregong." 
Psalms78:34 Mme e ne ya re fa o ba bolaya, ba botse ka ga ona, ba tlhabologe, ba batle Modimo;" 
Psalms78:35 ba gakologelwe, fa Modimo e le lefika la bona, mme Modimo Mogodimodimo e le mogolodi wa bona." 
Psalms78:36 Mme ba rata go o kgona ka melomo ya bona, ba o aketsa ka diteme tsa bona;" 
Psalms78:37 mme dipelo tsa bona di ne di sa o ineele ka tlhomamo, ba sa tlhokomele kgolagano ya ona ka boikanyego." 
Psalms78:38 Mme ona ka o le kutlwelo-botlhoko, o ne o itshwarela molato, o sa ba nyeletse; e bile o ne o busa bogale jwa ona gantsi, o sa tsose kgakalo yotlhe ya ona." 
Psalms78:39 O ne o gopola, fa bona ba le nama fela, ba le mowa o o fetang, o o sa tlholeng o ka boa." 
Psalms78:40 Ba ne ba o rukhutlhegela gantsi jang ne kwa sekakeng, ba o hutsafatsa kwa gareganaga." 
Psalms78:41 Ba leka Modimo gangwe le gape, ba kgopisa Moitshepi wa Iseraele." 
Psalms78:42 Ba ne ba se ke ba gakologelwa letsogo la ona, le e seng letsatsi le o ba namoletseng mmaba ka lone," 
Psalms78:43 jale fa o ne o dira ditshupo tsa ona kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto, le dikgakgamatso tsa ona mo nageng ya Soane." 
Psalms78:44 O ne wa fetola metsi a dinoka tsa bona madi, le a dinokana tsa bona gore ba retelelwe ke go nwa." 
Psalms78:45 Wa ba romela diboba, tsa ba loma, le digwagwa, tsa ba senyetsa." 
Psalms78:46 Thobo ya bona wa e naya segongwane, le leungo la matsapa a bona wa le naya tsie." 
Psalms78:47 Wa senya moweine wa bona ka sefako, le megokare wa bona ka serame." 
Psalms78:48 Wa bolaya dikgomo tsa bona ka sefako, le matsomane a bona ka ditladi." 
Psalms78:49 Wa ba romela bogale jo bo tukang jwa ona, le kgakalo le kgalefo le pitlagano, lesomo leo la barongwi ba tlalelo." 
Psalms78:50 Wa baakanyetsa bogale jwa ona tsela, wa se ka wa thibela mewa ya bona go ya losong, wa neela leroborobo maphelo a bona." 
Psalms78:51 Wa itaya maitibolo a tsotlhe mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, le bana ba ntlha ba thata ya bona mo ditenteng tsa ga Hame." 
Psalms78:52 Mme batho ba ona wa ba bolotsa jaaka dinku, wa ba goga mo sekakeng jaaka letsomane." 
Psalms78:53 Wa ba tsamaisa tshireletsong, mo ba sa boifeng sepe; mme baba ba bona, lewatle la ba nwetsa." 
Psalms78:54 Wa ba fitlhisa kwa lefatsheng le le boitshepo la ona, kwa thabeng e letsogo le le jang la ona le e thopileng." 
Psalms78:55 Mme wa leleka merafe fa pele ga bona, wa ba ruisa lefatshe la yona jaaka boswa jo ba bo lekanyeditsweng, wa agisa ditso tsa Iseraele mo matlong a bona." 
Psalms78:56 Mme bona ba ne ba leka Modimo, Mogodimodimo, ba o rukhutlhegela, ba sa tlhokomele ditshupo tsa ona." 
Psalms78:57 Ba ikepa, ba dira ka boikanyologo jaaka borraabo; ba boela kwa morago jaaka bora jo bo sa ikanngweng." 
Psalms78:58 Ba o kgopisa ka dithota tsa tlhabelo tsa bona, ba tsosa lefufa la ona ka medimo ya diseto ya bona." 
Psalms78:59 E rile Modimo o utlwa, wa galefa, wa latlha Iseraele gotlhe," 
Psalms78:60 wa ba wa tlogela Taberenakele ya kwa Silo, e bong tente e o neng o e tlhomile mo bathong." 
Psalms78:61 Mme thata ya ona wa e neela mo botshwarong le kgalalelo ya ona ya ona mo letsogong la mmaba. 
Psalms78:62 Batho ba ona wa ba neela mo tšhakeng; boswa jwa ona wa bo gakalela. 
Psalms78:63 Molelo o jele makau a bona; makgarebe a bona ga a ka a tlhabelwa mogolokwane wa nyalo. 
Psalms78:64 Baperesiti ba bona ba ole ka tšhaka, mme batlholagadi ba bona ba palelwa ke go ba lelela." 
Psalms78:65 Foo Morena a thanya jaaka mongwe yo o ne a robetse, jaaka mogale yo o neng a fentswe ke weine." 
Psalms78:66 A itaya baganetsi ba gagwe, a ba busetsa kwa morago, a ba tsisetsa tshotlego e e sa khutleng." 
Psalms78:67 Ke go re: A latlha tente ya ga Josefa, a se ka a itlhaolela lotso lwa ga Eferaime," 
Psalms78:68 mme a itlhaolela lotso lwa ga Juta, thaba ya Sione e a e ratang." 
Psalms78:69 A aga Felo-ga-Boitshepo ga gagwe jaaka bogodimo jwa legodimo, jaaka lefatshe le o le thaetseng bosakhutleng." 
Psalms78:70 A itlhaolela Dafita, motlhanka wa gagwe, a mo tsaya a le kwa merakeng ya dinku." 
Psalms78:71 A mo tlosa a disitse dinku tse di amusang gore a dise Jakobe, batho ba gagwe, le Iseraele, boswa jwa gagwe." 
Psalms78:72 Mme o ne a ba disa ka fa pelong ya boammaaruri ya gagwe, a ba tsamaisa ka diatla tse di maatlametlo." 
Psalms79:1 Pesalome ya ga Asafe. Modimo, baheitane ba tsenye mo bosweng jwa gago; ba itshepolotse Tempele e e Boitshepo ya gago; ba dirile Jerusalema maroperope fela." 
Psalms79:2 Ditoto tsa batlhanka ba gago ba di file dinonyane tsa loapi go di ja; nama ya baitshepi ba gago ba e file dibata tsa naga. 
Psalms79:3 Madi a bona ba a tsholotse jaaka metsi tikologong ya Jerusalema, mme go ne go se ope yo o ba fitlhang." 
Psalms79:4 Re diregile nyatsego fela mo go ba re bapileng nabo; le tshotlego le kgobo mo go ba ba tikologong ya rona. 
Psalms79:5 E tla nna goleele go le kae, Morena? A o tla galefela ruri, a lefufa la gago le tla tuka jaaka molelo?" 
Psalms79:6 Tshololela kgakalo ya gago mo baheitaneng ba ba sa go itseng le mo magosing a a sa bitseng leina la gago. 
Psalms79:7 Gonne ba jele Jakobe, ba senya boago jwa gagwe." 
Psalms79:8 O se ka wa re beletsa ditshiamololo tsa borraetsho-mogolwagolwane; a boutlwelo-botlhoko jwa gago bo re kgatlhantshe ka bonako, gonne re koafetse thata." 
Psalms79:9 Re thuse, Modimo wa pholoso ya rona ka ntlha ya tlotlo ya leina la gago; o re namolele, o re itshwarele maleo ka ntlha ya leina la gago." 
Psalms79:10 Kana baheitane ba tla buelang ba re: “Modimo wa bona o kae?” A pusolosetso ya madi a a tsholotsweng a batlhanka ba gago e itsege mo baheitaneng fa pele ga matlho a rona. 
Psalms79:11 A phegelo ya bagolegwi e fitlhe fa pele ga gago; a bona ba ba tshwanetseng go swa ba lesiwe ka fa bogolong jwa letsogo la gago. 
Psalms79:12 Mme kgalo e bona ba re bapileng nabo ba go kgadileng ka yona, Morena, o e ba busetse gasupa mo dihubeng tsa bona." 
Psalms79:13 Mme rona ba re leng batho ba gago le dinku tsa bofulo jwa gago, re tla go leboga ka bosakhutleng, re bolela pako ya gago go ya tshikatshikeng." 
Psalms80:1 Pesalome ya tshupo ya ga Asafe e e kwaletsweng moopedisi, e e opelwang ka moopelo wa: “Madutla”." 
Psalms80:2 Wena, Modisa wa Iseraele, a o ko o utlwe; wena yo o gogang Josefa jaaka letsomane, wena yo o ntseng godimo ga boKerubime, iponatse ka phatsimo." 
Psalms80:3 Tsosa nonofo ya gago fa pele ga Eferaime le Benyamene le Manase, mme o tle go re thusa." 
Psalms80:4 Re tlhabolole, Modimo, o phatsimise sefatlhego sa gago gore re phologe." 
Psalms80:5 Morena, Modimo wa masomosomo, o tla galefela thapelo ya batho ba gago goleele go le kae?" 
Psalms80:6 O ba jesitse senkgwe sa dikeledi, wa ba nosa dikeledi gagolo thata." 
Psalms80:7 O re dirile se se lwelwang mo go ba re bapileng nabo, baba ba rona ba a re sotla." 
Psalms80:8 Re tlhabolole, Modimo wa masomosomo, o phatsimise sefatlhego sa gago gore re phologe." 
Psalms80:9 O epolotse setlhatshana sa moweine mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, wa leleka ditšhaba, wa se tlhoma." 
Psalms80:10 O se baakanyeditse manno, sa nama medi, sa tlala lefatshe." 
Psalms80:11 Dithaba di ne di khurumediwa ke moriti wa sona, le mesetere ya Modimo e khurumediwa ka dikala tsa sona." 
Psalms80:12 Se ne se godisa dikala tsa sona go fitlha kwa lewatleng le matlhogela a sona go fitlha kwa nokeng ya Ferathe. 
Psalms80:13 Kana o ne o phomelang dipota tsa sona gore botlhe ba ba fetang ka tsela ba se fotlhe? 
Psalms80:14 Kolobe ya sekgwa e a se epolola, diphologolo tsa naga di a se ja." 
Psalms80:15 Tswetswe, boa, Modimo wa masomosomo; leba, o le kwa legodimong, o bone; o tlhokomele setlhatshana se sa moweine;" 
Psalms80:16 e bong setlhongwa se se tlhomilweng ka letsogo la gago le le jang, le morwa yo ò mo ikgodiseditseng." 
Psalms80:17 Se fisitswe ka molelo, sa kgaolwa; a baba ba latlhege ka kgalemelo ya sefatlhego sa gago." 
Psalms80:18 A letsogo la gago le okame monna yo o dirilweng ke letsogo la gago le le jang, e bong morwa motho yo ò mo ikgodiseditseng." 
Psalms80:19 Foo ga re kitla re go hularela. Re phedise, mme re tla bitsa leina la gago." 
Psalms80:20 Re tlhabolole, Morena, Modimo wa masomosomo, o phatsimise sefatlhego sa gago gore re phologe." 
Psalms81:1 Pesalome ya ga Asafe e e kwaletsweng moopedisi, e e opelwang ka moopelo wa ba ba gatang segatelo." 
Psalms81:2 Ipeleleng Modimo o e leng thata ya rona, lo dudueletse Modimo wa ga Jakobe." 
Psalms81:3 Tlhabang sefela, lo letse moropa le katara e e itumedisang le harepa." 
Psalms81:4 Letsang phala, fa ngwedi o rogwa, gape fa o le mosweu ka letsatsi la moletlo wa rona." 
Psalms81:5 Gonne ke molao o o beetsweng Iseraele, ke se se siametseng Modimo wa ga Jakobe." 
Psalms81:6 O o beile go nna tshupo mo go Josefa, jale fa o bololela lefatshe la Egepeto. Ke utlwa puo e ke ne ke sa e itse, e re:" 
Psalms81:7 “Ke ne ka rola magetla a gagwe morwalo, diatla tsa gagwe tsa imololwa seroto." 
Psalms81:8 O no wa bitsa o le mo tlalelong, ka go golola; ka go araba ke fitlhegile mo marung a a dumang, ka go leka fa metsing a Meriba. Sela." 
Psalms81:9 Reetsa, morafe wa me, ke tla go kaela; wena Iseraele, e kete o ka bo o nkutlwa." 
Psalms81:10 A go se ka ga nna modimo ope wa seeng mo go wena; le gona o se ka wa obamela modimo ope wa ba sele. 
Psalms81:11 Ke nna Morena, Modimo wa gago, o o go ntshitseng kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto; atlhamisa legano la gago gore ke le tlatse." 
Psalms81:12 Mme batho ba me ba ne ba sa reetse lentswe la me; Iseraele o ne a sa utlwane le nna. 
Psalms81:13 Ke fa ke ba naya tsela ka ntlha ya logwadi lwa dipelo tsa bona; ba itsamaela ka fa maitaolong a bona. 
Psalms81:14 E kete batho ba me ba ka bo ba nkutlwa! E kete Iseraele o ka bo a sepela mo ditseleng tsa me! 
Psalms81:15 Ke ne ke tla akofa ke kokobetsa baba ba bona, ke tsholeletsa baganetsi ba bona letsogo." 
Psalms81:16 Ba ba tlhoileng Morena ba ne ba tla mo tlakisa, mme sebaka sa bona Baiseraele e ne e tla nna se se sa khutleng." 
Psalms81:17 O ne a tla ba jesa mabele a a nonneng. Ke ne ke tla go kgorisa dinotshe tsa semana.” 
Psalms82:1 Pesalome ya ga Asafe. Modimo o eme mo phuthegong ya medimo; o atlhola fa gare ga medimo. 
Psalms82:2 Lo tla atlhola ka tshiamololo goleele go le kae, lo ntse lo gobelelela baikepi? Sela." 
Psalms82:3 Siamisetsang ba babotlana le dikhutsana; nayang batlalelwi le batlhoki se se ba tshwanetseng. 
Psalms82:4 Pholosang ba babotlana le bahumanegi; lo ba golole mo diatleng tsa baikepi. 
Psalms82:5 Medimo eo ga e na temogo, ga e na tlhaloganyo; e kgarakgatshega mo lefifing; metheo yotlhe ya lefatshe e a tshikinyega." 
Psalms82:6 Nna ka nosi ke rile, lo medimo; mme lotlhe lo bomorwa Mogodimodimo." 
Psalms82:7 Mme ruri, lo tla swa jaaka batho, lo tla wa jaaka mongwe wa ditona." 
Psalms82:8 Tloga o eme, Modimo, o atlhole lefatshe; gonne o tla rua ditšhaba tsotlhe." 
Psalms83:1 Sefela. Pesalome ya ga Asafe. 
Psalms83:2 Modimo, se tlhokomologe, se didimale, se nne fela, Modimo!" 
Psalms83:3 Gonne, bona, baba ba gago ba a feretlha; ba ba go tlhoileng ba tsholetsa ditlhogo." 
Psalms83:4 Ba logela batho ba gago maano a bolotsana, ba gakololana ka ga ba o ba sireletsang." 
Psalms83:5 Ba re: “Tlayang, a re ba nyeletseng gore ba se tlhole ba nna morafe le gore leina la Iseraele le se tlhole le gopolwa.”" 
Psalms83:6 Ba gakololanye ka bongwefela jwa pelo, ba go ikgolaganyetsa:" 
Psalms83:7 E bong ba ditente tsa Etomo le Baisemaele le Bamoabe le Bahagare 
Psalms83:8 le ba Gebale le Baamone le Baamaleke le Bafelesita mmogo le baagi ba Tiro; 
Psalms83:9 Baasiria le bona ba ikopantse nabo, ba thusa boora Lote. Sela." 
Psalms83:10 Ba direle jaaka o kile wa direla Bamidiane le Sisera le Jabine fa nokeng ya Kisone. 
Psalms83:11 Ba nyeleditswe kwa Entore, ba tswa letshotelo la tshimo." 
Psalms83:12 Dira batlotlegi ba bona gore ba nne jaaka Orebe le Seebe le dikgosana tsa bona jaaka Seba le Salemuna 
Psalms83:13 tse di reng: “A re ithopeleng maago a Modimo.” 
Psalms83:14 Modimo wa me, ba dire jaaka matlakala le jaaka moko o o gogolwang ke phefo." 
Psalms83:15 Molelo o fisa sekgwa le kgabo ya molelo e tshuba dithaba: 
Psalms83:16 Ba leleke jalo ka ledimo la gago, o ba boifise jalo ka kgwanyape ya gago." 
Psalms83:17 Tlatsa difatlhego tsa bona ditlhong gore ba batle leina la gago, Morena." 
Psalms83:18 A ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, ba boife ka go sa feleng. A ba setlhafale ka ditlhong, ba latlhege" 
Psalms83:19 gore ba lemoge, fa wena yo o bidiwang Morena ò le Mogodimodimo ò le wesi o ò okameng lefatshe lotlhe." 
Psalms84:1 Pesalome ya boora Kora e e kwaletsweng moopedisi, e e opelwang ka moopelo wa ba ba gatang segatelo." 
Psalms84:2 Kana maago a gago a mantlentle jang wena Morena wa masomosomo! 
Psalms84:3 Mowa wa me o tlhologeletswe, o fegelelwa malapa a Morena. Pelo ya me le nama ya me di dudueletsa Modimo o o phedileng." 
Psalms84:4 Le serobele se iponetse ntlo le peolwane sentlhaga kwa e ka bayang mamphorwana a yona teng, e bong dialetare tsa gago, Morena wa masomosomo, Kgosi ya me, Modimo wa me." 
Psalms84:5 Go sego bona ba ba agileng mo Ntlong ya gago, ba go baka ka gale. Sela." 
Psalms84:6 Go sego motho yo thata ya gagwe e leng mo go wena, yo ditsela tse di bonalang di leng mo pelong ya gagwe." 
Psalms84:7 Fa ba ralala mokgatsha wa komelelo, ba o dire lefatshe la metswedi; le gona pula ya ntlha e o khurumetse ka masego." 
Psalms84:8 Ba tsamaya ba tlhomogantse dithata; mongwe le mongwe wa bona o tla bonala fa pele ga Modimo mo Sione. 
Psalms84:9 Morena, Modimo wa masomosomo, utlwa thapelo ya me, a o ko o reetse, wena Modimo wa ga Jakobe. Sela." 
Psalms84:10 Modimo, thebe ya rona, leba o bone sefatlhego sa motlodiwa wa gago." 
Psalms84:11 Gonne letsatsi le le lengwe fela mo malapeng a gago le gaisa malatsi a le sekete a mangwe. Ke rata go nna fa serepoding sa mojako wa Ntlo ya Modimo wa me bogolo go go aga mo matlong a boikepo. 
Psalms84:12 Gonne Morena Modimo ke letsatsi le thebe; Morena o tla abela boitshwarelo le tlotlo; ba ba tsamayang ka tshiamo ga a kitla a ba tima tse di molemo. 
Psalms84:13 Morena wa masomosomo, go sego motho yo o go ikanyang." 
Psalms85:1 Pesalome ya boora Kora e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms85:2 Morena, o utlwetse lefatshe la gago botlhoko, wa fetola tatlhego ya Jakobe." 
Psalms85:3 O itshwaretse molato wa morafe wa gago, wa bipa maleo otlhe a bona. Sela." 
Psalms85:4 O tlositse kgakalo yotlhe ya gago, wa boa mo bogaleng jwa gago jo bo tukang." 
Psalms85:5 Re tlhabolole, Modimo wa pholoso ya rona, o khutlise kgakalo ya gago mo go rona." 
Psalms85:6 A o tla re galefela ka bosakhutleng, a bogale jwa gago o tla bo tsweletsa pele go ya tshikatshikeng?" 
Psalms85:7 A ga o kitla o re phedisa gape gore batho ba gago ba go itumelele? 
Psalms85:8 Re bontshe bopelotlhomogi jwa gago, Morena, o re nee pholoso ya gago." 
Psalms85:9 Ke rata go utlwa se Morena, Modimo, o tla se buang; gonne batho ba ona, e bong baratiwa ba ona, ruri, o tla bua nabo tsa kagiso. Fela a ba se boele gape kwa bosilong." 
Psalms85:10 Kana pholoso ya ona e gaufi le ba ba o boifang gore kgalalelo e age mo lefatsheng la rona. 
Psalms85:11 Bopelontle le boammaaruri di a kgatlhana; tshiamo le kagiso di a atlana. 
Psalms85:12 Boammaaruri bo tlhoga mo lefatsheng; tshiamo e lebile kwa tlase e le kwa legodimong. 
Psalms85:13 Le gona Morena o tla naya se se molemo, lefatshe la rona le tla ntsha leungo la lone." 
Psalms85:14 Tshiamo e mo eteletse pele, e tlhokometse tsela ya dikgato tsa gagwe." 
Psalms86:1 Thapelo ya ga Dafita. Morena, ntshekegele tsebe, o nkutlwe; gonne ke motlalelwi le mohumanegi." 
Psalms86:2 Boloka mowa wa me; gonne ke boitshepo. Wena Modimo wa me, thusa motlhanka wa gago yo o go ikantseng." 
Psalms86:3 Intshwarele, Morena; gonne ke ntse ke kuela go wena letsatsi lotlhe." 
Psalms86:4 Itumedise mowa wa motlhanka wa gago; gonne ke tsholeletsa mowa wa me kwa go wena, Morena." 
Psalms86:5 Gonne wena, Morena, o molemo le boitshwarelo; o bopelonomi jo bogolo mo go botlhe ba ba goelang kwa go wena." 
Psalms86:6 Morena, reetsa thapelo ya me, o tlhokomele lentswe la mekokotlelo ya me." 
Psalms86:7 Ke goela kwa go wena ka letsatsi la tlalelo ya me; gonne o a nkutlwa. 
Psalms86:8 Ga go ope mo medimong o o tshwanang nao, Morena; ga go na sepe se se tshwanang le ditiro tsa gago." 
Psalms86:9 Ditšhaba tsotlhe tse o di dirileng di tla tla, di obamela fa pele ga gago, Morena, di tlotla leina la gago." 
Psalms86:10 Gonne wena o mogolo, o dira dikgakgamatso; wena o Modimo o le wesi fela." 
Psalms86:11 Morena, nthute tsela ya gago gore ke tsamae mo boammaaruring jwa gago; kitlanya pelo ya me gore e boife leina la gago." 
Psalms86:12 Morena, Modimo wa me, ke rata go go baka ka pelo yotlhe le go tlotla leina la gago ka bosenabokhutlo." 
Psalms86:13 Gonne bopelontle jwa gago bo bogolo mo go nna, o golotse mowa wa me mo felong ga baswi, fa go kwa tlasetlase." 
Psalms86:14 Modimo, baikgantshi ba ntsogetse; lekoko la ba ba peloethata le tsoma botshelo jwa me, mme ga ba go gopole." 
Psalms86:15 Mme wena Morena, o Modimo o o boutlwelo-botlhoko le boitshwarelo; ga o fele pelo, o tletse bopelotlhomogi le boammaaruri." 
Psalms86:16 Retologela kwa go nna, o intshwarele; naya motlhanka wa gago thata ya gago, o thuse morwa lelata la gago." 
Psalms86:17 Dira sesupo sa molemo mo go nna gore ba ba ntlhoileng ba se bone, ba be ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, ka wena Morena o nthusitse, o bile o nkgomoditse." 
Psalms87:1 Pesalome ya boora Kora. Sefela. Metheo e e mo dithabeng tse di boitshepo, Morena o a e rata." 
Psalms87:2 O rata dikgoro tsa Sione bogolo go maago otlhe a ga Jakobe. 
Psalms87:3 Dilo tse di galalelang di bolelwa ka ga gago, wena motse wa Modimo. Sela." 
Psalms87:4 Ke umaka Rahabe le Babele mo go ba ba nkitseng; le Felesita le Tiro mmogo le Khuše ke re: “Ba, ba tsaletswe teng.”" 
Psalms87:5 Ka ga Sione go tla twe: “Mongwe le mongwe o tsaletswe teng.” Mme motse oo, Mogodimodimo o a o tlhomamisa." 
Psalms87:6 Morena o tla bala, fa a kwala ditšhaba, a re: “Yo, o tsaletswe teng.” Sela." 
Psalms87:7 Bona ba ba binang pina le ba ba opelang ba re: “Metswedi yotlhe ya me e mo go wena.” 
Psalms88:1 Sefela. Pesalome ya boora Kora e e kwaletsweng moopedisi, e e opelwang ka moopelo wa: “Bolwetse”. Sefela sa thuto sa ga Hemane, oora Esera." 
Psalms88:2 Morena, Modimo wa thuso ya me, ke goela go wena bosigo le motshegare." 
Psalms88:3 A thapelo ya me e fitlhe fa go wena; sekegela selelo sa me tsebe. 
Psalms88:4 Gonne pelo ya me e tennwe ke dipogo; bophelo jwa me bo atametse felo ga baswi. 
Psalms88:5 Ke setse ke balelwa le ba ba fologelang mo lebitleng, ke tshwana le monna yo o se nang thata." 
Psalms88:6 Ke laditswe le baswi, jaaka ba ba bolailweng ba letse mo diphupung, ba o sa tlholeng o ba gopola, ka ba kgaogantswe le letsogo la gago." 
Psalms88:7 O mpeile kwa tlasetlase moleteng, mo mafifing, mo matennye." 
Psalms88:8 Bogale jwa gago bo nkimetse, o nkgateletse ka merwalela ya gago yotlhe. Sela." 
Psalms88:9 Ba ke itsanyeng sentle nabo o ba tlositse fa go nna; o ntirile seila sa bona; ke tswaletswe, ke palelwa ke go tswela kwa ntle." 
Psalms88:10 Leitlho la me le felelela ka pogo. Ke ntse ke go bitsa. Morena, ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe ke go tsholeletsa mabogo." 
Psalms88:11 A o tla dira dikgakgamatso mo baswing; gongwe ba ba suleng a ba tla tsoga ba go baka? Sela. 
Psalms88:12 A bopelothomogi jwa gago bo ka bolelwa mo phupung, gongwe boikanyego jwa gago kwa Felong ga baswi?" 
Psalms88:13 Dikgakgamatso tsa gago a di ka itsege mo lefifing, gongwe tshiamo ya gago mo lefatsheng la tebalo?" 
Psalms88:14 Mme nna, Morena, ke goela go wena, thapelo ya me e tla go wena, e sa le moso." 
Psalms88:15 Morena, o latlhelang mowa wa me, o mphitlhelelang sefatlhego sa gago." 
Psalms88:16 Ke tlaletswe, ke wa go swa go tswa bokaung jwa me; ke rwele dipoitshego tsa gago, ke batla go tlhoboga." 
Psalms88:17 Bogale jwa gago bo nkwetse; dipoitshego tsa gago di nnyeleditse; 
Psalms88:18 di ntikanyeditse jaaka metsi letsatsi lotlhe, di ntikile gotlhegotlhe." 
Psalms88:19 O tlositse moratiwa le tsala fa go nna, lefifi ke lone tsala ya me." 
Psalms89:1 Sefela sa thuto sa ga Ethane, oora Esera." 
Psalms89:2 Ke tla opela bopelotlhomogi jwa Morena ka bosakhutleng; ke tla itsise losika longwe le longwe boikanyo jwa gago ka molomo wa me. 
Psalms89:3 Gonne o rile: “Bopelontle bo tla tlhomama ka bosakhutleng; boikanyo jwa me ke bo thaile kwa legodimong. 
Psalms89:4 Ke dirile kgolagano le moitlhaolelwi wa me, ke ikanetse Dafita, motlhanka wa me, ka re:" 
Psalms89:5 ‘Ke tla tlhomamisa losika lwa gago go ya kwa go sa khutleng, ke agela ditshika tsotlhe sedulo sa gago sa bogosi.’ ” Sela." 
Psalms89:6 Magodimo a tla boka kgakgamatso ya gago, Morena, le boikanyo jwa gago bo bakwa mo phuthegong ya baitshepi." 
Psalms89:7 Gonne ke mang yo o lekanang le Morena kwa marung, yo o tshwanang le Morena mo go bomorwa Modimo?" 
Psalms89:8 Modimo o boifega mo kopanong ya baitshepi; o mogolo, o bile o boitshega go feta botlhe ba ba o dikanyeditseng." 
Psalms89:9 Morena, Modimo wa masomosomo, ke mang yo o tshwanang nao? Morena, o thata, boikanyo jwa gago bo mo tikologong ya gago." 
Psalms89:10 Wena o laola boikgogomoso jwa lewatle; e re fa makhubu a lone a tsholetsega, wena o a didimatse." 
Psalms89:11 O tšhwetlakantse Rahabe jaaka yo o tlhabilweng; o phatlaladitse baba ba gago ka letsogo le le thata la gago. 
Psalms89:12 Magodimo ke a gago le lefatshe ke la gago; lefatshe le tse di tletseng mo go lone wena o di thaile tsotlhe. 
Psalms89:13 Bokone le borwa o di tlhodile; Thabore le Heremone di dudueletsa leina la gago. 
Psalms89:14 O na le letsogo la bonatla, seatla sa gago se thata, letsogo le le jang la gago le tsholetsegile." 
Psalms89:15 Tshiamo le molao ke motheo wa sedulo sa gago sa bogosi; bopelonomi le boammaaruri di etelela sefatlhego sa gago pele. 
Psalms89:16 Go sego morafe o o itseng go duduetsa, o o tsamayang mo leseding la sefatlhego sa gago, Morena." 
Psalms89:17 Ba ipelela leina la gago ka metlha, ba godisiwa ka tshiamo ya gago." 
Psalms89:18 Gonne wena o mokgabo wa thata ya bona, o tsholetsa lonaka lwa rona ka bopelonomi jwa gago." 
Psalms89:19 Gonne thebe ya rona ke ya Morena, kgosi ya rona ke ya Moitshepi wa Iseraele." 
Psalms89:20 Ka motlha oo, o ne wa bua le baitshepi ba gago ka pono wa re: “Ke neetse mogale thuso, ke godisitse yo o tlhaotsweng mo morafeng." 
Psalms89:21 Ke bonye Dafita, motlhanka wa me, ka mo tlotsa lookwane lwa me lo lo boitshepo," 
Psalms89:22 yo seatla sa me se tla nnang le ena ka gale, yo letsogo la me le tla mo tiisang." 
Psalms89:23 Mmaba ga a ka ke a mo tlhasela, le e seng rra-bosula go mo patika." 
Psalms89:24 Ke tla remaganya baganetsi ba gagwe fa pele ga gagwe, ke bolaya ba ba mo tlhoileng." 
Psalms89:25 Mme boikanyo jwa me le bopelonomi jwa me di tla nna nae, lonaka lwa gagwe lo tla tsholetsegela godimo ka leina la me." 
Psalms89:26 Ke baya seatla sa gagwe mo lewatleng, le letsogo la gagwe le le jang mo dinokeng." 
Psalms89:27 O tla nthaya a re: ‘Wena o rre, o Modimo wa me, o lefika la thuso ya me.’" 
Psalms89:28 Le gona ke tla mo dira motsalwapele le yo mogolo mo dikgosing tsa lefatshe. 
Psalms89:29 Ke tla mmolokela bopelotlhomogi jwa me ka bosakhutleng, mme kgolagano ya me e tla mo tlhomamela." 
Psalms89:30 Ke tla dira gore losika lwa gagwe e nne lo lo sa khutleng, le sebaka sa sedulo sa gagwe sa bogosi se lekane le malatsi a legodimo." 
Psalms89:31 Mme e tla re fa bomorwawe ba tlogela molao wa me, ba sa tsamae mo go tse di ntshiametseng," 
Psalms89:32 fa ba itshepolola ditaelo tsa me, ba sa tlhokomele ditao tsa me," 
Psalms89:33 ke ba beletse ditlolo tsa bona ka thupa le melato ya bona ka dipetso. 
Psalms89:34 Le fa go ntse jalo bopelotlhomogi jwa me ga nkitla ke bo tlosa mo go ene, le e seng go mo senyetsa boikanyo jwa me." 
Psalms89:35 Ga nke ke itshepolola kgolagano ya me, le e seng go fetola se se duleng mo molomong wa me." 
Psalms89:36 Ke ikanne gangwe fela ka boitshepo jwa me – ga ke ne ke aketsa Dafita! – 
Psalms89:37 Ka re: ‘Losika lwa gagwe lo tla nnela ruri, le sedulo sa gagwe sa bogosi jaaka letsatsi fa pele ga me." 
Psalms89:38 O tla tlhomama ka bosakhutleng jaaka ngwedi. Kana mosupi yo o mo legodimong o boikanyo.’ ” Sela. 
Psalms89:39 Mme wena o latlhile motlodiwa wa gago, wa mo nyatsa, wa mo galefela." 
Psalms89:40 O sentse kgolagano e o e dirileng le motlhanka wa gago, wa itshepolola serwalo sa gagwe sa bogosi ka go se latlhela fa fatshe." 
Psalms89:41 O thubile dipota tsotlhe tsa gagwe, dikago tsa phemelo tsa gagwe wa di ntsha marope." 
Psalms89:42 Botlhe ba ba neng ba feta ka tsela ba ne ba mo thukhutha dilo, a sotlega mo go ba ba agileng nae." 
Psalms89:43 O godisitse mabogo a a jang a baganetsi ba gagwe, wa itumedisa baba botlhe ba gagwe." 
Psalms89:44 O titinne bogale jwa tšhaka ya gagwe, wa se ka wa mo natlafatsa mo tlhabanong." 
Psalms89:45 O fifaditse kgalalelo ya gagwe, wa digela sedulo sa gagwe sa bogosi fa fatshe." 
Psalms89:46 O khutshwafaditse malatsi a bokau jwa gagwe, wa mo jesa ditlhong. Sela." 
Psalms89:47 Morena, o tla iphitlha goleele go le kae? A bogale jwa gago bo tla tuka jaaka molelo?" 
Psalms89:48 Gopola tlhe gore bophelo ke eng? A batho botlhe o ba bopetse lefela? 
Psalms89:49 Motho ke mang yo o ka phelang, a sa bone loso, mme a golola mowa wa gagwe mo thateng ya felo ga baswi? Sela." 
Psalms89:50 Morena, mapelotlhomogi a gago a pele a kae, a o ikanetseng Dafita ka fa boikanyong jwa gago?" 
Psalms89:51 Morena, gopola tshotlego ya badiredi ba gago e ke e rweleng ka sehuba sa me e tswa merafeng yotlhe e megolo," 
Psalms89:52 e baba ba gago, Morena, ba sotlileng ka yona, e ba sotlileng dikgato tsa motlodiwa wa gago ka yona." 
Psalms89:53 A Morena a bakwe ka bosakhutleng. Amen, ee, a go nne jalo!" 
Psalms90:1 Thapelo ya ga Moše, monna wa Modimo. Morena, o ntse o le botshabelo jwa rona mo ditshikatshikeng." 
Psalms90:2 Pele dithaba di ise di tsalwe, o ise o tlhole lefatshe le lebopo, wena o ntse o le Modimo go tswa bosenang-tshimologo go ya bosakhutleng." 
Psalms90:3 O busetsa batho loroleng lwa mmu wa re: “Boang, bana ba batho.”" 
Psalms90:4 Gonne dinyaga di le sekete, mo matlhong a gago di tshwana le letsatsi le le fetileng la maabane, di tshwana le tiso ya bosigo." 
Psalms90:5 O ba gogotse jaaka ka morwalela; ba ntse jaaka ba robetse. Mo mosong ba nne jaaka bojang jo bo tlhogang," 
Psalms90:6 jo bo thunyang mo mosong, bo gole, mme maitsiboa bo segwe, bo omelele." 
Psalms90:7 Gonne re nyelela ka bogale jwa gago, re fediwa ka tshoganyetso ka kgakalo ya gago." 
Psalms90:8 O beile melato ya rona fa pele ga gago, le maleo a rona a a fitlhegileng o a beile mo leseding la sefatlhego sa gago." 
Psalms90:9 Gonne malatsi a rona otlhe a fetisiwa ke bogale jwa gago, dinyaga tsa rona di feta jaaka kgopolo." 
Psalms90:10 Bophelo jwa rona ke dinyaga di le masome a a supang, mme fa thata e le teng, bo ka nna dinyaga tse di masome a robedi; mme se segolo sa tsona ke tapisego le tshwenyego; gonne bo feta ka bonako, mme re fofela koo." 
Psalms90:11 Ke mang yo o lemogang bogolo jwa bogale jwa gago, le kgakalo ya gago, ka fa poitshegong ya gago?" 
Psalms90:12 Re rute go bala malatsi a rona gore re tle re tlhalefe mo dipelong. 
Psalms90:13 Boa, Morena! Go tla nna goleele go le kae? O utlwele batlhanka ba gago botlhoko." 
Psalms90:14 Re kgorise ka bopelotlhomogi jwa gago e sa le ka moso, mme re tla duduetsa, re itumela ka malatsi otlhe a rona." 
Psalms90:15 Re fe boitumelo ka malatsi a a kana ka a o re watlhaileng ka ona le ka dinyaga tse di kana ka tse re bonyeng botlhoko mo go tsona. 
Psalms90:16 A tiro ya gago e bonalele batlhanka ba gago, le kgalalelo ya gago bana ba bona." 
Psalms90:17 A botsalano jwa Morena, Modimo wa rona, bo re okame. Tsweletsa tiro ya diatla tsa rona, ee, tiro ya diatla tsa rona o e tsweletse." 
Psalms91:1 Yo o ntseng mo tshireletsong ya Mogodimodimo, yo o leng mo moriting wa Mothatayotlhe," 
Psalms91:2 o tla raya Morena a re: “O botshabelo jwa me le kago ya phemelo ya me; o Modimo wa me o ke o ikanyang.” 
Psalms91:3 Gonne ke ena yo o tla go gololang mo serung sa mothaisa-nonyane le mo leroborobong le le bolayang. 
Psalms91:4 O tla go sireletsa ka diphuka tsa gagwe, ò femelega fa tlase ga tsona; boammaaruri jwa gagwe ke thebe le phemelo." 
Psalms91:5 Ga o na go boifa poitshego ya bosigo, le e seng motsu o o fofang motshegare," 
Psalms91:6 le e seng leroborobo le le tsamayang mo lefifing, le e seng kgogodi e e bolayang motshegare wa selebalo." 
Psalms91:7 Le fa go ka wa ba le sekete ka fa lotlhakoreng lwa gago, gongwe ba le dikete di le some ka fa letsogong le le jang la gago, wena ga go nke go go ama." 
Psalms91:8 O tla leba ka matlho fela, o bona baikepi ba bolawa ke se ba se jeleng." 
Psalms91:9 Gonne o rile: “Wena Morena o botshabelo jwa me.” O dirile Mogodimodimo phemelo ya gago. 
Psalms91:10 Ga o nke o welwa ke bosula bope, le boago jwa gago ga bo nke bo atamelwa ke sebetso." 
Psalms91:11 Gonne o tla go laelela baengele ba gagwe gore ba go boloke mo ditseleng tsotlhe tsa gago. 
Psalms91:12 Ba tla go kuka ka diatla gore dinao tsa gago di se kgopiwe ke lentswe. 
Psalms91:13 O tla gata tau le lebolobolo, o gataka ledumedi le kgogela." 
Psalms91:14 Ke tla mo pholosa, ka a nkgomaretse ka lorato, ke tla mo sireletsa, gonne o itse leina la me." 
Psalms91:15 E tla re a mpitsa, ke mo utlwe, ke nne nae mo tlalelong; ke tla mo namola, ke mo tlotla." 
Psalms91:16 Ke tla mo kgorisa bophelo jo boleele, ke mmontsha pholoso ya me." 
Psalms92:1 Pesalome. Sefela sa letsatsi la Sabata. 
Psalms92:2 Go monate go leboga Morena le go opelela leina la gago dipako, Mogodimodimo," 
Psalms92:3 go bolela bopelotlhomogi jwa gago mo mosong le boikanyo jwa gago bosigo," 
Psalms92:4 ka kwadi ya dithapo di le some le ka harepa le ka melodi ya segwana. 
Psalms92:5 Gonne wena Morena o intumedisitse ka go dira ga gago; ke duduetsa ditiro tsa diatla tsa gago. 
Psalms92:6 Ditiro tsa gago, Morena, di dikgolo jang! Dikakanyo tsa gago di botengteng." 
Psalms92:7 Seeleele ga se di lemoge, lesilo ga le di tlhaloganye." 
Psalms92:8 Fa baikepi ba gola sentle jaaka bojang, mme badirabosula botlhe ba kgaba jaaka dithunya, e a be e le gore ba nyelediwe ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms92:9 Mme wena Morena o Mogodimodimo ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms92:10 Gonne ruri, baba ba gago, Morena, ruri baba ba gago ba tla latlhega, basulatsi botlhe ba tla faladiwa." 
Psalms92:11 Lonaka lwa me o lo tsholetsa jaaka lwa nare, o ntloditse lookwane lo lošwa." 
Psalms92:12 Leitlho la me le tla leba baba ba me ka kgatlhego, ditsebe tsa me di tla utlwela tatlhego ya basenyi ba ba ntsogelang ka boitumelo." 
Psalms92:13 Mosiami o tla tlhoga jaaka mokolane a gole jaaka setlhare sa mosetere wa Lebanone; 
Psalms92:14 ba ba tlhomilweng mo Ntlong ya Morena ba tla tlhoga mo malapeng a Modimo wa rona. 
Psalms92:15 Ba tla nna ba ungwa le mo botsofeng; ba tla nona, ba nna banana," 
Psalms92:16 e le go bolela gore Morena ke wa nnete. Ke lefika la me; ga go tshiamololo epe mo go ena. 
Psalms93:1 Morena ke kgosi, o apere borena. Morena o apere, o itlamile ka bonatla. Lefatshe le lone o le thaile gore le se ka la tshikinyega." 
Psalms93:2 Sedulo sa gago sa bogosi se sa le se tlhomama bogologolo tala. Wena o ntse o le teng ka bosenatshimologo. 
Psalms93:3 Morena, dinoka di tsholeditse, dinoka di tsholeditse kgwaso ya tsona; dinoka di tsholetsa mosumo wa tsona." 
Psalms93:4 Morena mo bogodimong o thata go gaisa kgwaso ya metsi a magolo le dintelo tse dikgolo tsa lewatle. 
Psalms93:5 Ditshupo tsa gago di ikanyega gotlhe; Ntlo ya gago, Morena, e tshwanetswe ke boitshepo ka metlha yotlhe." 
Psalms94:1 Morena, Modimo wa pusoloso, Modimo wa pusoloso, iponatse!" 
Psalms94:2 Nanoga, Moatlhodi wa lefatshe; busetsa baikgantshi ditiro tsa bona." 
Psalms94:3 Baikepi ba tla tsaya sebaka se se kana kang, Morena? Baikepi ba tla duduetsa goleele go le kae?" 
Psalms94:4 Ba phoka lefulo, ba bua ka makgakga; badirabosula ba ikgantsha botlhe." 
Psalms94:5 Morena, ba šobotla batho ba gago, ba patika boswa jwa gago." 
Psalms94:6 Ba bolaya motlholagadi le moeng; ba gaila masiela," 
Psalms94:7 ba re: “Morena ga a nke a bona; Modimo wa ga Jakobe ga o nke o lemoga.” 
Psalms94:8 Lemogang, lona dieleele mo morafeng! Lona masilo, lo tla tlhalefa leng?" 
Psalms94:9 A ena yo o tlhomileng tsebe ga a ka ke a utlwa? A ena yo o bopileng leitlho ga a ka ke a bona? 
Psalms94:10 A yo o layang ditšhaba ga a ka ke a di kgalemela, ena yo o rutang batho kitso?" 
Psalms94:11 Morena o itse megopolo ya batho, fa e le ya lefela." 
Psalms94:12 Go sego motho yo wena, Morena, o mo watlhayang, o mo ruta molao wa gago" 
Psalms94:13 gore o tle o mo nee tapologo mo malatsing a tlalelo, go tsamaya moikepi a epelwe lemena." 
Psalms94:14 Gonne Morena ga a nke a latlha batho ba gagwe; ga a nke a tlogela boswa jwa gagwe. 
Psalms94:15 Katlholo e tla boela mo tshiamong; botlhe ba ba dipelo di tlhamaletseng ba tla e latela. 
Psalms94:16 Ke mang yo o tla nkemelang mo basulatsing? Ke mang yo o tla mpuelelang mo go ba ba dirang bosula? 
Psalms94:17 Fa e ka bo e se Morena yo o nthusang, mowa wa me o ka bo o setse o le gaufi le felo ga tidimalo." 
Psalms94:18 E ne ya re fa ke re: “Lonao lwa me lo a theekela!” bopelotlhomogi jwa gago, Morena, bo ntshegetse." 
Psalms94:19 Mo bontsing jwa matshwenyego a a mo teng ga me, dikgomotso tsa gago di itumedisa mowa wa me." 
Psalms94:20 A sedulo sa moatlhodi sa tshenyo se ka dumelana le wena, se se bopang bosula ka go sokamisa molao?" 
Psalms94:21 Ba ikopanyetsa bophelo jwa mosiami, ba sekisa madi a a se nang molato." 
Psalms94:22 Mme Morena ke phemelo ya me; Modimo wa me e ntse e le lefika la botshabelo jwa me. 
Psalms94:23 O tla ba busolosetsa tshiamololo ya bona, a ba fedisa ka ntlha ya bosula jwa bona; Morena, Modimo wa rona, o tla ba nyeletsa." 
Psalms95:1 Tlayang a re dudueletseng Morena, re ipeleleng lefika la pholoso ya rona." 
Psalms95:2 A re tleng fa pele ga sefatlhego sa gagwe ka malebogo, re mo ipeleleng ka dikopelo tsa pako." 
Psalms95:3 Gonne Morena ke Modimo o mogolo, ke kgosi e kgolo, mmusi wa medimo yotlhe," 
Psalms95:4 yo mateng a lefatshe a leng mo seatleng sa gagwe, yo ditlhoa tsa dithaba e leng tsa gagwe;" 
Psalms95:5 yo lewatle e leng la gagwe, o le tlhodile; le lefatshe le le omileng ke la gagwe, diatla tsa gagwe di le bopile." 
Psalms95:6 Tlayang a re obameleng, re iname, re khubame fa pele ga Morena, Mmopi wa rona." 
Psalms95:7 Gonne ke ene Modimo wa rona; rona re batho ba bofulo jwa gagwe le dinku tsa seatla sa gagwe. E kete lo ka bo lo utlwa lentswe la gagwe kajeno! 
Psalms95:8 “Se thatafatseng dipelo tsa lona jaaka kwa Meriba le ka letsatsi la Masa mo sekakeng," 
Psalms95:9 kwa borraalona ba nthaetseng teng, ba nteka, etswe ba bonye ditiro tsa me." 
Psalms95:10 Ke ne ka tenwa ke morafe oo dinyaga di le 40, ka bua ka re: ‘Batho ba, ke ba ba dipelo di timetseng, ga ba itse ditsela tsa me.’" 
Psalms95:11 Ke gona ka moo ke ikanneng mo bogaleng jwa me ka re: ‘Ga ba nke ba tsena mo boikhutsong jwa me.’ ” 
Psalms96:1 Opelelang Morena sefela se sešwa; opelelang Morena, lona mafatshe otlhe!" 
Psalms96:2 Opelelang Morena, lo bake leina la gagwe, utlwatsang pholoso ya gagwe ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe!" 
Psalms96:3 Bolelang kgalalelo ya gagwe mo merafeng le dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe mo bathong botlhe! 
Psalms96:4 Gonne Morena o mogolo, pako e kgolo e mo tshwanetse; o boitshega bogolo go medimo yotlhe." 
Psalms96:5 Gonne medimo yotlhe ya merafe ga se ya sepe; mme Morena o dirile magodimo. 
Psalms96:6 Borena le kgalalelo di fa pele ga gagwe; thata le bontle di mo Felong ga gagwe ga Boitshepo. 
Psalms96:7 Ntshetsang Morena, lona ditso tsa merafe, ntshetsang Morena kgalalelo le thata!" 
Psalms96:8 Ntshetsang Morena kgalalelo ya leina la gagwe, tlisang ditshupelo, lo tsene mo malapeng a gagwe!" 
Psalms96:9 Obamelang Morena ka mokgabo o o boitshepo; roromang fa pele ga sefatlhego sa gagwe, lona mafatshe aotlhe!" 
Psalms96:10 Buang mo merafeng lo re: “Morena ke kgosi; o thaile lefatshe gore le se tshikinyege; o tla atlhola batho ka tshiamo.” 
Psalms96:11 A magodimo a itumele, a lefatshe le duduetse, a lewatle le gwase le tse di tletseng mo go lone." 
Psalms96:12 A naga e ipele le tsotlhe tse di mo go yona; ke gona ditlhare tsotlhe tsa sekgwa di tla duduetsang fa pele ga Morena; 
Psalms96:13 gonne o e tla, o tsile go atlhola lefatshe; o tla atlhola lefatshe ka tshiamo le batho ka boammaaruri jwa gagwe." 
Psalms97:1 Morena ke kgosi; a lefatshe le duduetse; a ditlhakatlhake tse dintsi di itumele. 
Psalms97:2 Maru le lefifi di mo dikanyeditse; tshiamo le molao ke mothao wa sedulo sa gagwe sa bogosi. 
Psalms97:3 Molelo o mo eteletse pele; o nyeletsa baba ba gagwe tikologong. 
Psalms97:4 Dikgadima tsa gagwe di bonesa lefatshe; lefatshe le a di bona, e bile le a roroma." 
Psalms97:5 Dithaba di gakologa fa pele ga Morena jaaka mmotu wa dinotshe, fa pele ga Morena wa lefatshe lotlhe." 
Psalms97:6 Magodimo a bolela tshiamo ya gagwe le batho botlhe ba bona kgalalelo ya gagwe. 
Psalms97:7 A ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong botlhe ba ba direlang ditshwantsho, ba ba ipokang ka medimo e e seng yona. Medimo yotlhe e a mo obamela." 
Psalms97:8 Sione o a utlwa, o a itumela; bomorwadia Juta ba ipelela dikatlholo tsa gago, Morena." 
Psalms97:9 Gonne wena Morena o Mogodimodimo yo o okameng lefatshe lotlhe; o mogolo bogolo go medimo yotlhe. 
Psalms97:10 Ba lo ratang Morena, tlhoang bosula; o boloka mewa ya badumedi ba gagwe, o ba pholosa mo diatleng tsa baikepi." 
Psalms97:11 Lesedi le tlhabetse mosiami, le boitumelo bo bonaletse ba ba dipelo di thokgameng." 
Psalms97:12 Lona basiami, itumeleleng Morena, lo bake leina la gagwe le le boitshepo." 
Psalms98:1 Pesalome. Opelelang Morena sefela se sešwa; gonne o dirile dilo tse di gakgamatsang. O fenya ka seatla se se jang, e bong ka letsogo la gagwe le le boitshepo." 
Psalms98:2 Morena o utlwaditse pholoso ya gagwe, a senolela matlho a ditšhaba tshiamo ya gagwe." 
Psalms98:3 O gopotse bopelontle jwa gagwe le boikanyo jwa gagwe mo Baiseraeleng; dikhutlo tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di bonye pholoso ya Modimo wa rona. 
Psalms98:4 Dudueletsang Morena, lona ba lefatshe lotlhe; ponyegang, lo ipele, lo opele." 
Psalms98:5 Opelelang Morena ka katara, ka katara le mantswe a kopelo." 
Psalms98:6 Duduetsang ka diphala le tumo ya dinaka fa pele ga Morena yo e leng kgosi. 
Psalms98:7 A lewatle le gwase le tse di tletseng mo go lone, le lefatshe le ba ba agileng mo go lone." 
Psalms98:8 A dinoka di ope diatla le dithaba di pate ka maipelo 
Psalms98:9 fa pele ga Morena. Gonne o e tla go atlhola lefatshe. O tla atlhola lefatshe ka tshiamo, le batho ka tshwanelo." 
Psalms99:1 Morena ke kgosi! A merafe e rorome. O ntse godimo ga boKerubime, a lefatshe le tshikinyege." 
Psalms99:2 Morena o mogolo mo Sione, o okame merafe yotlhe." 
Psalms99:3 A ba bake leina la gago le legolo la poitshego! Ke le le boitshepo. 
Psalms99:4 A ba bake le thata ya kgosi e e ratang tshiamo. Ke wena yo o tlhomamisitseng tse di tshwanetseng; tshiamo le molao o di dirisitse mo Jakobe. 
Psalms99:5 Godisang Morena, Modimo wa rona, lo ikobele fa pele ga sebeo sa dinao tsa gagwe; gonne ene o boitshepo." 
Psalms99:6 Moše le Arone e ne e le bangwe ba baperesiti ba gagwe, Samuele e le wa ba ba bitsang leina la gagwe. Ba ne ba goela Moreneng, mme a ba utlwa." 
Psalms99:7 O ne a bua nabo, a le mo pinagareng ya leru; ba ne ba boloka ditshupo tsa gagwe le molao o a neng a o ba neile." 
Psalms99:8 Wena Morena, Modimo wa rona, o ba utlwile; o ne o le Modimo o o boitshwarelo mo go bona, mme o busolosa ka fa ditirong tsa bona." 
Psalms99:9 Godisang Morena, Modimo wa rona, lo ikobele fa pele ga thaba ya gagwe e e boitshepo; gonne Morena, Modimo wa rona, o boitshepo." 
Psalms100:1 Pesalome ya tebogo. Dudueletsang Morena, lona mafatshe otlhe." 
Psalms100:2 Direlang Morena ka boitumelo; tlayang fa pele ga sefatlhego sa gagwe ka tuduetso. 
Psalms100:3 Lemogang gore Morena ke ena Modimo; ene o re dirile, mme re ba gagwe; re batho ba gagwe le dinku tse o di fudisang." 
Psalms100:4 Tsenang ka dikgoro tsa gagwe ka tebogo le mo malapeng a gagwe ka pako. Mo lebogeng, lo bake leina la gagwe." 
Psalms100:5 Gonne Morena o molemo; bopelontle jwa gagwe bo nnetse ruri le boikanyo jwa gagwe mo tshikatshikeng. 
Psalms101:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Ke tla opela ka ga bopelonomi le tshiamo, ke opelela wena Morena." 
Psalms101:2 Ke tla tlhokomela tsamao e e thokgameng. O tla tla leng kwano go nna? Ke tla sepela ka pelo e e phepa mo lapeng la me. 
Psalms101:3 Ga nke ke lesa matlho a me go leba dilo tse di bosula. Ke tlhoile go dira ga baikepi; ga go nke go nkgomarela. 
Psalms101:4 Pelo e e sokameng e tshwanetse go tloga mo go nna; bosula ga ke rate go bo itse. 
Psalms101:5 Yo o sebang mongwe-ka-ene mo sephiring ke tla mo didimatsa. Yo o matlho a boikgodiso le pelo ya boikgogomoso ga nka ke ka mo itshokela. 
Psalms101:6 Matlho a me a tla leba baikanyegi ba lefatshe gore ba phele le nna. Ena yo o tsamayang mo tseleng e e thokgameng o tla ntirela. 
Psalms101:7 Yo o dirang ka tsietso ga a nke a nna mo teng ga ntlo ya me; yo o buang maaka ga a nke a ema fa pele ga matlho a me. 
Psalms101:8 Mo mosong mongwe le mongwe ke tla nyeletsa baikepi botlhe mo lefatsheng; mo motseng wa Morena ke bolaela ruri badiradibe botlhe. 
Psalms102:1 Thapelo ya motlalelwi, a itlhobogile, mme a tshololela selelo sa gagwe fa pele ga Morena." 
Psalms102:2 Morena, utlwa thapelo ya me; a go lelela thuso ga me go fitlhe kwa go wena!" 
Psalms102:3 Se mphitlhele sefatlhego sa gago mo motlheng o ke leng mo pitlaganong ka ona; ntshekegele tsebe motlhang ke bitsang, o nkutlwe ka bonako." 
Psalms102:4 Gonne malatsi a me a nyelela jaaka musi; marapo a me a tuka molelo jaaka serumola. 
Psalms102:5 Pelo ya me e iteilwe, e swabile jaaka tlhaga, ka ba ka lebala go ja sejo sa ka." 
Psalms102:6 Marapo a me a kgomaretse nama ya me ka ntlha ya go duma ga me mo go thata. 
Psalms102:7 Ke tshwana le kokolofute a le mo sekakeng; ke ntse jaaka morubisi o o nnang mo matlotleng. 
Psalms102:8 Ga ke bone boroko; ke lela jaaka serobele se se sosi mo setlhoeng sa ntlo. 
Psalms102:9 Baba ba me ba tlhola ba nkgoba; ba ba nkgakaletseng ba hutsa ka leina la me. 
Psalms102:10 Gonne ke ja molora jaaka bogobe; seno sa me ke se tlhakanya le dikeledi 
Psalms102:11 ka ntlha ya kgalefo ya gago le kgakalo ya gago; gonne o ntsholeditse, wa ntatlhela fa fatshe." 
Psalms102:12 Malatsi a me a tshwana le moriti o moleele wa maitsiboa, ke swaba jaaka tlhaga." 
Psalms102:13 Mme wena, Morena, o tla nnela ruri, le segopotso sa gago se tla nna mo tshikatshikeng." 
Psalms102:14 Wena o tla nanoga, o utlwela Sione botlhoko; gonne ke nako ya go mo itshwarela; nako e e beilweng e tsile." 
Psalms102:15 Gonne batlhanka ba gago ba rata majwe a gagwe, ba utlwa botlhoko, ka a thubakilwe." 
Psalms102:16 Mme ditšhaba di tla boifa leina la gago, Morena, le dikgosi tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tla boifa kgalalelo ya gago." 
Psalms102:17 Gonne Morena o aga Sione, o bonwa mo kgalalelong ya gagwe." 
Psalms102:18 O retologetse thapelo ya yo o sa aparang; ga a nyatse dithapelo tsa bona. 
Psalms102:19 Dilo tse, a di kwalelwe losika lo lo tlang; a batho ba ba tla tlholegang ba boke Morena." 
Psalms102:20 Gonne o lebile kwa tlase a le kwa bogodimong jo bo boitshepo jwa gagwe; Morena o lebile lefatshe a le mo legodimong 
Psalms102:21 gore a utlwe diphegelo tsa bagolegwi, le gore a golole ba ba atlholetsweng loso" 
Psalms102:22 gore ba bolele leina la Morena mo Sione le poko ya gagwe mo Jerusalema," 
Psalms102:23 fa merafe yotlhe e phuthega, le magosi go direla Morena." 
Psalms102:24 O koafaditse thata ya me mo tseleng, a khutshwafatsa malatsi a me." 
Psalms102:25 Mme ka re: “Modimo wa me, se ntlose mo gare ga malatsi a me; dinyaga tsa gago ke tsa tlhatlologano ya ditshika.”" 
Psalms102:26 O sa le o thaya lefatshe bogologolo, wa dira magodimo ka diatla tsa gago." 
Psalms102:27 Tseo di tla nyelela, wena o tla sala; ee, di tla onala tsotlhe jaaka seaparo; o tla di ananya jaaka kobo; mme di tla nyelela." 
Psalms102:28 Mme wena o sa le ena, dinyaga tsa gago ga di nke di fela." 
Psalms102:29 Bana ba batlhanka ba gago ba tla aga, losika lwa bona lo tla tlhomama fa pele ga gago." 
Psalms103:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Baka Morena, mowa wa me, le tsotlhe tse di mo teng ga me, bakang leina la gagwe le le boitshepo!" 
Psalms103:2 Baka Morena, mowa wa me; se lebale sepe sa ditiro tse di molemo tsa gagwe!" 
Psalms103:3 O itshwarela maleo a gago otlhe, o fodisa makoa a gago otlhe." 
Psalms103:4 O golola bophelo jwa gago mo tshenyegong, o go rwesa bopelotlhomogi le mautlwelo-botlhoko mo tlhogong." 
Psalms103:5 O go kgorisa tse di molemo gore o busediwe bokaung jaaka ntsu. 
Psalms103:6 Morena o direla botlhe tshiamo le katlholelo ba ba patikwang. 
Psalms103:7 O ne a itsise Moše ditsela tsa gagwe le Baiseraele ditiro tsa gagwe. 
Psalms103:8 Morena o kutlwelo-botlhoko le boitshwarelo; o bopelotelele, o bopelontle jo bogolo." 
Psalms103:9 Ga a nke a nna bogale ka metlha, le e seng go galefela ruri." 
Psalms103:10 Ga a re direla ka fa maleong a rona, le e seng go re busolosa ka fa ditshiamololong tsa rona." 
Psalms103:11 Gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe bo bogolo mo go ba ba mmoifang jaaka legodimo le okame lefatshe. 
Psalms103:12 O tlosetsa ditlolo tsa rona kgakala, jaaka botlhabatsatsi bo le kgakala le bophirimatsatsi." 
Psalms103:13 Morena o utlwela ba ba mmoifang botlhoko, jaaka rra-bana a utlwela bana ba gagwe botlhoko." 
Psalms103:14 Gonne ena o itse popego ya rona, o gopola, fa re le lorole." 
Psalms103:15 Motho ena, malatsi a gagwe a tshwana le bojang; o thunya jaaka sethunya sa naga." 
Psalms103:16 Fa phefo e se fokile, ga se yo, mme felo ga sona ga go tlhole go se itse." 
Psalms103:17 Mme bopelotlhomogi jwa Morena bo mo go bona ba ba mmoifang, go tswa bosenang-tshimologo go ya bosakhutleng, le tshiamo ya gagwe mo baneng ba bana," 
Psalms103:18 e leng ba ba bolokang kgolagano ya gagwe, ba ba gakologelwang ditaelo tsa gagwe gore ba di dirise." 
Psalms103:19 Morena o tlhomamisitse sedulo sa bogosi sa gagwe kwa magodimong; bogosi jwa gagwe bo busa ntlheng tsotlhe. 
Psalms103:20 Bakang Morena, lona baengele ba gagwe, lona dinatla tse di thata, ba lo dirafatsang lefoko la gagwe ka go utlwa lentswe la lefoko la gagwe." 
Psalms103:21 Bakang Morena, lona masomosomo otlhe a gagwe, lona badiredi ba gagwe, ba lo dirang ka fa thatong ya gagwe." 
Psalms103:22 Bakang Morena, lona ditiro tsotlhe tsa gagwe mo mafelong otlhe a puso ya gagwe; baka Morena, wena mowa wa me!" 
Psalms104:1 Baka Morena, mowa wa me! Morena, Modimo wa me, o mogolo thata; o apere kgalalelo le borena." 
Psalms104:2 O ikapesa lesedi jaaka kobo, o phutholola legodimo jaaka lesela la tente." 
Psalms104:3 O aga maago a gago a bogodimo mo metsing, o ntsha maru koloi ya gago, o tsamaya ka diphuka tsa phefo." 
Psalms104:4 O dira diphefo barongwi ba gago le dikgabo tsa molelo badiredi ba gago. 
Psalms104:5 O beile lefatshe mo metheong ya lone gore le se ka la tshikinyega ka motlha ope go ya bosakhutleng. 
Psalms104:6 O no o le khurumeditse ka morwalela jaaka ka seaparo, metsi a ne a eme godimo ga dithaba," 
Psalms104:7 a tshaba kgalemo ya gago, a thibogela lentswe la tumo ya maru ya gago." 
Psalms104:8 Dithaba tsa tlhatloga, mekgatsha ya itshetlela; metsi a ya kwa felong fa o a laoletseng gona." 
Psalms104:9 O beile molelwane o a sa ka keng a o tlola gore a se boe a khurumetsa lefatshe gape. 
Psalms104:10 O eledisa metsi a metswedi mo melapong, a ba a ela fa gare ga dithaba." 
Psalms104:11 A nowa ke diphologolo tsotlhe tsa naga, dipitse tsa naga di itima lenyora." 
Psalms104:12 Dinonyane tsa legodimo di agile godimo ga ona, di letsa melodi mo dikaleng." 
Psalms104:13 O nosa dithaba metsi a a tswang maagong a bogodimo a gago; lefatshe le kgora maungo a ditiro tsa gago. 
Psalms104:14 O tlhogisetsa dikgomo bojang, le motho dimela go mo thusa le go ntsha dijo mo lefatsheng," 
Psalms104:15 le weine go itumedisa pelo ya motho, le lookwane go phatsimisa sefatlhego, le senkgwe go tiisa pelo ya motho." 
Psalms104:16 Ditlhare tsa Morena di a kgora, le mesetere ya Lebanone e o e tlhomileng," 
Psalms104:17 mo dinonyane di agang dintlhaga teng; le lekololwana sentlhaga sa lone se mo ditlhareng tsa mesiperese. 
Psalms104:18 Dithaba tse dikgolo ke botshabelo jwa diphele; jwa dipela ke mafika. 
Psalms104:19 O dirile ngwedi gore o supe dipaka; letsatsi le itse go phirima ga lone. 
Psalms104:20 Fa o tsisa lefifi, go nna bosigo, diphedi tsotlhe tsa sekgwa di tsamaya mo go jona." 
Psalms104:21 Ditawana di dumela se di ka se bolayang, di batla dijo tsa tsona mo Modimong." 
Psalms104:22 Fa letsatsi le tlhaba, di a boa, di ye go botha mo dikutleng tsa tsona." 
Psalms104:23 Motho a tswele kwa tirong ya gagwe le kwa matsapeng a gagwe go ya maitsiboeng. 
Psalms104:24 Ditiro tsa gago, Morena, kana di methalethale jang! O dirile tsotlhe ka botlhale; lefatshe le tletse ditlhodiwa tsa gago." 
Psalms104:25 Fa e le lewatle le legolo, le atlhametse ntlheng tsotlhe; go saila diphedi mo go lone tse di se nang palo, diphedi tse dinnye le tse dikgolo." 
Psalms104:26 Mekoro e tsamaya teng, le leruarua le o le bopileng gore le tshameke mo go lone." 
Psalms104:27 Tsotlhe di lebeletse wena gore o di fe dijo tsa tsona ka nako ya teng. 
Psalms104:28 Fa o di fa, di a sela; fa o huporolola seatla, di kgora tse di molemo;" 
Psalms104:29 fa o bipa sefatlhego, di a tshoga; fa o tlosa mewa ya tsona, di a swa, di boela loroleng lwa tsona;" 
Psalms104:30 fa o roma mowa wa gago, di a tlholega; o tlhabolola sefatlhego sa lefatshe." 
Psalms104:31 A kgalalelo ya Morena e nnele ruri; a Morena a itumelele ditiro tsa gagwe," 
Psalms104:32 ene yo e a reng a leba lefatshe, le rorome; e re a ama dithaba, di kue musi." 
Psalms104:33 Ke tla opelela Morena fa ke sa phedile; ke tla baka Modimo wa me ke sa le yo. 
Psalms104:34 A dikakanyo tsa me di o natefele; nna ke tla itumela mo go Morena. 
Psalms104:35 A baleofi ba nyelediwe mo lefatsheng; a baikepi ba se tlhole ba nna teng. Mowa wa me, baka Morena. Haleluya!" 
Psalms105:1 Lebogang Morena, lo bitse leina la gagwe; lo itsise ditiro tsa gagwe mo merafeng!" 
Psalms105:2 Mo opeleleng, lo mo leletse, lo bolele dikgakgamatso tsotlhe tsa gagwe!" 
Psalms105:3 Belafalang ka leina la gagwe le le boitshepo; a go itumele dipelo tsa ba ba batlang Morena! 
Psalms105:4 Botsang ka ga Morena le ka ga thata ya gagwe; lo batle sefatlhego sa gagwe ka gale. 
Psalms105:5 Gopolang dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe tse a di dirileng, le ditshupo tsa gagwe le dikatlholo tsa molomo wa gagwe," 
Psalms105:6 lona losika lwa ga Aborahame, motlhanka wa gagwe; lona bomorwa Jakobe, baitlhaolelwi ba gagwe!" 
Psalms105:7 Ena Morena ke Modimo wa rona; dikatlholo tsa gagwe di mo lefatsheng lotlhe. 
Psalms105:8 O gopola kgolagano ya gagwe ka gale, e bong lefoko le a le laetseng ditshika tse kete." 
Psalms105:9 Kgolagano e o e dirileng le Aborahame le ikano e o e ikanetseng Isaka," 
Psalms105:10 a e tlhomamisetsa Jakobe go nna molao le Iseraele go nna kgolagano e e sa khutleng," 
Psalms105:11 fa a re: “Wena ke tla go naya lefatshe la Kanana gore e nne kabelo ya boswa jwa lona,”" 
Psalms105:12 jale fa palo ya bona e sa ntse e le nnye, mme e le ba se kae, e bile ba le baeng mo go lone," 
Psalms105:13 ba tlhatlologanya dinageng, ba tswa setšhabeng ba ya setšhabeng, ba tlogela bogosi bongwe, ba ya kwa morafeng o mongwe." 
Psalms105:14 A se ka a leseletsa motho ope go ba gatelela; le gona a betsa dikgosi ka ntlha ya bona a re: 
Psalms105:15 “Se ameng batlodiwa ba me, lo se direle baporofeti ba me bosula.”" 
Psalms105:16 O kile a biletsa tlala mo lefatsheng, a senya tlamelo yotlhe ya dijo." 
Psalms105:17 A roma monna go ba etelela pele, e bong Josefa, a rekisiwa go nna motlhanka." 
Psalms105:18 Ba tsenya maoto a gagwe mo ditshiping, a ya go lala ka esi mo dikeetaneng" 
Psalms105:19 go ya go dirafale lefoko la gagwe, lefoko la Morena le mo supe a le mo nneteng." 
Psalms105:20 Kgosi ya roma go mmofolola, mmusi wa merafe a mo golola." 
Psalms105:21 Ya mo dira morena wa ntlo ya yona le molaodi wa tsotlhe tse e nang natso 
Psalms105:22 gore a laole dikgosana tsa yona ka fa a ratang ka teng le go ruta bagolo ba yona botlhale. 
Psalms105:23 Ke fa Iseraele a ya kwa Egepeto; Jakobe a jaka mo lefatsheng la ga Hame. 
Psalms105:24 Mme Morena a atisa morafe wa gagwe segolo, a o thatafatsa bogolo go baba ba ona." 
Psalms105:25 O ne a ba tlhanola dipelo gore ba tlhoe morafe wa gagwe, ba direle batlhanka ba gagwe ka bolotsana." 
Psalms105:26 A roma Moše, motlhanka wa gagwe, le Arone yo o neng a mo itlhaoletse." 
Psalms105:27 Bao ba dira ditshupo tsa gagwe mo go bona, le dikgakgamatso mo lefatsheng la ga Hame." 
Psalms105:28 A romela lefifi, a fifatsa; mme ba tlhokomologa lefoko la gagwe." 
Psalms105:29 A fetola metsi a bona madi, a bolaya ditlhapi tsa bona." 
Psalms105:30 Lefatshe la bone la ba la tlalatlala digwagwa, le mo matlwaneng a dikgosi tsa bone." 
Psalms105:31 A laela, mme ga tla diboba le menang mo nageng yotlhe ya bone." 
Psalms105:32 A dira pula ya bone sefako, a romela melelo ya dikgadima mo lefatsheng la bone." 
Psalms105:33 A itaya meweine ya bone le mefeie ya bone, a robaka ditlhare tsa naga ya bone." 
Psalms105:34 A laela, mme ga tla tsie ya segongwane le molome e e se nang palo." 
Psalms105:35 Ya ja botala jotlhe mo lefatsheng la bone, ya laila maungo a masimo a bone." 
Psalms105:36 Le gona a itaya maitibolo otlhe mo lefatsheng la bone, e bong matsalwapele a thata yotlhe ya bone." 
Psalms105:37 Ke fa a ba hudusa ba tshotse selefera le gouta, go se masalela ape mo ditsong tsa gagwe." 
Psalms105:38 Baegepeto ba itumelela khudugo ya bone, gonne ba ne ba wetswe ke letshogo ka ntlha ya bone." 
Psalms105:39 O ne a phutholola leru go nna tshireletso le molelo go bonesa bosigo. 
Psalms105:40 E rile ba lopa, a tsisa maphurrwana, a ba kgorisa senkgwe sa legodimo." 
Psalms105:41 A phatlola lefika, metsi a phothometsega, a ela mo sekakeng jaaka noka." 
Psalms105:42 Gonne o ne a gopola lefoko la gagwe le le boitshepo, le Aborahame, motlhanka wa gagwe." 
Psalms105:43 A bolotsa morafe wa gagwe ka boitumelo le baitlhaolelwi ba gagwe ka tuduetso. 
Psalms105:44 A ba naya mafatshe a ditšhaba gore ba rue tse merafe e di phuthileng ka matsapa," 
Psalms105:45 e le gore ba dirise ditaelo tsa gagwe le go tlhokomela melao ya gagwe. Haleluya! 
Psalms106:1 Haleluya! Lebogang Morena, gonne o molemo; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng." 
Psalms106:2 Ke mang yo o ka bolelang ditiro tsa bonatla tsa Morena, a utlwatsa poko ya gagwe yotlhe?" 
Psalms106:3 Go tlhogonolo ba ba tlhokomelang molao, ba ba dirang tse di siameng ka metlha yotlhe." 
Psalms106:4 Nkgopole, Morena, ka o kgatlhwa ke morafe wa gago; nketele ka thuso ya gago" 
Psalms106:5 gore ke jese matlho ka go leba letlhogonolo la baitlhaolelwi ba gago, ke be ke thabele boitumelo jwa setšhaba sa gago le go belafala mmogo le boswa jwa gago." 
Psalms106:6 Re leofile mmogo le borraarona, ra siamolola, ra ikepa." 
Psalms106:7 Borraarona ba ne ba sa tlhokomele dikgakgamatso tsa gago, ba sa gopole bogolo jwa bopelotlhomogi jwa gago, mme ba rukhutlhegela Mogodimodimo kwa Lewatleng la Motlhaka." 
Psalms106:8 Mme o ne a ba thusa ka ntlha ya leina la gagwe gore a supe bonatla jwa gagwe. 
Psalms106:9 A kgalemela Lewatle la Motlhaka, la ba la kgala; a ba kgabagantsha merwalela jaaka e kete ke sekaka." 
Psalms106:10 A ba namolela mo seatleng sa yo o ba tlhoileng, a ba golola mo seatleng sa mmaba." 
Psalms106:11 Metsi a khurumetsa baganetsi ba bona, ga se ka ga sala ope wa bona." 
Psalms106:12 Ya baa gona ba dumelang mafoko a gagwe, ba opela pako ya gagwe." 
Psalms106:13 Mme ba akofa ba lebala ditiro tsa gagwe, ba se ka ba letela taelo ya gagwe." 
Psalms106:14 Ba tlala keletso mo sekakeng, ba raela Modimo kwa nageng e e senya." 
Psalms106:15 Ke fa a ba naya ka fa topong ya bona, mme a tsenya tlhorego mo meweng ya bona." 
Psalms106:16 Ba ne ba fufegela Moše mo bothibelelong le Arone, moitshepi wa Morena." 
Psalms106:17 Lefatshe la atlhama, la metsa Dathane, la khurumetsa setlhopha sa ga Abirame." 
Psalms106:18 Ga tuka molelo mo lekokong la bona, kgabo ya fisa baikepi." 
Psalms106:19 Ba ne ba dira namane kwa Horebe, ba obamela setshwantsho se se bopilweng." 
Psalms106:20 Ba ananya Kgalalelo ya bona ka setshwantsho sa kgomo e e fulang bojang. 
Psalms106:21 Ba lebala Modimo, mopholosi wa bona o o dirileng dilo tse dikgolo kwa Egepeto," 
Psalms106:22 tse di gakgamatsang kwa lefatsheng la ga Hame le tse di boitshegang fa Lewatleng la Motlhaka. 
Psalms106:23 Ke fa o re, o tla ba nyeletsa. Mme go ka bo go dirafetse jalo, fa Moše, moitlhaolelwi wa ona, a ka bo a se ka a ba emela fa pele ga ona, a tima bogale jwa ona gore o se ka wa ba senya." 
Psalms106:24 Ba bile ba nyatsa lefatshe le le eletsegang, ba se ka ba dumela lefoko la ona;" 
Psalms106:25 ba ngongorega mo metlaaganeng ya bona, ba se ka ba utlwa Morena." 
Psalms106:26 Ke fa a ba tsholeletsa letsogo, a ikana gore o tla ba diga mo sekakeng," 
Psalms106:27 le go falaletsa losika lwa bona kwa ditšhabeng le go ba phatlalatsa mo mafatsheng. 
Psalms106:28 Ba ne ba ikgomaretsa mo go Baale-Pheore, ba ja tse di tlhabetsweng baswi," 
Psalms106:29 ba gakatsa Morena ka ditiro tsa bona, mme ba welwa ke petso." 
Psalms106:30 Ke fa Phinehase a nanoga, a tsereganya, mme petso ya khutlisiwa." 
Psalms106:31 Ke sona se a kailweng mosiami ka ntlha ya sona mo ditshikeng tsotlhe go ya go ile. 
Psalms106:32 Le gona ba mo gakatsa fa metsing a Meriba, Moše a ba a tlhagelwa ke molato ka ntlha ya bona." 
Psalms106:33 Gonne ba ne ba ganetsanya le Mowa wa ona, mo Moše a bileng a bua ka molomo se se sa mo tshwanelang." 
Psalms106:34 Ga ba a ka ba nyeletsa merafe e Morena a e ba kaetseng. 
Psalms106:35 Mme ba ne ba itlhakanya le baheitane, ba ithuta ditiro tsa bona." 
Psalms106:36 Ba direla medimo ya bona ya diseto e e tlogileng ya nna serai mo go bona. 
Psalms106:37 Ba tlhabela mewa e e bosula bomorwaa-bone le bomorwadia-bone. 
Psalms106:38 Ba tsholola madi a a se nang molato, – madi a bomorwaa-bone le bomorwadia-bone, ba ba tlhabela medimo ya diseto ya Bakanana; – lefatshe la itshepololwa jalo ka polao eo." 
Psalms106:39 Ba ikgotlela ka ditiro tsa bona, ba akafala ka go dira ga bona." 
Psalms106:40 Foo Morena a tukela morafe wa gagwe bogale, a tenwa ke boswa jwa gagwe." 
Psalms106:41 A ba neela mo diatleng tsa merafe ya baheitane, ba laolwa ke batlhoi ba bona." 
Psalms106:42 Baba ba bona ba ba gatelela, mme ba na le go ikoba fa tlase ga diatla tsa bona." 
Psalms106:43 O ne a ba thusa gantsi, mme bona ba mo rukhutlhegela ka maikaelelo a bona. Ba nyelela jalo ka molato wa bona." 
Psalms106:44 Le fa go ntse jalo o ne a ba tlhokomela mo pitlaganong ya bona, ka a utlwa dilelo tsa bona." 
Psalms106:45 A gopola kgolagano ya gagwe ka ntlha ya bona, a busa bogale, ka a na le bopelontle jo bogolo." 
Psalms106:46 A dira gore ba tlhomogelwe pelo ke botlhe ba ba ba isitseng botshwarong. 
Psalms106:47 Re thuse, Morena, Modimo wa rona, o re phuthe, o re golole mo baheitaneng gore re bake leina la gago le le boitshepo, re ipoke ka go go tlotla." 
Psalms106:48 A go bakwe Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele go tswa bosenang-tshimologo go ya bosakhutleng. A morafe otlhe o re: “Amen!” Haleluya!" 
Psalms107:1 Lebogang Morena, gonne o molemo; gonne bopelontle jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng." 
Psalms107:2 A ba ba golotsweng ke Morena ba bue jalo, ba o ba golotseng mo seatleng sa mopatiki," 
Psalms107:3 a ba phutha kwa mafatsheng, kwa botlhabatsatsi le kwa bophirimatsatsi, kwa bokone le kwa lewatleng." 
Psalms107:4 Ba ba neng ba kgarakgatshega kwa sekakeng mo gare ga naga, ba sa bone tsela e e yang kwa motseng o ba ka agang mo go ona;" 
Psalms107:5 ba tshwerwe ke tlala le lenyora, mewa ya bona e felelwa mo teng ga bona," 
Psalms107:6 mme ba goela Moreneng, ba le mo tlalelong, mme a ba golola mo dipitlaganong tsa bona," 
Psalms107:7 a ba tsamaisa mo tseleng e e leng yona gore ba fitlhe mo motseng o ba ka agang mo go ona: 
Psalms107:8 Bona bao a ba lebogele Morena bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe le dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe tse a di diretseng bana ba batho," 
Psalms107:9 ka a kgalolositse mowa o o nyorilweng, a jesa mowa o o tshwerweng ke tlala tse di molemo." 
Psalms107:10 Ba ba neng ba dutse mo lefifing le mo moriting wa loso ba golegilwe ka tlalelo le tshipi," 
Psalms107:11 ka ba ne ba rukhutlhegetse mafoko a Modimo, ba nyatsa kgakololo ya Mogodimodimo;" 
Psalms107:12 ba o neng a kokobetsa dipelo tsa bona ka tapisego, ba kgopiwa go se na mothusi;" 
Psalms107:13 ya baa gona ba goelang Moreneng, ba le mo tlalelong, mme a ba golola mo dipitlaganong tsa bona;" 
Psalms107:14 a ba ntsha mo lefifing le mo moriting wa loso, a kgaola dikgole tsa bona:" 
Psalms107:15 A bao ba lebogele Morena bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe le dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe tse a di diretseng bana ba batho," 
Psalms107:16 ka a thubile ditswalo tsa kgotlho, a roba mephakarego ya tshipi." 
Psalms107:17 Ba e neng e le masilo ka ntlha ya tsamao ya bona mo ditlolong, ba bogisiwa ka ntlha ya melato ya bona," 
Psalms107:18 mo ba neng ba tenwa ke dijo tsotlhe, ba le gaufi le go swa;" 
Psalms107:19 ya baa gona ba goelang Moreneng, ba le mo tlalelong, mme a ba golola mo dipitlaganong tsa bona;" 
Psalms107:20 a romela lefoko la gagwe, a ba fodisa, a pholosa maphelo a bona mo mabitleng:" 
Psalms107:21 A bao ba lebogele Morena bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe le dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe tse a di diretseng bana ba batho; 
Psalms107:22 a ba tsise ditlhabelo tsa tebogo, ba bolele ditiro tsa gagwe ka tuduetso." 
Psalms107:23 Ba ba neng ba tsamaya mo lewatleng ka dikepe, ba bapala mo metsing a magolo," 
Psalms107:24 ke bona ba ba bonyeng ditiro tsa Morena le dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe mo botennye. 
Psalms107:25 A laela, a fokisa phefo ya ledimo, la gogomosa dintelo tsa lewatle." 
Psalms107:26 Ba akgolelwa kwa godimo le kwa tlase, ba nyema moko mo tlalelong;" 
Psalms107:27 ba ne ba theekela, ba kgokgweetsega jaaka letagwa, ba felelwa ke maano otlhe." 
Psalms107:28 Ba goela Moreneng, ba le mo tlalelong, mme a ba golola mo dipitlaganong tsa bona," 
Psalms107:29 a kokobetsa ledimo, la nna phefonyana fela, makhubu a lewatle a kokobela;" 
Psalms107:30 mme ba itumelela go kokobela ga ona, mme a ba fitlhisa kwa bogorogelong jwa dikepe jo ba bo tlhologeletsweng:" 
Psalms107:31 A bao ba lebogele Morena bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe le dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe tse a di diretseng bana ba batho; 
Psalms107:32 a ba mo godise mo phuthegong ya morafe, ba mmoke mo pitsong ya bagolo." 
Psalms107:33 Dinoka o di fetotse sekaka, le metswedi ya metsi a e dira naga e e omileng." 
Psalms107:34 Lefatshe le le bogale o le fetotse magalaopa ka ntlha ya boikepo jwa baagi ba lone. 
Psalms107:35 Sekaka o se fetotse letsha la metsi, le naga e e omileng a e dira metswedi ya metsi." 
Psalms107:36 Ba ba bolawang ke tlala a ba baya teng, mme ba aga motse o ba ka nnang mo go ona." 
Psalms107:37 Ba jwala masimo, ba tlhoma ditlhare tsa moweine, ba fula maungo, ba kotula." 
Psalms107:38 Mme a ba tshegofatsa, ba be ba ntsifala thata; diruiwa tsa bona a se ka a di fokotsa." 
Psalms107:39 Ba boela ba fokotsega, ba kokobediwa ke bokete jwa botlhoko le khutsafalo." 
Psalms107:40 Yo o goromeletsang nyatsego mo batlotleging, a ba kgarakgatsha sekakeng mo go se nang tsela;" 
Psalms107:41 ene o ne a ntsha mohumanegi mo tlalelong, a mo godisa, a dira ditshika tse di tshwanang le difutshane ka bontsi." 
Psalms107:42 Moo go bona ba ba nang le nnete, ba itumela; boikepo jotlhe bo ithibile molomo." 
Psalms107:43 Yo o botlhale ke mang? A a tlhokomele dilo tse, a ele ditiro tsa bopelotlhomogi jwa Morena tlhoko." 
Psalms108:1 Sefela. Pesalome ya ga Dafita. 
Psalms108:2 Modimo, pelo ya me e etleetsegile; ke rata go opela le go letsa kwadi. Thanya, mowa wa me!" 
Psalms108:3 Tsogang harepa le katara, ke rata go tsosa mahube." 
Psalms108:4 Morena, nte ke go leboge mo merafeng, ke go leletse mo ditšhabeng." 
Psalms108:5 Gonne bopelontle jwa gago bo bogolo go feta legodimo; boammaaruri jwa gago bo fitlha kwa marung. 
Psalms108:6 Modimo, itlhatlosetse kwa godimo ga magodimo; a kgalalelo ya gago e okame lefatshe lotlhe." 
Psalms108:7 Thusa ka letsogo le le jang la gago, o nkutlwe gore baratwa ba gago ba pholosiwe." 
Psalms108:8 Modimo o ne wa bua mo Felong-ga-Boitshepo ga ona wa re: “Ke tla ipela, ke kgaoganya Šegeme, ke lekanya mokgatsha wa Sukothe." 
Psalms108:9 Gileate ke wa me, le Manase ke wa me; Eferaime ke phemelo ya tlhogo ya me; Juta ke thobane ya me ya bogosi." 
Psalms108:10 Moabe ke mogopo o ke tlhapelang mo go ona; setlhako sa me ke se latlhela mo go Etomo, ke tla dudueletsa Felesita.”" 
Psalms108:11 Ke mang yo o tla nkisang kwa motseng o o thata? Ke mang yo o tla nkgogelang kwa Etomo? 
Psalms108:12 A ga se wena, Modimo o o re latlhileng? Ee, Modimo, ga o bolole le mephato ya rona." 
Psalms108:13 Re direle thuso ya go phologa mo mmabeng; gonne thuso ya batho ga se ya sepe. 
Psalms108:14 Ka Modimo re tla dira ditiro tsa bonatla, mme ona o tla gataka baba ba rona." 
Psalms109:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. Modimo o ke o bakang, se didimale." 
Psalms109:2 Gonne ba nkatlhamoloseditse melomo ya boikepo le ya tsietso, ba bua le nna ka diteme tsa maaka." 
Psalms109:3 Ba ntikanyeditse ka mafoko a letlhoo, ba ntlhabantsha ka bomo." 
Psalms109:4 Lorato lwa me ba lo duela ka go ntlhabantsha, etswe nna ke nnetse go rapela." 
Psalms109:5 Ba ntebogile ka bosula boemong jwa molemo, le ka letlhoo boemong jwa lorato lwa me." 
Psalms109:6 Mo tsosetse moikepi go mo laola; a yo o mo sekisang a eme fa letsogong le le jang la gagwe. 
Psalms109:7 Fa a sekisiwa, a a tswe a bonywe molato; a thapelo ya gagwe e fetoge boleo." 
Psalms109:8 A malatsi a gagwe a ngotlege, tirelo ya gagwe e tsewe ke yo mongwe." 
Psalms109:9 A bana ba gagwe ba nne masiela le mosadi wa gagwe a nne motlholagadi. 
Psalms109:10 A bana ba gagwe ba kgarakgatshegele kwa le kwa, ba kope ba batle dijo, ba le kgakala le matlotla a bona." 
Psalms109:11 A yo o mo adimileng a lalele tsotlhe tse o nang natso; a baeng ba thukhuthe tse a di fufuletseng. 
Psalms109:12 A a se fitlhele ope yo o ka mo tlhomogelang pelo ka gope; a go se nne ope yo o utlwelang masiela a gagwe botlhoko. 
Psalms109:13 A bana ba gagwe ba nyelediwe, a leina la gagwe le phimolelwe ruri, e sa le mo losikeng lwa ntlha." 
Psalms109:14 Molato wa borraagwe a o gopolwe fa Moreneng, le boleo jwa ga mmaagwe a bo se phimolwe." 
Psalms109:15 A di nne fa pele ga Morena ka gale gore a nyeletse go gopolwa ga bona mo lefatsheng," 
Psalms109:16 ka a se ka a gopola go dira ka lorato, mme a bogisa motho wa tlalelo le wa khumanego, le yo o kaeleletsweng gore a mmolaele ruri." 
Psalms109:17 O ne a rata khutso, a e mo wele; o ne a sa rate tshegofatso, a e nne kgakala nae!" 
Psalms109:18 O ne a apara khutso jaaka kobo, a e tsene mo teng ga gagwe jaaka metsi le mo marapong a gagwe jaaka lookwane." 
Psalms109:19 A e nne mo go ena jaaka seaparo se a se aparang le jaaka moitlamo o a itlamang ka ona ka gale. 
Psalms109:20 A tseo e nne tuelo ya baganetsi ba me e e tswang mo Moreneng, le ya bona ba ba buang bosula ka ga me." 
Psalms109:21 Mme wena, Morena, Mongwaka, ntirele ka ntlha ya leina la gago; a e re ka bopelonomi jwa gago bo le molemo, o nkgolole." 
Psalms109:22 Gonne ke tlaletswe, ke bile ke humanegile, pelo ya me e tlhabilwe mo teng ga me." 
Psalms109:23 Ke ikela jaaka moriti o o otlologang maitsiboa, ke tlhotlhorilwe jaaka tsie." 
Psalms109:24 Mangole a me a kgwetlhisiwa ka go itima dijo, nama ya me e otile, ga e tlodiwe setlolo." 
Psalms109:25 Ke bile ke dule yo o kgobiwang ke bona; e a re fa ba mpona, ba thukhuthe ditlhogo." 
Psalms109:26 A o ko o nthuse, Morena, Modimo wa me. A o ko o nkgolole ka fa bopelonoming jwa gago" 
Psalms109:27 gore ba lemoge, fa tseo e le letsogo la gago, fa wena, Morena, o dirile jalo." 
Psalms109:28 Bona ba ka hutsa, mme wena o tshegofatse. A ba ba ntsogetseng ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, mme a motlhanka wa gago a itumele." 
Psalms109:29 A baganetsi ba me ba apesiwe nyatsego, a ba iphuthe ka ditlhong tsa bona jaaka ka kobo." 
Psalms109:30 Ke tla leboga Morena gagolo ka molomo wa me ke tla mmoka mo bontsing jwa batho. 
Psalms109:31 Gonne o eme mo ntlheng ya le le jang la mohumanegi gore a mo golole mo go ba ba mo atlholang. 
Psalms110:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Morena o ne a raya Morena wa me a re: “Dula fa letsogong la me le le jang go ya ke be ke dire baba ba gago sebeo sa dinao tsa gago.” 
Psalms110:2 Thobane-ya-bogosi ya thata ya gago, Morena o tla e otlolola a le mo go Sione a re: “Busa mo gare ga baba ba gago.”" 
Psalms110:3 Ka letsatsi la pololo ya gago batho ba gago ba tla tla ka bopelotshweu, ba apere mekgabo ya boitshepo. Mophato wa makau o tla tla kwa go wena, jaaka monyo o tsalwa ke mahube." 
Psalms110:4 Morena o ikanne – mme ga a kitla a dirolola ikano – a re: “O Moperesiti ka bosakhutleng ka fa mokgweng wa ga Melegi-Seteke.” 
Psalms110:5 Morena yo o fa letsogong le le jang la gago o tla thubakanya dikgosi ka letsatsi la bogale jwa gagwe. 
Psalms110:6 O tla atlhola mo ditšhabeng, go tlala direpa, a thubakanya tlhogo e e okameng lefatshe le legolo." 
Psalms110:7 O tla nwa mo nokaneng, a le mo tseleng, mme ka ntlha ya moo o tla tsholetsa tlhogo." 
Psalms111:1 Haleluya! Ke tla leboga Morena ka pelo yotlhe mo lekgotleng la ba ba nang le nnete le mo phuthegong ke re: 
Psalms111:2 Ditiro tsa Morena ke tse dikgolo, di tlhotlhomisiwa ke botlhe ba ba kgatlhwang ke tsona." 
Psalms111:3 Tiro ya gagwe ke borena le kgalalelo, tshiamo ya gagwe e emetse ruri." 
Psalms111:4 O dirile segopotso sa dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe. Morena o boitshwarelo le boutlwelo-botlhoko. 
Psalms111:5 Ba ba mmoifang o ba file dijo, kgolagano ya gagwe o e gopola ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms111:6 Thata ya ditiro tsa gagwe o e itsisitse batho ba gagwe ka go ba ruisa boswa jwa Baditšhaba. 
Psalms111:7 Ditiro tsa diatla tsa gagwe di boammaaruri le tshiamo, ditaelo tsa gagwe di ikanyega tsotlhe;" 
Psalms111:8 di tlhomamiseditswe ruri le ka bosakhutleng, di tlhokomelwa ka boikanyo le ka nnete." 
Psalms111:9 Batho ba gagwe o ba rometse kgololo; o laetse kgolagano ya gagwe go nna e e sa khutleng; leina la gagwe le boitshepo, le a tshabega." 
Psalms111:10 Go boifa Morena ke tshimologo ya botlhale; mongwe le mongwe yo o dirang jalo o na le tlhaloganyo e e molemo. Poko ya gagwe e nnetse ruri. 
Psalms112:1 Haleluya! Go sego monna yo o boifang Morena, yo ditaolo tsa gagwe di mo kgatlhang segolo." 
Psalms112:2 Kokomana ya gagwe e tla nna le thata e kgolo mo lefatsheng; losika lwa ba ba nang le nnete lo tla tshegofala. 
Psalms112:3 Letlotlo le khumo di mo ntlong ya gagwe, tshiamo ya gagwe e nnela ruri." 
Psalms112:4 Mosiami o bonegela ba ba nang le nnete mo lefifing jaaka lesedi, a le boitshwarelo le boutlwelo-botlhoko le tshiamo." 
Psalms112:5 Go sego monna yo o kutlwelo-botlhoko, a adimana; yo o dirang tsa gagwe ka tshiamo." 
Psalms112:6 Gonne ga a nke a theekela ka gope; mosiami o tla nna a gopolwa ka gale. 
Psalms112:7 Ga a nke a boifisiwa ke polelo e e bosula; o iteile pelo ka lentswe ka go ikanya Morena. 
Psalms112:8 Pelo ya gagwe e tlhomame, ga a nke a boifa sepe go ya a be a lebe baba ba gagwe ka kgatlhego." 
Psalms112:9 O gasagasetsa, batlhoki a ba fe. Tshiamo ya gagwe e nnetse ruri; lonaka lwa gagwe lo godisiwa ka tlotlo." 
Psalms112:10 Fa moikepi a bona jalo, o a ngala, a phuranye meno, a swabe. Keletso ya moikepi e a nyelela." 
Psalms113:1 Haleluya! Bakang, lona batlhanka ba Morena, bakang leina la Morena!" 
Psalms113:2 A leina la Morena le bakwe jaanong le ka bosakhutleng! 
Psalms113:3 A leina la Morena le bakwe go tswa kwa botlhabatsatsi go ya kwa bophirimatsatsi! 
Psalms113:4 Morena o okame ditšhaba tsotlhe, kgalalelo ya gagwe e kwa godimo ga magodimo." 
Psalms113:5 Ke mang yo o tshwanang le Morena, Modimo wa rona, yo o agileng kwa godimo," 
Psalms113:6 yo o lebelang legodimo le lefatshe kwa tlase? 
Psalms113:7 O tsosa yo mmotlana mo leroleng, a nanose mohumanegi mo thotobolong" 
Psalms113:8 gore a mmee fa batlotleging, fa batlotleging ba morafe wa gagwe;" 
Psalms113:9 o agisa moopa mo ntlong go nna mma-bana yo o itumelang. Haleluya! 
Psalms114:1 E rile Iseraele a huduga kwa Egepeto, le ba lapa la ga Jakobe mo morafeng wa puo e sele," 
Psalms114:2 Juta a nna felo ga boitshepo ga gagwe, le Iseraele ga puso ya gagwe." 
Psalms114:3 Lewatle le bonye jalo, la tshaba; Joretane a boa ka morago." 
Psalms114:4 Dithaba di ne tsa ja mokaragana jaaka diphelehu le makgabana jaaka dikwana. 
Psalms114:5 Ke eng, wena lewatle, fa o tshaba, le wena Joretane, fa o kata ka morago?" 
Psalms114:6 Ke eng lona dithaba, fa lo ja mokaragana jaaka diphelehu, le lona makgabana, fa lo etsa dikwana?" 
Psalms114:7 Wena lefatshe, roroma fa pele ga Morena, fa pele ga Modimo wa ga Jakobe," 
Psalms114:8 o o fetotseng lefika letsha la metsi le legakwa motswedi wa metsi. 
Psalms115:1 Se nee rona, Morena, se nee rona, mme o nee leina la gago kgalalelo ka ntlha ya bopelotlhomogi jwa gago le ka ntlha ya boammaaruri jwa gago." 
Psalms115:2 Baditšhaba ba tla buelang ba re: “Kana Modimo wa bona o kae?” 
Psalms115:3 Athe Modimo wa rona o mo legodimong, o dira tsotlhe tse o ratang go di dira." 
Psalms115:4 Medimo ya bona ya diseto ke selefera le gouta, ke tiro ya diatla tsa batho." 
Psalms115:5 E na le melomo, mme ga e bue; e na le matlho, mme ga e bone;" 
Psalms115:6 e na le ditsebe, mme ga e utlwe; e na le dinko, mme ga e dupe;" 
Psalms115:7 e na le diatla, mme ga e tshware; e na le dinao, mme ga e tsamae; le gona ga e ntshe mosumo ope ka memetso ya yona." 
Psalms115:8 Badiri ba yona ba tla nna fela jaaka yona, le mongwe le mongwe yo o e ikantseng." 
Psalms115:9 A Baiseraele ba ikanye Morena; ke ena thuso le thebe ya bona. 
Psalms115:10 A ba ntlo ya ga Arone ba ikanye Morena; ke ena thuso le thebe ya bona. 
Psalms115:11 A ba ba boifang Morena ba ikanye Morena; ke ena thuso le thebe ya bona. 
Psalms115:12 Morena o re gopotse, o tla tshegofatsa; o tla tshegofatsa Baiseraele, a tshegofatsa ba lapa la ga Arone." 
Psalms115:13 O tla tshegofatsa ba ba boifang Morena, bannye le bagolo." 
Psalms115:14 Morena o tla lo atisa, lona le bana ba lona." 
Psalms115:15 Lo tshegofaditswe ke Morena yo o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe. 
Psalms115:16 Legodimo ke legodimo la Morena, mme lefatshe lone o le neile bana ba batho." 
Psalms115:17 Baswi ga ba boke Morena, le e seng ope wa bona ba ba fologelang kwa tidimalong," 
Psalms115:18 mme rona re baka Morena jaanong le ka bosakhutleng. Haleluya! 
Psalms116:1 Morena ke a mo rata, gonne o utlwile lentswe la me la mekokotlelo ya me." 
Psalms116:2 E re ka a ntshekegetse tsebe, ke tla nna ke mmitsa ka malatsi otlhe a me." 
Psalms116:3 Dikgole tsa loso di ne di ntikanyeditse, le ditlalelo tsa felo ga baswi di ne di ntshwere, ka fitlhela pitlagano le bohutsana." 
Psalms116:4 Mme ke ne ka bitsa leina la Morena ka re: “Ao, Morena, swatola botshelo jwa me!”" 
Psalms116:5 Morena o boitshwarelo le tshiamo, Modimo wa rona o boutlwelo-botlhoko." 
Psalms116:6 Morena o boloka ba ba pelo di se nang maano. Ke ne ke koafetse, mme a nthusa." 
Psalms116:7 Mowa wa me, boela kwa boikhutsong jwa gago; gonne Morena o go diretse molemo." 
Psalms116:8 Ee, o nkgolotse mo losong le matlho a me mo dikeleding le dinao tsa me mo go kgotšweng." 
Psalms116:9 Ke tla tsamaya fa pele ga sefatlhego sa Morena mo lefatsheng la baphedi. 
Psalms116:10 Ke ne ke ntse ke dumela mo Modimong, le fa ke ne ke re: “Ke obegile thata.”" 
Psalms116:11 Ka bua ke tshogile ka re: “Batho botlhe ke baaki.” 
Psalms116:12 Nka lebogela Morena ka eng ditiro tsotlhe tse di molemo tse a di ntiretseng? 
Psalms116:13 Ke tla tsholetsa senwelo sa phologo, ke bitsa leina la Morena." 
Psalms116:14 Maikano a me ke tla a dirafaletsa Morena, ee, fa pele ga morafe otlhe wa gagwe." 
Psalms116:15 Loso lwa baratwa ba Morena ke selo sa botlhokwa mo matlhong a gagwe. 
Psalms116:16 Ao, Morena, kana ke motlhanka wa gago; ke motlhanka wa gago, morwa lelata la gago; o funolotse dikgole tsa me." 
Psalms116:17 Ke tla go tsisetsa setlhabelo sa tebogo, ke bitsa leina la Morena." 
Psalms116:18 Maikano a me ke tla a dirafaletsa Morena, ee, fa pele ga morafe otlhe wa gagwe," 
Psalms116:19 mo malapeng a Ntlo ya Morena, mo teng ga gago, Jerusalema. Haleluya!" 
Psalms117:1 Bakang Morena, lona ditšhaba tsotlhe; mo galaletseng, lona merafe yotlhe!" 
Psalms117:2 Gonne bopelontle jwa gagwe bo bogolo thata mo go rona, mme boammaaruri jwa Morena ke jo bo sa khutleng. Haleluya!"
