Psalms118:1 Lebogang Morena, gonne o molemo; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng." 
Psalms118:2 A Iseraele a bue a re: “Ee, bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng.”" 
Psalms118:3 A boora Arone ba bue ba re: “Ee, bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng.”" 
Psalms118:4 A ba ba boifang Morena ba bue ba re: “Ee, bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng.”" 
Psalms118:5 Ke ne ka bitsa Morena ke le mo pitlaganong; Morena a nkaraba, a mpaya mo go atlhameng." 
Psalms118:6 Morena o ntlheng ya me, ga nkitla ke boifa; kana motho a ka ntirang?" 
Psalms118:7 Morena o ntlheng ya me, ke mothusi wa me; mme nna ba ba ntlhoileng ke tla ba tlhaetsa matlho." 
Psalms118:8 Go nna mo tshireletsong ya Morena go gaisa go ikanya batho. 
Psalms118:9 Go nna mo tshireletsong ya Morena go gaisa go ikanya batlotlegi. 
Psalms118:10 Baheitane botlhe ba ne ba ntsentse gare; mme ke ba remagantse ka leina la Morena. 
Psalms118:11 Ba ne ba mpotile ntlheng tsotlhe; ee, ba ntikanyeditse; mme ke ba remagantse ka leina la Morena." 
Psalms118:12 Ba ne ba ntikanyeditse jaaka dintsi tsa dinotshe, ba tuka jaaka molelo wa mitlwa; mme ke ba remagantse ka leina la Morena." 
Psalms118:13 Ke ne ka kgaramediwa thata gore ke we, mme Morena a nthusa." 
Psalms118:14 Morena ke thata ya me le sefela sa me sa pako, o diregile pholoso ya me." 
Psalms118:15 Lentswe la tuduetso le la pholoso le mo matlong a basiami. “Letsogo la Morena le le jang le dira ditiro tsa bonatla. 
Psalms118:16 Letsogo la Morena le le jang le a godisa; letsogo la Morena le le jang le dira ditiro tsa bonatla.” 
Psalms118:17 Ga ke ne ke swa, mme ke tla phela, ke bolela ditiro tsa Morena." 
Psalms118:18 Morena o nkwatlhaile segolo, mme ga a ka a nneela mo losong." 
Psalms118:19 Mpuleleng dikgoro tsa tshiamo, ke tle ke tsene ka tsona, ke leboge Morena." 
Psalms118:20 Kgoro ya Morena ke e; basiami ba tla tsena ka yona. 
Psalms118:21 Ke tla go leboga, ka gonne o nkutlwile, wa nna pholoso ya me." 
Psalms118:22 Lentswe le le latlhilweng ke baagi le diregile letlapa la sekhutlo. 
Psalms118:23 Se ke se se dirilweng ke Morena; mme ke kgakgamatso mo matlhong a rona. 
Psalms118:24 Letsatsi le, ke le le dirilweng ke Morena; a re ipeleng, re itumele ka lone." 
Psalms118:25 Ao Morena, a ko o thuse! Ao Morena, a ko o tsweletse pele!" 
Psalms118:26 A go bakwe yo o tlang ka leina la Morena; re lo tshegofatsa, re le mo Ntlong ya Morena." 
Psalms118:27 Morena ke Modimo, mme o re neile lesedi. Bofang seruiwa sa tlhabelo ya moletlo ka dikgole gore se fitlhe fa dinakeng tsa aletare." 
Psalms118:28 O Modimo wa me, ke tla go baka; o Modimo wa me, ke tla go godisa." 
Psalms118:29 Lebogang Morena, gonne o molemo; le bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng." 
Psalms119:1 Go sego bona ba ditsela tsa bona di itekanetseng, ba ba tsamayang ka fa molaong wa Morena." 
Psalms119:2 Go sego ba ba tlhokomelang ditshupo tsa gagwe, ba ba mmatlang ka pelo yotlhe," 
Psalms119:3 ee, bona ba ba sa direng tshiamololo, mme ba tsamaya mo ditseleng tsa gagwe." 
Psalms119:4 Ditaolo tsa gago o di ntshitse gore di tlhokomelwe ruri. 
Psalms119:5 E kete ditsela tsa me di ka bo di tlhomame go tlhokomela melao ya gago. 
Psalms119:6 Foo nka bo ke sa tlhajwe ke ditlhong, fa nka bo ke tlhokomela ditaelo tsa gago tsotlhe." 
Psalms119:7 Ke tla go leboga ka boammaaruri jwa pelo, fa ke ithuta dithulaganyo tse di siameng tsa gago." 
Psalms119:8 Melao ya gago ke tla e ela tlhoko. A o ko o se ka wa ntlogelela ruri. 
Psalms119:9 Lekau le ka boloka bophepa jwa tsela ya lone jang? Ka go e lebanya le Lefoko la gago. 
Psalms119:10 Ke go batla ka pelo yotlhe; se ntese ka fapoga ditaelo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:11 Ke bolokile Lefoko la gago mo pelong ya me gore ke se ka ka go leofela. 
Psalms119:12 A go bakwe wena, Morena, nthuta melao ya gago." 
Psalms119:13 Ditao tsotlhe tsa molomo wa gago ke di boletse ka molomo. 
Psalms119:14 Ke itumelela tsela ya ditshupo tsa gago bogolo go mefutafuta ya dikhumo. 
Psalms119:15 Ke tla akanya ditaolo tsa gago ke ele ditselana tsa gago tlhoko. 
Psalms119:16 Ke tla natefelwa ke melao ya gago, ga nkitla ke lebala Lefoko la gago." 
Psalms119:17 Ntirele molemo ke le motlhanka wa gago gore ke phele, ke tle ke boloke Lefoko la gago." 
Psalms119:18 Mpudulola matlho gore ke itse go bona dikgakgamatso mo molaong wa gago. 
Psalms119:19 Ke moeng mo lefatsheng; o se ka wa mphitlhela ditaelo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:20 Mowa wa me o nyoretswe ditao tsa gago ka gale. 
Psalms119:21 O bôpetse baikgogomosi, ba ba hutsitsweng ba ba fapogang ditaelo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:22 Pitikolola kgobo le nyatsego mo go nna; gonne ke tshegeditse ditshupo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:23 Le fa dikgosi di nnetse go ntogela maano, motlhanka wa gago ena o akanya melao ya gago." 
Psalms119:24 Ee, ditshupo tsa gago di monate mo go nna, di a nkgakolola." 
Psalms119:25 Mowa wa me o kgomaretse lorole. A o ko o mphedise ka fa Lefokong la gago. 
Psalms119:26 Ke boletse ditsela tsa me, mme wa nkutlwa. A o ko o nthute melao ya gago." 
Psalms119:27 Ntlhaloganyetse tsela ya ditaolo tsa gago, mme ke tla akanya dikgakgamatso tsa gago." 
Psalms119:28 Mowa wa me o ntsha dikeledi ka ntlha ya bohutsana, nnamolola ka fa Lefokong la gago." 
Psalms119:29 Tsela ya maaka e beele kgakala le nna, o ntlhogonolofatse ka molao wa gago." 
Psalms119:30 Tsela ya boammaaruri ke yona ke e itlhophetseng, ka baya ditao tsa gago fa pele ga me." 
Psalms119:31 Ke ngaparetse ditshupo tsa gago, Morena, a ke se tlhajwe ke ditlhong." 
Psalms119:32 Ke taboga mo tseleng ya ditaelo tsa gago; gonne o oketsa pelo ya me. 
Psalms119:33 Morena, nthute tsela ya melao ya gago, mme ke tla e tseela ruri go ya bokhutlong." 
Psalms119:34 Nnaya tlhaloganyo, ke tle ke boloke molao wa gago, ke o tlhokomele ka pelo yotlhe." 
Psalms119:35 Ntsamaise mo tseleng ya ditaelo tsa gago; gonne e a nkgatlha. 
Psalms119:36 Sekegela pelo ya me kwa ditshupong tsa gago, mme e seng kwa boikhumisong." 
Psalms119:37 Faposa matlho a me gore a se ka a leba tsa boithamako, o mphedise mo ditseleng tsa gago." 
Psalms119:38 Dirafaletsa motlhanka wa gago tsholofetso ya gago e e lebanyeng ba ba go boifang. 
Psalms119:39 Tlosa mo go nna kgobo e ke e tshabang; gonne dikatlholo tsa gago di siame. 
Psalms119:40 Ruri ke tlhologeletswe ditaolo tsa gago. Mphedise ka tshiamo ya gago. 
Psalms119:41 A mapelotlhomogi a gago a ntirafalele, Morena, e bong pholoso ya gago ka fa Lefokong la gago," 
Psalms119:42 gore ke tle ke fetole ene yo o nkgobang; gonne ke ikanya Lefoko la gago. 
Psalms119:43 Mme Lefoko la nnete o se ka wa le tlosetsa ruri mo molomong wa me; gonne ke lebeletse dikatlholo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:44 Foo ke tla nna ke tlhokomela molao wa gago ka gale le ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms119:45 Ke rata go sepela fa go atlhameng; gonne ke batla ditaolo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:46 Ke tla bua ka ga ditshupo tsa gago fa pele ga dikgosi, ke sa tlhajwe ke ditlhong." 
Psalms119:47 Ke natefelwa ke ditaelo tsa gago tse ke di ratang. 
Psalms119:48 Ke tla tsholeletsa mabogo kwa ditaelong tsa gago tse ke di ratang, ke akanya melao ya gago." 
Psalms119:49 Gopola Lefoko le o le buileng le motlhanka wa gago, wa re ke se le lebale." 
Psalms119:50 Ke yona kgomotso ya me mo pogisegong ya me, fa tsholofetso ya gago e mphedisa." 
Psalms119:51 Baikgogomosi ba ntshotlile thata; mme ga ke a ka ka fapoga molao wa gago. 
Psalms119:52 Ke ne ka gakologelwa dikatlholo tsa gago tsa bogologolo, Morena, ka ikgomotsa." 
Psalms119:53 Ke ne ka tuka bogale ka ntlha ya baikepi ba ba tlogelang molao wa gago. 
Psalms119:54 Melao ya gago e mphetogetse difela mo ntlong ya me ya boeng. 
Psalms119:55 Ke lala ke gakologelwa leina la gago, Morena, ke tlhokomela molao wa gago." 
Psalms119:56 Ga nna kabelo ya me, ka ke tlhokometse ditaolo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:57 Morena ke kabelo ya me; ke rile, ke tla tlhokomela mafoko a gago." 
Psalms119:58 Ke ne ke lelela sefatlhegong sa gago ka pelo yotlhe; ntlhomogele pelo ka fa tsholofetsong ya gago. 
Psalms119:59 Ke akantse metsamao ya me, ka busetsa dinao tsa me kwa ditshupong tsa gago." 
Psalms119:60 Ka itlhaganela, ka se ka ka diega go tlhokomela ditaelo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:61 Megala ya baikepi e ntharile; mme ga ke a ka ka lebala molao wa gago. 
Psalms119:62 Ke tsoga gare ga bosigo go go galaletsa ka ntlha ya dikatlholo tse di siameng tsa gago. 
Psalms119:63 Ke monkane wa botlhe ba ba go boifang, le wa bona ba ba tlhokomelang ditaolo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:64 Morena, lefatshe le tletse bopelonomi jwa gago. Nthute melao ya gago." 
Psalms119:65 Morena, o diretse motlhanka wa gago molemo ka fa Lefokong la gago." 
Psalms119:66 Nthute bopelotheri le kutlwisiso le kitso, gonne ke dumela ditaelo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:67 E rile ke ise ke kokobediwe, ka timela; mme jaanong ke tlhokometse polelo ya gago." 
Psalms119:68 O molemo, o bile o dira molemo; nthute melao ya gago." 
Psalms119:69 Baikgogomosi ba mpharile ka maaka; mme nna ke tlhokomela ditaolo tsa gago ka pelo yotlhe. 
Psalms119:70 Dipelo tsa bona di nonne, ga di utlwe sepe; mme nna ke kgatlhwa ke molao wa gago." 
Psalms119:71 Go ne go le molemo mo go nna go kokobediwa gore ke ithute melao ya gago. 
Psalms119:72 Molao wa molomo wa gago, mo go nna o gaisa dikete tsa gouta le selefera." 
Psalms119:73 Diatla tsa gago di mpopile tsa mpaakanya. Ntlhalefise gore ke ithute ditaelo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:74 Ba ba go boifang ba a mpona, ba a itumela, ka ke lebeletse Lefoko la gago." 
Psalms119:75 Morena, ke a itse, fa dikatlholo tsa gago di siame, mme o nkwatlhaile ka boikanyo." 
Psalms119:76 Tswetswe a bopelontle jwa gago bo nkgomotse, ka fa o solofeditseng motlhanka wa gago ka teng." 
Psalms119:77 A mautlwelo-botlhoko a gago a mpharafare gore ke phele gonne molao wa gago ke boitumelo jwa me. 
Psalms119:78 A baikgogomosi ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, ka ba ntshiamololetse ba se na lebaka; mme nna ke tla akanya ditaolo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:79 A bona ba ba go boifang ba boele kwa go nna, le bona ba ba itseng ditshupo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:80 A pelo ya me e nne mo melaong ya gago, e itekanetse, gore ke se ka ka tlhajwa ke ditlhong." 
Psalms119:81 Mowa wa me o nyoretswe pholoso ya gago; ke lebeletse Lefoko la gago. 
Psalms119:82 Matlho a me a tlhoafaletse polelo ya gago a re: “O tla nkgomotsa leng?” 
Psalms119:83 Gonne le fa ke ntse jaaka lekuka mo musing, ga ke a ka ka lebala melao ya gago." 
Psalms119:84 Malatsi a motlhanka wa gago a kae? Ba ba ntlhomereng o tla ba atlhola leng? 
Psalms119:85 Baikgantshi ba nkepetse mamena, ba ba seng ka fa molaong wa gago." 
Psalms119:86 Ditaelo tsotlhe tsa gago di boammaaruri. Ba mpogisa ka bomo; nthuse. 
Psalms119:87 Ba batlile go nnyeletsa mo lefatsheng; mme nna ga ke a ka ka tlogela ditaolo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:88 A o ko o mphedise ka fa bopelonoming jwa gago gore ke tlhokomele tshupo ya molomo wa gago. 
Psalms119:89 Morena, Lefoko la gago le eme ka tlhomamo mo legodimong ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms119:90 Boikanyego jwa gago ke jwa losika longwe le longwe; o tlhomamisitse lefatshe, mme le ntse le eme." 
Psalms119:91 Le kajeno di sa ntse di eme ka fa dithulaganyong tsa gago; gonne dilo tsotlhe di a go direla. 
Psalms119:92 Fa molao wa gago e ka bo e ne e se boitumelo jwa me, foo nka bo ke latlhegile mo tlhorisegong ya me." 
Psalms119:93 Ga nkitla ke lebala ditaolo tsa gago ka gope; gonne o mphedisitse ka tsona. 
Psalms119:94 Ke wa gago, nthuse; gonne ke batla ditaolo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:95 Baikepi ba ntaletse go nnyeletsa. Ditshupo tsa gago ke a di tlhokomela. 
Psalms119:96 Ke bonye bokhutlo jwa tsotlhe tse di itekanetseng, mme taelo ya gago ga e na mafelelo." 
Psalms119:97 Molao wa gago ke o rata thata jang! Ke o akanya letsatsi lotlhe. 
Psalms119:98 Taelo ya gago e ntlhalefisa go gaisa baba ba me; gonne ke ya me ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms119:99 Ke tlhalefile go gaisa baruti ba me botlhe; gonne ditshupo tsa gago ke tsona tse ke di akanyang. 
Psalms119:100 Ke phala bagolo ka tlhaloganyo; gonne ke tlhokometse ditaolo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:101 Ke thibile dinao tsa me mo tseleng nngwe le nngwe e e bosula gore ke tlhokomele Lefoko la gago. 
Psalms119:102 Ga ke a ka ka fapoga ditao tsa gago; gonne o nthutile. 
Psalms119:103 Ditsholofetso tsa gago di monate jang mo magalapeng a me; di botshe go gaisa mafura a dinotshe mo molomong wa me! 
Psalms119:104 Ke bona tlhaloganyo ka ditaolo tsa gago; ke ka ntlha ya moo ke tlhoileng tsela nngwe le nngwe ya maaka. 
Psalms119:105 Lefoko la gago ke lobone lwa dinao tsa me, le lesedi la tsela ya me." 
Psalms119:106 Ke ikanne, ka ba ka dirafatsa go tlhokomela dithulaganyo tse di siameng tsa gago." 
Psalms119:107 Ke obegile thata. Morena, mphedise ka fa Lefokong la gago." 
Psalms119:108 Morena, a o ko o natefelwe ke tse molomo wa me o di go ntshetsang ka bopelotshweu, mme o nthute tse di ntshwanetseng." 
Psalms119:109 Bophelo jwa me bo mo dipharagobeng ka gale; mme molao wa gago ona ga ke a ka ka o lebala. 
Psalms119:110 Baikepi ba nthaisitse ka serai; mme ga ke a ka ka fapoga ditaolo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:111 Ditshupo tsa gago ke boswa jwa me ka bosakhutleng; gonne tsona ke boitumelo jwa pelo ya me. 
Psalms119:112 Pelo ya me e palelela mo go diriseng melao ya gago ka gale go ya bosakhutleng. 
Psalms119:113 Ba ba pelo-pedi ke ba tlhoile, mme molao wa gago ona ke a o rata." 
Psalms119:114 O tshireletso ya me le thebe ya me; ke lebeletse Lefoko la gago. 
Psalms119:115 Tlogang fa go nna, basulafatsi ke lona, gore ke tlhokomele ditaelo tsa Modimo wa me." 
Psalms119:116 Ntshegetsa ka fa tsholofetsong ya gago gore ke phele; se ntlhabise ditlhong ka ntlha ya tsholofelo ya me. 
Psalms119:117 Ntshegetsa gore ke phologe, mme ke tla itumelela melao ya gago ka gale." 
Psalms119:118 Botlhe ba ba fapogang melao ya gago o a ba latlha; gonne tsietso ya bona ke maaka fela. 
Psalms119:119 Baikepi botlhe ba lefatshe o ba kokola jaaka manyela; ke ka moo ke ratang ditshupo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:120 Mmele wa me o roromisiwa ke go go tshaba; ke boifa dikatlholo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:121 Ke dirile ka molao le tshiamo. O se ka wa ntlogelela bapatiki ba me. 
Psalms119:122 Emela motlhanka wa gago gore a phele sentle; a ba ba matepe ba se nkgatelele. 
Psalms119:123 Matlho a me a eleditse pholoso ya gago le tsholofetso e e siameng ya gago. 
Psalms119:124 Direla motlhanka wa gago ka fa bopelonoming jwa gago, o nthute melao ya gago." 
Psalms119:125 Ke motlhanka wa gago; ntlhalefise gore ke lemoge ditshupo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:126 Ke nako ya Morena ya go itshupa ka tiro; ba robagantse molao wa gago. 
Psalms119:127 Ke ka ntlha ya moo ke ratang ditaelo tsa gago go feta gouta le gouta e e sa pekwang. 
Psalms119:128 Ke ka ntlha ya moo ke kayang ditaolo tsotlhe tsa gago tshiamo; mme ke tlhoile tsela nngwe le nngwe ya maaka. 
Psalms119:129 Ditshupo tsa gago di a gakgamatsa; ke ka ntlha ya moo, fa mowa wa me o di boloka." 
Psalms119:130 Tlhaloso ya mafoko a gago e a sedimosa, e tlhalefisa ba ba se nang kitso." 
Psalms119:131 Ke kopolola molomo, ke kgalegile; gonne ke tlhologeletswe ditaelo tsa gago." 
Psalms119:132 Retologela kwa go nna, o ntlhomogele pelo jaaka go tshwanetse ba ba ratang leina la gago." 
Psalms119:133 Tiisa dikgato tsa me, ke tle ke sepele ka fa Lefokong la gago; mme a ke se laolwe ke boikepo bope." 
Psalms119:134 Nkgolole mo patikong ya batho, ke tle ke ele ditaolo tsa gago tlhoko." 
Psalms119:135 Phatsimisetsa motlhanka wa gago sefatlhego sa gago, o nthute melao ya gago." 
Psalms119:136 Matlho a me a ela dinokana tsa metsi, ka ba sa dirise molao wa gago." 
Psalms119:137 O tshiamo, Morena, le dikatlholo tsa gago ke tsa nnete." 
Psalms119:138 O laetse ditshupo tsa gago ka tshiamo le ka boikanyego jo bogolo. 
Psalms119:139 Ke jelwe ke tlhoafalo ya me, ka baganetsi ba me ba lebetse mafoko a gago." 
Psalms119:140 Lefoko la gago le itshekile thata; mme motlhanka wa gago o a le rata. 
Psalms119:141 Ke monnye, ke bile ke a nyatsega; mme ditaolo tsa gago ga ke di lebale." 
Psalms119:142 Tshiamo ya gago ke tshiamo e e sa khutleng, molao wa gago ke boammaaruri." 
Psalms119:143 Tlalelo le pitlaganyo di nkwetse, mme ditaelo tsa gago di njesa monate." 
Psalms119:144 Ditshupo tsa gago ke tsa tshiamo ka bosakhutleng. Ntlhalefise gore ke phele. 
Psalms119:145 Ke rapetse ka pelo yotlhe ka re: Nkutlwe, Morena; ke tla tlhokomela melao ya gago." 
Psalms119:146 Ke goetse go wena ka re: Nthusa mme ke tla ela ditshupo tsa gago tlhoko. 
Psalms119:147 Ke rakile mahube a moso, ka goela thuso; ke lebeletse mafoko a gago." 
Psalms119:148 Matlho a me a rakile nako ya ditiso tsa bosigo gore ke akanye polelo ya gago. 
Psalms119:149 Utlwa lentswe la me ka fa bopelonoming jwa gago; Morena, mphedise ka fa tshiamisong ya gago." 
Psalms119:150 Ba ba ntlhomereng ka bolotsana ba atametse, bona ba ba kgakala le molao wa gago." 
Psalms119:151 Wena, Morena, o gaufi, ditaelo tsa gago tsotlhe ke tsa boammaaruri." 
Psalms119:152 Ga ke bolo go itse ka ditshupo tsa gago gore o di tlhomamiseditse go ya bosakhutleng. 
Psalms119:153 Leba tlhorisego ya me, o nthuse; gonne ga ke lebale molao wa gago." 
Psalms119:154 Nkemele mo tshekong ya me, o nkgolole, o mphedise ka fa tsholofetsong ya gago." 
Psalms119:155 Pholoso e kgakala le baikepi; gonne ga ba batle melao ya gago. 
Psalms119:156 Morena, mautlwelo-botlhoko a gago a magolo. Mphedise ka fa ditshiamisong tsa gago." 
Psalms119:157 Ba ba ntlhomereng le baganetsi ba me ba bantsi; le fa go ntse jalo ga ke fapoge ditshupo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:158 E a re fa ke bona ba ba sa ikanyegeng, ba ntene, ka ba sa tlhokomele polelo ya gago." 
Psalms119:159 Bona, ke rata ditaolo tsa gago; Morena, o mphedise ka fa bopelonoming jwa gago." 
Psalms119:160 Kakaretso ya Lefoko la gago ke boammaaruri; dithulaganyo tsotlhe tse di siameng tsa gago ke tse di sa khutleng. 
Psalms119:161 Babusi ba ntlhomere ka bomo, mme pelo ya me e boifa mafoko a gago fela." 
Psalms119:162 Ke itumelela polelo ya gago jaaka mongwe yo o bonang thopo e kgolo. 
Psalms119:163 Maaka ke a tlhoile, ke a a sisimoga; mme molao wa gago ke a o rata." 
Psalms119:164 Ke go baka gasupa ka letsatsi ka ntlha ya ditshiamiso tse di siameng tsa gago. 
Psalms119:165 Ba ba ratang molao wa gago ba na le kagiso e kgolo; ga ba na se se ba kgopisang. 
Psalms119:166 Ke solofetse pholoso ya gago, Morena, ke dirile ka fa ditaelong tsa gago." 
Psalms119:167 Mowa wa me o tlhokometse ditshupo tsa gago, mme ke di rata thata." 
Psalms119:168 Ke tlhokometse ditaolo tsa gago le ditshupo tsa gago; gonne ditsela tsa me tsotlhe di fa pele ga gago. 
Psalms119:169 Morena, a selelo sa me se atamele fa pele ga gago; ntlhalefise ka fa Lefokong la gago." 
Psalms119:170 A mekokotlelo ya me e fitlhe fa pele ga gago; mpholose ka fa polelong ya gago. 
Psalms119:171 Molomo wa me o tla opela ka ga Lefoko la gago; gonne ditaelo tsa gago tsotlhe di siame. 
Psalms119:172 Loleme lwa me lo tla opela ka ga Lefoko la gago; gonne ditaelo tsa gago tsotlhe di siame. 
Psalms119:173 A letsogo la gago le nthuse; gonne ke itlhaoletse ditaolo tsa gago. 
Psalms119:174 Morena, ke tlhologeletswe pholoso ya gago; molao wa gago o njesa monate." 
Psalms119:175 A mowa wa me o phele gore o go bake, mme a ditshiamiso tsa gago di nthuse." 
Psalms119:176 Ke latlhegile jaaka nku e e timetseng; a o ko o batle motlhanka wa gago; gonne ditaelo tsa gago ga ke di lebale. 
Psalms120:1 Thapelo ya go batla go femelwa mo basotling. Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng. Ke goetse Moreneng, ke le mo pitlaganong, mme a nkutlwa." 
Psalms120:2 Morena, nkgolola mo molomong wa maaka, mo lolemeng lwa tsietso." 
Psalms120:3 O tla go nayang, a go okeletsa eng, wena, loleme lwa tsietso?" 
Psalms120:4 Metsu e e bogale ya dinatla e e nang le magala a mohudiri! 
Psalms120:5 A tatlhego ya me wee, ka ke jakile mo Mesege, ka ke agile fa ditenteng tsa Ketare!" 
Psalms120:6 E setse e le sebaka se se fetang selekanyo ke ntse ke agile fa go bona ba ba tlhoileng kagiso. 
Psalms120:7 Nna ke wa kagiso, mme fa ke bua, bona ba batla ntwa fela." 
Psalms121:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng. Ke tsholeletsa matlho a me kwa dithabeng; thuso ya me e tla tswa kae? 
Psalms121:2 Thuso ya me e tswa Moreneng yo o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe. 
Psalms121:3 Ga a ka ke a leseletsa lonao lwa gago go relela! Motlamedi wa gago ga a ka ke a otsela! 
Psalms121:4 Kana Motlamedi wa Iseraele ga a otsele, e bile ga a robale." 
Psalms121:5 Morena ke Mmabaledi wa gago; Morena ke moriti wa gago fa letsogong la gago le le jang. 
Psalms121:6 Letsatsi ga le kitla le go tlhaba motshegare, le fa e le ngwedi bosigo." 
Psalms121:7 Morena o tla go sireletsa mo masuleng otlhe; o tla boloka mowa wa gago. 
Psalms121:8 Morena o tla femela go bolola ga gago le go goroga ga gago go tloga jaanong go fitlha bosakhutleng. 
Psalms122:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng sa ga Dafita. E rile ba nthaya ba re: “A re yeng kwa Ntlong ya Morena!” ka itumela. 
Psalms122:2 Dinao tsa rona di eme mo dikgorong tsa gago, Jerusalema." 
Psalms122:3 Wena, Jerusalema, yo o agilweng jaaka motse o o kitlantsweng sentle," 
Psalms122:4 kwa ditso di tlhatlogelang teng, e bong ditso tsa Morena: Ke molao wa Baiseraele go baka leina la Morena teng." 
Psalms122:5 Gonne ditulo tsa katlholo di eme teng, ditulo tsa ntlo ya ga Dafita." 
Psalms122:6 Kopang kagiso ya Jerusalema; a ba ba go ratang ba phele ka iketlo. 
Psalms122:7 A go nne kagiso mo kagong ya phemelo ya lobota lwa gago, le boiketlo mo matlong a gago a borena." 
Psalms122:8 Ke tla bua ka ntlha ya bana ba ga rre le dilekane tsa me ke re: “A kagiso e nne mo go wena!” 
Psalms122:9 Ke tla go batlela se se molemo ka ntlha ya Ntlo ya Morena, Modimo wa rona." 
Psalms123:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng. Ke tsholeletsa matlho a me koo go wena, yo o dutseng kwa legodimong." 
Psalms123:2 Bona, matlho a rona a lebile Morena, Modimo wa rona, go ya a be a re tlhomogele pelo, jaaka matlho a batlhanka a lebile diatla tsa beng ba bona le jaaka matlho a lelata a lebile seatla sa mohumagadi wa lone." 
Psalms123:3 Re tlhomogele pelo, Morena, re tlhomogele pelo; gonne re kgotshe nyatsego go feta tekanyo." 
Psalms123:4 Mewa ya rona e kgotshe tshotlo segolo ya ba ba sa kgathaleng sepe le lonyatso lwa ba ba ikgantshang. 
Psalms124:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng sa ga Dafita. Fa e ka bo e ne e se Morena yo o neng a re emela – a Iseraele a re jalo – 
Psalms124:2 fa e ka bo e ne e se Morena yo o neng a re emela, jale fa batho ba re tsogela," 
Psalms124:3 foo ba ka bo ba re meditse re sa phela, jale fa ba re tukela bogale." 
Psalms124:4 Foo noka e ka bo e re gogotse, metsi a ka bo a re betile." 
Psalms124:5 Foo metsi a a gogomogileng a ka bo a re khurumeditse. 
Psalms124:6 A go bakwe Morena yo o sa re tlogelelang go garolwa ke meno a bona. 
Psalms124:7 Mewa ya rona e falotse jaaka nonyane mo mutlwaneng wa mothaisi; mogala o kgaogile, mme rona re falotse." 
Psalms124:8 Thuso ya rona e mo leineng la Morena, Modiri wa legodimo le lefatshe." 
Psalms125:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng. Ba ba ikanyang Morena, ba tshwana le thaba ya Sione e e sa reketleng, e e tlhomameng ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms125:2 Jerusalema o dikanyeditswe ke dithaba; Morena o dikanyeditse batho ba gagwe jalo go tloga jaanong le go ya bosakhutleng. 
Psalms125:3 Gonne thobane ya bogosi ya boikepo ga e kitla e nna mo kabelong ya basiami, gore basiami ba se ka ba otlololela diatla kwa bosuleng." 
Psalms125:4 Morena, bona ba ba molemo le ba ba dipelo tsa nnete o ba direle molemo." 
Psalms125:5 Mme ba ba fapogelang mo ditseleng tse di kgopo tsa bona, Morena o tla ba lesa go ya tatlhegong mmogo le ba ba dirang boikepo. A kagiso e nne le Iseraele!" 
Psalms126:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng. E rile Morena a fetola tatlhego ya Sione, ra tshwana le ba ba lorang." 
Psalms126:2 Foo melomo ya rona e ne ya tlala setshego, le diteme tsa rona tuduetso. Foo go ne go buiwa mo ditšhabeng go twe: “Morena o ba diretse dilo tse dikgolo.”" 
Psalms126:3 Morena o re diretse dilo tse dikgolo, ra itumela." 
Psalms126:4 Morena, fetola tatlhego ya rona jaaka dinokana tsa kwa borwa." 
Psalms126:5 Ba ba jwalang ka dikeledi, ba tla roba ka tuduetso." 
Psalms126:6 Ba a tle ba ye ba gase peo ba ntse ba lela, mme ba boe ka tuduetso ba tshotse dingata tsa bona." 
Psalms127:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng sa ga Salomo. Fa Morena a sa age ntlo, baagi ba yona ba tla bo ba itapisetsa lefela; fa Morena a sa dise motse, modisa o tla bo a itlhobaeletsa lefela." 
Psalms127:2 Ke lefela, fa lo tsoga phakela, lo itima boikhutso, lo ja dijo tsa matsapa; gonne Morena o tla naya baratwi ba gagwe ba ntse ba robetse." 
Psalms127:3 Bona, basimane ke neo ya Morena; leungo la sebopelo ke tuelo." 
Psalms127:4 Basimane ba bošwa jwa motho ba tshwana le metsu mo seatleng sa mogale. 
Psalms127:5 Go sego monna yo o e tladitseng mokotlopo wa gagwe; ga a nke a tlhajwa ke ditlhong, fa a bua le baba ba gagwe mo kgotleng." 
Psalms128:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng. Go sego mongwe le mongwe yo o boifang Morena, yo o tsamayang mo ditseleng tsa gagwe." 
Psalms128:2 Ruri, o tla ja tsa tiro ya diatla tsa gago. O letlhogonolo! O tshela sentle." 
Psalms128:3 Mosadi wa gago o tshwana le moweine o o ungwang, a le mo teng ga ntlo ya gago. Bana ba gago ba ntse jaaka matlhogela a motlhware, ba dikanyeditse bojelo jwa gago." 
Psalms128:4 Bona, monna yo o boifang Morena, ruri o tla tshegofadiwa jalo." 
Psalms128:5 A Morena a go tshegofatse a le mo Sione, gore o bone letlhogonolo la Jerusalema ka malatsi otlhe a bophelo jwa gago," 
Psalms128:6 o be o bone le bana ba bana ba gago! A kagiso e nne le Iseraele! 
Psalms129:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng. “Ba sa le ba mpitlaganya gantsintsi go tswa bokaung jwa me” – a Baiseraele ba bue jalo ba re: 
Psalms129:2 “Ba sa le ba mpitlaganya gantsintsi go tswa bokaung jwa me, mme ga ba a ka ba mphenya." 
Psalms129:3 Balemi ba lemile mo mokokotlong wa me; ba leelefatsa mesele ya bona ya mogoma. 
Psalms129:4 Morena o siame; o kgaotse dikgole tsa baikepi.” 
Psalms129:5 A ba tlhajwe ke ditlhong, ba kate ka morago bona botlhe ba ba tlhoileng Sione." 
Psalms129:6 A ba nne jaaka bojang jo bo tlhogang mo godimo ga ntlo, jo bo omelelang bo ise bo kumolwe," 
Psalms129:7 jo mosegi o sa bo tlatseng seatla, le e seng yo o bofang dingata go bo tlatsa letsogo;" 
Psalms129:8 fa bafeti ba sa ka keng ba bua teng ba re: “A tshegofatso ya Morena e nne le lona, re lo tshegofatsa ka leina la Morena.”" 
Psalms130:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng. Ke goela kwa go wena Morena, ke le mo botennye." 
Psalms130:2 Morena, utlwa lentswe la me; a ditsebe tsa gago di nne di tlhokomele mekokotlelo e ke e tlhatlosang." 
Psalms130:3 Morena, fa o ka lotolotsa melato, Morena, go ka ema mang?" 
Psalms130:4 Mme boitshwarelo bo fa go wena gore o tle o boifiwe. 
Psalms130:5 Ke lebeletse Morena, mowa wa me o lebeletse, ke bile ke solofela lefoko la gagwe." 
Psalms130:6 Mowa wa me o lebeletse Morena go gaisa badisa, fa ba lebeletse moso, ee, go gaisa badisa, fa ba lebeletse moso." 
Psalms130:7 Iseraele, o lebelele Morena; gonne bopelotlhomogi bo mo Moreneng; o na le kgololo e kgolo." 
Psalms130:8 Ke ene yo o tla gololang Iseraele mo ditshiamololong tsotlhe tsa gagwe. 
Psalms131:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng sa ga Dafita. Morena, pelo ya me ga e ikgantshe, le matlho a me ga a belafale; ga ke itsenye mo dilong tse dikgolo tse di mphetang." 
Psalms131:2 Ruri, ke gomoditse mowa wa me, ka o didimatsa; mowa wa me o tshwana le ngwana yo o kgwisitsweng a le fa go mmaagwe; mowa wa me o mo go nna jaaka ngwana yo o kgwisitsweng." 
Psalms131:3 Iseraele, o lebelele Morena go tloga jaanong go ya bosakhutleng." 
Psalms132:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng. Morena, gopola Dafita le matshwenyego otlhe a gagwe," 
Psalms132:2 yo o neng a ikanela Morena, a solofetsa Modimo o o thata wa ga Jakobe a re:" 
Psalms132:3 “Ruri, ga nka ke ka tsena mo ntlong ya me ya tente, le fa e le go ya go lala mo phateng e ke e aletsweng;" 
Psalms132:4 ga nka ke ka fa matlho a me boroko, le fa e le dintshi tsa me kotselo," 
Psalms132:5 go ya ke be ke bonele Morena bonno, le Modimo o o thata wa ga Jakobe meago.”" 
Psalms132:6 Bona, re utlwetse Letlole kwa Eferatha, ra le fitlhela mo nageng ya Jaare." 
Psalms132:7 A re yeng kwa boagong jwa gagwe, re obamele fa pele ga sebeo sa dinao tsa gagwe." 
Psalms132:8 Nanoga, Morena, o ye kwa bonnong jwa gago jwa boikhutso, wena le Letlole la thata ya gago." 
Psalms132:9 A baperesiti ba gago ba apare tshiamo; a baratiwa ba gago ba duduetse. 
Psalms132:10 O se ka wa gana motlodiwa wa gago ka ntlha ya ga Dafita, motlhanka wa gago." 
Psalms132:11 Morena o ikanetse Dafita ka boammaaruri – ga a kitla a bo tlhanogela – a re: “Yo e leng wa leungo la mmele wa gago ke tla mmaya mo sedulong sa bogosi sa gago. 
Psalms132:12 Fa bomorwao ba ka tlhokomela kgolagano ya me le ditshupo tsa me tse ke di ba rutang, foo bomorwaa-bone le bone ba tla nnela ruri mo sedulong sa bogosi sa gago.”" 
Psalms132:13 Gonne Morena o itlhaoletse Sione, a mo eletsa gore e nne boago jwa gagwe a re:" 
Psalms132:14 “Fa ke gona felo ga me ga boikhutso go ya bosakhutleng; fa ke gona fa ke tla agang teng; gonne ke go eleditse. 
Psalms132:15 Dijo tsa teng ke tla di tshegofatsa segolo, bahumanegi ba gona ke ba kgorisa bogobe." 
Psalms132:16 Baperesiti ba teng ke tla ba apesa pholoso; ba ba tlhomogetsweng pelo ba gona ba tla duduetsa thata. 
Psalms132:17 Foo ke tla tlhogisetsa Dafita lonaka; ke baakanyeditse motlodiwa wa me lobone. 
Psalms132:18 Ke tla apesa baba ba gagwe ditlhong; mme serwalo sa bogosi se se mo go ene se tla phatsima.” 
Psalms133:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng sa ga Dafita. Bona, go monate jang, go gontle jang, fa bana ba motho ba agile mmogo ka bongwefela jwa pelo." 
Psalms133:2 Go ntse jaaka lookwane lo lo rategang lo lo mo tlhogong, lo tshologela mo ditedung, ditedu tsa ga Arone, tse di lepelelelang mo momenong wa diaparo tsa gagwe." 
Psalms133:3 Go tshwana le monyo wa Heremone o o fologelang mo dithabeng tsa Sione; gonne Morena o rometse tshegofatso teng, e bong bophelo jo bo sa khutleng." 
Psalms134:1 Sefela sa go ya Tempeleng. Tlayang lo bake Morena, lona batlhanka botlhe ba Morena, ba lo emeng bosigo mo Ntlong ya Morena." 
Psalms134:2 Tsholeletsang mabogo kwa Felong-ga-Boitshepo, lo bake Morena." 
Psalms134:3 A Morena a go tshegofatse, a le mo Sione, ena yo o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe!" 
Psalms135:1 Haleluya! Bakang leina la Morena, bakang, lona batlhanka ba Morena!" 
Psalms135:2 Lona ba lo emeng mo Ntlong ya Morena, mo malapeng a Ntlo ya Modimo wa rona," 
Psalms135:3 bakang Morena, gonne Morena o molemo; opelelang leina la gagwe pako; gonne le a kgatlha." 
Psalms135:4 Gonne Morena o itlhophetse Jakobe, e bong Iseraele go nna wa gagwe." 
Psalms135:5 Ruri nna ke a itse, fa Morena a le mogolo; Morena wa rona o feta medimo yotlhe." 
Psalms135:6 Sengwe le sengwe se Morena o se ratang o se dira mo legodimong le mo lefatsheng le mo mawatleng le mo mafelong otlhe a a boteng. 
Psalms135:7 Ke ene yo o tlhatlosang meuwane go tswa kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe, a direla pula dikgadima, a ntsha phefo mo dipolokelong tsa gagwe." 
Psalms135:8 Ke ene yo o iteileng maitibolo a Egepeto, a batho le a dikgomo;" 
Psalms135:9 a go romela ditshupo le dikgakgamatso, wena Egepeto, a betsa Farao le batlhanka botlhe ba gagwe." 
Psalms135:10 Ke ene yo o fentseng ditšhaba tse dintsi, a bolaya dikgosi tse di thata," 
Psalms135:11 e bong Sihone, kgosi ya Baamori, le Oge, kgosi ya Basane, le magosi otlhe a Kanana." 
Psalms135:12 A aba lefatshe la bona go nna boswa, boswa jwa Baiseraele, morafe wa gagwe." 
Psalms135:13 Morena, leina la gago ke le le sa khutleng; Morena, o tla nna o gopolwa mo losikeng longwe le longwe." 
Psalms135:14 Gonne Morena o tla siamisetsa morafe wa gagwe, a utlwela batlhanka ba gagwe botlhoko." 
Psalms135:15 Medimo ya diseto ya Baditšhaba ke selefera le gouta, ke tiro ya diatla tsa batho." 
Psalms135:16 E na le melomo, mme ga e bue; e na le matlho, mme ga e bone;" 
Psalms135:17 e na le ditsebe, mme ga e utlwe; mme le gona ga go na mowa mo melomong ya yona." 
Psalms135:18 Badiri ba yona ba tla tshwana nayo le botlhe ba ba e ikanyang. 
Psalms135:19 Lona Baiseraele, bakang Morena; lona boora Arone, bakang Morena!" 
Psalms135:20 Lona Balefi, bakang Morena; lona ba lo boifang Morena, bakang Morena!" 
Psalms135:21 A go bakwe Morena go tswa mo Sione, ena yo o agileng mo Jerusalema. Haleluya!" 
Psalms136:1 Lebogang Morena, gonne o molemo; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng." 
Psalms136:2 Lebogang Modimo wa medimo; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa ona ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:3 Lebogang Morena wa barena; gonne bopelothomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:4 Ena yo o dirang dikgakgamatso tse dikgolo a le esi; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:5 Yo o dirileng legodimo ka botlhale; gonne bopelothomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:6 Yo o ngamotseng lefatshe godimo ga metsi; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:7 Yo o dirileng masedi a magolo; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:8 Letsatsi go laola motshegare; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:9 Ngwedi le dinaledi go laola bosigo; gonne bopelothomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:10 Yo o iteileng Baegepeto ka go bolaya maitibolo a bona; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:11 A ntsha Iseraele mo gare ga bona; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng; 
Psalms136:12 ka seatla se se thata le ka letsogo le le otlologileng; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:13 Yo o kgaogantseng Lewatle le Lehibidu ka bogare; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:14 A tshedisa Iseraele fa gare ga lone; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:15 Mme a digela Farao le mephato ya gagwe mo Lewatleng le Lehibidu; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:16 Yo o ne a ralatsa batho ba gagwe dikaka; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:17 Yo o fentseng dikgosi tse dikgolo; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:18 A bolaya dikgosi tse di tumileng; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:19 Sihone, kgosi ya Baamori; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng;" 
Psalms136:20 le Oge, kgosi ya Basane; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng." 
Psalms136:21 Mme a aba lefatshe la bona go nna boswa; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng; 
Psalms136:22 go nna boswa jwa ga Iseraele, motlhanka wa gagwe; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng." 
Psalms136:23 Yo o re gopotseng mo bobotlaneng jwa rona; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:24 A re swatola mo go ba ba re pitlagantseng; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:25 Yo o fang ditshedi tsotlhe dijo; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms136:26 Lebogang Modimo wa magodimo; gonne bopelotlhomogi jwa ona ke jo bo sa khutleng. 
Psalms137:1 Re ne re dutse fa dinokeng tsa Babele, ra ba ra lela, fa re gopola Sione." 
Psalms137:2 Re ne re pega diharepa tsa rona mo megokareng ya teng. 
Psalms137:3 Gonne ke teng kwa batshwari ba rona ba neng ba batla mafoko a sefela mo go rona gona; ba ba re thopileng ba senka boitumelo mo go rona ba re: “Re opeleleng sefela sengwe sa Sione.” 
Psalms137:4 Kana re ne re ka opela sefela sa Morena jang, re le mo nageng e sele!" 
Psalms137:5 Fa nka go lebala, wena Jerusalema, a seatla sa me se se jang se lebale tiro ya sona." 
Psalms137:6 A loleme lwa me lo kgomarele magalapa a me, fa ke sa go gopole, fa ke sa itumelele Jerusalema bogolo go dilo tsotlhe!" 
Psalms137:7 Morena, gopola Baetomo, ba ka letsatsi la Jerusalema ba rileng: “Mo rutleng, mo phomeng go fitlha mo motheong!”" 
Psalms137:8 Morwadi Babele, wena mogateledi, go sego yo o tla go busetsang ditiro tsa gago tse o di re diretseng!" 
Psalms137:9 Go sego ena yo o tla phamolang masea a gago, a a thubaganya mo lefikeng!" 
Psalms138:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Ke tla go galaletsa ka pelo yotlhe, ke go opelela pako fa pele ga medimo." 
Psalms138:2 Ke tla obamela ke lebile Tempele e e Boitshepo ya gago, ke galaletsa leina la gago ka ntlha ya bopelontle jwa gago le boikanyego jwa gago; gonne o godisitse leina la gago bogolo go tsotlhe." 
Psalms138:3 O nkutlwile mo letsatsing le ke go biditseng ka lone, wa nnaya bopelokgale le thata mo moweng." 
Psalms138:4 Morena, dikgosi tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tla go galaletsa, fa di utlwile mafoko a molomo wa gago." 
Psalms138:5 Di tla opela ka ga ditsela tsa Morena, ka kgalalelo ya Morena e le kgolo." 
Psalms138:6 Gonne Morena o godimo, mme o leba yo o boikokobetso; mme yo o ikgodisang ena o mo itse a sa le kgakala." 
Psalms138:7 Fa ke tsamaya ke le mo pitlaganong, ke wena yo o mphedisang; kgakalo ya baba ba me o e ntshetsa seatla, mme letsogo le le jang la gago le a nthusa." 
Psalms138:8 Morena o tla di nkgonela. Bopelontle jwa gago, Morena, ga bo na bokhutlo; se tlogele ditiro tsa diatla tsa gago!" 
Psalms139:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. Morena, o a ntlhotlhomisa, o a nkitse." 
Psalms139:2 O itse go nna ga me le go nanoga ga me; o tlhaloganya maikaelelo a me o le kgakala. 
Psalms139:3 O sekaseka go tsamaya ga me le go lala ga me; mme ditsela tsotlhe tsa me o a di ela tlhoko. 
Psalms139:4 Gonne ga go na lefoko lepe mo lolemeng lwa me le, wena Morena, o sa le tlhaloganyeng gotlhe." 
Psalms139:5 O ntikanyeditse kwa morago le kwa pele, o beile seatla sa gago mo go nna." 
Psalms139:6 Kitso e, ke a e gakgamalela, e a mpalela; e kwa godimo, ke retelelwa ke go fitlha kwa go yona." 
Psalms139:7 Nka ya kae go efoga mo Moweng wa gago, sefatlhego sa gago nka se tshabela kae?" 
Psalms139:8 Fa nka tlhatlogela kwa legodimong, o tla bo o le teng; fa nka ntsha felo ga baswi bolao jwa me, bona, o tla bo o le gona." 
Psalms139:9 Fa nka tsaya diphuka tsa mahube, ka ya go aga kwa bokhutlong jwa lewatle," 
Psalms139:10 le koo seatla sa gago se tla nkgoga, seatla se se jang sa gago se ntshwara." 
Psalms139:11 Le fa nka re: “A lefifi le mpipe, a lesedi le le ntikanyeditseng le nne lentsho tikologong ya me,”" 
Psalms139:12 foo le lefifi ga le nke le nna lefifi mo go wena, le bosigo bo tla galalela jaaka motshegare, lefifi le tshwana le lesedi." 
Psalms139:13 Gonne o dirile diphilo tsa me, wa mpopa ke le mo mmeleng wa ga mme." 
Psalms139:14 Ke a go leboga, ka ke dirilwe ka kgakgamatso e e gaisang; di a gakgamatsa, ditiro tsa gago, mme mowa wa me o itse sentle jalo." 
Psalms139:15 Marapo a me a ne a sa go fitlhegela, motlheng o ke dirilweng ka ona mo bosaitsiweng, ke logiwa sentle mo botennye jwa lefatshe." 
Psalms139:16 Matlho a gago a mponye ke simolola go utlwelelwa; mme malatsi a me a a sa leng a rulaganngwa go ise go nne lepe la ona, a kwadilwe otlhe mo lokwalong lwa gago." 
Psalms139:17 Modimo, mo go nna megopolo ya gago e ratega jang! Palo ya yona e kana kang!" 
Psalms139:18 Fa ke re, ke a e bala, ke fitlhele e feta motlhaba. Fa ke thanya, ke fitlhele ke sa ntse ke na nao." 
Psalms139:19 Modimo, bolaya tlhe moikepi! Lona banna ba polao, ntlogelang." 
Psalms139:20 Ke ba ba go rukhutlhegelang ka boferefere, ba bolela leina la gago ka go sa tshwanelang." 
Psalms139:21 Morena, a ga ke na go tlhoa bone ba ba go tlhoileng, le go tenwa ke ba ba go tsogelang?" 
Psalms139:22 Ke ba tlhoile ka letlhoo le le tletseng, ba mphetogetse baba." 
Psalms139:23 Nkeleke, Modimo, o itse pelo ya me; nteke, o itse megopolo ya me," 
Psalms139:24 mme o bone, fa ke le mo tseleng e e bosula, mme o nkgogele mo tseleng ya bosakhutleng!" 
Psalms140:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita e e kwaletsweng moopedisi. 
Psalms140:2 Morena, nkgolole mo bathong ba ba bosula; o mpoloke mo banneng ba ba bodipa," 
Psalms140:3 ba ba akanyang dilo tse di bosula mo pelong, ba tsosa ntwa ka malatsi otlhe." 
Psalms140:4 Ba itooditse diteme, ba tshwana le dinoga; botlhole jwa lebolobolo bo mo maganong a bona. Sela." 
Psalms140:5 Morena, mpoloke mo diatleng tsa moikepi, o mphemele mo banneng ba ba bogwama, ba ba ikaeletseng go ntigela lengopeng." 
Psalms140:6 Baikgantshi ba mphitlhetse mutlwane le serai, ba mpeetse letloa fa thoko ga tsela, ba nthaisitse ka seru. Sela." 
Psalms140:7 Ke buile le Morena ka re: “O Modimo wa me.” Morena, reetsa lentswe la mekokotlelo ya me." 
Psalms140:8 Modimo Morena, wena thuso e e thata ya me, ke wena yo o femelang tlhogo ya me ka letsatsi la tlhabano." 
Psalms140:9 Morena, o se ka wa dirafatsa dikeletso tsa moikepi; a maano a o a logileng a se kgonege, ba ka tla ba ikgodisa. Sela." 
Psalms140:10 Fa ba ka tsholetsa ditlhogo tikologong ya me, a tshenyo ya diteme tsa bona e ba khurumetse." 
Psalms140:11 A Morena a nesetse magala mo go bona, a ba digele mo molelong, mo bodibeng gore ba se ka ba tlhola ba tsoga." 
Psalms140:12 A monna wa puo e e bosula a se ka a tlhomama mo lefatsheng; monna yo o bodipa a tlalelo e mo leleke gangwe le gape. 
Psalms140:13 Ke a itse, fa Morena a tla emela kgang ya motlalelwi le tshiamelo ya mohumanegi." 
Psalms140:14 Ruri, basiami ba tla leboga leina la gago, ba nnete ba tla aga fa pele ga gago." 
Psalms141:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Morena, ke a go bitsa; itlhaganele, o tle go nna; utlwa lentswe la me, fa ke goela go wena." 
Psalms141:2 A thapelo ya me e nne jaaka maswalo fa pele ga gago; a tsholetso ya me ya mabogo e nne jaaka tshupelo ya maitsiboa. 
Psalms141:3 Morena, beela molomo wa me tiso; lebelela mojako wa molomo wa me." 
Psalms141:4 Se sokololele pelo ya me kwa selong se se bosula go dira ditiro tsa boikepo le banna ba ba dirang bosula, mme a ke se je monate o ba o jang." 
Psalms141:5 Mosiami a ka ntitaya, ke ka lorato, a ka nkwatlhaya, ke lookwane lwa tlhogo; tlhogo ya me ga e kitla e lo gana. Le fa go ntse jalo ke rapela ka ntlha ya masula a bona." 
Psalms141:6 Fa baatlhodi ba bona ba digwa mo makgotlhong, ba tla utlwa mafoko a me, fa e le a a monate." 
Psalms141:7 Marapo a rona a gasagasegile fa mojakong wa felo ga baswi jaaka fa motho a lema, a gagola lefatshe." 
Psalms141:8 Gonne matlho a me a lebile wena Modimo Morena; ke batla botshabelo fa go wena; se ntshe mowa wa me mo nameng. 
Psalms141:9 Mphemele mo thateng ya segole se ba nthaisitseng ka sona, le mo dirung tsa ba ba dirang bosula." 
Psalms141:10 A baikepi ba wele mo lemeneng la bona botlhe mmogo, mogang nna ke fetang ke falola." 
Psalms142:1 Sefela sa thuto sa ga Dafita, fa a ne a le mo logageng. Thapelo." 
Psalms142:2 Ke goela Moreneng ke tlhatlositse lentswe; ke lelela boitshwarelo mo Moreneng ke tsholeditse lentswe. 
Psalms142:3 Ke tshololela selelo sa me fa pele ga gagwe, ke bega tlalelo ya me fa pele ga gagwe." 
Psalms142:4 Fa ke nyema moko, wena o itse tsela ya me. Ba mpeetse serai mo tseleng e ke tshwanetseng go e tsamaya." 
Psalms142:5 Ke lebile ntlheng ya letsogo le le jang, ke fitlhela go se na ope yo o nkitseng; botshabelo jwa me bo ile; ga go ope yo o mpotsang bophelo." 
Psalms142:6 Ke goela kwa go wena, Morena, ke re: “Ke wena botshabelo jwa me le kabelo ya me mo lefatsheng la baphedi.”" 
Psalms142:7 Ela selelo sa me tlhoko; gonne ke koafetse segolo; nkgolole mo babogising ba me; gonne ba mpheta ka thata. 
Psalms142:8 Nntshe mo kgolegong gore ke galaletse leina la gago. Basiami ba tla ntikanyetsa, fa o ntirela molemo." 
Psalms143:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. Utlwa thapelo ya me, Morena, o ele selelo sa me tlhoko; nkutlwe ka fa boikanyegong jwa gago le ka tshiamo ya gago." 
Psalms143:2 Mme o se ka wa seka le motlhanka wa gago; gonne ga go na mophedi ope yo o siameng fa pele ga gago. 
Psalms143:3 Gonne mmaba o bogisa mowa wa me, o gateletse bophelo jwa me fa fatshe; o nkagisa mo lefifing jaaka bona ba ba swetseng ruri." 
Psalms143:4 Mowa wa me o a felelela; pelo ya me e gatsetse mo teng ga me. 
Psalms143:5 Ke gakologelwa malatsi a bogologolo, ke akanya tsotlhe tse o di dirileng; ke gopola ditiro tsa diatla tsa gago." 
Psalms143:6 Ke otlololela mabogo kwa go wena, mowa wa me o go nyoretswe jaaka lefatshe le le omeletseng. Sela." 
Psalms143:7 Morena, akofa o nkutlwe, mowa wa me o a idibala; se mphitlhele sefatlhego sa gago, gore ke se ka ka nna jaaka bona ba ba fologetseng kwa moleteng." 
Psalms143:8 Nkutlwise bopelonomi jwa gago mo mosong; gonne ke ikantse wena. Nkitsise tsela e ke tshwanetseng go e tsamaya; gonne ke tsholeletsa mowa wa me kwa go wena. 
Psalms143:9 Nkgolole mo babeng ba me, Morena, ke itiketsa ka wena." 
Psalms143:10 Nthute go dira se se go natefelang; gonne o Modimo wa me. A Mowa wa gago o o molemo o nkgoge mo tseleng e e lekalekanyeng. 
Psalms143:11 Morena, mphedise ka ntlha ya leina la gago, o nntshe mo pitlaganong ka tshiamo ya gago." 
Psalms143:12 Mme o nyeletse baba ba me ka fa bopelonoming jwa gago, mme botlhe ba ba ntwantshang o ba bolae; gonne ke motlhanka wa gago." 
Psalms144:1 Pesalome ya ga Dafita. A go bakwe Morena, lefika la me, yo o rutileng diatla tsa me go tlhabana le menwana ya me go lwa;" 
Psalms144:2 e bong Montlhomogelapelo le Montshireletsi; Momphemedi le Mompholosi; thebe ya me le yo ke mo ikanyang, yo o tsenyang morafe wa me mo taolong ya me." 
Psalms144:3 Morena, kana motho ke eng, fa o mo itse, le ngwana wa motho, fa o mo tlhokomela?" 
Psalms144:4 Motho o tshwana le pudulo fela; malatsi a gagwe a feta jaaka moriti. 
Psalms144:5 Morena, sekamisa legodimo la gago o fologe; ama dithaba gore di kue musi." 
Psalms144:6 Gadimisa legadima, mme o ba phatlalatse; roma metsu ya gago, o ba tseanye." 
Psalms144:7 Ntsha mabogo a gago, o le kwa godimo, o nkinole; o ntshwatole mo merwaleleng, mo diatleng tsa baeng," 
Psalms144:8 ba melomo ya bona e buang maaka, ba diatla tsa bona tse di jang e leng tsa tsietso!" 
Psalms144:9 Modimo, ke tla go opelela sefela se sešwa, ke go leletsa harepa ya dithapo di le some." 
Psalms144:10 Ke wena yo o nayang dikgosi phenyo, yo o falodisang Dafita, motlhanka wa gago, mo tšhakeng e e senyang." 
Psalms144:11 Ntshwatole o nkgolole mo diatleng tsa baeng, ba melomo ya bona e buang maaka ba diatla tsa bona tse di jang e leng tsa tsietso!" 
Psalms144:12 A bomorwaa-rona ba nne mo bokaung jwa bona jaaka ditlhatshana tse di godisitsweng; le bomorwadia-rona ba nne jaaka maotwana a sekhutlo a a setilweng ka fa mokgweng wa kago ya matlo a borena. 
Psalms144:13 A difala tsa rona di tlale, go ntshiwe mefutafuta ya dijo mo go tsona; a difutshane tsa rona di ate ga dikete, di ntsifale ga dikete tse some mo mafulong a rona." 
Psalms144:14 A dikgomo tsa rona di tsale di se folotse go se nne nyelelo le e seng go lelela kotsi mo dipatlelong tsa rona. 
Psalms144:15 Go sego morafe o o dirafalelwang ke tseo; go tlhogonolo morafe o Morena e leng Modimo wa ona! 
Psalms145:1 Sefela sa pako sa ga Dafita. Modimo wa me, ke tla go godisa, Kgosi; ke baka leina la gago ka gale le ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms145:2 Ke tla go baka ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe, ke tumisa leina la gago ka gale le ka bosakhutleng." 
Psalms145:3 Morena o mogolo, o tshwanetse go bakwa thata; bogolo jwa gagwe ga bo na tlhotlhomiso." 
Psalms145:4 Losika longwe lo tla boka ditiro tsa gago mo go lo longwe, ba tla bolela ditiro tse di thata tsa gago." 
Psalms145:5 Ke tla bua ka ga phatsimo ya borena jo bo galalelang jwa gago le ka ga ditiro tse di gakgamatsang tsa gago. 
Psalms145:6 Bona ba tla bua ka ga thata ya ditiro tse di boitshegang tsa gago, mme nna ke tla bolela bogolo jwa gago." 
Psalms145:7 Ba tla utlwatsa tumo ya molemo o mogolo wa gago, ba dudueletsa tshiamo ya gago." 
Psalms145:8 Morena o boitshwarelo le boutlwelo-botlhoko; ga a fele pelo, o mogolo ka bopelotlhomogi." 
Psalms145:9 Morena o molemo mo go botlhe, boutlwelo-botlhoko jwa gagwe bo okame ditiro tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
Psalms145:10 Morena, a dibopiwa tsotlhe tsa gago di go leboge, a baratwa ba gago ba go bake." 
Psalms145:11 A ba bolele kgalalelo ya bogosi jwa gago, ba bue ka ga thata ya gago" 
Psalms145:12 gore ba itsise bana ba batho ditiro tse di bonatla tsa gago le kgalalelo e e phatsimang ya bogosi jwa gago. 
Psalms145:13 Bogosi jwa gago ke bogosi jo bo se nang bokhutlo, puso ya gago e nna go ya tshikatshikeng." 
Psalms145:14 Morena o tshegetsa botlhe ba ba wang, o tsosa botlhe ba ba obegileng." 
Psalms145:15 Matlho a ba botlhe a lebile wena, mme o ba naya dijo tsa bona ka nako e e lebanyeng." 
Psalms145:16 O huporolola seatla sa gago, o kgorisa diphedi tsotlhe ka natefo." 
Psalms145:17 Morena o siame mo ditseleng tsotlhe tsa gagwe, o pelonomi mo ditirong tsotlhe tsa gagwe." 
Psalms145:18 Morena o gaufi le botlhe ba ba mmitsang, botlhe ba ba mmitsang ka boammaaruri." 
Psalms145:19 O dirafatsa keletso ya bona ba ba mmoifang, o utlwa selelo sa bona, a ba thuse." 
Psalms145:20 Morena o boloka botlhe ba ba mo ratang, mme baikepi botlhe o a ba nyeletsa." 
Psalms145:21 Molomo wa me o tla bolela pako ya Morena; a diphedi tsotlhe di galaletse leina le le boitshepo la gagwe ka gale le ka bosakhutleng. 
Psalms146:1 Haleluya! Baka Morena, wena mowa wa me!" 
Psalms146:2 Ke tla nna ke galaletsa Morena ke ntse ke phela; ke tla nna ke opelela Modimo wa me ke sa ntse ke le yo. 
Psalms146:3 Lo se ka lwa ikanya barena, le e seng ngwana wa motho yo go se nang thuso epe mo go ena." 
Psalms146:4 Fa mowa wa gagwe o tswa, o boela gape kwa mmung wa gagwe; maikaelelo a gagwe a fele ka lone letsatsi leo." 
Psalms146:5 Go sego ena yo Modimo wa ga Jakobe e leng thuso ya gagwe, yo tsholofelo ya gagwe e leng mo go Morena, Modimo wa gagwe," 
Psalms146:6 yo o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe le lewatle le tsotlhe tse di mo go tsona; yo o bolokang boammaaruri ka bosakhutleng; 
Psalms146:7 yo o direlang bapatikwi tshiamo, ba ba tlala a ba fe dijo. Morena o golola bagolegwi." 
Psalms146:8 Morena o foufolola difofu; Morena o tsosa ba ba obegileng; Morena o rata basiami. 
Psalms146:9 Morena o boloka baeng, o gomotsa dikhutsana le batlholagadi; mme tsela ya baikepi yona a e kgopamise." 
Psalms146:10 Morena ke kgosi ka bosakhutleng; e bong Modimo wa gago, Sione, go ya tshikatshikeng. Haleluya!" 
Psalms147:1 Galaletsang Morena! Gonne go pila go leletsa Modimo wa rona, ee, go monate; sefela sa pako se tshwanetse." 
Psalms147:2 Morena o aga Jerusalema, o phutha balelekwi ba Iseraele." 
Psalms147:3 O fodisa ba ba dipelo di phatlogileng, o fapa dintho tsa bona." 
Psalms147:4 O tlhomamisa palo ya dinaledi, tsotlhe o di taya maina." 
Psalms147:5 Morena wa rona o mogolo, o thata e kgolo; tlhaloganyo ya gagwe ga e ka ke ya lekanngwa." 
Psalms147:6 Morena o kakatlolola ba ba pelonolo; mme baikepi bona o ba digela fa fatshe. 
Psalms147:7 Tlhabelang Morena sefela sa tebogo; opelelang Modimo wa rona ka harepa; 
Psalms147:8 ona o o apesang legodimo ka maru, o o baakanyetsang lefatshe pula, o o medisang bojang mo dithabeng;" 
Psalms147:9 o o nayang diruiwa dijo tsa tsona, le magakajane, fa a lela." 
Psalms147:10 Ga o natefelwe ke thata ya pitse, ga o kgatlhwe ke dikgoka tsa monna." 
Psalms147:11 Morena o kgatlhwa ke ba ba mmoifang, ba ba solofetseng bopelonomi jwa gagwe." 
Psalms147:12 Jerusalema, galaletsa Morena; Sione, baka Modimo wa gago." 
Psalms147:13 Gonne o thatafaditse mephakarego ya mejako ya gago; o tshegofaditse bana ba gago mo go wena. 
Psalms147:14 Ke ona o o nayang lefatshe la gago kagiso, o o go jesang mabele a a nang le moko." 
Psalms147:15 O romela taolo ya ona kwa lefatsheng; Lefoko la ona le siana thata. 
Psalms147:16 O tlhotlhora semathana jaaka boboa, o gasa serame jaaka molora." 
Psalms147:17 O latlhela sefako sa ona jaaka dikgapetla. Ke mang yo o ka itshokelang letsididi la ona? 
Psalms147:18 O roma Lefoko la ona, o di gakolose; o fokisa phefo ya ona, metsi a ele." 
Psalms147:19 O itsise Jakobe Lefoko la ona, o itsise Iseraele melao ya ona le dithulaganyo tsa ona." 
Psalms147:20 Ga o ise o ke o direle morafe ope jalo, mme dikatlholo tsa ona ga ba di itse. Haleluya!" 
Psalms148:1 Haleluya! Bakang Morena, lo le mo magodimong; mmakeng, lo le mo mafelong a a godimo!" 
Psalms148:2 Mmakeng lona baengele ba gagwe botlhe; mmakeng lona masomosomo a gagwe otlhe! 
Psalms148:3 Mmakeng lona letsatsi le ngwedi; mmakeng lona dinaledi tsotlhe tse di phatsimang! 
Psalms148:4 Mmakeng lona magodimo a magodimo le metsi a a leng kwa godimo ga magodimo. 
Psalms148:5 A di bake leina la Morena; gonne o laotse, mme tsa tlholega." 
Psalms148:6 Mme o di tlhomamiseditse ruri; o beile molao o di sa ka keng tsa o tlola. 
Psalms148:7 Bakang Morena, lo le mo lefatsheng, lona dikgwanyape tsa mawatle le madiba otlhe," 
Psalms148:8 le wena molelo le sefako le semathana le musi le phefo ya ledimo le le dirafatsang lefoko la gagwe. 
Psalms148:9 Lona dithaba le dithabana tsotlhe; lona ditlhare tse di ungwang le mesetere yotlhe; 
Psalms148:10 lona diphologolo le diruiwa tsotlhe; lona dilo tse di gagabang le lona dinonyane tse di diphuka; 
Psalms148:11 lona dikgosi tsa lefatshe le merafe yotlhe, lona dikgosana le baatlhodi botlhe ba lefatshe;" 
Psalms148:12 lona makau le lona makgarebe, lona batsofe mmogo le bana –" 
Psalms148:13 botlhe a ba bake leina la Morena; gonne leina la gagwe ke lone fela le le godileng. Borena jwa gagwe bo mo lefatsheng le mo legodimong. 
Psalms148:14 O godiseditse morafe wa gagwe lonaka; ke se se bokwang ke batlhomogelwa botlhe ba gagwe, e bong Baiseraele, morafe o o gaufi nae. Haleluya!" 
Psalms149:1 Haleluya! Opelelang Morena sefela se sešwa le pako ya gagwe mo phuthegong ya baratwi! 
Psalms149:2 A Iseraele a itumelele Modiri wa gagwe; a bana ba Sione ba dudueletse kgosi ya bona! 
Psalms149:3 A ba bake leina la gagwe ka dipina, ba mo leletse moropa le harepa." 
Psalms149:4 Gonne Morena o natefelwa ke batho ba gagwe; o kgabisa ba ba pelonolo ka pholoso. 
Psalms149:5 A baratwi ba letse megolokwane ka tlotlo; ba duduetse ba le mo malaong a bona," 
Psalms149:6 dipôkô tsa Modimo di le mo melomong ya bona le tšhaka e e magale mabedi mo diatleng tsa bona," 
Psalms149:7 go dirafatsa pusoloso mo ditšhabeng le dipetso mo merafeng 
Psalms149:8 go golega dikgosi tsa yona ka dikeetane le batlotlegi ba yona ka mefiri ya tshipi 
Psalms149:9 go dirafatsa mo go bona katlholo e e kwadilweng. Seo ke tlotlo ya baratwi ba gagwe. Haleluya! 
Psalms150:1 Haleluya! Bakang Modimo mo Felong ga ona ga Boitshepo; o bakeng mo loaping lwa thata ya ona! 
Psalms150:2 O bakeleng ditiro tse dikgolo tsa ona, o bakeng ka fa bogolong jo bo tletseng jwa ona!" 
Psalms150:3 O bakeng ka tumo ya dinaka; o bakeng ka harepa le serankure! 
Psalms150:4 O bakeng ka moropa le ka dipina, o bakeng ka dikwadi tsa dithapo le ka ditlhaka!" 
Psalms150:5 O bakeng ka diphaphatshana tsa motenyane; o bakeng ka diphaphatshana tsa moporo! 
Psalms150:6 A tsotlhe tse di nang le mowa di bake Morena! Haleluya! 
Proverbs1:1 Diane tsa ga Salomo morwa Dafita, kgosi ya Iseraele." 
Proverbs1:2 Ke tsa go itse botlhale le ngwao, tsa go tlhaloganya mafoko a temogo" 
Proverbs1:3 gore motho a amogele tlhagiso e e tlhalefisang le tshiamo le molao le tsa nnete 
Proverbs1:4 gore ba ba iseng ba tlhalefe ba newe thuto, makau a newe kitso le kelelelo –" 
Proverbs1:5 Yo o botlhale o tla di utlwa, a ba a okelediwa kitso; yo o fatlhogileng o tla bona dikgakologelo tse di molemo –" 
Proverbs1:6 gore a tlhaloganye diane le ditshwantsho le mafoko a ba ba botlhale le dinyepo tsa bone. 
Proverbs1:7 Go boifa Morena ke tshimologo ya kitso. Masilo a nyatsa botlhale le maitsholo. 
Proverbs1:8 Morwaaka, utlwa taelo ya ga rraago; se tlhokomologe thuto ya ga mmaago!" 
Proverbs1:9 Gonne tsona ke serwalo se sentle mo tlhogong ya gago le sebaga sa mokgabo mo molaleng wa gago. 
Proverbs1:10 Morwaaka, fa baleofi ba go raela, o gane." 
Proverbs1:11 Fa ba re: “Tlaya le rona, re lalele motho go tsholola madi, re ratele go bolaya yo o se nang molato ka bomo;" 
Proverbs1:12 re metse ba ba phelang jaaka felo ga baswi le ba ba itekanetseng jaaka ba ba fologelang kwa lebitleng. 
Proverbs1:13 Re tla bona dithoto tsa mefutafuta tsa tlhwatlhwa e kgolo; re tla tlatsa matlo a rona ka thopo. 
Proverbs1:14 Utlwana le rona! Re tla tlhakanela kgetsana ya madi mmogo.” 
Proverbs1:15 Morwaaka, se tsamae nabo mo tseleng! Iletsa dinao tsa gago ditselana tsa bone!" 
Proverbs1:16 Gonne maoto a bone a sianna kwa bosuleng, a itlhaganelela go tsholola madi." 
Proverbs1:17 Ee, letloa le le thaisang dinonyane tsa mefutafuta fa pele ga matlho a tsona le alelwa lefela." 
Proverbs1:18 Mme bone bao ba lalela madi a bone ka bosi, ba batla go itshenyetsa maphelo ka bosi." 
Proverbs1:19 Ke tsona ditsela tsa botlhe ba ba batlang kgwebo ya tshiamololo: yona e tla amoga beng ba yona bophelo. 
Proverbs1:20 Botlhale bo kuela godimo mo mebileng; bo utlwatsa lentswe la jona mo dipatlelong. 
Proverbs1:21 Bo tlhaba mokgosi bo le mo godimo ga dipota; bo bolela mafoko a jona mo mejakong ya dikgoro tsa motse: 
Proverbs1:22 Bo re: “Lona ba lo sa tlhalefang lo tla rata go se tlhalefe go fitlha leng? Basotli ba tla khutla leng go kgatlhwa ke ditshotlo? Masilo a tla lesa leng go tlhoa kitso? 
Proverbs1:23 Retologelang kwa kgalemelong ya me! Bonang, ke tla lo ntshetsa mowa wa me, ke lo itsise mafoko a me." 
Proverbs1:24 E re ka ke biditse, mme lwa gana; ke otlolotse letsogo, mme ga se ka ga tlhokomela ope;" 
Proverbs1:25 ka lo tlhokomologile kgakololo ya me yotlhe, mme lwa se ka lwa rata kgalemelo ya me:" 
Proverbs1:26 Ka moo le nna ke tla tshega tatlhego ya lona, ke sotla, fa lo tlelwa ke therego;" 
Proverbs1:27 fa therego e lo tlela jaaka tumo ya maru, fa tatlhego ya lona e tla jaaka ledimo, fa tlalelo le pitlaganyo di lo wela." 
Proverbs1:28 Foo ba tla mpitsa, mme ga nke ke araba; ba tla mpatla, mme ga ba nke ba mpona." 
Proverbs1:29 E re ka ba tlhoile kitso, ba se ka ba itlhaolela go boifa Morena;" 
Proverbs1:30 ka ba se ka ba rata kgakololo ya me, mme ba nyatsa kgalemelo ya me yotlhe:" 
Proverbs1:31 Ke ka moo ba tshwanetseng go bolawa ke se ba se jeleng, le go kgora bosula jwa maano a ba a logileng." 
Proverbs1:32 Gonne boikepo jwa ba ba sa tlhalefang bo a ba bolaya; go se kgathale sepe ga dieleele go di isa mo tatlhegong. 
Proverbs1:33 Mme yo o nkutlwang o tla nna mo tshireletsong; o tla bo a iketlile a sa boife bosula.” 
Proverbs2:1 Morwaaka, fa o ka amogela mafoko a me, wa boloka ditaolo tsa me mo go wena," 
Proverbs2:2 fa o sekegela botlhale tsebe, o lebisa pelo ya gago kwa tlhaloganyong;" 
Proverbs2:3 ee, fa o bitsa temogo, o tlhatlosetsa tlhaloganyo lentswe la gago," 
Proverbs2:4 fa o bo batla jaaka selefera, o bo fukutsa jaaka khumo e e fitlhegileng," 
Proverbs2:5 foo o tla tlhaloganya go boifa Morena, o tla bona kitso ya go itse Modimo." 
Proverbs2:6 Gonne Morena o aba botlhale; kitso le tlhaloganyo di tswa mo molomong wa gagwe. 
Proverbs2:7 O bolokela basiami thuso; ke ene thebe ya ba ba sepelang ka boitekanelo 
Proverbs2:8 le yo o bolokang ditselana tsa tshiamo le yo o tsamayang mo tseleng ya ba ba mmoifang. 
Proverbs2:9 Foo o tla tlhaloganya tshiamo le molao le tsa nnete le tselana nngwe le nngwe e e molemo. 
Proverbs2:10 Gonne botlhale bo tla tsena mo pelong ya gago; kitso e tla nna monate mo go wena. 
Proverbs2:11 Kakanyo e tla go disa, tlhaloganyo e tla go boloka;" 
Proverbs2:12 e le go go falodisa mo tseleng ya ba ba bosula le mo bathong ba ba buang tse di sokameng," 
Proverbs2:13 ba ba tlogelang ditselana tse di tlhamaletseng gore ba tsamae mo ditseleng tsa lefifi; 
Proverbs2:14 ba ba itumelang go dira bosula ba dudueletsa bokgopo jwa yo o sa siamang," 
Proverbs2:15 ba ditselana tsa bone di kgopameng, ba metlhala ya bone e leng ya boikepo." 
Proverbs2:16 E tla go falodisa mo mosading o sele yo e seng wa gago wa mafoko a a borethe; 
Proverbs2:17 yo o tlhalang molekane wa bošwa jwa gagwe, a lebale kgolagano e o e ikanetseng fa pele ga Modimo wa gagwe." 
Proverbs2:18 Gonne lapa la gagwe le fologela kwa losong; ditselana tsa gagwe di ya kwa baswing. 
Proverbs2:19 Botlhe ba ba yang kwa go ene ga ba boe; ga ba fitlhe mo ditselaneng tsa bophelo. 
Proverbs2:20 Tseo ke gore o sepele mo tseleng ya ba ba molemo, o tlhamalele fela mo ditselaneng tsa basiami." 
Proverbs2:21 Gonne ba nnete ba tla nna mo lefatsheng; baitekanedi ba tla sadisiwa mo go lone. 
Proverbs2:22 Mme baikepi ba tla nyelediwa mo lefatsheng; balotsana ba tla kumolwa mo go lone. 
Proverbs3:1 Morwaaka, se lebale thuto ya me; a pelo ya gago e tshegetse ditaolo tsa me!" 
Proverbs3:2 Gonne di tla go okeletsa bontsi jwa malatsi le dinyaga tsa bophelo le kagiso. 
Proverbs3:3 A lorato le boammaaruri di se go tlogele, di apare mo molaleng wa gago, o di kwale mo pelong ya gago jaaka mo letlapeng." 
Proverbs3:4 Foo o tla bona bopelonomi le botlhale jo bo molemo tse di kgatlhang Modimo le batho. 
Proverbs3:5 Ikanye Morena ka pelo yotlhe, mme o se ikaege ka tlhaloganyo ya gago." 
Proverbs3:6 Mo gopole mo ditseleng tsotlhe tsa gago, mme ene o tla siamisa ditselana tsa gago." 
Proverbs3:7 Se ikae yo o botlhale ka wesi, mme o boife Morena, o ile bosula." 
Proverbs3:8 Go dira jalo go tla fodisa mmele wa gago, go lapolosa marapo a gago." 
Proverbs3:9 Tlotla Morena ka dineo tsa khumo ya gago le tsa letlhafula la kotulo yotlhe ya gago. 
Proverbs3:10 Foo difala tsa gago di tla tlala letlotlo; digatelo tsa gago di tla tshologa matute a moweine. 
Proverbs3:11 Morwaaka, se nyatse kotlo ya Morena; le gona o se kgopisiwe ke kgalemelo ya gagwe." 
Proverbs3:12 Gonne Morena o a tle a otle yo a mo ratang, jaaka rraagwe motho a betsa ngwana yo o mo kgatlhang." 
Proverbs3:13 Go tlhogonolo motho yo o bonyeng botlhale le monna yo o bonang tlhaloganyo. 
Proverbs3:14 Go bo bona go gaisa go bona selefera; go nna najo go phala gouta. 
Proverbs3:15 Bo na le tlhwatlhwa e kgolo bogolo go dibaga tsa korale. Dilo tse dintle tsotlhe ga di lekane najo. 
Proverbs3:16 Boleele jwa bophelo bo mo seatleng sa jona se se jang; mo go sa molema sa jona go na le khumo le tlotlo. 
Proverbs3:17 Ditsela tsa jona ke ditsela tse dintle; ditselana tsotlhe tsa jona ke tsa kagiso. 
Proverbs3:18 Botlhale ke setlhare sa bophelo mo go ba ba bo tshwereng; ba ba itshwarelelang ka jona ba tlhogonolo. 
Proverbs3:19 Morena o theile lefatshe ka botlhale; a tlhomamisa legodimo ka tlhaloganyo. 
Proverbs3:20 Ke ka kitso ya gagwe, fa madiba a tswela, fa maru a rothisa monyo." 
Proverbs3:21 Morwaaka, boloka kelelelo le kakanyo; a di se tloge mo matlhong a gago!" 
Proverbs3:22 Tsona di tla phedisa mowa wa gago; tsona e tla nna mokgabo o montle mo molaleng wa gago. 
Proverbs3:23 Foo ò tla tsamaya mo tseleng ya gago ò iketlile; leoto la gago ga le ne le kgotšwa. 
Proverbs3:24 Fa o ya go robala ga o ka ke wa boifa. Fa o robetse, boroko jwa gago bo tla nna monate." 
Proverbs3:25 Ga o na go boifa poitshego ya tshoganyetso, le fa e le tatlhego ya baikepi, fa e tla." 
Proverbs3:26 Gonne ke Morena yo ò mo ikanyang; o tla disa leoto la gago gore le se tshwarwe. 
Proverbs3:27 Se time ba ba tshwanetsweng ke tse di molemo, fa go le mo thateng ya gago go ba thusa." 
Proverbs3:28 Se ree mongwe-ka-wena o a re: “Tsamaya o tla boa! Ke tla se go naya kamoso!” etswe o na naso. 
Proverbs3:29 Se logele mongwe-ka-wena maano a a bosula a ntse a agile nao a go ikantse. 
Proverbs3:30 O se ka wa seka le motho kwa ntle ga lebaka, fa a sa go direla bosula bope!" 
Proverbs3:31 Se fufegele monna yo o dirang ka tshiamololo, se itlhophele tsela epe ya ditsela tsa gagwe!" 
Proverbs3:32 Gonne Morena o tenwa ke yo o kgopo, mme o kopana le ba nnete." 
Proverbs3:33 Morena o rogaka ntlo ya moikepi, mme lelapa la basiami o a le tshegofatsa." 
Proverbs3:34 Ba e leng basotli o tla ba sotla; mme ba ba ikokobetsang o tla ba tlhomogela pelo. 
Proverbs3:35 Boswa jwa ba ba botlhale ke tlotlo, mme masilo a tla sala le ditlhong." 
Proverbs4:1 Banaka, utlwang thuto ya ga rraeno, lo ele tlhoko gore lo lemoge tlhaloganyo!" 
Proverbs4:2 Gonne ke lo naya thuto e e molemo; se tlogeleng molao wa me! 
Proverbs4:3 E rile ke nna le rre ke le mosimane, ke le tlekeetso, ke le ngwana-o-esi wa ga mme," 
Proverbs4:4 rre a nthuta a nthaya a re: “Pelo ya gago a e tshole mafoko a me; boloka ditaolo tsa me, foo o tla phela." 
Proverbs4:5 Batla botlhale, batla tlhaloganyo; se di lebale, se fapoge mo mafokong a molomo wa me." 
Proverbs4:6 Se bo tlogele, bo tla go disa; bo rate, bo tla go boloka!" 
Proverbs4:7 Botlhale bo phala dilo tsotlhe, ka moo he: Batla botlhale! ntsha tsotlhe tse o di ruileng, o reke tlhaloganyo." 
Proverbs4:8 Bo godise, bo tla go godisa; bo tla go tlotla, fa o bo tlamparela." 
Proverbs4:9 Bo tla rwesa tlhogo ya gago serwalo se sentle; bo go naya mokgabo wa serwalo sa bogosi.” 
Proverbs4:10 Ngwanaka, reetsa o amogele mafoko a me, foo dinyaga tsa bophelo di tla go ntsifalela." 
Proverbs4:11 Ke go ruta tsela ya botlhale, ke go tsamaisa mo metlhaleng ya nnete." 
Proverbs4:12 Fa o tsamaya, dikgato tsa gago ga di nke di khutshwafadiwa; fa o siana, ga o nke o kgotšwa." 
Proverbs4:13 Kgomarela thuto. O se ka wa e lesa. E boloke. Gonne yona ke bophelo jwa gago. 
Proverbs4:14 Se wele mo tseleng ya baikepi, o se sepele ka mokgwa wa ba ba bosula." 
Proverbs4:15 E tlhokomologe, se tsamae mo go yona; fapoga mo go yona, o iphetele." 
Proverbs4:16 Gonne ga ba robale ba ise ba senye; ba tlhoka boroko, fa ba ise ba dige motho." 
Proverbs4:17 Gonne ba ja bogobe jwa boikepo, ba nwa weine ya dikgatelelo." 
Proverbs4:18 Tselana ya basiami e tshwana le lesedi la mahube le le ntseng le oketsegela pele go ya motshegareng o mogolo. 
Proverbs4:19 Mme tsela ya baikepi e tshwana le lefifi; ga ba itse gore ba tla kgotšwa ke eng. 
Proverbs4:20 Morwaaka, reetsa mafoko a me, sekegela dipolelo tsa me tsebe." 
Proverbs4:21 A di se tloge mo matlhong a gago; di boloke mo pelong ya gago. 
Proverbs4:22 Gonne di phedisa ba ba di bonang; di ba fodisa mmele otlhe. 
Proverbs4:23 Disa pelo ya gago bogolo go tsotlhe tse di ka disiwang; gonne bophelo bo tswa mo go yona. 
Proverbs4:24 Bolotsana jwa molomo bo tlose mo go wena; tsietso ya loleme e katologanye nao. 
Proverbs4:25 A matlho a gago a lebelele kwa pele! A dintshi tsa matlho a gago di lebe tse di fa pele ga gago. 
Proverbs4:26 Lolamisa motlhala wa dinao tsa gago. A ditsela tsotlhe tsa gago e nne tse di laotsweng. 
Proverbs4:27 Se fapogele ntlheng ya le le jang, le fa e le ya la molema; tshabisa maoto a gago bosula." 
Proverbs5:1 Ngwanaka, botlhale jwa me o bo ele tlhoko; tlhaloganyo ya me o e sekegele tsebe" 
Proverbs5:2 gore o boloke kelelelo, mme molomo wa gago o boloke kitso." 
Proverbs5:3 Gonne molomo wa mosadi o sele o rothisa mafura a dinotshe; magalapa a gagwe a borethe bogolo go lookwane. 
Proverbs5:4 Mme la bofelo o galaka jaaka longana; o bogale jaaka tšhaka e e magale-mabedi. 
Proverbs5:5 Maoto a gagwe a fologela kwa losong; dikgato tsa gagwe di ntse di atamela felo ga baswi. 
Proverbs5:6 Ditselana tsa gagwe ke tsa go kgarakgatshega a sa itse gore a se ka a tlhamalela mo tseleng ya bophelo. 
Proverbs5:7 Mme jaanong, banaka, nkutlweng; se tlogeleng mafoko a molomo wa me!" 
Proverbs5:8 A tsela ya gago e nne kgakala nae; se atamele mojako wa ntlo ya gagwe. 
Proverbs5:9 E se re gongwe wa naya ba bangwe thata ya bošwa jwa gago, le e seng go naya mosadi yo o setlhogo dinyaga tsa gago," 
Proverbs5:10 e se re gongwe ba bangwe ba kgora ka thata ya gago le ka tse o di bonyeng ka matsapa, tsa ya mo ntlong ya motho o sele." 
Proverbs5:11 E se re gongwe mo bokhutlong jwa gago, fa go fela mmele wa gago le nama ya gago, o a fegelwa," 
Proverbs5:12 o a re: “Joo nna wee! Ke ne ke reng, fa ke ila thuto; fa pelo ya me e nyatsa kgalemelo," 
Proverbs5:13 fa ke sa utlwe mantswe a baruti ba me fa ke sa sekegele ba ba nthutang tsebe! 
Proverbs5:14 Ke batlile go wela gotlhe mo tatlhegong, ke le mo gare ga batho le phuthego!”" 
Proverbs5:15 Nnyaya! Nwaa metsi a sediba sa gago, a a tswelang mo motsweding wa gago." 
Proverbs5:16 A o a re, metswedi ya gago e tshologele kwa ntle; dinokana tsa metsi tsa gago di ele mo dipatlelong?" 
Proverbs5:17 Nnyaya! A e nne tsa gago o le nosi, e seng tsa ba bangwe nao!" 
Proverbs5:18 A motswedi wa gago o tshegofale; o itumelele mosadi wa bošwa jwa gago o le nosi. 
Proverbs5:19 O a ratega jaaka tshephe e namagadi, o montle jaaka mofele o monamagadi. A bontle jwa gagwe bo go lapolose ka metlha, wena o nne o itumele ka lorato lwa gagwe." 
Proverbs5:20 Morwaaka, o ratelang go kgatlhwa ke mosadi o sele? O ka tlamparela jang mosadi yo e seng wa gago?" 
Proverbs5:21 Gonne ditsela tsa mongwe le mongwe di bonwa ke matlho a Morena; o ntse a tlhokomela metlhala yotlhe ya gagwe. 
Proverbs5:22 Moikepi o tla tshwarwa ka melato ya gagwe, a golegwa ka megala ya boleo jwa gagwe." 
Proverbs5:23 O tla swa ka go sa rutega, a latlhega ka bosilo jo bogolo jwa gagwe." 
Proverbs6:1 Ngwanaka, fa o ipofile wa re, ke tla lefa molato wa mongwe-ka-nna; fa o ipofile ka go neelana diatla le moeng," 
Proverbs6:2 fa o itlamile ka mafoko a molomo wa gago; fa o tshwerwe ka dipolelo tsa molomo wa gago," 
Proverbs6:3 dira jaana, ngwanaka gore o ikgolole, gonne o wetse mo diatleng tsa mongwe-ka-wena: Yaa o ikokobetse, o kokotlele mongwe-ka-wena thata!" 
Proverbs6:4 Tima matlho a gago boroko, se dumelele dintshi tsa gago go otsela." 
Proverbs6:5 O falole jaaka phudufudu mo seatleng sa motsomi le jaaka nonyane mo seatleng sa mothaisi wa yona. 
Proverbs6:6 Motlapa, yaa kwa tshoswaneng, o bone mekgwa ya yona, o tlhalefe!" 
Proverbs6:7 Le fa e se na kgosana le e seng mokwaledi gongwe molaodi," 
Proverbs6:8 e etleetsa dijo tsa yona selemo, e kgobokanya dijo tsa yona fa go kotulwa." 
Proverbs6:9 Wena setshwakga, o tla robala go fitlha leng? O tla tsoga leng mo borokong?" 
Proverbs6:10 O a re: “Ke ya go robala go le gonnye, ke otsela go le gonnye, ke phutha diatla go le gonnye go ikhutsa.”" 
Proverbs6:11 Mme khumanego ya gago e tla tla jaaka senokwane le lehuma la gago jaaka motlhabani. 
Proverbs6:12 Yo o tsamayang ka bolotsana jwa molomo ke motho yo o se nang mosola; ga se monna wa sepe. 
Proverbs6:13 O gwetlha ka matlho, a bontshe ka maoto, a supe ka menwana," 
Proverbs6:14 a loge maano a bolotsana mo pelong ya gagwe a a bosula ka metlha yotlhe, a lotlhanye batho." 
Proverbs6:15 Ene yoo tatlhego e tla mo wela ka tshoganyetso, o tla pšhwetlwa ka ponyo ya leitlho, go se na se se ka mo thusang." 
Proverbs6:16 Dilo di le thataro Morena o di tlhoile, tse supa ke maila mo go ene:" 
Proverbs6:17 Ke matlho a boikgantsho le loleme lwa maaka le diatla tse di tshololang madi a a se nang molato 
Proverbs6:18 le pelo e e logang maano a bolotsana le maoto a a itlhaganelelang kwa bosuleng 
Proverbs6:19 le mosupi wa kako yo o bolelang maaka le yo o losang bana ba motho. 
Proverbs6:20 Ngwanaka, boloka taolo ya ga rraago; se latlhe thuto ya ga mmaago." 
Proverbs6:21 Di golegelele mo pelong ya gago ka metlha, o di apare mo molaleng wa gago." 
Proverbs6:22 A di go pate, fa o tsamaya; di go sireletse, fa o robala; di bue nao, fa o thanya." 
Proverbs6:23 Gonne taolo ke lobone, thuto ke lesedi; dikgalemelo tsa thuto ke tsela ya bophelo" 
Proverbs6:24 gore di go thibose mo mosading yo o bosula le mo boretheng jwa loleme lwa mosadi wa yo mongwe. 
Proverbs6:25 Se eletse bontle jwa gagwe ka pelo ya gago; le gona a a se ka a go gapa ka dintshi tsa matlho a gagwe. 
Proverbs6:26 Gonne mosadi wa seaka o humanegisa motho, mme mosadi wa monna yo mongwe o tsoma bophelo jo bo rategang." 
Proverbs6:27 A motho o ka lokela molelo mo kgwatlheng ya gagwe, diaparo tsa gagwe di sa šwe?" 
Proverbs6:28 Gongwe a motho o ka gata magala, mme a se ka a šwa dinao?" 
Proverbs6:29 Yo o tsenang kwa mosading wa mongwe-ka-ene o ntse jalo; mongwe le mongwe yo o mo amang ga a ka ke a falola mo petsong. 
Proverbs6:30 Legodu ga le nyatsege, fa le utswa gore le kgorise keletso ya lone, fa le bolawa ke tlala." 
Proverbs6:31 Fa le tshwarwa, le ka lefa gasupa; le ka ntsha dithoto tsotlhe tsa ntlo ya lone." 
Proverbs6:32 Mme yo o senyang nyalo le mosadi o sele o a tsenwa; go dira ene fela yo o ratang go itshenyetsa bophelo. 
Proverbs6:33 O tla kgwatha ka ditlhong; nyatsego ya gagwe ke e e sa phimolweng. 
Proverbs6:34 Gonne fa bogale jwa monna e le jwa lefufa, ga a kitla a rekegela ka letsatsi la pusoloso;" 
Proverbs6:35 ga a nke a go itshwarela, le fa o ntsha tefa; ga a nke a diga pelo, le fa o ntsha dineo tse dintsi." 
Proverbs7:1 Ngwanaka, se lebale mafoko a me; ipolokele ditaolo tsa me." 
Proverbs7:2 Tshegetsa ditaolo tsa me, foo o tla phela, le molao wa me jaaka thaka ya leitlho la gago." 
Proverbs7:3 Di bofelele mo menwaneng ya gago, o di kwale mo letlapeng la pelo ya gago." 
Proverbs7:4 Raya botlhale o re: “O kgaitsadiake;” bitsa tlhaloganyo wa ga eno 
Proverbs7:5 gore di go fapose mosadi o sele yo e seng wa gago, wa mafoko a a borethe." 
Proverbs7:6 Gonne nkile ka okomela ka fenstere le ka phatlha ya lobota," 
Proverbs7:7 ka bona lekau mo go ba ba sa tlhalefang; ka lemoga lesilo mo makolwaneng 
Proverbs7:8 le feta le mmila gaufi le sekhutlo sa mosadi yole, le tsamaya mo tseleng e e fetang fa ntlong ya gagwe," 
Proverbs7:9 ka lotlatlana, ka maabanyane, ka nako ya bosigo le lefifi." 
Proverbs7:10 Bonang, ke fa mosadi yole a le kgatlhantsha, a apere diaparo tsa boaka, a le pelo e bolotsana;" 
Proverbs7:11 a ipapatsa, a itaola; dinao tsa gagwe tsa tlhoka boikhutso mo ntlong ya gagwe." 
Proverbs7:12 Jaanong o mo mmileng, kgantele o mo dipatlelong, o lalela mo dikhutlong tsotlhe." 
Proverbs7:13 Sule! O tshwere lekau lele, o a le atla; o bolela le lone, a se na ditlhong, a re:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Ke ne ke tlamegile go tlhaba ditlhabelo tsa tebogo; kajeno ke dirafaditse maikano a me. 
Proverbs7:15 Ke ka moo ke duleng go go kgatlhantsha le go go batla, mme jaanong ke go bonye." 
Proverbs7:16 Ke adile bolao jwa me ka dikobo le ka masela a a mebalabala a mantle a Egepeto. 
Proverbs7:17 Ke gasitse marobalo a me ka mera le mekgwapha le kinamone tse di nkgang monate. 
Proverbs7:18 Tlaya, a re tlhapelwe ka lorato go fitlha mosong, a re thabisanye ka go ratana!" 
Proverbs7:19 Gonne monna wa me ga a yo mo gae, o ile leetong le leleele." 
Proverbs7:20 Sekgwama sa madi o se tshotse; o tla boela kwano gae ka letsatsi le ngwedi o tlalang ka lone.” 
Proverbs7:21 A le raela jalo, a le kgona ka mafoko a mantsi a gagwe le ka borethe jwa loleme lwa gagwe." 
Proverbs7:22 La mo sala morago ka pele jaaka pholo e isiwa go tlhajwa, jaaka lesilo, fa le golegilwe go ya go otliwa;" 
Proverbs7:23 go fitlhelela motswi o le phololele sebete; jaaka nonyane e itlhaganela go tsena mo serung e sa itse, fa e ya go bolawa." 
Proverbs7:24 Ka moo he, lona banaka, nkutlweng lo tlhokomele mafoko a molomo wa me." 
Proverbs7:25 A pelo ya gago e se ka ya fapogela mo tseleng ya mosadi yoo, ngwanaka, o se ka wa timelela mo ditselaneng tsa gagwe." 
Proverbs7:26 Gonne ba ba bolailweng ba o ba digileng ba bantsi; botlhe ba ba bolailweng ke ene ke bontsi jo bogolo. 
Proverbs7:27 Ntlo ya gagwe ke ditsela tse di yang kwa felong ga baswi, ke tsa go fologela kwa matlwaneng a loso." 
Proverbs8:1 A botlhale ga bo kue? A tlhaloganyo ga e tlhatlose lentswe la yona? 
Proverbs8:2 Bo eme mo mebotong e e okameng tsela le mo makgabaganong a ditselana. 
Proverbs8:3 Bo kua fa thoko ga dikgoro tsa motse; fa pele ga dikgorwana bo kuela godimo bo re: 
Proverbs8:4 “Heelang banna! Ke bitsa lona; lentswe la me le raya lona bana ba batho. 
Proverbs8:5 Lona ba lo sa tlhalefang ithuteng botlhale; lona masilo, ithuteng tlhaloganyo!" 
Proverbs8:6 Utlwang, gonne ke tla bolela dikgang tota, ke tumolola molomo go bua tse di siameng." 
Proverbs8:7 Ee, magalapa a me a bua nnete, mme dipuo tsa boikepo ke maila mo go nna." 
Proverbs8:8 Mafoko otlhe a molomo wa me a siame; ga go na bolotsana le fa e le tshokamo mo go ona. 
Proverbs8:9 A utlwala sentle fela otlhe mo go yo o a tlhaloganyang; yo o bonyeng kitso a re: Ke a nnete. 
Proverbs8:10 Amogelang kgalemelo ya me, mme e seng selefera; le kitso bogolo go gouta e e tlhaotsweng." 
Proverbs8:11 Gonne botlhale bo molemo bogolo go dibaga tsa korale; dilo tse dintle tsotlhe ga di lekane najo. 
Proverbs8:12 Nna Botlhale ke tlwaelanye le Tlhaloganyo; kitso le kelelelo ke na natso. 
Proverbs8:13 Go boifa Morena ke go ila bosula. Ke tlhoile boikgogomoso le boikgodiso le tsamao e e bosula le molomo o o bolotsana. 
Proverbs8:14 Kgakololo le botswerere di mo go nna; ke na le kutlwisiso le thata. 
Proverbs8:15 Dikgosi di busa ka nna; beng ba thata ba baya melao e e siameng ka nna. 
Proverbs8:16 Dikgosana di laola ka nna, le batlotlegi le baatlhodi botlhe ba lefatshe." 
Proverbs8:17 Ke rata ba ba nthatang; ba ba mpatlang ka tlhoafalo ba tla mpona. 
Proverbs8:18 Khumo le tlotlo di mo go nna le leruo le le tlhomameng le tshiamo. 
Proverbs8:19 Leungo la me le gaisa gouta, ee, gouta e e itshekileng; se ke se ruisang motho se phala selefera e e tlhaotsweng." 
Proverbs8:20 Ke sepela mo tseleng ya tshiamo, ke tsamaya ditselana tsa molao fa gare" 
Proverbs8:21 gore ke jese banthati boswa jo bo tlhomameng, ke ba tlaletse matlo a mahumo." 
Proverbs8:22 Morena o ntirile mo tshimologong ya ditsela tsa gagwe, ka nna wa ntlha wa ditiro tsa gagwe bogologolo." 
Proverbs8:23 Ke sa le ke tlholwa kgale mo tshimologong pele ga metlha ya lefatshe. 
Proverbs8:24 E rile go se na mawatle, go se na metswedi e e tletseng metsi, ka tsalwa." 
Proverbs8:25 Ya re dithaba di ise di theiwe, dithota di ise di nne teng, ka tsalwa." 
Proverbs8:26 Ke fa Morena a ise a dire lefatshe le dinaga le fa e le tshimologo ya mebu ya lefatshe. 
Proverbs8:27 Ya re a ala legodimo, ka bo ke le gona; ya re a tlhoma tikologo ya loapi mo godimo ga mawatle" 
Proverbs8:28 ya re a bofelela maru kwa godimo, ya re a tswedisa metswedi ya mawatle thata," 
Proverbs8:29 ya re a beela lewatle molelwane wa lone gore metsi a se ka a tlola taolo ya gagwe ya re a baya metheo ya lefatshe," 
Proverbs8:30 ka bo ke na nae ke le ngwana ka itumela ka letsatsi le letsatsi, ka nna ka tshameka fa pele ga gagwe ka metlha yotlhe." 
Proverbs8:31 Ka tshanoka mo tikologong ya lefatshe la gagwe, ka itumelela baba ba batho." 
Proverbs8:32 Ka moo he, nkutlweng, bomorwaaka; go tlhogonolo ba ba sepelang mo ditseleng tsa me." 
Proverbs8:33 Utlwang thuto, lo tlhalefe; lo se ka lwa e tlhokomologa." 
Proverbs8:34 Go sego motho yo o nkutlwang, a leta fa dikgorong tsa me ka malatsi otlhe, a disa mepakwana ya mejako ya me." 
Proverbs8:35 Gonne yo o mponang o bona bophelo, a itumelelwa ke Morena." 
Proverbs8:36 Mme yo o mphosang o a itshenyetsa ka esi; botlhe ba ba ntlhoileng ba rata loso.” 
Proverbs9:1 Botlhale bo agile ntlo ya jona, jwa emisa maotwana a yona a supa," 
Proverbs9:2 jwa tlhaba dikgomo tsa jona, jwa tlhakanya weine ya jona, jwa baakanya lomati lwa bojelo lwa jona," 
Proverbs9:3 jwa roma basetsana ba jona, ba laletsa ba le fa mobotong e e okameng motse ba re:" 
Proverbs9:4 “Yo o sa tlhalefang, a a tle kwano!” Yo o se nang tlhaloganyo bo mo raya bo re:" 
Proverbs9:5 “Tlayang lo je dijo tsa me, lo nwe weine e ke e tlhakantseng!" 
Proverbs9:6 Tlogelang bosilo gore lo phele; lo sepele mo tseleng ya tlhaloganyo.” 
Proverbs9:7 Yo o kgalemelang mosotli o iponna ditlhong fela; yo o bolelelang moikepi nnete o itshela sebala sa gagwe. 
Proverbs9:8 Se kgalemele mosotli, e se re gongwe a go tlhoa; kgalemela yo o botlhale, o tla go rata." 
Proverbs9:9 Naya yo o botlhale, o tla tlhalefela pele; ruta mosiami, o tla rutegela pele." 
Proverbs9:10 Tshimologo ya botlhale ke go boifa Morena; go itse Moitshepi ke yona tlhaloganyo. 
Proverbs9:11 Gonne malatsi a gago a tla ntsifala ka nna; o tla okelediwa dinyaga tsa bophelo ke nna. 
Proverbs9:12 Fa o le botlhale, o tla thusega ka jona; fa o sotlile o tla rwala molato o le wesi." 
Proverbs9:13 Mosadi yo o bidiwang Bosilo o a tlhodia, o a raela; ga a itse ditlhong." 
Proverbs9:14 O ntse fa mojakong wa ntlo ya gagwe mo sedulong kwa mebotong ya motse 
Proverbs9:15 gore a laletse ba ba fetang mo tseleng, ba ba tlhamaletseng mo ditselaneng tsa bone, a re:" 
Proverbs9:16 “Yo o sa tlhalefang a a tle kwano!” Yo o se nang tlhaloganyo a mo raya a re: 
Proverbs9:17 “Metsi a a utswitsweng a monate; senkgwe sa sephiri se a natefa.” 
Proverbs9:18 Mme yo o sa tlhalefang ga a itse fa baswi ba le gona; fa ba ba laleditsweng ke ene Bosilo ba le kwa matennye a felo ga baswi. 
Proverbs10:1 Diane tsa ga Salomo. Ngwana yo o botlhale o itumedisa rraagwe, mme ngwana yo o bosilo o hutsafatsa mmaagwe." 
Proverbs10:2 Dikhumo tsa tshiamololo ga di thuse sepe, mme tshiamo e golola mo losong." 
Proverbs10:3 Morena ga a bolaise mosiami tlala, mme keletso ya moikepi o e kgoromeletsa kwa morago." 
Proverbs10:4 Seatla sa motlapa se a humanegisa, mme diatla tsa ba ba tlhaga di a humisa."
