Proverbs10:5 Ngwana yo o maatlametlo o phutha dijo selemong. Yo o robalang go kotulwa ke yo o tlhabisang ditlhong. 
Proverbs10:6 Masego a mo tlhogong ya mosiami, mme melomo ya baikepi e fitlha kgatelelo." 
Proverbs10:7 Go gakologelwa mosiami go tshegofatsa matlho, mme leina la baikepi le a nyelela." 
Proverbs10:8 Yo o pelo e botlhale o amogela ditaolo, mme yo o molomo o bosilo o tla digwa." 
Proverbs10:9 Yo o sepelang ka boitekanelo o tsamaya a le mo tshireletsong; yo o sokamisang ditsela tsa gagwe o tla lemogiwa. 
Proverbs10:10 Yo o tswitlang ka leitlho o tsisa bohutsana; mme yo o kgalemelang molato a sa tshabe motho o dira kagiso. 
Proverbs10:11 Molomo wa mosiami ke motswedi wa bophelo; mme melomo ya baikepi e fitlha kgatelelo. 
Proverbs10:12 Letlhoo le tsosa phapaang, mme lorato lo bipa maleo otlhe." 
Proverbs10:13 Go fitlhelwa botlhale mo molomong wa motlhalefi, mme thupa e tshwanetse motlhana wa yo o se nang tlhaloganyo." 
Proverbs10:14 Ba ba botlhale ba ipolokela kitso, mme molomo wa seeleele o atametsa tlalelo." 
Proverbs10:15 Tse mohumi o nang natso ke motse o o thata wa gagwe; mme tatlhego ya ba ba botlana ke khumanego ya bone. 
Proverbs10:16 Tse mosiami o di itiretseng di a mo phedisa; tse moikepi o di bonang di a mo leofisa. 
Proverbs10:17 Yo o elang kotlo tlhoko o mo tseleng e e yang mo bophelong; mme yo o tlhokomologang kgalemelo o a timela. 
Proverbs10:18 Melomo ya maaka e fitlha letlhoo, moutlwatsa-tshele ke lesilo." 
Proverbs10:19 Bontsi jwa mafoko ga bo tlhoke boleo, mme yo o itshwarang molomo o botlhale." 
Proverbs10:20 Loleme lwa mosiami ke selefera e e tlhaotsweng; tlhaloganyo ya moikepi ga se ya sepe. 
Proverbs10:21 Molomo wa mosiami o jesa ba bantsi, mme dieleele di tla swa ka go tlhoka tlhaloganyo." 
Proverbs10:22 Tshegofatso ya Morena ke yona e e humisang; matsapa a motho ga a e okeletse sepe. 
Proverbs10:23 Go dira tse di tlhabisang ditlhong go kgatlha seeleele; mme monna yo o nang le tlhaloganyo o kgatlhwa ke botlhale. 
Proverbs10:24 Se moikepi o se tshabang se tla mo wela; se basiami ba se eletsang Modimo o tla se ba naya. 
Proverbs10:25 E a re fa ledimo le feta, moikepi a ye le lone; mme mosiami o theilwe mo motheong o o sa khutleng." 
Proverbs10:26 Tse botlha bo di dirang mo menong, tse musi o di dirang mo matlhong, ke tse motlapa o di direlang ba ba mo romileng." 
Proverbs10:27 Go boifa Morena go oketsa malatsi a bophelo; mme dinyaga tsa baikepi di tla fokodiwa. 
Proverbs10:28 Tsholofelo ya basiami e isa mo boitumelong; tse baikepi ba di letileng di a nyelela. 
Proverbs10:29 Tsela ya Morena ke phemelo ya morapedi, mme e isa badiri ba boithamako mo tatlhegong." 
Proverbs10:30 Mosiami ga a kitla a reketla ka bosakhutleng, mme baikepi ga ba kitla ba nnela ruri mo lefatsheng." 
Proverbs10:31 Molomo wa mosiami o tlhogisa botlhale, mme loleme lwa bolotsana lo tla kumolwa." 
Proverbs10:32 Molomo wa mosiami o itse tse di natefang; melomo ya baikepi e itse tsa bolotsana fela. 
Proverbs11:1 Selekanyetso sa go tsietsa ke maila mo Moreneng; mme seelo se se lekanyeng se a mo kgatlha. 
Proverbs11:2 Boikgantsho bo bapile le ditlhong, mme botlhale bo mo go ba ba ikokobetsang." 
Proverbs11:3 Poifo-Modimo ya batho ba nnete e ba etelela pele, mme bolotsana jwa ba ba se nang boikanyo bo tla ba isa tatlhegong." 
Proverbs11:4 Di-tsa-motho ga di thuse ka letsatsi la bogale, mme tshiamo e golola mo losong." 
Proverbs11:5 Tshiamo ya mmoifi-Modimo e tla baakanya tsela ya gagwe, mme moikepi o tla wa ka boikepo jwa gagwe." 
Proverbs11:6 Tshiamo ya batho ba nnete e tla ba pholosa, mme ba ba se nang boikanyo ba tla tshwarwa ka keletso ya bone." 
Proverbs11:7 E a re fa moikepi a swa, tsholofelo ya gagwe e nyelele; tse masilo a di lebeletseng di senyege." 
Proverbs11:8 Fa mosiami a ntshiwa mo tlalelong, moikepi o tsena mo boemong jwa gagwe." 
Proverbs11:9 Yo o pelompe o senya mongwe-ka-ene ka molomo, mme basiami ba pholosiwa ka kitso." 
Proverbs11:10 E a re fa basiami ba phela sentle, motse o duduetse; e re baikepi ba nyelela, go nne tuduetso." 
Proverbs11:11 Motse o gola ka tshegofatso ya batho ba nnete, mme o rutlwa ka melomo ya baikepi." 
Proverbs11:12 Yo o se nang tlhaloganyo o nyatsa mongwe-ka-ene, mme monna wa kelelelo o a didimala." 
Proverbs11:13 Yo o senyang ba bangwe leina o bolela tsa sephiri, mme yo o mowa o ikanyegang o a di loba." 
Proverbs11:14 Mo go se nang bogogi jo bo siameng morafe o a latlhega, mme o thusega, fa go le bagakolodi ba bantsi." 
Proverbs11:15 Fa motho a ipofa go emela molato wa yo mongwe, o tla direlwa bosula thata; mme yo o ilang kemelo o tla iketla." 
Proverbs11:16 Mosadi yo o pelontle o tla bona tlotlego, mme mosadi yo o ilang nnete o bona sedulo sa nyatsego." 
Proverbs11:17 Yo o lorato o itirela molemo ka esi; yo o setlhogo o itshenyetsa ka esi. 
Proverbs11:18 Moikepi o itirela khumo ya tsietso, mme yo o jwalang tsa tshiamo o bona tuelo ya nnete." 
Proverbs11:19 Tshiamo ya nnete e isa mo bophelong, mme yo o sianelang boikepo o sianela losong." 
Proverbs11:20 Ba ba pelo di kgopo ba tena Morena, mme ba tsamao e e itekanetseng ba a mo kgatlha." 
Proverbs11:21 Ruri, yo o bosula ga a nke a tlhoka petso, mme losika lwa basiami lo tla falola." 
Proverbs11:22 Mosadi yo montle yo o se nang maitseo o tshwana le lenyena la gouta mo nkong ya kolobe. 
Proverbs11:23 Tse basiami ba di eletsang ke tse di molemo fela; tse baikepi ba di lebeletseng ke kotlo e e bogale. 
Proverbs11:24 Go na le ba ba abelang ba bangwe thata, mme ba okelediwa leruo; go ba ba bolokang tsa bone go feta tshwanelo, mme ba ya lehumeng." 
Proverbs11:25 Yo o ratang go tshegofatsa ba bangwe o tla lapolosiwa ka esi; yo o nosang ba bangwe le ene o tla nosiwa. 
Proverbs11:26 Yo o ganang ka mabele o hutsiwa ke batho; mme lesego le tla okama yo o a rekisang. 
Proverbs11:27 Yo o tlhoafalelang tse di molemo o ipatlela natefo, mme yo o batlang bosula o tla ipolaya ka jona." 
Proverbs11:28 Yo o ikanyang khumo ya gagwe o tla tlhotlhorega, mme basiami ba tla tlhoga jaaka matlhare." 
Proverbs11:29 Yo o dubakanyang ntlo ya gagwe o tla rua phefo; lesilo e tla nna motlhanka wa yo o pelo e botlhale. 
Proverbs11:30 Leungo la mosiami ke setlhare sa bophelo yo o kgonang mewa ya batho o botlhale. 
Proverbs11:31 Bonang, mosiami o tla bona tuelo mo lefatsheng; moikepi le moleofi le bone ba tla bona ya bone e e botlhoko." 
Proverbs12:1 Yo o ratang kotlo o rata kitso. Yo o ilang kgalemelo ke seeleele. 
Proverbs12:2 Morena o kgatlhwa ke yo o molemo, mme o latlha mologa-maano-a-bosula." 
Proverbs12:3 Motho ga a kitla a tlhomama ka boikepo, mme medi ya basiami ga e nke e kumolwa." 
Proverbs12:4 Mosadi yo o maatlametlo ke serwalo sa monna wa gagwe; mme yo o tlhabisang ditlhong o tshwana le go tlhotlhona ga marapo a gagwe. 
Proverbs12:5 Megopolo ya basiami e batla tshiamo, mme maano a baikepi ke a tsietso." 
Proverbs12:6 Mafoko a baikepi ke a go lalela madi a basiami, mme melomo ya ba nnete e a ba pholosa." 
Proverbs12:7 Baikepi ba tla ribegediwa ba tlosiwa; mme matlo a basiami a ntse a eme. 
Proverbs12:8 Monna o bokwa go lekana le kitso ya gagwe, mme yo o pelo e kgopo o tla nyatsega." 
Proverbs12:9 Yo mmotlana, fa a itirela, o phala yo o ikgodisang, mme a tlhoka bogobe." 
Proverbs12:10 Mosiami o na le pelo le mo diruiweng tsa gagwe, mme maikutlo a baikepi a setlhogo." 
Proverbs12:11 Yo o lemang tshimo ya gagwe o tla kgora bogobe; mme yo o latelang tse di se nang mosola ga a na tlhaloganyo. 
Proverbs12:12 Moikepi o eletsa go tsoma dilo tse di bosula, mme medi ya basiami e tla ntsha maungo." 
Proverbs12:13 Boleo jwa molomo ke seru se se kotsi; mme mosiami o falola mo tlalelong. 
Proverbs12:14 Motho o tla kgora tse di molemo tsa leungo la molomo wa gagwe; tiro ya diatla tsa motho e tla boela kwa go ene. 
Proverbs12:15 Tsela ya lesilo e lolame mo matlhong a lone, mme go botlhale yo o amogelang kgakololo." 
Proverbs12:16 Lesilo le bontsha go ngala ga lone ka pele, mme yo o itshwereng pila o fitlha kgopisego." 
Proverbs12:17 Yo o bolelang tse e leng tsona o bua tse di tlhomameng; mme mosupi wa maaka o bua tsa tsietso. 
Proverbs12:18 Go na le ba ba buabuang mafoko a a tlhabang jaaka tšhaka, mme diteme tsa ba ba botlhale di a fodisa." 
Proverbs12:19 Molomo wa boammaaruri o tla tlhomama ka bosakhutleng, mme loleme lwa maaka ke lwa ponyo ya leitlho fela." 
Proverbs12:20 Tsietso e mo pelong tsa ba ba akanyang bosula, mme ba ba rerang kagiso ba na le boitumelo." 
Proverbs12:21 Mosiami ga a welwe ke tatlhego epe, mme ba ditlalelo di ba welang ka bontsi ke baikepi." 
Proverbs12:22 Melomo e e akang e tena Morena, mme ba ba dirang ka boammaaruri ba a mo kgatlha." 
Proverbs12:23 Motho yo o itshwereng sentle o loba kitso, mme pelo tsa masilo di kua tsa bosilo." 
Proverbs12:24 Diatla tsa batlhoafadi di tla laola, mme botlapa bo isa botlhankeng." 
Proverbs12:25 Tshwenyego mo pelong ya monna e a e imela; mme lefoko la lorato le a e thabisa. 
Proverbs12:26 Mosiami o itse se se mo phedisang, mme tsela ya baikepi e a ba timetsa." 
Proverbs12:27 Setshwakga ga se bone se se se tsomang, mme khumo e kgolo ke ya monna wa motlhoafadi." 
Proverbs12:28 Bophelo bo mo tseleng ya tshiamo, mme tsela e e sokameng e isa losong." 
Proverbs13:1 Ngwana yo o botlhale o laiwa ke rraagwe, mme mosotli ga a rate kgalemelo." 
Proverbs13:2 Motho o tla ja tse di monate tsa leungo la molomo wa gagwe, mme balotsana ba eletsa kgatelelo fela." 
Proverbs13:3 Yo o disang molomo wa gagwe o ipolokela bophelo; mmalabadi o tla wela theregong. 
Proverbs13:4 Motlapa o eletsa tse dintsi, mme ga a bone sepe; tse batlhoafadi ba di eletsang ba di bona ka botlalo." 
Proverbs13:5 Mosiami o tlhoa puo ya maaka, mme moikepi o nyefola ba bangwe, a itlhabisa ditlhong." 
Proverbs13:6 Tshiamo e boloka wa tsamao e e molemo, mme boleo bo diga baikepi." 
Proverbs13:7 Go na le yo o ipayang mohumi, le fa a se na sepe, le yo o ipayang mohumanegi, le fa a na le leruo le legolo." 
Proverbs13:8 Serekololo sa bophelo jwa motho ke khumo ya gagwe; mme motlhoki ga a utlwe go bôpêlwa. 
Proverbs13:9 Lesedi la mosiami le tuka sentle, mme dipone tsa baikepi di tla tima." 
Proverbs13:10 Ka boikgodiso go tsosiwa kgang fela, mme ba ba amogelang kgakololo ba botlhale." 
Proverbs13:11 Leruo le le bonwang ka boithamako le tla ngotlega, mme yo o le kgobokanyang ka tiro ya diatla o tla le ntsifatsa." 
Proverbs13:12 Tsholofelo e e diegang e lwatsa pelo, mme keletso e e dirafetseng ke setlhare sa bophelo." 
Proverbs13:13 Yo o nyatsang lefoko la Modimo, dipetso tsa lone di tla mo wela, mme yo o boifang taolo o tla fiwa tuelo." 
Proverbs13:14 Thuto ya letlhale ke motswedi wa bophelo gore motho a falole mo dirung tsa loso. 
Proverbs13:15 Kelelelo e e molemo e a kgatlhisa, mme tsela ya balotsana e ba isa mo tatlhegong." 
Proverbs13:16 Motlhalefi o dira tsotlhe ka kitso, mme seeleele se phatlalatsa bosilo." 
Proverbs13:17 Morongwi wa boikepo o tlhokisa boikhutso, mme morongwi yo o ikanyegang o tlisa namatshego." 
Proverbs13:18 Khumanego le nyatsego ke tsa yo o nyatsang thuto, mme yo o tlhokomelang kgalemelo o tla tlotlega." 
Proverbs13:19 Keletso e e dirafetseng e monate mo pelong mme go tshaba bosula go tena masilo. 
Proverbs13:20 Kopana le matlhale gore o tlhalefe; mme yo o tlwaelanang le masilo o tla nna bosula. 
Proverbs13:21 Tatlhego e latelela baleofi, mme Modimo o duela basiami ka tse di molemo." 
Proverbs13:22 Yo o molemo o tlogelela bana ba bana boswa, mme dithoto tsa moleofi di bolokelwa mosiami." 
Proverbs13:23 Tshimo e badidi ba e kgathileng e ntsha dijo tse dintsi; mme go na le ba ba latlhegang ka tshiamololo. 
Proverbs13:24 Yo o rekegelang thupa o tlhoile morwawe; yo o mo ratang o a tle a mo otle. 
Proverbs13:25 Mosiami o a ja a ba a kgore mme dimpa tsa baikepi di tla tlhoka di nna logaba. 
Proverbs14:1 Mma-botlhale o agile ntlo ya gagwe, mme mma-bosilo o e rutla ka diatla tsa gagwe." 
Proverbs14:2 Yo o sepelang mo tshiamong ya gagwe o boifa Morena, mme yo o fapogileng tsela o a mo nyatsa." 
Proverbs14:3 Thupa ya moikgantshi ke molomo wa gagwe, mme melomo ya matlhale e disa beng ba yona." 
Proverbs14:4 Fa dipholo di se teng, mogopo o lolea; mme kotulo e kgolo e bonwa ka thata ya dipholo." 
Proverbs14:5 Mosupi yo o ikanyegang ga a ake, mme mosupi wa tsietso o bua maaka fela." 
Proverbs14:6 Mosotli o batla botlhale, mme ga a bo bone; wa kelelelo ene o bo bona ka botlhofo." 
Proverbs14:7 Tlogela monna wa lesilo; gonne o tlhokile molomo wa kitso mo go ene. 
Proverbs14:8 Botlhale jwa yo o tlhalefileng ke go disa tsamao ya gagwe, mme bosilo jwa dieleele ke tsietsego fela." 
Proverbs14:9 Masilo a sotlwa ke setlhabelo-sa-molato, mme ba nnete ba natefela Modimo." 
Proverbs14:10 Pelo e itse botlhoko jwa yona, fela jaaka yo mongwe a sa itse boitumelo jwa yona." 
Proverbs14:11 Matlo a baikepi a tla senngwa, mme lelapa la ba nnete le tla kgaba." 
Proverbs14:12 Go na le ditsela tse motho a reng di siame, mme la bofelo ke ditsela tsa loso." 
Proverbs14:13 Pelo e ka nna botlhoko, le fa molomo o tshega, mme bokhutlo jwa boitumelo ya nna selelo." 
Proverbs14:14 Yo o pelo e tenegileng o tla bolawa ke ditsela tsa gagwe; mme monna yo o molemo o tla ja monate wa ditiro tsa gagwe. 
Proverbs14:15 Yo o sa tlhalefang ke madumela-gotlhe, mme letlhale le ela dikgato tsa lone tlhoko." 
Proverbs14:16 Letlhale le a boifa le tila bosula, mme lesilo le itaola fela le sa boife sepe." 
Proverbs14:17 Yo o galefang ka pele o tla dira tsa bosilo, le yo o bolotsana mo maanong o ipiletsa letlhoo." 
Proverbs14:18 Boswa jwa ba ba sa tlhalefang ke bosilo, mme ba ba botlhale ba ikgabisitse ka kitso." 
Proverbs14:19 Ba ba bosula a ba iname fa pele ga ba ba molemo le baikepi mo dikgorong tsa mosiami. 
Proverbs14:20 Mohumanegi o tlhoiwa le ke wa ga gabo, mme mohumi o ratwa ke ba bantsi." 
Proverbs14:21 Yo o nyatsang mongwe-ka-ene o a leofa, mme go tlhogonolo yo o tlhomogelang babogisegi pelo." 
Proverbs14:22 A ga ba timele ba ba logang maano a a bosula? Mme lorato le boammaaruri ke tsa ba ba akanyang molemo. 
Proverbs14:23 Go tswelelwa pele ka tiro yotlhe e e lapisang, mme go buabua ka molomo fela go a tlhokisa." 
Proverbs14:24 Serwalo sa batlhalefi ke khumo ya bone, mme bosilo jwa dieleele e ntse e le bosilo fela." 
Proverbs14:25 Mosupi wa nnete o pholosa maphelo, mme yo o buang maaka ke moeki." 
Proverbs14:26 Tshireletso e e tiileng ke ya yo o boifang Morena; le bana ba gagwe ba tla nna le botshabelo. 
Proverbs14:27 Go boifa Morena ke motswedi wa bophelo gore motho a falole mo dirung tsa loso. 
Proverbs14:28 Bontsi jwa morafe ke yona kgalalelo ya kgosi, mme fa go fokotsega batho ke therego ya kgosana." 
Proverbs14:29 Yo o pelotelele o na le tlhaloganyo e kgolo; mme yo o felang pelo o dira dilo tsa bosilo jo bogolo. 
Proverbs14:30 Pelo e e iketlileng e phedisa mmele sentle, mme lefufa ke go tlhotlhona ga marapo." 
Proverbs14:31 Yo o gatelelang ba babotlana o kgala Mmopi wa bone, mme yo o tlhomogelang bahumanegi pelo o a mo tlotla." 
Proverbs14:32 Moikepi o digwa ke bosula jwa gagwe, mme mosiami o na le botshabelo motlha a swang." 
Proverbs14:33 Botlhale bo iketlile mo pelong ya motlhalefi, mme tse di mo pelong tsa masilo di utlwala ka makgakga." 
Proverbs14:34 Tshiamo e godisa setšhaba, mme boleo ke ditlhong tsa merafe." 
Proverbs14:35 Motlhanka yo o botlhale o kgatlha kgosi, mme e tla galefela yo o tlhabisang ditlhong." 
Proverbs15:1 Karabo e e bonolo e tima bogale, mme lefoko le le kgopisang le a galefisa." 
Proverbs15:2 Diteme tsa matlhale di ntsha kitso sentle, mme melomo ya masilo e bilola boeleele fela." 
Proverbs15:3 Matlho a Morena a mo mafelong aotlhe, a tlhola ba ba bosula le ba ba molemo." 
Proverbs15:4 Bonolo jwa loleme ke setlhare sa bophelo; mme bolotsana jwa lone bo phatlola pelo. 
Proverbs15:5 Lesilo le nyatsa kotlo ya rraalo, mme yo o elang kgalemelo tlhoko o tla tlhalefa." 
Proverbs15:6 Letlotlo le legolo le mo ntlong ya mosiami, mme di-tsa-moikepi di a senyega." 
Proverbs15:7 Melomo ya matlhale e utlwatsa kitso, mme dipelo tsa masilo ga di na nnete." 
Proverbs15:8 Ditlhabelo tsa baikepi ke maila Moreneng, mme thapelo ya batlhamaladi e a mo kgatlha." 
Proverbs15:9 Tsamao ya moikepi ke maila Moreneng, mme o rata yo o latelelang tshiamo." 
Proverbs15:10 Kotlo e e botlhoko e wela yo o tlogelang tsela; mme yo o ilang kgalemelo o tla swa. 
Proverbs15:11 Morena o bona felo ga baswi le ga tatlhego, mme o bona dipelo tsa batho bogolo go gona." 
Proverbs15:12 Mosotli ga a rate yo o mo kgalemelang, le gona ga a etele matlhale." 
Proverbs15:13 Pelo e e thabileng e ntlafatsa sefatlhego, mme mowa o imelwa ke botlhoko jwa pelo." 
Proverbs15:14 Pelo ya motlhalefi e batla kitso, mme melomo ya masilo e rata boeleele." 
Proverbs15:15 Malatsi aotlhe a mmogisegi a botlhoko, mme yo o pelo e thabileng o na le moletlo ka gale." 
Proverbs15:16 Bobotlana jo bo nang le poifo-Modimo bo phala khumo e kgolo e e nang le letswalo. 
Proverbs15:17 Go ja morogo re ratana go monate go phala kgomo e e nontshitsweng re tlhoanye. 
Proverbs15:18 Monna yo o bogale o tsosa ntwa, mme yo o pelotelele o fedisa kgang." 
Proverbs15:19 Tsela ya motlapa e tshwana le legora lwa mitlwa, mme tselana ya ba ba matlhagatlhaga e katilwe sentle." 
Proverbs15:20 Ngwana yo o tlhalefileng o itumedisa rraagwe, mme motho wa lesilo o nyatsa mmaagwe." 
Proverbs15:21 Boeleele ke boitumelo jwa yo o se nang tlhaloganyo, mme monna wa kelelelo o tlhamalalela pele fela." 
Proverbs15:22 Maikaelelo a a pala, fa go se na kgakololano; fa bagakolodi ba le bantsi, a tla dirafala." 
Proverbs15:23 Monna o itumelela karabo ya molomo wa gagwe; lefoko le le buiwang ka nako e e le lebanyeng le molemo jang! 
Proverbs15:24 Tsela ya bophelo e tlhatlosetsa motlhalefi kwa godimo gore a fapoge felo ga baswi ka kwa tlase. 
Proverbs15:25 Morena o tla rutla ntlo ya baikgantshi, mme o tla tlhomamisa molelwane wa motlholagadi." 
Proverbs15:26 Maano a yo o bosula ke maila mo Moreneng, mme mafoko a lorato a phepa mo go ene." 
Proverbs15:27 Motho wa kgwebo ya tshiamololo o hudua ntlo ya gagwe, mme yo o ilang dineo tse di faposang o tla phela." 
Proverbs15:28 Pelo ya mosiami e akanya dikarabo, mme melomo ya baikepi e bilola tse di bosula." 
Proverbs15:29 Morena o kgakala le baikepi, mme thapelo ya basiami o a e utlwa." 
Proverbs15:30 Matlho a thabo a itumedisa pelo; kitsiso e e molemo e tiisa moko. 
Proverbs15:31 Tsebe e e reetsang dikgalemelo tse di phedisang e rata go nna le matlhale. 
Proverbs15:32 Yo o tlhokomologang dikotlo o nyatsa bophelo jwa gagwe, mme yo o utlwang kgalemelo o tla bona tlhaloganyo." 
Proverbs15:33 Go boifa Morena ke yona thuto ya botlhale; boikokobetso bo etelela tlotlego pele. 
Proverbs16:1 Sa motho ke go ikakanya, mme loleme lo tla fiwa karabo ke Morena." 
Proverbs16:2 Motho a re, ditsela tsotlhe tsa gagwe di itshekile, mme yo o tlhatlhobang mewa ke Morena." 
Proverbs16:3 Neela Morena ditiro tsa gago, foo maikaelelo a gago a tla dirafala." 
Proverbs16:4 Morena o bopetse dilo tsotlhe maikaelelo a gagwe; ee, le moikepi o mmopetse letsatsi la tatlhego." 
Proverbs16:5 Mongwe le mongwe yo o pelo e ikgodisang ke maila mo Moreneng; ruri, ga a kitla a tlhoka petso." 
Proverbs16:6 Molato o bipiwa ka bopelotlhomogi le ka boammaaruri; motho o tila bosula ka go boifa Morena. 
Proverbs16:7 Fa ditsela tsa monna di kgatlha Morena, le baba ba gagwe o tla ba agisanya nae." 
Proverbs16:8 Leruonyana la tshiamo le phala le legolo la tshiamololo. 
Proverbs16:9 Pelo ya motho e akanya tsela ya gagwe, mme Morena ke ene a tsamaisang dikgato tsa gagwe." 
Proverbs16:10 Katlholo e mo molomong wa kgosi; a molomo wa yona o se ka wa atlhola ka boikanyologo! 
Proverbs16:11 Seelo le selekanyetso tse di siameng ke tsa Morena; majwe otlhe a kgetsana a a supang bokete ke tiro ya gagwe. 
Proverbs16:12 Go dira tsa boikepo ke maila dikgosing; gonne sedulo sa kgosi se tlhomamisiwa ka tshiamo. 
Proverbs16:13 Melomo e e siameng e kgatlha dikgosi; di rata yo o bolelang tsa nnete. 
Proverbs16:14 Kgalefo ya kgosi e tshwana le barongwi ba loso; monna yo o botlhale o tla e tima. 
Proverbs16:15 Sefatlhego sa kgosi se se supang lorato se a phedisa; bopelontle jwa yona bo tshwana le leru la pula ya tlhakola-modula. 
Proverbs16:16 Go huma botlhale go phala gouta jang ne! Go huma tlhaloganyo go gaisa selefera. 
Proverbs16:17 Tsela e e katilweng ya batho ba nnete ke go tila bosula; yo o disang tsamao ya gagwe o boloka bophelo jwa gagwe. 
Proverbs16:18 Boikgodiso bo latelwa ke tatlhego; mowa o o ikgantshang o etelela go wa pele. 
Proverbs16:19 Go ikokobetsa le ba ba ikokobetsang go gaisa go abelana thopo le ba ba ikgodisang. 
Proverbs16:20 Yo o elang Lefoko la Modimo tlhoko o tla bona tlhogonolo. Go sego yo o ikanyang Morena. 
Proverbs16:21 Yo o pelo e botlhale o tla bidiwa motlhalefi; mafoko a a bonolo a tsweledisa thuto pele. 
Proverbs16:22 Tlhaloganyo ke motswedi wa bophelo mo go mong wa yona; mme masilo a otlwa ka bosilo jwa ona. 
Proverbs16:23 Pelo ya letlhale e ruta loleme lwa lone; le gona e godisa thuto mo molomong wa lone. 
Proverbs16:24 Mafoko a a monate ke mafura a dinotshe, a natefela pelo, a alafa le marapo." 
Proverbs16:25 Go na le tsela e e siameng mo matlhong a motho, mme bokhutlo jwa yona ke tsela ya loso." 
Proverbs16:26 Tlala ya modiri e a mo dirisa, gonne molomo wa gagwe o a mo kgweetsa." 
Proverbs16:27 Sekebeke se epela ba bangwe gopo ya tatlhego; e kete molelo o o fisang o mo molomong wa sona. 
Proverbs16:28 Molotsana o lotlhanya batho; mosenya-leina o kgaoganya ditsala. 
Proverbs16:29 Mosiamolodi o raela mongwe-ka-ene, o mo gogela mo tseleng e e seng molemo." 
Proverbs16:30 Yo o budulatsang matlho go loga maano a bolotsana, a ba a moma molomo o setse a dirile bosula." 
Proverbs16:31 Moriri o mmududu ke serwalo se sentlentle; se bonwa ka tsamao e e siameng. 
Proverbs16:32 Yo o pelotelele o phala seganka; yo o itseng go itshwara o gaisa mothopi wa motse. 
Proverbs16:33 Tengwa e kgotlokgodiwa mo pataneng ya seaparo, mme katlholo ya yona e tswa mo Moreneng." 
Proverbs17:1 Thathana e e se nang sešabo go le kagiso e phala ntlo e e tletseng dinama go lowa. 
Proverbs17:2 Motlhanka yo o botlhale o tla laola ngwana yo o tlhabisang ditlhong, a ba a kgaogana boswa le bomorwa mongwagwe." 
Proverbs17:3 Selefera e itshekisiwa mo pitseng e e tlhaolosang le gouta mo leisong la moubo, mme Morena o leka dipelo jalo." 
Proverbs17:4 Mosenyi o reetsa molomo o o tsietsang; moaki o utlwelela loleme lo lo bolotsana. 
Proverbs17:5 Yo o sotlang mohumanegi o kgala Modiri wa gagwe; yo o itumelelang kotsi ya yo mongwe ga a nke a tlhoka petso. 
Proverbs17:6 Serwalo sa tlotlo sa batsofe ke bana ba bana; bana ba tlotlega ka borraabo. 
Proverbs17:7 Puo e e maatlametlo e rona lesilo; bogolo jang puo ya maaka e rona motlotlegi! 
Proverbs17:8 Thelesetso ke taemane ya tlhogonolo mo matlhong a mong wa yona; le fa a ya kae, e ntse e mo tsweletsa pele." 
Proverbs17:9 Yo o bipang boleo jwa yo mongwe o batla thatano; mme yo o tsosang kgang gape o kgaoganya ditsala. 
Proverbs17:10 Kgalemelo e thusa motlhalefi go feta dipetso tse di lekgolo mo lesilong. 
Proverbs17:11 Serukhutlhi se batla tse di bosula fela, mme se tla romelwa morongwi yo o setlhogo." 
Proverbs17:12 Go kaone go kgatlhana le senonnori se se thukhuthilweng bana bogolo go go kgatlhana le lesilo le le mo bosilong jwa lone. 
Proverbs17:13 Yo o duelang molemo ka bosula, tatlhego ga e nke e tlogela ntlo ya gagwe." 
Proverbs17:14 Yo o simololang kgang o tshwana le yo o thibololang metsi; ka moo tlogela ntwa e ise e simologe. 
Proverbs17:15 Yo o atlholang a re: “Moikepi o siame;” le yo o reng: “Mosiami o molato.” Ba tena Morena ka bobedi jwa bone. 
Proverbs17:16 Ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa go le madi mo seatleng sa lesilo a a ka rekang botlhale? Mme kana ga le na tlhaloganyo." 
Proverbs17:17 Tsala e nthata ka nako nngwe le nngwe; mme ke morwa-rre fela yo o ntsaletsweng sebaka sa tlalelo. 
Proverbs17:18 Motho yo o se nang tlhaloganyo ke yo o ipofang ka seatla go lefela yo mongwe yo o emelang mongwe-ka-ene. 
Proverbs17:19 Yo o ratang komano o rata boleo; yo o tlotlomatsang setswalo sa gagwe o batala thubego. 
Proverbs17:20 Yo o pelo e sokameng ga a bone tlhogonolo epe; wa loleme lo lo bolotsana o tla wela mo kotsing. 
Proverbs17:21 Yo o tsalang lesilo o na le tshwenyego; seeleele, rraaso ga a nke a itumela." 
Proverbs17:22 Pelo e e thabileng e itse go fodisa, mme mowa o o imetsweng o omeletsa marapo." 
Proverbs17:23 Moikepi o amogelela neo e e faposang sephiring go sokamisa ditselana tsa tshiamo. 
Proverbs17:24 Yo o nang le tlhaloganyo o lebile botlhale, mme matlho a lesilo a lebile kwa bokhutlong jwa lefatshe." 
Proverbs17:25 Mosimane yo o boeleele o ngadisa rraagwe le go utlwisa yo o mmelegeng botlhoko jo bo galakang. 
Proverbs17:26 Go lefisa yo o siameng ga go molemo, mme go itaya batlotlegi ke bosula jo bo fetang joo." 
Proverbs17:27 Yo o thibelang mafoko a gagwe o na le kitso; le yo o mowa o iketlileng ke monna yo o nang le tlhaloganyo. 
Proverbs17:28 Le lesilo, fa le didimala, le ka kaiwa letlhale; fa le moma molomo wa lone, ba ka re: “Le na le tlhaloganyo.”" 
Proverbs18:1 Yo o ikgaoganyang le ba bangwe o batla boithatelo fela; o lwantsha tsotlhe tse di tsweletsang pele. 
Proverbs18:2 Lesilo ga le kgatlhwe ke tlhaloganyo, mme le rata go senola pelo ya lone." 
Proverbs18:3 Fa go tla moikepi, le nyatso e tla nae le nyatsego e e bapileng le kgobo." 
Proverbs18:4 Mafoko a monna wa nnete ke metsi a bodiba, ke noka e e elang, ke motswedi wa botlhale." 
Proverbs18:5 Go goga le moikepi ga go a siama, le e seng go siamololela mosiami mo tshekong." 
Proverbs18:6 Molomo wa lesilo o tsosa ntwa; molomo wa lone o ipiletsa dithupa. 
Proverbs18:7 Molomo wa lesilo o le isa tatlhegong molomo wa lone ke seru se se thaisang bophelo jwa lone. 
Proverbs18:8 Mafoko a mosenya-leina a tshwana le dijo tse di mafura tse di fologelang kwa teng ga mala ka borethe. 
Proverbs18:9 Le ene yo o botlapa mo tirong ya gagwe ke monnaa mosenyi. 
Proverbs18:10 Leina la Morena ke phemelo e e tiileng; mosiami o tshabela teng a sirelediwa. 
Proverbs18:11 Khumo ya mohumi ke motse o o femetsweng mo go ene, ke lobota lo lo godimo mo megopolong ya gagwe." 
Proverbs18:12 Boikgodiso jwa pelo ya motho bo etelela tatlhego ya gagwe pele, mme boikokobetso bo latelwa ke tlotlego." 
Proverbs18:13 Fa motho a araba a ise a utlwe potso, ke bosilo le ditlhong mo go ene." 
Proverbs18:14 Monna yo o pelokgale o itshokela bolwetse jwa gagwe; mme mowa o o imetsweng, ke mang yo o ka o tsosang?" 
Proverbs18:15 Pelo ya motlhalefi e ntse e ithutela pele; ditsebe tsa matlhale di batla kitso. 
Proverbs18:16 Neo e motho o e ntshang e mmulela tsela, e mo fitlhisa fa pele ga ba bagolo." 
Proverbs18:17 Mmegi wa molato e kete o siame mo tshekong ya gagwe, mme go tla tla mongwe-ka-ene a mmotsolotsa." 
Proverbs18:18 Tengwa e khutlisa diphapaang, e kgaoganya ba ba thata." 
Proverbs18:19 Morwa motho yo o leofetsweng o thata bogolo go motse o o femetsweng; letlhoo le tshwana le phemelo ya ntlo ya borena. 
Proverbs18:20 Mpa ya motho e tla kgora leungo la molomo wa gagwe; o tla kgora kotulo ya tse a di jwetseng ka molomo wa gagwe. 
Proverbs18:21 Loso le bophelo di mo thateng ya loleme; ba ba ratang go bua ka lone ba tla ja leungo la lone. 
Proverbs18:22 Yo o bonyeng mosadi o bonye se se molemo; o filwe tlhogonolo ke Morena. 
Proverbs18:23 Mohumanegi o bua ka mokokotlelo, mme mohumi o araba ka bopeloethata." 
Proverbs18:24 Balekane ba motho ba ka mo isa mo tatlhegong; mme go ka nna le tsala e e kgomarelang motho bogolo go morwa-rraagwe. 
Proverbs19:1 Mohumanegi yo o sepelang mo poifong-Modimo o molemo bogolo go yo o molomo o bolotsana yo e leng lesilo. 
Proverbs19:2 Le keletso e e se nang kitso ga e molemo, le yo o itlhaganelang ka dinao o tla timela." 
Proverbs19:3 Boeleele jwa motho bo sokamisa tsela ya gagwe, mme pelo ya gagwe e ngongoregele Morena." 
Proverbs19:4 Khumo e okeletsa motho ditsala tse dintsi, mme yo mmotlana o tlogelwa ke tsala ya gagwe." 
Proverbs19:5 Mosupi yo e seng wa nnete ga a nke a tlhoka petso; yo o buang maaka ga a nke a falola. 
Proverbs19:6 Ba bantsi ba batla go kgatlha motlotlegi; yo o ntshang dineo mongwe le mongwe ke tsala ya gagwe. 
Proverbs19:7 Bomorwa-rraagwe mohumanegi ba mo tlhoa botlhe; ditsala tsa gagwe di mo katogile bogolo go bone; o ba tlhaeletsa kwa morago, mme ga ba tle." 
Proverbs19:8 Yo o ithutang o rata bophelo jwa gagwe; yo o bolokang kelelelo o tla bona tse di molemo. 
Proverbs19:9 Mosupi wa maaka ga a nke a tlhoka petso; yo o buang tse e seng tsona o tla latlhega. 
Proverbs19:10 Go phela sentle go rona lesilo; go rona bogolo jang, fa motlhanka a ka laola barena." 
Proverbs19:11 Botlhale jwa motho bo mo dira pelotelele; ke tlotlo ya gagwe, fa a itshwarela maleo." 
Proverbs19:12 Kgakalo ya kgosi e tshwana le go bôpa ga tawana; mme bopelontle jwa yona bo ntse jaaka monyo mo dijwalong. 
Proverbs19:13 Mosimane yo o boeleele ke tshenyegelo ya ga rraagwe; mme go omana ga mosadi ke thulelo e e ntseng e na ka gale. 
Proverbs19:14 Ntlo le dithoto ke boswa jwa borraabatho; mme mosadi yo o maatlametlo o tswa mo Moreneng. 
Proverbs19:15 Botlapa bo a thulametsa; mme yo o itunnang o tla bolawa ke tlala. 
Proverbs19:16 Yo o tshegetsang taolo ya Modimo o a ipoloka; mme yo o nyatsang ditsela tsa ona o tla swa. 
Proverbs19:17 Yo o tlhomogelang yo mmotlana pelo o adima Morena; ene o tla mo duelela thuso ya gagwe. 
Proverbs19:18 Otla morwao, tsholofelo ya tlhabologo e ntse e le teng, mme o se ka wa mo neela mo go bolaweng." 
Proverbs19:19 Yo o galefang thata o na le go lefisiwa; fa o mo golola, o tla etegela, a senyetsa pele." 
Proverbs19:20 Utlwa kgakololo o amogele kgalemelo gore o tle o nne yo o tlhalefileng mo metlheng e e tlang. 
Proverbs19:21 Pelo ya motho e loga maano a mantsi; mme maikaelelo a Morena ke ona a a tla dirafalang. 
Proverbs19:22 Khumo e ntle ya motho ke boikanyego jwa gagwe; mohumanegi o molemo bogolo go moaki. 
Proverbs19:23 Go boifa Morena go isa bophelong; motho yo o ntseng jalo o tla kgora, a lala a sa tlelwe ke bosula bope." 
Proverbs19:24 Motlapa o tsenya seatla mo mogopong, mme a palelwa ke go se isa kwa molomong." 
Proverbs19:25 Yo o sa tlhalefang o tla tlhalefa, fa o otla mosotli; fa motlhalefi a kgalemelwa, o tla tlhaloganya kitso." 
Proverbs19:26 Yo o gatelelang rraagwe, a leleka mmaagwe, ke ngwana yo o tlhabisang ditlhong yo o nyatsegang." 
Proverbs19:27 Morwaaka, bogolo khutlela thuto, ka o ntse o fapoga mo mafokong a kitso." 
Proverbs19:28 Mosupi wa sekebeke o sotla tshiamo; melomo ya baikepi e natefelwa ke tsietso. 
Proverbs19:29 Petso ya dikatlholo e baakanyeditswe basotli le dikotlo di baakanyeditswe metlhana ya masilo. 
Proverbs20:1 Weine ke mosotli, bojalwa ke motsosa-loratla; botlhe ba ba theekelang ka tsona ga ba botlhale." 
Proverbs20:2 Mafoko a kgosi a a tshosang a tshwana le go bôpa ga tawana; yo o e gakatsang o itshenyetsa bophelo. 
Proverbs20:3 Go nna kgakala le phapaang ke tlotlo ya monna, mme seeleele sengwe le sengwe se simolola ntwa." 
Proverbs20:4 Motlapa ga o leme mariga; mme e tle e re mo kotulong a batle dijo, o se ke o bone sepe." 
Proverbs20:5 Maikaelelo a pelo ya monna ke metsi a bodiba; a giwa ke monna yo o tlhalefileng. 
Proverbs20:6 Batho ba bantsi ga twe ba lorato, mme ke mang yo o bonang monna yo o ikanyegang?" 
Proverbs20:7 Mosiami yo o sepelang mo poifong-Modimo bana ba gagwe ba tla nna tlhogonolo sehularong sa gagwe. 
Proverbs20:8 Kgosi e e ntseng mo sedulong sa katlholo e a fefera, e tlosa bosula jotlhe ka matlho a yona." 
Proverbs20:9 Ke mang yo o ka reng: “Ke tlhapile pelo, ke itshekile, ga ke na boleo”?" 
Proverbs20:10 Bobedi jwa dilekanyetso le jwa dielo tse di tsietsang ke maila fa pele ga Morena ka bobedi jwa tsona. 
Proverbs20:11 Le ene mosimane o a tle a ipontshe ka ditiro tsa gagwe, fa maitsholo a gagwe e le a a phepa le a nnete gongwe nnyaya." 
Proverbs20:12 Tsebe e e utlwang le leitlho le le bonang, Morena o di dirile ka bobedi jwa tsona." 
Proverbs20:13 Se rate boroko, e se re gongwe wa humanega; buduloga matlho, foo o tla kgora dijo." 
Proverbs20:14 Moreki o a tle a re: “Ga di a siama! Ga di a siama!” Mme e re a sena go tsamaya, a ipoke." 
Proverbs20:15 Le fa go na le gouta le bontsi jwa ditalama tsa dikorala, tseo tsotlhe di phalwa ke molomo o o botlhale." 
Proverbs20:16 Mo amoge kobo ya gagwe, gonne o ipofile go lefela yo mongwe; mo tsee a nne peeletso mo boemong jwa baeng." 
Proverbs20:17 Dijo tsa tsietso di monate mo mothong, mme morago ga moo molomo wa gagwe o tlala makgwarana." 
Proverbs20:18 Maano a tla tlhomama ka kgakololano; dira ntwa ka tsamaiso ya botlhale. 
Proverbs20:19 Mosenya-leina o bolela tse o di sebetsweng; ka moo se tlwaelane le mmuabui. 
Proverbs20:20 Yo o rogang rraagwe gongwe mmaagwe, lobone lwa gagwe lo tla tima mo nakong ya lefifi." 
Proverbs20:21 Boswa jo bo batlwang ka potlako mo tshimologong bo tla tlhoka tshegofatso mo bokhutlong. 
Proverbs20:22 Se re: “Ke tla ipusolosetsa bosula!” Letela Morena, o tla go thusa." 
Proverbs20:23 Makete a mabedi ke maila Moreneng; selekanyetso sa tsietso ga se a siama. 
Proverbs20:24 Morena ke ene o tsamaisang dikgato tsa monna; motho o ka tlhaloganya jang tsela ya gagwe? 
Proverbs20:25 Ke seru mo mothong, fa a itlhaganela a re: “Ke tla se naya Morena,” mme e re a sena go ikana jalo e be e le gona a ikakanyang." 
Proverbs20:26 Kgosi e e botlhale e fefera baikepi, e tsamaisa leotwana le le phothang mo go bone." 
Proverbs20:27 Mowa wa motho ke lobone lwa Morena lo lo tlhotlhomisang dikarolo tsotlhe tsa mmele. 
Proverbs20:28 Lorato le boammaaruri di boloka kgosi; e tshegetsa sedulo sa yona sa bogosi ka lorato. 
Proverbs20:29 Bontle jwa makau ke thata ya ona; mokgabo wa banna bagolo ke tlhogo tse dipududu. 
Proverbs20:30 Dintho tse di tswang madi di tlhabolosa modira-bosula; dikotlo di tlhabolosa maikutlo a mmele. 
Proverbs21:1 Pelo ya kgosi e tshwana le mesele ya metsi mo diatleng tsa Morena; o e isa gongwe le gongwe kwa a ratang teng. 
Proverbs21:2 Tsela nngwe le nngwe ya motho e tlhamaletse mo matlhong a gagwe, mme Morena ene o sekaseka dipelo." 
Proverbs21:3 Go dira ka tshiamo le ka tshwanelo go kgatlha Morena bogolo go setlhabelo. 
Proverbs21:4 Sefatlhego sa boikgodiso le pelo ya boikgantsho tse e leng go ikgatlha ga baikepi ke boleo fela. 
Proverbs21:5 Dikakanyo tsa yo o tlhaga di tsweletsa pele; mme yo o potlakang o itlhokisa fela. 
Proverbs21:6 Go batla mahumo ka loleme lwa maaka ke go latela boithamako jo bo isang losong. 
Proverbs21:7 Go gatelela ga baikepi go a ba golafatsa, gonne ba gana go dira tse di siameng." 
Proverbs21:8 Tsamao ya monna yo o molato e masokasoke, mme yo o phepa tiro ya gagwe e siame." 
Proverbs21:9 Go nna mo sekhutlong godimo ga ntlo go phala go nna mo ntlong mmogo le mosadi yo o omanang. 
Proverbs21:10 Pelo ya moikepi e eletsa bosula; ga a tlhomogele mongwe-ka-ene pelo. 
Proverbs21:11 Go otla mosotli ke go tlhalefisa yo o iseng a tlhalefe; mme letlhale le amogela kitso, fa le rutwa fela." 
Proverbs21:12 Yo o leng tshiamo o tlhokomela ntlo ya moikepi; o digela baikepi mo tatlhegong. 
Proverbs21:13 Yo o thibang tsebe gore a se utlwe go goa ga yo mmotlana, le ene e tla re a goa, a se ke a utlwiwe." 
Proverbs21:14 Mpho ya sephiri e tima bogale; thelesetso kobong e tima kgakalo e kgolo. 
Proverbs21:15 Ke boitumelo jwa mosiami, fa go dirwa ka tshiamo; mme mo go ba ba dirang tsa bolotsana ke therego." 
Proverbs21:16 Motho yo o fapogang mo tseleng ya tlhaloganyo o tla akofa a lala mo phuthegong ya baswi. 
Proverbs21:17 Yo o ratang botlhapelwa o tla tlhoka; yo o ratang weine le setlolo ga a nke a huma. 
Proverbs21:18 Serekololo sa mosiami ke moikepi; mo boemong jwa ba nnete go tla molotsana. 
Proverbs21:19 Go botoka go nna mo lefatsheng la sekaka bogolo go go nna le mosadi yo o omanang yo o ngongoregang ka metlha. 
Proverbs21:20 Khumo e ntlentle le lookwane di mo lapeng la yo o botlhale, mme motho yo o bosilo o a di senya." 
Proverbs21:21 Yo o latelang tshiamo le lorato o tla bona bophelo le pholoso le tlotlego. 
Proverbs21:22 Letlhale le fenya motse wa bagale; le diga phemelo e ba neng ba e ikanya. 
Proverbs21:23 Yo o disang molomo wa gagwe le loleme lwa gagwe o iphemela gore a se tsene mo ditlalelong. 
Proverbs21:24 Yo o ikgantshang, yo o ikgogomosang, leina la gagwe ke mosotli; o dira ka boikgantsho jo bo se nang tekanyo." 
Proverbs21:25 Keletso ya setshwakga e a se bolaya gonne diatla tsa sona di gana go dira. 
Proverbs21:26 Yo o pelotshetlha o eletsa letsatsi lotlhe, mme mosiami o a fa, ga a timane." 
Proverbs21:27 Setlhabelo sa moikepi ke maila Moreneng; bogolo fa a se tlisa ka maano a a bosula. 
Proverbs21:28 Mosupi wa maaka o tla latlhega; mme motho yo o utlwileng mafoko o tla bua tse di tlhomameng. 
Proverbs21:29 Moikepi o sefatlhego se matepe, mme wa nnete o siamisa tsamao ya gagwe." 
Proverbs21:30 Ga go na botlhale le e seng tlhaloganyo le e seng maano tse Morena a ka kgonwang ka tsona. 
Proverbs21:31 Pitse e etleeleditswe letsatsi la tlhabano; mme phenyo yona e tswa mo Moreneng. 
Proverbs22:1 Leina le le molemo le phala khumo e kgolo; go ratwa go gaisa selefera le gouta. 
Proverbs22:2 Mohumi le mohumanegi ba a phedisanya; Morena o ba dirile botlhe. 
Proverbs22:3 E a re letlhale le bona dikotsi, le iphitlhe; mme ba ba sa tlhalefang ba fetele pele, ba wele tatlhegong." 
Proverbs22:4 Tuelo ya boikokobetso le ya go boifa Morena ke khumo le tlotlo le bophelo. 
Proverbs22:5 Mitlwa le diru di mo tseleng ya yo o sokameng; yo o bolokang bophelo jwa gagwe o a di katoga. 
Proverbs22:6 Tlwaetsa mosimane tsamao e e mo tshwanetseng; foo ga a kitla a fapoga mo go yona, le fa a tsofetse." 
Proverbs22:7 Mohumi o laola bahumanegi; moadingwi ke motlhanka wa moadimi. 
Proverbs22:8 Yo o jwalang tshiamololo o tla roba tatlhego; thupa ya kgalefo ya gagwe e tla itaya ene. 
Proverbs22:9 Yo o matlho-a-lorato o tla tshegofadiwa; gonne o nathetse ba ba tlhokang bogobe jwa gagwe. 
Proverbs22:10 Leleka mosotli; foo dikgang di tla fela; go seka le go nyatsa go tla khutla. 
Proverbs22:11 Morena o rata yo o pelo e phepa; kgosi ke tsala ya yo o e kgatlhang ka puo. 
Proverbs22:12 Matlho a Morena a boloka tse o di bonyeng, mme o tla diga mafoko a molotsana." 
Proverbs22:13 Motlapa o a re: “Tau e ka fa ntle; nka bolawa mo dipatlelong.” 
Proverbs22:14 Melomo ya basadi ba sele ke gopo e e boteng; yo Morena o mo galefetseng o tla wela mo go yona. 
Proverbs22:15 Fa bosilo bo palelela mo pelong ya mosimane, thupa ya kotlo e tla bo ntsha mo go ene." 
Proverbs22:16 Go gatelela yo mmotlana ke go mo humisa; go naya mohumi ke go mo tlhokisa fela. 
Proverbs22:17 Tlhwaya tsebe, o utlwe mafoko a matlhale, o ele kitso ya me tlhoko." 
Proverbs22:18 Ee, go gontle, fa o a boloka mo maikutlong a gago; foo aotlhe a tla bo a bopetswe molomo wa gago." 
Proverbs22:19 Ke ruta wena kajeno gore o tle o ikanye Morena ka wesi. 
Proverbs22:20 Kana ke go kwaletse diane tse di nang le dikgakololo le kitso," 
Proverbs22:21 go go ruta nnete le mafoko a a ikanyegang gore o tle o arabe yo o go botsang ka mafoko a boammaaruri. 
Proverbs22:22 Se thukhuthe yo mmotlana, ka a le mmotlana; le gona se gatelele mmogisegi mo lekgotleng." 
Proverbs22:23 Gonne Morena o tla ba emela mo tshekong, mme bathukhuthi ba bone o tla ba thukhutha bophelo." 
Proverbs22:24 Se tsalane le yo o mabifi; se kopane le monna yo o pelo-khutshwane," 
Proverbs22:25 e se re gongwe wa tlwaela mekgwa ya gagwe, wa thaela bophelo jwa gago seru." 
Proverbs22:26 Se nne le ba ba ikanang ka letsogo, ba ba ipofang go emela melato ya ba bangwe." 
Proverbs22:27 Kana fa o palelwa ke go lefa, bolao jwa gago bo tla tsewa ka fa tlase ga gago." 
Proverbs22:28 Se sutise molelwane wa bogologolo o borraago ba o segileng. 
Proverbs22:29 Fa o bona monna e le setswerere mo tirong ya gagwe, ene o ka direla dikgosi; ga se yo o ka direlang ba e leng batho fela." 
Proverbs23:1 E re fa o nna fatshe go ja le mmusi, o gopole sentle yo o fa pele ga gago;" 
Proverbs23:2 o itshware setho, le fa o le tlalakgolo." 
Proverbs23:3 Se eletse matlotlwa a a monate a gagwe; gonne ke dijo tse di tsietsang. 
Proverbs23:4 Se tshwenyegele go huma; tlogela maano a teng. 
Proverbs23:5 A o tla tlhoma matlho mo lehumong? Le tla tloga le nyelela! Gonne le itirela diphuka le fofela kwa legodimong jaaka lenong. 
Proverbs23:6 Se je dijo tsa yo o lefufa; se eletse dijo tse di monate tsa gagwe. 
Proverbs23:7 Gonne o ntse jaaka a akanya mo pelong. Ka molomo o go raya a re: “Jaa, o nwe!” mme pelo ya gagwe yona ga e ree jalo." 
Proverbs23:8 Thathana e ò e jeleng ò tla e tlhatsa; mafoko a tebogo a gago ò tla bo ò a buetse lefela. 
Proverbs23:9 Se bue mo tsebeng ya seleele, gonne se tla nyatsa botlhale jwa mafoko a gago." 
Proverbs23:10 Se sutise molelwane wa bogologolo; se tseele masiela masimo a ona. 
Proverbs23:11 Gonne moemedi wa ona o thata; ene o tla a emela kgatlhanong le wena. 
Proverbs23:12 Neela pelo ya gago mo thutong le ditsebe tsa gago mo mafokong a kitso. 
Proverbs23:13 Se tlhokise mosimane kotlo; fa o mo itaya ka thupa ga a kitla a a swa. 
Proverbs23:14 Ka go mo itaya ka thupa o tla faposa bophelo jwa gagwe mo felong ga baswi. 
Proverbs23:15 Morwaaka, fa pelo ya gago e tlhalefa, pelo ya me le yona e tla itumela." 
Proverbs23:16 Maikutlo a me a tla ipela, fa molomo wa gago o bua tse di siameng." 
Proverbs23:17 A pelo ya gago e se fufegele baleofi, mme a e tlhoafalele poifo-Morena ka metlha." 
Proverbs23:18 Gonne fa ò e boloka, tswelelopele e tla nna teng; mme tsholofelo ya gago ga e kitla e nyelela." 
Proverbs23:19 Wena morwaaka, reetsa ò tlhalefe! Tsamaisa pelo ya gago mo tseleng e e tlhamaletseng." 
Proverbs23:20 Se nne le banwi ba bojalwa ba ba megagaru mo go jeng nama. 
Proverbs23:21 Gonne monwi le moji ba tla humanega. Go se kgathale sepe go apesa motho dikata. 
Proverbs23:22 Utlwa rraago yo o go tsetseng; se nyatse mmaago, fa a sena go tsofala." 
Proverbs23:23 Reka boammaaruri, mme o se bo rekise; reka le botlhale le thuto le tlhaloganyo." 
Proverbs23:24 Rraagwe mosiami o ipela thata; motsadi wa letlhale o a le itumelela. 
Proverbs23:25 A go itumele rraago le mmaago; yo o go belegeng a a duduetse. 
Proverbs23:26 Morwaaka, nneele pelo ya gago! A matlho a gago a kgatlhwe ke ditsela tsa me!" 
Proverbs23:27 Gonne seaka ke gopo e e boteng; mosadi wa seotswa ke sediba se se pitlaganyeng. 
Proverbs23:28 Le gona o lalela batho jaaka senokwane; o atisa bolotsana mo bathong. 
Proverbs23:29 Tatlhego ke ya ga mang? Tlalelo ke ya ga mang? Dintwa ke tsa ga mang? Selelo ke sa ga mang? Dintho tsa bomo ke tsa ga mang? Matlho a a leoto ke a ga mang? 
Proverbs23:30 Ke tsa ba ba lalang kwa bojalweng; ke tsa ba ba tlang go utlwa dino tse di tagang. 
Proverbs23:31 Se kgatlhwe ke bohibidu jwa weine, fa e phatsima mo senwelong! E nowa e le monate thata," 
Proverbs23:32 mme morago e loma jaaka noga; e go jwela ka botlhole jaaka kake. 
Proverbs23:33 Matlho a gago a tla bona dilo tse di seng gona; pelo ya gago e tla go buisa tse di sokameng. 
Proverbs23:34 O tla nna jaaka e kete o robetse mo gare ga lewatle le jaaka yo o robetseng mo godimo ga pinagare ya mokoro. 
Proverbs23:35 O re: “Ba ntiteile, ga ke a utlwa botlhoko; ba nkotlile, ga ke a lemoga. Ke tla tsoga leng ke tle ke e batle go nwa gape.”" 
Proverbs24:1 Se fufegele dilo tsa ba ba bosula; se eletse go tshwana nabo. 
Proverbs24:2 Gonne dipelo tsa bone di akanya kgatelelo; melomo ya bone e bua tse di isang mo tatlhegong. 
Proverbs24:3 Ntlo e agiwa ka botlhale; e thewa sentle ka maatlametlo," 
Proverbs24:4 mme ka kitso matlwana a yona a tlala dithoto tsa mefutafuta tse di tlhwatlhwa e kgolo le tse dintle. 
Proverbs24:5 Letlhale le thata bogolo go seganka; yo o nang le kitso o thata bogolo go yo o dikgoka. 
Proverbs24:6 Gonne ò tla itse go lwa ntwa ka dikgakololo tse di botlhale; phenyo e bonwa ka bontsi jwa bagakolodi. 
Proverbs24:7 Tsa botlhale di palela seeleele; mo lekgotleng se tlhoka puo. 
Proverbs24:8 Yo o logang maano a go dira bosula o tla bidiwa Rra-bolotsana. 
Proverbs24:9 Boleo ke maikaelelo a bosilo; mosotli o ilega mo bathong. 
Proverbs24:10 Fa o nyema moko ka letsatsi la tlalelo, thata ya gago e tla bo e se ya sepe." 
Proverbs24:11 Pholosa ba ba gogelwang losong! Thibela ba ba theekelelang go ya go bolawa. 
Proverbs24:12 Fa o ka re: “Ke ne ke sa itse,” ona o o bonang dipelo a ga o kitla o lemoga? Ona o o disang bophelo jwa gago o a itse. O direla motho ka fa tirong ya gagwe." 
Proverbs24:13 Morwaaka, jaa lomepe lwa dinotshe, gonne lo monate; mafura a dinotshe a botshe mo magalapeng a gago." 
Proverbs24:14 Itse gore botlhale bo ntse jalo mo moweng wa gago. Fa o bo bona, tswelelopele e tla nna teng, mme tsholofelo ya gago ga e kitla e nyelela." 
Proverbs24:15 Wena moikepi, se lalele lelapa la mosiami; se senye legae la gagwe." 
Proverbs24:16 Le fa mosiami a ka wa gasupa, o tla nna a tsoga gape; mme baikepi bone ba wela mo tatlhegong." 
Proverbs24:17 Fa mmaba wa gago a wa, se itumele; fa a digwa, a pelo ya gago e se duduetse," 
Proverbs24:18 e se re gongwe Morena a bona, mme ga nna bosula mo matlhong a gagwe, a busa bogale jwa gagwe mo go ene." 
Proverbs24:19 Se tukele basenyi bogale; se fufegele baikepi 
Proverbs24:20 gonne yo o bosula ga a tswelele pele; lesedi la baikepi le tla tima. 
Proverbs24:21 Morwaaka, boifa Morena le kgosi; se tlwaelane le dirukhutlhi." 
Proverbs24:22 Gonne tatlhego ya tsona e tla dirafala ka tshoganyetso, sebaka sa tshenyego ya tsona se itsiwe ke mang?" 
Proverbs24:23 Diane tse di latelang fa le tsona ke tsa batlhalefi: Go gobelelela motho mo tshekong ga go a siama. 
Proverbs24:24 Yo o rayang moikepi a re: “O siame!” ene, batho ba tla mo rogaka, merafe e tla mo hutsa." 
Proverbs24:25 Go ratega ba ba mo atlholang ka tshiamo; lesego le letlhogonolo di tla ba dirafalela. 
Proverbs24:26 Yo o ntshang dikarabo tse di siameng o atla molomo. 
Proverbs24:27 Fetsa tiro ya gago e e kwa ntle, o leme tshimo ya gago; morago ga moo o ka aga ntlo ya gago." 
Proverbs24:28 Se pateletse mongwe-ka-wena ka bomo! A ò tshwanetse go timetsa batho ka molomo wa gago? 
Proverbs24:29 Se re: “Ke tla mo direla se a se ntiretseng; ke busolosetsa monna ka fa tirong ya gagwe.” 
Proverbs24:30 Nkile ka feta kwa tshimong ya motlapa kwa tshimong ya moweine ya motho yo o se nang tlhaloganyo. 
Proverbs24:31 Ka fitlhela e tlhogile mefero gotlhe, e khurumeditswe ke mokolonyane, lorako lwa matlapa lwa yona lo digilwe." 
Proverbs24:32 Ka leba, ka ela tlhoko, ka bona, ka fitlhela e le thuto e e reng:" 
Proverbs24:33 Fa o robala go le gonnye, o otsela go le gonnye, o repisa diatla go le gonnye go ikhutsa," 
Proverbs24:34 khumanego ya gago e tla tla jaaka senokwane le lehuma la gago jaaka motlhabani. 
Proverbs25:1 Diane tse di latelang fa le tsona ke tsa ga Salomo; di kgobokantswe ke banna ba ga Hesekia kgosi ya Juta. 
Proverbs25:2 Ke tlotlo ya Modimo go loba mafoko; ke tlotlo ya dikgosi go tlhotlhomisa mafoko go a senola. 
Proverbs25:3 Bogodimo jwa legodimo le boteng jwa lefatshe le dipelo tsa dikgosi ga di ka ke tsa tlhotlhomisiwa. 
Proverbs25:4 Fa manyela a okolwa mo selefereng, sebopiwa sa mogakolosi se tla tswa sentle:" 
Proverbs25:5 A moikepi a tlosiwe jalo fa pele ga kgosi; foo sedulo sa bogosi sa yona se tla tlhomamisiwa ka tshiamo. 
Proverbs25:6 Se ipoke fa pele ga kgosi; se eme mo maemong a ba bagolo! 
Proverbs25:7 Gonne go bolelelwa go twe: “Tlhatlogela kwano!” go phala go kokobediwa fa pele ga motlotlegi yo ò mmonang ka matlho a gago. 
Proverbs25:8 Ò se ka wa potlaka go ya go seka, e se re gongwe morago ga moo wa tlhoka go itse se ò ka se dirang, fa mongwe-ka-wena a go tlhabisa ditlhong." 
Proverbs25:9 Seka kgang ya gago le mongwe-ka-wena, mme ò se ka wa senola sephiri sa yo mongwe," 
Proverbs25:10 e se re gongwe ba ba utlwang jalo ba go kgoba, mme nyatsego ya gago ya se ka ya khutla." 
Proverbs25:11 Lefoko le le buiwang ka nako ya lone le tshwana le dinamune tsa gouta tse di mo megopong ya selefera. 
Proverbs25:12 Mokgalemi yo o botlhale mo tsebeng ya yo o utlwang ke lenyena la gouta le mokgabo wa gouta e e sa pekwang. 
Proverbs25:13 Morongwi yo o ikanyegang o tshwana le maruru a semathana mo bolelong jwa kotulo mo go ba ba mo romileng; gonne o lapolosa mowa wa morena wa gagwe. 
Proverbs25:14 Monna yo o ipokang ka dineo, mme a sa di ntshe, o tshwana le maru le phefo tse di sa neseng pula." 
Proverbs25:15 Kgosi e e bogale e kgonwa ka bopelotelele; loleme lo lo bonolo lo roba marapo. 
Proverbs25:16 Fa ò bonye mafura a dinotshe, ò je a a go lekanyeng fela, e se re gongwe a go tena, mme wa a tlhatsa." 
Proverbs25:17 Ò se ka wa ya gantsi kwa ntlong ya mongwe-ka-wena, e se re gongwe wa mo tena, mme a go tlhoa." 
Proverbs25:18 Monna yo o supang maaka ka ga mongwe-ka-ene ke molamu le tšhaka le motswi o o bogale. 
Proverbs25:19 Go ikanya molotsana ka letsatsi la tlalelo ke go ikanya leino le le bodileng le lekoto le le relelang. 
Proverbs25:20 Go opelela yo o pelo-e-botlhoko difela go tshwana le go apola diaparo ka letsatsi le le maruru le go tshela se se botlhoko mo dinthong. 
Proverbs25:21 Fa mmaba wa gago a tshwerwe ke tlala, mo fe dijo; fa a nyorilwe, mo nose metsi." 
Proverbs25:22 Gonne o tla bo o tlhatlaganya magala mo tlhogong ya gagwe, mme Morena o tla go duela." 
Proverbs25:23 Phefo ya bokone e tlisa pula; loleme lo lo sebang lo ngadisa difatlhego. 
Proverbs25:24 Go nna mo sekhutlong mo godimo ga ntlo go phala go nna mo ntlong mmogo le mosadi yo o omanang. 
Proverbs25:25 Mafoko a a molemo a a tswang mo lefatsheng le le kgakala ke metsi a a maruru mo go yo o nyorilweng. 
Proverbs25:26 Mosiami yo o fenngwang ke moikepi ke motswedi o o gatakilweng, ke sediba se se kgoberegileng." 
Proverbs25:27 Go ja mafura a dinotshe thata ga go molemo; go tlhotlhomisa tse di thata go isa mo bothateng. 
Proverbs25:28 Monna yo o sa itseng go itshwara ke motse o o phuntsweng lobota. 
Proverbs26:1 Tlotlo e rona lesilo jaaka semathana se rona mo selemong le jaaka pula e rona mo kotulong. 
Proverbs26:2 Thogako e e se nang lebaka ga e kitla e dirafala; e tshwana le thaga e e timelang le peolwane e e fofang e tloga. 
Proverbs26:3 Seme se lebanye pitse le mogala esele, le thupa metlhana ya dieleele." 
Proverbs26:4 Se arabe lesilo ka fa bosilong jwa lone, e se re gongwe le wena wa tshwana nalo." 
Proverbs26:5 Mme fetola lesilo tse di tshwanetseng bosilo jwa lone gore le se ka la itshema letlhale. 
Proverbs26:6 Yo o romelang mafoko ka lesilo o ikgaola maoto, o a siamololelwa." 
Proverbs26:7 Seane mo melomong ya masilo se tshwana le maoto a segole a a repileng. 
Proverbs26:8 Yo o tlotlang lesilo o tshwana le yo o bofelelang letlapa mo go seragamajwe. 
Proverbs26:9 Seane melomong ya masilo ke letlhaku la mitlwa mo seatleng sa letagwa. 
Proverbs26:10 Yo o rapang lesilo le bafeti ke mohudi yo o ntshang botlhe dintho. 
Proverbs26:11 Lesilo le le boelelang bosilo jwa lone le tshwana le ntšwa e e boelang go ja matlhatsa a yona. 
Proverbs26:12 Fa o bona monna yo o ikayang botlhale, lesilo le solofelwa go ka tlhabologa bogolo go ene." 
Proverbs26:13 Setshwakga se a re: “Ledumedi le mo tseleng; tau e mo dipatlelong.” 
Proverbs26:14 Motlapa o fetoga mo bolaong jwa ona jaaka setswalo se akgega mo mapegong a sona. 
Proverbs26:15 Motlapa o tsenya seatla sa ona mo mogopong; mme go se isa kwa molomong go a o palela. 
Proverbs26:16 Sebodu se itshema letlhale bogolo go banna ba supa ba ba itseng go araba sentle. 
Proverbs26:17 Yo o itsenyang mo ntweng e e seng ya gagwe o tshwara ntšwa e e fetang ka ditsebe. 
Proverbs26:18 Setsenwa se hula dirumola le metswi e e bolayang. 
Proverbs26:19 Monna yo o tsietsang mongwe-ka-ene o ipata ka go re: “Kana ke tshameka fela,” o tshwana naso." 
Proverbs26:20 Molelo o a tima, fa dikgong di fedile; phapaang e a khutla, fa go se na molotlhanyi." 
Proverbs26:21 Monna wa phapaang o tsosa ntwa jaaka moubo o tukisa magala le dikgong di tukisa molelo. 
Proverbs26:22 Mafoko a yo o senyang leina a tshwana le dijo tse di monate tse di fologelang kwa teng ga mala ka borethe. 
Proverbs26:23 Fa molomo o tuka lorato, mme pelo e ntse e le mpe, ke lobeana fela lo lo manegilweng manyela a selefera." 
Proverbs26:24 Motlhoi o itira morati ka molomo wa gagwe, mme o na le tsietso ka kwa teng." 
Proverbs26:25 Fa a utlwatsa lentswe la lorato, se mo ikanye; gonne o na le bosupa jwa makgapha mo pelong ya gagwe." 
Proverbs26:26 Le fa letlhoo le ka iphitlha ka tsietso, bosula jwa lone bo tla bonala mo phuthegong." 
Proverbs26:27 Yo o epang lemena o tla wela mo go lone; yo o kgokolosang lefika o tla bolawa ke lone. 
Proverbs26:28 Molomo wa maaka o tlhoa ba o ba pšhwetlileng; loleme lo lo borethe lo isa mo tatlhegong. 
Proverbs27:1 Se ipoke ka tsa letsatsi la kamoso; gonne ga o itse tse letsatsi le tla di tlisang. 
Proverbs27:2 A yo mongwe a go tumise, e seng molomo wa gago; o sele, e seng loleme lwa gago!" 
Proverbs27:3 Lefika le makete, motlhaba ke morwalo, mme go ngadisiwa ke lesilo go makete go di gaisa ka bobedi jwa tsona." 
Proverbs27:4 Kgalefo e setlhogo, bogale bo a bela, mme lefufa lone le ka kgonwa ke mang?" 
Proverbs27:5 Kgalemelo ponatshegong e phala lorato lo lo fitlhegileng. 
Proverbs27:6 Dintho tse di ntshitsweng ke morati di a ikanyega, mme dikatlo tsa motlhoi di a aketsa." 
Proverbs27:7 Yo o kgotsheng o gataka mafura a dinotshe, mme tsotlhe tse di galakang di monate mo go yo o tlala." 
Proverbs27:8 Monna yo o thobileng mo gae, a kgarakgatshega, o tshwana le nonyane e e kobilweng mo sentlhageng sa yona." 
Proverbs27:9 Lookwane le maswalo di thabisa pelo; monate wa tsala ya motho ke kgakololo ya pelo ya gagwe. 
Proverbs27:10 Se tlogele tsala ya gago le tsala ya ga rraago; se tsene mo ntlong ya ga morwa-rraago ka letsatsi la tatlhego ya gago. Moagammogo yo o gaufi o gaisa morwa-rraago yo o kgakala. 
Proverbs27:11 Ngwanaka, tlhalefa o thabise pelo ya me gore ke tle ke itse go fetola yo o nkgobang." 
Proverbs27:12 E a re letlhale le bona dikotsi, le iphitlhe; mme ba ba sa tlhalefang ba fetele pele, ba wele tatlhegong." 
Proverbs27:13 Mo amoge kobo, gonne o ipofile go lefela yo mongwe; tsaya peeletso mo go ene ka ntlha ya baeng." 
Proverbs27:14 Yo o tshegofatsang mongwe-ka-ene ka lentswe le legolo mo mosong phakela o tla belaelwa gore o a rogaka. 
Proverbs27:15 Thulelo e e rothang ka letsatsi la pula e tshwana le mosadi yo o tlholang a omanye. 
Proverbs27:16 Yo o ka mo thibelang a ka thibela phefo le go tshwara lookwane ka seatla se se jang. 
Proverbs27:17 Tshipi e loodiwa ka tshipi; motho le ene o betlwa ke yo mongwe. 
Proverbs27:18 Yo o tlhokomelang setlhare sa feie o tla ja maungo a sona; yo o direlang morena wa gagwe o tla tlotlwa. 
Proverbs27:19 Sefatlhego se ipona mo metsing; pelo ya motho e ipona jalo ka ya yo mongwe. 
Proverbs27:20 Ga go kgore felo ga baswi le ga tatlhego; matlho a batho le ona ga a kgore. 
Proverbs27:21 Selefera e itshekisiwa mo pitseng e e gakolosang le gouta mo leisong le monna ka melomo ya ba ba mmokang. 
Proverbs27:22 Le fa o ka tlhobola seeleele mmogo le mabele mo kikeng ka motshe, ga se kitla se tlogela boeleele jwa sona." 
Proverbs27:23 Ela dinku tsa gago tlhoko thata gore di phela jang; o tsee matlhape tsia; 
Proverbs27:24 gonne khumo ga se ya bosakhutleng; a kampo serwalo sa bogosi ke sa ditshika tsotlhe? 
Proverbs27:25 E tla re fa bojang bo segilwe, fa go bonala botala jo bonana, fa merogo ya dithaba e phuthilwe," 
Proverbs27:26 o bo o na le dikwana tse di go apesang; o ka reka tshimo ka diphelehu. 
Proverbs27:27 Mašwi a dipodi a tla bo a lekanye go go jesa le ba lapa la gago le go phedisa malata a gago. 
Proverbs28:1 Baikepi ba a tshaba, le fa go se na ope yo o ba lateletseng, mme basiami ba pelokgale jaaka tawana." 
Proverbs28:2 Dikgosi tsa morafe di latelana ka pele ka ntlha ya maleo a ona, mme tshiamo e tlhomama ka batho ba ba nang le tlhaloganyo le kitso." 
Proverbs28:3 Monna yo e leng tlhogo, yo o gatelelang ba babotlana, o tshwana le pula e e gogolang fela e e sa tsiseng dijo." 
Proverbs28:4 Ba ba tlogelang molao ba boka baikepi, mme ba ba tshegetsang molao ba a ba galefela." 
Proverbs28:5 Batho ba ba bosula ga ba tlhaloganye tshiamo, mme ba ba batlang Morena ba tlhaloganya tsotlhe." 
Proverbs28:6 Mohumanegi yo o sepelang ka poifo-Modimo o molemo bogolo go mohumi yo o sokameng, ka a le tsela-pedi." 
Proverbs28:7 Yo o tshegetsang molao ke ngwana yo o tlhalefileng, mme yo o tsalanang le difafalele o tlhabisa rraagwe ditlhong." 
Proverbs28:8 Yo o kokotletsang di-tsa-gagwe ka tsadiso ya madi gongwe ka kgwebo o phuthela yo o tla tlhomogelang batlhoki pelo. 
Proverbs28:9 Yo o ithibang ditsebe gore a se ka a utlwa molao, thapelo ya gagwe le yona ke maila." 
Proverbs28:10 Yo o faposetsang ba nnete kwa tseleng e e bosula o tla wela mo lemeneng la gagwe ka esi, mme ba ba tletseng tumelo ba tla ja boswa jwa tse di molemo." 
Proverbs28:11 Monna yo o humileng o itshema letlhale; mme modidi yo o nang le tlhaloganyo o a mo lemoga. 
Proverbs28:12 Fa basiami ba duduetsa, ke kgalalelo e kgolo; mme fa baikepi ba tsoga, batho ba iphitlha." 
Proverbs28:13 Yo o lobang maleo a gagwe ga a kitla a kgona sepe; mme yo o a ipobolang, a a bakela, o tla tlhomogelwa pelo." 
Proverbs28:14 Go sego motho yo o boifang Modimo ka gale, mme yo o thatafatsang pelo ya gagwe o tla wela mo tatlhegong." 
Proverbs28:15 Moikepi yo o busang batho ba babotlana ke tau e e bôpang le bere e e tsomang. 
Proverbs28:16 Molaodi yo o tlhokang tlhaloganyo ke mogateledi yo mogolo, mme yo o ilang kgwebo ya tshiamololo o tla phela ka boleele." 
Proverbs28:17 Motho yo o imelwang ke molato wa go bolaya motho o tla nna motshabi go fitlha lebitleng; se mo thuseng. 
Proverbs28:18 Yo o sepelang ka poifo-Modimo o tla phologa, mme yo o sokameng, a le tsela-pedi o tla wela mo gopong." 
Proverbs28:19 Yo o lemang tshimo ya gagwe o tla kgora bogobe, mme yo o latelang tse di se nang mosola o tla bona khumanego fela." 
Proverbs28:20 Monna yo o ikanyegang o tla bona ditshegofatso tse dikgolo, mme yo o potlakelang go huma ga a nke a tlhoka kotlo." 
Proverbs28:21 Go gobelelela motho ga go a siama. Monna o ka tlogela tshiamo le ka ntlha ya thathana ya bogobe fela. 
Proverbs28:22 Monna wa leitlho la lefufa o potlakela go huma, mme ga a itse gore lehuma le tla mo wela." 
Proverbs28:23 Yo o kgalemelelang motho boleo o tla ratwa morago bogolo go motho wa loleme lo lo borethe. 
Proverbs28:24 Yo o thukhuthang rraagwe gongwe mmaagwe, mme a re: “Ga se boleo!” ke ene molekane wa mosenyi." 
Proverbs28:25 Yo o pelotshetlha o tsosa dintwa, mme yo o ikanyang Morena o tla lapolosiwa." 
Proverbs28:26 Yo o ikanyang tlhaloganyo ya gagwe ke seeleele, mme yo o sepelang ka botlhale o tla phologa." 
Proverbs28:27 Yo o abelang mohumanegi ga a kitla a tlhoka sepe, mme yo o ipipang matlho o tla rogakwa gantsi." 
Proverbs28:28 Fa baikepi ba tsoga, batho ba a iphitlha; mme fa ba latlhega, basiami ba a ntsifala." 
Proverbs29:1 Monna yo o gagamatsang molala, le fa a kgalemetswe gantsi, o tla pšhwetlakanngwa ka tshoganyetso, mme go se na thuso." 
Proverbs29:2 Fa basiami ba ntsifala, morafe o a itumela; fa baikepi ba busa, morafe o a fegelwa." 
Proverbs29:3 Monna yo o ratang botlhale o itumedisa rraagwe; mme yo o kopanang le diaka o fetsa dithoto tsa gagwe. 
Proverbs29:4 Kgosi e phedisa lefatshe sentle ka tshiamo, mme yo o kgethisang batho go feta tekanyo o a le tubaka." 
Proverbs29:5 Monna yo o buang mafoko a a borethe le mongwe-ka-ene o ngamolela dinao tsa gagwe serai. 
Proverbs29:6 Go na le mutlwane mo tseleng ya monna yo o bosula, mme mosiami o ka siana a thabile." 
Proverbs29:7 Mosiami o itse tse di tshwanetseng ba babotlana, mme moikepi ga a di lemoge, ga a di itse." 
Proverbs29:8 Basotli ba tsosa moferefere mo motseng, mme ba ba botlhale ba tima bogale." 
Proverbs29:9 Fa motlhalefi a seka le lesilo, le tla tlhodia le tshega, mme go se na boikhutso." 
Proverbs29:10 Banna ba ba tshololang madi ba tlhoa mmoifi-Modimo; ba batla go bolaya ba e leng ba nnete. 
Proverbs29:11 Lesilo le ntsha bogale jotlhe jwa lone, mme letlhale le bo kokobetse morago." 
Proverbs29:12 Mmusi yo o utlwelelang mafoko a maaka, badiredi ba gagwe ke baikepi fela." 
Proverbs29:13 Mohumanegi le mogateledi ba a kgatlhana; Morena o sedimosa matlho a bobedi jwa bone. 
Proverbs29:14 Kgosi e e direlang ba babotlana tse di ba tshwanetseng ka boikanyo, sedulo sa yona sa bogosi se tla tlhomama ka bosakhutleng." 
Proverbs29:15 Thupa le kgalemelo di a tlhalefisa; mme mosimane yo o itaolang o tlhabisa mmaagwe ditlhong. 
Proverbs29:16 Fa baikepi ba ntsifala, go ntsifala maleo, mme basiami ba tla bona tatlhego ya bone, ba itumela." 
Proverbs29:17 Otla ngwana wa gago, mme o tla go ikhutsisa, a go thabisa pelo." 
Proverbs29:18 Fa go se na pono ya moporofeti, batho ba itaola fela, mme go sego yo o tshegetsang molao." 
Proverbs29:19 Motlhanka ga a siamisiwe ka mafoko; le fa a a tlhaloganya, ga a a kgathalale." 
Proverbs29:20 Fa o bona monna yo o bonako mo puong ya gagwe, lesilo le solofelwa go ka tlhabologa bogolo go ene." 
Proverbs29:21 Yo o lêmang motlhanka wa gagwe go tloga bonyaneng, la bofelo o tla mmona a nna matepe." 
Proverbs29:22 Monna yo o bogale o losa batho; yo o pelo-khutshwane o leofa gantsi. 
Proverbs29:23 Boikgodiso jwa motho bo tla mo isa tlase, mme yo o ikokobetsang o tla bona tlotlo." 
Proverbs29:24 Yo o jang le legodu o a itlhoa; o utlwa go rogakwa yo o sa begeng legodu, mme ga a le bege." 
Proverbs29:25 Go boifa batho go tlisa serai, mme yo o ikanyang Morena o tla femelwa." 
Proverbs29:26 Ba bantsi ba batla sefatlhego sa mmusi, mme tshiamelo ya motho e tswa mo Moreneng." 
Proverbs29:27 Yo o dirang ka tshiamololo o ilwa ke basiami; wa tsamao ya nnete o ilwa ke moikepi. 
Proverbs30:1 Mafoko a ga Agure morwa Jake wa ga Masa. Monna yo o a re: “Ke itapiseditse Modimo; ke itapiseditse Modimo. Ke feletswe. 
Proverbs30:2 Gonne ke seeleele sa phologolo, ga ke motho; ga ke na tlhaloganyo ya motho." 
Proverbs30:3 Ga ke a ithuta botlhale; ene Moitshepi ga ke na kitso ya go mo itse. 
Proverbs30:4 Go tlhatlogetse mang kwa legodimong a ba a boa? Ke mang yo o huparetseng phefo ka diatla tsa gagwe? Ke mang yo o bofeletseng metsi mo kobong? Ke mang yo o tlhomamisitseng dikhutlo tsotlhe tsa lefatshe? Leina la gagwe ke mang? Leina la Morwawe ke mang? Nkarabe, fa o itse tseo.”" 
Proverbs30:5 Mafoko otlhe a Modimo a itshekisitswe; ona Modimo ke thebe ya ba ba batlang botshabelo mo go ona. 
Proverbs30:6 Se oketse mafoko a ona, e se re gongwe wa go otla, mme wa fitlhelwa o le moaki." 
Proverbs30:7 Ke kopa dilo di le pedi mo go wena; se nkganele ka tsona ke ise ke swe: 
Proverbs30:8 Bolotsana le mafoko a maaka di katose mo go nna. Se mphe lehuma le e seng lehumo. Mphe dijo tse di ntekanyeng," 
Proverbs30:9 e se re gongwe ka kgora, ka go itatola ka re: “Morena ke mang?” E se re gongwe ka humanega, ka utswa, ka senya leina la Modimo wa me." 
Proverbs30:10 Se sebe motlhanka mo go mongwagwe, e se re gongwe a go roga, mme wa nna molato." 
Proverbs30:11 Go na le batho bangwe ba ba rogang borraabo, ba ba sa tshegofatseng bommaabo;" 
Proverbs30:12 ke ba ba ithayang ba re, ba phepa, mme ba ise ba tlhapisiwe maswe a bone." 
Proverbs30:13 Batho bao – matlho a bona a ikgantsha jang ne! Dintshi tsa matlho a bona di supa boikgodiso jang ne! 
Proverbs30:14 Batho bao – meno a bona ke ditšhaka, meno a ditlhaya tsa bona ke dithipa, ba ja babogisegi mo lefatsheng le go tlosa bahumanegi mo bathong." 
Proverbs30:15 Kgofa e na le bomorwadia-yona ba le babedi ba ba reng: “Mphe! Mphe!” Go na le dilo di le tharo tse di sa kgoreng; ee, di le nne tse di sa reng: “Go ntse!”" 
Proverbs30:16 Ke felo ga baswi le moopa le lefatshe le le sa kgoreng metsi le molelo o o sa reng: “Go lekanye.” 
Proverbs30:17 Leitlho le le sotlang rraalo, le le nyatsang go utlwa mmaalo, magakabe a molatswana a tla le gonya, manongnyana a tla le ja." 
Proverbs30:18 Go dilo di le tharo tse di mpalelang; ee, di le nne tse ke sa di itseng." 
Proverbs30:19 Ke tsela ya lenong kwa loaping, le tsela ya noga mo lefikeng, le tsela ya mokoro mo lewatleng, le tsela ya monna yo o nang le mosadi yo mošwa." 
Proverbs30:20 Tsela ya mosadi yo o senyang nyalo e ntse jaana: Fa a jele, o iphimola molomo a re: “Ga ke a dira molato.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Lefatshe le roroma ka dilo di le tharo; ee, le palelwa ke go itshokela dilo di le nne:" 
Proverbs30:22 Ke motlhanka, fa a nna kgosi; le seeleele, fa se kgora dijo;" 
Proverbs30:23 le lefetwa, fa le nyalwa; le lelata, fa le leleka mohumagadi wa lone." 
Proverbs30:24 Dilo di le nne di dinnye mo lefatsheng, mme di botlhale thata, ke tse:" 
Proverbs30:25 Ditshoswane ke morafe o o seng thata, mme di tle di baakanye dijo tsa tsona selemo;" 
Proverbs30:26 dipela ke morafe o o sa tiang, mme di tle di ikagele matlo mo mafikeng;" 
Proverbs30:27 tsie ga e na kgosi, mme segopa sotlhe sa yona se bolola ka thulaganyo;" 
Proverbs30:28 mokgantitswane ò ka o tshwara ka diatla, mme o mo matlong a dikgosi." 
Proverbs30:29 Go dilo di le tharo tse di gwantang sentle, ee, dilo di le nne tse di tsamao e ntle, ke tse:" 
Proverbs30:30 Tau ke mogale mo gare ga dibata; ga e tshabe sepe; 
Proverbs30:31 mokoko o gwanta mo gare ga dikgogo; le phoko e etelela letsomane pele; le kgosi e bolotsa mephato ya yona. 
Proverbs30:32 Fa o dirile bosilo ka go ikgodisa, gongwe fa o logile maano a a bosula baya seatla mo molomong!" 
Proverbs30:33 Gonne go fetlha lobebe go ntsha serethe; go pitla dinko go ntsha madi; go tlhotlheletsa bogale go tsosa tlhabano. 
Proverbs31:1 Mafoko a kgosi Lemuele, e leng diane tse mmaagwe o di mo rutileng a re:" 
Proverbs31:2 “Wena morwaaka wa ntlha, nka go raya ka reng? Morwaaka yo ke go belegeng, nka reng? Morwa maikano a me, nka reng?" 
Proverbs31:3 Se neele basadi thata ya gago; basadi ba ba senyang dikgosi ò se ba neele lorato lwa gago. 
Proverbs31:4 Ga go a tshwanela dikgosi, Lemuele, ga go a tshwanela dikgosi go nwa weine; ga go a tshwanela barena go eletsa bojalwa," 
Proverbs31:5 e se re gongwe, fa ba a nwa, ba lebala molao, ba sokamisa tshiamelo ya babogisegi botlhe." 
Proverbs31:6 Nayang yo o batlileng go latlhega bojalwa, lo nee yo o pelo-e-botlhoko weine," 
Proverbs31:7 a nwe, a lebale khumanego ya gagwe, mme a se ka a tlhola a gopola tapisego ya gagwe." 
Proverbs31:8 “Buelela semumu, o emele tshiamo ya masiela otlhe." 
Proverbs31:9 Bula molomo wa gago, o atlhole ka tshiamo, o siamisetse mmogisegi le mohumanegi.”" 
Proverbs31:10 Mosadi yo o maatlametlo o bonwa ke mang? Kana ene ke lehumo le le gaisang ditalama tsa tlhwatlhwa e kgolo. 
Proverbs31:11 Pelo ya monna wa gagwe e ntse e mo ikanya; mme monna ga a nke a tlhoka tswelelopele. 
Proverbs31:12 Mosadi o ntse a mo direla tse di molemo, e seng tse di bosula, ka malatsi otlhe a bophelo jwa gagwe." 
Proverbs31:13 O a tle a tlhoafalele boboa le letseta; a dire ka diatla tsa gagwe ka bopelotshweu. 
Proverbs31:14 O tshwana le mekoro ya morekisi: O ya go tsaya dijo tsa gagwe kwa kgakala. 
Proverbs31:15 O a tle a tsoge e sa le bosigo, a fe ba lapa la gagwe dijo, a laela malata a gagwe tiro ya letsatsi." 
Proverbs31:16 Fa a batla tshimo, a e reke; a tlhome ditlhare tsa moweine ka papadi ya diatla tsa gagwe." 
Proverbs31:17 Thata ya gagwe o a tle a e dire moitlamo wa letheka la gagwe, a tie mabogo." 
Proverbs31:18 O lemoga fa go bapala ga gagwe go tswelela pele; lobone lwa gagwe ga lo time bosigo. 
Proverbs31:19 Diatla tsa gagwe di a tle di tshware seotlhi, di fete di sutisetse tlhale kwa pele." 
Proverbs31:20 O a tle a huporololele mmogisegi seatla, a ntshetse mohumanegi mabogo." 
Proverbs31:21 Ga a boifele ba lapa la gagwe serame, gonne botlhe ba ba mo lapeng la gagwe ba apesitswe tse di tlhatlagantsweng." 
Proverbs31:22 O a tle a itirele diphate, diaparo tsa gagwe ke tsa masela a mantle le a mahibidu." 
Proverbs31:23 Monna wa gagwe o tlotlega mo makgotleng, fa a nna le banna bagolo ba morafe." 
Proverbs31:24 O a tle a roke dihempe, a di rekise, a ise meitlamo kwa bareking." 
Proverbs31:25 Thata le tlotlego ke diaparo tsa gagwe; o a tle a itumelele letsatsi le le tlang. 
Proverbs31:26 O a tle a tswe molomo ka botlhale; thuto e e natefang e mo lolemeng lwa gagwe. 
Proverbs31:27 O tlhokomela tse di dirwang mo lapeng la gagwe; ga a je dijo tsa botshwakga. 
Proverbs31:28 Bomorwawe ba nanoge ba re: “Ò tlhogonolo!” Le monna wa gagwe a mmoke, a re:" 
Proverbs31:29 “Basadi ba bantsi ba dirile ka maatlametlo, mme wena o ba phala botlhe!”" 
Proverbs31:30 Boeletsego bo a tsietsa, bontle ke phefo fela, mme mosadi yo o boifang Morena o tla bakwa." 
Proverbs31:31 A a je leungo la diatla tsa gagwe. A a bakwe mo makgotleng ka ditiro tsa gagwe. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Mafoko a Moreri morwa Dafita, kgosi ya kwa Jerusalema." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 A boithamako jwa maithamako! Go bua Moreri. A boithamako jwa maithamako! Dilo tsotlhe ke tsa boithamako. 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Matsapa otlhe a motho o itapisang ka ona fa tlase ga letsatsi a mo thusa eng? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Losika longwe lo a tloga, lo longwe lo a goroga; ke lefatshe fela le le tlhomameng ka bosakhutleng." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Letsatsi le a tlhaba, letsatsi le a phirima, le itlhaganelela kwa felong ga lone kwa le tla tlhabang teng gape." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Phefo e ya kwa borwa e be e retologela kwa bokone; e foka e ntse e dikologa-dikologa; phefo e be e boele gape kwa e neng e tswa teng. 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Dinoka tsotlhe di elelela kwa lewatleng, mme lewatle ga le tlale; e bile dinoka di boela gape kwa di neng di tswa teng." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Dilo tsotlhe di na le matsapa a tsona; motho ga a kgone go tlhalosa. Leitlho ga le kgore go bona, le tsebe ga e tladiwe ke go utlwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Tse di kileng tsa nna teng di tla be di nne teng gape; tse di kileng tsa dirafala ke tsona tse di tla dirafalang gape. Ga go na sepe se sešwa fa tlase ga letsatsi. 
Ecclesiastes1:10 A go na le sengwe se go ka tweng: “Bonang, se sešwa ke se”? Nnyaya! Kana se kile sa nna teng mo metlheng e e fetileng, rona re ise re nne teng." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Ba bogologolo ga ba tlhole ba gopolwa; mme ba metlha e e tlang le bone ba tla lebalwa ke ba ba tla ba latelang. 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Nna Moreri ke ne ke le kgosi ya Iseraele mo Jerusalema. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ke ne ke ikaeletse go lotolotsa le go tlhotlhomisa ka botlhale dilo tsotlhe tse di dirwang fa tlase ga legodimo. Ke tiro e e makete e Modimo o e neetseng batho gore ba itapise ka yona. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ka bona ditiro tsotlhe tse di dirwang fa tlase ga letsatsi; ka fitlhela tsotlhe e le tsa boithamako le go tshwara lephoro fela. 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Tse di kgopameng ga di ka ke tsa tlhamaladiwa; tse di tlhokafalang ga di kgone go balwa. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ke ne ka ithaya ka re: “Ruri, ke bonye botlhale jo bogolo, ka ba ka nna ka bo oketsa bogolo go botlhe ba ba neng ba busa mo Jerusalema pele ga me. Ee, pelo ya me ya bona botlhale jo bontsi le kitso e kgolo.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Jaanong ya re ke ineela ka pelo go itse botlhale le go itse botsenwa le bosilo, ka lemoga gore le gona ke go tshwara lephoro fela." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Gonne botlhale jo bogolo bo na le tshwenyego e kgolo; gape yo o oketsang kitso o oketsa botlhoko. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Nkile ka ithaya mo pelong ka re: “Ahee! Ke tla leka go itumela le go ja monate.” Ka fitlhela le gona e le phefo fela. 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ka bua ka ga setshego ka re: “Ke botsenwa;” le ka ga boitumelo ka re: “Bo thusa eng?” 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ka ikakanya ka re: “Ke tla lapolosa mmele wa me ka weine – fela a tlhaloganyo e ntsamaise ka botlhale! – ke tla itshola ka bosilo go fitlhelela ke bone tse di leng molemo mo bathong, tse ba tshwanetseng go di dira fa tlase ga legodimo ka malatsi a a baletsweng maphelo a bone.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ka dira ditiro tse dikgolo, ka ikagela matlo, ka itirela masimo a moweine." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Ka itemela masimo le dikgwa tse di kgabisang, le ditlhare tsa maungo tsa mefutafuta, ka di tlhoma teng." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Ka itirela matsha a metsi go nosetsa sekgwa sa ditlhare tse di tlhomilweng. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ka reka batlhanka le malata. Ka bona batlhanka ba ba tsaletsweng mo ntlong ya me, le gona ka rua motlhape o mogolo wa dikgomo le letsomane le legolo la dinku bogolo go botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo Jerusalema pele ga me." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Le gona ka ikgobokanyetsa selefera le gouta le letlotlo la dikgosi le la dinaga; ka ipatlela baopedi ba banna le ba basadi le monate wa bomorwa-batho, e leng baratiwa ba le bantsi." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ka nna mogolo, ka nna ka golela pele, ka phala botlhe ba ba neng ba le mo Jerusalema pele ga me. Le gona botlhale jwa me jwa sala mo go nna." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Tsotlhe tse matlho a me a neng a di eletsa ga ke a ka ka a ganela ka tsona le e seng go tima pelo ya me boitumelo bope; ruri pelo ya me e ne e itumelela matsapa otlhe a me. E ne e le tsona tuelo ya me mo tapisegong yotlhe ya me. 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Jaanong ya re ke leba ditiro tsotlhe tsa me tse di dirilweng ke diatla tsa me le matsapa a ke itapisitseng mo tirong ka ona, ka fitlhela tsotlhe e le tsa boithamako fela, e le go tshwara lephoro fela di se na mosola fa tlase ga letsatsi." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ka retologa go lemoga botlhale le botsenwa le boeleele. – Kana motho yo o latelang kgosi o ka dira eng se se iseng se dirwe? 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ka lemoga gore botlhale bo gaisa bosilo jaaka lesedi le phala lefifi. 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Motlhalefi o na le matlho mo tlhogong ya gagwe, mme lesilo le sepela mo lefifing. Mme le gona ka lemoga gore tatlhego e ba wela botlhe ka go tshwana." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ka ba ka akanya mo pelong ka re: “Tse di welang lesilo, le nna di tla nkwela. Go nthusa eng, fa ke tlhalefile thata?” Ka ba ka ithaya mo pelong ka re: “Selo se le sona ke boithamako fela.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Gonne yo o botlhale le yo o bosilo ga ba kitla ba gopolwa ka bosakhutleng. Ka malatsi a a tlang ba tla bo ba sa bolo go lebalwa botlhe. Ijoo! Motlhalefi o tla swa fela jaaka lesilo! 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ka moo ka ila bophelo; gonne tiro e e dirwang fa tlase ga letsatsi e ne e le botlhoko mo go nna. Gonne tsotlhe ke boithamako fela, ke go tshwara lephoro fela." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ka ba ka ila tsotlhe tse ke di itiretseng ka matsapa fa tlase ga letsatsi. Gonne ke na le go di tlogelela motho yo o tla nnang teng morago ga me. 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Go itse mang gore: A o tla nna botlhale gongwe bosilo? Mme o tla busa tsotlhe tse ke di itapiseditseng, ka di itirela ka botlhale fa tlase ga letsatsi. Le tseo ke boithamako fela." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ka ntlha ya moo ka tlhobogisa pelo ya me matsapa otlhe a ke itapisitseng ka ona fa tlase ga letsatsi. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Gonne fa motho yo o itapiseditseng tsa gagwe ka botlhale le ka kitso le ka botswerere a na le go di tlogelela motho yo mongwe boswa yo a sa di itapisetsang, le gona moo ke boithamako fela le botlhoko jo bogolo." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Kana motho o bona eng ka matsapa otlhe a gagwe le ka tshwenyego ya pelo ya gagwe tse o itapisang ka tsona fa tlase ga letsatsi? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Gonne matlhoko le tshwenyego ke tsa gagwe ka malatsi otlhe; le bosigo pelo ya gagwe ga e ikhutse. Selo se le sona ke boithamako fela. 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Motho ga a na tse di molemo tse di gaisang go ja le go nwa le go jesa pelo ya gagwe monate mo tapisegong ya gagwe. Mme ke lemogile gore selo se le sona se tswa mo seatleng sa Modimo. 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Gonne go ka ja mang, go ka nwa mang kwa ntle ga ona?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Gonne motho yo o o kgatlhang o mo naya botlhale le kitso le boitumelo. Mme tiro e o e neelang moleofi ke go phutha le go kgobokanya tse di tla neelwang yo o siameng fa pele ga Modimo. Le selo se ke boithamako fela le go tshwara lephoro. 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Sengwe le sengwe se na le nako ya sona. Maikaelelo mangwe le mangwe a na le sebaka sa ona fa tlase ga legodimo. 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Go na le sebaka sa go tsalwa le sebaka sa go swa; sebaka sa go tlhoma le sebaka sa go kumola tse di tlhomilweng; 
Ecclesiastes3:3 sebaka sa go bolaya le sebaka sa go alafa; sebaka sa go rutla le sebaka sa go aga; 
Ecclesiastes3:4 sebaka sa go lela le sebaka sa go tshega; sebaka sa go hutsafala le sebaka sa go bina; 
Ecclesiastes3:5 sebaka sa go latlha matlapa le sebaka sa go phutha matlapa; sebaka sa go tlamparela le sebaka sa go katogana le go tlamparela; 
Ecclesiastes3:6 sebaka sa go batla le sebaka sa go latlhegelwa; sebaka sa go boloka le sebaka sa go latlha; 
Ecclesiastes3:7 sebaka sa go gagola le sebaka sa go roka; sebaka sa go didimala le sebaka sa go bua; 
Ecclesiastes3:8 sebaka sa go rata le sebaka sa go tlhoa; sebaka sa ntwa le sebaka sa kagiso. 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Tse modiri o itapisang ka tsona di mo thusa eng? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ke bonye tshwenyego e Modimo o e neetseng bomorwa-batho gore ba itapise ka yona. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 O dirile sengwe le sengwe sentle ka nako ya sona. Le gona o tsentse bosakhutleng mo dipelong tsa bone. Fela batho ga ba kgone go lemoga tiro e Modimo o e dirang go tswa tshimologong go ya bokhutlong. 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ke a itse gore ga go na tse di ba siametseng sentle, fa e se go itumela le go dira tse di molemo mo maphelong a bone." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Le gona motho mongwe le mongwe, fa a ja, a nwa, a ja monate mo tapisegong yotlhe ya gagwe, ke neo ya Modimo." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ke a itse gore tsotlhe tse Modimo o di dirang di tla nna ka bosakhutleng. Ga di ka ke tsa okediwa le e seng go fokodiwa. Mme Modimo o dirile jalo gore batho ba tle ba o boife. 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Tse di leng teng ga di bolo go nna teng; tse di tla nnang teng di tla bo di kile tsa nna teng. Modimo o tla tsosa tse di fetileng. 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Le gona fa tlase ga legodimo ke bonye boikepo bo le mo felong ga tshiamo le tshiamololo e le mo felong ga molao. 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ka ba ka gopola mo pelong ka re: “Modimo o tla atlhola mosiami le moikepi; gonne maikaelelo mangwe le mangwe le tiro nngwe le nngwe di na le sebaka sa tsona.” 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ka ba ka akanya mo pelong ka re: “Ke ka ntlha ya bomorwa-batho gore Modimo o tle o ba leke, mme bone ba ipone, fa bone e le diphologolo ka fa ba ntseng ka teng.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Gonne tse di dirafalelang bana ba batho di dirafalela le diphologolo. Tatlhego ya bone e tshwana fela le ya tsone: Ba swa jaaka di swa. Mowa wa bophelo o le mongwe o mo go bone le mo go tsone. Ga go na sepe se motho o gaisang diphologolo ka sona. Gonne tsotlhe ke boithamako fela. 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Dilo tsotlhe di ya mo felong go le gongwe; tsotlhe di tswa mo leroleng, tsotlhe di boela mo leroleng." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ke mang yo o itseng gore mewa ya bana ba batho e tlhatlogela kwa godimo le gore mewa ya diphologolo e fologela kwa tlase mo lefatsheng? 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ke lemogile gore ga go na lesego lepe le le phalang la motho yo o itumelelang ditiro tsa gagwe; gonne ke yona kabelo ya gagwe. Gonne ke mang yo o ka mo isang kwa o tla itumelelang teng tse di tla dirafalang morago ga gagwe? 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ka boa ka bona dikgatelelo tsotlhe tse di dirwang fa tlase ga letsatsi; ka bona dikeledi tsa ba ba gateletsweng, mme ba se na mogomotsi. Bagateledi ba bone ba ne ba le thata, mme bone ba se na yo o ka ba gomotsang." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ka ba ka re: “Baswi ba ba sa bolong go swa ba tlhogonolo bogolo go baphedi ba ba sa ntseng ba phela. 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Mme yo o tlhogonolo go ba phala ka bobedi jwa bona ke yo o iseng a nne teng; yo o iseng a bone ditiro tse di bosula tse di dirwang fa tlase ga letsatsi.” 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Ka ba ka lemoga gore matsapa otlhe le botswerere jotlhe mo tirong di tswa mo lefufeng la motho yo o fufegelang mongwe-ka-ene. Ka re: “Selo se le sona ke boithamako fela le go tshwara lephoro.” 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Lesilo le ikgonara mabogo, le ije nama." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Seatla se se tletseng boikhutso se gaisa diatla tse pedi tse di tletseng tapisego le go tshwara lephoro. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Ka ba ka bona boithamako gape fa tlase ga letsatsi; 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Go na le mongwe a le esi a se na yo mongwe; le gona ga a na morwawe le fa e le morwa-rraagwe. Mme matsapa otlhe a gagwe ga a fele; matlho a gagwe ga a kgore khumo. Ga a akanye gore, ke itapisetsa mang, fa ke itima tse di monate? Le selo se ke boithamako fela le tshwenyego e e botlhoko." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Ba le babedi ba phala a le mongwe, gonne ba bona tuelo e e molemo ka matsapa a bone;" 
Ecclesiastes4:10 gonne fa ba wa, mongwe o tla tsosa molekane wa gagwe. Mme a tatlhego ya gagwe wee yo o wang, a se na yo mongwe yo o ka mo tsosang!" 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Le gona fa ba le babedi ba robala mmogo ba a thuthafala. Mme a le mongwe a ka thuthafala jang?
